Genesis43:16 Rĩrĩa Jusufu onire Benjamini arĩ hamwe nao-rĩ
Genesis43:17 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jusufu aamwĩrĩte
Genesis43:18 Nao andũ acio nĩmamakire maatwarwo gwake mũciĩ. Magĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
Genesis43:19 Tondũ ũcio makĩambata magĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũnene wa nyũmba ya Jusufu
Genesis43:20 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis43:21 No harĩa twarũgamire tũrarĩrĩre-rĩ
Genesis43:22 Na ningĩ nĩtuoka na betha ingĩ cia kũgũra irio. Tũtiũĩ nũũ wekĩrire betha ciitũ makũnia-inĩ maitũ.”
Genesis43:23 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis43:24 Ningĩ mũnene ũcio wa nyũmba ya Jusufu akĩmatwara mũciĩ kwa Jusufu
Genesis43:25 Nao makĩhaarĩria iheo ciao cia kũhe Jusufu ooka mĩaraho
Genesis43:26 Rĩrĩa Jusufu ookire mũciĩ-rĩ
Genesis43:27 Nake akĩmahooya ũhoro
Genesis43:28 Makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis43:29 Na aaroranga akĩona mũrũ wa nyina Benjamini
Genesis43:30 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis43:31 Na aarĩkia gwĩthamba ũthiũ akiuma
Genesis43:32 Makĩigĩra Jusufu irio ciake arĩ wiki
Genesis43:33 Andũ acio maaikarĩtio mbere yake kũringana na ũkũrũ wao
Genesis43:34 Rĩrĩa maihũrĩirwo irio kuuma metha-inĩ ya Jusufu-rĩ
Genesis44:1 Nake Jusufu agĩatha mũnene wa nyũmba yake
Genesis44:2 Ningĩ wĩkĩre gĩkombe gĩakwa kĩrĩa kĩa betha mũromo-inĩ wa ikũnia rĩa ũrĩa mũnini biũ wao
Genesis44:3 Rũciinĩ gwakĩa-rĩ
Genesis44:4 Matanathiĩ kũraya na itũũra rĩu inene-rĩ
Genesis44:5 Githĩ gĩkombe gĩkĩ tikĩo mwathi wakwa anyuuaga nakĩo na akaragũra nakĩo? Ũndũ ũyũ mwĩkĩte nĩ ũndũ mũũru mũno.’ ”
Genesis44:6 Na rĩrĩa aamakinyĩrire-rĩ
Genesis44:7 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis44:8 Ithuĩ o na nĩtũragũcookeirie betha iria twakorire mĩromo-inĩ ya makũnia maitũ kuuma bũrũri wa Kaanani; nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩtũma tũiye betha kana thahabu kuuma nyũmba ya mwathi waku?
Genesis44:9 Ndungata o na ĩmwe yaku yakorwo ĩrĩ nakĩo-rĩ
Genesis44:10 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis44:11 O mũndũ o mũndũ agĩikũrũkia ikũnia rĩake thĩ na ihenya na akĩrĩtumũra.
Genesis44:12 Nake mũnene ũcio wa nyũmba ya Jusufu akĩambĩrĩria gũcaria gĩkombe
Genesis44:13 Nao moona ũguo-rĩ
Genesis44:14 Jusufu aarĩ o kũu nyũmba rĩrĩa Juda na ariũ a ithe maatoonyire kuo. Nao makĩĩgũithia thĩ mbere yake.
Genesis44:15 Jusufu akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis44:16 Juda akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis44:17 No Jusufu akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis44:18 No Juda agĩthiĩ harĩ we
Genesis44:19 Mwathi wakwa
Genesis44:20 Na ithuĩ tũgĩgũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis44:21 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkĩĩra ndungata ciaku atĩrĩ
Genesis44:22 Na ithuĩ tũkĩĩra mwathi witũ atĩrĩ
Genesis44:23 No wee werire ndungata ciaku atĩrĩ
Genesis44:24 Na twainũka kũrĩ ndungata yaku ũcio ithe witũ
Genesis44:25 “Ningĩ ithe witũ agĩtwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:26 No ithuĩ tũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:27 “Nayo ndungata yaku ũcio ithe witũ agĩtwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:28 Ũmwe wacio nĩathiire na ndacooke
Genesis44:29 Mũngĩoya ũyũ ũngĩ nake akoone mũtino-rĩ
Genesis44:30 “Na rĩrĩ
Genesis44:31 oone atĩ kamwana gaka tũtirĩ nako
Genesis44:32 Niĩ ndungata yaku-rĩ
Genesis44:33 “Na rĩu ndagũthaitha ũreke niĩ ndungata yaku ndigwo gũkũ nduĩke ngombo ya mwathi wakwa handũ ha kamwana gaka
Genesis44:34 Ingĩhota atĩa kũinũka kũrĩ baba itarĩ na kamwana gaka? Aca! Ndũkareke ngoone kĩeha kĩrĩa kĩngĩnyiita baba.”
Genesis45:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jusufu akĩremwo nĩ kwĩyũmĩrĩria mbere ya arĩa othe maamũtungataga
Genesis45:2 Na akĩrĩra anĩrĩire o nginya andũ a Misiri makĩmũigua
Genesis45:3 Jusufu akĩĩra ariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis45:4 Ningĩ Jusufu akĩĩra ariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis45:5 Na rĩu
Genesis45:6 Handũ-inĩ ha mĩaka ĩĩrĩ rĩu gũkoretwo na ngʼaragu bũrũri-inĩ
Genesis45:7 No Ngai aandũmire mbere yanyu nĩguo ndũme matigari manyu matũũre gũkũ thĩ
Genesis45:8 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Genesis45:9 Na rĩu hiũhai mũcooke kũrĩ baba mũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Genesis45:10 Ũgũtũũra bũrũri wa Gosheni na ũkorwo ũrĩ hakuhĩ na niĩ
Genesis45:11 Kũu nĩkuo ndĩrĩgũteithagĩria tondũ kũrĩ na mĩaka ĩngĩ ĩtano ya ngʼaragu ĩtigarĩte. Kwaga ũguo wee na nyũmba yaku na andũ arĩa othe makwĩgiĩ nĩmũgũtuĩka athĩĩnĩki.’
Genesis45:12 “Inyuĩ nĩmũreyonera
Genesis45:13 Na mwĩre baba ũhoro wa gĩtĩĩo kĩrĩa gĩothe heetwo gũkũ Misiri
Genesis45:14 Ningĩ akĩhĩmbĩria mũrũ wa nyina Benjamini na akĩrĩra
Genesis45:15 Na akĩmumunya ariũ a ithe othe na akĩmahĩmbĩria akĩrĩraga. Thuutha ũcio ariũ a ithe makĩaranĩria nake.
Genesis45:16 Na rĩrĩa ũhoro ũcio waiguirwo nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki ya Firaũni
Genesis45:17 Firaũni akĩĩra Jusufu atĩrĩ
Genesis45:18 na mũndehere ithe wanyu na andũ a nyũmba cianyu. Na niĩ nĩngamũhe kũndũ kũrĩa kwega mũno bũrũri-inĩ wa Misiri
Genesis45:19 “Ningĩ nĩwathĩrĩrio ũmeere atĩrĩ: ‘Ĩkai ũũ: Oyai makaari mamwe kuuma gũkũ Misiri nĩ ũndũ wa ciana na atumia anyu
Genesis45:20 Na mũtigatindanĩre na indo cianyu tondũ maũndũ mothe marĩa mega mũno ma Misiri megũtuĩka manyu.’ ”
Genesis45:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ariũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka o ro ũguo. Jusufu akĩmahe makaari o ta ũrĩa Firaũni aathanĩte na agĩcooka akĩmahe rĩĩgu wa rũgendo rwao.
Genesis45:22 Ningĩ akĩhe o mũndũ o mũndũ wao nguo njerũ
Genesis45:23 Na indo ici nĩcio aatũmĩire ithe: Ndigiri ikũmi ikuuĩte indo iria njega mũno cia Misiri
Genesis45:24 Agĩcooka akiumagaria ariũ a ithe
Genesis45:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩambata makiuma Misiri
Genesis45:26 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis45:27 No rĩrĩa maamwĩrire maũndũ marĩa mothe Jusufu aamerĩte
Genesis45:28 Nake Isiraeli akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis46:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Isiraeli akiumagara na indo ciothe iria aarĩ nacio
Genesis46:2 Nake Ngai akĩarĩria Isiraeli na kĩoneki ũtukũ
Genesis46:3 Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis46:4 O na nĩngũikũrũkania nawe kũu Misiri
Genesis46:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jakubu akiuma Birishiba
Genesis46:6 O na ningĩ magĩthiĩ na mahiũ mao na indo iria ciothe maagĩĩte nacio marĩ kũu Kaanani
Genesis46:7 Aathiire Misiri na ariũ ake na tũmwana twa ariũ ake
Genesis46:8 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Isiraeli (Jakubu na njiaro ciake) arĩa maathiire Misiri: Rubeni irigithathi rĩa Jakubu.
Genesis46:9 Ariũ a Rubeni maarĩ: Hanoku
Genesis46:10 Ariũ a Simeoni maarĩ: Jemueli
Genesis46:11 Ariũ a Lawi maarĩ: Gerishoni
Genesis46:12 Ariũ a Juda maarĩ: Eri
Genesis46:13 Ariũ a Isakaru maarĩ: Tola
Genesis46:14 Ariũ a Zebuluni maarĩ: Seredi
Genesis46:15 Acio nĩo ariũ arĩa Lea aaciarĩire Jakubu kũu Padani-Aramu
Genesis46:16 Ariũ a Gadi maarĩ: Zifioni
Genesis46:17 Nao Ariũ a Asheri maarĩ: Imuna
Genesis46:18 Icio nĩcio ciana iria ciaciarĩirwo Jakubu nĩ Zilipa
Genesis46:19 Ariũ a Rakeli mũtumia wa Jakubu maarĩ: Jusufu na Benjamini.
Genesis46:20 Nake Jusufu arĩ kũu Misiri
Genesis46:21 Nao ariũ a Benjamini maarĩ: Bela
Genesis46:22 Acio nĩo ariũ a Rakeli arĩa maaciarĩirwo Jakubu othe maarĩ andũ ikũmi na ana.
Genesis46:23 Mũriũ wa Dani aarĩ: Hushimu.
Genesis46:24 Nao Ariũ a Nafitali maarĩ: Jahazeeli
Genesis46:25 Acio nĩo ariũ arĩa maaciarĩirwo Jakubu nĩ Biliha ũrĩa Labani aaheete mwarĩ Rakeli
Genesis46:26 Andũ othe arĩa maathiire na Jakubu Misiri
Genesis46:27 Hamwe na ariũ arĩa eerĩ a Jusufu arĩa aaciarĩire Misiri
Genesis46:28 Nake Jakubu agĩtũma Juda athiĩ mbere yake kũrĩ Jusufu nĩgeetha athĩrĩrwo njĩra ya gũthiĩ Gosheni. Rĩrĩa maakinyire bũrũri wa Gosheni
Genesis46:29 Jusufu akĩhaarĩria ngaari yake ya mbarathi
Genesis46:30 Nake Isiraeli akĩĩra Jusufu atĩrĩ
Genesis46:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jusufu akĩĩra ariũ a ithe na andũ a nyũmba ya ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis46:32 Andũ acio nĩ arĩithi; marĩithagia mahiũ
Genesis46:33 Na rĩrĩa Firaũni arĩmwĩta na amũũrie atĩrĩ
Genesis46:34 mwagĩrĩirwo mũmũcookerie atĩrĩ
Genesis47:1 Jusufu agĩthiĩ akĩĩra Firaũni atĩrĩ
Genesis47:2 Ningĩ agĩthuura ariũ a ithe atano na akĩmatwara mbere ya Firaũni.
Genesis47:3 Firaũni akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis47:4 Ningĩ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis47:5 Firaũni akĩĩra Jusufu atĩrĩ
Genesis47:6 na bũrũri wa Misiri ũrĩ mbere yaku; he thoguo na ariũ a thoguo mwena ũrĩa mwega mũno wa bũrũri ũyũ. Reke maikare Gosheni. Na rĩrĩ
Genesis47:7 Ningĩ Jusufu akĩrehe ithe Jakubu mbere ya Firaũni. Na Jakubu aarĩkia kũrathima Firaũni-rĩ
Genesis47:8 Firaũni akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis47:9 Nake Jakubu akĩĩra Firaũni atĩrĩ
Genesis47:10 Jakubu agĩcooka akĩrathima Firaũni na akĩehera akiuma hau Firaũni aarĩ.
Genesis47:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu akĩhe ithe na ariũ a ithe ũtũũro kũu Misiri na akĩmahe mĩgũnda mwena ũrĩa mwega mũno wa bũrũri ũcio
Genesis47:12 Ningĩ Jusufu nĩaheaga ithe na ariũ a ithe na andũ a nyũmba ya ithe othe irio kũringana na mũigana wa ciana ciao.
Genesis47:13 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis47:14 Jusufu akĩũngania mbeeca iria ciothe ingĩonekire bũrũri wa Misiri na wa Kaanani
Genesis47:15 Na rĩrĩa mbeeca cia andũ a Misiri na cia andũ a Kaanani ciathirire-rĩ
Genesis47:16 Nake Jusufu akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis47:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtwarĩra Jusufu mahiũ mao
Genesis47:18 Naguo mwaka ũcio wathira-rĩ
Genesis47:19 Tũngĩgĩkua ũtwĩroreire nĩkĩ
Genesis47:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu akĩgũrĩra Firaũni bũrũri wothe wa Misiri. Nao andũ a Misiri makĩendia ithaka ciao
Genesis47:21 Nake Jusufu agĩgĩtua andũ ngombo kuuma mwena ũmwe wa Misiri nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ.
Genesis47:22 No rĩrĩ
Genesis47:23 Nake Jusufu akĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
Genesis47:24 No rĩrĩa mũkaagetha
Genesis47:25 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis47:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu akĩruta watho ũkoniĩ ithaka cia Misiri
Genesis47:27 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩtũũra Misiri bũrũri-inĩ wa Gosheni. Makĩgĩa na indo kuo na magĩciarana
Genesis47:28 Jakubu aikarire Misiri mĩaka ikũmi na mũgwanja
Genesis47:29 Na rĩrĩa ihinda rĩa Isiraeli rĩa gũkua rĩakuhĩrĩirie-rĩ
Genesis47:30 no rĩrĩa ngaahurũka hamwe na maithe makwa
Genesis47:31 Nake Isiraeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis48:1 Thuutha-inĩ ũcio Jusufu akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Genesis48:2 Na rĩrĩa Jakubu eerirwo atĩrĩ
Genesis48:3 Jakubu akĩĩra Jusufu atĩrĩ
Genesis48:4 akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis48:5 “Rĩu-rĩ
Genesis48:6 Ciana iria ingĩ ũngĩciarĩrwo thuutha wao nĩ ciaku; kũrĩa makagaya mageetanagio na marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a ithe wao.
Genesis48:7 Na rĩrĩa ndacookaga kuuma Padani
Genesis48:8 Na rĩrĩa Isiraeli onire ariũ a Jusufu
Genesis48:9 Jusufu akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis48:10 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis48:11 Isiraeli akĩĩra Jusufu atĩrĩ
Genesis48:12 Nake Jusufu akĩmaruta maru-inĩ ma Isiraeli
Genesis48:13 Jusufu akĩoya ariũ ake eerĩ
Genesis48:14 No Isiraeli agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo agĩkũigĩrĩra mũtwe wa Efiraimu
Genesis48:15 Ningĩ akĩrathima Jusufu
Genesis48:16 na Mũraika ũrĩa ũũhonoketie kuuma mĩtino-inĩ yothe
Genesis48:17 Na rĩrĩa Jusufu onire atĩ ithe aigĩrĩire guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo mũtwe-inĩ wa Efiraimu-rĩ
Genesis48:18 Jusufu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis48:19 No ithe akĩrega
Genesis48:20 Akĩmarathima mũthenya ũcio
Genesis48:21 Ningĩ Isiraeli akĩĩra Jusufu atĩrĩ
Genesis48:22 Nawe
Genesis49:1 Ningĩ Jakubu agĩtũmanĩra ariũ ake
Genesis49:2 “Ũnganai na mũthikĩrĩrie
Genesis49:3 “Rubeni
Genesis49:4 Wagagĩte ta maaĩ
Genesis49:5 “Simeoni na Lawi nĩ a nyina ũmwe
Genesis49:6 Ngoro yakwa ndũkanatoonye ndundu-inĩ yao
Genesis49:7 Marakara mao mahiũ mũno
Genesis49:8 “Juda
Genesis49:9 Juda
Genesis49:10 Rũthanju rwa ũthamaki rũtikoima harĩ Juda
Genesis49:11 Akoohagĩrĩra ndigiri yake mũthabibũ-inĩ
Genesis49:12 Maitho make makaira gũkĩra ndibei
Genesis49:13 “Zebuluni agaatũũra hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria
Genesis49:14 “Isakaru nĩ ndigiri ĩrĩa ĩrĩ hinya ĩkomete gatagatĩ ka mĩrigo ĩĩrĩ.
Genesis49:15 Rĩrĩa akoona ũrĩa ũhurũko wake ũrĩ mwega
Genesis49:16 “Dani agaaciirĩrĩra andũ ake na kĩhooto
Genesis49:17 Dani agaatuĩka ta nyoka ĩrĩ mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra
Genesis49:18 “Wee Jehova-rĩ
Genesis49:19 “Gadi nĩagatharĩkĩrwo nĩ ikundi cia atunyani
Genesis49:20 “Irio cia Asheri nĩ cia kũguna mwĩrĩ; na akaaheanaga irio njega ingĩkenia mũthamaki.
Genesis49:21 “Nafitali nĩ ta thiiya ya mũgoma ĩrekereirio
Genesis49:22 “Jusufu nĩ mũthabibũ ũrĩa ũciaraga
Genesis49:23 Aikia a mĩguĩ nĩmamũtharĩkĩire marĩ na marũrũ; makĩmũikĩria mĩguĩ marĩ na ũũru mũingĩ.
Genesis49:24 No ũta wake ndwenyenyekire
Genesis49:25 nĩ ũndũ wa Ngai wa thoguo
Genesis49:26 Irathimo cia thoguo nĩ makĩria ma irathimo cia irĩma iria cia tene
Genesis49:27 “Benjamini ahaana ta njũũi ĩrĩa ngoroku; kĩroko-inĩ atambuuraga kĩrĩa aguĩmĩte
Genesis49:28 Ĩyo yothe nĩyo mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya Isiraeli
Genesis49:29 Ningĩ Jakubu akĩmahe mawatho maya: “Ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkua. Mũgaathika harĩa maithe makwa mathikĩtwo
Genesis49:30 ngurunga ĩrĩa ĩrĩ gĩthaka-inĩ kĩa Makipela hakuhĩ na Mamure kũu Kaanani
Genesis49:31 Hau nĩho Iburahĩmu na mũtumia wake Sara maathikirwo
Genesis49:32 Gĩthaka kĩu na ngurunga ĩyo ciagũrirwo kuuma kũrĩ Ahethi.”
Genesis49:33 Nake Jakubu aarĩkia kũhe ariũ ake ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Genesis50:1 Nake Jusufu agĩkĩĩgũithia thĩ mbere ya ithe
Genesis50:2 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩatha athondekani arĩa maarĩ ndungata ciake mathondeke mwĩrĩ wa ithe Isiraeli nĩguo ndũkabuthe. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athondekani makĩmũthondeka
Genesis50:3 handũ ha ihinda rĩa thikũ mĩrongo ĩna
Genesis50:4 Namo matukũ ma kũmũcakaĩra maathira-rĩ
Genesis50:5 ‘Baba nĩatũmire ndĩĩhĩte na mwĩhĩtwa
Genesis50:6 Nake Firaũni akĩmũtũmanĩra
Genesis50:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu akĩambata agĩthiĩ gũthika ithe. Nao anene othe a Firaũni magĩthiĩ nake
Genesis50:8 o hamwe na andũ othe a nyũmba ya Jusufu
Genesis50:9 Thigari cia ngaari cia ita na cia mbarathi o na cio igĩthiĩ nake. Kĩarĩ gĩkundi kĩnene mũno kĩa andũ.
Genesis50:10 Nao maakinya ihuhĩro-inĩ rĩa ngano rĩa Atadi
Genesis50:11 Na rĩrĩa Akaanani arĩa maatũũraga kũu moonire macakaya macio hau ihuhĩro-inĩ rĩa ngano rĩa Atadi
Genesis50:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ariũ a Jakubu magĩĩka o ũrĩa aamaathĩte:
Genesis50:13 Makĩmũkuua makĩmũtwara bũrũri wa Kaanani
Genesis50:14 Thuutha wa gũthika ithe-rĩ
Genesis50:15 Na rĩrĩa ariũ a ithe moonire atĩ ithe wao nĩakua
Genesis50:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtũmana kũrĩ Jusufu makiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis50:17 ‘Ũũ nĩguo mũkeera Jusufu: ndagũthaitha ũrekere ariũ a thoguo mehia na mahĩtia marĩa meekire nĩ ũndũ nĩmagwĩkire ũũru mũno.’ Na rĩu twagũthaitha wohere ndungata cia Ngai wa thoguo mehia macio.” Na rĩrĩa ndũmĩrĩri yao yamũkinyĩire
Genesis50:18 Ariũ a ithe magĩcooka magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we
Genesis50:19 No Jusufu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis50:20 Inyuĩ mwaciirĩte kũnjĩka ũũru
Genesis50:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Genesis50:22 Jusufu agĩikara Misiri
Genesis50:23 na akĩona rũciaro rwa gatatũ rwa ciana cia Efiraimu. O na ciana cia Makiru mũrũ wa Manase ciaciarwo nĩciaigĩrĩirwo maru-inĩ ma Jusufu.
Genesis50:24 Ningĩ Jusufu akĩĩra ariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis50:25 Nake Jusufu agĩtũma ariũ a Isiraeli mehĩte na mwĩhĩtwa
Genesis50:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu agĩkua
Exodus1:1 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Isiraeli arĩa maathiire bũrũri wa Misiri hamwe na Jakubu
Exodus1:2 Nao nĩ Rubeni
Exodus1:3 Isakaru
Exodus1:4 Dani na Nafitali; Gadi na Asheri.
Exodus1:5 Njiaro cia Jakubu ciothe ciarĩ mĩrongo mũgwanja; nowe Jusufu
Exodus1:6 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus1:7 no andũ a Isiraeli magĩciarana na makĩingĩha mũno
Exodus1:8 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus1:9 Nake akĩĩra andũ ake atĩrĩ
Exodus1:10 Gĩũkei
Exodus1:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Misiri makĩmaigĩra arori a ngombo mamahinyĩrĩrie na ũndũ wa kũmarutithia wĩra wa hinya
Exodus1:12 No o ũrĩa maathiire na mbere kũhinyĩrĩrio-rĩ
Exodus1:13 na makĩmahinyĩrĩria na wĩra matekũmaiguĩra tha.
Exodus1:14 Andũ a Misiri magĩtũma mũtũũrĩre wa andũ a Isiraeli ũgĩe na ruo rũkĩru nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra mũritũ wa gũthondeka maturubarĩ na thimiti
Exodus1:15 Mũthamaki wa bũrũri wa Misiri akĩĩra Shifira na Pua
Exodus1:16 “Rĩrĩa mũrĩteithagia atumia a Ahibirania makĩgĩa ciana
Exodus1:17 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus1:18 Nake mũthamaki ũcio wa bũrũri wa Misiri agĩĩta aciarithania acio
Exodus1:19 Nao aciarithania acio magĩcookeria Firaũni atĩrĩ
Exodus1:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai agĩgĩtanahĩra aciarithania acio
Exodus1:21 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus1:22 Nake Firaũni agĩatha andũ ake othe atĩrĩ: “Kahĩĩ o gothe gaaciarwo nĩ Mũhibirania no nginya mũgagaikia Rũũĩ rwa Nili
Exodus2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus2:2 nake akĩgĩa nda
Exodus2:3 No rĩrĩa aaremirwo nĩgũkahitha rĩngĩ-rĩ
Exodus2:4 Mwarĩ wa nyina na kaana kau aarũgamaga haraaya nĩguo one ũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩgakora.
Exodus2:5 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus2:6 Agĩkunũra gĩkabũ kĩu na akĩona kaana kau. Agĩkaiguĩra tha tondũ nĩkarĩraga. Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus2:7 Nake mwarĩ wa nyina na kaana kau akĩũria mwarĩ wa Firaũni atĩrĩ
Exodus2:8 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus2:9 Mwarĩ wa Firaũni akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus2:10 Rĩrĩa kaana kau gaakũrire-rĩ
Exodus2:11 Thuutha wa Musa gũtuĩka mũndũ mũgima-rĩ
Exodus2:12 Nake acũthĩrĩria mĩena yothe na ndone mũndũ-rĩ
Exodus2:13 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ akiumagara na akĩona Ahibirania eerĩ makĩrũa. Akĩũria ũrĩa wogitanĩte atĩrĩ
Exodus2:14 Nake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus2:15 Rĩrĩa Firaũni aiguire ũhoro ũcio
Exodus2:16 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus2:17 Arĩithi amwe nĩmookire na makĩingata airĩtu acio
Exodus2:18 Rĩrĩa airĩtu acio maainũkire kũrĩ ithe wao Reueli-rĩ
Exodus2:19 Makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus2:20 Jethero akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Exodus2:21 Nake Musa agĩĩtĩkĩra gũikara kwa mũndũ ũcio
Exodus2:22 Zipora agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ
Exodus2:23 Thuutha wa ihinda iraaya-rĩ
Exodus2:24 Nake Ngai akĩigua gũcaaya kwao nake akĩririkana kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake na Iburahĩmu
Exodus2:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai akĩona gũtangĩka kwa andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus3:2 Arĩ kũu-rĩ
Exodus3:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa agĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
Exodus3:4 Rĩrĩa Jehova onire atĩ nĩathiĩ hau gũcũthĩrĩria
Exodus3:5 Nake Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus3:6 Ningĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus3:7 Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ; “Ti-itherũ nĩnyonete mĩnyamaro ya andũ akwa kũu bũrũri wa Misiri. Nĩnjiguĩte kĩrĩro kĩao nĩ ũndũ wa arũgamĩrĩri a ngombo arĩa mamahinyagĩrĩria
Exodus3:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩnjikũrũkĩte nĩguo ndĩmateithũre kuuma moko-inĩ ma andũ a Misiri
Exodus3:9 Na rĩu kĩrĩro kĩa andũ a Isiraeli nĩkĩnginyĩire
Exodus3:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Exodus3:11 No Musa akĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ
Exodus3:12 Nake Ngai agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus3:13 Musa akĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Exodus3:14 Ngai akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus3:15 Ningĩ Ngai agĩcooka akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus3:16 “Thiĩ
Exodus3:17 na nĩnduĩte nĩngũmũruta kuuma mĩnyamaro-inĩ yanyu kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus3:18 “Athuuri acio a Isiraeli nĩmagagũthikĩrĩria. Ningĩ wee na athuuri acio nĩmũgathiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa bũrũri wa Misiri na mũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Exodus3:19 No nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũthamaki ũcio wa bũrũri wa Misiri ndakamwĩtĩkĩria mũthiĩ
Exodus3:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngatambũrũkia guoko gwakwa hũũre andũ a Misiri na maũndũ mothe ma magegania marĩa ngeeka thĩinĩ wao. Thuutha ũcio
Exodus3:21 “Na nĩngatũma mwĩtĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri
Exodus3:22 Mũndũ-wa-nja o wothe Mũisiraeli nĩakahooya mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake
Exodus4:1 Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus4:2 Nake Jehova akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus4:3 Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus4:4 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus4:5 Nake Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus4:6 Ningĩ Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus4:7 Jehova agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus4:8 Ningĩ Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus4:9 No mangĩaga gwĩtĩkia ciama ici cierĩ kana mage gũkũigua-rĩ
Exodus4:10 Musa akĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Exodus4:11 Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus4:12 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus4:13 No Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus4:14 Namo marakara ma Jehova makĩrĩrĩmbũkĩra Musa
Exodus4:15 Ũrĩmwaragĩria na ũkamwĩra ũrĩa ekuuga
Exodus4:16 Nĩakaarĩria andũ handũ haku
Exodus4:17 No oya rũthanju rũrũ nĩguo ũhotage kũringa ciama naruo.”
Exodus4:18 Nake Musa agĩcooka kwa Jethero mũthoni-we
Exodus4:19 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus4:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa akĩoya mũtumia wake na ariũ ake
Exodus4:21 Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus4:22 Ningĩ wĩre Firaũni atĩrĩ
Exodus4:23 na nĩndakwĩrire atĩrĩ
Exodus4:24 Marĩ handũ harĩa mararĩrĩire marĩ rũgendo-inĩ-rĩ
Exodus4:25 No Zipora akĩoya kahiga kaarĩ kogĩ ta kahiũ
Exodus4:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova agĩtigana nake. (Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia ũcio wake oigire “ũrĩ mũthuuri wakwa wa thakame” aaragia ũhoro wa irua.)
Exodus4:27 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus4:28 Nake Musa akĩĩra Harũni ũrĩa wothe Jehova amũtũmĩte akoige
Exodus4:29 Musa na Harũni magĩcookanĩrĩria athuuri a Isiraeli othe
Exodus4:30 nake Harũni akĩmeera ũrĩa wothe Jehova eerĩte Musa. O na ningĩ Musa akĩringa ciama mbere yao;
Exodus4:31 nao magĩĩtĩkia. Na rĩrĩa maiguire atĩ Jehova nĩameciirĩtie na akona mĩnyamaro yao-rĩ
Exodus5:1 Thuutha-inĩ Musa na Harũni nĩmathiire kũrĩ Firaũni
Exodus5:2 Nake Firaũni akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Exodus5:3 Ningĩ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus5:4 No mũthamaki wa bũrũri wa Misiri akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Exodus5:5 Nake Firaũni akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus5:6 Mũthenya o ũcio Firaũni agĩatha arũgamĩrĩri a ngombo o na nyabaara cia andũ
Exodus5:7 “Mũtigacooke kũhe andũ a Isiraeli nyeki ya gũthondeka maturubarĩ; nĩmathiĩ magecarĩrie nyeki o ene.
Exodus5:8 No mũmeere atĩ no nginya mathondeke maturubarĩ mũigana o ta wa mbere; mũtikamanyiihĩrie gĩthimo. Nĩ igũũta; nĩkĩo mararĩra makoiga atĩrĩ
Exodus5:9 Maritũhĩriei wĩra nĩgeetha makoragwo makĩruta wĩra hĩndĩ ciothe
Exodus5:10 Nao arũgamĩrĩri a ngombo na nyabaara cia andũ magĩthiĩ makĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Exodus5:11 Thiĩi mũgecarĩrie nyeki yanyu kũrĩa guothe mũrĩmĩona
Exodus5:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ makĩhurunjũkĩra bũrũri wa Misiri guothe kũngania makoni ma ngano mamatũmĩre ta nyeki.
Exodus5:13 Arũgamĩrĩri a ngombo makĩmahinyĩrĩria mũno
Exodus5:14 Nao andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ nyabaara arĩa maathuurĩtwo nĩ anene a ngombo a Firaũni magakĩhũũragwo
Exodus5:15 Nao andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ nyabaara magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Firaũni kũmũthaitha
Exodus5:16 Ndungata ciaku itiraheo nyeki
Exodus5:17 Nake Firaũni agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus5:18 Cookai wĩra-inĩ. Mũtikũheo nyeki
Exodus5:19 Nao andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ nyabaara makĩmenya atĩ maarĩ thĩĩna-inĩ rĩrĩa meerirwo atĩrĩ
Exodus5:20 Rĩrĩa moimire harĩ Firaũni-rĩ
Exodus5:21 nao anyabara acio makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus5:22 Musa agĩcooka kũrĩ
Exodus5:23 Kuuma rĩrĩa ndaathiire kũrĩ Firaũni kũmwarĩria thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Exodus6:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus6:2 Ngai agĩcooka akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus6:3 Nĩ niĩ ndoimĩrĩire Iburahĩmu
Exodus6:4 O na nĩndathondekire kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa nao atĩ nĩngamahe bũrũri wa Kaanani
Exodus6:5 Na makĩria-rĩ
Exodus6:6 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Exodus6:7 Ngaamuoya ta andũ akwa kĩũmbe
Exodus6:8 Na nĩngamũtwara bũrũri ũrĩa ndeeranĩire na mwĩhĩtwa nyambararĩtie guoko atĩ nĩngaahe Iburahĩmu
Exodus6:9 Musa agĩkĩheana ũhoro ũcio kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus6:10 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus6:11 “Thiĩ wĩre Firaũni
Exodus6:12 No Musa akĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Exodus6:13 Ngai nĩacookire akĩaria na Musa na Harũni ũhoro wĩgiĩ andũ a Isiraeli na Firaũni mũthamaki wa bũrũri wa Misiri na akĩmaatha marute andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũri wa Misiri.
Exodus6:14 Aya nĩo maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao: Ariũ a Rubeni ũrĩa irigithathi rĩa Isiraeli maarĩ Hanoku na Palu
Exodus6:15 Ariũ a Simeoni maarĩ Jemueli
Exodus6:16 Maya nĩmo maarĩ marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Lawi kũringana na maandĩko mao: Gerishoni
Exodus6:17 Ariũ a Gerishoni kũringana na mbarĩ ciao maarĩ Libini na Shimei.
Exodus6:18 Ariũ a Kohathu maarĩ Amuramu
Exodus6:19 Ariũ a Merari maarĩ Mahali na Mushi. Acio nĩo maarĩ mbarĩ cia Lawi kũringana na maandĩko mao.
Exodus6:20 Amuramu nĩahikirie mwarĩ wa nyina na ithe wetagwo Jokebedi
Exodus6:21 Ariũ a Iziharu maarĩ Kora
Exodus6:22 Ariũ a Uzieli maarĩ Mishaeli
Exodus6:23 Harũni nĩahikirie Elisheba
Exodus6:24 Ariũ a Kora maarĩ Asiri
Exodus6:25 Eleazaru mũrũ wa Harũni nĩahikirie mũirĩtu ũmwe wa Putieli
Exodus6:26 Harũni o ũcio
Exodus6:27 Nĩo maarĩirie Firaũni
Exodus6:28 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus6:29 aamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Exodus6:30 No Musa akĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Exodus7:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus7:2 Wee ũriugaga ũrĩa wothe ndĩgwathaga
Exodus7:3 No nĩngũtũma ngoro ya Firaũni yũme
Exodus7:4 ndakamũigua. Ningĩ nĩngatambũrũkia guoko gwakwa kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus7:5 Nao andũ a Misiri nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Exodus7:6 Musa na Harũni magĩĩka o ũrĩa Jehova aamaathĩte meke.
Exodus7:7 Musa aarĩ na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnana nake Harũni mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnana na ĩtatũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maaragia na Firaũni.
Exodus7:8 Jehova akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus7:9 “Rĩrĩa Firaũni arĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus7:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Firaũni
Exodus7:11 Nake Firaũni agĩĩta andũ arĩa oogĩ o na ago
Exodus7:12 O mũndũ agĩikia rũthanju rwake thĩ na rũgĩtuĩka nyoka. No rũthanju rwa Harũni rũkĩmeria thanju ciao.
Exodus7:13 No rĩrĩ
Exodus7:14 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus7:15 Nĩũgathiĩ kũrĩ Firaũni rũciinĩ agĩthiĩ rũũĩ. Weterere mũcemanie nake hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Rũũĩ rwa Nili
Exodus7:16 Ũcooke ũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Exodus7:17 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Ũndũ ũyũ nĩguo ũgũtũma ũmenye atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova: Ngũgũtha maaĩ ma Rũũĩ rwa Nili na rũthanju rũrũ rũrĩ guoko-inĩ gwakwa
Exodus7:18 Thamaki iria irĩ thĩinĩ wa Rũũĩ rwa Nili nĩigũkua
Exodus7:19 Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus7:20 Musa na Harũni magĩĩka o ũrĩa Jehova aathanĩte. Agĩkĩambararia rũthanju rwake arĩ mbere ya Firaũni na anene ake
Exodus7:21 Thamaki iria ciarĩ Rũũĩ rwa Nili igĩkua
Exodus7:22 No aringi ciama a bũrũri wa Misiri magĩĩka maũndũ o ta macio na ũndũ wa maũgĩ mao ma ũgo
Exodus7:23 Handũ ha kũigua-rĩ
Exodus7:24 Nao andũ othe a Misiri makĩenja ithima gũkuhĩ na Rũũĩ rwa Nili nĩguo mone maaĩ ma kũnyua
Exodus7:25 Mĩthenya mũgwanja nĩyahĩtũkire thuutha wa Jehova kũgũtha maaĩ ma Nili.
Exodus8:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:2 Ũngĩrega kũmarekereria mathiĩ
Exodus8:3 Rũũĩ rwa Nili rũkũiyũra ciũra. Igũũka ciambate o nginya nyũmba yaku ya ũthamaki o na nyũmba yaku ya toro o nginya ũrĩrĩ waku igũrũ
Exodus8:4 Ciũra icio ikũrũgĩrĩre na irũgĩrĩre andũ aku o na anene aku.’ ”
Exodus8:5 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Harũni agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa maaĩ ma bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus8:7 No aringi ciama a bũrũri wa Misiri magĩĩka maũndũ o ta macio na ũndũ wa maũgĩ mao ma ũgo
Exodus8:8 Firaũni agĩĩta Musa na Harũni
Exodus8:9 Musa akĩĩra Firaũni atĩrĩ
Exodus8:10 Firaũni akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus8:11 Ciũra nĩcigũkweherera na ciehere nyũmba ciaku
Exodus8:12 Na rĩrĩa Musa na Harũni mehereire Firaũni
Exodus8:13 Nake Jehova agĩĩka o ũrĩa Musa aahooete. Ciũra iria ciarĩ nyũmba
Exodus8:14 Ikĩũnganio ikĩigwo irũndo
Exodus8:15 No rĩrĩa Firaũni onire atĩ marĩkũhoorerwo nĩ thĩĩna-rĩ
Exodus8:16 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:17 Nao magĩĩka ũguo; na rĩrĩa Harũni aatambũrũkirie guoko anyiitĩte rũthanju-rĩ
Exodus8:18 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aringi a ciama a bũrũri wa Misiri maageririe kũrehe rwagĩ na maũgĩ mao ma ũgo-rĩ
Exodus8:19 Aringi acio a ciama makĩĩra Firaũni atĩrĩ
Exodus8:20 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:21 Ũngĩaga kũreka mathiĩ-rĩ
Exodus8:22 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Exodus8:23 Nĩngekĩra ngũũrani gatagatĩ ka andũ akwa na aku. Rũciũ nĩrĩo kĩama gĩkĩ gĩgekĩka.’ ”
Exodus8:24 Na ũguo noguo Jehova eekire. Ngi mĩrumbĩ mĩnene ikĩiyũra nyũmba ya ũthamaki ya Firaũni na igĩtoonya nyũmba cia anene ake
Exodus8:25 Ningĩ Firaũni agĩĩta Musa na Harũni
Exodus8:26 No Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus8:27 No nginya tũthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ werũ-inĩ tũkarutĩre Jehova Ngai witũ magongona
Exodus8:28 Firaũni akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus8:29 Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus8:30 Musa agĩkiuma harĩ Firaũni
Exodus8:31 nake Jehova agĩĩka ũrĩa Musa aamũhoire; nacio ngi ikĩeherera Firaũni
Exodus8:32 No rĩrĩ
Exodus9:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:2 Ũngĩrega kũmarekereria
Exodus9:3 guoko kwa Jehova nĩgũkũrehithĩria ũhiũ waku ũrĩa ũrĩ ũrĩithio-inĩ mũthiro mũũru mũno kũrĩ mbarathi cianyu na ndigiri
Exodus9:4 No Jehova nĩagekĩra ngũũrani gatagatĩ ka ũhiũ wa andũ a Isiraeli na andũ a Misiri
Exodus9:5 Jehova agĩtua ihinda
Exodus9:6 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Jehova agĩgĩka o ũguo: Ũhiũ wothe wa andũ a Misiri ũgĩkua
Exodus9:7 Firaũni agĩtũma andũ magatuĩrie ũhoro
Exodus9:8 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus9:9 Mbiro ĩyo nĩĩgatuĩka rũkũngũ rũhinyu
Exodus9:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩkĩoya mbiro kuuma riiko inene
Exodus9:11 Aringi ciama a Misiri matingĩahotire kũrũgama mbere ya Musa nĩ ũndũ wa mahũha marĩa maarĩ namo
Exodus9:12 No Jehova akĩũmia ngoro ya Firaũni
Exodus9:13 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:14 kana ihinda rĩĩrĩ ngũtũmĩre mĩthiro yakwa yothe ya hinya
Exodus9:15 Nĩgũkorwo nginya rĩu nĩingĩhotete gũtambũrũkia guoko gwakwa
Exodus9:16 No ngũrũgamĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi gĩkĩ kĩũmbe
Exodus9:17 No wĩyũmĩtie kũhinyĩrĩria andũ akwa na ũkagiria mathiĩ.
Exodus9:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Exodus9:19 Gĩathane rĩu atĩ ũhiũ waku na indo ciothe iria ũrĩ nacio mũgũnda itoonyio handũ ingĩĩgitia
Exodus9:20 Anene acio a Firaũni arĩa meetigĩrĩte kiugo kĩa Jehova makĩhiũha gũtoonyia ngombo ciao na ũhiũ wao nyũmba thĩinĩ.
Exodus9:21 No arĩa mateetigĩrire kiugo kĩa Jehova maatigire ngombo ciao na ũhiũ wao mĩgũnda-inĩ.
Exodus9:22 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:23 Rĩrĩa Musa aatambũrũkirie rũthanju arũroretie matu-inĩ
Exodus9:24 mbura ya mbembe ĩgĩkiura
Exodus9:25 Mbura ĩyo ya mbembe ĩkiura bũrũri wothe wa Misiri
Exodus9:26 Kũndũ kũrĩa mbura ĩyo ya mbembe ĩtoirire no bũrũri wa Gosheni
Exodus9:27 Nake Firaũni agĩĩta Musa na Harũni
Exodus9:28 Hooyai Jehova
Exodus9:29 Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus9:30 No nĩnjũũĩ atĩ wee na anene aku mũtirĩ mũretigĩra Jehova Ngai.”
Exodus9:31 (Ũguta na cairi nĩciathũkirio
Exodus9:32 No rĩrĩ
Exodus9:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa akĩehera harĩ Firaũni na akiuma nja ya itũũra inene. Agĩtambũrũkia moko amaroretie na kũrĩ Jehova; marurumĩ na mbura ya mbembe igĩthira
Exodus9:34 Rĩrĩa Firaũni onire atĩ mbura ya mbembe na marurumĩ nĩciathira akĩĩhia rĩngĩ; we na anene ake makĩũmia ngoro ciao.
Exodus9:35 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngoro ya Firaũni yarĩ nyũmũ na ndangĩarekereirie andũ a Isiraeli mathiĩ
Exodus10:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:2 nĩguo mũkeeraga ciana cianyu na ciana ciacio ũrĩa ndokĩrĩire andũ a Misiri
Exodus10:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Firaũni makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:4 Warega kũmarekereria-rĩ
Exodus10:5 Ikaiyũra thĩ
Exodus10:6 Ikaiyũra nyũmba ciaku
Exodus10:7 Anene a Firaũni makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:8 Musa na Harũni magĩcookio kũrĩ Firaũni. Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus10:9 Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus10:10 Firaũni akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus10:11 Aca! Thiĩi o arũme oiki
Exodus10:12 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa agĩtambũrũkia rũthanju rwake igũrũ rĩa bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus10:14 Nacio ngigĩ icio ikĩhithũkĩra bũrũri wa Misiri wothe na igĩikara kũndũ guothe bũrũri-inĩ irĩ nyingĩ mũno. Mbere ĩyo gũtiagĩte mũthiro wa ngigĩ ta ũcio na gũtikagĩa ũngĩ ta ũcio.
Exodus10:15 Ikĩhumbĩra thĩ yothe o nginya ĩkĩira. Ikĩrĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩatigarĩtio nĩ mbura ya mbembe
Exodus10:16 Nake Firaũni agĩĩta Musa na Harũni narua
Exodus10:17 Rĩu ndekerai mehia makwa o rĩngĩ na mũhooe Jehova Ngai wanyu anjehererie mũthiro ũyũ mũũru.”
Exodus10:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa akĩeherera Firaũni agĩthiĩ akĩhooya Jehova.
Exodus10:19 Nake Jehova akĩgarũra rũhuho
Exodus10:20 No Jehova akĩũmia ngoro ya Firaũni
Exodus10:21 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa agĩtambũrũkia guoko akũroretie igũrũ matu-inĩ
Exodus10:23 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩahotire kuona ũrĩa ũngĩ kana oime gwake handũ ha mĩthenya ĩtatũ. No andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus10:24 Ningĩ Firaũni agĩĩta Musa
Exodus10:25 No Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:26 Ũhiũ witũ no nginya tũthiĩ naguo; gũtirĩ o na ihũngũ tũgũtiga na thuutha. No nginya tũhũthĩre imwe ciacio tũkĩhooya Jehova Ngai witũ

Exodus12:1 Jehova akĩĩra Musa na Harũni marĩ kũu bũrũri wa Misiri atĩrĩ
Exodus12:2 “Mweri ũyũ nĩguo ũgũtuĩka mweri wa mbere harĩ inyuĩ
Exodus12:3 Ĩrai andũ othe a Isiraeli atĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi mweri ũyũ
Exodus12:4 Nyũmba ĩngĩgakorwo ĩrĩ nini mũno
Exodus12:5 Nyamũ iria mũgũthuura no nginya ikorwo irĩ tũtũrũme twa ũkũrũ wa mwaka ũmwe
Exodus12:6 Cimenyererei nginya mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri
Exodus12:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makooya thakame ĩmwe ya tũtũrũme tũu
Exodus12:8 Ũtukũ o ũcio makaarĩa nyama icio ihĩhĩtio na mwaki
Exodus12:9 Mũtikanarĩe nyama irĩ njĩthĩ kana itherũkĩtio na maaĩ
Exodus12:10 Mũtikanatigie imwe ciacio ikinyĩrie rũciinĩ; iria ingĩtigara nginya rũciinĩ
Exodus12:11 Ũũ nĩguo mũkaarĩa nyama icio: mũkorwo mwĩhotorete mĩcibi yanyu njohero
Exodus12:12 “O ũtukũ ũcio nĩngatuĩkanĩria bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus12:13 Thakame ĩyo ĩgaatuĩka rũũri rwanyu nyũmba-inĩ iria mũgaakorwo mũrĩ
Exodus12:14 “Mũthenya ũcio nĩmũrĩũririkanaga; ũkũngũyagĩrei harĩ njiarwa iria igooka ũrĩ wa gĩathĩ kĩa Jehova
Exodus12:15 Ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mũgwanja
Exodus12:16 Gĩai na kĩũngano gĩtheru mũthenya wa mbere
Exodus12:17 “Kũngũĩrai Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate Ĩtarĩ Ndawa ya Kũimbia
Exodus12:18 Mweri wa mbere mũrĩrĩĩaga mĩgate ĩtarĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia
Exodus12:19 Handũ ha matukũ mũgwanja
Exodus12:20 Mũtikanarĩe kĩndũ gĩĩkĩrĩtwo ndawa ya kũimbia. Kũrĩa guothe mũgaatũũra
Exodus12:21 Nake Musa agĩĩta athuuri a Isiraeli othe
Exodus12:22 Oyai kĩohe kĩa mahuti ma mũthobi
Exodus12:23 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehova arĩtuĩkania bũrũri nĩguo orage andũ a Misiri-rĩ
Exodus12:24 “Athĩkĩrai ũrutani ũyũ taarĩ watho wa gũtũũra wathĩkagĩrwo nĩ inyuĩ na njiaro cianyu.
Exodus12:25 Rĩrĩa mũgaatoonya bũrũri ũrĩa Jehova akaamũhe ta ũrĩa eranĩire-rĩ
Exodus12:26 Na rĩrĩa ciana cianyu ikamũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus12:27 Mũgaaciĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus12:28 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩka o ũrĩa Jehova aathire Musa na Harũni.
Exodus12:29 O ũtukũ gatagatĩ Jehova akĩũraga marigithathi mothe kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus12:30 Firaũni na anene ake othe o na andũ a Misiri othe
Exodus12:31 O ũtukũ ũcio
Exodus12:32 Oyai ndũũru cianyu cia mbũri na cia ngʼombe o ta ũrĩa mũroigĩte na mũthiĩ. Na mũndathime o na niĩ.”
Exodus12:33 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩhĩka andũ acio moime bũrũri ũcio na ihenya
Exodus12:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makĩoya kĩmere kĩao gĩtanekĩrwo ndawa ya kũimbia
Exodus12:35 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa meerĩĩtwo nĩ Musa na makĩhooya andũ a Misiri mamahe indo cia betha na cia thahabu
Exodus12:36 Jehova agĩtũma andũ acio metĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri nao makĩmahe kĩrĩa gĩothe meetirie; nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtaha indo cia andũ a Misiri.
Exodus12:37 Andũ a Isiraeli makĩambĩrĩria rũgendo kuuma Ramesese magĩthiĩ Sukothu. Arũme arĩa metwaraga na magũrũ maarĩ ta 600
Exodus12:38 Na andũ angĩ aingĩ nĩmathiire na makĩambatania nao
Exodus12:39 Kĩmere kĩrĩa maarutĩte bũrũri wa Misiri nĩkĩo maatũmĩrire gũthondeka mĩgate ĩtarĩ ndawa ya kũimbia. Kĩmere kĩu gĩtiarĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia tondũ nĩkũingatwo maingatirwo bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus12:40 Ihinda rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maatũũrire bũrũri wa Misiri nĩ mĩaka 430.
Exodus12:41 Harĩa mĩaka ĩyo 430 yathirĩire-rĩ
Exodus12:42 Tondũ ũtukũ ũcio nĩguo Jehova aikarire eiguĩte nĩguo amarute bũrũri wa Misiri-rĩ
Exodus12:43 Jehova akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus12:44 Ngombo o yothe ũgũrĩte no ĩrĩe Bathaka ĩyo thuutha wa kũmĩruithia
Exodus12:45 no mũrarĩrĩri kana mũruti wĩra wa mũcaara ndakanamĩrĩe.
Exodus12:46 “No nginya ĩrĩĩagĩrwo thĩinĩ wa nyũmba o ĩmwe
Exodus12:47 Mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli no nginya ũkũngũĩre Bathaka.
Exodus12:48 “Mũgeni ũtũũrĩte thĩinĩ wanyu na nĩekwenda gũkũngũĩra Bathaka ya Jehova
Exodus12:49 Watho o ũcio noguo ũgwatha arĩa maciarĩtwo marĩ a bũrũri
Exodus12:50 Andũ a Isiraeli othe magĩĩka o ũrĩa Jehova aathĩte Musa na Harũni.
Exodus12:51 Na mũthenya o ro ũcio
Exodus13:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ

Exodus13:3 Nake Musa akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ

Exodus13:5 Rĩrĩa Jehova akaamũkinyia bũrũri wa Akaanani
Exodus13:6 Ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mũgwanja mũkaarĩĩaga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia na mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũthondeke iruga inene nĩ ũndũ wa Jehova.
Exodus13:7 Rĩĩagai mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia ihinda rĩa mĩthenya ĩyo mũgwanja; gũtikoneke kĩndũ kĩrĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia gatagatĩ kanyu
Exodus13:8 Mũthenya ũcio o mũndũ ere mũriũ atĩrĩ

Exodus13:10 No nginya mũrũmie watho ũyũ mwathane ihinda rĩaguo rĩakinya
Exodus13:11 “Thuutha wa Jehova kũmũkinyia bũrũri wa Akaanani na amũhe guo
Exodus13:12 nĩmũkahe Jehova maciaro ma mbere ma nda ciothe. Marigithathi ma njamba mothe ma ũhiũ wanyu nĩ ma Jehova.
Exodus13:13 Mũgaakũũraga irigithathi o rĩothe rĩa ndigiri na gatũrũme

Exodus13:16 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũrĩtuĩkaga ta rũũri guoko-inĩ gwaku

Exodus13:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai agĩgĩtongoria andũ acio mathiũrũrũkĩire njĩra ya werũ-inĩ merekeire Iria Itune. Andũ a Isiraeli maambatire makiuma bũrũri wa Misiri meeohete indo cia mbaara.
Exodus13:19 Musa nĩakuuire mahĩndĩ ma Jusufu
Exodus13:20 Thuutha wa kuuma Sukothu maambire kambĩ ciao Ethamu ndeere-inĩ cia werũ.

Exodus14:17 Nĩngũũmia ngoro cia andũ a Misiri nĩgeetha o nao mamarũmĩrĩre. Na nĩngegĩĩra riiri nĩ ũndũ wa Firaũni na mbũtũ yake ya ita
Exodus14:18 Nao andũ a Misiri nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova hĩndĩ ĩyo ngegĩĩra riiri nĩ ũndũ wa Firaũni
Exodus14:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũraika wa Ngai ũrĩa wathiiaga atongoretie mbũtũ ya thigari cia Isiraeli
Exodus14:20 gĩkĩgĩa gatagatĩ ga thigari cia Misiri na cia Isiraeli. Ũtukũ wothe itu rĩu rĩgĩĩkĩra nduma mwena ũmwe
Exodus14:21 Ningĩ Musa agĩtambũrũkia guoko igũrũ wa iria
Exodus14:22 nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩringa iria mahĩtũkĩire thĩ nyũmũ
Exodus14:23 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩmarũmĩrĩra na ihenya
Exodus14:24 Rũciinĩ ruoro rũgĩtema-rĩ
Exodus14:25 Agĩtũma magũrũ ma ngaari ciao cia ita macomoke nĩgeetha makorwo na thĩĩna wa gũcitwarithia. Nao andũ a Misiri makiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus14:26 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus14:27 Musa agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ wa iria
Exodus14:28 Maaĩ magĩcookana
Exodus14:29 No andũ a Isiraeli maaringire iria magereire njĩra nyũmũ
Exodus14:30 Mũthenya ũcio Jehova akĩhonokia Isiraeli kuuma moko-inĩ ma andũ a Misiri
Exodus14:31 Na rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire hinya mũnene ũrĩa Jehova onirie andũ a Misiri-rĩ
Exodus15:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa na andũ a Isiraeli makĩinĩra Jehova rwĩmbo rũrũ: “Nĩngũinĩra Jehova
Exodus15:2 Jehova nĩwe hinya wakwa na rwĩmbo rwakwa; nĩwe ũtuĩkĩte ũhonokio wakwa. Nĩwe Ngai wakwa na nĩndĩĩmũgoocaga
Exodus15:3 Jehova nĩ njamba ya ita; Jehova nĩrĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake.
Exodus15:4 Ngaari cia ita cia Firaũni na mbũtũ yake aamĩikirie iria-inĩ. Anene arĩa ega mũno a Firaũni moorĩire maaĩ-inĩ ma Iria Itune.
Exodus15:5 Maaĩ marĩa mariku nĩmamathikĩte; Nao magakĩrikĩra kũrĩa kũriku ta ihiga.
Exodus15:6 “Wee Jehova
Exodus15:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũnene waku wa magegania
Exodus15:8 Na ũndũ wa mũrurumo wa mĩhũmũ ya maniũrũ maku-rĩ
Exodus15:9 “Thũ nayo yetĩĩte
Exodus15:10 No wahuhire rũhuho rũkĩhurutana
Exodus15:11 “Wee Jehova-rĩ
Exodus15:12 Watambũrũkirie guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo
Exodus15:13 “Nĩ ũndũ wa wendo waku ũtathiraga
Exodus15:14 Ndũrĩrĩ ikaigua
Exodus15:15 Aathani a Edomu nĩmakamaka mũno
Exodus15:16 guoya na kĩmako nĩikamakinyĩrĩra. Na ũndũ wa hinya wa guoko gwaku-rĩ
Exodus15:17 Ũkaamarehe thĩinĩ na ũmahaande kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa igai rĩaku
Exodus15:18 Jehova agaathamaka tene na tene.”
Exodus15:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbarathi cia Firaũni
Exodus15:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Miriamu ũrĩa mũnabii mũndũ-wa-nja
Exodus15:21 Miriamu akĩmainĩra atĩrĩ: “Inĩrai Jehova
Exodus15:22 Ningĩ Musa agĩtongoria Isiraeli kuuma Iria Itune magĩthiĩ Werũ wa Shuri. Magĩthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ werũ-inĩ na matekuona maaĩ.
Exodus15:23 Rĩrĩa maakinyire Mara

Exodus16:1 Mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli nĩwoimagararire ũkiuma Elimu ũgĩkinya Werũ wa Sini
Exodus16:2 Kũu werũ-inĩ
Exodus16:3 Andũ a Isiraeli makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus16:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus16:5 Mũthenya wa gatandatũ-rĩ
Exodus16:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa na Harũni makĩĩra andũ othe a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Exodus16:7 na rũciinĩ nĩmũkona riiri wa Jehova
Exodus16:8 O na ningĩ Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus16:9 Ningĩ Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus16:10 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Harũni aaragĩria mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli-rĩ
Exodus16:11 Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus16:12 “Nĩnjiguĩte gũteta kwa andũ a Isiraeli. Meere atĩrĩ
Exodus16:13 Hwaĩ-inĩ ũcio gũgĩũka tũnyoni tũrĩa twĩtagwo tũmakia-arũme tũkĩiyũra kambĩ ciao. Naguo rũciinĩ kwarĩ ime rĩathiũrũrũkĩirie kambĩ ciao.
Exodus16:14 Ime rĩaitĩka-rĩ
Exodus16:15 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maatuonire
Exodus16:16 Jehova aathanĩte ũũ: ‘O mũndũ nĩonganie o ĩrĩa ĩkũmũigana. Oyagai o kĩbaba kĩmwe kĩa omeri kĩa o mũndũ wothe ũrĩ hema-inĩ cianyu.’ ”
Exodus16:17 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa meerirwo; amwe makĩũngania mĩingĩ
Exodus16:18 Na rĩrĩa yathimirwo na kĩbaba kĩa omeri
Exodus16:19 Ningĩ Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus16:20 No rĩrĩ

Exodus16:22 Mũthenya wa gatandatũ-rĩ
Exodus16:23 Nake Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus16:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩiga imwe nginya rũciinĩ
Exodus16:25 Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus16:26 Mĩthenya ĩtandatũ nĩguo mũrĩciũnganagia
Exodus16:27 No rĩrĩ
Exodus16:28 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus16:29 Menyai atĩ Jehova nĩamũheete Thabatũ; na nĩkĩo amũheaga mĩgate ya mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ mũthenya ũcio wa gatandatũ. Mũndũ o wothe nĩaikarage harĩa arĩ mũthenya ũcio wa mũgwanja; gũtikanagĩe mũndũ ũkumagara.”
Exodus16:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ makĩhurũka mũthenya wa mũgwanja.
Exodus16:31 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩta mĩgate ĩyo mana. Maarĩ merũ ta mbegũ cia korianda
Exodus16:32 Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus16:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus16:34 O ta ũrĩa Jehova aathire Musa-rĩ
Exodus16:35 Andũ a Isiraeli maarĩire mana mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna nginya magĩkinya bũrũri ũrĩa watũũragwo nĩ andũ; maarĩire mana nginya rĩrĩa maakinyire mũhaka-inĩ wa Kaanani.
Exodus16:36 (Omeri ĩmwe ĩigana ta gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa eba ĩmwe.)

Exodus17:7 Nake agĩĩta handũ hau Masa na Meriba

Exodus20:1 Nake Ngai akĩaria ciugo ici ciothe
Exodus20:2 “Nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai waku
Exodus20:3 “Ndũkanagĩe na ngai ingĩ tiga niĩ.
Exodus20:4 “Ndũkanethondekere mũhianano mũicũhie wa mũhianĩre wa kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩ kũũrĩa igũrũ kana gũkũ thĩ
Exodus20:5 Ndũkanacinamĩrĩre kana ũcihooe
Exodus20:6 no ngonania wendo kũrĩ njiarwa ngiri na ngiri cia andũ arĩa manyendete na magaathĩkĩra maathani makwa.
Exodus20:7 “Ndũkanagwete rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova Ngai waku na itherũ

Exodus20:9 Rutaga wĩra waku wothe mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus20:10 no mũthenya wa mũgwanja nĩ Thabatũ ya Jehova Ngai waku. Mũthenya ũcio ndũkanarute wĩra o na ũrĩkũ
Exodus20:11 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ombire igũrũ na thĩ
Exodus20:12 “Tĩĩa thoguo na nyũkwa
Exodus20:13 “Ndũkanoragane.
Exodus20:14 “Ndũkanatharanie.
Exodus20:15 “Ndũkanaiye.
Exodus20:16 “Ndũkanaigĩrĩre mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ kĩgeenyo.

Exodus21:2 “Ũngĩgũra Mũhibirania arĩ ndungata
Exodus21:3 Angĩgooka arĩ wiki
Exodus21:4 Mwathi wa ndungata ĩyo angĩmĩhe mũtumia nake mũtumia ũcio amũciarĩre ciana cia aanake na airĩtu
Exodus21:5 “No ndungata ĩyo ĩngĩkaaria
Exodus21:6 hĩndĩ ĩyo mwathi wa ndungata ĩyo nĩakamĩtwara mbere ya atuithania ciira. Akaamĩtwara mũrango-inĩ
Exodus21:7 “Mũndũ angĩendia mwarĩ agatuĩke ndungata
Exodus21:8 Ĩngĩaga gũkenia mwathi ũrĩa wamĩthuurĩte
Exodus21:9 Angĩmĩũrĩria mũriũ
Exodus21:10 Mũriũ angĩhikia mũtumia ũngĩ
Exodus21:11 Angĩaga kũmũhingĩria maũndũ maya matatũ-rĩ
Exodus21:12 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩgũtha mũndũ amũũrage
Exodus21:13 No rĩrĩ
Exodus21:14 No mũndũ angĩtũmĩra mawara na oorage mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ akĩendaga-rĩ
Exodus21:15 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩtharĩkĩra ithe kana nyina no nginya ooragwo.
Exodus21:16 “Mũndũ ũngĩiya mũndũ ũngĩ na hinya akamwendie
Exodus21:17 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩruma ithe kana nyina no nginya ooragwo.
Exodus21:18 “Andũ mangĩũgitana na ũmwe aringe ũrĩa ũngĩ na ihiga kana na ngundi na aage gũkua
Exodus21:19 ũcio mũringani ndagacookererwo nĩ mahĩtia angĩkorwo ũrĩa waringĩtwo nĩakehota na etware nja na mũtirima wake. No rĩrĩ
Exodus21:20 “Mũndũ angĩhũũra ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ-wa-nja na rũthanju
Exodus21:21 no ndangĩherithio ngombo ĩyo ĩngĩarahũka thuutha wa mũthenya ũmwe kana ĩĩrĩ
Exodus21:22 “Andũ mangĩkorwo makĩrũa
Exodus21:23 No mũtumia ũcio angĩtihio ũũru
Exodus21:24 riitho rĩrĩhagio na riitho
Exodus21:25 ihĩa rĩrĩhagio na ihĩa
Exodus21:26 “Mũndũ angĩgũtha ndungata ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ-wa-nja riitho narĩo rĩthũke-rĩ
Exodus21:27 Na angĩkũũra igego rĩa ndungata ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ-wa-nja
Exodus21:28 “Ndegwa ĩngĩtheeca mũndũ mũrũme kana mũndũ-wa-nja na rũhĩa akue

Exodus21:32 Ndegwa ĩngĩtheeca ngombo ya mũndũ mũrũme kana mũndũ-wa-nja
Exodus21:33 “Mũndũ angĩkunũra irima
Exodus21:34 mwene irima rĩu no nginya arĩhe hathara ĩyo; no nginya arĩhe mwene nyamũ

Exodus22:1 “Mũndũ angĩiya ndegwa kana ngʼondu
Exodus22:2 “Mũici angĩnyiitwo agĩtua nyũmba nake agũthwo akue-rĩ
Exodus22:3 no ũndũ ũcio ũngĩkĩka thuutha wa riũa kũratha
Exodus22:4 “Nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩiyĩtwo ĩngĩonekana ĩrĩ muoyo moko-inĩ make
Exodus22:5 “Mũndũ angĩrĩithia ũhiũ wake mũgũnda wene o na kana arĩithie mũgũnda wene wa mĩthabibũ
Exodus22:6 “Mwaki ũngĩtuthũka na ũcine ihinga cia mĩigua nginya ũkinyĩre itĩĩa cia ngano kana ngano ĩrũngiĩ
Exodus22:7 “Mũndũ angĩhithia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake betha kana indo amũigĩre-rĩ
Exodus22:8 No mũici ũcio angĩaga kũnyiitwo
Exodus22:9 Ha ũhoro o wothe wa mũndũ gũkorwo na kĩndũ na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩtagĩrĩire
Exodus22:10 “Mũndũ angĩhithia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake ndigiri
Exodus22:11 ũhoro ũcio wao ũgaatuuo na njĩra ya kwĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa mbere ya Jehova atĩ ũrĩa ũhithĩtio tiwe ũiyĩte indo icio. Mwene nake etĩkĩre mwĩhĩtwa ũcio
Exodus22:12 No angĩkorwo nyamũ nĩkũiywo yaiirwo kuuma kũrĩa yahithĩtio-rĩ
Exodus22:13 Angĩkorwo yatambuurirwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka
Exodus22:14 “Mũndũ angĩgwatio nyamũ ya mũndũ ũngĩ
Exodus22:15 No nyamũ ĩyo ĩngĩkorwo ĩrĩ na mwene-rĩ
Exodus22:16 “Mũndũ angiuha mũirĩtu gathirange ũtoorĩtio kũhikio
Exodus22:17 Ithe wa mũirĩtu angĩrega biũ kũmũheana kũrĩ mũndũ ũcio
Exodus22:18 “Mũtigetĩkĩrie mũndũ-wa-nja mũrogi atũũre muoyo.
Exodus22:19 “Mũndũ ũngĩgwata nyamũ no nginya ooragwo.
Exodus22:20 “Mũndũ ũkaarutĩra ngai ingĩ iruta tiga Jehova nĩakaniinwo.
Exodus22:21 “Mũtigeke mũgeni ũũru kana mũmũhinyĩrĩrie
Exodus22:22 “Mũtikanahinyĩrĩrie mũtumia wa ndigwa kana mwana wa ngoriai.
Exodus22:23 Mũngĩĩka ũguo nao mangaĩre
Exodus22:24 Nĩngacinwo nĩ marakara
Exodus22:25 “Ũngĩkombera mũndũ ũmwe wakwa gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu mbeeca abatairio nĩcio-rĩ
Exodus22:26 Mũndũ ũngĩ angĩkũnengera nguo yake ya igũrũ ĩrũgamĩrĩre thiirĩ
Exodus22:27 tondũ noyo arĩ nayo ya kwĩhumbĩra. Angĩkĩĩhumbĩra nakĩ agĩkoma? Angaĩra
Exodus22:28 “Ndũkanarume Ngai kana ũrume mũnene wa andũ anyu.
Exodus22:29 “Ndũgacerithĩrie maruta kuuma makũmbĩ-inĩ maku kana mahihĩro-inĩ maku ma ndibei. “No nginya ũũheage marigithathi ma ariũ aku.
Exodus22:30 Wĩkage o ũguo mwena-inĩ wĩgiĩ ngʼombe na ngʼondu ciaku. Iria ciaciarwo ũrekage igaikara na manyina mĩthenya mũgwanja
Exodus22:31 “Inyuĩ mũgũtuĩka andũ akwa aamũre. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtikanarĩe nyama cia nyamũ ndamburange nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka; ciikagĩriei ngui.
Exodus23:1 “Ndũkanamemerekie ndeto cia maheeni. Ndũgateithĩrĩrie mũndũ mwaganu na ũndũ wa kũrũgamĩrĩra ũira wa maheeni.
Exodus23:2 “Ndũkarũmanĩrĩre na mũingĩ gwĩka ũũru. Ũngĩruta ũira igooti-inĩ
Exodus23:3 na ndũkonanie kĩmenyano harĩ mũndũ mũthĩĩni ciira-inĩ wake.
Exodus23:4 “Ũngĩona ndegwa kana ndigiri ya mũndũ mũrĩ ũthũ nake yũrĩte-rĩ
Exodus23:5 Ũngĩona ndigiri ya mũndũ ũgũthũire ĩgwĩte ĩkaremererwo nĩ mũrigo wayo-rĩ
Exodus23:6 “Ndũkanaime andũ anyu arĩa athĩĩni kĩhooto ciira-inĩ wao.
Exodus23:7 Ndũkahutanie na thitango ya maheeni
Exodus23:8 “Ndũkoe ihaki
Exodus23:9 “Ndũkahatĩrĩrie mũgeni; inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ ũrĩa mũgeni aiguaga
Exodus23:10 “Haandaga irio mĩgũnda yaku mĩaka ĩtandatũ
Exodus23:11 no mwaka wa mũgwanja ũkarekaga mũgũnda ũikare ũguo ũtarĩmĩtwo na ũtekũhũthĩrwo. Nao arĩa athĩĩni gatagatĩ ka andũ anyu makonaga irio kuuma mũgũnda ũcio
Exodus23:12 “Rutaga wĩra waku mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus23:13 “Menyagĩrĩra wĩkage maũndũ marĩa mothe ngwĩrĩte. Ndũkanagwete marĩĩtwa ma ngai ingĩ; ndũkareke maiguuo makĩgwetwo na kanua gaku.
Exodus23:14 “Gĩagai na gĩathĩ gĩa gũkũngũĩra maita matatũ o mwaka.
Exodus23:15 “Kũngũyagĩra Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate Ĩtarĩ na Ndawa ya Kũimbia; handũ ha mĩthenya mũgwanja ũrĩĩage mĩgate ĩtarĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia
Exodus23:16 “Kũngũyagĩra Gĩathĩ kĩa Magetha na maciaro ma mbere ma irio iria ũhaandĩte mĩgũnda yaku. “Kũngũyagĩra Gĩathĩ kĩa Igetha mũthia-inĩ wa mwaka
Exodus23:17 “Arũme othe nĩmarĩthiiaga mbere ya Mwathani Jehova maita matatũ o mwaka.
Exodus23:18 “Ndũkanandutĩre thakame ya igongona hamwe na kĩndũ kĩrĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia. “Maguta ma maruta makwa ma gĩathĩ matikaigwo nginya rũciinĩ.
Exodus23:19 “Rehaga indo iria njega cia maciaro ma mbere nyũmba-inĩ ya Jehova Ngai waku. “Ndũkanaruge koori na iria rĩa nyina.
Exodus23:20 “Na rĩrĩ
Exodus23:21 Iguagai na mwathĩkagĩre ũrĩa ekũmwĩra. Mũtikanamũkararie tondũ ndakamũrekera ũremi wanyu
Exodus23:22 Mũngĩmũigua kũna ũrĩa aroiga
Exodus23:23 Mũraika wakwa nĩagathiĩ mbere yanyu
Exodus23:24 Mũtikanainamĩrĩre ngai ciao
Exodus23:25 Hooyagai Jehova Ngai wanyu nake
Exodus23:26 na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaahuna kana atuĩke thaata bũrũri-inĩ wanyu. Nĩndĩĩmũkinyagĩria matukũ marĩa mwathĩrĩirio ma gũtũũra muoyo.
Exodus23:27 “Nĩngũtũma kĩmakania gĩakwa mbere yanyu
Exodus23:28 Nĩngatũma magi mbere yanyu
Exodus23:29 No rĩrĩ
Exodus23:30 Ndĩmaingataga o kahora o kahora
Exodus23:31 “Nĩngekĩra mĩhaka yanyu kuuma Iria Itune
Exodus23:32 Mũtikagĩe na kĩrĩkanĩro nao kana na ngai ciao.
Exodus23:33 Mũtikareke matũũre bũrũri-inĩ wanyu; nĩ tondũ no matũme mũnjĩhĩrie
Exodus24:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus24:2 no Musa wiki ũgaakuhĩrĩria Jehova; acio angĩ matigooke hakuhĩ. Nao andũ acio angĩ a Isiraeli matikambate nawe.”
Exodus24:3 Nake Musa agĩthiĩ na akĩĩra andũ ciugo ciothe cia Jehova na mawatho make
Exodus24:4 Nake Musa akĩandĩka ũhoro wothe ũrĩa Jehova aarĩtie. Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ agĩũkĩra rũciinĩ tene
Exodus24:5 Ningĩ agĩtũma aanake amwe a Isiraeli
Exodus24:6 Musa akĩoya nuthu ya thakame yatuo akĩmĩĩkĩra mbakũri-inĩ
Exodus24:7 Ningĩ akĩoya Ibuku rĩa Kĩrĩkanĩro
Exodus24:8 Musa agĩcooka akĩoya thakame ĩyo
Exodus24:9 Musa na Harũni
Exodus24:10 na makĩona Ngai wa Isiraeli. Rungu rwa makinya make haarĩ handũ haakĩtwo wega na mahiga ma yakuti ya bururu
Exodus24:11 No Jehova ndaigana kũhũũra atongoria acio a Isiraeli; nĩmoonire Ngai
Exodus24:12 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus24:13 Ningĩ Musa akiumagara marĩ na mũteithĩrĩria wake Joshua
Exodus24:14 Akĩĩra athuuri acio atĩrĩ
Exodus24:15 Rĩrĩa Musa aambatire kĩrĩma-inĩ
Exodus24:16 naguo riiri wa Jehova ũgĩikara igũrũ rĩa Kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai. Kĩrĩma gĩkĩhumbĩrwo nĩ itu rĩu mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus24:17 andũ a Isiraeli moonaga riiri wa Jehova ũtariĩ ta mwaki wa kũniinana ũrĩ kĩrĩma igũrũ.
Exodus24:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa agĩtoonya itu-inĩ o akĩambataga kĩrĩma. Agĩikara kũu kĩrĩma-inĩ matukũ mĩrongo ĩna
Exodus25:1 Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus25:2 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli mandehere iruta. Nĩwe ũkwamũkĩra iruta rĩu handũ hakwa kuuma kũrĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ngoro yake ĩkwenda kũheana.
Exodus25:3 Maruta marĩa ũrĩamũkagĩra kuuma kũrĩ o nĩmo maya: thahabu
Exodus25:4 na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus25:5 na njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ mũtune
Exodus25:6 na maguta ma mũtamaiyũ ma gwakia tawa; na mahuti manungi wega ma gũthondeka maguta ma gũitanĩrĩrio
Exodus25:7 na tũhiga twa onigithi
Exodus25:8 “Ningĩ ũnjakithĩrie handũ haamũre
Exodus25:9 Thondekai hema ĩno nyamũre
Exodus25:10 “Nĩmathondekere ithandũkũ rĩa mbaũ cia mũgaa. Ũraihu warĩo ũkorwo ũrĩ mĩkono ĩĩrĩ na nuthu
Exodus25:11 Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩgemio na thahabu therie mĩena yeerĩ nja na thĩinĩ
Exodus25:12 Rĩtwekerie icũhĩ inya cia thahabu
Exodus25:13 Ũcooke ũthondeke mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mũgaa ũmĩgemie na thahabu.
Exodus25:14 Toonyia mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya icũhĩ-inĩ iria irĩ mĩena ya ithandũkũ nĩgeetha rĩkuuĩkage.
Exodus25:15 Mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya ĩrekwo ĩikarage icũhĩ-inĩ cia ithandũkũ rĩĩrĩ
Exodus25:16 Ũcooke wĩkĩre thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ rĩu Ũira
Exodus25:17 “Thondeka gĩtĩ gĩa tha gĩa thahabu therie
Exodus25:18 Na ũture makerubi meerĩ ma thahabu
Exodus25:19 Thondeka ikerubi rĩmwe rĩikare mũthia-inĩ ũmwe
Exodus25:20 Makerubi macio makorwo matambũrũkĩtie mathagu mamo na igũrũ
Exodus25:21 Igĩrĩra gĩtĩ kĩu gĩa tha igũrũ rĩa ithandũkũ
Exodus25:22 Na hau igũrũ wa gĩtĩ gĩa tha
Exodus25:23 “Thondeka metha na mbaũ cia mũgaa
Exodus25:24 Ũmĩgemie na thahabu therie
Exodus25:25 Mĩthondekere karũbaũ gaceke ka wariĩ wa rũhĩ gathiũrũrũkĩrie metha ĩyo
Exodus25:26 Thondekera metha ĩyo icũhĩ inya cia thahabu
Exodus25:27 Icũhĩ icio ikorwo irĩ hakuhĩ na mũcibi wa karũbaũ karĩa gaceke
Exodus25:28 Thondeka mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mbaũ cia mũgaa
Exodus25:29 Na ũthondeke thaani ciayo
Exodus25:30 Iga mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩigagwo mbere yakwa igũrũ rĩa metha ĩyo
Exodus25:31 “Thondeka mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa ma thahabu therie
Exodus25:32 Honge ithathatũ ciumĩre mĩena-inĩ ya mũrũgamo wa mũtĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa
Exodus25:33 Ikombe ithatũ iturĩtwo na mũhiano wa mahũa ma mũrothi irĩ na tũkonyo na mahũa ikorwo irĩ rũhonge-inĩ rũmwe
Exodus25:34 Na mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩra matawa hagĩe ikombe inya cia mũhiano wa mahũa ma mũrothi irĩ na tũkonyo na mahũa.
Exodus25:35 Gakonyo kamwe gakorwo karĩ rungu rwa honge cia mbere igĩrĩ ciumĩte mũrũgamo-inĩ wa mũtĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa
Exodus25:36 Tũkonyo tũu na honge icio ikorwo irĩ kĩndũ kĩmwe na mũtĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa
Exodus25:37 “Ningĩ ũthondeke matawa mũgwanja maguo na ũmaigĩrĩre igũrũ rĩaguo nĩgeetha mamũrĩke hau mbere ya guo.
Exodus25:38 Magathĩ ma gũtinia ndaambĩ na thaani cia mũrarĩ wa ndaambĩ ikorwo irĩ cia thahabu therie.
Exodus25:39 Taranda ya thahabu therie ĩhũthĩrwo gũthondeka mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa o na indo icio ciothe.
Exodus25:40 Ũtigĩrĩre atĩ nĩwacithondeka kũringana na mũhianĩre ũrĩa wonirio ũrĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ.
Exodus26:1 “Thondeka hema nyamũre ĩrĩ na itambaya ikũmi cia gũcuurio itumĩtwo na gatani yogothetwo wega ya ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus26:2 Itambaya icio cia gũcuurio ciothe ikorwo ciiganaine
Exodus26:3 Itambaya ithano-rĩ
Exodus26:4 Kundĩka ciana cia gĩtambaya kĩa rangi wa bururu mũthia-inĩ wa gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mũico wa mwena ũmwe
Exodus26:5 Kundĩka ciana mĩrongo ĩtano gĩtambaya-inĩ kĩmwe gĩa gũcuurio
Exodus26:6 Ningĩ ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia thahabu
Exodus26:7 “Tuma itambaya ikũmi na kĩmwe cia guoya wa mbũri ituĩke hema ya kũhumbĩra hema ĩrĩa nyamũre.
Exodus26:8 Itambaya icio ciothe ikũmi na kĩmwe ikorwo ciiganaine
Exodus26:9 Tumania itambaya ithano cia icio cia gũcuurio ituĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe
Exodus26:10 Kundĩka ciana mĩrongo ĩtano mũthia-inĩ wa itambaya cia gũcuurio cia mwena ũmwe
Exodus26:11 Ningĩ ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia gĩcango
Exodus26:12 Harĩ ũraihu wa gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio ũrĩa ũngĩtigara
Exodus26:13 Itambaya cia gũcuurio cia hema ikorwo iraihĩte kũrĩ icio ingĩ na mũkono ũmwe mĩena yeerĩ; kĩrĩa gĩgũtigara gĩcunjuure kĩhumbĩre mĩena ya hema ĩyo nyamũre.
Exodus26:14 Thondekera hema ĩyo kĩandarũa kĩa njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ mũtune igatunĩha
Exodus26:15 “Thondeka mbaũ cia kũrũgama cia mũtĩ wa mũgaa cia gwaka hema ĩyo nyamũre.
Exodus26:16 O rũbaũ-inĩ rũkorwo rũrĩ rwa mĩkono ikũmi kũraiha na mũkono ũmwe na nuthu kwarama
Exodus26:17 mbaũ icio igĩe na tũhocio tũcomokete tũigananĩirie. Thondeka mbaũ icio ciothe cia Hema-ĩrĩa-Nyamũre na njĩra ĩyo.
Exodus26:18 Thondeka mbaũ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia mwena wa gũthini wa hema ĩyo nyamũre
Exodus26:19 na ũthondeke itina cia betha mĩrongo ĩna cia gũikarĩrwo nĩ mbaũ icio mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus26:20 Ningĩ mwena ũcio ũngĩ
Exodus26:21 na itina mĩrongo ĩna cia betha o igĩrĩ igaikarĩrwo nĩ rũbaũ rũmwe.
Exodus26:22 Thondeka mbaũ ithathatũ cia mwena wa na thuutha
Exodus26:23 na ũthondeke mbaũ igĩrĩ cia koine cia mwena wa na thuutha.
Exodus26:24 Koine-inĩ icio cierĩ no nginya ikorwo irĩ mbaũ igĩrĩ igĩrĩ kuuma thĩ nginya igũrũ
Exodus26:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio hegũkorwo na mbaũ inyanya
Exodus26:26 “Ningĩ ũthondeke mĩgamba ya mbaũ cia mũgaa: ĩtano yayo nĩ ũndũ wa mbaũ cia mwena ũmwe wa hema ĩyo nyamũre
Exodus26:27 na ĩtano nĩ ũndũ wa mbaũ cia mwena ũcio ũngĩ
Exodus26:28 Mũgamba wa gatagatĩ uume mũthia ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ
Exodus26:29 Gemia mbaũ icio na thahabu
Exodus26:30 “Aka hema ĩyo nyamũre kũringana na mũhianĩre ũrĩa wonirio rĩrĩa warĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ.
Exodus26:31 “Tuma gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus26:32 Cuuria gĩtambaya kĩu na tũcuurio twa thahabu ikĩngĩ-inĩ inya cia mũgaa iria igemetio na thahabu
Exodus26:33 Cuuria gĩtambaya kĩu gĩa gũcuurio na ngathĩka
Exodus26:34 Igĩrĩra gĩtĩ gĩa tha igũrũ rĩa ithandũkũ rĩa Ũira thĩinĩ wa Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru-Mũno.
Exodus26:35 Iga metha nja ya gĩtambaya kĩu gĩa gũcuurio mwena wa gathigathini wa hema ĩyo nyamũre
Exodus26:36 “Itoonyero-inĩ rĩa hema
Exodus26:37 Thondekera gĩtambaya kĩu gĩa gũcuurio tũcuurio twa thahabu na itugĩ ithano cia mũgaa igemetio na thahabu. Na ũcitwekerie itina ithano cia gĩcango.
Exodus27:1 “Aka kĩgongona na mbaũ cia mũgaa
Exodus27:2 Thondeka hĩa inya
Exodus27:3 Thondeka indo ciothe cia kĩgongona irĩ cia gĩcango
Exodus27:4 Thondekera kĩgongona kĩu gĩtara
Exodus27:5 Ũige gĩtara kĩu rungu wa muoho wa kĩgongona nĩgeetha rũkinye nuthu ya ũraihu wa kĩgongona.
Exodus27:6 Thondeka itugĩ cia mũgaa nĩ ũndũ wa kĩgongona na ũcigemie na gĩcango.
Exodus27:7 Itugĩ icio itoonyio mĩrĩnga-inĩ ĩyo nĩgeetha ĩgakoragwo ĩikarĩire mĩena-inĩ yeerĩ ya kĩgongona hĩndĩ ya gũgĩkuua.
Exodus27:8 Thondeka kĩgongona kĩu na mbaũ nĩguo kĩgĩe na irima gatagatĩ. Ũgĩthondeke o ta ũrĩa wonirio rĩrĩa warĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ.
Exodus27:9 “Thondeka nja ya hema ĩrĩa nyamũre; mwena wa gũthini ũkorwo ũrĩ wa mĩkono igana kũraiha na ũgĩe na itambaya cia gũcuurio cia gatani ũrĩa mwogothe wega
Exodus27:10 ũkorwo na itugĩ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na itina mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia gĩcango
Exodus27:11 Mwena wa gathigathini o naguo ũkorwo ũrĩ na mĩkono igana kũraiha na ũgĩe na itambaya cia gũcuurio
Exodus27:12 “Mwena wa ithũĩro wa nja ĩyo ũkorwo ũrĩ wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtano kwarama na ũgĩe na itambaya cia gũcuurio na itugĩ ikũmi na itina ikũmi.
Exodus27:13 Mwena wa irathĩro
Exodus27:14 Itambaya cia gũcuurio ikorwo irĩ cia ũraihu wa mĩkono ikũmi na ĩtano na ikorwo irĩ mwena ũmwe wa itoonyero rĩa nja ĩyo
Exodus27:15 na itambaya ingĩ cia gũcuurio cia ũraihu wa mĩkono ikũmi na ĩtano ikorwo mwena ũcio ũngĩ wa itoonyero
Exodus27:16 “Naguo ũhoro wa itoonyero rĩa nja ĩyo
Exodus27:17 Itugĩ ciothe gũthiũrũrũkĩria nja ĩyo
Exodus27:18 Nja ĩyo ĩkorwo na ũraihu wa mĩkono igana
Exodus27:19 Indo iria ingĩ ciothe cia gũtũmĩrwo wĩra-inĩ wa hema ĩrĩa nyamũre
Exodus27:20 “Atha andũ a Isiraeli makũrehere maguta marĩa makeere wega ma ndamaiyũ hihe ma gũkũheaga ũtheri
Exodus27:21 Thĩinĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
Exodus28:1 “Tũmanĩra Harũni mũrũ wa nyũkwa oke harĩwe kuuma gatagatĩ ka andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus28:2 Tumĩra Harũni mũrũ wa nyũkwa nguo nyamũre
Exodus28:3 Arĩria mabundi marĩa marĩ na ũũgĩ wa gũtuma
Exodus28:4 Nacio ici nĩcio nguo iria megũtuma: gakuo ga gĩthũri
Exodus28:5 Nĩ mahũthĩre thahabu
Exodus28:6 “Tuma ebodi ya ndigi cia rangi wa thahabu na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus28:7 Nĩ wega ebodi ĩyo ĩgĩe na tũmĩkwa twĩrĩ twa kũmĩnyiitithanĩria ciande-inĩ
Exodus28:8 Naguo mũcibi wayo wa njohero ũrĩa mũtume wega ũkorwo ũhaana tayo na ũrĩ wa gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe na ebodi ĩyo na ũthondeketwo na ndigi cia rangi wa thahabu
Exodus28:9 “Oya tũhiga twĩrĩ twa onigithi ũkurure marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Isiraeli igũrũ rĩatuo
Exodus28:10 marũmanĩrĩire ũrĩa maaciarirwo
Exodus28:11 Kurura marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Isiraeli tũhiga-inĩ tũu twĩrĩ ta ũrĩa mũrengi wa tũhiga twa goro akururaga kahengere ga gwĩkĩra mũhũũri. Ũcooke ũtũtumĩrĩre tũkonyo-inĩ twa thahabu
Exodus28:12 na ũtuoherere ndaamĩ-inĩ cia kĩande cia ebodi
Exodus28:13 Thondeka tũkonyo tũgemu twa thahabu
Exodus28:14 na irengeeri igĩrĩ cia thahabu therie
Exodus28:15 “Thondekithia gakuo ga gĩthũri ga gwĩkagĩrwo ituĩro-inĩ rĩa ciira
Exodus28:16 Gakuo kau gakorwo kaiganaine mĩena yothe ĩna inji kenda kũraiha na inji kenda kwarama
Exodus28:17 Ũcooke ũgatumĩrĩre mĩhari ĩna ya tũhiga twa goro. Mũhari wa mbere hakorwo kahiga ka wakiki ũrĩa mũtune
Exodus28:18 mũhari wa keerĩ ũtumĩrĩre kahiga ga thumarati
Exodus28:19 mũhari wa gatatũ ũtumĩrĩre kahiga ka wakiki ũrĩa wa bururu
Exodus28:20 naguo mũhari wa kana ũtumĩrĩrwo kahiga ga thumarati ĩrĩa theru
Exodus28:21 Hagĩkorwo harĩ na tũhiga ikũmi na twĩrĩ
Exodus28:22 “Thondekera gakuo kau ga gĩthũri irengeeri njogothe cia thahabu therie ihaana ta mũkanda.
Exodus28:23 Gathondekere mĩrĩnga ĩĩrĩ ya thahabu
Exodus28:24 Ohania irengeeri igĩrĩ cia thahabu mĩrĩnga-inĩ hau mĩthia-inĩ ya gakuo ga gĩthũri
Exodus28:25 nayo mĩthia ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ya irengeeri yohithanio na tũkonyo tũrĩa twĩrĩ
Exodus28:26 Thondeka mĩrĩnga ĩĩrĩ ya thahabu ũmĩnyiitithanie na mĩthia ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ya gakuo ga gĩthũri mwena wa na thĩinĩ kũrigania na ebodi.
Exodus28:27 Thondeka mĩrĩnga ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ya thahabu na ũmĩnyiitithanie magũrũ-inĩ ma ndaamĩ cia kĩande mwena-inĩ wa mbere wa ebodi
Exodus28:28 Mĩrĩnga ya gakuo ga gĩthũri ĩrĩohithanagio na mĩrĩnga ya ebodi na rũrigi rwa bururu
Exodus28:29 “Rĩrĩa rĩothe Harũni arĩĩtoonyaga Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru
Exodus28:30 Ningĩ wĩkĩre Urimu na Thumimu thĩinĩ wa gakuo kau ga gĩthũri
Exodus28:31 “Tuma nguo ndaaya ya ebodi ya taama wa bururu mũtheri
Exodus28:32 na ĩkorwo na harũkĩrio ya mũtwe gatagatĩ kayo. Ĩkorwo ĩtirihĩtwo mĩthia-inĩ ta kara ya ngingo gũthiũrũrũkĩria iharũkĩrio rĩu rĩa mũtwe
Exodus28:33 Thondeka tũcunjuura tũtariĩ ta matunda ma makomamanga twa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus28:34 Ngengere cia thahabu na makomamanga macio mathiĩ mahakanĩtio gũthiũrũrũka rũtumo rwa magũrũ-inĩ rwa nguo ĩyo ndaaya.
Exodus28:35 Harũni no nginya ehumbage nguo ĩyo hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa egũtungata. Ngengere nĩirĩiguagwo ikĩgamba rĩrĩa egũtoonya Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru o hau mbere ya Jehova na rĩrĩa ekuuma ho
Exodus28:36 “Thondeka gatanji ga thahabu therie
Exodus28:37 Koherere rũrigi rwa rangi wa bururu nĩguo ũkanyiitithanie na kĩremba
Exodus28:38 Karĩkoragwo karĩ thiithi-inĩ wa Harũni
Exodus28:39 “Kanjũ nĩĩtumwo ĩrĩ ya gatani ĩrĩa njega mũno
Exodus28:40 Tumĩra ariũ a Harũni kanjũ
Exodus28:41 Warĩkia kũhumba mũrũ wa nyũkwa na ariũ ake nguo icio-rĩ
Exodus28:42 “Matumithĩrie thuruarĩ cia thĩinĩ cia gatani
Exodus28:43 Harũni na ariũ ake no nginya maciĩhumbage rĩrĩa rĩothe marĩtoonyaga Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo kana magĩthengerera kĩgongona marutĩre wĩra Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru nĩgeetha matikahĩtie
Exodus29:1 “Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:2 Na kuuma mũtu-inĩ mũhinyu mũno wa ngano ũtarĩ ndawa ya kũimbia
Exodus29:3 Ĩkĩra indo icio gĩkabũ-inĩ na ũcinenganĩre ũguo hamwe na ndegwa ĩyo na ndũrũme icio cierĩ.
Exodus29:4 Ũcooke ũrehe Harũni na ariũ ake itoonyero-inĩ rĩa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
Exodus29:5 Oya nguo icio
Exodus29:6 Mwĩkĩre kĩremba mũtwe
Exodus29:7 Oya maguta ma gũitanĩrĩrio ũmũitĩrĩrie mũtwe ũmwamũre.
Exodus29:8 Rehe ariũ ake na ũmahumbe kanjũ
Exodus29:9 na ũmoohe tũmĩcibi twa mũtwe. Ningĩ wohe Harũni na ariũ ake mĩcibi. Ũthĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩ wao ũrĩ watho wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo tene na tene. Ũguo nĩguo ũkaamũra Harũni na ariũ ake.
Exodus29:10 “Rehe ndegwa ĩyo mwena wa mbere wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
Exodus29:11 Ũcooke ũmĩthĩnjĩre mbere ya Jehova o hau itoonyero-inĩ rĩa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo.
Exodus29:12 Ningĩ woe thakame ĩmwe ya ndegwa ĩyo
Exodus29:13 Ningĩ woe maguta mothe marĩa mahumbĩire nyama cia nda
Exodus29:14 No nyama cia ndegwa ĩyo hamwe na rũũa na mahu ũcicinĩre nja ya kambĩ. Rĩu nĩ iruta rĩa mehia.
Exodus29:15 “Oya ndũrũme ĩmwe nake Harũni na ariũ ake mamĩigĩrĩre moko mao mũtwe igũrũ wayo.
Exodus29:16 Mĩthĩnje na woe thakame
Exodus29:17 Tinangia ndũrũme tũcunjĩ
Exodus29:18 Ũcooke ũcinĩre ndũrũme ĩyo yothe igũrũ wa kĩgongona. Rĩu nĩ iruta rĩa njino rĩa kũrutĩra Jehova
Exodus29:19 “Oya ndũrũme ĩyo ĩngĩ
Exodus29:20 Mĩthĩnje
Exodus29:21 Na woe thakame ĩmwe kuuma kĩgongona-inĩ na maguta ma gũitanĩrĩrio ũciminjaminjĩrie Harũni na nguo ciake
Exodus29:22 “Oya maguta mamwe ma ndũrũme ĩyo
Exodus29:23 Kuuma gĩkabũ-inĩ kĩa mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mbere ya Jehova
Exodus29:24 Indo ici ciothe cineane moko-inĩ ma Harũni na ariũ ake
Exodus29:25 Ningĩ ũcooke woe indo icio kuuma moko-inĩ mao
Exodus29:26 Warĩkia kũruta gĩthũri kĩa ndũrũme ĩyo ya kĩamũrano kĩa Harũni
Exodus29:27 “Amũra icunjĩ cia ndũrũme ĩyo ya kĩamũrano iria irĩ cia Harũni na ariũ ake nacio nĩ: gĩthũri kĩrĩa gĩathũngũthĩtio na kĩero kĩrĩa kĩaheanĩtwo.
Exodus29:28 Indo icio ituĩke rwĩga rwa kũheagwo Harũni na ariũ ake nĩ andũ a Isiraeli hĩndĩ ciothe. Nĩrĩo iruta rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli marĩrutagĩra Jehova kuuma maruta-inĩ ma ũiguano.
Exodus29:29 “Nguo iria nyamũre cia Harũni igũtuĩka cia njiaro ciake
Exodus29:30 Mũriũ ũrĩa ũkamũgaya atuĩke mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai na oke gũtungata thĩinĩ wa Handũ-Harĩa-Hatheru
Exodus29:31 “Oya ndũrũme ĩyo ya kĩamũrano nacio nyama ciayo ũcirugĩre handũ harĩa hatheru.
Exodus29:32 Harũni na ariũ ake marĩrĩagĩra nyama cia ndũrũme ĩyo na mĩgate kuuma gĩkabũ-inĩ o hau itoonyero-inĩ rĩa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo.
Exodus29:33 Nĩmarĩrĩĩaga indo icio irutĩtwo cia horohio nĩ ũndũ wa kwamũrwo kwao na gũtherio. No itikanarĩĩo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ
Exodus29:34 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:35 “Ĩka Harũni na ariũ ake maũndũ mothe marĩa ngwathĩte
Exodus29:36 Rutagai ndegwa ĩmwe o mũthenya
Exodus29:37 Gĩa na horohio ya kĩgongona mĩthenya mũgwanja ya gũkĩamũra. Thuutha ũcio kĩgongona kĩu nĩgĩgũtuĩka gĩtheru mũno
Exodus29:38 “Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩndũ kĩrĩa ũrĩĩrutaga hĩndĩ ciothe kĩgongona-inĩ o mũthenya: tũtũrũme twĩrĩ
Exodus29:39 Gatũrũme kamwe gakarutwo rũciinĩ na karĩa kangĩ hwaĩ-inĩ kũrĩ mairia.
Exodus29:40 Gatũrũme ka mbere gakarutanagĩrio na mũtu mũhinyu mũno gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa eba ũtukanĩtio na maguta ma mũtamaiyũ gacunjĩ ka inya ka hini ĩmwe na ndibei gacunjĩ ka inya ka hini ĩmwe
Exodus29:41 Ruta gatũrũme kau kangĩ igongona hwaĩ-inĩ kũrĩ mairia
Exodus29:42 “Harĩ njiaro iria igooka
Exodus29:43 ningĩ hau no ho ndĩcemanagia na andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus29:44 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngamũra Hema-ĩyo-ya-Gũtũnganwo na kĩgongona na nyamũre Harũni na ariũ ake mandungatagĩre marĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai.
Exodus29:45 Ningĩ nĩngatũũrania na andũ a Isiraeli na nduĩke Ngai wao.
Exodus29:46 Nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai wao
Exodus30:1 “Thondeka kĩgongona kĩa mbaũ cia mũgaa gĩa gũcinagĩra ũbumba.
Exodus30:2 Nĩgĩkorwo kĩiganaine mĩena yothe mũkono ũmwe kũraiha na mũkono ũmwe kwarama na mĩkono ĩĩrĩ kũraiha na igũrũ
Exodus30:3 Kĩgemie igũrũ
Exodus30:4 Thondekera kĩgongona kĩu mĩrĩnga ĩĩrĩ
Exodus30:5 Thondeka mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mbaũ cia mũgaa
Exodus30:6 Iga kĩgongona kĩu mbere ya gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩa Ũira
Exodus30:7 “Harũni no nginya acinĩre ũbumba mũnungi wega hau igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona o rũciinĩ rĩrĩa egũthondeka matawa.
Exodus30:8 No nginya acine ũbumba rĩngĩ agĩakia matawa hwaĩ-inĩ kũrĩ mairia
Exodus30:9 Ndũkanacinĩre ũbumba wa mũthemba ũngĩ kĩgongona-inĩ gĩkĩ kana ũrutĩre ho iruta rĩa njino
Exodus30:10 Harũni nĩarutage horohio hĩa-inĩ cia kĩgongona kĩu o mwaka riita rĩmwe. Horohio ĩno ya o mwaka no nginya ĩrutagwo na thakame ya iruta rĩa kũhoroheria mehia
Exodus30:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:12 “Rĩrĩa ũgũtara andũ a Isiraeli-rĩ
Exodus30:13 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩkĩraga agathiĩ mwena wa andũ arĩa marĩkĩtie gũtarwo
Exodus30:14 Arĩa othe marĩkĩraga magathiĩ mwena wa arĩa marĩkĩtie gũtarwo
Exodus30:15 Arĩa atongu matirĩheanaga makĩria ya nuthu ya cekeri
Exodus30:16 Amũkĩra mbeeca cia horohio kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli nawe ũcihũthĩre ũtungata-inĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo. Ũguo ũgaatuĩka kĩririkano kĩa andũ a Isiraeli mbere ya Jehova makĩrutĩra mĩoyo yao horohio.”
Exodus30:17 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:18 “Thondeka kĩraĩ gĩa gwĩthambagĩra gĩa gĩcango
Exodus30:19 Harũni na ariũ ake marĩĩthambaga moko mao na nyarĩrĩ na maaĩ macio.
Exodus30:20 Rĩrĩa rĩothe marĩtoonyaga Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
Exodus30:21 marĩĩthambaga moko na nyarĩrĩ nĩgeetha matigakue. Ũndũ ũcio ũgaatuĩka watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo tene na tene nĩ Harũni na njiaro ciake
Exodus30:22 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:23 “Oya mahuti maya manungi wega: cekeri 500 cia manemane ĩrĩa ndwekie
Exodus30:24 cekeri 500 cia mwĩnũ
Exodus30:25 Indo ici ũcithondeke ituĩke maguta matheru ma gũitanĩrĩrio matukanĩtio makanunga wega marutĩirwo wĩra nĩ mũthondeki mũũgĩ wa maguta. Macio matuĩke maguta matheru ma gũitanagĩrĩrio.
Exodus30:26 Ningĩ ũhũthĩre maguta macio gũitĩrĩria Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
Exodus30:27 na metha na indo ciayo ciothe
Exodus30:28 kĩgongona kĩa iruta rĩa njino na indo ciakĩo ciothe
Exodus30:29 Nĩũgaciamũra nĩgeetha ituĩke theru mũno makĩria
Exodus30:30 “Itĩrĩria Harũni na ariũ ake maguta ũmaamũre nĩgeetha mandungatagĩre marĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai.
Exodus30:31 Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Exodus30:32 Ndũkanamaitĩrĩrie mĩĩrĩ ya arũme
Exodus30:33 Mũndũ wothe ũrĩthondekaga maguta manungi wega mahaana ta maya
Exodus30:34 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:35 na ũthondekithie magĩe na mũtararĩko mwega wa ũbumba; wĩra ũcio ũrutwo nĩ mũthondeki mũũgĩ wa maguta. Makorwo mekĩrĩtwo cumbĩ
Exodus30:36 Thĩithia mahuti mamwe matuĩke mũtu
Exodus30:37 Mũtikanethondekere ũbumba wa mũthemba ũyũ nĩ ũndũ wa inyuĩ ene; ũtuagei mũtheru nĩ ũndũ wa Jehova.
Exodus30:38 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩa ũgathondeka ũngĩ taguo nĩguo ekenagie na mũtararĩko waguo nĩakaingatwo kuuma kũrĩ andũ ao.”
Exodus31:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus31:2 “Ta rora wone
Exodus31:3 na nĩndĩmũiyũrĩtie na Roho wa Ngai
Exodus31:4 ya gũcora mĩcoro ya ũũgĩ indo-inĩ cia thahabu
Exodus31:5 gwacũhia tũhiga twa goro twa gũthecererwo indo-inĩ
Exodus31:6 O na rĩrĩ
Exodus31:7 nacio nĩ Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
Exodus31:8 nacio nĩ metha na indo ciayo
Exodus31:9 kĩgongona kĩa iruta rĩa njino na indo ciakĩo
Exodus31:10 o na nguo iria ndume
Exodus31:11 na maguta ma gũitanĩrĩrio
Exodus31:12 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus31:13 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli ũũ: ‘No nginya mũrũmagie Thabatũ ciakwa. Rũrũ nĩruo rũgatuĩka rũũri gatagatĩ gakwa na inyuĩ njiarwa iria igooka
Exodus31:14 “ ‘Menyagĩrĩrai Thabatũ tondũ nĩ mũthenya mũtheru harĩ inyuĩ. Mũndũ ũngĩũthaahia no nginya ooragwo; mũndũ ũngĩruta wĩra mũthenya ũcio nĩakaingatwo kuuma kũrĩ andũ ao.
Exodus31:15 Wĩra nĩũrutagwo mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus31:16 andũ a Isiraeli nĩmathĩkagĩre Thabatũ
Exodus31:17 Rũrũ nĩruo rũgaatuĩka rũũri gatagatĩ gakwa na andũ a Isiraeli nginya tene
Exodus31:18 Rĩrĩa Jehova aarĩkirie kwaria na Musa kũu igũrũ rĩa Kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai
Exodus32:1 Rĩrĩa andũ moonire atĩ Musa nĩaikarire mũno ataikũrũkĩte kuuma kĩrĩma-inĩ
Exodus32:2 Harũni akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus32:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe makĩruta icũhĩ cia thahabu icio ciarĩ matũ-inĩ mao magĩcirehere Harũni.
Exodus32:4 Nake akĩoya indo iria maamũreheire
Exodus32:5 Rĩrĩa Harũni onire ũguo
Exodus32:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ andũ magĩũkĩra rũciinĩ tene
Exodus32:7 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus32:8 Nĩmagarũrũkĩte narua magatiga ũrĩa ndaamathĩte
Exodus32:9 Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus32:10 Rĩu tigana na niĩ nĩgeetha marakara makwa mamarĩrĩmbũkĩre
Exodus32:11 No Musa agĩthaitha Jehova Ngai wake
Exodus32:12 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩtũma andũ a Misiri moige atĩrĩ
Exodus32:13 Ririkana ndungata ciaku Iburahĩmu
Exodus32:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehova akĩĩricũkwo
Exodus32:15 Musa akĩhũndũka
Exodus32:16 Ihengere icio ciarĩ wĩra wa Ngai; maandĩko macio maarĩ maandĩko ma Ngai makururĩtwo ihengere-inĩ icio.
Exodus32:17 Rĩrĩa Joshua aiguire inegene rĩa andũ makiugĩrĩria akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus32:18 Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus32:19 Rĩrĩa Musa akuhĩrĩirie kambĩ
Exodus32:20 Nake akĩnyiita njaũ ĩyo maathondekete
Exodus32:21 Nake Musa akĩũria Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus32:22 Nake Harũni akĩmũcookeria
Exodus32:23 Maanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Exodus32:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus32:25 Musa akĩona atĩ andũ nĩmakararĩtie
Exodus32:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩrũgama itoonyero-inĩ rĩa kambĩ
Exodus32:27 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus32:28 Alawii magĩĩka ta ũrĩa maathirwo nĩ Musa
Exodus32:29 Nake Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus32:30 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Musa akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Exodus32:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa agĩcooka kũrĩ Jehova
Exodus32:32 No rĩu-rĩ
Exodus32:33 Nake Jehova agĩcookeria Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus32:34 Rĩu gĩthiĩ
Exodus32:35 Nake Jehova akĩhũũra andũ acio na mũthiro nĩ tondũ wa ũrĩa meekire na njaũ ĩyo yathondeketwo nĩ Harũni.
Exodus33:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus33:2 Nĩngũtũma mũraika mbere yanyu na nĩngaingata Akaanani
Exodus33:3 Ambatai mũthiĩ bũrũri ũcio ũrĩ bũthi wa iria na ũũkĩ. No niĩ ndigathiĩ na inyuĩ
Exodus33:4 Rĩrĩa andũ acio maiguire ciugo icio cia kũmathĩĩnia ngoro
Exodus33:5 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩeerĩte Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus33:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makĩrutĩra mathaga mao hau kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Horebu.
Exodus33:7 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus33:8 Na rĩrĩa rĩothe Musa aathiiaga hema-inĩ
Exodus33:9 Musa agĩtoonya hema ĩyo
Exodus33:10 Rĩrĩa andũ mona gĩtugĩ kĩu gĩa itu kĩrũgamĩte itoonyero-inĩ rĩa hema ĩyo
Exodus33:11 Jehova agakĩaria na Musa makĩonanaga ũthiũ kwa ũthiũ o ta ũrĩa mũndũ maaragia na mũratawe. Thuutha ũcio Musa agacooka kambĩ
Exodus33:12 Musa akĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Exodus33:13 Angĩkorwo nĩũkenetio nĩ niĩ
Exodus33:14 Jehova akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus33:15 Nake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus33:16 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩkĩmenya atĩa atĩ nĩũkenetio nĩ niĩ
Exodus33:17 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus33:18 Ningĩ Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus33:19 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus33:20 No Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus33:21 Ningĩ Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus33:22 Rĩrĩa riiri wakwa ũrĩkorwo ũkĩhĩtũkĩra hau-rĩ
Exodus33:23 Rĩrĩa ndĩrĩeheria guoko gwakwa
Exodus34:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus34:2 Wĩhaarĩrie rũciinĩ
Exodus34:3 Gũtikagĩe mũndũ ũkwambatania hamwe nawe kana onekane handũ o hothe kũu kĩrĩma-inĩ; o na gũtikagĩe ndũũru cia mbũri kana cia ngʼombe ingĩrĩithio kũu mbere ya kĩrĩma.”
Exodus34:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa agĩicũhia ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga o ta iria cia mbere na akĩroka kwambata kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai rũciinĩ tene
Exodus34:5 Nake Jehova agĩikũrũka arĩ itu-inĩ
Exodus34:6 Agĩkĩhĩtũkĩra mbere ya Musa akĩanagĩrĩra akoiga atĩrĩ
Exodus34:7 ũtũũragia wendani kũrĩ andũ ngiri na ngiri
Exodus34:8 Musa agĩkĩinamĩrĩra thĩ o rĩmwe
Exodus34:9 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus34:10 Ningĩ Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus34:11 Athĩkĩra ũrĩa ngũgwatha ũmũthĩ. Nĩngarutũrũra Aamori
Exodus34:12 Wĩmenyerere ndũkagĩe kĩrĩĩko na andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri-inĩ ũcio ũrathiĩ
Exodus34:13 Nĩmũkoinanga igongona ciao
Exodus34:14 Mũtikanahooe ngai ĩngĩ o na ĩrĩkũ
Exodus34:15 “Mwĩmenyererei mũtikagĩe kĩrĩĩko na andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri-inĩ ũcio; nĩgũkorwo rĩrĩa maahũũra ũmaraya na ngai ciao na magacirutĩra iruta
Exodus34:16 Na rĩrĩa mũngĩthuura airĩtu amwe ao matuĩke atumia a aanake anyu
Exodus34:17 “Ndũkanathondeke mĩhianano ya gũtwekio.
Exodus34:18 “Kũngũyagĩra Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia. Handũ-inĩ ha mĩthenya mũgwanja
Exodus34:19 “Irigithathi rĩa nda o yothe nĩ rĩakwa
Exodus34:20 Irigithathi rĩa ndigiri ũrĩrĩkũũraga na gatũrũme
Exodus34:21 “Rutaga wĩra mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus34:22 “Kũngũyagĩra Gĩathĩ-gĩa-Ciumia
Exodus34:23 Arũme anyu othe no nginya mokage mbere ya Mwathani Jehova
Exodus34:24 Nĩngarutũrũra ndũrĩrĩ imweherere
Exodus34:25 “Ndũkanandutĩre thakame ya igongona ĩtukanĩte na kĩndũ gĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia
Exodus34:26 “Rehagai maciaro ma mbere marĩa mega mũno ma mĩgũnda yanyu
Exodus34:27 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus34:28 Musa aikarire na Jehova hau matukũ mĩrongo ĩna
Exodus34:29 Rĩrĩa Musa aikũrũkire kuuma kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai arĩ na ihengere igĩrĩ cia Ũira moko-inĩ make
Exodus34:30 Rĩrĩa Harũni na andũ a Isiraeli othe moonire Musa
Exodus34:31 No Musa akĩmeeta; nĩ ũndũ ũcio Harũni na atongoria othe a mũingĩ magĩcooka harĩ we
Exodus34:32 Thuutha ũcio andũ a Isiraeli othe makĩmũkuhĩrĩria
Exodus34:33 Rĩrĩa Musa aarĩkirie kũmaarĩria
Exodus34:34 No rĩrĩa rĩothe aatoonyaga harĩ Jehova maranĩrie
Exodus34:35 makona ũthiũ wake o ũkengete. Nake Musa agacookia taama ũcio wa kwĩhumbĩra ũthiũ nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ agaathiĩ kwaria na Jehova.
Exodus35:1 Musa nĩonganirie mũingĩ wothe wa andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus35:2 Wĩra nĩũrutagwo mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus35:3 Mũtigaakagie mwaki mũthenya ũcio wa Thabatũ kũrĩa guothe mũrĩtũũraga.”
Exodus35:4 Musa akĩĩra mũingĩ wothe wa andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Exodus35:5 Rutĩrai Jehova maruta kuuma indo-inĩ iria mũrĩ nacio. Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũkũigua akĩenda
Exodus35:6 na rĩa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus35:7 njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ mũtune igatunĩha
Exodus35:8 na maguta ma mũtamaiyũ ma gwakia tawa; na mahuti manungi wega ma gwĩkĩrwo maguta-inĩ ma gũitanĩrĩrio
Exodus35:9 na tũhiga twa onigithi na tũhiga tũngĩ twa goro twa gũtumĩrĩrwo nguo ya ebodi na gakuo ga gĩthũri.
Exodus35:10 “Arĩa othe marĩ na ũũgĩ wa ũbundi gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu
Exodus35:11 Hema ĩrĩa nyamũre na hema yayo o na kĩndũ gĩa kũmĩhumbĩra
Exodus35:12 na ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro hamwe na mĩtĩ yarĩo
Exodus35:13 metha na mĩtĩ yayo
Exodus35:14 na mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa ma kũmũrĩkaga
Exodus35:15 na kĩgongona kĩa ũbumba na mĩtĩ yakĩo
Exodus35:16 na kĩgongona kĩa iruta rĩa njino hamwe na gĩtara gĩakĩo gĩa gĩcango
Exodus35:17 na itambaya cia gũcuurio cia itoonyero rĩa nja hamwe na itugĩ na itina ciacio na gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio gĩa itoonyero rĩa kuuma nja ya hema
Exodus35:18 na higĩ cia hema ĩrĩa nyamũre
Exodus35:19 na nguo ndume cia kwĩhumbagwo mũndũ agĩtungata arĩ handũ-harĩa-haamũre; nĩcio nguo iria nyamũre cia Harũni ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai o na cia ariũ ake rĩrĩa megũtungata marĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai.”
Exodus35:20 Naguo mũingĩ wothe wa andũ a Isiraeli ũkĩehera harĩ Musa
Exodus35:21 na mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa weyendeire na ngoro yake yahĩĩahĩaga
Exodus35:22 Arĩa maiguire metĩkĩra ũhoro ũcio
Exodus35:23 Ũrĩa wothe warĩ na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus35:24 Andũ arĩa maarehire iruta rĩa betha kana rĩa gĩcango
Exodus35:25 Mũndũ-wa-nja o wothe warĩ mũũgĩ wĩra-inĩ wa kuogotha ndigi na moko make
Exodus35:26 Nao andũ-a-nja othe arĩa meyendeire na nĩ maarĩ na ũũgĩ ũcio
Exodus35:27 Atongoria marehire tũhiga twa onigithi na tũhiga tũngĩ twa goro tũtumĩrĩrwo nguo-inĩ ya ebodi na gakuo ga gĩthũri.
Exodus35:28 Nĩmacookire makĩrehe mahuti manungi wega
Exodus35:29 Andũ a Isiraeli othe
Exodus35:30 Ningĩ Musa akĩĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Exodus35:31 na nĩamũiyũrĩtie na Roho wa Ngai
Exodus35:32 nĩgeetha athugunde mĩcoro ya ũũgĩ ya indo-inĩ cia thahabu
Exodus35:33 na gwacũhia tũhiga twa goro twa gũthecererwo indo-inĩ
Exodus35:34 Na eerĩ
Exodus35:35 Nĩamaiyũrĩtie na ũũgĩ wa kũruta mawĩra mothe
Exodus36:1 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Bezaleli
Exodus36:2 Ningĩ Musa agĩĩta Bezaleli na Oholiabu na mũndũ o wothe warĩ mũũgĩ
Exodus36:3 Nao makĩamũkĩra kuuma kũrĩ Musa maruta mothe marĩa andũ a Isiraeli maarehete ma kũruta wĩra wa gwaka handũ-harĩa-haamũre. Nao andũ magĩthiĩ o na mbere kũrehe maruta ma kwĩyendera rũciinĩ o rũciinĩ.
Exodus36:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mabundi mothe marĩa maarĩ na ũũgĩ
Exodus36:5 na makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus36:6 Nake Musa akĩruta watho
Exodus36:7 tondũ indo iria maarĩ nacio ciarĩ nyingĩ makĩria ma iria ciabatarainie kũruta wĩra ũcio wothe.
Exodus36:8 Andũ othe arĩa maarĩ oogĩ thĩinĩ wa aruti a wĩra magĩthondeka hema nyamũre na itambaya ikũmi cia gũcuurio itumĩtwo na gatani yogothetwo wega na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus36:9 Itambaya ciothe cia gũcuurio nĩciaiganaine
Exodus36:10 Makĩnyiitithania itambaya ithano hamwe
Exodus36:11 Ningĩ magĩkundĩka ciana cia gĩtambaya kĩa rangi wa bururu mũthia-inĩ wa gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mũico-inĩ wa mwena ũmwe
Exodus36:12 Magĩcooka magĩkundĩka ciana ingĩ mĩrongo ĩtano gĩtambaya-inĩ kĩmwe gĩa gũcuurio kĩa mwena ũmwe
Exodus36:13 Ningĩ magĩthondeka ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia thahabu na magĩcihũthĩra kũohithania itambaya icio cia gũcuurio cia mĩena yeerĩ
Exodus36:14 Ningĩ magĩtuma itambaya cia gũcuurio ikũmi na kĩmwe cia guoya wa mbũri igĩtuĩka cia kũhumbĩra hema ĩrĩa nyamũre.
Exodus36:15 Itambaya icio ciothe cia gũcuurio ikũmi na kĩmwe nĩciaiganaine; ciarĩ cia mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtatũ kũraiha
Exodus36:16 Magĩtumithania itambaya ithano cia gũcuurio igĩtuĩka kĩndũ kĩmwe
Exodus36:17 Ningĩ magĩkundĩka ciana mĩrongo ĩtano mũthia-inĩ wa gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩa mũico kĩa mwena ũmwe
Exodus36:18 Ningĩ magĩthondeka ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia gĩcango cia kuohania hema ĩtuĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe.
Exodus36:19 Magĩcooka magĩthondekera hema kĩhumbĩri kĩa njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ mũtune igatunĩha
Exodus36:20 Ningĩ magĩthondeka buremu cia kũmĩrũgamia cia mbaũ cia mũtĩ wa mũgaa nĩ ũndũ wa hema ĩyo nyamũre.
Exodus36:21 O buremu yarĩ ya mĩkono ikũmi kũraiha
Exodus36:22 natuo tũhocio tũgĩcomoka tũigananĩirie. Maathondekire buremu ciothe cia hema ĩyo nyamũre na njĩra ĩyo.
Exodus36:23 Ningĩ magĩthondeka buremu mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia mwena wa gũthini wa hema ĩyo nyamũre
Exodus36:24 na magĩthondeka itina mĩrongo ĩna cia betha cia gwĩkĩrwo rungu rwacio; o itina igĩrĩ ikanyiitĩrĩra buremu ĩmwe
Exodus36:25 Cia mwena ũcio ũngĩ
Exodus36:26 na itina mĩrongo ĩna cia betha
Exodus36:27 Ningĩ magĩthondeka buremu ithathatũ cia mwena wa na thuutha
Exodus36:28 na buremu igĩrĩ igĩthondekwo nĩ ũndũ wa tũkoine-inĩ twa hema ĩyo nyamũre cia mwena wa na thuutha.
Exodus36:29 Koine-inĩ ici cierĩ
Exodus36:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio haarĩ na buremu inyanya na itina ikũmi na ithathatũ cia betha; o igĩrĩ igaikarĩrwo nĩ buremu ĩmwe.
Exodus36:31 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka mĩgamba ya mbaũ cia mũgaa: ĩtano yayo nĩ ũndũ wa buremu cia mwena ũmwe wa hema ĩyo nyamũre
Exodus36:32 na ĩtano nĩ ũndũ wa buremu cia mwena ũcio ũngĩ
Exodus36:33 Maathondekire mũgamba wa gatagatĩ uumĩte mũthia ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ hau gatagatĩ ga buremu icio.
Exodus36:34 Nĩmagemirie buremu icio na thahabu
Exodus36:35 Nĩmatumire gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus36:36 Makĩmĩthondekera itugĩ inya cia mbaũ cia mĩgaa na magĩcigemia na thahabu. Magĩcooka magĩthondeka tũcuurio twa thahabu
Exodus36:37 Itoonyero-inĩ rĩa hema makĩrĩthondekera gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
