Joshua7:26 Magĩcooka makĩhũmbĩra Akani na hĩba nene mũno ya mahiga
Joshua8:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua8:2 Ĩkai itũũra rĩa Ai na mũthamaki warĩo o ta ũrĩa mwekire itũũra rĩa Jeriko na mũthamaki warĩo
Joshua8:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua na mbũtũ yothe ya ita makiumagara magatharĩkĩre Ai. Nake agĩthuura andũ 30
Joshua8:4 akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Ta thikĩrĩriai wega. Inyuĩ mũkuoheria andũ a itũũra rĩu inene na mwena warĩo wa na thuutha. Mũtigaikare haraaya narĩo. Inyuothe mũikare mwĩiguĩte.
Joshua8:5 Niĩ na arĩa othe tũrĩ nao tũgũthengerera itũũra rĩu inene kuuma na mbere na rĩrĩa andũ acio mariumagara gũtũhũũra o ta ũrĩa meekire hĩndĩ ya mbere-rĩ
Joshua8:6 Nao matũingatithie o nginya tũmaguucĩrĩrie biũ moime itũũra rĩu inene
Joshua8:7 inyuĩ na inyuĩ mũkĩre muume kũrĩa mũmooheirie
Joshua8:8 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua8:9 Nake Joshua akĩmeera moimagare
Joshua8:10 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũciinĩ tene
Joshua8:11 Mbũtũ yothe ya ita ĩrĩa yarĩ hamwe nake ĩgĩthiĩ yambatĩte
Joshua8:12 Joshua nĩakoretwo oete andũ ta 5
Joshua8:13 Magĩgĩatha thigari ciikare ciĩhaarĩirie o andũ handũ hao
Joshua8:14 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Ai onire ũndũ ũcio
Joshua8:15 Nake Joshua na andũ a Isiraeli othe magĩĩtua ta mahũũrĩtwo magatoorio
Joshua8:16 Nao andũ othe a itũũra rĩa Ai magĩĩtwo nĩguo mamarũmĩrĩre
Joshua8:17 Gũtirĩ mũndũ mũrũme o na ũmwe wa Ai kana Betheli ũtoimire gũthiĩ gũkinyĩra andũ a Isiraeli. Magĩtiga itũũra rĩu rĩtaahingĩtwo magĩtengʼeria andũ a Isiraeli.
Joshua8:18 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua8:19 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua8:20 Na rĩrĩa andũ acio a Ai maarorire na thuutha na makĩona ndogo yumĩte itũũra rĩu yambatĩte na igũrũ-rĩ
Joshua8:21 Rĩrĩa Joshua na Isiraeli othe moonire atĩ andũ ao arĩa mooheirie andũ thuutha wa itũũra nĩmarĩtunyanĩte
Joshua8:22 Nao andũ arĩa maamohetie makiuma itũũra rĩu inene matharĩkĩre. Andũ a Ai magĩgĩĩkĩrwo gatagatĩ ka andũ a Isiraeli
Joshua8:23 No nĩmanyiitire mũthamaki wa Ai arĩ muoyo
Joshua8:24 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maarĩkirie kũũraga andũ othe a Ai arĩa maarĩ gĩthaka-inĩ na kũu werũ-inĩ
Joshua8:25 Andũ arĩa mooragirwo mũthenya ũcio maarĩ andũ 12
Joshua8:26 Nĩgũkorwo Joshua ndaigana gũthuna guoko kũrĩa kwambararĩtie itimũ rĩake nginya rĩrĩa aarĩkirie kũniina andũ arĩa othe maatũũraga Ai.
Joshua8:27 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkuuĩra ũhiũ na indo iria maatahĩte kuuma itũũra rĩu inene
Joshua8:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua agĩcina Ai na akĩrĩtua hĩba ya mwanangĩko ya gũtũũra
Joshua8:29 Joshua agĩcooka agĩcuuria mũthamaki ũcio wa Ai mũtĩ igũrũ
Joshua8:30 Thuutha wa ũguo Joshua agĩakĩra Jehova
Joshua8:31 o ta ũrĩa Musa ndungata ya Jehova aathĩte andũ a Isiraeli. Aagĩakire o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo thĩinĩ wa Ibuku rĩa Watho wa Musa
Joshua8:32 Nake Joshua akĩandĩka watho wa Musa igũrũ rĩa mahiga macio
Joshua8:33 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua8:34 Thuutha ũcio
Joshua8:35 Gũtirĩ kiugo o na kĩmwe kĩa iria ciothe Musa aathanĩte Joshua ataathomeire kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe kĩa Isiraeli
Joshua9:1 Na rĩrĩa athamaki othe arĩa maarĩ mwena wa ithũĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani maiguire maũndũ macio
Joshua9:2 magĩcookanĩrĩra hamwe nĩguo mahũũrane na Joshua na Isiraeli.
Joshua9:3 No rĩrĩ
Joshua9:4 magĩĩka ũndũ wa wara. Magĩthiĩ marĩ ta andũ matũmĩtwo marĩ na ndigiri ciao ikuuithĩtio makũnia matarũkangu
Joshua9:5 Nao arũme acio meekĩrĩte iraatũ ciarĩ ndarũku
Joshua9:6 Nao magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Joshua kambĩ-inĩ o kũu Giligali
Joshua9:7 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩĩra Ahivi acio atĩrĩ
Joshua9:8 Nao magĩcookeria Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua9:9 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua9:10 na ũrĩa wothe eekire athamaki arĩa eerĩ a Aamori kũu irathĩro rĩa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua9:11 Nao athuuri atongoria aitũ na andũ arĩa othe matũũraga bũrũri witũ nĩmatwĩrire atĩrĩ
Joshua9:12 Irio ici ciitũ cia rĩĩgu ciarĩ hiũ mũthenya ũrĩa tuoimire gwitũ tũke kũrĩ inyuĩ. No rĩu ta kĩonei ũrĩa ciũmĩte na ikagĩa mbuu.
Joshua9:13 Nacio mondo ici ciarĩ njerũ tũgĩciyũria ndibei
Joshua9:14 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩrora irio imwe cia andũ acio
Joshua9:15 Nake Joshua akĩgĩa kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa thayũ nao atĩ areke matũũre muoyo
Joshua9:16 Mĩthenya ĩtatũ thuutha wa kũgĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu na andũ acio a Gibeoni
Joshua9:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makiumagara
Joshua9:18 No andũ a Isiraeli matiigana kũmahũũra
Joshua9:19 no atongoria acio othe makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua9:20 Ũrĩa tũngĩmeeka nĩ atĩrĩ: Nĩ tũkũreka matũũre muoyo
Joshua9:21 O na ningĩ makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua9:22 Ningĩ Joshua agĩĩta andũ acio a Gibeoni akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Joshua9:23 Tondũ ũcio nĩmwagwatwo nĩ kĩrumi
Joshua9:24 Nao magĩcookeria Joshua makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua9:25 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua9:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua akĩmahonokia kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Joshua9:27 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Joshua agĩtua andũ acio a Gibeoni oini a ngũ na atahĩri mũingĩ wa Isiraeli maaĩ
Joshua10:1 Na rĩrĩa
Joshua10:2 Nake
Joshua10:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Adoni-Zedeki mũthamaki wa Jerusalemu agĩtũmanĩra Hohamu mũthamaki wa Hebironi
Joshua10:4 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua10:5 Nao athamaki acio atano a Aamori
Joshua10:6 Nao andũ a Gibeoni magĩtũmanĩra Joshua o kũu Giligali kambĩ-inĩ yake
Joshua10:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua akĩambata akiuma Giligali arĩ na ita rĩake rĩothe hamwe na njamba ciake cia ita iria irĩ hinya.
Joshua10:8 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua10:9 Thuutha wa gũthiĩ ũtukũ wothe kuuma Giligali
Joshua10:10 Nake Jehova akĩmarehere kĩrigiicano mbere ya Isiraeli
Joshua10:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo moragĩra andũ a Isiraeli maikũrũkĩte kuuma Bethi-Horoni marorete Azeka-rĩ
Joshua10:12 Mũthenya ũrĩa Jehova aaneanire Aamori kũrĩ a Isiraeli-rĩ
Joshua10:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio riũa rĩkĩrũgama o ro ũguo
Joshua10:14 Gũtirĩ kwagĩa mũthenya ũngĩ ta ũcio mbere ĩyo kana thuutha ũcio
Joshua10:15 Nake Joshua agĩcooka hamwe na andũ othe a Isiraeli kambĩ-inĩ kũu Giligali.
Joshua10:16 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua10:17 Rĩrĩa Joshua eerirwo atĩ athamaki acio nĩmonetwo mehithĩte ngurunga-inĩ kũu Makeda
Joshua10:18 akiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua10:19 No inyuĩ mũtigatithie. Tengʼeriai thũ cianyu
Joshua10:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli makĩmaniina biũ
Joshua10:21 Mbũtũ yothe ya ita ĩgĩgĩcooka kambĩ kũrĩ Joshua o kũu Makeda na thayũ
Joshua10:22 Joshua agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua10:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩĩka o ũguo
Joshua10:24 Athamaki acio marĩkia kũrehwo harĩ Joshua
Joshua10:25 Joshua akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua10:26 Nake Joshua akĩringa athamaki acio akĩmooraga
Joshua10:27 Riũa rĩgĩthũa-rĩ
Joshua10:28 Mũthenya ũcio
Joshua10:29 Ningĩ Joshua na Isiraeli rĩothe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makiuma kũu Makeda magĩthiĩ nginya itũũra rĩa Libina na makĩrĩtharĩkĩra.
Joshua10:30 Nake Jehova akĩneana itũũra rĩu o narĩo na mũthamaki warĩo moko-inĩ ma andũ a Isiraeli. Nake Joshua akĩniina itũũra rĩu na andũ arĩa maarĩ kuo na rũhiũ rwa njora. Ndaigana gũtigia mũndũ o na ũmwe thĩinĩ warĩo arĩ muoyo. Nake agĩĩka mũthamaki warĩo o ta ũrĩa eekire mũthamaki wa Jeriko.
Joshua10:31 Ningĩ Joshua na Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makiuma kũu Libina magĩthiĩ nginya Lakishi; makĩrĩngʼethera
Joshua10:32 Nake Jehova akĩneana Lakishi kũrĩ Isiraeli
Joshua10:33 O hĩndĩ ĩyo
Joshua10:34 Ningĩ Joshua na Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makiuma kũu Lakishi magĩthiĩ nginya Egiloni; makĩrĩngʼethera makĩrĩtharĩkĩra.
Joshua10:35 Nao magĩtunyana itũũra rĩu mũthenya o ro ũcio
Joshua10:36 Ningĩ Joshua na Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake
Joshua10:37 Magĩtunyana itũũra rĩu
Joshua10:38 Ningĩ Joshua na Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ nake makĩhũndũka
Joshua10:39 Magĩtunyana itũũra rĩu
Joshua10:40 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua agĩtooria mwena ũcio wothe
Joshua10:41 Joshua akĩmatooria kuuma Kadeshi-Barinea nginya Gaza na kuuma mwena ũcio wothe wa Gosheni nginya Gibeoni.
Joshua10:42 Athamaki acio othe hamwe na mabũrũri mao-rĩ
Joshua10:43 Nake Joshua agĩcooka hamwe na andũ othe a Isiraeli kambĩ-inĩ kũu Giligali.
Joshua11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua11:2 o na kũrĩ athamaki a mwena wa gathigathini arĩa maarĩ irĩma-inĩ
Joshua11:3 na kũrĩ Akaanani arĩa matũire mwena wa irathĩro na wa ithũĩro; na kũrĩ Aamori
Joshua11:4 Nao magĩũka na mbũtũ ciao ciothe cia ita
Joshua11:5 Athamaki acio othe magĩturanĩra mbũtũ ciao
Joshua11:6 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua11:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua na mbũtũ yake yothe ya ita
Joshua11:8 nake Jehova akĩmaneana moko-inĩ ma Isiraeli. Nao makĩmahoota makĩmaingatithia o nginya Sidoni ĩrĩa Nene
Joshua11:9 Joshua akĩmeeka o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathanĩte: Agĩtinia mbarathi ciao mĩtari
Joshua11:10 Ningĩ Joshua akĩhũndũka na agĩtunyana itũũra rĩa Hazoru na akĩũraga mũthamaki warĩo na rũhiũ rwa njora. (Hazoru nĩrĩo rĩarĩ itũũra inene mothamaki-inĩ macio).
Joshua11:11 Nao makĩũraga andũ arĩa othe maarĩ kuo na rũhiũ rwa njora. Makĩmaniina biũ na matiigana gũtigia kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kĩarĩ na mĩhũmũ
Joshua11:12 Nake Joshua agĩtunyana matũũra macio mothe ma ũthamaki na athamaki a mo
Joshua11:13 No rĩrĩ
Joshua11:14 Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmekuuĩire indo ciothe iria maatahire
Joshua11:15 O ta ũrĩa Jehova aathire ndungata yake Musa-rĩ
Joshua11:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua agĩtunyana bũrũri ũcio wothe: nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma
Joshua11:17 na kuuma kĩrĩma kĩa Halaku
Joshua11:18 Joshua nĩarũire mbaara na athamaki acio othe ihinda iraaya.
Joshua11:19 Na tiga o Ahivi arĩa maatũũraga Gibeoni
Joshua11:20 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ Jehova we mwene watũmire
Joshua11:21 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua agĩthiĩ akĩniina andũ a Anaki kuuma bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma: kuuma Hebironi
Joshua11:22 Na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa Anaki bũrũri ũcio wa Isiraeli; no itũũra rĩa Gaza
Joshua11:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua agĩtunyana bũrũri ũcio wothe
Joshua12:1 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua12:2 Athamaki acio nĩ Sihoni wa Aamori
Joshua12:3 O na nĩathanaga mwena wa irathĩro wa Araba
Joshua12:4 Ningĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩtunyana bũrũri wa Ogu mũthamaki wa Bashani
Joshua12:5 Aathanaga Kĩrĩma kĩa Herimoni
Joshua12:6 Musa ndungata ya Jehova hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli nĩmamatooririe. Nake Musa ndungata ya Jehova akĩheana bũrũri wao kũrĩ andũ a Rubeni
Joshua12:7 Acio nĩo athamaki a bũrũri ũrĩa Joshua na andũ a Isiraeli maatooririe kũu mwena wa ithũĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua12:8 bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma
Joshua12:9 mũthamaki wa Jeriko
Joshua12:10 na mũthamaki wa Jerusalemu
Joshua12:11 na mũthamaki wa Jaramuthu
Joshua12:12 na mũthamaki wa Egiloni
Joshua12:13 na mũthamaki wa Debiri
Joshua12:14 na mũthamaki wa Horoma
Joshua12:15 na mũthamaki wa Libina
Joshua12:16 na mũthamaki wa Makeda
Joshua12:17 na mũthamaki wa Tapua
Joshua12:18 na mũthamaki wa Afeku
Joshua12:19 na mũthamaki wa Madoni
Joshua12:20 na mũthamaki wa Shimuroni Meroni
Joshua12:21 na mũthamaki wa Taanaka
Joshua12:22 na mũthamaki wa Kedeshi
Joshua12:23 na mũthamaki wa Dori (kũu Nafothu-Dori)
Joshua12:24 na mũthamaki wa Tiriza
Joshua13:1 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua13:2 “Ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa ũtigarĩte: nĩ ngʼongo ciothe cia Afilisti na cia Ageshuru:
Joshua13:3 kuuma Rũũĩ rwa Shihoru mwena wa irathĩro wa bũrũri wa Misiri
Joshua13:4 kuuma gũthini
Joshua13:5 na bũrũri wa a Gebali; na Lebanoni guothe nginya mwena wa irathĩro
Joshua13:6 “Andũ othe arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma kuuma Lebanoni nginya Misirefothu-Maimu
Joshua13:7 na ũũgae ũtuĩke igai harĩ mĩhĩrĩga ĩyo kenda
Joshua13:8 Nuthu ĩyo ĩngĩ ya andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase
Joshua13:9 Naguo mũhaka ũcio woimĩte Aroeri rũteere-inĩ rwa mũkuru wa Arinoni
Joshua13:10 na matũũra mothe ma Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori
Joshua13:11 Ningĩ ũgakinya Gileadi
Joshua13:12 ũguo nĩ kuuga ũthamaki wothe wa Ogu kũu Bashani
Joshua13:13 No rĩrĩ
Joshua13:14 No ndaigana kũhe Alawii igai
Joshua13:15 Nake Musa akĩgaĩra mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni
Joshua13:16 Bũrũri ũrĩa uumĩte Aroeri rũteere-inĩ rwa mũkuru wa Arinoni
Joshua13:17 nginya Heshiboni na matũũra marĩo marĩa maarĩ werũ-inĩ ũcio mũtũũgĩru
Joshua13:18 Jahazu
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaimu
Joshua13:20 na Bethi-Peoru
Joshua13:21 o na matũũra mothe marĩa maarĩ werũ-inĩ ũcio mũtũũgĩru o hamwe na ũthamaki wothe wa Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori
Joshua13:22 Hamwe na arĩa mooragĩirwo mbaara-inĩ
Joshua13:23 Mũhaka wa mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni warĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Matũũra macio hamwe na tũtũũra twamo nĩmo maarĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni
Joshua13:24 Ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa Musa aaheete mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi
Joshua13:25 Nĩ bũrũri wa Jazeri
Joshua13:26 na kuuma Heshiboni nginya Ramathu-Mizipe na Betonimu
Joshua13:27 na kũu gĩtuamba-inĩ
Joshua13:28 Matũũra macio hamwe na tũtũũra twamo nĩmo maatuĩkire igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi
Joshua13:29 Ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa Musa aaheete nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase
Joshua13:30 Nĩ bũrũri ũrĩa uumĩte o Mahanaimu
Joshua13:31 nuthu ya Gileadi
Joshua13:32 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo igai rĩrĩa Musa aaheanĩte hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ kũu werũ-inĩ wa Amoabi mũrĩmo wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua13:33 No rĩrĩ
Joshua14:1 Maya nĩmo mabũrũri marĩa andũ a Isiraeli maheirwo matuĩke igai rĩao bũrũri-inĩ wa Kaanani
Joshua14:2 Magai mao maagairwo na njĩra ya gũcuukĩra mĩtĩ kũrĩ o mĩhĩrĩga ĩyo kenda na nuthu
Joshua14:3 nĩgũkorwo Musa nĩaheete mĩhĩrĩga ĩĩrĩ na nuthu igai rĩao mwena wa irathĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. No rĩrĩ
Joshua14:4 nĩgũkorwo ariũ a Jusufu nĩmatuĩkĩte mĩhĩrĩga ĩĩrĩ
Joshua14:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makĩgayania bũrũri ũcio o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathĩte Musa.
Joshua14:6 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua14:7 Niĩ ndaarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Musa ndungata ya Jehova aandũmire kuuma Kadeshi-Barinea thiĩ ngathigaane bũrũri ũcio. Nĩndamũcookeirie ũhoro o ta ũrĩa warĩ ngoro-inĩ yakwa
Joshua14:8 no rĩrĩ
Joshua14:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Joshua14:10 “Na rĩrĩ
Joshua14:11 Ndĩ na hinya ũmũthĩ o ta ũrĩa ndarĩ naguo mũthenya ũrĩa Musa aandũmire; ndĩ na hinya wa gũthiĩ mbaara-inĩ o ta ũrĩa ndaarĩ naguo hĩndĩ ĩyo
Joshua14:12 Tondũ ũcio rĩu kĩĩhe bũrũri ũyũ wa irĩma
Joshua14:13 Nake Joshua agĩkĩrathima Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune
Joshua14:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hebironi gũtũũire kũrĩ gwa Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune ũcio Mũkenizi kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo
Joshua14:15 (Hebironi gwetagwo Kiriathu-Ariba nĩ ũndũ gwetanĩtio na Ariba
Joshua15:1 Naguo bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩirwo mũhĩrĩga wa Juda
Joshua15:2 Mũhaka wao wa mwena wa gũthini wambĩrĩire gĩcongoco-inĩ kĩa mwena wa gũthini kĩa Iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Joshua15:3 mũhaka ũcio ũkahĩtũkĩra mwena wa gũthini wa Mwanya wa Akirabimu
Joshua15:4 Ningĩ wacookete ũgathiĩ o ro ũguo nginya Azimoni
Joshua15:5 Mũhaka wa mwena wa irathĩro warĩ Iria rĩa Cumbĩ nginya mũthia wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa gathigathini wambĩrĩirie gĩcongoco-inĩ kĩa iria mũthia-inĩ wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua15:6 ũkambatĩrĩra nginya Bethi-Hogila
Joshua15:7 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio wacookete ũkambata nginya Debiri uumĩte Gĩtuamba kĩa Akori
Joshua15:8 Ningĩ ũkambatania na Gĩtuamba kĩa Beni-Hinomu ũikũrũkanĩtie na kĩharũrũka kĩa mwena wa gũthini wa itũũra inene rĩa Mũjebusi (na nĩrĩo Jerusalemu). Kuuma hau ũkambata nginya gacũmbĩrĩ ga karĩma karĩa karĩ mwena wa ithũĩro wa Gĩtuamba kĩa Hinomu o kũu mũthia wa gathigathini wa Gĩtuamba kĩa Refaimu.
Joshua15:9 Kuuma gacũmbĩrĩ ga karĩma mũhaka ũcio werekeire gĩthima kĩa maaĩ ma Nefitoa
Joshua15:10 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkarigiicũka na mwena wa ithũĩro uumĩte Baala ũgakinya Kĩrĩma kĩa Seiru
Joshua15:11 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkoima hau
Joshua15:12 Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa ithũĩro wegiritanĩtie na hũgũrũrũ cia Iria rĩrĩa Inene. Ĩyo nĩyo mĩhaka ĩrĩa yathiũrũrũkĩirie andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda
Joshua15:13 O ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwathĩte-rĩ
Joshua15:14 Nake Kalebu akĩingata Anaki arĩa atatũ kuuma Hebironi
Joshua15:15 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩthiĩ kũrũa na andũ arĩa maatũũraga itũũra inene rĩa Debiri (kũrĩa tene gwetagwo Kiriathu-Sefari.)
Joshua15:16 Nake Kalebu akiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua15:17 Nake Othinieli mũrũ wa Kenazu
Joshua15:18 Mũthenya ũmwe rĩrĩa Akisa aathiire kũrĩ Othinieli-rĩ
Joshua15:19 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua15:20 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda
Joshua15:21 Matũũra marĩa maarĩ mũthia wa gũthini ma mũhĩrĩga wa Juda thĩinĩ wa Negevu kwerekera mũhaka wa Edomu maarĩ maya: Kabizeeli
Joshua15:22 na Kina
Joshua15:23 na Kedeshi
Joshua15:24 na Zifu
Joshua15:25 na Hazoru-Hadata
Joshua15:26 na Amamu
Joshua15:27 na Hazoru-Gada
Joshua15:28 na Hazoru-Shuali
Joshua15:29 na Baala
Joshua15:30 na Elitoladi
Joshua15:31 na Zikilagi
Joshua15:32 na Lebaothu
Joshua15:33 Namo matũũra marĩa maarĩ ituamba-inĩ cia irĩma cia mwena wa ithũĩro: maarĩ Eshitaoli
Joshua15:34 na Zanoa
Joshua15:35 na Jaramuthu
Joshua15:36 na Shaaraimu
Joshua15:37 Zenani
Joshua15:38 na Dilani
Joshua15:39 na Lakishi
Joshua15:40 na Kaboni
Joshua15:41 na Gederothu
Joshua15:42 na Libina
Joshua15:43 na Ifita
Joshua15:44 na Keila
Joshua15:45 Na Ekironi na mĩciĩ ĩrĩa yarĩthiũrũrũkĩirie
Joshua15:46 ningĩ itũũra rĩa Ekironi
Joshua15:47 o na Ashidodi na mĩciĩ ĩrĩa yarĩthiũrũrũkĩirie
Joshua15:48 Namo matũũra ma bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma nĩ: Shamiru

Joshua16:1 Bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩirwo ciana cia Jusufu wambĩrĩirie kuuma Jorodani o kũu Jeriko
Joshua16:2 Wacookete ũgathiĩ na mbere kuuma Betheli (na nokuo Luzu)
Joshua16:3 ningĩ ũgaikũrũka na mwena wa ithũĩro
Joshua16:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Manase na Efiraimu
Joshua16:5 Ũyũ nĩguo warĩ bũrũri wa Efiraimu
Joshua16:6 ũgathiĩ na mbere nginya iria-inĩ. Kuuma Mikemethathu mwena wa gathigathini
Joshua16:7 Ũgacooka ũgaikũrũka kuuma Janoa nginya Atarothu na Naara
Joshua16:8 Kuuma Tapua mũhaka ũcio ũgathiĩ ũrorete na mwena wa ithũĩro
Joshua16:9 Bũrũri ũcio wothe warĩ hamwe na matũũra mothe na tũtũũra twamo tũrĩa Efiraimu maagaĩirwo thĩinĩ wa igai rĩa andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase.
Joshua16:10 No andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu matiigana kũrutũrũra andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga Gezeri; nginya ũmũthĩ andũ a Kaanani matũũranagia hamwe na andũ a Efiraimu
Joshua17:1 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩarĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Manase arĩ we irigithathi rĩa Jusufu
Joshua17:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio igai rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩarĩ rĩa andũ acio angĩ a Manase
Joshua17:3 No rĩrĩ
Joshua17:4 Nao airĩtu acio magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
Joshua17:5 Igai rĩa gĩthaka kĩa Manase rĩarĩ thanju ikũmi tũtegũtara Gileadi na Bashani iria ciarĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua17:6 Na tondũ airĩtu acio a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase nĩmaheirwo igai hamwe na ariũ a mũhĩrĩga ũcio
Joshua17:7 Naguo bũrũri wa Manase woimĩte o kũu Asheri nginya Mikemethathu mwena wa irathĩro wa Shekemu. Mũhaka wagereire mwena wa gũthini kuuma kũu ũgakinya kwa andũ arĩa maatũũraga Eni-Tapua.
Joshua17:8 (Bũrũri wa Tapua warĩ wa Manase
Joshua17:9 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũgĩthiĩ na mbere ũrorete mwena wa gũthini ũgĩkinya mũkuru wa karũũĩ ga Kana. Kũu kwarĩ na matũũra ma Efiraimu o hamwe na matũũra ma Manase
Joshua17:10 Mwena wa gũthini bũrũri warĩ wa Efiraimu
Joshua17:11 Kũu Isakaru na Asheri
Joshua17:12 No rĩrĩ
Joshua17:13 No rĩrĩ
Joshua17:14 Ningĩ andũ a Jusufu makĩũria Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua17:15 Nake Joshua akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua17:16 Andũ a Jusufu makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua17:17 No Joshua akĩĩra nyũmba ya Jusufu
Joshua17:18 no nĩmũkũheo mũtitũ wa bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma o naguo. Gũtheriei
Joshua18:1 Nakĩo kĩũngano gĩothe kĩa andũ a Isiraeli gĩkĩũngana kũu Shilo na gĩkĩamba Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo kuo
Joshua18:2 no nĩ gwatigarire mĩhĩrĩga mũgwanja ya Isiraeli ĩrĩa ĩtegwatĩire igai rĩayo.
Joshua18:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua akĩũria andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Joshua18:4 Thuurai andũ atatũ kuuma kũrĩ o mũhĩrĩga
Joshua18:5 Na inyuĩ nĩmũkagayania bũrũri ũcio icunjĩ mũgwanja. Mũhĩrĩga wa Juda ũgaikara o kũu bũrũri waguo mwena wa gũthini
Joshua18:6 Mwarĩkia kwandĩka ũrĩa ngʼongo icio mũgwanja ingĩgayanio-rĩ
Joshua18:7 No rĩrĩ
Joshua18:8 Nao andũ acio makĩambĩrĩria kuumagara magatuĩrie bũrũri ũcio. Nake Joshua akĩmaatha
Joshua18:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio makiumagara magĩtuĩkania bũrũri ũcio
Joshua18:10 Nake Joshua akĩmacuukĩra mĩtĩ o kũu Shilo mbere ya Jehova
Joshua18:11 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua18:12 Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa gathigathini waambĩrĩirie Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua18:13 Kuuma kũu ũgakĩrania ũrorete na mwena wa kĩharũrũka kĩa gũthini kĩa Luzu (na norĩo Betheli) na ũgaikũrũka nginya Atarothu-Adari gũkuhĩ na kĩrĩma kĩa mwena wa gũthini wa itũũra rĩa Bethi-Horoni ya Mũhuro.
Joshua18:14 Kuuma kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩngʼetheire Bethi-Horoni mwena wa gũthini
Joshua18:15 Naguo mwena wa gũthini mũhaka waambĩrĩirie gĩturi-inĩ kĩa Kiriathu-Jearimu
Joshua18:16 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio waikũrũkĩte o nginya magũrũ-inĩ ma kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩangʼetheire Gĩtuamba kĩa Beni-Hinomu
Joshua18:17 Mũhaka ũcio wacookete ũkegonya na mwena wa gathigathini
Joshua18:18 Mũhaka wathiĩte na mbere nginya kĩharũrũka-inĩ gĩa gathigathini kĩa Bethi-Araba na ũgaikũrũka nginya Araba.
Joshua18:19 Ningĩ ũgacooka ũkarora kĩharũrũka kĩa mwena wa gathigathini kĩa Bethi-Hogila
Joshua18:20 Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani nĩruo rwarĩ mũhaka wa mwena wa irathĩro. Ĩyo nĩyo yarĩ mĩhaka ĩrĩa yathiũrũrũkĩte igai rĩa mbarĩ cia Benjamini mĩena ĩyo yothe.
Joshua18:21 Mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini
Joshua18:22 na Bethi-Araba
Joshua18:23 na Avimu

Joshua18:28 na Zela
Joshua19:1 Mũtĩ wa keerĩ wagwĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni
Joshua19:2 Igai rĩu rĩao rĩarĩ na matũũra maya: Birishiba (kana Shiba)
Joshua19:3 na Hazari-Shuali
Joshua19:4 na Elitoladi
Joshua19:5 na Zikilagi
Joshua19:6 na Bethi-Lebaothu
Joshua19:7 Matũũra marĩa mangĩ maarĩ Aini
Joshua19:8 hamwe na tũtũũra tũrĩa tũngĩ tuothe twathiũrũrũkĩirie matũũra macio o nginya Baalathu-Biri (norĩo Rama ya kũu Negevu). Rĩu nĩrĩo rĩarĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa andũ a Simeoni
Joshua19:9 Igai rĩu mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni wagaĩirwo rĩarutirwo kuuma igai rĩa andũ a Juda
Joshua19:10 Mũtĩ wa gatatũ wagũĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni
Joshua19:11 Mũhaka ũcio ũkĩambata ũrorete na mwena wa ithũĩro ũgĩkinya Marala
Joshua19:12 Ũgĩcooka ũkĩrigiicũka na mwena wa irathĩro kuuma Saridi werekeire mwena ũrĩa riũa rĩrathagĩra
Joshua19:13 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũgĩthiĩ na mbere ũrorete mwena wa irathĩro
Joshua19:14 Kuuma hau mũhaka ũcio ũgĩthiũrũrũka na mwena wa gathigathini
Joshua19:15 Matũũra marĩa maanyiitĩtwo nĩ mũhaka ũcio maarĩ Katathu
Joshua19:16 Matũũra macio na tũtũũra twamo nĩmo maarĩ igai rĩa Zebuluni
Joshua19:17 Mũtĩ wa kana wagwĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru kũringana na ũrĩa mbarĩ ciao ciatariĩ.
Joshua19:18 Bũrũri wao warĩ na matũũra maya: Jezireeli
Joshua19:19 na Hafaraimu
Joshua19:20 na Rabithu
Joshua19:21 na Remethu
Joshua19:22 Mũhaka wahutĩtie Taboru
Joshua19:23 Matũũra macio na tũtũũra twamo nĩmo maarĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru
Joshua19:24 Mũtĩ wa gatano wagwĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri
Joshua19:25 Bũrũri wao warĩ na matũũra maya: Helikathu
Joshua19:26 na Alameleki
Joshua19:27 Ũgacooka ũkarigiicũka ũrorete na mwena wa irathĩro
Joshua19:28 Mũhaka ũcio ũgĩthiĩ nginya Abudoni
Joshua19:29 Mũhaka ũcio ũgĩcooka ũkĩrigiicũka werekeire Rama
Joshua19:30 o na matũũra ma Uma
Joshua19:31 Matũũra macio hamwe na tũtũũra twamo nĩmo maarĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri
Joshua19:32 Mũtĩ wa gatandatũ wagwĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali
Joshua19:33 Mũhaka wao woimire Helefu o kũu mũtĩ-inĩ ũrĩa mũnene thĩinĩ wa Zaananimu
Joshua19:34 Mũhaka ũcio ũkĩrigiicũka ũrorete mwena wa ithũĩro ũhĩtũkĩire Azinothu-Taboru

Joshua19:49 Rĩrĩa maarĩkirie kũgaya bũrũri ũcio kũringana na ũrĩa icunjĩ ciaheanĩtwo-rĩ
Joshua19:50 o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathanĩte. Nao maamũheire itũũra rĩrĩa oorĩtie aheo narĩo nĩ Timuna-Sera o kũu bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu. Nake agĩaka itũũra rĩu agĩtũũra kuo.
Joshua19:51 Maya nĩmo mabũrũri marĩa Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
Joshua20:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua20:2 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli mathuure matũũra manene ma kũũrĩrwo
Joshua20:3 nĩgeetha mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩũraga mũndũ na njĩra ya mũtino na atekwenda-rĩ
Joshua20:4 “Rĩrĩa orĩra itũũra rĩmwe rĩa macio manene-rĩ
Joshua20:5 Nake mũrĩhĩria wa thakame ĩyo ĩitĩtwo angĩmuuma thuutha
Joshua20:6 Mũndũ ũcio nĩarekwo aikare itũũra rĩu inene nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akaarũgama mbere ya andũ monganĩte aciirithio
Joshua20:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩamũra Kedeshi itũũra rĩrĩa rĩrĩ kũu Galili bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Nafitali
Joshua20:8 Naguo mwena wa irathĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mũrĩmo wa Jeriko magĩthuura Bezeri kũu werũ-inĩ ũrĩa mwaraganu mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wa Rubeni
Joshua20:9 Mũndũ o wothe Mũisiraeli o na kana mũndũ wa kũngĩ ũtũũranagia nao ũrĩa ũngĩũraga mũndũ ataciirĩire gwĩka ũguo no oorĩre matũũra-inĩ macio manene maathuurĩtwo nĩguo ndakooragwo nĩ mũrĩhanĩria wa thakame ĩyo ĩitĩtwo atanarũgama mbere ya andũ monganĩte aciirithio.
Joshua21:1 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua21:2 kũu Shilo bũrũri wa Kaanani makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua21:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Joshua21:4 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua21:5 Acio angĩ a rũciaro rwa Kohathu maaheirwo matũũra ikũmi kuuma mbarĩ ya mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu
Joshua21:6 Njiaro cia Gerishoni ciaheirwo matũũra ikũmi na matatũ kuuma mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru
Joshua21:7 Njiaro cia Merari
Joshua21:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩhe Alawii matũũra macio na kũndũ kũrĩa kwamathiũrũrũkĩirie kũrĩ ũrĩithio wao o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathanĩte na kanua ka Musa.
Joshua21:9 Kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Juda na wa Simeoni andũ a Isiraeli makĩheana matũũra maya magwetetwo na marĩĩtwa
Joshua21:10 (matũũra maya maaheirwo njiaro cia Harũni arĩa maarĩ a mbarĩ cia Akohathu cia mũhĩrĩga wa Alawii
Joshua21:11 Magĩkĩmahe Kiriathu-Ariba (na no kuo Hebironi)
Joshua21:12 No rĩrĩ
Joshua21:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio njiaro cia Harũni ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩcihe Hebironi (itũũra inene rĩa kũũrĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũraganĩte)
Joshua21:14 na Jatiri
Joshua21:15 na Holoni
Joshua21:16 na Aini
Joshua21:17 Na kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini makĩheo Gibeoni
Joshua21:18 na Anathothu
Joshua21:19 Matũũra mothe ma athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Joshua21:20 Nacio mbarĩ icio ingĩ ciatigarĩte cia Kohathu cia mũhĩrĩga wa Alawii ciaheirwo matũũra kuuma kũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu ta ũũ:
Joshua21:21 Kũu bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu maaheirwo Shekemu (itũũra inene rĩa kũũrĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũraganĩte)
Joshua21:22 na Kibizaimu
Joshua21:23 Ningĩ kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Dani makĩheo Eliteke
Joshua21:24 na Aijaloni
Joshua21:25 Kuuma nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase makĩheo Taanaka
Joshua21:26 Matũũra macio mothe ikũmi hamwe na ithaka ciamo cia ũrĩithio nĩmo maheirwo mbarĩ icio ingĩ cia Kohathu.
Joshua21:27 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua21:28 kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru
Joshua21:29 na Jaramuthu
Joshua21:30 kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri
Joshua21:31 na Helikathu
Joshua21:32 kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali
Joshua21:33 Matũũra mothe ma mbarĩ cia Agerishoni maarĩ ikũmi na matatũ hamwe na ithaka ciamo cia ũrĩithio.
Joshua21:34 Nacio mbarĩ cia Amerari (nao nĩo Alawii arĩa angĩ maatigaire) makĩheo: kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni
Joshua21:35 na Dimuna
Joshua21:36 kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni
Joshua21:37 na Kedemothu
Joshua21:38 kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi
Joshua21:39 na Heshiboni
Joshua21:40 Matũũra mothe marĩa maaheirwo mbarĩ cia Amerari
Joshua21:41 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio matũũra ma Alawii thĩinĩ wa bũrũri ũrĩa wegwatĩirwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli maarĩ mĩrongo ĩna na manana marĩ mothe
Joshua21:42 O itũũra rĩarĩ na ũrĩithio ũrĩa warĩthiũrũrũkĩirie; ũguo nĩguo matũũra macio mothe maatariĩ.
Joshua21:43 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩhe Isiraeli ũhurũko mĩena yothe
Joshua21:44 Nake Jehova akĩmahe ũhurũko na mĩena yothe o ta ũrĩa eerĩte maithe mao na mwĩhĩtwa. Gũtirĩ thũ o na ĩmwe yao yahotire kũmeetiiria
Joshua21:45 Gũtirĩ kĩrĩkanĩro o na kĩmwe kĩa maũndũ marĩa mega Jehova aameerĩire gĩtaahingirio; ciĩranĩro icio ciothe nĩciahingirio.
Joshua22:1 Ningĩ Joshua agĩĩta andũ a Mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni
Joshua22:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua22:3 Matukũ macio mothe mathirĩte o nginya ũmũthĩ-rĩ
Joshua22:4 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua22:5 No rĩrĩ
Joshua22:6 Nake Joshua akĩmarathima
Joshua22:7 (Musa nĩaheete nuthu ĩmwe ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase gĩthaka kũu Bashani
Joshua22:8 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua22:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni
Joshua22:10 Rĩrĩa maakinyire Gelilothu gũkuhĩ na Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani kũu bũrũri wa Kaanani-rĩ
Joshua22:11 Na rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maaiguire atĩ nĩmakĩte kĩgongona kĩu mũhaka-inĩ wa Kaanani kũu Gelilothu gũkuhĩ na Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mwena wa andũ a Isiraeli-rĩ
Joshua22:12 kĩungano gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli gĩkĩũngana Shilo nĩguo gĩkarũe nao.
Joshua22:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli magĩtũma Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai athiĩ bũrũri wa Gileadi; athiĩ kũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni
Joshua22:14 O hamwe nake
Joshua22:15 Rĩrĩa maathiire Gileadi
Joshua22:16 “Kĩũngano gĩothe kĩa Jehova gĩkũmũũria atĩrĩ
Joshua22:17 Mehia marĩa meekĩirwo Peori matitũiganĩte? Nginya ũmũthĩ ũyũ tũtirĩ twetheria mehia macio
Joshua22:18 Rĩu na inyuĩ nĩ Jehova mũrahutatĩra? “ ‘Mũngĩremera Jehova ũmũthĩ
Joshua22:19 Angĩkorwo bũrũri ũrĩa mwĩgwatĩire nĩmũthaahu-rĩ
Joshua22:20 Rĩrĩa Akani mũrũ wa Zera aagire kwĩhokeka maũndũ-inĩ makoniĩ indo iria ciamũrĩtwo cia kũniinwo-rĩ
Joshua22:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Rubeni
Joshua22:22 “Jehova
Joshua22:23 Angĩkorwo nĩtwakĩte kĩgongona giitũ ithuĩ ene nĩguo tũhutatĩre Jehova
Joshua22:24 “Aca! Ithuĩ twekire ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra atĩ mũthenya ũmwe njiaro cianyu ciahota gũkeera ciitũ atĩrĩ
Joshua22:25 Jehova nĩekĩrĩte mũhaka wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani ũtuĩke wa gũtũhakania ithuĩ na inyuĩ
Joshua22:26 “Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩatũmire tuuge atĩrĩ
Joshua22:27 No rĩrĩ
Joshua22:28 “Na ithuĩ tũkiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua22:29 “Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo
Joshua22:30 Rĩrĩa Finehasi
Joshua22:31 Nake Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akĩĩra Rubeni
Joshua22:32 Nake Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru
Joshua22:33 Nĩmakenire nĩ kũigua ũhoro ũcio
Joshua22:34 Nao andũ a Rubeni na Gadi magĩĩta kĩgongona kĩu ũũ: Mũira Gatagatĩ Gaitũ atĩ Jehova nĩwe Ngai.
Joshua23:1 Thuutha wa ihinda inene gũthira na Jehova agĩkorwo aheete andũ a Isiraeli ũhurũko kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciao ciothe iria ciamathiũrũrũkĩirie
Joshua23:2 agĩĩta andũ a Isiraeli othe
Joshua23:3 Inyuĩ ene nĩmwĩoneire maũndũ marĩa mothe Jehova Ngai wanyu ekĩte ndũrĩrĩ ici ciothe Nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Joshua23:4 Ririkanai ũrĩa ndamũgaĩire ndũrĩrĩ iria ciatigarĩte ituĩke igai rĩa mĩhĩrĩga yanyu
Joshua23:5 Jehova Ngai wanyu we mwene nĩagaciingata imweherere. Nĩagacieheria mbere yanyu
Joshua23:6 “Gĩai na hinya mũno; mũrũmie na mwathĩkagĩre watho wothe ũrĩa wandĩkĩtwo Ibuku-inĩ rĩa watho wa Musa
Joshua23:7 Mũtikanagwatanĩre na ndũrĩrĩ ici itigaire thĩinĩ wanyu; mũtikanagwete marĩĩtwa ma ngai ciacio kana mwĩhĩte nacio. Mũtikanacitungatĩre kana mũciinamĩrĩre.
Joshua23:8 No inyuĩ no nginya mũrũmie kwĩgwatania na Jehova Ngai wanyu
Joshua23:9 “Jehova nĩamũingatĩire ndũrĩrĩ nene na irĩ hinya mũno ikamweherera; na nginya ũmũthĩ ũyũ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũhotete kũmwĩtiiria.
Joshua23:10 Mũndũ ũmwe wanyu atooragia andũ ngiri
Joshua23:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩmenyererei mũno nĩguo mwendage Jehova Ngai wanyu.
Joshua23:12 “No rĩrĩ
Joshua23:13 hĩndĩ ĩyo na inyuĩ mũmenye wega atĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu ndagacooka kũingata ndũrĩrĩ icio ciehere mbere yanyu. No rĩrĩ
Joshua23:14 “Rĩu niĩ ngirie gwĩthiĩra na njĩra ĩrĩa andũ othe a thĩ mathiiaga. Nĩmũũĩ na ngoro cianyu ciothe
Joshua23:15 No rĩrĩ
Joshua23:16 Mũngĩthũkia kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova Ngai wanyu kĩrĩa aamwathire mũrũmagĩrĩre
Joshua24:1 Ningĩ Joshua agĩcookanĩrĩria mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli kũu Shekemu. Agĩĩta athuuri
Joshua24:2 Nake Joshua akĩĩra andũ othe atĩrĩ
Joshua24:3 No nĩndarutire ithe wanyu Iburahĩmu
Joshua24:4 nake Isaaka ngĩmũhe Jakubu na Esaũ. Nĩndagaĩire Esaũ bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Seiru
Joshua24:5 “ ‘Ningĩ ngĩcooka ngĩtũma Musa na Harũni
Joshua24:6 Rĩrĩa ndaarutire maithe manyu kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Joshua24:7 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkaĩra Jehova amateithie
Joshua24:8 “ ‘Ningĩ ngĩmũtwara bũrũri wa Aamori arĩa maatũũraga mwena wa irathĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Nao makĩrũa na inyuĩ na niĩ ngĩmaneana moko-inĩ manyu. Nĩndamaanangire mamweherere
Joshua24:9 Na rĩrĩa Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu mũthamaki wa Moabi eeharagĩria kũrũa na Isiraeli-rĩ
Joshua24:10 No niĩ ndingĩathikĩrĩirie Balamu; nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũmũrathima maita maingĩ
Joshua24:11 “ ‘Ningĩ mũkĩringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani na mũgĩkinya Jeriko. Nao andũ a Jeriko makĩrũa na inyuĩ
Joshua24:12 Ngĩcooka ngĩrekia magi marĩ mboora mathiĩ mbere yanyu
Joshua24:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩmũhe bũrũri mũtaanogeire na matũũra mũtaakĩte; na nĩkuo mũtũũraga
Joshua24:14 “Na rĩrĩ
Joshua24:15 No rĩrĩ
Joshua24:16 Nao andũ acio magĩcookia makiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua24:17 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ Jehova Ngai witũ we mwene watũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri hamwe na maithe maitũ
Joshua24:18 Nake Jehova nĩaingatire ndũrĩrĩ icio ciothe ciehere mbere iitũ
Joshua24:19 Nake Joshua akĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
Joshua24:20 Mũngĩgaatiganĩria Jehova na mũtungatĩre ngai cia kũngĩ
Joshua24:21 No andũ acio makĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua24:22 Nake Joshua akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua24:23 Joshua akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua24:24 Nao andũ acio makĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua24:25 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Joshua agĩthondekera andũ kĩrĩkanĩro
Joshua24:26 Nake Joshua akĩandĩka maũndũ macio Ibuku-inĩ rĩa Watho wa Ngai. Agĩcooka akĩoya ihiga inene
Joshua24:27 Akĩĩra andũ acio othe atĩrĩ
Joshua24:28 Nake Joshua agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ acio mathiĩ
Joshua24:29 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni
Joshua24:30 Nao makĩmũthika kũu gĩthaka kĩa igai rĩake
Joshua24:31 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩtungatĩra Jehova matukũ-inĩ mothe ma Joshua na ma athuuri arĩa maatigirwo muoyo Joshua akua
Joshua24:32 Namo mahĩndĩ ma Jusufu
Joshua24:33 Nake Eleazaru mũrũ wa Harũni agĩkua na agĩthikwo kũu Gibea
Judges1:1 Thuutha wa Joshua gũkua
Judges1:2 Nake Jehova agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges1:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Juda makĩĩra andũ a Simeoni
Judges1:4 Rĩrĩa andũ a Juda maamatharĩkĩire-rĩ
Judges1:5 Kũu nĩkuo maakorire Adoni-Bezeki
Judges1:6 Adoni-Bezeki akĩũra
Judges1:7 Nake Adoni-Bezeki akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges1:8 Ningĩ andũ a Juda magĩtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu
Judges1:9 Thuutha wa ũguo
Judges1:10 Ningĩ magĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga kũu Hebironi (kũrĩa tene gwetagwo Kiriathu-Ariba) maathiĩ makĩhoota Sheshai
Judges1:11 Kuuma kũu magĩthiĩ kũrũa na andũ arĩa maatũũraga Debiri (kũrĩa tene gwetagwo Kiriathu-Sefari.)
Judges1:12 Nake Kalebu akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges1:13 Nake Othinieli
Judges1:14 Mũthenya ũmwe Akisa nĩathiire kũrĩ Othinieli
Judges1:15 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges1:16 Nacio njiaro cia mũthoni-we wa Musa
Judges1:17 Nao andũ a Juda magĩthiĩ hamwe na andũ a Simeoni ariũ a ithe wao
Judges1:18 O na ningĩ andũ a Juda magĩtunyana matũũra manene ma Gaza
Judges1:19 Jehova aarĩ hamwe na andũ a Juda. Magĩkĩĩnyiitĩra bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma
Judges1:20 Na o ta ũrĩa Musa eeranĩire
Judges1:21 No rĩrĩ
Judges1:22 Na rĩrĩ
Judges1:23 Rĩrĩa maatũmire andũ magathigaane Betheli (kũrĩa mbere ĩyo gwetagwo Luzu)
Judges1:24 athigaani acio makĩona mũndũ akiuma kũu itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene
Judges1:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmoonia
Judges1:26 Mũndũ ũcio agĩcooka agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Ahiti
Judges1:27 No andũ a Manase matiaingatire andũ a Bethi-Shani
Judges1:28 Na rĩrĩ
Judges1:29 O nao andũ a Efiraimu matiigana kũingata andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga kũu Gezeri
Judges1:30 O nao andũ a Zebuluni matiigana kũingata andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga kũu Kitironi kana Nahaloli
Judges1:31 O na andũ a Asheri matiigana kũingata andũ othe arĩa maatũũraga Ako
Judges1:32 na tondũ wa ũguo andũ a Asheri magĩtũũrania na andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri ũcio.
Judges1:33 O nao andũ a Nafitali matiigana kũingata andũ arĩa maatũũraga kũu Bethi-Shemeshu
Judges1:34 Andũ a Aamori makĩhingĩrĩria andũ a Dani kũu bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma
Judges1:35 Ningĩ Aamori nĩmatuĩte itua rĩa gũtũũra Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Herezu
Judges1:36 Mũhaka wa Aamori woimĩte Ituĩkanĩrio rĩa Akirabimu
Judges2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges2:2 na inyuĩ mũtikanagĩe na kĩrĩkanĩro na andũ a bũrũri ũyũ
Judges2:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Judges2:4 Rĩrĩa mũraika wa Jehova aarĩkirie kwarĩria andũ a Isiraeli maũndũ macio mothe
Judges2:5 nao magĩĩta handũ hau Bokimu. Nao makĩrutĩra Jehova magongona hau.
Judges2:6 Thuutha wa Joshua kũrekereria andũ a Isiraeli-rĩ
Judges2:7 Nao andũ acio magĩtungatĩra Jehova matukũ-inĩ mothe ma Joshua na ma athuuri arĩa maatigirwo marĩ muoyo Joshua akua
Judges2:8 Nake Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni
Judges2:9 Nao makĩmũthika kũu gĩthaka-inĩ gĩake o kũu Timinathu-Heresi bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu
Judges2:10 Thuutha wa rũciaro rũu ruothe gũkua
Judges2:11 Ningĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova na magĩtungatĩra ngai cia Baali.
Judges2:12 Nao magĩtirika Jehova
Judges2:13 tondũ nĩmatirikĩte Jehova
Judges2:14 Nake Jehova akĩrakarĩra andũ a Isiraeli
Judges2:15 Rĩrĩa rĩothe andũ a Isiraeli maathiiaga kũrũa
Judges2:16 Ningĩ Jehova akĩmaarahũrĩra atiirĩrĩri bũrũri arĩa maamahonokirie moko-inĩ ma andũ acio maamatharĩkagĩra.
Judges2:17 No rĩrĩ
Judges2:18 Rĩrĩa rĩothe Jehova aamaarahũragĩra mũtiirĩrĩri bũrũri-rĩ
Judges2:19 No mũtiirĩrĩri bũrũri akua
Judges2:20 Tondũ ũcio
Judges2:21 ndigũcooka kũrutũrũra rũrĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwa iria Joshua aatigire kuo agĩkua.
Judges2:22 Nĩcio ngũhũthĩra kũgeria andũ a Isiraeli
Judges2:23 Jehova nĩetĩkĩririe ndũrĩrĩ icio itigare kuo
Judges3:1 Ici nĩcio ndũrĩrĩ iria Jehova aatigirie kuo nĩguo ageragie andũ a Isiraeli arĩa mataamenyerete ũhoro wa mbaara cia kũu Kaanani.
Judges3:2 (Eekire ũguo nĩgeetha arute njiaro cia andũ a Isiraeli ũhoro wa mbaara tondũ njiaro icio itiamenyete ũhoro wa kũrũa mbaara).
Judges3:3 Ndũrĩrĩ icio nĩcio ici: aathani arĩa atano a Afilisti
Judges3:4 Ciatigirio nĩgeetha igerie andũ a Isiraeli
Judges3:5 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩtũũrania na Akaanani
Judges3:6 Nao makĩhikia airĩtu ao
Judges3:7 Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmekire ũũru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova; makĩriganĩrwo nĩ Jehova Ngai wao
Judges3:8 Namo marakara ma Jehova magĩakanĩra andũ a Isiraeli o nginya akĩmarekereria moko-inĩ ma Kushani-Rishathaimu mũthamaki wa Aramu-Naharaimu
Judges3:9 No rĩrĩa maarĩrĩire Jehova
Judges3:10 Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩake
Judges3:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio bũrũri ũgĩkorwo na thayũ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
Judges3:12 O rĩngĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka ũũru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
Judges3:13 Egiloni akĩgĩĩra andũ a Amoni na Amaleki
Judges3:14 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩtuĩka ndungata cia Egiloni mũthamaki wa Moabi mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnana.
Judges3:15 O rĩngĩ andũ a Isiraeli makĩrĩrĩra Jehova
Judges3:16 Na rĩrĩ
Judges3:17 Nake agĩtwarĩra Egiloni mũthamaki wa Moabi igooti
Judges3:18 Thuutha wa Ehudu kũmũnengera igooti
Judges3:19 Nowe mwene aakinya mĩhianano-inĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ hakuhĩ na Giligali
Judges3:20 Nake Ehudu akĩmũkuhĩrĩria rĩrĩa aikarĩte arĩ o wiki nyũmba-inĩ yake ya ũthamaki ya igũrũ
Judges3:21 Ehudu agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake kwa ũmotho
Judges3:22 O na mũtĩ waruo ũgĩtoonya na rũhiũ rũkiumanĩra na thuutha. Ehudu ndaacomorire rũhiũ
Judges3:23 Ningĩ Ehudu agĩthiĩ gĩthaku-inĩ
Judges3:24 Ehudu aarĩkia gũthiĩ
Judges3:25 Nacio igĩeterera o nginya igĩconoka
Judges3:26 Na rĩrĩ
Judges3:27 Aakinya kuo akĩhuha karumbeta kũu bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu
Judges3:28 Akĩmaatha atĩrĩ
Judges3:29 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩũraga andũ ta 10
Judges3:30 Mũthenya ũcio andũ a Moabi magĩtuĩka ndungata cia andũ a Isiraeli
Judges3:31 Thuutha wa Ehudu hagĩũka mũndũ wetagwo Shamigari mũrũ wa Anathu
Judges4:1 Thuutha wa Ehudu gũkua-rĩ
Judges4:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩmarekereria moko-inĩ ma Jabini
Judges4:3 Jabini aarĩ na ngaari cia ita cia igera magana kenda
Judges4:4 Na rĩrĩ
Judges4:5 Nake aarĩ na handũ ha gũciirĩra rungu rwa Mũkĩndũ wa Debora
Judges4:6 Debora agĩtũmanĩra Baraka mũrũ wa Abinoamu kuuma Kedeshi ya Nafitali
Judges4:7 Niĩ nĩngũguucĩrĩria Sisera
Judges4:8 Nake Baraka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges4:9 Nake Debora akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges4:10 na kũu Baraka agĩĩta andũ a Zebuluni na a Nafitali. Andũ 10
Judges4:11 Na rĩrĩ
Judges4:12 Nao andũ makĩhe Sisera ũhoro
Judges4:13 Sisera agĩcookanĩrĩria ngaari ciake cia ita cia igera magana kenda
Judges4:14 Nake Debora akĩĩra Baraka atĩrĩ
Judges4:15 Rĩrĩa Baraka aamakuhĩrĩirie
Judges4:16 No Baraka akĩingatithia ngaari icio cia ita o hamwe na mbũtũ cia ita nginya Haroshethu-Hagoyimu. Nacio thigari ciothe cia Sisera ikĩũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora; na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe watigarire.
Judges4:17 No rĩrĩ
Judges4:18 Jaeli akiumagara agatũnge Sisera
Judges4:19 Sisera akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges4:20 Sisera akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges4:21 No Jaeli ũcio mũtumia wa Heberi akĩoya higĩ ya hema na nyondo
Judges4:22 Baraka agĩũka aingatithĩtie Sisera
Judges4:23 Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ
Judges4:24 Nakuo guoko kwa andũ a Isiraeli gũgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na hinya igũrũ rĩa Jabini
Judges5:1 Mũthenya ũcio Debora na Baraka mũrũ wa Abinoamu makĩina rwĩmbo rũrũ:
Judges5:2 “Rĩrĩa anene a Isiraeli maatongoria
Judges5:3 “Iguai ũhoro ũyũ
Judges5:4 “Rĩrĩa Wee Jehova woimire Seiru
Judges5:5 Irĩma nĩciathingithire mbere ya Jehova
Judges5:6 “Matukũ-inĩ ma Shamigari mũrũ wa Anathu
Judges5:7 Tũtũũra tũkĩaga andũ kũu Isiraeli
Judges5:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathuurire ngai ngʼeni
Judges5:9 Ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ hamwe na anene a Isiraeli
Judges5:10 “Inyuĩ mũhaicaga ndigiri njerũ
Judges5:11 kũrĩ na mĩgambo ya aini itahĩro-inĩ rĩa maaĩ. Mainaga ciĩko cia ũthingu cia Jehova
Judges5:12 ‘Wee Debora
Judges5:13 “Ningĩ andũ arĩa maatigaire
Judges5:14 Amwe mookire kuuma Efiraimu
Judges5:15 Anene a Isakaru maarĩ hamwe na Debora; Ĩĩ-ni
Judges5:16 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire mũikare mĩaki-inĩ mũiguage mahiũ makĩhuhĩrwo mĩrũri? Ngʼongo-inĩ cia Rubeni nĩ kwarĩ ũhoro mũnene wa gwĩcookera.
Judges5:17 Gileadi aikarire o kũu mũrĩmo wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Nake Dani-rĩ
Judges5:18 Andũ a Zebuluni nĩmetwarĩrĩire ũgwati-inĩ wa gĩkuũ; o nake Nafitali agĩĩka o ũguo kũu gũtũũgĩru werũ-inĩ.
Judges5:19 “Athamaki magĩũka
Judges5:20 Kũu igũrũ njata nĩciarũire
Judges5:21 Rũũĩ rwa Kishoni nĩ rwamathereririe
Judges5:22 Ningĩ mahũngũ ma mbarathi makĩrumia thĩ
Judges5:23 Nake mũraika wa Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges5:24 “Jaeli mũtumia wa Heberi ũrĩa Mũkeni
Judges5:25 Sisera aamũhoire maaĩ
Judges5:26 Aatambũrũkirie guoko gwake akĩoya higĩ ya hema
Judges5:27 Akĩinama magũrũ-inĩ make
Judges5:28 “Nyina wa Sisera agĩcũthĩrĩria na ndirica; akĩanĩrĩra arĩ gatirica-inĩ kau
Judges5:29 Atumia ake arĩa oogĩ mũno makamũcookagĩria; o nake agecookagĩria na ngoro yake atĩrĩ
Judges5:30 ‘Githĩ ti gwetha mareetha na makagayana indo cia ndaho: mũirĩtu ũmwe kana eerĩ harĩ o mũndũ
Judges5:31 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thũ ciaku iroothira
Judges6:1 Andũ a Isiraeli o rĩngĩ nĩmekire maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
Judges6:2 Na tondũ hinya wa andũ a Midiani nĩwamahatĩrĩirie mũno
Judges6:3 Rĩrĩa rĩothe andũ a Isiraeli maahaandaga irio-rĩ
Judges6:4 Nao nĩmambĩte hema ciao kũu bũrũri-inĩ
Judges6:5 Nĩgũkorwo maambataga kuo na mahiũ mao na hema ciao mahaana ta ngigĩ kũingĩha. Andũ na ngamĩĩra ciao matingĩatarĩkire; magĩtharĩkĩra bũrũri ũcio nĩgeetha mawanange biũ.
Judges6:6 Amidiani makĩnyariira andũ a Isiraeli o nginya andũ a Isiraeli magĩkaĩra Jehova amateithie.
Judges6:7 Na rĩrĩ
Judges6:8 akĩmatũmĩra mũnabii
Judges6:9 Nĩ niĩ ndaamũtharire kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa andũ a Misiri
Judges6:10 Ngĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:11 Nake mũraika wa Jehova agĩũka agĩikara thĩ gĩtina-inĩ kĩa mũgandi o kũu Ofira
Judges6:12 Nake mũraika ũcio wa Jehova akiumĩrĩra Gideoni
Judges6:13 Nake Gideoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:14 Nake Jehova akĩmũgarũrũkĩra
Judges6:15 Gideoni akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges6:16 Jehova akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:17 Nake Gideoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:18 Ndagũthaitha ndũkae kuuma haha nginya njooke na ndeehe iruta rĩakwa na ndĩrĩige mbere yaku.” Nake Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges6:19 Gideoni agĩtoonya nyũmba
Judges6:20 Nake mũraika wa Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:21 Nake mũraika wa Jehova akĩhutia nyama na mĩgate ĩyo ĩtaarĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia na mũthia wa rũthanju rwake. Mwaki ũgĩakana uumĩte ihiga-inĩ
Judges6:22 Rĩrĩa Gideoni aamenyire atĩ oima mũraika wa Jehova-rĩ
Judges6:23 Nowe Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gideoni agĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona hau
Judges6:25 O ũtukũ ũcio Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:26 Ũcooke wakĩre Jehova Ngai waku kĩgongona kĩrĩa kĩagĩrĩire hau igũrũ rĩa harĩa hambatĩru. Hũthĩra ngũ cia gĩtugĩ kĩa Ashera kĩrĩa ũtemangire
Judges6:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gideoni akĩoya ndungata ciake ikũmi
Judges6:28 Rũciinĩ kwarooka gũkĩa rĩrĩa andũ a itũũra mookĩrire-rĩ
Judges6:29 Makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Judges6:30 Andũ acio a itũũra makĩĩra Joashu atĩrĩ
Judges6:31 Nowe Joashu agĩcookeria kĩrĩndĩ kĩu kĩamũrigiicĩirie kĩ na ũũru atĩrĩ
Judges6:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthenya ũcio magĩtua Gideoni “Jerubu-Baali
Judges6:33 Na rĩrĩ
Judges6:34 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩa Gideoni
Judges6:35 Agĩtũma andũ bũrũri wothe wa Manase
Judges6:36 Nake Gideoni akĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Judges6:37 atĩrĩ
Judges6:38 Na ũguo noguo gwatuĩkire. Gideoni akĩroka gũũkĩra rũciinĩ tene mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ; akĩhiha rũũa rũu ime rũkiuma maaĩ mbakũri ĩmwe.
Judges6:39 Ningĩ Gideoni akĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Judges6:40 Ũtukũ ũcio Ngai agĩĩka o ro ũguo. No rũũa rwiki rwarĩ rũmũ; nakuo thĩ guothe kwarĩ kũhumbĩre nĩ ime.
Judges7:1 Rũciinĩ tene
Judges7:2 Jehova akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:3 Na rĩrĩ
Judges7:4 No Jehova akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gideoni agĩikũrũkia andũ acio maaĩ-inĩ. Marĩ hau Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges7:6 Andũ magana matatũ makĩnyua maaĩ na hĩ ciao. Acio angĩ othe magĩturia ndu makĩnyua maaĩ.
Judges7:7 Jehova akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gideoni akĩĩra andũ acio angĩ a Isiraeli macooke hema-inĩ ciao
Judges7:9 Ũtukũ ũcio Jehova akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:10 No angĩkorwo nĩũgwĩtigĩra gũtharĩkĩra-rĩ
Judges7:11 na ũthikĩrĩrie ũrĩa maroiga. Thuutha ũcio nĩũkũgĩa na hinya wa gũtharĩkĩra kambĩ ĩyo.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gideoni na Pura ndungata yake magĩikũrũka nginya tũnyũmba-inĩ twa arangĩri a kambĩ ĩyo.
Judges7:12 Nao Amidiani
Judges7:13 Gideoni aakinyire ho o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe eeraga mũratawe ũhoro wa kĩroto gĩake. Nake oigaga atĩrĩ
Judges7:14 Mũrata wake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges7:15 Rĩrĩa Gideoni aiguire ũhoro wa kĩroto kĩu na ũtaũri wakĩo
Judges7:16 Akĩgayania andũ acio magana matatũ ikundi ithatũ
Judges7:17 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges7:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa niĩ na arĩa othe ndĩ nao tũrĩhuha tũrumbeta twitũ
Judges7:19 Gideoni na andũ acio igana rĩmwe arĩa maarĩ nake magĩkinya mũthia wa kambĩ o kĩambĩrĩria-inĩ kĩa ũtukũ gatagatĩ
Judges7:20 Ikundi icio ithatũ ikĩhuha tũrumbeta
Judges7:21 Na rĩrĩa o mũndũ aarũgamire handũ hake gũthiũrũrũkĩria kambĩ-rĩ
Judges7:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa tũrumbeta tũu magana matatũ twahuhirwo
Judges7:23 Andũ a Isiraeli kuuma Nafitali
Judges7:24 Nake Gideoni agĩtũmana bũrũri wothe ũrĩa wa irĩma wa Efiraimu
Judges7:25 O na ningĩ nĩmanyiitire atongoria eerĩ a Midiani
Judges8:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges8:2 Nowe akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:3 Ngai nĩaneanire Orebu na Zeebu
Judges8:4 Gideoni na andũ ake magana matatũ
Judges8:5 Nake akĩĩra andũ a Sukothu atĩrĩ
Judges8:6 No anene a Sukothu makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges8:7 Nake Gideoni akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:8 Oima kũu akĩambata nginya Penieli
Judges8:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩĩra andũ a Penieli atĩrĩ
Judges8:10 Nao Zeba na Zalimuna maarĩ kũu Karikori marĩ na ita rĩa andũ ta 15
Judges8:11 Gideoni akĩambata na njĩra ya andũ arĩa maikaraga hema-inĩ mwena wa irathĩro rĩa Noba na Jogibeha
Judges8:12 Zeba na Zalimuna
Judges8:13 Gideoni mũrũ wa Joashu akĩhũndũka oimĩte mbaara-inĩ
Judges8:14 Nake akĩnyiita mwanake wa Sukothu
Judges8:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Gideoni agĩũka
Judges8:16 Agĩkĩnyiita athuuri acio a itũũra
Judges8:17 Ningĩ akĩmomora mũthiringo ũcio mũraihu na igũrũ wa Penieli
Judges8:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩũria Zeba na Zalimuna atĩrĩ
Judges8:19 Gideoni akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:20 Akĩgarũrũkĩra Jetheri
Judges8:21 Zeba na Zalimuna makĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges8:22 Andũ a Isiraeli makĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges8:23 Nowe Gideoni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges8:24 Ningĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges8:25 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges8:26 Naguo ũritũ wa icũhĩ icio cia thahabu aahooete wakinyire cekeri 1
Judges8:27 Gideoni agĩthondeka thahabu ĩyo ĩgĩtuĩka ebodi
Judges8:28 Ũguo nĩguo andũ a Midiani maahootirwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Judges8:29 Jerubu-Baali mũrũ wa Joashu nĩacookire gwake mũciĩ gũtũũra kuo.
Judges8:30 Na aarĩ na ariũ mĩrongo mũgwanja ake mwene
Judges8:31 Nayo thuriya yake ĩrĩa yaikaraga Shekemu
Judges8:32 Gideoni mũrũ wa Joashu aakuire arĩ mũkũrũ mũno
Judges8:33 Gideoni akua-rĩ
Judges8:34 na matiacookire kũririkana Jehova Ngai wao
Judges8:35 O na ningĩ nĩmagire gũcookia ngaatho kũrĩ nyũmba ya Jerubu-Baali (nĩwe Gideoni) nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa mothe mega aamekĩire.
Judges9:1 Abimeleku mũrũ wa Jerubu-Baali nĩathiire kũrĩ aa mamawe na andũ othe a mbarĩ ya kũrĩa nyina oimĩte kũu Shekemu
Judges9:2 “Ũriai atũũri othe a Shekemu atĩrĩ
Judges9:3 Rĩrĩa aa mamawe meerire atũũri a Shekemu ũhoro ũcio wothe
Judges9:4 Nao makĩmũhe cekeri mĩrongo mũgwanja cia betha irutĩtwo hekarũ-inĩ ya Baali-Berithu
Judges9:5 Agĩthiĩ gwa ithe mũciĩ o kũu Ofira na akĩũragithĩria ariũ a ithe mĩrongo mũgwanja ihiga-inĩ rĩmwe
Judges9:6 Nao atũũri othe a Shekemu na a Bethi-Milo makĩũngana mũtĩ-inĩ ũrĩa mũnene o hau gĩtugĩ-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ Shekemu
Judges9:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jothamu aaheirwo ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Judges9:8 Mũthenya ũmwe mĩtĩ nĩyoimagarire ĩgaitĩrĩrie ũmwe wayo maguta atuĩke mũthamaki wayo. Nayo ĩkĩĩra mũtamaiyũ atĩrĩ
Judges9:9 “No mũtamaiyũ ũcio ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges9:10 “Thuutha ũcio mĩtĩ ĩyo ĩkĩĩra mũkũyũ atĩrĩ
Judges9:11 “No mũkũyũ ũcio ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges9:12 “Ningĩ mĩtĩ ĩkĩĩra mũthabibũ atĩrĩ
Judges9:13 “No mũthabibũ ũcio ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges9:14 “Kũrĩkĩrĩria mĩtĩ yothe ĩkĩĩra mũtare wa gĩthaka-inĩ atĩrĩ
Judges9:15 “Naguo mũtare ũcio wa gĩthaka ũkĩĩra mĩtĩ ĩyo atĩrĩ
Judges9:16 “No rĩrĩ
Judges9:17 tondũ baba nĩwe wamũrũĩrĩire
Judges9:18 (no ũmũthĩ nĩmũũkĩrĩire nyũmba ya baba
Judges9:19 mũngĩkorwo mwĩkĩte ũndũ ũcio na kĩhooto
Judges9:20 No kũngĩkorwo ti ũguo-rĩ
Judges9:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jothamu agĩĩthara
Judges9:22 Thuutha wa Abimeleku gwathana Isiraeli mĩaka ĩtatũ-rĩ
Judges9:23 Ngai agĩtũma roho mũũru gatagatĩ ka Abimeleku na atũũri a Shekemu
Judges9:24 Ngai eekire ũndũ ũyũ nĩgeetha ngero ĩrĩa yagerirwo ariũ mĩrongo mũgwanja a Jerubu-Baali
Judges9:25 Nĩ ũndũ wa kũregana nake-rĩ
Judges9:26 Nake Gaali mũrũ wa Ebedi hamwe na ariũ a ithe magĩthaamĩra kũu Shekemu
Judges9:27 Thuutha wa gũthiĩ mĩgũnda-inĩ na gũcookereria thabibũ na gũcihiha
Judges9:28 Nake Gaali mũrũ wa Ebedi akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges9:29 Naarĩ korwo andũ aya me rungu rwa wathani wakwa! Hĩndĩ ĩyo niĩ no ndĩmweherie. No njĩĩre Abimeleku atĩrĩ
Judges9:30 Rĩrĩa Zebuli ũcio mwathi wa itũũra aiguire ũrĩa Gaali mũrũ wa Ebedi oigĩte-rĩ
Judges9:31 Agĩtũmĩra Abimeleku andũ na hitho
Judges9:32 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Judges9:33 Rũciinĩ tene riũa rĩkĩratha-rĩ
Judges9:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Abimeleku marĩ hamwe na mbũtũ ciake ciothe cia ita makiumagara ũtukũ
Judges9:35 Nake Gaali mũrũ wa Ebedi nĩoimagarĩte akarũgama itoonyero-inĩ rĩa kĩhingo gĩa itũũra inene
Judges9:36 Rĩrĩa Gaali aamoonire-rĩ
Judges9:37 No Gaali akĩaria rĩngĩ
Judges9:38 Ningĩ Zebuli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gaali agĩtongoria atũũri a Shekemu makĩhũũrana na Abimeleku.
Judges9:40 Abimeleku akĩmũtengʼeria
Judges9:41 Abimeleku agĩtũũra Aruma
Judges9:42 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ andũ a Shekemu magĩthiĩ mĩgũnda-inĩ
Judges9:43 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩoya andũ ake
Judges9:44 Abimeleku na ikundi iria aarĩ nacio makĩguthũka mbere nginya hau itoonyero-inĩ rĩa kĩhingo gĩa itũũra inene
Judges9:45 Abimeleku akĩhũũrana na itũũra rĩu inene mũthenya wothe nginya akĩrĩtaha na akĩũraga andũ a rĩo othe. Ningĩ akĩananga itũũra rĩu inene
Judges9:46 Rĩrĩa maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Judges9:47 Rĩrĩa Abimeleku aiguire atĩ nĩmacookanĩrĩire kuo-rĩ
Judges9:48 we na andũ ake othe makĩambata Kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩa Zalimuna. Akĩoya ithanwa
Judges9:49 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio othe magĩtema honge
Judges9:50 Abimeleku agĩthiĩ itũũra rĩa Thebezu
Judges9:51 No rĩrĩ
Judges9:52 Abimeleku agĩthiĩ mũthiringo-inĩ ũcio
Judges9:53 mũtumia ũmwe akĩmũgũithĩria ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi mũtwe
Judges9:54 Nake agĩĩta mũkuui wake wa indo cia mbaara na ihenya
Judges9:55 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire atĩ Abimeleku nĩakuĩte-rĩ
Judges9:56 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai aarĩhirie Abimeleku nĩ ũndũ wa waganu ũrĩa ekĩte ithe
Judges9:57 Ningĩ Ngai akĩrĩhia andũ a Shekemu nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wao wothe. Kĩrumi kĩa Jothamu mũrũ wa Jerubu-Baali gĩkĩmacookerera.
Judges10:1 Thuutha wa Abimeleku
Judges10:2 Agĩtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ; agĩcooka agĩkua
Judges10:3 Nake Tola akĩrũmĩrĩrwo nĩ Jairu wa kuuma Gileadi
Judges10:4 Jairu aarĩ na ariũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ arĩa mathiiaga mahaicĩte ndigiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ. Maathaga matũũra mĩrongo ĩtatũ kũu Gileadi
Judges10:5 Jairu akua aathikirwo kũu Kamonu.
Judges10:6 O rĩngĩ andũ a Isiraeli nĩmekire maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova. Magĩtungatĩra Mabaali na Maashitorethu
Judges10:7 akĩrakario nĩo. Akĩmaneana moko-inĩ ma Afilisti na moko-inĩ ma Aamoni
Judges10:8 arĩa maamanyariirire na makĩmahinyĩrĩria mwaka-inĩ ũcio. Nao makĩhinyĩrĩria andũ a Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani kũu Gileadi
Judges10:9 Ningĩ Aamoni makĩringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani nĩguo makarũe na andũ a Juda
Judges10:10 Ningĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩkaĩra Jehova makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges10:11 Jehova akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges10:12 na Asidoni
Judges10:13 No inyuĩ nĩmwandiganĩirie na mũgĩtungatĩra ngai ingĩ
Judges10:14 Thiĩi mũgakaĩre ngai icio mwĩthuurĩire. Nĩimũhonokagie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũranyamarĩka!”
Judges10:15 No andũ a Isiraeli makĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Judges10:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩkĩeheria ngai icio cia kũngĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ kao
Judges10:17 Rĩrĩa Aamoni meerirwo moe indo cia mbaara na makĩamba hema ciao kũu Gileadi-rĩ
Judges10:18 Atongoria a andũ a Gileadi makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Judges11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges11:2 Mũtumia wa Gileadi o nake akĩmũciarĩra aanake
Judges11:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jefitha akĩũrĩra ariũ a ithe
Judges11:4 Thuutha wa ihinda inini
Judges11:5 athuuri a Gileadi magĩthiĩ kũgĩĩra Jefitha kuuma bũrũri wa Tobu.
Judges11:6 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:7 Jefitha akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges11:8 Athuuri a Gileadi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:9 Jefitha akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Judges11:10 Athuuri acio a Gileadi makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges11:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jefitha agĩthiĩ hamwe na athuuri a Gileadi
Judges11:12 Ningĩ Jefitha agĩtũmana kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Aamoni na kĩũria gĩkĩ: “Nĩ ũhoro ũrĩkũ ũrĩ naguo na ithuĩ nĩgeetha ũtharĩkĩre bũrũri witũ?”
Judges11:13 Mũthamaki wa Aamoni agĩcookeria andũ a Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges11:14 Nake Jefitha agĩtũma andũ rĩngĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Aamoni
Judges11:15 akiuga atĩrĩ: “Ũũ nĩguo Jefitha oiga: Isiraeli ndooire bũrũri wa Moabi kana bũrũri wa Aamoni.
Judges11:16 No rĩrĩa maambatire makiuma Misiri
Judges11:17 Ningĩ Isiraeli agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Edomu
Judges11:18 “Magĩcooka magĩtuĩkanĩria werũ-inĩ
Judges11:19 “Ningĩ Isiraeli agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori
Judges11:20 Na rĩrĩ
Judges11:21 “Nake Jehova
Judges11:22 magĩtunyana guothe kuuma Arinoni nginya Jaboku
Judges11:23 “Na rĩrĩ
Judges11:24 Kaĩ ũtangĩoya kĩrĩa Kemoshu ngai yaku ĩkũheete? Ithuĩ na ithuĩ twĩgwatĩre kĩrĩa gĩothe Jehova Ngai witũ atũheete.
Judges11:25 Anga wee nĩũkĩrĩte Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu
Judges11:26 Handũ ha mĩaka magana matatũ Isiraeli matũũrĩte kũu Heshiboni
Judges11:27 Niĩ ndikũhĩtĩirie
Judges11:28 O na kũrĩ ũguo
Judges11:29 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩa Jefitha. Akĩringa Gileadi na Manase
Judges11:30 Nake Jefitha akĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa mbere ya Jehova
Judges11:31 o kĩrĩa gĩkoima nja na mũrango wa nyũmba yakwa kĩndũnge rĩrĩa ngaacooka hootanĩte kuuma kũrĩ Aamoni
Judges11:32 Nake Jefitha agĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na Aamoni
Judges11:33 Agĩthũkangia matũũra mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ kuuma Aroeri nginya gũkuhĩ na Minithu
Judges11:34 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jefitha aacookire gwake mũciĩ kũu Mizipa-rĩ
Judges11:35 Rĩrĩa aamuonire-rĩ
Judges11:36 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges11:37 Ningĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges11:38 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:39 Thuutha wa mĩeri ĩyo ĩĩrĩ
Judges11:40 atĩ o mwaka airĩtu a Isiraeli mathiiage nja mĩthenya ĩna kũririkana mwarĩ wa Jefitha ũcio Mũgileadi.
Judges12:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges12:2 Jefitha akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges12:3 Rĩrĩa ndonire atĩ mũtindeithia-rĩ
Judges12:4 Jefitha agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ a Gileadi
Judges12:5 Nao Agileadi makĩĩgwatĩra mariũko ma Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani marĩa maaringĩrĩire kũu Efiraimu
Judges12:6 makamwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges12:7 Jefitha agĩtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli mĩaka ĩtandatũ. Jefitha ũcio Mũgileadi agĩcooka agĩkua
Judges12:8 Thuutha wake
Judges12:9 Nake aarĩ na aanake mĩrongo ĩtatũ na airĩtu mĩrongo ĩtatũ. Akĩheana airĩtu ake mahikio nĩ arĩa maarĩ nja ya mũhĩrĩga wake
Judges12:10 Ibizani agĩcooka agĩkua
Judges12:11 Thuutha wake

Judges12:13 Thuutha wake

Judges13:1 O rĩngĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
Judges13:2 Mũndũ ũmwe warĩ wa Zora
Judges13:3 Mũraika wa Jehova akĩmuumĩrĩra
Judges13:4 Na rĩrĩ
Judges13:5 tondũ wee nĩũkũgĩa nda na ũciare kahĩĩ. Gũtirĩ kanyũi gakaahũthĩrwo mũtwe-inĩ wake
Judges13:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia ũcio agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthuuriwe
Judges13:7 No nĩanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Judges13:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Manoa akĩhooya Jehova: “Mwathani nĩndagũthaitha
Judges13:9 Ngai akĩigua Manoa
Judges13:10 Nake mũtumia akĩhiũha gũthiĩ kwĩra mũthuuriwe
Judges13:11 Manoa agĩũkĩra
Judges13:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Manoa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges13:13 Mũraika wa Jehova agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges13:14 Ndakarĩe kĩndũ o gĩothe kiumĩte mũthabibũ-inĩ
Judges13:15 Manoa akĩĩra mũraika wa Jehova atĩrĩ
Judges13:16 Mũraika wa Jehova agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges13:17 Nake Manoa agĩtuĩria ũhoro kuuma kũrĩ mũraika wa Jehova akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges13:18 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges13:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Manoa akĩoya koori hamwe na mũtu wa igongona
Judges13:20 O rũrĩrĩmbĩ rũkĩrĩrĩmbũkaga kuuma kĩgongona-inĩ rũrorete igũrũ-rĩ
Judges13:21 Rĩrĩa mũraika ũcio wa Jehova aagire gũcooka kwĩyonithania kũrĩ Manoa na mũtumia wake
Judges13:22 Akĩĩra mũtumia wake atĩrĩ
Judges13:23 No mũtumia wake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges13:24 Mũtumia ũcio agĩciara kahĩĩ na agĩgatua Samusoni. Gagĩkũra
Judges13:25 nake Roho wa Jehova akĩambĩrĩria gũkaarahũra o hĩndĩ ĩyo kaarĩ kũu Mahane-Dani
Judges14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges14:2 Acooka mũciĩ
Judges14:3 Ithe na nyina makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges14:4 (Aciari ake matiamenyaga atĩ ũndũ ũcio woimĩte kũrĩ Jehova
Judges14:5 Samusoni agĩikũrũka Timina marĩ hamwe na ithe na nyina. Na rĩrĩa makuhĩrĩirie mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ ya Timina-rĩ
Judges14:6 Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩake na hinya nginya agĩtarũranga mũrũũthi ũcio na moko matheri o ta ũrĩa angĩtarũranga koori. No ndaigana kwĩra ithe o na kana nyina ũrĩa ekĩte.
Judges14:7 Nake agĩcooka agĩikũrũka makĩaranĩria na mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio
Judges14:8 Thuutha ũcio
Judges14:9 ũrĩa aatahire na hĩ
Judges14:10 Na rĩrĩ
Judges14:11 Na rĩrĩa andũ maamuonire
Judges14:12 Samusoni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges14:13 Mwaremwo nĩ kũmĩtaũra-rĩ
Judges14:14 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges14:15 Naguo mũthenya wa ĩna wakinya
Judges14:16 Nake mũtumia wa Samusoni akĩĩgũithia harĩ we
Judges14:17 Akĩrĩra mĩthenya ĩyo yothe mũgwanja ya iruga rĩu
Judges14:18 Riũa rĩtanathũa mũthenya ũcio wa mũgwanja
Judges14:19 Nake Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩa Samusoni na hinya mũno. Nake agĩikũrũka nginya Ashikeloni

Judges15:1 Thuutha ũcio
Judges15:2 Ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges15:3 Samusoni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges15:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiumagara
Judges15:5 akĩgwatia icinga icio mwaki na akĩrekereria mbwe icio ngano-inĩ ya Afilisti ĩrĩa yarĩ mĩgũnda. Agĩcina itĩĩa cia ngano ĩrĩa yarũgamĩtio mũgũnda na ngano ĩrĩa ĩtaarĩ ngethe
Judges15:6 Rĩrĩa Afilisti mooririe atĩrĩ
Judges15:7 Nake Samusoni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges15:8 Agĩkĩmatharĩkĩra na ũũru mũnene na akĩũraga aingĩ ao. Agĩcooka agĩikũrũka na agĩikara ngurunga-inĩ ya ihiga rĩa Etamu.
Judges15:9 Nao Afilisti makĩambata na makĩamba hema kũu Juda
Judges15:10 Nao andũ a Juda makĩũria atĩrĩ
Judges15:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ ngiri ithatũ kuuma Juda magĩikũrũka nginya ngurunga-inĩ ya ihiga rĩa Etamu na makĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ

Judges15:13 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ

Judges15:15 Akĩona rũkambucu rwa ndigiri rũtaarĩ rũkũrũ
Judges15:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samusoni akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges15:17 Rĩrĩa aarĩkirie kwaria-rĩ
Judges15:18 Na tondũ aarĩ mũnyootu mũno
Judges15:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ngai agĩthikũria irima kũu Lehi
Judges15:20 Samusoni aatiirĩrĩire Isiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Afilisti.
Judges16:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Samusoni nĩathiire Gaza
Judges16:2 Andũ a Gaza makĩĩrwo atĩrĩ

Judges16:4 Thuutha ũcio
Judges16:5 Nao aathani a Afilisti magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we

Judges16:7 Nake Samusoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ

Judges16:9 Nao andũ mehithĩte thĩinĩ wa nyũmba-rĩ
Judges16:10 Nake Delila akĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges16:11 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ

Judges16:13 Delila agĩcooka akĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges16:14 na agĩcirũmia na higĩ. Agĩcooka akĩmwĩta o rĩngĩ
Judges16:15 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges16:16 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aamũgiaga na akamũtindĩrĩra mũthenya o mũthenya
Judges16:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Samusoni akĩmwĩra maũndũ mothe. Akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges16:18 Na rĩrĩa Delila aamenyire atĩ nĩamwĩra maũndũ make mothe
Judges16:19 Nake Delila agĩtũma Samusoni akome ciero-inĩ ciake
Judges16:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges16:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Afilisti makĩmũnyiita na hinya
Judges16:22 No rĩrĩ
Judges16:23 Na rĩrĩ
Judges16:24 Rĩrĩa andũ maamuonire
Judges16:25 Na rĩrĩa ngoro ciao ciacanjamũkĩte
Judges16:26 Samusoni akĩĩra ndungata ĩrĩa yamũnyiitĩte guoko atĩrĩ
Judges16:27 Na rĩrĩ
Judges16:28 Samusoni akĩhooya Jehova
Judges16:29 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samusoni akĩnyiita itugĩ icio cierĩ cia gatagatĩ iria ciarũgamĩtie hekarũ ĩyo. Agĩĩtiirania nacio
Judges16:30 Samusoni akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges16:31 Nao ariũ a ithe na nyũmba yothe ya ithe magĩikũrũka makamũgĩĩre. Makĩmũkuua makĩmũinũkia na makĩmũthika gatagatĩ ga Zora na Eshitaoli mbĩrĩra-inĩ ya ithe Manoa. Nake aatirĩrĩire Isiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
Judges17:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges17:2 akĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ

Judges17:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩcookia betha ĩyo kũrĩ nyina

Judges17:7 Mũlawii ũmwe mwanake kuuma itũũra rĩa Bethilehemu ya Juda
Judges17:8 akiuma itũũra-inĩ rĩu agĩthiĩ gwetha kũndũ kũngĩ gwa gũtũũra. Arĩ njĩra-inĩ agĩkora nyũmba ya Mika ĩrĩa yarĩ bũrũri-inĩ ũrĩa wa irĩma wa Efiraimu.

Judges17:12 Ningĩ Mika akĩamũra Mũlawii ũcio
Judges17:13 Nake Mika akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges18:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges18:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Dani magĩthuura njamba cia ita ithano kuuma Zora na Eshitaoli ithiĩ igathigaane bũrũri ũcio na ituĩrie ũhoro. Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Dani makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges18:3 Na rĩrĩa maakuhĩrĩirie nyũmba ya Mika
Judges18:4 Nake akĩmeera ũrĩa Mika aamwĩkĩire
Judges18:5 Nao magĩcooka makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges18:6 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges18:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio atano makiuma kuo na magĩkinya Laishi
Judges18:8 Na rĩrĩa maacookire Zora na Eshitaoli
Judges18:9 Magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges18:10 Mwakinya kuo
Judges18:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ magana matandatũ a kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Dani
Judges18:12 Marĩ njĩra-inĩ
Judges18:13 Kuuma kũu magĩthiĩ na mbere nginya bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu na magĩkinya mũciĩ wa Mika.
Judges18:14 Ningĩ andũ acio atano arĩa maathigaanĩte bũrũri ũcio wa Laishi makĩĩra ariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Judges18:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtoonya nyũmba ya mwanake ũcio Mũlawii o kũu mũciĩ kwa Mika na makĩmũgeithia.
Judges18:16 Nao andũ acio a Dani magana matandatũ meeohete indo cia mbaara makĩrũgama hau kĩhingo-inĩ.
Judges18:17 Andũ acio atano arĩa maathigaanĩte bũrũri ũcio magĩtoonya thĩinĩ
Judges18:18 Rĩrĩa andũ acio maatoonyire nyũmba ya Mika na makĩoya mũhianano wa gwacũhio
Judges18:19 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges18:20 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio agĩkena. Akĩoya ebodi
Judges18:21 Nao makĩhũndũka magĩthiĩ matongoretio nĩ ciana ciao iria nini na mahiũ mao
Judges18:22 Rĩrĩa maakorirwo mathiĩte handũ haraaya kuuma nyũmba ya Mika-rĩ
Judges18:23 O andũ acio makĩmoigagĩrĩria-rĩ
Judges18:24 Akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges18:25 Andũ acio a Dani magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges18:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio a Dani magĩĩthiĩra
Judges18:27 Ningĩ makĩoya kĩrĩa Mika aathondekete
Judges18:28 Gũtiarĩ na mũndũ wa kũmahonokia tondũ maatũũraga kũraihu na Sidoni na matiatarainie na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ. Itũũra rĩu inene rĩarĩ gĩtuamba-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ hakuhĩ na Bethi-Rehobu. Andũ acio a Dani magĩaka itũũra rĩu inene rĩngĩ na magĩthaamĩra kuo.
Judges18:29 Makĩrĩĩta Dani o ta ithe wao Dani ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ Isiraeli o na gũtuĩka itũũra rĩu inene rĩetagwo Laishi mbere ĩyo.
Judges18:30 Andũ a Dani makĩĩhaandĩra mĩhianano kũu
Judges18:31 Magĩthiĩ na mbere kũhũthĩra mĩhianano ĩrĩa Mika aathondekete
Judges19:1 Matukũ-inĩ macio Isiraeli gũtiarĩ na mũthamaki. Na rĩrĩ
Judges19:2 No thuriya ĩyo ĩkĩaga kwĩhokeka kũrĩ we. Nayo ĩkĩmũtiga ĩgĩcooka mũciĩ gwa ithe kũu Bethilehemu ya Juda. Thuutha wa gũkorwo kũu mĩeri ĩna
Judges19:3 mũthuuri wake agĩthiĩ kũrĩ we kũmũringĩrĩria acooke. Aathiire na ndungata yake na ndigiri igĩrĩ. Nake mũtumia ũcio akĩmũtoonyia nyũmba ya ithe
Judges19:4 Mũthoni-we
Judges19:5 Mũthenya wa ĩna magĩũkĩra tene na akĩĩhaarĩria oimagare
Judges19:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio eerĩ magĩikara thĩ kũrĩa na kũnyua. Thuutha-inĩ ithe wa mũirĩtu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges19:7 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio ookĩrire athiĩ
Judges19:8 Rũciinĩ rwa mũthenya wa gatano
Judges19:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio
Judges19:10 No rĩrĩ
Judges19:11 Rĩrĩa maakuhĩrĩirie Jebusi na kũrĩ hakuhĩ gũtuka-rĩ
Judges19:12 Mwathi wayo agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges19:13 Nake akiuga o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Judges19:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩthiĩ na mbere
Judges19:15 Kũu nĩkuo maatithirie maraarĩrĩre. Nao magĩthiĩ magĩikara thĩ kĩhaaro-inĩ kĩnene gĩa itũũra rĩu inene
Judges19:16 Hwaĩ-inĩ ũcio
Judges19:17 Na rĩrĩa aarorire akĩona mũgendi ũcio hau kĩhaaro-inĩ gĩa itũũra inene
Judges19:18 Agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges19:19 Ithuĩ tũrĩ na mahuti na irio cia ndigiri ciitũ na mĩgate na ndibei nĩ ũndũ witũ ithuĩ ndungata ciaku
Judges19:20 Nake mũthuuri ũcio mũkũrũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges19:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmũtoonyia nyũmba yake na akĩhe ndigiri ciake gĩa kũrĩa. Maarĩkia gwĩthamba magũrũ-rĩ
Judges19:22 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo meekenagia-rĩ
Judges19:23 Mwene nyũmba ĩyo akiuma na nja akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges19:24 Thikĩrĩriai
Judges19:25 No andũ acio matiigana kũmũthikĩrĩria. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Judges19:26 Na gũgĩthererũka-rĩ
Judges19:27 Na rĩrĩa mwathi wake ookĩrire rũciinĩ na akĩhingũra mũrango wa nyũmba akiuma nja nĩguo ethiĩre-rĩ
Judges19:28 Nake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Judges19:29 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyire mũciĩ-rĩ
Judges19:30 na mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wonire ũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges20:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges20:2 Atongoria a andũ othe a mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli makĩrũgama handũ hao kũu kĩũngano-inĩ kĩa andũ a Ngai
Judges20:3 (Nao andũ Benjamini makĩigua atĩ andũ a Isiraeli nĩmambatĩte nginya Mizipa.) Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges20:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũlawii ũcio mũthuuri wa mũtumia ũrĩa woragĩtwo akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges20:5 Ũtukũ ũcio andũ a Gibea nĩmaanũmĩrĩire
Judges20:6 Ngĩoya thuriya yakwa
Judges20:7 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges20:8 Andũ acio othe magĩũkĩra o taarĩ mũndũ ũmwe
Judges20:9 No rĩrĩ
Judges20:10 Tũkũruta andũ ikũmi thĩinĩ wa o andũ igana a mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli
Judges20:11 Tondũ ũcio andũ othe a Isiraeli makĩũngana na makĩnyiitana o ta maarĩ mũndũ ũmwe mahũũre itũũra rĩu inene.
Judges20:12 Mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli ĩgĩtũma andũ mathiĩ kũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wothe wa Benjamini
Judges20:13 Na rĩrĩ
Judges20:14 Moimire matũũra-inĩ mao
Judges20:15 O ro rĩmwe andũ a Benjamini magĩcookanĩrĩria andũ arĩa marũaga na hiũ cia njora 20
Judges20:16 Gatagatĩ-inĩ ga thigari icio ciothe nĩ kwarĩ na andũ magana mũgwanja maathuurĩtwo a kĩmotho
Judges20:17 Tiga andũ a Benjamini-rĩ
Judges20:18 Andũ a Isiraeli makĩambata nginya Betheli na magĩtuĩria ũhoro harĩ Ngai makĩũria atĩrĩ
Judges20:19 Rũciinĩ rũrũ rũngĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩũkĩra na makĩamba hema ciao gũkuhĩ na Gibea.
Judges20:20 Andũ a Isiraeli makiumagara makahũũrane na andũ a Benjamini
Judges20:21 Nao andũ a Benjamini makiuma kũu Gibea na makĩũraga andũ a Isiraeli 22
Judges20:22 No andũ a Isiraeli makĩũmanĩrĩria mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ na makĩrũgama handũ hao rĩngĩ o harĩa meigĩte mũthenya wa mbere.
Judges20:23 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩambata makĩrĩrĩra mbere ya Jehova nginya hwaĩ-inĩ
Judges20:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli magĩkuhĩrĩria andũ a Benjamini mũthenya wa keerĩ.
Judges20:25 Mũthenya ũcio
Judges20:26 Ningĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Judges20:27 Nao andũ a Isiraeli
Judges20:28 nake Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru
Judges20:29 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩmoheria mathiũrũrũkĩirie Gibea.
Judges20:30 Nao makĩambata makahũũrane na andũ a Benjamini mũthenya wa gatatũ na makĩrũgama handũ hao nĩguo mahũũrane na Gibea o ta ũrĩa meekĩte hau mbere.
Judges20:31 Nao Abenjamini makiumĩra mamatũnge na makĩguucĩrĩrio kũraihu na itũũra rĩu inene. Makĩambĩrĩria kũhũũra andũ a Isiraeli o ta mbere ĩyo
Judges20:32 Rĩrĩa andũ a Benjamini meeranaga atĩrĩ
Judges20:33 Andũ othe a Isiraeli makĩehera harĩa maarĩ na makĩrũgama handũ hao kũu Baali-Tamaru
Judges20:34 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ ngiri ikũmi arĩa maarĩ njamba iria thuure cia Isiraeli magĩtharĩkĩra Gibea kuuma na mbere. Nayo mbaara yarĩ nene ũũ atĩ andũ a Benjamini matiigana gũkũũrana ũrĩa mwanangĩko wamakuhĩrĩirie.
Judges20:35 Nake Jehova akĩhootera andũ a Benjamini mbere ya Isiraeli
Judges20:36 Tondũ ũcio andũ a Benjamini makĩona atĩ nĩmaatooretio. Na rĩrĩ
Judges20:37 Nao andũ acio moohetie andũ makĩguthũka o rĩmwe magĩtoonya Gibea
Judges20:38 Nao andũ a Isiraeli nĩ mabangĩte na andũ acio moohetie andũ atĩ matoogie ndogo nene ĩthiĩ na igũrũ yumĩte itũũra rĩu inene
Judges20:39 nĩgeetha hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli magarũrũke na macooke mbaara-inĩ. Andũ a Benjamini maakorirwo maambĩrĩria kũũraga andũ a Isiraeli (ta andũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ)
Judges20:40 No rĩrĩa ndogo yambĩrĩirie kwambata na igũrũ yumĩte itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene-rĩ
Judges20:41 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli makĩmagarũrũkĩra nao andũ a Benjamini makĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya mũnene
Judges20:42 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩũrĩra andũ a Isiraeli marorete na werũ-inĩ
Judges20:43 Magĩthiũrũrũkĩria andũ a Benjamini acio
Judges20:44 Andũ a Benjamini ngiri ikũmi na inyanya magĩkua
Judges20:45 Na rĩrĩa maagarũrũkire marorete na werũ-inĩ nginya ihiga-inĩ rĩa Rimoni
Judges20:46 Mũthenya ũcio andũ a Benjamini 25
Judges20:47 No andũ magana matandatũ makĩgarũrũka na makĩũrĩra werũ-inĩ o nginya ihiga-inĩ rĩa Rimoni
Judges20:48 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩcooka nginya bũrũri wa andũ a Benjamini na makĩhũũra matũũra mothe na rũhiũ rwa njora
Judges21:1 Andũ acio a Isiraeli nĩmehĩtĩte mwĩhĩtwa marĩ kũu Mizipa makoiga atĩrĩ
Judges21:2 Andũ acio nĩmathiire Betheli
Judges21:3 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:4 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũciinĩ tene andũ magĩaka kĩgongona na makĩruta maruta ma njino o na maruta ma ũiguano.
Judges21:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli makĩũria atĩrĩ
Judges21:6 Na rĩrĩ
Judges21:7 Tũngĩhota atĩa kuonera arĩa matigarĩte atumia
Judges21:8 Magĩcooka makĩũria atĩrĩ
Judges21:9 Tondũ rĩrĩa maatarire andũ
Judges21:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kĩũngano kĩu gĩgĩtũma andũ a kũrũa 12
Judges21:11 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:12 Nao magĩkora gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ arĩa maatũũraga kũu Jabeshi-Gileadi airĩtu magana mana arĩa mataakomete na mũndũ mũrũme
Judges21:13 Ningĩ kĩũngano gĩothe gĩgĩtũma ihooya rĩa thayũ kũrĩ andũ a Benjamini o hau rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga rĩa Rimoni.
Judges21:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Benjamini makĩhũndũka ihinda o rĩu na makĩheo andũ-a-nja a Jabeshi-Gileadi arĩa matooragĩtwo. No matingĩamaiganire.
Judges21:15 Nao andũ magĩcakaĩra andũ a Benjamini
Judges21:16 Nao athuuri arĩa akũrũ a kĩũngano makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:17 Makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:18 Tũtingĩmahe airĩtu aitũ matuĩke atumia ao
Judges21:19 No rĩrĩ
Judges21:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩatha andũ a Benjamini
Judges21:21 na mũikare mũkĩroraga. Rĩrĩa airĩtu a Shilo mariumĩra meturanĩre na arĩa angĩ rwĩmbo-inĩ-rĩ
Judges21:22 Rĩrĩa maithe mao kana ariũ a maithe mao magaatũrehera thitango
Judges21:23 Ũguo nĩguo andũ a Benjamini meekire. O rĩrĩa airĩtu maainaga-rĩ
Judges21:24 Na ihinda rĩu andũ a Isiraeli makiuma kũndũ kũu
Judges21:25 Matukũ-inĩ macio Isiraeli gũtiarĩ na mũthamaki; o mũndũ ekaga ũrĩa oonaga kwagĩrĩire.
Ruth1:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth1:2 Mũndũ ũcio eetagwo Elimeleku
Ruth1:3 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth1:4 Nao makĩhikia andũ-a-nja a Moabi
Ruth1:5 Mahaloni na Kilioni o nao magĩkua
Ruth1:6 Rĩrĩa Naomi aiguire arĩ kũu Moabi atĩ Jehova nĩateithĩtie andũ ake akamahe irio-rĩ
Ruth1:7 We na atumia acio eerĩ a ariũ ake makiumagara kuuma kũu maatũũraga
Ruth1:8 Nake Naomi akĩĩra atumia acio eerĩ a ariũ ake atĩrĩ
Ruth1:9 Jehova arotũma o ũmwe wanyu eyonere ũhurũko mũciĩ wa mũthuuri ũngĩ.” Agĩcooka akĩmamumunya
Ruth1:10 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth1:11 No Naomi akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ruth1:12 Aarĩ akwa
Ruth1:13 mwakĩmeterera o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa makaagimara? No mũikare mũtahikĩte mũmetereire? Aca
Ruth1:14 Nao maigua ũguo makĩrĩra rĩngĩ. Nake Oripa akĩmumunya nyaciarawe
Ruth1:15 Nake Naomi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth1:16 No Ruthu akĩmũcookeria
Ruth1:17 Kũrĩa ũgaakuĩra nĩkuo ngaakuĩra
Ruth1:18 Rĩrĩa Naomi onire atĩ Ruthu nĩatuĩte itua rĩa gũthiĩ nake
Ruth1:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio a nja eerĩ magĩthiĩ nginya magĩkinya Bethilehemu. Rĩrĩa maakinyire Bethilehemu-rĩ
Ruth1:20 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ruth1:21 Ndoimire gũkũ njiyũrĩrĩire
Ruth1:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Naomi agĩcooka kuuma Moabi marĩ hamwe na Ruthu ũcio Mũmoabi
Ruth2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth2:2 Nake Ruthu ũcio Mũmoabi akĩĩra Naomi atĩrĩ
Ruth2:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiumagara agĩthiĩ
Ruth2:4 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Boazu agĩkinya oimĩte Bethilehemu
Ruth2:5 Boazu akĩũria mũrũgamĩrĩri wa acio maagethaga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:6 Nake mũrũgamĩrĩri akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Ruth2:7 Nake oigire atĩrĩ
Ruth2:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Boazu akĩĩra Ruthu atĩrĩ
Ruth2:9 Ũrorage mũgũnda ũrĩa arũme aya megũkorwo makĩgetha
Ruth2:10 Rĩrĩa Ruthu aiguire ũguo
Ruth2:11 Boazu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Ruth2:12 Jehova arokũrĩha nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo wĩkĩte. Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli
Ruth2:13 Nake Ruthu akiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:14 Hĩndĩ ya kũrĩa irio yakinya
Ruth2:15 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ookĩrire akahaare-rĩ
Ruth2:16 O na nĩ kaba mũrutage cairi ĩmwe kuuma itĩĩa-inĩ
Ruth2:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ruthu akĩhaara kũu mũgũnda ũcio nginya o hwaĩ-inĩ. Agĩcooka akĩhũũra cairi ĩrĩa aahaarĩte
Ruth2:18 Akĩmĩkuua
Ruth2:19 Nyaciarawe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Ruth2:20 Naomi akĩĩra mũtumia ũcio wa mũriũ atĩrĩ
Ruth2:21 Nake Ruthu ũcio Mũmoabi akiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:22 Naomi akĩĩra Ruthu ũcio mũtumia wa mũriũ atĩrĩ
Ruth2:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ruthu agĩikara hakuhĩ na ndungata cia airĩtu cia Boazu akĩhaaraga nginya magetha ma cairi na ma ngano magĩthira. Nake agĩtũũra na nyaciarawe.
Ruth3:1 Mũthenya ũmwe-rĩ
Ruth3:2 Githĩ Boazu ũcio wee ũkoretwo na ndungata ciake cia airĩtu ti mũndũ wa rũrĩra rwitũ? Ũtukũ ũyũ nĩguo ekũhuha cairi kĩhuhĩro-inĩ.
Ruth3:3 Wĩthambe na wĩhake maguta mekũnunga wega
Ruth3:4 Rĩrĩa arĩkoma
Ruth3:5 Ruthu akĩmũcookeria
Ruth3:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩikũrũka agĩkinya kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩu
Ruth3:7 Na rĩrĩa Boazu aarĩkirie kũrĩa na kũnyua
Ruth3:8 Ũtukũ gatagatĩ
Ruth3:9 Akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Ruth3:10 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth3:11 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth3:12 O na gũtuĩka ndĩ ũmwe wa arĩa mangĩkũmenyerera-rĩ
Ruth3:13 Rĩu kĩraare haha ũtukũ ũyũ
Ruth3:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ruthu agĩkoma hau magũrũ-inĩ make nginya rũciinĩ

Ruth3:18 Nake Naomi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth4:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth4:2 Boazu agĩĩta athuuri ikũmi a itũũra akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ruth4:3 Ningĩ akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wa mbarĩ yao atĩrĩ
Ruth4:4 Ndagĩĩciiria ngũhe ũhoro ũcio na ngwĩre ũgũre gĩthaka kĩu ũrĩ mbere ya andũ aya maikarĩte haha o na mbere ya athuuri a andũ aitũ. Ũngĩkorwo nĩũgũgĩkũũra
Ruth4:5 Boazu nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth4:6 Na rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio wa mbarĩ yao aiguire ũguo-rĩ
Ruth4:7 (Matukũ-inĩ ma tene thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli-rĩ

Ruth4:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Boazu akĩĩra athuuri acio na andũ othe atĩrĩ
Ruth4:10 Ningĩ nĩndahikia Ruthu ũrĩa Mũmoabi
Ruth4:11 Ningĩ athuuri acio
Ruth4:12 Ciana iria Jehova egũkũhe kuuma kũrĩ mũirĩtu ũcio irotũma nyũmba yaku ĩhaane ta ya Perezu
Ruth4:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Boazu akĩhikia Ruthu
Ruth4:14 Nao andũ-a-nja makĩĩra Naomi atĩrĩ
Ruth4:15 Kau nĩko gakerũhia mũtũũrĩre waku
Ruth4:16 Nake Naomi akĩoya kaana kau
Ruth4:17 Nao andũ-a-nja arĩa maatũũraga kũu makiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth4:18 Ici nacio nĩcio njiaro cia Perezu: Perezu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Hezironi
Ruth4:19 nake Hezironi aarĩ ithe wa Ramu
Ruth4:20 nake Ramu aarĩ ithe wa Aminadabu
Ruth4:21 nake Salimoni aarĩ ithe wa Boazu
Ruth4:22 nake Obedi aarĩ ithe wa Jesii
1Samuel1:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:2 Aarĩ na atumia eerĩ; ũmwe eetagwo Hana na ũrĩa ũngĩ eetagwo Penina. Penina aarĩ na ciana
1Samuel1:3 Mwaka o mwaka mũndũ ũcio nĩambataga kuuma itũũra rĩake agathiĩ Shilo kũhooya na kũrutĩra Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe igongona. Shilo nĩkuo Hofini na Finehasi
1Samuel1:4 Rĩrĩa rĩothe mũthenya wa Elikana wakinyaga wa kũruta igongona-rĩ
1Samuel1:5 No nĩaheaga Hana rũgai maita meerĩ
1Samuel1:6 Na tondũ Jehova nĩamũhingĩte nda-rĩ
1Samuel1:7 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩthiĩ na mbere mwaka o mwaka. Rĩrĩa rĩothe Hana aambataga athiĩ nyũmba ya Jehova-rĩ
1Samuel1:8 Nake Elikana mũthuuriwe akamũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:9 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe maarĩkia kũrĩa na kũnyua marĩ kũu Shilo-rĩ
1Samuel1:10 Hana akĩrĩra mũno na akĩhooya Jehova
1Samuel1:11 Nake akĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa
1Samuel1:12 Na rĩrĩa aathiiaga na mbere kũhooya Jehova
1Samuel1:13 Hana aahooyaga na ngoro yake
1Samuel1:14 akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:15 Hana akĩmũcookeria
1Samuel1:16 Tiga kuona ndungata yaku ta ĩrĩ mũndũ-wa-nja mwaganu; ngoretwo gũkũ ngĩhooya ndĩ na ruo rũingĩ o na kĩeha.”
1Samuel1:17 Eli akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:18 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:19 Magĩũkĩra mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũciinĩ tene
1Samuel1:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ihinda rĩgĩkinya Hana akĩgĩa nda na agĩciara kahĩĩ. Agĩgatua Samũeli
1Samuel1:21 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio wetagwo Elikana aambatire hamwe na nyũmba yake yothe kũrutĩra Jehova igongona rĩa mwaka o mwaka na akahingie mwĩhĩtwa wake-rĩ
1Samuel1:22 Hana ndaathiire. Eerire mũthuuriwe atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:23 Mũthuuriwe Elikana akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:24 Gaatiga kuonga
1Samuel1:25 Maarĩkia gũthĩnja ndegwa-rĩ
1Samuel1:26 Nake Hana akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:27 Ndahooire heo kahĩĩ gaka
1Samuel1:28 Tondũ ũcio o na niĩ nĩndakaamũrĩra Jehova. Matukũ mothe marĩa gegũtũũra muoyo-rĩ
1Samuel2:1 Ningĩ Hana akĩhooya

1Samuel2:3 “Mũtigacooke kwaria na mwĩĩkĩrĩro ũguo kana mũreke tũnua twanyu twarie na mwĩtĩĩo
1Samuel2:4 “Mota ma njamba cia ita nĩmoinangĩku
1Samuel2:5 Arĩa maarĩ ahũũnu meyandĩkithagia nĩguo mone irio
1Samuel2:6 “Jehova nĩwe ũrehaga gĩkuũ
1Samuel2:7 Jehova nĩwe ũtũmaga andũ mathĩĩne na arĩa angĩ matonge; nĩwe ũnyiihanagia na agatũũganĩria.
1Samuel2:8 Ooyaga mũthĩĩni akamũruta rũkũngũ-inĩ
1Samuel2:9 Nĩakamenyerera makinya ma andũ ake arĩa atheru
1Samuel2:10 arĩa makararagia Jehova nĩmagathuthwo. Nĩakamookĩrĩra na marurumĩ arĩ o kũu igũrũ; Jehova nĩwe ũgatuĩra ituri cia thĩ ciira. “Nĩakahe mũthamaki wake hinya
1Samuel2:11 Nake Elikana akĩinũka mũciĩ gwake Rama
1Samuel2:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:13 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:14 Yaikagia njibe ĩyo nyũngũ-inĩ ya kĩgera
1Samuel2:15 Na o na mbere ya maguta gũcinwo-rĩ
1Samuel2:16 Mũndũ angĩamwĩrire atĩrĩ
1Samuel2:17 Wĩhia ũcio wa aanake a Eli warĩ mũnene mũno maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
1Samuel2:18 Nowe Samũeli aatungataga mbere ya Jehova arĩ o mwana mũnini
1Samuel2:19 O mwaka nyina nĩamũtumagĩra gakanjũ
1Samuel2:20 Eli nĩarathimaga Elikana na mũtumia wake
1Samuel2:21 Nake Jehova akĩiguĩra Hana tha; akĩgĩa nda agĩciara aanake atatũ na airĩtu eerĩ. Nake mwana ũcio ti Samũeli agĩkũrĩra hau mbere ya Jehova.
1Samuel2:22 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Samuel2:24 Aca
1Samuel2:25 Mũndũ angĩhĩria mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ-rĩ
1Samuel2:26 Nake mwana ũcio ti Samũeli agĩkũra
1Samuel2:27 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:28 Ndathuurire thoguo kuuma mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yothe ya Isiraeli atuĩke mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai wakwa
1Samuel2:29 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte mũnyarare igongona rĩakwa na iruta
1Samuel2:30 “Tondũ wa ũguo-rĩ
1Samuel2:31 Hĩndĩ nĩĩroka rĩrĩa ngaaniina hinya waku na niine hinya wa andũ a nyũmba ya thoguo
1Samuel2:32 nawe nĩũkona mĩnyamaro gĩikaro-inĩ gĩakwa. O na gũtuĩka ũndũ mwega nĩũgeekwo Isiraeli
1Samuel2:33 O mũndũ waku ũrĩa itakeheria kĩgongona-inĩ gĩakwa-rĩ
1Samuel2:34 “ ‘Naguo ũndũ ũrĩa ũkũhaana kũrĩ ariũ aku eerĩ
1Samuel2:35 Na niĩ nĩngethuurĩra mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai mwĩhokeku
1Samuel2:36 Ningĩ mũndũ wothe ũrĩa ũgaatigara wa nyũmba yaku
1Samuel3:1 Nake mwana ũcio ti Samũeli aatungataga mbere ya Jehova arĩ harĩ Eli. Matukũ-inĩ macio kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩtiaiguagwo kaingĩ
1Samuel3:2 Ũtukũ ũmwe Eli
1Samuel3:3 Tawa wa Ngai ndwahorete
1Samuel3:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehova agĩĩta Samũeli. Samũeli agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:5 Nake agĩtengʼera kũrĩ Eli
1Samuel3:6 Jehova agĩĩtana rĩngĩ
1Samuel3:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samũeli ndaakoretwo amenyete Jehova
1Samuel3:8 Jehova nĩetire Samũeli riita rĩa gatatũ
1Samuel3:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Eli akĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:10 Nake Jehova agĩũka akĩrũgama hau
1Samuel3:11 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo maũndũ marĩa mothe ndoigire ma gũũkĩrĩra Eli na nyũmba yake nĩngamahingia kuuma kĩambĩrĩria nginya mũthia.
1Samuel3:13 Nĩgũkorwo nĩndamwĩrire nĩngatuĩra nyũmba yake ciira nginya tene nĩ ũndũ wa mehia marĩa we oĩ ũhoro wamo; ariũ ake nĩmetuire andũ a kũmeneka
1Samuel3:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndehĩtire igũrũ rĩa nyũmba ya Eli ngiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:15 Samũeli agĩkoma o nginya rũciinĩ
1Samuel3:16 no Eli akĩmwĩta
1Samuel3:17 Eli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Samũeli akĩmwĩra maũndũ mothe
1Samuel3:19 Jehova nĩakoragwo hamwe na Samũeli o ũrĩa aakũraga
1Samuel3:20 Nakuo Isiraeli guothe kuuma Dani nginya Birishiba magĩkũũrana atĩ Samũeli aarĩ mũthuure atuĩke mũnabii wa Jehova.
1Samuel3:21 Nake Jehova agĩthiĩ na mbere kuonekana kũu Shilo
1Samuel4:1 20 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel4:2 Afilisti magĩtũma ita rĩao rĩgacemanie na Isiraeli
1Samuel4:3 Rĩrĩa mbũtũ ciacookire kambĩ-inĩ-rĩ
1Samuel4:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio magĩtũma andũ kũu Shilo
1Samuel4:5 Rĩrĩa ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova rĩakinyire kambĩ-inĩ-rĩ
1Samuel4:6 Na rĩrĩa Afilisti maaiguire mbugĩrĩrio ĩyo makĩũrania atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:7 Afilisti magĩĩtigĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
