1Samuel4:8 Wũi-ĩiya-witũ-ĩ! Nũũ ũgũtũhonokia moko-inĩ ma ngai ici irĩ hinya ũũ? Ici nĩcio ngai iria ciahũũrire andũ a Misiri na mĩthiro ya mĩthemba yothe werũ-inĩ.
1Samuel4:9 Mwĩyũmĩrĩriei
1Samuel4:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Afilisti makĩrũa nao
1Samuel4:11 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai rĩgĩtahwo
1Samuel4:12 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Mũbenjamini ũmwe akĩhanyũka oimĩte mbaara-inĩ
1Samuel4:13 Na rĩrĩa aakinyire-rĩ
1Samuel4:14 Rĩrĩa Eli aiguire mũkayũrũrũko ũcio akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:15 ũrĩa warĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo kenda na ĩnana
1Samuel4:16 Akĩĩra Eli atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:17 Mũndũ ũcio warehire ũhoro agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:18 Rĩrĩa aagwetire ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai
1Samuel4:19 Mũtumia wa mũriũ wake Finehasi aarĩ na nda na aatigĩtie hanini aciare. Na rĩrĩa aaiguire ũhoro ũcio wa atĩ ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai nĩrĩtahĩtwo
1Samuel4:20 Na rĩrĩa aakuaga
1Samuel4:21 Nake agĩtua kahĩĩ kau Ikabodu
1Samuel4:22 Akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel5:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel5:2 Magĩcooka magĩtwara ithandũkũ rĩu thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya ngai yao ĩrĩa yetagwo Dagoni
1Samuel5:3 Rĩrĩa andũ a Ashidodi mookĩrire rũciinĩ tene mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ-rĩ
1Samuel5:4 No mookĩra rũciinĩ rũrũ rũngĩ-rĩ
1Samuel5:5 Nĩkĩo nginya ũmũthĩ gũtirĩ athĩnjĩri-ngai a Dagoni kana andũ angĩ matoonyaga hekarũ ya Dagoni kũu Ashidodi magereire hingĩro-inĩ ĩyo ya mũrango.
1Samuel5:6 Nakuo guoko kwa Jehova gũkĩũmĩra andũ a Ashidodi na kũndũ kũrĩa kwariganĩtie nakuo; akĩmarehere mwanangĩko na akĩmahũũra na mĩrimũ ya mahũha.
1Samuel5:7 Na rĩrĩa andũ a Ashidodi moonire ũrĩa gwekĩka
1Samuel5:8 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo magĩcookanĩrĩria aathani othe a Afilisti
1Samuel5:9 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel5:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtwara ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai Ekironi. Na rĩrĩa ithandũkũ rĩu rĩatoonyaga Ekironi-rĩ
1Samuel5:11 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo magĩcookanĩrĩria aathani othe a Afilisti makĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel5:12 Nao arĩa mataakuire makĩhũũrwo na mĩrimũ ya mahũha
1Samuel6:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel6:2 Afilisti magĩĩta athĩnjĩri-ngai na aragũri
1Samuel6:3 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:4 Afilisti makĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:5 Thondekai tũmĩhiano twa mahũha na twa tũbĩa iria irathũkia bũrũri
1Samuel6:6 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte mũmie ngoro cianyu ta ũrĩa andũ a Misiri na Firaũni meekire? Rĩrĩa aamahinyĩrĩirie-rĩ
1Samuel6:7 “Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel6:8 Oyai ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova mũrĩigĩrĩre igũrũ rĩa ngaari
1Samuel6:9 no mũikare mũrĩrorete. Rĩngĩambata rĩkinye bũrũri warĩo
1Samuel6:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩĩka ũguo. Makĩoya ngʼombe icio igĩrĩ magĩcioherera ngaari-inĩ
1Samuel6:11 Makĩigĩrĩra ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova igũrũ rĩa ngaari
1Samuel6:12 Ningĩ ngʼombe icio ikĩambata irũngĩrĩirie irorete Bethi-Shemeshu
1Samuel6:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Bethi-Shemeshu nĩ kũgetha maagethaga ngano yao kĩanda-inĩ
1Samuel6:14 Nayo ngaari ĩgĩkinya mũgũnda-inĩ wa Joshua wa kũu Bethi-Shemeshu
1Samuel6:15 Nao Alawii makĩruta ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova hamwe na gathandũkũ ka mĩhiano ĩyo ya thahabu
1Samuel6:16 Aathani acio atano a Afilisti makĩĩonera maũndũ macio mothe
1Samuel6:17 Ĩno nĩyo mĩhiano ya mahũha ma thahabu ĩrĩa Afilisti maatũmire ĩrĩ igongona rĩa mahĩtia rĩa kũrutĩrwo Jehova: Mũhiano o ũmwe warutagwo nĩ ũndũ wa o itũũra: Ashidodi
1Samuel6:18 Naguo mũigana wa mbĩa cia thahabu waiganaga o ta matũũra ma Afilisti ma aathani acio atano
1Samuel6:19 No Ngai akĩũraga andũ amwe a kũu Bethi-Shemeshu
1Samuel6:20 nao andũ a Bethi-Shemeshu makĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:21 Ningĩ magĩtũmana kũrĩ andũ a Kiriathu-Jearimu
1Samuel7:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Kiriathu-Jearimu magĩthiĩ
1Samuel7:2 Ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro nĩrĩaikarire Kiriathu-Jearimu ihinda iraaya
1Samuel7:3 Nake Samũeli akĩĩra nyũmba yothe ya Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli magĩtigana na Mabaali na Maashitarothu
1Samuel7:5 Ningĩ Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:6 Na rĩrĩa maagomanĩte kũu Mizipa
1Samuel7:7 Rĩrĩa Afilisti maaiguire atĩ Isiraeli maagomanĩte kũu Mizipa
1Samuel7:8 Makĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:9 Nake Samũeli akĩoya kagondu koongaga na agĩkarutĩra Jehova igongona rĩa njino karĩ kagima o ro ũguo. Agĩkaĩra Jehova nĩ ũndũ wa Isiraeli
1Samuel7:10 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Samũeli aarutaga igongona rĩa njino-rĩ
1Samuel7:11 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makiuma kũu Mizipa naihenya
1Samuel7:12 Ningĩ Samũeli akĩoya ihiga na akĩrĩhaanda gatagatĩ ka Mizipa na Sheni. Akĩrĩĩta Ebeni-Ezeri
1Samuel7:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Afilisti magĩtoorio mũno na matiacookire gũtharĩkĩra bũrũri wa andũ a Isiraeli rĩngĩ. Ihinda rĩothe rĩrĩa Samũeli aatũũrire muoyo
1Samuel7:14 Namo matũũra marĩa Afilisti maatahĩte kũrĩ Isiraeli kuuma Ekironi nginya Gathu magĩcookerera Isiraeli
1Samuel7:15 Samũeli agĩthiĩ na mbere gũtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli matukũ mothe ma muoyo wake.
1Samuel7:16 Mwaka o mwaka nĩathiũrũrũkaga kuuma Betheli nginya Giligali na Mizipa
1Samuel7:17 No nĩacookaga Rama hĩndĩ ciothe
1Samuel8:1 Rĩrĩa Samũeli aakũrire
1Samuel8:2 Mũriũ wake wa irigithathi eetagwo Joeli
1Samuel8:3 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel8:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athuuri othe a Isiraeli makĩũngana
1Samuel8:5 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:6 No rĩrĩa maamwĩrire atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:7 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:8 O ta ũrĩa matũire mekaga ũguo kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndamambatirie ngĩmaruta bũrũri wa Misiri nginya ũmũthĩ
1Samuel8:9 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel8:10 Nake Samũeli akĩĩra andũ acio maamwĩtagia mũthamaki ũhoro wothe wa Jehova.
1Samuel8:11 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:12 Amwe ao nĩakamatua aathani a thigari ngiri
1Samuel8:13 Nĩakoya airĩtu anyu amatue athondeki a indo iria inungaga wega
1Samuel8:14 Nĩakoyaga mĩgũnda yanyu
1Samuel8:15 Nĩakoyaga gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa ngano yanyu na gĩa thabibũ cianyu akĩhe anene ake na ndungata ciake.
1Samuel8:16 Ndungata cianyu cia arũme na cia andũ-a-nja
1Samuel8:17 Nĩakoyaga gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa mahiũ manyu
1Samuel8:18 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya-rĩ
1Samuel8:19 No andũ acio makĩrega gũthikĩrĩria Samũeli makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:20 Ningĩ tũtuĩke ta ndũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ ciothe
1Samuel8:21 Rĩrĩa Samũeli aiguire ũhoro ũrĩa wothe andũ acio moigire-rĩ
1Samuel8:22 Jehova akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel9:2 Mũndũ ũcio aarĩ na mũriũ wetagwo Saũlũ
1Samuel9:3 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel9:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩhĩtũkĩra bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu na bũrũri wa Shalisha
1Samuel9:5 Rĩrĩa maakinyire rũgongo rwa Zufu
1Samuel9:6 No ndungata ĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:7 Saũlũ akĩĩra ndungata yake atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:8 Ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmũcookeria o rĩngĩ
1Samuel9:9 (Tene thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli
1Samuel9:10 Saũlũ akĩĩra ndungata yake atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:11 Na rĩrĩa maambataga kĩrĩma marorete itũũra-inĩ
1Samuel9:12 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:13 O mwarĩkia gũtoonya itũũra-rĩ
1Samuel9:14 Nao makĩambata itũũra-inĩ
1Samuel9:15 Na mũthenya ũmwe mbere ya Saũlũ gũũka-rĩ
1Samuel9:16 “Rũciũ ihinda ta rĩrĩ nĩngagũtũmĩra mũndũ kuuma bũrũri wa Benjamini. Mũitĩrĩrie maguta atuĩke mũtongoria wa andũ akwa a Isiraeli; nĩagakũũra andũ akwa kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa Afilisti. Nĩndorete andũ akwa
1Samuel9:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Samũeli onire Saũlũ
1Samuel9:18 Saũlũ agĩkuhĩrĩria Samũeli hau itoonyero-inĩ rĩa itũũra
1Samuel9:19 Nake Samũeli agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:20 Ha ũhoro wa ndigiri iria wateire mĩthenya ĩtatũ mĩhĩtũku-rĩ
1Samuel9:21 Nake Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:22 Ningĩ Samũeli akĩrehe Saũlũ na ndungata yake
1Samuel9:23 Samũeli akĩĩra ũrĩa warugaga atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:24 Nake ũcio warugaga akĩoya kũgũrũ kũu na kĩrĩa kĩarĩ kũgũrũ-inĩ
1Samuel9:25 Maikũrũka kuuma handũ hau hatũũgĩru na maakinya itũũra-inĩ-rĩ
1Samuel9:26 Nao makĩrooka gũũkĩra rũciinĩ tene
1Samuel9:27 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maikũrũkaga makinye mũthia wa itũũra-rĩ
1Samuel10:1 Ningĩ Samũeli akĩoya kĩnandũ kĩa maguta
1Samuel10:2 Ũmũthĩ twatigana
1Samuel10:3 “Ningĩ kuuma kũu nĩũgũthiĩ na mbere ũkinye mũtĩ-inĩ ũrĩa mũnene wa Taboru. Nĩũgũcemania na andũ atatũ makĩambata mathiĩ kũu Betheli kũrĩ Ngai. Ũmwe arĩkorwo akuuĩte tũũri tũtatũ
1Samuel10:4 Nao makũgeithie na makũhe mĩgate ĩĩrĩ
1Samuel10:5 “Thuutha ũcio ũthiĩ nginya Gibea ya Ngai
1Samuel10:6 Roho wa Jehova nĩegũũka igũrũ rĩaku na hinya
1Samuel10:7 Marũũri macio maarĩkia kũhingio-rĩ
1Samuel10:8 “Ikũrũka mbere yakwa nginya Giligali. Ti-itherũ nĩngaikũrũka njũke kũrĩ we ndute magongona ma njino na maruta ma ũiguano. No no nginya weterere mĩthenya mũgwanja nginya njũke harĩ we ngwĩre ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩka.”
1Samuel10:9 Na rĩrĩa Saũlũ aahũndũkaga matigane na Samũeli-rĩ
1Samuel10:10 Rĩrĩa maakinyire Gibea-rĩ
1Samuel10:11 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa othe maamũũĩ maamuonire akĩratha mohoro me hamwe na anabii
1Samuel10:12 Mũndũ watũũraga kũu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:13 Thuutha wa Saũlũ gũtiga kũratha mohoro
1Samuel10:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ithe mũnini wa Saũlũ akĩũria Saũlũ na ndungata yake atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:15 Ithe mũnini wa Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:16 Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:17 Samũeli agĩtũmanĩra andũ a Isiraeli mongane harĩ Jehova kũu Mizipa
1Samuel10:18 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:19 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel10:20 Rĩrĩa Samũeli aarehire mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli hakuhĩ-rĩ
1Samuel10:21 Ningĩ akĩrehithia mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini hau mbere
1Samuel10:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtuĩria ũhoro makĩria harĩ Jehova
1Samuel10:23 Nao magĩtengʼera
1Samuel10:24 Samũeli akĩĩra andũ othe atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:25 Samũeli agĩtaarĩria andũ mawatho ma ũthamaki. Nake akĩmaandĩka gĩkũnjo-inĩ akĩmaiga mbere ya Jehova. Ningĩ Samũeli akĩĩra andũ mathiĩ
1Samuel10:26 Saũlũ o nake agĩthiĩ gwake mũciĩ kũu Gibea
1Samuel10:27 No andũ amwe a thogothogo makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel11:2 Nowe Nahashu ũcio Mũamoni agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:3 Athuuri acio a Jabeshi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:4 Rĩrĩa andũ acio matũmĩtwo maakinyire Gibea gwa Saũlũ na makĩheana ũhoro ũcio kũrĩ andũ-rĩ
1Samuel11:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel11:6 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ aiguire ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel11:7 Akĩnyiita ndegwa igĩrĩ
1Samuel11:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Saũlũ aamatarire hamwe marĩ kũu Bezeki
1Samuel11:9 Nao makĩĩra andũ acio maatũmĩtwo atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:10 Nao makĩĩra andũ a Amoni atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:11 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Saũlũ akĩgayania ita rĩake akĩiga andũ ikundi ithatũ; na hĩndĩ ya ituanĩra rĩa arangĩri rĩa gũgĩkĩa makĩhithũka kambĩ-inĩ ya Aamoni makĩmooraga nginya rĩrĩa riũa rĩakoretwo rĩhiũhĩte. Arĩa maatigarire makĩharaganio. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gũtiarĩ andũ ao eerĩ maatigĩtwo me hamwe.
1Samuel11:12 Andũ acio magĩcooka makĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:13 Nowe Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samũeli agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe magĩthiĩ Giligali na magĩkindĩra atĩ Saũlũ nĩwe mũthamaki marĩ mbere ya Jehova. Nao marĩ kũu makĩruta maruta ma ũiguano marĩ mbere ya Jehova
1Samuel12:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel12:2 Rĩu mũrĩ na mũthamaki wa kũmũtongoria. Hakwa-rĩ
1Samuel12:3 Niĩ nũngiĩ haha. Rutai ũira wa kũnyuna mũtĩ mũrĩ mbere ya Jehova
1Samuel12:4 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:5 Samũeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:6 Samũeli agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:7 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel12:8 “Rĩrĩa ciana cia Jakubu ciathiire Misiri
1Samuel12:9 “No nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ Jehova Ngai wao; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩameendirie guoko-inĩ gwa Sisera
1Samuel12:10 Nao magĩkaĩra Jehova makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:11 Jehova agĩcooka agĩtũma Jerubu-Baali
1Samuel12:12 “No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa muonire atĩ Nahashu mũthamaki wa Amoni nĩookaga kũmũhũũra-rĩ
1Samuel12:13 Rĩu ũyũ nĩwe mũthamaki ũrĩa mũthuurĩte
1Samuel12:14 Mũngĩĩtigĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:15 No mũngĩaga gwathĩkĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:16 “Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel12:17 Githĩ rĩu ti hĩndĩ ya magetha ma ngano? Nĩngũkaĩra Jehova atũme marurumĩ na mbura. Na inyuĩ nĩmũkamenya atĩ nĩ ũndũ mũũru mwekire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova rĩrĩa mwetirie mũthamaki.”
1Samuel12:18 Ningĩ Samũeli agĩkaĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:19 Nao andũ acio othe makĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:20 Samũeli agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:21 Mũtikanagarũrũkĩre mĩhianano ya kũhooywo ya tũhũ. Ndĩngĩmũguna
1Samuel12:22 Nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake inene
1Samuel12:23 No hakwa niĩ mwene-rĩ
1Samuel12:24 No mwĩtigagĩrei Jehova na mũmũtungatagĩre mũrĩ na wĩhokeku ngoro-inĩ cianyu ciothe; cũraniai maũndũ manene marĩa amwĩkĩire.
1Samuel12:25 No mũngĩkorwo nĩmũkũrũmanĩrĩria gwĩkaga ũũru-rĩ
1Samuel13:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:2 Saũlũ nĩathuurire andũ ngiri ithatũ kuuma Isiraeli; ngiri igĩrĩ magĩikara nake kũu Mikimashi na bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Betheli
1Samuel13:3 Jonathani agĩtharĩkĩra irangĩro rĩa Afilisti kũu Geba
1Samuel13:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũhoro ũyũ ũkĩiguuo Isiraeli guothe
1Samuel13:5 Nao Afilisti makĩũngana nĩguo marũe na andũ a Isiraeli
1Samuel13:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire atĩ maarĩ handũ hooru mũno
1Samuel13:7 O na Ahibirania amwe nĩmaringire mũrĩmo wa Jorodani
1Samuel13:8 Nake agĩeterera mĩthenya mũgwanja ĩrĩa yatuĩtwo nĩ Samũeli; no Samũeli ndaigana gũũka Giligali
1Samuel13:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:10 O rĩrĩa aarĩkirie kũruta igongona rĩu
1Samuel13:11 Samũeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:12 ndeciiria atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:13 Samũeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:14 No rĩu ũthamaki waku ndũgũtũũra; Jehova nĩacarĩtie mũndũ moimĩranĩtie ngoro
1Samuel13:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samũeli akiuma Giligali akĩambata Gibea ya Benjamini
1Samuel13:16 Saũlũ na mũriũ Jonathani na andũ arĩa maarĩ nao maikaraga Gibea ya Benjamini
1Samuel13:17 Nacio ikundi cia atharĩkĩri ikiuma kambĩ-inĩ ya Afilisti irĩ ikundi ithatũ. Kĩmwe gĩkĩerekera mwena wa Ofara gũkuhĩ na Shuali
1Samuel13:18 kĩrĩa kĩngĩ gĩkĩerekera Bethi-Horoni
1Samuel13:19 Gũtiarĩ mũturi ũngĩonekire bũrũri wothe wa Isiraeli
1Samuel13:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe a Isiraeli maikũrũkaga magathiĩ kũrĩ Afilisti
1Samuel13:21 Thogora wa kũnoora hiũ cia mĩraũ na thururu warĩ cekeri icunjĩ igĩrĩ cia ithatũ
1Samuel13:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthenya wa mbaara gũtirĩ mũthigari o na ũmwe wa arĩa maarĩ na Saũlũ na Jonathani warĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora kana itimũ guoko-inĩ gwake; Saũlũ na mũriũ Jonathani no-o maarĩ nacio.
1Samuel13:23 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Jonathani mũrũ wa Saũlũ akĩĩra mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra indo cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:2 Saũlũ aikarĩte ndeere-inĩ cia Gibea rungu rwa mũtĩ wa mũkomamanga kũu Migironi. Nao andũ arĩa aarĩ nao maarĩ ta andũ magana matandatũ
1Samuel14:3 ũmwe wao aarĩ Ahija
1Samuel14:4 Mĩena yeerĩ ya kĩhunguro kĩrĩa Jonathani endaga gũũkĩrĩra nĩguo akinye irangĩro-inĩ rĩa Afilisti nĩ haarĩ na hurũrũka cia ihiga; ĩmwe yetagwo Bozezi
1Samuel14:5 Hurũrũka ĩmwe yarĩ mwena wa gathigathini kũngʼethera Mikimashi
1Samuel14:6 Jonathani akĩĩra mwanake ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:7 Mũkuui wake wa indo cia mbaara akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:8 Jonathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:9 Mangĩtwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:10 No mangĩtwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:11 Nao eerĩ makĩĩonithania irangĩro-inĩ rĩa Afilisti. Nao Afilisti makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:12 Nao andũ a irangĩro-inĩ makĩgũthũkĩra Jonathani na mũkuui wake wa indo cia mbaara makĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:13 Jonathani akĩambata
1Samuel14:14 Itharĩkĩra rĩu rĩa mbere rĩa Jonathani marĩ na mũkuui wake wa indo cia mbaara rĩoragire andũ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ gacigo-inĩ ka nuthu ya ĩka.
1Samuel14:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩmako gĩkĩnyiita andũ othe a ita
1Samuel14:16 Arangĩri a Saũlũ arĩa maarĩ Gibea ya Benjamini makĩona andũ a ita rĩu maharaganĩte mĩena yothe.
1Samuel14:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ akĩĩra andũ arĩa maarĩ nake atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:18 Saũlũ akĩĩra Ahija atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:19 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ aaragĩria mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai-rĩ
1Samuel14:20 Ningĩ Saũlũ na andũ ake othe makĩũngana
1Samuel14:21 Ahibirania arĩa maarĩ na Afilisti mbere ĩyo na arĩa maambĩte magathiĩ hamwe nao kambĩ-inĩ ciao
1Samuel14:22 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli arĩa meehithĩte bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu maiguire atĩ Afilisti nĩ kũũra mooraga-rĩ
1Samuel14:23 Ũguo nĩguo Jehova aahonokirie Isiraeli mũthenya ũcio
1Samuel14:24 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:25 Ita rĩothe rĩgĩtoonya mũtitũ
1Samuel14:26 Rĩrĩa maatoonyire mũtitũ nĩmoonire ũũkĩ ũgĩtaata
1Samuel14:27 No Jonathani ndaiguĩte atĩ ithe nĩehĩtithĩtie andũ na mwĩhĩtwa; nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtambũrũkia rũthanju rũrĩa aanyiitĩte akĩrũtobokia igua-inĩ rĩa ũũkĩ. Akĩũcama na kanua
1Samuel14:28 Nake ũmwe wa thigari icio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:29 Jonathani akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:30 Githĩ gũtingiuma wega makĩria korwo ũmũthĩ andũ nĩmekũrĩĩte indo imwe cia iria matahĩte kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciao? Githĩ rĩũraga rĩu rĩa Afilisti rĩtingiuma inene makĩria?”
1Samuel14:31 Mũthenya ũcio
1Samuel14:32 Nao makĩguthũkĩra indo iria maatahĩte
1Samuel14:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ ũmwe akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:34 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:35 Ningĩ Saũlũ agĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona; rĩu nĩrĩo rĩarĩ ihinda rĩake rĩa mbere gwĩka ũguo.
1Samuel14:36 Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:37 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ akĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:39 Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa Jehova ũrĩa ũhonokagia Isiraeli atũũraga muoyo-rĩ
1Samuel14:40 Saũlũ agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ othe a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:41 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ akĩhooya Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli
1Samuel14:42 Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:43 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ akĩĩra Jonathani atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:44 Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:45 No andũ acio makĩũria Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:46 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ agĩtiga kũingatana na Afilisti
1Samuel14:47 Saũlũ aambĩrĩria gũthamakĩra Isiraeli
1Samuel14:48 Akĩrũa na ũcamba
1Samuel14:49 Ariũ a Saũlũ maarĩ Jonathani
1Samuel14:50 Mũtumia wake eetagwo Ahinoamu mwarĩ wa Ahimaazu. Mũnene wa ita rĩa Saũlũ eetagwo Abineri mũrũ wa Neri
1Samuel14:51 Kishu ithe wa Saũlũ
1Samuel14:52 Matukũ-inĩ mothe ma Saũlũ nĩ kwarĩ na mbaara ndũrũ cia kũrũa na Afilisti
1Samuel15:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel15:2 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: ‘Nĩngaherithia Aamaleki nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa meekire Isiraeli rĩrĩa maamoheirie njĩra-inĩ makĩambata moimĩte bũrũri wa Misiri.
1Samuel15:3 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel15:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ agĩĩta andũ
1Samuel15:5 Saũlũ agĩthiĩ itũũra inene rĩa Amaleki
1Samuel15:6 Ningĩ akĩĩra Akeni atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:7 Nake Saũlũ agĩtharĩkĩra Aamaleki amarutĩtie kuuma Havila nginya Shuri
1Samuel15:8 Akĩnyiita Agagi mũthamaki wa Aamaleki arĩ muoyo
1Samuel15:9 No Saũlũ na ita rĩake makĩhonokia Agagi na ngʼondu imwe cia iria njega
1Samuel15:10 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩgĩkinyĩra Samũeli
1Samuel15:11 “Ndĩ na kĩeha nĩ gũtua Saũlũ mũthamaki
1Samuel15:12 Rũciinĩ tene-rĩ
1Samuel15:13 Rĩrĩa Samũeli aakinyire harĩ we
1Samuel15:14 No Samũeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:15 Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:16 Samũeli akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:17 Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:18 Nake agĩgũtũma ũthiĩ ũkarute wĩra
1Samuel15:19 Waregire gwathĩkĩra Jehova nĩkĩ? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire ũguthũkĩre indo cia ndaho
1Samuel15:20 Nake Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:21 Thigari nĩcio cioire ngʼondu na ngʼombe kuuma kũrĩ indo iria ciatahĩtwo
1Samuel15:22 No Samũeli akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũremi ũhaana ta mehia ma ũragũri
1Samuel15:24 Nake Saũlũ akĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:25 Rĩu ndagũthaitha
1Samuel15:26 No Samũeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:27 Rĩrĩa Samũeli aagarũrũkaga athiĩ-rĩ
1Samuel15:28 Samũeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:29 Ũrĩa we Riiri wa Isiraeli ndaheenanagia kana akericũkwo; nĩ ũndũ we ti mũndũ
1Samuel15:30 Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Samũeli agĩcookania na Saũlũ
1Samuel15:32 Samũeli agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:33 No Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel15:34 Samũeli agĩcooka agĩthiĩ Rama
1Samuel15:35 Nginya mũthenya ũrĩa Samũeli aakuire
1Samuel16:1 Nake Jehova akĩũria Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:2 No Samũeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:3 Na wĩte Jesii oke igongona-inĩ rĩu
1Samuel16:4 Samũeli agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwĩrĩte eeke. Rĩrĩa aakinyire Bethilehemu
1Samuel16:5 Samũeli akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:6 Rĩrĩa ariũ a Jesii maakinyire-rĩ
1Samuel16:7 No Jehova akĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:8 Ningĩ Jesii agĩĩta Abinadabu akĩmũhĩtũkĩria mbere ya Samũeli. No Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:9 Ningĩ Jesii akĩhĩtũkithia Shama
1Samuel16:10 Jesii akĩrehe ariũ ake mũgwanja arĩa maahĩtũkĩire harĩ Samũeli
1Samuel16:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩũria Jesii atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũmana
1Samuel16:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Samũeli akĩoya rũhĩa rwa maguta akĩmũitĩrĩria maguta ariũ a nyina makĩonaga; kuuma mũthenya ũcio Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩa Daudi na hinya. Nake Samũeli agĩcooka agĩthiĩ Rama.
1Samuel16:14 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel16:15 Nacio ndungata cia Saũlũ ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:16 Reke mwathi witũ aathe ndungata ciake iria irĩ haha icarie mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩkũhũũrĩra kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto. Nĩarĩhũũraga kĩnanda rĩrĩa roho mũũru uumĩte kũrĩ Ngai wagũkora
1Samuel16:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:18 Ndungata ĩmwe yake ĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Jesii
1Samuel16:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesii akĩoya ndigiri ikuuĩte mĩgate
1Samuel16:21 Daudi agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Saũlũ
1Samuel16:22 Ningĩ Saũlũ agĩtũma ũhoro kũrĩ Jesii
1Samuel16:23 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe roho ũcio mũũru uumĩte kũrĩ Ngai wakoraga Saũlũ
1Samuel17:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:2 Saũlũ na andũ a Isiraeli makĩũngana
1Samuel17:3 Afilisti magĩikara kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩmwe
1Samuel17:4 Njamba ĩmwe yetagwo Goliathũ
1Samuel17:5 Eekĩrĩte ngũbia ya gĩcango mũtwe
1Samuel17:6 eyohete indo cia kũgitĩra mũthiimo cia gĩcango
1Samuel17:7 Mũtĩ wa itimũ rĩake waiganaga ta mũtĩ wa mũtumi ngoora
1Samuel17:8 Goliathũ akĩrũgama
1Samuel17:9 Angĩhota kũrũa na niĩ na anjũrage-rĩ
1Samuel17:10 Ningĩ Mũfilisti ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:11 Rĩrĩa maiguire ciugo cia Mũfilisti ũcio
1Samuel17:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:13 Ariũ atatũ a Jesii arĩa akũrũ nĩmathiĩte na Saũlũ mbaara-inĩ: Wa mbere eetagwo Eliabu; na wa keerĩ Abinadabu; na wa gatatũ Shama.
1Samuel17:14 Daudi nĩwe warĩ mũnini wao. Acio atatũ akũrũ nĩmarũmĩrĩire Saũlũ
1Samuel17:15 no Daudi agathiiaga gwĩ Saũlũ
1Samuel17:16 Ihinda rĩa matukũ mĩrongo ĩna Mũfilisti ũcio nĩoimagĩra o rũciinĩ na hwaĩ-inĩ
1Samuel17:17 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:18 Nacio cienyũ ici ikũmi cia ngorono ũcitware kũrĩ mũnene wa gĩkundi kĩao. Ũkĩrore ũrĩa ariũ a nyũkwa matariĩ ũnjookerie ũhoro wao wa kũnyũmĩrĩria.
1Samuel17:19 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:20 Kwarooka gũkĩa-rĩ
1Samuel17:21 Andũ a Isiraeli na Afilisti maaharagĩria ita ciao igaikara ingʼethanĩire.
1Samuel17:22 Nake Daudi agĩtiga indo iria aakuuĩte harĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wamenyagĩrĩra indo
1Samuel17:23 Rĩrĩa aaragia nao
1Samuel17:24 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire mũndũ ũcio
1Samuel17:25 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:26 Daudi akĩũria andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ hakuhĩ nake atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:27 Nao magĩcookera ũhoro ũcio maaragia
1Samuel17:28 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Eliabu
1Samuel17:29 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:30 Nake agĩcooka akĩhũgũkĩra mũndũ ũngĩ na akĩmwarĩria ũhoro o ro ũcio
1Samuel17:31 Ũhoro ũcio Daudi oigire nĩwaiguirwo
1Samuel17:32 Daudi akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:33 Saũlũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:34 No Daudi akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:35 ndĩmĩrũmagĩrĩra
1Samuel17:36 Ndungata yaku yanooraga mũrũũthi na nduba o cierĩ; Mũfilisti ũyũ ũtarĩ mũruu o nake egũtuĩka o ta ĩmwe yacio
1Samuel17:37 Jehova ũrĩa wahonokirie harĩ gĩthu kĩa mũrũũthi o na gĩthu kĩa nduba-rĩ
1Samuel17:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ akĩhumba Daudi nguo ciake na
1Samuel17:39 Daudi akĩĩoha rũhiũ rwake rwa njora igũrũ rĩa nguo icio
1Samuel17:40 Agĩcooka akĩnyiita rũthanju rwake na guoko
1Samuel17:41 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũfilisti ũcio no gũũka ookaga akuhĩrĩrie Daudi
1Samuel17:42 Nake akĩrora Daudi
1Samuel17:43 Akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:44 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:45 Daudi akĩĩra Mũfilisti ũcio atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:46 Ũmũthĩ Jehova nĩegũkũneana kũrĩ niĩ
1Samuel17:47 Arĩa othe moonganĩte haha nĩmekũmenya atĩ Jehova ndahonokanagia na rũhiũ rwa njora kana itimũ; nĩgũkorwo mbaara nĩ ya Jehova
1Samuel17:48 Na rĩrĩa Mũfilisti ũcio aamũkuhagĩrĩria nĩguo amũtharĩkĩre-rĩ
1Samuel17:49 Agĩikia guoko mondo-inĩ yake akĩruta kahiga kamwe
1Samuel17:50 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩhoota Mũfilisti ũcio na kĩgũtha na kahiga; ndaarĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora guoko-inĩ gwake akĩgũtha Mũfilisti ũcio na akĩmũũraga.
1Samuel17:51 Daudi agĩtengʼera
1Samuel17:52 Andũ a Isiraeli na Juda makiumĩra maanĩrĩire
1Samuel17:53 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maacookire kuuma kũingatithia Afilisti
1Samuel17:54 Daudi akĩoya mũtwe wa Mũfilisti ũcio
1Samuel17:55 Na rĩrĩa Saũlũ eroreire Daudi agĩthiĩ gũtũnga Mũfilisti
1Samuel17:56 Nake mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:57 Na thuutha wa Daudi gũcooka kuuma kũũraga Mũfilisti-rĩ
1Samuel17:58 Saũlũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:1 Thuutha wa Daudi kũrĩĩkia kwaria na Saũlũ
1Samuel18:2 Kuuma mũthenya ũcio Saũlũ akĩiga Daudi gwake na ndaarekire acooke kũinũka mũciĩ gwa ithe.
1Samuel18:3 Nake Jonathani akĩgĩa kĩrĩkanĩro na Daudi nĩ ũndũ nĩamwendete o ta ũrĩa eyendete we mwene.
1Samuel18:4 Jonathani akĩruta nguo ĩrĩa ndaaya yake ya igũrũ ĩrĩa eehumbĩte akĩmĩhe Daudi
1Samuel18:5 Ũrĩa wothe Saũlũ aatũmaga Daudi ageeke
1Samuel18:6 Rĩrĩa andũ mainũkaga
1Samuel18:7 Makĩrũgarũgaga
1Samuel18:8 Saũlũ nĩarakarire mũno; ikũngũiya rĩu rĩkĩmũiguithia ũiru mũno. Agĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:9 Na kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ akĩambĩrĩria kũiguĩra Daudi ũiru na kũmwĩkũũa.
1Samuel18:10 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ roho mũũru uumĩte kũrĩ Ngai ũgĩũka na hinya mũno igũrũ rĩa Saũlũ. Nake akĩambĩrĩria kwaria ta mũgũrũki arĩ nyũmba yake thĩinĩ
1Samuel18:11 nake akĩmũikĩria
1Samuel18:12 Saũlũ nĩetigĩrĩte Daudi
1Samuel18:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩeheria Daudi harĩ we akĩmũtua mũnene wa thigari ngiri
1Samuel18:14 Ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ekaga nĩwagaacagĩra
1Samuel18:15 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ onire ũrĩa Daudi aagacĩire
1Samuel18:16 No andũ othe a Isiraeli na Juda nĩmendete Daudi nĩ ũndũ nĩamatongoragia kũu ita-inĩ ciao.
1Samuel18:17 Saũlũ akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:18 No Daudi akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa ihinda rĩakinyire rĩa Merabu
1Samuel18:20 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel18:21 Nake agĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:22 Ningĩ Saũlũ agĩatha ndungata ciake
1Samuel18:23 Nao magĩcookera ciugo icio kũrĩ Daudi. No Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:24 Rĩrĩa ndungata cia Saũlũ ciamwĩrire ũrĩa Daudi oiga-rĩ
1Samuel18:25 Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:26 Rĩrĩa ndungata cierire Daudi maũndũ macio-rĩ
1Samuel18:27 Daudi na andũ ake makiumagara
1Samuel18:28 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ aamenyire atĩ Jehova aarĩ hamwe na Daudi
1Samuel18:29 Saũlũ agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũmwĩtigĩra
1Samuel18:30 Anene a ita cia Afilisti magĩthiĩ o na mbere mbaara-inĩ
1Samuel19:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel19:2 nake akĩmũkunyĩra ũhoro
1Samuel19:3 Niĩ nĩngathiĩ ndũgame hamwe na baba kũu mũgũnda-inĩ
1Samuel19:4 Jonathani akĩĩra ithe Saũlũ wega wa Daudi
1Samuel19:5 Nĩetoonyirie ũgwati-inĩ rĩrĩa ooragire Mũfilisti. Nake Jehova akĩhe Isiraeli guothe ũhootani mũnene mũno
1Samuel19:6 Saũlũ nĩathikĩrĩirie Jonathani na akĩĩhĩta akiuga ũũ: “Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa Jehova atũũraga muoyo
1Samuel19:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jonathani agĩĩta Daudi akĩmwĩra ũhoro ũcio maaragia wothe. Akĩmũtwara kũrĩ Saũlũ
1Samuel19:8 Nĩ kwagĩire na mbaara rĩngĩ
1Samuel19:9 No roho mũũru uumĩte kũrĩ Jehova ũgĩkora Saũlũ rĩrĩa aikarĩte gwake nyũmba arĩ na itimũ rĩake guoko-inĩ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi aahũũraga kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto.
1Samuel19:10 Saũlũ akĩgeria kũmũthecereria rũthingo-inĩ na itimũ rĩake
1Samuel19:11 Saũlũ agĩtũma andũ kwa Daudi makaraangĩre nyũmba yake na mamũũrage gwakĩa. No Mikali
1Samuel19:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mikali agĩikũrũkĩria Daudi ndirica-inĩ
1Samuel19:13 Ningĩ Mikali akĩoya mũhianano na akĩũiga ũrĩrĩ igũrũ
1Samuel19:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Saũlũ aatũmire andũ makanyiite Daudi
1Samuel19:15 Ningĩ Saũlũ agĩtũma andũ acio macooke makarore Daudi
1Samuel19:16 No rĩrĩa andũ maatoonyire kuo
1Samuel19:17 Saũlũ akĩĩra Mikali atĩrĩ
1Samuel19:18 Nake Daudi akĩũra
1Samuel19:19 Ũhoro ũgĩkinyĩra Saũlũ
1Samuel19:20 nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũma andũ makamũnyiite. No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moonire gĩkundi kĩa anabii gĩkĩratha mohoro
1Samuel19:21 Saũlũ akĩheo ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel19:22 Thuutha wa maũndũ mothe
1Samuel19:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ agĩthiĩ Naiothu
1Samuel19:24 Akĩaũra nguo ciake cia igũrũ
1Samuel20:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:2 Jonathani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:3 No Daudi akĩĩhĩta akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:4 Jonathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:6 No thoguo angĩnjaga-rĩ
1Samuel20:7 Angĩkoiga atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:8 No wee rĩ
1Samuel20:9 Jonathani akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:10 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:11 Jonathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:12 Ningĩ Jonathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:13 No baba angĩtua nĩ egũkũgera ngero-rĩ
1Samuel20:14 No nyonia tha iria itathiraga ta iria cia Jehova matukũ marĩa ngũtũũra muoyo
1Samuel20:15 na ndũkaneherie tha ciaku o na rĩ kuuma kũrĩ nyũmba yakwa
1Samuel20:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jonathani akĩgĩa kĩrĩkanĩro na nyũmba ya Daudi
1Samuel20:17 Nake Jonathani agĩtũma Daudi akiindĩre mwĩhĩtwa wake nĩ ũndũ nĩamwendete
1Samuel20:18 Ningĩ Jonathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:19 Mũthenya wa gatatũ gwatua gũtuka-rĩ
1Samuel20:20 Nĩngaikia mĩguĩ ĩtatũ mwena-inĩ warĩo
1Samuel20:21 Ningĩ nĩngatũma kahĩĩ ndĩkeere atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:22 No ingĩkeera kahĩĩ kau atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:23 Naguo ũhoro ũrĩa twaranĩirie nawe-rĩ
1Samuel20:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩĩhitha kũu mũgũnda-inĩ
1Samuel20:25 Agĩikara thĩ handũ harĩa aamenyerete
1Samuel20:26 Saũlũ ndoigire ũndũ mũthenya ũcio
1Samuel20:27 No mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
1Samuel20:28 Jonathani agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:29 Aranjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:30 Marakara ma Saũlũ magĩakanĩra Jonathani
1Samuel20:31 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe mũrũ wa Jesii egũtũũra muoyo gũkũ thĩ
1Samuel20:32 Jonathani akĩũria ithe atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:33 No Saũlũ akĩmũikĩria itimũ rĩake nĩguo amũũrage. Nake Jonathani akĩmenya atĩ ithe nĩatuĩte itua rĩa kũũraga Daudi.
1Samuel20:34 Jonathani agĩũkĩra
1Samuel20:35 Rũciinĩ rũrũ rũngĩ Jonathani akiumagara
1Samuel20:36 akĩĩra kahĩĩ kau atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:37 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa kahĩĩ kau gaakinyire harĩa mũguĩ wa Jonathani wagwĩte-rĩ
1Samuel20:38 Ningĩ akĩanĩrĩra agĩkeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:39 (Kahĩĩ kau gatirĩ ũndũ kaamenyaga ũhoro-inĩ ũcio; tiga Jonathani na Daudi maamenyaga ũhoro ũcio.)
1Samuel20:40 Ningĩ Jonathani akĩnengera kahĩĩ kau indo ciake cia mbaara
1Samuel20:41 Thuutha wa kahĩĩ kau gũthiĩ-rĩ
1Samuel20:42 Jonathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel21:2 Daudi agĩcookeria Ahimeleku ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:3 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel21:4 No mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio agĩcookeria Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:5 Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio akĩmũnengera mĩgate ĩyo mĩamũre
1Samuel21:7 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel21:8 Daudi akĩũria Ahimeleku atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:9 Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:10 Mũthenya ũcio Daudi akĩũrĩra Saũlũ
1Samuel21:11 No ndungata cia Akishi ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:12 Nake Daudi akĩiga ũhoro ũcio ngoro-inĩ na agĩĩtigĩra Akishi mũthamaki wa Gathu mũno.
1Samuel21:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩĩgũrũkithia mbere yao; na rĩrĩa aarĩ moko-inĩ mao
1Samuel21:14 Akishi akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:15 Kaĩ nyiihĩtie agũrũki atĩ nĩguo mũndehere mũndũ ũyũ haha eke maũndũ ta maya mbere yakwa? Mũndũ ũyũ no nginya oke nyũmba yakwa?”
1Samuel22:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel22:2 Arĩa othe maarĩ na mĩnyamaro
1Samuel22:3 Kuuma kũu
1Samuel22:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmatigĩra mũthamaki wa Moabi
1Samuel22:5 No mũnabii Gadi akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel22:7 Nake Saũlũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:8 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmĩte inyuothe mũciire kũnjũkĩrĩra? Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩnjĩĩra rĩrĩa mũrũ wakwa egũthondeka kĩrĩkanĩro na mũrũ wa Jesii. Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu wĩciirĩtie ũhoro wakwa kana akanjĩĩra atĩ mũrũ wakwa nĩaikĩrĩirie ndungata yakwa ĩikare ĩnjoheirie
1Samuel22:9 No Doegu ũrĩa Mũedomu
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleku nĩamũtuĩrĩirie ũhoro harĩ Jehova; agĩcooka akĩmũhe irio
1Samuel22:11 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai Ahimeleku mũrũ wa Ahitubu
1Samuel22:12 Saũlũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:13 Saũlũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleku agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:15 Mũthenya ũcio nĩguo warĩ wa mbere wa kũmũtuĩrĩria ũhoro harĩ Jehova? Aca tiguo! Reke mũthamaki ndageciirĩrie ndungata yaku kana mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa nyũmba ya ithe
1Samuel22:16 No mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:17 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩatha thigari iria ciamũrũgamĩrĩire
1Samuel22:18 Mũthamaki agĩcooka agĩatha Doegu
1Samuel22:19 Agĩcooka akĩhũũra Nobu
1Samuel22:20 No Abiatharu
1Samuel22:21 Akĩĩra Daudi atĩ Saũlũ nĩoragĩte athĩnjĩri-Ngai a Jehova.
1Samuel22:22 Nake Daudi akĩĩra Abiatharu atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:23 Ikara hamwe na niĩ; ndũgetigĩre; mũndũ ũrĩa ũracaria muoyo waku
1Samuel23:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel23:2 Nake agĩtuĩria ũhoro harĩ Jehova
1Samuel23:3 No andũ a Daudi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:4 O rĩngĩ Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro harĩ Jehova
1Samuel23:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake magĩthiĩ Keila
1Samuel23:6 (Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel23:7 Saũlũ akĩĩrwo atĩ Daudi nĩathiĩte Keila
1Samuel23:8 Nake Saũlũ agĩĩta mbũtũ ciake ciothe mathiĩ mbaara
1Samuel23:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi aamenyire atĩ Saũlũ nĩaciirĩire kũmwĩka ũũru-rĩ
1Samuel23:10 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:11 Hihi aikari a Keila nĩmekũũneana kũrĩ we? Hihi Saũlũ nĩegũikũrũka gũkũ
1Samuel23:12 O rĩngĩ Daudi akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake
1Samuel23:14 Nake Daudi agĩikara ciĩhitho cia werũ-inĩ na irĩma-inĩ cia Werũ wa Zifu. O mũthenya Saũlũ nĩamũcaragia
1Samuel23:15 Rĩrĩa Daudi aarĩ Horeshu kũu Werũ wa Zifu
1Samuel23:16 Nake Jonathani mũrũ wa Saũlũ agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Daudi kũu Horeshu na akĩmũteithia kwĩyũmĩrĩria thĩinĩ wa Ngai.
1Samuel23:17 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:18 Nao eerĩ makĩgĩa kĩrĩkanĩro mbere ya Jehova. Thuutha ũcio Jonathani akĩinũka
1Samuel23:19 Nao andũ a Azifu makĩambata magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Saũlũ kũu Gibea makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:20 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel23:21 Saũlũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:22 Thiĩi mũkehaarĩrie makĩria. Tuĩriai nĩ kũ Daudi amenyerete gũthiiaga
1Samuel23:23 Tuĩriai ũhoro wa kũrĩa guothe ehithaga na mũndehere ũhoro mũkinyanĩru. Na niĩ nĩngũcooka thiĩ na inyuĩ; angĩkorwo arĩ kũndũ gũkũ-rĩ
1Samuel23:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makiumagara magĩthiĩ kũu Zifu
1Samuel23:25 Nake Saũlũ na andũ ake makĩambĩrĩria kũmacaria
1Samuel23:26 Saũlũ aagerete mwena ũmwe wa kĩrĩma
1Samuel23:27 hagĩũka mũndũ watũmĩtwo kũrĩ Saũlũ
1Samuel23:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ agĩtiga kũrũmĩrĩra Daudi
1Samuel23:29 Nake Daudi akĩambata akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ gũtũũra ciĩhitho-inĩ cia Eni-Gedi.
1Samuel24:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel24:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ akĩoya andũ ngiri ithatũ arĩa athuure kuuma Isiraeli guothe magĩthiĩ gũcaria Daudi na andũ ake gũkuhĩ na ndwaro cia mahiga kũrĩa gũtũũragwo nĩ Mbũri cia Werũ.
1Samuel24:3 Nake agĩkinya ciugũ-inĩ cia ngʼondu iria ciarĩ njĩra-inĩ; naho nĩ haarĩ na ngurunga
1Samuel24:4 Nao andũ a Daudi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:5 Thuutha-inĩ
1Samuel24:6 Akĩĩra andũ ake atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:7 Aarĩkia kwaria ciugo icio
1Samuel24:8 Ningĩ Daudi akiuma ngurunga-inĩ ĩyo
1Samuel24:9 Akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:10 Ũmũthĩ nĩweyonera na maitho maku ũrĩa Jehova egũkũneanĩte moko-inĩ makwa kũu ngurunga-inĩ. Kũrĩ andũ amwe maniingĩrĩirie ngũũrage
1Samuel24:11 Baba
1Samuel24:12 Jehova arotũtuithania ciira niĩ nawe. Na Jehova arondĩhĩria maũru marĩa wee ũnjĩkĩte
1Samuel24:13 O ta ũrĩa kũrĩ thimo yugaga atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:14 “Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli oimĩte gwake ookĩrĩre ũ? Nũũ ũingatithĩtie? Nĩ ngui nguũ? Kana nĩ thuya?
1Samuel24:15 Jehova arotũtuithania na atue ciira gatagatĩ gaitũ. Aroeciiria ũhoro wakwa na aũrũgamie; arondũĩrĩra na aahonokie kuuma guoko-inĩ gwaku.”
1Samuel24:16 Rĩrĩa Daudi aarĩkirie kuuga ũguo-rĩ
1Samuel24:17 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:18 Nĩwarĩĩkia o rĩu kũnjĩĩra ũndũ mwega ũnjĩkĩte; Jehova nĩekũũneanĩte moko-inĩ maku
1Samuel24:19 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ona thũ yake-rĩ
1Samuel24:20 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ti-itherũ nĩũgatuĩka mũthamaki
1Samuel24:21 Rĩu wĩhĩte harĩ niĩ na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova atĩ ndũkaniina njiaro ciakwa kana rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩthire kuuma nyũmba-inĩ ya baba.”
1Samuel24:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩĩhĩta harĩ Saũlũ. Nake Saũlũ agĩcooka mũciĩ
1Samuel25:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:2 Mũndũ ũmwe wa kũu Maoni
1Samuel25:3 Nake eetagwo Nabali
1Samuel25:4 Daudi arĩ werũ-inĩ nĩaiguire atĩ Nabali nĩ ngʼondu aramura guoya.
1Samuel25:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũma aanake ikũmi akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:6 Mwĩrei atĩrĩ; ‘Ũrotũũra mĩaka mĩingĩ! Ũrogĩa na ũgima
1Samuel25:7 “ ‘Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:8 Ũria ndungata ciaku na nĩigũkwĩra. Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo ĩka aanake acio akwa maũndũ mega
1Samuel25:9 Rĩrĩa andũ a Daudi maakinyire-rĩ
1Samuel25:10 Nabali agĩcookeria ndungata cia Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:11 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩtũma njoe mĩgate yakwa
1Samuel25:12 Andũ acio a Daudi makĩhũndũka
1Samuel25:13 Daudi akĩĩra andũ ake atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:14 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:15 No andũ acio nĩmatwĩkire wega. Matiatwĩkire ũũru
1Samuel25:16 Ũtukũ na mũthenya maarĩ ta rũthingo rwatũrigiicĩirie hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa twarĩithagia ngʼondu ciitũ gũkuhĩ nao.
1Samuel25:17 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel25:18 Abigaili ndaateire ihinda. Akĩoya mĩgate magana meerĩ
1Samuel25:19 Ningĩ akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:20 Na rĩrĩa aathiiaga ahaicĩte ndigiri yake agereire mũkuru warĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ
1Samuel25:21 Daudi aakoretwo oiga atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:22 Ngai aroherithia Daudi
1Samuel25:23 Rĩrĩa Abigaili onire Daudi
1Samuel25:24 Akĩĩgũithia magũrũ-inĩ make
1Samuel25:25 Mwathi wakwa aroaga kũrũmbũiya mũndũ ũcio mwaganu ti Nabali. Ahaana o ta rĩĩtwa rĩake
1Samuel25:26 “Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:27 Na ũreke kĩheo gĩkĩ
1Samuel25:28 Ndagũthaitha ũrekere ndungata yaku ihĩtia rĩayo
1Samuel25:29 O na kũngĩkorwo kũrĩ mũndũ ũgũthingatĩte akũrute muoyo-rĩ
1Samuel25:30 Rĩrĩa Jehova agaakorwo ekĩte mwathi wakwa maũndũ mothe mega marĩa eeranĩire mamũkoniĩ
1Samuel25:31 mwathi wakwa ndakanakorwo arĩ na mũrigo wa kũmũritũhĩra thĩinĩ wa thamiri yake nĩ ũndũ wa gũitithia thakame hatarĩ na gĩtũmi kana akorwo erĩhĩirie. Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehova akaarehera mwathi wakwa ũhootani-rĩ
1Samuel25:32 Daudi akĩĩra Abigaili atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:33 Ũrorathimwo nĩ ũndũ wa itua rĩaku rĩega na kũngiria ndigaite thakame ũmũthĩ
1Samuel25:34 Tiga nĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Samuel25:35 Ningĩ Daudi akĩamũkĩra kĩrĩa aamũreheire kuuma guoko-inĩ gwake
1Samuel25:36 Rĩrĩa Abigaili aathiire kũrĩ Nabali
1Samuel25:37 Ningĩ rũciinĩ gwakĩa
1Samuel25:38 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ta ikũmi
1Samuel25:39 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi aaiguire atĩ Nabali nĩakuĩte
1Samuel25:40 Ndungata ciake igĩthiĩ Karimeli
1Samuel25:41 Akĩinamĩrĩra
1Samuel25:42 Abigaili akĩhaica ndigiri na ihenya
1Samuel25:43 Daudi nĩahikĩtie Ahinoamu wa Jezireeli
1Samuel25:44 No Saũlũ nĩaheanĩte mwarĩ Mikali
1Samuel26:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel26:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ agĩikũrũka nginya Werũ wa Zifu
1Samuel26:3 Saũlũ akĩamba hema ciake njĩra-inĩ hakuhĩ na kĩrĩma kĩa Hakila kĩrĩa kĩngʼetheire Jeshimoni
1Samuel26:4 agĩtũma athigaani na akĩmenya atĩ ti-itherũ Saũlũ nĩakinyĩte kuo.
1Samuel26:5 Nake Daudi akiumagara agĩthiĩ harĩa Saũlũ aambĩte hema. Akĩona harĩa Saũlũ na Abineri mũrũ wa Neri
1Samuel26:6 Daudi agĩcooka akĩũria Ahimeleku ũrĩa Mũhiti
1Samuel26:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na Abishai magĩthiĩ kũrĩ ita rĩu ũtukũ
1Samuel26:8 Abishai akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:9 No Daudi akĩĩra Abishai atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:10 Ningĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:11 No Jehova arongiria ndambũrũkie guoko kũrĩ ũrĩa mũitĩrĩrie maguta wa Jehova
1Samuel26:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩoya itimũ na mbũthũ ya maaĩ icio ciarĩ hakuhĩ na mũtwe wa Saũlũ
1Samuel26:13 Daudi agĩcooka akĩringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ
1Samuel26:14 Nake akĩanĩrĩra
1Samuel26:15 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:16 Ũguo wee wĩkĩte ti ũndũ mwega. Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa Jehova atũũraga muoyo-rĩ
1Samuel26:17 Saũlũ akĩmenya mũgambo wa Daudi
1Samuel26:18 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:19 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel26:20 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel26:21 Nake Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:22 Nake Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:23 Jehova nĩwe ũrĩhaga o mũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu wake
1Samuel26:24 Ti-itherũ o ta ũguo niĩ nyonete muoyo waku ũrĩ wa goro ũmũthĩ
1Samuel26:25 Saũlũ agĩcooka akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:1 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel27:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ magana matandatũ arĩa maarĩ nake makiuma
1Samuel27:3 Daudi na andũ ake magĩtũũrania na Akishi kũu Gathu. Mũndũ o mũndũ aarĩ na andũ a nyũmba yake
1Samuel27:4 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ eerirwo atĩ Daudi nĩorĩire Gathu
1Samuel27:5 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra Akishi atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Akishi akĩmũhe Zikilagi mũthenya o ro ũcio
1Samuel27:7 Daudi agĩikara bũrũri wa Afilisti mwaka ũmwe na mĩeri ĩna.
1Samuel27:8 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel27:9 Rĩrĩa rĩothe Daudi aatharĩkagĩra kũndũ
1Samuel27:10 Rĩrĩa Akishi aamũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:11 Ndaatigirie mũndũ mũrũme kana mũndũ-wa-nja muoyo nĩguo matwarwo Gathu
1Samuel27:12 Nake Akishi nĩehokete Daudi na akeĩraga atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel28:2 Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samũeli nĩakuĩte
1Samuel28:4 Afilisti makĩũngana na magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao kũu Shunemu
1Samuel28:5 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Saũlũ
1Samuel28:6 Nake agĩtuĩria ũhoro kuuma kũrĩ Jehova
1Samuel28:7 Saũlũ agĩcooka akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ agĩkĩĩgarũra nĩguo ndakamenyeke
1Samuel28:9 No mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:10 Saũlũ akĩĩhĩta harĩ we na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
1Samuel28:11 Ningĩ mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio onire Samũeli
1Samuel28:13 Mũthamaki nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:14 Akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:15 Samũeli akĩũria Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:16 Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:17 Jehova nĩekĩte o ta ũrĩa oigire na kanua gakwa. Jehova nĩagũtunyĩte ũthamaki uume moko-inĩ maku
1Samuel28:18 Nĩ ũndũ wee ndwathĩkĩire Jehova
1Samuel28:19 Jehova nĩegũkũneana
1Samuel28:20 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ akĩgũa
1Samuel28:21 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio okire kũrĩ Saũlũ na akĩona ũrĩa aamakĩte
1Samuel28:22 Rĩu ndagũthaitha
1Samuel28:23 Nake akĩrega
1Samuel28:24 Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio nĩ aarĩ na njaũ noru kũu nyũmba
1Samuel28:25 Agĩcooka agĩtwarĩra Saũlũ na andũ ake
1Samuel29:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel29:2 Na rĩrĩa aathani a Afilisti maahĩtũkaga na ikundi ciao cia magana na cia ngiri
1Samuel29:3 Anene acio a ita rĩa Afilisti makĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:4 No anene a mbũtũ cia ita cia Afilisti makĩmũrakarĩra
1Samuel29:5 Githĩ ũyũ ti Daudi ũrĩa mainĩire nyĩmbo-inĩ ciao ũũ: “ ‘Saũlũ nĩeyũragĩire andũ ngiri nyingĩ
1Samuel29:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Akishi agĩĩta Daudi
1Samuel29:7 Hũndũka ũthiĩ na thayũ; ndũgeeke ũndũ ũngĩrakaria anene a Afilisti.”
1Samuel29:8 Daudi akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:9 Akishi akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:10 Rĩu rooka gũũkĩra rũciinĩ tene
1Samuel29:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake makĩrooka gũũkĩra rũciinĩ tene nĩguo macooke bũrũri-inĩ wa Afilisti
1Samuel30:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel30:2 na nĩmatahĩte andũ-a-nja arĩa othe maarĩ kuo
1Samuel30:3 Rĩrĩa Daudi na andũ ake mookire Zikilagi
1Samuel30:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake makĩrĩra maanĩrĩire nginya makĩaga hinya wa kũrĩra rĩngĩ.
1Samuel30:5 Atumia a Daudi eerĩ nĩmatahĩtwo
1Samuel30:6 Daudi akĩnyariirĩka mũno nĩ ũndũ andũ nĩmaciirĩire kũmũhũũra na mahiga; o mũndũ arĩ na marũrũ ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa aanake na airĩtu ake. No Daudi akĩgĩa na hinya thĩinĩ wa Jehova Ngai wake.
1Samuel30:7 Daudi agĩcooka akĩĩra Abiatharu
1Samuel30:8 nake Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro kũrĩ Jehova
1Samuel30:9 Daudi na andũ magana matandatũ arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake magĩkinya Mũkuru wa Besori
1Samuel30:10 nĩgũkorwo andũ ta magana meerĩ maarĩ anogu mũno
1Samuel30:11 Nao magĩkorerera Mũmisiri werũ-inĩ
1Samuel30:12 na kĩenyũ kĩa ngũyũ hihe na imanjĩka igĩrĩ cia thabibũ nyũmithie. Akĩrĩa agĩcookwo nĩ hinya
1Samuel30:13 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:14 Nĩtwatharĩkĩire Negevu ya Akerethi
1Samuel30:15 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:16 Agĩtongoria Daudi
1Samuel30:17 Daudi akĩmahũũra kuuma hwaĩ-inĩ kũrĩ mairia nginya hwaĩ-inĩ wa mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
1Samuel30:18 Daudi agĩcookia indo ciothe iria Aamaleki maakuuĩte
1Samuel30:19 Gũtirĩ kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kĩagire: mũndũ mwĩthĩ kana mũkũrũ
1Samuel30:20 Nake akĩoya ndũũru ciothe cia mbũri na ngʼombe
1Samuel30:21 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkinya harĩ andũ arĩa magana meerĩ arĩa maanogete mũno makaremwo nĩ kũmũrũmĩrĩra na magatigwo thuutha hau mũkuru-inĩ wa Besori. Magĩũka gũthagaana Daudi na andũ arĩa maarĩ nake. Rĩrĩa Daudi na andũ ake maakuhĩrĩirie
1Samuel30:22 No andũ arĩa othe aaganu na arĩa a haaro thĩinĩ wa arũmĩrĩri a Daudi makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:23 Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:24 Nũũ ũngĩthikĩrĩria ũguo mũroiga? Igai rĩa mũndũ ũrĩa watigirwo akĩrora indo rĩkũiganana na rĩa ũrĩa waikũrũkire agĩthiĩ mbaara-inĩ. Othe mekũgayana o ũndũ ũmwe.”
1Samuel30:25 Daudi agĩtua ũndũ ũcio ũtuĩke kĩrĩra na watho wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo kũu Isiraeli kuuma mũthenya ũcio nginya ũmũthĩ.
1Samuel30:26 Rĩrĩa Daudi aakinyire Zikilagi
1Samuel30:27 Agĩcitũmĩra arĩa maarĩ Betheli
1Samuel30:28 na arĩa maarĩ Aroeri
1Samuel30:29 na Rakali; na arĩa maarĩ matũũra ma Ajerameeli
1Samuel30:30 o na arĩa maarĩ Horoma
1Samuel30:31 na Hebironi; na arĩa maarĩ kũndũ guothe kũrĩa Daudi na andũ ake moorũũrĩte.
1Samuel31:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel31:2 Afilisti makĩhatĩrĩria Saũlũ na ariũ ake mũno
1Samuel31:3 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel31:4 Nake Saũlũ akĩĩra mũkuui wake wa indo cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel31:5 Rĩrĩa mũkuui wake wa indo cia mbaara onire atĩ Saũlũ nĩakua-rĩ
1Samuel31:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ
1Samuel31:7 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ mwena ũcio ũngĩ wa kĩanda na arĩa maarĩ mũrĩmo wa Jorodani moonire atĩ mbũtũ ya ita ya Isiraeli nĩyoora
1Samuel31:8 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
1Samuel31:9 Nao makĩmũtinia mũtwe na makĩoya indo ciake cia mbaara
1Samuel31:10 Makĩiga indo cia Saũlũ cia mbaara thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Ashitarothu
1Samuel31:11 No rĩrĩa andũ a Jabeshi-Gileadi maaiguire ũrĩa Afilisti meekĩte Saũlũ-rĩ
1Samuel31:12 njamba ciao cia ita igĩthiĩ ũtukũ wothe nginya Bethi-Shani. Makĩruta mwĩrĩ wa Saũlũ na ya ariũ ake atatũ kuuma rũthingo-inĩ rwa Bethi-Shani
1Samuel31:13 Magĩcooka makĩoya mahĩndĩ macio mao na makĩmathika gĩtina-inĩ kĩa mũtĩ wa mũbinde kũu Jabeshi
2Samuel1:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel1:2 Mũthenya wa ĩtatũ-rĩ
2Samuel1:3 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:4 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:5 Ningĩ Daudi akĩũria mwanake ũcio wamũreheire ũhoro ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:6 Mwanake ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:7 Rĩrĩa eehũgũrire
2Samuel1:8 “Nake akĩnjũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:9 “Ningĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:10 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩthiĩ harĩ we
2Samuel1:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ nake makĩnyiita nguo ciao
2Samuel1:12 Nao magĩcakaya
2Samuel1:13 Daudi akĩũria mwanake ũcio wamũreheire ũhoro atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:14 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:15 Ningĩ Daudi agĩĩta ũmwe wa andũ ake
2Samuel1:16 Nĩgũkorwo Daudi aamwĩĩrire atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:17 Nake Daudi agĩcakaĩra Saũlũ na mũriũ Jonathani
2Samuel1:18 na agĩathana atĩ andũ a Juda marutwo icakaya rĩĩrĩ rĩĩtagwo rwĩmbo rwa ũta (narĩo rĩandĩkĩtwo Ibuku-inĩ rĩa Jasharu):
2Samuel1:19 “Wee Isiraeli
2Samuel1:20 “Ũhoro ũyũ ndũkaheanwo Gathu
2Samuel1:21 “Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel1:22 Kuuma kũrĩ thakame ya arĩa moragĩtwo
2Samuel1:23 “Saũlũ na Jonathani
2Samuel1:24 “Inyuĩ airĩtu a Isiraeli
2Samuel1:25 “Hĩ
2Samuel1:26 Niĩ ndĩ na kĩeha nĩ ũndũ waku Jonathani
2Samuel1:27 “Hĩ
2Samuel2:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩambata agĩthiĩ Hebironi na atumia ake eerĩ
2Samuel2:3 Ningĩ Daudi agĩthiĩ hamwe na andũ arĩa aarĩ nao
2Samuel2:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Juda magĩũka Hebironi
2Samuel2:5 agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ andũ a Jabeshi-Gileadi makameere atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:6 Jehova aromuonia ũtugi na wĩhokeku wake
2Samuel2:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:8 Mahinda macio
2Samuel2:9 Akĩmũtua mũthamaki wa Gileadi
2Samuel2:10 Nake Ishi-Boshethu mũrũ wa Saũlũ aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
2Samuel2:11 Ihinda rĩrĩa Daudi aarĩ mũthamaki kũu Hebironi agĩthamakĩra nyũmba ya Juda
2Samuel2:12 Abineri mũriũ wa Neri
2Samuel2:13 Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia na andũ a Daudi makiumagara
2Samuel2:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abineri akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩrũgama magĩtarwo
2Samuel2:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo o mũndũ akĩnyiita mũndũ ũrĩa merekanĩire mũtwe
2Samuel2:17 Mbaara ĩkĩrũra mũno mũthenya ũcio
2Samuel2:18 Nao ariũ atatũ a Zeruia maarĩ ho: Nao nĩ Joabu
2Samuel2:19 Nake agĩtengʼeria Abineri atekũgarũrũka na mwena wa ũrĩo kana wa ũmotho
2Samuel2:20 Nake Abineri akĩrora na thuutha wake
2Samuel2:21 Nake Abineri akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:22 O rĩngĩ
2Samuel2:23 No Asaheli ndaatigire kũmũhanyũkia; nĩ ũndũ ũcio Abineri agĩtheeca Asaheli nda na mũthia wa itimũ rĩake
2Samuel2:24 No Joabu na Abishai magĩtengʼeria Abineri
2Samuel2:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Benjamini magĩcookanĩrĩra hamwe
2Samuel2:26 Abineri agĩĩta Joabu aanĩrĩire
2Samuel2:27 Joabu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joabu akĩhuha karumbeta
2Samuel2:29 Ũtukũ ũcio wothe Abineri na andũ ake magĩtuĩkanĩria Araba. Makĩringa Jorodani
2Samuel2:30 Nake Joabu agĩtiga gũtengʼeria Abineri
2Samuel2:31 No andũ a Daudi nĩmooragĩte andũ a Benjamini magana matatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ arĩa maarĩ na Abineri.
2Samuel2:32 Nao makĩoya Asaheli
2Samuel3:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:2 Nake Daudi nĩagĩire na ciana cia aanake arĩ kũu Hebironi: Mũriũ wake wa irigithathi eetagwo Amunoni ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ Ahinoamu ũrĩa Mũjezireeli;
2Samuel3:3 Mũriũ wa keerĩ eetagwo Kileabu ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ Abigaili ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa ndigwa wa Nabali ũrĩa Mũkarimeli; na wa gatatũ aarĩ Abisalomu ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ Maaka mwarĩ wa Talimai mũthamaki wa Geshuru;
2Samuel3:4 wa kana aarĩ Adonija ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ Hagithu; wa gatano aarĩ Shefatia ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ Abitali;
2Samuel3:5 na wa gatandatũ aarĩ Ithireamu mũrũ wa Egila mũtumia wa Daudi. Acio nĩo maaciarĩirwo Daudi kũu Hebironi.
2Samuel3:6 Hĩndĩ ya mbaara ya nyũmba ya Saũlũ na nyũmba ya Daudi
2Samuel3:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:8 Abineri nĩarakarire mũno tondũ wa kwĩrwo ũguo nĩ Ishi-Boshethu
2Samuel3:9 Ngai arothũũra
2Samuel3:10 na ndute ũthamaki nyũmba-inĩ ya Saũlũ
2Samuel3:11 Ishi-Boshethu ndaigana kwĩra Abineri ũndũ ũngĩ tondũ nĩamwĩtigĩrĩte.
2Samuel3:12 Ningĩ Abineri agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Daudi makamwĩre atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:13 Nake Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:14 Ningĩ Daudi agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Ishi-Boshethu mũrũ wa Saũlũ makamwĩre atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ishi-Boshethu agĩathana Mikali agĩĩrwo kuuma kũrĩ mũthuuriwe Palitieli mũrũ wa Laishi.
2Samuel3:16 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:17 Nake Abineri akĩaranĩria na athuuri a Isiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:18 Mũtigĩĩke ũguo rĩu! Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩerire Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:19 Nake Abineri nĩacookire akĩaranĩria na andũ a Benjamini. Agĩcooka agĩthiĩ Hebironi akeere Daudi maũndũ mothe marĩa Isiraeli na nyũmba yothe ya Benjamini meendaga gwĩka.
2Samuel3:20 Rĩrĩa Abineri
2Samuel3:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abineri akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:22 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo andũ a Daudi
2Samuel3:23 Rĩrĩa Joabu na thigari ciothe iria ciarĩ hamwe nake maakinyire-rĩ
2Samuel3:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joabu agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:25 Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ Abineri mũrũ wa Neri egũũkĩte gũkũheenia na gũthigaana mĩthiĩre yaku
2Samuel3:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Joabu oimire harĩ Daudi
2Samuel3:27 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:28 Thuutha ũcio
2Samuel3:29 Thakame yake ĩrocookerera Joabu na nyũmba ya ithe yothe! Nayo nyũmba ya Joabu ndĩkanaage mũndũ ũmwe ũrĩ na kĩronda gĩkuura thakame
2Samuel3:30 (Joabu na Abishai mũrũ wa nyina mooragire Abineri tondũ nĩooragĩte Asaheli mũrũ wa nyina wao mbaara-inĩ kũu Gibeoni.)
2Samuel3:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩĩra Joabu na andũ othe arĩa aarĩ nao atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:32 Nao magĩthika Abineri kũu Hebironi
2Samuel3:33 Mũthamaki akĩina icakaya rĩĩrĩ nĩ ũndũ wa Abineri: “Abineri nĩaragĩrĩirwo nĩgũkua ta andũ arĩa moinaga watho?
2Samuel3:34 Moko maku matiarĩ moohe
2Samuel3:35 Ningĩ andũ othe magĩũka na makĩringĩrĩria Daudi arĩe irio gũtanatuka
2Samuel3:36 Nao andũ acio othe maakĩona ũrĩa gwathiĩ magĩkena; ti-itherũ
2Samuel3:37 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe na Isiraeli guothe makĩmenya mũthenya ũcio atĩ mũthamaki ndaarĩ na itemi ũhoro-inĩ wa gĩkuũ kĩa Abineri mũrũ wa Neri.
2Samuel3:38 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra andũ ake atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:39 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:2 Nake mũrũ wa Saũlũ aarĩ na andũ eerĩ arĩa maarĩ atongoria a ikundi cia gũtharĩkanĩra. Ũmwe eetagwo Baana na ũcio ũngĩ Rekabu; maarĩ ariũ a Rimoni ũrĩa Mũbeerothi wa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini; Beerothu gũtaragwo ta gĩcunjĩ kĩa Benjamini
2Samuel4:3 tondũ andũ a Beerothu nĩmoorĩire Gitaimu na matũũrĩte kuo ta andũ a kũngĩ nginyagia ũmũthĩ.
2Samuel4:4 (Jonathani mũrũ wa Saũlũ aarĩ na mũriũ wonjete magũrũ meerĩ. Aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka ĩtano rĩrĩa ũhoro wa Saũlũ na Jonathani wamakinyĩire kuuma Jezireeli. Nake mũreri wake akĩmũkuua
2Samuel4:5 Nake Rekabu na Baana
2Samuel4:6 Nao makĩingĩra nyũmba ya thĩinĩ metuĩte ta meendaga gũkuua ngano
2Samuel4:7 Maingĩrire nyũmba hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakomete gĩtanda-inĩ nyũmba yake ya toro. Maarĩkia kũmũtheeca na kũmũũraga
2Samuel4:8 Magĩtwarĩra Daudi mũtwe wa Ishi-Boshethu kũu Hebironi
2Samuel4:9 Nake Daudi agĩcookeria Rekabu na Baana
2Samuel4:10 rĩrĩa mũndũ aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
2Samuel4:11 Akĩrĩ makĩria atĩa
2Samuel4:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩatha andũ ake
2Samuel5:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:2 Ihinda rĩrĩa Saũlũ aarĩ mũthamaki witũ-rĩ
2Samuel5:3 Rĩrĩa athuuri othe a Isiraeli maathiĩte Hebironi kũrĩ Mũthamaki Daudi
2Samuel5:4 Daudi aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Samuel5:5 Aathamakĩire Juda mĩaka mũgwanja na mĩeri ĩtandatũ arĩ Hebironi
2Samuel5:6 Mũthamaki na andũ ake magĩthiĩ Jerusalemu magatharĩkĩre Ajebusi
2Samuel5:7 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:8 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel5:9 Nake Daudi agĩtũũra kĩĩhitho-inĩ kĩu kĩa hinya
2Samuel5:10 Daudi agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na hinya tondũ Jehova Ngai Mwene-Hinya-Wothe aarĩ hamwe nake.
2Samuel5:11 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:12 Nake Daudi akĩmenya atĩ Jehova nĩamũhaandĩte atuĩke mũthamaki wa Isiraeli na agatũũgĩria ũthamaki wake nĩ ũndũ wa andũ ake a Isiraeli.
2Samuel5:13 Aarĩkia kuuma Hebironi
2Samuel5:14 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma ciana iria aaciarĩire kũu Jerusalemu: Shamua
2Samuel5:15 na Ibiharu
2Samuel5:16 na Elishama
2Samuel5:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afilisti maaiguire atĩ Daudi nĩaitĩrĩirio maguta agatuĩka mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
2Samuel5:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:19 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro kũrĩ Jehova
2Samuel5:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩthiĩ Baali-Perazimu
2Samuel5:21 Nao Afilisti magĩtiganĩria mĩhianano yao kũu
2Samuel5:22 Afilisti nĩmambatire o rĩngĩ makĩĩaragania Gĩtuamba-inĩ kĩa Refaimu;
2Samuel5:23 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro harĩ Jehova
2Samuel5:24 Rĩrĩa ũrĩigua mũkubio uumĩte igũrũ rĩa mĩtĩ ya mĩkũngũgũ-rĩ
2Samuel5:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwathĩte
2Samuel6:1 O rĩngĩ
2Samuel6:2 Daudi arĩ hamwe na andũ acio ake othe magĩthiĩ moimĩte Baala kũu Juda makambatie ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai marĩrute kuo
2Samuel6:3 Nao makĩigĩrĩra ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai ngaari-inĩ njerũ ya ngʼombe
2Samuel6:4 ĩrĩ na ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai igũrũ rĩayo
2Samuel6:5 Nake Daudi na nyũmba yothe ya Isiraeli maarũũhagia na hinya wao wothe marĩ mbere ya Jehova
2Samuel6:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakinyire kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩa ngano kĩa Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Namo marakara ma Jehova magĩakanĩra Uza tondũ wa gĩĩko kĩu gĩa kwaga gĩtĩĩo; Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai akĩmũgũtha akĩgũa
2Samuel6:8 Nake Daudi akĩrakara tondũ mangʼũrĩ ma Jehova nĩmookĩrĩire Uza
2Samuel6:9 Nake Daudi agĩĩtigĩra Jehova mũthenya ũcio
2Samuel6:10 Nake ndetĩkĩrire gũtwara ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova kũu aatũire
2Samuel6:11 Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova rĩgĩikara nyũmba-inĩ ya Obedi-Edomu ũrĩa Mũgiiti mĩeri ĩtatũ
2Samuel6:12 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel6:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel6:14 Daudi akĩina arĩ mbere ya Jehova na hinya wake wothe
2Samuel6:15 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na nyũmba yothe ya Isiraeli makĩambatia ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova makĩanagĩrĩra na makĩhuhaga tũrumbeta.
2Samuel6:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova rĩatoonyaga itũũra inene rĩa Daudi-rĩ
2Samuel6:17 Nao makĩrehe ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova na makĩrĩiga handũ harĩo thĩinĩ wa hema ĩrĩa Daudi aambĩte nĩ ũndũ warĩo
2Samuel6:18 Aarĩkia kũruta magongona ma njino
2Samuel6:19 Ningĩ akĩheana mũgate
2Samuel6:20 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi aacookire mũciĩ akarathime andũ a nyũmba yake-rĩ
2Samuel6:21 Daudi akĩĩra Mikali atĩrĩ
2Samuel6:22 O na nĩ ngũkĩrĩrĩria kwĩyagithia gĩtĩĩo gũkĩra ũũ
2Samuel6:23 Nake Mikali mwarĩ wa Saũlũ ndaagĩire ciana nginya mũthenya ũrĩa aakuire.
2Samuel7:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:2 akĩĩra mũnabii Nathani atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:3 Nathani agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:4 Ũtukũ ũcio kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinyĩra Nathani
2Samuel7:5 “Thiĩ ũkeere ndungata yakwa Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:6 Niĩ ndirĩ ndatũũra nyũmba kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaarutire andũ a Isiraeli kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri nginya ũmũthĩ. Ndũũraga thiiaga kũndũ na kũndũ ndĩ hema-inĩ arĩ yo gĩtũũro gĩakwa.
2Samuel7:7 Kũrĩa guothe ndanathiĩ na andũ a Isiraeli othe-rĩ
2Samuel7:8 “Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:9 Nĩ ngoretwo nawe o kũrĩa guothe wanathiĩ
2Samuel7:10 Na nĩngaahe andũ akwa a Isiraeli handũ
2Samuel7:11 o na ũrĩa matũire meekaga kuuma rĩrĩa ndathuurire atongoria a gũtongoragia andũ akwa a Isiraeli. Ningĩ nĩngakũhe ũhurũko kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciaku ciothe. “ ‘Jehova egũkwĩra atĩ Jehova we mwene nĩwe ũkaarũgamia nyũmba yaku:
2Samuel7:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa matukũ maku magaathira
2Samuel7:13 Ũcio nĩwe ũgaaka nyũmba ĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa Rĩakwa
2Samuel7:14 Nĩngatuĩka ithe
2Samuel7:15 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:16 Nyũmba yaku na ũthamaki waku igũtũũra mbere yakwa nginya tene; o nakĩo gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene gĩgũtũũra kĩrĩ kĩrũmu wega nginya tene.’ ”
2Samuel7:17 Nake Nathani akĩĩra Daudi ciugo ciothe cia ũguũrio ũcio.
2Samuel7:18 Nake Mũthamaki Daudi agĩtoonya
2Samuel7:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:20 “Nĩ atĩa ũngĩ Daudi angĩkwĩra? Nĩgũkorwo Wee Mwathani Jehova
2Samuel7:21 Nĩ ũndũ wa kiugo gĩaku
2Samuel7:22 “Wee Mwathani Jehova
2Samuel7:23 Na nũũ ũhaana ta andũ aku a Isiraeli
2Samuel7:24 Wee nĩũrũgamĩtie andũ aku a Isiraeli matuĩke andũ aku nginya tene
2Samuel7:25 “Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:26 nĩgeetha rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩnenehe nginya tene. Ningĩ andũ nĩmakoiga atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:27 “Wee Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
2Samuel7:28 Wee Mwathani Jehova
2Samuel7:29 Rĩu nĩwonete kwagĩrĩire ũrathime nyũmba ya ndungata yaku
2Samuel8:1 Thuutha wa mahinda macio-rĩ
2Samuel8:2 Ningĩ Daudi nĩatooririe andũ a Moabi. Agĩtũma makome thĩ na akĩmathima na ũraihu wa rũrigi. Aamathima-rĩ
2Samuel8:3 Daudi nĩahũũranire na Hadadezeri mũrũ wa Rehobu
2Samuel8:4 Nake Daudi akĩmũtunya ngaari ciake cia ita ngiri ĩmwe
2Samuel8:5 Rĩrĩa Asuriata a kuuma Dameski mookire gũteithia Hadadezeri mũthamaki wa Zoba
2Samuel8:6 Akĩiga mbũtũ cia kũrangĩra ũthamaki wa Asuriata kũu Dameski. Nao Asuriata magĩtuĩka a gwathagwo nĩwe makamũrehagĩra igooti. Jehova nĩaheaga Daudi ũhootani kũrĩa guothe aathiiaga.
2Samuel8:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel8:8 Kuuma matũũra ma Teba na Berothai
2Samuel8:9 Rĩrĩa Tou mũthamaki wa Hamathu aaiguire atĩ Daudi nĩahootete mbũtũ ciothe cia mbaara cia Hadadezeri-rĩ
2Samuel8:10 agĩtũma mũriũ Joramu kũrĩ Mũthamaki Daudi akamũgeithie na amũkũngũĩre nĩ ũndũ wa kũhoota Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:11 Mũthamaki Daudi akĩamũrĩra Jehova indo icio
2Samuel8:12 Nacio nĩ Edomu na Moabi
2Samuel8:13 Nake Daudi akĩgĩa igweta hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oimire kũũraga andũ a Edomu ngiri ikũmi na inyanya Gĩtuamba-inĩ gĩa Cumbĩ.
2Samuel8:14 Nake akĩiga thigari cia kũrangĩra Edomu guothe
2Samuel8:15 Daudi nĩathamakire Isiraeli guothe
2Samuel8:16 Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa ita; nake Jehoshafatu mũrũ wa Ehiludu nĩwe warĩ mwandĩki wa maũndũ ma ihinda rĩu;
2Samuel8:17 nake Zadoku mũrũ wa Ahitubu na Ahimeleku mũrũ wa Abiatharu maarĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai; nake Seraia aarĩ mwandĩki.
2Samuel8:18 Nake Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa Akerethi na Apelethi; nao ariũ a Daudi maarĩ ataari a mũthamaki.
2Samuel9:1 Nake Daudi akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:2 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel9:3 Nake mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:4 Nake mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Samuel9:6 Rĩrĩa Mefiboshethu mũrũ wa Jonathani
2Samuel9:7 Nake Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:8 Nake Mefiboshethu akĩinamĩrĩra
2Samuel9:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra Ziba
2Samuel9:10 Wee
2Samuel9:11 Ningĩ Ziba akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboshethu aarĩ na kamwana geetagwo Mika
2Samuel9:13 Nake Mefiboshethu agĩtũũra Jerusalemu
2Samuel10:1 Thuutha wa mahinda macio
2Samuel10:2 Nake Daudi agĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
2Samuel10:3 andũ arĩa maarĩ igweta a Aamoni makĩũria Hanuni mwathi wao atĩrĩ
2Samuel10:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hanuni akĩnyiitithia andũ acio a Daudi
2Samuel10:5 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi eerirwo ũhoro ũcio
2Samuel10:6 Rĩrĩa Aamoni maamenyire atĩ nĩmatuĩkĩte kĩndũ kĩnungu harĩ Daudi-rĩ
2Samuel10:7 Nake Daudi aigua ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
2Samuel10:8 Nao Aamoni makiumagara
2Samuel10:9 Nake Joabu akĩona atĩ thigari nĩciarĩte mĩhari ya mbaara mbere yake o na thuutha wake; nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthuura mbũtũ imwe iria ciarĩ njamba mũno kũu Isiraeli
2Samuel10:10 Andũ acio angĩ akĩmaiga watho-inĩ wa Abishai mũrũ wa nyina
2Samuel10:11 Joabu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel10:12 Wĩyũmĩrĩrie nĩgeetha tũrũe na ũcamba nĩ ũndũ wa andũ aitũ na nĩ ũndũ wa matũũra manene ma Ngai witũ. Jehova nĩegwĩka ũrĩa ekuona kwagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ make.”
2Samuel10:13 Ningĩ Joabu na mbũtũ ciake magĩtharĩkĩra Asuriata
2Samuel10:14 Rĩrĩa Aamoni moonire atĩ Asuriata nĩmaroora-rĩ
2Samuel10:15 Thuutha wa Asuriata kuona atĩ nĩmatoorio nĩ andũ a Isiraeli-rĩ
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezeri aarehithĩtie Asuriata kuuma mũrĩmo wa Rũũĩ rwa Farati; magĩthiĩ nginya Helamu marĩ hamwe
2Samuel10:17 Rĩrĩa Daudi eerirwo ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
2Samuel10:18 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel10:19 Rĩrĩa athamaki arĩa othe maarĩ ndungata cia Hadadezeri moonire atĩ nĩmahootwo nĩ Isiraeli-rĩ
2Samuel11:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel11:2 Hwaĩ-inĩ ũmwe-rĩ
2Samuel11:3 nake Daudi agĩtũma mũndũ agatuĩrie ũhoro wake. Mũndũ ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩtũma andũ makamũgĩĩre. Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩũka kũrĩ Daudi
2Samuel11:5 Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩgĩa nda na agĩtũmanĩra Daudi
2Samuel11:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩtũma mũndũ athiĩ kũrĩ Joabu amwĩre atĩrĩ: “Ndũmĩra Uria ũrĩa Mũhiti.” Nake Joabu agĩtũma Uria kũrĩ Daudi.
2Samuel11:7 Rĩrĩa Uria ookire
2Samuel11:8 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra Uria atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:9 No Uria agĩkoma itoonyero-inĩ rĩa nyũmba ya ũthamaki hamwe na ndungata ciothe cia mwathi wake
2Samuel11:10 Rĩrĩa Daudi eerirwo atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:11 Uria akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:12 Ningĩ Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:13 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi aamwĩtire
2Samuel11:14 Rũciinĩ Daudi akĩandĩkĩra Joabu marũa
2Samuel11:15 Marũa macio maandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:16 Rĩrĩa Joabu aarigiicĩirie itũũra rĩrĩa inene
2Samuel11:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a itũũra rĩu inene mookire kũrũa na Joabu-rĩ
2Samuel11:18 Joabu agĩtũma mũndũ kũrĩ Daudi akamũhe ũhoro wothe wa mbaara ĩyo.
2Samuel11:19 Nake agĩatha mũndũ ũcio aatũmire atĩrĩ: “Warĩkia kũhe mũthamaki ũhoro ũyũ wothe wa mbaara
2Samuel11:20 marakara ma mũthamaki maahota kũrĩrĩmbũka
2Samuel11:21 Nũũ woragire Abimeleku mũrũ wa Jerubu-Beshethu? Githĩ ti mũndũ-wa-nja wamũikĩirie ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi arĩ rũthingo-inĩ igũrũ? Githĩ ti kĩo gĩatũmire akuĩre kũu Thebezu? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũmire mũthiĩ hakuhĩ mũno na rũthingo?’ Angĩgakũũria ũguo-rĩ
2Samuel11:22 Nake mũndũ ũcio akiumagara agĩthiĩ
2Samuel11:23 Nake mũndũ ũcio watũmĩtwo akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo aikia a mĩguĩ maraikĩria ndungata ciaku mĩguĩ marĩ rũthingo igũrũ
2Samuel11:25 Nake Daudi akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:26 Rĩrĩa mũtumia wa Uria aiguire atĩ mũthuuriwe nĩakuĩte-rĩ
2Samuel11:27 Ihinda rĩa gũcakaya rĩathira-rĩ
2Samuel12:1 Nake Jehova agĩtũma Nathani kũrĩ Daudi. Na aakinya harĩ we Nathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:2 Mũndũ ũcio warĩ gĩtonga aarĩ na ndũũru nyingĩ cia ngʼondu na cia ngʼombe
2Samuel12:3 no ũcio warĩ mũthĩĩni ndaarĩ na kĩndũ tiga o kamwatĩ kanini aagũrĩte. Agĩkarera
2Samuel12:4 “Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:5 Daudi agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa mũndũ ũcio
2Samuel12:6 No nginya arĩhe kamwatĩ kau maita mana
2Samuel12:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Nathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:8 Nĩndakũheire nyũmba ya mwathi waku
2Samuel12:9 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte ũnyarare kiugo kĩa Jehova
2Samuel12:10 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Samuel12:11 “Jehova ekuuga ũũ: ‘Nĩngũkũrehithĩria thĩĩna kuuma nyũmba yaku wee mwene. O maitho-inĩ maku nĩngoya atumia aku
2Samuel12:12 Wekire ũndũ ũcio na hitho
2Samuel12:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩĩra Nathani atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:14 No tondũ nĩũtũmĩte thũ cia Jehova imũmene mũno nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
2Samuel12:15 Nathani aarĩkia kũinũka mũciĩ-rĩ
2Samuel12:16 Daudi agĩthaitha Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa mwana ũcio. Akĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio
2Samuel12:17 Nao athuuri a nyũmba yake magĩthiĩ hakuhĩ nake nĩguo mamũrũgamie na igũrũ nowe akĩrega
2Samuel12:18 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja wakinya-rĩ
2Samuel12:19 No Daudi akĩona atĩ ndungata ciake nĩciaheehanaga
2Samuel12:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩũkĩra. Aarĩkia gwĩthamba
2Samuel12:21 Ndungata ciake ĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:22 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:23 No rĩu tondũ nĩakuĩte-rĩ
2Samuel12:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩhooreria mũtumia wake Bathisheba
2Samuel12:25 na tondũ Jehova nĩakendete-rĩ
2Samuel12:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu akĩhũũra Raba itũũra rĩa andũ a Amoni
2Samuel12:27 Ningĩ Joabu agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Daudi
2Samuel12:28 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩcookanĩrĩria mbũtũ ciake ciothe cia ita agĩthiĩ Raba
2Samuel12:30 Nake akĩoya thũmbĩ ya mũtwe ya mũthamaki wao
2Samuel12:31 akĩrutũrũra aikari akuo
2Samuel13:1 Thuutha wa mahinda macio-rĩ
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni agĩtangĩka nginya agĩĩtua nĩ mũrũaru nĩ ũndũ wa mwarĩ wa ithe Tamaru
2Samuel13:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:4 Akĩũria Amunoni atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:5 Jonadabu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Amunoni agĩkoma na agĩĩtua nĩ mũrũaru. Na rĩrĩa mũthamaki ookire kũmuona
2Samuel13:7 Daudi agĩtũmanĩra Tamaru nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki
2Samuel13:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Tamaru agĩthiĩ nyũmba ya mũrũ wa ithe Amunoni
2Samuel13:9 Agĩcooka akĩoya rũgĩo
2Samuel13:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Amunoni akĩĩra Tamaru atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:11 No rĩrĩa aamũtwarĩire nĩguo arĩe
2Samuel13:12 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:13 Ha ũhoro wakwa naguo atĩa? Thoni ciakwa ingĩcitwara nakũ? O nawe-rĩ
2Samuel13:14 Nowe akĩrega kũmũigua
2Samuel13:15 Ningĩ Amunoni akĩmũthũũra na rũthũũro rũnene makĩria. Ti-itherũ
2Samuel13:16 Tamaru akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:17 Nake Amunoni agĩĩta ndungata yake
2Samuel13:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndungata yake ĩkĩmũikia na nja
2Samuel13:19 Tamaru akĩĩitĩrĩria mũhu mũtwe
2Samuel13:20 Nake mũrũ wa nyina Abisalomu akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:21 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Mũthamaki Daudi aiguire maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ
2Samuel13:22 Abisalomu ndaigana kwaria na Amunoni ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
2Samuel13:23 Mĩaka ĩĩrĩ yathira
2Samuel13:24 Abisalomu agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel13:25 Mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:26 Ningĩ Abisalomu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:27 Nowe Abisalomu akĩmũringĩrĩria
2Samuel13:28 Abisalomu agĩatha andũ ake
2Samuel13:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Abisalomu magĩĩka Amunoni o ta ũrĩa Abisalomu aamaathĩte. Hĩndĩ ĩyo ariũ othe a mũthamaki magĩũkĩra
2Samuel13:30 Marĩ njĩra-inĩ makĩũra-rĩ
2Samuel13:31 Nake mũthamaki agĩũkĩra
2Samuel13:32 No Jonadabu mũrũ wa Shimea
2Samuel13:33 Mũthamaki mwathi wakwa ndagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrũmbũiya ũhoro ũcio wa atĩ ariũ othe a mũthamaki nĩmakuĩte. Amunoni nowe wiki ũkuĩte.”
2Samuel13:34 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abisalomu nĩakoretwo orĩte. Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:35 Jonadabu akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:36 Na aarĩkia kwaria o ro ũguo-rĩ
2Samuel13:37 Nake Abisalomu akĩũra agĩthiĩ gwa Talimai mũrũ wa Amihudi
2Samuel13:38 Thuutha wa Abisalomu kũũrĩra Geshuru
2Samuel13:39 Nayo ngoro ya mũthamaki nĩyeriragĩria gũthiĩ kũrĩ Abisalomu
2Samuel14:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Samuel14:3 Ũcooke ũthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki ũmwarĩrie ciugo ici.” Nake Joabu akĩmwĩra ũrĩa ekuuga.
2Samuel14:4 Rĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio wa kuuma Tekoa aathiire kũrĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel14:5 Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:6 Niĩ ndungata yaku ndĩrarĩ na ariũ eerĩ. Nao maroogitana me mũgũnda
2Samuel14:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:8 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:9 No mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio wa Tekoa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:10 Nake mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:11 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:12 Ningĩ mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:13 Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:14 Ta ũrĩa maaĩ maitĩkaga thĩ
2Samuel14:15 “Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:16 no gũkorwo mũthamaki nĩegwĩtĩkĩra kũhonokia ndungata yake kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa mũndũ ũrĩa ũrageria gũtũniina niĩ hamwe na mũriũ wakwa
2Samuel14:17 “Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki akĩĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:19 Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:20 Nake Joabu
2Samuel14:21 Mũthamaki akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:22 Joabu akĩĩgũithia aturumithĩtie ũthiũ thĩ nĩguo amũhe gĩtĩĩo
2Samuel14:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu agĩthiĩ Geshuru
2Samuel14:24 Nowe mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:25 Thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli guothe gũtiarĩ mũndũ ũngĩ o na ũmwe waganagwo gũthakara ta Abisalomu. Kuuma rũcuĩrĩ rwake rwa mũtwe nginya nyarĩrĩ ciake ndaarĩ na kameni.
2Samuel14:26 Rĩrĩa rĩothe eenjaga njuĩrĩ cia mũtwe wake
2Samuel14:27 Nake Abisalomu nĩaciarire aanake atatũ na mũirĩtu ũmwe. Nake mwarĩ eetagwo Tamaru
2Samuel14:28 Abisalomu aatũũrire mĩaka ĩĩrĩ Jerusalemu atarĩ oona ũthiũ wa mũthamaki.
2Samuel14:29 Ningĩ Abisalomu agĩtũmanĩra Joabu nĩguo amũtũme kũrĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel14:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu agĩthiĩ mũciĩ kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel14:32 Nake Abisalomu akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joabu agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel15:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:2 Nake ookĩraga rũciinĩ tene akarũgama mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra ĩrĩa yathiiaga kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa itũũra rĩrĩa inene. Na rĩrĩa mũndũ o wothe ooka arĩ na mateta ma gũtwarĩra mũthamaki nĩguo atue itua-rĩ
2Samuel15:3 Ningĩ Abisalomu akamwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:4 Ningĩ Abisalomu akamwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:5 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa mũndũ wothe amũkuhĩrĩria ainamĩrĩre mbere yake
2Samuel15:6 Abisalomu ekaga ũguo kũrĩ andũ othe a Isiraeli arĩa mookaga kũrĩ mũthamaki gũcaria kĩhooto
2Samuel15:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndungata yaku yatũũraga Geshuru kũu Suriata
2Samuel15:9 Nake mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abisalomu agĩtũma andũ na hitho mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yothe ya Isiraeli makoige atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:11 Andũ magana meerĩ kuuma Jerusalemu nĩo maathiĩte hamwe na Abisalomu. Meetĩtwo marĩ ageni
2Samuel15:12 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Abisalomu aarutaga magongona-rĩ
2Samuel15:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩĩra anene ake othe arĩa aarĩ nao Jerusalemu atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:15 Nao anene a mũthamaki makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:16 Nake mũthamaki akiumagara
2Samuel15:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki akiumagara
2Samuel15:18 Nao andũ ake othe makĩmũhĩtũka
2Samuel15:19 Mũthamaki akĩũria Itai ũrĩa Mũgiiti atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:20 Ũrookire o ira. Ingĩgwĩtĩkĩria atĩa wambĩrĩrie kũũrũũra na ithuĩ
2Samuel15:21 No Itai agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:22 Nake Daudi akĩĩra Itai atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:23 Nao andũ othe a bũrũri ũcio makĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene rĩrĩa andũ acio othe maahĩtũkaga. Mũthamaki o nake akĩringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa karũũĩ ga Kidironi
2Samuel15:24 Zadoku o nake aarĩ ho
2Samuel15:25 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra Zadoku atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:26 No angĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:27 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra Zadoku ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:28 Na niĩ ngũikara njetereire mariũko-inĩ kũu werũ-inĩ
2Samuel15:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Zadoku na Abiatharu magĩkuua ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai
2Samuel15:30 No Daudi agĩthiĩ na mbere kwambata kĩrĩma kĩa mĩtamaiyũ
2Samuel15:31 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:32 Na rĩrĩa Daudi aakinyire gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma
2Samuel15:33 Nake Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:34 No ũngĩcooka itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene na wĩre Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:35 Githĩ Zadoku na Abiatharu arĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai matiigũkorwo kũu hamwe nawe? Meerage ũndũ o wothe ũngĩigua nyũmba-inĩ ya mũthamaki.
2Samuel15:36 Ariũ ao eerĩ
2Samuel15:37 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hushai mũrata wa Daudi agĩcooka
2Samuel16:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel16:2 Nake mũthamaki akĩũria Ziba atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:3 Mũthamaki agĩcooka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:4 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra Ziba atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:5 Mũthamaki Daudi aakuhĩrĩria Bahurimu-rĩ
2Samuel16:6 Agĩikĩria Daudi na anene othe a mũthamaki mahiga
2Samuel16:7 Shimei akĩrumana
2Samuel16:8 Jehova nĩakũrĩhĩtie
2Samuel16:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abishai mũrũ wa Zeruia akĩũria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:10 No mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:11 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra Abishai na anene ake othe atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:12 Hihi no gũkorwo Jehova nĩekuona thĩĩna wakwa
2Samuel16:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake magĩthiĩ na mbere magereire njĩra nake Shimei akagera mwena-inĩ wa kĩrĩma angʼethanĩire nao
2Samuel16:14 Nake mũthamaki na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ nake magĩkinya kũrĩa maathiiaga manogeete. Na kũu nĩkuo Daudi aahurũkĩire
2Samuel16:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abisalomu na andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩũka Jerusalemu
2Samuel16:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hushai ũrĩa Mũariki
2Samuel16:17 Abisalomu akĩũria Hushai atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:18 Nake Hushai akĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:19 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel16:20 Abisalomu akĩĩra Ahithofeli atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofeli agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩambĩra Abisalomu hema nyũmba igũrũ
2Samuel16:23 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel17:1 Ahithofeli akĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:2 Na ndĩmũtharĩkĩre o ro rĩu arĩ mũnogu na atarĩ na hinya. Ndĩmũmakie
2Samuel17:3 na hũndũre andũ othe macooke kũrĩ we. Gĩkuũ kĩa mũndũ ũcio ũracaria gĩgũcookia andũ othe harĩwe; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkũgurara.”
2Samuel17:4 Narĩo ithugunda rĩu rĩkĩoneka rĩrĩ rĩega nĩ Abisalomu na athuuri othe a Isiraeli.
2Samuel17:5 No Abisalomu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:6 Na rĩrĩa Hushai ookire
2Samuel17:7 Hushai agĩcookeria Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:8 Wee nĩũũĩ thoguo na andũ ake; nĩ andũ njamba
2Samuel17:9 O na rĩu ahithĩtwo ngurunga kana akahithwo handũ hangĩ. Angĩtharĩkĩra mbũtũ ciaku cia ita mbere-rĩ
2Samuel17:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo o na mũthigari ũrĩa njamba
2Samuel17:11 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũgũtaara atĩrĩ: Reke andũ othe a Isiraeli kuuma Dani nginya Birishiba
2Samuel17:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩtũkaamũtharĩkĩra harĩa hothe tũngĩmuona
2Samuel17:13 O na ningĩ angĩgatoonya itũũra inene
2Samuel17:14 Nake Abisalomu na andũ othe a Isiraeli makiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:15 Hushai akĩĩra Zadoku na Abiatharu
2Samuel17:16 Rĩu tũmana kũrĩ Daudi narua
2Samuel17:17 Jonathani na Ahimaazu maikaraga Eni-Rogeli. Nayo ndungata ya mũirĩtu nĩyo yarĩ ĩthiĩ ĩkamahe ũhoro ũcio
2Samuel17:18 No kamwana kanini nĩkamonire na gakĩĩra Abisalomu. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio eerĩ makiumagara na ihenya magĩtoonya nyũmba ya mũndũ kũu Bahurimu. Nake aarĩ na gĩthima hau nja ya mũciĩ wake
2Samuel17:19 Nake mũtumia wa mũndũ ũcio akĩoya kĩndũ gĩa kũhumbĩra
2Samuel17:20 Na rĩrĩa andũ a Abisalomu mookire kũrĩ mũtumia ũcio kũu nyũmba gwake-rĩ
2Samuel17:21 Thuutha wa andũ acio gũthiĩ
2Samuel17:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ nake magĩũkĩra na makĩringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Na gũgĩkĩa gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtaaringĩte Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani.
2Samuel17:23 Na rĩrĩa Ahithofeli onire atĩ mataaro make matiinarũmĩrĩrĩrwo-rĩ
2Samuel17:24 Daudi agĩthiĩ Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:25 Abisalomu nĩathuurĩte Amasa atuĩke mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita ithenya rĩa Joabu. Amasa aarĩ mũriũ wa mũndũ wetagwo Jetheri
2Samuel17:26 Andũ a Isiraeli na Abisalomu maambĩte hema ciao bũrũri-inĩ wa Gileadi.
2Samuel17:27 Na rĩrĩa Daudi aakinyire Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:28 makĩrehe indo cia gũkomera
2Samuel17:29 na ũũkĩ na ngorono
2Samuel18:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel18:2 Daudi agĩtũma mbũtũ icio cia ita ithiĩ ikarũe
2Samuel18:3 No andũ acio makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:5 Mũthamaki agĩatha Joabu
2Samuel18:6 Mbũtũ icio cia ita ikĩerekera werũ-inĩ ikarũe na Isiraeli
2Samuel18:7 Kũu nĩkuo mbũtũ cia ita cia Isiraeli ciatooreirio nĩ andũ a Daudi. Nao arĩa maakuire mũthenya ũcio maarĩ aingĩ mũno
2Samuel18:8 Mbaara ĩkĩhurunjũka bũrũri wothe
2Samuel18:9 Nake Abisalomu agĩcemania na andũ a Daudi. Nake aahaicĩte nyũmbũ yake
2Samuel18:10 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe wao onire ũguo
2Samuel18:11 Joabu akĩĩra mũndũ ũrĩa wamwĩrire ũguo atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:12 No mũndũ ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:13 Na ingĩtwarĩrĩirie muoyo wakwa thĩĩna-inĩ
2Samuel18:14 Joabu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:15 Nao andũ ikũmi arĩa maakuuagĩra Joabu indo cia mbaara makĩrigiicĩria Abisalomu
2Samuel18:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu akĩhuha karumbeta
2Samuel18:17 Nao makĩoya Abisalomu
2Samuel18:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo
2Samuel18:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel18:20 Joabu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu akĩĩra Mũkushi ũmwe atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaazu mũrũ wa Zadoku akĩĩra Joabu rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:23 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:24 Daudi aaikairĩte thĩ gatagatĩ ga kĩhingo kĩa na thĩinĩ na kĩa nja-rĩ
2Samuel18:25 Nake mũrangĩri agĩĩta mũthamaki na akĩmũmenyithia ũhoro ũcio. Nake mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:26 Ningĩ mũrangĩri akĩona mũndũ ũngĩ ahanyũkĩte
2Samuel18:27 Mũrangĩri akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:28 Ningĩ Ahimaazu agĩĩta mũthamaki
2Samuel18:29 Nake mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:30 Nake mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũkushi agĩkinya
2Samuel18:32 Mũthamaki akĩũria Mũkushi atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:33 Mũthamaki akĩinaina. Akĩhaica
2Samuel19:1 Nake Joabu akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:2 Naguo ũhootani wa mũthenya ũcio wa mbũtũ cia ita ciothe ũkĩgarũrũka
2Samuel19:3 Mũthenya ũcio andũ magĩcooka itũũra-inĩ inene na hitho
2Samuel19:4 Nake mũthamaki akĩhumbĩra ũthiũ
2Samuel19:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu agĩtoonya nyũmba kũrĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel19:6 Wee wendete arĩa magũthũire
2Samuel19:7 Rĩu ũkĩra ũthiĩ ũkoomĩrĩrie andũ aku ũmekĩre hinya. Niĩ ngwĩhĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova atĩ aakorwo ndũkuuma ũthiĩ gũtanatuka
2Samuel19:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩũkĩra
2Samuel19:9 Mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yothe ya Isiraeli
2Samuel19:10 nake Abisalomu ũrĩa twaitĩrĩirie maguta atũthamakĩre-rĩ
2Samuel19:11 Mũthamaki Daudi nĩatũmanire kũrĩ Zadoku na Abiatharu
2Samuel19:12 Inyuĩ mũrĩ ariũ a baba
2Samuel19:13 Ningĩ mwĩre Amasa atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:14 Nake mũthamaki akĩguucĩrĩria ngoro cia andũ othe a Juda ta ciarĩ ngoro ya mũndũ ũmwe. Nao magĩtũmana kũrĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel19:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩcooka agĩthiĩ agĩkinya Jorodani. Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel19:16 Nake Shimei mũrũ wa Gera
2Samuel19:17 Nake aarĩ na andũ a Benjamini ngiri ĩmwe
2Samuel19:18 Makĩringĩra iriũko-inĩ nĩguo maringie andũ a nyũmba ya mũthamaki na meeke o ũrĩa angĩenda. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Shimei mũrũ wa Gera aaringire Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani akĩĩgũithia thĩ mbere ya mũthamaki
2Samuel19:19 na akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:20 Nĩgũkorwo niĩ ndungata yaku nĩnjũũĩ atĩ nĩnjĩhĩtie
2Samuel19:21 Ningĩ Abishai mũrũ wa Zeruia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:22 Nake Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki akĩĩra Shimei atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:24 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel19:25 Rĩrĩa ooimire Jerusalemu agatũnge mũthamaki
2Samuel19:26 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:27 Na nĩacambĩtie ndungata yaku kũrĩ mũthamaki mwathi wakwa. Mwathi wakwa mũthamaki ahaana ta mũraika wa Ngai; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ĩka ũrĩa ũkuona kwagĩrĩire.
2Samuel19:28 Njiaro ciothe cia guka ciagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũũragwo nĩ mũthamaki mwathi wakwa. No wee nĩwaheire ndungata yaku handũ na arĩa marĩĩagĩra metha-inĩ yaku. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndĩ na kĩhooto kĩrĩkũ gĩa gũgũkaĩra rĩngĩ mũthamaki wakwa?”
2Samuel19:29 Mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboshethu akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:31 Ningĩ Barizilai
2Samuel19:32 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel19:33 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩra Barizilai atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:34 Nowe Barizilai agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:35 Rĩu ndĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnana. No menye ũtiganu wa ũndũ mwega na mũũru? Ndungata yaku yahota gũcama kĩrĩa ĩrarĩa na kĩrĩa ĩranyua? No hote kũigua mĩgambo ya arũme na ya andũ-a-nja makĩina? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩtũma ndungata yaku ĩtuĩke mũrigo ũngĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki mwathi wakwa?
2Samuel19:36 Ndungata yaku nĩĩkũringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani hamwe na mũthamaki handũ ha itĩĩna inini
2Samuel19:37 Reke ndungata yaku ĩcooke
2Samuel19:38 Mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe makĩringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
2Samuel19:40 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki aaringire mũrĩmo agĩkinya Giligali
2Samuel19:41 Thuutha wa kahinda kanini andũ othe a Isiraeli nĩmookaga kũrĩ mũthamaki makamwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:42 Andũ othe a Juda magĩcookeria andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:43 Ningĩ andũ a Isiraeli magĩcookeria andũ a Juda atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩtiganĩria Daudi
2Samuel20:3 Rĩrĩa Daudi aacookire gĩikaro kĩa nyũmba yake ya ũthamaki kũu Jerusalemu-rĩ
2Samuel20:4 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩra Amasa atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:5 No rĩrĩa Amasa aathiire gwĩta andũ a Juda
2Samuel20:6 Daudi akĩĩra Abishai atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Joabu
2Samuel20:8 Rĩrĩa maarĩ ihiga-inĩ rĩrĩa inene kũu Gibeoni
2Samuel20:9 Joabu akĩĩra Amasa atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:10 Amasa ndaatindanĩrĩire na rũhiũ rũrĩa Joabu aanyiitĩte na guoko
2Samuel20:11 Ũmwe wa andũ a Joabu akĩrũgama mwena-inĩ wa Amasa
2Samuel20:12 Nake Amasa eegaragaragia thakame-inĩ yake arĩ njĩra gatagatĩ
2Samuel20:13 Amasa aarĩkia kweherio njĩra-inĩ
2Samuel20:14 Sheba akĩhĩtũkĩra mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yothe ya Isiraeli
2Samuel20:15 Nacio mbũtũ ciothe cia ita hamwe na Joabu igĩũka na ikĩrigiicĩria Sheba kũu Abeli-Bethi-Maaka. Magĩthondeka kĩhumbu gĩa tĩĩri kũrigania na itũũra
2Samuel20:16 mũndũ-wa-nja ũmwe mũũgĩ agĩĩtana arĩ thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu
2Samuel20:17 Nake agĩthiĩ erekeire harĩ we; nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:18 Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria
2Samuel20:19 Ithuĩ-rĩ
2Samuel20:20 Joabu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:21 Ũguo tiguo ũhoro ũtariĩ. Mũndũ wĩtagwo Sheba mũrũ wa Bikiri
2Samuel20:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia ũcio agĩthiĩ kũrĩ andũ othe arĩ na mataaro macio make ma ũũgĩ
2Samuel20:23 Joabu nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mbũtũ ciothe cia ita cia Isiraeli; nake Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada aarĩ mũnene wa Akerethi
2Samuel20:24 Adoniramu aarĩ mũtongoria wa kũrutithia wĩra wa hinya; nake Jehoshafatu mũrũ wa Ahiludu nĩwe warĩ mwandĩki wa maũndũ ma ihinda rĩu;
2Samuel20:25 nake Sheva nĩwe warĩ mwandĩki-marũa; Zadoku na Abiatharu maarĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai;
2Samuel20:26 nake Ira
2Samuel21:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel21:2 Nake mũthamaki agĩĩta andũ a Gibeoni akĩaria nao. (Na rĩrĩ
