2Samuel21:3 Nake Daudi akĩũria andũ acio a Gibeoni atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:4 Nao andũ a Gibeoni makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:5 Nao magĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:6 reke tũneo arũme mũgwanja a njiaro ciake nĩgeetha mooragwo na maraganio mbere ya Jehova kũu Gibea ya Saũlũ
2Samuel21:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel21:8 No mũthamaki agĩkuua Arimoni na Mefiboshethu
2Samuel21:9 Nake akĩmaneana kũrĩ Gibeoni
2Samuel21:10 Rizipa mwarĩ wa Aia akĩoya nguo ya ikũnia
2Samuel21:11 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi eerirwo ũrĩa Rizipa mwarĩ wa Aia
2Samuel21:12 agĩthiĩ
2Samuel21:13 Daudi agĩkuua mahĩndĩ ma Saũlũ na ma mũriũ Jonathani kuuma kũu
2Samuel21:14 Nao magĩthika mahĩndĩ ma Saũlũ na ma mũriũ Jonathani mbĩrĩra-inĩ ya Kishu
2Samuel21:15 O rĩngĩ nĩ kwagĩire mbaara gatagatĩ ka Afilisti na Isiraeli. Daudi agĩikũrũka agĩthiĩ hamwe na andũ ake makarũe na Afilisti
2Samuel21:16 Nake Ishibi-Benobu ũrĩa warĩ ũmwe wa njiaro cia Rafa
2Samuel21:17 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel21:18 Ningĩ thuutha wa mahinda macio
2Samuel21:19 Ningĩ mbaara-inĩ ĩngĩ makĩrũa na Afilisti kũu Gobu
2Samuel21:20 Ningĩ mbaara-inĩ ĩngĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ kũu Gathu
2Samuel21:21 Rĩrĩa aanyũrũririe andũ a Isiraeli
2Samuel21:22 Andũ acio ana maarĩ a rũciaro rwa Rafa kũu Gathu nao makĩgũa moko-inĩ ma Daudi na andũ ake.
2Samuel22:1 Daudi nĩainĩire Jehova na ciugo cia rwĩmbo rũrũ rĩrĩa Jehova aamũhonokirie kuuma guoko-inĩ gwa thũ ciake ciothe na kuuma guoko-inĩ gwa Saũlũ.
2Samuel22:2 Akiuga atĩrĩ: “Jehova nĩwe rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga
2Samuel22:3 Ngai wakwa nĩwe rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga
2Samuel22:4 Ngayagĩra Jehova
2Samuel22:5 “Ndiihũ cia gĩkuũ nĩciathiũrũrũkĩirie; nakĩo kĩguũ kĩa mwanangĩko gĩkĩngĩria hinya.
2Samuel22:6 Mĩhĩndo ya mbĩrĩra ĩgĩĩthiororokeria; nayo mĩtego ya gĩkuũ ĩkĩĩhotorera.
2Samuel22:7 Mĩnyamaro-inĩ yakwa ndakaĩire Jehova; ngĩgĩkaĩra Ngai wakwa arĩ hekarũ-inĩ yake. Nĩ aiguire mũgambo wakwa
2Samuel22:8 “Thĩ ĩkĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha; Nayo mĩthingi ya igũrũ ĩkĩenyenya; ĩkĩinaina tondũ aarĩ mũrakaru.
2Samuel22:9 Ndogo ĩkiuma maniũrũ-inĩ make ĩkĩambata na igũrũ; mwaki wa kũniinana ũkiuma kanua-inĩ gake. Kanua-inĩ gake hakoima makara mekũrĩrĩmbũka.
2Samuel22:10 Aahingũrire igũrũ agĩikũrũka thĩ; matu matumanu maarĩ rungu rwa makinya make.
2Samuel22:11 Ombũkire akuuĩtwo nĩ ikerubi; akĩambata na igũrũ na mathagu ma rũhuho.
2Samuel22:12 Ehumbĩrire na nduma
2Samuel22:13 Kuuma ũkengi ũrĩa warĩ harĩ we
2Samuel22:14 Jehova akĩruruma arĩ kũu igũrũ; mũgambo wa Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno
2Samuel22:15 Aikirie mĩguĩ
2Samuel22:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mĩkuru ya iria ĩkĩonekana
2Samuel22:17 “Agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake kuuma o kũu igũrũ akĩnyiita; akĩnguucia akĩnduta maaĩ-inĩ kũrĩa kũriku.
2Samuel22:18 Andeithũrire thũ yakwa ĩrĩ hinya
2Samuel22:19 Maanjĩhotoreire mũthenya ũrĩa ndaarĩ na mũtino
2Samuel22:20 Andutire na nja akĩndwara handũ haariĩ
2Samuel22:21 “Jehova anjĩkĩire maũndũ kũringana na ũthingu wakwa
2Samuel22:22 Nĩgũkorwo nĩnũmĩtie njĩra cia Jehova; ndiĩkĩte ũũru na ũndũ wa kũhutatĩra Ngai wakwa.
2Samuel22:23 Mawatho make mothe marĩ mbere yakwa; ndihutatĩire irĩra cia watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo.
2Samuel22:24 Ngoretwo itarĩ na ũcuuke ndĩ mbere yake
2Samuel22:25 Jehova andĩhĩte kũringana na ũthingu wakwa
2Samuel22:26 “Ũrĩ mwĩhokeku harĩ arĩa makwĩhokete
2Samuel22:27 kũrĩ ũrĩa wĩtheragia wĩonanagia ũrĩ mũtheru
2Samuel22:28 Wee ũhonokagia andũ arĩa enyiihia
2Samuel22:29 Wee Jehova
2Samuel22:30 Ndĩ na ũteithio waku no hote gũtharĩkĩra mbũtũ ya ita; ndĩ na Ngai wakwa no hote kũrũga rũthingo.
2Samuel22:31 “Mũrungu-rĩ
2Samuel22:32 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Samuel22:33 Nĩ Mũrungu ũũhotoraga hinya na ũhoti
2Samuel22:34 Atũmaga magũrũ makwa matengʼere o ta ma thwariga; aahotithagia kũrũgama kũndũ gũtũũgĩru.
2Samuel22:35 We nĩwe wonagia moko makwa mũrũĩre wa mbaara; moko makwa no mageete ũta wa gĩcango.
2Samuel22:36 Ũũheaga ngo yaku ya ũhootani; ũinamagĩrĩra thĩ ũkaanenehia.
2Samuel22:37 Ũnjaramagĩria njĩra ya kũrĩa thiiagĩra
2Samuel22:38 “Ndaingatithirie thũ ciakwa na ngĩcihehenja; ndiacookire na thuutha nginya rĩrĩa cianiinirwo.
2Samuel22:39 Ndacihehenjire biũ
2Samuel22:40 Wee ũũheaga hinya wa kũrũa mbaara
2Samuel22:41 Watũmire thũ ciakwa ihũndũke ciũre
2Samuel22:42 Maakaire mateithio
2Samuel22:43 Ndaamahũũrire makĩhaana ta rũkũngũ rũhinyu rwa thĩ; ngĩmahũũra na ngĩmarangĩrĩria ta ndooro ya njĩra-inĩ.
2Samuel22:44 “Nĩũũhonoketie ngaaga gũtharĩkĩrwo nĩ andũ akwa; ũndũũragia ndĩ mũtongoria wa ndũrĩrĩ. Andũ itooĩ nĩmakandungatagĩra
2Samuel22:45 andũ a kũngĩ mokaga kũrĩ niĩ menyiihĩtie; maigua ngumo yakwa
2Samuel22:46 Othe makuuaga ngoro; mokaga makĩinainaga moimĩte ciĩhitho-inĩ ciao cia hinya.
2Samuel22:47 “Jehova atũũraga muoyo! O we Rwaro rwakwa rwa Ihiga arogoocwo! Ngai arotũgĩrio
2Samuel22:48 We nĩwe Mũrungu ũrĩa ũndĩhagĩria
2Samuel22:49 nĩwe ũũhonokagia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciakwa. Wanyambatĩririe igũrũ rĩa andũ arĩa maathũire
2Samuel22:50 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Samuel22:51 Aheaga mũthamaki wake ũhootani mũnene; akonania ũtugi wake ũtathiraga kũrĩ ũcio wake mũitĩrĩrie maguta
2Samuel23:1 Ici nĩcio ciugo cia kũrigĩrĩria cia Daudi: “Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro wa Daudi mũrũ wa Jesii
2Samuel23:2 “Roho wa Jehova nĩaririe na kanua gakwa; kiugo gĩake kĩarĩ rũrĩmĩ-inĩ rwakwa.
2Samuel23:3 Ngai wa Isiraeli nĩaririe
2Samuel23:4 atuĩkaga ta ũtheri wa rũciinĩ riũa rĩkĩratha
2Samuel23:5 “Githĩ nyũmba yakwa ti nũngĩrĩru harĩ Mũrungu? Githĩ ndaarĩkanĩire na niĩ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra
2Samuel23:6 No andũ arĩa aaganu othe magaateo ta mĩigua
2Samuel23:7 Ũrĩa wothe ũhutagia mĩigua ahũthagĩra kĩndũ gĩa kĩgera kana mũtĩ wa itimũ; mĩigua ĩcinagĩrwo o harĩa ĩigĩtwo.”
2Samuel23:8 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma andũ a Daudi arĩa maarĩ njamba: Joshebu-Bashebethu ũrĩa Mũtakemoni aarĩ mũnene wa arĩa atatũ; nake oire itimũ rĩake
2Samuel23:9 Mũnini wake eetagwo Eleazaru mũrũ wa Dodai
2Samuel23:10 nowe ndoorire
2Samuel23:11 Ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire aarĩ Shama mũrũ wa Agee ũrĩa Mũharari. Rĩrĩa Afilisti monganire hamwe handũ haarĩ mũgũnda waiyũrĩte ndengũ
2Samuel23:12 No Shama ndoorire
2Samuel23:13 Hĩndĩ ya magetha-rĩ
2Samuel23:14 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu Daudi aarĩ kĩĩhitho-inĩ kĩa hinya
2Samuel23:15 Daudi akĩĩrirĩria maaĩ
2Samuel23:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio atatũ maarĩ njamba magĩtuĩkanĩria gatagatĩ-inĩ ga ita rĩa Afilisti
2Samuel23:17 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel23:18 Abishai mũrũ wa nyina na Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia aarĩ mũnene wa acio atatũ. Nake akĩoya itimũ rĩake agĩtharĩkĩra andũ magana matatũ
2Samuel23:19 Githĩ ndaakĩgĩire na igweta inene gũkĩra acio Atatũ? Nĩwe watuĩkire mũnene wao
2Samuel23:20 Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada aarĩ mũrũi njamba wa kuuma Kabizeeli
2Samuel23:21 Nĩooragire Mũmisiri mũndũ warĩ mũnene mũno. O na gũtuĩka Mũmisiri ũcio nĩanyiitĩte itimũ na guoko gwake
2Samuel23:22 Macio nĩmo maũndũ ma ũcamba marĩa meekirwo nĩ Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada; o nake aarĩ igweta o ta andũ arĩa atatũ maarĩ njamba.
2Samuel23:23 Nĩatĩĩtwo gũkĩra arĩa Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ
2Samuel23:24 Thĩinĩ wa andũ acio Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ
2Samuel23:25 na Shama ũrĩa Mũharodi
2Samuel23:26 na Helezu ũrĩa Mũpaliti
2Samuel23:27 na Abiezeri kuuma Anathothu
2Samuel23:28 na Zalimoni ũrĩa Mũahohi
2Samuel23:29 na Helebu mũrũ wa Baana ũrĩa Mũnetofathi
2Samuel23:30 na Benaia ũrĩa Mũpirathoni
2Samuel23:31 na Abi-Aliboni ũrĩa Mũaribathi
2Samuel23:32 na Eliahaba ũrĩa Mũshaaliboni
2Samuel23:33 mũrũ wa Shama ũrĩa Mũharari
2Samuel23:34 na Elifeleti mũrũ wa Ahasabai ũrĩa Mũmaakathi
2Samuel23:35 Herezo ũrĩa Mũkarimeli
2Samuel23:36 na Igali mũrũ wa Nathani kuuma Zoba
2Samuel23:37 na Zeleku ũrĩa Mũamoni
2Samuel23:38 na Ira ũrĩa Mũithiri
2Samuel23:39 na Uria ũrĩa Mũhiti. Andũ acio othe maarĩ mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja.
2Samuel24:1 Ningĩ marakara ma Jehova magĩakanĩra Isiraeli
2Samuel24:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki akĩĩra Joabu na anene a mbũtũ cia ita arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:3 No Joabu agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:4 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel24:5 Nao marĩkia kũringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
2Samuel24:6 Magĩthiĩ Gileadi na bũrũri-inĩ ũcio wa Tahatimu-Hodishi
2Samuel24:7 Magĩcooka magĩthiĩ merekeire kĩirigo kĩa hinya gĩa Turo na matũũra-inĩ mothe ma andũ a Ahivi na ma Kaanani. Marigĩrĩrio-ini magĩthiĩ Birishiba kũu Negevu ya Juda.
2Samuel24:8 Maarĩkia gũthiĩ bũrũri-inĩ wothe
2Samuel24:9 Joabu agĩcookeria mũthamaki ũhoro wa mũigana wa andũ arĩa mangĩathiire mbaara: Thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli kwarĩ andũ ngiri magana manana andũ marĩ na hinya wa mwĩrĩ na mangĩahotire kũhũthĩra rũhiũ rwa njora
2Samuel24:10 Nake Daudi agĩthĩĩnĩka mũno ngoro thuutha wa gũtara andũ acio a mbaara
2Samuel24:11 Daudi atanokĩra rũciinĩ rũrũ rũngĩ-rĩ
2Samuel24:12 “Thiĩ ũkeere Daudi ũũ
2Samuel24:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gadi agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Daudi
2Samuel24:14 Daudi akĩĩra Gadi atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩrehera Isiraeli mũthiro kuuma rũciinĩ rũu nginya ihinda rĩrĩa rĩatuĩtwo; nao andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja kuuma Dani nginya Birishiba magĩkua.
2Samuel24:16 Rĩrĩa mũraika aatambũrũkirie guoko gwake nĩguo aanange Jerusalemu-rĩ
2Samuel24:17 Rĩrĩa Daudi onire mũraika ũcio woragaga andũ-rĩ
2Samuel24:18 Mũthenya o ro ũcio-rĩ
2Samuel24:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩambata o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathanĩte na kanua ka Gadi.
2Samuel24:20 Rĩrĩa Arauna aacũthĩrĩirie akĩona mũthamaki na andũ ake magĩũka marorete na kũrĩ we
2Samuel24:21 Arauna akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:22 Arauna akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:23 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel24:24 Mũthamaki agĩcookeria Arauna atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:25 Daudi agĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona hau
1Kings1:1 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Mũthamaki Daudi aakũrire na agatindĩka mĩaka-rĩ
1Kings1:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndungata ciake ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings1:3 Magĩetha mũirĩtu mũthaka Isiraeli guothe
1Kings1:4 Mũirĩtu ũcio aarĩ mũthaka mũno; nake akĩmenyerera mũthamaki na akĩmũtungatĩra
1Kings1:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings1:6 (Ithe ndaamũkaanĩtie ũndũ
1Kings1:7 Nake Adonija akĩrĩkanĩra na Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia
1Kings1:8 No Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:9 Nake Adonija akĩruta igongona rĩa ngʼondu
1Kings1:10 no ndaigana gwĩta Nathani ũrĩa mũnabii
1Kings1:11 Nake Nathani akĩũria Bathisheba
1Kings1:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings1:13 Ũkĩra ũthiĩ kũrĩ Mũthamaki Daudi ũmwĩre atĩrĩ
1Kings1:14 Ũrĩ o kũu ũkĩaria na mũthamaki
1Kings1:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Bathisheba agĩthiĩ kuona mũthamaki ũcio mũkũrũ kanyũmba gake ga thĩinĩ
1Kings1:16 Bathisheba akĩinamĩrĩra
1Kings1:17 Akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings1:18 No rĩrĩ
1Kings1:19 Nĩarutĩte igongona inene rĩa ngʼombe nyingĩ
1Kings1:20 Mũthamaki mwathi wakwa
1Kings1:21 Kwaga ũguo-rĩ
1Kings1:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aaragia na mũthamaki
1Kings1:23 Nao makĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings1:24 Nathani akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Kings1:25 Ũmũthĩ nĩaikũrũkĩte na akaruta igongona inene rĩa ngʼombe nyingĩ
1Kings1:26 No rĩrĩ
1Kings1:27 Ũndũ ũyũ-rĩ
1Kings1:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũthamaki Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings1:29 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩhĩta
1Kings1:30 ti-itherũ ũmũthĩ nĩguo ngũhingia ũrĩa ndehĩtire kũrĩ we na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli
1Kings1:31 Nake Bathisheba akĩinamĩrĩra
1Kings1:32 Mũthamaki Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings1:33 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Kings1:34 Mũrĩ kũu
1Kings1:35 Ningĩ mũcooke mwambate nake
1Kings1:36 Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings1:37 O ta ũrĩa Jehova akoretwo arĩ hamwe na mũthamaki mwathi wakwa
1Kings1:38 Tondũ ũcio Zadoku ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:39 Zadoku ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akĩruta rũhĩa rwa maguta kuuma hema-inĩ ĩrĩa nyamũre na agĩitĩrĩria Solomoni. Ningĩ makĩhuha karumbeta
1Kings1:40 Andũ othe makĩambata mamũrũmĩrĩire
1Kings1:41 Adonija na ageni othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makĩigua mũrurumo ũcio rĩrĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ kũrĩĩkia iruga rĩao. Rĩrĩa maiguire mũgambo wa karumbeta
1Kings1:42 O akĩaragia-rĩ
1Kings1:43 Jonathani agĩcookia atĩrĩ; “Aca ti ũguo! Mũthamaki Daudi mwathi witũ nĩatuĩte Solomoni mũthamaki.
1Kings1:44 Mũthamaki nĩoimagarĩtie Solomoni hamwe na Zadoku ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:45 na rĩrĩ

1Kings2:1 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩa Daudi rĩakuhĩrĩirie rĩa gũkua-rĩ
1Kings2:2 “Rĩu ndĩ hakuhĩ gũthiĩ na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩgeragwo nĩ andũ othe a thĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Kings2:3 na ũmenyagĩrĩre ũrĩa Jehova Ngai waku endaga: Ũthiiage na njĩra ciake
1Kings2:4 nĩgeetha Jehova atũũrie kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa aanjĩĩrĩire
1Kings2:5 “Rĩu wee mwene nĩũĩ ũrĩa Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia aanjĩkire
1Kings2:6 Ĩka ũrĩa ũkuona kwagĩrĩire kũringana na ũũgĩ waku
1Kings2:7 “No ariũ a Barizilai wa Gileadi ũmatugage wega

1Kings2:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩikarĩra gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩa ithe Daudi
1Kings2:13 Na rĩrĩ

1Kings2:15 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings2:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings2:17 Agĩthiĩ na mbere
1Kings2:18 Bathisheba agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings2:19 Rĩrĩa Bathisheba aathiire kũrĩ Mũthamaki Solomoni akamũhe ũhoro wa Adonija-rĩ
1Kings2:20 Nake nyina akiuga atĩrĩ

1Kings2:22 Mũthamaki Solomoni akĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ

1Kings2:24 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings2:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũthamaki Solomoni agĩatha Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada
1Kings2:26 Mũthamaki akĩĩra Abiatharu ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ
1Kings2:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni akĩeheria Abiatharu atige gũtuĩka mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai wa Jehova
1Kings2:28 Rĩrĩa ũhoro ũcio wakinyĩire Joabu
1Kings2:29 Mũthamaki Solomoni akĩĩrwo atĩ Joabu orĩire hema-inĩ ya Jehova na aarĩ hakuhĩ na kĩgongona. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni agĩatha Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada atĩrĩ
1Kings2:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Benaia akĩingĩra hema ĩyo ya Jehova akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
1Kings2:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩatha Benaia
1Kings2:32 Jehova nĩegũtũma acookererwo nĩ thakame ĩrĩa aaitire
1Kings2:33 Ihĩtia rĩu rĩa gũita thakame yao rĩrocookerera Joabu na njiaro ciake nginya tene. No kũrĩ Daudi na njiaro ciake
1Kings2:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada agĩthiĩ akĩgũtha Joabu akĩmũũraga
1Kings2:35 Mũthamaki akĩnenehia Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada akĩmũtua mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita handũ ha Joabu
1Kings2:36 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩtũmana Shimei eetwo

1Kings3:4 Mũthamaki agĩthiĩ Gibeoni kũruta magongona
1Kings3:5 Nakuo kũu Gibeoni Jehova akiumĩrĩra Solomoni ũtukũ kĩroto-inĩ

1Kings3:10 Jehova nĩakenire nĩ ũndũ wa Solomoni kũmũũria ũndũ ũcio.

1Kings3:12 nĩngwĩka o ũguo wahooya. Nĩngũkũhe ngoro ĩ na ũũgĩ na gũkũũrana
1Kings3:13 O na ningĩ nĩngũkũhe maũndũ marĩa ũtanahooya
1Kings3:14 Na ũngĩthiiaga na mĩthiĩre yakwa
1Kings3:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni agĩũkĩra toro

1Kings4:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩthamaka Isiraeli guothe.
1Kings4:2 Aya nĩo maarĩ anene ake: Azaria mũrũ wa Zadoku aarĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai;
1Kings4:3 nao Elihorefu na Ahija
1Kings4:4 nake Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita; nao Zadoku na Abiatharu maarĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai;
1Kings4:5 nake Azaria mũrũ wa Nathani nĩwe warĩ mũrũgamĩrĩri wa anene a ngʼongo; nake Zabudu mũrũ wa Nathani aarĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai na mũtaari wa mũthamaki;
1Kings4:6 nake Ahisharu aarĩ mũrũgamĩrĩri wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki; nake Adoniramu mũrũ wa Abida aarĩ mũrũgamĩrĩri wa arĩa maarutithagio wĩra na hinya.
1Kings4:7 Ningĩ Solomoni aarĩ na abarũthi ikũmi na eerĩ arĩa marũgamĩrĩire ngʼongo ciothe cia Isiraeli
1Kings4:8 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma abarũthi acio: Beni-Huri nĩwe warũgamĩrĩire bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu;
1Kings4:9 na Beni-Dekeri akarũgamĩrĩra Makazu
1Kings4:10 nake Beni-Hesedi akarũgamĩrĩra Arubothu (Soko na bũrũri wothe wa Heferi warĩ wake);
1Kings4:11 na Beni-Abinadabu akarũgamĩrĩra Nafathu-Dori (nake nĩwe wahikĩtie Tafathu mwarĩ wa Solomoni);
1Kings4:12 na Baana mũrũ wa Ahiludu akarũgamĩrĩra Taanaka
1Kings4:13 Nake Beni-Geberi akarũgamĩrĩra Ramothu-Gileadi (itũũro cia Jairu mũrũ wa Manase kũu Gileadi ciarĩ ciake
1Kings4:14 o nake Ahinadabu mũrũ wa Ido akarũgamĩrĩra Mahanaimu;
1Kings4:15 na Alimaazu akarũgamĩrĩra Nafitali (nake aahikĩtie Basemathu mwarĩ wa Solomoni);
1Kings4:16 na Baana mũrũ wa Hushai akarũgamĩrĩra Asheri na Alothu;
1Kings4:17 nake Jehoshafatu mũrũ wa Parua akarũgamĩrĩra Isakaru;
1Kings4:18 nake Shimei mũrũ wa Ela akarũgamĩrĩra Benjamini;
1Kings4:19 na Geberi mũrũ wa Uri akarũgamĩrĩra Gileadi (bũrũri wa Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori
1Kings4:20 Andũ a Juda na a Isiraeli maarĩ aingĩ mũno ta mũthanga wa iria-inĩ. Maarĩĩaga
1Kings4:21 Nake Solomoni nĩathamakĩire mothamaki mothe kuuma Rũũĩ rwa Farati nginya bũrũri wa Afilisti
1Kings4:22 Mahũthĩro ma Solomoni ma o mũthenya maarĩ maya: kori mĩrongo ĩtatũ cia mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu mũno
1Kings4:23 ngʼombe ikũmi cia gũtuĩrwo
1Kings4:24 Nĩgũkorwo nĩwe wathamakagĩra mothamaki mothe marĩa maarĩ ithũĩro rĩa Rũũĩ rwa Farati kuuma Tifisa nginya Gaza
1Kings4:25 Rĩrĩa rĩothe Solomoni aarĩ muoyo-rĩ
1Kings4:26 Solomoni aarĩ na ciugũ cia mbarathi cia ita ngiri inya
1Kings4:27 Nao anene a ngʼongo
1Kings4:28 Ningĩ nĩmarehaga igeri ciao cia cairi na nyeki
1Kings4:29 Ngai nĩaheire Solomoni ũũgĩ na ũmenyi mũingĩ mũno wa maũndũ
1Kings4:30 Ũũgĩ wa Solomoni warĩ mũnene gũkĩra ũũgĩ wa andũ othe a mwena wa irathĩro
1Kings4:31 Aarĩ mũũgĩ gũkĩra mũndũ ũngĩ o wothe
1Kings4:32 Nĩaathugundire thimo ngiri ithatũ
1Kings4:33 Nĩataaragĩria ũhoro wa mũkũrĩre wa mĩmera
1Kings4:34 Andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩmookaga gũthikĩrĩria ũũgĩ wa Solomoni matũmĩtwo nĩ athamaki othe a thĩ
1Kings5:1 Rĩrĩa Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo aiguire atĩ Solomoni nĩaitĩrĩirio maguta agatuĩka mũthamaki handũ ha ithe Daudi-rĩ
1Kings5:2 Nake Solomoni agĩcookeria Hiramu ndũmĩrĩri ĩno:
1Kings5:3 “Wee nĩũkũmenya atĩ tondũ wa mbaara iria ciothe cianakora baba
1Kings5:4 No rĩu Jehova Ngai wakwa nĩaheete ũhurũko mĩena yothe
1Kings5:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩnduĩte atĩ nĩngwaka hekarũ ĩĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova Ngai wakwa
1Kings5:6 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athana nĩguo ndemerwo mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni. Andũ akwa nĩmarĩrutithanagia wĩra na andũ aku
1Kings5:7 Rĩrĩa Hiramu aiguire ndũmĩrĩri ya Solomoni
1Kings5:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hiramu agĩtũmana kũrĩ Solomoni
1Kings5:9 Andũ akwa nĩmekũmĩikũrũkia kuuma Lebanoni nginya iria-inĩ
1Kings5:10 Ũguo nĩguo Hiramu aathiire na mbere gũtwarĩra Solomoni mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa na ya mĩthengera ĩrĩa endaga.
1Kings5:11 Nake Solomoni nĩaheaga Hiramu ngano ya kũrĩĩo gwake mũciĩ ya kori ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
1Kings5:12 Jehova nĩaheire Solomoni ũũgĩ
1Kings5:13 Mũthamaki Solomoni akĩandĩkithia aruti wĩra 30
1Kings5:14 Aamatũmaga marĩ ikundi cia andũ ngiri ikũmi o mweri
1Kings5:15 Solomoni nĩ aarĩ na andũ 70
1Kings5:16 o ũndũ ũmwe na anyabara 3
1Kings5:17 Mũthamaki agĩathana
1Kings5:18 Mabundi ma Solomoni
1Kings6:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa magana mana na mĩrongo ĩnana
1Kings6:2 Hekarũ ĩrĩa Mũthamaki Solomoni aakĩire Jehova yarĩ na ũraihu wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtandatũ
1Kings6:3 Gĩthaku kĩa mwena wa mbere wa nyũmba ĩyo nene ya hekarũ nĩkĩongereire wariĩ wa hekarũ
1Kings6:4 Nake agĩakĩra hekarũ ndirica ngundeeru cia na igũrũ.
1Kings6:5 Nĩaakithirie tũnyũmba twa mĩena-inĩ
1Kings6:6 Ngoroba ya thĩ mũno yarĩ na wariĩ wa mĩkono ĩtano
1Kings6:7 Hekarũ ĩgĩakwo-rĩ
1Kings6:8 Mũromo wa gũtoonya ngoroba ya thĩ warĩ mwena wa gũthini wa hekarũ; ningĩ nĩ haarĩ na ngathĩ ya kwambata ngoroba ya gatagatĩ na kuuma hau ĩgathiĩ ngoroba ya gatatũ.
1Kings6:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩaka hekarũ na akĩmĩrĩkia
1Kings6:10 Na nĩakĩrĩire tũnyũmba twa rwere tũthiũrũkĩirie hekarũ
1Kings6:11 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩgĩakinyĩire Solomoni
1Kings6:12 “Ha ũhoro wa hekarũ ĩno ũraaka-rĩ
1Kings6:13 Na nĩngatũũrania na andũ a Isiraeli
1Kings6:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩaka hekarũ na akĩmĩrĩkia.
1Kings6:15 Nake akĩhumbĩra thingo cia thĩinĩ na mbaũ cia mĩtarakwa
1Kings6:16 Mwena wa thuutha wa hekarũ akĩgayania mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mbaũ cia mĩtarakwa kuuma thĩ nginya igũrũ
1Kings6:17 Ũraihu wa nyũmba ĩrĩa nene yarĩ mbere ya kanyũmba kau warĩ wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩna kũraiha.
1Kings6:18 Hekarũ thĩinĩ kwahumbĩrĩtwo na mbaũ cia mĩtarakwa
1Kings6:19 Thĩinĩ wa handũ-harĩa-haamũre
1Kings6:20 Hau thĩinĩ haamũre
1Kings6:21 Solomoni aahumbĩrire hekarũ thĩinĩ na thahabu therie
1Kings6:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩgemia thĩinĩ guothe na thahabu. Ningĩ nĩagemirie kĩgongona kĩrĩa kĩarĩ thĩinĩ wa handũ-harĩa-haamũre na thahabu.
1Kings6:23 Hau thĩinĩ haamũre
1Kings6:24 Ikerubi rĩa mbere rĩarĩ na ithagu rĩa mĩkono ĩtano kũraiha
1Kings6:25 Ikerubi rĩa keerĩ o narĩo rĩarĩ rĩa mĩkono ikũmi; makerubi macio meerĩ nĩmaiganaine na makahaanana.
1Kings6:26 Ũraihu wa o ikerubi rĩmwe warĩ wa mĩkono ikũmi.
1Kings6:27 Nĩaigire makerubi macio kanyũmba ga thĩinĩ mũno ka hekarũ
1Kings6:28 Nĩaagemirie makerubi macio na thahabu.
1Kings6:29 Thingo-inĩ iria ciathiũrũrũkĩirie hekarũ
1Kings6:30 Ningĩ akĩhumbĩra thĩ ya tũnyũmba twa thĩinĩ na twa nja ya hekarũ na thahabu.
1Kings6:31 Narĩo itoonyero rĩa hau thĩinĩ haamũre agĩthondeka mĩrango ya mbaũ cia mĩtamaiyũ
1Kings6:32 Na mĩrango-ini yeerĩ ya mbaũ cia mĩtamaiyũ agĩicũhia magemio ma makerubi
1Kings6:33 O ũndũ ũmwe nĩathondekire buremu irĩ na mĩena ĩna cia mĩtamaiyũ cia itoonyero rĩa nyũmba ĩrĩa nene.
1Kings6:34 Ningĩ agĩthondeka mĩrango ĩĩrĩ ya mbaũ cia mĩthengera
1Kings6:35 Nĩacũhirie makerubi
1Kings6:36 Na nĩaakire nja ya thĩinĩ na mĩhari ĩtatũ ya mahiga maicũhie na mũhari ũngĩ ũmwe wa mĩgamba mĩicũhie ya mĩtarakwa.
1Kings6:37 Mũthingi wa hekarũ ĩyo ya Jehova wakirwo mwaka wa ĩna wa mweri wa Zivu.
1Kings6:38 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe mweri-inĩ wa Bulu
1Kings7:1 No rĩrĩ
1Kings7:2 Nĩaakire nyũmba ĩngĩ ya ũthamaki yetagwo Nyũmba ya Ũthamaki ya Mũtitũ wa Lebanoni
1Kings7:3 Nyũmba ĩyo yagitirwo na mbaũ cia mĩtarakwa iria ciarĩ igũrũ wa mĩgamba ĩrĩa yaigĩrĩirwo igũrũ wa itugĩ
1Kings7:4 Ndirica ciayo ciekĩrĩtwo igũrũ
1Kings7:5 Mĩrango yothe yarĩ na buremu cia mĩena ĩna; yekĩrĩtwo mwena wa na mbere ĩtatũ ĩtatũ
1Kings7:6 Nĩathondekire gĩthaku kĩa mũhari wa itugĩ
1Kings7:7 Nĩaakire nyũmba ya gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene
1Kings7:8 Nayo nyũmba yake ya gũikara ya ũthamaki
1Kings7:9 Mĩako ĩyo yothe
1Kings7:10 Mĩthingi yaakĩtwo na mahiga manene ma mũthemba mwega
1Kings7:11 Igũrũ gwakĩtwo na mahiga marĩa mega mũno matinĩtio na gĩthimo
1Kings7:12 Nayo nja ĩrĩa nene yathiũrũrũkĩirio na rũthingo rwa mĩhari ĩtatũ ya mahiga maicũhie
1Kings7:13 Mũthamaki Solomoni nĩatũmanire Turo nĩgeetha areherwo Huramu
1Kings7:14 ũrĩa nyina aarĩ mũtumia wa ndigwa wa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali
1Kings7:15 Nĩathondekire itugĩ igĩrĩ cia gĩcango
1Kings7:16 Ningĩ nĩathondekire ciongo cia gĩcango gĩtwekie cia kũigĩrĩra igũrũ rĩa itugĩ icio
1Kings7:17 Irengeeri igathĩkanĩtio ta mĩnyororo igĩcuurio nĩguo igemie ciongo cia itugĩ icio
1Kings7:18 Nĩathondekire makomamanga mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ĩkĩrigiicĩria irengeeri icio ciagathĩkanĩtio ta mĩnyororo cia kũgemia ciongo iria ciarĩ igũrũ rĩa itugĩ. O kĩongo agĩgĩĩka o ũguo.
1Kings7:19 Ciongo iria ciarĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ cia gĩthaku ciathondeketwo na mũhianĩre wa mahũa ma itoka
1Kings7:20 Ciongo cia itugĩ icio cierĩ
1Kings7:21 Nĩahaandire itugĩ icio gĩthaku-inĩ kĩa hekarũ. Gĩtugĩ kĩa mwena wa gũthini agĩgĩĩta Jakini
1Kings7:22 Ciongo iria ciarĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ icio ciathondeketwo na mũhianĩre wa mahũa ma itoka. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio wĩra wa itugĩ ũkĩrĩka.
1Kings7:23 Ningĩ agĩaka itangi rĩa gĩthiũrũrĩ rĩa kĩgera gĩtwekie inene mũno rĩrĩa rĩetagwo Karia
1Kings7:24 Mũhuro wa rũtiriho nĩrĩathiũrũrũkĩirio na magemio maahaanaine na tũbũũthũ
1Kings7:25 Nako Karia kau kaigĩrĩirwo igũrũ rĩa mĩhiano ya ndegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ; ithatũ ciacio ciarorete mwena wa gathigathini
1Kings7:26 Ũtungu wa Karia kau waiganaine na wariĩ wa rũhĩ. Rũtiriho rwako rwatariĩ ta rũtiriho rwa gĩkombe
1Kings7:27 Ningĩ agĩaka makaari ikũmi ma gĩcango mangĩaguucirio; o gĩkaari kĩmwe kĩarĩ kĩa ũraihu wa mĩkono ĩna
1Kings7:28 Makaari macio maakĩtwo ta ũũ: maarĩ na icunjĩ cia mĩena inyiitithanĩtio na buremu.
1Kings7:29 Icunjĩ iria ciarĩ gatagatĩ ka buremu
1Kings7:30 O gĩkaari kĩarĩ na magũrũ mana ma gĩcango
1Kings7:31 Mwena wa thĩinĩ wa gĩkaari kĩu kwarĩ na mũromo warĩ na buremu ya gĩthiũrũrĩ ya mũkono ũmwe kũrika. Mũromo ũcio warĩ wa gĩthiũrũrĩ
1Kings7:32 Magũrũ macio mana meekĩrĩtwo rungu rwa icunjĩ cia mĩena
1Kings7:33 Magũrũ macio maathondeketwo ta magũrũ ma ngaari ya ita
1Kings7:34 O gĩkaari nĩ kĩarĩ na nyiitĩro inya
1Kings7:35 Mwena wa na igũrũ wa gĩkaari kĩu wathiũrũrũkĩirio na mũcibi wa wariĩ wa nuthu ya mũkono kũrika. Itugĩ na icunjĩ cia mĩena nĩcianyiitithanĩtio na mwena wa na igũrũ wa gĩkaari kĩu.
1Kings7:36 Nake Huramu agĩkurura mĩhiano ya makerubi
1Kings7:37 Ũguo nĩguo aathondekire makaari macio ikũmi. Mothe maatwekeirio handũ hamwe
1Kings7:38 Ningĩ nĩathondekire iraĩ ikũmi cia gĩcango
1Kings7:39 Nĩaigire ikaari ithano ciacio mwena wa gũthini wa hekarũ
1Kings7:40 Ningĩ Huramu nĩathondekire iraĩ
1Kings7:41 itugĩ icio igĩrĩ; na ciongo icio igĩrĩ ciahaanaga ta mbakũri irĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ icio; na irengeeri iria igĩrĩ ciagathĩkanĩtio ta mĩnyororo iria ciagemetie ciongo icio ciarĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ;
1Kings7:42 na makomamanga 400 ma irengeeri iria igĩrĩ ciagathĩkanĩtio ta mĩnyororo (mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ya makomamanga o harĩ kĩrengeeri kĩmwe ĩkagemia ciongo icio ciahanaga ta mbakũri iria ciarĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ);
1Kings7:43 na makaari ikũmi na iraĩ ciamo ikũmi;
1Kings7:44 na Karia na mĩhiano ya ndegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ rungu rwako;
1Kings7:45 o na nyũngũ
1Kings7:46 Mũthamaki aatwekithagĩria indo icio kũrĩa gwathondekagĩrwo indo cia rĩũmba kũu werũ-inĩ wa Jorodani gatagatĩ ga Sukothu na Zarethani.
1Kings7:47 Solomoni ndaathimire indo icio tondũ ciarĩ nyingĩ mũno; ũritũ wa gĩcango ndwamenyekanire ũrĩa waiganaga.
1Kings7:48 Ningĩ Solomoni nĩathondekithirie indo ciothe iria ciarĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova: Aathondekire kĩgongona gĩa thahabu; na metha ya thahabu ya kũigĩrĩra mĩgate ĩrĩa yaigagwo mbere ya Jehova;
1Kings7:49 na mĩtĩ ya kũigĩrĩrwo matawa ya thahabu therie (ĩtano ĩkaigwo mwena wa ũrĩo
1Kings7:50 na iraĩ cia thahabu therie
1Kings7:51 Rĩrĩa wĩra wothe ũrĩa Mũthamaki Solomoni aarutaga wa gwaka hekarũ ya Jehova wathirire-rĩ
1Kings8:1 Ningĩ Mũthamaki Solomoni agĩĩta athuuri a Isiraeli
1Kings8:2 Nao andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩũka hamwe kũrĩ Mũthamaki Solomoni hĩndĩ ya gĩathĩ kĩa mweri wa Ethanimu
1Kings8:3 Rĩrĩa athuuri othe a Isiraeli maakinyire-rĩ
1Kings8:4 nao makĩambatia ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova hamwe na Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
1Kings8:5 nake Mũthamaki Solomoni na kĩũngano gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli kĩrĩa gĩacemanĩtie harĩ we kĩrĩ mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩu
1Kings8:6 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩcooka makĩrehe ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova handũ harĩo thĩinĩ wa hekarũ
1Kings8:7 Makerubi macio maatambũrũkĩtie mathagu mamo igũrũ rĩa harĩa haigĩtwo ithandũkũ rĩu
1Kings8:8 Mĩtĩ ĩyo yarĩ mĩraihu mũno
1Kings8:9 Thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ rĩu gũtiarĩ na kĩndũ kĩngĩ tiga o ihengere iria igĩrĩ cia mahiga iria Musa aigĩte ho rĩrĩa aarĩ Horebu
1Kings8:10 Rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai meeherire makiuma Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru
1Kings8:11 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai matingĩahotire kũruta wĩra wao nĩ ũndũ wa itu rĩu
1Kings8:12 Ningĩ Solomoni akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings8:13 no rĩrĩ
1Kings8:14 O hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩũngano gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli kĩrũgamĩte o hau
1Kings8:15 Ningĩ akiuga atĩrĩ: “Jehova arogoocwo
1Kings8:16 ‘Kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaarutire andũ akwa a Isiraeli kuuma Misiri
1Kings8:17 “Baba Daudi nĩatuĩte na ngoro yake gwaka hekarũ ĩĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
1Kings8:18 No Jehova eerire baba
1Kings8:19 No rĩrĩ
1Kings8:20 “Jehova nĩatũũrĩtie kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu
1Kings8:21 Hau nĩho thondekete handũ ha kũiga ithandũkũ rĩrĩa rĩ na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa Jehova aarĩkanĩire na maithe maitũ
1Kings8:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni akĩrũgama mbere ya kĩgongona kĩa Jehova
1Kings8:23 akiuga atĩrĩ: “Wee Jehova
1Kings8:24 Wee nĩũhingĩirie baba
1Kings8:25 “Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:26 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:27 “No kũhoteke Ngai atũũre gũkũ thĩ? Igũrũ
1Kings8:28 No o na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Kings8:29 Maitho maku maroikara marorete hekarũ ĩno ũtukũ na mũthenya
1Kings8:30 Igua gũthaithana kwa ndungata yaku na kwa andũ aku a Isiraeli rĩrĩa mekũhooya marorete handũ haha. Ũigue ũrĩ kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:31 “Rĩrĩa mũndũ angĩhĩtĩria mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake na gũtuĩke no nginya ehĩte
1Kings8:32 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩ ũkaigua ũrĩ kũu igũrũ na ũtue itua. Ũtuithanie ndungata ciaku ciira
1Kings8:33 “Rĩrĩa andũ aku a Isiraeli mahootwo nĩ thũ nĩ ũndũ nĩmakũhĩtĩirie
1Kings8:34 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkamaigua ũrĩ kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:35 “Rĩrĩa igũrũ rĩkaahingwo na mbura yage kuura tondũ wa ũrĩa andũ aku makũhĩtĩirie-rĩ
1Kings8:36 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkaamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:37 “Kũngĩkaagĩa ngʼaragu kana mũthiro bũrũri-inĩ
1Kings8:38 na rĩrĩa mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa andũ aku a Isiraeli angĩkaahooya kana athaithane
1Kings8:39 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkaigua ũrĩ kũu igũrũ gĩikaro-inĩ gĩaku
1Kings8:40 nĩgeetha matũũre magwĩtigĩrĩte matukũ mothe marĩa megũtũũra bũrũri ũrĩa waheire maithe maitũ.
1Kings8:41 “Ha ũhoro wa mũndũ wa kũngĩ ũrĩa ũtarĩ wa andũ aku a Isiraeli
1Kings8:42 tondũ andũ nĩmakaigua ngumo ya Rĩĩtwa rĩaku inene
1Kings8:43 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:44 “Rĩrĩa andũ aku maathiĩ mbaara-inĩ kũrũa na thũ ciao
1Kings8:45 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkaigua mahooya na gũthaithana kwao ũrĩ kũu igũrũ na ũmatirĩrĩre ũhoro-inĩ ũcio wao.
1Kings8:46 “Rĩrĩa makwĩhĩria
1Kings8:47 nao mangĩĩcookera ngoro-inĩ ciao marĩ o kũu bũrũri ũrĩa maatahĩirwo
1Kings8:48 na mangĩgagũcookerera na ngoro ciao ciothe
1Kings8:49 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:50 Na ũkarekera andũ aku
1Kings8:51 tondũ nĩ andũ aku na igai rĩaku
1Kings8:52 “Ũrohingũra maitho maku na ũigue mathaithana ma ndungata yaku na ma andũ aku a Isiraeli
1Kings8:53 Nĩgũkorwo nĩwe wamathuurire kuuma thĩinĩ wa ndũrĩrĩ ciothe cia thĩ matuĩke igai rĩaku kĩũmbe
1Kings8:54 Rĩrĩa Solomoni aarĩkirie mahooya macio mothe na gũthaitha Jehova-rĩ
1Kings8:55 Akĩrũgama na akĩrathima kĩũngano gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli na mũgambo mũnene
1Kings8:56 “Jehova arogoocwo
1Kings8:57 Jehova Ngai witũ aroikara hamwe na ithuĩ o ta ũrĩa aarĩ hamwe na maithe maitũ; aroaga gũtũtiganĩria o na kana gũtũtirika.
1Kings8:58 Arotũma ngoro ciitũ imũcookerere
1Kings8:59 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:60 nĩgeetha andũ othe a thĩ mamenye atĩ Jehova nĩwe Ngai
1Kings8:61 No ngoro cianyu no nginya ciĩheane biũ kũrĩ Jehova Ngai witũ
1Kings8:62 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki na andũ othe a Isiraeli makĩruta magongona hau mbere ya Jehova.
1Kings8:63 Solomoni nĩarutĩire Jehova igongona rĩa ũiguano ta ũũ: ngʼombe ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ
1Kings8:64 Mũthenya o ro ũcio mũthamaki nĩamũrire gĩcigo gĩa gatagatĩ kĩa nja ĩrĩa ĩrĩ mbere ya hekarũ ya Jehova
1Kings8:65 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩkorwo na gĩathĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩ hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli
1Kings8:66 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire akĩĩra andũ acio mainũke. Makĩrathima mũthamaki magĩcooka makĩinũka makenete na maiguĩte wega ngoro
1Kings9:1 Rĩrĩa Solomoni aarĩkirie gwaka hekarũ ya Jehova o na nyũmba ya ũthamaki
1Kings9:2 Jehova akĩmuumĩrĩra hĩndĩ ya keerĩ
1Kings9:3 Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ: “Nĩnjiguĩte kũhooya na gũthaithana kũrĩa ũhooete ũrĩ mbere yakwa; nĩnyamũrĩte hekarũ ĩno
1Kings9:4 “No wee mwene-rĩ
1Kings9:5 Nĩngahaanda gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli nginya tene
1Kings9:6 “No wee kana ariũ aku mũngĩkagarũrũka mũtigane na niĩ
1Kings9:7 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngeheria andũ a Isiraeli bũrũri ũyũ ndĩmaheete na ndiganĩrie hekarũ ĩno nyamũrĩte ĩĩtanio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa. Bũrũri wa Isiraeli ũgaatuĩka wa kuunagwo thimo
1Kings9:8 Na o na gũtuĩka hekarũ ĩno nĩ ya kũgegania-rĩ
1Kings9:9 Andũ nĩmagacookia moige atĩrĩ
1Kings9:10 Thuutha wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
1Kings9:11 Mũthamaki Solomoni nĩaheire Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo matũũra mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ kũu Galili
1Kings9:12 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Hiramu ooimire Turo nĩguo akoone matũũra marĩa aaheetwo nĩ Solomoni
1Kings9:13 Nake akĩũria Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Kings9:14 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings9:15 Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro wa ũrĩa Mũthamaki Solomoni aarutithirie andũ wĩra na hinya matekwĩyendera wa gwaka hekarũ ya Jehova na nyũmba ya ũthamaki
1Kings9:16 Firaũni mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩatharĩkĩire na akĩnyiita Gezeru. Agĩgũcina na mwaki
1Kings9:17 Nake Solomoni agĩaka Gezeru rĩngĩ. Nĩaakire Bethi-Horoni ya mũhuro
1Kings9:18 Baalathu
1Kings9:19 o na ningĩ nĩaakire matũũra manene ma kũiga indo ciake na matũũra ma ngaari ciake cia ita na ma mbarathi ciake
1Kings9:20 Andũ othe arĩa maatigaire kuuma kũrĩ Aamori
1Kings9:21 ũguo nĩ kuuga njiaro ciao iria ciatigarĩte bũrũri-inĩ
1Kings9:22 No Solomoni ndaatuire mũndũ o na ũmwe wa Isiraeli ngombo; nĩo maarĩ andũ ake a kũrũa mbaara
1Kings9:23 Ningĩ nĩ kwarĩ atongoria a anene 550 arĩa maarutithagia mawĩra mothe ma Solomoni na makarũgamĩrĩra aruti wĩra.
1Kings9:24 Rĩrĩa mwarĩ wa Firaũni aambatire kuuma itũũra inene rĩa Daudi agĩthiĩ gũikara nyũmba ya ũthamaki ĩrĩa Solomoni aamwakĩire
1Kings9:25 Solomoni aarutaga magongona ma njino na ma ũiguano kĩgongona-inĩ kĩrĩa aakĩire Jehova maita matatũ o mwaka
1Kings9:26 Ningĩ Mũthamaki Solomoni agĩaka marikabu nyingĩ kũu Ezioni-Geberi
1Kings9:27 Nake Hiramu agĩtũma andũ ake
1Kings9:28 Magĩthiĩ nginya Ofiri
1Kings10:1 Rĩrĩa Mũthamaki mũndũ-wa-nja wa Sheba aiguire ngumo ya Solomoni na ũhoro wa ngwatanĩro yake na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova-rĩ
1Kings10:2 Agĩkinya Jerusalemu arũmĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ aingĩ mũno
1Kings10:3 Nake Solomoni agĩcookia ciũria ciake ciothe; gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe mũthamaki aaremirwo nĩkũmũtaarĩria.
1Kings10:4 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki-mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio wa Sheba onire ũũgĩ wothe wa Solomoni o na nyũmba ya ũthamaki ĩrĩa aakĩte
1Kings10:5 na irio iria ciarĩ metha-inĩ yake
1Kings10:6 Akĩĩra Mũthamaki Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Kings10:7 No ndietĩkirie maũndũ macio nginya rĩrĩa ndĩrokire gũkũ
1Kings10:8 Kaĩ gũkena nĩ andũ aku-ĩ! Ningĩ gũkena nĩ anene aku arĩa marũgamaga mbere yaku hĩndĩ ciothe makaiguaga ũũgĩ waku!
1Kings10:9 Jehova Ngai waku arogoocwo
1Kings10:10 Agĩkĩhe mũthamaki taranda igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
1Kings10:11 (Marikabu cia Hiramu nĩ ciarehire thahabu kuuma Ofiri
1Kings10:12 Mũthamaki aahũthĩrire mĩthandari ĩyo gwaka itugĩ cia gũtiirĩrĩra hekarũ ya Jehova na cia nyũmba ya ũthamaki
1Kings10:13 Mũthamaki Solomoni nĩaheire mũthamaki ũcio mũndũ-wa-nja wa Sheba indo nyingĩ cia ũtaana wake na kĩrĩa kĩngĩ gĩothe eerirĩirie na aahooire. Thuutha ũcio Mũthamaki mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akiumagara hamwe na ndungata ciake agĩcooka bũrũri wake mwene.
1Kings10:14 Ũritũ wa thahabu ĩrĩa Solomoni aamũkagĩra o mwaka warĩ wa taranda magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ
1Kings10:15 ĩtataranĩirio na igooti rĩa athũgũri na onjorithia na ya kuuma kũrĩ athamaki a Arabia
1Kings10:16 Mũthamaki Solomoni agĩthondeka ngo nene magana meerĩ cia thahabu hũũre; o ĩmwe yathondeketwo na ũritũ wa beka magana matandatũ cia thahabu.
1Kings10:17 Ningĩ agĩthondeka ngo nini magana matatũ cia thahabu hũũre; o ĩmwe yathondeketwo na ũritũ wa mina ithatũ cia thahabu. Mũthamaki agĩciiga Nyũmba ya Ũthamaki ĩrĩa yetagwo Mũtitũ wa Lebanoni.
1Kings10:18 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩthondeka gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki kĩnene mũno
1Kings10:19 Gĩtĩ kĩu kĩa ũnene kĩarĩ na ngathĩ ya makinya matandatũ
1Kings10:20 Mĩhiano ĩngĩ ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya mĩrũũthi yarũgamĩtio ngathĩ-inĩ ĩyo ya makinya matandatũ. O ikinya rĩa ngathĩ rĩarĩ na mũhiano wa mũrũũthi o mwena. Gũtirĩ gĩtĩ kĩngĩ ta kĩu gĩathondeketwo mbere ĩyo gĩa ũthamaki ũngĩ o na ũrĩkũ.
1Kings10:21 Indo ciothe iria Mũthamaki Solomoni aanyuuagĩra ciarĩ cia thahabu
1Kings10:22 Mũthamaki aarĩ na marikabu nyingĩ cia wonjoria iria-inĩ
1Kings10:23 Mũthamaki Solomoni aarĩ na ũtonga na ũũgĩ mũingĩ gũkĩra athamaki arĩa angĩ othe a thĩ.
1Kings10:24 Andũ a thĩ yothe nĩmacaragia ũrĩa mangĩona Solomoni nĩguo maigue ũũgĩ ũrĩa Ngai eekĩrĩte ngoro-inĩ yake.
1Kings10:25 Andũ arĩa mookaga kũmuona mwaka o mwaka nĩmamũrehagĩra iheo; indo cia betha
1Kings10:26 Solomoni nĩacookanĩrĩirie ngaari cia ita na mbarathi; aarĩ na ngaari cia ita 1
1Kings10:27 Mũthamaki nĩatũmire betha cingĩhe Jerusalemu o ta mahiga
1Kings10:28 Mbarathi cia Solomoni cioimaga bũrũri wa Misiri na Kilikia. Onjorithia a mũthamaki macigũraga kuuma Kilikia.
1Kings10:29 Ngaari ĩmwe ya ita maamĩgũraga kuuma Misiri
1Kings11:1 Mũthamaki Solomoni nĩendire andũ-a-nja aingĩ a kũndũ kũngĩ o hamwe na mwarĩ wa Firaũni
1Kings11:2 Moimĩte ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ iria Jehova eerĩte Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Kings11:3 Aarĩ na atumia magana mũgwanja kuuma nyũmba cia ũthamaki
1Kings11:4 O ũrĩa Solomoni aathiire agĩkũraga
1Kings11:5 Akĩrũmĩrĩra Ashitorethu ngai ya nga ya andũ a Sidoni
1Kings11:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩĩka ũũru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova; ndaarũmĩrĩire Jehova kũna ta ũrĩa ithe Daudi eekĩte.
1Kings11:7 Solomoni nĩakĩire Kemoshu ngai ĩrĩa meneku ya Moabi
1Kings11:8 Eekire o ũguo kũrĩ atumia arĩa angĩ ake othe a kũngĩ
1Kings11:9 Jehova nĩarakaririo nĩ Solomoni tondũ ngoro yake nĩyahutatĩire Jehova
1Kings11:10 O na gũtuĩka nĩakaanĩtie Solomoni kũrũmĩrĩra ngai ingĩ-rĩ
1Kings11:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩĩra Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Kings11:12 No rĩrĩ
1Kings11:13 No ndikamũtunya ũthamaki wothe
1Kings11:14 Nake Jehova akĩarahũrĩra Solomoni thũ
1Kings11:15 Mbere ĩyo rĩrĩa Daudi aarũaga na Edomu
1Kings11:16 Joabu na andũ a Isiraeli othe maikarire kũu mĩeri ĩtandatũ
1Kings11:17 No Hadadi arĩ o kahĩĩ-rĩ
1Kings11:18 Nao makiuma Midiani magĩthiĩ Parani. Ningĩ makĩoya andũ angĩ kũu Parani
1Kings11:19 Firaũni nĩakenirio mũno nĩ Hadadi o nginya akĩmũhe mwarĩ wa nyina na Tahapenesi
1Kings11:20 Mwarĩ wa nyina na Tahapenesi akĩmũciarĩra kahĩĩ geetagwo Genubathu karĩa kaarereirwo nyũmba-inĩ ya mũthamaki nĩ Tahapenesi. Genubathu agĩtũũrania na ciana cia Firaũni kuo.
1Kings11:21 Hadadi arĩ kũu Misiri akĩigua atĩ Daudi nĩahurũkĩte hamwe na maithe make
1Kings11:22 Firaũni akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings11:23 Nake Ngai akĩarahũra thũ ĩngĩ ya gũũkĩrĩra Solomoni
1Kings11:24 Akĩĩyũnganĩria andũ
1Kings11:25 Rezoni aarĩ thũ ya Isiraeli rĩrĩa rĩothe Solomoni aatũũrire muoyo
1Kings11:26 Ningĩ Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati akĩremera mũthamaki. Aarĩ ũmwe wa anene a Solomoni
1Kings11:27 Ũũ nĩguo aaremeire Mũthamaki: Solomoni nĩathondekete mbenji na agacookereria rũthingo rwa itũũra inene rĩa ithe Daudi.
1Kings11:28 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings11:29 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu
1Kings11:30 nake Ahija akĩoya nguo ĩyo njerũ eehumbĩte
1Kings11:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩra Jeroboamu atĩrĩ
1Kings11:32 No nĩ ũndũ wa ndungata yakwa Daudi na itũũra inene rĩa Jerusalemu
1Kings11:33 Ngwĩka ũguo
1Kings11:34 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
1Kings11:35 Nĩngeheria ũthamaki moko-inĩ ma mũriũ na ngũhe mĩhĩrĩga ikũmi.
1Kings11:36 Nĩngaahe mũriũ mũhĩrĩga ũmwe
1Kings11:37 No wee-rĩ
1Kings11:38 Ũngĩka ũrĩa wothe ngũgwatha
1Kings11:39 Nĩnganyariira njiaro cia Daudi
1Kings11:40 Solomoni nĩageririe kũũraga Jeroboamu
1Kings11:41 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Solomoni
1Kings11:42 Solomoni aathamakĩire Isiraeli rĩothe arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
1Kings11:43 Agĩcooka akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
1Kings12:1 Rehoboamu nĩathiire Shekemu
1Kings12:2 Rĩrĩa Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati aiguire ũhoro ũcio (aarĩ o Misiri
1Kings12:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli magĩtũmanĩra Jeroboamu
1Kings12:4 “Thoguo nĩatũigĩrĩire icooki iritũ
1Kings12:5 Rehoboamu akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:6 Thuutha ũcio Mũthamaki Rehoboamu akĩhooya kĩrĩra kũrĩ athuuri arĩa maatungatagĩra ithe Solomoni rĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo. Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:7 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:8 No Rehoboamu akĩregana na ũtaaro ũrĩa athuuri acio maamũheire
1Kings12:9 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:10 Aanake acio a riika rĩake makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:11 Baba aamũigĩrĩire icooki iritũ; niĩ nĩngũrĩritũhia makĩria. Baba aamũhũũraga na iboko; no niĩ ndĩrĩmũhũũraga na tũngʼaurũ.’ ”
1Kings12:12 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ Jeroboamu na andũ othe magĩcooka kũrĩ Rehoboamu
1Kings12:13 Mũthamaki agĩcookeria andũ acio ũhoro ehĩte mũno. Akĩregana na ũtaaro ũrĩa aaheetwo nĩ athuuri
1Kings12:14 akĩrũmĩrĩra ũtaaro wa aanake
1Kings12:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki ndaigana gũthikĩrĩria andũ acio
1Kings12:16 Rĩrĩa andũ othe a Isiraeli moonire atĩ mũthamaki ũcio nĩarega kũmathikĩrĩria
1Kings12:17 No andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maatũũraga matũũra-inĩ ma Juda-rĩ
1Kings12:18 Mũthamaki Rehoboamu agĩtũma Adoniramu ũrĩa warĩ mũrũgamĩrĩri wa andũ arĩa maarutithagio wĩra na hinya
1Kings12:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli matũire maremeire nyũmba ya Daudi nginya ũmũthĩ.
1Kings12:20 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli othe maaiguire atĩ Jeroboamu nĩacookete kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri
1Kings12:21 Rĩrĩa Rehoboamu aakinyire Jerusalemu
1Kings12:22 No rĩrĩ
1Kings12:23 “Thiĩ wĩre Rehoboamu mũrũ wa Solomoni mũthamaki wa Juda
1Kings12:24 ‘Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Tigai kwambata mũkahũũrane na ariũ a ithe wanyu
1Kings12:25 Nake Jeroboamu akĩirigĩra itũũra rĩa Shekemu na rũthingo rwa hinya thĩinĩ wa bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu
1Kings12:26 Jeroboamu agĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:27 Andũ aya mangĩambata mathiĩ makarute magongona hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova kũu Jerusalemu-rĩ
1Kings12:28 Thuutha wa kũhooya ũtaaro
1Kings12:29 Mũhianano ũmwe akĩũiga Betheli
1Kings12:30 Naguo ũndũ ũyũ ũgĩtuĩka mehia; nĩgũkorwo andũ nĩmathiiaga o nginya Dani kũhooya mũhianano ũrĩa warĩ kũu.
1Kings12:31 Jeroboamu nĩaakire mahooero kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
1Kings12:32 Akĩambĩrĩria gĩathĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtano mweri-inĩ wa ĩnana
1Kings12:33 Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtano mweri-inĩ wa ĩnana
1Kings13:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings13:2 Akĩanĩrĩra
1Kings13:3 Mũthenya o ro ũcio
1Kings13:4 Rĩrĩa Mũthamaki Jeroboamu aaiguire ũrĩa mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai aanĩrĩire agokĩrĩra kĩgongona kĩu kĩarĩ Betheli
1Kings13:5 Nakĩo kĩgongona kĩu gĩgĩatũkana
1Kings13:6 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai atĩrĩ
1Kings13:7 Mũthamaki akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai atĩrĩ
1Kings13:8 No mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings13:9 Nĩgũkorwo nĩnjathĩtwo nĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova
1Kings13:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩgera njĩra ĩngĩ na ndaacookeire ĩrĩa aagereire agĩthiĩ Betheli.
1Kings13:11 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings13:12 Ithe wao akĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Kings13:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩĩra ariũ ake atĩrĩ
1Kings13:14 na akĩrũmĩrĩra mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai. Akĩmũkora aikarĩte thĩ rungu rwa mũtĩ wa mũgandi
1Kings13:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings13:16 Mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings13:17 Tondũ nĩnjĩĩrĩtwo nĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova atĩrĩ
1Kings13:18 Mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings13:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai agĩcooka nake gwake mũciĩ
1Kings13:20 Maikarĩte o metha-inĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinyĩra mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ ũrĩa wacooketie mũnabii wa kuuma Juda na thuutha.
1Kings13:21 Akĩanĩrĩra
1Kings13:22 No nĩũcookete na thuutha
1Kings13:23 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai aarĩkirie kũrĩa na kũnyua-rĩ
1Kings13:24 Na agĩthiĩ na njĩra-rĩ
1Kings13:25 Andũ amwe arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra hau makĩona mwĩrĩ ũgũĩte hau thĩ
1Kings13:26 Rĩrĩa mũnabii ũrĩa wamũcooketie na thuutha kuuma rũgendo-inĩ rwake aiguire ũhoro ũcio
1Kings13:27 Mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ akĩĩra ariũ ake atĩrĩ
1Kings13:28 Nake akiumagara agĩthiĩ
1Kings13:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũnabii ũcio akĩoya mwĩrĩ wa mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai
1Kings13:30 Nake akĩiga mwĩrĩ ũcio mbĩrĩra-inĩ yake mwene
1Kings13:31 Aarĩkia kũmũthika
1Kings13:32 Nĩgũkorwo ũhoro ũrĩa aaheanire uumanĩte na kiugo kĩa Jehova wa gũũkĩrĩra kĩgongona kĩrĩa kĩrĩ Betheli o na mahooero mothe marĩa maarĩ kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru thĩinĩ wa matũũra ma Samaria-rĩ
1Kings13:33 O na thuutha wa maũndũ macio-rĩ
1Kings13:34 Macio nĩmo maarĩ mehia ma nyũmba ya Jeroboamu marĩa maatũmire ĩgwe na ĩniinwo biũ yeherio gũkũ thĩ.
1Kings14:1 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu
1Kings14:2 nake Jeroboamu akĩĩra mũtumia wake atĩrĩ
1Kings14:3 Kuua mĩgate ikũmi
1Kings14:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtumia wa Jeroboamu agĩĩka ũguo eerirwo na agĩthiĩ mũciĩ kwa Ahija kũu Shilo. Na rĩrĩ
1Kings14:5 Nowe Jehova nĩeerĩte Ahija atĩrĩ
1Kings14:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa Ahija aaiguire mũkinyo wa magũrũ make arĩ mũrango-inĩ
1Kings14:7 Thiĩ
1Kings14:8 Ndaatunyanire ũthamaki kuuma kũrĩ nyũmba ya Daudi
1Kings14:9 Wee nĩwĩkĩte maũndũ maingĩ mooru
1Kings14:10 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
1Kings14:11 Ngui nĩikaarĩa andũ a Jeroboamu arĩa magaakuĩra itũũra-inĩ inene
1Kings14:12 “No wee-rĩ
1Kings14:13 Isiraeli othe nĩmakamũcakaĩra na mamũthike. Ũcio nowe wiki wa Jeroboamu ũgaathikwo
1Kings14:14 “Jehova we mwene nĩakarũgamia mũthamaki ũngĩ wa gũthamakĩra Isiraeli ũrĩa ũkaaniina nyũmba ya Jeroboamu. Ũmũthĩ nĩguo mũthenya! Atĩ atĩa? Ĩĩ
1Kings14:15 Nake Jehova nĩakahũũra Isiraeli
1Kings14:16 Nĩagatiganĩria andũ a Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa mehia marĩa Jeroboamu ekĩte
1Kings14:17 Nake mũtumia wa Jeroboamu agĩũkĩra
1Kings14:18 Nao magĩgathika
1Kings14:19 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jeroboamu
1Kings14:20 Aathamakire mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ
1Kings14:21 Rehoboamu mũrũ wa Solomoni nĩwe warĩ mũthamaki wa Juda. Aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na ũmwe rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
1Kings14:22 Nao andũ a Juda nĩmekire maũndũ ma waganu maitho-inĩ ma Jehova. Nĩ ũndũ wa mehia marĩa meekire
1Kings14:23 Ningĩ magĩĩthondekera kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
1Kings14:24 O na nĩ kwarĩ maraya ma arũme mahooero-inĩ kũu bũrũri-inĩ; andũ acio magĩĩka maũndũ mothe marĩa maarĩ magigi ma ndũrĩrĩ iria Jehova aaingatĩte mbere ya andũ a Isiraeli matanoka kuo.
1Kings14:25 Mwaka-inĩ wa ĩtano wa Mũthamaki Rehoboamu-rĩ
1Kings14:26 Nake agĩkuua igĩĩna cia hekarũ ya Jehova na igĩĩna cia nyũmba ya ũthamaki. Aakuuire indo ciothe o hamwe na ngo ciothe cia thahabu iria Solomoni aathondekithĩtie.
1Kings14:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũthamaki Rehoboamu agĩthondeka ngo ingĩ cia gĩcango handũ ha icio cia mbere
1Kings14:28 Rĩrĩa rĩothe mũthamaki aathiiaga hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova
1Kings14:29 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ mothe makoniĩ wathani wa Rehoboamu na ũrĩa wothe eekire-rĩ
1Kings14:30 Hĩndĩ ciothe nĩ gwakoragwo na mbaara gatagatĩ ka Rehoboamu na Jeroboamu.
1Kings14:31 Nake Rehoboamu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
1Kings15:1 Mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana wa ũthamaki wa Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati-rĩ
1Kings15:2 na agĩthamaka arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka ĩtatũ. Nyina eetagwo Maaka mwarĩ wa Abisalomu.
1Kings15:3 Nĩekire mehia marĩa mothe ithe eekĩte mbere yake; ndeyamũrĩire Jehova Ngai wake na ngoro yake yothe
1Kings15:4 No rĩrĩ
1Kings15:5 Nĩgũkorwo Daudi nĩekĩte ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
1Kings15:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings15:7 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Abija na ũrĩa wothe eekire-rĩ
1Kings15:8 Nake Abija akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
1Kings15:9 Mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ wa ũthamaki wa Jeroboamu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli-rĩ
1Kings15:10 nake agĩthamaka arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na ũmwe. Cũwe wake eetagwo Maaka mwarĩ wa Abisalomu.
1Kings15:11 Asa nĩekire ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
1Kings15:12 Nĩaingatire maraya ma arũme ma mahooero-inĩ moime bũrũri ũcio
1Kings15:13 O na nĩeheririe cũwe wake Maaka atige gũtuĩka mũthamaki-mũndũ-wa-nja
1Kings15:14 O na gũtuĩka ndaathengirie mahooero marĩa maarĩ kũndũ gũtũũgĩru-rĩ
1Kings15:15 Nĩarehire kũu hekarũ ya Jehova betha
1Kings15:16 Gwatũire mbaara gatagatĩ ka Asa na Baasha mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings15:17 Baasha mũthamaki wa Isiraeli nĩambatire agĩũkĩrĩra Juda na agĩaka rũthingo rwa hinya kũu Rama
1Kings15:18 Ningĩ Asa akĩruta betha na thahabu ciothe iria ciatigarĩte kĩgĩĩna-inĩ kĩa hekarũ ya Jehova na kĩa nyũmba yake ya ũthamaki. Nake agĩciĩhokera anene ake macitwarĩre Beni-Hadadi mũrũ wa Taburimoni
1Kings15:19 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings15:20 Beni-Hadadi agĩĩtĩkĩra ũhoro wa Mũthamaki Asa
1Kings15:21 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Baasha aiguire ũhoro ũcio
1Kings15:22 Ningĩ Mũthamaki Asa akĩruta watho kũu Juda guothe
1Kings15:23 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ mothe makoniĩ wathani wa Asa
1Kings15:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Asa akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
1Kings15:25 Nadabu mũrũ wa Jeroboamu aatuĩkire mũthamaki wa Isiraeli mwaka wa keerĩ wa Asa mũthamaki wa Juda
1Kings15:26 Nĩekire maũndũ ma waganu maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
1Kings15:27 Baasha mũrũ wa Ahija wa nyũmba ya Isakaru nĩaciirĩire kũmũũkĩrĩra
1Kings15:28 Baasha ooragire Nadabu mwaka wa gatatũ wa Asa mũthamaki wa Juda na agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
1Kings15:29 Aambĩrĩria gũthamaka-rĩ
1Kings15:30 nĩ ũndũ wa mehia marĩa Jeroboamu ekĩte na agĩtũma Isiraeli mehie
1Kings15:31 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Nadabu
1Kings15:32 Gwatũire mbaara gatagatĩ ka Asa na Baasha mũthamaki wa Isiraeli hĩndĩ yothe ya wathani wao.
1Kings15:33 Mwaka wa gatatũ wa Asa
1Kings15:34 Nĩekire maũndũ ma waganu maitho-ini ma Jehova
1Kings16:1 Ningĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinya kũrĩ Jehu mũrũ wa Hanani gĩa gũũkĩrĩra Baasha
1Kings16:2 “Ndakũrutire kuuma rũkũngũ-inĩ ngĩgũtua mũtongoria wa andũ akwa a Isiraeli
1Kings16:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngirie kũniina Baasha na nyũmba yake
1Kings16:4 Ngui nĩikarĩa andũ a Baasha arĩa magaakuĩra itũũra-inĩ inene
1Kings16:5 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Baasha
1Kings16:6 Baasha akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
1Kings16:7 O na ningĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinya kũrĩ mũnabii Jehu
1Kings16:8 Mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtandatũ wa Asa
1Kings16:9 Nake Zimuri
1Kings16:10 Zimuri agĩtoonya kuo
1Kings16:11 Aambĩrĩria gũthamaka o ro ũguo
1Kings16:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Zimuri akĩniina nyũmba yothe ya Baasha
1Kings16:13 Nĩ ũndũ wa mehia marĩa mothe Baasha na mũriũ Ela meekĩte na magatũma andũ a Isiraeli mehie
1Kings16:14 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Ela na ũrĩa wothe eekire-rĩ
1Kings16:15 Mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja wa Asa mũthamaki wa Juda
1Kings16:16 Nao andũ a Isiraeli maarĩ kũu kambĩ makĩigua atĩ Zimuri nĩaciirĩire mũthamaki na akamũũraga. Mũthenya o ro ũcio
1Kings16:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Omuri na andũ a Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makĩehera Gibethoni na makĩrigiicĩria itũũra inene rĩa Tiriza marĩtahe.
1Kings16:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Zimuri onire atĩ itũũra inene nĩrĩanyiitwo-rĩ
1Kings16:19 nĩ ũndũ wa mehia marĩa eekĩte
1Kings16:20 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Zimuri
1Kings16:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli magĩatũkana ikundi igĩrĩ
1Kings16:22 No rĩrĩ
1Kings16:23 Mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ũmwe wa Asa mũthamaki wa Juda
1Kings16:24 Nake akĩgũra karĩma ga Samaria kuuma kũrĩ Shemeru na taranda igĩrĩ cia betha
1Kings16:25 No rĩrĩ
1Kings16:26 Nĩathiire na mĩthiĩre yothe ya Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati
1Kings16:27 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Omuri
1Kings16:28 Omuri akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
1Kings16:29 Mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩnana wa Asa
1Kings16:30 Ahabu mũrũ wa Omuri nĩekire maũndũ maingĩ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
1Kings16:31 We to kuona onire gwĩka mehia ta ma Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati arĩ kaũndũ kanini
1Kings16:32 Nĩathondekeire Baali kĩgongona thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Baali ĩrĩa aakire kũu Samaria.
1Kings16:33 Ningĩ Ahabu nĩathondekire gĩtugĩ kĩa Ashera
1Kings16:34 Ihinda-inĩ rĩa Ahabu
1Kings17:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings17:2 Ningĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinyĩra Elija akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
1Kings17:3 “Ũkĩra uume gũkũ
1Kings17:4 Ũrĩnyuuaga maaĩ karũũĩ-inĩ kau
1Kings17:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Elija agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwĩrire. Agĩthiĩ mũkuru-inĩ wa Kerithu
1Kings17:6 Mahuru maamũtwaragĩra mũgate na nyama rũciinĩ
1Kings17:7 Thuutha ũcio
1Kings17:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinyĩra Elija rĩngĩ
1Kings17:9 “Thiĩ o rĩmwe nginya Zarefathu kũu Sidoni ũgaikare kuo. Nĩnjathĩte mũtumia wa ndigwa wa kũu akũheage irio.”
1Kings17:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ Zarefathu. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyire kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa itũũra
1Kings17:11 Mũtumia ũcio agĩtua gũthiĩ kũmũgĩĩrĩra maaĩ-rĩ
1Kings17:12 Mũtumia ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings17:13 Elija akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings17:14 Tondũ ũũ nĩguo Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli ekuuga: ‘Ndigithũ ndĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩgathira mũtu namo maguta matirĩ hĩndĩ magathira cuba-inĩ
1Kings17:15 Nake agĩthiĩ agĩĩka o ũguo Elija aamwĩrire. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o mũthenya nĩ kwarĩ na irio cia Elija
1Kings17:16 Nĩgũkorwo ndigithũ ndĩathiraga mũtu nayo cuba ndĩathiraga maguta
1Kings17:17 Thuutha ũcio mũriũ wa mũtumia ũcio mwene mũciĩ akĩrwara. Nake akĩĩhĩrwo mũno makĩria
1Kings17:18 Mũtumia ũcio akĩĩra Elija atĩrĩ
1Kings17:19 Nake Elija akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings17:20 Nake agĩkaĩra Jehova

1Kings17:22 Jehova akĩigua gũkaya kwa Elija
1Kings17:23 Elija akĩoya mwana ũcio akĩmũikũrũkia kuuma kanyũmba ka igũrũ
1Kings17:24 Nake mũtumia ũcio akĩĩra Elija atĩrĩ
1Kings18:1 Thuutha wa ihinda iraaya
1Kings18:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Elija agĩthiĩ kwĩonania kũrĩ Ahabu. Na rĩrĩ
1Kings18:3 nake Ahabu nĩatũmanĩire Obadia ũrĩa warĩ mũrũgamĩrĩri wa nyũmba yake ya ũthamaki. (Obadia aarĩ mwĩtĩkia weheanĩte mũno kũrĩ Jehova.
1Kings18:4 Rĩrĩa Jezebeli ooragithagia anabii a Jehova
1Kings18:5 Ahabu akĩĩra Obadia atĩrĩ
1Kings18:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩgayana bũrũri ũcio o eerĩ o mũndũ kũrĩa egũtuĩkanĩria
1Kings18:7 Rĩrĩa Obadia aathiiaga-rĩ
1Kings18:8 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings18:9 Obadia akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings18:10 Ti-itheru o ta ũrĩa Jehova Ngai waku atũũraga muoyo-rĩ
1Kings18:11 Na rĩu ũranjĩĩra thiĩ kũrĩ mwathi wakwa ngamwĩre atĩrĩ
1Kings18:12 Niĩ ndiũĩ kũrĩa Roho wa Jehova angĩgũtwara twatigana nawe. Ingĩthiĩ njĩĩre Ahabu ũguo na acooke akwage-rĩ
1Kings18:13 Wee mwathi wakwa-rĩ
1Kings18:14 Na rĩu ũranjĩĩra thiĩ kũrĩ mwathi wakwa ngamwĩre atĩrĩ
1Kings18:15 Elija akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings18:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Obadia agĩthiĩ gũtũnga Ahabu akĩmwĩra ũhoro ũcio
1Kings18:17 Rĩrĩa Ahabu onire Elija
1Kings18:18 Elija akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings18:19 Rĩu tũmana andũ moime Isiraeli guothe
1Kings18:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ahabu agĩtũmana Isiraeli guothe na agĩcookanĩrĩria anabii Kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩa Karimeli.
1Kings18:21 Elija agĩthiĩ mbere ya andũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Kings18:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Elija akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Kings18:23 Tũreherei ndegwa igĩrĩ. Reke methuurĩre ndegwa ĩmwe
1Kings18:24 Ningĩ mũcooke mũkaĩre rĩĩtwa rĩa ngai wanyu
1Kings18:25 Elija akĩĩra anabii a Baali atĩrĩ
1Kings18:26 Tondũ ũcio makĩoya ndegwa ĩrĩa maaheirwo makĩmĩhaarĩria. Magĩkaĩra rĩĩtwa rĩa Baali kuuma rũciinĩ nginya mĩaraho
1Kings18:27 Mĩaraho yakinya-rĩ
1Kings18:28 Tondũ ũcio makĩanĩrĩra mũno
1Kings18:29 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings18:30 Ningĩ Elija akĩĩra andũ othe atĩrĩ
1Kings18:31 Elija akĩoya mahiga ikũmi na meerĩ kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga ya njiarwa cia Jakubu
1Kings18:32 Nake agĩaka kĩgongona na mahiga macio rĩĩtwa-inĩ rĩa Jehova
1Kings18:33 Akĩara ngũ
1Kings18:34 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Kings18:35 Namo maaĩ macio magĩtherera gũthiũrũrũka kĩgongona
1Kings18:36 Ihinda rĩa kũruta igongona-rĩ
1Kings18:37 Njigua
1Kings18:38 Naguo mwaki wa Jehova ũgĩikũrũka ũgĩcina igongona
1Kings18:39 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ othe moonire ũndũ ũcio
1Kings18:40 Nake Elija agĩatha andũ acio akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Kings18:41 Nake Elija akĩĩra Ahabu atĩrĩ
1Kings18:42 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ahabu agĩthiĩ
1Kings18:43 Nake akĩĩra ndungata yake atĩrĩ
1Kings18:44 Riita rĩa mũgwanja ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings18:45 Hĩndĩ ĩyo igũrũ rĩgĩthimba nĩ ũndũ wa matu
1Kings18:46 Naguo hinya wa Jehova ũgĩũka igũrũ rĩa Elija

1Kings19:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jezebeli agĩtũmĩra Elija mũndũ akamwĩre atĩrĩ
1Kings19:3 Elija agĩĩtigĩra akĩũra nĩguo ahonokie muoyo wake. Aakinya Birishiba kũu Juda
1Kings19:4 nowe mwene
1Kings19:5 Agĩkoma toro hau rungu rwa mũtĩ ũcio. O rĩmwe mũraika akĩmũhutia
1Kings19:6 Akĩĩhũgũra
1Kings19:7 Mũraika ũcio wa Jehova akĩmũkora hĩndĩ ya keerĩ
1Kings19:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩũkĩra akĩrĩa na akĩnyua. Akĩgĩa na hinya nĩ ũndũ wa irio icio
1Kings19:9 Kũu agĩthiĩ agĩtoonya ngurunga
1Kings19:10 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings19:11 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings19:12 Thuutha wa gĩthingithia gũgĩũka mwaki
1Kings19:13 Rĩrĩa Elija aiguire mũgambo ũcio
1Kings19:14 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings19:15 Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings19:16 Ũcooke ũitĩrĩrie Jehu mũrũ wa Nimushi maguta atuĩke mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings19:17 Jehu nĩakooraga ũrĩa wothe ũkaahonoka rũhiũ rwa njora rwa Hazaeli
1Kings19:18 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings19:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Elija akiuma kũu
1Kings19:20 Nake Elisha agĩtiganĩria ndegwa ciake akĩrũmĩrĩra Elija. Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings19:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Elisha akĩmũtiga
1Kings20:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings20:2 Agĩtũma andũ mathiĩ itũũra rĩu inene kũrĩ Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings20:3 ‘Betha na thahabu ciaku nĩ ciakwa
1Kings20:4 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings20:5 Nao andũ acio maatũmĩtwo magĩcooka rĩngĩ makiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings20:6 No ihinda ta rĩĩrĩ rũciũ nĩngatũma anene akwa moke moiruurie nyũmba ya ũthamaki na nyũmba cia anene aku. Nĩmagataha indo ciothe iria cia bata
1Kings20:7 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩĩta athuuri othe a bũrũri ũcio
1Kings20:8 Athuuri na andũ othe makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings20:9 Nake agĩcookeria andũ acio maatũmĩtwo nĩ Beni-Hadadi
1Kings20:10 Ningĩ Beni-Hadadi agĩtũma ũhoro rĩngĩ kũrĩ Ahabu
1Kings20:11 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings20:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Beni-Hadadi aiguire ũhoro ũcio rĩrĩa we na athamaki acio manyuuaga me hema-inĩ ciao
1Kings20:13 Ihinda rĩu mũnabii agĩũka kũrĩ Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings20:14 Nake Ahabu akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Kings20:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ahabu agĩĩta anene arĩa ethĩ 232 arĩa maatongoragia mbũtũ cia bũrũri. Ningĩ agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ acio angĩ a andũ a Isiraeli othe maarĩ 7
1Kings20:16 Nao makiumagara mĩaraho hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Beni-Hadadi na athamaki acio mĩrongo ĩtatũ na eerĩ arĩa maarĩ rũmwe nake
1Kings20:17 Anene acio ethĩ maatongoragia mbũtũ cia bũrũri nĩo maathiire mbere. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Beni-Hadadi nĩatũmĩte andũ a gũthigaana
1Kings20:18 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings20:19 Anene acio ethĩ atongoria a mbũtũ cia bũrũri makiumagara kuuma itũũra-inĩ marũmĩrĩirwo nĩ mbũtũ ya ita
1Kings20:20 na o mũndũ akĩũraga thũ yake. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Asuriata makĩũra maingatithĩtio nĩ andũ a Isiraeli. No Beni-Hadadi mũthamaki wa Suriata akĩũra ahaicĩte mbarathi me na andũ amwe ake arĩa ahaici a mbarathi.
1Kings20:21 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩmatindĩka na agĩtooria mbarathi na ngaari cia ita
1Kings20:22 Thuutha ũcio mũnabii agĩkora mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings20:23 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu anene a mũthamaki wa Suriata makĩmũtaara atĩrĩ
1Kings20:24 Ĩka atĩrĩ: Eheria athamaki othe kuuma mbũtũ-inĩ ciao
1Kings20:25 No nginya warahũre ita ta rĩrĩa wateire
1Kings20:26 Kĩmera kĩrĩa kĩarũmĩrĩire gĩakinya-rĩ
1Kings20:27 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli o nao maacookanĩrĩirio na makĩneo indo ciothe
1Kings20:28 Mũndũ wa Ngai agĩũka
1Kings20:29 Ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mũgwanja maikarire mambĩte hema ciao mangʼethanĩire
1Kings20:30 Acio angĩ makĩũrĩra itũũra inene rĩa Afeki
1Kings20:31 Anene ake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings20:32 Makĩĩhotora nguo cia makũnia njohero
1Kings20:33 Andũ acio makĩigua ũguo meerwo taarĩ kĩmenyithia kĩega
1Kings20:34 Beni-Hadadi akĩĩra Mũthamaki Ahabu atĩrĩ
1Kings20:35 Na ũndũ wa kiugo kĩa Jehova
1Kings20:36 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũnabii akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings20:37 Ningĩ mũnabii akĩona mũndũ ũngĩ
1Kings20:38 Mũnabii agĩthiĩ
1Kings20:39 Na rĩrĩa mũthamaki aahĩtũkaga-rĩ
1Kings20:40 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndungata yaku yagĩire na mĩhangʼo ya haha na harĩa mũndũ ũcio akĩũra.” Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings20:41 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũnabii akĩeheria gĩtambaya maitho-inĩ na ihenya
1Kings20:42 Akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings20:43 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩthiĩ Samaria nyũmba-inĩ yake ya ũthamaki athitĩtie gĩthiithi na arĩ mũrakaru.

1Kings22:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:2 No mwaka-inĩ wa gatatũ
1Kings22:3 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli nĩakoretwo eera anene ake atĩrĩ
1Kings22:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩũria Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:5 No Jehoshafatu agĩcooka akĩĩra mũthamaki wa Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Kings22:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩcookanĩrĩria anabii hamwe
1Kings22:7 Nowe Jehoshafatu akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:8 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩcookeria Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩĩta ũmwe wa anene ake
1Kings22:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki wa Isiraeli na Jehoshafatu mũthamaki wa Juda mehumbĩte nguo ciao cia ũthamaki na magaikarĩra itĩ ciao cia ũnene hau kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩa ngano
1Kings22:11 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:12 Nao anabii acio angĩ othe maarathaga o ũndũ ũmwe
1Kings22:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa watũmĩtwo ageete Mikaya akĩmwĩra ũũ
1Kings22:14 Nowe Mikaya akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings22:15 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyire-rĩ

1Kings22:17 Nake Mikaya akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:18 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:19 Mikaya agĩthiĩ na mbere
1Kings22:20 Nake Jehova akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:21 Marigĩrĩrio-inĩ roho ũmwe ũkiumĩra
1Kings22:22 “Jehova akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:23 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova nĩekĩrĩte roho wa maheeni tũnua-inĩ twa anabii aya aku othe. Jehova nĩagwathĩrĩirie mwanangĩko.”
1Kings22:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Zedekia mũrũ wa Kenaana agĩkuhĩrĩria na akĩgũtha Mikaya rũhĩ rwa ũthiũ. Akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:25 Mikaya agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings22:26 Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩathana
1Kings22:27 na muge atĩrĩ
1Kings22:28 Mikaya akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings22:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki wa Isiraeli na Jehoshafatu mũthamaki wa Juda makĩambata nginya Ramothu-Gileadi.
1Kings22:30 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:31 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:32 Rĩrĩa anene a mbũtũ cia ngaari cia ita moonire Jehoshafatu magĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:33 anene acio a ngaari cia ita makĩona atĩ ũcio ti mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings22:34 No mũndũ ũmwe akĩgeeta ũta wake
1Kings22:35 Nayo mbaara ĩkĩneneha
1Kings22:36 Riũa rĩgĩthũa
1Kings22:37 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩkua na agĩtwarwo Samaria
1Kings22:38 Nao magĩthambĩria ngaari ĩyo ya ita karia-inĩ ga Samaria
1Kings22:39 Namo maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Ahabu
1Kings22:40 Ahabu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make. Nake mũriũ Ahazia agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
1Kings22:41 Jehoshafatu mũrũ wa Asa aatuĩkire mũthamaki wa Juda mwaka-inĩ wa ĩna wa Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.
1Kings22:42 Jehoshafatu aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtano rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
1Kings22:43 No maũndũ-inĩ mothe
1Kings22:44 Ningĩ Jehoshafatu magĩikara marĩ na thayũ na mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.
1Kings22:45 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jehoshafatu
1Kings22:46 Nake akĩniina bũrũri-inĩ arũme arĩa maahũũraga ũmaraya na arũme arĩa angĩ mahooero-inĩ
1Kings22:47 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gũtiarĩ mũthamaki Edomu; mũnini wa mũthamaki nĩwe waathanaga.
1Kings22:48 Nake Jehoshafatu nĩaakire marikabu nyingĩ cia wonjoria
1Kings22:49 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ahazia mũrũ wa Ahabu akĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:50 Nake Jehoshafatu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make

1Kings22:52 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
1Kings22:53 Nake agĩtungatĩra Baali

2Kings5:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings5:2 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings5:3 Nake mũirĩtu ũcio akĩĩra mwathi wake mũndũ-wa-nja atĩrĩ
2Kings5:4 Naamani agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki mwathi wake na akĩmwĩra ũrĩa mũirĩtu ũcio woimĩte Isiraeli oigĩte.
2Kings5:5 Nake mũthamaki ũcio wa Suriata akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Kings5:6 Marũa marĩa atwarĩire mũthamaki wa Isiraeli maandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Nĩndatũma ndungata yakwa Naamani na marũa maya kũrĩ we
2Kings5:7 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Isiraeli aathomire marũa macio-rĩ
2Kings5:8 Rĩrĩa Elisha mũndũ wa Ngai aiguire atĩ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli nĩatembũrangĩte nguo ciake-rĩ
2Kings5:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Naamani agĩthiĩ hamwe na mbarathi ciake na ngaari cia ita o nginya mũromo-inĩ wa nyũmba ya Elisha.
2Kings5:10 Nake Elisha akĩmũtũmĩra mũndũ amwĩre atĩrĩ
2Kings5:11 No Naamani agĩthiĩ arakarĩte
2Kings5:12 Githĩ njũũĩ cia Dameski
2Kings5:13 Ndungata cia Naamani igĩthiĩ harĩ we ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings5:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Naamani agĩikũrũka
2Kings5:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Naamani na arĩa othe maamũteithagia magĩcooka kũrĩ mũndũ wa Ngai. Nake akĩrũgama mbere yake
2Kings5:16 Nake mũnabii akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Kings5:17 Nake Naamani akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings5:18 No rĩrĩ
2Kings5:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Elisha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings5:20 Gehazi
2Kings5:21 Tondũ ũcio Gehazi akĩhiũha nĩguo akinyĩre Naamani. Rĩrĩa Naamani aamuonire ahanyũkĩte arorete na kũrĩ we-rĩ
2Kings5:22 Nake Gehazi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Kings5:23 Nake Naamani akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings5:24 Rĩrĩa Gehazi aakinyire kĩrĩma-inĩ
2Kings5:25 Thuutha ũcio agĩtoonya nyũmba akĩrũgama mbere ya mwathi wake Elisha. Nake Elisha akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings5:26 Nowe Elisha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings5:27 Mangũ ma Naamani nĩwe mekwĩgwatĩrĩra na njiaro ciaku nginya tene.” Hĩndĩ ĩyo Gehazi akĩehera harĩ Elisha arĩ na mangũ na akerũha
2Kings6:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:2 Twĩtĩkĩrie tũthiĩ Jorodani
2Kings6:3 Ningĩ ũmwe wao akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings6:4 Nake Elisha agĩthiĩ hamwe nao. Nao magĩthiĩ Jorodani na makĩambĩrĩria gũtema mĩtĩ.
2Kings6:5 Na rĩrĩa ũmwe wao aatemaga mũtĩ-rĩ
2Kings6:6 Nake mũndũ wa Ngai akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings6:7 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings6:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:9 Mũndũ wa Ngai agĩtũmana kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
2Kings6:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩtũma andũ magatuĩrie ũhoro wa handũ hau mũndũ wa Ngai aarĩtie ũhoro waho. Mahinda maingĩ Elisha nĩeragĩra mũthamaki wa Isiraeli kũndũ kũrĩa aagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwĩmenyerera
2Kings6:11 Ũndũ ũcio ũkĩrakaria mũthamaki wa Suriata mũno. Nake agĩĩta anene ake na akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings6:12 Nake ũmwe wa anene ake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings6:13 Nake mũthamaki agĩathana
2Kings6:14 Nake mũthamaki agĩtũma mbarathi na ngaari cia ita

2Kings6:20 Maarĩkia kũingĩra itũũra rĩu inene

2Kings6:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmathondekera iruga inene
2Kings6:24 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:25 Na gũkĩgĩa na ngʼaragu nene mũno itũũra rĩu inene. Kũrigiicĩrio kwarĩo gũgĩikara ihinda iraaya ũũ atĩ mũtwe wa ndigiri wendagio cekeri mĩrongo ĩnana cia betha
2Kings6:26 Na rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Isiraeli aahĩtũkagĩra rũthingo igũrũ-rĩ

2Kings7:9 Magĩcooka makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
2Kings7:10 Nao magĩthiĩ magĩĩta arangĩri a ihingo cia itũũra

2Kings8:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:2 Nake mũtumia ũcio agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa mũndũ wa Ngai oigĩte. We mwene na andũ a nyũmba yake magĩthiĩ na magĩikara bũrũri wa Afilisti mĩaka mũgwanja.
2Kings8:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:4 Mũthamaki aaragia na Gehazi
2Kings8:5 O rĩrĩa Gehazi eeraga mũthamaki ũrĩa Elisha aariũkirie mũndũ-rĩ
2Kings8:6 Nake mũthamaki akĩũria mũtumia ũhoro ũcio
2Kings8:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:8 akĩĩra Hazaeli atĩrĩ
2Kings8:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hazaeli agĩthiĩ gũtũnga Elisha
2Kings8:10 Nake Elisha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Kings8:11 Elisha akĩmũkũũrĩra maitho amũrorete nginya Hazaeli agĩconoka. Nake mũndũ wa Ngai akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra.
2Kings8:12 Nake Hazaeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings8:13 Nake Hazaeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings8:14 Ningĩ Hazaeli agĩtigana na Elisha agĩcooka kũrĩ mwathi wake. Rĩrĩa Beni-Hadadi aamũũririe atĩrĩ
2Kings8:15 No mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Hazaeli akĩoya taama mũritũ
2Kings8:16 Mwaka-inĩ wa ĩtano wa wathani wa Joramu mũrũ wa Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli-rĩ
2Kings8:17 Jehoramu aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings8:18 Nĩathiire na mĩthiĩre ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Kings8:19 No rĩrĩ
2Kings8:20 Mahinda ma Jehoramu-rĩ
2Kings8:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehoramu agĩthiĩ Zairu hamwe na ngaari ciake ciothe cia ita. Andũ a Edomu makĩmũrigiicĩria hamwe na anene a ngaari ciake cia ita
2Kings8:22 Nginyagia ũmũthĩ andũ a Edomu matũũraga maremeire Juda. Andũ a Libina o nao makĩrega watho wa Juda o ihinda-inĩ rĩu.
2Kings8:23 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jehoramu
2Kings8:24 Nake Jehoramu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make na agĩthikwo hamwe nao itũũra-inĩ rĩa Daudi. Nake mũriũ Ahazia agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings8:25 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ wa wathani wa Joramu mũrũ wa Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli-rĩ
2Kings8:26 Ahazia aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings8:27 Nake Ahazia agĩthiĩ na mĩthiĩre ya nyũmba ya Ahabu
2Kings8:28 Ahazia nĩmathiire na Joramu mũrũ wa Ahabu nĩguo makarũe na Hazaeli mũthamaki wa Suriata kũu Ramothu-Gileadi. Nao Asuriata makĩguraria Joramu;
2Kings8:29 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũthamaki Joramu akĩhũndũka

2Kings9:10 Ha ũhoro wa Jezebeli-rĩ

2Kings9:12 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ

2Kings9:16 Ningĩ Jehu akĩhaica ngaari yake ya ita
2Kings9:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũrori wa itũũra aarũgamĩte mũthiringo-inĩ mũraihu na igũrũ kũu Jezireeli
2Kings9:18 Nake mũndũ ũcio akĩhaica mbarathi
2Kings9:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩtũma mũndũ wa keerĩ wa mbarathi. Aakinya kũrĩ o akĩmeera atĩrĩ

2Kings9:23 Joramu akĩgarũrũka akĩũra
2Kings9:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehu akĩruta ũta wake
2Kings9:25 Nake Jehu akĩĩra Bidikari mũnene wa ngaari yake ya ita atĩrĩ
2Kings9:26 ‘Mũthenya wa ira nĩndĩronire thakame ya Nabothu na thakame ya ariũ ake
2Kings9:27 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ahazia mũthamaki wa Juda onire ũrĩa kwahaana
2Kings9:28 Nacio ndungata ciake ikĩmũkuua na ngaari ya ita
2Kings9:29 (Ahazia aatuĩkĩte mũthamaki wa Juda mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa wathani wa Joramu mũrũ wa Ahabu).
2Kings9:30 Ningĩ Jehu agĩthiĩ Jezireeli. Na rĩrĩa Jezebeli aaiguire ũguo-rĩ
2Kings9:31 Rĩrĩa Jehu aatoonyaga kĩhingo-inĩ
2Kings9:32 Nake Jehu akĩrora na igũrũ ndirica-inĩ
2Kings9:33 Nake Jehu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:34 Jehu agĩtoonya nyũmba ya ũthamaki thĩinĩ akĩrĩa na akĩnyua. Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:35 No rĩrĩa maathiire nja makamũthike
2Kings9:36 Nao makĩhũndũka
2Kings9:37 Nakĩo kĩimba kĩa Jezebeli gĩgaatuĩka o ta rũrua kĩrĩ thĩ kamũgũnda-inĩ ka Jezireeli

2Kings10:2 “Tondũ mũrĩ na ciana cia mwathi wanyu

2Kings10:4 No-o makĩmaka makiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings10:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũrĩa warĩ mũrori wa maũndũ ma nyũmba ya ũthamaki

2Kings10:8 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũrĩa watũmĩtwo aakinyire

2Kings10:10 Menyai ũũ
2Kings10:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehu akĩũraga andũ othe a nyũmba ya Ahabu arĩa maatigaire kũu Jezireeli
2Kings10:12 Jehu agĩcooka akiumagara
2Kings10:13 agĩtũngana na andũ amwe arĩa maatarainie na Ahazia mũthamaki wa Juda akĩmooria atĩrĩ

2Kings10:15 Nake aarĩkia kuuma kũu
2Kings10:16 Nake Jehu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings10:17 Rĩrĩa Jehu aakinyire Samaria-rĩ
2Kings10:18 Ningĩ Jehu agĩcookereria andũ othe hamwe
2Kings10:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings10:20 Nake Jehu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings10:21 Nake agĩcooka agĩtũma ũhoro kũndũ guothe Isiraeli
2Kings10:22 Nake Jehu akĩĩra mũikaria wa harĩa nguo ciaigagwo atĩrĩ
2Kings10:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehu na Jehonadabu mũrũ wa Rekabu magĩtoonya hekarũ ya Baali. Jehu akĩĩra ndungata cia Baali atĩrĩ
2Kings10:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtoonya marute magongona
2Kings10:25 Rĩrĩa Jehu aarĩkirie kũruta igongona rĩa njino-rĩ
2Kings10:26 Nao makĩruta ihiga rĩrĩa rĩamũre nja ya hekarũ ya Baali na makĩrĩcina.
2Kings10:27 Makĩmomora ihiga rĩrĩa rĩamũre rĩa Baali
2Kings10:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehu akĩniina biũ ũhooi wa Baali thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli.
2Kings10:29 No rĩrĩ
2Kings10:30 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Jehu atĩrĩ
2Kings10:31 No Jehu ndaigana kũmenyerera kũiga watho wa Jehova
2Kings10:32 Matukũ-inĩ macio
2Kings10:33 mwena wa irathĩro wa Jorodani na bũrũri-inĩ wothe wa Gileadi
2Kings10:34 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jehu-rĩ
2Kings10:35 Nake Jehu akĩhurũka na maithe make na agĩthikwo Samaria. Nake mũriũ Jehoahazu agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings10:36 Narĩo ihinda rĩrĩa Jehu aathamakĩire Isiraeli kũu Samaria rĩarĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩnana.
2Kings11:1 Rĩrĩa Athalia nyina wa Ahazia onire atĩ mũriũ nĩakua-rĩ
2Kings11:2 No rĩrĩ
2Kings11:3 Aikarire ahithĩtwo hamwe na mũreri wake thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova mĩaka ĩtandatũ ĩrĩa Athalia aathamakire bũrũri ũcio.
2Kings11:4 Mwaka-inĩ wa mũgwanja
2Kings11:5 Akĩmaatha akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings11:6 nakĩo gĩcunjĩ gĩa ithatũ kĩrangĩre Kĩhingo gĩa Suri
2Kings11:7 na inyuĩ andũ arĩa makoragwo thĩinĩ wa ikundi icio ingĩ igĩrĩ
2Kings11:8 Mũikare mũthiũrũrũkĩirie mũthamaki
2Kings11:9 Nao anene a ita arĩa maathaga ikundi cia andũ igana rĩmwe magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehoiada
2Kings11:10 Nake akĩhe anene acio matimũ na ngo iria ciarĩ cia Mũthamaki Daudi
2Kings11:11 Nao arangĩri
2Kings11:12 Jehoiada akĩrehe mũrũ wa mũthamaki akĩmwĩkĩra thũmbĩ
2Kings11:13 Rĩrĩa Athalia aaiguire inegene rĩa andũ na arangĩri
2Kings11:14 Agĩcũthĩrĩria na akĩona mũthamaki arũgamĩte gĩtugĩ-inĩ o ta ũrĩa mũtugo warĩ. Nao anene na ahuhi tũrumbeta maarũgamĩte hakuhĩ na mũthamaki
2Kings11:15 Jehoiada mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩatha anene a ita a thigari igana igana arĩa maarĩ arũgamĩrĩri a mbũtũ
2Kings11:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmũnyiitĩra harĩa mbarathi ciatoonyagĩra igĩthiĩ nja cia nyũmba ya ũthamaki
2Kings11:17 Nake Jehoiada akĩgĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro gatagatĩ ka Jehova
2Kings11:18 Nao andũ othe a bũrũri magĩthiĩ hekarũ-inĩ ya Baali na makĩmĩtharia. Makiunanga igongona na mĩhianano
2Kings11:19 Nake agĩthiĩ na anene a ita arĩa maarũgamagĩrĩra ikundi cia thigari igana igana
2Kings11:20 Nao andũ othe a bũrũri magĩkena. Narĩo itũũra rĩkĩhoorera
2Kings11:21 Joashu aarĩ wa mĩaka mũgwanja rĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gwathana.
2Kings12:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings12:2 Joashu nĩekire maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova mĩaka ĩrĩa yothe Jehoiada mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai aamũtaarire.
2Kings12:3 No rĩrĩ
2Kings12:4 Joashu akĩĩra athĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ
2Kings12:5 Ĩtĩkĩriai mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai o wothe aamũkagĩre mbeeca kuuma kũrĩ ũmwe wa aigi a kĩgĩĩna
2Kings12:6 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings12:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũthamaki Joashu agĩĩta Jehoiada ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai na athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa angĩ
2Kings12:8 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩtĩkĩra atĩ matikũngania mbeeca ingĩ kuuma kũrĩ andũ
2Kings12:9 Nake Jehoiada ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akĩoya ithandũkũ na agĩtũra ngunĩko yarĩo irima. Akĩrĩiga mwena wa ũrĩo wa mũndũ agĩtoonya hekarũ ya Jehova. Athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa maarangagĩra itoonyero magĩĩkĩra mbeeca ciothe ithandũkũ-inĩ iria ciarehagwo hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova.
2Kings12:10 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe moonaga mbeeca nĩciaingĩha ithandũkũ-inĩ
2Kings12:11 Rĩrĩa mũigana wa mbeeca wahinga
2Kings12:12 na arĩa maakaga na mahiga
2Kings12:13 Mbeeca iria ciarehagwo hekarũ-inĩ itiahũthagĩrwo na gũthondeka iraĩ cia betha
2Kings12:14 Mbeeca icio ciarĩhaga aruti a wĩra arĩa maarutaga wĩra wa gũcookereria hekarũ.
2Kings12:15 Matioragia mathabu ma mbeeca kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa maanengerete mbeeca marĩhe aruti a wĩra
2Kings12:16 Mbeeca cia maruta ma mahĩtia
2Kings12:17 Ihinda-inĩ o rĩu Hazaeli mũthamaki wa Suriata akĩambata agĩthiĩ agĩtharĩkĩra Gathu na akĩrĩtaha. Ningĩ akĩhũndũka
2Kings12:18 No rĩrĩ
2Kings12:19 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Joashu
2Kings12:20 Nao anene ake makĩmũciirĩrĩra ndundu mamũũkĩrĩre
2Kings12:21 Nao anene arĩa maamũũragire nĩ Jozakaru mũrũ wa Shimeathu
2Kings13:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings13:2 Nĩekire maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova nĩ ũndũ wa kũrũmĩrĩra mehia ma Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati
2Kings13:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Isiraeli

2Kings13:12 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jehoashu
2Kings13:13 Jehoashu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make

2Kings13:17 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings13:18 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings13:19 Nake mũndũ wa Ngai akĩrakara nĩ ũndũ wake
2Kings13:20 Nake Elisha agĩkua na agĩthikwo. Na rĩrĩ

2Kings13:23 No rĩrĩ

2Kings13:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehoashu mũrũ wa Jehoahazu agĩtunya Beni-Hadadi mũrũ wa Hazaeli matũũra marĩa Hazaeli aatahĩte mbaara-inĩ kuuma kũrĩ ithe Jehoahazu. Joashu aamũtooririe maita matatũ
2Kings14:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings14:2 Aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings14:3 Nĩekire maũndũ marĩa moonagwo magĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings14:4 No rĩrĩ
2Kings14:5 Thuutha wa ũthamaki gũkorwo ũrũmĩte moko-inĩ make
2Kings14:6 No rĩrĩ
2Kings14:7 Ningĩ nĩwe wahootire 10
2Kings14:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Amazia agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Jehoashu mũrũ wa Jehoahazu mũrũ wa Jehu
2Kings14:9 No rĩrĩ
2Kings14:10 Ti-itherũ nĩũtooretie Edomu
2Kings14:11 O na kũrĩ ũguo
2Kings14:12 Andũ a Juda makĩhũũrwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli
2Kings14:13 Nake Jehoashu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩnyiita Amazia mũthamaki wa Juda mũrũ wa Joashu mũrũ wa Ahazia
2Kings14:14 Nake akĩoya thahabu yothe na betha na indo ciothe iria ciarĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova na iria ciarĩ igĩĩna-inĩ cia nyũmba ya ũthamaki. Ningĩ agĩtaha andũ na agĩcooka Samaria.
2Kings14:15 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jehoashu
2Kings14:16 Jehoashu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
2Kings14:17 Amazia mũrũ wa Joashu mũthamaki wa Juda aatũũrire muoyo mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtano thuutha wa gĩkuũ kĩa Jehoashu mũrũ wa Jehoahazu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.
2Kings14:18 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ ma wathani wa Amazia
2Kings14:19 Nao andũ makĩgĩa ndundu ya kũmũũkĩrĩra kũu Jerusalemu
2Kings14:20 Nĩacookirio akuuĩtwo na mbarathi
2Kings14:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ othe a Juda makĩoya Azaria arĩ na mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtandatũ
2Kings14:22 Nĩwe waakire Elathu rĩngĩ
2Kings14:23 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩtano wa wathani wa Amazia mũrũ wa Joashu mũthamaki wa Juda
2Kings14:24 Nĩekire maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings14:25 Nĩwe wacookirie mĩhaka ya Isiraeli kuuma Lebo-Hamathu nginya Iria-inĩ rĩa Araba kũringana na kiugo kĩa Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli kĩrĩa kĩarĩtio nĩ ndungata yake Jona mũrũ wa Amitai
2Kings14:26 Jehova nĩonete ruo rũnene rwa andũ othe a Isiraeli
2Kings14:27 Na tondũ Jehova ndoigĩte atĩ nĩegũtharia rĩĩtwa rĩa Isiraeli gũkũ thĩ-rĩ
2Kings14:28 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jeroboamu
2Kings14:29 Jeroboamu nĩahurũkire hamwe na maithe make
2Kings15:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings15:2 Nake aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtandatũ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings15:3 Nake nĩekire maũndũ marĩa maarĩ magĩrĩru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings15:4 No rĩrĩ
2Kings15:5 Jehova nĩahũũrire mũthamaki na mangũ o nginya mũthenya ũrĩa aakuire
2Kings15:6 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Azaria
2Kings15:7 Azaria akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
2Kings15:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings15:9 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings15:10 Shalumu mũrũ wa Jabeshi nĩaciirĩire gũũkĩrĩra Zekaria. Akĩmũtharĩkĩra mbere ya andũ
2Kings15:11 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Zekaria
2Kings15:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kiugo kĩa Jehova kĩrĩa kĩarĩirio Jehu nĩkĩahingire
2Kings15:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings15:14 Menahemu mũrũ wa Gadi akiuma Tiriza
2Kings15:15 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Shalumu
2Kings15:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Menahemu
2Kings15:17 Mwaka-inĩ wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na kenda wa Azaria mũthamaki wa Juda
2Kings15:18 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova. Hĩndĩ ya wathani wake wothe
2Kings15:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Puli mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩtharĩkĩra bũrũri ũcio
2Kings15:20 Menahemu agĩĩtia mbeeca icio na hinya kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli. Mũndũ o wothe gĩtonga aarĩ arute cekeri mĩrongo ĩtano cia betha
2Kings15:21 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Menahemu
2Kings15:22 Menahemu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make. Nake mũriũ Pekaia agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings15:23 Mwaka-inĩ wa mĩrongo ĩtano wa ũthamaki wa Azaria mũthamaki wa Juda
2Kings15:24 Pekaia agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova. Ndaigana gũtiga mehia ma Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati marĩa aatũmĩte Isiraeli meehie.
2Kings15:25 Ũmwe wa anene ake
2Kings15:26 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Pekaia
2Kings15:27 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings15:28 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova. Ndaigana gũtigana na mehia ma Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati
2Kings15:29 Hĩndĩ ya Peka mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
2Kings15:30 Ningĩ Hoshea mũrũ wa Ela agĩciirĩra ndundu ya gũũkĩrĩra Peka mũrũ wa Remalia. Nake akĩmũtharĩkĩra na akĩmũũraga
