2Kings16:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings16:2 Ahazu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings16:3 Aathiiaga na mĩthiĩre ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Kings16:4 Nĩaarutĩire magongona na agĩcinĩra ũbumba kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
2Kings16:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Rezini mũthamaki wa Suriata
2Kings16:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Rezini mũthamaki wa Suriata agĩtunyana itũũra rĩa Elathu
2Kings16:7 Ahazu agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Tigilathu-Pileseru mũthamaki wa Ashuri makamwĩre atĩrĩ
2Kings16:8 Nake Ahazu agĩkuua betha na thahabu iria ciarĩ hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova
2Kings16:9 Mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩĩtĩkĩra na ũndũ wa gũtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Dameski na akĩrĩtunyana. Agĩthaamia atũũri akuo akĩmatwara Kiri na akĩũraga Rezini.
2Kings16:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũthamaki Ahazu agĩthiĩ Dameski gũtũngana na Tigilathu-Pileseru mũthamaki wa Ashuri. Nake akĩona kĩgongona kũu Dameski
2Kings16:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Uria ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩaka kĩgongona kũringana na ũrĩa wothe aatũmĩirwo
2Kings16:12 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki aacookire kuuma Dameski na akĩona kĩgongona kĩu
2Kings16:13 Akĩruta igongona rĩake rĩa njino na rĩa mũtu
2Kings16:14 Nakĩo kĩgongona gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩarĩ mbere ya Jehova
2Kings16:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũthamaki Ahazu akĩhe Uria ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai mawatho maya: “Igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona kĩu kĩnene kĩerũ
2Kings16:16 Nake Uria ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Mũthamaki Ahazu aamwathĩte.
2Kings16:17 Mũthamaki Ahazu akĩeheria icunjĩ cia mwena-inĩ
2Kings16:18 Nĩeheririe gĩthaku gĩa Thabatũ kĩrĩa gĩakĩtwo hekarũ-inĩ
2Kings16:19 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Ahazu
2Kings16:20 Nake Ahazu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
2Kings17:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings17:2 Agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings17:3 Shalimaneseru mũthamaki wa Ashuri akĩambata agatharĩkĩre Hoshea
2Kings17:4 No mũthamaki wa Ashuri nĩamenyire atĩ Hoshea aarĩ mũkunyanĩri
2Kings17:5 Mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩtharĩkĩra bũrũri wothe
2Kings17:6 Mwaka-inĩ wa kenda wa wathani wa Hoshea nĩguo mũthamaki wa Ashuri aatunyanire Samaria
2Kings17:7 Maũndũ macio mothe meekĩkire nĩ ũndũ andũ a Isiraeli nĩmehĩirie Jehova Ngai wao
2Kings17:8 na makĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo ya ndũrĩrĩ iria ciaingatĩtwo nĩ Jehova ciehere mbere yao
2Kings17:9 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩka maũndũ na hitho ma gũũkĩrĩra Jehova Ngai wao marĩa mataagĩrĩire. Kuuma mũthiringo-inĩ wa kũrangĩra nginya itũũra rĩrĩa rĩairigĩirwo rũthingo rwa hinya
2Kings17:10 Nĩmahaandire mahiga maamũre o na itugĩ cia Ashera
2Kings17:11 Nĩmacinagĩra ũbumba handũ hothe hatũũgĩru
2Kings17:12 Nĩmahooire mĩhianano o na gũtuĩka Jehova nĩoigĩte atĩrĩ
2Kings17:13 Nake Jehova agĩkaania andũ a Isiraeli na andũ a Juda na ũndũ wa anabii ake othe na andũ arĩa moonaga maũndũ
2Kings17:14 No matiigana kũnjigua
2Kings17:15 Nao makĩrega irĩra cia watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na maithe mao
2Kings17:16 Nĩmatiganĩirie maathani mothe ma Jehova Ngai wao
2Kings17:17 Ningĩ makĩruta airĩtu na aanake ao marĩ magongona ma njino. Nĩmarathaga ũhoro na makaragũra
2Kings17:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩrakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa andũ a Isiraeli
2Kings17:19 O nao andũ a Juda matiarũmĩrĩire maathani ma Jehova Ngai wao. Maarũmĩrĩire mĩtugo ĩrĩa yambĩrĩirio nĩ andũ a Isiraeli.
2Kings17:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩrega andũ a Isiraeli othe
2Kings17:21 Na rĩrĩa aamũranirie andũ a Isiraeli na nyũmba ya Daudi-rĩ
2Kings17:22 Andũ a Isiraeli makĩrũmĩrĩra mehia mothe ma Jeroboamu
2Kings17:23 nginya rĩrĩa Jehova aameheririe mbere yake o ta ũrĩa aamerĩte na kanua ka ndungata ciake ciothe cia anabii. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makĩeherio bũrũri wao
2Kings17:24 Nake mũthamaki wa Ashuri akĩruta andũ Babuloni
2Kings17:25 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maambĩrĩirie gũikara kuo matiahooyaga Jehova; nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩmatũmĩra mĩrũũthi kuo
2Kings17:26 Nake mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩkinyĩrio ũhoro akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ: “Andũ arĩa wathaamirie ũkĩmatwara matũũra-inĩ ma Samaria matiũĩ ũrĩa ngai ya bũrũri ũcio yendaga. Nĩĩmatũmĩire mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa ĩramooraga
2Kings17:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩathana atĩrĩ: “Reke mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũmwe wa arĩa maatahirwo kuuma Samaria acooke agatũũre kuo
2Kings17:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũmwe wa arĩa maatahĩtwo kuuma Samaria agĩthiĩ gũtũũra Betheli
2Kings17:29 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:30 Andũ a kuuma Babuloni magĩthondeka mũhianano wetagwo Sukothu-Benothu
2Kings17:31 nao andũ a Aavi magĩthondeka Nibihazu na Tarataka
2Kings17:32 Nĩmahooyaga Jehova
2Kings17:33 Nĩmahooyaga Jehova
2Kings17:34 Nginyagia ũmũthĩ matũire marũmĩtie mĩtugo yao ya tene. Nao matihooyaga Jehova kana gwathĩkĩra irĩra cia watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo
2Kings17:35 Rĩrĩa Jehova aarĩkanĩire kĩrĩkanĩro na andũ a Isiraeli-rĩ
2Kings17:36 No Jehova ũrĩa wamũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri na hinya mũnene na atambũrũkĩtie guoko gwake
2Kings17:37 Hĩndĩ ciothe no nginya mũmenyagĩrĩre kĩrĩra kĩa watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo na matuĩro marĩa matuĩtwo
2Kings17:38 Mũtikariganĩrwo nĩ kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndaarĩkanĩire na inyuĩ
2Kings17:39 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:40 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:41 O na rĩrĩa andũ acio mahooyaga Jehova
2Kings18:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings18:2 Aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings18:3 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings18:4 Nĩeheririe kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
2Kings18:5 Nake Hezekia agĩtũũra ehokete Jehova
2Kings18:6 Nĩatũũrire arũgamĩte wega harĩ Jehova na ndaigana gũtiga kũmũrũmĩrĩra; na nĩatũũire arũmĩtie maathani ma Jehova marĩa aaheire Musa.
2Kings18:7 Nake Jehova aarĩ hamwe nake; nake Hezekia akĩgaacĩra maũndũ-inĩ mothe marĩa ekaga. Ningĩ nĩareganire na watho wa mũthamaki wa Ashuri
2Kings18:8 Nĩatooririe Afilisti kuuma mũthiringo-inĩ wa arangĩri nginya itũũra-inĩ rĩrĩa rĩairigĩtwo na rũthingo rwa hinya
2Kings18:9 Mwaka-inĩ wa ĩna wa ũthamaki wa Hezekia
2Kings18:10 Na thuutha wa mĩaka ĩtatũ Ashuri magĩtunyana Samaria. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio itũũra rĩa Samaria rĩgĩtahwo mwaka-inĩ wa ĩtandatũ wa ũthamaki wa Hezekia
2Kings18:11 Nake mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩthaamĩria andũ a Isiraeli kũu Ashuri
2Kings18:12 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire nĩ ũndũ nĩmagĩte gwathĩkĩra Jehova Ngai wao
2Kings18:13 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩna wa ũthamaki wa Hezekia
2Kings18:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda agĩtũmĩra mũthamaki wa Ashuri ũrĩa warĩ kũu Lakishi ndũmĩrĩri ĩno: “Nĩhĩtĩtie. Njeherera na nĩngũkũrĩha kĩrĩa gĩothe ũngĩnjĩtia.” Nake mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩĩtia Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda taranda magana matatũ cia betha
2Kings18:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hezekia akĩmũhe betha iria ciothe cionekire hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova na igĩĩna-inĩ ciothe cia nyũmba ya ũthamaki.
2Kings18:16 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu
2Kings18:17 Mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩtũma mwathi ũrĩa mũnene wa mbũtũ ciothe cia ita
2Kings18:18 Magĩtũmanĩra mũthamaki; nake Eliakimu mũrũ wa Hilikia mũrũgamĩrĩri wa nyũmba ya ũthamaki
2Kings18:19 Nake mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings18:20 Wee uugaga ũrĩ na hinya wa mbũtũ cia ita
2Kings18:21 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings18:22 O na ũngĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings18:23 “ ‘Rĩu-rĩ
2Kings18:24 Wakĩhota gũtooria o na mũnene ũrĩa mũnini mũno thĩinĩ wa anene a mwathi wakwa
2Kings18:25 Na ningĩ-rĩ
2Kings18:26 Nake Eliakimu mũrũ wa Hilikia
2Kings18:27 No mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ cia ita agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Kings18:28 Ningĩ mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita akĩrũgama
2Kings18:29 Mũthamaki ekuuga ũũ: Mũtigetĩkĩrie Hezekia amũheenie. Ndangĩhota kũmũhonokia kuuma guoko-inĩ gwakwa.
2Kings18:30 Mũtigetĩkĩre Hezekia amũringĩrĩrie kwĩhoka Jehova hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ekuuga atĩrĩ
2Kings18:31 “Mũtigathikĩrĩrie Hezekia. Mũthamaki wa Ashuri ekuuga ũũ: Rekei tũiguane
2Kings18:32 nginya rĩrĩa ngooka ndĩmũtware bũrũri ũrĩa ũhaana ta wanyu
2Kings18:33 Nĩ kũrĩ ngai ya bũrũri o na ũrĩkũ ĩrĩ yahonokia bũrũri wayo kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa mũthamaki wa Ashuri?
2Kings18:34 Ngai cia Hamathu na Aripadi irĩ kũ? Ngai cia Sefarivaimu
2Kings18:35 Nĩ ngai ĩrĩkũ harĩ ngai ciothe cia mabũrũri macio yanahonokia bũrũri wayo kuuma kũrĩ niĩ? Gwakĩhoteka atĩa Jehova ahonokie Jerusalemu kuuma guoko-inĩ gwakwa?”
2Kings18:36 No andũ acio magĩkira ki
2Kings18:37 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Eliakimu mũrũ wa Hilikia ũrĩa mũrori wa maũndũ ma nyũmba ya ũthamaki
2Kings19:1 Rĩrĩa Mũthamaki Hezekia aiguire ũguo
2Kings19:2 Agĩtũma Eliakimu ũrĩa warĩ mũrori wa maũndũ ma nyũmba ya ũthamaki
2Kings19:3 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings19:4 No gũkorwo Jehova Ngai waku nĩekũigua ciugo ciothe cia mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita
2Kings19:5 Rĩrĩa anene a Mũthamaki Hezekia maakinyire kũrĩ Isaia-rĩ
2Kings19:6 Isaia akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings19:7 Ta thikĩrĩria! Niĩ nĩngwĩkĩra roho wa mũthemba mũna thĩinĩ wake
2Kings19:8 Rĩrĩa mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita aiguire atĩ mũthamaki wa Ashuri nĩoimĩte Lakishi
2Kings19:9 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings19:10 “Ĩrai Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda atĩrĩ: Ndũgetĩkĩrie Ngai ũcio wĩhokete akũheenie rĩrĩa ekuuga atĩrĩ
2Kings19:11 Ti-itherũ nĩũiguĩte ũrĩa athamaki a Ashuri mekĩte mabũrũri-inĩ mothe
2Kings19:12 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings19:13 Mũthamaki wa Hamathu na kana mũthamaki wa Aripadi
2Kings19:14 Hezekia akĩnyiita marũa kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa maatũmĩtwo
2Kings19:15 Nake Hezekia akĩhooya Jehova
2Kings19:16 Tega matũ maku Wee Jehova
2Kings19:17 “Ti-itherũ Jehova
2Kings19:18 Na nĩmaikĩtie ngai ciao mwaki-inĩ na magacithũkangia
2Kings19:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings19:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu agĩtũma ndũmĩrĩri kũrĩ Hezekia
2Kings19:21 Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa Jehova aarĩtie wa kũmũũkĩrĩra: “ ‘Mũirĩtu Gathirange
2Kings19:22 Ũcio ũrumĩte na ũkamenereria nũũ? Ningĩ-rĩ
2Kings19:23 Ũtũmĩte andũ aku moke marume Jehova. Na ũkoiga atĩrĩ
2Kings19:24 Nĩnyenjete ithima mabũrũri ma kũngĩ
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Kaĩ ũtaiguĩte? Kuuma tene nĩndamũrĩte ũndũ ũcio
2Kings19:26 Andũ akuo maagithĩtio hinya
2Kings19:27 “ ‘No nĩnjũũĩ kũrĩa ũikaraga
2Kings19:28 Tondũ nĩũndakarĩire
2Kings19:29 “Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo gĩgaakorwo kĩrĩ kĩmenyithia gĩaku
2Kings19:30 Na o rĩngĩ matigari ma nyũmba ya Juda nĩmagaikũrũkia mĩri na thĩ
2Kings19:31 Nĩgũkorwo Jerusalemu nĩgũkoima matigari ma andũ
2Kings19:32 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova ekuuga ũũ igũrũ rĩa mũthamaki wa Ashuri: “Ndagatoonya itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene
2Kings19:33 Njĩra ĩrĩa ookĩire-rĩ
2Kings19:34 Nĩngagitĩra itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene na ndĩrĩhonokie
2Kings19:35 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio mũraika wa Jehova agĩthiĩ akĩũraga andũ 185
2Kings19:36 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Senakeribu mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩtharia kambĩ agĩthiĩ. Agĩcooka Nineve agĩikara kuo.

2Kings20:1 Matukũ-inĩ macio Hezekia akĩrwara
2Kings20:2 Hezekia akĩhũgũra ũthiũ wake
2Kings20:3 “Wee Jehova
2Kings20:4 Isaia atanakinya nja ya gatagatĩ-rĩ
2Kings20:5 “Cooka
2Kings20:6 Nĩngũkuongerera mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtano ya gũtũũra muoyo. Na nĩngũkũhonokia hamwe na itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa mũthamaki wa Ashuri. Nĩngũgitĩra itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene nĩ ũndũ wakwa
2Kings20:7 Ningĩ Isaia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings20:8 Hezekia nĩoorĩtie Isaia atĩrĩ
2Kings20:9 Nake Isaia akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Kings20:10 Nake Hezekia akiuga atĩrĩ

2Kings20:15 Nake mũnabii akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings20:16 Nake Isaia akĩĩra Hezekia atĩrĩ
2Kings20:17 Ti-itherũ ihinda nĩrĩgakinya
2Kings20:18 Na andũ amwe a rũciaro rwaku

2Kings20:20 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Hezekia
2Kings20:21 Nake Hezekia akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make. Nake mũriũ Manase agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings21:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings21:2 Agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings21:3 Nĩaakire rĩngĩ kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
2Kings21:4 Agĩaka magongona thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova
2Kings21:5 Thĩinĩ wa nja cierĩ cia hekarũ ya Jehova
2Kings21:6 Nake akĩruta mũriũ wake arĩ igongona rĩa njino
2Kings21:7 Nĩooire mũhianano mũicũhie ũrĩa aathondekete wa gĩtugĩ kĩa Ashera
2Kings21:8 Ndirĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ ngaatũma magũrũ ma andũ a Isiraeli morũũre
2Kings21:9 No andũ acio matiigana kũigua. Manase akĩmahĩtithia
2Kings21:10 Jehova oigire na tũnua twa ndungata ciake cia anabii atĩrĩ:
2Kings21:11 “Manase mũthamaki wa Juda nĩekĩte mehia marĩ magigi. Ageeka maũndũ mooru gũkĩra Aamori arĩa maarĩ mbere yake
2Kings21:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli ekuuga ũũ: Nĩngũrehere Jerusalemu na Juda mwanangĩko ũrĩa ũgaatũma andũ arĩa makaigua ũhoro ũcio mararakwo nĩ matũ mao.
2Kings21:13 Nĩngatambũrũkĩria Jerusalemu rũrigi rwa gũthima rũrĩa rwahũthĩrirwo rwa gũũkĩrĩra Samaria na kabirũ karĩa kahũthĩrirwo gũũkĩrĩra nyũmba ya Ahabu. Nĩngaherithia na niine andũ a Jerusalemu o ta ũrĩa mũndũ ahuuraga thaani
2Kings21:14 Nĩngatiganĩria matigari ma igai rĩakwa
2Kings21:15 tondũ nĩmekĩte maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ makwa
2Kings21:16 Ningĩ Manase nĩaitire thakame nyingĩ mũno ya andũ matehĩtie
2Kings21:17 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Manase
2Kings21:18 Manase akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make
2Kings21:19 Amoni aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings21:20 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings21:21 Nĩathiire na mĩthiĩre yothe ya ithe; akĩhooya mĩhianano ĩrĩa ithe aahooyaga
2Kings21:22 Agĩtigana na Jehova
2Kings21:23 Anene a Amoni makĩmũciirĩra ndundu
2Kings21:24 Nao andũ a bũrũri makĩũraga arĩa othe maathugundĩte gũũkĩrĩra Mũthamaki Amoni na magĩtua mũriũ Josia mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings21:25 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Amoni
2Kings21:26 Nake agĩthikwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ yake mũgũnda-inĩ wa Uza. Nake mũriũ Josia agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings22:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings22:2 Nake agĩĩka ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings22:3 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩnana wa wathani wake
2Kings22:4 “Ambata
2Kings22:5 Nao maciĩhokere andũ arĩa mathuurĩtwo a kũrũgamĩrĩra wĩra wa hekarũ. Andũ acio ũtigĩrĩre nĩ marĩha aruti a wĩra arĩa macookagĩrĩria hekarũ ya Jehova
2Kings22:6 nao nĩ atharamara
2Kings22:7 No rĩrĩ
2Kings22:8 Hilikia mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩĩra Shafani ũcio mwandĩki marũa atĩrĩ
2Kings22:9 Nake Shafani ũcio mwandĩki-marũa agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki na akĩmũhe ũhoro ũcio
2Kings22:10 Ningĩ Shafani ũcio mwandĩki-marũa akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Kings22:11 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki aaiguire ciugo cia Ibuku rĩu rĩa Watho-rĩ
2Kings22:12 Akĩruta mawatho maya kũrĩ Hilikia ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Kings22:13 “Thiĩi mũkanduĩrĩrie ũhoro kũrĩ Jehova
2Kings22:14 Hilikia ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Kings22:15 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings22:16 ‘Ũũ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga: Nĩngũrehithia mwanangĩko kũndũ gũkũ na kũrĩ andũ akuo kũringana na maũndũ marĩa mothe mandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Juda athomete.
2Kings22:17 Tondũ nĩmandirikĩte
2Kings22:18 Ĩrai mũthamaki wa Juda
2Kings22:19 Tondũ ngoro yaku nĩyaherire na ũkĩĩnyiihĩria Jehova rĩrĩa waiguire ũhoro ũrĩa njarĩtie wa gũũkĩrĩra kũndũ gũkũ o na andũ akuo
2Kings22:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngagũcookanĩrĩria hamwe na maithe maku
2Kings23:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra athuuri othe a Juda na a Jerusalemu moongane hamwe.
2Kings23:2 Nake akĩambata agĩthiĩ hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova arĩ hamwe na andũ a Juda
2Kings23:3 Nake mũthamaki akĩrũgama hau gĩtugĩ-inĩ
2Kings23:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩatha Hilikia mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
2Kings23:5 Nake akĩeheria athĩnjĩri-ngai cia mĩhianano arĩa maamũrĩtwo nĩ athamaki a Juda macinagĩre ũbumba kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru thĩinĩ wa matũũra ma Juda na matũũra marĩa maarigiicĩirie Jerusalemu
2Kings23:6 Nake akĩruta gĩtugĩ kĩa Ashera kuuma hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova
2Kings23:7 Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩmomora nyũmba cia ihooero cia maraya ma arũme
2Kings23:8 Josia akĩrehe athĩnjĩri-Ngai othe kuuma matũũra-inĩ mothe ma Juda
2Kings23:9 O na gwatuĩka athĩnjĩri-ngai a kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru matiatungataga kĩgongona-inĩ kĩa Jehova kũu Jerusalemu-rĩ
2Kings23:10 Nĩaathũkirie Tofeti ĩrĩa yarĩ Gĩtuamba-inĩ kĩa Beni-Hinomu
2Kings23:11 Akĩeheria mbarathi iria athamaki a Juda maamũrĩire riũa kuuma itoonyero-inĩ rĩa hekarũ ya Jehova. Nacio ciarĩ nja hakuhĩ na kanyũmba ka mũnene wetagwo Nathani-Meleku. Josia agĩcooka agĩcina ngaari cia ita iria ciamũrĩirwo riũa.
2Kings23:12 Ningĩ akĩmomora igongona iria ciakĩtwo nĩ athamaki a Juda nyũmba igũrũ hakuhĩ na kanyũmba ka igũrũ ka Ahazu
2Kings23:13 Mũthamaki agĩcooka agĩthũkia kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa kwarĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa Jerusalemu
2Kings23:14 Josia akĩhehenja mahiga marĩa maamũre
2Kings23:15 O nakĩo kĩgongona kĩrĩa kĩarĩ Betheli
2Kings23:16 Ningĩ Josia akĩroranga kũu
2Kings23:17 Mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings23:18 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings23:19 O ta ũrĩa Josia eekĩte Betheli
2Kings23:20 Josia akĩũragĩra athĩnjĩri-ngai othe a kũndũ kũu gũtũũgĩru igũrũ rĩa igongona icio
2Kings23:21 Mũthamaki akĩruta watho ũyũ kũrĩ andũ othe
2Kings23:22 Na gũtiarĩ na Bathaka ĩngĩ yakũngũĩirwo ta ĩyo kuuma hĩndĩ ya atiirĩrĩri bũrũri arĩa matongoragia Isiraeli kana matukũ-inĩ mothe ma athamaki a Isiraeli na athamaki a Juda.
2Kings23:23 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩnana wa Mũthamaki Josia
2Kings23:24 Ningĩ Josia nĩeheririe aragũri
2Kings23:25 Mbere na thuutha wa Josia gũtiarĩ mũthamaki ũngĩ take
2Kings23:26 No rĩrĩ
2Kings23:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings23:28 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Josia
2Kings23:29 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Josia aarĩ mũthamaki-rĩ
2Kings23:30 Nacio ndungata cia Josia igĩkuua mwĩrĩ wake na ngaari ya ita kuuma Megido
2Kings23:31 Jehoahazu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings23:32 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings23:33 Firaũni Neko nĩamuohire na mĩnyororo kũu Ribila
2Kings23:34 Firaũni Neko agĩtua Eliakimu mũriũ wa Josia mũthamaki ithenya rĩa ithe Josia
2Kings23:35 Jehoiakimu akĩrĩha Firaũni Neko betha na thahabu iria eetĩtie. Nĩgeetha ahote gwĩka ũguo
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakimu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings23:37 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova o ta ũrĩa maithe make meekĩte.
2Kings24:1 Hĩndĩ ya ũthamaki wa Jehoiakimu-rĩ
2Kings24:2 Jehova agĩtũma mbũtũ cia gũtahana cia kuuma Babuloni
2Kings24:3 Ti-itherũ maũndũ macio meekĩkire Juda kũringana na watho wa Jehova
2Kings24:4 o hamwe na gũita thakame ya andũ matehĩtie. Nĩgũkorwo nĩaiyũrĩtie Jerusalemu na thakame ya andũ matehĩtie
2Kings24:5 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Jehoiakimu
2Kings24:6 Jehoiakimu akĩhurũka na maithe make. Nake mũriũ Jehoiakini agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Kings24:7 Mũthamaki wa Misiri ndaigana kuuma bũrũri wake rĩngĩ
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakini aarĩ wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnana rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings24:9 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings24:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo anene a Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni magĩũka nginya Jerusalemu
2Kings24:11 nake Nebukadinezaru we mwene agĩũka nginya itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene
2Kings24:12 Nake Jehoiakini mũthamaki wa Juda
2Kings24:13 Nebukadinezaru nĩarutire mĩthiithũ yothe kuuma hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova na nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki
2Kings24:14 Agĩkuua andũ othe a Jerusalemu akĩmatwara ithaamĩrio: anene othe
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinezaru agĩtwara Jehoiakini arĩ mũgwate nginya Babuloni. Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩkuua nyina wa mũthamaki kuuma Jerusalemu nginya Babuloni
2Kings24:16 Ningĩ mũthamaki wa Babuloni agĩthaamĩria mbũtũ yothe ya ita nginya Babuloni; ita rĩothe rĩa andũ 7
2Kings24:17 Agĩcooka agĩtua Matania
2Kings24:18 Zedekia aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ũmwe rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Kings24:19 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Kings24:20 Maũndũ macio mothe meekirwo Jerusalemu na Juda nĩ tondũ wa marakara ma Jehova
2Kings25:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Kings25:2 Narĩo itũũra rĩkĩrigiicĩrio nginya mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa Mũthamaki Zedekia.
2Kings25:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings25:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo rũthingo rwa itũũra rĩu inene rũkĩmomorwo
2Kings25:5 no mbũtũ ya ita ya Babuloni ĩgĩtengʼeria mũthamaki
2Kings25:6 Nayo mbũtũ ya ita ĩkĩnyiita mũthamaki ũcio
2Kings25:7 Makĩũraga ariũ a Zedekia o hau mbere yake
2Kings25:8 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja wa mweri wa ĩtano mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na kenda wa Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni
2Kings25:9 Agĩcina hekarũ ya Jehova
2Kings25:10 Nayo mbũtũ yothe ya ita ya Babuloni
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani mũnene wa arangĩri nĩathaamirie andũ arĩa othe maatigaire kũu itũũra-inĩ inene
2Kings25:12 No mũnene ũcio wa ita agĩtigia andũ amwe a arĩa athĩĩni mũno a bũrũri ũcio
2Kings25:13 Andũ a Babuloni nĩmoinangire itugĩ cia gĩcango
2Kings25:14 Ningĩ magĩkuua nyũngũ
2Kings25:15 Mũnene ũcio wa thigari cia mũthamaki nĩakuuire ngĩo cia mwaki na mbakũri cia kũminjaminjĩria
2Kings25:16 Nakĩo gĩcango kuuma itugĩ iria igĩrĩ
2Kings25:17 Gĩtugĩ o kĩmwe kĩarĩ kĩa ũraihu wa buti mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja. Nakĩo kĩongo gĩakĩo kĩrĩa kĩarĩ igũrũ rĩa gĩtugĩ kĩmwe gĩacio kĩarĩ kĩa buti inya na nuthu kũraiha na igũrũ
2Kings25:18 Mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri nĩanyiitire Seraia mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
2Kings25:19 Harĩ arĩa angĩ maatigaire kũu itũũra-inĩ inene
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani ũcio mũnene wa arangĩri akĩmakuua othe
2Kings25:21 Nake mũthamaki wa Babuloni akĩmooragithĩria kũu Ribila
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni agĩthuura Gedalia mũrũ wa Ahikamu
2Kings25:23 Rĩrĩa anene a mbũtũ cia ita othe na andũ ao maaiguire atĩ mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩathuurĩte Gedalia atuĩke barũthi
2Kings25:24 Gedalia akĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa wa kũmoomĩrĩria hamwe na andũ ao
2Kings25:25 No rĩrĩ
2Kings25:26 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo andũ othe kuuma ũrĩa mũnini mũno nginya ũrĩa mũnene mũno
2Kings25:27 Mwaka-inĩ wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja kuuma rĩrĩa Jehoiakini mũthamaki wa Juda aatwarirwo bũrũri ũngĩ
2Kings25:28 Akĩmwarĩria na ũhooreri na akĩmũhe gĩtĩ gĩa kũmũtĩĩithia gũkĩra athamaki acio angĩ maarĩ nao kũu Babuloni.
2Kings25:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehoiakini akĩruta nguo ciake cia njeera
2Kings25:30 Mũthamaki ũcio nĩaheaga Jehoiakini indo cia kũmũteithia cia o mũthenya

1Chronicles11:11 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma andũ acio maarĩ njamba a Daudi: Jashobeamu ũrĩa Mũhakimoni nake aarĩ mũtongoria wa anene; nĩwe woire itimũ rĩake ahũũrane na andũ 300
1Chronicles11:12 Mũnini wake eetagwo Eleazaru mũrũ wa Dodo ũrĩa Mũahohi
1Chronicles11:13 Nake aarĩ hamwe na Daudi kũu Pasi-Damimu hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afilisti moonganĩte marũe nao. Maarĩ handũ haarĩ mũgũnda waiyũire cairi
1Chronicles11:14 No-o nĩmaregeire gatagatĩ ka mũgũnda ũcio. Makĩũgitĩra
1Chronicles11:15 Anene atatũ a acio mĩrongo ĩtatũ
1Chronicles11:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi aarĩ kĩĩhitho-inĩ kĩrũmu nayo mbũtũ ya Afilisti yarĩ Bethilehemu.

1Chronicles11:20 Abishai mũrũ wa nyina na Joabu nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa acio Atatũ. Nake akĩoya itimũ rĩake
1Chronicles11:21 Nĩatĩĩkire mũno gũkĩra acio angĩ Atatũ na agĩtuĩka mwathi wao o na gũtuĩka ndaataranĩirio nao.
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada aarĩ mũrũi njamba wa kuuma Kabizeeli
1Chronicles11:23 Na nĩooragire Mũmisiri warĩ wa ũraihu wa buti mũgwanja na nuthu. O na gũtuĩka Mũmisiri ũcio nĩanyiitĩte itimũ rĩaiganaga ta mũtĩ wa mũtumi ngoora
1Chronicles11:24 Macio nĩmo maũndũ ma ũcamba marĩa mekirwo nĩ Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada. O nake aarĩ igweta o ta andũ arĩa atatũ maarĩ njamba.

1Chronicles18:5 Rĩrĩa Asuriata a kuuma Dameski mookire gũteithia Hadadezeri mũthamaki wa Zoba
1Chronicles18:6 Akĩiga mbũtũ ciake cia kũrangĩra ũthamaki wa Asuriata kũu Dameski
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi nĩatunyanire ngo cia thahabu iria ciarĩ na anene a Hadadezeri
1Chronicles18:8 Kuuma matũũra ma Teba na Kuni marĩa maarĩ ma Hadadezeri
1Chronicles18:9 Rĩrĩa Tou
1Chronicles18:10 agĩtũma mũriũ Hadoramu kũrĩ Mũthamaki Daudi akamũgeithie na amũkũngũĩre nĩ ũndũ wa kũhoota Hadadezeri ũrĩa wakoretwo akĩrũa na Tou. Hadoramu agĩtwarĩra Daudi indo cia mĩthemba mĩingĩ ithondeketwo na thahabu na betha na gĩcango.
1Chronicles18:11 Mũthamaki Daudi akĩamũrĩra Jehova indo icio o ta ũrĩa aamũrĩte betha na thahabu iria aatahĩte kuuma kũrĩ andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ici ciothe: Edomu
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai mũrũ wa Zeruia nĩooragire andũ a Edomu 18
1Chronicles18:13 Nake akĩiga mbũtũ cia kũrangĩra kũu Edomu nao andũ a Edomu othe magĩtuĩka a gwathagwo nĩ Daudi. Jehova nĩaheire Daudi ũhootani kũrĩa guothe aathiiaga.
1Chronicles18:14 Daudi nĩathamakire Isiraeli guothe
1Chronicles18:15 Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa ita
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoku mũrũ wa Ahitubu
1Chronicles18:17 Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa Akerethi na Apelethi; nao ariũ a Daudi nĩo maarĩ atongoria na anene a gũikaranagia na mũthamaki.
1Chronicles19:1 Thuutha wa mahinda macio-rĩ
1Chronicles19:2 Nake Daudi agĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
1Chronicles19:3 andũ arĩa maarĩ igweta a Amoni makĩũria Hanuni atĩrĩ
1Chronicles19:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hanuni akĩnyiitithia andũ acio a Daudi
1Chronicles19:5 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe aakinyĩirie Daudi ũhoro wa andũ acio-rĩ
1Chronicles19:6 Rĩrĩa andũ a Amoni maamenyire atĩ nĩmatuĩkĩte kĩndũ kĩnungu harĩ Daudi-rĩ
1Chronicles19:7 Magĩkombora ngaari cia ita ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ na igĩrĩ na atwarithia a cio
1Chronicles19:8 Nake Daudi aigua ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
1Chronicles19:9 Nao andũ a Amoni makiumagara
1Chronicles19:10 Joabu nĩonire atĩ thigari nĩciaranĩtio mbere yake o na thuutha wake; nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthuura mbũtũ imwe iria njega mũno kũu Isiraeli
1Chronicles19:11 Andũ acio angĩ akĩmaiga watho-inĩ wa Abishai mũrũ wa nyina. Nao akĩmatũma makarũe na andũ a Amoni.
1Chronicles19:12 Joabu akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles19:13 Wĩyũmĩrĩrie nĩgeetha tũrũe na ũcamba nĩ ũndũ wa andũ aitũ
1Chronicles19:14 Nake Joabu arĩ na mbũtũ ciake agĩtharĩkĩra Asuriata
1Chronicles19:15 Rĩrĩa Aamoni moonire atĩ Asuriata nĩmaroora-rĩ
1Chronicles19:16 Thuutha wa Asuriata kuona atĩ nĩmatoorio nĩ andũ a Isiraeli
1Chronicles19:17 Rĩrĩa Daudi eerirwo ũhoro ũcio
1Chronicles19:18 No rĩrĩ
1Chronicles19:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndungata cia Hadadezeri cionire atĩ nĩmahootwo nĩ Isiraeli-rĩ

1Chronicles21:3 Nowe Joabu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Chronicles21:4 No rĩrĩ
1Chronicles21:5 Joabu akĩmenyithia Daudi mũigana wa andũ arĩa maangĩarũire mbaara ta ũũ: Isiraeli guothe kwarĩ na andũ 1
1Chronicles21:6 No rĩrĩ
1Chronicles21:7 O na ningĩ watho ũcio warĩ mũũru maitho-inĩ ma Ngai; nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩherithia Isiraeli.

1Chronicles21:9 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Gadi ũrĩa woonagĩra Daudi maũndũ atĩrĩ

1Chronicles21:13 Daudi akĩĩra Gadi atĩrĩ
1Chronicles21:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩrehera Isiraeli mũthiro
1Chronicles21:15 Nake Ngai agĩtũma mũraika akanange Jerusalemu. No rĩrĩa mũraika ekaga ũguo-rĩ
1Chronicles21:16 Nake Daudi akĩrora igũrũ akĩona mũraika wa Jehova arũngiĩ gatagatĩ ka igũrũ na thĩ acomorete rũhiũ rwa njora
1Chronicles21:17 Daudi akĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ
1Chronicles21:18 Nake mũraika wa Jehova agĩatha Gadi eere Daudi aambate athiĩ agaakĩre Jehova kĩgongona o kũu kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩa ngano kĩa Arauna ũrĩa Mũjebusi.
1Chronicles21:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩambata agĩathĩkĩra kiugo kĩu Gadi aarĩtie thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova.
1Chronicles21:20 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Arauna aakonyoraga ngano-rĩ
1Chronicles21:21 Nake Daudi agĩkuhĩrĩria
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

1Chronicles21:24 Nowe Mũthamaki Daudi agĩcookeria Arauna atĩrĩ
1Chronicles21:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩrĩha Arauna cekeri magana matandatũ cia thahabu nĩ ũndũ wa handũ hau.
1Chronicles21:26 Daudi agĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona handũ hau
1Chronicles21:27 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria mũraika ũcio nake agĩcookia rũhiũ rwake njora.

1Chronicles22:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ

1Chronicles22:3 Nake akĩruta igera nyingĩ cia gũthondeka mĩcumarĩ ya mĩrango ya ihingo na ya kũnyiitithania indo cia nyũmba thĩinĩ
1Chronicles22:4 Ningĩ akĩruta mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa ĩtangĩtarĩka
1Chronicles22:5 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles22:6 Ningĩ agĩĩta mũriũ Solomoni akĩmwatha aakĩre Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli nyũmba.
1Chronicles22:7 Daudi akĩĩra Solomoni ũũ: “Mũrũ wakwa

1Chronicles22:10 Ũcio nĩwe ũgaaka nyũmba ĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa. Agaatuĩka mũrũ wakwa
1Chronicles22:11 “Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles22:12 Jehova arokũhe ũbaarĩrĩri na ũmenyo rĩrĩa agaakũnengera ũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Chronicles22:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo wee nĩũkagaacĩra

1Chronicles22:16 wa thahabu na wa betha
1Chronicles22:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩatha atongoria othe a Isiraeli mateithie mũriũ Solomoni.
1Chronicles22:18 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Chronicles22:19 Rĩu mwĩheanei ngoro na muoyo mũcarie Jehova Ngai wanyu. Ambĩrĩriai gwaka handũ-harĩa-haamũre ha Jehova Ngai
1Chronicles23:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles23:2 Ningĩ agĩcookanĩrĩria atongoria othe a Isiraeli hamwe na athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii.
1Chronicles23:3 Alawii arĩa maakinyĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ kana makĩria magĩtarwo
1Chronicles23:4 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles23:5 Nao andũ 4
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi nĩagayanirie Alawii acio ikundi kũringana na ariũ a Lawi na nĩo Gerishoni
1Chronicles23:7 Ariũ a Gerishoni maarĩ: Ladani na Shimei.
1Chronicles23:8 Ariũ a Ladani maarĩ: Jehieli na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao
1Chronicles23:9 Ariũ a Shimei maarĩ: Shelomothu
1Chronicles23:10 Na ariũ a Shimei maarĩ: Jahathu
1Chronicles23:11 Jahathu nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao
1Chronicles23:12 Ariũ a Kohathu maarĩ: Amuramu
1Chronicles23:13 Ariũ a Amuramu maarĩ: Harũni na Musa. Harũni nĩamũrirwo hamwe na njiaro ciake nginya tene
1Chronicles23:14 Ariũ a Musa
1Chronicles23:15 Ariũ a Musa maarĩ: Gerishomu na Eliezeri.
1Chronicles23:16 Njiaro cia Gerishomu nĩ: Shebueli nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao.
1Chronicles23:17 Njiaro cia Eliezeri nĩ: Rehabia na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao. Eliezeri ndaarĩ na ariũ angĩ
1Chronicles23:18 Ariũ a Iziharu maarĩ: Shelomithu na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao.
1Chronicles23:19 Ariũ a Hebironi maarĩ: Jeria na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao
1Chronicles23:20 Ariũ a Uzieli maarĩ: Mika na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao
1Chronicles23:21 Ariũ a Merari maarĩ: Mahali na Mushi. Ariũ a Mahali maarĩ: Eleazaru na Kishu.
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazaru aakuire atarĩ na aanake; aarĩ o na airĩtu. Makĩhikio nĩ ariũ a mũrũ wa nyina na ithe wao Kishu.
1Chronicles23:23 Ariũ a Mushi maarĩ: Mahali
1Chronicles23:24 Acio nĩo maarĩ njiaro cia Lawi kũringana na nyũmba ciao: na nĩo maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao ta ũrĩa marĩĩtwa mao maandĩkĩtwo
1Chronicles23:25 Nĩgũkorwo Daudi nĩoigĩte atĩrĩ
1Chronicles23:26 Alawii matigũcooka kũbatario nĩgũkuuaga hema ĩrĩa nyamũre kana kĩndũ o nakĩ kĩa iria ihũthagĩrwo cia gũtungata thĩinĩ wayo.”
1Chronicles23:27 Kũringana na ciugo cia Daudi cia mũthia
1Chronicles23:28 Wĩra wa Alawii warĩ wa gũteithia njiaro cia Harũni ũtungata-inĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova ta ũũ: kũrũgamĩrĩra nja cia hekarũ na tũnyũmba twa ithaku-inĩ
1Chronicles23:29 Nĩo maarĩ arũgamĩrĩri a mĩgate ĩrĩa yaigagwo metha-inĩ
1Chronicles23:30 Ningĩ marũgamage o rũciinĩ gũcookeria Jehova ngaatho na kũmũgooca. Ningĩ magekaga ũguo o hwaĩ-inĩ
1Chronicles23:31 na rĩrĩa rĩothe maruta ma njino mangĩarutĩirwo Jehova

1Chronicles24:21 Kuuma kũrĩ ariũ a Rehabia: nĩ Ishia na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao.
1Chronicles24:22 Kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Iziharu: nĩ Shelomothu; na kuuma ariũ a Shelomothu: nĩ Jahathu.
1Chronicles24:23 Ariũ a Hebironi maarĩ: Jeria na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao
1Chronicles24:24 Mũrũ wa Uzieli: aarĩ Mika; kuuma ariũ a Mika: nĩ Shamiru.
1Chronicles24:25 Mũrũ wa nyina na Mika: aarĩ Ishia; kuuma ariũ a Ishia: nĩ Zekaria.
1Chronicles24:26 Ariũ a Merari: maarĩ Mahali na Mushi. Mũrũ wa Jaazia: aarĩ Beno.

1Chronicles24:28 kuuma kũrĩ Mahali: nĩ Eleazaru
1Chronicles24:29 Kuuma kũrĩ Kishu: nĩ mũriũ Jerameeli.
1Chronicles24:30 Nao ariũ a Mushi: maarĩ Mahali
1Chronicles24:31 O nao nĩmacuukire mĩtĩ o ta ũrĩa ariũ a ithe wao a rũciaro rwa Harũni meekire

1Chronicles25:3 Kuuma kũrĩ ariũ a Jeduthuni: maarĩ Gedalia
1Chronicles25:4 Kuuma kũrĩ ariũ a Hemani: maarĩ Bukia
1Chronicles25:5 Acio othe maarĩ ariũ a Hemani ũrĩa wonagĩra mũthamaki maũndũ. Maaheanĩtwo kũrĩ we kũringana na ciĩranĩro cia Ngai nĩguo mamũtũũgagĩrie. Ngai aaheete Hemani ariũ ikũmi na ana

1Chronicles26:1 Ikundi cia arangĩri a ihingo: kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Kora maarĩ: Meshelemia mũrũ wa Kore
1Chronicles26:2 Ariũ a Meshelemia maarĩ: Zekaria
1Chronicles26:3 na Elamu aarĩ wa gatano
1Chronicles26:4 Ariũ a Obedi-Edomu maarĩ: Shemaia
1Chronicles26:5 na Amieli aarĩ wa gatandatũ
1Chronicles26:6 Mũriũ Shemaia o nake aarĩ na ariũ ake
1Chronicles26:7 Ariũ a Shemaia maarĩ: Othini
1Chronicles26:8 Acio othe maarĩ a njiaro cia Obedi-Edomu; o hamwe na ariũ ao
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemia nĩ aarĩ na ariũ ake na andũ a nyũmba yao
1Chronicles26:10 Ariũ a Hosa ũrĩa Mũmerari maarĩ: Shimuri na nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao (o na gũtuĩka tiwe warĩ irigithathi
1Chronicles26:11 Hilikia aarĩ wa keerĩ
1Chronicles26:12 Ikundi icio cia arangĩri a ihingo ciĩtanĩtio na anene ao
1Chronicles26:13 Andũ ethĩ na andũ akũrũ o ũndũ ũmwe nĩmacuukĩire o kĩhingo mĩtĩ kũringana na nyũmba ciao.
1Chronicles26:14 Mũtĩ wa Kĩhingo kĩa Irathĩro wagwĩrĩire Shelemia. Ningĩ magĩcuuka mĩtĩ nĩ ũndũ wa mũriũ Zekaria
1Chronicles26:15 Mũtĩ wa Kĩhingo gĩa Gũthini wagwĩrĩire Obedi-Edomu
1Chronicles26:16 Mĩtĩ ya Kĩhingo gĩa Ithũĩro
1Chronicles26:17 O mũthenya gwakoragwo na Alawii atandatũ mwena wa irathĩro
1Chronicles26:18 Nayo nja ya mwena wa ithũĩro
1Chronicles26:19 Icio nĩcio ciarĩ ikundi cia arangĩri a ihingo arĩa maarĩ a njiaro cia Kora na Merari.
1Chronicles26:20 Alawii arĩa angĩ nĩo maarũgamagĩrĩra igĩĩna cia nyũmba ya Ngai na igĩĩna cia indo iria nyamũre.
1Chronicles26:21 Njiaro cia Ladani
1Chronicles26:22 na ariũ a Jehieli
1Chronicles26:23 Kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Amuramu
1Chronicles26:24 Shubaeli wa rũciaro rwa Gerishomu mũrũ wa Musa
1Chronicles26:25 Andũ a nyũmba yao kuuma kũrĩ Eliezeri: maarĩ mũriũ Rehabia
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomithu na andũ a nyũmba yao nĩo maarũgamagĩrĩra igĩĩna ciothe cia indo iria ciarĩ nyamũre nĩ Mũthamaki Daudi
1Chronicles26:27 Indo imwe cia iria ciatahĩtwo mbaara-inĩ maaciamũrĩire wĩra wa gũcookereria hekarũ ya Jehova.
1Chronicles26:28 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles26:29 Kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Iziharu: Kenania na ariũ ake nĩmaheirwo mawĩra na kũu nja ya hekarũ matuĩke anene na aciirithania a Isiraeli.
1Chronicles26:30 Kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Hebironi: maarĩ Hashabia na andũ a nyũmba yao
1Chronicles26:31 Kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Hebironi
1Chronicles26:32 Jeria aarĩ na andũ a nyũmba yao 2
1Chronicles27:1 Ũyũ nĩguo mũtaratara wa andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba
1Chronicles27:2 Mũrũgamĩrĩri wa gĩkundi kĩa mbere kĩa mweri wa mbere aarĩ Jashobeamu mũrũ wa Zabidieli. Gĩkundi gĩake kĩarĩ na andũ 24
1Chronicles27:3 Nake aarĩ wa rũciaro rwa Perezu
1Chronicles27:4 Mũrũgamĩrĩri wa gĩkundi kĩa mweri wa keerĩ aarĩ Dodai ũrĩa Mũahohi; mũtongoria wa gĩkundi gĩake aarĩ Mikilothu. Gĩkundi gĩake kĩarĩ na andũ 24
1Chronicles27:5 Mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita wa gatatũ
1Chronicles27:6 Benaia ũcio nĩwe warĩ njamba mũno gatagatĩ-inĩ ka arĩa Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ na nĩwe warĩ mũnene wao. Gĩkundi gĩake kĩarũgamagĩrĩrwo nĩ mũriũ Amizabadi.
1Chronicles27:7 Mũnene wa kana
1Chronicles27:8 Mũnene wa gatano mweri wa ĩtano
1Chronicles27:9 Mũnene wa gatandatũ wa mweri wa ĩtandatũ
1Chronicles27:10 Mũnene wa mũgwanja wa mweri wa mũgwanja
1Chronicles27:11 Mũnene wa kanana
1Chronicles27:12 Mũnene wa kenda wa mweri wa kenda aarĩ Abiezeri ũrĩa Mũanathothu wa rũciaro rwa Abenjamini. Gĩkundi gĩake kĩarĩ na andũ 24
1Chronicles27:13 Mũnene wa ikũmi
1Chronicles27:14 Mũnene wa ikũmi na ũmwe
1Chronicles27:15 Mũnene wa ikũmi na eerĩ
1Chronicles27:16 Anene arĩa maathaga mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli maarĩ aya: mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni aarĩ Eliezeri mũrũ wa Zikiri; mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni aarĩ Shefatia mũrũ wa Maaka;
1Chronicles27:17 mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi aarĩ Hashabia mũrũ wa Kemueli; mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Harũni aarĩ Zadoku;
1Chronicles27:18 mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda aarĩ Elihu mũrũ wa ithe na Daudi; mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru aarĩ Omuri mũrũ wa Mikaeli;
1Chronicles27:19 mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni aarĩ Ishimaia mũrũ wa Obadia; mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali aarĩ Jeremothu mũrũ wa Azirieli;
1Chronicles27:20 mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Aefiraimu aarĩ Hoshea mũrũ wa Azazia; mũnene wa nuthu ĩmwe ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase aarĩ Joeli mũrũ wa Pedaia;
1Chronicles27:21 mũnene wa nuthu ĩrĩa ingĩ ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase kũu Gileadi aarĩ Ido mũrũ wa Zekaria; mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini aarĩ Jaasieli mũrũ wa Abineri;
1Chronicles27:22 mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani aarĩ Azareli mũrũ wa Jerohamu; Acio nĩo maarĩ anene arĩa maathaga mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli.
1Chronicles27:23 Daudi ndaatarire andũ a mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na arĩa mataakinyĩtie
1Chronicles27:24 Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia nĩambĩrĩirie gũtara andũ
1Chronicles27:25 Azimavethu mũrũ wa Adieli nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra nyũmba iria ciaigagwo indo cia ũthamaki. Jonathani mũrũ wa Uzia nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra nyũmba cia kũigwo indo kũu ngʼongo-inĩ
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mũrũ wa Kelubu nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra andũ arĩa maarutaga wĩra wa kũrĩma mĩgũnda.
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei ũrĩa Mũramathi nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ. Zabadi ũrĩa Mũshifimi nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra maciaro ma mĩthabibũ matanekĩrwo mĩtũngi-inĩ.
1Chronicles27:28 Baali-Hanani ũrĩa Mũgederi nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra mĩtĩ ya mĩtamaiyũ na ya mĩborothandi magũrũ-inĩ ma irĩma cia mwena wa irathĩro. Joashu nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra kũrĩa kwaigagwo maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ.
1Chronicles27:29 Shitirai ũrĩa Mũsharoni nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra ndũũru cia ngʼombe iria ciarĩithagio Sharoni. Shafati mũrũ wa Adilai nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra ndũũru cia ngʼombe iria ciarĩ cianda-inĩ.
1Chronicles27:30 Obili ũrĩa Mũishumaeli nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra ngamĩĩra. Jehedeia ũrĩa Mũmeronothu nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra ndigiri.
1Chronicles27:31 Jazizi ũrĩa Mũhagari nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra ndũũru cia mbũri. Acio othe nĩo maarĩ anene arĩa marũgamagĩrĩra indo ciothe cia Mũthamaki Daudi.
1Chronicles27:32 Jonathani mamawe wa Daudi aarĩ mũheani kĩrĩra
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithofeli nĩwe waheaga mũthamaki kĩrĩra. Nake Hushai ũrĩa Mũariki aarĩ mũrata wa mũthamaki.
1Chronicles27:34 Jehoiada mũrũ wa Benaia na Abiatharu nĩo maacookire ithenya rĩa Ahithofeli. Joabu nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki.
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi nĩatũmanĩire anene othe a Isiraeli moongane Jerusalemu
1Chronicles28:2 Mũthamaki Daudi nĩarũgamire akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Ta thikĩrĩriai
1Chronicles28:3 No Ngai akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:4 “No Jehova
1Chronicles28:5 Harĩ ariũ akwa othe
1Chronicles28:6 Aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ: ‘Mũriũ waku Solomoni nĩwe ũgaaka nyũmba yakwa na nja ciakwa
1Chronicles28:7 Nĩngahaanda ũthamaki wake nginya tene angĩtũũra arũmĩtie maathani na mawatho makwa ta ũrĩa kũrekwo ihinda rĩĩrĩ.’
1Chronicles28:8 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Chronicles28:9 “Nawe mũrũ wakwa Solomoni-rĩ
1Chronicles28:10 Gĩĩciirie rĩu
1Chronicles28:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩnengera mũriũ Solomoni mĩcoro ya mwako wa gĩthaku kĩa hekarũ
1Chronicles28:12 Akĩmũnengera mĩcoro ya mĩako yothe ĩrĩa Roho eekĩrĩte meciiria-inĩ make ĩkoniĩ nja cia hekarũ ya Jehova
1Chronicles28:13 Ningĩ akĩmũtaarĩria wĩra wa ikundi cia athĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Chronicles28:14 Nake akĩheana mũigana wa ũritũ wa thahabu ya gũthondeka indo ciothe cia thahabu cia kũhũthagĩrwo ũtungata-inĩ wa mĩthemba o mĩthemba
1Chronicles28:15 ũritũ wa thahabu ya gũthondeka mĩtĩ ya thahabu ya kũigĩrĩrwo matawa na matawa mayo
1Chronicles28:16 ũritũ wa thahabu ya gũthondeka metha ya kũigĩrĩra mĩgate ĩrĩa mĩamũre; na ũritũ wa betha ya gũthondeka metha cia betha;
1Chronicles28:17 na ũritũ wa thahabu therie ya gũthondeka hũũma
1Chronicles28:18 na ũritũ wa thahabu therie ya gũthondeka kĩgongona gĩa gũcinĩrwo ũbumba. O na ningĩ akĩmũnengera mũcoro wa ngaari ya ita
1Chronicles28:19 Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:20 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra mũriũ Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:21 Ikundi cia athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii
1Chronicles29:1 Ningĩ Mũthamaki Daudi akĩĩra kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe atĩrĩ: “Mũriũ wakwa Solomoni
1Chronicles29:2 Nĩnjigithĩtie indo na ũhoti wakwa wothe nĩ ũndũ wa hekarũ ya Ngai wakwa
1Chronicles29:3 Makĩria ma ũguo
1Chronicles29:4 ngũheana taranda ngiri ithatũ cia thahabu
1Chronicles29:5 o na nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wa thahabu na indo cia wĩra wa betha ũrĩa wothe ũkaarutwo nĩ mabundi. Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atongoria a nyũmba
1Chronicles29:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wa hekarũ ya Ngai nĩmaheanire taranda ngiri ithano
1Chronicles29:8 Mũndũ o wothe warĩ na tũhiga twa goro nĩatũheanire thĩinĩ wa kĩgĩĩna kĩa hekarũ ya Jehova kĩrĩa kĩamenyagĩrĩrwo nĩ Jehieli ũrĩa Mũgerishoni.
1Chronicles29:9 Andũ nĩmakenirio nĩ ũrĩa atongoria ao maamũkĩire ũhoro ũcio na kwĩyendera
1Chronicles29:10 Daudi nĩagoocire Jehova arĩ mbere ya kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe
1Chronicles29:11 Wee Jehova-rĩ
1Chronicles29:12 Ũtonga na gĩtĩĩo ciumaga kũrĩ we; Wee nĩwe wathaga indo ciothe. Hinya na ũhoti wa gũtũũgĩria o na kũhe andũ othe hinya irĩ moko-inĩ maku.
1Chronicles29:13 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:14 “No niĩ ngĩrĩ ũ
1Chronicles29:15 Ithuĩ tũrĩ ageni na agendi maitho-inĩ maku
1Chronicles29:16 Wee Jehova Ngai witũ
1Chronicles29:17 Niĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ Wee Ngai wakwa nĩũtuĩragia ngoro
1Chronicles29:18 Wee Jehova
1Chronicles29:19 Na ũhotithie mũriũ wakwa Solomoni kwĩrutĩra na ngoro yake yothe
1Chronicles29:20 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra kĩũngano gĩothe atĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:21 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ makĩrutĩra Jehova magongona na makĩmũrutĩra maruta ma njino
1Chronicles29:22 Makĩrĩa na makĩnyua marĩ na gĩkeno kĩnene mũthenya ũcio marĩ hau mbere ya Jehova. Ningĩ makĩamũkĩra Solomoni mũrũ wa Daudi arĩ mũthamaki hĩndĩ ya keerĩ
1Chronicles29:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki kĩa Jehova
1Chronicles29:24 Anene othe
1Chronicles29:25 Jehova agĩtũũgĩria Solomoni mũno maitho-inĩ ma andũ a Isiraeli othe
1Chronicles29:26 Daudi mũrũ wa Jesii aarĩ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli guothe.
1Chronicles29:27 Aathamakĩire Isiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
1Chronicles29:28 Aakuire arĩ mũkũrũ mũno
1Chronicles29:29 Naho ha maũndũ marĩa makoniĩ wathani wa Mũthamaki Daudi kuuma kĩambĩrĩria nginya mũthia
1Chronicles29:30 hamwe na maũndũ mothe marĩa maakoniĩ ũthamaki wake na ũhoti ũrĩa aarĩ naguo
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni
2Chronicles1:2 Nake Solomoni akĩarĩria andũ a Isiraeli othe: akĩarĩria anene a mbũtũ cia o ngiri ngiri
2Chronicles1:3 Nake Solomoni na kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe makĩambata kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kũu Gibeoni
2Chronicles1:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:5 No kĩgongona gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa gĩathondeketwo nĩ Bezaleli mũrũ wa Uri
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni akĩambata kĩgongona-inĩ kĩu gĩa gĩcango o hau mbere ya Jehova thĩinĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo
2Chronicles1:7 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio-rĩ
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni agĩcookeria Ngai atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:9 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:10 He ũũgĩ na ũmenyo
2Chronicles1:11 Ngai akĩĩra Solomoni atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:12 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩũkũheo ũũgĩ na ũmenyo. O na ningĩ nĩngũkũhe ũtonga
2Chronicles1:13 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩthiĩ Jerusalemu oimĩte handũ harĩa hatũũgĩru kũu Gibeoni hau mbere ya Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo. Nake agĩthamakĩra Isiraeli.
2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni nĩacookanĩrĩirie ngaari cia ita na mbarathi; aarĩ na ngaari cia ita 1
2Chronicles1:15 Mũthamaki nĩatũmire betha na thahabu cingĩhe Jerusalemu o ta mahiga
2Chronicles1:16 Mbarathi cia Solomoni cioimaga Misiri na kuuma Kilikia
2Chronicles1:17 Maagũraga ngaari ĩmwe ya ita kuuma Misiri cekeri 600 cia betha
2Chronicles2:1 Solomoni nĩathanire gwakwo hekarũ ĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
2Chronicles2:2 Nĩandĩkithirie andũ 70
2Chronicles2:3 Solomoni agĩtũmĩra Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo ndũmĩrĩri ĩno: “Ndehithĩria mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa o ta ũrĩa wekĩire baba Daudi rĩrĩa wamũrehithĩirie mĩtarakwa ya gwaka nyũmba ya ũthamaki ya gũikaraga.
2Chronicles2:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:5 “Hekarũ ĩrĩa ngwaka nĩ nene mũno
2Chronicles2:6 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:7 “Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
2Chronicles2:8 “O na ningĩ ũndehithĩrie mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa
2Chronicles2:9 nĩgeetha ũnyonere mbaũ nyingĩ
2Chronicles2:10 Nĩngaahe ndungata ciaku iria ciatũũraga mbaũ kori 20
2Chronicles2:11 Nake Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo akĩandĩka marũa agĩcookeria Solomoni ũhoro
2Chronicles2:12 Ningĩ Hiramu agĩthiĩ na mbere
2Chronicles2:13 “Nĩngũgũtũmĩra Huramu-Abi
2Chronicles2:14 ũrĩa nyina wake oimĩte Dani nake ithe akoima Turo. Nĩarutĩtwo kũruta wĩra wa thahabu na wa betha
2Chronicles2:15 “Rĩu-rĩ
2Chronicles2:16 na ithuĩ nĩtũgũtema mĩgogo yothe ĩrĩa ũbataire kuuma Lebanoni
2Chronicles2:17 Nake Solomoni agĩtara ageni othe arĩa maarĩ Isiraeli
2Chronicles2:18 Nake akĩgaya andũ 70
2Chronicles3:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni akĩambĩrĩria gwaka hekarũ ya Jehova kũu Jerusalemu Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Moria
2Chronicles3:2 Aambĩrĩirie gwaka mũthenya wa ĩĩrĩ wa mweri wa keerĩ
2Chronicles3:3 Mũthingi ũrĩa Solomoni eenjire nĩ ũndũ wa gwaka hekarũ ya Ngai warĩ mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtandatũ kũraiha na mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ kwarama
2Chronicles3:4 Nakĩo gĩthaku kĩrĩa kĩarĩ hau mbere ya hekarũ kĩarĩ kĩa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ kũraiha
2Chronicles3:5 Akĩhũũrĩra nyũmba ĩrĩa nene mbaũ cia mĩthengera na agĩcihumbĩra na thahabu ĩrĩa njega mũno
2Chronicles3:6 Aagemirie hekarũ na tũhiga twa goro. Nayo thahabu ĩrĩa aahũthĩrire yarĩ thahabu ya Paravaimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Nacio mbaũ cia mĩratho
2Chronicles3:8 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩaka Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru-Mũno
2Chronicles3:9 Ũritũ wa mĩcumarĩ ya thahabu warĩ wa cekeri mĩrongo ĩtano. Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩgemia mĩena ya na igũrũ ya hau Hatheru-Mũno na thahabu.
2Chronicles3:10 Thĩinĩ wa Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru-Mũno nĩakururithirie makerubi meerĩ na akĩmagemia na thahabu.
2Chronicles3:11 Ũraihu wa mathagu ma makerubi wothe warĩ mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ. Ithagu rĩmwe rĩa ikerubi rĩa mbere rĩarĩ rĩa mĩkono ĩtano kũraiha na rĩkahutia rũthingo rwa hekarũ
2Chronicles3:12 O narĩo ithagu rĩmwe rĩa ikerubi rĩa keerĩ rĩarĩ na ũraihu wa mĩkono ĩtano na rĩkahutia rũthingo rũu rũngĩ rwa hekarũ
2Chronicles3:13 Mathagu ma makerubi maya maarĩ na ũraihu wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ. Maicũhĩtio marũgamĩte na magũrũ
2Chronicles3:14 Solomoni nĩathondekire gĩtambaya gĩa gũcuurio kĩa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
2Chronicles3:15 Mwena wa mbere wa hekarũ agĩaka itugĩ igĩrĩ
2Chronicles3:16 Nĩathondekire irengeeri igathĩkanĩtio
2Chronicles3:17 Aakire itugĩ icio mwena wa mbere wa hekarũ
2Chronicles4:1 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩakithia kĩgongona gĩa gĩcango kĩa ũraihu wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles4:2 Agĩcooka agĩaka itangi inene mũno rĩrĩa rĩetagwo Karia rĩa kĩgera gĩtwekie
2Chronicles4:3 Mũhuro wa mũthia warĩo
2Chronicles4:4 Nako Karia kau kaigĩrĩirwo igũrũ rĩa mĩhiano ya ndegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ: ithatũ ciacio ciarorete mwena wa gathigathini
2Chronicles4:5 Ũtungu wa Karia kau waiganaine na rũhĩ kwarama
2Chronicles4:6 Ningĩ agĩthondeka iraĩ ikũmi cia gwĩthambĩra
2Chronicles4:7 Nĩathondekire mĩtĩ ikũmi ya kũigĩrĩrwo matawa ya thahabu
2Chronicles4:8 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka metha ikũmi
2Chronicles4:9 Nĩathondekire nja ya athĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Chronicles4:10 Akĩiga Karia kau mwena wa gũthini
2Chronicles4:11 O na nĩathondekire nyũngũ na icakũri na mbakũri cia kũminjaminja maaĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Huramu akĩrĩkia wĩra wothe ũrĩa aaheetwo arute nĩ Mũthamaki Solomoni thĩinĩ wa Hekarũ ya Ngai
2Chronicles4:12 itugĩ iria igĩrĩ
2Chronicles4:13 na makomamanga marĩa 400 ma irengeeri iria igĩrĩ ciagathĩkanĩtio ta mĩnyororo (yarĩ mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ya makomamanga o harĩ kĩrengeeri kĩmwe
2Chronicles4:14 makaari na iraĩ ciamo;
2Chronicles4:15 Karia na mĩhiano ya ndegwa iria ikũmi na igĩrĩ rungu rwako;
2Chronicles4:16 nyũngũ
2Chronicles4:17 Nake mũthamaki aatwekithagĩria indo icio kũrĩa gwathondekagĩrwo indo cia rĩũmba kũu werũ-inĩ wa Jorodani gatagatĩ ga Sukothu na Zarethani.
2Chronicles4:18 Indo icio ciothe ciathondekithirio nĩ Solomoni ciarĩ nyingĩ mũno
2Chronicles4:19 Ningĩ Solomoni nĩathondekithirie indo ciothe iria ciarĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Ngai: aathondekire kĩgongona gĩa thahabu; na metha cia mĩgate ĩrĩa yaigagwo mbere ya Jehova;
2Chronicles4:20 na mĩtĩ ya matawa ya thahabu therie hamwe na matawa mayo ma gwakanaga marĩ mbere ya harĩa haamũre o ta ũrĩa gwathanĩtwo;
2Chronicles4:21 na wĩra wa magemio wa mahũa ma thahabu
2Chronicles4:22 magathĩ ma kũrenga ndaambĩ
2Chronicles5:1 Rĩrĩa wĩra wothe ũrĩa Solomoni aarutagĩra hekarũ ya Jehova warĩkire-rĩ
2Chronicles5:2 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩĩta athuuri a Isiraeli
2Chronicles5:3 Nao andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩũka hamwe kũrĩ mũthamaki hĩndĩ ya gĩathĩ
2Chronicles5:4 Rĩrĩa athuuri othe a Isiraeli maakinyire
2Chronicles5:5 nao makĩambatia ithandũkũ
2Chronicles5:6 nake Mũthamaki Solomoni na kĩũngano gĩothe kĩa Isiraeli kĩrĩa gĩacemanĩtie harĩ we marĩ mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩu
2Chronicles5:7 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩcooka makĩrehe ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova handũ harĩo harĩa haamũre thĩinĩ wa hekarũ
2Chronicles5:8 Makerubi macio maatambũrũkĩtie mathagu mamo igũrũ rĩa harĩa haigĩtwo ithandũkũ rĩu
2Chronicles5:9 Mĩtĩ ĩyo yarĩ mĩraihu mũno ũũ atĩ mĩthia yayo
2Chronicles5:10 Thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ rĩu gũtiarĩ na kĩndũ kĩngĩ tiga o ihengere iria igĩrĩ Musa aaigĩte ho rĩrĩa aarĩ Horebu
2Chronicles5:11 Ningĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩehera makiuma Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru. Athĩnjĩri-Ngai othe arĩa maarĩ hau nĩmetheretie matekũrũmbũiya ikundi ciao.
2Chronicles5:12 Nao Alawii othe arĩa maarĩ aini

2Chronicles5:14 nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai matingĩahotire kũruta wĩra wao nĩ ũndũ wa itu rĩu

2Chronicles6:18 “No kũhoteke Ngai agĩtũũranie na andũ gũkũ thĩ? Igũrũ
2Chronicles6:19 No o na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
2Chronicles6:20 Maitho maku maroikara marorete hekarũ ĩno mũthenya na ũtukũ
2Chronicles6:21 Igua gũthaithana kwa ndungata yaku na kwa andũ aku a Isiraeli rĩrĩa mekũhooya marorete handũ haha. Ũigue ũrĩ kũu igũrũ
2Chronicles6:22 “Rĩrĩa mũndũ angĩhĩtĩria mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake na gũtuĩke no nginya ehĩte

2Chronicles6:24 “Rĩrĩa andũ aku a Isiraeli maahootwo nĩ thũ tondũ nĩmakũhĩtĩirie nao magũcookerere na moimbũre rĩĩtwa rĩaku
2Chronicles6:25 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkaamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ na ũrekere andũ aku a Isiraeli mehia mao na ũmacookie bũrũri ũrĩa wamaheire hamwe na maithe mao.
2Chronicles6:26 “Rĩrĩa igũrũ rĩkaahingwo

2Chronicles6:31 nĩgeetha matũũre magwĩtigĩrĩte

2Chronicles6:33 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkaamũigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ gĩikaro-inĩ gĩaku

2Chronicles7:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:2 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai matingĩahotire gũtoonya hekarũ ya Jehova tondũ riiri wa Jehova nĩwaiyũrĩte kuo.
2Chronicles7:3 Na rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli othe moonire mwaki ũkiuma na igũrũ
2Chronicles7:4 Ningĩ mũthamaki na andũ othe makĩruta magongona marĩ mbere ya Jehova.
2Chronicles7:5 Nake Mũthamaki Solomoni akĩruta igongona rĩa ngʼombe 22
2Chronicles7:6 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩĩhaarĩria kũruta wĩra wao
2Chronicles7:7 Nake Solomoni akĩamũra kũu gatagatĩ ka nja
2Chronicles7:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩkũngũĩra gĩathĩ kĩu mĩthenya mũgwanja
2Chronicles7:9 Mũthenya wa ĩnana makĩgĩa na kĩũngano nĩ ũndũ nĩmarĩkĩtie gũkũngũĩra Kwamũrwo gwa kĩgongona mĩthenya mũgwanja
2Chronicles7:10 Mũthenya wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ wa mweri wa mũgwanja
2Chronicles7:11 Rĩrĩa Solomoni aarĩkirie gwaka hekarũ ya Jehova na nyũmba ya ũthamaki
2Chronicles7:12 Jehova akĩmuumĩrĩra ũtukũ
2Chronicles7:13 “Rĩrĩa ingĩhinga igũrũ nayo mbura yaage kuura
2Chronicles7:14 andũ acio akwa
2Chronicles7:15 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:16 Nĩthuurĩte na ngaamũra hekarũ ĩno nĩgeetha Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩtũũre kuo nginya tene. Maitho makwa na ngoro yakwa igũtũũra kuo hĩndĩ ciothe.
2Chronicles7:17 “Na ha ũhoro waku
2Chronicles7:18 nĩngahaanda gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene
2Chronicles7:19 “No rĩrĩ

2Chronicles7:21 O na gũtuĩka hekarũ ĩno nĩguo ĩrĩ nene
2Chronicles7:22 Andũ nĩmagacookia moige
2Chronicles8:1 Thuutha wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles8:2 Solomoni nĩaakire rĩngĩ matũũra marĩa aaheetwo nĩ Hiramu
2Chronicles8:3 Solomoni agĩcooka agĩthiĩ Hamathu-Zoba na akĩrĩtaha.
2Chronicles8:4 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩaka Tadimori kũu werũ-inĩ na matũũra manene mothe marĩa aakĩte kũu Hamathu ma kũigwo indo.
2Chronicles8:5 Nĩaakire Bethi-Horoni ya Mwena wa Igũrũ
2Chronicles8:6 o ũndũ ũmwe na Baalathu
2Chronicles8:7 Andũ othe arĩa maatigaire kuuma kũrĩ Ahiti
2Chronicles8:8 ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩ
2Chronicles8:9 No Solomoni ndaatuire andũ a Isiraeli ngombo cia wĩra wake; acio nĩo maarĩ andũ ake a kũrũa mbaara
2Chronicles8:10 O na ningĩ no-o maarĩ atongoria anene a Mũthamaki Solomoni
2Chronicles8:11 Solomoni akĩruta mwarĩ wa Firaũni kuuma Itũũra Inene rĩa Daudi
2Chronicles8:12 Igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona kĩa Jehova kĩrĩa Solomoni aakĩte mbere ya gĩthaku
2Chronicles8:13 O ta ũrĩa maabataranĩtie kũrutwo o mũthenya nĩ ũndũ wa maruta marĩa Musa aathanĩte ma Thabatũ
2Chronicles8:14 Kũrũmanĩrĩra na wathani ũrĩa watuĩtwo nĩ ithe Daudi
2Chronicles8:15 Nao matiatigire kũrũmĩrĩra watho ũrĩa mũthamaki aathĩte athĩnjĩri-Ngai kana Alawii ũndũ-inĩ o wothe hamwe na ũmenyereri wa igĩĩna.
2Chronicles8:16 Wĩra wa Solomoni wothe nĩwahingirio kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa mũthingi wa hekarũ ya Jehova wakirwo nginya ĩkĩrĩka. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio hekarũ ya Jehova ĩkĩrĩkio gwakwo.
2Chronicles8:17 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩthiĩ Ezioni-Geberi na Elathu hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Edomu.
2Chronicles8:18 Nake Hiramu akĩmũtũmĩra marikabu irũgamĩrĩirwo nĩ anene ake
2Chronicles9:1 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki-mũndũ-wa-nja wa Sheba aiguire ngumo ya Solomoni
2Chronicles9:2 Nake Solomoni agĩcookia ciũria ciake ciothe; gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe aaremirwo nĩkũmũtaarĩria.
2Chronicles9:3 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki-mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio wa Sheba onire ũũgĩ wa Solomoni
2Chronicles9:4 na irio iria ciarĩ metha-inĩ yake
2Chronicles9:5 Akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:6 No ndietĩkirie ũrĩa moigaga nginya rĩrĩa ndĩrokire na ndĩreyonera na maitho makwa niĩ mwene. Ti-itherũ
2Chronicles9:7 Kaĩ gũkena nĩ andũ aku-ĩ! Ningĩ gũkena nĩ anene aku arĩa marũgamaga mbere yaku hĩndĩ ciothe makaiguaga ũũgĩ waku!
2Chronicles9:8 Jehova Ngai waku arogoocwo
2Chronicles9:9 Ningĩ akĩhe mũthamaki taranda 120 cia thahabu
2Chronicles9:10 (Nao andũ a Hiramu na andũ a Solomoni nĩmarehire thahabu kuuma Ofiri; o na nĩmarehire mĩtĩ ya mĩthandari na tũhiga twa goro.
2Chronicles9:11 Mũthamaki aahũthĩrire mĩthandari ĩyo gwaka ngathĩ cia hekarũ ya Jehova o na cia nyũmba ya ũthamaki
2Chronicles9:12 Mũthamaki Solomoni nĩaheire mũthamaki-mũndũ-wa-nja wa Sheba kĩrĩa gĩothe eerirĩirie na kĩrĩa eetirie; akĩmũhe indo makĩria ma iria we aamũreheire. Mũthamaki mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akiumagara hamwe na ndungata ciake
2Chronicles9:13 Ũritũ wa thahabu ĩrĩa Solomoni aamũkagĩra o mwaka warĩ wa taranda 666
2Chronicles9:14 ĩtataranĩirio na igooti rĩrĩa rĩarehagwo nĩ athũgũri na onjorithia. Ningĩ athamaki othe a Arabia na abarũthi a bũrũri nĩmarehagĩra Solomoni thahabu na betha.
2Chronicles9:15 Mũthamaki Solomoni agĩthondeka ngo nene 200 cia thahabu hũũre; o ĩmwe yathondeketwo na ũritũ wa beka 600 cia thahabu.
2Chronicles9:16 Ningĩ agĩthondeka ngo 300 cia thahabu hũũre
2Chronicles9:17 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩthondeka gĩtĩ kĩnene kĩa ũthamaki kĩgemetio mwena wa na thĩinĩ na mĩguongo
2Chronicles9:18 Gĩtĩ kĩu kĩa ũnene kĩarĩ na ngathĩ ya makinya matandatũ
2Chronicles9:19 Mĩhiano ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya mĩrũũthi yarũgamĩtio ngathĩ-inĩ ĩyo ya makinya matandatũ
2Chronicles9:20 Indo ciothe iria Mũthamaki Solomoni aanyuuagĩra ciarĩ cia thahabu
2Chronicles9:21 Mũthamaki aarĩ na marikabu nyingĩ cia wonjoria iria ciarũgamagĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ a Hiramu. Ciacookaga o riita rĩmwe thĩinĩ wa mĩaka ĩtatũ
2Chronicles9:22 Mũthamaki Solomoni aarĩ na ũtonga na ũũgĩ mũingĩ gũkĩra athamaki arĩa angĩ othe a thĩ.
2Chronicles9:23 Athamaki othe a thĩ nĩmacaragia ũrĩa mangĩona Solomoni nĩguo maigue ũũgĩ ũrĩa Ngai eekĩrĩte ngoro-inĩ yake.
2Chronicles9:24 Andũ arĩa mookaga kũmuona mwaka o mwaka nĩmamũrehagĩra iheo
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoni aarĩ na nyũmba 4
2Chronicles9:26 Nake nĩathaga athamaki othe kuuma Rũũĩ rwa Farati nginya bũrũri wa Afilisti
2Chronicles9:27 Mũthamaki nĩatũmire betha cingĩhe Jerusalemu o ta mahiga
2Chronicles9:28 Mbarathi cia Solomoni ciarehetwo kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri
2Chronicles9:29 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Solomoni
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni aathamakĩire Isiraeli rĩothe arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
2Chronicles9:31 Agĩcooka akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make

2Chronicles10:2 Rĩrĩa Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati aaiguire ũhoro ũcio (tondũ aarĩ bũrũri wa Misiri
2Chronicles10:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli magĩtũmanĩra Jeroboamu
2Chronicles10:4 “Thoguo nĩatũigĩrĩire icooki iritũ
2Chronicles10:5 Rehoboamu akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:6 Thuutha ũcio Mũthamaki Rehoboamu akĩhooya kĩrĩra kũrĩ athuuri arĩa maatungatagĩra ithe Solomoni rĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo. Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:7 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:8 No Rehoboamu akĩregana na ũtaaro ũrĩa athuuri maamũheire
2Chronicles10:9 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:10 Aanake acio a riika rĩake makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:11 Baba aamũigĩrĩire icooki iritũ
2Chronicles10:12 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ Jeroboamu na andũ a Isiraeli othe magĩcooka kũrĩ Rehoboamu
2Chronicles10:13 Nake mũthamaki akĩmacookeria ehĩte mũno. Akĩregana na ũtaaro ũrĩa aaheetwo nĩ athuuri
2Chronicles10:14 akĩrũmĩrĩra ũtaaro wa aanake
2Chronicles10:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki ndaigana gũthikĩrĩria andũ acio
2Chronicles10:16 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli othe moonire atĩ mũthamaki ũcio nĩarega kũmathikĩrĩria
2Chronicles10:17 No andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maatũũraga matũũra-inĩ ma Juda-rĩ
2Chronicles10:18 Mũthamaki Rehoboamu agĩtũma Adoniramu ũrĩa warĩ mũrũgamĩrĩri wa andũ arĩa maarutithagio wĩra na hinya; no andũ a Isiraeli makĩmũhũũra na mahiga nyuguto
2Chronicles10:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makoretwo maremeire nyũmba ya Daudi nginya ũmũthĩ.

2Chronicles11:2 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles11:3 “Thiĩ wĩre Rehoboamu mũrũ wa Solomoni mũthamaki wa Juda

2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboamu agĩtũũra Jerusalemu na agĩaka matũũra ma ũgitĩri kũu Juda

2Chronicles11:7 na Bethi-Zuru
2Chronicles11:8 na Gathu
2Chronicles11:9 na Adoraimu
2Chronicles11:10 na Zora

2Chronicles11:13 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii kuuma ngʼongo ciao ciothe kũu Isiraeli guothe maarĩ mwena wake.
2Chronicles11:14 Nĩgũkorwo Alawii nĩmatiganĩirie ũrĩithio wao na indo ciothe
2Chronicles11:15 Nake agĩthuura athĩnjĩri-ngai ake mwene nĩ ũndũ wa kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
2Chronicles11:16 Andũ othe a kuuma kũrĩ o mũhĩrĩga wa Isiraeli arĩa maahaarĩirie ngoro ciao kũmaatha Jehova
2Chronicles11:17 Makĩongerera ũthamaki wa Juda hinya na makĩnyiitĩrĩra Rehoboamu mũrũ wa Solomoni handũ ha mĩaka ĩtatũ
2Chronicles11:18 Nake Rehoboamu nĩahikirie Mahalathu
2Chronicles11:19 Nake akĩmũciarĩra aanake aya: Jeushu
2Chronicles11:20 Ningĩ akĩhikia Maaka mwarĩ wa Abisalomu
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboamu nĩendire Maaka mwarĩ wa Abisalomu gũkĩra atumia arĩa angĩ othe na gũkĩra thuriya ciake ciothe. Atumia ake othe maarĩ 18 na thuriya 60
2Chronicles11:22 Rehoboamu nĩathuurire Abija mũrũ wa Maaka atuĩke mũriũ mũnene wa ariũ a ithe acio angĩ nĩgeetha akaamũtua mũthamaki.
2Chronicles11:23 Nĩatũmĩrire ũũgĩ
2Chronicles12:1 Thuutha wa Rehoboamu kwĩhaanda ta mũthamaki na gũkorwo agĩte na hinya
2Chronicles12:2 Tondũ wa gũkorwo matarĩ ehokeku harĩ Jehova
2Chronicles12:3 Aarĩ na ngaari cia mbaara 1
2Chronicles12:4 agĩtaha matũũra manene marĩa maarĩ mairigĩre ma Juda na agĩthiĩ nginya Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles12:5 Nake mũnabii Shemaia agĩũka kũrĩ Rehoboamu o na kũrĩ atongoria a Juda arĩa moonganĩte kũu Jerusalemu nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra Shishaka
2Chronicles12:6 Atongoria a Isiraeli hamwe na mũthamaki makĩĩnyiihia
2Chronicles12:7 Rĩrĩa Jehova onire atĩ nĩmenyiihĩtie-rĩ
2Chronicles12:8 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles12:9 Rĩrĩa Shishaka mũthamaki wa Misiri aatharĩkĩire Jerusalemu-rĩ
2Chronicles12:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũthamaki Rehoboamu agĩthondeka ngo cia gĩcango handũ ha icio cia mbere
2Chronicles12:11 Rĩrĩa rĩothe mũthamaki aathiiaga hekarũ ya Jehova-rĩ
2Chronicles12:12 Tondũ Rehoboamu nĩenyiihirie
2Chronicles12:13 Mũthamaki Rehoboamu nĩehaandire wega kũu Jerusalemu na agĩthiĩ o na mbere arĩ mũthamaki. Aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na ũmwe rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Chronicles12:14 Nĩekire maũndũ mooru tondũ ndaatuĩte na ngoro yake kũrongooria Jehova.
2Chronicles12:15 Na ha ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Rehoboamu kuuma kĩambĩrĩria nginya mũthia-rĩ
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboamu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make na agĩthikwo o kũu Itũũra-inĩ Inene rĩa Daudi. Nake mũriũ Abija agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Chronicles13:1 Mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana wa ũthamaki wa Jeroboamu nĩguo Abija aatuĩkire mũthamaki wa Juda
2Chronicles13:2 na agĩthamaka arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka ĩtatũ. Nyina eetagwo Maaka mwarĩ wa Urieli wa Gibea. Nĩ kwarĩ mbaara gatagatĩ ka Abija na Jeroboamu.
2Chronicles13:3 Abija aathiire mbaara-inĩ arĩ na mbũtũ ya thigari irĩ ũhoti 400
2Chronicles13:4 Abija akĩrũgama igũrũ rĩa Kĩrĩma kĩa Zemaraimu
2Chronicles13:5 Kaĩ mũtooĩ atĩ Jehova
2Chronicles13:6 No rĩrĩ

2Chronicles13:10 “No ithuĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles13:11 O rũciinĩ na hwaĩ-inĩ nĩmarutagĩra Jehova maruta ma njino na ũbumba ũrĩa ũnungaga wega. Nĩmaigagĩrĩra mĩgate metha-inĩ ĩrĩa theru
2Chronicles13:12 Ngai arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ; we nĩwe mũtongoria witũ. Athĩnjĩri-Ngai ake na tũrumbeta twao nĩo marĩgambia mũgambo wa mbaara ya kũmũũkĩrĩra inyuĩ. Andũ a Isiraeli
2Chronicles13:13 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles13:14 Juda nĩmehũgũrire na makĩona atĩ nĩmatharĩkĩirwo kuuma na mbere na kuuma na thuutha. Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩkaĩra Jehova. Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩhuha tũrumbeta twao
2Chronicles13:15 nao andũ a Juda makiugĩrĩria na mũgambo wa mbaara. Hĩndĩ ĩyo maanagĩrĩra na mũgambo wa mbaara
2Chronicles13:16 Andũ a Isiraeli makĩũrĩra andũ a Juda
2Chronicles13:17 Abija na andũ ake makĩmahũũra mbaara nene
2Chronicles13:18 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩtoorio mbaara-inĩ ĩyo; nao andũ a Juda magĩtuĩka atooria tondũ nĩmehokire Jehova
2Chronicles13:19 Nake Abija akĩingatithia Jeroboamu na akĩmũtaha matũũra ma Betheli
2Chronicles13:20 Jeroboamu ndaigana gũcooka kũgĩa na hinya rĩngĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Abija. Nake Jehova agĩkĩmũgũtha igũtha agĩkua.

2Chronicles20:32 Nake akĩrũmĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ya ithe Asa na ndaigana gũtigana nayo; agĩĩka ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova.
2Chronicles20:33 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:34 Ciĩko iria ingĩ cia wathani wa Jehoshafatu kuuma kĩambĩrĩria nginya mũthia
2Chronicles20:35 Thuutha ũcio Jehoshafatu mũthamaki wa Juda agĩtuma ũrata na Ahazia mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
2Chronicles20:36 Makĩiguana nake atĩ maake marikabu cia wonjoria. Nao maarĩkia gũciakĩra kũu Ezioni-Geberi
2Chronicles20:37 Eliezeri mũrũ wa Dodavahu wa kuuma Maresha akĩrathĩra Jehoshafatu ũrathi wa ũrĩa akoona ũũru
2Chronicles21:1 Nake Jehoshafatu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make na agĩthikwo hamwe nao o kũu Itũũra Inene rĩa Daudi. Nake mũriũ Jehoramu agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Chronicles21:2 Ariũ a ithe na Jehoramu mũrũ wa Jehoshafatu maarĩ Azaria
2Chronicles21:3 Ithe nĩamaheete iheo nyingĩ cia betha na thahabu na indo ingĩ cia goro
2Chronicles21:4 Rĩrĩa Jehoramu eehaandire na akĩrũma ũthamaki-inĩ wa ithe-rĩ
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki. Nake agĩthamaka arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka ĩnana.
2Chronicles21:6 Agĩthiĩ na mĩthiĩre ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Chronicles21:7 No o na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
2Chronicles21:8 Hĩndĩ ya Jehoramu-rĩ
2Chronicles21:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehoramu agĩthiĩ kuo na anene ake na ngaari ciake cia ita ciothe. Nao andũ a Edomu makĩmũrigiicĩria arĩ hamwe na anene a ngaari ciake cia ita
2Chronicles21:10 Nginya ũmũthĩ
2Chronicles21:11 O na ningĩ nĩakĩte kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kũu irĩma-inĩ cia Juda
2Chronicles21:12 Jehoramu akĩnyiita marũa moimĩte kũrĩ mũnabii Elija maandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Jehova Ngai wa thoguo Daudi ekuuga ũũ: ‘Ndũthiĩte na mĩthiĩre ya thoguo Jehoshafatu

2Chronicles23:3 kĩũngano gĩothe nĩkĩagĩire kĩrĩkanĩro na mũthamaki kũu hekarũ-inĩ ya Ngai. Jehoiada akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:4 Na rĩrĩ

2Chronicles23:7 Alawii makeiga mathiũrũrũkĩirie mũthamaki
2Chronicles23:8 Nao Alawii na andũ othe a Juda magĩĩka o ũrĩa Jehoiada ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai aathanire. O mũndũ akĩoya andũ ake arĩa maathiiaga wĩra mũthenya wa Thabatũ na arĩa moimagĩra wĩra

2Chronicles23:10 Akĩrũgamia andũ othe

2Chronicles23:12 Rĩrĩa Athalia aaiguire inegene rĩa andũ makĩhanyũka magĩkũngũyagĩra mũthamaki
2Chronicles23:13 Agĩcũthĩrĩria

2Chronicles23:16 Nake Jehoiada akĩgĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro atĩ we
2Chronicles23:17 Nao andũ othe magĩthiĩ hekarũ-inĩ ya Baali na makĩmĩtharia. Makiunanga igongona na mĩhianano na makĩũragĩra Matani ũrĩa warĩ mũthĩnjĩri-ngai wa Baali hau mbere ya igongona icio.

2Chronicles27:4 Nĩaakire matũũra irĩma-inĩ cia Juda na agĩaka nyũmba cia ũgitĩri na mĩthiringo mĩraihu na igũrũ kũndũ kũrĩa kwarĩ na mũtitũ.

2Chronicles28:27 Nake Ahazu akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make na agĩthikwo itũũra-inĩ rĩa Jerusalemu
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Chronicles29:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa maagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Chronicles29:3 Mweri wa mbere wa mwaka wa mbere wa wathani wake-rĩ
2Chronicles29:4 Nake akĩrehe athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii
2Chronicles29:5 akiuga atĩrĩ: “Ta thikĩrĩriai inyuĩ Alawii! Mwĩtheriei rĩu
2Chronicles29:6 Maithe maitũ matiarĩ ehokeku; nĩmekire ũũru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova Ngai witũ na makĩmũtirika. Nĩmahũgũrire mothiũ mao makĩaga kũrora gĩikaro kĩa Jehova
2Chronicles29:7 O na ningĩ nĩmahingire mĩrango ya gĩthaku na makĩhoria matawa. Matiacinire ũbumba kana makĩrutĩra Ngai wa Isiraeli maruta o na marĩkũ ma njino handũ-inĩ harĩa haamũre.
2Chronicles29:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
2Chronicles29:9 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩatũmire maithe maitũ mooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
2Chronicles29:10 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Alawii aya makĩambĩrĩria kũruta wĩra: kuuma kũrĩ Akohathu
2Chronicles29:13 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Elizafani
2Chronicles29:14 Kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Hemani
2Chronicles29:15 Maarĩkia gũcookanĩrĩria ariũ a ithe wao hamwe na meetheria-rĩ
2Chronicles29:16 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩtoonya handũ-harĩa-haamũre ha Jehova nĩguo mahatherie. Na indo ciothe iria itaarĩ theru iria maakorire kũu hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova magĩciruta magĩciiga nja ya hekarũ ya Jehova. Nao Alawii magĩcioya magĩcitwara Gĩtuamba-inĩ gĩa Kidironi.
2Chronicles29:17 Maambĩrĩirie wĩra wa gũtheria hekarũ mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere
2Chronicles29:18 Magĩcooka magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Mũthamaki Hezekia
2Chronicles29:19 Nĩtũhaarĩirie na tũkaamũra indo iria ciothe Mũthamaki Ahazu ehereetie Hekarũ-inĩ rĩrĩa aarĩ mũthamaki nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga wĩhokeku. Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:20 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:21 Nao makĩrehe ndegwa mũgwanja
2Chronicles29:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩthĩnja ndegwa icio
2Chronicles29:23 Nacio thenge cia igongona rĩa kũhoroherio mehia ikĩrehwo mbere ya mũthamaki na kĩũngano kĩu
2Chronicles29:24 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩcooka magĩthĩnja thenge icio hamwe na thakame yacio
2Chronicles29:25 Mũthamaki akĩiga Alawii hekarũ-inĩ ya Jehova marĩ na thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba
2Chronicles29:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Alawii makĩrũgama mehaarĩirie na inanda cia Daudi cia kũina
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekia agĩathana atĩ kũrutwo iruta rĩa njino kĩgongona-inĩ. Narĩo igongona rĩambĩrĩria kũrutwo-rĩ
2Chronicles29:28 Kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe gĩkĩinamĩrĩra
2Chronicles29:29 Na rĩrĩa maruta maarĩkirie kũrutwo-rĩ
2Chronicles29:30 Nake Mũthamaki Hezekia na anene ake magĩatha Alawii magooce Jehova na ciugo cia Daudi na cia Asafu mũndũ ũrĩa muoni-maũndũ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩina nyĩmbo cia kũgooca Jehova marĩ na gĩkeno na makĩinamia mĩtwe yao makĩmũhooya.
2Chronicles29:31 Ningĩ Hezekia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:32 Naguo mũigana wa maruta ma njino marĩa maarehirwo nĩ kĩũngano kĩu warĩ ndegwa mĩrongo mũgwanja
2Chronicles29:33 Nyamũ ciothe iria ciaamũrĩtwo cia magongona ciarĩ ndegwa 600 na ngʼondu hamwe na mbũri 3
2Chronicles29:34 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:35 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:36 Nake Hezekia na andũ othe magĩkena nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa Ngai eekĩire andũ ake
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekia nĩatũmire ndũmĩrĩri Isiraeli guothe na Juda
2Chronicles30:2 Mũthamaki na anene ake na kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe kũu Jerusalemu magĩtua atĩ megũkũngũĩra Bathaka mweri wa keerĩ.
2Chronicles30:3 Matiahotete kũmĩkũngũĩra ihinda-inĩ rĩayo tondũ gũtiarĩ na athĩnjĩri-Ngai a kũigana arĩa meetheretie
2Chronicles30:4 Mũbango ũcio nĩwonekire wagĩrĩire harĩ mũthamaki o na harĩ kĩũngano gĩothe.
2Chronicles30:5 Nao magĩtua atĩ gũthiĩ kwanĩrĩrwo Isiraeli guothe
2Chronicles30:6 Kũrũmanĩrĩra na watho wa mũthamaki
2Chronicles30:7 Mũtigatuĩke ta maithe manyu kana ariũ a maithe manyu
2Chronicles30:8 Mũtikoomie ciongo cianyu ta ũrĩa maithe manyu meekire; mwĩheanei harĩ Jehova. Ũkai handũ-harĩa-haamũre
2Chronicles30:9 Mũngĩcookerera Jehova-rĩ
2Chronicles30:10 Atwari a marũa magĩthiĩ itũũra o itũũra kũu Efiraimu na Manase
2Chronicles30:11 O na gũkĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
2Chronicles30:12 Ningĩ o na kũu Juda guoko kwa Ngai kwarĩ igũrũ rĩa andũ
2Chronicles30:13 Kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ mũno gĩkĩũngana kũu Jerusalemu nĩguo gĩkũngũĩre Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndawa ya Kũimbia mweri wa keerĩ.
2Chronicles30:14 Makĩeheria igongona iria ciarĩ kũu Jerusalemu o na makĩeheria igongona cia gũcinĩra ũbumba
2Chronicles30:15 Nĩmathĩnjire gatũrũme ka Bathaka mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa keerĩ. Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii magĩconoka na magĩĩtheria
2Chronicles30:16 Ningĩ makĩambĩrĩria ũtungata wao wa o mũthenya o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo Watho-inĩ wa Musa mũndũ wa Ngai. Athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩminjaminja thakame ĩrĩa maanengereirio nĩ Alawii.
2Chronicles30:17 Na tondũ nĩ kwarĩ na andũ aingĩ kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ kĩu mateetheretie-rĩ
2Chronicles30:18 O na akorwo andũ aingĩ arĩa mookĩte kuuma Efiraimu
2Chronicles30:19 ũrĩa ũtuĩte na ngoro yake kũrongooria Ngai
2Chronicles30:20 Nake Jehova akĩigua ihooya rĩa Hezekia
2Chronicles30:21 Nao andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ kũu Jerusalemu magĩkũngũĩra Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndawa ya Kũimbia marĩ na gĩkeno kĩnene mĩthenya mũgwanja
2Chronicles30:22 Nake Hezekia akĩaria ciugo cia kũũmĩrĩria Alawii othe arĩa moonanirie ũmenyo mwega wa gũtungatĩra Jehova. Handũ ha mĩthenya ĩyo mũgwanja nĩmarĩire kĩrĩa maagaĩirwo
2Chronicles30:23 Kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe gĩgĩcooka gĩkĩiguanĩra gĩkũngũĩre gĩathĩ kĩu mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja; nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩkũngũĩra mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja makenete mũno.
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda akĩruta ndegwa 1
2Chronicles30:25 Kĩũngano gĩothe kĩa Juda gĩgĩkena hamwe na athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii na andũ arĩa othe monganĩte moimĩte Isiraeli
2Chronicles30:26 Nĩ kwarĩ na gĩkeno kĩnene kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles30:27 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii makĩrũgama
2Chronicles31:1 Rĩrĩa maũndũ macio mothe maathirire-rĩ
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekia agĩkĩiga athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii na ikundi
2Chronicles31:3 Mũthamaki nĩaheanire indo ciake mwene cia kũrutagwo maruta ma njino ma rũciinĩ na ma hwaĩ-inĩ
2Chronicles31:4 Agĩatha andũ arĩa maatũũraga Jerusalemu maheage athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii rwĩga rũrĩa rwamagĩrĩire
2Chronicles31:5 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:6 Nao andũ a Isiraeli na Juda arĩa maatũũraga matũũra-inĩ ma Juda o nao makĩrehe gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa ndũũru ciao cia ngʼombe na ngʼondu
2Chronicles31:7 Maambĩrĩirie gwĩka ũndũ ũyũ mweri wa ĩtatũ na makĩrĩkia mweri wa mũgwanja.
2Chronicles31:8 Rĩrĩa Hezekia na anene ake mookire na makĩona irũndo icio
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekia akĩũria athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii ũhoro wa irũndo icio;
2Chronicles31:10 nake Azaria mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene wa kuuma nyũmba ya Zadoku akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:11 Hezekia agĩathana gwakwo makũmbĩ kũu thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova
2Chronicles31:12 Nao magĩcooka makĩrehe mĩhothi na wĩhokeku
2Chronicles31:13 Jehieli
2Chronicles31:14 Kore mũrũ wa Imuna ũrĩa Mũlawii
2Chronicles31:15 Edeni
2Chronicles31:16 Hamwe na ũguo makĩgaĩra arũme arĩa maarĩ na mĩaka ĩtatũ na makĩria arĩa marĩĩtwa mao maarĩ maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa
2Chronicles31:17 Nao makĩgaĩra athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa maandĩkithĩtio nĩ andũ a nyũmba ciao maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa ciao
2Chronicles31:18 Maataranĩirie ciana ciothe
2Chronicles31:19 Ha ũhoro wa athĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Chronicles31:20 Ũguo nĩguo Hezekia eekire Juda guothe
2Chronicles31:21 Maũndũ-inĩ mothe marĩa ekaga ma gũtungata hekarũ-inĩ ya Ngai
2Chronicles32:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:2 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Hezekia onire atĩ Senakeribu nĩoka na atĩ muoroto wake warĩ kũhũũra Jerusalemu
2Chronicles32:3 magĩciira na anene ake o na atongoria a thigari cia ita ũrĩa mekũhingĩrĩria maaĩ kuuma ithima-inĩ cia nja ya itũũra inene
2Chronicles32:4 Kĩrĩndĩ kĩnene kĩa andũ gĩkĩũngana
2Chronicles32:5 Ningĩ akĩruta wĩra mũingĩ wa gũcookereria rũthingo kũrĩa guothe rwamomoretwo
2Chronicles32:6 Agĩthuura anene a mbũtũ cia ita marũgamĩrĩre andũ
2Chronicles32:7 “Gĩai na hinya na mũũmĩrĩrie. Mũtigetigĩre
2Chronicles32:8 Kĩrĩa we arĩ nakĩo no hinya wa mwĩrĩ; no ithuĩ tũrĩ na Jehova Ngai witũ
2Chronicles32:9 Thuutha ũcio
2Chronicles32:10 “Ũũ nĩguo Senakeribu mũthamaki wa Ashuri ekuuga: Mũrutĩte ũmĩrĩru wanyu kũ
2Chronicles32:11 Rĩrĩa Hezekia ekuuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:12 Githĩ Hezekia we mwene ndeheririe kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kwa ngai ĩyo
2Chronicles32:13 “Kaĩ mũtooĩ ũrĩa niĩ na maithe maitũ twĩkĩte andũ othe a mabũrũri marĩa mangĩ? Nacio ngai cia ndũrĩrĩ icio-rĩ
2Chronicles32:14 Nĩ ngai ĩrĩkũ ya icio cia ndũrĩrĩ iria cianangirwo nĩ maithe makwa yahotire kũhonokia andũ ayo kuuma kũrĩ niĩ? Gwakĩhoteka atĩa ngai yanyu ĩmũgitĩre kuuma guoko-inĩ gwakwa?
2Chronicles32:15 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
2Chronicles32:16 Ndungata cia Senakeribu igĩthiĩ o na mbere kwaria mĩario ya gũũkĩrĩra Jehova Ngai o na gũũkĩrĩra ndungata yake Hezekia.
2Chronicles32:17 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩandĩka marũa ma kũruma Jehova
2Chronicles32:18 Ningĩ makĩanĩrĩra na Kĩhibirania kũrĩ andũ a Jerusalemu arĩa maarĩ rũthingo igũrũ
2Chronicles32:19 Magĩkĩaria ũhoro wa Ngai wa Jerusalemu o ta ũrĩa maaragia ũhoro wa ngai cia andũ arĩa angĩ a thĩ
2Chronicles32:20 Mũthamaki Hezekia na mũnabii Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu makĩhooya manĩrĩire magĩkaĩra ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio.
2Chronicles32:21 Nake Jehova agĩtũma mũraika ũrĩa waniinire thigari ciothe cia mbaara na atongoria na anene arĩa maarĩ kambĩ-inĩ ya mũthamaki wa Ashuri. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Senakeribu akĩinũka gwake aconokete. Na rĩrĩa aatoonyire hekarũ ya ngai yake-rĩ
2Chronicles32:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩhonokia Hezekia na andũ a Jerusalemu kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa Senakeribu mũthamaki wa Ashuri
2Chronicles32:23 Andũ aingĩ magĩtwarĩra Jehova indo cia maruta kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles32:24 Matukũ-inĩ macio-rĩ
2Chronicles32:25 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hezekia akĩĩrira mehia ma mwĩtĩĩo wa ngoro yake
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekia aarĩ na ũtonga mũingĩ mũno o na agatĩĩka
2Chronicles32:28 O na ningĩ agĩaka makũmbĩ ma kũiga ngano yagethwo
2Chronicles32:29 Nĩaakire tũtũũra na akĩgĩa na ndũũru nene cia ngʼondu na cia ngʼombe
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia nĩwe wahingĩrĩirie Gĩthima kĩa Gihoni mwena wa rũgongo
2Chronicles32:31 No rĩrĩa abarũthi maatũmirwo kũrĩ we nĩ aathani a Babuloni mamũũrie ũhoro wa rũũri rwa kĩmenyithia rũrĩa ruonekete bũrũri-inĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles32:32 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Hezekia na wĩrutĩri wake nĩmandĩkĩtwo kĩoneki-inĩ kĩa mũnabii Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make na agĩthikwo kĩrĩma-inĩ kũrĩa mbĩrĩra cia andũ a rũciaro rwa Daudi ciarĩ. Nakuo Juda guothe na andũ a Jerusalemu makĩmũhe gĩtĩĩo aarĩkia gũkua. Nake mũriũ Manase agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Chronicles33:1 Manase aarĩ wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Chronicles33:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa mataagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova na ũndũ wa kũrũmĩrĩra maũndũ maarĩ magigi marĩa meekagwo nĩ ndũrĩrĩ iria Jehova aaingatĩte ciehere mbere ya andũ a Isiraeli.
2Chronicles33:3 Agĩaka rĩngĩ kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa ithe Hezekia aamomorete; ningĩ agĩakĩra Baali igongona na agĩthondeka itugĩ cia Ashera. Ningĩ akĩinamĩrĩra na akĩhooya mĩhianano yothe ya mbũtũ cia njata cia igũrũ na agĩcitungatĩra.
2Chronicles33:4 Manase nĩaakire igongona thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Jehova
2Chronicles33:5 Nĩakĩire mĩhianano yothe ya mbũtũ cia njata cia igũrũ igongona kũu nja cierĩ cia hekarũ ya Jehova.
2Chronicles33:6 Nĩaarutire ariũ ake matuĩke igongona
2Chronicles33:7 Nĩooire mũhianano mũicũhie ũrĩa aathondekete na akĩũiga thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Ngai
2Chronicles33:8 Ndigatũma magũrũ ma andũ a Isiraeli macooke kũũrũũra moime bũrũri ũyũ ndaheire maithe manyu ma tene
2Chronicles33:9 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:10 Jehova akĩarĩria Manase na andũ ake
2Chronicles33:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai akĩmarehithĩria anene a mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki wa Ashuri
2Chronicles33:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo aarĩ mũhinyĩrĩrĩku ngoro-rĩ
2Chronicles33:13 Na rĩrĩa aamũhooire
2Chronicles33:14 Thuutha-inĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles33:15 Akĩeheria ngai cia kũngĩ
2Chronicles33:16 Ningĩ agĩcookereria kĩgongona kĩa Jehova
2Chronicles33:17 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:18 Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ makoniĩ wathani wa Manase
2Chronicles33:19 Ihooya rĩake
2Chronicles33:20 Manase akĩhurũka hamwe na maithe make na agĩthikwo nyũmba-inĩ yake ya ũthamaki. Nake mũriũ Amoni agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Chronicles33:22 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Chronicles33:23 Nowe ndeekire ta ithe Manase tondũ ndaigana kwĩnyiihĩria Jehova; Amoni nĩaingĩhirie mahĩtia make.
2Chronicles33:24 Anene a Amoni makĩmũciirĩrĩra
2Chronicles33:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a bũrũri ũcio makĩũraga andũ arĩa othe maaciirĩire kũũraga Mũthamaki Amoni; nao magĩtua mũriũ Josia mũthamaki ithenya rĩake.
2Chronicles34:1 Josia aarĩ wa mĩaka ĩnana rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
2Chronicles34:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa maagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
2Chronicles34:3 Mwaka wa ĩnana wa wathani wake
2Chronicles34:4 Nake agĩathana na agĩtigĩrĩra atĩ igongona cia Baali nĩciamomorwo; agĩtinangia icunjĩ igongona cia ũbumba iria ciarĩ igũrũ rĩacio
2Chronicles34:5 Nake agĩcinithĩria mahĩndĩ ma athĩnjĩri-ngai a Baali igongona-inĩ ciao
2Chronicles34:6 Ũguo noguo eekire matũũra-inĩ ma Manase
2Chronicles34:7 akĩmomora igongona na itugĩ cia Ashera
2Chronicles34:8 Mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana wa wathani wa Josia
2Chronicles34:9 Magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Hilikia mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
2Chronicles34:10 Ningĩ magĩciĩhokera andũ arĩa maathuurĩtwo a kũrũgamĩrĩra wĩra wa hekarũ ya Jehova. Nao andũ acio makĩrĩha aruti a wĩra arĩa maathondekete na magacookereria hekarũ.
2Chronicles34:11 O na ningĩ nĩmaheire atharamara na aaki mbeeca cia kũgũra mahiga maicũhie
2Chronicles34:12 Andũ acio nĩmarutire wĩra marĩ na wĩhokeku. Andũ arĩa maamarũgamĩrĩire maarĩ Jahathu na Obadia

Ezra6:7 Mũtikaingĩrĩre wĩra ũcio wa hekarũ ya Ngai. Barũthi wa Ayahudi na athuuri a Ayahudi nĩmarekwo maake rĩngĩ nyũmba ĩyo ya Ngai o harĩa yaakĩtwo.
Ezra6:8 O na ningĩ nĩndathana ũrĩa mũgwĩkĩra athuuri aya a Ayahudi magĩaka nyũmba ĩyo ya Ngai: Mahũthĩro mothe ma andũ acio nĩ marĩhwo kuuma kĩgĩĩna-inĩ kĩa ũthamaki kĩa Mũrĩmo-wa-Farati
Ezra6:9 Kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩngĩendekana
Ezra6:10 nĩgeetha marutage magongona ma gwĩtĩkĩrĩka nĩ Ngai wa igũrũ
Ezra6:11 Ningĩ nĩndathana atĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũngĩgarũra maandĩko macio
Ezra6:12 Ngai ũrĩa ũtũmĩte Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩtũũre kũu aroeheria mũthamaki o wothe kana andũ arĩa mangĩgeria kũgarũra watho ũyũ kana kũharagania hekarũ ĩyo ĩrĩ Jerusalemu. Niĩ Dario nĩ niĩ ndaruta watho ũcio. Nĩwathĩkĩrwo na kĩyo.
Ezra6:13 Ningĩ
Ezra6:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athuuri a Ayahudi magĩthiĩ o na mbere gwaka na kũgaacĩra makĩhunjagĩrio nĩ mũnabii Hagai
Ezra6:15 Hekarũ ĩyo yarĩkire mũthenya wa gatatũ wa mweri wa Adari
Ezra6:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli na athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Ezra6:17 Indo iria maarutire nĩ ũndũ wa kwamũrwo kwa nyũmba ya Ngai ciarĩ ndegwa igana rĩmwe
Ezra6:18 Nao magĩtoonyia athĩnjĩri-Ngai wĩra-inĩ kũringana na ikundi ciao
Ezra6:19 Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa mbere
Ezra6:20 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii nĩmetheretie na othe maarĩ atheru. Alawii nĩo maathĩnjire gatũrũme ka Bathaka
Ezra6:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maacookete kuuma kũrĩa maatahĩirwo makĩrĩa Bathaka ĩyo
Ezra6:22 Nĩmakũngũĩire Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndawa ya Kũimbia marĩ na gĩkeno ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mũgwanja

Ezra7:8 Ezara aakinyire Jerusalemu mweri wa gatano wa mwaka wa mũgwanja wa mũthamaki.

Ezra7:17 Menyerera wone atĩ mbeeca ici nĩciagũra ndegwa
Ezra7:18 Wee na ariũ a thoguo Ayahudi no mwĩke o ũrĩa mũngĩona kwagĩrĩire na matigari ma betha na thahabu
Ezra7:19 Twarĩrai Ngai wa Jerusalemu indo ciothe iria mwĩhokeirwo cia kũhũthagĩrwo mahooya-inĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya Ngai wanyu.
Ezra7:20 Na kĩndũ kĩngĩ o gĩothe kĩngĩendekana nĩ ũndũ wa hekarũ ya Ngai wanyu

Ezra7:25 Nawe Ezara

Ezra8:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tũkĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio na tũgĩthaitha Ngai witũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio

Nehemiah4:1 Rĩrĩa Sanibalati aaiguire atĩ nĩtwakaga rũthingo rĩngĩ
Nehemiah4:2 na arĩ mbere ya athiritũ ake na mbũtũ cia ita cia Samaria
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia ũrĩa Mũamoni
Nehemiah4:4 No rĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:5 Ndũkahithĩrĩre mahĩtia mao kana weherie mehia mao kuuma ũthiũ-inĩ waku
Nehemiah4:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tũgĩaka rũthingo rũu rĩngĩ o nginya ruothe rũgĩkinya nuthu ya ũraihu waruo
Nehemiah4:7 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Sanibalati
Nehemiah4:8 Magĩthiĩ ndundu marĩ othe
Nehemiah4:9 No nĩtwahooire Ngai witũ na tũkĩiga arangĩri a gũtũgitĩra mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩ ũndũ nĩtwehĩtĩirwo.

Nehemiah4:11 O nacio thũ ciitũ ikiuga atĩrĩ

Nehemiah4:17 arĩa maakaga rũthingo. Nao arĩa maakuuaga indo cia mwako maarutaga wĩra na guoko kũmwe
Nehemiah4:18 nake mwaki o wothe aikaraga eyohete rũhiũ rwake rwa njora njohero o akĩrutaga wĩra. No mũhuhi wa karumbeta aanjikaraga hakuhĩ.

Nehemiah12:23 Atongoria a nyũmba cia njiaro cia Lawi nginya hĩndĩ ya Johanani mũrũ wa Eliashibu o nao nĩmandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa matukũ macio.

Nehemiah12:25 Matania
Nehemiah12:26 Maatungataga hĩndĩ ya Joiakimu mũrũ wa Jeshua
Nehemiah12:27 Hĩndĩ ya kwamũrwo kwa rũthingo rwa Jerusalemu
Nehemiah12:28 Aini o nao nĩmacookanĩrĩirio hamwe kuuma ngʼongo iria ciathiũrũrũkĩirie Jerusalemu
Nehemiah12:29 na kuuma Bethi-Giligali
Nehemiah12:30 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii marĩkia gwĩtheria
Nehemiah12:31 Atongoria a Juda nĩndameerire mahaice rũthingo-igũrũ. Ningĩ ngĩhe ikundi igĩrĩ nene cia aini wĩra wa gũcookia ngaatho. Gĩkundi kĩmwe gĩgĩthiĩ mwena wa ũrĩo kĩrĩ rũthingo-igũrũ
