Nehemiah12:33 hamwe na Azaria
Nehemiah12:34 na Juda

Nehemiah12:36 na athiritũ ake
Nehemiah12:37 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah12:38 Gĩkundi gĩa keerĩ kĩa aini gĩgĩthiĩ kĩerekeire mwena wa ũmotho. Na niĩ ngĩmarũmĩrĩra kũu rũthingo igũrũ hamwe na nuthu ya andũ
Nehemiah12:39 igũrũ rĩa Kĩhingo kĩa Efiraimu
Nehemiah12:40 Ikundi icio cierĩ cia aini cia gũcookia ngaatho igĩikara handũ ha cio thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Ngai
Nehemiah12:41 o ũndũ ũmwe na athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Nehemiah12:42 o hamwe na Maaseia
Nehemiah12:43 Na mũthenya ũcio nĩmarutire magongona manene
Nehemiah12:44 Mahinda-inĩ macio nĩ gwathuurirwo andũ marũgamĩrĩre makũmbĩ ma indo iria ciarutagwo
Nehemiah12:45 Nĩmarutaga wĩra wa gũtungatĩra Ngai wao
Nehemiah12:46 Nĩgũkorwo tene mũno
Nehemiah12:47 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio matukũ-inĩ ma Zerubabeli na ma Nehemia
Nehemiah13:1 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:2 tondũ matiigana kũhe andũ a Isiraeli irio na maaĩ; no-o nĩ kũrĩha maarĩhire Balamu amarume. (No rĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:3 Rĩrĩa andũ maaiguire watho ũcio
Nehemiah13:4 Mbere ĩyo
Nehemiah13:5 na nĩamũhete nyũmba nene aikarage ĩrĩa mbere ĩyo yaigagwo mĩhothi ya ngano
Nehemiah13:6 No rĩrĩa maũndũ maya mothe maathiiaga na mbere
Nehemiah13:7 ngĩcooka Jerusalemu. Ndacooka Jerusalemu nĩguo ndaamenyire ũũru ũrĩa Eliashibu eekĩte nĩ ũndũ wa kũhe Tobia kanyũmba nja ya nyũmba ya Ngai.
Nehemiah13:8 Nĩndarakaririo nĩ ũhoro ũcio mũno na ngĩikia indo ciothe cia Tobia nja.
Nehemiah13:9 Ngĩcooka ngĩruta watho kũgĩe igongona rĩa gũtheria nyũmba ĩyo
Nehemiah13:10 Ningĩ nĩndamenyire atĩ Alawii matiaheagwo gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩerĩtwo maaheagwo
Nehemiah13:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩrũithia anene acio
Nehemiah13:12 Andũ othe a Juda nĩmarehire gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa ngano
Nehemiah13:13 Na niĩ ngĩtua Shelemia ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
Nehemiah13:14 Ndirikana
Nehemiah13:15 Matukũ-inĩ macio nĩndeyoneire andũ a Juda makĩhiha ndibei mũthenya wa Thabatũ na makĩrehe ngano
Nehemiah13:16 Andũ a Turo arĩa maatũũraga Jerusalemu nĩmarehaga thamaki na indo cia mĩthemba yothe
Nehemiah13:17 Ngĩrũithia andũ arĩa maarĩ igweta a Juda
Nehemiah13:18 Maithe manyu ma tene-rĩ
Nehemiah13:19 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:20 Rĩmwe kana meerĩ
Nehemiah13:21 No ngĩmakaania ngĩmooria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:22 Ningĩ ngĩatha Alawii meetherie macooke mathiĩ makarangĩre ihingo nĩgeetha maige mũthenya wa Thabatũ ũrĩ mũtheru. Ndirikana
Nehemiah13:23 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:24 Nuthu ya ciana ciao ciaaragia rũthiomi rwa Ashidodi kana thiomi cia ndũrĩrĩ icio ingĩ
Nehemiah13:25 Ngĩmarũithia na ngĩmetĩria kĩrumi. Nĩndahũũrire arũme amwe ao na ngĩmamunya njuĩrĩ. Ngĩtũma mehĩte mwĩhĩtwa makĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai
Nehemiah13:26 Githĩ ti ihikanio ta icio ciatũmire Solomoni mũthamaki wa Isiraeli eehie? Ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ nyingĩ gũtiarĩ mũthamaki ũngĩ watariĩ take. Ngai wake nĩamwendete
Nehemiah13:27 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Nehemiah13:28 Mũriũ ũmwe wa Joiada mũrũ wa Eliashibu mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene aarĩ mũthoni-we wa Sanibalati ũrĩa Mũhoroni. Nĩndamũingatire oime harĩ niĩ.
Nehemiah13:29 Maririkane
Nehemiah13:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Nehemiah13:31 Ningĩ nĩndathondekire mweke wa kũhothaga ngũ na maciaro ma mbere mahinda marĩa maatuĩtwo. Wee Ngai wakwa
Esther1:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther1:2 Matukũ-inĩ macio-rĩ
Esther1:3 na mwaka wa gatatũ wa wathani wake
Esther1:4 Nake akĩonania ũtonga mũnene wa ũthamaki wake na ũkengi na riiri wa ũnene wake
Esther1:5 Matukũ macio maathira
Esther1:6 Mũgũnda ũcio warĩ na mĩcuurio ya gatani ya rangi mwerũ na ya rangi wa bururu
Esther1:7 Ndibei yaheanagwo na ikombe cia thahabu
Esther1:8 Kũringana na watho wa mũthamaki
Esther1:9 O nake Vashiti
Esther1:10 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja
Esther1:11 irehe Vashiti
Esther1:12 No rĩrĩa ndungata icio ciakinyirie watho wa mũthamaki
Esther1:13 Na tondũ warĩ mũtugo wa mũthamaki gũtuĩria maũndũ ma watho na ma kĩhooto
Esther1:14 Nao arĩa maakuhĩrĩirie mũthamaki mũno maarĩ Karishena
Esther1:15 Mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
Esther1:16 Memukani agĩcookia arĩ mbere ya mũthamaki na andũ arĩa maarĩ igweta atĩrĩ
Esther1:17 Nĩgũkorwo ũndũ ũyũ wĩkĩtwo nĩ mũtumia wa mũthamaki nĩũkũmenyeka nĩ andũ-a-nja othe
Esther1:18 Ũmũthĩ-rĩ
Esther1:19 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Esther1:20 Rĩrĩa watho ũcio wa mũthamaki ũrĩanĩrĩrwo kũndũ guothe kũrĩa mũthamaki aathanaga-rĩ
Esther1:21 Mũthamaki na andũ ake arĩa maarĩ igweta magĩkenio nĩ mataaro macio
Esther1:22 Agĩtũma marũa kũndũ guothe ũthamaki-inĩ ũcio
Esther2:1 Thuutha ũcio rĩrĩa marakara ma Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu maahoorerire
Esther2:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndungata iria ciatungatagĩra mũthamaki we mwene ikiuga atĩrĩ
Esther2:3 Mũthamaki nĩathuure anene mabũrũri-inĩ mothe marĩa aathanaga marehe airĩtu acio othe ciĩrorerwa nyũmba-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩtũũragwo nĩ andũ-a-nja thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya ũthamaki kũu gĩikaro kĩrĩa kĩirigĩre gĩa Shushani. Nao nĩmamenyagĩrĩrwo nĩ Hegai
Esther2:4 Thuutha ũcio mũirĩtu ũrĩa ũgaakenia mũthamaki nĩagatuĩka mũtumia wa mũthamaki ithenya rĩa Vashiti.” Mataaro macio magĩkenia mũthamaki
Esther2:5 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:6 nake aatahĩtwo kuuma Jerusalemu nĩ Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni
Esther2:7 Moridekai aarĩ na mwarĩ wa ithe mũnini wetagwo Hadasa
Esther2:8 Rĩrĩa watho ũcio wa mũthamaki wanĩrĩirwo-rĩ
Esther2:9 Mũirĩtu ũcio nĩamũkenirie na akĩendeka nĩwe. O hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmũhe indo cia gwĩthakaria nacio o na akĩmũhe irio cia mwanya. Ningĩ akĩmũhe ndungata mũgwanja cia airĩtu
Esther2:10 Esiteri ndoimbũrĩte rũrĩrĩ rwake kana kĩhumo kĩa nyũmba yao
Esther2:11 O mũthenya Moridekai nĩaceerangaga hau nja ya nyũmba ĩyo yatũũragwo nĩ andũ-a-nja
Esther2:12 Mbere ya o mũirĩtu kũgĩa na mweke wa gũthiĩ kũrĩ Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu
Esther2:13 O mũirĩtu aarĩ athiĩ harĩ mũthamaki ta ũũ: Nĩaheagwo kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩothe angĩendire gwĩkuuĩra kuuma nyũmba ĩyo yatũũragwo nĩ andũ-a-nja gĩa gũthiĩ nakĩo nyũmba-inĩ ya mũthamaki.
Esther2:14 Hwaĩ-inĩ aathiiaga agatoonya kuo
Esther2:15 Ihinda rĩa Esiteri rĩakinya (mũirĩtu ũrĩa Moridekai aarerete taarĩ mwarĩ
Esther2:16 Nake Esiteri agĩtwarwo kũrĩ Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu kũu nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki mweri-inĩ wa ikũmi
Esther2:17 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:18 Nake mũthamaki akĩrugithia iruga inene mũno
Esther2:19 Rĩrĩa airĩtu acio gathirange moonganirio ihinda rĩa keerĩ
Esther2:20 No Esiteri ndoimbũrĩte kĩhumo kĩa nyũmba yao kana kĩa rũrĩrĩ rwake
Esther2:21 Ihinda rĩu Moridekai aikaraga kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki
Esther2:22 Nowe Moridekai akĩmenya ũhoro wa ndundu ĩyo na akĩĩra Esiteri
Esther2:23 Na rĩrĩa ũhoro ũcio watuĩririo na ũkĩoneka atĩ warĩ wa ma
Esther3:1 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio
Esther3:2 Anene othe a mũthamaki arĩa maarĩ hau kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki nĩmaturagia maru na makainamĩrĩra
Esther3:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo anene a mũthamaki arĩa maarĩ kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki makĩũria Moridekai atĩrĩ
Esther3:4 O mũthenya nĩmamwaragĩria no akĩrega kũmaigua. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩhe Hamani ũhoro ũcio nĩgeetha mone kana mũtugo ũcio wa Moridekai no ũkirĩrĩrio
Esther3:5 Rĩrĩa Hamani onire atĩ Moridekai ndangĩmũturĩria maru kana amũtĩĩe
Esther3:6 No aarĩkia kũmenya rũrĩrĩ rwa andũ a Moridekai rwarĩ rũrĩkũ
Esther3:7 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ wa Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu

Esther3:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki akĩruta gĩcũhĩ kĩa mũhũũri wake kuuma kĩara-inĩ gĩake
Esther3:11 Mũthamaki akĩĩra Hamani atĩrĩ
Esther3:12 Na rĩrĩ

Esther3:14 Kobi ĩmwe ya marũa macio ma watho ũcio yarĩ ĩtũmwo ĩrĩ watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo mabũrũri-inĩ mothe
Esther3:15 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa watho wa mũthamaki warĩ wa na ihenya
Esther4:1 Rĩrĩa Moridekai aamenyire ũrĩa wothe gwekĩtwo
Esther4:2 Aathiire o nginya kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki
Esther4:3 Thĩinĩ wa mabũrũri mothe kũrĩa marũa na watho wa mũthamaki wakinyaga kwagĩaga na gũcakaya kũnene
Esther4:4 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndungata cia Esiteri cia airĩtu na cia arũme iria ciarĩ hakũre ciokire ikĩmũhe ũhoro ũkoniĩ Moridekai
Esther4:5 Nake Esiteri agĩtũmanĩra Hathaka
Esther4:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Hathaka akiumagara
Esther4:7 Nake Moridekai akĩmwĩra maũndũ marĩa mothe maamũkorete
Esther4:8 Ningĩ akĩmũnengera kobi ya marũa ma watho ũcio wa kũniinwo kwao
Esther4:9 Nake Hathaka agĩcooka
Esther4:10 Nake Esiteri akĩmũtaarĩria ũrĩa ekwĩra Moridekai
Esther4:11 “Anene othe a mũthamaki

Esther4:13 agĩtũmana macookio mamwĩre atĩrĩ

Esther4:15 Nake Esiteri akĩmeera macookerie Moridekai ũhoro
Esther4:16 “Thiĩ ũcookanĩrĩrie Ayahudi othe arĩa maikaraga Shushani
Esther4:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Moridekai agĩthiĩ na agĩĩka ũrĩa wothe Esiteri aamũtaarĩte.
Esther5:1 Mũthenya wa gatatũ wakinya-rĩ

Esther5:3 Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Esther5:4 Esiteri akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Esther5:5 Mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
Esther5:6 Na rĩrĩa maanyuuaga ndibei-rĩ
Esther5:7 Esiteri agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Esther5:8 Kũngĩkorwo nĩnjĩtĩkĩrĩkĩte nĩ mũthamaki
Esther5:9 Mũthenya ũcio Hamani nĩoimire kũu akenete na agacanjamũka ngoro. No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa onire Moridekai hau kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki na akĩona atĩ ndaramũrũgamĩra kana akamwĩtigĩra
Esther5:10 No rĩrĩ

Esther5:12 Hamani agĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
Esther5:13 No maũndũ macio mothe
Esther5:14 Zereshu mũtumia wake marĩ na arata ake othe makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Esther6:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther6:2 Hakĩoneka handĩkĩtwo thĩinĩ warĩo atĩ Moridekai nĩwe woimbũrĩte Bigithana na Tereshu
Esther6:3 Mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
Esther6:4 Mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
Esther6:5 Ndungata ciake ikĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Esther6:6 Rĩrĩa Hamani aaingĩrire
Esther6:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Esther6:8 nĩ wega wathane atĩ nguo ĩrĩa ndaaya ya ũthamaki ĩrĩa wee mũthamaki wanekĩra ĩrehwo
Esther6:9 Ningĩ wĩtĩkĩre nguo ĩyo ndaaya
Esther6:10 Mũthamaki agĩatha Hamani

Esther6:14 Ihinda o ro rĩu maaragia nake

Esther7:2 rĩrĩa maanyuuaga ndibei mũthenya ũcio wa keerĩ
Esther7:3 Nake Esiteri mũtumia wa mũthamaki akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Esther7:4 Nĩ ũndũ niĩ na andũ akwa nĩtwendetio tũniinwo
