Esther7:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcuuria Hamani mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio aathondekithĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa Moridekai. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩthirwo nĩ marakara.
Esther8:1 Mũthenya o ro ũcio
Esther8:2 Mũthamaki akĩruta gĩcũhĩ kĩa mũhũũri wake kĩrĩa aatunyĩte Hamani
Esther8:3 Esiteri agĩthaitha mũthamaki o rĩngĩ
Esther8:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩtambũrũkĩria Esiteri rũthanju rwa thahabu rwa ũthamaki
Esther8:5 Akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Esther8:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Esther8:7 Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu agĩcookeria Esiteri mũtumia wa mũthamaki na Moridekai ũrĩa Mũyahudi atĩrĩ
Esther8:8 Na rĩrĩ
Esther8:9 O rĩmwe aandĩki-marũa a ũthamaki magĩĩtwo
Esther8:10 Moridekai nĩandĩkithirie marũa na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu
Esther8:11 Itua rĩu rĩa mũthamaki rĩgĩtĩkĩria Ayahudi a matũũra mothe marĩa manene kĩhooto gĩa kũngana megitĩre; maniine
Esther8:12 Mũthenya ũrĩa wamũrirwo wa Ayahudi gwĩka ũguo mabũrũri-inĩ mothe ma Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu warĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ mweri wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Esther8:13 Kobi ya marũa macio ma itua rĩu yarĩ ĩheanwo ĩrĩ watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo mabũrũri-inĩ mothe
Esther8:14 Atwari acio a marũa
Esther8:15 Moridekai oimire mbere ya mũthamaki ekĩrĩte nguo cia ũthamaki cia rangi wa bururu na rangi mwerũ
Esther8:16 Kũrĩ Ayahudi rĩu rĩarĩ ihinda rĩa gũkena
Esther8:17 Thĩinĩ wa bũrũri o wothe o na thĩinĩ wa itũũra inene o rĩothe
Esther9:1 Kũrĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ mweri wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Esther9:2 Ayahudi nĩmecookanĩrĩirie matũũra-inĩ mao manene mabũrũri-inĩ mothe ma Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu
Esther9:3 Nao andũ othe arĩa maarĩ igweta a mabũrũri macio
Esther9:4 Moridekai aarĩ mũndũ woĩkaine wega kũu nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki; nayo ngumo yake ĩkĩhunja mabũrũri-inĩ macio mothe
Esther9:5 Ayahudi makĩhũũra thũ ciao ciothe na hiũ cia njora
Esther9:6 Nyũmba-inĩ ya mũthamaki kũu Shushani
Esther9:7 Ningĩ nĩmooragire Parishandatha
Esther9:8 na Poratha
Esther9:9 na Parimashata
Esther9:10 na nĩo ariũ ikũmi a Hamani mũrũ wa Hamedatha
Esther9:11 Mũigana wa andũ arĩa mooragĩirwo nyũmba-inĩ ya mũthamaki kũu Shushani nĩwakinyĩirio mũthamaki mũthenya o ro ũcio.
Esther9:12 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩra Esiteri mũtumia wa mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Esther9:13 Esiteri agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Esther9:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩathana gwĩkwo ũguo. Itua rĩkĩhĩtũkio kũu Shushani
Esther9:15 Ayahudi arĩa maarĩ kũu Shushani magĩcookanĩrĩra hamwe mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari
Esther9:16 O mahinda macio-rĩ
Esther9:17 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire kũrĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ mweri-inĩ wa Adari
Esther9:18 Na rĩrĩ
Esther9:19 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga Ayahudi arĩa maatũũraga tũtũũra-inĩ marũmie mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari
Esther9:20 Moridekai nĩandĩkire maũndũ macio
Esther9:21 nĩguo makũngũyagĩre mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna
Esther9:22 arĩ rĩo ihinda rĩrĩa Ayahudi meeyũkĩrĩirie kũrĩ thũ ciao
Esther9:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ayahudi magĩtĩkĩra gũthiĩ na mbere na gũkũngũĩra ũguo maambĩrĩirie
Esther9:24 Nĩgũkorwo Hamani mũrũ wa Hamedatha
Esther9:25 No rĩrĩa ũndũ ũcio wa hitho wamenyekire nĩ mũthamaki
Esther9:26 (Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mĩthenya ĩyo ĩgĩtwo Purimu kuumana na rĩĩtwa rĩu Puri.) Nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ mothe marĩa maandĩkĩtwo marũa-inĩ macio
Esther9:27 Ayahudi magĩĩtua kũgĩe mũtugo wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo
Esther9:28 Mĩthenya ĩyo ĩtuĩke ya kũririkanagwo na ĩmenyagĩrĩrwo nĩ njiarwa ciothe na nyũmba ciothe
Esther9:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Esiteri
Esther9:30 Nake Moridekai agĩtũmĩra Ayahudi othe arĩa maarĩ mabũrũri-inĩ 127 ma ũthamaki wa Ahasuerusu marũa
Esther9:31 nĩgeetha marũmagie mĩthenya ĩyo ya Purimu mahinda marĩa matuĩtwo
Esther9:32 Itua rĩu rĩa kũrũmĩrĩrwo rĩa Esiteri nĩrĩekĩrire mawatho macio maakoniĩ Purimu hinya
Esther10:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther10:2 Ha ũhoro wa ciĩko ciake cia hinya na ũhoti
Esther10:3 Moridekai ũrĩa Mũyahudi aarĩ wa keerĩ wathani-inĩ kuuma he Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu
Job1:1 Bũrũri-inĩ wa Uzu nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ watũire kuo wetagwo Ayubu. Mũndũ ũcio ndaarĩ ũcuuke ningĩ aarĩ mũndũ mũrũngĩrĩru; nĩetigĩrĩte Ngai na agatheemaga maũndũ marĩa mooru.
Job1:2 Ayubu aarĩ na ariũ mũgwanja na airĩtu atatũ
Job1:3 ningĩ nĩ aarĩ na ngʼondu 7
Job1:4 Ariũ ake nĩmagĩaga na iruga o mũndũ riita rĩake gwake mũciĩ
Job1:5 Na matukũ ma maruga maathira
Job1:6 Na rĩrĩ
Job1:7 Nake Jehova akĩũria Shaitani atĩrĩ
Job1:8 Ningĩ Jehova akĩũria Shaitani atĩrĩ
Job1:9 Shaitani agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job1:10 Githĩ wee ndũmũirigĩire na ũkamũrigiicĩria hamwe na nyũmba yake
Job1:11 No rĩrĩ
Job1:12 Jehova akĩĩra Shaitani atĩrĩ
Job1:13 Na rĩrĩ
Job1:14 mũkinyia-ũhoro agĩkora Ayubu
Job1:15 nao andũ a Sabea macitharĩkĩra na macitaha. Ndungata nacio maciũraga na rũhiũ rwa njora
Job1:16 O akĩaragia-rĩ
Job1:17 O akĩaragia-rĩ
Job1:18 O akĩaragia-rĩ
Job1:19 na rĩrĩ
Job1:20 Nake Ayubu aigua-ũhoro ũcio
Job1:21 akiuga atĩrĩ: “Ndoimire nda ya maitũ ndĩ njaga
Job1:22 Thĩinĩ wa maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ
Job2:1 Ningĩ nĩ kwarĩ mũthenya ũngĩ araika maathiire kũrũgama mbere ya Jehova
Job2:2 Nake Jehova akĩũria Shaitani atĩrĩ
Job2:3 Ningĩ Jehova akĩũria Shaitani atĩrĩ
Job2:4 Nake Shaitani agĩcookeria Jehova
Job2:5 No rĩrĩ
Job2:6 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Shaitani atĩrĩ
Job2:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Shaitani akiuma hau mbere ya Jehova
Job2:8 Nake Ayubu akĩoya gacere ka nyũngũ ethũage nako
Job2:9 Nake mũtumia wake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Job2:10 Nake Ayubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Job2:11 Na rĩrĩ
Job2:12 Rĩrĩa maamuonire marĩ o haraaya-rĩ
Job2:13 Ningĩ magĩcooka magĩikara thĩ hamwe nake matukũ mũgwanja
Job3:1 Thuutha wa matukũ macio
Job3:2 Akiuga atĩrĩ:
Job3:3 “Mũthenya ũrĩa niĩ ndaciarirwo ũroora
Job3:4 Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ
Job3:5 Mũthenya ũcio ũrokĩĩnyiitĩrwo nĩ nduma nene na kĩĩruru gĩa gĩkuũ; ũrohumbĩrwo nĩ itu; nduma ĩrotooria ũtheri waguo.
Job3:6 Ũtukũ ũcio-rĩ
Job3:7 Ũtukũ ũcio ũrothaata; o na gũtikanoigwo ngemi ũtukũ ũcio.
Job3:8 Arĩa marumaga mĩthenya maroruma mũthenya ũcio
Job3:9 Njata ciaguo cia rũciinĩ irotuĩka nduma; ũroeterera ũtheri na wage kũwona
Job3:10 nĩ ũndũ ndũigana kũhinga mĩrango ya nda ya maitũ
Job3:11 “Ndaagire gũkua ngĩciarwo nĩkĩ? Ndaagire gũkua ngiuma nda nĩkĩ?
Job3:12 Ndaamũkĩrirwo maru-inĩ nĩkĩ? Ndaamũkĩrirwo nyondo-inĩ atĩ nĩguo nyongithio nĩkĩ?
Job3:13 Nĩgũkorwo rĩu ingĩkomete ndĩ na thayũ; rĩu ingĩrĩ toro hurũkĩte
Job3:14 hamwe na athamaki na aheani kĩrĩra a gũkũ thĩ arĩa meeyakĩire kũndũ kũrĩa kwanangĩku rĩngĩ
Job3:15 o hamwe na aathani arĩa maarĩ na thahabu
Job3:16 Ningĩ-rĩ
Job3:17 Kũu andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmatigĩte kũnyamarĩka
Job3:18 Kũu-rĩ
Job3:19 Andũ arĩa anini na arĩa anene othe marĩ kuo
Job3:20 “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga andũ arĩa marĩ na mĩnyamaro maheo ũtheri
Job3:21 o acio meriragĩria gĩkuũ na gĩtingĩũka
Job3:22 acio maiyũragwo nĩ gĩkeno magakena maakinya mbĩrĩra?
Job3:23 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga muoyo ũheo mũndũ ũũrĩte njĩra
Job3:24 Nĩ ũndũ handũ ha ndĩe irio
Job3:25 Ũndũ ũrĩa ndeetigagĩra nĩũngorete; ũndũ ũrĩa wamakagia mũno nĩguo ũnginyĩrĩire.
Job3:26 Ndionaga thayũ
Job4:1 Nake Elifazu ũrĩa Mũtemaani agĩcookia
Job4:2 “Mũndũ angĩgeria gũkũgwetera koigo kamwe-rĩ
Job4:3 Ririkana ũrĩa wanataara andũ aingĩ
Job4:4 Ciugo ciaku cianatiirĩrĩra arĩa manahĩngwo makenda kũgũa; nĩwe wanekĩra maru marĩa magondoku hinya.
Job4:5 No rĩu-rĩ
Job4:6 Githĩ wĩtigĩri Ngai waku tiguo wagĩrĩirwo gũtuĩka ũũmĩrĩru waku
Job4:7 “Ta wĩcũũranie atĩrĩ: Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wanathĩĩnĩka atekĩte ũũru? Nĩ kũ andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru marĩ maniinwo?
Job4:8 Niĩ ũrĩa nyonete-rĩ
Job4:9 Manangagwo nĩ mĩhũmũ ya Ngai; makaniinwo nĩ kĩhuhũkanio kĩa marakara make.
Job4:10 Mĩrũũthi no ĩrume na ĩrarame
Job4:11 Mũrũũthi nĩũkuaga nĩ kwaga gĩa kũguĩma
Job4:12 “Nĩ kũrĩ kohoro karanginyĩire na hitho
Job4:13 Ũtukũ ngĩĩcũũrania ũhoro wa cioneki cia kũmakania
Job4:14 ngĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya na kũinaina
Job4:15 O hĩndĩ ĩyo roho ũraahĩtũkĩra o ũthiũ-inĩ wakwa
Job4:16 Roho ũcio ũrarũgama
Job4:17 ‘Mũndũ wa gũkua-rĩ
Job4:18 Angĩkorwo Ngai ndangĩhota kwĩhoka ndungata ciake-rĩ
Job4:19 githĩ to oone mahĩtia maingĩ mũno ma andũ arĩa matũũraga nyũmba cia ndoro
Job4:20 Kuuma rũciinĩ nginya hwaĩ-inĩ moinangagwo tũcunjĩ; magathira tene na tene matekũrũmbũiyo.
Job4:21 Githĩ mĩkanda ya hema yao ndĩmunyũrĩtwo
Job5:1 “Wenda gwĩtana
Job5:2 Rũngʼathio rũũragaga kĩrimũ
Job5:3 Niĩ mwene nĩnyonete kĩrimũ gĩkĩgĩa na mĩri
Job5:4 Ciana ciake nĩiraihanĩrĩirie na ũgitĩri
Job5:5 Ũrĩa mũhũtu arĩĩaga magetha make
Job5:6 Nĩgũkorwo hatĩka ndĩkunũkaga kuuma thĩ
Job5:7 No rĩrĩ
Job5:8 “No rĩrĩ
Job5:9 We ekaga maũndũ ma magegania marĩa mataangĩmenyeka
Job5:10 Nĩwe uuragĩria thĩ mbura; na nĩwe ũrehagĩra bũrũri maaĩ.
Job5:11 Arĩa menyiihagia nĩwe ũmatũũgagĩria
Job5:12 Nĩwe ũthaatagia mĩbango ya arĩa marĩ waara
Job5:13 Nĩanyiitaga arĩa oogĩ waara-inĩ wao
Job5:14 Nduma ĩmakoraga kũrĩ o mũthenya; mũthenya barigici makahambataga taarĩ ũtukũ.
Job5:15 Nĩahonokagia arĩa abatari kuuma kũrĩ rũhiũ rwa njora rũrĩa rũrĩ tũnua-inĩ twao; amahonokagia moko-inĩ ma arĩa marĩ hinya.
Job5:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athĩĩni makagĩa na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Job5:17 “Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũngagwo nĩ Ngai; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũkamene irũithia rĩa Mwene-Hinya-Wothe.
Job5:18 Nĩgũkorwo nĩaguraranagia
Job5:19 Nĩagagũteithũra harĩ mĩtino ĩtandatũ; o na ĩrĩ mũgwanja-rĩ
Job5:20 Hĩndĩ ya ngʼaragu nĩagagũkũũra kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ
Job5:21 Nĩũkagitĩrwo harĩ rũcamiũ rwa rũrĩmĩ
Job5:22 Nĩũgathekerera mwanangĩko na ngʼaragu
Job5:23 Nĩgũkorwo nĩũkagĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro na mahiga ma werũ-inĩ
Job5:24 Nawe ũikarage ũũĩ atĩ hema yaku nĩ ngitĩre; nawe nĩũkooya ithabu rĩa indo ciaku ũkore hatirĩ kĩndũ kĩũrĩte.
Job5:25 Nĩũkamenya atĩ ciana ciaku nĩikaingĩha
Job5:26 Ũgaathiĩ mbĩrĩra-inĩ ũrĩ o na hinya
Job5:27 “Nĩtũtuĩrĩtie ũhoro ũyũ
Job6:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job6:2 “Naarĩ korwo ruo rũrũ ndĩ naruo rwathimwo
Job6:3 Ti-itherũ yakorwo ĩrĩ mĩritũ gũkĩra mũthanga ũrĩa ũrĩ maria-inĩ marĩa manene; na nĩkĩo ndĩrahiũhire kwaria.
Job6:4 Mĩguĩ ya Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩĩndoonyete
Job6:5 Njagĩ ya werũ-inĩ-rĩ
Job6:6 Irio itarĩ mũcamo nĩ irĩĩkaga itekĩrĩtwo cumbĩ? Mũruru wa itumbĩ ũrĩa mwerũ-rĩ
Job6:7 Niĩ ndingĩcihutia; irio ta icio no itũme njire ngoro.
Job6:8 “Naarĩ korwo ndaheo ũndũ ũrĩa ndĩrahooya
Job6:9 naguo nĩ atĩ Ngai eetĩkĩre kũũmemenda
Job6:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ngĩe na ũndũ wa kũũhooreria
Job6:11 “Ndĩ na hinya ũrĩkũ atĩ nĩguo njikare ndĩ na mwĩhoko? Ndĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩrĩkũ atĩ nĩguo ngirĩrĩrie?
Job6:12 Niĩ ndĩ hinya ta ihiga? Mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩ wa gĩcango?
Job6:13 Niĩ ndĩ na hinya wa gwĩteithia
Job6:14 “Mũndũ ũtarĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro aagĩrĩire gũteithio nĩ arata ake
Job6:15 No ariũ a baba maagĩte kwĩhokeka o ta tũrũũĩ tũrĩa tũhũaga
Job6:16 rĩrĩa tũirĩtio nĩ mbarabu ĩgĩtweka
Job6:17 no rĩrĩ
Job6:18 Ikundi cia agendi nĩithaamaga njĩra ciacio
Job6:19 Ikundi cia agendi cia Tema icaragia maaĩ
Job6:20 Magathĩĩnĩka
Job6:21 O na inyuĩ-rĩ
Job6:22 Niĩ-rĩ
Job6:23 honokiai guoko-inĩ gwa thũ
Job6:24 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Job6:25 Kaĩ ciugo cia ma irĩ ruo-ĩ! No rĩrĩ
Job6:26 Anga mũrenda kũruta mahĩtia ũrĩa njugĩte
Job6:27 Inyuĩ o na no mũcuukĩre mwana wa ngoriai mĩtĩ
Job6:28 “No rĩu-rĩ
Job6:29 Mwĩcũraniei nĩguo mũtikogomie kĩhooto; njookererai
Job6:30 Nĩ kũrĩ wĩhia ũrĩ mĩromo-inĩ yakwa? Anga kanua gakwa gatingĩhota gũkũũrana maũndũ ma rũmena?
Job7:1 “Githĩ mũndũ ndakoragwo na ũtungata mũritũ gũkũ thĩ? Githĩ matukũ make matihaana o ta ma mũndũ mwandĩke wĩra?
Job7:2 O ta ngombo ĩkwĩrirĩria ciĩruru cia hwaĩ-inĩ
Job7:3 ũguo nĩguo niĩ ngaĩirwo mĩeri ya tũhũ
Job7:4 Rĩrĩa ndakoma ndĩyũragia atĩrĩ
Job7:5 Mwĩrĩ wakwa ũiyũrĩtwo nĩ igunyũ na ngũcĩ
Job7:6 “Matukũ makwa maraathira na ihenya rĩkĩrĩte rĩa kanyamũ karĩa gakonjithanagia uuthi ngoora ĩgĩtumwo
Job7:7 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Job7:8 Riitho rĩrĩa rĩranyona rĩtigacooka kũnyona rĩngĩ; mũkaanjaria
Job7:9 O ta ũrĩa itu rĩthiiaga rĩkabuĩria
Job7:10 Ndagacooka kũinũka gwake mũciĩ; harĩa aaikaraga ndagacooka kuonwo ho.
Job7:11 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Job7:12 Niĩ-rĩ
Job7:13 Rĩrĩa ngwĩciiria ũrĩrĩ wakwa nĩguo ũkũũhooreria
Job7:14 o na hĩndĩ ĩyo ũũmakagia na irooto
Job7:15 nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngathuura kaba gũitwo
Job7:16 Nĩthũire muoyo wakwa; ndikwenda gũtũũra nginya tene. Tigana na niĩ tondũ matukũ makwa no ma tũhũ.
Job7:17 “Mũndũ-rĩ
Job7:18 atĩ ũmũthuthuuragia ngoro o rũciinĩ
Job7:19 Kaĩ gũtarĩ hĩndĩ ũgaatiga gũikara ũndorete
Job7:20 Angĩkorwo nĩnjĩhĩtie-rĩ
Job7:21 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩragiria ũnjohere mahĩtia makwa na ũndekere mehia makwa? Nĩgũkorwo ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkoma tĩĩri-inĩ; nawe nĩũkanjaria no ndigakorwo ho.”
Job8:1 Nake Bilidadi ũrĩa Mũshuhi agĩcookia
Job8:2 “Nĩ nginya rĩ ũgũikara ũkĩaragia maũndũ ta macio? Ciugo ciaku no ta inegene rĩa rũhuho rũkĩhurutana.
Job8:3 Mũrungu-rĩ
Job8:4 Rĩrĩa ciana ciaku ciamwĩhĩirie-rĩ
Job8:5 No rĩrĩ
Job8:6 ũngĩkorwo ũrĩ mũtheru na mũrũngĩrĩru-rĩ
Job8:7 O na gũtuĩka kĩambĩrĩria gĩaku no kĩoneke kĩrĩ kĩnini
Job8:8 “Ũria ũhoro harĩ njiarwa cia tene
Job8:9 nĩgũkorwo ithuĩ tũraciarirwo o ro ira na tũtirĩ ũndũ tũũĩ
Job8:10 Acio githĩ to makũrute na makũhe ũhoro? Acio githĩ to maarie ũhoro marĩ na ũmenyo?
Job8:11 Irura-rĩ
Job8:12 Rĩngĩkũrĩra handũ hatarĩ maaĩ rĩũmaga narua gũkĩra nyeki
Job8:13 Ũcio nĩguo mũthia wa arĩa othe mariganagĩrwo nĩ Mũrungu; ũguo no ta guo mwĩhoko wa arĩa matooĩ Ngai ũthiraga.
Job8:14 Kĩrĩa ehokete no kĩndũ kĩhũthũ; kĩrĩa egiritanagia nakĩo no ta rũrenda rwa mbũmbũĩ.
Job8:15 Etiiranagia na rũrenda rwake
Job8:16 Ahaana ta mũtĩ ũitĩrĩirio maaĩ wega ũrĩ riũa-inĩ
Job8:17 mĩri yaguo ĩĩthiororokeirie kĩhumbu kĩa mahiga
Job8:18 No rĩrĩa wakũũrwo harĩa ũraarĩ-rĩ
Job8:19 Ti-itherũ muoyo waguo ũmaga ũgathira
Job8:20 “Ti-itherũ Mũrungu ndangĩrega mũndũ ũtarĩ ũcuuke
Job8:21 Na rĩrĩ
Job8:22 Thũ ciaku nĩikahumbwo thoni
Job9:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia
Job9:2 “Ti-itherũ nĩnjũũĩ ũhoro ũcio nĩ wa ma. No rĩrĩ
Job9:3 O na korwo mũndũ enda gũkararania na Ngai-rĩ
Job9:4 Ũũgĩ wake nĩ mũingĩ mũno
Job9:5 Eeheragia irĩma itekũmenya
Job9:6 Athingithagia thĩ ĩkoima handũ hayo
Job9:7 Aathaga riũa rĩkaaga kũratha; nake agiragĩrĩria ũtheri wa njata.
Job9:8 Nĩwe watambũrũkirie igũrũ arĩ o wiki
Job9:9 Nĩwe Mũũmbi wa njata iria ciĩtagwo Nduba
Job9:10 Nĩekaga magegania matangĩmenyeka
Job9:11 Rĩrĩa aahĩtũkĩra harĩa ndĩ
Job9:12 Angĩgutha kĩndũ-rĩ
Job9:13 Ngai ndahingagĩrĩria marakara make; o na arĩa maateithagĩrĩria Rahabu nĩmamũinamagĩrĩra.
Job9:14 “Niĩ-rĩ
Job9:15 O na korwo ndihĩtĩtie-rĩ
Job9:16 O na ingĩamwĩtire nake anjĩtĩke-rĩ
Job9:17 We angĩamemendire na kĩhuhũkanio
Job9:18 Ndarekaga njookererwo nĩ mĩhũmũ
Job9:19 Korwo no ũhoro wa hinya-rĩ
Job9:20 O na korwo ndiahĩtĩtie-rĩ
Job9:21 “O na gũtuĩka ndirĩ na ũcuuke-rĩ
Job9:22 Ũhoro no ũrĩa ũmwe; nĩkĩo ndĩroiga atĩrĩ
Job9:23 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ihũũra rĩarehe gĩkuũ kĩa narua
Job9:24 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa bũrũri wagĩa moko-inĩ ma andũ aaganu
Job9:25 “Matukũ makwa marahanyũka gũkĩra mũkinyia-ũhoro; mombũkaga matarĩ na gĩkeno o na kĩnini.
Job9:26 Mahĩtũkaga na ihenya mũno ta tũtarũ twa irura
Job9:27 Ingiuga atĩrĩ
Job9:28 no ngeetigĩra mĩnyamaro yakwa yothe
Job9:29 Kuona atĩ nĩndĩkĩtie gũtuuo mũhĩtia-rĩ
Job9:30 O na ingĩĩthamba na thabuni
Job9:31 no ũndikirie irima rĩa gĩcoro nĩgeetha o na nguo ciakwa iithũũre.
Job9:32 “We ti mũndũ ta niĩ atĩ nĩguo ndĩmũcookerie
Job9:33 Naarĩ korwo nĩ harĩ mũndũ ũngĩtũiguithania
Job9:34 mũndũ wa kũnjehereria rũthanju rwa Ngai
Job9:35 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩingĩacooka kwaragia itekũmwĩtigĩra
Job10:1 “Nĩthũire gũtũũra muoyo ũyũ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndikũhingĩrĩria mateta makwa
Job10:2 Ngwĩra Ngai atĩrĩ: Tiga kũndua mwĩhia
Job10:3 Kaĩ ũkenagio nĩ kũũhinyĩrĩria
Job10:4 Kaĩ maitho maku marĩ o ta maitho ma andũ? Kaĩ muonere waku ũhaana o ta wa mũndũ?
Job10:5 Kaĩ matukũ maku maigana ta ma andũ
Job10:6 nĩguo ũcarĩrĩrie mahĩtia makwa
Job10:7 o na gũtuĩka wee nĩũũĩ atĩ ndiĩhĩtie
Job10:8 “Moko maku nĩmo maathondekire na makĩnyũmba. Rĩu nĩũgũkĩgarũrũka ũnyanange?
Job10:9 Ririkana atĩ wanyũũmbire ta rĩũmba. Rĩu ũgũcooka ũndue rũkũngũ rĩngĩ?
Job10:10 Githĩ ndwanjitire ta iria
Job10:11 ũkĩĩhumbĩra na nyama na gĩkonde
Job10:12 Nĩwaaheire muoyo o na ũkĩnyonia ũtugi waku; naguo ũmenyereri waku nĩguo ũtũirie roho wakwa.
Job10:13 “No nĩwahithire maũndũ maya ngoro-inĩ yaku
Job10:14 Ingĩehirie wee nĩwanyonaga
Job10:15 Kaĩ akorwo nĩnjĩhĩtie ndĩ na haaro-ĩ! O na ingĩiguĩka ndiĩkĩte ũũru
Job10:16 Ingĩtiira mũtwe wakwa-rĩ
Job10:17 Nĩũndeheire aira angĩ manjũkĩrĩre
Job10:18 “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire ũndute nda ya maitũ? Naarĩ korwo ndakuire itoneetwo nĩ maitho ma mũndũ o na ũmwe.
Job10:19 Naarĩ korwo ndiaciarirwo
Job10:20 Githĩ matukũ makwa o na marĩ manini matikirie gũthira? Tigana na niĩ nĩguo ngĩe na gĩkeno gwa kahinda kanini
Job10:21 kamũira thiĩte kũrĩa mũndũ athiiaga na ndacooke
Job10:22 o bũrũri ũrĩa ũtukũ wakuo ũrĩ mũtumanu mũno
Job11:1 Nake Zofaru ũrĩa Mũnaamathi agĩcookia
Job11:2 “Ciugo icio ciothe-rĩ
Job11:3 Mwĩraho ũcio waku-rĩ
Job11:4 Wee ũreera Ngai atĩrĩ
Job11:5 Naarĩ korwo Ngai no aarie
Job11:6 na akũguũrĩrie hitho cia ũũgĩ
Job11:7 “Wee no ũhote kũmenya maũndũ marĩa mahithe ma Ngai? Kana no ũhote gũtuĩria kũna maũndũ ma Mwene-Hinya-Wothe?
Job11:8 Maũndũ make nĩmatũũgĩru gũkĩra igũrũ
Job11:9 Gĩthimo kĩamo nĩ kĩraihu gũkĩra thĩ na nĩ kĩaramu gũkĩra iria rĩrĩa inene.
Job11:10 “Angĩũka agũikie njeera-rĩ
Job11:11 Ti-itherũ nĩoĩ andũ arĩa maheenanagia; na rĩrĩa oona ũndũ mũũru-rĩ
Job11:12 No rĩrĩ
Job11:13 “No rĩrĩ
Job11:14 ũngĩeheria mehia marĩa marĩ guoko-inĩ gwaku
Job11:15 hĩndĩ ĩyo no ũhote gũtiira ũthiũ waku na igũrũ ũtegũconoka; no ũrũgame wega ũtarĩ na guoya.
Job11:16 Ti-itherũ nĩũkariganĩrwo nĩ mathĩĩna maku
Job11:17 Mũtũũrĩre waku nĩũgacangarara gũkĩra mũthenya barigici
Job11:18 Ũgũtũũra ũrĩ na mwĩhoko tondũ ũrĩ na ũgitĩri
Job11:19 Nĩũgakomaga
Job11:20 No rĩrĩ
Job12:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job12:2 “Hatirĩ nganja inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ andũ
Job12:3 No rĩrĩ
Job12:4 “Nduĩkĩte mũndũ wa gũthekererwo nĩ arata akwa
Job12:5 Andũ arĩa maikaraga megangarĩte manyũrũragia mũtino
Job12:6 Hema cia atunyani nĩcio ciikaraga igaacĩire
Job12:7 “No ta kĩũrie nyamũ
Job12:8 kana warĩrie thĩ
Job12:9 Nĩ irĩkũ cia icio ciothe itooĩ atĩ nĩ guoko kwa Jehova gwĩkĩte ũndũ ũyũ?
Job12:10 Mĩoyo ya ciũmbe ciothe ĩrĩ guoko-inĩ gwake
Job12:11 Githĩ gũtũ gũtithuuranagia ciugo o ta ũrĩa rũrĩmĩ rũcamaga irio?
Job12:12 Githĩ ũũgĩ ndũkoragwo na andũ arĩa akũrũ? Githĩ gũtũũra mũno gũtirehaga ũmenyo?
Job12:13 “Ũũgĩ na hinya nĩ cia Ngai; mataaro na ũmenyo nĩ ciake.
Job12:14 Kĩrĩa amomoraga gĩtingĩakwo rĩngĩ; mũndũ ũrĩa aahingĩra njeera gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩmuohora.
Job12:15 Ahingagĩrĩria maaĩ
Job12:16 Hinya na ũtooria nĩ ciake; mũheenio na mũheenania eerĩ no ake.
Job12:17 Aheani kĩrĩra amatongoragia matarĩ nguo
Job12:18 Nĩohoraga mĩnyororo ĩrĩa athamaki moohaga andũ nayo
Job12:19 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai amatongoragia marutĩtwo nguo
Job12:20 Nĩakiragia mĩromo ya aheani kĩrĩra arĩa meehoketwo
Job12:21 We nĩagagĩra arĩa atĩĩku bata
Job12:22 Nĩaguũragia maũndũ marĩa mariku ma nduma
Job12:23 Anenehagia ndũrĩrĩ
Job12:24 Nĩagaagagia meciiria ma atongoria a gũkũ thĩ; akamaingata
Job12:25 Mahambaataga nduma-inĩ kũrĩa gũtarĩ ũtheri; ningĩ atũmaga matũgũũge ta mũndũ mũrĩĩu.
Job13:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Job13:2 Ũrĩa mũũĩ o na niĩ nĩnjũũĩ; mũtirĩ oogĩ kũngĩra.
Job13:3 No niĩ ndĩrenda kwaria na Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Job13:4 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Job13:5 Naarĩ korwo mwakira ki! Ũndũ ũcio ũngĩtuĩka ũũgĩ harĩ inyuĩ.
Job13:6 Na rĩrĩ
Job13:7 Kaĩ mũngĩaria ũũru mũkĩarĩrĩria Mũrungu? Kaĩ mũngĩaria maheeni igũrũ rĩake?
Job13:8 Kaĩ mũngĩmuonia kĩmenyano? Kaĩ mũgũciirĩrĩra Mũrungu?
Job13:9 Angĩmũtuĩria inyuĩ-rĩ
Job13:10 Ti-itherũ no amũrũithie mũngĩtuĩka a kuonania kĩmenyano na hitho.
Job13:11 Hĩ
Job13:12 Mĩario yanyu ya ũũgĩ nĩ thimo hũthũ o ta mũhu; ihooto cianyu no ta kwĩgitĩra na rĩũmba.
Job13:13 “Kirai ki
Job13:14 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma ndĩtoonyie ũgwati-inĩ na ngaiga muoyo wakwa moko-inĩ makwa?
Job13:15 O na angĩnjũraga-rĩ
Job13:16 Ti-itherũ
Job13:17 Thikĩrĩriai wega ũhoro wakwa; matũ manyu nĩmakĩigue ũrĩa nguuga.
Job13:18 Ti-itherũ nĩhaarĩirie ciira wakwa
Job13:19 Nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũũthitanga? Angĩkorwo nĩ kũrĩ-rĩ
Job13:20 “Wee Ngai
Job13:21 Atĩrĩ
Job13:22 Ningĩ ũnjĩte na nĩngwĩtĩka
Job13:23 Nĩ mahĩtia na mehia maigana niĩ njĩkĩte? Nyonia ihĩtia na rĩĩhia rĩakwa.
Job13:24 Ũraahitha ũthiũ waku nĩkĩ
Job13:25 Nĩũngĩnyamaria ithangũ rĩrahurutwo nĩ rũhuho? Nĩũgũtengʼerania na maragara momũ?
Job13:26 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ wandĩkĩte maũndũ marũrũ ma kũnjũkĩrĩra
Job13:27 Wohaga magũrũ makwa na mĩnyororo; ũrangagĩra njĩra ciakwa ciothe na ũndũ wa gũcora njoro makinya ma magũrũ makwa.
Job13:28 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ amocaga ta kĩndũ kĩbuthĩte
Job14:1 “Mũndũ ũciarĩtwo nĩ mũndũ-wa-nja-rĩ
Job14:2 Akũraga ta ihũa na agacooka akooma; ahĩtũkaga na ihenya ta kĩĩruru
Job14:3 Mũndũ ta ũcio wakĩmũkũũrĩra maitho? Mũndũ ta ũcio wamũrehe mbere yaku aciirithio?
Job14:4 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũruta kĩndũ gĩtheru kuuma harĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ gĩtheru? Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe!
Job14:5 Matukũ ma mũndũ nĩ matare; nĩũtuĩte mũigana wa mĩeri yake
Job14:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tiga kũmũrora
Job14:7 “Mũtĩ-rĩ
Job14:8 O na mĩri yaguo ĩngĩkũrĩra thĩ na gĩthukĩ kĩaguo kĩũmĩre tĩĩri-inĩ
Job14:9 ũngĩkaguucia maaĩ-rĩ
Job14:10 No mũndũ akuuaga agathikwo; aatuĩkana-rĩ
Job14:11 O ta ũrĩa maaĩ mahũũaga kũu iria-inĩ
Job14:12 ũguo noguo mũndũ akomaga na ndacookaga gũũkĩra rĩngĩ; o nginya rĩrĩa igũrũ rĩgaathira-rĩ
Job14:13 “Naarĩ korwo wahitha thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra
Job14:14 Mũndũ akua-rĩ
Job14:15 Wee ũgetana
Job14:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũgatara makinya makwa
Job14:17 Mahĩtia makwa meekĩrĩtwo mondo-inĩ
Job14:18 “No rĩrĩ
Job14:19 na o ta ũrĩa maaĩ mamuthũraga mahiga
Job14:20 Wee ũmũtooragia o rĩmwe rĩa kũigana
Job14:21 Ariũ ake mangĩheo gĩtĩĩo
Job14:22 We no ruo rwa mwĩrĩ wake aiguaga
Job15:1 Nake Elifazu ũrĩa Mũtemaani akĩũria atĩrĩ:
Job15:2 “Mũndũ mũũgĩ no acookie ũhoro na kwĩgereria
Job15:3 No eciirĩrĩre na ciugo cia tũhũ
Job15:4 No wee-rĩ
Job15:5 Mehia maku nĩmo mataaraga kanua gaku; nawe ũthuurĩte kwaria na rũrĩmĩ rwa mũndũ mwara.
Job15:6 Kanua gaku wee mwene nĩko karagũtuĩra ciira
Job15:7 “Wee nĩwe mũndũ wa mbere gũciarwo? Wee-rĩ
Job15:8 Wee nĩũthikagĩrĩria ndundu ya Ngai? Wee wiki-rĩ
Job15:9 Nĩ atĩa ũũĩ ithuĩ tũtooĩ? Nĩ ũmenyo ũrĩkũ ũrĩ naguo ithuĩ tũtarĩ?
Job15:10 Tũrĩ na athuuri marĩ na mbuĩ na arĩa akũrũ mũno
Job15:11 Ndũiganĩtwo nĩ ũhoorerania wa Mũrungu
Job15:12 Ngoro yaku ĩgũteete nĩkĩ
Job15:13 nĩguo werekerie marakara maku kũrĩ Mũrungu
Job15:14 “Mũndũ akĩrĩ kĩ
Job15:15 Angĩkorwo Ngai ndangĩhota kwĩhoka andũ arĩa ake aamũre-rĩ
Job15:16 mũndũ akĩrĩ kĩ atĩ amwĩhoke? Mũndũ nĩ mwaganu na nĩ kĩmaramari
Job15:17 “Wee ta thikĩrĩria na nĩngũgũtaarĩria; reke ngwĩre ũrĩa nyonete
Job15:18 ngwĩre ũrĩa andũ arĩa oogĩ moigĩte
Job15:19 (o acio oiki maaheetwo bũrũri hĩndĩ ĩrĩa gũtaarĩ mũndũ wa kũngĩ watuĩkanagia gatagatĩ-inĩ kao):
Job15:20 Atĩrĩ
Job15:21 Aiguaga o mĩgambo ya kũmakania mũno; hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maũndũ mothe moneka ta marĩ mega-rĩ
Job15:22 Ndarĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩa gwĩthara kuuma nduma-inĩ; etereirio kũũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora.
Job15:23 Orũũraga agĩcaragia irio
Job15:24 Mĩnyamaro na ruo rwa ngoro nĩcio imũmakagia; imũtooragia taarĩ mũthamaki wĩhaarĩirie kũmũtharĩkĩra
Job15:25 nĩ ũndũ ainainagĩria Mũrungu ngundi
Job15:26 akamũguthũkĩra angʼathĩtie
Job15:27 “O na gũtuĩka ũthiũ wake nĩ mũnoru
Job15:28 agaatũũraga matũũra maanangĩku
Job15:29 Ndagacooka gũkorwo arĩ mũtongu
Job15:30 Ndakahota kũũrĩra nduma; rũrĩrĩmbĩ nĩrũkahoohia thuuna ciake
Job15:31 Nĩatige kwĩheenia na ũndũ wa kwĩhoka maũndũ ma tũhũ
Job15:32 Ihinda rĩake rĩtanakinya-rĩ
Job15:33 Agaatuĩka ta mũthabibũ ũhũrũrĩtwo thabibũ ciaguo itarĩ njĩru
Job15:34 Nĩgũkorwo andũ a thiritũ ya arĩa matooĩ Ngai matũũraga marĩ thaata
Job15:35 Magĩaga nda cia mathĩĩna
Job16:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job16:2 “Nĩnjiguĩte maũndũ maingĩ ta macio; inyuothe mũrĩ ahoorerania a kũnyamarania!
Job16:3 Mĩario ĩyo yanyu mĩingĩ ya mũhũhũtĩko-rĩ
Job16:4 O na niĩ no njarie ta inyuĩ
Job16:5 No rĩrĩ
Job16:6 “No o na ndaaria-rĩ
Job16:7 Ti-itherũ
Job16:8 Wee nĩũnjoheete
Job16:9 Ngai nĩandooretie na akandembũranga nĩ ũrĩa arakarĩte
Job16:10 Andũ nĩmathamĩtie tũnua twao maathekerere; mangũthaga rũthĩa makĩĩnyũrũragia
Job16:11 Mũrungu nĩandekereirie kũrĩ andũ arĩa ooru
Job16:12 Niĩ ndaikarĩte wega
Job16:13 aikia a mĩguĩ ake nĩmandigiicĩirie. Aratheeca higo ciakwa atarĩ na tha
Job16:14 Aatharĩkagĩra maita maingĩ maingĩ; anguthũkagĩra ta njamba ya ita.
Job16:15 “Ndumĩire gĩkonde gĩakwa kĩa mwĩrĩ nguo ya ikũnia
Job16:16 Ũthiũ wakwa nĩũtunĩhĩte nĩkũrĩra
Job16:17 no rĩrĩ
Job16:18 “Wee thĩ-rĩ
Job16:19 O na rĩu-rĩ
Job16:20 Mũũthaithanĩrĩri nĩ mũrata wakwa rĩrĩa maitho makwa maraita maithori harĩ Ngai;
Job16:21 nĩathaithanagĩrĩra mũndũ kũrĩ Ngai
Job16:22 “No mĩaka mĩnini ĩgũthira
Job17:1 Roho wakwa nĩmũthuthĩku
Job17:2 Ti-itherũ thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ andũ a kũũnyũrũria; maitho makwa no nginya meerorere rũmena rwao.
Job17:3 “Wee Ngai-rĩ
Job17:4 Wee nĩwaagithĩtie meciiria mao ũmenyo; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũngĩmetĩkĩria mahootane.
Job17:5 Mũndũ angĩkaana arata ake nĩ ũndũ wa kĩheo-rĩ
Job17:6 “Ngai nĩanduĩte mũndũ wa kuunwo thimo nĩ andũ othe
Job17:7 Maitho makwa nĩ maroora nĩ gwĩthikĩra; ciĩga ciakwa ciothe ihũthĩte o ta kĩĩruru.
Job17:8 Andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩmagegetio nĩ ũhoro ũcio; andũ arĩa matarĩ na ũũru mekĩte nĩmarahũkĩte mokĩrĩre andũ arĩa matooĩ Ngai.
Job17:9 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job17:10 “No rĩrĩ
Job17:11 Matukũ makwa nĩ mathiru
Job17:12 Andũ aya magarũraga ũtukũ makaũtua mũthenya; nduma yamakinyĩrĩra moigaga atĩrĩ
Job17:13 Angĩkorwo mũciĩ ũrĩa njĩrĩgĩrĩire no mbĩrĩra
Job17:14 angĩkorwo no njĩĩre ũhoro wa kũbutha atĩrĩ
Job17:15 mwĩhoko wakwa ũkĩrĩ kũ? Nũũ ũngĩnyonera mwĩhoko?
Job17:16 Na rĩrĩ
Job18:1 Ningĩ Bilidadi ũrĩa Mũshuhi agĩcookia
Job18:2 “Ũrĩĩtiga kwaria mĩario ĩno rĩ? Gĩa na ũũgĩ nĩguo o na ithuĩ tũhote kwaria.
Job18:3 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma ũtuone tũhaana ta ngʼombe
Job18:4 Wee ũrehanyũrũra nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ũrakarĩte-rĩ
Job18:5 “Tawa wa mũndũ mwaganu nĩmũhorie; rũrĩrĩmbĩ rwa mwaki wake nĩrũtigĩte gwakana.
Job18:6 Ũtheri ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ wa hema yake ũtuĩkĩte nduma; naguo tawa ũrĩa ũrĩ hakuhĩ nake ũkahora.
Job18:7 Hinya wa mũkinyũkĩrie wake nĩmũhũthie; namo mathugunda make makamũgũithia thĩ.
Job18:8 Makinya make mamũikagia wabu-inĩ
Job18:9 Mũtego ũmũnyiitĩire ndiira-inĩ ya kũgũrũ; mũtego ũgakĩmũrũmia biũ.
Job18:10 Ahithĩirwo kĩana kĩa rũrigi tĩĩri-inĩ
Job18:11 Imakania imuumagĩrĩra na mĩena yothe
Job18:12 Mũtino nĩũmũhũũtĩire; mwanangĩko wetereire agwe.
Job18:13 Mũtino ũrĩĩaga icunjĩ cia gĩkonde gĩake; narĩo irigithathi rĩa gĩkuũ rĩgatambuuranga ciĩga ciake.
Job18:14 Aguucĩtio
Job18:15 Mwaki nĩguo ũtũũraga hema-inĩ yake; ũbiriti ũgwakana nĩũhurunjĩtwo gĩikaro gĩake.
Job18:16 Mĩri yake yũmagĩra tĩĩri-inĩ
Job18:17 Kĩririkano gĩake nĩ gĩgaathira thĩ; ndarĩ rĩĩtwa bũrũri-inĩ.
Job18:18 Akaarutũrũrwo ũtheri-inĩ atwarwo nduma-inĩ na nĩakaingatwo oime thĩ ĩno.
Job18:19 Ndarĩ ciana kana njiaro thĩinĩ wa andũ ao
Job18:20 Andũ a mwena wa ithũĩro nĩmakagegio nĩ maũndũ marĩa mamũkorete; andũ a mwena wa irathĩro manyiitwo nĩ kĩmako.
Job18:21 Ti-itherũ ũguo nĩguo gĩikaro kĩa mũndũ mwaganu gũkahaana; kũndũ kwa mũndũ ũrĩa ũtooĩ Mũrungu-rĩ
Job19:1 Nake Ayubu akĩũria atĩrĩ:
Job19:2 “Mũkũũnyariira nginya-rĩ
Job19:3 Rĩu mũrĩ kũndetia maita ikũmi; mũũtharĩkĩire mũtarĩ na thoni.
Job19:4 Angĩkorwo nĩ ma atĩ nĩhĩtĩtie njĩra
Job19:5 Mũngĩkorwo ti-itherũ nĩmũgwĩtũũgĩria igũrũ rĩakwa
Job19:6 no kĩmenyei atĩ Ngai nĩwe ũũhĩtĩirie
Job19:7 “O na gũtuĩka nĩngayaga ngoiga atĩrĩ
Job19:8 Nĩahingĩire njĩra na niĩ ndingĩhota kũhĩtũka; tũcĩra twakwa nĩatwĩkĩrĩte nduma.
Job19:9 Nĩanjaũrĩte gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa
Job19:10 Andarũrangaga kuuma mbarĩ ciothe nginya ngathira; amunyaga mwĩhoko wakwa o ta mũtĩ.
Job19:11 Marakara make nĩmanjakanĩire; andaraga hamwe na thũ ciake.
Job19:12 Mbũtũ ciake cia ita injerekagĩra na hinya; ciakaga ihumbu cia kũnjũkĩrĩra
Job19:13 “Nĩanyamũranĩtie na ariũ a baba makaahutatĩra; andũ arĩa tũyaine nao nĩmeĩndigithĩtie biũ.
Job19:14 Andũ a mbarĩ ciitũ nĩmathiĩte makandiga; arata akwa nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ niĩ.
Job19:15 Ageni akwa na ndungata ciakwa cia andũ-a-nja matuaga ta matanjũũĩ; maanyonaga ta ndĩ mũndũ uumĩte kũndũ kũngĩ.
Job19:16 Njĩtaga ndungata yakwa
Job19:17 Mĩhũmũ ya kanua gakwa nĩmĩnungu harĩ mũtumia wakwa; nduĩkĩte wa kũmenwo harĩ ariũ a maitũ.
Job19:18 O na tũhĩĩ tũrĩa tũnini nĩtũũnyararĩte
Job19:19 Arata akwa arĩa manguhĩrĩirie othe nĩmathũire; andũ arĩa nyendeete nĩmahutatĩire makaanjũkĩrĩra.
Job19:20 Niĩ thirĩte ngatigara o gĩkonde na mahĩndĩ; niĩ ndigarĩirwo no kĩni kĩa magego giiki.
Job19:21 “Njiguĩrai tha
Job19:22 Mũthingatanaga na niĩ o ta ũrĩa Mũrungu aathingataga nĩkĩ? Mũtirĩ mũraiganwo nĩ nyama ciakwa?
Job19:23 “Naarĩ korwo ciugo ciakwa nĩciandĩkĩtwo
Job19:24 igakarwo na karamu ga kĩgera igũrũ rĩa ngocorai
Job19:25 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ Mũngũũri arĩ muoyo
Job19:26 Nakĩo gĩkonde gĩkĩ gĩakwa kĩarĩkia gũthira
Job19:27 niĩ mwene nĩngamwĩonera na maitho
Job19:28 “Mũngiuga atĩrĩ
Job19:29 inyuĩ ene nĩmwagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩtigĩra rũhiũ rwa njora; nĩgũkorwo mangʼũrĩ nĩmakarehithia kũherithanio na rũhiũ rwa njora
Job20:1 Nake Zofaru ũrĩa Mũnaamathi agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job20:2 “Meciiria makwa nĩ mathĩĩnĩku
Job20:3 Ndĩraigua irũithia rĩa kũnjonorithia
Job20:4 “Ti-itherũ nĩũũĩ ũrĩa gũtũire kuuma tene rĩrĩa mũndũ aigirwo gũkũ thĩ ĩno
Job20:5 atĩ kũrũũhia kwa arĩa aaganu no gwa kahinda
Job20:6 O na gũtuĩka mwĩtĩĩo wake nĩ ũkinyaga o igũrũ
Job20:7 agaathira nginya tene o ta mai make mwene; arĩa manamuona mooragie atĩrĩ
Job20:8 Airagĩria ta kĩroto
Job20:9 Riitho rĩrĩa rĩamuonaga rĩtikamuona rĩngĩ; harĩa aaikaraga hatikamuona rĩngĩ.
Job20:10 Ciana ciake ikaageragia kwĩiguithania na athĩĩni; moko make mwene no nginya magaacookia ũtonga wake kũrĩa aaũrutire.
Job20:11 Hinya wa wĩthĩ ũrĩa ũiyũrĩte mahĩndĩ-inĩ make ũgaakoma hamwe nake rũkũngũ-inĩ.
Job20:12 “O na gũtuĩka ũũru ũrĩ mũrĩo ũrĩ kanua gake
Job20:13 o na gũtuĩka ndangĩhota kũũrekia na aũigaga kanua gake-rĩ
Job20:14 irio ciake nĩikarũra irĩ nda yake; igaatuĩka ũrũrũ wa nduĩra thĩinĩ wake.
Job20:15 Nĩagatahĩka ũtonga ũrĩa ameretie; Mũrungu nĩagatũma aũtahĩke.
Job20:16 Nĩakoonga thumu wa nyoka; magego ma nyoka nĩmo makaamũũraga.
Job20:17 Ndagakenera tũrũũĩ
Job20:18 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa anogeire no nginya agagĩcookia atakĩrĩte; ndagakenera uumithio wa wonjoria wake.
Job20:19 Nĩgũkorwo nĩahinyĩrĩirie athĩĩni
Job20:20 “Ti-itherũ merirĩria make matingĩthira; ndangĩĩhonokia na indo iria eigĩire.
Job20:21 Gũtirĩ kĩndũ atigĩirio gĩa kũrĩa; ũtonga wake ndũgatũũra.
Job20:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aiganĩire nĩ ũndũ wa kũingĩhia indo
Job20:23 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aiyũrĩtie nda yake-rĩ
Job20:24 O na angĩũrĩra indo cia mbaara cia kĩgera
Job20:25 Aũcomoraga kuuma ngʼongʼo wake
Job20:26 nduma nene nĩyetereire igĩĩna ciake. Mwaki ũtarĩ mũhurutĩre nĩũkamũcina
Job20:27 Igũrũ nĩrĩkaguũria wĩhia wake; thĩ nayo nĩĩkarahũka ĩmũũkĩrĩre.
Job20:28 Kĩguũ nĩgĩgathereria nyũmba yake
Job20:29 Ũcio nĩguo ũndũ ũrĩa Ngai agayagĩra arĩa aaganu
Job21:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job21:2 “Thikĩrĩriai wega ciugo ciakwa; rekei ũndũ ũyũ ũtuĩke nĩguo mũkũũhooreria naguo.
Job21:3 Ngirĩrĩriai na niĩ njarie
Job21:4 “Niĩ-rĩ
Job21:5 Ta ndorai mũgege; mwĩnyiite tũnua twanyu na moko nĩ kũmaka.
Job21:6 Ndĩciiragia ũhoro ũyũ ngamaka mũno; ngethithimũkwo nĩ mwĩrĩ
Job21:7 Atĩrĩ
Job21:8 Nĩmeonagĩra ciana ciao ikĩgaacĩra kũu marĩ
Job21:9 Mĩciĩ yao ĩikaraga ĩgitĩirwo na ĩtarĩ na guoya; naruo rũthanju rwa Ngai rũtimahũũraga.
Job21:10 Ndegwa ciao itiagaga kũgwatia; ngʼombe ciao iciaraga
Job21:11 Moimagaragia twana twao tũingĩ o ta rũũru; ciana icio ciao ikaina igĩtũrũhaga.
Job21:12 Nao o ene mainaga makĩhũũraga tũhembe na inanda cia mũgeeto; mekenagia na mũgambo wa mũtũrirũ.
Job21:13 Matũũraga mĩaka yao magaacĩire
Job21:14 Na no-o meeraga Mũrungu atĩrĩ
Job21:15 Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩwe ũ
Job21:16 No rĩrĩ
Job21:17 “Na rĩrĩ
Job21:18 Nĩ maita maigana matuĩkaga ta nyeki nyũmũ ĩkũhurutwo nĩ rũhuho
Job21:19 Kuugagwo atĩrĩ
Job21:20 Maitho make nĩmeyonere mwanangĩko wake mwene; nĩarekwo akunde mangʼũrĩ ma Mwene-Hinya-Wothe.
Job21:21 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Job21:22 “Nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota kũruta Mũrungu atĩ nĩguo agĩe na ũmenyo
Job21:23 Nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ ũkuuaga arĩ na hinya wake wothe
Job21:24 mwĩrĩ wake ũheetwo irio wega
Job21:25 Mũndũ ũngĩ agakua arĩ na marũrũ ma ngoro
Job21:26 Makomaga o ro ũndũ ũmwe tĩĩri-inĩ
Job21:27 “Niĩ nĩnjũũĩ wega ũrĩa mũreciiria
Job21:28 Mũrooria atĩrĩ
Job21:29 Kaĩ mũtarĩ muoria andũ arĩa mathiiaga ngʼendo? Kaĩ mũtarũmbũyagia ũrĩa mamwĩraga:
Job21:30 atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩ aiguagĩrwo tha mũthenya wa mũtino
Job21:31 Nũũ ũreganaga na mĩtugo ya mũndũ mwaganu maitho-inĩ make? Nũũ ũmũrĩhagia kũringana na maũndũ marĩa aaneka?
Job21:32 Atwaragwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Job21:33 Tĩĩri wa gĩtuamba nĩũrĩ mũrĩo harĩ we; andũ othe nĩwe marũmagĩrĩra
Job21:34 “Mwakĩhota atĩa kũũhooreria na ndeto cia tũhũ? Hatirĩ kĩndũ gĩtigaru harĩ macookio manyu tiga o maheeni!”
Job22:1 Nake Elifazu ũrĩa Mũtemaani agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job22:2 “Mũndũ aahota kũguna Mũrungu? O na mũndũ mũũgĩ-rĩ
Job22:3 Nĩ gĩkeno kĩrĩkũ ũthingu waku ũngĩrehere Mwene-Hinya-Wothe? Nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ angĩgĩa naguo angĩkorwo mĩthiĩre yaku ndĩrĩ ũcuuke?
Job22:4 “Arakũrũithia na agagũthitanga nĩ ũndũ wa wĩtigĩri Ngai waku?
Job22:5 Githĩ waganu waku ti mũnene? Mehia maku-rĩ
Job22:6 Wetirie ũgitĩri kuuma kũrĩ ariũ a thoguo hatarĩ gĩtũmi; nĩwaũrire andũ nguo
Job22:7 Arĩa anogu ndwamaheire maaĩ
Job22:8 o na gũtuĩka warĩ mũndũ ũrĩ hinya
Job22:9 Nĩwaingatire atumia a ndigwa matarĩ na kĩndũ
Job22:10 Nĩkĩo ũthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mĩtego
Job22:11 nĩkĩo ũtumanĩirwo nĩ nduma
Job22:12 “Githĩ Ngai ndarĩ o kũu igũrũ o igũrũ? O na ta kĩone ũrĩa njata iria irĩ igũrũ mũno itũũgĩrĩte!
Job22:13 No rĩrĩ
Job22:14 Matu matumanu nĩmamũhumbĩrĩte
Job22:15 Ũgũtũũra ũgeraga o njĩra ya tene ĩrĩa andũ aaganu managerera?
Job22:16 Nĩmahuririo ihinda rĩao rĩtanakinya
Job22:17 Nao meerire Mũrungu atĩrĩ
Job22:18 No rĩrĩ
Job22:19 “Andũ arĩa athingu nĩmeyonagĩra mwanangĩko wa acio aaganu
Job22:20 ‘Ti-itherũ thũ ciitũ nĩnyanange
Job22:21 “Athĩkĩra Ngai ũikare ũrĩ na thayũ nake
Job22:22 Ĩtĩkĩra ũrutani wa kanua gake
Job22:23 Ũngĩcookerera ũcio Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Job22:24 na ũte ngũmba ciaku cia thahabu rũkũngũ-inĩ
Job22:25 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũcio Mwene-Hinya-Wothe agaatuĩka thahabu yaku
Job22:26 Ti-itherũ
Job22:27 Nĩũkamũhooya
Job22:28 Ũrĩa watua wĩkwo nĩguo ũrĩkagwo
Job22:29 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ angĩ manyiihio
Job22:30 Nĩakahonokia o na ũrĩa ũrĩ na ũcuuke
Job23:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job23:2 “O na ũmũthĩ gũteta gwakwa no kũrũrũ; guoko gwake nĩkũnditũhĩire o na ngĩcaayaga ũguo.
Job23:3 Naarĩ korwo nĩnjũũĩ kũrĩa ingĩmuona; Naarĩ korwo no hote gũthiĩ kũrĩa aikaraga!
Job23:4 Ingĩĩyarĩrĩria harĩ we
Job23:5 No nyende kũmenya ũrĩa angĩĩnjookeria
Job23:6 No anjũkĩrĩre na ũhoti wake mũnene? Aca
Job23:7 Hau-rĩ
Job23:8 “No rĩrĩ
Job23:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arĩ wĩra-inĩ mwena wa gathigathini
Job23:10 Nowe-rĩ
Job23:11 Magũrũ makwa moimĩte makinya make thuutha; nũmagĩrĩra njĩra yake itekwahũka na mwena.
Job23:12 Niĩ nditiganĩirie maathani ma mĩromo yake; njĩkĩrĩire ciugo cia kanua gake gũkĩra irio ciakwa cia o mũthenya.
Job23:13 “No rĩrĩ
Job23:14 Ahingagia ũndũ ũrĩa anduĩrĩire
Job23:15 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmĩte nyiitwo nĩ kĩmako ndĩ mbere yake; ndeciiria maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ
Job23:16 Mũrungu nĩatũmĩte ngoro yakwa yũrwo nĩ hinya; ũcio Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩatũmĩte nyiitwo nĩ guoya.
Job23:17 No rĩrĩ
Job24:1 “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩgiragia Mwene-Hinya-Wothe araarĩrie mahinda ma ciira? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga arĩa mamũũĩ meterere mĩthenya ta ĩyo o tũhũ?
Job24:2 Kũrĩ andũ meeheragia mahiga ma mũhaka
Job24:3 Moyaga ndigiri ya mwana wa ngoriai
Job24:4 Nĩ meeheragia andũ arĩa abatari njĩra-inĩ
Job24:5 O ta njagĩ cia werũ
Job24:6 Monganagia ngaragatha mĩgũnda-inĩ
Job24:7 Maraaraga njaga nĩ kwaga nguo; matirĩ kĩndũ gĩa kwĩhumbĩra rĩrĩa kwagĩa heho.
Job24:8 Maconjoragio nĩ mbura ya irĩma-inĩ
Job24:9 Mahuragia mwana wa ngoriai kuuma nyondo-inĩ; nako gakenge ka mũthĩĩni gatahagwo nĩ ũndũ wa thiirĩ.
Job24:10 Mathiiaga njaga nĩ kwaga nguo; makuuaga itĩĩa cia ngano
Job24:11 Mahihagĩra ndamaiyũ mĩtaro-inĩ; nĩo makinyangaga ihihĩro cia ndibei o magĩkuaga nĩ nyoota.
Job24:12 Mũcaayo wa arĩa marakua nĩũraiguuo ũkiuma itũũra inene
Job24:13 “Nĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa mareganaga na ũtheri
Job24:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa gwatuka-rĩ
Job24:15 Riitho rĩa gĩtharia rĩetagĩrĩra kũgĩe mairia; kĩĩraga atĩrĩ
Job24:16 Rĩrĩa kũrĩ nduma-rĩ
Job24:17 Nĩgũkorwo andũ acio othe-rĩ
Job24:18 “No rĩrĩ
Job24:19 O ta ũrĩa riũa na ũrugarĩ iniinaga maaĩ ma tharunji-rĩ
Job24:20 Nayo nda ĩrĩa yamaciarire ĩkariganĩrwo nĩo
Job24:21 Marĩĩaga indo cia mũtumia thaata na ũrĩa ũtarĩ kaana
Job24:22 No Ngai
Job24:23 We no ametĩkĩrie maikare mahurũkĩte makĩĩiguaga ta matarĩ na ũgwati
Job24:24 Nĩgũkorwo matũũgagĩrio o kahinda kanini
Job24:25 “Akorwo ũguo tiguo gũtariĩ-rĩ
Job25:1 Nake Bilidadi ũrĩa Mũshuhi agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job25:2 “Wathani na gwĩtigĩrwo nĩ cia Ngai; nĩwe ũhaandaga watho kũu igũrũ o igũrũ mũno.
Job25:3 Mbũtũ ciake no itarĩke? Nũũ ũtaaragĩrwo nĩ ũtheri wake?
Job25:4 Mũndũ aakĩhota atĩa gũkorwo arĩ mũthingu mbere ya Mũrungu? Mũndũ ũciarĩtwo nĩ mũndũ-wa-nja-rĩ
Job25:5 Angĩkorwo o na mweri ti mũcangararu
Job25:6 mũndũ na no ta kĩgunyũ
Job26:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job26:2 “Kaĩ ũrĩ gũteithia ũrĩa ũtarĩ na ũhoti-ĩ! Kaĩ ũrĩ kũhonokia guoko kũrĩa gũtarĩ na hinya-ĩ!
Job26:3 Kaĩ ũrĩ gũtaara mũndũ ũtarĩ na ũũgĩ-ĩ! Na atĩrĩ
Job26:4 Nũũ wagũteithia kwaria ciugo icio? Na nĩ roho waũ waria na kanua gaku?
Job26:5 “Arĩa akuũ marĩ na ruo rũnene
Job26:6 Gĩkuũ nĩkĩguũranie mbere ya Ngai; mwanangĩko ũikarĩte ũtarĩ mũhumbĩre.
Job26:7 Atambũrũkagia matu ma mwena wa gathigathini igũrũ rĩa kũndũ gũtarĩ kĩndũ; nayo thĩ ndarĩ kĩndũ amĩcunjurĩtie nakĩo.
Job26:8 Athayaga maaĩ thĩinĩ wa matu make
Job26:9 Ahumbagĩra ũthiũ wa mweri rĩrĩa waiganana
Job26:10 Nĩekĩrĩte rũkiriri igũrũ rĩa maaĩ
Job26:11 Itugĩ iria itiirĩrĩire igũrũ nĩ ithingithaga
Job26:12 Nĩoirugire maaĩ ma iria na ũndũ wa hinya wake; na nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wake nĩatinaangirie Rahabu tũcunjĩ.
Job26:13 Mĩhũmũ yake nĩyo yathakaririe igũrũ; guoko gwake nĩ gwatheecire nyoka ĩrĩa ĩnyororokaga na ihenya.
Job26:14 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job27:1 Nake Ayubu agĩthiĩ na mbere na mĩario yake
Job27:2 “Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa Mũrungu atũũraga muoyo
Job27:3 hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe niĩ ngũtũũra muoyo
Job27:4 mĩromo yakwa ndĩkaaria maũndũ ma waganu
Job27:5 Niĩ ndigetĩkĩra atĩ nĩ inyuĩ mũrĩ na kĩhooto; nginya rĩrĩa ngaakua
Job27:6 Nĩngũtũũria ũthingu wakwa na ndikaũrekia; thamiri yakwa ndĩkanjiirithia rĩrĩa rĩothe ngũtũũra muoyo.
Job27:7 “Thũ ciakwa irogĩtuĩka ta arĩa aaganu
Job27:8 Tondũ-rĩ
Job27:9 Mũrungu nĩakĩiguaga gũkaya gwake rĩrĩa akorwo nĩ mĩnyamaro?
Job27:10 Nĩakenagĩra ũcio Mwene-Hinya-Wothe? Nĩakayagĩra Ngai mahinda mothe?
Job27:11 “Nĩngũmũruta ũhoro wĩgiĩ ũhoti wa Mũrungu; ndikũhitha njĩra cia Mwene-Hinya-Wothe.
Job27:12 Inyuothe nĩmwĩoneire maũndũ macio. Ĩkĩrĩ yakĩ mĩario ĩno ĩtarĩ kĩene?
Job27:13 “Ũũ nĩguo Mũrungu aathagĩrĩria arĩa aaganu
Job27:14 O na ciana ciake ciaingĩha atĩa
Job27:15 Mũthiro nĩguo ũkaaninũkia arĩa agaatiga thuutha wake
Job27:16 O na angĩonganĩrĩria betha ta rũkũngũ
Job27:17 kĩrĩa egũcookanĩrĩria gĩkehumbwo nĩ ũrĩa mũthingu
Job27:18 Nyũmba ĩrĩa aakaga no ta nyũmba ya kĩĩhuruta
Job27:19 Agaakoma arĩ mũtongu
Job27:20 Imakania imũkoragĩrĩra ta mũiyũro wa maaĩ; kĩhuhũkanio gĩkaamũhuria ũtukũ.
Job27:21 Rũhuho rwa mwena wa Irathĩro rũmuoyaga akabuĩria; rũmweheragia kũrĩa atũũraga.
Job27:22 Rũmũhurutaga rũtarĩ na tha o rĩrĩa aroorĩra hinya waruo.
Job27:23 Rũhũũraga hĩ rũkamũkenerera
Job28:1 “Nĩ kũrĩ handũ harĩa betha yenjagwo o na nĩ harĩ handũ harĩa thahabu ĩtheragĩrio.
Job28:2 Kĩgera kĩrutagwo kuuma tĩĩri-inĩ
Job28:3 Mũndũ nĩkũniina aniinaga nduma; acaragia mahiga macio nginya kũrĩa kũriku mũno
Job28:4 Mũndũ atũrĩkagia irima thĩ kũraya na kũrĩa andũ matũũraga
Job28:5 Thĩ nĩkuo kuumaga irio
Job28:6 mahiga-inĩ ma thĩ nĩkuo kuumaga yakuti ĩrĩa ya bururu
Job28:7 Gũtirĩ nyoni ndĩa-nyama yũĩ gacĩra kau kahithe
Job28:8 Nyamũ iria ciĩtĩĩaga itirĩ ciagathiĩra
Job28:9 Guoko kwa mũndũ gũtharĩkagĩra gũkanyiita ihiga rĩa nyaigĩ
Job28:10 Enjaga mungu ũgatũrĩkia rwaro rwa ihiga; maitho make makĩonaga igĩĩna ciaruo ciothe.
Job28:11 Ethaga itwe cia njũũĩ
Job28:12 “No ũũgĩ-rĩ
Job28:13 Mũndũ ndangĩmenya thogora wa ũũgĩ; ndũngĩoneka bũrũri wa arĩa marĩ muoyo.
Job28:14 Kũrĩa kũriku mũno kuugaga atĩrĩ
Job28:15 Ndũngĩgũrĩka na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Job28:16 Ndũngĩgũrĩka na thahabu ya Ofiri
Job28:17 Thahabu kana icicio-rĩ
Job28:18 Maricani kana ngenyekenyi iria cia goro itiagĩrĩire kũgwetanio naguo; thogora wa ũũgĩ ũkĩrĩte wa ruru ĩrĩa ndune.
Job28:19 Yakuti ya Kushi ndĩngĩigananio naguo; o na ndũngĩgũrĩka na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno.
Job28:20 “Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job28:21 Nĩmũhithe kũrĩ maitho ma ciũmbe ciothe iria itũũraga muoyo
Job28:22 Mwanangĩko na gĩkuũ ciugaga atĩrĩ
Job28:23 Ngai nĩooĩ njĩra ya gũthiĩ kũrĩa ũrĩ
Job28:24 nĩgũkorwo nĩonaga mũthia wa thĩ
Job28:25 Rĩrĩa aathimĩire rũhuho nditi yaruo
Job28:26 rĩrĩa aarutĩire mbura watho ĩrũmagĩrĩre
Job28:27 nake nĩonire ũũgĩ na akĩũthima; aũrũmirie na akĩũthuthuuria.
Job28:28 Agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Job29:1 Ningĩ Ayubu nĩathiire na mbere kwaria
Job29:2 “Naarĩ korwo no haane ũrĩa ndaatariĩ mĩeri ĩrĩa ya tene
Job29:3 rĩrĩa tawa wake wamũrĩkaga igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wakwa
Job29:4 Korwo ndariĩ ũrĩa ndatariĩ matukũ-inĩ marĩa ndagaacĩire biũ
Job29:5 rĩrĩa Mwene-Hinya-Wothe aarĩ hamwe na niĩ
Job29:6 rĩrĩa gacĩra gakwa kaihũgĩtio nĩ kĩrimũ kĩa iria
Job29:7 “Rĩrĩa ndaathiiaga kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa itũũra inene
Job29:8 aanake maanyonaga makeehera
Job29:9 andũ arĩa anene maatigaga kwaria
Job29:10 mĩgambo ya andũ arĩa marĩ igweta ĩgakirio
Job29:11 Ũrĩa wothe wanjiguaga ngĩaria aaragia wega igũrũ rĩakwa
Job29:12 nĩ ũndũ nĩndahatũraga arĩa athĩĩni maakaya mateithio
Job29:13 Mũndũ agĩkua nĩandaathimaga; nĩndatũmaga ngoro ya mũtumia wa ndigwa ĩine.
Job29:14 Ndehumbaga ũthingu ta nguo; ciira wa kĩhooto nĩguo warĩ nguo yakwa ya igũrũ
Job29:15 Nĩ niĩ ndaarĩ maitho ma arĩa atumumu
Job29:16 Ndaarĩ ithe wa arĩa abatari; nĩndaciiragĩrĩra o na mũndũ itooĩ.
Job29:17 Ningĩ nĩndoinangaga magego ma arĩa aaganu
Job29:18 “Ndeciiragia atĩrĩ
Job29:19 Mĩri yakwa ĩgataamba ĩkinye maaĩ-inĩ
Job29:20 Riiri wakwa ũgũtũũra werũhagio thĩinĩ wakwa
Job29:21 “Andũ maathikagĩrĩria marĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Job29:22 Ndaarĩkia kwaria-rĩ
Job29:23 Maanjetagĩrĩra ta andũ metereire mbura
Job29:24 Ndaamathekathekagia moorĩtwo nĩ hinya makaaga gwĩtĩkia; ũtheri wa ũthiũ wakwa warĩ wa bata mũno kũrĩ o.
Job29:25 Nĩ niĩ ndamoonagia njĩra
Job30:1 “No rĩu-rĩ
Job30:2 Hinya wa moko mao ũngĩangʼunire nakĩ
Job30:3 Nĩmathĩnĩkĩte nĩ ũndũ wa wagi na ngʼaragu
Job30:4 Maahaaraga nyeni cia mahuti ma cumbĩ kuuma ihinga-inĩ
Job30:5 Nĩmaingatirwo kuuma kũrĩ mũingĩ
Job30:6 Nĩmahatĩrĩirio maikarage mĩkuru-inĩ ya tũrũũĩ tũhũu
Job30:7 Maanagia ta nyamũ kũu ihinga-inĩ
Job30:8 Rũciaro rũtarĩ kĩene na rũtarĩ rĩĩtwa
Job30:9 “Na rĩu ariũ ao maraanyũrũria na rwĩmbo; ngagĩtuĩka wa kuunagwo thimo nĩo.
Job30:10 Nĩmathũire na magaikaraga haraihu na niĩ; matiĩtigagĩra kũnduĩra mata ũthiũ.
Job30:11 Nĩ ũndũ rĩu Ngai nĩaregeretie ũta wakwa
Job30:12 Mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo kũrĩ rũrĩrĩ rũratharĩkĩra; maigagĩra magũrũ makwa mĩtego
Job30:13 Maharaganagia njĩra yakwa; mahotaga kũnyũnũha o na gũtarĩ na mũndũ ũramateithia.
Job30:14 Mokĩte ta matoonyeire mwanya-inĩ mwariĩ; mokĩire gatagatĩ ga kũu kwanangĩku
Job30:15 Imakania nĩcihootete; gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa kĩũmbũrĩtwo ta kĩhurutĩtwo nĩ rũhuho
Job30:16 “Na rĩu muoyo wakwa nĩũrathirĩrĩkĩra; matukũ ma thĩĩna nĩmanyiitĩte.
Job30:17 Ũtukũ ũtheecangaga mahĩndĩ makwa; ruo rwa gũthegenya rũtindigithagĩria.
Job30:18 Ngai angũnjakũnjaga ta nguo na ũndũ wa ũhoti wake mũnene; aanyiitaga ta kanjũ yakwa ngingo-inĩ.
Job30:19 Anjikĩtie ndoro-inĩ
Job30:20 “Nĩwe ndĩrakaĩra
Job30:21 Wee nĩũngarũrũkĩte ũtarĩ na tha; ũtharĩkĩire na hinya wa guoko gwaku.
Job30:22 Nĩũũhurĩtie
Job30:23 Nĩnjũũĩ nĩũkanginyia o gĩkuũ-inĩ
Job30:24 “Ti-itherũ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũkagĩrĩra mũndũ ũthuthĩkĩte ngoro
Job30:25 Niĩ-rĩ
Job30:26 No rĩrĩ
Job30:27 Nda yakwa ndĩtigaga kũruruma; matukũ ma thĩĩna nĩmanginyĩire.
Job30:28 Thiiaga njirĩte biũ
Job30:29 Nduĩkĩte mũrũ wa nyina na mbwe
Job30:30 Gĩkonde gĩakwa nĩkĩgarũrũkĩte
Job30:31 Kĩnanda gĩakwa kĩa mũgeeto kĩrutaga o mũgambo wa gũcakaya
Job31:1 “Niĩ nĩtwarĩĩkanĩire na maitho makwa ndikanarore mũirĩtu ndĩmwĩrirĩrie.
Job31:2 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Job31:3 Githĩ ti kwanangwo kwa arĩa aaganu
Job31:4 Githĩ we ndonaga njĩra ciakwa
Job31:5 “Ingĩkorwo thiiaga na njĩra itarĩ cia ma-rĩ
Job31:6 Ngai nĩathime na ratiri cia kĩhooto
Job31:7 makinya makwa mangĩkorwo nĩmahũkĩte makoima njĩra-inĩ
Job31:8 hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩrĩa haandĩte kĩrorĩĩo nĩ andũ angĩ
Job31:9 “Ngoro yakwa ĩngĩkorwo yanaheenererio nĩ mũndũ-wa-nja
Job31:10 hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia wakwa arothĩa ngano ya mũndũ ũngĩ
Job31:11 Nĩgũkorwo ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũmaramari wa thoni
Job31:12 Tondũ ũcio nĩ mwaki ũrĩa ũcinaga nginya ũkaananga; na nĩũngĩamunyĩte magetha makwa mothe.
Job31:13 “Ingĩkorwo nĩnyimĩte ndungata ciakwa cia arũme na cia andũ-a-nja kĩhooto rĩrĩa manateta nĩ ũndũ wakwa-rĩ
Job31:14 niĩ ngeeka atĩa rĩrĩa Mũrungu akaanjũkĩrĩra? Ngaacookia atĩa rĩrĩa ngeetwo ndĩĩtetere ũhoro-inĩ ũcio?
Job31:15 Githĩ ũcio wanyũũmbire kũu nda ya maitũ to we wamoombire? Githĩ tiwe watũthondekire tũrĩ kũu nda cia aa maitũ?
Job31:16 “Ingĩkorwo ndanaima athĩĩni kĩrĩa maanerirĩria
Job31:17 ingĩkorwo ndĩĩaga irio ciakwa nyiki
Job31:18 (no niĩ kuuma ũnini wakwa
Job31:19 ingĩkorwo ndanoona mũndũ agĩkua nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga nguo
Job31:20 na ngoro yake ndĩandathimire nĩ ũndũ wa kũmũiguithia ũrugarĩ na guoya wa ngʼondu ciakwa-rĩ
Job31:21 ingĩkorwo ndanoya guoko gwakwa ngookĩrĩra mwana ũtarĩ ithe
Job31:22 hĩndĩ ĩyo guoko gwakwa kũroahũkĩra kĩande-inĩ kũgwe
Job31:23 Nĩ ũndũ nĩndetigagĩra mwanangĩko uumĩte kũrĩ Mũrungu
Job31:24 “Ingĩkorwo nĩnjigĩte mwĩhoko wakwa harĩ thahabu
Job31:25 ingĩkorwo ndanakenera ũtonga wakwa mũnene
Job31:26 ingĩkorwo ndanarũmbũiya riũa rĩarĩte
Job31:27 na ngoro yakwa ĩkĩheenererio nĩcio na hitho
Job31:28 o na macio mangĩtuĩka mehia ma gũtuĩrwo ciira
Job31:29 “Ingĩkorwo ndaanakena nĩ thũ yakwa kuona mũtino
Job31:30 no niĩ ndirĩ ndetĩkĩra kanua gakwa keehie na ũndũ wa kũhoera muoyo wayo kĩrumi
Job31:31 kũngĩkorwo andũ a nyũmba yakwa matirĩ moiga atĩrĩ
Job31:32 no gũtirĩ mũgeni wanaraara njĩra-inĩ
Job31:33 ingĩkorwo ndaanahitha mehia makwa
Job31:34 tondũ wa gwĩtigĩra kĩrĩndĩ
Job31:35 (“Naarĩ korwo ndaarĩ na mũndũ wa kũnjigua! Rĩu nĩndekĩra rũũri rwa kwĩyarĩrĩria: reke Mwene-Hinya-Wothe anjookerie ũhoro; reke mũũthitangi andĩke marũa ma thitango yake.
Job31:36 Ti-itherũ marũa macio ingĩmaigĩrĩra kĩande
Job31:37 Njooke ndĩmũhe ũhoro wakwa ikinya gwa ikinya; ndĩmũkuhĩrĩrie ta ndĩ mũnene.)
Job31:38 “Korwo mũgũnda wakwa wakaya
Job31:39 ingĩkorwo ndanarĩa maciaro maguo iteekũrĩha
Job31:40 hĩndĩ ĩyo congʼe ũrokũra kuo handũ ha ngano
Job32:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio atatũ nĩmatigire gũcookeria Ayubu
Job32:2 No rĩrĩ
Job32:3 Ningĩ nĩarakarĩtio nĩ arata acio atatũ tondũ nĩmagĩte ũndũ mangĩcookeria Ayubu
Job32:4 Na rĩrĩ
Job32:5 No rĩrĩa onire atĩ andũ acio atatũ matiarĩ na ũndũ ũngĩ wa kuuga-rĩ
Job32:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Elihu
Job32:7 Ndeciiragia atĩrĩ
Job32:8 No nĩ roho ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ wa mũndũ
Job32:9 To arĩa akũrũ oiki oogĩ
Job32:10 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nguuga atĩrĩ
Job32:11 Nĩngwetereire rĩrĩa mũkwaragia
Job32:12 nĩngũmũtegeire matũ biũ. No gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu wonanirie mahĩtia ma Ayubu; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu ũmũcookeirie mĩario yake.
Job32:13 Tigai kuuga atĩrĩ
Job32:14 No rĩrĩ
Job32:15 “Nĩmamakĩte
Job32:16 no nginya njeterere
Job32:17 O na niĩ nĩngwaria; o na niĩ nĩnguuga ũrĩa njũũĩ.
Job32:18 Nĩgũkorwo njiyũrĩtwo nĩ ciugo
Job32:19 thĩinĩ wakwa haana ta ndibei ĩrĩ cuba ngunĩke
Job32:20 no nginya njarie hũũcũke
Job32:21 Ndigũtĩĩra mũndũ o na ũ maũthĩ
Job32:22 nĩ ũndũ korwo ndĩ mwara na kũgaathĩrĩria
Job33:1 “No rĩu Ayubu-rĩ
Job33:2 Ndĩ hakuhĩ gũtumũra kanua gakwa; ciugo ciakwa irĩ o rũrĩmĩ-inĩ rwakwa.
Job33:3 Ciugo ciakwa ciumĩte ngoro nũngĩrĩru; mĩromo yakwa yaragia ĩtarĩ na ũhinga.
Job33:4 Roho wa Mũrungu nĩwe ũnyũmbĩte; mĩhũmũ ya Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩyo ĩĩheaga muoyo.
Job33:5 Nawe njookeria
Job33:6 Niĩ haana o tawe maitho-inĩ ma Mũrungu; o na niĩ ndombirwo na rĩũmba.
Job33:7 Kwĩĩndigĩra gũtigakũmakie
Job33:8 “No rĩrĩ
Job33:9 ‘Ndĩ mũtheru na ndirĩ na mehia; ndiĩkĩte ũũru
Job33:10 No Ngai nĩanyonete na mahĩtia; anduĩte thũ yake.
Job33:11 Nĩanjohaga magũrũ na mĩnyororo; arangagĩra njĩra ciakwa ciothe.’
Job33:12 “No ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ
Job33:13 Ũramũtetia nĩkĩ
Job33:14 Nĩgũkorwo Mũrungu nĩaaragia
Job33:15 Rĩmwe akaaragia kĩroto-inĩ na kĩoneki-inĩ gĩa ũtukũ
Job33:16 no amaarĩrie matũ-inĩ mao
Job33:17 nĩguo agarũre mũndũ atige kũhĩtia
Job33:18 nĩguo agitĩre roho wake kuuma gĩkuũ-inĩ
Job33:19 Ningĩ mũndũ no arũithio na gũkomio ũrĩrĩ wa ruo
Job33:20 o nginya ngoro yake ĩgathũũra irio
Job33:21 Nyama cia mwĩrĩ wake ihĩnjaga igathirĩrĩkĩra
Job33:22 Roho wake ũgakuhĩrĩria mbĩrĩra
Job33:23 “No rĩrĩ
Job33:24 nake amũkinyĩrie wega wake na oige atĩrĩ
Job33:25 hĩndĩ ĩyo nyama cia mwĩrĩ wake igeethĩha ta cia mwana; igaacooka ta ũrĩa ciarĩ matukũ-inĩ ma wĩthĩ wake.
Job33:26 Ahooyaga Ngai ageekwo wega nĩwe
Job33:27 Nake agacooka agathiĩ kũrĩ andũ akameera atĩrĩ
Job33:28 Nĩakũũrire roho wakwa ndũkaharũrũkio mbĩrĩra
Job33:29 “Mũrungu nĩekaga mũndũ maũndũ macio mothe
Job33:30 nĩguo agarũre roho wake ndũkaharũrũkio mbĩrĩra
Job33:31 “Atĩrĩrĩ Ayubu
Job33:32 Wakorwo ũrĩ na ũndũ wa kuuga-rĩ
Job33:33 No akorwo ti ũguo-rĩ
Job34:1 Ningĩ Elihu akiuga atĩrĩ:
Job34:2 “Iguai ciugo ciakwa
Job34:3 Nĩgũkorwo gũtũ gũthuuranagia ciugo o ta ũrĩa rũrĩmĩ rũcamaga irio.
Job34:4 Nĩtwĩkũũranĩrei ithuĩ ene ũndũ ũrĩa wagĩrĩire; nĩtwĩrute tũrĩ hamwe ũndũ ũrĩa mwega.
Job34:5 “Ayubu aroiga atĩrĩ
Job34:6 O na gũtuĩka ndĩraria ũrĩa kũrĩ
Job34:7 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ ũhaana ta Ayubu
Job34:8 Atwaranaga na andũ arĩa mekaga ũũru; agĩĩaga thiritũ na andũ arĩa aaganu.
Job34:9 Nĩgũkorwo oigaga atĩrĩ
Job34:10 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gĩĩthikĩrĩriei
Job34:11 Arĩhaga mũndũ kũringana na ũrĩa ekĩte; akamũrehere o kĩrĩa kĩringaine na mĩthiĩre yake.
Job34:12 Gũtingĩhoteka atĩ Mũrungu no eeke mahĩtia
Job34:13 Nũũ wamũtuire mũrori wa thĩ? Nũũ wamũtuire mũrũgamĩrĩri wa thĩ yothe?
Job34:14 Korwo aagĩa na muoroto wa kweheria roho wake na mĩhũmũ-rĩ
Job34:15 andũ othe mangĩthiranĩra hamwe
Job34:16 “Akorwo ũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ na ũtaũku-rĩ
Job34:17 Mũndũ ũthũire kĩhooto-rĩ
Job34:18 Githĩ ti we wĩraga athamaki atĩrĩ
Job34:19 o ũcio ũtatĩagĩra anene maũthĩ
Job34:20 Makuuaga o rĩmwe
Job34:21 “Maitho make maikaraga macũthĩrĩirie mĩthiĩre ya andũ; nĩonaga mĩthiĩre yao yothe.
Job34:22 Gũtirĩ handũ harĩ nduma
Job34:23 Mũrungu ndabatairio nĩgũthuthuuria ndeto cia andũ makĩria
Job34:24 Ahehenjaga arĩa marĩ ũhoti atekũũria mũndũ na akarũgamia andũ angĩ ithenya rĩao.
Job34:25 Tondũ we nĩamenyaga maũndũ marĩa meekaga
Job34:26 Amaherithagĩria waganu wao makĩonagwo nĩ mũndũ o wothe
Job34:27 tondũ nĩmagarũrũkire magĩtiga kũmũrũmĩrĩra
Job34:28 Nĩmatũmire kĩrĩro kĩa arĩa athĩĩni gĩkinye hau mbere yake
Job34:29 No rĩrĩ
Job34:30 nĩguo agirie mũndũ ũtarĩ na ũngai gwathana
Job34:31 “Korwo mũndũ no ere Mũrungu atĩrĩ
Job34:32 Nduta menye ũrĩa itarahota kuona; ingĩkorwo nĩnjĩkĩte ũũru-rĩ
Job34:33 Ngai-rĩ
Job34:34 “Andũ arĩa marĩ na ũtaũku maroiga atĩrĩ
Job34:35 ‘Ayubu aaragia atarĩ na ũmenyo; ciugo ciake nĩciagĩte ũũgĩ.’
Job34:36 Hĩ
Job34:37 Nĩongereire ũremi harĩ mehia make; atũhũũragĩra hĩ cia kĩnyũrũri
Job35:1 Ningĩ Elihu akiuga atĩrĩ:
Job35:2 “Nĩũgwĩciiria ũhoro ũyũ nĩ wa kĩhooto? Ũroiga atĩrĩ
Job35:3 No rĩrĩ
Job35:4 “No nyende gũgũcookeria ũhoro
Job35:5 Ta rora igũrũ wone; ta cũthĩrĩria matu macio marĩ igũrũ rĩaku kũraya mũno.
Job35:6 Ũngĩĩhia-rĩ
Job35:7 Ũngĩkorwo ũrĩ mũthingu-rĩ
Job35:8 Waganu waku ũhutagia o mũndũ tawe
Job35:9 “Andũ makayaga nĩ icooki rĩa kũhinyĩrĩrio; mathaithanaga mateithũrwo guoko-inĩ kwa ũcio ũrĩ hinya mũingĩ.
Job35:10 No gũtirĩ mũndũ uugaga atĩrĩ
Job35:11 ũrĩa ũtũrutaga maũndũ gũkĩra ũrĩa arutaga nyamũ cia werũ-inĩ
Job35:12 Ndacookagia rĩrĩa andũ maakaya nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩtũũgĩrio wa andũ arĩa aaganu.
Job35:13 Ti-itherũ
Job35:14 Githĩ ndakaaga gũthikĩrĩria mũno makĩria rĩrĩa ũkuuga atĩ ndũramuona
Job35:15 na makĩria ma ũguo ũkoiga atĩ marakara make matiherithanagia na ndarũmbũyagia waganu o na hanini!
Job35:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ayubu atumũrĩte kanua gake akaaria ũhoro wa tũhũ; nĩarĩĩtie ndeto nyingĩ atarĩ na ũmenyo.”
Job36:1 Elihu agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria
Job36:2 “Ngirĩrĩria hanini
Job36:3 Ũmenyo wakwa ndĩũrutĩte kũraihu; niĩ ngũtũũgĩria kĩhooto kĩa ũcio Mũnyũũmbi.
Job36:4 Menya wega atĩ ndeto ciakwa ti cia maheeni; ũyũ mũrĩ nake arĩ na ũmenyo mũkinyanĩru.
Job36:5 “Mũrungu nĩwe mwene hinya
Job36:6 Ndatũũragia arĩa aaganu muoyo
Job36:7 Ndeheragia maitho make harĩ arĩa athingu; amaikaragĩria gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene hamwe na athamaki
Job36:8 No rĩrĩ
Job36:9 we nĩameeraga ũrĩa mekĩte
Job36:10 We nĩatũmaga mathikĩrĩrie ũtaaro
Job36:11 Mangĩmwathĩkĩra na mamũtungatĩre
Job36:12 No mangĩaga kũigua
Job36:13 “Arĩa matarĩ na Ngai ngoro-inĩ meiigagĩra marakara; o na rĩrĩa aramooha na mĩnyororo
Job36:14 Makuuaga marĩ ethĩ
Job36:15 No arĩa mathĩĩnĩkaga
Job36:16 “We-rĩ
Job36:17 No rĩu-rĩ
Job36:18 Wĩmenyerere mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakanakũheenererie na ũtonga; ndũgetĩkĩrie ihaki inene rĩkũhĩtithie njĩra.
Job36:19 Ũtonga waku o na kana kĩyo gĩaku kĩnene-rĩ
Job36:20 Tiga kwĩrirĩria ũtukũ
Job36:21 Wĩmenyerere ndũkeerekere ũũru-inĩ
Job36:22 “Mũrungu nĩatũgĩrĩtio nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoti wake. Nũũ mũrutani take?
Job36:23 Nũũ ũmwathĩrĩire njĩra ciake
Job36:24 Ririkanaga gwĩkĩrĩra wĩra wake
Job36:25 Andũ othe nĩmawonete; andũ mawĩroragĩra marĩ o kũraya.
Job36:26 Ĩ Mũrungu ndakĩrĩ mũnene; nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ũmenyi witũ! Mũigana wa mĩaka yake ndũngĩtuĩrĩka.
Job36:27 “Ambatagia matata ma maaĩ
Job36:28 matu magaita ũigũ wamo
Job36:29 Nũũ ũngĩmenya ũrĩa atambũrũkagia matu
Job36:30 Kĩone ũrĩa ahurunjaga rũheni rwake rũkamũthiũrũrũkĩria
Job36:31 Ũũ nĩguo aathaga ndũrĩrĩ na akaheana irio nyingĩ.
Job36:32 Akumbatagĩria rũheni na moko make
Job36:33 Marurumĩ make nĩmanagĩrĩra kĩhuhũkanio kĩrĩa kĩroka; o na ngʼombe nĩimenyithanagia atĩ kũrĩ kĩhuhũkanio kĩroka.
Job37:1 “Ndaigua ũguo ngoro yakwa ĩgatumatuuma
Job37:2 Thikĩrĩria! Thikĩrĩria mũraramo wa mũgambo wake
Job37:3 Arekagĩrĩria rũheni rwake rungu rwa igũrũ guothe na akarũtũma nginya ituri cia thĩ.
Job37:4 Thuutha waruo gũũkaga mũgambo wa mũraramo wake; arurumaga na mũgambo wake mũkaru. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũgambo wake waiguuo-rĩ
Job37:5 Mũgambo wa Mũrungu ũrurumaga na njĩra ya magegania; ekaga maũndũ manene tũtangĩhota kũmenya.
Job37:6 Eeraga tharunji atĩrĩ
Job37:7 Nĩatigithagia mũndũ o wothe wĩra wake nĩgeetha andũ othe ombĩte mamenye wĩra wake.
Job37:8 Nyamũ nacio nĩciĩhithaga; ciikaraga imamo-inĩ ciacio.
Job37:9 Kĩhuhũkanio kiumaga gĩikaro gĩakĩo
Job37:10 Mĩhũmũ ya Mũrungu nĩĩthondekaga mbarabu
Job37:11 Nĩaiyũragia matu na ũigũ; ahurunjaga rũheni rũkamatũrĩkia.
Job37:12 Mathiiaga magĩthiũrũrũkaga o kũrĩa angĩmeerekeria thĩ yothe
Job37:13 Arehaga matu macio nĩguo aherithie andũ
Job37:14 “Ayubu
Job37:15 Wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa Ngai aathaga matu
Job37:16 Wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa matu macio macuurĩtio wega
Job37:17 Wee ũringĩkaga nĩ ũrugarĩ wa nguo ciaku rĩrĩa bũrũri ũkirĩte ki hĩndĩ ya rũhuho rwa gũthini-rĩ
Job37:18 no ũhote kũruta wĩra nake ũhoro-inĩ wa gũtambũrũkia matu mairũ
Job37:19 “Ta twĩre ũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũmwĩra; tũtingĩhota gwĩciirĩra nĩ ũndũ wa nduma iitũ.
Job37:20 Nĩagĩrĩire kwĩrwo atĩ nĩngwenda kwaria? Nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ o na ũ ũngiuga amerio?
Job37:21 Rĩu-rĩ
Job37:22 Okaga kuuma mwena wa gathigathini arĩ na riiri ukengeete ta wa thahabu; Ngai okaga arĩ na ũkaru wa gwĩtigĩrwo.
Job37:23 Ũcio Mwene-Hinya-Wothe-rĩ
Job37:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ nĩmamũtĩĩte
Job38:1 Nake Jehova agĩcookeria Ayubu ũhoro arĩ kĩhuhũkanio-inĩ
Job38:2 “Nũũ ũyũ ũrekĩra kĩrĩra gĩakwa nduma na ciugo itarĩ na ũmenyo?
Job38:3 Wĩhotore ta mũndũ mũrũme; nĩngũkũũria ciũria
Job38:4 “Warĩ kũ rĩrĩa ndaakire mũthingi wa thĩ? Njĩĩra akorwo ũrĩ na ũũgĩ wa kũmenya.
Job38:5 Nũũ wathimire mũigana wayo? Ti-itherũ wee nĩũũĩ! Nũũ watambũrũkirie rũrigi rwa gũthima igũrũ rĩayo?
Job38:6 Mĩthingi yayo yahandirwo igũrũ rĩa kĩĩ
Job38:7 hĩndĩ ĩrĩa njata cia rũciinĩ ciainire hamwe
Job38:8 “Nũũ wahingĩrĩirie iria na mĩrango rĩrĩa rĩatumũkire kuuma nda
Job38:9 rĩrĩa ndatuire matu nguo ciarĩo
Job38:10 rĩrĩa ndarĩkĩrĩire mĩhaka
Job38:11 rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ
Job38:12 “Kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria-rĩ
Job38:13 nĩguo ũhote kũnyiita thĩ na mĩthia yaguo
Job38:14 Thĩ ĩhaanaga ta rĩũmba rĩhũrĩtwo mũhũũri; mũonekere wayo ũtariĩ ta mũhianĩre wa nguo.
Job38:15 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmaimagwo ũtheri wao
Job38:16 “Ũrĩ wathiĩ rũgendo nginya kũrĩa iria rĩtherũkagĩra
Job38:17 Ũrĩ wonio ihingo cia gĩkuũ? Ũrĩ wona ihingo cia kĩĩruru gĩa gĩkuũ?
Job38:18 Ũrĩ wamenya ũnene wa wariĩ wa thĩ? Njĩĩra akorwo nĩũũĩ maũndũ macio mothe.
Job38:19 “Njĩra ya gũthiĩ kũrĩa ũtheri ũtũũraga nĩĩrĩkũ? Nayo nduma ĩikaraga kũ?
Job38:20 No ũcitware gwacio? Nĩũũĩ tũcĩra twa gũthiĩ kũrĩa itũũraga?
Job38:21 Ti-itherũ wee nĩũũĩ
Job38:22 “Ũrĩ watoonya makũmbĩ kũrĩa tharunji ĩigĩtwo
Job38:23 o icio njigĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mahinda ma thĩĩna
Job38:24 Njĩra ya gũthiĩ kũrĩa ũtheri ũgayanagĩrio nĩĩrĩkũ
Job38:25 Nũũ wenjagĩra mbura ya kĩboboto mũtaro wa kũgerera
Job38:26 nĩguo mbura yure bũrũri ũtatũũraga mũndũ
Job38:27 nĩguo ĩhũũnagie kũu gũtiganĩrie gũgakira ihooru
Job38:28 Mbura nĩĩrĩ ithe? Nũũ mũciari wa matata ma ime?
Job38:29 Tharunji yumaga nda ya ũ? Nũũ ũciaraga mbaa ĩrĩa yumaga igũrũ
Job38:30 rĩrĩa maaĩ momaga ta ihiga
Job38:31 “Wee-rĩ
Job38:32 Wahota kuumagaragia njata iria ciĩtagwo Mazarothu o mahinda maacio maakinya
Job38:33 Nĩũũĩ mawatho ma igũrũ? No ũhote kũhaanda wathani wa Ngai ũrũme gũkũ thĩ?
Job38:34 “Wahota kwanĩrĩra nginya mũgambo waku ũkinye matu-inĩ nĩguo kuure wĩhumbĩre na kĩguũ kĩa maaĩ?
Job38:35 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga heni ithiĩ na njĩra ciacio? Nĩikũrehagĩra ũhoro igakwĩra atĩ
Job38:36 Nũũ waheire ngoro ũũgĩ
Job38:37 Nũũ ũrĩ na ũũgĩ wa gũtara matu? Nũũ ũngĩhota kũinamia ndigithũ cia maaĩ cia igũrũ
Job38:38 rĩrĩa rũkũngũ rwatondora
Job38:39 “Nĩwe ũguĩmagĩra mũrũũthi wa mũgoma wone gĩa kũrĩa
Job38:40 rĩrĩa ĩkomereire imamo-inĩ ciayo
Job38:41 Nũũ ũheaga ihuru irio rĩrĩa tũcui twarĩo tũgũkaĩra Mũrungu tũkĩũrũũraga nĩ kwaga irio?
Job39:1 “Wee nĩũũĩ rĩrĩa mbũri cia irĩma-inĩ iciaraga? Wee nĩwĩroragĩra rĩrĩa thwariga ĩgũciara kaana kayo?
Job39:2 Wee nĩũtaraga mĩeri ĩrĩa ciikaraga ingĩgaaciara? Nĩũũĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa iciaraga?
Job39:3 Ciĩthunaga igaciara twana twacio; ruo rwacio rwa gũciara rũgathira.
Job39:4 Twana twacio twagĩraga mwĩrĩ
Job39:5 “Nũũ warekereirie njagĩ ĩthiiage ĩtarĩ mũũria? Nũũ wamĩohorire mĩhĩndo?
Job39:6 Ndaamĩheire werũ ũtuĩke mũciĩ wayo
Job39:7 Ĩthekagĩrĩra inegene rĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa itũũra; ndĩiguaga mũkaĩrĩrio wa mũtwarithia.
Job39:8 Ĩrimũthagĩra irĩma-inĩ ĩgĩetha gwa kũrĩa
Job39:9 “Mbogo ya njamba-rĩ
Job39:10 No ũhote kũmĩoha matandĩko ĩrĩme na mũraũ? No ĩkuume thuutha ituamba-inĩ ĩkĩrĩmaga na mũraũ?
Job39:11 No ũmĩĩhoke nĩ ũndũ atĩ ĩrĩ na hinya mũingĩ? No ũmĩtigĩre wĩra waku mũritũ ĩrutage?
Job39:12 No ũmĩĩhoke ĩkũrehere ngano yaku
Job39:13 “Mathagu ma nyaga mabatabataga nĩ gũkena
Job39:14 Ĩrekagĩria matumbĩ mayo tĩĩri-inĩ na ĩkamatiga mũthanga-inĩ magwate ũrugarĩ
Job39:15 ĩtegwĩciiria atĩ no makinywo na magũrũ makue
Job39:16 Ĩĩkaga ciana ciayo ũũru ta itarĩ ciayo; ndĩmakaga atĩ wĩra wayo no ũtuĩke wa tũhũ
Job39:17 nĩgũkorwo Ngai ndaamĩheire ũũgĩ kana akĩmĩhe igai rĩa mwĩciirĩrie mwega.
Job39:18 No rĩrĩ
Job39:19 “Wee nĩwe ũheaga mbarathi hinya wayo
Job39:20 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga ĩrũũge ta ngigĩ
Job39:21 Ĩhuragia thĩ na ũcamba ĩgĩkenagĩra hinya wayo
Job39:22 Ĩthekagĩrĩra guoya
Job39:23 Thiaka wa mũmĩhaici ũbocabocaga mbaru-inĩ ciayo
Job39:24 Irĩĩaga tĩĩri nĩ ũrũme; ndĩngĩrũgama ĩkindĩirie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa karumbeta kagamba.
Job39:25 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa karumbeta kagamba ĩgatiiha
Job39:26 “Rwĩgĩ-rĩ
Job39:27 Nderi nĩwe ũmĩathaga yũmbũke na igũrũ
Job39:28 Ĩtũũraga kĩharũrũka-inĩ kĩa ihiga
Job39:29 Ĩrĩ hau nĩguo ĩcaragĩria gĩa kũrĩa; maitho mayo moonaga irio irĩ o kũraya.
Job39:30 Tũcui twayo tũnyuuaga thakame
Job40:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Ayubu atĩrĩ:
Job40:2 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũaga na Mwene-Hinya-Wothe-rĩ
Job40:3 Nake Ayubu agĩcookeria Jehova
Job40:4 “Niĩ ndiagĩrĩire o na hanini; ndaakĩhota atĩa gũgũcookeria? Nĩndehumbĩra kanua na guoko.
Job40:5 Nĩndaririe rĩmwe
Job40:6 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Ayubu arĩ kĩhuhũkanio-inĩ
Job40:7 “Wĩhotore ta mũndũ mũrũme; nĩngũkũũria ciũria
Job40:8 “Gũtua ciira gwakwa na kĩhooto-rĩ
Job40:9 Wee-rĩ
Job40:10 Ta kĩĩgemie na riiri na ũkengi
Job40:11 Rekereria marakara mahiũ ma mangʼũrĩ maku
Job40:12 rora mũndũ o wothe mwĩtĩĩi na ũmũnyiihie
Job40:13 Mathike othe hamwe tĩĩri-inĩ; ũmoohe mothiũ na nduma kũu mbĩrĩra-inĩ.
Job40:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo niĩ mwene nĩngetĩkania nawe atĩ guoko gwaku mwene kwa ũrĩo no gũkũhonokie.
Job40:15 “Ta rora nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩtagwo Behemothu
Job40:16 Nĩ hinya ũigana atĩa ĩrĩ naguo njohero
Job40:17 Ĩinagia mũtingʼoe wayo ta mũtarakwa; nga cia ciero ciayo ciohanĩtio hamwe ta mĩhĩndo.
Job40:18 Mahĩndĩ mayo mahaana ta mĩberethi ya gĩcango
Job40:19 Nĩyo nyamũ ya mbere harĩ ciũmbe cia Mũrungu
Job40:20 Irĩma ĩmĩheaga maciaro maacio
Job40:21 Ĩkomaga rungu rwa mahũa ma maaĩ-inĩ
Job40:22 Mahũa macio ma maaĩ-inĩ makamĩhitha; nakĩo kĩĩruru kĩa mĩtĩ ya irura hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia karũũĩ gĩkamĩthiũrũrũkĩria.
Job40:23 Rĩrĩa rũũĩ ruoka na nditi
Job40:24 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũmĩnyiita rĩrĩa ĩĩhũũgĩte
Job41:1 “No ũhote kũguucũrũria nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Leviathani na ndwano
Job41:2 No ũhote kũmĩtoonyia rũrigi iniũrũ
Job41:3 No ĩtinde ĩgĩgũthaitha ũmĩiguĩre tha? No ĩkwarĩrie na ciugo cia ũhooreri?
Job41:4 No ĩrĩkanĩre nawe ũthiĩ nayo
Job41:5 No ũhote kũmĩhooreria ta nyoni
Job41:6 Onjoria no mamĩkũũranie na indo ciao? No mamĩgayanie kũrĩ onjorithia?
Job41:7 No ũhote gũtheecanga rũũa rwayo na mĩcengi
Job41:8 Ũngĩmĩhutia na guoko
Job41:9 Mwĩrĩgĩrĩro wa atĩ no ũmĩtoorie nĩ kwĩheenia; o kũmĩona tu nĩkũiganĩte gũtũma mũndũ amake
Job41:10 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ ũcamba mũiganu wa kũmĩarahũra. Nũũ ũngĩkĩhota kwĩĩndiiria niĩ?
Job41:11 Nũũ ũngĩnandũra kĩndũ atĩ nĩguo ndĩmũrĩhe? Kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩ rungu rwa igũrũ nĩ gĩakwa.
Job41:12 “Ndikwaga kwaria ũhoro wa ciĩga ciayo
Job41:13 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũmĩaũra nguo yayo ya igũrũ? Nũũ ũngĩmĩkuhĩrĩria amĩĩkĩre matamu?
Job41:14 Nũũ ũngĩũmĩrĩria kũmĩathamia kanua
Job41:15 Mũgongo wayo ũrĩ na ngo ciĩiganĩrĩire mĩhari
Job41:16 o ĩmwe ĩnyiitanĩte na ĩrĩa ĩngĩ
Job41:17 Igwatanĩtio hamwe irĩ nũmu; inyiitanĩte hamwe ũndũ itangĩtigithũkana.
Job41:18 Gũtiiha kwayo kũmenũkagia ũtheri; maitho mayo nĩ ta mĩrũri ya rũciinĩ gũgĩthererũka.
Job41:19 Imũrĩ cia mwaki ciumaga kanua-inĩ kayo; ĩrathũkagia thandĩ cia mwaki.
Job41:20 Ĩrutaga ndogo na maniũrũ taarĩ nyũngũ ĩratherũka ĩhagĩrĩtwo igũrũ rĩa mwaki wa ithanjĩ.
Job41:21 Mĩhũmũ yayo ĩgwatagia makara mwaki
Job41:22 Ngingo-inĩ yayo nĩho hinya wayo ũkoragwo
Job41:23 Mĩgũtha ya nyama ciayo nĩmĩnyiitanu mũno; nĩ mĩrũmu ũũ atĩ ndĩngĩenyenyeka.
Job41:24 Ngoro yayo yũmĩte ta ihiga
Job41:25 Rĩrĩa yarahũka
Job41:26 Gũtirĩ rũhiũ rwa njora rũngĩmĩĩka ũndũ
Job41:27 Harĩ Leviathani-rĩ
Job41:28 Mĩguĩ ndĩngĩtũma yũre; mahiga ma kĩgũtha no ta mũũngũ harĩ yo.
Job41:29 Harĩ yo njũgũma no ta gacunjĩ ka rũnyeki rũmũ; ĩthekagĩrĩra kũbĩrĩrĩka gwa itimũ.
Job41:30 Nda yayo nĩ ta rũgĩo rũrĩ na mageca; ĩtigaga ngururo ndaka-inĩ ta cia ngaari iria ikonyoraga ngano.
Job41:31 Ĩtũmaga iria kũrĩa kũriku gũtherũke ta nyũngũ
Job41:32 Harĩa yagerera ĩtigaga mũhari ũkũhenia; mũndũ no eciirie atĩ ndia ĩrĩ na mbuĩ.
Job41:33 Gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩngĩigananio nayo gũkũ thĩ; nĩ kĩũmbe gĩtarĩ guoya.
Job41:34 Ĩnyũrũragia kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩĩtũũgagĩria; nĩyo mũthamaki wa kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩĩtĩĩaga.”
Job42:1 Ningĩ Ayubu agĩcookeria Jehova
Job42:2 “Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ wahota gwĩka maũndũ mothe; gũtirĩ mũbango waku ũngĩgirĩrĩka.
Job42:3 Nĩworirie atĩrĩ
Job42:4 “Woigire atĩrĩ
Job42:5 Matũ makwa nĩmaiguĩte ũhoro waku no rĩu maitho makwa nĩgũkuona makuonete.
Job42:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngwĩmena niĩ mwene
Job42:7 Thuutha wa Jehova kwĩra Ayubu maũndũ macio-rĩ
Job42:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Job42:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Elifazu ũrĩa Mũtemaani
Job42:10 Thuutha wa Ayubu kũhoera arata ake-rĩ
Job42:11 Ariũ na aarĩ a nyina othe
Job42:12 Jehova nĩarathimire matukũ ma mũthia ma muoyo wa Ayubu gũkĩra marĩa ma mbere. Nĩaagĩire na ngʼondu 14
Job42:13 Nĩacookire akĩgĩa na aanake mũgwanja na airĩtu atatũ.
Job42:14 Mwarĩ wa mbere aamũtuire Jemima
Job42:15 Gũtirĩ handũ o na ha bũrũri-inĩ wothe hangĩonekire andũ-a-nja athaka ta airĩtu a Ayubu
Job42:16 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio-rĩ
Job42:17 Nake agĩkua arĩ mũkũrũ
Psalms1:1 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms1:2 No rĩrĩ
Psalms1:3 Mũndũ ũcio ahaana ta mũtĩ mũhaande tũmĩtaro-inĩ twa maaĩ
Psalms1:4 No andũ arĩa aaganu matihaana ũguo! Mahaana ta mũũngũ ũrĩa ũmbũragwo nĩ rũhuho.
Psalms1:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ arĩa aaganu matigetiiria ciira-inĩ
Psalms1:6 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩamenyagĩrĩra njĩra ya andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms2:1 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga ndũrĩrĩ iciirĩre gwĩka ũũru na andũ mathugunde maũndũ ma tũhũ?
Psalms2:2 Athamaki a thĩ nĩmatuĩte itua
Psalms2:3 Moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms2:4 Ũrĩa ũikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kũu igũrũ no gũtheka aratheka; We Mwathani-rĩ
Psalms2:5 Ningĩ agacooka akamakũũma arakarĩte
Psalms2:6 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ njigĩte Mũthamaki wakwa kũu Zayuni
Psalms2:7 Niĩ nĩngwanĩrĩra itua rĩa Jehova: Jehova aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Psalms2:8 Hooya niĩ
Psalms2:9 Nĩũgaciunanga na njũgũma ya kĩgera ya ũthamaki; ũgaacihehenja ihaane ta tũcunjĩ twa nyũngũ ya rĩũmba.”
Psalms2:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Psalms2:11 Tungatĩrai Jehova mũkĩmwĩtigagĩra
Psalms2:12 Mumunyai Mũriũ
Psalms3:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms3:2 Aingĩ nĩ arĩa maraaria ũhoro wakwa
Psalms3:3 No rĩrĩ
Psalms3:4 Ngayagĩra Jehova na mũgambo mũnene
Psalms3:5 Niĩ ngomaga na ngoona toro; ngacooka ngokĩra rĩngĩ
Psalms3:6 Ndingĩĩtigĩra andũ makũmi ma ngiri
Psalms3:7 Arahũka
Psalms3:8 Ũhonokio uumaga harĩ Jehova. Irathimo ciaku irotũũra na andũ aku.
Psalms4:1 Njĩtĩka rĩrĩa ndagũkaĩra
Psalms4:2 Inyuĩ
Psalms4:3 Menyai atĩ Jehova nĩeyamũrĩire arĩa mamwendete; Jehova nĩarĩiguaga rĩrĩa ndamũkaĩra.
Psalms4:4 Mũngĩrakara mũtikehie; rĩrĩa mũrĩ marĩrĩ-inĩ manyu-rĩ
Psalms4:5 Rutagai magongona marĩa magĩrĩire
Psalms4:6 Kũrĩ andũ aingĩ maroria atĩrĩ
Psalms4:7 Wee nĩũnjiyũrĩtie gĩkeno kĩnene ngoro-inĩ yakwa
Psalms4:8 Niĩ ndĩrĩkomaga na nyonage toro ndĩ na thayũ
Psalms5:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms5:2 Thikĩrĩria ngĩgũkaĩra ũndeithie
Psalms5:3 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms5:4 Nĩgũkorwo Wee ndũrĩ Mũrungu wa gũkenera ũũru; ningĩ andũ arĩa aaganu ndũngĩtũũrania nao.
Psalms5:5 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi matingĩrũgama mbere yaku; andũ arĩa othe mekaga maũndũ mooru nĩũmathũire.
Psalms5:6 Andũ arĩa maaragia maheeni nĩũmaniinaga; nao arĩa maitaga thakame na makaheenania
Psalms5:7 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms5:8 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms5:9 Tũnua twacio tũtiaragia ũhoro ũngĩĩhokwo; ngoro ciacio ciyũrĩte mwanangĩko. Mĩmero yacio nĩ ta mbĩrĩra ngunũre; ciaragia maheeni na rũrĩmĩ rwacio.
Psalms5:10 Wee Ngai
Psalms5:11 No rĩrĩ
Psalms5:12 Nĩ ũndũ ti-itherũ Wee Jehova nĩũrathimaga andũ arĩa athingu; ũtũũraga ũmairigĩire na wega waku taarĩ ngo.
Psalms6:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms6:2 Jehova
Psalms6:3 O nayo ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ na ruo rũnene. Nĩ nginya rĩ
Psalms6:4 Wee Jehova
Psalms6:5 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩkũririkana arĩ mũkuũ. Nũũ ũkũgoocaga arĩ thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra?
Psalms6:6 Niĩ ndĩ mũnogu mũno nĩ ũndũ wa gũcaaya; ũtukũ wothe njihũgagia ũrĩrĩ wakwa na kĩrĩro
Psalms6:7 Maitho makwa matirona wega nĩ ũndũ wa ihooru; nĩmaroora nĩ ũndũ wa thũ ciakwa ciothe.
Psalms6:8 Njehererai inyuĩ arĩa othe mwĩkaga ũũru
Psalms6:9 Jehova nĩaiguĩte ngĩmũthaitha anjiguĩre tha; Jehova nĩetĩkĩrĩte ihooya rĩakwa.
Psalms6:10 Thũ ciakwa ciothe nĩigaconoka na imake; igaacooka na thuutha o rĩmwe iconokete.
Psalms7:1 Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa
Psalms7:2 tondũ waga gwĩka ũguo mekũndembũranga o ta mũrũũthi
Psalms7:3 Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa
Psalms7:4 na ingĩkorwo njĩkĩte mũndũ ũũru ũrĩa ũtarĩ na haaro na niĩ
Psalms7:5 hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩreke thũ yakwa ĩnyiingatithie na ĩĩnyiite; tũma ĩrangĩrĩrie muoyo wakwa tĩĩri-inĩ
Psalms7:6 Arahũka Wee Jehova
Psalms7:7 Andũ a ndũrĩrĩ arĩa monganĩte nĩmagũthiũrũrũkĩrie. Mathamakĩre ũrĩ kũu igũrũ;
Psalms7:8 Jehova nĩagĩtuĩre andũ othe ciira. Wee Jehova
Psalms7:9 Wee Ngai mũthingu
Psalms7:10 Ngai-Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno nĩwe ngo yakwa
Psalms7:11 Ngai nĩwe ũtuanagĩra ciira na kĩhooto
Psalms7:12 Mũndũ angĩaga kũgarũrũka
Psalms7:13 Nĩahaarĩirie indo ciake cia mbaara cia kũũragana; akahaarĩria mĩguĩ yake ĩkũrĩrĩmbũka mwaki.
Psalms7:14 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgĩte nda ya waganu
Psalms7:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa wenjaga irima na akarĩthikũria
Psalms7:16 Thĩĩna ũrĩa aambĩrĩirie ũmũcookagĩrĩra we mwene
Psalms7:17 Nĩngũcookeria Jehova ngaatho tondũ wa ũthingu wake
Psalms8:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms8:2 Nĩũtũmĩte rũgooco ruume tũnua-inĩ twa ciana na twa ngenge
Psalms8:3 Rĩrĩa ndecũũrania ũhoro ũkoniĩ igũrũ rĩu rĩaku
Psalms8:4 mũndũ akĩrĩ kĩ tondũ ũikaraga ũkĩmwĩciiragia
Psalms8:5 Watũmire atigie o hanini aiganane nawe
Psalms8:6 Wamũtuire wa gwathaga mawĩra ma moko maku; ũkĩiga indo ciothe rungu rwa makinya make:
Psalms8:7 ndũũru ciothe cia mbũri na cia ngʼombe
Psalms8:8 na nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ
Psalms8:9 Wee Jehova
Psalms9:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms9:2 Nĩngũcanjamũka na ngene nĩ ũndũ waku. Nĩngũina rwĩmbo ngooce rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms9:3 Thũ ciakwa icookaga na thuutha
Psalms9:4 Nĩgũkorwo nĩũtiirĩrĩire kĩhooto gĩakwa na ciira wakwa; nĩũikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene
Psalms9:5 Nĩũrũithĩtie ndũrĩrĩ na ũkaniina andũ arĩa aaganu; namo marĩĩtwa mao ũkamatharia tene na tene.
Psalms9:6 Thũ nĩũcikinyĩirie mwanangĩko ũtathiraga
Psalms9:7 Jehova athamakaga nginya tene; nĩahaandĩte gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene nĩguo atuanĩre ciira.
Psalms9:8 Nĩagatuĩra andũ a thĩ ciira na kĩhooto; nĩagathamakĩra ndũrĩrĩ o ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire.
Psalms9:9 Jehova nĩwe rĩũrĩro rĩa arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie
Psalms9:10 Arĩa mooĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩmarĩkwĩhokaga
Psalms9:11 Inĩrai Jehova nyĩmbo mũmũgooce
Psalms9:12 Nĩgũkorwo ũcio ũrĩhanagĩria thakame nĩamaririkanaga; kĩrĩro kĩa andũ arĩa ahinyĩrĩrĩku ndakariganĩrwo nĩkĩo.
Psalms9:13 Wee Jehova
Psalms9:14 nĩguo nyumbũre ũgooci waku ndĩ kũu ihingo-inĩ cia Mwarĩ wa Zayuni
Psalms9:15 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩigwĩte o irima rĩrĩa cienjete; magũrũ maacio nĩmanyiitĩtwo nĩ wabu o ũcio ihithĩte wa gũtegana.
Psalms9:16 Jehova nĩemenyithanĩtie na ũndũ wa gũtuanĩra ciira na kĩhooto gĩake; andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmetegete na wĩra wa moko mao ene.
Psalms9:17 Andũ arĩa aaganu macookaga o mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Psalms9:18 No rĩrĩ
Psalms9:19 Wee Jehova
Psalms9:20 Wee Jehova
Psalms10:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms10:2 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu etĩĩaga rĩrĩa ekũhĩta andũ arĩa matarĩ hinya
Psalms10:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu erahagĩra merirĩria ma ngoro yake; arathimaga andũ arĩa akoroku
Psalms10:4 Mũndũ ũcio mwĩtĩĩi ndarongoragia Ngai; meciiria-inĩ make mothe ndeciiragia ũhoro wa Ngai.
Psalms10:5 Njĩra ciake ciikaraga igaacĩire hĩndĩ ciothe; we nĩ mwĩtĩĩi mũno
Psalms10:6 Eĩĩraga na ngoro yake atĩrĩ
Psalms10:7 Kanua gake kaiyũrĩte irumi na maheeni
Psalms10:8 Aikaraga oheirie andũ hakuhĩ na matũũra: ageterera arĩa matarĩ na ũũru akamooraga
Psalms10:9 Aikaraga oheirie o ta mũrũũthi ũrĩ kĩmamo-inĩ kĩaguo; agaikara oheirie nĩguo anyiite arĩa matarĩ na hinya; anyiitaga arĩa matarĩ na hinya
Psalms10:10 Ahehenjaga andũ acio matarĩ na wa kũmateithia
Psalms10:11 Eĩĩraga na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms10:12 Arahũka
Psalms10:13 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu arume Ngai? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga eĩĩre na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms10:14 No rĩrĩ
Psalms10:15 Una guoko kwa mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu na kwa ũrĩa mũũru; mũrĩhie nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wake ũcio ũtangĩmenyeka.
Psalms10:16 Jehova nĩwe Mũthamaki wa nginya tene; ndũrĩrĩ nĩigathira ciehere bũrũri-inĩ wake.
Psalms10:17 Wee Jehova
Psalms10:18 ũgitagĩra andũ arĩa matarĩ maithe na arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie
Psalms11:1 Niĩ njũragĩra harĩ Jehova. Mwahota atĩa kũnjĩĩra atĩrĩ: “Ũmbũka ta nyoni ũũrĩre kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩaku.
Psalms11:2 Ta rora
Psalms11:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mĩthingi ĩraanangwo-rĩ
Psalms11:4 Jehova arĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ yake theru; Jehova arĩ gĩtĩ-inĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene kũu igũrũ. Acũthagĩrĩria ariũ a andũ; maitho make nĩmamaroragia.
Psalms11:5 Jehova nĩaroragia andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms11:6 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩakamoirĩria marakara maraakana na ũbiriti ũgwakana; igai rĩao nĩ rũhuho rũrĩa rũcinaga.
Psalms11:7 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩ mũthingu

Psalms14:7 Naarĩ korwo ũhonokio wa Isiraeli no ũgĩũke kuuma Zayuni! Rĩrĩa Jehova agaacookeria andũ ake indo ciao-rĩ

Psalms15:2 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mĩthiĩre yake ĩtarĩ ũcuuke
Psalms15:3 na ndarĩ njambanio rũrĩmĩ-inĩ rwake
