Psalms15:5 ndakombanagĩra mbeeca ciake nĩguo one uumithio
Psalms16:1 Wee Mũrungu
Psalms16:2 Ndeerire Jehova atĩrĩ
Psalms16:3 Ha ũhoro wa andũ arĩa aamũre arĩa marĩ bũrũri-inĩ
Psalms16:4 Andũ arĩa matengʼeragĩra ngai ingĩ-rĩ
Psalms16:5 Jehova nĩwe ũnjigĩire rwĩga rwakwa
Psalms16:6 Ũnjatũrĩire ithaka kũndũ kũrĩa kwega; ti-itherũ igai rĩakwa nĩrĩngenagia mũno.
Psalms16:7 Nĩngũgooca Jehova
Psalms16:8 Jehova akoragwo arĩ mbere yakwa hĩndĩ ciothe. Tondũ arĩ guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo-rĩ
Psalms16:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngoro yakwa nĩnjanjamũku
Psalms16:10 tondũ ndũkandiganĩria mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Psalms16:11 Nĩũũmenyithĩtie njĩra ya gũthiĩ muoyo-inĩ; nĩũkanjiyũria gĩkeno ndĩ harĩa ũrĩ
Psalms17:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms17:2 Ituĩro rĩakwa rĩa kĩhooto nĩrĩkiume kũrĩ wee; maitho maku nĩmakĩone o ũndũ ũrĩa wagĩrĩire.
Psalms17:3 O na ũngĩthuthuuria ngoro yakwa na ũnduĩrie ũtukũ
Psalms17:4 Ha ũhoro wa ciĩko cia andũ
Psalms17:5 Makinya makwa nĩmarũmĩtie njĩra ciaku; magũrũ makwa matirĩ matenderũka.
Psalms17:6 Wee Mũrungu
Psalms17:7 Tũma magegania ma wendo waku mũnene monekane
Psalms17:8 Menyagĩrĩra niĩ ta kĩũma kĩa riitho rĩaku; hitha kĩĩruru-inĩ kĩa mathagu maku
Psalms17:9 ndigakorwo nĩ andũ arĩa aaganu arĩa maatharĩkagĩra
Psalms17:10 Nĩmahinganĩtie ngoro ciao nyũmũ
Psalms17:11 Maahĩtĩte
Psalms17:12 Mahaana ta mũrũũthi ũhũtĩire ndĩa yaguo
Psalms17:13 Arahũka
Psalms17:14 Wee Jehova
Psalms17:15 Na niĩ-rĩ
Psalms18:1 Nĩngwendete
Psalms18:2 Jehova nĩwe rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga
Psalms18:3 Ngayagĩra Jehova
Psalms18:4 Mĩhĩndo ya gĩkuũ nĩyandigiicire; kĩguũ kĩa mwanangĩko gĩkĩĩhubĩkania.
Psalms18:5 Mĩhĩndo ya mbĩrĩra ĩgĩĩthiororokeria; nayo mĩtego ya gĩkuũ ĩkĩnjĩhotorera.
Psalms18:6 Mĩnyamaro-inĩ yakwa ndakaĩire Jehova; ngĩrĩrĩra Ngai wakwa aandeithie. Arĩ hekarũ-inĩ yake nĩ aaiguire mũgambo wakwa; kĩrĩro gĩakwa gĩgĩkinya harĩ we
Psalms18:7 Thĩ ĩkĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha
Psalms18:8 Ndogo ĩkiuma maniũrũ-inĩ make ĩkĩambata na igũrũ; mwaki wa kũniinana ũkiuma kanua-inĩ gake
Psalms18:9 Aahingũrire igũrũ agĩikũrũka thĩ; matu matumanu maarĩ rungu rwa makinya make.
Psalms18:10 Aathiire akuuĩtwo nĩ ikerubi akĩũmbũka; akĩambata na igũrũ na mathagu ma rũhuho.
Psalms18:11 Aatuire nduma kĩndũ gĩake gĩa kwĩhumbĩra
Psalms18:12 Kuuma ũkengi ũrĩa warĩ harĩ we
Psalms18:13 Jehova akĩruruma arĩ kũu igũrũ; mũgambo wa Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno ũkĩiguuo.
Psalms18:14 Aikirie mĩguĩ yake
Psalms18:15 Mĩkuru ya iria ĩkĩguũrio
Psalms18:16 Agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake kuuma o kũu igũrũ
Psalms18:17 Andeithũrire harĩ thũ yakwa ĩrĩ hinya
Psalms18:18 Manjĩhotoreire mũthenya ũrĩa ndaarĩ na mũtino
Psalms18:19 Andeehire kũndũ kwariĩ; akĩndeithũra nĩ tondũ nĩakenetio nĩ niĩ.
Psalms18:20 Jehova anjĩkĩire maũndũ kũringana na ũthingu wakwa; andĩhĩte kũringana na ũtheru wa moko makwa.
Psalms18:21 Nĩgũkorwo nĩnũmĩtie njĩra cia Jehova; ndiĩkĩte ũũru ngahutatĩra Ngai wakwa.
Psalms18:22 Mawatho make mothe marĩ mbere yakwa; ndihutatĩire irĩra cia watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo.
Psalms18:23 Ngoretwo itarĩ na ũcuuke ndĩ mbere yake
Psalms18:24 Jehova andĩhĩte kũringana na ũthingu wakwa
Psalms18:25 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩhokeku ũrĩĩonanagia ũrĩ mwĩhokeku
Psalms18:26 kũrĩ ũrĩa wĩtheragia
Psalms18:27 Wee ũhonokagia andũ arĩa enyiihia
Psalms18:28 Wee Jehova
Psalms18:29 Ndĩ na ũteithio waku no hote gũtharĩkĩra mbũtũ ya ita; ndĩ na Ngai wakwa no hote kũrũga rũthingo.
Psalms18:30 Mũrungu-rĩ
Psalms18:31 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Psalms18:32 Nĩ Mũrungu ũũheaga hinya na agatũma njĩra yakwa ĩkinyanĩre.
Psalms18:33 Atũmaga magũrũ makwa magĩe ihenya ta ma thwariga; aahotithagia kũrũgama kũndũ kũrĩa kũraihu.
Psalms18:34 We nĩwe wonagia moko makwa mũrũĩre wa mbaara; moko makwa no mageete ũta wa gĩcango.
Psalms18:35 Ũũheaga ngo yaku ya ũhootani
Psalms18:36 Ũnjaramagĩria njĩra ya kũrĩa thiiagĩra
Psalms18:37 Ndaingatithirie thũ ciakwa ngĩcikinyĩra; ndiacookire na thuutha nginya rĩrĩa cianiinirwo.
Psalms18:38 Ndacihehenjire ikĩremwo nĩ gũũkĩra; ciagũire thĩ wa magũrũ makwa.
Psalms18:39 Wee waheire hinya wa kũrũa mbaara; ũgĩgĩtũma thũ ciakwa ciinamĩrĩre magũrũ-inĩ makwa.
Psalms18:40 Watũmire thũ ciakwa ihũndũke ciũre
Psalms18:41 Maakaire mateithio
Psalms18:42 Ndaamahũũrire makĩhinya ta rũkũngũ rũmbũrĩtwo nĩ rũhuho; ngĩmaita njĩra-inĩ ta ndooro.
Psalms18:43 Nĩũũhonoketie ngaaga gũtharĩkĩrwo nĩ andũ; ũnduĩte mũtongoria wa ndũrĩrĩ; andũ itooĩ nĩmandungatagĩra.
Psalms18:44 O rĩrĩa maigua ngumo yakwa
Psalms18:45 Othe makuuaga ngoro; mookaga makĩinainaga moimĩte ciĩhitho ciao cia hinya.
Psalms18:46 Jehova atũũraga muoyo! O we Rwaro rwakwa rwa Ihiga arogoocwo! Ngai o we Mũhonokia wakwa arotũgĩrio!
Psalms18:47 We nĩwe Mũrungu ũrĩa ũndĩhagĩria
Psalms18:48 o we ũũhonokagia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciakwa. Wandũgĩririe igũrũ rĩa andũ arĩa maathũire; ũkĩndeithũra kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya.
Psalms18:49 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Psalms18:50 Aheaga mũthamaki wake ũhootani mũnene; onanagia ũtugi wake ũtathiraga kũrĩ ũcio wake mũitĩrĩrie maguta
Psalms19:1 Igũrũ riumbũraga riiri wa Mũrungu; namo matu mamemerekagia wĩra wa moko make.
Psalms19:2 Mũthenya ũkinyagĩria mũthenya ũrĩa ũngĩ ũhoro; naguo ũtukũ ũkamenyithia ũtukũ ũrĩa ũngĩ ũhoro wa riiri ũcio.
Psalms19:3 Gũtirĩ mĩario kana rũthiomi kũrĩa mũgambo wacio ũtaiguĩkaga.
Psalms19:4 Mũgambo wacio ũthiiaga thĩ yothe
Psalms19:5 narĩo riumaga rĩhaana ta mũhikania akiuma nyũmba yake
Psalms19:6 Rĩrathagĩra mwena-inĩ ũmwe wa kũu igũrũ
Psalms19:7 Watho wa Jehova nĩ mũkinyanĩru
Psalms19:8 Mataaro ma Jehova nĩmarũngĩrĩru
Psalms19:9 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩ ũndũ mũtheru
Psalms19:10 Maũndũ macio nĩ ma goro gũkĩra thahabu
Psalms19:11 Ningĩ nĩmo mataaraga ndungata yaku; kũmamenyerera nĩ ũndũ ũrĩ irĩhi inene.
Psalms19:12 Nũũ ũngĩhota gũkũũrana mahĩtia make? Ndekera mahĩtia makwa ma hitho-inĩ.
Psalms19:13 Ningĩ rigagĩrĩria ndungata yaku ndĩkeehie mehia ma mwĩĩro o namo; ndũkanareke mehia macio manjathe. Nĩguo ndĩrĩikaraga itarĩ na ũcuuke
Psalms19:14 Ciugo cia kanua gakwa na matarania ma ngoro yakwa irogũkenia maitho-inĩ maku
Psalms20:1 Jehova arogwĩtĩka rĩrĩa ũrĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ; rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai wa Jakubu rĩrokũgitĩra.
Psalms20:2 Arokũrehere ũteithio kuuma handũ harĩa hake haamũre
Psalms20:3 Aroririkana magongona maku mothe
Psalms20:4 Arokũhe maũndũ marĩa ngoro yaku ĩĩrirĩirie
Psalms20:5 Rĩrĩa ũkaahootana nĩtũkoigĩrĩria na gĩkeno
Psalms20:6 Rĩu nĩmenyete atĩ Jehova nĩahonokagia ũrĩa wake mũitĩrĩrie maguta; nĩamwĩtĩkaga arĩ kũu igũrũ rĩake rĩamũre
Psalms20:7 Andũ amwe mehokaga ngaari cia ita
Psalms20:8 Makurumaga makagũa thĩ
Psalms20:9 Wee Jehova
Psalms21:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms21:2 Nĩũmũhingĩirie wendi wa ngoro yake
Psalms21:3 Wamwamũkĩrire na irathimo nyingĩ
Psalms21:4 Aakũhooire atũũre muoyo
Psalms21:5 Riiri wake nĩ mũnene nĩ ũndũ wa ũhootani ũrĩa ũmũheete; nĩũmũheete riiri na igweta.
Psalms21:6 Ti-itherũ nĩũmũrathimĩte na irathimo cia gũtũũra nginya tene
Psalms21:7 Nĩgũkorwo mũthamaki ehokaga Jehova; nĩ ũndũ wa wendo wa Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno ndangĩenyenyeka.
Psalms21:8 Guoko gwaku nĩgũkanyiita thũ ciaku ciothe; guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo gũgaakumbata arĩa marĩ muku nawe.
Psalms21:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkaamoimĩrĩra ũgaatũma mahaane ta icua rĩa mwaki mũnene. Nĩ ũndũ wa mangʼũrĩ make-rĩ
Psalms21:10 Nĩũkaniina njiaro ciao ithire gũkũ thĩ
Psalms21:11 O na mangĩgagũciirĩra magwĩke ũũru
Psalms21:12 nĩgũkorwo nĩũgatũma mahũndũke moore rĩrĩa makoona ũgeetete ũta waku ũmarathe.
Psalms21:13 No gĩtũũgĩre Wee Jehova
Psalms22:1 Ngai wakwa
Psalms22:2 Wee Ngai wakwa
Psalms22:3 No rĩrĩ
Psalms22:4 Maithe maitũ nĩwe meehokaga; maakwĩhokire nawe ũkĩmahonokia.
Psalms22:5 Maagũkaĩire nao makĩhonokio; maakwĩhokire na matiigana gũconorithio.
Psalms22:6 No niĩ nduĩkĩte o ta kĩgunyũ
Psalms22:7 Andũ arĩa othe maanyonaga nĩmanyũrũragia; makaanuma makĩinainagia mĩtwe
Psalms22:8 “Ehokaga Jehova; Jehova nĩakĩmũhatũre. Nĩakĩmũteithũre
Psalms22:9 No rĩrĩ
Psalms22:10 Kuuma ndaaciarwo ndaikirio o harĩwe; kuuma ndoima nda ya maitũ ũkoretwo ũrĩ Mũrungu wakwa.
Psalms22:11 Ndũkandaihĩrĩrie
Psalms22:12 Ndegwa nyingĩ nĩindigicĩirie; thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ ndegwa irĩ hinya cia Bashani.
Psalms22:13 Mĩrũũthi ĩkũrarama
Psalms22:14 Njitĩtwo thĩ ta maaĩ
Psalms22:15 Hinya wakwa ũniarĩte ta rũgĩo
Psalms22:16 Ndĩĩmũrigiicĩrie nĩ magui; ndĩĩmũthiũrũrũkĩrie nĩ gĩkundi kĩa andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru
Psalms22:17 Mahĩndĩ makwa no hote kũmatara mothe; andũ marandora na makangũũrĩra maitho.
Psalms22:18 Maragayana nguo ciakwa
Psalms22:19 No rĩrĩ
Psalms22:20 Teithũra muoyo wakwa kuuma harĩ rũhiũ rwa njora
Psalms22:21 Thara kuuma kanua-inĩ ka mĩrũũthi; honokia kuuma hĩa-inĩ cia mbogo.
Psalms22:22 Nĩngumbũra rĩĩtwa rĩaku kũrĩ ariũ a baba; ndĩrĩkũgoocaga ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ.
Psalms22:23 Inyuĩ andũ aya mwĩtigĩrĩte Jehova
Psalms22:24 Nĩgũkorwo we ndaamenire kana akĩnyarara gũthĩĩnĩka kwa ũrĩa mũnyamarĩku; ndaahithire ũthiũ wake kuuma kũrĩ we
Psalms22:25 Gĩtũmi kĩa ngũgooce ũrĩa ngũgoocaga ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩnene kiumĩte harĩwe; niĩ nĩndĩrĩhingagia mĩĩhĩtwa yakwa ndĩ mbere ya arĩa magwĩtigĩrĩte.
Psalms22:26 Andũ arĩa athĩĩni marĩrĩĩaga na makahũũna
Psalms22:27 Andũ arĩa othe matũũraga ituri ciothe cia thĩ nĩmakaririkana na macookerere Jehova
Psalms22:28 nĩgũkorwo ũthamaki nĩ wa Jehova
Psalms22:29 Andũ arĩa othe atongu a thĩ makaarĩa na mamũhooe; arĩa othe makuuaga magathikwo nĩmagaturia ndu mbere yake
Psalms22:30 Ciana nĩikamũtungatĩra; nacio nĩikaahe njiarwa iria igooka ũhoro wa Mwathani.
Psalms22:31 Acio nĩmakahunjia ũthingu wake kũrĩ andũ arĩa magaaciarwo
Psalms23:1 Jehova nĩwe mũrĩithi wakwa
Psalms23:2 Atũmaga njarahe ũrĩithio-inĩ ũrĩ nyeki nduru
Psalms23:3 Nĩariũkagia ngoro yakwa
Psalms23:4 O na ingĩtuĩka ndĩrahungurĩra mũkuru ũrĩ nduma ta ya gĩkuũ
Psalms23:5 Ũnjaragĩra metha mbere yakwa o harĩa thũ ciakwa irĩ. Ũnjitagĩrĩria maguta mũtwe; gĩkombe gĩakwa nĩkĩiyũrĩrĩire.
Psalms23:6 Ti-itherũ wega na wendani nĩirĩrũmanagĩrĩra na niĩ matukũ mothe ma muoyo wakwa
Psalms24:1 Thĩ nĩ ya Jehova
Psalms24:2 nĩgũkorwo nĩwe waakire mũthingi wayo igũrũ rĩa maria
Psalms24:3 Nũũ ũngĩambata kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Jehova? Nũũ ũngĩrũgama handũ harĩa hake haamũre?
Psalms24:4 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ na moko matheru na akaaga ũũru ngoro
Psalms24:5 Mũndũ ũcio nĩarĩamũkagĩra kĩrathimo kuuma kũrĩ Jehova
Psalms24:6 Ũguo nĩguo rũciaro rwa arĩa mamũrongoragia rũtariĩ
Psalms24:7 Ambarariai mĩtwe yanyu
Psalms24:8 Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri nĩwe ũũ? Nĩwe Jehova ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya na nĩ njamba

Psalms25:5 ndongoria ũhoro-inĩ waku wa ma na ũndutage
Psalms25:6 Jehova
Psalms25:7 Ndũkaririkane mehia ma ũnini wakwa
Psalms25:8 Jehova nĩ mwega na nĩ mũrũngĩrĩru; nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ arĩa ehia nĩarĩmonagĩrĩria njĩra ciake.
Psalms25:9 Atongoragia andũ arĩa menyiihagia na njĩra ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire
Psalms25:10 Njĩra ciothe cia Jehova nĩ cia wendani na wĩhokeku

Psalms25:12 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩtigĩri Jehova nũũ? Mũndũ ũcio nĩarĩmuonagĩrĩria njĩra ĩrĩa aagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũgera.
Psalms25:13 Mũndũ ũcio egũtũũra matukũ make agaacĩire
Psalms25:14 Jehova nĩehokaga andũ arĩa mamwĩtigagĩra; nĩo amenyithagia kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake.

Psalms25:16 Hũgũkĩra
Psalms25:17 Mathĩĩna ma ngoro yakwa nĩmaingĩhĩte; niinĩra ruo rũrĩa ndĩ naruo.
Psalms25:18 Rora mĩnyamaro yakwa o na gũtangĩka gwakwa
Psalms25:19 Rora thũ ciakwa wone ũrĩa cingĩhĩte

Psalms26:5 Nĩthũire kĩũngano kĩa andũ arĩa mekaga ũũru
Psalms26:6 Ngwĩthamba moko nyonanie ndirĩ na mahĩtia
Psalms26:7 nyine nyanĩrĩire rwĩmbo rwa gũcookia ngaatho

Psalms26:9 Ndũkeherie ngoro yakwa hamwe na ya arĩa mehagia

Psalms26:11 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms26:12 Magũrũ makwa marũgamĩte handũ harĩa haigananu; nĩndĩrĩgoocaga Jehova ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩnene.
Psalms27:1 Jehova nĩwe ũtheri wakwa na ũhonokio wakwa; ingĩgĩĩtigĩra ũ? Jehova nĩwe kĩĩhitho kĩa muoyo wakwa; ingĩkĩmakio nũũ?
Psalms27:2 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa ooru manjũkĩrĩra nĩguo matambuure nyama cia mwĩrĩ wakwa
Psalms27:3 O na mbũtũ cia ita ingĩndigiicĩria
Psalms27:4 Ndĩ o ũndũ ũmwe njũũragia harĩ Jehova
Psalms27:5 Nĩgũkorwo mũthenya wa thĩĩna-rĩ
Psalms27:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtwe wakwa nĩũkambarario igũrũ wa thũ iria iithiũrũrũkĩirie; nĩngaruta igongona ngĩanagĩrĩra na gĩkeno ndĩ hema-inĩ yake; nĩngainĩra Jehova na ndĩmũgooce.
Psalms27:7 Wee Jehova
Psalms27:8 Ha ũhoro waku
Psalms27:9 Ndũkaahithe ũthiũ waku
Psalms27:10 O na baba na maitũ mangĩndiganĩria
Psalms27:11 Wee Jehova nyonagĩrĩria njĩra yaku
Psalms27:12 Ndũkaneane kũrĩ arĩa marĩ muku na niĩ
Psalms27:13 Niĩ nĩnjĩtĩkĩtie ũũ: atĩ nĩngeyonera wega wa Jehova ndĩ bũrũri wa arĩa marĩ muoyo.
Psalms27:14 Eterera o Jehova: gĩa na hinya na ũũmĩrĩrie ngoro
Psalms28:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms28:2 Igua gũthaithana gwakwa ngĩgũkaĩra ũndeithie
Psalms28:3 Ndũkanguucũrũranie hamwe na andũ arĩa aaganu
Psalms28:4 Andũ acio marĩhe nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao
Psalms28:5 Tondũ matirũmbũyagia mawĩko ma Jehova o na wĩra wa moko make
Psalms28:6 Jehova arogoocwo
Psalms28:7 Jehova nĩwe hinya wakwa na nowe ngo yakwa; ngoro yakwa nĩwe ĩĩhokete
Psalms28:8 Jehova nĩwe hinya wa andũ ake
Psalms28:9 Honokia andũ aku na ũrathime igai rĩĩrĩ rĩaku
Psalms29:1 Rahai Jehova
Psalms29:2 Rahai Jehova
Psalms29:3 Mũgambo wa Jehova ũragamba na kũu iria-inĩ; Mũrungu ũcio wa riiri nĩararuruma
Psalms29:4 Mũgambo wa Jehova nĩ ũrĩ ũhoti; mũgambo wa Jehova ũiyũrĩte riiri.
Psalms29:5 Mũgambo wa Jehova unangaga mĩtarakwa; Jehova oinangaga mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni ĩgatuĩka tũcunjĩ.
Psalms29:6 Atũmaga bũrũri wa Lebanoni ũtũũhe ta njaũ
Psalms29:7 Mũgambo wa Jehova ũhenũkaga nĩnĩmbĩ cia mwaki.
Psalms29:8 Mũgambo wa Jehova ũinainagia werũ; Jehova ainainagia Werũ wa Kadeshi.
Psalms29:9 Mũgambo wa Jehova ũthioraga mĩtĩ ya mĩgandi
Psalms29:10 Jehova arĩ igũrũ rĩa mũiyũro wa maaĩ aikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene; Jehova egũtũũra aikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene arĩ Mũthamaki nginya tene.
Psalms29:11 Jehova aheaga andũ ake hinya; Jehova arathimaga andũ ake magaikara na thayũ.
Psalms30:1 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms30:2 Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa
Psalms30:3 Wee Jehova
Psalms30:4 Inĩrai Jehova mũmũgooce
Psalms30:5 nĩgũkorwo marakara make nĩ ma kahinda o kanini
Psalms30:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndagaacĩire
Psalms30:7 Wee Jehova
Psalms30:8 Wee Jehova nĩwe ndakaĩire; ngĩthaitha Mwathani anjiguĩre tha:
Psalms30:9 “Mwanangĩko wakwa ũngĩkorwo na uumithio ũrĩkũ
Psalms30:10 Wee Jehova
Psalms30:11 Wagarũrire kĩgirĩko gĩakwa gĩgĩtuĩka rwĩmbo rwa gĩkeno; ũkĩnduta nguo yakwa ya ikũnia
Psalms30:12 nĩgeetha ngoro yakwa ĩkũinĩre na ndĩgakire. Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa
Psalms31:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms31:2 Ndegera gũtũ na ũhiũhe ũũke ũũhatũre; tuĩka rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga rwa kũũrĩra
Psalms31:3 Nĩgũkorwo Wee nĩwe Rwaro rwakwa rwa Ihiga na gĩikaro gĩakwa kĩirigĩre na hinya
Psalms31:4 Ndeithũkithia mũtego-inĩ ũrĩa nyambĩirwo
Psalms31:5 Roho wakwa ndaũiga moko-inĩ maku; Wee Jehova
Psalms31:6 Nĩthũire arĩa mahooyaga ngai cia mĩhianano ĩtarĩ kĩene; niĩ ndĩhokete o Jehova.
Psalms31:7 Niĩ nĩngũcanjamũka na ngenage nĩ ũndũ wa wendo waku
Psalms31:8 Ndũũneanĩte kũrĩ thũ
Psalms31:9 Njiguĩra tha
Psalms31:10 Muoyo wakwa nĩũniinĩtwo nĩ ruo rũnene
Psalms31:11 Nĩ ũndũ wa thũ ciakwa ciothe
Psalms31:12 Nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ niĩ o ta mũndũ ũkuĩte; ngakĩhaana o ta nyũngũ nguũ.
Psalms31:13 Nĩgũkorwo nĩndĩraigua njambanio ya andũ aingĩ; guoya mũnene ũkĩnyumaga na mĩena yothe; marathugunda manjĩke ũũru
Psalms31:14 No niĩ nĩwe ndĩhokete
Psalms31:15 Mahinda makwa marĩ moko-inĩ maku; ndeithũra kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciakwa
Psalms31:16 Tũma ũthiũ waku warĩre ndungata yaku; honokia nĩ ũndũ wa wendo waku ũtathiraga.
Psalms31:17 Wee Jehova
Psalms31:18 Tũma mĩromo yao ya kũheenania ĩkirio
Psalms31:19 Kaĩ wega waku ũrĩa ũigĩire arĩa magwĩtigĩrĩte
Psalms31:20 Ũmahithaga harĩa Wee ũrĩ o harĩa hegitĩtie
Psalms31:21 Jehova arogoocwo
Psalms31:22 Rĩrĩa ndaarĩ mũmaku
Psalms31:23 Endai Jehova inyuĩ andũ ake aamũre! Jehova nĩamenyagĩrĩra arĩa ehokeku
Psalms31:24 Gĩai na hinya na mwĩyũmĩrĩrie ngoro
Psalms32:1 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms32:2 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms32:3 Rĩrĩa ndakirĩte ki
Psalms32:4 Nĩgũkorwo guoko gwaku nĩ kwanditũhagĩra mũthenya na ũtukũ; hinya wakwa wathirire o ta ũrĩa ime rĩthiraga hĩndĩ ya riũa.
Psalms32:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩkumbũrĩra mehia makwa
Psalms32:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ wothe mwĩtigĩri Ngai nĩakũhooe rĩrĩa ũngĩoneka; ti-itherũ rĩrĩa maaĩ maingĩ marĩ hinya maambũrũrũka
Psalms32:7 Wee nĩwe kĩĩhitho gĩakwa; nĩũkangitĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna
Psalms32:8 Nĩndĩrĩkũrutaga na ngakuonereria njĩra ĩrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũgera; ndĩrĩgũtaaraga na ngũmenyagĩrĩre.
Psalms32:9 Ndũkahaane ta mbarathi kana nyũmbũ
Psalms32:10 Andũ arĩa aaganu monaga maruo maingĩ
Psalms32:11 Inyuĩ arĩa athingu kenerai Jehova na mũcanjamũke; mũinĩrei
Psalms33:1 Inĩrai Jehova mũkenete
Psalms33:2 Goocai Jehova na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto; mũinĩrei na kĩnanda kĩrĩa kĩgeete na nga ikũmi.
Psalms33:3 Mũinĩrei rwĩmbo rwerũ; hũũrai inanda mũrĩ na ũũgĩ
Psalms33:4 Nĩgũkorwo kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩerekereru na nĩ kĩa ma; we nĩ mwĩhokeku maũndũ-inĩ mothe marĩa ekaga.
Psalms33:5 Jehova nĩendete ũthingu na ciira wa kĩhooto; thĩ yothe ĩiyũrĩte wendani wake ũrĩa ũtathiraga.
Psalms33:6 Igũrũ rĩombirwo na ũndũ wa kiugo kĩa Jehova
Psalms33:7 Aacookanĩrĩirie maaĩ ma iria inene ndigithũ-inĩ; maaĩ ma kũrĩa kũriku aamaigire thĩinĩ wa makũmbĩ.
Psalms33:8 Thĩ yothe nĩĩtigĩre Jehova; andũ othe a thĩ nĩmamũtĩĩe.
Psalms33:9 Nĩgũkorwo aaririe
Psalms33:10 Jehova nĩarigiicaga mĩbango ya ndũrĩrĩ; nĩathũkagia mĩoroto ya andũ.
Psalms33:11 No mĩbango ya Jehova ĩĩhaandaga wega nginya tene
Psalms33:12 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms33:13 Jehova arĩ igũrũ aroraga thĩ akoona andũ othe;
Psalms33:14 acũthagĩrĩria arĩa othe matũũraga gũkũ thĩ
Psalms33:15 we nĩwe mũũmbi wa ngoro ciao othe
Psalms33:16 Gũtirĩ mũthamaki ũhonokagio nĩ mũigana wa ita rĩake
Psalms33:17 Ha ũhoro wa kũhonokania-rĩ
Psalms33:18 No rĩrĩ
Psalms33:19 akamateithũra gĩkuũ-inĩ
Psalms33:20 Ithuĩ twetagĩrĩra Jehova tũrĩ na mwĩhoko; nĩwe ũteithio witũ o na ngo iitũ.
Psalms33:21 Ngoro ciitũ nĩcikenete nĩ ũndũ wake
Psalms33:22 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms34:1 Ndĩrĩkumagia Jehova hĩndĩ ciothe; ndĩrĩmũgoocaga na kanua gakwa hĩndĩ ciothe.
Psalms34:2 Ngoro yakwa nĩ Jehova ĩrĩĩrahaga; arĩa anyamaarĩku marĩiguaga ũguo magakena.
Psalms34:3 Goocai Jehova mũmũnenehie mũrĩ hamwe na niĩ; rekei tũtũũgĩrie rĩĩtwa rĩake tũrĩ hamwe.
Psalms34:4 Ndarongoririe Jehova
Psalms34:5 Andũ arĩa mamũcũthagĩrĩria matheragĩrwo nĩ ũtheri; mothiũ mao gũtirĩ hĩndĩ magaaconorithio.
Psalms34:6 Mũndũ ũyũ mũthĩĩni aakaĩire Jehova
Psalms34:7 Mũraika wa Jehova aikaraga arangĩire arĩa othe mamwĩtigagĩra
Psalms34:8 Camai muone atĩ Jehova nĩ mwega; kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũragĩra harĩ we.
Psalms34:9 Mwĩtigĩrei Jehova
Psalms34:10 Mĩrũũthi no yage gĩa kũrĩa ĩhũte
Psalms34:11 Ũkai ciana ciakwa
Psalms34:12 Mũndũ ũrĩa wanyu ũngĩenda gũtũũra muoyo
Psalms34:13 nĩakĩmenyerere rũrĩmĩ rwake rũtikoige ũũru
Psalms34:14 Garũrũka utige gwĩka ũũru na wĩke ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire; caragia thayũ na ũũthingatage.
Psalms34:15 Maitho ma Jehova macũthagĩrĩria andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms34:16 ũthiũ wa Jehova ũũkagĩrĩra andũ arĩa mekaga ũũru
Psalms34:17 Andũ arĩa athingu makayaga
Psalms34:18 Jehova akoragwo arĩ hakuhĩ na andũ arĩa ahehenjeku ngoro
Psalms34:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu no akorwo arĩ na mathĩĩna maingĩ
Psalms34:20 agitagĩra mahĩndĩ make mothe
Psalms34:21 Andũ arĩa aaganu makooragwo nĩ ũũru; nao arĩa mathũire andũ arĩa athingu nĩmagatuĩrwo ciira.
Psalms34:22 Jehova akũũraga ndungata ciake; arĩa othe moragĩra harĩ we gũtirĩ ũgaatuĩrwo ciira.
Psalms35:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms35:2 Oya ngo nene na gako kanini; arahũka ũũke ũndeithie.
Psalms35:3 Hiũria itimũ na mĩcengi
Psalms35:4 Andũ arĩa mendaga kũnduta muoyo maroconorithio na maagithio gĩtĩĩo
Psalms35:5 Marohaana ta mahuti mombũrĩtwo nĩ rũhuho
Psalms35:6 njĩra yao ĩrogĩa nduma na ĩtendere
Psalms35:7 Kuona atĩ nĩmahithĩire wabu wa kũndega hatarĩ gĩtũmi
Psalms35:8 marokorererwo nĩ mwanangĩko matehaarĩirie
Psalms35:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoro yakwa ĩgaacanjamũka nĩ ũndũ wa Jehova
Psalms35:10 Nĩngwanĩrĩra na ngoro yakwa yothe
Psalms35:11 Nĩkuumĩrĩte aira a maheeni
Psalms35:12 Wega wakwa mandĩhaga na ũũru
Psalms35:13 No rĩrĩa o maarĩ arũaru
Psalms35:14 ndaikarire ngĩcakayaga
Psalms35:15 No rĩrĩa ndahĩngirwo ngĩgwa
Psalms35:16 Maanyũrũragia ta andũ matooĩ Ngai
Psalms35:17 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms35:18 Nĩ niĩ ngũgũcookeria ngaatho kĩũngano-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩnene; ndĩkũgoocaga ndĩ gatagatĩ ka andũ aingĩ.
Psalms35:19 Ndũkareke arĩa maathũire tũhũ mangũũrĩre maitho
Psalms35:20 Matiaragia ndeto cia thayũ
Psalms35:21 Manjathamagĩria tũnua twao makoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms35:22 Wee Jehova
Psalms35:23 Arahũka
Psalms35:24 Wee Jehova
Psalms35:25 Ndũkareke meciirie atĩrĩ
Psalms35:26 Arĩa othe mangũũragĩra maitho mangenerere nĩ ũndũ wa mĩnyamaro yakwa maroconorithio na manyiitwo nĩ kĩrigiicano; arĩa othe metũũgagĩria igũrũ rĩakwa maroconorithio na maagithio gĩtĩĩo.
Psalms35:27 Arĩa makenaga ndaatuĩrwo ciira na kĩhooto
Psalms35:28 Rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũrĩaragia ũhoro wa ũthingu waku
Psalms36:1 Ndĩ na ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ngoro-inĩ yakwa
Psalms36:2 Nĩ gũkorwo maitho-inĩ make mwene erahaga mũno
Psalms36:3 Ciugo cia kanua gake nĩ cia waganu na nĩ cia maheeni; nĩatigĩte gũtuĩka mũndũ mũũgĩ na wa gwĩkaga wega.
Psalms36:4 O na arĩ ũrĩrĩ-inĩ wake athugundaga o maũndũ mooru; eheanaga njĩra-inĩ ya kũmwerekeria gwĩka ũũru
Psalms36:5 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms36:6 Ũthingu waku ũhaana ta irĩma iria nene
Psalms36:7 Hĩ! Kaĩ wendo waku ũrĩa ũtathiraga nĩ wa goro mũno-ĩ! Andũ othe anene na anini moragĩra kĩĩgunyĩ-inĩ kĩa mathagu maku.
Psalms36:8 Marĩĩaga makaigania kuumana na ũingĩ wa nyũmba yaku; ũmaheaga gĩa kũnyua kuuma rũũĩ-inĩ rwaku rwa gĩkeno.
Psalms36:9 Nĩgũkorwo gĩthima kĩa muoyo kĩrĩ kũrĩ we; ũtheri-inĩ waku nĩho tuonaga ũtheri.
Psalms36:10 Kĩrĩrĩria kwenda arĩa makũũĩ
Psalms36:11 Ikinya rĩa ũrĩa mwĩtĩĩi rĩroaga kũnjũkĩrĩra
Psalms36:12 Ta rora wone ũrĩa andũ arĩa mekaga ũũru magwĩte thĩ; maikanĩtio thĩ
Psalms37:1 Tigaga gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa mekaga ũũru
Psalms37:2 nĩgũkorwo acio makaahooha o narua o ta ũrĩa nyeki ĩhoohaga
Psalms37:3 Wĩhoke Jehova na wĩkage wega; tũũra bũrũri-inĩ ũkenagĩra ũrĩithio wa thayũ.
Psalms37:4 Ĩkaga maũndũ ma gũkenia Jehova
Psalms37:5 Rekagĩrĩria Jehova njĩra yaku; mwĩhokage o we
Psalms37:6 Nĩarĩtũmaga ũthingu waku ware o ta rũciinĩ
Psalms37:7 Hoorera mbere ya Jehova na ũmweterere ũtegũthethũka; ndũgathĩĩnĩke ngoro rĩrĩa andũ magaacĩra mĩthiĩre-inĩ yao
Psalms37:8 Tigaga kũrakara na wĩrigagĩrĩrie mangʼũrĩ; tigaga gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro
Psalms37:9 Nĩgũkorwo andũ ooru nĩmakaniinwo
Psalms37:10 No kahinda kanini
Psalms37:11 No arĩa ahooreri nĩo makaagaya bũrũri
Psalms37:12 Andũ arĩa aaganu mathugundaga mokĩrĩre andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms37:13 no Mwathani athekagĩrĩra andũ acio aaganu
Psalms37:14 Andũ arĩa aaganu macomorete hiũ cia njora
Psalms37:15 No hiũ icio ciao cia njora igaatheeca ngoro ciao ene
Psalms37:16 Nĩ kaba kĩndũ kĩnini kĩrĩ na andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms37:17 nĩgũkorwo hinya wa andũ arĩa aaganu nĩũkaniinwo
Psalms37:18 Matukũ ma andũ arĩa matarĩ ũcuuke nĩmooĩo nĩ Jehova
Psalms37:19 Hĩndĩ ya mwanangĩko matikoona ũũru; na hĩndĩ ya ngʼaragu magaakorwo na irio cia kũigana.
Psalms37:20 No andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmagathira: Thũ cia Jehova igaathira ta ũrĩa ũthaka wa mĩgũnda ũthiraga
Psalms37:21 Andũ arĩa aaganu makoombaga na matirĩhaga
Psalms37:22 andũ arĩa Jehova arathimĩte nĩmakagaya bũrũri
Psalms37:23 Jehova angĩkenio nĩ mũthiĩre wa mũndũ
Psalms37:24 o na angĩhĩngwo
Psalms37:25 Ndaarĩ mũnini
Psalms37:26 Hĩndĩ ciothe makoragwo marĩ ataana
Psalms37:27 Theemaga ũũru
Psalms37:28 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova endete o kĩhooto
Psalms37:29 Andũ arĩa athingu nĩo makaagaya bũrũri
Psalms37:30 Kanua ka mũndũ mũthingu gatumũkaga ndeto cia ũũgĩ
Psalms37:31 Watho wa Ngai wake ũrĩ o ngoro-inĩ yake; makinya make matingĩtenderũka.
Psalms37:32 Andũ arĩa aaganu maikaraga moheirie arĩa athingu
Psalms37:33 no Jehova ndakamatiganĩria moko-inĩ ma andũ acio aaganu
Psalms37:34 Etagĩrĩra Jehova na ũrũmagĩrĩre njĩra yake. Nĩagagũtũũgĩria nĩguo ũgae bũrũri; rĩrĩa andũ arĩa aaganu makaaniinwo-rĩ
Psalms37:35 Nĩnyonete mũndũ mwaganu na mũndũ ũtarĩ tha agaacĩire ta mũtĩ mũruru ũrĩ o imerero-inĩ rĩaguo
Psalms37:36 no thuutha wa kahinda o kanini akĩehera
Psalms37:37 Cũrania ũhoro wa mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ ũcuuke
Psalms37:38 No rĩrĩ
Psalms37:39 Ũhonokio wa andũ arĩa athingu uumaga kũrĩ Jehova; we nĩwe kĩĩhitho kĩao kĩa hinya hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna.
Psalms37:40 Jehova nĩamateithagia na akamateithũra; amateithũraga kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa aaganu na akamahonokia
Psalms38:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms38:2 Nĩgũkorwo mĩguĩ yaku nĩĩtheceete
Psalms38:3 Ndirĩ na ũgima wa mwĩrĩ tondũ wa mangʼũrĩ maku; mahĩndĩ makwa nĩmarũaru nĩ ũndũ wa mehia makwa.
Psalms38:4 Mahĩtia makwa nĩmanditũhĩire mũno o ta mũrigo mũritũ itangĩhota gũkuua.
Psalms38:5 Ironda ciakwa nĩitogotete na ikanunga nĩ tondũ wa ũrimũ wakwa wa mehia.
Psalms38:6 Thiiaga ndĩĩhacĩte
Psalms38:7 Mũgongo wakwa ũiyũrĩtwo nĩ ruo ta rwa mwaki; ndirĩ na ũgima wa mwĩrĩ.
Psalms38:8 Ndĩ mũmocu na ngathuthĩka biũ; ndĩracaaya nĩ ruo rwa ngoro.
Psalms38:9 Wee Mwathani
Psalms38:10 Ngoro yakwa nĩĩratuuma mũno
Psalms38:11 Arata na athiritũ akwa matiendaga kũnguhĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ wa ironda ciakwa; o na andũ a itũũra rĩakwa manjikaraga haraihu.
Psalms38:12 Andũ arĩa mendaga kũnjũraga nĩ mĩtego mandegagĩra
Psalms38:13 Niĩ haana ta mũndũ gĩtaigua
Psalms38:14 nduĩkĩte ta mũndũ ũtaiguaga
Psalms38:15 Wee Jehova
Psalms38:16 Nĩgũkorwo ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms38:17 Nĩgũkorwo ngirie kũgũa
Psalms38:18 Nĩngumbũra waganu wakwa; nĩthĩĩnĩtio nĩ mehia makwa.
Psalms38:19 Thũ ciakwa iria irĩ kĩyo nĩcio nyingĩ; arĩa maathũire hatarĩ gĩtũmi nĩ aingĩ.
Psalms38:20 Andũ arĩa mandĩhaga wega wakwa na ũũru manjambagia rĩrĩa niĩ ngũthingata ũndũ ũrĩa mwega.
Psalms38:21 Wee Jehova
Psalms38:22 Ũka narua ũndeithie
Psalms39:1 Ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms39:2 No rĩrĩa ndakirĩte na ngahoorera
Psalms39:3 Ngoro yakwa yahĩĩahĩaga thĩinĩ wakwa
Psalms39:4 “Wee Jehova
Psalms39:5 Ũtũmĩte matukũ makwa makuhĩhe ta rũhĩ; mũigana wa mĩaka yakwa ti ta kĩndũ harĩwe. Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩ muoyo o na rĩrĩa ehaandĩte wega nĩ kĩndũ gĩa tũhũ.
Psalms39:6 Ti-itherũ mũndũ nĩ ta kĩĩruru rĩrĩa egũcangacanga: Mĩhangʼo ĩrĩa ehangʼagia nayo no ya tũhũ; eigagĩra ũtonga
Psalms39:7 “No rĩu
Psalms39:8 Honokia kuuma mehia-inĩ makwa mothe; ndũkareke thekererwo nĩ andũ arĩa akĩĩgu.
Psalms39:9 Ndakirĩte ki; ndingĩatumũrire kanua gakwa
Psalms39:10 Njehereria ihũũra rĩaku; nĩhootetwo nĩ iringa rĩa guoko gwaku.
Psalms39:11 We ũrũithagia na ũkaherithia andũ nĩ ũndũ wa mehia mao; ũniinaga ũtonga wao ta memenyi; mũndũ no ta kĩndũ gĩa tũhũ.
Psalms39:12 “Igua ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms39:13 Wĩhũgũre na kũngĩ ũtige kũnyona
Psalms40:1 Ndetereire Jehova o ngirĩrĩirie; nake agĩĩthikĩrĩria akĩigua kĩrĩro gĩakwa.
Psalms40:2 Nĩ aandutire irima rĩa mũũro
Psalms40:3 Eekĩrire rwĩmbo rwerũ kanua-inĩ gakwa
Psalms40:4 Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũtuĩte atĩ arĩĩhokaga o Jehova
Psalms40:5 Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa-rĩ
Psalms40:6 Wee-rĩ
Psalms40:7 Ningĩ ngiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms40:8 Niĩ ndĩriragĩria gwĩka wendi waku
Psalms40:9 Nyanagĩrĩra ũhoro wa ũthingu ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩnene; o ta ũrĩa ũũĩ
Psalms40:10 Niĩ ndihithagĩrĩra ũthingu waku ngoro-inĩ yakwa; njaragia ũhoro wa wĩhokeku na ũhonokio waku. Wendo waku na ũhoro waku wa ma ndirĩ ndacihitha kĩũngano kĩrĩa kĩnene.
Psalms40:11 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms40:12 Nĩgũkorwo mathĩĩna matangĩtarĩka nĩmandigiicĩirie; mehia makwa nĩmanginyĩrĩire
Psalms40:13 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms40:14 Andũ arĩa othe mendaga kũnjũraga maroconorithio na manyiitwo nĩ kĩrigiicano; arĩa othe mendaga nyanangwo marocooka na thuutha maconokete.
Psalms40:15 Andũ arĩa maathekagĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ
Psalms40:16 No arĩa makũrongoragia marokena na macanjamũke nĩ ũndũ waku; arĩa mendete ũhonokio waku marotũũra moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms40:17 No rĩrĩ
Psalms41:1 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms41:2 Jehova nĩarĩmũgitagĩra na amũtũũragie muoyo; nĩarĩmũrathimaga bũrũri-inĩ
Psalms41:3 Jehova nĩarĩmũmenyagĩrĩra arĩ ũrĩrĩ-inĩ arĩ mũrũaru
Psalms41:4 Ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms41:5 Thũ ciakwa ciaragia ũhoro wakwa na rũmena ikooria atĩrĩ
Psalms41:6 Rĩrĩa rĩothe mũndũ ooka kũnyona
Psalms41:7 Thũ ciakwa ciothe iheehanagĩra nĩguo iinjũkĩrĩre; injiiragĩrĩra maũndũ mooru mũno
Psalms41:8 “Mũrimũ mũũru nĩũmũnyiitĩte; ndarĩ hĩndĩ agokĩra hau akomete.”
Psalms41:9 O na mũrata wakwa wa hakuhĩ
Psalms41:10 No rĩrĩ
Psalms41:11 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ nĩũkenetio nĩ niĩ
Psalms41:12 We nĩũũnyiitĩrĩire nĩ ũndũ wa wagĩrĩru wakwa
Psalms41:13 Jehova
Psalms42:1 O ta ũrĩa thwariga ĩnyootagĩra tũrũũĩ twa maaĩ
Psalms42:2 Ngoro yakwa nĩ Ngai ĩnyootagĩra
Psalms42:3 Maithori makwa matuĩkĩte nĩmo irio ciakwa mũthenya o na ũtukũ
Psalms42:4 Maũndũ maya ndĩmaririkanaga o ngĩitũrũraga ngoro yakwa: ngaririkana ũrĩa ndatwaranaga na kĩrĩndĩ
Psalms42:5 Wee ngoro yakwa
Psalms42:6 Ngoro yakwa nĩnditũhĩre ĩrĩ thĩinĩ wakwa; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũkũririkana ndĩ bũrũri wa Jorodani
Psalms42:7 Ndia ĩmwe nĩĩreta ndia ĩrĩa ĩngĩ na mũgambo wa mũrurumo wa ndururumo ciaku cia maaĩ; makũmbĩ maku mothe o na ndiihũ nĩciũkĩte
Psalms42:8 Mũthenya-rĩ
Psalms42:9 Njũũragia Mũrungu
Psalms42:10 Nĩ ta ngũhehenjwo mahĩndĩ makwa
Psalms42:11 Wee ngoro yakwa
Psalms43:1 Nduĩra ciira wakwa
Psalms43:2 Wee Ngai nĩwe kĩirigo gĩakwa kĩa hinya. Ũndiganĩirie nĩkĩ? Ingĩthiĩ ngĩcakayaga nĩkĩ nĩ ũndũ wa kũhinyĩrĩirio nĩ thũ?
Psalms43:3 Tũma ũtheri waku na ũhoro waku wa ma
Psalms43:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngathiĩ kĩgongona-inĩ kĩa Ngai
Psalms43:5 Wee ngoro yakwa
Psalms44:1 Twanaigua na matũ maitũ Wee Ngai
Psalms44:2 Nĩwaingatire ndũrĩrĩ na guoko gwaku
Psalms44:3 Matiegwatĩire bũrũri ũcio na hinya wa rũhiũ rwao
Psalms44:4 Wee nĩwe Mũthamaki wakwa na Ngai wakwa
Psalms44:5 Wee nĩwe ũtũhotithagia kũhoota thũ ciitũ; nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku tũrangagĩrĩria arĩa marĩ muku na ithuĩ.
Psalms44:6 Ndiĩhokaga ũta wakwa
Psalms44:7 no Wee nĩwe ũtũtooranagĩria harĩ thũ ciitũ
Psalms44:8 Ngai nĩwe tũtindaga tũkĩĩrahĩra mũthenya wothe
Psalms44:9 No rĩu nĩũtũtiganĩirie na ũgatũconorithia; nĩũtigĩte gũtwaranaga na mbũtũ ciitũ cia ita.
Psalms44:10 Nĩwatũmire tũũrĩre thũ ciitũ
Psalms44:11 Ũtũrekereirie tũtambuurwo ta ngʼondu
Psalms44:12 Wendetie andũ aku ta kĩndũ tũhũ
Psalms44:13 Nĩũtũmĩte tũmenwo nĩ andũ arĩa tũhakanĩte nao
Psalms44:14 Nĩũtũmĩte tũtuĩke a kuunagwo thimo nĩ ndũrĩrĩ; tũgagĩtuĩka a kũinainagĩrio mĩtwe nĩ andũ.
Psalms44:15 Ndindaga njonokete mũthenya wothe
Psalms44:16 nĩ ũndũ wa inyũrũri cia andũ arĩa maanyũrũragia na makaanuma
Psalms44:17 Twakorirwo nĩ maũndũ macio mothe
Psalms44:18 Ngoro ciitũ iticookete na thuutha; makinya maitũ matiumĩte njĩra-inĩ yaku.
Psalms44:19 No ũtũhehenjete
Psalms44:20 Tũngĩkorwo nĩtwariganĩirwo nĩ rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai witũ
Psalms44:21 githĩ Ngai ndangĩamenyire ũhoro ũcio
Psalms44:22 No nĩ ũndũ waku tũtindaga tũngʼetheire gĩkuũ mũthenya wothe; tũtuĩtwo ta ngʼondu cia gũthĩnjwo.
Psalms44:23 Wee Mwathani
Psalms44:24 Ũhithĩte ũthiũ waku nĩkĩ
Psalms44:25 Tũrũndĩtwo rũkũngũ-inĩ; mĩĩrĩ iitũ ĩkĩnyiitanĩte na thĩ.
Psalms44:26 Arahũka ũtũteithie; tũkũũre tondũ wa wendani waku ũtathiraga.
Psalms45:1 Ngoro yakwa ĩiyũrĩtwo nĩ ũhoro mwega rĩrĩa ngũinĩra mũthamaki rwĩmbo rũrũ; rũrĩmĩ rwakwa no ta karamu ka mwandĩki ũrĩa mũũgĩ.
Psalms45:2 Wee ũrĩ mũthaka mũno gũkĩra andũ othe
Psalms45:3 Wĩohe rũhiũ rwaku rwa njora njohero
Psalms45:4 Ũrĩ thĩinĩ wa ũnene waku thiĩ ũhaicĩte mbarathi
Psalms45:5 Mĩguĩ yaku ĩrĩa mĩũgĩ nĩĩtheece thũ cia mũthamaki o ngoro-inĩ; ndũrĩrĩ nĩigwe magũrũ-inĩ maku.
Psalms45:6 Wee Ngai
Psalms45:7 Wee wendete ũthingu no ũgathũũra waganu; nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai
Psalms45:8 Nguo ciaku ciothe inungĩte o manemane
Psalms45:9 Thĩinĩ wa andũ-a-nja aku arĩa atĩĩku harĩ na aarĩ a athamaki; mũhiki ũcio wa mũthamaki aikarĩte mwena waku wa ũrĩo egemetie na thahabu ya Ofiri.
Psalms45:10 Ta thikĩrĩria
Psalms45:11 Mũthamaki nĩakenetio mũno nĩ ũthaka waku; mũtĩĩe
Psalms45:12 Mwarĩ wa Turo nĩagakũrehera kĩheo
Psalms45:13 Mwarĩ wa mũthamaki no riiri mũtheri arĩ naguo arĩ thĩinĩ wa nyũmba yake
Psalms45:14 Aratwarwo harĩ mũthamaki ehumbĩte nguo ngʼemie; oimĩtwo thuutha nĩ airĩtu gathirange a thiritũ yake
Psalms45:15 Mararehwo na gĩkeno na ndũhiũ; nĩmatoonye nyũmba ya mũthamaki.
Psalms45:16 Ciana cianyu nĩcio igaacooka ithenya rĩa maithe manyu; ũkaamatua anene bũrũri-inĩ guothe.
Psalms45:17 Nĩngũtũma ũtũũre ũririkanagwo nĩ njiarwa na njiarwa; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũrĩrĩ igaatũũra igũkumagia tene na tene.
Psalms46:1 Ngai nĩwe rĩũrĩro riitũ o na hinya witũ
Psalms46:2 Tondũ ũcio tũtingĩĩtigĩra
Psalms46:3 o na maaĩ marĩo mangĩruruma na mahũyũke
Psalms46:4 Nĩ kũrĩ rũũĩ rũrĩa tũrũũĩ twaruo tũkenagia itũũra rĩa Ngai
Psalms46:5 Ngai arĩ kũu thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu
Psalms46:6 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩiraronja
Psalms46:7 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ; Ngai wa Jakubu nĩwe kĩirigo giitũ kĩa hinya.
Psalms46:8 Ũkai muone ciĩko iria Jehova ekĩte
Psalms46:9 Aniinaga mbaara nginya ituri cia thĩ; oinaga ũta na agathethera itimũ
Psalms46:10 “Hoorerai
Psalms46:11 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ; Ngai wa Jakubu nĩwe kĩirigo giitũ kĩa hinya.
Psalms47:1 Inyuĩ andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Psalms47:2 Jehova Ũrĩa-Ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno kaĩ nĩ wa gwĩtigĩrwo-ĩ
Psalms47:3 Atooragia ndũrĩrĩ igaikara rungu rwitũ
Psalms47:4 Nĩwe watũthuurĩire igai riitũ
Psalms47:5 Ngai nĩambatĩte
Psalms47:6 Inĩrai Ngai mũmũgooce na nyĩmbo
Psalms47:7 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai nĩwe Mũthamaki wa thĩ yothe; mũgoocei na nyĩmbo.
Psalms47:8 Ngai nĩwe ũthamakagĩra ndũrĩrĩ; Ngai aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake kĩrĩa gĩtheru kĩa ũnene.
Psalms47:9 Andũ a ndũrĩrĩ arĩa marĩ igweta nĩmonganĩte matuĩke ta andũ a Ngai wa Iburahĩmu
Psalms48:1 Jehova nĩ mũnene
Psalms48:2 Kĩrĩma kĩu kĩa Ngai nĩ gĩthaka na gĩkaraiha na igũrũ
Psalms48:3 Ngai arĩ thĩinĩ wa ciikaro iria ngitĩre cia mũthamaki; nake nĩeyonanĩtie atĩ nĩwe kĩirigo gĩacio kĩa hinya.
Psalms48:4 Rĩrĩa athamaki maanyiitanire hamwe na magĩthiĩ magatharĩkĩre itũũra rĩu
Psalms48:5 maarĩonire
Psalms48:6 O hau-hau makĩnyiitwo nĩ kũinaina
Psalms48:7 Wamanangire o ta ũrĩa marikabu cia Tarishishi cianangagwo nĩ rũhuho ruumĩte mwena wa irathĩro.
Psalms48:8 O ta ũrĩa tũiguĩte
Psalms48:9 Tũrĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ yaku
Psalms48:10 O ta ũrĩa rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩtariĩ
Psalms48:11 Kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni nĩgĩkenaga
Psalms48:12 Ceeraceerai Zayuni
Psalms48:13 mũrore ũrĩa kũirigĩtwo na hinya
Psalms48:14 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ũyũ nĩwe Ngai witũ nginya tene na tene; egũtũũra atũtongoragia nginya hĩndĩ ĩtagathira.
Psalms49:1 Iguai ũhoro ũyũ
Psalms49:2 inyuĩ mũtarĩ igweta na arĩa mũrĩ igweta
Psalms49:3 Kanua gakwa nĩgekwaria ciugo cia ũũgĩ
Psalms49:4 Nĩngũtega gũtũ ndĩĩiguĩre thimo; njooke ndaũre ndaĩ ĩno ngĩhũũraga kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto:
Psalms49:5 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩtũma ndĩtigĩre hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna
Psalms49:6 o acio mehokaga ũtonga wao
Psalms49:7 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũkũũra muoyo wa mũndũ ũngĩ
Psalms49:8 nĩgũkorwo ũkũũri wa muoyo nĩ ũndũ wa goro mũno
Psalms49:9 atĩ nĩguo mũndũ atũũre muoyo nginya tene
Psalms49:10 Nĩgũkorwo andũ othe nĩmonaga atĩ o na andũ arĩa oogĩ nĩmakuuaga; mũndũ mũkĩĩgu na mũndũ kĩrimũ o nao nĩmakuaga
Psalms49:11 Mbĩrĩra ciao igũtũũra irĩ nyũmba ciao nginya tene
Psalms49:12 No mũndũ-rĩ
Psalms49:13 Ũyũ nĩguo ũndũ ũrĩa wathĩrĩirio arĩa meĩhokaga o ene
Psalms49:14 Maathĩrĩirio mbĩrĩra o ta ngʼondu cia gũthĩnjwo
Psalms49:15 No Ngai nĩagakũũra muoyo wakwa kuuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ; ti-itherũ nĩwe ũkaanyamũkĩra.
Psalms49:16 Ndũkanetigĩre mũndũ rĩrĩa aatuĩka gĩtonga
Psalms49:17 nĩgũkorwo ndarĩ kĩndũ agaathiĩ nakĩo akua
Psalms49:18 O na gũtuĩka rĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo eyoonaga arĩ mũrathime
Psalms49:19 agakua athiĩ kũrĩ maithe mao
Psalms49:20 Mũndũ mũtongu ũtarĩ na ũmenyo atariĩ o ta nyamũ iria ikuuaga igathira.
Psalms50:1 Jehova
Psalms50:2 Ngai aracangarara arĩ Zayuni itũũra rĩu ithaka mũno.
Psalms50:3 Ngai witũ nĩ gũũka arooka na ndegũkira; mbere yake nĩ mwaki ũrakana
Psalms50:4 Areeta igũrũ na thĩ nĩguo ituĩke aira agĩciirithia andũ ake:
Psalms50:5 “Cookanĩrĩrai harĩ niĩ inyuĩ andũ akwa aamũre
Psalms50:6 Narĩo igũrũ rĩanagĩrĩra ũthingu wake
Psalms50:7 “Inyuĩ andũ akwa
Psalms50:8 Ndirakũrũithia nĩ ũndũ wa magongona maku
Psalms50:9 Ndibatarĩtio nĩ ndegwa yumĩte kiugũ gĩaku
Psalms50:10 nĩgũkorwo nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka nĩ ciakwa
Psalms50:11 Nyoni ciothe iria irĩ kũu irĩma-inĩ
Psalms50:12 Ingĩkorwo hũtiĩ
Psalms50:13 Niĩ nĩndĩĩaga nyama cia ndegwa
Psalms50:14 Rutĩra Ngai igongona rĩa gũcookia ngaatho
Psalms50:15 na ũngayagĩre mũthenya wa mĩnyamaro; na nĩndĩrĩkũhonokagia
Psalms50:16 No rĩrĩ
Psalms50:17 Nĩũmenete ũrutani wakwa
Psalms50:18 Rĩrĩa wona mũici
Psalms50:19 Ũhũthagĩra kanua gaku kwaria ndeto njũru
Psalms50:20 Hĩndĩ ciothe waragia ndeto cia gũũkĩrĩra mũrũ wa thoguo
Psalms50:21 Maũndũ macio ũmekaga o ngirĩte
Psalms50:22 “Mwĩcũraniei ũhoro ũyũ
Psalms50:23 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrutaga igongona rĩa gũcookia ngaatho nĩ niĩ atĩĩaga
Psalms51:1 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms51:2 Thambia mahĩtia makwa mothe
Psalms51:3 Nĩgũkorwo nĩnjũũĩ mahĩtia makwa
Psalms51:4 Wee nĩwe njĩhĩirie
Psalms51:5 Ti-itherũ ndaciarirwo ndĩ mwĩhia; maitũ aagĩire nda ya kũnjiara arĩ o na mehia.
Psalms51:6 Ti-itherũ
Psalms51:7 Theria na mũthobi
Psalms51:8 Tũma ngene na njanjamũke; mahĩndĩ marĩa ũthetherete nĩmagĩkene.
Psalms51:9 Hitha ũthiũ waku ndũkoone mehia makwa
Psalms51:10 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms51:11 Ndũkanyingate nyume harĩwe
Psalms51:12 Njookeria gĩkeno kĩrĩa kĩa ũhonokio waku
Psalms51:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngaruta andũ arĩa aremi nĩguo mamenye njĩra ciaku
Psalms51:14 Wee Ngai

Psalms51:16 Wee ndũkenagio nĩ kũrutĩrwo igongona
Psalms51:17 Magongona marĩa Ngai etĩkagĩra nĩ roho ũrĩa mũthuthĩku; ngoro ĩrĩa thuthĩku na ĩkahera-rĩ
Psalms51:18 Tũma itũũra rĩa Zayuni rĩgaacĩre nĩ ũndũ wa wega waku; aka thingo cia Jerusalemu rĩngĩ.
Psalms51:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũgakenagĩra magongona ma ũthingu
Psalms52:1 Wee njamba ĩno ĩrĩ hinya
Psalms52:2 Rũrĩmĩ rwaku rũthugundaga mwanangĩko; rũhaana ta rwenji rũnoore
Psalms52:3 Wendete maũndũ mooru gũkĩra marĩa mega
Psalms52:4 Wendete ciugo o ciothe ithũkagia andũ
Psalms52:5 Ti-itherũ Mũrungu nĩagakwananga nginya tene na tene: Agakũnyiita
Psalms52:6 Andũ arĩa athingu nĩmakona ũguo metigĩre; nao magathekerera mũndũ ũcio
Psalms52:7 “Ũyũ nĩwe mũndũ ũrĩa wagire gũtua Ngai kĩĩhitho gĩake kĩa hinya
Psalms52:8 No rĩrĩ
Psalms52:9 Ngũtũũra ngũgoocaga nginya tene nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wĩkĩte; ndĩrĩĩhokaga rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms53:1 Kĩrimũ kĩĩraga na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms53:2 Ngai aroraga ciana cia andũ arĩ o igũrũ
Psalms53:3 Othe nĩmacookete na thuutha
Psalms53:4 Andũ acio mekaga maũndũ mooru kaĩ matarĩ ũmenyo
Psalms53:5 O hau-rĩ
Psalms53:6 Naarĩ korwo ũhonokio wa Isiraeli no ũgĩũke kuuma Zayuni! Rĩrĩa Ngai agacookereria andũ ake na indo ciao-rĩ

Psalms54:2 Wee Ngai
Psalms54:3 Andũ ageni nĩmanjũkĩrĩire; nao andũ matarĩ tha nĩmaracaria muoyo wakwa
Psalms54:4 Ti-itherũ Ngai nĩwe ũteithio wakwa; Mwathani nĩwe ũndiiragĩrĩra.
Psalms54:5 Cookereria andũ arĩa manjambagia ũũru wao; Wee maniine nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhokeku waku.
Psalms54:6 Nĩngũkũrutĩra igongona rĩa kwĩyendera; nĩngũgooca rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms54:7 Nĩgũkorwo nĩahonoketie mathĩĩna-inĩ makwa mothe
Psalms55:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms55:2 njigua na ũnjĩtĩke. Meciiria makwa nĩmathĩĩnĩtie na ndĩ mũgiĩku
Psalms55:3 nĩ ũndũ wa mũgambo wa thũ
Psalms55:4 Ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ na ruo rũnene thĩinĩ wakwa
Psalms55:5 Guoya na kũinaina nĩcindigiicĩirie; hubanĩirio nĩ kĩmako kĩnene.
Psalms55:6 Na niĩ ngiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms55:7 ingĩũra thiĩ kũndũ kũraya
Psalms55:8 ingĩhiũha thiĩ handũ harĩa ingĩĩgitia
Psalms55:9 Wee Mwathani
Psalms55:10 Mũthenya na ũtukũ
Psalms55:11 Thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu inene no mwanangĩko ũrĩ kuo; kwĩhĩtanĩra na kũheenania ciyũrĩte njĩra-inĩ ciarĩo.
Psalms55:12 Korwo nĩ thũ ĩranuma-rĩ
Psalms55:13 No rĩrĩ
Psalms55:14 o wee twanakenanĩra tũrĩ na ngwatanĩro njega
Psalms55:15 Gĩkuũ kĩrohubanĩria thũ ciakwa o rĩmwe; iroikũrũka mbĩrĩra irĩ muoyo
Psalms55:16 No rĩrĩ
Psalms55:17 Hwaĩ-inĩ

Psalms55:19 Mũrungu ũrĩa ũtũũrĩte aikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene nginya tene
Psalms55:20 Mũndũ ũcio tũrĩ thiritũ nake atharĩkagĩra arata ake
Psalms55:21 Mĩario yake ĩnyorokete o ta thiagĩ

Psalms56:1 Wee Ngai

Psalms56:3 Rĩrĩa ndetigĩra-rĩ

Psalms60:1 Wee Ngai nĩũtũtiganĩirie na ũgatũharagania; ũkoretwo ũtũrakarĩire

Psalms60:3 Nĩũtũmĩte andũ aku makorwo na mahinda maritũ; ũmanyuithĩtie ndibei magathiĩ magĩtũgũũgaga.

Psalms60:5 Tũhonokie na ũtũteithie na guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo

Psalms60:7 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa

Psalms61:5 Nĩgũkorwo Wee Ngai nĩũiguĩte mĩĩhĩtwa yakwa
Psalms61:6 Ongerera matukũ ma mũthamaki ma gũtũũra muoyo
Psalms61:7 Aroikarĩra gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene arĩ mbere ya Ngai nginya tene; tũma wendo na wĩhokeku waku imũgitagĩre.

Psalms62:1 Ngoro yakwa yetagĩrĩra Ngai o we wiki; ũhonokio wakwa uumaga harĩ we.
Psalms62:2 O we wiki nĩwe rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga na ũhonokio wakwa; nĩwe kĩirigo gĩakwa kĩa hinya
Psalms62:3 Nĩ nginya rĩ mũgũtũũra mũtharĩkagĩra mũndũ? Mwamũũraga inyuothe
Psalms62:4 Nĩmatuĩte itua mamweherie ũnene-inĩ wake; makenagio nĩ maheeni. Marathimanaga na tũnua twao
Psalms62:5 Wee ngoro yakwa
Psalms62:6 O we wiki nĩwe rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga na ũhonokio wakwa; nĩwe kĩirigo gĩakwa kĩa hinya ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngenyenyeka.
Psalms62:7 Ũhonokio wakwa na gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa ciumaga kũrĩ Ngai; nĩwe rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga rũrĩ hinya
Psalms62:8 Inyuĩ andũ aya
Psalms62:9 Andũ arĩa matarĩ igweta no mĩhũmũ tu
Psalms62:10 Mũtikehoke ũtunyani kana mwĩtĩĩe na indo cia kũiya; o na ũtonga wanyu ũngĩingĩha-rĩ

Psalms62:12 na atĩ Wee Mwathani
Psalms63:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms63:2 Nĩnguonete ũrĩ handũ-harĩa-haamũre

Psalms63:4 Ndĩrĩkũgoocaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe ngũtũũra muoyo
Psalms63:5 Ngoro yakwa ĩiganĩire ta ĩrĩĩte irio iria njega mũno; nako kanua gakwa nĩkarĩkũgoocaga
Psalms63:6 Ngũririkanaga ndĩ ũrĩrĩ; ndĩciiragia ũhoro waku ũtukũ wothe.
Psalms63:7 Tondũ Wee nĩwe ũteithio wakwa-rĩ
Psalms63:8 Ngoro yakwa nĩĩnyiitĩrĩire harĩwe; guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo gũkaanyiitĩrĩra.
Psalms63:9 Andũ arĩa macaragia muoyo wakwa nĩguo maũniine nĩmakanangwo; magaatoonyerera na thĩ nginya kũrĩa kũriku mũno.

Psalms64:9 Andũ othe nĩmagetigĩra; nĩmakaheana ũhoro wa wĩra wa Ngai

Psalms65:4 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms65:5 Ũtũcookagĩria ũhoro na ciĩko cia magegania na cia kĩhooto

Psalms65:7 o Wee wahooreririe mũrurumo wa maria
Psalms65:8 Andũ arĩa matũũraga kũraya nĩmetigagĩra magegania maku; ũtũmaga thĩ yothe ĩkene
Psalms65:9 Wee nĩwe ũmenyagĩrĩra thĩ na ũkamiurĩria mbura; ũtũmaga ĩgĩe na bũthi mũingĩ. Rũũĩ rwa Ngai rũiyũrĩte maaĩ ma gũkũrĩria andũ irio

Psalms66:1 Anĩrĩrai Ngai mũkenete mũrĩ mbere ya Jehova

Psalms66:3 Ĩrai Ngai atĩrĩ
Psalms66:4 Andũ othe a thĩ nĩwe mainamagĩrĩra; mainaga magakũgooca
Psalms66:5 Ũkai muone ũrĩa Ngai ekĩte

Psalms68:12 “Athamaki na mbũtũ cia ita moraga na ihenya; nakuo kambĩ-inĩ andũ magayanaga indo cia ndaho.
Psalms68:13 O na rĩrĩa mũkomete hakuhĩ na mwaki wa gĩikaro kĩa nja

Psalms69:1 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms69:2 Ndĩratoonyerera mũtondo-inĩ mũriku
Psalms69:3 Nĩnogete mũno nĩ gũkaya ndeithio; mũmero wakwa nĩ mũngʼaru. Maitho makwa nĩmorĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩgũcũthĩrĩria Ngai wakwa.
Psalms69:4 Andũ arĩa maathũire hatarĩ gĩtũmi nĩ aingĩ gũkĩra njuĩrĩ cia mũtwe wakwa; thũ ciakwa iria iithũire hatarĩ gĩtũmi nĩ nyingĩ
Psalms69:5 Wee Ngai nĩũũĩ ũrimũ wakwa; mahĩtia makwa matingĩhithĩka harĩwe.
Psalms69:6 Andũ arĩa makwĩhokete
Psalms69:7 Nĩgũkorwo nĩngirĩrĩirie kũmenwo nĩ ũndũ waku
Psalms69:8 Nduĩkĩte ta mũgeni harĩ ariũ a baba
Psalms69:9 kĩyo kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo kĩa nyũmba yaku nĩkĩo kĩrandĩa
Psalms69:10 Rĩrĩa ngũrĩra na ngehinga kũrĩa irio
Psalms69:11 rĩrĩa ndehumba nguo ya ikũnia
Psalms69:12 Andũ arĩa maikaraga kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa itũũra nĩ niĩ manyũrũragia
Psalms69:13 Wee Jehova
Psalms69:14 Honokia ũndute mũtondo-inĩ
Psalms69:15 Ndũkareke mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũũhubĩkanie
Psalms69:16 Wee Jehova
Psalms69:17 Ndũkahithe ndungata yaku ũthiũ waku; njĩtĩka narua
Psalms69:18 Ũka hakuhĩ ũndeithũre; honokia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciakwa.
Psalms69:19 We nĩũũĩ ũrĩa nyũrũrĩtio
Psalms69:20 Kũnyũrũrio nĩ gũũthuthĩte ngoro ngatigwo itarĩ na mwĩhoko; ndeetereire nyone wa kũnjiguĩra tha
Psalms69:21 Maanjĩkĩrĩire maaĩ ma nyongo irio-inĩ ciakwa
Psalms69:22 Metha ĩrĩa maarĩirwo ĩrotuĩka mũtego; ĩrotuĩka ihũũra o na mũtego wa kũmagwatia.
Psalms69:23 Maitho mao marogĩa nduma matige gũcooka kuona
Psalms69:24 Maitũrũrĩre mangʼũrĩ maku; makinyĩrie marakara maku mahiũ.
Psalms69:25 Mĩciĩ yao ĩrokira ihooru; kũroaga mũndũ wa gũtũũra hema-inĩ ciao.
Psalms69:26 Nĩgũkorwo manyariiraga arĩa wee ũgurarĩtie
Psalms69:27 Mathitangĩre o ngero thuutha wa ĩrĩa ĩngĩ; ndũkanareke magatoonya ũhonokanio-inĩ waku.
Psalms69:28 Marothario ibuku-inĩ rĩa muoyo
Psalms69:29 Ndĩ na ruo na ngathĩĩnĩka; Wee Ngai kĩĩhonokie na ũngitĩre.
Psalms69:30 Nĩngũgooca rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai na rwĩmbo
Psalms69:31 Naguo ũndũ ũcio nĩũgũgĩkenia Jehova gũkĩra kũmũhe ndegwa
Psalms69:32 Andũ arĩa athĩĩni mona ũguo nĩmagakena; inyuĩ arĩa mũrongoragia Ngai
Psalms69:33 Jehova nĩathikagĩrĩria arĩa abatari
Psalms69:34 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩimũgooce
Psalms69:35 nĩgũkorwo Ngai nĩakahonokia Zayuni
Psalms69:36 ciana cia ndungata ciake nĩigakũgaya
Psalms70:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms70:2 Andũ arĩa mendaga kũnjũraga maroconorithio na manyiitwo nĩ kĩrigiicano; arĩa othe mendaga nyanangwo marocooka na thuutha maconokete.
Psalms70:3 Andũ arĩa mathekagĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ
Psalms70:4 No arĩa othe makũrongoragia marokena na macanjamũke; arĩa mendete ũhonokio waku marotũũra moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms70:5 No rĩrĩ
Psalms71:1 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms71:2 Ndeithũra na ũũhonokie nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu waku; thikĩrĩria ũũhonokie.
Psalms71:3 Tuĩka rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga rwa kũũrĩra
Psalms71:4 Honokia
Psalms71:5 Nĩgũkorwo ũkoretwo ũrĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa
Psalms71:6 Kuuma gũciarwo gwakwa ndũũrĩte ngwĩhokete; nĩwe wandutire nda ya maitũ. Ngũtũũra ngũgoocaga.
Psalms71:7 Nĩnduĩkĩte ta kĩndũ gĩa kũgegania harĩ andũ aingĩ
Psalms71:8 Kanua gakwa kaiyũrĩte ũgooci waku
Psalms71:9 Ndũkande hĩndĩ ya ũkũrũ; ndũkanandiganĩrie rĩrĩa itarĩ na hinya.
Psalms71:10 Nĩgũkorwo thũ ciakwa ciaragia ũhoro wa kũnjũkĩrĩra; acio metagĩrĩra kũnjũraga nĩmacokanĩtie ndundu.
Psalms71:11 Moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms71:12 Wee Ngai
Psalms71:13 Acio maathitangaga-rĩ
Psalms71:14 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms71:15 Kanua gakwa karĩganaga ũthingu waku
Psalms71:16 Wee Mwathani Jehova
Psalms71:17 Kuuma ndĩ o mũnini
Psalms71:18 Wee Ngai
Psalms71:19 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms71:20 O na gũtuĩka nĩũtũmĩte nyone mathĩĩna maingĩ na marũrũ-rĩ
Psalms71:21 Nĩũkongerera gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa
Psalms71:22 Ndĩrĩkũgoocaga na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhokeku waku
Psalms71:23 Mĩromo yakwa nĩrĩanagĩrĩra nĩ gũkena rĩrĩa ngũina ngũgooce
Psalms71:24 Rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũrĩrahaga ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia ũthingu mũthenya wothe
Psalms72:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms72:2 Nake nĩarĩciiragĩra andũ aku na ũthingu
Psalms72:3 Irĩma igaatũmaga andũ magaacĩre
Psalms72:4 Nĩarĩgitagĩra andũ arĩa anyamaarĩku gatagatĩ ka andũ
Psalms72:5 Mũthamaki arotũũra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe riũa rĩgũtũũra
Psalms72:6 Arĩhaanaga ta mbura ĩkiurĩra mũgũnda mũtũgũte
Psalms72:7 Matukũ-inĩ make andũ arĩa athingu nĩmagatheerema; naguo ũgaacĩru ũingĩhe o nginya rĩrĩa mweri ũgaakorwo ũtarĩ ho.
Psalms72:8 Agaathanaga kuuma iria rĩmwe nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ
Psalms72:9 Ndũrĩrĩ cia werũ-inĩ nĩikainamĩrĩra mbere yake
Psalms72:10 Athamaki a Tarishishi na a mabũrũri marĩa marĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia kũraya nĩmakamũrehagĩra igooti; nao athamaki a Sheba na Seba nĩmakamũrehagĩra iheo.
Psalms72:11 Athamaki othe makaamũinamĩrĩra
Psalms72:12 Nĩgũkorwo nĩakahonokia abatari maamũkaĩra
Psalms72:13 Nĩakaiguagĩra tha arĩa matarĩ hinya na arĩa abatari
Psalms72:14 Nĩakamateithũra kuuma kũrĩ arĩa mamahinyagĩrĩria na kuuma haaro-inĩ
Psalms72:15 Arogĩtũũra hĩndĩ ndaaya! Aroheagwo thahabu ya kuuma Sheba. Arotũũra ahooyagĩrwo nĩ andũ hĩndĩ ciothe
Psalms72:16 Bũrũri ũrogĩa na bũthi wa ngano kũndũ guothe; ĩrorirũkĩra tũrĩma-igũrũ. Maciaro makuo marothegea ta ma Lebanoni; nakuo matũũra-inĩ andũ marotheerema ta nyeki ya gĩthaka.
Psalms72:17 Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩrotũũra nginya tene; rĩrotũũra o ta ũrĩa riũa rĩgũtũũra. Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩikarathimwo nĩ ũndũ wake
Psalms72:18 Goocai Jehova Ngai
Psalms72:19 Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩu rĩrĩ riiri rĩrogoocagwo nginya tene; nayo thĩ yothe ĩroiyũrwo nĩ riiri wake. Ameni
Psalms72:20 Ũcio nĩguo mũthia wa mahooya ma Daudi
Psalms73:1 Ti-itherũ Ngai nĩ mwega harĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Psalms73:2 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms73:3 Nĩgũkorwo nĩndaiguagĩra arĩa etĩĩi ũiru
Psalms73:4 Nĩgũkorwo matithĩĩnĩkaga; mĩĩrĩ yao nĩ mĩgima na ĩkoragwo na hinya.
Psalms73:5 Matikoragwo na moritũ ta andũ arĩa angĩ
Psalms73:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩtĩĩo nĩguo mũgathĩ wao; o ene mehumbaga ũhinya.
Psalms73:7 Ũmũ wa ngoro ciao ũtherũkaga o ũmaramari; meciiria mao mooru matirĩ mũhaka.
Psalms73:8 Nĩ andũ a kĩnyũrũri
Psalms73:9 Tũnua twao twaragia ũũru wa gũũkĩrĩra igũrũ
Psalms73:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ ao nĩmakamacokerera na metĩkie ũrĩa wothe makoiga.
Psalms73:11 Makoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms73:12 Ũũ nĩguo andũ arĩa aaganu matariĩ: tondũ gũtirĩ ũndũ ũmamakagia
Psalms73:13 Ti-itherũ
Psalms73:14 Nĩgũkorwo ndindaga na mĩnyamaro mũthenya wothe; herithĩtio rũciinĩ o rũciinĩ.
Psalms73:15 Ingĩoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms73:16 No rĩrĩa ndageragia gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũhoro ũcio wothe
Psalms73:17 o nginya rĩrĩa ndatoonyire handũ-harĩa-haamũre ha Mũrungu; hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩkĩmenya ũrĩa makaarĩkĩrĩria.
Psalms73:18 Ti-itherũ ũmaigaga kũndũ kũrĩa gũtenderũ; ũmagũithagia thĩ makaanangĩka.
Psalms73:19 Hĩ! Kaĩ nĩmakanangwo o rĩmwe-ĩ! Makaaniinwo biũ nĩ imakania!
Psalms73:20 O ta ũrĩa kĩroto gĩthiraga mũndũ okĩra
Psalms73:21 Rĩrĩa ngoro yakwa yarĩ na kĩeha na roho wakwa ũgatuurwo
Psalms73:22 ndiarĩ na meciiria magima
Psalms73:23 No rĩrĩ
Psalms73:24 Nĩũndongoragia na ũtaaro waku
Psalms73:25 Nũũ ũngĩ ndĩ nake kũu igũrũ tiga Wee? Gũkũ thĩ ndirĩ na kĩndũ ĩngĩĩrirĩria tiga o Wee.
Psalms73:26 Mwĩrĩ wakwa na ngoro yakwa no ciage hinya
Psalms73:27 Ti-itherũ arĩa magũtiganagĩria nĩmagathira; nĩũkanangaga arĩa othe matakwĩhokete.
Psalms73:28 No ha ũhoro wakwa-rĩ
Psalms74:1 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms74:2 Ririkana andũ arĩa wegũrĩire o tene
Psalms74:3 Erekeria makinya maku kũrĩ mwanangĩko ũyũ ũtũũrĩte kuo
Psalms74:4 Amuku aku mararamĩire harĩa wacemanĩirie na ithuĩ; maahaandire bendera ciao irĩ imenyithia.
Psalms74:5 Metuĩte ta andũ mekũhiũria mathanwa mateme mĩtĩ ya mũtitũ.
Psalms74:6 Mbaũ iria ciothe ciagemetio magĩciunanga na mathanwa na ibũi ciao.
Psalms74:7 Nĩmacinire handũ-haku-harĩa-haamũre hakĩmomoka
Psalms74:8 Moigire atĩrĩ na ngoro ciao
Psalms74:9 Gũtirĩ ciama tũringagĩrwo mahinda maya; anabii nĩmathirĩte
Psalms74:10 Wee Ngai
Psalms74:11 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte ũthune guoko gwaku
Psalms74:12 No rĩrĩ
Psalms74:13 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:14 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:15 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:16 Mũthenya nĩ waku o na ũtukũ no waku; Wee nĩwe wahaandire riũa na mweri.
Psalms74:17 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:18 Ririkana ũrĩa thũ ĩkũnyũrũrĩtie
Psalms74:19 Ndũkaneane muoyo wa ndirahũgĩ yaku kũrĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka; ndũkariganĩrwo nĩ mĩoyo ya andũ aku arĩa manyariirĩtwo nginya tene.
Psalms74:20 Ririkana kĩrĩkanĩro gĩaku
Psalms74:21 Ndũkareke mũndũ ũrĩa mũhinyĩrĩrie acooke na thuutha aconokete; andũ arĩa athĩĩni na arĩa abatari nĩmagooce rĩĩtwa rĩaku.
Psalms74:22 Arahũka
Psalms74:23 Ndũkariganĩrwo nĩ mbugĩrĩrio ya amuku aku
Psalms75:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms75:2 Uugaga atĩrĩ
Psalms75:3 Rĩrĩa thĩ na andũ ayo othe maathingitha
Psalms75:4 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi ngũmeera atĩrĩ
Psalms75:5 Tigai kwambararia hĩa cianyu na igũrũ
Psalms75:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Psalms75:7 No rĩrĩ
Psalms75:8 Jehova anyiitĩte gĩkombe kĩiyũrĩte ndibei ĩrĩ na mũhũũyũ
Psalms75:9 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms75:10 Nĩngarenga hĩa cia andũ arĩa othe aaganu
Psalms76:1 Kũu Juda Ngai nĩoĩkaine; rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ inene thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli.
Psalms76:2 Hema yake ĩrĩ kũu Salemu
Psalms76:3 Kũu nĩkuo oinangĩire mĩguĩ ya ũta ĩkũhenia
Psalms76:4 Wee ũcangararĩte nĩ ũtheri
Psalms76:5 Andũ arĩa njamba magwĩte magatunywo indo
Psalms76:6 Nĩ ũndũ wa ikũũma rĩaku
Psalms76:7 Wee nowe wa gwĩtigĩrwo. Nũũ ũngĩrũgama mbere yaku rĩrĩa ũrĩ mũrakaru?
Psalms76:8 Wamenyithanirie itua rĩaku ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
Psalms76:9 rĩrĩa Wee Ngai
Psalms76:10 Ti-itherũ mangʼũrĩ ma andũ nĩmagakũgoocithia
Psalms76:11 Mwĩhĩtei mĩĩhĩtwa harĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu na mũmĩhingie; rekei mabũrũri marĩa mothe mũriganĩtie namo marehere ũcio wa gwĩtigĩrwo iheo.
Psalms76:12 Athuthaga roho wa arĩa maathanaga; etigagĩrwo nĩ athamaki a thĩ.
Psalms77:1 Ndakaĩire Ngai andeithie; ndakaĩire Ngai nĩguo anjigue.
Psalms77:2 Rĩrĩa ndaarĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ
Psalms77:3 Wee Ngai
Psalms77:4 Wee watũmire njũrwo nĩ toro
Psalms77:5 Ndeciiririe ũhoro wa matukũ ma tene
Psalms77:6 ngĩkĩĩririkania ũrĩa ndainaga ũtukũ
Psalms77:7 “Mwathani egũtũũra atũregete nginya tene? Ndarĩ hĩndĩ agacooka gũtũkenera?
Psalms77:8 Wendo wake ũtathiraga-rĩ
Psalms77:9 Kaĩ Mũrungu ariganĩirwo nĩkũiguanĩra tha? Kaĩ marakara make matũmĩte atige gũtugana?”
Psalms77:10 Ngĩcooka ngĩĩciiria atĩrĩ
Psalms77:11 Nĩngũririkana ciĩko cia Jehova; ĩĩ nĩguo
Psalms77:12 Ndĩrĩtaranagia mawĩra maku mothe
Psalms77:13 Njĩra ciaku
Psalms77:14 Wee nĩwe Mũrungu ũrĩa ũringaga ciama; wonanagia ũhoti waku kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ.
Psalms77:15 Nĩwakũũrire andũ aku na guoko gwaku kwa hinya
Psalms77:16 Maaĩ nĩmakuonire
Psalms77:17 Matu mooiririe mbura
Psalms77:18 Ngwa yaku yaiguĩkanire kĩhuhũkanio-inĩ
Psalms77:19 Njĩra yaku yatuĩkanĩirie iria-inĩ
Psalms77:20 Watongoririe andũ aku o ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi atongoragia rũũru
Psalms78:1 Inyuĩ andũ akwa
Psalms78:2 Ngũtumũra kanua gakwa njarie na ngerekano
Psalms78:3 maũndũ marĩa twanaigua na tũkamenya
Psalms78:4 Tũtingĩhitha ciana ciao maũndũ macio; nĩtũrĩĩraga rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka ũhoro wa ciĩko cia Jehova cia kũmũgoocithia
Psalms78:5 Aaheire Jakubu mawatho
Psalms78:6 nĩguo rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka thuutha rũkaamenya watho ũcio
Psalms78:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ciĩhoke Ngai na ciage kũriganĩrwo nĩ ciĩko ciake
Psalms78:8 Nacio itikahaane ta maithe macio ma tene
Psalms78:9 Andũ a Efiraimu
Psalms78:10 matiarũmirie kĩrĩkanĩro kĩao na Ngai
Psalms78:11 Nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ maũndũ marĩa ekĩte
Psalms78:12 Nĩaringire ciama maithe mao makĩĩonagĩra marĩ kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Psalms78:13 Aagayanirie iria
Psalms78:14 Mũthenya aamatongoragia na itu
Psalms78:15 Nĩatũranirie mahiga kũu werũ-inĩ
Psalms78:16 nĩatũmire tũrũũĩ tuume rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga
Psalms78:17 No-o maathiire o na mbere kwĩhĩria Ngai
Psalms78:18 Nao makĩgeria Mũrungu makĩendaga
Psalms78:19 Magĩũkĩrĩra Ngai na mĩario
Psalms78:20 Rĩrĩa aagũthire ihiga
Psalms78:21 Rĩrĩa Jehova aiguire ũguo
Psalms78:22 nĩgũkorwo matiigana gwĩtĩkia Ngai
Psalms78:23 No rĩrĩ
Psalms78:24 oirĩirie andũ mana ta mbura marĩe
Psalms78:25 Andũ makĩrĩa irio cia araika; akĩmahe irio iria ciothe mangĩahotire kũrĩa.
Psalms78:26 O na ningĩ akĩerekeria rũhuho rwa mwena wa irathĩro kuuma igũrũ
Psalms78:27 Akĩmaharũrũkĩria nyama nyingĩ ta rũkũngũ
Psalms78:28 Agĩtũma igwe thĩinĩ wa kambĩ yao
Psalms78:29 Maarĩire o nginya makĩhũũna
Psalms78:30 No matanarĩkia kũrĩa irio icio meriragĩria
Psalms78:31 marakara ma Ngai makĩmokĩrĩra; akĩũraga arĩa maarĩ na hinya mũno gatagatĩ kao
Psalms78:32 O na amekĩte ũguo wothe-rĩ
Psalms78:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũma matukũ mao mathire o ũguo tũhũ
Psalms78:34 Rĩrĩa rĩothe Mũrungu ooraga amwe ao nĩmamũmaathaga; mamũrongoragia na makamũcookerera na kĩyo.
Psalms78:35 Nao makaririkana atĩ Ngai nĩwe warĩ Rwaro rwao rwa Ihiga
Psalms78:36 No-o makeyendithĩrĩria harĩ we na tũnua twao
Psalms78:37 ngoro ciao itiarĩ njĩhokeku kũrĩ we
Psalms78:38 Nowe no aaiyũrĩtwo nĩ tha; akĩmarekera waganu wao
Psalms78:39 Nĩaaririkanire atĩ maarĩ o andũ tu
Psalms78:40 Nĩ maita maingĩ atĩa maamũremagĩra marĩ kũu werũ-inĩ
Psalms78:41 Mahinda maingĩ nĩmageririe Mũrungu; maathirĩkirie Ũrĩa-Mũtheru-wa-Isiraeli.
Psalms78:42 Matiaririkanire ũhoti wake: mũthenya ũrĩa aamakũũrire kuuma kũrĩ arĩa maamahinyagĩrĩria
Psalms78:43 kana mũthenya ũrĩa onanirie ciama ciake kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Psalms78:44 Nĩagarũrire njũũĩ cia bũrũri wa Misiri igĩtuĩka thakame; matingĩahotire kũnyua maaĩ ma tũrũũĩ twao.
Psalms78:45 Akĩmatũmĩra mĩrumbĩ mĩingĩ ya ngi ikĩmarĩa
Psalms78:46 Irio cia mĩgũnda yao aaciheire itono
Psalms78:47 Aanangire mĩthabibũ yao na mbura ya mbembe
Psalms78:48 Ngʼombe ciao aaciũragire na mbura ya mbembe
Psalms78:49 Aamaitĩrĩirie marakara make mahiũ
Psalms78:50 Nĩaatemeire marakara make njĩra; ndamahonokirie kũrĩ gĩkuũ
Psalms78:51 Akĩũraga marigithathi mothe ma bũrũri wa Misiri
Psalms78:52 No akĩruta andũ ake kuo ta rũũru; akĩmatongoria o ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi atongoragia ngʼondu magĩtuĩkanĩria kũu werũ-inĩ.
Psalms78:53 Aamatongoririe amamenyereire
Psalms78:54 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmakinyia mũhaka-inĩ wa bũrũri wake ũcio mũtheru
Psalms78:55 Ningĩ akĩrutũrũra ndũrĩrĩ ciehere mbere yao
Psalms78:56 No nĩmageririe Ngai na makĩremera Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno; matiathikĩrĩirie mawatho make.
Psalms78:57 Nĩmagire wĩhokeku na makĩaga wĩtĩkio o ta maithe mao
Psalms78:58 Nĩmamũrakaririe nĩ ũndũ wa gũkorwo na kũndũ kwao gũtũũgĩru gwa kũhooyagĩra; makĩarahũra ũiru wake nĩ ũndũ wa mĩhianano yao.
Psalms78:59 Rĩrĩa Ngai aamaiguire
Psalms78:60 Agĩthaama Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo ĩrĩa yarĩ Shilo
Psalms78:61 Akĩrekereria ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro rĩrĩa rĩa hinya wake rĩthaamio
Psalms78:62 Andũ ake nao akĩmarekereria rũhiũ rwa njora; nĩarakarĩtio mũno nĩ igai rĩake.
Psalms78:63 Mwaki ũgĩcina aanake ao
Psalms78:64 athĩnjĩri-Ngai ao makĩũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Psalms78:65 Ningĩ Mwathani akĩarahũka ta mũndũ woima toro
Psalms78:66 Aahũũrire thũ ciake agĩcihũndũra; aaciconorithirie nginya tene.
Psalms78:67 Ningĩ akĩrega hema cia Jusufu
Psalms78:68 no rĩrĩ
Psalms78:69 Nĩaakire handũ harĩa hake haamũre hakĩhaana ta irĩma iria ndaaya
Psalms78:70 Aathuurire Daudi ndungata yake na akĩmũruta ciugũ-inĩ cia ngʼondu;
Psalms78:71 akĩmũtigithia kũrĩithia ngʼondu
Psalms78:72 Nake Daudi akĩmarĩithia arĩ na wagĩrĩru wa ngoro; aamatongoragia na ũũgĩ wa moko make.
Psalms79:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms79:2 Ciimba cia ndungata ciaku macineanĩte ituĩke irio cia nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ
Psalms79:3 Maitĩte thakame ya andũ aku ta maaĩ Jerusalemu guothe
Psalms79:4 Tũtuĩkĩte andũ a kũmenwo nĩ arĩa tũriganĩtie nao
Psalms79:5 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms79:6 Itĩrĩria ndũrĩrĩ iria itakũũĩ mangʼũrĩ maku
Psalms79:7 nĩgũkorwo nĩmatambuurĩte Jakubu na makaananga bũrũri wake.
Psalms79:8 Ndũgatũherithie nĩ ũndũ wa mehia ma maithe maitũ; tha ciaku irohiũha itũkinyĩrĩre
Psalms79:9 Tũteithie
Psalms79:10 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma ndũrĩrĩ ciũrie atĩrĩ
Psalms79:11 Mũcaayo wa arĩa moohetwo njeera ũrogũkinyĩra; nĩ ũndũ wa hinya wa guoko gwaku gitĩra arĩa matuĩrĩirwo gũkua.
Psalms79:12 Wĩrĩhĩrie maita mũgwanja harĩ ndũrĩrĩ iria tũriganĩtie nacio
Psalms79:13 Na ithuĩ andũ aku
Psalms80:1 Wee Mũrĩithi wa Isiraeli
Psalms80:2 ũrĩ mbere ya Efiraimu
Psalms80:3 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms80:4 Wee Jehova Ngai mwene hinya wothe
Psalms80:5 Nĩũmahũũnĩtie na irio cia maithori; ũtũmĩte manyue maithori maiyũrĩte mbakũri riita.
Psalms80:6 Ũtũtuĩte kĩndũ gĩa kũrũagĩrwo nĩ arĩa tũriganĩtie nao
Psalms80:7 Wee Ngai-Mwene-Hinya-Wothe-rĩ
Psalms80:8 Wareehire mũthabibũ kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri; warutũrũrire ndũrĩrĩ ũkĩũhaanda arĩ guo.
Psalms80:9 Nĩwaũthereirie mũgũnda
Psalms80:10 Irĩma nĩciahumbĩrirwo nĩ kĩĩruru kĩaguo
Psalms80:11 Watambũrũkirie honge ciaguo o nginya Iria-inĩ rĩrĩa Inene
Psalms80:12 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte ũmomore njirigo ciaguo
Psalms80:13 Ũrangarangagwo nĩ ngũrwe cia gĩthaka
Psalms80:14 Wee Ngai Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Psalms80:15 mũri ũrĩa guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo kwahaandire
Psalms80:16 Mũthabibũ waku nĩũtemetwo
Psalms80:17 Guoko gwaku kũroikara na mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ guoko-inĩ gwaku kwa ũrĩo
Psalms80:18 No ithuĩ-rĩ

Psalms81:1 Inĩrai Ngai
Psalms81:2 Ambĩrĩriai kũina
Psalms81:3 Huhai coro hĩndĩ ya Karũgamo ka Mweri
Psalms81:4 ũyũ nĩ watho wa kĩrĩra gĩa kũrũmĩrĩrwo kũrĩ Isiraeli
Psalms81:5 We nĩaũhaandire ũtuĩke kĩrĩra harĩ Jusufu hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aathiire gũtharĩkĩra bũrũri wa Misiri
Psalms81:6 Ekuuga atĩrĩ
Psalms81:7 Wangaĩire ũrĩ na mĩnyamaro na niĩ ngĩkũhatũra
Psalms81:8 “Inyuĩ andũ akwa
Psalms81:9 Mũtikanagĩe na ngai ngʼeni gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu; mũtikanainamĩrĩre ngai ya kũngĩ.
Psalms81:10 Nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai waku
Psalms81:11 “No andũ akwa matiigana gũũthikĩrĩria; Isiraeli ndaigana kũnjathĩkĩra.
Psalms81:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩmarekereria marũmĩrĩre ũremi wa ngoro ciao
Psalms81:13 “Korwo andũ akwa no maathikĩrĩrie
Psalms81:14 ndamatooreria thũ ciao o na ihenya
Psalms81:15 Andũ arĩa mathũire Jehova mangĩĩthuna marĩ mbere yake
Psalms81:16 No inyuĩ ingĩmũhe ngano ĩrĩa njega mũno mũrĩĩage; ingĩmũhũũnagia na ũũkĩ wa kuuma rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga.”
Psalms82:1 Ngai arũgamĩte kĩũngano-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩnene; aratuĩra “ngai” ciira arĩ gatagatĩ ga cio.
Psalms82:2 “Nĩ nginya rĩ mũgũtũũra mũciiragĩrĩra andũ arĩa matarũgamagĩrĩra kĩhooto
Psalms82:3 “Ciiragĩrĩrai kĩhooto kĩa arĩa matarĩ hinya na arĩa matarĩ maithe; tũũriai ihooto cia andũ arĩa athĩĩni o na arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie.
Psalms82:4 Hatũragai arĩa matarĩ hinya na arĩa abatari; mateithũrei kuuma moko-inĩ ma arĩa aaganu.
Psalms82:5 “Andũ acio matirĩ ũndũ mooĩ
Psalms82:6 “Ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms82:7 No mũgaakua o ta ũrĩa andũ makuuaga; mũkaagũa o ta aathani arĩa angĩ.”
Psalms82:8 Arahũka
Psalms83:1 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms83:2 Ta rora wone ũrĩa thũ ciaku iranegena
Psalms83:3 Mathugundaga ndundu ya gũũkĩrĩra andũ aku na wara; maciiragĩrĩra gũũkĩrĩra andũ arĩa wendete.
Psalms83:4 Meranaga atĩrĩ
Psalms83:5 Maciiraga marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe; maiguithanagĩria magũũkĩrĩre:
Psalms83:6 andũ a hema cia Edomu
Psalms83:7 na cia Gebali
Psalms83:8 O na Ashuri nĩmegwatanĩtie nao nĩguo mateithĩrĩrie njiaro cia Loti.
Psalms83:9 Meeke o ta ũrĩa wekire Amidiani
Psalms83:10 o acio maaniinĩirwo Enidoru
Psalms83:11 Tũma andũ ao arĩa marĩ igweta mahaane ta Orebu na Zeebu
Psalms83:12 arĩa moigire atĩrĩ

Psalms83:14 O ta ũrĩa mwaki ũcinaga mũtitũ kana ta rũrĩrĩmbĩ rũgĩcina irĩma-rĩ
Psalms83:15 maingatithie o ro ũguo na kĩhuhũkanio gĩaku
Psalms83:16 Humba mothiũ mao thoni
Psalms83:17 Marotũũra maconokete na marĩ amaku; marokua na gĩconoko kĩnene.
Psalms83:18 Tũma mamenye atĩ Wee

Psalms87:1 Nĩahaandĩte mũthingi wa itũũra rĩake igũrũ rĩa kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩamũre;
Psalms87:2 Jehova nĩendete ihingo cia Zayuni gũkĩra ciikaro iria ingĩ ciothe cia Jakubu.
Psalms87:3 Maũndũ mega nĩmaragio igũrũ rĩaku
Psalms87:4 “Nĩngwandĩka ũhoro wa Rahabu na wa Babuloni thĩinĩ wa arĩa manjũũĩ

Psalms88:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms88:2 Ihooya rĩakwa rĩrokinya harĩwe; inamĩrĩria gũtũ gwaku ũigue gũkaya gwakwa.
Psalms88:3 Nĩgũkorwo muoyo wakwa ũiyũrĩtwo nĩ thĩĩna
Psalms88:4 Niĩ ndaranĩirio na arĩa makiriĩ gũkua; haana ta mũndũ ũtarĩ na hinya.
Psalms88:5 Niĩ njiganĩirio na arĩa akuũ
Psalms88:6 Ũnjikĩtie irima rĩrĩa iriku mũno
Psalms88:7 Mangʼũrĩ maku nĩmanditũhĩire mũno; nĩũũhubĩkanĩtie na ndiihũ ciaku ciothe.
Psalms88:8 Nĩũnjehereirie arata akwa arĩa twendanĩte mũno
Psalms88:9 maitho makwa nĩmaroora nĩ kĩeha. Wee Jehova
Psalms88:10 Andũ arĩa akuũ-rĩ
Psalms88:11 Wendo waku nĩumbũragwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Psalms88:12 Magegania maku nĩmonagwo kũndũ kũu kwa nduma
Psalms88:13 No nĩngũgũkaĩra ũndeithie
Psalms88:14 Wee Jehova
Psalms88:15 Kuuma o ũnini wakwa ndũũrĩte nyamarĩtio na ngakuhĩrĩria gĩkuũ; nĩnyamaarĩkĩte nĩ imakania ciaku
Psalms88:16 Mangʼũrĩ maku nĩmahubĩkanĩtie
Psalms88:17 Maathiũrũrũkagĩria mũthenya wothe ta mũiyũro wa maaĩ; hingĩrĩirio nĩmo na mĩena yothe.
Psalms88:18 Nĩũnjehereirie athiritũ akwa na arĩa nyendete; nduma nĩyo mũrata wakwa ũrĩa ũnguhĩrĩirie mũno.
Psalms89:1 Ngũtũũra nyinaga ũhoro wa wendo mũnene wa Jehova nginya tene; ndĩrĩmenyithanagia wĩhokeku waku na kanua gakwa kũrĩ njiarwa na njiarwa.
Psalms89:2 Nĩngumbũra atĩ wendo waku ũtũũraga ũrĩ mũrũmu nginya tene
Psalms89:3 Woigire atĩrĩ
Psalms89:4 ‘Nĩngatũma rũciaro rwaku rũtũũre rwĩhaandĩte nginya tene
Psalms89:5 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms89:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Psalms89:7 Kĩama-inĩ kĩa acio atheru
Psalms89:8 Wee Jehova Ngai Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Psalms89:9 Nĩwe wathaga kĩhuhũkanio kĩa iria rĩrĩa inene; rĩrĩa makũmbĩ marĩo mookĩra na igũrũ
Psalms89:10 Wahehenjire Rahabu agĩtuĩka o ta ũmwe wa arĩa moragĩtwo; wahurunjire thũ ciaku na guoko gwaku kũrĩ hinya.
Psalms89:11 Igũrũ nĩ rĩaku
Psalms89:12 Nĩwe wombire mwena wa gathigathini na wa gũthini; Taboru na Herimoni ciinaga ikenete nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku.
Psalms89:13 Gĩcoka gĩaku nĩ kĩrĩ ũhoti; guoko gwaku kũrĩ hinya
Psalms89:14 Ũthingu na kĩhooto nĩcio mũthingi wa gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene; wendo na wĩhokeku nĩigũtongoragia.
Psalms89:15 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms89:16 Makenagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku mũthenya wothe; magũtũũgagĩria nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu waku.
Psalms89:17 Nĩgũkorwo Wee nĩwe riiri na hinya wao
Psalms89:18 Ti-itherũ
Psalms89:19 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe nĩwaririe na njĩra ya kĩoneki
Psalms89:20 Nĩndĩĩoneire Daudi ndungata yakwa; nĩndĩmũitĩrĩirie maguta makwa maamũre.
Psalms89:21 Guoko gwakwa nĩkũrĩmũtiiragĩrĩra; ti-itherũ gĩcoka gĩakwa nĩkĩrĩmwĩkagĩra hinya.
Psalms89:22 Gũtirĩ thũ ĩkaamwĩtia igooti. gũtirĩ mũndũ mwaganu ũkaamũhinyĩrĩria.
Psalms89:23 Nĩngahehenja thũ ciake mbere yake
Psalms89:24 Wendo wakwa wa kwĩhokeka ũrĩkoragwo hamwe nake
Psalms89:25 Nĩngatambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa iria
Psalms89:26 Nĩakanjĩta anjĩĩre atĩrĩ
Psalms89:27 Ningĩ nĩngamwamũra atuĩke irigithathi rĩakwa
Psalms89:28 Nĩngũtũũria wendo wakwa harĩ we nginya tene
Psalms89:29 Nĩngahaanda rũciaro rwake nginya tene
Psalms89:30 “Ariũ ake mangĩgatirika watho wakwa na mage kũrũmĩrĩra kĩrĩra gĩakwa
Psalms89:31 mangĩgathũkia kĩrĩra kĩa watho wakwa wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo na mage kũmenyerera maathani makwa
Psalms89:32 nĩngaherithia wĩhia wao na rũthanju
Psalms89:33 no ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngaamwehereria wendo wakwa
Psalms89:34 Ndigathũkia kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa kana ngarũrĩre ũrĩa iromo ciakwa ciarĩtie.
Psalms89:35 Nĩndĩhĩtĩte ngĩgwetaga ũtheru wakwa
Psalms89:36 atĩ rũciaro rwake rũgũtũũra nginya tene
Psalms89:37 gĩgũtũũra kĩrĩ kĩrũmu nginya tene o ta mweri
Psalms89:38 No rĩrĩ
Psalms89:39 Wee nĩũkanĩte kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ũrĩkanĩire na ndungata yaku
Psalms89:40 Wee ũmomorete thingo ciake ciothe na ũkaananga ciĩhitho ciake iria cia hinya.
Psalms89:41 Ehĩtũkĩri othe nĩmatahĩte indo ciake; atuĩkĩte wa kũnyararwo nĩ andũ arĩa mariganĩtie nake.
Psalms89:42 Wee nĩũtũũgĩrĩtie guoko kwa ũrĩo kwa arĩa mamũthũire; nĩũtũmĩte thũ ciake ciothe ikene.
Psalms89:43 Ũũgĩ wa rũhiũ rwake rwa njora nĩũũhũndũrĩte
Psalms89:44 Nĩũniinĩte riiri wake ũgathira
Psalms89:45 Nĩũnyiihĩtie matukũ ma wĩthĩ wake; ũmũhumbĩte thoni o ta nguo.
Psalms89:46 Nĩ nginya rĩ
Psalms89:47 Ririkana ũrĩa mũtũũrĩre wakwa ũrĩ wa gũthira o narua. Kaĩ akĩrĩ ũndũ wa tũhũ watũmire ũmbe andũ othe!
Psalms89:48 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ ũngĩtũũra muoyo na ndonane na gĩkuũ
Psalms89:49 Wee Mwathani
Psalms89:50 Mwathani
Psalms89:51 o irumi iria thũ ciaku iinyũrũrĩtie nacio
Psalms89:52 Jehova arogoocwo nginya tene! Ameni
Psalms90:1 JEHOVA
Psalms90:2 O mbere ya irĩma kũgĩa kuo kana ũkĩũmba thĩ na mabũrũri
Psalms90:3 Wee ũcookagia andũ magatuĩka rũkũngũ
Psalms90:4 Nĩgũkorwo mĩaka ngiri harĩwe no ta mũthenya wa ira ũrĩa ũrahĩtũkire
Psalms90:5 Ũhaataga andũ
Psalms90:6 o na gũtuĩka rũciinĩ nĩĩringũkaga
Psalms90:7 Tũniinagwo nĩ marakara maku
Psalms90:8 Nĩũigĩte wĩhia witũ o mbere yaku
Psalms90:9 Matukũ maitũ mothe maniinagwo nĩ mangʼũrĩ maku; tũninũkagia mĩaka iitũ na gũcaaya.
Psalms90:10 Mũigana wa matukũ maitũ-rĩ
Psalms90:11 Nũũ ũũĩ hinya wa marakara maku? Nĩgũkorwo mangʼũrĩ maku nĩ manene o ta gwĩtigĩrwo kũrĩa wagĩrĩire.
Psalms90:12 Tuonie gũtara matukũ maitũ wega
Psalms90:13 Wee Jehova
Psalms90:14 Rũciinĩ tũhũũnagie na wendo waku ũtathiraga
Psalms90:15 Tũma tũkene matukũ maingĩ o ta marĩa ũtũnyamarĩtie
Psalms90:16 Ndungata ciaku irokĩonio ciĩko ciaku
Psalms90:17 Wega wa Mwathani Ngai witũ ũrogĩa na ithuĩ; tũma wĩra wa moko maitũ ũgaacĩre
Psalms91:1 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũikaraga agitĩirwo nĩ Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno arĩhurũkaga kĩĩruru-inĩ kĩa Mwene-Hinya-Wothe.
Psalms91:2 Ngũkiuga ũhoro wa Jehova atĩrĩ
Psalms91:3 Ti-itherũ nĩegũgũteithũra gĩkerenge-inĩ kĩa mũtegi
Psalms91:4 Arĩkũhumbagĩra na njoya ciake
Psalms91:5 Ndũrĩĩtigagĩra imakania cia ũtukũ
Psalms91:6 o na kana mũrimũ ũrĩa ũceemaga nduma-inĩ
Psalms91:7 Andũ ngiri no magũe mwena waku
Psalms91:8 Wee no kwĩrorera ũkerorera na maitho maku wĩonere iherithia rĩa andũ arĩa aaganu.
Psalms91:9 Ũngĩtua Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno gĩikaro gĩaku
Psalms91:10 hĩndĩ ĩyo gũtirĩ ũũru ũgaagũkorerera
Psalms91:11 Nĩgũkorwo nĩagaatha araika ake nĩ ũndũ waku
Psalms91:12 nĩmagakuoya na igũrũ na moko mao nĩgeetha ndũkaringwo kũgũrũ nĩ ihiga.
Psalms91:13 Nĩũgakinyĩrĩria mũrũũthi
Psalms91:14 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Psalms91:15 Arĩngayagĩra
Psalms91:16 Ngũmũtũũria muoyo matukũ maingĩ nginya aiganie
Psalms92:1 Nĩ wega mũno gũcookagĩria Jehova ngaatho o na gũkumagia rĩĩtwa rĩaku na rwĩmbo
Psalms92:2 nĩ wega mũno kwanagĩrĩra wendo waku o rũciinĩ
Psalms92:3 tũkĩinagia kĩnanda gĩa kĩnũbi kĩa ndigi ikũmi
Psalms92:4 Nĩgũkorwo
Psalms92:5 Ĩĩ mawĩra maku matikĩrĩ manene
Psalms92:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ ũũgĩ ndangĩmamenya
Psalms92:7 atĩ o na arĩa aaganu mangĩkũra ta nyeki
Psalms92:8 No Wee Jehova
Psalms92:9 Nĩgũkorwo thũ ciaku
Psalms92:10 Wee nĩwambararĩtie rũhĩa rwakwa o ta rwa mbogo; ndĩĩmũitĩrĩrie maguta marĩa mega mũno.
Psalms92:11 Maitho makwa nĩmeyoneire gũtoorio gwa thũ ciakwa; matũ makwa nĩmeiguĩrĩire ũrĩa thũ ciakwa icio njaganu itooretio.
Psalms92:12 Andũ arĩa athingu marĩtheeremaga o ta mũtĩ wa mũkĩndũ
Psalms92:13 mahaandĩtwo kũu nyũmba-inĩ ya Jehova
Psalms92:14 Magatũũra maciaraga maciaro o na marĩ akũrũ
Psalms92:15 maanagĩrĩre
Psalms93:1 Jehova nĩarathamaka
Psalms93:2 Gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene gĩtũũrĩte kĩrĩ kĩrũmu kuuma o tene; wee ũtũũrĩte kuo kuuma tene na tene.
Psalms93:3 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms93:4 We nĩarĩ hinya gũkĩra makũmbĩ ma iria
Psalms93:5 Wee Jehova
Psalms94:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms94:2 Arahũka
Psalms94:3 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms94:4 Maaragia ndeto cia mwĩgaatho; andũ arĩa othe meekaga ũũru
Psalms94:5 Mahehenjaga andũ aku
Psalms94:6 Mooragaga mũtumia wa ndigwa
Psalms94:7 Moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms94:8 Mwĩmenyererei inyuĩ arĩa mwagĩte ũũgĩ mũrĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ; inyuĩ andũ aya akĩĩgu
Psalms94:9 Ũrĩa wombire gũtũ-rĩ
Psalms94:10 Ũcio ũrũithagia ndũrĩrĩ-rĩ
Psalms94:11 Jehova nĩoĩ meciiria ma mũndũ; ĩĩ
Psalms94:12 Wee Jehova
Psalms94:13 nĩũgaatũma ahoorere matukũ-inĩ ma thĩĩna
Psalms94:14 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ndagatiganĩria andũ ake; igai rĩake ndarĩ hĩndĩ angĩrĩtirika.
Psalms94:15 Ũtuanĩri ciira wa kĩhooto nĩũgakwo rĩngĩ igũrũ rĩa ũthingu
Psalms94:16 Nũũ ũkwarahũka
Psalms94:17 Tiga Jehova aandeithirie-rĩ
Psalms94:18 Rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms94:19 Rĩrĩa mĩtangĩko yaingĩhire thĩinĩ wakwa-rĩ
Psalms94:20 Gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩa ungumania-rĩ
Psalms94:21 Monganaga hamwe nĩguo mokĩrĩre mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu
Psalms94:22 No Jehova nĩwe ũtuĩkĩte kĩirigo gĩakwa kĩa hinya
Psalms94:23 We nĩakamaherithia nĩ ũndũ wa mehia mao na amaniine nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wao; Jehova Ngai witũ nĩakamaniina.

Psalms95:4 Thĩ kũrĩa kũriku mũno kũrĩ guoko-inĩ gwake
Psalms95:5 Iria nĩ rĩake

Psalms96:1 Inĩrai Jehova rwĩmbo rwerũ; inĩrai Jehova
Psalms96:2 Inĩrai Jehova

Psalms96:4 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩ mũnene
Psalms96:5 Nĩgũkorwo ngai ciothe cia ndũrĩrĩ nĩ mĩhianano
Psalms96:6 Riiri na ũnene irĩ mbere yake; hinya na riiri irĩ handũ hake harĩa haamũre.
Psalms96:7 Tũũgĩriai Jehova
Psalms96:8 Tũũgĩriai Jehova nĩ ũndũ wa riiri ũrĩa wagĩrĩire rĩĩtwa rĩake; mũreherei maruta na mũũke nja-inĩ ciake.
Psalms96:9 Hooyai Jehova thĩinĩ wa riiri wa ũtheru wake; inainai mũrĩ mbere yake
Psalms96:10 Ĩrai ndũrĩrĩ atĩrĩ

Psalms96:13 ĩkaina ĩrĩ mbere ya Jehova
Psalms97:1 Jehova nĩarathamaka
Psalms97:2 Athiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ matu na nduma ndumanu; ũthingu na kĩhooto nĩcio mũthingi wa gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene.
Psalms97:3 Mwaki ũmũthiiaga mbere ũgĩcinaga thũ ciake na mĩena yothe.
Psalms97:4 Heni ciake imũrĩkaga thĩ yothe; thĩ ĩcionaga ĩkainaina.
Psalms97:5 Irĩma itwekaga o ta mũhũra mbere ya Jehova
Psalms97:6 Igũrũ rĩanagĩrĩra ũthingu wake
Psalms97:7 Andũ arĩa othe mahooyaga mĩhianano mĩicũhie nĩmaconorithagio
Psalms97:8 Zayuni ĩiguaga ũguo ĩgakena
Psalms97:9 Nĩgũkorwo Wee Jehova
Psalms97:10 Arĩa endi Jehova nĩmathũũre ũũru
Psalms97:11 Ũtheri nĩwarĩire arĩa athingu na arĩa arũngĩrĩru ngoro makaiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno.
Psalms97:12 Kenerai Jehova
Psalms98:1 Inĩrai Jehova rwĩmbo rwerũ
Psalms98:2 Jehova nĩamenyithanĩtie ũhonokio wake na akaguũria ũthingu wake kũrĩ andũ a ndũrĩrĩ.
Psalms98:3 Nĩaririkanĩte wendo wake na wĩhokeku wake ũrĩa erĩire nyũmba ya Isiraeli; ituri ciothe cia thĩ nĩcionete ũhonokanio wa Ngai witũ.
Psalms98:4 Anĩrĩrai mũkenete mũrĩ mbere ya Jehova

Psalms99:1 Jehova nĩarathamaka
Psalms99:2 Jehova nĩ mũnene Zayuni; nĩatũũgĩrĩte igũrũ rĩa ndũrĩrĩ ciothe.
Psalms99:3 Andũ nĩmakĩgooce rĩĩtwa rĩaku inene na rĩa gwĩtigĩrwo: we nĩwe mũtheru.
Psalms99:4 Mũthamaki nĩ arĩ hinya
Psalms99:5 Tũũgĩriai Jehova Ngai witũ
Psalms99:6 Musa na Harũni maarĩ amwe a athĩnjĩri-Ngai ake
Psalms99:7 Aamaragĩria arĩ thĩinĩ wa gĩtugĩ kĩa itu; makĩrũmia mawatho make na kĩrĩra kĩa watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo kĩrĩa aamaheete.

Psalms100:1 Anĩrĩrai mũkenete mũrĩ mbere ya Jehova
Psalms100:2 Thathaiyai Jehova mũcanjamũkĩte; ũkai mbere yake mũkĩinaga mũkenete.
Psalms100:3 Menyai atĩ Jehova nĩwe Ngai. Nĩwe watũũmbire
Psalms100:4 Tonyerai ihingo ciake mũrĩ na ngaatho
Psalms100:5 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩ mwega
Psalms101:1 Niĩ ndĩinaga ũhoro wa wendo na wa kĩhooto gĩaku; Wee Jehova nĩwe ndĩrĩgoocaga na rwĩmbo.
Psalms101:2 Nĩngwĩmenyerera ndũũre mũtũũrĩre ũtarĩ ũcuuke: nĩ rĩ ũgaagĩũka kũrĩ niĩ? Nĩndĩrĩikaraga mũciĩ gwakwa ndĩ na ngoro ĩtarĩ ũcuuke.
Psalms101:3 Gũtirĩ ũndũ mũũru ndĩrĩigaga mbere ya maitho makwa. Nĩthũire ciĩko cia andũ arĩa matarĩ wĩtĩkio; ndingĩĩtĩkĩra menyiitĩrĩre harĩ niĩ.
Psalms101:4 Ndĩrĩikaraga haraihu na andũ arĩa marĩ ngoro nemi; ũũru-rĩ
Psalms101:5 Mũndũ o wothe ũngĩcambia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake na hitho
Psalms101:6 Maitho makwa-rĩ
Psalms101:7 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkaga maũndũ ma mawara ũgaikara nyũmba-inĩ yakwa; gũtirĩ mũndũ waragia maheeni ũkaarũgama mbere yakwa.
Psalms101:8 O rũciinĩ nĩndĩrĩkiragia arĩa othe aaganu bũrũri-inĩ; nĩngeheria andũ arĩa othe mekaga ũũru mathire itũũra-inĩ rĩrĩa inene rĩa Jehova.
Psalms102:1 Wee Jehova
Psalms102:2 Tiga kũũhitha ũthiũ waku rĩrĩa ndĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ. Inamĩrĩria gũtũ gwaku ũnjigue; ndagũkaĩra
Psalms102:3 Nĩgũkorwo matukũ makwa marathira o ta ũrĩa ndogo ĩthiraga; namo mahĩndĩ makwa maraakana o ta gĩcinga.
Psalms102:4 Ngoro yakwa ĩringĩkĩte na ĩkahooha o ta nyeki; ndiganĩirwo o na nĩ kũrĩa irio.
Psalms102:5 Tondũ wa ũrĩa ndĩracaaya nyanĩrĩire
Psalms102:6 Haana ta ndundu ya werũ-inĩ
Psalms102:7 Ndaaraga itarĩ toro; haanĩte ta nyoni ĩrĩ o iiki nyũmba igũrũ.
Psalms102:8 Mũthenya wothe thũ ciakwa itindaga igĩĩthirĩkia; acio maanyũrũragia mahũthagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩakwa taarĩ kĩrumi.
Psalms102:9 Nĩgũkorwo ndĩĩaga mũhu taarĩ irio ciakwa
Psalms102:10 tondũ wa mangʼũrĩ maku manene
Psalms102:11 Matukũ makwa mahaana o ta kĩĩruru kĩa hwaĩ-inĩ; hoohaga ta nyeki.
Psalms102:12 No rĩrĩ
Psalms102:13 Wee nĩũkwarahũka ũiguĩre itũũra rĩa Zayuni tha
Psalms102:14 Nĩgũkorwo mahiga makuo nĩmakenagĩrwo nĩ ndungata ciaku; o na rũkũngũ rwakuo nĩrũtũmaga iringwo nĩ tha.
Psalms102:15 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩigeetigĩra rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
Psalms102:16 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩagaaka itũũra rĩa Zayuni rĩngĩ
Psalms102:17 Nĩakaigua mahooya ma andũ arĩa aagi; ndakanyarara mahooya mao.
Psalms102:18 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩwandĩkwo nĩ ũndũ wa rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka
Psalms102:19 “Jehova nĩacũthĩrĩirie thĩ arĩ harĩa hake haamũre kũu igũrũ; arĩ kũu igũrũ Jehova nĩkũrora aarorire thĩ
Psalms102:20 nĩguo aigue gũcaaya kwa arĩa moheetwo
Psalms102:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova nĩrĩkoimbũrwo kũu Zayuni
Psalms102:22 rĩrĩa andũ a ndũrĩrĩ na mothamaki makoongana
Psalms102:23 Hĩndĩ ya mũtũũrĩre wakwa nĩanyiihirie hinya wakwa; nĩakuhĩhirie matukũ makwa.
Psalms102:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ: “Wee Ngai wakwa
Psalms102:25 O kĩambĩrĩria-inĩ
Psalms102:26 Icio nĩgũthira igaathira
Psalms102:27 No Wee ndũgarũrũkaga
Psalms102:28 Ciana cia ndungata ciaku igaatũũra na thayũ mbere yaku; nacio njiaro ciacio cigaikara irũmĩte irĩ mbere yaku.”
Psalms103:1 Gooca Jehova
Psalms103:2 Gooca Jehova
Psalms103:3 o ũrĩa ũkũrekagĩra mehia maku mothe
Psalms103:4 ũrĩa ũkũũraga muoyo waku kuuma irima rĩa gĩkuũ
Psalms103:5 o we ũkũhũũnagia na maũndũ mega nĩgeetha waanake waku werũhagio o ta wa nderi.
Psalms103:6 Jehova ekaga maũndũ ma ũthingu
Psalms103:7 Nĩamenyithirie Musa njĩra ciake
Psalms103:8 Jehova nĩ mũigua tha na nĩ mũtugi
Psalms103:9 We ndaciirithanagia hĩndĩ ciothe
Psalms103:10 Ndatũherithagia ta ũrĩa mehia maitũ magĩrĩirwo
Psalms103:11 O ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩraihanĩrĩirie na thĩ
Psalms103:12 o ta ũrĩa irathĩro kũraihanĩrĩirie na ithũĩro-rĩ
Psalms103:13 O ta ũrĩa mũthuuri aiguagĩra ciana ciake tha
Psalms103:14 nĩgũkorwo we nĩoĩ ũrĩa tuombirwo

Psalms103:16 rĩhurutagwo nĩ rũhuho rĩkehera
