Psalms104:1 Gooca Jehova
Psalms104:2 Ehumbĩte ũtheri taarĩ nguo; we atambũrũkagia igũrũ taarĩ hema
Psalms104:3 na akaara mĩgamba ya tũnyũmba twake twa ngoroba igũrũ rĩa maaĩ. We atũmaga matu matuĩke ngaari yake ya ita
Psalms104:4 Nĩwe ũtũmaga rũhuho rũtuĩke arekio ake
Psalms104:5 We aahaandire thĩ igũrũ rĩa mĩthingi yayo; ndĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩenyenyeka.
Psalms104:6 Wamĩhumbĩrire na iria rĩrĩa inene taarĩ nguo; maaĩ maikarire makunĩkĩire irĩma.
Psalms104:7 No rĩrĩ
Psalms104:8 magĩtherera igũrũ wa irĩma
Psalms104:9 Wee nĩwe wekĩrire mũhaka ũrĩa matangĩkĩra; gũtirĩ hĩndĩ magaacooka kũhumbĩra thĩ.
Psalms104:10 We atũmaga ithima ciitĩrĩre maaĩ mĩkuru-inĩ; mathereraga gatagatĩ-inĩ ka irĩma.
Psalms104:11 Nĩcio iheaga nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka maaĩ ma kũnyua; nĩkuo njagĩ cia werũ-inĩ inyootoragĩrwo.
Psalms104:12 Nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ ciakaga itara hakuhĩ na maaĩ macio; ciinaga irĩ honge-inĩ cia mĩtĩ.
Psalms104:13 We aitagĩrĩria irĩma maaĩ moimĩte nyũmba-inĩ ciake iria irĩ igũrũ; thĩ nĩĩiganagwo nĩ maciaro ma wĩra wake.
Psalms104:14 We atũmaga nyeki ĩkũre nĩ ũndũ wa kũrĩĩo nĩ mahiũ
Psalms104:15 ndibei ĩrĩa ĩkenagia ngoro ya mũndũ na maguta ma gũtũma ũthiũ wake ũkenge
Psalms104:16 Mĩtĩ ya Jehova nĩyuragĩrio mbura wega
Psalms104:17 Kũu nĩkuo nyoni ciakaga itara ciacio; nayo njũũ
Psalms104:18 Irĩma-inĩ iria ndaaya nĩkuo mbũri cia gĩthaka ciikaraga; mĩatũka-inĩ ya mahiga nĩkuo ikami ciĩhithaga.
Psalms104:19 Mweri nĩguo ũmenyithanagia hĩndĩ ya imera
Psalms104:20 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga kũgĩe nduma
Psalms104:21 Mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa mĩĩthĩ ĩraramaga ĩkĩhĩta
Psalms104:22 Riũa rĩrathaga
Psalms104:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ agathiĩ kũruta wĩra wake
Psalms104:24 Wee Jehova
Psalms104:25 Rĩĩrĩa nĩrĩo iria rĩrĩa inene na rĩariĩ
Psalms104:26 Marikabu nĩkuo igeragĩra igĩthiĩ na igĩcooka
Psalms104:27 Icio ciothe nĩwe icũthagĩrĩria nĩguo ũcihe irio ciacio hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire.
Psalms104:28 Na rĩrĩa wacihe irio
Psalms104:29 Rĩrĩa wahitha ũthiũ waku
Psalms104:30 Rĩrĩa watũma Roho waku
Psalms104:31 Riiri wa Jehova ũrotũũra nginya tene; Jehova arokenagĩra mawĩra make:
Psalms104:32 o we ũcio ũroraga thĩ
Psalms104:33 Ngũtũũra nyinagĩra Jehova matukũ mothe ma muoyo wakwa; ndĩrĩinaga ngĩgoocaga Ngai wakwa hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe ngũtũũra muoyo.
Psalms104:34 Jehova arokenio nĩ mecũũrania makwa
Psalms104:35 No rĩrĩ
Psalms105:1 Cookeria Jehova ngaatho
Psalms105:2 Mũinĩrei
Psalms105:3 Mwĩrahei nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake itheru; ngoro cia arĩa marongoragia Jehova nĩikene.
Psalms105:4 Cũthĩrĩriai Jehova na hinya wake; mathaai ũthiũ wake hĩndĩ ciothe.
Psalms105:5 Ririkanai magegania marĩa ekĩte
Psalms105:6 inyuĩ njiaro cia Iburahĩmu ndungata yake
Psalms105:7 Jehova nĩwe Ngai witũ; matuĩro make ma ciira marĩ thĩ yothe.
Psalms105:8 Nĩaririkanaga kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake nginya tene
Psalms105:9 kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na Iburahĩmu
Psalms105:10 Nĩagĩĩkĩrire hinya harĩ Jakubu kĩrĩ kĩrĩra gĩake kĩa watho wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo
Psalms105:11 “Wee nĩwe ngaahe bũrũri wa Kaanani ũtuĩke igai rĩrĩa ũkaagaya.”
Psalms105:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩ o anini magĩtarwo
Psalms105:13 morũũraga kuuma rũrĩrĩ rũmwe nginya rũrĩa rũngĩ
Psalms105:14 Ndarĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe eetĩkĩririe amanyariire; nĩ ũndũ wao akĩrũithia athamaki
Psalms105:15 “Mũtikanahutie andũ arĩa akwa aitĩrĩrie maguta; mũtikaneke anabii akwa ũũru.”
Psalms105:16 Agĩtũma bũrũri ũcio ũgĩe ngʼaragu
Psalms105:17 agĩtũma mũndũ athiĩ mbere yao: nĩwe Jusufu
Psalms105:18 Nĩmamũtiihirie magũrũ na bĩngũ
Psalms105:19 nginya ũrĩa oigĩte ũgĩkinyanĩra
Psalms105:20 Mũthamaki agĩtũmana na akĩmuohorithia
Psalms105:21 Akĩmũtua mwathi wa indo cia nyũmba yake
Psalms105:22 nĩguo ataarage anene ake o ũrĩa angĩonire kwagĩrĩire
Psalms105:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Isiraeli agĩthiĩ Misiri; Jakubu agĩtũũra arĩ mũgeni bũrũri-inĩ ũcio wa Hamu.
Psalms105:24 Jehova agĩtũma andũ ake maciarane mũno; agĩtũma maingĩhe mũno gũkĩra thũ ciao
Psalms105:25 iria aagarũrire ngoro ciao agĩtũma ithũũre andũ ake
Psalms105:26 Aatũmire Musa ndungata yake
Psalms105:27 Nao makĩringa ciama ciake gatagatĩ-inĩ kao
Psalms105:28 Agĩtũma kũgĩe nduma naguo bũrũri ũcio ũgĩtumana
Psalms105:29 Akĩgarũra maaĩ mao magĩtuĩka thakame
Psalms105:30 Bũrũri wao ũkĩiyũra ciũra
Psalms105:31 Aaririe
Psalms105:32 Akĩgarũra mbura yao ĩgĩtuĩka ya mbembe
Psalms105:33 akĩrũnda mĩthabibũ yao
Psalms105:34 Aaririe
Psalms105:35 ikĩrĩa kĩndũ gĩothe kĩarĩ kĩĩruru bũrũri-inĩ wao
Psalms105:36 Ningĩ akĩũraga marigithathi mothe ma bũrũri wao
Psalms105:37 Nĩaarutire Isiraeli makiuma kuo
Psalms105:38 Andũ a Misiri nĩmakenire moima kuo
Psalms105:39 Nĩatambũrũkirie itu rĩmahumbagĩre
Psalms105:40 Metirie irio
Psalms105:41 Aatũranirie rwaro rwa ihiga
Psalms105:42 Nĩgũkorwo nĩaririkanire kĩĩranĩro gĩake gĩtheru kĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na ndungata yake Iburahĩmu.
Psalms105:43 Nĩaarutire andũ ake makiuma kũu makenete
Psalms105:44 akĩmahe mabũrũri ma ndũrĩrĩ
Psalms105:45 nĩguo marũmagie mataaro make
Psalms106:1 Goocai Jehova. Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho
Psalms106:2 Nũũ ũngiuga ciĩko cia hinya cia Jehova
Psalms106:3 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms106:4 Ndirikanaga
Psalms106:5 nĩguo ngenagĩre ũgaacĩru wa andũ aku athuure
Psalms106:6 Ithuĩ nĩtwĩhĩtie
Psalms106:7 Rĩrĩa maithe maitũ maarĩ Misiri
Psalms106:8 No nĩamahonokirie nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake
Psalms106:9 Nĩakũũmire Iria Itune
Psalms106:10 Nĩamahonokirie guoko-inĩ kwa andũ arĩa maamathũire; akĩmakũũra kuuma guoko-inĩ gwa thũ.
Psalms106:11 Maaĩ macio nĩmahubanĩirie amuku ao; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao watigarire.
Psalms106:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩĩtĩkia ciĩranĩro ciake
Psalms106:13 No makĩriganĩrwo o narua nĩ ũrĩa ekĩte
Psalms106:14 Marĩ kũu werũ-inĩ makĩnyiitwo nĩ thuti; makĩgeria Mũrungu marĩ kũu gũtagĩĩaga kĩndũ.
Psalms106:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmahe kĩrĩa maamwĩtirie
Psalms106:16 Ningĩ nĩmaiguĩrĩire Musa ũiru marĩ kũu kambĩ-inĩ
Psalms106:17 Thĩ ĩgĩatũka na ĩkĩmeria Dathani; ningĩ ĩgĩthika thiritũ ya Abiramu.
Psalms106:18 Mwaki ũgĩakana gatagatĩ-inĩ ka arũmĩrĩri ao; rũrĩrĩmbĩ rũgĩcina andũ acio aaganu.
Psalms106:19 Nĩmathondekire gacaũ marĩ kũu Horebu
Psalms106:20 Maakũũranirie Riiri wa Ngai na mũhianano wa ndegwa ĩrĩa ĩrĩĩaga nyeki.
Psalms106:21 Makĩriganĩrwo nĩ Mũrungu ũrĩa wamahonokirie
Psalms106:22 akĩringa ciama bũrũri wa Hamu
Psalms106:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiuga nĩekũmaniina
Psalms106:24 Ningĩ makĩnyarara bũrũri ũcio mwega
Psalms106:25 Makĩnuguna marĩ hema-inĩ ciao
Psalms106:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩoya guoko na igũrũ
Psalms106:27 angʼaũranĩrie njiaro ciao kũu gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ
Psalms106:28 Nĩmeyohanirie na Baali ya Peoru
Psalms106:29 magĩtũma Jehova arakare nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao cia waganu
Psalms106:30 No Finehasi akĩrũgama na igũrũ
Psalms106:31 Ũhoro ũcio ũgĩtũma atuuo nĩ mũthingu kũrĩ njiarwa na njiarwa nginya tene.
Psalms106:32 Nao makĩrakaria Jehova hau maaĩ-inĩ ma Meriba
Psalms106:33 nĩgũkorwo nĩmaremeire Roho wa Ngai
Psalms106:34 Matiigana kũniina ndũrĩrĩ icio ta ũrĩa Jehova aamaathĩte
Psalms106:35 no nĩgũtukana maatukanire na ndũrĩrĩ
Psalms106:36 Makĩhooya mĩhianano yao
Psalms106:37 Makĩrutĩra ndaimono aanake na airĩtu ao marĩ magongona.
Psalms106:38 Magĩita thakame ĩteehĩtie
Psalms106:39 Nĩmethaahirie o ene nĩ gwĩka ũguo meekire; na ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao makĩhũũra ũmaraya.
Psalms106:40 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩrakarĩra andũ ake
Psalms106:41 Akĩmaneana kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ
Psalms106:42 Thũ ciao ikĩmahinyĩrĩria
Psalms106:43 Nake akĩmateithũra mahinda maingĩ
Psalms106:44 Nowe akĩona mĩnyamaro yao rĩrĩa aaiguire magĩkaya;
Psalms106:45 nĩ ũndũ wao akĩririkana kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake
Psalms106:46 Agĩtũma maiguĩrwo tha nĩ arĩa othe maamatahĩte.
Psalms106:47 Tũhonokie
Psalms106:48 Jehova arogoocwo
Psalms107:1 Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho
Psalms107:2 Andũ arĩa makũũrĩtwo nĩ Jehova nĩmakiuge ũguo: o acio akũũrĩte kuuma guoko-inĩ gwa thũ
Psalms107:3 o acio aacookanĩrĩirie amarutĩte mabũrũri-inĩ
Psalms107:4 Amwe morũũrire werũ-inĩ ũtarĩ kĩndũ
Psalms107:5 Maarĩ ahũtu na makanyoota
Psalms107:6 Nao magĩkaĩra Jehova marĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ
Psalms107:7 Aamagereirie njĩra nũngarũ
Psalms107:8 Nĩmagĩcookerie Jehova ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa wendo wake ũrĩa ũtathiraga
Psalms107:9 nĩgũkorwo nĩwe ũnyootoraga andũ arĩa anyootu
Psalms107:10 Amwe maaikarĩte nduma-inĩ o na nduma-inĩ nene mũno
Psalms107:11 nĩgũkorwo nĩmaremeire ciugo cia Mũrungu
Psalms107:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmarutithia wĩra wa hinya; nao makĩhĩngwo na gũkĩaga wa kũmateithia.
Psalms107:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩkaĩra Jehova marĩ thĩĩna-inĩ
Psalms107:14 Nake aamarutire nduma-inĩ
Psalms107:15 Nĩmagĩcookerie Jehova ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa wendo wake ũrĩa ũtathiraga
Psalms107:16 nĩgũkorwo nĩoinangaga ihingo cia gĩcango na akoinanga mĩgĩĩko ya kĩgera.
Psalms107:17 Amwe maatuĩkire andũ akĩĩgu nĩ ũndũ wa mĩthiĩre yao ya ũremi
Psalms107:18 Magĩtuĩka a kũira ngoro mona irio o ciothe
Psalms107:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩkaĩra Jehova marĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ
Psalms107:20 Aatũmire kiugo gĩake akĩmahonia; aamateithũrire kuuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ.
Psalms107:21 Nĩmagĩcookerie Jehova ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa wendo wake ũrĩa ũtathiraga
Psalms107:22 Nĩmakĩrute igongona rĩa gũcookia ngaatho
Psalms107:23 Angĩ maagereire iria-inĩ marĩ marikabu-inĩ; maathiiaga wonjoria kũu maria-inĩ manene.
Psalms107:24 Nĩmoonire mawĩko ma Jehova
Psalms107:25 Nĩgũkorwo aaririe
Psalms107:26 Marikabu igĩikanio na igũrũ
Psalms107:27 Makĩagaga na magĩtũgũũga ta andũ arĩĩu; ũũgĩ wao wothe nĩwakinyĩte mũthia.
Psalms107:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩkaĩra Jehova marĩ thĩĩna-inĩ
Psalms107:29 Nake akĩhooreria kĩhuhũkanio kĩu kĩnene; namo makũmbĩ ma iria rĩu magĩkirio ki.
Psalms107:30 Nao magĩkena nĩ iria rĩu kũhoorera
Psalms107:31 Nĩmagĩcookerie Jehova ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa wendo wake ũrĩa ũtathiraga
Psalms107:32 Nĩmamũtũũgĩrie kĩũngano-inĩ kĩa andũ
Psalms107:33 Aagarũrire kũrĩa kwarĩ njũũĩ gũgĩtuĩka werũ
Psalms107:34 naguo bũrũri ũrĩa woimaga irio mũno akĩũtua werũ wa igata ũtaarĩ kĩndũ
Psalms107:35 Aagarũrire kũrĩa kwarĩ werũ gũkĩgĩa tũria twa maaĩ
Psalms107:36 nao andũ arĩa maarĩ ahũtu akĩmarehe kuo
Psalms107:37 Maarĩmire mĩgũnda na makĩhaanda mĩthabibũ
Psalms107:38 aamarathimire nao makĩingĩha mũno
Psalms107:39 Mũigana wao ũgĩcooka ũkĩnyiiha
Psalms107:40 we ũrĩa ũnyararithagia andũ arĩa marĩ igweta-rĩ
Psalms107:41 No rĩrĩ
Psalms107:42 Andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru monaga ũguo magakena
Psalms107:43 Mũndũ o wothe mũũgĩ-rĩ
Psalms108:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms108:2 Arahũka
Psalms108:3 Wee Jehova nĩngũkũgooca
Psalms108:4 Nĩgũkorwo wendo waku nĩ mũnene
Psalms108:5 Wee Ngai tũũgĩra
Psalms108:6 Tũhonokie na ũtũteithie na guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo
Psalms108:7 Ngai nĩarĩtie arĩ handũ hake harĩa haamũre
Psalms108:8 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa
Psalms108:9 Moabi nĩ kĩraĩ gĩakwa gĩa gwĩthambĩra
Psalms108:10 Nũũ ũkũnginyia itũũra rĩrĩa inene rĩirigĩre? Nũũ ũkũndongoria andware Edomu?
Psalms108:11 Githĩ tiwe
Psalms108:12 Tũteithie ũtũhootanĩre harĩ thũ ciitũ
Psalms108:13 Ngai arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ nĩtũkũhootana
Psalms109:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms109:2 nĩgũkorwo andũ arĩa aaganu na a maheeni nĩmathamĩtie tũnua nĩguo manjũkĩrĩre; nĩmarĩtie ũhoro wakwa na rũrĩmĩ rwa maheeni.
Psalms109:3 Mandigicĩirie makĩaragia ndeto cia rũthũũro; maatharĩkagĩra hatarĩ gĩtũmi.
Psalms109:4 Handũ ha wendo ũrĩa ndĩmendete naguo
Psalms109:5 Mandĩhaga wega na ũũru
Psalms109:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkĩte ũguo mũigĩre mũndũ mũũru amũũkĩrĩre; mwena wake wa ũrĩo nĩkũrũgame mũndũ wa kũmũthitanga.
Psalms109:7 Aacirithio-rĩ
Psalms109:8 Matukũ make maronyiiha; ũtongoria wake ũrooywo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ.
Psalms109:9 Ciana ciake irotuĩka cia ngoriai
Psalms109:10 Ciana ciake irotuĩka njara-rũhĩ cia gũcangacanga; iroingatwo ciume mĩciĩ yao ĩyo mĩanangĩku.
Psalms109:11 Indo ciake ciothe irotahwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa marĩ thiirĩ nake; andũ a kũngĩ nĩmeyoere maciaro ma wĩra wake.
Psalms109:12 Aroaga mũndũ ũngĩmwonia ũtugi
Psalms109:13 Njiaro ciake iroeherio
Psalms109:14 Waganu wa maithe make ũrotũũra ũririkanagwo nĩ Jehova; wĩhia wa nyina ũroaga gũgaathario o na rĩ.
Psalms109:15 Mehia mao marotũũra hĩndĩ ciothe marĩ mbere ya Jehova
Psalms109:16 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũcio we ndarĩ hĩndĩ eciiragia ũhoro wa gũtugana
Psalms109:17 Aronyiitwo nĩ kĩrumi
Psalms109:18 Ehumbaga kĩrumi taarĩ nguo; kĩamũtoonyire mwĩrĩ ta maaĩ
Psalms109:19 Kĩrotuĩka taarĩ nguo ya igũrũ erigiicĩirie
Psalms109:20 Rĩrĩ nĩrĩtuĩke irĩhi rĩa Jehova kũrĩ arĩa maathitangaga
Psalms109:21 No rĩrĩ
Psalms109:22 Nĩgũkorwo ndĩ mũthĩĩni na mũbatari
Psalms109:23 Ndĩ hakuhĩ kũbuĩria o ta kĩĩruru kĩa hwaĩ-inĩ; hurutagwo nĩ rũhuho o ta ngigĩ.
Psalms109:24 Maru makwa nĩmaregerete nĩ kwĩima kũrĩa; mwĩrĩ wakwa ũhĩnjĩte nĩ kwaga maguta.
Psalms109:25 Nduĩkĩte kĩndũ gĩa kũnyũrũrio nĩ andũ arĩa maathitangaga; rĩrĩa maanyona
Psalms109:26 Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa
Psalms109:27 Tũma mamenye atĩ kũu nĩ guoko gwaku
Psalms109:28 O nĩ marumanage
Psalms109:29 Arĩa maathitangaga makaahumbwo njono na mohwo thoni taarĩ nguo ya igũrũ.
Psalms109:30 Nĩndĩrĩkumagia Jehova mũno na kanua gakwa; nĩndĩrĩmũgoocaga ndĩ kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ kĩnene.
Psalms109:31 Nĩgũkorwo arũgamaga guoko-inĩ kwa ũrĩo kwa mũndũ ũrĩa mũbatari
Psalms110:1 Jehova nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: “Ikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo
Psalms110:2 Mũthĩgi wa hinya waku-rĩ
Psalms110:3 Ikundi ciaku cia ita nĩikerutĩra mũthenya waku wa mbaara. Igooka irĩ na ũgemu wa ũtheru
Psalms110:4 Jehova nĩehĩtĩte na ndangĩĩricũkwo
Psalms110:5 Mwathani arĩ guoko-inĩ gwaku kwa ũrĩo; nĩakahehenja athamaki mũthenya wa mangʼũrĩ make.
Psalms110:6 Nĩagatuĩra ndũrĩrĩ ciira
Psalms110:7 Nĩakanyua maaĩ ma karũũĩ karĩ mũkĩra-inĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩakambararia mũtwe wake.
Psalms111:1 Goocai Jehova. Nĩngũkumia Jehova na ngoro yakwa yothe ndĩ thiritũ-inĩ ya arĩa arũngĩrĩru
Psalms111:2 Ciĩko cia Jehova nĩ cia magegania; nĩicũũranagio nĩ arĩa othe makenagio nĩcio.
Psalms111:3 Ciĩko ciake ciyũrĩte riiri na ũkaru
Psalms111:4 Nĩatũmĩte magegania make maririkanwo; Jehova nĩ mũtugi na nĩ mũigua tha.
Psalms111:5 Arĩa mamwĩtigagĩra nĩamaheaga irio; egũtũũra aririkanaga kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake nginya tene.
Psalms111:6 Nĩonetie andũ ake mawĩra make ma hinya
Psalms111:7 Mawĩra ma moko make nĩ ma kwĩhokeka
Psalms111:8 Nĩ marũmu nginya tene na tene
Psalms111:9 Nĩakinyĩirie andũ ake ũkũũri; aamũrire kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake kĩrĩ gĩa gũtũũra nginya tene: rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ itheru na nĩ rĩa gwĩtigĩrwo.
Psalms111:10 Kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ũũgĩ nĩ gwĩtigĩra Jehova; arĩa othe marũmagĩrĩra mataaro make nĩmagĩĩaga na ũmenyo mwega. Kũgoocwo nĩ gwake tene na tene.
Psalms112:1 Goocai Jehova. Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtigagĩra Jehova
Psalms112:2 Ciana ciake nĩigatuĩka cia bata bũrũri-inĩ; rũciaro rwa arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩrũkarathimwo.
Psalms112:3 Gwake mũciĩ gũkoragwo na ũtonga na indo nyingĩ
Psalms112:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũrũngĩrĩru o na arĩ nduma-inĩ nĩatheragĩrwo nĩ ũtheri
Psalms112:5 Mũndũ ũcio mũtugani na ũheanaga o ũguo tũhũ
Psalms112:6 Ti-itherũ mũndũ ũcio ndakenyenyeka; mũndũ mũthingu atũũraga aririkanagwo nginya tene.
Psalms112:7 Angĩigua ũhoro mũũru ndangĩĩtigĩra; ngoro yake nĩĩkindĩire
Psalms112:8 Ngoro yake nĩngitĩre
Psalms112:9 Nĩahurunjĩte iheo ciake akahe andũ arĩa athĩĩni
Psalms112:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩakoona ũguo na arakare
Psalms113:1 Goocai Jehova. Mũgoocei
Psalms113:2 Rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova rĩrogoocwo
Psalms113:3 Kuuma o irathĩro rĩa riũa nginya ithũĩro rĩarĩo
Psalms113:4 Jehova nĩatũũgĩrĩtio igũrũ rĩa ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Psalms113:5 Nũũ ũhaana ta Jehova Ngai witũ
Psalms113:6 o ũcio ũinamagĩrĩra arorererie maũndũ ma igũrũ o na ma thĩ?
Psalms113:7 Oyaga athĩĩni na igũrũ kuuma rũkũngũ-inĩ
Psalms113:8 amaikaragia hamwe na anene
Psalms113:9 Atũmaga mũtumia thaata atũũre gwake mũciĩ
Psalms114:1 Rĩrĩa Isiraeli moimire bũrũri wa Misiri
Psalms114:2 Juda gwatuĩkire handũ ha Ngai haamũre
Psalms114:3 Iria rĩonire ũguo rĩkĩũra
Psalms114:4 Irĩma igĩtũhatũũha ta ndũrũme
Psalms114:5 Kaĩ wonire atĩa
Psalms114:6 Inyuĩ irĩma
Psalms114:7 Wee thĩ
Psalms114:8 o we ũcio wagarũrire rwaro rwa ihiga rũgĩtuĩka karia ka maaĩ
Psalms115:1 Ti ithuĩ
Psalms115:2 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga ndũrĩrĩ ciũrie atĩrĩ
Psalms115:3 Ngai witũ arĩ o igũrũ; we ekaga o ũrĩa endaga.
Psalms115:4 No mĩhianano yao nĩ betha na thahabu
Psalms115:5 Nĩĩrĩ tũnua
Psalms115:6 nĩĩrĩ matũ
Psalms115:7 nĩĩrĩ moko
Psalms115:8 Andũ arĩa mamĩthondekaga makaahaana o tayo
Psalms115:9 Wee nyũmba ya Isiraeli
Psalms115:10 Wee nyũmba ya Harũni
Psalms115:11 Inyuĩ arĩa mũmwĩtigĩrĩte
Psalms115:12 Jehova nĩatũririkanĩte na nĩegũtũrathima: Nĩekũrathima nyũmba ya Isiraeli
Psalms115:13 nĩekũrathima arĩa metigĩrĩte Jehova
Psalms115:14 Jehova arotũma mũingĩhe
Psalms115:15 Mũrorathimwo nĩ Jehova
Psalms115:16 Kũu igũrũ mũno nĩ kwa Jehova
Psalms115:17 Andũ arĩa akuũ matigoocaga Jehova
Psalms115:18 nĩ ithuĩ tũrĩkumagia Jehova
Psalms116:1 Nĩnyendete Jehova
Psalms116:2 Tondũ nĩathikĩrĩirie-rĩ
Psalms116:3 Ndarigiicĩirio nĩ mĩhĩndo ya gĩkuũ
Psalms116:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩkaĩra rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
Psalms116:5 Jehova nĩ mũtugi na nĩ mũthingu; Ngai witũ aiyũrĩtwo nĩ tha.
Psalms116:6 Jehova nĩagitagĩra andũ arĩa matarĩ oogĩ; rĩrĩa ndahinyĩrĩirio mũno
Psalms116:7 Wee ngoro yakwa-rĩ
Psalms116:8 Nĩgũkorwo Wee Jehova nĩũhonoketie muoyo wakwa kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ
Psalms116:9 nĩgeetha thiiage ndĩ mbere ya Jehova bũrũri-inĩ wa arĩa marĩ muoyo.
Psalms116:10 No ndetĩkirie ũhoro wake; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms116:11 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ndamakĩte
Psalms116:12 Nĩ kĩĩ ingĩthukĩra Jehova nakĩo nĩ ũndũ wa wega wake wothe ũrĩa anjĩkĩte?
Psalms116:13 Nĩkuoya nguoya gĩkombe kĩa ũhonokio na igũrũ
Psalms116:14 Nĩngũhingĩria Jehova mĩĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa ndehĩtire
Psalms116:15 Andũ arĩa athingu marĩ bata mũno harĩ Jehova
Psalms116:16 Wee Jehova
Psalms116:17 Nĩngũkũrutĩra igongona rĩa gũgũcookeria ngaatho
Psalms116:18 Nĩngũhingĩria Jehova mĩĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa ndehĩtire andũ ake othe marĩ ho
Psalms116:19 kũu nja-inĩ cia nyũmba ya Jehova
Psalms117:1 Goocai Jehova
Psalms117:2 Nĩgũkorwo wendo wake nĩ mũnene harĩ ithuĩ
Psalms118:1 Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho nĩgũkorwo nĩ mwega; wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms118:2 Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmoige atĩrĩ
Psalms118:3 Nyũmba ya Harũni nĩyuuge atĩrĩ
Psalms118:4 Andũ arĩa metigĩrĩte Jehova nĩmoige atĩrĩ
Psalms118:5 Ndakaĩire Jehova ndĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ
Psalms118:6 Jehova arĩ hamwe na niĩ; ndingĩĩtigĩra. Mũndũ-rĩ
Psalms118:7 Jehova arĩ hamwe na niĩ; nĩwe mũndeithia. Nĩngerorera thũ ciakwa ikĩhootwo.
Psalms118:8 Nĩ kaba kũũrĩra harĩ Jehova
Psalms118:9 Nĩ kaba kũũrĩra harĩ Jehova
Psalms118:10 Ndarigiicĩirio nĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Psalms118:11 Ciandigiicĩirie mĩena yothe
Psalms118:12 Ciathiũrũrũkĩirie na mĩena yothe ta njũkĩ
Psalms118:13 Ndahatĩkĩtwo mũno nĩ thũ hakuhĩ ngwe
Psalms118:14 Jehova nĩwe hinya wakwa na nĩwe ũtũmaga nyine; nake nĩatuĩkĩte ũhonokio wakwa.
Psalms118:15 Mbugĩrĩrio ya gĩkeno na ya ũhootani ĩiyũrĩte hema-inĩ cia andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms118:16 Guoko kwa ũrĩo kwa Jehova nĩ kwambararie; guoko kwa ũrĩo kwa Jehova nĩ gwĩkĩte maũndũ manene!”
Psalms118:17 Niĩ gũkua ndigũkua
Psalms118:18 Jehova nĩaherithĩtie mũno
Psalms118:19 Hingũrĩrai ihingo cia ũthingu; nĩngũtoonya njookerie Jehova ngaatho.
Psalms118:20 Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩhingo kĩa Jehova kĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu mangĩtoonyera.
Psalms118:21 Nĩ ngaatho ngũgũcookeria
Psalms118:22 Ihiga rĩrĩa aaki maaregire nĩrĩo rĩtuĩkĩte ihiga inene rĩa koine;
Psalms118:23 Jehova nĩwe wĩkĩte ũndũ ũcio
Psalms118:24 Mũthenya ũyũ nĩ Jehova ũtũmĩte ũgĩe; nĩtũcanjamũkei
Psalms118:25 Wee Jehova
Psalms118:26 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms118:27 Jehova nĩwe Mũrungu
Psalms118:28 Wee nĩwe Mũrungu wakwa
Psalms118:29 Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho
Psalms119:1 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms119:2 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms119:3 Matirĩ ũndũ mũũru mekaga; no kũgera mageragĩra njĩra ciake.
Psalms119:4 Wee nĩũheanĩte mawatho marĩa marĩ ma gwathĩkagĩrwo na kĩyo.
Psalms119:5 Naarĩ korwo mĩthiĩre yakwa ĩkĩrĩ mĩkindĩrĩku ũhoro-inĩ wa gwathĩkagĩra kĩrĩra gĩaku!
Psalms119:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndingĩconorithio rĩrĩa ngũcũũrania maathani maku mothe.
Psalms119:7 Nĩndĩrĩkũgoocaga ndĩ na ngoro nũngĩrĩru
Psalms119:8 Nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku; ndũgakĩndiganĩrie o biũ.
Psalms119:9 Mũndũ mwĩthĩ-rĩ
Psalms119:10 Ngũrongoragia na ngoro yakwa yothe; ndũkanareke njũrũũre ndigane na maathani maku.
Psalms119:11 Nĩhithĩte kiugo gĩaku thĩinĩ wa ngoro yakwa
Psalms119:12 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:13 Nĩndĩriugaga na ngacookera na mĩromo yakwa ũhoro wa mawatho mothe marĩa moimĩte kanua gaku.
Psalms119:14 Nĩngenagio nĩkũrũmĩrĩra kĩrĩra gĩaku
Psalms119:15 Nĩndĩrĩcũũranagia mawatho maku na ngatarania njĩra yaku.
Psalms119:16 Nĩngenagĩra kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku; ndigatiganĩria kiugo gĩaku.
Psalms119:17 Niĩ ndungata yaku njĩka wega
Psalms119:18 Hingũra maitho makwa nĩguo nyone maũndũ ma magegania marĩa marĩ watho-inĩ waku.
Psalms119:19 Niĩ ndĩ mũgeni gũkũ thĩ; ndũkaahithe maathani maku.
Psalms119:20 Ngoro yakwa nĩĩrahĩĩahĩĩa nĩ kwĩrirĩria mawatho maku o mahinda mothe.
Psalms119:21 Wee nĩũkũũmaga arĩa etĩĩi
Psalms119:22 Njehereria kĩnyũrũri na kũmenwo
Psalms119:23 O na gũtuĩka aathani maikaraga thĩ hamwe makanjambia
Psalms119:24 Kĩrĩra gĩaku nĩkĩo ngenagĩra; nĩkĩo kĩĩheaga mataaro.
Psalms119:25 Ngometio thĩ rũkũngũ-inĩ; tũũria muoyo wakwa kũringana na kiugo gĩaku.
Psalms119:26 Nĩndakwĩrire mĩthiĩre yakwa nawe ũkĩnjĩtĩka; nduta kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku.
Psalms119:27 Menyithia ũrutani wa mawatho maku; na niĩ nĩndĩrĩcũũranagia ũhoro wa magegania maku.
Psalms119:28 Ngoro yakwa nĩ nogu nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha; njĩkĩra hinya kũringana na kiugo gĩaku.
Psalms119:29 Njeheranĩria na mĩthiĩre ya maheeni; nĩ ũndũ wa ũtugi waku nduta watho waku.
Psalms119:30 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms119:31 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:32 Hanyũkaga o na njĩra ya maathani maku
Psalms119:33 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:34 He ũmenyo
Psalms119:35 Ngeragĩria njĩra-inĩ cia maathani maku
Psalms119:36 Erekeria ngoro yakwa kũrĩ kĩrĩra gĩaku
Psalms119:37 Girĩrĩria maitho makwa matige kwĩrorera maũndũ ma tũhũ; tũũria muoyo wakwa kũringana na kiugo gĩaku.
Psalms119:38 Hingĩria ndungata yaku kĩĩranĩro gĩaku
Psalms119:39 Njehereria njono iria ndĩĩtigagĩra
Psalms119:40 Kaĩ nĩndĩĩriragĩria mawatho maku-ĩ! Tũũria muoyo wakwa nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu waku.
Psalms119:41 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:42 nĩguo ngoragwo na ũndũ wa gũcookeria andũ arĩa maanyũrũragia
Psalms119:43 Ndũkandunye kiugo kĩa ma kuuma kanua-inĩ gakwa
Psalms119:44 Ngũtũũra njathĩkagĩra watho waku
Psalms119:45 Ndĩrĩthiiaga ndĩ na wĩyathi
Psalms119:46 Nĩndĩrĩaragia ũhoro wa kĩrĩra gĩaku mbere ya athamaki na ndirĩconokaga
Psalms119:47 nĩgũkorwo nĩngenagĩra maathani maku tondũ nĩndĩmendete.
Psalms119:48 Ndĩrĩambararagia moko makwa kũrĩ maathani maku marĩa nyendete
Psalms119:49 Ririkana kiugo gĩaku kũrĩ ndungata yaku
Psalms119:50 Ũndũ ũrĩa ũũhooreragia ndĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ nĩ ũyũ: atĩ kĩĩranĩro gĩaku nĩkĩo gĩtũũragia muoyo wakwa.
Psalms119:51 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi maanyũrũragia matekwĩgirĩrĩria
Psalms119:52 Nĩndirikanaga mawatho maku ma tene
Psalms119:53 Nyiitagwo nĩ mangʼũrĩ nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa aaganu
Psalms119:54 Ũhoro wa kĩrĩra gĩaku nĩguo ũtuĩkĩte rwĩmbo rwakwa
Psalms119:55 Ũtukũ ndirikanaga rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms119:56 Ũũ nĩguo ngoretwo ngĩĩka: nĩnjathĩkagĩra mawatho maku.
Psalms119:57 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:58 Maathĩĩte ũthiũ waku na ngoro yakwa yothe; nginyagĩria wega waku o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire.
Psalms119:59 Nĩndĩcũũranĩtie ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yakwa
Psalms119:60 Nĩngũhiũha na ndigũcererwo gwathĩkĩra maathani maku.
Psalms119:61 O na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ andũ arĩa aaganu no manjohe na mĩhĩndo-rĩ
Psalms119:62 Ũtukũ gatagatĩ njarahũkaga ngũcookerie ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa mawatho maku ma kĩhooto.
Psalms119:63 Niĩ ndĩ mũrata wa andũ arĩa othe magwĩtigĩrĩte
Psalms119:64 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:65 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:66 Nduta gũkũũrana maũndũ wega o na kũmamenya
Psalms119:67 Mbere itanoona thĩĩna nĩndahĩtagia
Psalms119:68 Wee ũrĩ mwega
Psalms119:69 O na gũtuĩka andũ arĩa etĩĩi nĩmahakĩte gĩko na ndeto cia maheeni
Psalms119:70 Ngoro ciao nĩ nyũmũ na itirĩ tha
Psalms119:71 Warĩ ũndũ mwega niĩ nyone thĩĩna
Psalms119:72 Watho ũrĩa uumĩte kanua gaku nĩ wa bata mũno harĩ niĩ
Psalms119:73 Moko maku nĩmo manyũmbire na magĩĩthondeka ũguo ndariĩ; he ũtaũku nĩguo ndĩĩrute maathani maku.
Psalms119:74 Andũ arĩa magwĩtigĩrĩte marokenaga rĩrĩa maanyona
Psalms119:75 Jehova
Psalms119:76 Wendani waku ũrĩa ũtathiraga ũrotuĩka wa kũũhooreria
Psalms119:77 Ĩtĩkĩra tha ciaku inginyĩre nĩguo ndũũre muoyo
Psalms119:78 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi maroconorithio nĩ ũndũ wa kũnjĩka ũũru hatarĩ gĩtũmi; no niĩ-rĩ
Psalms119:79 Andũ arĩa magwĩtigĩrĩte maronjookerera
Psalms119:80 Ngoro yakwa ĩroaga ũcuuke ũhoro-inĩ wa kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku
Psalms119:81 Ngoro yakwa ĩringĩkaga nĩ kwĩrirĩria ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:82 Maitho makwa nĩmaraaga hinya nĩ gũtũũra njũthĩrĩirie kĩĩranĩro gĩaku; ngakĩũria atĩrĩ
Psalms119:83 O na gũtuĩka haana ta mondo ya rũũa ya ndibei ĩigĩtwo ndogo-inĩ
Psalms119:84 Niĩ ndungata yaku-rĩ
Psalms119:85 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi manyenjeire marima nĩguo ngwe kuo
Psalms119:86 Maathani maku mothe nĩ ma kwĩhokwo; ndeithia
Psalms119:87 Maatigĩtie hanini maaniine nyume thĩ ĩno
Psalms119:88 Menyerera muoyo wakwa kũringana na wendo waku
Psalms119:89 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:90 Wĩhokeku waku nĩ wa kuuma njiarwa nginya njiarwa; nĩwe warũmirie thĩ
Psalms119:91 Mawatho maku matũũraga nginya ũmũthĩ
Psalms119:92 Korwo watho waku tiguo ũngenagia
Psalms119:93 Niĩ ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngaariganĩrwo nĩ mawatho maku
Psalms119:94 Honokia
Psalms119:95 Andũ arĩa aaganu manjoheirie nĩguo maaniine
Psalms119:96 Ũndũ o wothe mũkinyanĩru wega
Psalms119:97 Kaĩ nĩnyendete watho waku-ĩ! Ndindaga ngĩtarania ũhoro waguo mũthenya wothe.
Psalms119:98 Maathani maku matũmaga njũhĩge gũkĩra thũ ciakwa
Psalms119:99 Niĩ ndĩ na ũmenyo mũingĩ gũkĩra arutani akwa othe
Psalms119:100 Niĩ ndĩ na ũmenyo mũingĩ gũkĩra athuuri
Psalms119:101 Nĩndigagĩrĩria magũrũ makwa matikagerere njĩra o yothe njũru
Psalms119:102 Niĩ nditiganĩirie mawatho maku
Psalms119:103 Kaĩ ciugo ciaku irĩ mũrĩo ngĩcicama-ĩ
Psalms119:104 Ngĩĩaga na ũtaũku nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩra gĩaku; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩthũire njĩra o yothe njũru.
Psalms119:105 Kiugo gĩaku nĩkĩo tawa wa magũrũ makwa
Psalms119:106 Nĩndĩĩhĩtĩte mwĩhĩtwa na ngagwatĩria
Psalms119:107 Nĩthĩĩnĩkĩte mũno; Wee Jehova
Psalms119:108 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:109 O na gũtuĩka ndũũraga nyiitĩrĩire muoyo wakwa moko-inĩ makwa-rĩ
Psalms119:110 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmanyambĩire mũtego
Psalms119:111 Mawatho maku nĩmo igai rĩakwa nginya tene; nĩmo gĩkeno kĩa ngoro yakwa.
Psalms119:112 Ngoro yakwa nĩĩtuĩte kũrũmagia kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku o nginya mũthia.
Psalms119:113 Nĩthũire andũ a ngoro igĩrĩ
Psalms119:114 Wee nĩwe rĩũrĩro rĩakwa na ngo yakwa; njigĩte mwĩhoko wakwa kiugo-inĩ gĩaku.
Psalms119:115 Njehererai
Psalms119:116 Nyiitagĩrĩra kũringana na kĩĩranĩro gĩaku
Psalms119:117 Ndiiragĩrĩra
Psalms119:118 Nĩũregaga arĩa othe matiganaga na kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku
Psalms119:119 Arĩa othe aaganu a gũkũ thĩ ũmateaga ta gĩko; nĩ ũndũ ũcio niĩ nĩnyendete kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku.
Psalms119:120 Mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩũinainaga nĩgũgwĩtigĩra; njikaraga na guoya mũnene nĩ ũndũ wa mawatho maku.
Psalms119:121 Niĩ njĩkĩte maũndũ ma ũthingu na ma kĩhooto; ndũkandiganĩrie harĩ arĩa maahinyagĩrĩria.
Psalms119:122 Menyerera ũgima wa ndungata yaku; ndũkareke andũ arĩa etĩĩi maahinyĩrĩrie.
Psalms119:123 Maitho makwa nĩmaraaga hinya nĩgũtũũra njũũthĩrĩirie ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:124 Ĩkaga ndungata yaku kũringana na wendo waku
Psalms119:125 Niĩ ndĩ ndungata yaku; he gũkũũrana maũndũ
Psalms119:126 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:127 Tondũ nĩnyendete maathani maku gũkĩra thahabu
Psalms119:128 na tondũ nĩnduĩte mawatho maku mothe nĩmagĩrĩire
Psalms119:129 Kĩrĩra gĩaku nĩ kĩa magegania; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndĩrĩgĩathĩkagĩra.
Psalms119:130 Ciugo ciaku ciataũrwo nĩirehaga ũtheri; nĩciũhĩgagia andũ arĩa matarĩ oogĩ.
Psalms119:131 Njathamĩtie kanua gakwa ngahũma nĩ ũndũ wa kwĩrirĩria maathani maku.
Psalms119:132 Njerekera na ũnjiguĩre tha
Psalms119:133 Rũngagĩrĩria makinya makwa kũringana na kiugo gĩaku; ndũkareke njathagwo nĩ wĩhia o na ũrĩkũ.
Psalms119:134 Ngũũra kuuma ũhiinyanĩrĩria wa andũ
Psalms119:135 Tũma ũthiũ waku warĩre ndungata yaku
Psalms119:136 Maitho makwa manyũrũrũkagia maithori ta rũũĩ
Psalms119:137 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:138 Mawatho marĩa ũheanĩte nĩ ma ũthingu; nĩ ma kwĩhokwo kũna.
Psalms119:139 Kĩyo gĩakwa nĩkĩĩnogetie
Psalms119:140 Ciĩranĩro ciaku nĩthuuranĩre o biũ
Psalms119:141 O na gũtuĩka ndirĩ bata na nĩnyararĩtwo-rĩ
Psalms119:142 Ũthingu waku nĩ wa gũtũũra tene na tene
Psalms119:143 Ngoretwo nĩ mathĩĩna na mĩnyamaro
Psalms119:144 Kĩrĩra gĩaku nĩ kĩa ma nginya tene; kĩĩhe ũtaũku nĩguo ndũũre muoyo.
Psalms119:145 Ndĩragũkaĩra na ngoro yakwa yothe
Psalms119:146 Wee nĩwe ndĩrakaĩra
Psalms119:147 Njũkagĩra tene gũtanakĩa
Psalms119:148 Maitho makwa maikaraga mahingũkĩte matuanĩra-inĩ mothe ma arangĩri
Psalms119:149 Igua mũgambo wakwa kũringana na wendo waku; Wee Jehova
Psalms119:150 Andũ arĩa mathugundaga maũndũ ma wĩki naaĩ nĩmanguhĩrĩirie
Psalms119:151 No Wee Jehova
Psalms119:152 Matukũ-inĩ ma tene nĩndamenyire kuuma kĩrĩra-inĩ gĩaku
Psalms119:153 Rora gũthĩĩnĩka gwakwa na ũndeithũre
Psalms119:154 Ndũĩrĩra na ũkĩngũũre; tũũria muoyo wakwa kũringana na kĩĩranĩro gĩaku.
Psalms119:155 Ũhonokio nĩũraihĩrĩirie andũ arĩa aaganu
Psalms119:156 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:157 Andũ arĩa maanyariiraga nĩ aingĩ
Psalms119:158 Njũthagĩrĩria arĩa matarĩ na wĩtĩkio ngoro
Psalms119:159 Ta kĩone ũrĩa nyendete mawatho maku; tũũria muoyo wakwa
Psalms119:160 Ciugo ciaku ciothe nĩ cia ma; mawatho maku mothe nĩ ma ũthingu na nĩ ma gũtũũra tene na tene.
Psalms119:161 Aathani maanyariiraga hatarĩ gĩtũmi
Psalms119:162 Ngenagĩra kĩĩranĩro gĩaku
Psalms119:163 Nĩmenete na ngathũũra maheeni
Psalms119:164 O mũthenya ngũgoocaga maita mũgwanja nĩ ũndũ wa mawatho maku ma ũthingu.
Psalms119:165 Arĩa mendete watho waku nĩ marĩ thayũ mũingĩ
Psalms119:166 Njetagĩrĩra ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:167 Njathĩkagĩra kĩrĩra gĩaku
Psalms119:168 Njathĩkagĩra mawatho maku na kĩrĩra gĩaku
Psalms119:169 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms119:170 Mathaithana makwa marokinya harĩwe; ndeithũra kũringana na kĩĩranĩro gĩaku.
Psalms119:171 Mĩromo yakwa ĩrĩkũgoocaga hĩndĩ ciothe
Psalms119:172 Rũrĩmĩ rwakwa nĩrũkĩine ũhoro wa kiugo gĩaku
Psalms119:173 Guoko gwaku nĩgũkĩĩhaarĩrie kũndeithia
Psalms119:174 Ũhonokio waku nĩguo ndĩĩriragĩria
Psalms119:175 Ndĩrogĩtũũra muoyo nĩguo ngũgoocage
Psalms119:176 Niĩ nĩhĩtĩtie njĩra ta ngʼondu yũrĩte. Gĩcarie ndungata yaku
Psalms120:1 Ndakaĩire Jehova ndĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ

Psalms120:5 Kaĩ ndĩ na haaro-ĩ
Psalms120:6 Nĩndũũrĩte hĩndĩ ndaaya gatagatĩ-inĩ ka arĩa mathũire thayũ.
Psalms120:7 Niĩ ndĩ mũndũ wa thayũ; no rĩrĩa ndaaria-rĩ
Psalms121:1 Nĩngũtiira maitho makwa ndore irĩma-inĩ: ũteithio wakwa ũngiuma na kũ?
Psalms121:2 Ũteithio wakwa uumaga kũrĩ Jehova
Psalms121:3 We ndangĩreka kũgũrũ gwaku gũtirũke: ũcio mũmenyereri waku ndarĩ hĩndĩ angĩcũnga;
Psalms121:4 ti-itherũ
Psalms121:5 Jehova nĩwe ũkũmenyagĩrĩra: Jehova nĩwe kĩĩruru gĩaku guoko-inĩ gwaku kwa ũrĩo;
Psalms121:6 mũthenya wee ndũngĩringĩka nĩ riũa
Psalms121:7 Jehova nĩarĩkũgitagĩra kuuma ũũru-inĩ wothe: nĩarĩĩmenyagĩrĩra muoyo waku;

Psalms122:3 Jerusalemu rĩakĩtwo ta itũũra inene rĩnyitithanĩtio wega.
Psalms122:4 Kũu nĩkuo mĩhĩrĩga yambataga

Psalms124:1 Korwo Jehova ndaakoretwo arĩ mwena witũ; Isiraeli nĩmakiuge ũguo:

Psalms126:1 Rĩrĩa Jehova aacookirie andũ a Zayuni arĩa maatahĩtwo akĩmainũkia-rĩ

Psalms127:1 Tiga nyũmba yakirwo nĩ Jehova
Psalms127:2 Nĩ tũhũ andũ kũrooka gũũkĩra rũciinĩ tene
Psalms127:3 Ciana nĩ igai kuuma kũrĩ Jehova
Psalms127:4 Ciana iria mũndũ aciarĩte arĩ mũnini no ta mĩguĩ ĩrĩ moko-inĩ ma njamba ya ita.
Psalms127:5 Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa thiaka wake ũiyũrĩte mĩguĩ. Matigaaconorithio rĩrĩa magaakorwo magĩciira na thũ ciao hau kĩhingo-inĩ.
Psalms128:1 Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ o wothe wĩtigĩrĩte Jehova
Psalms128:2 Nĩũkarĩĩaga maciaro ma wĩra waku; irathimo na kũgaacĩra nĩigatuĩka ciaku.
Psalms128:3 Mũtumia waku egũtuĩka ta mũthabibũ ũrĩa ũciaraga mũno arĩ kũu nyũmba-inĩ yaku thĩinĩ; ciana ciaku ituĩke ta thuuna cia mũtamaiyũ ithiũrũrũkĩirie metha yaku.
Psalms128:4 Ũguo nĩguo mũndũ arĩrathimagwo
Psalms128:5 Jehova arokũrathimaga arĩ Zayuni matukũ mothe ma muoyo waku; ũroona kũgaacĩra kwa Jerusalemu
Psalms128:6 na ũtũũre muoyo

Psalms132:14 “Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩhurũko gĩakwa nginya tene na tene; gũkũ nĩkuo ngũtũũra njikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene
Psalms132:15 nĩngakũrathima na ũmaathi mũingĩ mũno; athĩĩni akuo ndĩmahũũnie na irio.
Psalms132:16 Nĩngahumba athĩnjĩri-Ngai akuo ũhonokio
Psalms132:17 “Kũu nĩkuo ngaatũma rũhĩa rwa Daudi rũthundũke na njigĩre ũrĩa njitĩrĩirie maguta tawa ũgwakana.

Psalms136:1 Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho
Psalms136:2 Cookeriai Ngai wa ngai iria ingĩ ngaatho. Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:3 Cookeriai Mwathani wa aathani ngaatho: Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:4 we wiki nĩwe wĩkaga maũndũ manene ma magegania
Psalms136:5 nĩwe wombire igũrũ na ũndũ wa ũmenyo wake
Psalms136:6 nĩwe watambũrũkirie thĩ nyũmũ igũrũ rĩa maaĩ
Psalms136:7 nĩwe wombire imũrĩ iria nene
Psalms136:8 riũa rĩathage mũthenya
Psalms136:9 naguo mweri na njata ciathage ũtukũ; Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:10 nĩwe waringire marigithathi ma Misiri
Psalms136:11 akĩruta Isiraeli gatagatĩ-inĩ kao
Psalms136:12 na guoko kwa hinya na atambũrũkĩtie gĩcoka gĩake
Psalms136:13 nĩwe wagayũkanirie Iria Itune rĩgĩtigana
Psalms136:14 agĩtũma andũ a Isiraeli matuĩkanie gatagatĩ karĩo
Psalms136:15 no Firaũni na ita rĩake akĩmahubĩkanĩria kũu Iria-inĩ Itune; Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:16 nĩwe watongoririe andũ ake magĩtuĩkanĩria werũ-inĩ
Psalms136:17 nĩwe waringire athamaki maarĩ anene
Psalms136:18 na akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ ngumo: Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:19 nĩo Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori
Psalms136:20 na Ogu mũthamaki wa Bashani; Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:21 na akĩheana bũrũri wao ũtuĩke igai
Psalms136:22 ũgĩtuĩka igai rĩa Isiraeli ndungata yake; Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:23 nĩwe watũririkanire rĩrĩa twahatĩrĩirio
Psalms136:24 na agĩtũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciitũ
Psalms136:25 nĩwe ũheaga ciũmbe ciothe irio. Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:26 Cookeriai Mũrungu wa igũrũ ngaatho. Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.

Psalms137:3 nĩgũkorwo tũrĩ kũu andũ arĩa maatũtahĩte nĩmatwĩraga tũmainĩre nyĩmbo
Psalms137:4 Tũngĩhota atĩa kũina nyĩmbo cia Jehova tũrĩ bũrũri wa ũgeni?

Psalms139:1 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms139:2 Nĩũĩ rĩrĩa njikarĩte thĩ na rĩrĩa njũkĩrĩte ũkamenya meciiria makwa ũrĩ o kũraya.
Psalms139:3 Nĩũũĩ ngiumagara o na ngĩkoma; Wee nĩũũĩ mĩthiĩre yakwa yothe.
Psalms139:4 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms139:5 Nĩũnjirigĩire mbere na thuutha; nĩũnjigĩrĩire guoko gwaku.
Psalms139:6 Ũmenyo ta ũcio nĩ wa magegania mũno harĩ niĩ
Psalms139:7 Nĩ kũ ingĩthiĩ njeherere Roho waku? Ingĩũrĩra kũ nyume ũthiũ-inĩ waku?
Psalms139:8 Ingĩambata thiĩ igũrũ
Psalms139:9 Ingĩũmbũka na mathagu ma gũgĩkĩa
Psalms139:10 o na kũu guoko gwakwa nokuo kũngĩndongoria
Psalms139:11 Ingiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms139:12 o na nduma ndĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩgũtumanĩra; ũtukũ ũkwara ta mũthenya
Psalms139:13 Nĩgũkorwo nĩwe wombire ciĩga ciakwa cia na thĩinĩ; wanyiitithanirie ndĩ o nda ya maitũ.
Psalms139:14 Nĩngũkũgooca nĩ ũndũ mũũmbĩre ũrĩa nyũmbĩtwo naguo nĩ wa kũmakania na wa magegania; ciĩko ciaku nĩ cia magegania
Psalms139:15 Mahĩndĩ makwa matiahithĩkĩte harĩwe
Psalms139:16 maitho maku nĩmonaga mwĩrĩ wakwa ũtanombwo biũ. Matukũ mothe marĩa nyamũrĩirwo nĩmandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩaku o na mbere ya ũmwe wamo kũgĩa.
Psalms139:17 Hĩ! Ĩ meciiria maku matikĩrĩ ma bata harĩ niĩ
Psalms139:18 Ingĩtua kũmatara
Psalms139:19 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Psalms139:20 Maaragia ũhoro waku marĩ na meciiria mooru; arĩa magũthũire mahũthagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku ũũru.

Psalms139:23 Wee Mũrungu
Psalms139:24 Rora wone kana nĩ harĩ mĩthiĩre mĩũru thĩinĩ wakwa

Psalms141:3 Wee Jehova

Psalms141:5 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩakĩĩninge: ũndũ ũcio nĩ wa kũnyonia ũtugi; kũndũithia nĩakĩndũithie: ũguo no ta kũnjitĩrĩria maguta mũtwe wakwa. Mũtwe wakwa ndũngĩrega gũitĩrĩrio maguta macio. No rĩrĩ

Psalms145:3 Jehova nĩwe mũnene
Psalms145:4 Rũciaro rũmwe nĩrũkarahĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ maũndũ marĩa waneka; nĩrũkamenyithanagia ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia hinya.

Psalms147:1 Goocai Jehova. Kaĩ nĩ ũndũ mwega kũgooca Ngai witũ na rwĩmbo-ĩ
Psalms147:2 Jehova nĩwe wakaga Jerusalemu; nĩwe ũcookagĩrĩria andũ a Isiraeli arĩa matahĩtwo.
Psalms147:3 Nĩwe ũhonagia arĩa athuthĩku ngoro
Psalms147:4 Nĩwe ũmenyaga mũigana wa njata
Psalms147:5 Mwathani witũ nĩwe mũnene na nĩ arĩ hinya mũingĩ; ũmenyo wake ndũrĩ mũthia.
Psalms147:6 Jehova nĩwe ũtiiragĩrĩra andũ arĩa ahooreri
Psalms147:7 Inĩrai Jehova mũmũcookerie ngaatho; inĩrai Ngai witũ na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto.
Psalms147:8 Nĩahumbagĩra igũrũ na matu; nĩwe uuragĩria thĩ mbura

Psalms149:2 Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmakenere ũcio wamombire; andũ a Zayuni nĩmacanjamũke nĩ ũndũ wa Mũthamaki wao.
Psalms149:3 Nĩmagooce rĩĩtwa rĩake makĩrũgarũgaga
Psalms149:4 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩakenagio nĩ andũ ake; andũ arĩa ahooreri amahumbaga thũmbĩ ya ũhonokio.
Psalms149:5 Andũ arĩa aamũre nĩmakenere gĩtĩĩo kĩu
Psalms149:6 Ũgooci wa Mũrungu ũrokorwo tũnua-inĩ twao
Psalms149:7 nĩguo meerĩhĩrie harĩ ndũrĩrĩ

Psalms150:1 Goocai Jehova. Goocai Mũrungu mũrĩ harĩa hake haamũre; mũgoocei mũrĩ kũu igũrũ
Psalms150:2 Mũgoocei nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciake cia hinya; mũgoocei nĩ ũndũ wa ũnene wake mũingĩ mũno.
Psalms150:3 Mũgoocei mũkĩhuhaga karumbeta
Psalms150:4 mũgoocei na tũhembe mũkĩrũgarũgaga
Psalms150:5 mũgoocei mũkĩhũũrithanagia thaani cia rũthuku iria ngʼambi
Psalms150:6 Kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩ mĩhũmũ nĩkĩgooce Jehova. Goocai Jehova.

Proverbs3:15 Ũũgĩ ũrĩ goro gũkĩra ruru iria ndune; kĩrĩa gĩothe ũngĩĩrirĩria gũtirĩ kĩngĩringithanio naguo.
Proverbs3:16 Guoko-inĩ gwake kwa ũrĩo harĩ ũingĩ wa matukũ; guoko-inĩ gwake kwa ũmotho harĩ na ũtonga na gĩtĩĩo.
Proverbs3:17 Mĩthiĩre ya ũũgĩ nĩ mĩthiĩre ya kwendeka
Proverbs3:18 Ũũgĩ nĩ mũtĩ wa muoyo kũrĩ arĩa maũhĩmbagĩria; arĩa megĩagĩra naguo-rĩ

Proverbs10:12 Rũmena rũrehaga nyamũkano

Proverbs10:14 Andũ oogĩ meigagĩra ũmenyo
Proverbs10:15 Indo cia itonga nĩ gĩtũũro kĩao kĩirigĩre na hinya

Proverbs10:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhithaga rũmena rwake aaragia na mĩromo ya maheeni
Proverbs10:19 Rĩrĩa ciugo ciaingĩha mehia matiagaga
Proverbs10:20 Rũrĩmĩ rwa mũndũ mũthingu nĩ betha njega
Proverbs10:21 Mĩromo ya arĩa athingu ĩhũnagia andũ aingĩ
Proverbs10:22 Kĩrathimo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩo kĩrehaga ũtonga
Proverbs10:23 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu akenagĩra mĩtugo mĩũru
Proverbs10:24 Kĩrĩa mũndũ mwaganu etigagĩra nĩkĩo gĩkaamũkora
Proverbs10:25 Kĩhuhũkanio kĩahĩtũka andũ arĩa aaganu maticookaga kuoneka
Proverbs10:26 Ta ũrĩa thiki ĩgagatagĩra magego
Proverbs10:27 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova-rĩ
Proverbs10:28 Itanya rĩa mũndũ mũthingu nĩ gĩkeno
Proverbs10:29 Njĩra ya Jehova nĩ rĩũrĩro rĩa andũ arĩa athingu
Proverbs10:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu ndarĩ hĩndĩ akaamunywo
Proverbs10:31 Kanua ka mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu karehaga ũũgĩ
Proverbs10:32 Mĩromo ya mũndũ mũthingu nĩyũũĩ kwaria ndeto iria ciagĩrĩire
Proverbs11:1 Ratiri itarĩ cia ma nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs11:2 Rĩrĩa mwĩtĩĩo woka
Proverbs11:3 Ũrũngĩrĩru wa arĩa marũgamĩte wega nĩũmonagĩrĩria njĩra
Proverbs11:4 Ũtonga ndũrĩ kĩguni mũthenya wa mangʼũrĩ
Proverbs11:5 Ũthingu wa andũ arĩa matarĩ na ũcuuke ũmathondekagĩra njĩra nũngarũ
Proverbs11:6 Ũthingu wa andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩũmahonokagia
Proverbs11:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ mwaganu aakua
Proverbs11:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩahonokagio kuuma thĩĩna-inĩ
Proverbs11:9 Mũndũ ũtetigĩrĩte Ngai nĩanangaga mũndũ wa itũũra na kanua gake
Proverbs11:10 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu magaacĩra
Proverbs11:11 Itũũra inene nĩrĩtũũgagĩrio nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrathimo kĩa andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru
Proverbs11:12 Mũndũ ũtarĩ ũũgĩ wa gũkũũrana maũndũ anyũrũragia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake
Proverbs11:13 Mũndũ wa mũhuhu nĩoimagia ndeto cia ndundu nja
Proverbs11:14 Bũrũri ũngĩaga ũtongoria mwega nĩkũgũa ũgũũaga
Proverbs11:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũgamagĩrĩra thiirĩ wa mũndũ ũngĩ ti-itherũ nĩagathĩĩnĩka
Proverbs11:16 Mũndũ-wa-nja mũtaana nĩegĩagĩra gĩtĩĩo
Proverbs11:17 Mũndũ mũtaana egunaga we mwene
Proverbs11:18 Mũndũ mwaganu athũkũmaga mũcaara wa kũmũheenia
Proverbs11:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu kũna nĩagatũũra muoyo
Proverbs11:20 Andũ arĩa marĩ ngoro ya rũtũrĩko nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs11:21 Ti-itherũ mũndũ mwaganu ndakaaga kũherithio
Proverbs11:22 Mũndũ-wa-nja mũthaka ũtarĩ ũgereri ahaana ta gĩcũhĩ gĩa thahabu kĩrĩ iniũrũ-inĩ rĩa ngũrwe.
Proverbs11:23 Wendi wa mũndũ mũthingu ũrĩkagĩrĩria o wega-inĩ
Proverbs11:24 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũheanaga na ũtaana
Proverbs11:25 Mũndũ mũtaana nĩakagaacĩra; ũrĩa ũnyootoraga arĩa angĩ o nake mwene nĩakanyootorwo.
Proverbs11:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũregaga kwenderia andũ mbembe iria aigĩte nĩarumagwo nĩ andũ
Proverbs11:27 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũcaragia maũndũ mega arĩonaga o wega
Proverbs11:28 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wĩhokaga ũtonga wake nĩkũgũa akaagũa
Proverbs11:29 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyamaragia mũciĩ wake akaagaya o rũhuho
Proverbs11:30 Maciaro ma andũ arĩa athingu nĩ mũtĩ wa muoyo
Proverbs11:31 Angĩkorwo andũ arĩa athingu nĩmarĩhagwo marĩ gũkũ thĩ-rĩ
Proverbs12:1 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wendete ũtaaro nĩendete ũmenyi
Proverbs12:2 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwega nĩatugagwo nĩ Jehova
Proverbs12:3 Mũndũ ndangĩhota kwĩhaanda na maũndũ ma waganu
Proverbs12:4 Mũtumia ũrĩa ngatha nĩwe thũmbĩ ya mũthuuri wake
Proverbs12:5 Mĩbango ya andũ arĩa athingu nĩ ya kĩhooto
Proverbs12:6 Ndeto cia andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ cia kuohia andũ mamaite thakame
Proverbs12:7 Andũ aaganu mangʼaũranagio magathira biũ
Proverbs12:8 Mũndũ agaathagĩrĩrio kũringana na ũũgĩ wake
Proverbs12:9 Kaba mũndũ ũrĩa wonagwo ta atarĩ bata no nĩ arĩ ndungata
Proverbs12:10 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩamenyagĩrĩra muoyo wa nyamũ yake
Proverbs12:11 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩmaga mũgũnda wake nĩarĩkoragwo na irio nyingĩ
Proverbs12:12 Arĩa aaganu meriragĩria indo iria itahĩtwo nĩ andũ arĩa ooru
Proverbs12:13 Mũndũ mũũru ategagwo nĩ mĩario ya wĩhia wake
Proverbs12:14 Mũndũ nĩaiyũragwo nĩ maciaro mega ma kanua gake
Proverbs12:15 Njĩra ya mũndũ mũkĩĩgu yonekaga yagĩrĩire harĩ we
Proverbs12:16 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu onanagia marakara make o rĩmwe
Proverbs12:17 Mũira wa ma arutaga o ũira wa ma
Proverbs12:18 Ciugo iteciirĩtio itheecaga ta rũhiũ rwa njora
Proverbs12:19 Mĩromo ĩrĩa yaragia ma ĩtũũraga nginya tene
Proverbs12:20 Ngoro cia arĩa mathugundaga gwĩka ũũru ciyũrĩtwo nĩ maheeni
Proverbs12:21 Gũtirĩ ũũru ũngĩkora andũ arĩa athingu
Proverbs12:22 Mĩromo ĩrĩa ĩheenanagia nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs12:23 Mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri nĩahithaga ũmenyi wake
Proverbs12:24 Moko ma mũndũ ũrĩ kĩyo nĩmo magaathana
Proverbs12:25 Ũritũ wa ngoro nĩũhatagĩrĩria mũndũ
Proverbs12:26 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩataaraga arata ake
Proverbs12:27 Mũndũ kĩgũũta o na ndahĩhagia nyama cia ũguĩmi wake
Proverbs12:28 Muoyo wonekaga na njĩra ya ũthingu; na njĩra-inĩ ĩyo-rĩ
Proverbs13:1 Mwana mũũgĩ nĩathikagĩrĩria ũrutani wa ithe
Proverbs13:2 Mũndũ nĩakenagĩra maciaro mega ma kuuma kanua gake
Proverbs13:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra kanua gake nĩ muoyo wake amenyagĩrĩra
Proverbs13:4 Ngoro ya kĩgũũta ĩĩriragĩria na ndĩone kĩndũ
Proverbs13:5 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩathũire ũhoro ũtarĩ wa ma
Proverbs13:6 Ũthingu ũgitagĩra mũndũ ũrĩa mũrũngĩrĩru
Proverbs13:7 Kũrĩ mũndũ wĩtuaga gĩtonga
Proverbs13:8 Ũtonga wa mũndũ wahota gũkũũra muoyo wake
Proverbs13:9 Ũtheri wa mũndũ mũthingu waaraga ũgacangarara
Proverbs13:10 Mwĩtĩĩo ũciaraga njũgitano
Proverbs13:11 Mbeeca itarĩ cia wĩhokeku ithiiaga igĩthiraga
Proverbs13:12 Ũndũ mũtaanye ũngĩikario mũno nĩũrwaragia mũndũ ngoro
Proverbs13:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthũire ũrutani nĩeyũnũhaga
Proverbs13:14 Ũrutani wa mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo
Proverbs13:15 Gũtaũkĩrwo wega nĩ maũndũ gũtũmaga mũndũ endeke
Proverbs13:16 Mũndũ o wothe mwĩbaarĩrĩri ekaga maũndũ make na ũmenyi
Proverbs13:17 Mũtũmwo mwaganu atoonyaga thĩĩna-inĩ
Proverbs13:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũregaga gũtaarwo anyiitagwo nĩ thĩĩna na thoni
Proverbs13:19 Ũndũ mwĩrirĩrie wakinyanĩra ũiguithagia ngoro wega
Proverbs13:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũceeraga na arĩa oogĩ akĩragĩrĩria kũũhĩga
Proverbs13:21 Mũtino ũthingataga mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩhia
Proverbs13:22 Mũndũ mwega atigagĩra ciana cia ciana ciake igai
Proverbs13:23 Mũgũnda wa mũndũ mũthĩĩni no ũciare irio nyingĩ
Proverbs13:24 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũigaga rũthanju thĩ nĩ mwana wake athũire
Proverbs13:25 Andũ arĩa athingu marĩĩaga makahũũna
Proverbs14:1 Mũtumia mũũgĩ nĩ gwaka akaga nyũmba yake
Proverbs14:2 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiiaga na mĩthiĩre mĩrũngĩrĩru nĩwe mwĩtigĩri Jehova
Proverbs14:3 Mĩario ya mũndũ mũkĩĩgu nĩ rũthanju rwa kũmũhũũra
Proverbs14:4 Kũrĩa gũtarĩ ndegwa mĩharatĩ ĩkoragwo ĩrĩ mĩtheru
Proverbs14:5 Mũira mwĩhokeku ndaheenanagia
Proverbs14:6 Mũnyũrũrania acaragia ũũgĩ na ndangĩwona
Proverbs14:7 Ikara kũraya na mũndũ mũkĩĩgu
Proverbs14:8 Ũũgĩ wa arĩa abaarĩrĩri nĩũtũmaga mamenye ũhoro wa njĩra ciao
Proverbs14:9 Andũ arĩa akĩĩgu manyũrũragia horohio ya mehia
Proverbs14:10 Ngoro o yothe nĩyũũĩ ũrũrũ wayo
Proverbs14:11 Nyũmba ya mũndũ mwaganu nĩĩkanangwo
Proverbs14:12 Kũrĩ njĩra mũndũ onaga ta yagĩrĩire
Proverbs14:13 O na hĩndĩ ya gũtheka ngoro no ĩkorwo ĩgĩtuura
Proverbs14:14 Andũ arĩa matarĩ ehokeku nĩmakarĩhwo kũna nĩ ũndũ wa mĩthiĩre yao
Proverbs14:15 Mũndũ ũtarĩ ũũgĩ etĩkagia ũndũ o wothe
Proverbs14:16 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩetigagĩra Jehova na akeherera ũũru
Proverbs14:17 Mũndũ ũhiũhaga kũrakara ekaga maũndũ ma ũrimũ
Proverbs14:18 Andũ arĩa matarĩ ũũgĩ magayaga ũrimũ
Proverbs14:19 Andũ arĩa ooru nĩmakainamĩrĩra harĩ arĩa ega
Proverbs14:20 Andũ arĩa athĩĩni mathũũragwo o na nĩ andũ a itũũra rĩao
Proverbs14:21 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenaga mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake nĩ kwĩhia ehagia
Proverbs14:22 Andũ arĩa mathugundaga ũũru githĩ ti njĩra mahĩtagia? No arĩa mabangaga maũndũ mega monaga ũtugi na wĩhokeku.
Proverbs14:23 Wĩra wothe wa hinya ũrehaga uumithio
Proverbs14:24 Ũtonga wa andũ arĩa oogĩ nĩguo thũmbĩ yao
Proverbs14:25 Mũira mwĩhokeku nĩahonokagia mĩoyo
Proverbs14:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtigagĩra Jehova arĩ na kĩĩhitho kĩrũmu
Proverbs14:27 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo
Proverbs14:28 Ũingĩ wa andũ nĩguo riiri wa mũthamaki
Proverbs14:29 Mũndũ mũkirĩrĩria arĩ ũmenyo mũingĩ
Proverbs14:30 Ngoro ĩrĩ na thayũ ĩheaga mwĩrĩ muoyo
Proverbs14:31 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria athĩĩni nĩkũnyarara anyararaga Ũrĩa wamombire
Proverbs14:32 Rĩrĩa mũtino woka
Proverbs14:33 Ũũgĩ nĩ ũikaraga ngoro-inĩ ya ũrĩa ũũĩ gũkũũrana maũndũ
Proverbs14:34 Ũthingu nĩgũtũũgĩria ũtũũgagĩria rũrĩrĩ
Proverbs14:35 Mũthamaki nĩakenagio nĩ ndungata njũgĩ
Proverbs15:1 Icookio rĩa ũhooreri nĩrĩeheragia mangʼũrĩ
Proverbs15:2 Rũrĩmĩ rwa mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ rũgaathagĩrĩria ũmenyo
Proverbs15:3 Maitho ma Jehova marĩ kũndũ guothe
Proverbs15:4 Rũrĩmĩ rũrĩa rũrehaga kĩhonia nĩ ta mũtĩ wa muoyo
Proverbs15:5 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu aregaga ũtaaro wa ithe
Proverbs15:6 Nyũmba ya mũndũ mũthingu ĩkoragwo na kĩgĩĩna kĩnene
Proverbs15:7 Mĩromo ya andũ arĩa oogĩ ĩtambagia o ũũgĩ
Proverbs15:8 Igongona rĩa andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs15:9 Njĩra cia andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs15:10 Iherithia rĩtarĩ rĩa tha rĩetereire mũndũ ũrĩa ũtigĩte njĩra
Proverbs15:11 Gĩkuũ na Mwanangĩko ciikaraga ciĩyanĩkĩte mbere ya Jehova
Proverbs15:12 Mũnyũrũrania nĩathũire kũrũngwo; ndangĩhooya kĩrĩra kũrĩ ũrĩa mũũgĩ.
Proverbs15:13 Ngoro ngenu ĩtũmaga gĩthiithi gĩthere
Proverbs15:14 Ngoro ĩrĩ na gũkũũrana maũndũ nĩĩmaathaga ũmenyo
Proverbs15:15 Matukũ mothe ma andũ arĩa ahatĩrĩrie nĩ ma thĩĩna
Proverbs15:16 Nĩ kaba kĩndũ kĩnini hamwe na gwĩtigĩra Jehova
Proverbs15:17 Nĩ kaba kũrĩa rwĩga rwa nyeni harĩa harĩ wendo
Proverbs15:18 Mũndũ ũhiũhaga kũrakara aarahũraga ngarari
Proverbs15:19 Njĩra ya kĩgũũta nĩkũhingwo ĩhingĩtwo na mĩigua
Proverbs15:20 Mwana mũũgĩ atũmaga ithe akene
Proverbs15:21 Ũrimũ ũkenagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũtooĩ gũkũũrana maũndũ
Proverbs15:22 Mĩbango nĩĩthaataga nĩ kwaga kĩrĩra
Proverbs15:23 Mũndũ nĩaiguaga gĩkeno agĩcookia ũhoro ũrĩa wagĩrĩire
Proverbs15:24 Harĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ njĩra ya muoyo ĩrorete na igũrũ
Proverbs15:25 Jehova nĩamomoraga nyũmba ya mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩtĩĩi
Proverbs15:26 Meciiria ma mũndũ mwaganu nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs15:27 Mũndũ mũkoroku arehagĩra nyũmba yake thĩĩna
Proverbs15:28 Ngoro ya mũndũ mũthingu nĩĩthimaga macookio mayo
Proverbs15:29 Jehova aikaraga haraaya na andũ arĩa aaganu
Proverbs15:30 Gũtheria gĩthiithi nĩkũrehagĩra ngoro gĩkeno
Proverbs15:31 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthikagĩrĩria ikaanania rĩrĩa rĩrehaga muoyo nĩagatũũrania na andũ arĩa oogĩ.
Proverbs15:32 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũregaga kũigua agĩkaanio nĩ kwĩnyarara enyararaga we mwene
Proverbs15:33 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩkuo kũheaga mũndũ ũũgĩ
Proverbs16:1 Mĩbango ya ngoro nĩ ya mũndũ
Proverbs16:2 Mũndũ onaga mĩthiĩre yake yothe ĩrĩ mĩega
Proverbs16:3 Rekagĩrĩria Jehova maũndũ mothe marĩa ũrĩĩkaga
Proverbs16:4 Jehova ombire indo ciothe irĩ na gĩtũmi gĩacio
Proverbs16:5 Mũndũ wothe wa ngoro ya mwĩtĩĩo nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova. Menyai na ma atĩrĩ
Proverbs16:6 Mehia nĩmahorohagĩrio nĩ wendo na wĩhokeku
Proverbs16:7 Rĩrĩa mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ yakenia Jehova-rĩ
Proverbs16:8 Kaba indo nini cionekete na njĩra ya ũthingu
Proverbs16:9 Mũndũ nĩabangaga na ngoro mũthiĩre wake
Proverbs16:10 Mĩromo ya mũthamaki yaragia ũhoro taarĩ ndũmĩrĩri
Proverbs16:11 Igeri na ratiri cia ma nĩ cia Jehova; mahiga mothe ma gũthima marĩa marĩ mũhuko-rĩ
Proverbs16:12 Kũrĩ athamaki-rĩ
Proverbs16:13 Athamaki nĩmakenagĩra mĩromo ĩrĩa yaragia ma; nĩ marĩ bata na mũndũ waragia ũhoro wa ma.
Proverbs16:14 Mangʼũrĩ ma mũthamaki nĩ ta mũtũmwo wa gĩkuũ
Proverbs16:15 Gũthererwo gĩthiithi nĩ mũthamaki nĩ muoyo; ũtugi wake ũtariĩ ta itu rĩa mbura ĩrĩa ĩkũragia irio.
Proverbs16:16 Hĩ! Kaĩ kũgĩa ũũgĩ nĩ kwega gũkĩra thahabu-ĩ
Proverbs16:17 Njĩra njariĩ ya arĩa arũngĩrĩru yeheragĩra ũũru; mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra mĩthiĩre yake nĩ muoyo wake mwene agitagĩra.
Proverbs16:18 Mwĩtĩĩo ũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ mwanangĩko
Proverbs16:19 Nĩ kaba roho wa kwĩnyiihia na gũkorwo hamwe na arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie
Proverbs16:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũmbũyagia mataaro nĩagaacagĩra
Proverbs16:21 Arĩa oogĩ ngoro-inĩ metagwo akũũrani maũndũ
Proverbs16:22 Ũtaũku nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo kũrĩ arĩa marĩ naguo
Proverbs16:23 Ngoro ya mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩyo ĩtongoragia kanua gake
Proverbs16:24 Ndeto njega nĩ igua rĩa ũũkĩ
Proverbs16:25 Kũrĩ njĩra mũndũ onaga ta yagĩrĩire
Proverbs16:26 Kũhũũta kwa mũruti wa wĩra nĩkuo kũmũteithagia
Proverbs16:27 Kĩmaramari gĩthugundaga ũũru
Proverbs16:28 Mũndũ mwaganu arehaga ngarari
Proverbs16:29 Mũndũ wa haaro aheenagĩrĩria mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake
Proverbs16:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa uunagĩra andũ riitho akoragwo agĩthugunda waganu
Proverbs16:31 Mbuĩ nĩ thũmbĩ ya riiri; cionekaga nĩ ũndũ wa mũtũũrĩre wa ũthingu.
Proverbs16:32 Nĩ kaba mũndũ mũkirĩrĩria gũkĩra njamba ya ita
Proverbs16:33 Mĩtĩ ĩcuukagĩrwo maru-inĩ
Proverbs17:1 Nĩ kaba kĩenyũ kĩũmũ kĩa mũgate kũndũ kũrĩ na thayũ na ũhooreri
Proverbs17:2 Ndungata ĩrĩ na ũũgĩ ĩgaatuĩka ya gwatha mũriũ wa mwene yo ũrĩa ũrehaga njono
Proverbs17:3 Nyũngũ nĩ ya gũthererio betha
Proverbs17:4 Mũndũ mwaganu athikagĩrĩria mĩromo ĩrĩa yaragia waganu; nake mũndũ wa maheeni athikagĩrĩria rũrĩmĩ rũrĩa rwaragia maũndũ ma gũthũkia.
Proverbs17:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthekagĩrĩra athĩĩni nĩkũmena amenaga Ũrĩa wamombire; mũndũ ũrĩa ũkenagĩra mũtino ndakaaga kũherithio.
Proverbs17:6 Ciana cia ciana nĩ thũmbĩ harĩ andũ arĩa akũrũ
Proverbs17:7 Mĩario ya bata ndĩagĩrĩire kanua ka mũndũ mũkĩĩgu
Proverbs17:8 Ihaki rĩhaana ta ihiga rĩa kũrehe mũnyaka kũrĩ ũrĩa ũhakanaga; kũrĩa guothe athiiaga nĩagaacagĩra.
Proverbs17:9 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhumbagĩra ihĩtia nĩ wendo acaragia
Proverbs17:10 Kũrũithio nĩgũkenagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũũranaga maũndũ gũkĩra iboko igana harĩ mũndũ mũkĩĩgu.
Proverbs17:11 Mũndũ mũũru arongooragia o ũremi; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩagatũmĩrwo mũnene ũtarĩ tha amũũkĩrĩre.
Proverbs17:12 Nĩ kaba gũcemania na nduba ĩtunyĩtwo ciana ciayo gũkĩra gũcemania na mũndũ mũkĩĩgu na ũrimũ wake.
Proverbs17:13 Mũndũ angĩrĩha wega na ũũru
Proverbs17:14 Kwambĩrĩria haaro nĩ ta kũhingũrĩra maaĩ mahingĩrĩrie; nĩ ũndũ ũcio tiganaga na ũhoro ũcio ngarari itaanagĩa.
Proverbs17:15 Gũtuĩra mũndũ mwaganu atĩ ndehĩtie na gũtuĩra ũrĩa ũtehĩtie atĩ nĩ mwĩhia
Proverbs17:16 Mbeeca nĩ cia bata ũrĩkũ irĩ guoko-inĩ kwa mũndũ mũkĩĩgu
Proverbs17:17 Mũrata wa mũndũ amwendaga hĩndĩ ciothe
Proverbs17:18 Mũndũ ũtooĩ gũkũũrana maũndũ atuĩkaga wa kũrĩha thiirĩ wa mũndũ ũngĩ o na akaiga kĩndũ gĩa kũrũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ wa mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake.
Proverbs17:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa wendete haaro nĩ mehia endete; na mũndũ ũrĩa wakaga kĩhingo kĩraihu na igũrũ eĩtagĩria wanangĩki.
Proverbs17:20 Mũndũ ũrĩ ngoro ya ũremi ndagaacagĩra; nake mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ rũrĩmĩ rwa kũheenania agũũaga thĩĩna-inĩ.
Proverbs17:21 Kũgĩa na mũriũ mũkĩĩgu kũrehaga ihooru; ithe wa mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ndarĩ hĩndĩ akenaga.
Proverbs17:22 Ngoro ngenu nĩ ndawa njega
Proverbs17:23 Mũndũ mwaganu amũkagĩra ihaki na hitho
Proverbs17:24 Mũndũ ũkũũranaga maũndũ aikaraga arorete o ũũgĩ
Proverbs17:25 Mwana mũkĩĩgu arehagĩra ithe kĩeha
Proverbs17:26 Ti wega kũherithia mũndũ ũtekĩte mahĩtia
Proverbs17:27 Mũndũ ũrĩ na ũmenyo aragia ciugo athimĩte
Proverbs17:28 O na mũndũ mũkĩĩgu angĩkira nĩonagwo arĩ mũũgĩ
Proverbs18:1 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtendaga gũtũũrania na andũ arũmagĩrĩra o merirĩria make; ningĩ areganaga na matua mothe ma ũũgĩ ũrĩa mũkinyanĩru.
Proverbs18:2 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ndakenagĩra ũtaũku
Proverbs18:3 Rĩrĩa waganu woka
Proverbs18:4 Ciugo cia kanua ka mũndũ nĩ ta ndia ndiku
Proverbs18:5 Ti wega gũtĩĩra andũ arĩa aaganu maũthĩ
Proverbs18:6 Mĩromo ya mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ĩmũrehagĩra ngũĩ
Proverbs18:7 Kanua ka mũndũ mũkĩĩgu nĩko kamũthũkagĩria maũndũ
Proverbs18:8 Ndeto cia mũndũ wa mũhuhu nĩ ta twenyũ twega twa irio; tũmerũkaga nginya tũturi-inĩ twa nda tũrĩa tũrĩ thĩinĩ mũno.
Proverbs18:9 Mũndũ kĩgũũta wĩra-inĩ wake nĩ wa nyina na ũrĩa wanangaga.
Proverbs18:10 Rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova nĩ mũthiringo ũrĩ hinya; arĩa athingu moragĩra ho
Proverbs18:11 Ũtonga wa andũ arĩa atongu nĩguo itũũra rĩao rĩa hinya; meciiragia nĩ rũthingo rũtangĩhaicĩka.
Proverbs18:12 Mbere ya mwanangĩko
Proverbs18:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũcookagia ũhoro mbere ya kũũthikĩrĩria
Proverbs18:14 Roho wa mũndũ nĩguo ũmũũmagĩrĩria rĩrĩa arĩ mũrũaru
Proverbs18:15 Ngoro ya mũndũ mũkũũrani maũndũ nĩĩgĩagĩra ũmenyo; matũ ma arĩa oogĩ nĩmaũcaragĩrĩria.
Proverbs18:16 Kĩheo mũndũ aheanĩte kĩmuonagia njĩra ya kũhĩtũkĩra
Proverbs18:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrehaga ciira wake mbere onekaga taarĩ we na ma
Proverbs18:18 Ũcuuki wa mĩtĩ nĩũniinaga ngarari
Proverbs18:19 Mũndũ mũrakarie nĩ mũrũ wa nyina nĩ hinya kwĩiguithania nake gũkĩra kwĩgwatĩra itũũra inene rĩirigĩre
Proverbs18:20 Nda ya mũndũ nĩĩhũũnagio nĩ maciaro ma kanua gake; nĩaiganagwo nĩ magetha ma mĩromo yake.
Proverbs18:21 Rũrĩmĩ rũrĩ na hinya wa gwathĩrĩra mũndũ muoyo kana gĩkuũ
Proverbs18:22 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩgĩĩagĩra na mũtumia nĩegĩagĩra na kĩndũ kĩega
Proverbs18:23 Mũndũ mũthĩĩni athaithanaga aiguĩrwo tha
Proverbs18:24 Mũndũ mũceeri na andũ aingĩ aahota kwĩyũnũhithia
Proverbs19:1 Nĩ kaba mũndũ mũthĩĩni ũrĩa ũthiiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩtarĩ ũcuuke
Proverbs19:2 Ti wega kũgĩa na kĩyo hatarĩ na ũmenyo
Proverbs19:3 Ũrimũ wa mũndũ nĩguo wanangaga muoyo wake
Proverbs19:4 Ũtonga nĩwongagĩrĩra mũndũ arata aingĩ
Proverbs19:5 Mũira wa maheeni ndakaaga kũherithio
Proverbs19:6 Andũ aingĩ macaragia ũrĩa mangĩendwo nĩ mũnene
Proverbs19:7 Angĩkorwo mũndũ mũthĩĩni nĩatiganagio nĩ andũ ao othe-rĩ
Proverbs19:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩgĩĩagĩra na ũũgĩ nĩ ngoro yake mwene endete; ũrĩa ũkenagĩra ũtaũku nĩagaacagĩra.
Proverbs19:9 Mũira wa maheeni ndakaaga kũherithio
Proverbs19:10 Gũtiagĩrĩire mũndũ mũkĩĩgu gũikaraga egangarĩte; gũkĩrĩ ũũru makĩria ngombo gwatha anene!
Proverbs19:11 Ũũgĩ wa mũndũ nĩũmũheaga ũkirĩrĩria
Proverbs19:12 Marakara ma mũthamaki nĩ ta mũraramo wa mũrũũthi
Proverbs19:13 Mwana mũkĩĩgu nĩ mwanangĩko harĩ ithe
Proverbs19:14 Nyũmba na ũtonga igayagwo kuuma kũrĩ aciari
Proverbs19:15 Ũgũũta ũrehaga toro mũnene
Proverbs19:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa wathĩkagĩra maathani-rĩ
Proverbs19:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũiguagĩra athĩĩni tha nĩ Jehova akombagĩra indo
Proverbs19:18 Rũithagia mũrũguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa kũrĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro; tiga kwenda gũtũma akooragwo.
Proverbs19:19 Mũndũ wa marakara mahiũ no nginya aherithio; ũngĩmũteithũra rĩmwe no nginya ũkaamũteithũra rĩngĩ.
Proverbs19:20 Thikĩrĩria mataaro na wĩtĩkĩre ũrutani
Proverbs19:21 Mĩbango ya ngoro ya mũndũ nĩ mĩingĩ
Proverbs19:22 Kĩrĩa mũndũ eriragĩria nĩ wendo ũrĩa ũtathiraga
Proverbs19:23 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova gũkinyagia mũndũ muoyo-inĩ: Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ akahurũka aiganĩire
Proverbs19:24 Kĩgũũta kĩrikagia guoko gwakĩo thaani-inĩ; gĩgakĩremwo o na nĩgũgũcookia kanua!
Proverbs19:25 Hũũra mũnyũrũrania
Proverbs19:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtunyaga ithe indo na akaingata nyina
Proverbs19:27 Mũrũ wakwa
Proverbs19:28 Mũira wa kũhakwo anyũrũragia kĩhooto
Proverbs19:29 Maherithia maigĩirwo anyũrũrania
Proverbs20:1 Ndibei nĩ mũnyũrũrania
Proverbs20:2 Mangʼũrĩ ma mũthamaki nĩ ta mũraramo wa mũrũũthi; ũrĩa ũmũrakaragia nĩ muoyo wake ateaga.
Proverbs20:3 Gwĩtheema ngũĩ kũrehagĩra mũndũ gĩtĩĩo
Proverbs20:4 Kĩgũũta gĩticimbaga hĩndĩ ya irĩma; nĩ ũndũ ũcio hĩndĩ ya magetha gĩathiĩ kũmaatha gĩtirĩ kĩndũ kĩonaga.
Proverbs20:5 Muoroto wa ngoro ya mũndũ nĩ ta maaĩ ma ndia ndiku
Proverbs20:6 Andũ aingĩ metuaga marĩ na wendo ũtangĩthira
Proverbs20:7 Mũndũ mũthingu atũũraga mũtũũrĩre ũtarĩ ũcuuke; kũrathimwo-rĩ
Proverbs20:8 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki aikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene atue ciira
Proverbs20:9 Nũũ ũngiuga atĩrĩ
Proverbs20:10 Mahiga ma ratiri mataiganainie ũritũ
Proverbs20:11 O na kaana kamenyekaga nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciako
Proverbs20:12 Matũ marĩa maiguaga na maitho marĩa monaga-rĩ
Proverbs20:13 Tiga kwenda toro
Proverbs20:14 Mũgũri akĩgũra oigaga atĩrĩ
Proverbs20:15 Thahabu nĩ kũrĩ
Proverbs20:16 Oya nguo ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩrũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ wa mũndũ wa kũngĩ; mĩige ĩrũgamĩrĩre thiirĩ ũcio wa mũndũ wa kũngĩ.
Proverbs20:17 Irio cionekete na njĩra ya kũheenania irĩ cama harĩ mũndũ
Proverbs20:18 Mĩbango ĩgaacagĩra nĩ ũndũ wa kũhooya kĩrĩra
Proverbs20:19 Mũndũ wa mũhuhu nĩoimagia ndeto cia ndundu nja
Proverbs20:20 Mũndũ angĩruma ithe kana nyina
Proverbs20:21 Igai rĩrĩa rĩoneka narua kĩambĩrĩria-inĩ
Proverbs20:22 Ndũkoige atĩrĩ
Proverbs20:23 Mahiga ma ratiri mataiganainie ũritũ nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs20:24 Makinya ma mũndũ matongoragio nĩ Jehova. Mũndũ-rĩ
Proverbs20:25 Nĩ mũtego harĩ mũndũ kwamũrĩra Ngai kĩndũ na ihenya
Proverbs20:26 Mũthamaki mũũgĩ nĩathũngũrũraga andũ arĩa aaganu; ageragĩria kĩgaragari gĩa gũkonyora ngano igũrũ rĩao.
Proverbs20:27 Roho wa mũndũ nĩ tawa wa Jehova
Proverbs20:28 Wendo na wĩhokeku nĩcigitagĩra mũthamaki; ũtugi nĩũtũmaga gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene kĩrũme.
Proverbs20:29 Hinya wa andũ ethĩ nĩguo riiri wao
Proverbs20:30 Mahũũra na nguraro nĩitheragia ũũru wa mũndũ
Proverbs21:1 Ngoro ya mũthamaki ĩrĩ moko-inĩ ma Jehova; amĩroragia o kũrĩa ekwenda
Proverbs21:2 Mũndũ oonaga mĩthiĩre yake yothe ĩrĩ mĩega
Proverbs21:3 Gwĩka ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire na ũrĩa ũrĩ kĩhooto nĩ gwĩtĩkagĩrwo nĩ Jehova gũkĩra kũruta igongona.
Proverbs21:4 Maitho ma mwĩtũũgĩrio na ngoro ya mwĩtĩĩo
Proverbs21:5 Mĩbango ya arĩa marĩ kĩyo nĩĩrehaga uumithio
Proverbs21:6 Kũgĩa na ũtonga na njĩra ya rũrĩmĩ rwa maheeni nĩ kĩbii gĩa gũthira
Proverbs21:7 Haaro ya andũ arĩa aaganu ĩkaamakururia
Proverbs21:8 Njĩra ya mũndũ mũhĩtia nĩ njogomu
Proverbs21:9 Nĩ kaba gũtũũra nyũmba-igũrũ
Proverbs21:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu eriragĩria gwĩka o ũũru; ndaiguuagĩra mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake tha.
Proverbs21:11 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũnyũrũrania aaherithio
Proverbs21:12 Ũrĩa Mũthingu
Proverbs21:13 Mũndũ angĩhinga matũ ndakaigue kĩrĩro kĩa arĩa athĩĩni-rĩ
Proverbs21:14 Kĩheo kĩheanĩtwo na hitho nĩkĩhooreragia marakara
Proverbs21:15 Ituĩro rĩa kĩhooto rĩatuuo
Proverbs21:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtiganaga na njĩra ya ũũgĩ
Proverbs21:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwendi ikeno nĩagathĩĩna; ũrĩa wothe mwendi ndibei na maguta-rĩ
Proverbs21:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu atuĩkaga irĩhi rĩa gũkũũra ũrĩa mũthingu
Proverbs21:19 Nĩ kaba gũtũũra werũ-inĩ
Proverbs21:20 Thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩ kũrĩ mĩthemba yothe ya irio njega o na maguta
Proverbs21:21 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthingataga ũthingu na wendani nĩagĩĩaga na muoyo
Proverbs21:22 Mũndũ mũũgĩ atharĩkagĩra itũũra inene rĩa andũ arĩa njamba
Proverbs21:23 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra kanua gake na rũrĩmĩ rwake nĩeyeheragia mũtino-inĩ.
Proverbs21:24 Mũndũ mwĩtĩĩi na mwĩgereri
Proverbs21:25 Merirĩria ma mũndũ kĩgũũta nĩmo makaamũũraga
Proverbs21:26 Mũthenya wothe eriragĩria o makĩria
Proverbs21:27 Igongona rĩa mũndũ mwaganu nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi: ĩ rĩtikĩrĩ magigi makĩria hĩndĩ ĩrĩa rĩrehetwo na ũhinga ngoro-inĩ!
Proverbs21:28 Mũira wa maheeni nĩgũthira agaathira

Proverbs21:31 Mbarathi nĩĩharagĩrio nĩ ũndũ wa mũthenya wa mbaara
Proverbs22:1 Rĩĩtwa rĩega nĩrĩakwĩrirĩrio gũkĩra ũtonga mũnene; gũtĩĩka nĩ kwega gũkĩra betha kana thahabu.
Proverbs22:2 Andũ arĩa atongu na arĩa athĩĩni harĩ ũndũ ũmwe ũmanyiitithanĩtie; Jehova nĩwe Mũmbi wao othe.
Proverbs22:3 Mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri onaga ũgwati akehitha
Proverbs22:4 Kwĩnyiihia na gwĩtigĩra Jehova kũrehaga ũtonga
Proverbs22:5 Njĩra cia andũ arĩa aaganu irĩ mĩigua na mĩtego
Proverbs22:6 Menyeria mwana njĩra ĩrĩa agĩrĩirwo nĩkũgera
Proverbs22:7 Andũ arĩa atongu nĩ mathaga arĩa athĩĩni
Proverbs22:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhaandaga waganu agethaga thĩĩna
Proverbs22:9 Mũndũ mũtaana we mwene nĩakarathimwo
Proverbs22:10 Ingata mũnyũrũrania
Proverbs22:11 Mũndũ ũrĩa wendaga ngoro theru na akaaragia maũndũ ma ũtugi
Proverbs22:12 Maitho ma Jehova nĩmamenyagĩrĩra ũmenyo
Proverbs22:13 Kĩgũũta kiugaga
Proverbs22:14 Kanua ka mũtumia mũtharia nĩ irima iriku
Proverbs22:15 Ngoro ya mwana yohanĩtio na ũrimũ
Proverbs22:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria arĩa athĩĩni nĩguo eyongerere ũtonga
Proverbs22:17 Tega matũ
Proverbs22:18 tondũ nĩ ũndũ mwega hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkũmaiga ngoro-inĩ yaku
Proverbs22:19 Ndaakũmenyithia mo nĩgeetha mwĩhoko waku ũkoragwo harĩ Jehova
Proverbs22:20 Githĩ ndikwandĩkĩire thimo mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Proverbs22:21 ngakũruta ciugo cia ma na cia kwĩhokeka
Proverbs22:22 Ndũkanatunye arĩa athĩĩni indo ciao tondũ wa ũthĩĩni wao
Proverbs22:23 nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩakamaciirĩrĩra
Proverbs22:24 Ndũkanagĩe ũrata na mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ marakara mahiũ
Proverbs22:25 tondũ wahota kwĩruta mĩthiĩre yake
Proverbs22:26 Ndũgatuĩke mũndũ wa kũiga kĩndũ gĩa kũrũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ
Proverbs22:27 ũngĩkaaga kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩha nakĩo-rĩ
Proverbs22:28 Ndũkaneherie ihiga rĩa tene rĩa mũhaka rĩrĩa rĩahaandirwo nĩ maithe manyu ma tene.
Proverbs22:29 Nĩwonaga mũndũ mũũgĩ na wĩra wake? Ũcio agatungata o na mbere ya athamaki; ndagatungata mbere ya andũ matooĩkaine.
Proverbs23:1 Rĩrĩa waikara thĩ kũrĩĩanĩra na mwathi wa bũrũri-rĩ
Proverbs23:2 wĩigĩrĩre kahiũ mũmero ũngĩkorwo ũrĩ mũndũ mũkoroku.
Proverbs23:3 Ndũkerirĩrie irio ciake irĩ mũrĩo
Proverbs23:4 Tiga kwĩnogia na kwenda gwĩtongia; gĩa na ũũgĩ wa kũhota kwĩrigĩrĩria.
Proverbs23:5 No wone ũtonga
Proverbs23:6 Tiga kũrĩa irio cia mũndũ mũkarĩ
Proverbs23:7 tondũ nĩ mũndũ wa arĩa meciiragia o ũhoro wa thogora hĩndĩ ciothe. Akwĩraga atĩrĩ
Proverbs23:8 Nĩũgatahĩka kĩrĩa kĩnini ũgaakorwo ũrĩĩte
Proverbs23:9 Ndũkaarie na mũndũ mũkĩĩgu
Proverbs23:10 Ndũkaneherie ihiga rĩa tene rĩa mũhaka
Proverbs23:11 tondũ Mũgitĩri wacio nĩ arĩ na hinya; nĩakamaciirĩrĩra agũũkĩrĩre.
Proverbs23:12 Ringĩrĩria ngoro yaku gũthikĩrĩria ũrutani
Proverbs23:13 Ndũkanaage kũherithia mwana; ũngĩmũhũũra na rũthanju-rĩ
Proverbs23:14 Mũhũũrage na rũthanju nĩguo ũhonokie muoyo wake kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ.
Proverbs23:15 Mũrũ wakwa
Proverbs23:16 ngoro yakwa nĩĩgacanjamũka rĩrĩa mĩromo yaku ĩkaaria maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire.
Proverbs23:17 Ndũkanareke ngoro yaku ĩiguĩre ehia ũiru
Proverbs23:18 Tondũ ti-itherũ wee ũrĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro thuutha-inĩ
Proverbs23:19 Mũrũ wakwa
Proverbs23:20 Ndũkegwatanie na andũ arĩa manyuuaga njoohi
Proverbs23:21 nĩgũkorwo arĩĩu na andũ arĩa akoroku matuĩkaga athĩĩni
Proverbs23:22 Thikagĩrĩria thoguo
Proverbs23:23 Wĩgũrĩre ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma na ndũkanawendie; wĩgĩĩre na ũũgĩ
Proverbs23:24 Ithe wa mwana mũthingu arĩ gĩkeno kĩnene mũno; nake ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwana mũũgĩ nĩakenagio nĩwe.
Proverbs23:25 Thoguo na maitũguo marocanjamũka nĩ ũndũ waku; mũtumia ũrĩa wagũciarire arokena!
Proverbs23:26 Mũrũ wakwa
Proverbs23:27 nĩgũkorwo mũmaraya nĩ irima iriku
Proverbs23:28 Oohagĩria andũ njĩra-inĩ o ta njangiri
Proverbs23:29 Nũũ ũrĩ na haaro? Nũũ ũrĩ na kĩeha? Nũũ ũrĩ hatĩka-inĩ? Nũũ ũrĩ na mateta? Nũũ ũgurarĩtio hatarĩ gĩtũmi? Nũũ ũtunĩhĩtie maitho?
Proverbs23:30 Nĩ arĩa matindaga marũmanĩrĩire na ndibei
Proverbs23:31 Tiga kwĩrorera ndibei rĩrĩa ĩtunĩhĩte
Proverbs23:32 Mũthia-inĩ ĩrũmanaga ta nyoka
Proverbs23:33 Maitho maku makoonaga maũndũ mageni
Proverbs23:34 Ũgaatuĩka ta mũndũ ũkomete iria-inĩ rĩrĩa inene gatagatĩ
Proverbs23:35 Nĩũkoiga atĩrĩ
Proverbs24:1 Tiga kũiguĩra andũ arĩa aaganu ũiru
Proverbs24:2 nĩgũkorwo ngoro ciao ithugundaga o haaro
Proverbs24:3 Nyũmba yakagwo na ũũgĩ
Proverbs24:4 ũmenyo nĩguo ũiyũragia tũnyũmba twayo
Proverbs24:5 Mũndũ mũũgĩ arĩ ũhoti mũnene
Proverbs24:6 ũgĩthiĩ mbaara-inĩ nĩũbatarĩtio nĩgũtaarwo
Proverbs24:7 Ũũgĩ ũrĩ igũrũ mũno

Proverbs24:9 Mathugunda ma ũrimũ nĩ mehia

Proverbs24:12 Ũngiuga atĩrĩ
Proverbs24:13 Mũrũ wakwa

Proverbs24:24 Ũrĩa wothe wĩraga mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ na mahĩtia atĩrĩ

Proverbs25:1 Ici nĩ thimo ingĩ cia Solomoni
Proverbs25:2 Kũhithĩrĩra ũndũ nĩ ũgooci wa Ngai; nakuo gũtuĩria ũndũ nĩkuo kũgoocithagia athamaki.
Proverbs25:3 O ta ũrĩa igũrũ kũraihĩte na igũrũ
Proverbs25:4 Theria betha ĩthire gĩko
Proverbs25:5 eheria andũ arĩa aaganu harĩ mũthamaki
Proverbs25:6 Ndũgetũũgĩrie harĩ mũthamaki
Proverbs25:7 kaba mũthamaki we mwene akwĩre
Proverbs25:8 ndũkahiũhe kũũtwara igooti-inĩ
Proverbs25:9 Ciirai na mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku we mwene
Proverbs25:10 kana ũiguuo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ agũconore
Proverbs25:11 Kiugo kĩarĩtio hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire nĩ ta matunda ma thahabu marĩ thaani-inĩ ya betha.
Proverbs25:12 Gĩcũhĩ gĩa gũtũ gĩa thahabu
Proverbs25:13 Ta ũhehu wa tharunji hĩndĩ ya magetha
Proverbs25:14 O ta ũrĩa matu na rũhuho matarĩ mbura ihaana
Proverbs25:15 Ũkirĩrĩria no ũguucĩrĩrie ũrĩa waathanaga etĩkĩre ũndũ
Proverbs25:16 Ũngĩona ũũkĩ-rĩ
Proverbs25:17 Nyiihia gũthiiaga kwa mũndũ wa itũũra
Proverbs25:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũheanaga ũira wa maheeni agookĩrĩra mũndũ wa itũũra
Proverbs25:19 Kwĩhoka mũndũ ũtarĩ mwĩhokeku hĩndĩ ya thĩĩna
Proverbs25:20 Ũrĩa ũinagĩra mũndũ ũrĩ na ngoro nditũ nyĩmbo
Proverbs25:21 Thũ yaku ĩngĩkorwo ĩhũtiĩ-rĩ
Proverbs25:22 Weka ũguo-rĩ
Proverbs25:23 O ta ũrĩa rũhuho rwa gathigathini rũrehaga mbura

Proverbs25:26 O ta gĩthima kĩiyũrĩte ndaka
Proverbs25:27 Ti wega kũrĩa ũũkĩ mũingĩ mũno

Proverbs26:1 O ta ũrĩa tharunji ĩtaagĩrĩire kũgĩa hĩndĩ ya riũa
Proverbs26:2 Ta kanyoni-ka-nja gekũbatabata
Proverbs26:3 Kĩboko nĩ kĩa mbarathi
Proverbs26:4 Ndũkanacookerie mũndũ mũkĩĩgu kũringana na ũrimũ wake
Proverbs26:5 Cookeria mũndũ mũkĩĩgu kũringana na ũrimũ wake
Proverbs26:6 Gũtũma ndũmĩrĩri na guoko kwa mũndũ mũkĩĩgu-rĩ
Proverbs26:7 O ta magũrũ ma gĩthua ũrĩa mathiiaga maniginĩte
Proverbs26:8 Kũhe mũndũ mũkĩĩgu gĩtĩĩo no ta kuoherera ihiga kĩgũtha-inĩ.
Proverbs26:9 Thimo ĩkĩario nĩ kanua ka mũndũ mũkĩĩgu nĩ ta mũigua ũrĩ guoko-inĩ kwa mũrĩĩu.
Proverbs26:10 Mũndũ wandĩkaga mũndũ mũkĩĩgu kana mwĩhĩtũkĩri nĩ ta ũrĩa ũikagia mĩguĩ o ro ũguo agatiihia andũ.
Proverbs26:11 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu acookagĩra ũrimũ wake o ta ũrĩa ngui ĩcookagĩrĩra matahĩko mayo.
Proverbs26:12 Wanona mũndũ wĩonaga arĩ mũũgĩ maitho-inĩ make? Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu arĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gũkĩra mũndũ ũcio.
Proverbs26:13 Kĩgũũta kiugaga atĩrĩ
Proverbs26:14 Ta ũrĩa mũrango ũtindaga ũkĩgarũrũka ihocio-inĩ ciaguo
Proverbs26:15 Kĩgũũta gĩikagia guoko gwakĩo o thaani-inĩ; kĩnogagio nĩgũcooka gũkuoya gĩgũkinyie kanua-inĩ.
Proverbs26:16 Kĩgũũta kĩĩonaga kĩrĩ kĩũgĩ maitho-inĩ makĩo
Proverbs26:17 Mwĩhĩtũkĩri wĩtoonyagia inegene-inĩ rĩtamũkoniĩ no ta mũndũ ũkũnyiita ngui matũ.
Proverbs26:18 Ta mũgũrũki ũgũikia icinga cia mwaki
Proverbs26:19 no taguo mũndũ ahaana ũrĩa ũheenagia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake
Proverbs26:20 Mwaki ũngĩaga ngũ no kũhora ũhoraga; ngarari cingĩaga mũhuhu no gũthira ithiraga.
Proverbs26:21 O ta ũrĩa makara magwatagia marĩa mangĩ mwaki
Proverbs26:22 Ndeto cia mũndũ wa mũhuhu nĩ ta twenyũ twega twa irio; tũmerũkaga tũgathiĩ mwĩrĩ wa mũndũ o thĩinĩ biũ.
Proverbs26:23 Ta ũrĩa indo cia rĩũmba inyorokagio ikahenia na igũrũ
Proverbs26:24 Mũndũ wa rũmena aaragia ũhinga na mĩromo yake

Proverbs26:27 Mũndũ angĩenja irima
Proverbs26:28 Rũrĩmĩ rwa maheeni nĩkũmena rũmenete arĩa rũtuuragia

Proverbs27:12 Mũndũ mũũgĩ oonaga ũgwati ũgĩũka akehitha
Proverbs27:13 Oya nguo ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũgamagĩrĩra thiirĩ wa mũndũ wa kũngĩ; mĩige ĩrũgamĩrĩre thiirĩ ũcio wa mũndũ-wa-nja wa kũngĩ.
Proverbs27:14 Mũndũ angĩrathima mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake rũciinĩ tene anĩrĩire-rĩ
Proverbs27:15 Mũtumia wa haaro ahaanaine na maaĩ maratata mategũtigithĩria hĩndĩ ya mbura;
Proverbs27:16 kũgeria kũmũgirĩrĩria nĩ ta kũgeria kũgirĩrĩria rũhuho
Proverbs27:17 O ta ũrĩa kĩgera kĩnooraga kĩrĩa kĩngĩ
Proverbs27:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩmagĩra mũkũyũ nĩakaarĩa maciaro maguo

Proverbs27:23 Thũũrimaga mahiũ maku na kĩyo
Proverbs27:24 nĩgũkorwo ũtonga ndũtũũraga nginya tene

Proverbs27:27 Nĩũkagĩa na iria rĩingĩ rĩa mbũri rĩa gũkũigana na rĩa kũnyuuo nĩ andũ a nyũmba yaku
Proverbs28:1 Andũ arĩa aaganu moraga o na gũtarĩ mũndũ ũramathingata
Proverbs28:2 Bũrũri ũngĩĩhia
Proverbs28:3 Mwathani ũrĩa ũhatagĩrĩria andũ arĩa athĩĩni ahaana ta mbura ya rũhuho ĩrĩa ĩtatigagia irio.
Proverbs28:4 Andũ arĩa matirikaga watho magaathagĩrĩria andũ arĩa aaganu
Proverbs28:5 Andũ arĩa ooru matiiguaga maũndũ ma kĩhooto
Proverbs28:6 Nĩ kaba mũndũ mũthĩĩni ũrĩa ũthiiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩtarĩ ũcuuke
