Isaiah49:25 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah49:26 Nĩngatũma andũ arĩa makũhinyagĩrĩria marĩe nyama cia mĩĩrĩ yao; makaarĩĩo nĩ thakame yao ene o ta marĩĩtwo nĩ njoohi. Nao andũ othe nĩmakamenya
Isaiah50:1 Jehova ekũũria atĩrĩ
Isaiah50:2 Rĩrĩa ndokire-rĩ
Isaiah50:3 Niĩ humbaga igũrũ nguo ya nduma
Isaiah50:4 Mwathani Jehova nĩaahete rũrĩmĩ rwa andũ arĩa marutĩtwo maũndũ
Isaiah50:5 Mwathani Jehova nĩahingũrĩte matũ makwa
Isaiah50:6 Ndaneanire mũgongo wakwa kũrĩ andũ arĩa maahũũraga
Isaiah50:7 Tondũ Mwathani Jehova nĩwe ũndeithagia-rĩ
Isaiah50:8 Ningĩ ũrĩa ũnduuaga mũthingu arĩ hakuhĩ. Nũũ ũngĩgĩĩthitanga? Nĩoke tũrũgamane nake! Ningĩ ũrĩa ũngĩnjiirithia akĩrĩ we ũ? Mũndũ ũcio nĩarekwo akĩĩngʼethere!
Isaiah50:9 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah50:10 Nũũ thĩinĩ wanyu wĩtigĩrĩte Jehova
Isaiah50:11 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah51:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah51:2 ta rorai Iburahĩmu
Isaiah51:3 Ti-itherũ Jehova nĩakahooreria Zayuni
Isaiah51:4 “Inyuĩ andũ akwa ta thikĩrĩriai
Isaiah51:5 Ũhoro wakwa wa ũthingu nĩũrooka o na ihenya
Isaiah51:6 Tiirai maitho manyu na igũrũ
Isaiah51:7 “Ta njiguai
Isaiah51:8 Nĩgũkorwo makaarĩĩo nĩ memenyi mathire biũ o ta nguo; na marĩĩo nĩ igunyũ o ta marĩ guoya wa ngʼondu. No rĩrĩ
Isaiah51:9 Arahũka
Isaiah51:10 Githĩ tiwe wahũithirie iria
Isaiah51:11 Andũ arĩa akũũre a Jehova nĩmagacooka. Nao magaatoonya Zayuni makĩinaga; nĩmagekĩrwo thũmbĩ ya gĩkeno gĩa tene na tene. Magaakena na macanjamũke
Isaiah51:12 “Niĩ
Isaiah51:13 nawe ũkariganĩrwo nĩ Jehova ũrĩa wakũũmbire
Isaiah51:14 Nao oohwo arĩa marainaina nĩ guoya nĩmekuohorwo o narua; matigakuĩra kũu marima-inĩ ma njeera
Isaiah51:15 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu
Isaiah51:16 Nĩnjĩkĩrĩte ciugo ciakwa kanua-inĩ gaku
Isaiah51:17 Arahũka
Isaiah51:18 Harĩ ariũ ake othe arĩa aaciarire
Isaiah51:19 Mogwati maya meerĩ nĩmo magũkorete; nũũ ũgaagĩkũhooreria? Mogwati macio nĩ mwanangĩko na ũniinani
Isaiah51:20 Ariũ aku nĩmaringĩkĩte; nao makomete macemanĩrio-inĩ ma njĩra ciothe
Isaiah51:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio igua ũhoro ũyũ
Isaiah51:22 Mwathani Jehova Ngai waku ũrĩa ũgitagĩra andũ ake
Isaiah51:23 Nĩnganeana mbakũri ĩyo moko-inĩ ma arĩa makũnyariiraga
Isaiah52:1 Arahũka
Isaiah52:2 Wĩribaribe rũkũngũ; ũkĩra
Isaiah52:3 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Wee wendirio ũtarutĩirwo kĩndũ
Isaiah52:4 Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Tene andũ akwa maikũrũkire bũrũri wa Misiri magĩthiĩ gũtũũra marĩ ageni kuo; thuutha ũyũ andũ a Ashuri nĩmamahinyĩrĩirie.”
Isaiah52:5 Jehova ekũũria atĩrĩ
Isaiah52:6 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ akwa nĩmakamenya rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; mũthenya ũcio nĩmakamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ ndaaririe ũhoro ũcio o tene. Ĩĩ nĩguo
Isaiah52:7 Kaĩ magũrũ ma mũndũ ũrĩa ũrarehe ũhoro mwega
Isaiah52:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah52:9 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah52:10 Jehova nĩakaguũria guoko gwake gũtheru harĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Isaiah52:11 Eherai
Isaiah52:12 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah52:13 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah52:14 O ta ũrĩa andũ aingĩ maagegirio mũno nĩ ũndũ wake
Isaiah52:15 ũguo noguo akaamakia ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ
Isaiah53:1 Nũũ wĩtĩkĩtie ũhoro witũ
Isaiah53:2 Nĩgũkorwo ndungata ĩyo yakũrire ĩhaana ta mũtĩ mwĩthĩ
Isaiah53:3 Ndungata ĩyo nĩyanyararirwo na ĩkĩregwo nĩ andũ
Isaiah53:4 Ti-itherũ nĩwe woire wonje witũ
Isaiah53:5 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah53:6 Ithuothe
Isaiah53:7 Nĩahinyĩrĩirio na agĩthĩĩnio
Isaiah53:8 Eeheririo na ũndũ wa kũhinyĩrĩrio na gũtuĩrwo ciira ũtarĩ wa kĩhooto. Ha ũhoro wa rũciaro rwake-rĩ
Isaiah53:9 Rĩrĩa aakuire aigirwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ ya andũ aaganu
Isaiah53:10 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah53:11 Thuutha wa ngoro yake gũthĩĩnĩka
Isaiah53:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngamĩgayanĩria igai hamwe na arĩa anene
Isaiah54:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah54:2 “Wĩyaramĩrie handũ ha hema yaku
Isaiah54:3 Nĩgũkorwo nĩũgatheerema mwena wa ũrĩo na wa ũmotho; njiaro ciaku nĩikegwatĩra mabũrũri ma ndũrĩrĩ
Isaiah54:4 “Ndũkanetigĩre; tondũ ndũgaaconoka. O na ndũkanaigue guoya wa gũconorithio; nĩgũkorwo ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũkaanyararithio. Nĩukariganĩrwo nĩ thoni cia ũnini waku
Isaiah54:5 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa Mũũmbi waku nĩwe mũthuuri waku
Isaiah54:6 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩagagwĩta ũcooke
Isaiah54:7 “Nĩgũkorwo ndĩragũtiganĩirie o gwa kahinda kanini
Isaiah54:8 Hĩndĩ ya marakara maingĩ nĩndakũhithire ũthiũ wakwa gwa kahinda kanini
Isaiah54:9 “Kũrĩ niĩ matukũ maya no ta marĩa ma hĩndĩ ya Nuhu
Isaiah54:10 Nĩgũkorwo irĩma no ithingithio
Isaiah54:11 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah54:12 Nĩngathondeka ndirica ciaku na mahiga mega matune
Isaiah54:13 Ciana ciaku ciothe nĩikarutagwo ũhoro nĩ Jehova
Isaiah54:14 Nĩũgaikara ta ũhaandĩtwo wega ũhoro-inĩ wa ũthingu: Ũnyamarania nĩũgakũraihĩrĩria; ndũgakorwo ũrĩ na ũndũ ũngĩtũma wĩtigĩre. Nakĩo kĩmako nĩgĩgakũraihĩrĩria; gĩtigagũkuhĩrĩria.
Isaiah54:15 Na rĩrĩ
Isaiah54:16 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah54:17 na gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩa mbaara gĩthondeketwo gĩa gũgũũkĩrĩra gĩkaagaacĩra wĩra-inĩ wakĩo
Isaiah55:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah55:2 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma mũtũmĩre mbeeca harĩ irio gũtarĩ
Isaiah55:3 Tegai matũ mũthikĩrĩrie
Isaiah55:4 Atĩrĩrĩ ũcio nĩndĩmũtuĩte mũira kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ
Isaiah55:5 Ti-itherũ nĩũgeeta ndũrĩrĩ iria ũtooĩ
Isaiah55:6 Mathaai Jehova hĩndĩ ĩrĩa angĩoneka; mũkaĩrei hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arĩ hakuhĩ.
Isaiah55:7 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩatigane na mĩthiĩre yake
Isaiah55:8 “Nĩgũkorwo meciiria makwa timo meciiria manyu
Isaiah55:9 “O ta ũrĩa matu maraihanĩrĩirie na thĩ
Isaiah55:10 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa mbura yuraga
Isaiah55:11 ũguo noguo kiugo gĩakwa kĩrĩa kiumaga kanua gakwa gĩgaaikara: Kiugo kĩu gĩtikanjookerera o ro ũguo tũhũ
Isaiah55:12 Ũkoimagara na gĩkeno
Isaiah55:13 Ithenya rĩa mĩigua-rĩ
Isaiah56:1 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Tũũrai mũtuanagĩra ciira wa kĩhooto
Isaiah56:2 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Isaiah56:3 Mũndũ wa kũngĩ ũrĩa wĩnyiitanĩtie na Jehova ndakanoige atĩrĩ
Isaiah56:4 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ha ũhoro wa andũ arĩa ahakũre arĩa mamenyagĩrĩra thabatũ ciakwa
Isaiah56:5 nĩngamahe handũ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ yakwa na thingo-inĩ ciayo
Isaiah56:6 Andũ a kũngĩ arĩa menyiitanĩtie na Jehova nĩguo mamũtungatagĩre
Isaiah56:7 andũ acio nĩo ngaatwara kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩakwa kĩrĩa kĩamũre
Isaiah56:8 Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah56:9 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah56:10 Arangĩri a Isiraeli nĩ atumumu
Isaiah56:11 Matariĩ o ta ngui ngoroku mũno; matirĩ hĩndĩ mahũũnaga. Nĩ arĩithi matarĩ na ũtaũku; othe magarũrũkĩte magathiĩ na njĩra ciao o ene
Isaiah56:12 O mũndũ aanagĩrĩra akoiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah57:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah57:2 Andũ arĩa mathiiaga na mĩthiĩre mĩagĩrĩru
Isaiah57:3 “No inyuĩ-rĩ
Isaiah57:4 Nũũ ũcio inyuĩ mũranyũrũria? Nũũ ũcio mũratembanĩria mĩromo na mũkamũrutĩra rũrĩmĩ? Githĩ inyuĩ ti inyuĩ ciana cia aremi
Isaiah57:5 Inyuĩ mũhĩahĩaga nĩ thuti cianyu mũrĩ kũu mĩgandi-inĩ
Isaiah57:6 “Mĩhianano ya kũhooywo ĩrĩa ĩrĩ mahiga-inĩ manyoroku kũu ituamba-inĩ nĩyo rũgai rwanyu; ĩĩ
Isaiah57:7 Wee ũthondekete ũrĩrĩ waku karĩma-inĩ karĩa karaaya na igũrũ
Isaiah57:8 Thuutha wa mĩrango yaku
Isaiah57:9 Nĩwathiire kũrĩ Moleku ũrĩ na maguta ma mũtĩ wa mũtamaiyũ
Isaiah57:10 Nĩwanogirio nĩ mĩthiĩre yaku yothe
Isaiah57:11 “Nũũ wakũiguithirie guoya na ũkĩmwĩtigĩra
Isaiah57:12 Nĩngaumbũrania ũthingu waku na ciĩko ciaku
Isaiah57:13 Rĩrĩa ũgaakaya ũkĩenda ũteithio-rĩ
Isaiah57:14 Na nĩgũkeeranwo atĩrĩ: “Akaai
Isaiah57:15 Nĩgũkorwo Ũrĩa-Ũrĩ-Igũrũ Mũno
Isaiah57:16 Ndigũtũũra ndũithanagia nginya tene
Isaiah57:17 Nĩndarakaririo mũno nĩ mehia make ma gũkoroka; ngĩmũherithia na ngĩmũhitha ũthiũ wakwa nĩ kũrakara
Isaiah57:18 Nĩnyonete njĩra ciake
Isaiah57:19 ndũme kũgĩe na ũgooci tũnua-inĩ twa andũ arĩa macakayaga kũu Isiraeli. Thayũ
Isaiah57:20 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah57:21 Ngai wakwa ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah58:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah58:2 Nĩgũkorwo manjaragia mũthenya o mũthenya; makonekaga ta mangĩenda mũno kũmenya njĩra ciakwa
Isaiah58:3 Moragia atĩrĩ
Isaiah58:4 Kwĩhinga kũrĩa irio kwanyu kũrĩĩkagĩrĩria na ngũĩ na njũgitano
Isaiah58:5 Kwĩhinga kũrĩa irio kwa mũthemba ũcio wa mũndũ kwĩnyiihia mũthenya o ũmwe tu-rĩ
Isaiah58:6 “Githĩ mũthemba ũrĩa thuurĩte wa kwĩhinga kũrĩa irio ti ũyũ: kuohora arĩa moohetwo na njĩra ĩtarĩ ya kĩhooto
Isaiah58:7 Githĩ ti kũgayanaga irio ciaku na andũ arĩa ahũtu
Isaiah58:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũtheri waku nĩũgaathera o ta ũrĩa gũtherũrũkaga rũciinĩ
Isaiah58:9 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũgeetana
Isaiah58:10 ningĩ ũngĩĩrutĩra kũhũũnia andũ arĩa ahũtu
Isaiah58:11 Jehova nĩarĩgũtoongoragia hĩndĩ ciothe
Isaiah58:12 Andũ aku nĩo magaacookereria kũrĩa kwaanangĩtwo o tene
Isaiah58:13 “Ũngĩgirĩrĩria magũrũ maku gũthũkia mũthenya wa Thabatũ
Isaiah58:14 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũgakena nĩ ũndũ wa Jehova
Isaiah59:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah59:2 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah59:3 Nĩgũkorwo moko manyu nĩmathaahĩte nĩ ũiti wa thakame
Isaiah59:4 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wendaga ciira wa kĩhooto
Isaiah59:5 Mahaana ta makomeire matumbĩ ma nduĩra
Isaiah59:6 Rũrenda rũu rwao nĩ rwa tũhũ rũtingĩtumwo nguo; matiingĩhumbĩra na kĩrĩa mathondekaga naruo. Mawĩra mao nĩ mawĩra ma waganu
Isaiah59:7 Magũrũ mao mahanyũkaga makehie; mahiũhaga magaite thakame ya mũndũ ũtehĩtie. Meciiria mao no meciiria ma ũũru; na kũrĩa guothe mathiiaga matigaga gũkirĩte ihooru na mwanangĩko.
Isaiah59:8 Njĩra ya thayũ matimĩũĩ; na mĩthiĩre yao ti ya gũtuanĩra ciira na kĩhooto. Metemeire njĩra njogomu; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũcigeragĩra akagĩa na thayũ.
Isaiah59:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ciira wa kĩhooto ũrĩ kũraya na ithuĩ
Isaiah59:10 Tũhambataga rũthingo ta mũtumumu
Isaiah59:11 Ithuothe tũraramaga o ta nduba; tũcakayaga na kĩeha ta ndutura. Tũcaragia ũhoro wa gũtuĩrwo ciira na kĩhooto
Isaiah59:12 Nĩgũkorwo mahĩtia maitũ nĩ maingĩ maitho-inĩ maku
Isaiah59:13 namo nĩ ũremi na gũkaana Jehova
Isaiah59:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtwagĩte ciira wa kĩhooto
Isaiah59:15 Ũhoro wa ma ndũrĩ handũ ũngĩoneka
Isaiah59:16 Ningĩ akĩona atĩ gũtiarĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wagĩrĩire
Isaiah59:17 Agĩcooka akĩĩhumba ũthingu taarĩ gako gake ga kũmũgitĩra gĩthũri
Isaiah59:18 O ta ũrĩa ciĩko ciao itariĩ
Isaiah59:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Isaiah59:20 “Mũkũũri nĩagooka Zayuni
Isaiah59:21 Ningĩ Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah60:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah60:2 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah60:3 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩigooka kũrĩ ũtheri waku
Isaiah60:4 “Tiira maitho wĩrorere mĩena yothe: One ũrĩa andũ othe monganĩte magooka harĩwe
Isaiah60:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkona ũndũ ũcio
Isaiah60:6 Ndũũru cia ngamĩĩra nĩikaiyũra bũrũri waku
Isaiah60:7 Ndũũru ciothe cia mbũri cia Kedari igaacookanĩrĩrio irehwo kũrĩ we
Isaiah60:8 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah60:9 Ti-itherũ andũ arĩa matũũraga icigĩrĩra-inĩ nĩ niĩ metagĩrĩra; matongoretio nĩ marikabu cia Tarishishi
Isaiah60:10 “Andũ a kũngĩ nĩo magaacookereria thingo ciaku
Isaiah60:11 Ihingo ciaku igũtũũra irĩ hingũre
Isaiah60:12 Nĩgũkorwo rũrĩrĩ kana ũthamaki ũrĩa ũtagagũtungatĩra nĩũkaniinwo; ũkaanangwo biũ.
Isaiah60:13 “Riiri wa Lebanoni ũgaatuĩka waku
Isaiah60:14 Ariũ a andũ arĩa makũhinyagĩrĩria nĩmagooka harĩwe makũinamĩrĩre; na arĩa othe makũmenete
Isaiah60:15 “O na akorwo nĩwatiganĩirio na ũkĩmenwo
Isaiah60:16 Nĩũkanyuuaga iria rĩa ndũrĩrĩ na wongithagio nyondo cia ũthamaki. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo ũkaamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Isaiah60:17 Ngaakũrehera gĩcango handũ ha thahabu
Isaiah60:18 Ngũĩ ndĩgaacooka kũiguuo bũrũri-inĩ waku
Isaiah60:19 Riũa ti rĩo rĩrĩkwaragĩra mũthenya
Isaiah60:20 Riũa rĩu rĩaku rĩtigacooka gũthũa rĩngĩ
Isaiah60:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nao andũ aku othe magaatuĩka athingu
Isaiah60:22 Nyũmba ĩrĩa nini ĩkongerereka ĩtuĩke andũ ngiri
Isaiah61:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah61:2 na hunjanagĩrie ũhoro wa mwaka ũrĩa Jehova akoonania ũtugi wake
Isaiah61:3 na ndeithagie andũ arĩa marĩ na kĩeha kũu Zayuni: ndĩmahumbe tanji ya ũthaka handũ ha mũhu
Isaiah61:4 Nao nĩmagaka kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũire kwanangĩtwo kuuma tene
Isaiah61:5 Nao ageni nĩmakarĩithagia ndũũru cianyu; nao andũ a kũngĩ marĩmage mĩgũnda yanyu
Isaiah61:6 No inyuĩ mũgeetagwo athĩnjĩri-Ngai a Jehova
Isaiah61:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa andũ akwa manaconorithio
Isaiah61:8 “Nĩgũkorwo niĩ
Isaiah61:9 Njiaro ciao nĩikaagĩa igweta ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Isaiah61:10 Niĩ nĩngenagĩra Jehova mũno; ngoro yakwa ĩcanjamũkaga nĩ ũndũ wa Ngai wakwa. Nĩgũkorwo nĩahumbĩte ũhonokio ta nguo
Isaiah61:11 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa tĩĩri ũtũmaga mbegũ imere
Isaiah62:1 Ha ũhoro wa kũrũĩrĩra Zayuni-rĩ
Isaiah62:2 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩikoona ũthingu waku
Isaiah62:3 Ningĩ ũgaatuĩka ta tanji ya ũthaka ũnyiitĩtwo guoko-inĩ kwa Jehova
Isaiah62:4 Wee ndũgacooka gwĩtwo Mũtiganĩrie
Isaiah62:5 O ta ũrĩa mwanake ahikagia mũirĩtu
Isaiah62:6 Nĩnjigĩte arangĩri a thingo ciaku
Isaiah62:7 o na kana mũmũhe ũhurũko nginya rĩrĩa akahaanda Jerusalemu
Isaiah62:8 Jehova nĩehĩtĩte ambararĩtie guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo
Isaiah62:9 no rĩrĩ
Isaiah62:10 Hĩtũkĩrai
Isaiah62:11 Jehova nĩanĩrĩire ũhoro ũyũ ituri-inĩ ciothe cia thĩ
Isaiah62:12 Acio marĩĩtagwo Andũ arĩa Aamũre
Isaiah63:1 Nũũ ũyũ ũroka oimĩte Edomu
Isaiah63:2 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte nguo ciaku itunĩhe
Isaiah63:3 “Niĩ-rĩ
Isaiah63:4 Nĩgũkorwo mũthenya wa kũrĩhanĩria warĩ ngoro-inĩ yakwa
Isaiah63:5 Niĩ nĩndacũthĩrĩirie
Isaiah63:6 Nĩndakinyĩrĩirie ndũrĩrĩ ndĩ na marakara
Isaiah63:7 Nĩngũheana ũhoro wa motugi ma Jehova
Isaiah63:8 Nĩ ũndũ oigire atĩrĩ
Isaiah63:9 Mathĩĩna-inĩ mao mothe o nake nĩathĩĩnĩkire
Isaiah63:10 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah63:11 Ningĩ andũ acio ake makĩririkana matukũ ma tene
Isaiah63:12 Ũrĩa watũmire guoko gwake kwa hinya na kũrĩ riiri gũikare mwena wa ũrĩo wa Musa
Isaiah63:13 ũrĩa wamatongoreirie kũndũ kũu kũriku
Isaiah63:14 o ta ũrĩa ngʼombe ithiiaga kwarahio gĩtuamba-inĩ
Isaiah63:15 We ta cũthĩrĩria thĩ ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
Isaiah63:16 O na angĩkorwo Iburahĩmu ndatũũĩ
Isaiah63:17 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah63:18 Andũ aku arĩa aamũre nĩmegwatĩire bũrũri ũyũ wamaheire ũgĩtuĩka wao o ihinda inini
Isaiah63:19 Ithuĩ tũrĩ andũ aku kuuma tene; no rĩrĩ
Isaiah64:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah64:2 O ta ũrĩa mwaki ũmundagia thari ikarĩrĩmbũka
Isaiah64:3 Nĩgũkorwo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Wee wekire maũndũ ma kũmakania marĩa tũteerĩgĩrĩire-rĩ
Isaiah64:4 Kuuma o tene gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũrĩ waigua maũndũ ta macio
Isaiah64:5 Wee ũũkaga gũteithia andũ arĩa mekaga maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire makenete
Isaiah64:6 Ithuothe tũtuĩkĩte ta mũndũ ũrĩ na thaahu
Isaiah64:7 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũkayagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Isaiah64:8 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah64:9 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Isaiah64:10 Matũũra maku marĩa manene maamũre nĩmatuĩkĩte werũ; o na itũũra rĩa Zayuni rĩtuĩkĩte werũ
Isaiah64:11 Hekarũ iitũ ĩrĩa nyamũre na ĩrĩ riiri
Isaiah64:12 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio mothe
Isaiah65:1 “Niĩ ndeguũrĩirie andũ arĩa mataahooyaga kĩrĩra; na andũ arĩa mataamaathaga niĩ
Isaiah65:2 Mũthenya wothe ndindaga ndambũrũkĩirie moko makwa kũrĩ andũ aremi
Isaiah65:3 o andũ arĩa matũũraga maathirĩkagia o ũthiũ-inĩ wakwa
Isaiah65:4 arĩa matindaga maikarĩte mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Isaiah65:5 andũ acio moigaga atĩrĩ
Isaiah65:6 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah65:7 ndĩhanĩrie mehia manyu inyuĩ ene
Isaiah65:8 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “O ta ũrĩa ngogoyo yonekaga kĩmanjĩka-inĩ gĩa thabibũ
Isaiah65:9 Ngaaruta njiaro kuuma kũrĩ Jakubu
Isaiah65:10 Sharoni gũgaatuĩka ũrĩithio wa ndũũru cia mbũri
Isaiah65:11 “No rĩrĩ
Isaiah65:12 ngaamwathĩrĩria kũũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Isaiah65:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova Mwathani ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ndungata ciakwa nĩikaarĩa irio
Isaiah65:14 O na ningĩ ndungata ciakwa nĩikaina nĩgũcanjamũka ngoro
Isaiah65:15 Marĩĩtwa manyu mũkaamatigĩra andũ akwa arĩa ndĩthuurĩire
Isaiah65:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũkaahoera bũrũri kĩrathimo
Isaiah65:17 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah65:18 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah65:19 Nĩngakenera Jerusalemu na njanjamũke nĩ ũndũ wa andũ akwa; naguo mũgambo wa kĩgirĩko o na kana wa kĩrĩro ndũkaiguuo kũu rĩngĩ.
Isaiah65:20 “Kũu gũtirĩ mwana wa rũkenge ũgaacooka gũkua arĩ na matukũ manini
Isaiah65:21 Nao nĩmagaka nyũmba na macitũũre; makaahaanda mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ na marĩĩage maciaro mayo.
Isaiah65:22 Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ magaaka nyũmba ituĩke cia gũtũũrwo nĩ andũ angĩ
Isaiah65:23 Nao matigacooka kũruta wĩra wa tũhũ
Isaiah65:24 Na nĩgũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Isaiah65:25 Nayo njũũi na kagondu ikaarĩĩaga hamwe
Isaiah66:1 Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “Igũrũ nĩrĩo gĩtĩ gĩakwa kĩa ũnene
Isaiah66:2 Githĩ ti guoko gwakwa gwathondekire indo ici ciothe
Isaiah66:3 No rĩrĩ
Isaiah66:4 nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Isaiah66:5 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah66:6 Ta iguai mbugĩrĩrio ĩyo ĩroima kũu itũũra rĩrĩa inene
Isaiah66:7 “Atanambĩrĩria kũrũmwo-rĩ
Isaiah66:8 Nũũ ũrĩ aigua ũndũ ta ũcio? Nũũ ũrĩ wona maũndũ ta macio? Anga bũrũri wakĩhota gũciarĩrwo andũ aguo mũthenya o ro ũmwe
Isaiah66:9 Anga no nginyie ihinda rĩa mwana gũciarwo na ndikĩreke aciarwo?” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekũũria. “Anga no hingĩrĩrie mwana nda nginyĩtie ihinda rĩake rĩa gũciarwo?” ũguo nĩguo Ngai wanyu ekũũria.
Isaiah66:10 “Inyuĩ inyuothe arĩa mwendete itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu
Isaiah66:11 Nĩgeetha mũhaane ta andũ mongete maũndũ mega marĩo
Isaiah66:12 Nĩgũkorwo ũũ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga: “Nĩngakinyĩria itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu thayũ ũhaana ta rũũĩ
Isaiah66:13 O ta ũrĩa mwana ahooreragio nĩ nyina
Isaiah66:14 Rĩrĩa mũkoona ũndũ ũcio
Isaiah66:15 Atĩrĩrĩ
Isaiah66:16 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩagatuĩra andũ othe ciira
Isaiah66:17 “Na rĩrĩ
Isaiah66:18 “Na niĩ-rĩ
Isaiah66:19 “Nĩngekĩra kĩmenyithia thĩinĩ wao
Isaiah66:20 Nao nĩmakarehe ariũ a thoguo othe
Isaiah66:21 Na niĩ nĩngathuura amwe ao matuĩke athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii
Isaiah66:22 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah66:23 Kuuma Karũgamo ka Mweri ũmwe nginya Karũgamo ka Mweri ũrĩa ũngĩ
Isaiah66:24 “Nao nĩmakoimagara makerorere ciimba cia andũ arĩa maanemeire; nĩ ũndũ igunyũ ciao itigakua
Jeremiah1:1 Maya nĩmo maũndũ marĩa maaririo nĩ Jeremia
Jeremiah1:2 Ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyamũkinyĩrĩire mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ wa wathani wa Josia
Jeremiah1:3 o na ningĩ matukũ-inĩ ma wathani wa Jehoiakimu mũrũ wa Josia
Jeremiah1:4 Ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyanginyĩrire
Jeremiah1:5 “Mbere ya gũkũũmba nda-inĩ ya maitũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah1:6 Na niĩ ngĩmũcookeria
Jeremiah1:7 Nowe Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ: “Tiga kuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah1:8 Ndũkanametigĩre

Jeremiah1:10 One
Jeremiah1:11 Ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyanginyĩrire
Jeremiah1:12 Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah1:13 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyanginyĩrire o rĩngĩ ngĩũrio atĩrĩ: “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩ ũrona?” Na niĩ ngĩcookia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah1:14 Nake Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah1:15 Ndĩ hakuhĩ gwĩta andũ othe a mothamaki ma gathigathini
Jeremiah1:16 Nĩngatuĩra andũ akwa matuĩro ma ciira
Jeremiah1:17 “Ũkĩra wĩhaarĩrie! Rũgama na ũmeere ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ngũgwatha. Ndũkamakio nĩo

Jeremiah2:1 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyanginyĩrire

Jeremiah2:3 Isiraeli-rĩ
Jeremiah2:4 Thikĩrĩriai mũigue ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova
Jeremiah2:5 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Nĩ mahĩtia marĩkũ maithe manyu maanyonire namo
Jeremiah2:6 Matiigana kũũria atĩrĩ: ‘Jehova arĩ ha
Jeremiah2:7 Nĩndamũrehire bũrũri mũnoru

Jeremiah2:9 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũmũciirithia o rĩngĩ

Jeremiah2:14 Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah2:15 Mĩrũũthi nĩĩraramĩte; nĩĩmũraramĩire. Nĩyanangĩte bũrũri wake; matũũra make macinĩtwo na mwaki
Jeremiah2:16 O na andũ a Memufisi
Jeremiah2:17 Githĩ tiwe mwene wĩrehereire maũndũ maya nĩ ũndũ wa gũtirika Jehova Ngai waku
Jeremiah2:18 Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah2:19 Waganu waku nĩguo ũgaakũherithia
Jeremiah2:20 “Nĩwoinangire icooki rĩaku rĩa ngingo o tene
Jeremiah2:21 Niĩ ndaakũhaandĩte ũrĩ ta mũthabibũ mũthuuranĩre wa mũthemba ũrĩa mwega. Wagĩcookire kũngarũrũka atĩa
Jeremiah2:22 O na ũngĩĩthamba na igata
Jeremiah2:23 “Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah2:24 ũkahaana ta njagĩ ĩrĩa ĩmenyerete gũikara werũ-inĩ
Jeremiah2:25 Tiga kũhanyũka nginya ũthirĩrwo nĩ iraatũ magũrũ
Jeremiah2:26 “O ta ũrĩa mũici aconorithagio aanyiitwo
Jeremiah2:27 Meeraga mũtĩ atĩrĩ
Jeremiah2:28 Ikĩrĩ kũ ngai icio mwethondekeire? Kĩrekei ciũke
Jeremiah2:29 “Mũgũkĩndũithia nĩ ũndũ kĩ? Inyuothe nĩmũũnemeire
Jeremiah2:30 “Nĩ wĩra wa tũhũ ndaarutire ngĩherithia andũ anyu; matiigana kũigua maakaanio magarũrũke. Rũhiũ rwaku rwa njora nĩrũniinĩte anabii anyu
Jeremiah2:31 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah2:32 Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah2:33 Kaĩ nĩ ũrĩ ũũgĩ mũingĩ rĩrĩa ũgũcaria wendo-ĩ! Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o na atumia arĩa aaganu mũno no merute na mĩthiĩre yaku.
Jeremiah2:34 Nguo-inĩ ciaku-rĩ
Jeremiah2:35 wee uugaga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah2:36 Ũriũngariũngaga nĩkĩ

Jeremiah3:1 “Mũndũ angĩtigana na mũtumia wake
Jeremiah3:2 “Ta tiira maitho ũcũthĩrĩrie tũcũmbĩrĩ twa irĩma kũrĩa gũtigĩtwo ũtheri. Nĩ kũrĩ handũ ũtarĩ wakomwo nawe? Mĩkĩra-inĩ ya njĩra-rĩ
Jeremiah3:3 Tondũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah3:4 Githĩ to rĩu wanjĩta ũkiugaga: ‘Baba
Jeremiah3:5 kaĩ ũgũgĩtũũra ũrakarĩte? Mangʼũrĩ macio maku-rĩ
Jeremiah3:6 Matukũ-inĩ ma wathani wa Mũthamaki Josia
Jeremiah3:7 Ndeciirĩtie atĩ nĩakanjookerera aarĩkia gwĩka maũndũ macio mothe
Jeremiah3:8 Nĩndaheire Isiraeli ũcio wahutatĩire marũa ma gũtigana nake
Jeremiah3:9 Tondũ wa ũrĩa Isiraeli oonaga ũmaraya wake ũtarĩ ũndũ mũnene harĩ we
Jeremiah3:10 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah3:11 Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ: “Isiraeli
Jeremiah3:12 Thiĩ ũkahunjanĩrie ndũmĩrĩri ĩno werekeire mwena wa gathigathini
Jeremiah3:13 Wee ũndũ ũrĩa ũgwĩka-rĩ
Jeremiah3:14 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Njookererai
Jeremiah3:15 Nĩngacooka ndĩmũhe arĩithi arĩa ndĩthuurĩire na ngoro yakwa

Jeremiah3:22 “Njookererai
Jeremiah3:23 Ti-itherũ inegene rĩa ũhooi mĩhianano kũu tũrĩma-inĩ o na kũu irĩma-inĩ nĩ rĩa maheeni; ti-itherũ
Jeremiah3:24 Kuuma o ũnini-inĩ witũ

Jeremiah4:1 “Atĩrĩrĩ wee Isiraeli
Jeremiah4:2 ningĩ ũngĩrũmia ũhoro wa ma

Jeremiah4:4 Mwĩamũrĩrei Jehova
Jeremiah4:5 “Anĩrĩrai kũu Juda
Jeremiah4:6 Haandai bendera mũthiĩ mwerekeire Zayuni! Mwĩtharei narua mwĩhonokie! Nĩgũkorwo nĩndĩrarehithia mwanangĩko uumĩte mwena wa gathigathini
Jeremiah4:7 Mũrũũthi nĩumĩte kĩmamo-inĩ kĩaguo; mũniinani wa kũniina ndũrĩrĩ nĩoimagarĩte. Oimĩte gwake oke aanange bũrũri waku. Matũũra maku makaanangĩka
Jeremiah4:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Jeremiah4:9 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah4:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngiuga atĩrĩ: “Hĩ! Mwathani Jehova
Jeremiah4:11 Ihinda rĩu andũ aya o hamwe na Jerusalemu nĩmakeerwo atĩrĩ
Jeremiah4:12 nĩ rũhuho rũrĩ na hinya kũrĩ rũu ruumĩte kũrĩ niĩ. Rĩu nĩngũmatuĩra matuĩro ma ciira.”
Jeremiah4:13 Ta rorai muone! Mũndũ ũcio aroka ta matu
Jeremiah4:14 Wee Jerusalemu-rĩ
Jeremiah4:15 Nĩ kũrĩ na mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra kũu Dani
Jeremiah4:16 “Ĩrai ndũrĩrĩ ũhoro ũcio
Jeremiah4:17 Marĩrigiicĩirie o ta andũ marangĩire mũgũnda
Jeremiah4:18 “Mĩthiĩre yaku mwene na ciĩko ciaku nĩcio ikũreheire maũndũ macio. Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo iherithia rĩaku. Na kaĩ nĩ irũrũ-ĩ! Kaĩ nĩrĩgũtheeca ngoro-ĩ!”
Jeremiah4:19 Wũi
Jeremiah4:20 Mwanangĩko ũrarũmanĩrĩra na mwanangĩko; bũrũri wothe nĩwanangĩtwo. O rĩmwe hema ciakwa nĩthũkangie
Jeremiah4:21 Nĩ nginya rĩ ngũtũũra nyonaga bendera ya mbaara
Jeremiah4:22 “Andũ akwa nĩ irimũ; matinjũũĩ. Nĩ ciana iteciiragia

Jeremiah4:29 Rĩrĩa kwaiguuo mũrurumo wa andũ arĩa mathiiaga mahaicĩte mbarathi na wa andũ arĩa maikagia mĩguĩ-rĩ

Jeremiah5:1 “Ta ambatai na mũikũrũke barabara-inĩ ciothe cia Jerusalemu

Jeremiah5:3 Wee Jehova
Jeremiah5:4 Ngĩĩciiria atĩrĩ: “Aya nĩ andũ athĩĩni; nĩ andũ akĩĩgu
Jeremiah5:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũthiĩ kũrĩ atongoria ngaaranĩrie nao; ti-itherũ acio nĩmoĩ njĩra ya Jehova
Jeremiah5:6 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah5:7 “Ngũmũrekera nĩkĩ? Ciana cianyu nĩciindirikĩte
Jeremiah5:8 Mahũũnĩte magatuĩka ta mbarathi cia njamba cikĩĩrirĩria cia mĩgoma
Jeremiah5:9 Githĩ ndikĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmaherithia nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio?” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. “Githĩ ndikĩagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwĩrĩhĩria harĩ rũrĩrĩ ta rũu?
Jeremiah5:10 “Tuĩkanĩriai mĩgũnda yao ya mĩthabibũ mũmĩharaganie
Jeremiah5:11 Andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli na andũ a nyũmba ya Juda nĩmagĩte wĩhokeku harĩ niĩ biũ
Jeremiah5:12 Nĩmaheenanĩtie ũhoro wĩgiĩ Jehova; moigĩte atĩrĩ
Jeremiah5:13 Anabii nĩ a tũhũ ta rũhuho
Jeremiah5:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah5:15 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah5:16 Mathiaka ma mĩguĩ yao matariĩ ta mbĩrĩra iria ĩtathikĩtwo; othe nĩ njamba irĩ hinya.
Jeremiah5:17 Nao nĩmakaarĩa na maniine magetha manyu o na irio cianyu
Jeremiah5:18 “No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah5:19 “Na rĩrĩa andũ makooria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah5:20 “Anĩrĩra ũhoro ũyũ kũrĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Jakubu
Jeremiah5:21 Ta thikĩrĩriai inyuĩ andũ aya akĩĩgu na mũtarĩ mbuguĩro
Jeremiah5:22 Githĩ inyuĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũnjĩtigĩra?” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. “Githĩ inyuĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũinaina mũrĩ mbere yakwa? Ndaatũmire mũthanga ũtuĩke mũhaka wa iria rĩrĩa inene
Jeremiah5:23 No andũ aya-rĩ
Jeremiah5:24 Nao matingĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah5:25 Mahĩtia manyu nĩmo matũmĩte mũraihĩrĩrio nĩ maũndũ macio; mehia manyu matũmĩte mwage maũndũ marĩa mega.
Jeremiah5:26 “Thĩinĩ wa andũ akwa-rĩ
Jeremiah5:27 O ta ũrĩa gĩkerenge kĩiyũraga nyoni
Jeremiah5:28 ningĩ manorete na makanyoroka mwĩrĩ. Waganu wao nĩũingĩhĩte mũno; maticiiragĩrĩra mwana wa ndigwa nĩguo ahootane ciira-inĩ
Jeremiah5:29 Githĩ ndikĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmaherithia nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio?” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. “Githĩ ndikĩagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwĩrĩhĩria harĩ rũrĩrĩ ta rũrũ?
Jeremiah5:30 “Ũndũ mũũru mũno na wa kũmakania nĩwĩkĩkĩte bũrũri-inĩ ũyũ:
Jeremiah5:31 Anabii marathaga mohoro ma maheeni

Jeremiah6:2 Nĩngananga Mwarĩ wa Zayuni
Jeremiah6:3 Arĩithi marĩ na ndũũru ciao cia mbũri nĩmagooka nĩguo mamũũkĩrĩre; nĩmakaamba hema ciao imũthiũrũrũkĩirie mĩena yothe
Jeremiah6:4 “Mwĩhaarĩriei tũrũe nake! Arahũkai
Jeremiah6:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah6:6 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Temai mĩtĩ mũmĩige ihũba nene ingʼetheire Jerusalemu. Itũũra rĩrĩ inene no nginya rĩherithio; nĩ ũndũ rĩiyũrĩte ũhoro wa kũhinyanĩrĩria.
Jeremiah6:7 O ta ũrĩa gĩthima gĩtherũkaga maaĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah6:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah6:9 Ũũ nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga: “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah6:10 Nũũ ingĩkĩarĩria ndĩmũkaanie na anjigue? Nũũ ũngĩĩthikĩrĩria? Matũ mao nĩmahinge
Jeremiah6:11 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah6:12 Nyũmba ciao igaatuĩka cia andũ angĩ
Jeremiah6:13 “Kuuma ũrĩa mũnini nginya ũrĩa mũnene
Jeremiah6:14 Mohaga kĩronda kĩa andũ akwa taarĩ kĩronda kĩa andũ matagurarĩtio mũno
Jeremiah6:15 Hihi nĩmaconokaga nĩ mũtugo ũcio wao ũrĩ magigi? Aca
Jeremiah6:16 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Rũgamai magomano-inĩ ma njĩra
Jeremiah6:17 Nĩndaigire arangĩri nĩguo mamũrangĩre
Jeremiah6:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah6:19 Ta thikĩrĩria
Jeremiah6:20 Ngĩrĩ na bata ũrĩkũ na ũbumba ũcio wa kuuma Sheba
Jeremiah6:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah6:22 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ta rorai muone
Jeremiah6:23 Manyiitĩte mĩguĩ na matimũ; nĩ andũ ooru matarĩ tha. Mũrurumo wao magĩũka mahaicĩte mbarathi
Jeremiah6:24 Nĩtũiguĩte ũhoro wa andũ acio
Jeremiah6:25 Mũtikoimagare mũthiĩ mĩgũnda
Jeremiah6:26 Inyuĩ andũ akwa
Jeremiah6:27 “Wee nawe nĩngũtuĩte mũgeria wa cuuma
Jeremiah6:28 Nĩ aremi momĩtie ngoro
Jeremiah6:29 Ihuruti nĩirahurutĩra mwaki na hinya nĩguo ũcine ngocorai
Jeremiah6:30 Andũ acio marĩĩtagwo betha-ĩrĩa-ĩregetwo
Jeremiah7:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte kũrĩ Jehova
Jeremiah7:2 “Thiĩ ũrũgame kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa nyũmba ya Jehova na ũrĩ hau wanĩrĩre ũhoro ũyũ
Jeremiah7:3 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah7:4 Tigai gũikaraga mwĩhokete ndeto cia maheeni
Jeremiah7:5 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Jeremiah7:6 mũngĩaga kũhinyĩrĩria mũndũ wa kũngĩ
Jeremiah7:7 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngareka mũtũũre kũndũ gũkũ
Jeremiah7:8 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah7:9 “ ‘Anga mũrĩiyaga na mũkooragana
Jeremiah7:10 na ningĩ mũgacooka mũgooka mũkarũgama mbere yakwa thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ĩno ĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Jeremiah7:11 Nyũmba ĩno ĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa mũmĩtuĩte ngurunga ya atunyani? No niĩ nĩndĩĩoneire maũndũ macio! Ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
Jeremiah7:12 “ ‘Rĩu ũkĩrai mũthiĩ Shilo
Jeremiah7:13 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Rĩrĩa inyuĩ mwekaga maũndũ macio mothe
Jeremiah7:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah7:15 Nĩngamũingata mwehere mbere yakwa
Jeremiah7:16 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah7:17 Kaĩ wee ũtarona ũrĩa mareka kũu matũũra-inĩ ma Juda
Jeremiah7:18 Ciana iroina ngũ
Jeremiah7:19 Jehova egũkĩũria atĩrĩ: Nĩ niĩ maraathirĩkia? Githĩ andũ aya ti o ene marethũkia meconorithie?
Jeremiah7:20 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Jeremiah7:21 “ ‘Ũũ nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah7:22 Nĩ ũndũ rĩrĩa ndaarutire maithe manyu kũu bũrũri wa Misiri na ngĩmaarĩria
Jeremiah7:23 no nĩndamaheire rĩathani rĩrĩ: Atĩrĩ
Jeremiah7:24 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah7:25 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maithe manyu moimire bũrũri wa Misiri nginya rĩu
Jeremiah7:26 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah7:27 “Wameera maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ
Jeremiah7:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah7:29 Enjwoi njuĩrĩ cianyu mũcite
Jeremiah7:30 “ ‘Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ

Jeremiah7:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ciimba cia andũ acio nĩigatuĩka nyama cia kũrĩĩo nĩ nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ
Jeremiah7:34 Ningĩ nĩnganiina mĩgambo ya gĩkeno na ya kũrũũhia
Jeremiah8:1 “ ‘Jehova ekuuga atĩ ihinda rĩu
Jeremiah8:2 Makaanĩkĩrwo riũa
Jeremiah8:3 Kũrĩa guothe ngaamathaamĩria
Jeremiah8:4 “Meere atĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:5 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte andũ aya mathiĩ na mbere kũũhutatĩra? Andũ a Jerusalemu maahutatagĩra nĩkĩ? Matũũrĩte marũmĩtie maũndũ ma maheeni
Jeremiah8:6 Nĩndĩmathikĩrĩirie wega mũno
Jeremiah8:7 Mũrũaru ũrĩ rĩera-inĩ nĩũmenyaga mahinda maguo ma gũcooka
Jeremiah8:8 “ ‘Mwakĩhota atĩa kuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:9 Andũ arĩa oogĩ nĩmagaconorithio; nĩmakagega na magwatio nĩ mũtego. Kuona atĩ nĩmareganĩte na ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova
Jeremiah8:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Jeremiah8:11 Mohaga kĩronda kĩa andũ akwa taarĩ kĩronda kĩa andũ matagurarĩtio mũno. Moigaga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:12 Hihi nĩmaconokaga nĩ mũtugo ũcio wao ũrĩ magigi? Aca
Jeremiah8:13 “ ‘Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:14 “Tũikarĩte haha nĩkĩ? Cookanĩrĩrai hamwe! Nĩtũũrei
Jeremiah8:15 Tũtũũrĩte twĩrĩgĩrĩire atĩ nĩgũkũgĩa thayũ
Jeremiah8:16 Mũtiihĩre wa mbarathi cia thũ ũraiguuo kuuma Dani; mbarathi ciao cia njamba iraania bũrũri wothe ũkainaina. Mookĩte kũrĩa bũrũri na kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ kuo
Jeremiah8:17 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:18 Wee ũũhooreragia rĩrĩa ndĩ na kĩeha-rĩ
Jeremiah8:19 Ta thikĩrĩria kĩrĩro kĩa andũ akwa marĩ bũrũri wa kũraya: “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:20 “Ihinda rĩa magetha nĩrĩhĩtũku
Jeremiah8:21 Kuona atĩ andũ akwa nĩmahehenjetwo-rĩ
Jeremiah8:22 Kaĩ gũtarĩ ndawa kũu Gileadi? Gũtirĩ mũthondekani kuo? Ironda cia andũ akwa cikĩagĩte kũhona nĩkĩ?
Jeremiah9:1 Naarĩ korwo mũtwe wakwa nĩ itherũkĩro rĩa maaĩ
Jeremiah9:2 Naarĩ korwo ndĩ na nyũmba ya kũrarĩrĩrwo nĩ agendi kũu werũ-inĩ
Jeremiah9:3 “Mahacaga nĩmĩ ciao magacitua ta ũta wa gũikia ndeto cia maheeni. Ũhootani ũrĩa marĩ naguo bũrũri-inĩ
Jeremiah9:4 “Mwĩhũgei arata anyu; mũndũ ndakehoke mũrũ wa nyina. Nĩgũkorwo mũrũ wa nyina na mũndũ nĩ mũheenania
Jeremiah9:5 Mũrata aheenagia mũratawe
Jeremiah9:6 Wee ũtũũraga ũrigiicĩirio nĩ maheeni
Jeremiah9:7 Tondũ ũcio Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah9:8 Nĩmĩ ciao itariĩ ta mĩguĩ ya kũũragana; no ndeto cia maheeni ciaragia. O mũndũ aaragĩria ũrĩa ũngĩ ndeto cia thayũ na kanua gake
Jeremiah9:9 Jehova ekũũria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah9:10 Nĩngũrĩra na ngirĩke nĩ ũndũ wa irĩma
Jeremiah9:11 “Ngaatua itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu hĩba ya mahiga

Jeremiah9:14 Handũ ha ũguo
Jeremiah9:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ

Jeremiah9:18 Nĩmeerwo moke narua

Jeremiah9:26 nao nĩ andũ a bũrũri wa Misiri
Jeremiah10:1 Ta thikĩrĩriai mũigue ũhoro ũrĩa Jehova ekũmwĩra
Jeremiah10:2 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Tigai kwĩruta mĩthiĩre ya ndũrĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:3 Nĩgũkorwo mĩtugo ya andũ acio ndĩrĩ kĩene: matemaga mũtĩ mũtitũ
Jeremiah10:4 Maũgemagia na betha na thahabu; maũhũũragĩrĩra na mĩcumarĩ na nyondo ndũkae kwenyenya.
Jeremiah10:5 Ũtariĩ ta kĩndũ gĩa kũhahũra nyamũ gĩthecereirwo mũtĩ mũgũnda-inĩ wa marenge
Jeremiah10:6 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:7 Nũũ ũtangĩgwĩtigĩra
Jeremiah10:8 Acio othe-rĩ

Jeremiah10:11 “Meerei atĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:12 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:13 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa we agũũthũka-rĩ
Jeremiah10:14 Andũ othe nĩmagĩte meciiria na makaaga ũũgĩ; nake mũturi wa thahabu o wothe nĩaconorithĩtio nĩ mĩhianano ĩyo yake. Nĩ ũndũ mĩhianano ĩyo yake ya gwĩturĩra nĩ ya maheeni; ndĩrĩ mĩhũmũ thĩinĩ wayo.
Jeremiah10:15 Ndĩrĩ kĩene
Jeremiah10:16 We ũcio Rũgai rwa Jakubu ndatariĩ tayo

Jeremiah13:1 Jehova aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ: “Thiĩ wĩgũrĩre mũcibi wa gatani
Jeremiah13:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩgũra mũcibi
Jeremiah13:3 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkĩnginyĩrĩra hĩndĩ ya keerĩ ngĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Jeremiah13:4 “Oya mũcibi ũcio ũraagũrire
Jeremiah13:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩthiĩ ngĩũhitha kũu Rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Farati
Jeremiah13:6 Matukũ maingĩ maathira Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah13:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩthiĩ kũu rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Farati
Jeremiah13:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkĩnginyĩrĩra
Jeremiah13:9 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Ũguo nĩguo ngaaniina rũtũrĩko rwa Juda o na rũtũrĩko rũnene rwa Jerusalemu.
Jeremiah13:10 Andũ aya aaganu
Jeremiah13:11 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa mũcibi wĩohagwo njohero ya mũndũ
Jeremiah13:12 “Meere atĩrĩ: ‘Ũũ nĩguo Jehova
Jeremiah13:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũmeere atĩrĩ
Jeremiah13:14 Nĩngamahũũrithania mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Jeremiah13:15 Thikĩrĩriai na mũtege matũ
Jeremiah13:16 Goocai Jehova Ngai wanyu atanarehe nduma
Jeremiah13:17 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah13:18 Ĩra mũthamaki o na nyina wa mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Jeremiah13:19 Matũũra manene ma kũu Negevu nĩmakahingwo
Jeremiah13:20 Tiirai maitho muone andũ acio marooka moimĩte mwena wa gathigathini. Rũũru rũrĩa wehokeirwo rwa ngʼondu rũrĩa ũretĩĩaga naruo-rĩ
Jeremiah13:21 Ũkoiga atĩa rĩrĩa Jehova akaanenehia andũ arĩa watuĩte athiritũ aku nĩguo matuĩke a gũgwathaga? Githĩ ndũkanyiitwo nĩ ruo rũnene
Jeremiah13:22 Nawe ũngĩkeyũria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah13:23 Mũkushi ahota kũgarũra gĩkonde kĩa mwĩrĩ wake
Jeremiah13:24 “Niĩ ngaakũhurunja o ta ũrĩa mũũngũ ũmbũragwo nĩ rũhuho rwa werũ-inĩ.
Jeremiah13:25 Rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩaku
Jeremiah13:26 Nĩngakũguũria nguo ikũhumbĩre ũthiũ nĩguo njaga yaku yoneke:
Jeremiah13:27 ũtharia waku o na mĩĩto ĩrĩa wanagĩria
Jeremiah14:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia ĩkoniĩ ihinda rĩrĩa kwagĩte mbura:
Jeremiah14:2 “Bũrũri wa Juda nĩũracakaya
Jeremiah14:3 Andũ arĩa marĩ igweta maratũma ndungata ciao igatahe maaĩ; irathiĩ marima-inĩ ikaaga maaĩ. Iracooka na ndigithũ itarĩ kĩndũ; ikehumbĩra mĩtwe iconokete na ikuĩte ngoro.
Jeremiah14:4 Thĩ nĩyatũkangĩte
Jeremiah14:5 O nayo thwariga nĩĩteete gacaũ kayo gaaciarwo o ro ũguo kũu werũ-inĩ
Jeremiah14:6 Njagĩ nacio irũgamĩte tũrĩma-igũrũ kũrĩa gũtakũraga kĩndũ
Jeremiah14:7 O na gũtuĩka mehia maitũ nĩmaroimbũra ũũru ũrĩa twĩkĩte

Jeremiah23:8 no makoigaga atĩrĩ

Jeremiah23:10 Bũrũri ũyũ ũiyũrĩte itharia; bũrũri ũyũ ũikarĩte ũrĩ mũngʼaru nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrumi
Jeremiah23:11 “Anabii na athĩnjĩri-Ngai matiĩtigagĩra Ngai; o na thĩinĩ wa hekarũ-inĩ yakwa

Jeremiah23:14 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa anabii a Jerusalemu-rĩ
Jeremiah23:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio

Jeremiah23:26 Nĩ nginya rĩ ũhoro ũyũ ũgũthiĩ na mbere ngoro-inĩ cia anabii acio maheenanagia
Jeremiah23:27 Meciiragia atĩ irooto icio meranaga mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ nĩigũtũma andũ akwa mariganĩrwo nĩ rĩĩtwa rĩakwa

Jeremiah30:19 Kuuma kũu nĩgũkaiguuagwo gũkĩinĩrwo nyĩmbo cia gũcookia ngaatho
Jeremiah30:20 Ciana ciao igaikaraga o ta matukũ-inĩ marĩa ma tene
Jeremiah30:21 Mũtongoria wao agaakorwo arĩ ũmwe wa andũ ao kĩũmbe; o nake mwathi wao akoima o kũu thĩinĩ wa andũ ao. Nĩngamũreharehe nake oke hakuhĩ na niĩ
Jeremiah30:22 ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩmũgatuĩka andũ akwa
Jeremiah30:23 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah30:24 Marakara mahiũ ma Jehova matigaathira
Jeremiah31:1 “Ihinda-inĩ rĩu ngaakorwo ndĩ Ngai wa mbarĩ ciothe cia Isiraeli
Jeremiah31:2 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Andũ arĩa makaahonoka kũũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora-rĩ
Jeremiah31:3 Jehova nĩatuumĩrĩire matukũ-inĩ ma tene
Jeremiah31:4 Nĩngagwaka rĩngĩ nawe nĩũgaakĩka
Jeremiah31:5 Ningĩ nĩũkahaanda mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ kũu irĩma-inĩ cia Samaria; arĩmi nĩmakamĩhaanda
Jeremiah31:6 Nĩgũkaagĩa mũthenya ũmwe ũrĩa arangĩri makaanĩrĩra marĩ tũrĩma-inĩ twa Efiraimu
Jeremiah31:7 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Inĩrai Jakubu mũkenete
Jeremiah31:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:9 Nao magooka makĩrĩraga; nĩmakahooyaga ngĩmacookia kwao. Nĩngamagereria ndwere-inĩ cia tũrũũĩ twa maaĩ
Jeremiah31:10 “Thikĩrĩriai ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova
Jeremiah31:11 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩagakũũra Jakubu
Jeremiah31:12 Nĩmagooka maanĩrĩre nĩ gũkena marĩ kũu irĩma-inĩ cia Zayuni; nĩmagakenagĩra ũtaana wa Jehova: wa ngano
Jeremiah31:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo airĩtu nĩmakaina na makene
Jeremiah31:14 Nĩngahũũnia athĩnjĩri-Ngai na bũthi
Jeremiah31:15 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Mũgambo nĩũiguĩtwo kũu Rama
Jeremiah31:16 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Wĩgirĩrĩrie mũgambo waku ũtige kũiguuo ũkĩrĩra
Jeremiah31:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Jeremiah31:18 “Ti-itherũ nĩnjiguĩte mũcaayo wa Efiraimu akiuga atĩrĩ: ‘Wee nĩũũherithĩtie o ta gacaũ gatamenyerete gwĩkĩrwo icooki
Jeremiah31:19 Thuutha wa gũturuura
Jeremiah31:20 Githĩ Efiraimu tiwe mũrũ wakwa ũrĩa nyendete
Jeremiah31:21 “Ĩkĩrai marũũri ma barabara
Jeremiah31:22 Ũgũtũũra ũrũũraga nginya-rĩ
Jeremiah31:23 Ũũ nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah31:24 Andũ nĩmagatũũrania hamwe kũu Juda o na matũũra-inĩ makuo mothe
Jeremiah31:25 Nĩnganogora arĩa anogu
Jeremiah31:26 Ndaigua ũguo ngĩũkĩra
Jeremiah31:27 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Matukũ nĩmarooka
Jeremiah31:28 O ta ũrĩa ndaarũgamĩrĩire makĩmunywo na magĩtharũrio
Jeremiah31:29 “Matukũ-inĩ macio andũ matigacooka kuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:30 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:31 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Matukũ nĩmarooka
Jeremiah31:32 Nakĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu gĩtihaana ta kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndaarĩkanĩire na maithe mao ma tene rĩrĩa ndaamanyiitire na guoko
Jeremiah31:33 “Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ngaarĩkanĩra na nyũmba ya Isiraeli ihinda rĩu rĩathira
Jeremiah31:34 Gũtigacooka gũkorwo na mũndũ ũkũruta ũrĩa ũngĩ
Jeremiah31:35 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:36 “Mawatho ma kũrũmĩrĩrwo mangĩkeherio maitho-inĩ makwa-rĩ

Jeremiah31:38 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:39 Naruo rũrigi rwa gũthima rũgaatambũrũka kuuma hau rũringĩrĩire nginya karĩma-inĩ ka Garebi
Jeremiah31:40 Gĩtuamba-inĩ gĩothe kũrĩa ciimba iteagwo na gũgaitwo mũhu
Jeremiah32:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte kũrĩ Jehova mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi wa wathani wa Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda
Jeremiah32:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩciarigiicĩirie Jerusalemu irĩtunyane
Jeremiah32:3 Nĩgũkorwo Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda nĩamuohithĩtie kũu
Jeremiah32:4 Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda ndakehonokia kuuma moko-inĩ ma andũ a Babuloni
Jeremiah32:5 Nĩagatwara Zedekia kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah32:6 Nake Jeremia akiuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah32:7 Hanameli mũrũ wa Shalumu
Jeremiah32:8 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Jeremiah32:9 nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩkĩgũra mũgũnda ũcio warĩ Anathothu kuuma kũrĩ Hanameli mũrũ wa mama
Jeremiah32:10 Ngĩcooka ngĩĩkĩra kĩrore na ngĩcinĩrĩra mũhũũri wakwa marũa-inĩ macio ma kuonania nũũ mwene gĩthaka
Jeremiah32:11 Ngĩoya kobi ĩmwe ya marũa macio ma kuonania nũũ mwene gĩthaka
Jeremiah32:12 ngĩcineana kũrĩ Baruku mũrũ wa Neria
Jeremiah32:13 “O marĩ hau-rĩ
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah32:15 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah32:16 “Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah32:17 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah32:18 Wee wonanagia wendani waku kũrĩ andũ ngiri na ngiri
Jeremiah32:19 wee nowe mũnene wa ũheani kĩrĩra
Jeremiah32:20 Wee nĩwe waringire ciama o na ũkĩonania morirũ kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Jeremiah32:21 Warutire andũ aku a Isiraeli kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri na ũndũ wa kũringa ciama na kuonania morirũ
Jeremiah32:22 Nĩwamaheire bũrũri ũyũ werĩire maithe mao na mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩũkamahe
Jeremiah32:23 Maatoonyire bũrũri ũcio makĩwĩgwatĩra ũgĩtuĩka wao
Jeremiah32:24 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah32:25 O na gũtuĩka itũũra nĩrĩkũneanwo kũrĩ andũ a Babuloni
Jeremiah32:26 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩgĩkinyĩra Jeremia
Jeremiah32:27 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Jeremiah32:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah32:29 Andũ acio a Babuloni maraatharĩkĩra itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene nĩmagatoonya kuo na marĩmundie mwaki; nĩ makaarĩcina rĩthire
Jeremiah32:30 “Andũ a Isiraeli na a Juda mekaga o maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ makwa kuuma ũnini-inĩ wao; ti-itherũ
Jeremiah32:31 Kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa itũũra rĩĩrĩ rĩakirwo nginya ũmũthĩ
Jeremiah32:32 Andũ a Isiraeli na a Juda nĩmathirĩkĩtie nĩguo ndakare na maũndũ mothe ma waganu marĩa meekĩte: o
Jeremiah32:33 Nĩmahutatĩire makaaga kũhũgũra mothiũ mao kũrĩ niĩ; o na gũtuĩka nĩndamarutire kaingĩ kaingĩ
Jeremiah32:34 No maigire mĩhianano ĩyo yao ĩrĩ magigi thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ĩrĩa ĩĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Jeremiah32:35 Ningĩ nĩmakĩire Baali mahooero kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
Jeremiah32:36 “Ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene
Jeremiah32:37 Ti-itherũ nĩngamacookanĩrĩria kuuma mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa ndaamathaamĩirie ndĩ na marakara mahiũ na mangʼũrĩ maingĩ; ngaamacookia kũndũ gũkũ na ndũme matũũre marĩ agitĩre.
Jeremiah32:38 Nĩmagatuĩka andũ akwa na niĩ nduĩke Ngai wao.
Jeremiah32:39 Nĩngatũma o magĩe na ũrũmwe wa ngoro o na mĩthiĩre-inĩ yao
Jeremiah32:40 Nĩngarĩĩkanĩra nao kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra nginya tene na tene: Ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngaatiga kũmeka wega
Jeremiah32:41 Nĩngakenaga ngĩmeeka wega
Jeremiah32:42 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: O ta ũrĩa ndaarehithĩirie andũ aya mathĩĩna manene
Jeremiah32:43 O rĩngĩ nĩgũkagũrwo mĩgũnda bũrũri-inĩ ũyũ
Jeremiah32:44 Mĩgũnda ĩkaagũragwo na betha
Jeremiah33:1 O mahinda-inĩ macio Jeremia aarĩ muohe kũu nja-inĩ ya arangĩri
Jeremiah33:2 “Ũũ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Ta kĩngaĩre
Jeremiah33:4 Nĩgũkorwo ũũ nĩguo Jehova
Jeremiah33:5 makĩhũũrana na andũ a Babuloni: ‘Nyũmba icio ciothe nĩikaiyũrio ciimba cia andũ arĩa ngooragithia ndĩ na marakara na mangʼũrĩ. Nĩngahitha itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene ũthiũ wakwa nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wao wothe.
Jeremiah33:6 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah33:7 Nĩngacookia andũ a Juda na a Isiraeli gũkũ ndĩmarute kũrĩa matũũrĩte marĩ atahe
Jeremiah33:8 Nĩngamatheria mathirwo nĩ mehia mothe marĩa mananjĩhĩria na ndĩmarekere mehia mao mothe ma kũrega kũnjathĩkĩra.
Jeremiah33:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene nĩrĩkandehithĩria ngumo na gĩkeno
Jeremiah33:10 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Mwaragia ũhoro ũkoniĩ kũndũ gũkũ
Jeremiah33:11 mĩgambo ya gĩkeno na ya gũcanjamũka
Jeremiah33:12 “O na ningĩ Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Kũndũ gũkũ kũnũhe na gũtarĩ andũ kana nyamũ-rĩ
Jeremiah33:13 Thĩinĩ wa matũũra ma bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma
Jeremiah33:14 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah33:15 “ ‘Matukũ-inĩ macio o na ihinda rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah33:16 Matukũ-inĩ macio
Jeremiah33:17 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Daudi ndarĩ hĩndĩ akaaga mũndũ wa gũikarĩra gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩa nyũmba ya Isiraeli
Jeremiah33:18 kana athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Jeremiah33:19 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyakinyĩrĩire Jeremia akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Jeremiah33:20 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Angĩkorwo inyuĩ mwahota gũthũkia kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa na mũthenya
Jeremiah33:21 nakĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndaarĩkanĩire na Daudi ndungata yakwa
Jeremiah33:22 Nĩngatũma njiaro cia Daudi ndungata yakwa
Jeremiah33:23 O rĩngĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyakinyĩrĩire Jeremia akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Jeremiah33:24 “Kaĩ ũtamenyete andũ aya maroiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah33:25 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Angĩkorwo ndiigĩte kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa na mũthenya na ũtukũ
Jeremiah33:26 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngagĩteanĩria njiaro cia Jakubu na cia Daudi ndungata yakwa
Jeremiah34:1 Rĩrĩa Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni aarũaga mbaara na Jerusalemu na matũũra marĩa maarĩrigiicĩirie
Jeremiah34:2 “Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli ekuuga atĩrĩ: Thiĩ kũrĩ Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda
Jeremiah34:3 Nawe ndũkahonoka atĩ wĩeherie moko-inĩ make
Jeremiah34:4 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah34:5 ũgaakua gĩkuũ gĩa thayũ. O ta ũrĩa andũ maakirie mwaki wa macakaya nĩ ũndũ wa gũtĩĩa maithe maku
Jeremiah34:6 Nake Jeremia ũcio mũnabii akĩĩra Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda maũndũ macio mothe
Jeremiah34:7 hĩndĩ ĩyo mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki wa Babuloni ciahũũranaga na Jerusalemu o na matũũra macio mangĩ ma Juda marĩa meyũmĩrĩirie
Jeremiah34:8 Ndũmĩrĩri nĩyakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte kũrĩ Jehova thuutha wa Mũthamaki Zedekia kũrĩkanĩra kĩrĩkanĩro na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ Jerusalemu maanĩrĩre ũhoro wa kuohorwo kwa ngombo.
Jeremiah34:9 Mũndũ o wothe angĩtuĩka nĩekuohora ngombo ciake cia Ahibirania
Jeremiah34:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio anene othe o na andũ arĩa maatoonyire kĩrĩkanĩro-inĩ kĩu
Jeremiah34:11 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah34:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyakinyĩrĩire Jeremia
Jeremiah34:13 “Jehova
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Hĩndĩ ciothe mwaka-inĩ wa mũgwanja
Jeremiah34:15 Nĩmwĩrĩga kwĩrira
Jeremiah34:16 No rĩu nĩmũgarũrũkĩte mũgathaahia rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; mũndũ o mũndũ wanyu nĩacooketie ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme na ya mũndũ-wa-nja ĩrĩa ararekereirie ĩĩthiĩre o kũrĩa ĩngĩenda. Nĩmũmatuĩte ngombo cianyu rĩngĩ.
Jeremiah34:17 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah34:18 Andũ arĩa magararĩte kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa
Jeremiah34:19 Atongoria a Juda na a Jerusalemu
Jeremiah34:20 nĩngamaneana kũrĩ thũ ciao iria ciendaga kũmaruta muoyo. Ciimba ciao igaatuĩka irio cia nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ
Jeremiah34:21 “Nĩnganeana Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda na anene ake kũrĩ thũ ciao iria ciendaga kũmaruta muoyo
Jeremiah34:22 Nĩngũruta watho
Jeremiah35:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte kũrĩ Jehova hĩndĩ ya wathani wa Jehoiakimu mũrũ wa Josia
Jeremiah35:2 “Thiĩ kũrĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Rekabu
Jeremiah35:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩthiĩ ngĩgĩĩra Jaazania mũrũ wa Jeremia mũrũ wa Habazania
Jeremiah35:4 Ngĩmarehe thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Jehova
Jeremiah35:5 Ngĩcooka ngĩiga mbakũri ciyũrĩte ndibei
Jeremiah35:6 No-o magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah35:7 Ningĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah35:8 Nĩtũtũũrĩte twathĩkĩire ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ithe witũ wa tene Jonadabu mũrũ wa Rekabu aatwathire. Gũtirĩ mũndũ witũ ithuĩ
Jeremiah35:9 kana agĩaka nyũmba ya gũtũũrwo
Jeremiah35:10 Tũtũũrĩte hema-inĩ twathĩkagĩra ũrĩa wothe ithe witũ wa tene Jonadabu aatwathire.
Jeremiah35:11 No rĩrĩa Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni aahithũkĩire bũrũri ũyũ
Jeremiah35:12 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩgĩkinyĩra Jeremia
Jeremiah35:13 “Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah35:14 ‘Jonadabu mũrũ wa Rekabu aathire ariũ ake matikananyue ndibei
Jeremiah35:15 Ndĩmũtũmĩire ndungata ciakwa ciothe cia anabii kaingĩ kaingĩ. Nao mamwĩraga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah35:16 Njiaro icio cia Jonadabu mũrũ wa Rekabu nĩihingĩtie watho ũcio ithe wao wa tene aacitigĩire
Jeremiah35:17 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah35:18 Nake Jeremia agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ a nyũmba ya Rekabu atĩrĩ
Jeremiah35:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah36:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa ĩna kuuma Jehoiakimu mũrũ wa Josia atuĩka mũthamaki wa Juda-rĩ
Jeremiah36:2 “Oya ibuku rĩa gĩkũnjo wandĩke thĩinĩ warĩo mohoro marĩa mothe ngũheete makoniĩ Isiraeli na Juda
Jeremiah36:3 Hihi rĩrĩa andũ a Juda makaigua ũhoro wa mwanangĩko ũrĩa wothe njiirĩire kũmarehithĩria-rĩ
Jeremiah36:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jeremia agĩĩta Baruku mũrũ wa Neria
Jeremiah36:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jeremia akĩĩra Baruku atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thiĩ arĩ we kũu nyũmba-inĩ ya Jehova mũthenya ũmwe ũrĩa kwĩhingagwo kũrĩa irio
Jeremiah36:7 Hihi maahota kũrehe mathaithana mao harĩ Jehova
Jeremiah36:8 Nake Baruku mũrũ wa Neria nĩekire ũrĩa wothe Jeremia ũrĩa mũnabii aamwĩrĩte eeke; agĩthoma ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo ya Jehova kũu thĩinĩ wa hekarũ kuuma ibuku-inĩ rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo.
Jeremiah36:9 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:10 Kuuma kanyũmba-inĩ ka Gemaria mũrũ wa Shafani ũrĩa mwandĩki
Jeremiah36:11 Rĩrĩa Mikaia mũrũ wa Gemaria
Jeremiah36:12 agĩikũrũka agĩtoonya kanyũmba-inĩ ka mwandĩki karĩa kaarĩ kũu nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaia aarĩkia kũmahe ũhoro wothe ũrĩa aiguĩte Baruku agĩthomera andũ kuuma ibuku-inĩ rĩa gĩkũnjo-rĩ
Jeremiah36:14 anene acio othe magĩtũma Jehudi mũrũ wa Nethania
Jeremiah36:15 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:16 Rĩrĩa maaiguire mohoro macio mothe
Jeremiah36:17 Ningĩ magĩcooka makĩũria Baruku atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:19 Nao anene acio makĩĩra Baruku atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:20 Maarĩkia kũiga ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo kanyũmba-inĩ ka Elishama
Jeremiah36:21 Mũthamaki nake agĩtũma Jehudi agĩĩre ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo
Jeremiah36:22 Kwarĩ mweri wa kenda
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudi aathoma icigo ithatũ kana inya cia ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo-rĩ
Jeremiah36:24 Mũthamaki na andũ arĩa othe maamũtungataga arĩa maiguire mohoro macio matiigana gwĩtigĩra
Jeremiah36:25 O na gũtuĩka Elinathani
Jeremiah36:26 Handũ ha ũguo
Jeremiah36:27 Thuutha wa mũthamaki gũcina ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo rĩrĩa rĩandĩkĩtwo mohoro nĩ Baruku ta ũrĩa eerĩtwo nĩ Jeremia andĩke-rĩ
Jeremiah36:28 “Oya ibuku rĩngĩ rĩa gĩkũnjo wandĩke thĩinĩ warĩo mohoro marĩa mothe maarĩ ibuku-nĩ rĩu rĩa mbere
Jeremiah36:29 Ningĩ wĩre Jehoiakimu mũthamaki wa Juda atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah36:31 Nĩngamũherithia we hamwe na ciana ciake
Jeremiah36:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jeremia akĩoya ibuku rĩngĩ rĩa gĩkũnjo
Jeremiah37:1 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:2 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:3 Nake Mũthamaki Zedekia agĩtũma Jehukali mũrũ wa Shelemia marĩ na Zefania mũrũ wa Maaseia ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai mathiĩ kũrĩ Jeremia ũcio mũnabii
Jeremiah37:4 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mbũtũ cia ita cia Firaũni nĩcioimagarĩte kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri
Jeremiah37:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩgĩkinyĩra Jeremia ũcio mũnabii
Jeremiah37:7 “Jehova
Jeremiah37:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nao andũ a Babuloni nĩmagacooka gũkũ na matharĩkĩre itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene
Jeremiah37:9 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Tigai kwĩheenia
Jeremiah37:10 O na mũngĩhoota mbũtũ ciothe cia ita cia andũ a Babuloni icio iramũtharĩkĩra
Jeremiah37:11 Thuutha wa mbũtũ icio cia ita cia andũ a Babuloni kwehera kũu Jerusalemu nĩ ũndũ wa mbũtũ cia Firaũni
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia nĩoimagarire kuuma itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene nĩguo athiĩ bũrũri wa Benjamini akenyiitĩre igai rĩake rĩa gĩthaka gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ arĩa maarĩ kuo.
Jeremiah37:13 No rĩrĩa aakinyire Kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa Benjamini
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:15 Anene acio nĩmarakarĩire Jeremia
Jeremiah37:16 Nake Jeremia agĩtoonyio mungu-inĩ warĩ kanyũmba ga thĩinĩ mũno kũu kĩoho-inĩ
Jeremiah37:17 Na thuutha ũcio Mũthamaki Zedekia agĩtũmana areehwo kũu nyũmba-inĩ ya ũthamaki. Arĩ kũu

Jeremiah37:19 Marĩ ha anabii acio aku
Jeremiah37:20 Na rĩu-rĩ

Jeremiah38:1 Nao Shefatia mũrũ wa Matani
Jeremiah38:2 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũgũikara itũũra-inĩ rĩĩrĩ inene nĩakooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Jeremiah38:3 Ningĩ
Jeremiah38:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo anene makĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:5 Mũthamaki Zedekia agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩnyiita Jeremia makĩmũikia irima rĩa maaĩ rĩa Malikija
Jeremiah38:7 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi-Meleku akiuma hau nja ya nyũmba ya ũthamaki
Jeremiah38:9 “Mũthamaki mwathi wakwa
Jeremiah38:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩatha Ebedi-Meleku ũcio Mũkushi
Jeremiah38:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ebedi-Meleku akĩoya andũ acio
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi-Meleku ũcio Mũkushi
Jeremiah38:13 nao makĩmũguucia na mĩkanda ĩyo
Jeremiah38:14 Mũthamaki Zedekia agĩtũmanĩra Jeremia ũcio mũnabii
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia akĩĩra Zedekia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:16 Nake Mũthamaki Zedekia akĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa na hitho harĩ Jeremia
Jeremiah38:17 Nake Jeremia akĩĩra Zedekia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:18 No ũngĩrega kwĩneana kũrĩ anene a mũthamaki wa Babuloni
Jeremiah38:19 Mũthamaki Zedekia akĩĩra Jeremia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:20 Nake Jeremia akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:21 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:22 Andũ-a-nja othe arĩa matigaire thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki wa Juda nĩmagatwarĩrwo anene a mũthamaki wa Babuloni. Andũ-a-nja acio nao magaakwĩra atĩrĩ: “ ‘Arata acio aku wehokeete nĩmakũhĩtithirie na magĩgũkĩria hinya. Magũrũ maku nĩmatoonyereire mũtondo-inĩ; nao arata aku nĩmagũtiganĩirie.’
Jeremiah38:23 “Atumia aku othe na ciana ciaku nĩmakaneanwo kũrĩ andũ a Babuloni. Wee mwene ndũkehonokia moko-inĩ mao
Jeremiah38:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Zedekia akĩĩra Jeremia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:25 Anene mangĩigua atĩ nĩtwaranĩirie nawe
Jeremiah38:26 hĩndĩ ĩyo nawe ũmeere atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:27 Anene acio othe nĩmookire kũrĩ Jeremia
Jeremiah38:28 Nake Jeremia agĩikara kũu kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa arangĩri nginya mũthenya ũrĩa itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩatunyanirwo.
Jeremiah39:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa kenda wa wathani wa Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda
Jeremiah39:2 Ningĩ mũthenya wa kenda wa mweri wa ĩna wa mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa wathani wa Zedekia
Jeremiah39:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo anene othe a mũthamaki wa Babuloni magĩtoonya na magĩikara Kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa Gatagatĩ: Nao nĩ Nerigali-Sharezeru wa Samugari
Jeremiah39:4 Rĩrĩa Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda na thigari ciothe maamonire
Jeremiah39:5 No nayo mbũtũ ya andũ a Babuloni ĩkĩmatengʼeria
Jeremiah39:6 Kũu Ribila nokuo mũthamaki wa Babuloni oragithĩirie ariũ a Zedekia
Jeremiah39:7 Agĩcooka agĩkũũrithia Zedekia maitho na akĩmuoha na bĩngũ cia gĩcango nĩguo atwarwo Babuloni.
Jeremiah39:8 Andũ acio a Babuloni magĩcina nyũmba ya ũthamaki
Jeremiah39:9 Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah39:10 No rĩrĩ

Jeremiah39:14 magĩtũmana

Jeremiah40:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte kũrĩ Jehova thuutha wa Nebuzaradani ũcio mũnene wa arangĩri a mũthamaki kũmũrekereria oime kũu Rama. Nĩakorete Jeremia arĩ muohe na mĩnyororo arĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ arĩa othe maatahĩtwo kuuma Jerusalemu na Juda rĩrĩa maatwaragwo Babuloni marĩ ohe.
Jeremiah40:2 Nake mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri a mũthamaki oona Jeremia
Jeremiah40:3 Na rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah40:4 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:5 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jeremia agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Gedalia
Jeremiah40:7 Rĩrĩa anene othe a mbũtũ cia ita na andũ ao arĩa maarĩ kũu bũrũri-inĩ ũcio mwaraganu maiguire atĩ mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩatuĩte Gedalia mũrũ wa Ahikamu barũthi wa bũrũri ũcio
Jeremiah40:8 magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Gedalia kũu Mizipa: nao maarĩ Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia mũrũ wa Ahikamu
Jeremiah40:10 Niĩ mwene nĩngũtũũra gũkũ Mizipa nĩgeetha ndĩmwaragĩrĩrie kũrĩ andũ a Babuloni arĩa marĩũkaga kũrĩ ithuĩ
Jeremiah40:11 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ayahudi arĩa othe maarĩ Moabi
Jeremiah40:12 othe magĩcooka bũrũri wa Juda kũrĩ Gedalia kũu Mizipa
Jeremiah40:13 Johanani mũrũ wa Karea
Jeremiah40:14 nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Johanani mũrũ wa Karea akĩarĩria Gedalia na hitho marĩ kũu Mizipa
Jeremiah40:16 Nowe Gedalia mũrũ wa Ahikamu akĩĩra Johanani mũrũ wa Karea atĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:1 Mweri-inĩ wa mũgwanja Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania
Jeremiah41:2 Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania hamwe na andũ acio ikũmi mokĩte nake magĩũkĩra
Jeremiah41:3 Ishumaeli agĩcooka akĩũraga Ayahudi othe arĩa maarĩ na Gedalia kũu Mizipa
Jeremiah41:4 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire kũũragwo kwa Gedalia
Jeremiah41:5 andũ mĩrongo ĩnana meyenjete nderu

Jeremiah41:8 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:9 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:10 Ishumaeli nĩanyiitire mĩgwate andũ acio angĩ othe arĩa maikaraga Mizipa
Jeremiah41:11 Rĩrĩa Johanani mũrũ wa Karea
Jeremiah41:12 makĩoya andũ ao othe na makiumagara makarũe na Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania. Nao makĩmũkorerera hakuhĩ na handũ haarĩ maaĩ maingĩ kũu Gibeoni.
Jeremiah41:13 Rĩrĩa andũ acio othe Ishumaeli aarĩ nao monire Johanani mũrũ wa Karea na anene a mbũtũ cia ita acio maarĩ nake-rĩ
Jeremiah41:14 Andũ acio othe Ishumaeli aatahĩte kũu Mizipa nĩmahũndũkire
Jeremiah41:15 Nowe Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania na andũ ake anana nĩmetharire kuuma harĩ Johanani
Jeremiah41:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Johanani mũrũ wa Karea na anene othe a mbũtũ cia ita acio maarĩ nake
Jeremiah41:17 Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere
Jeremiah41:18 nĩguo moorĩre andũ a Babuloni. Nĩmetigagĩra andũ a Babuloni tondũ Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania nĩooragĩte Gedalia mũrũ wa Ahikamu

Jeremiah44:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia ĩkoniĩ Ayahudi othe arĩa matũũraga bũrũri wa Misiri ya Mũhuro: kũu Migidoli
Jeremiah44:2 “Ũũ nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah44:3 nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa mekĩte. Nĩmathirĩkirie
Jeremiah44:4 Ndatũũrĩte ndĩmatũmagĩra ndungata ciakwa cia anabii kaingĩ

Jeremiah44:8 Mũraathirĩkia nĩkĩ
Jeremiah44:9 Kaĩ mũriganĩirwo nĩ maũndũ ma waganu marĩa mekirwo nĩ maithe manyu
Jeremiah44:10 Nginya ũmũthĩ
Jeremiah44:11 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah44:12 Nĩngweheria matigari ma Juda macio matuĩte atĩ nĩmegũthiĩ bũrũri wa Misiri magatũũre kuo. Othe magaathirĩra bũrũri wa Misiri; makooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Jeremiah44:13 andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri wa Misiri nĩngamaherithia na rũhiũ rwa njora
Jeremiah44:14 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa matigari ma Juda acio mathiĩte gũtũũra bũrũri wa Misiri ũkaahonoka
Jeremiah44:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ othe arĩa maamenyete atĩ atumia ao nĩmacinagĩra ngai ingĩ ũbumba
Jeremiah44:16 “Ithuĩ tũtingĩthikĩrĩria ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo ũtwarĩirie ũkĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova!
Jeremiah44:17 Gũtirĩ nganja ithuĩ no tũgwĩka ũrĩa wothe tuoigire atĩ nĩtũgwĩka: Nĩtũrĩcinagĩra Mũthamaki-Mũndũ-wa-nja wa kũũrĩa Igũrũ ũbumba
Jeremiah44:18 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:19 Atumia nao magĩcooka makĩongerera atĩrĩ

Jeremiah44:21 “Githĩ Jehova ndaaririkanire na agĩĩciiria ũhoro wa ũbumba ũcio wacinagĩrwo matũũra-inĩ macio ma Juda na njĩra-inĩ cia Jerusalemu nĩ inyuĩ
Jeremiah44:22 Na rĩrĩa Jehova aaremirwo nĩ gũcooka gũkirĩrĩria ciĩko cianyu cia waganu na maũndũ marĩ magigi macio mwekaga-rĩ
Jeremiah44:23 Nĩ ũndũ inyuĩ nĩmũcinĩte ũbumba mũkehĩria Jehova

Jeremiah44:29 “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Ũndũ ũyũ nĩguo ũgaatuĩka kĩmenyithia kĩanyu atĩ nĩngamũherithia mũrĩ gũkũ
Jeremiah44:30 Ũũ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga: ‘Nĩngũneana Firaũni Hofira mũthamaki wa bũrũri wa Misiri kũrĩ thũ ciake iria icaragia kũmũruta muoyo

Jeremiah46:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkoniĩ ndũrĩrĩ ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire mũnabii Jeremia:
Jeremiah46:2 Ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ bũrũri wa Misiri: Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya gũũkĩrĩra mbũtũ cia ita cia Firaũni Neko
Jeremiah46:3 “Thagathagai ngo cianyu
Jeremiah46:4 Tandĩkai mbarathi
Jeremiah46:5 Nĩ kĩĩ ndĩrona? Nĩamaku mũno
