Jeremiah46:9 Guthũkai
Jeremiah46:10 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:11 “Ambata
Jeremiah46:12 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩikaigua ũhoro wa gũconorithio gwaku; kĩrĩro gĩaku gĩkaaiyũra thĩ. Njamba ĩkaahĩngagwo nĩ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ; cierĩ ikaagũa thĩ hamwe.”
Jeremiah46:13 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa Jehova aaheire Jeremia ũcio mũnabii ĩkoniĩ gũũka kwa Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni
Jeremiah46:14 “Anĩrĩrai ũhoro ũyũ bũrũri-inĩ wa Misiri
Jeremiah46:15 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma njamba cianyu cia ita ciaraganio thĩ? Itingĩhota gwĩtiiria
Jeremiah46:16 Nĩikahĩngwo rĩngĩ na rĩngĩ; ikaagũanĩra o mũndũ igũrũ rĩa ũrĩa ũngĩ. Ikoiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:17 Marĩ kũu makaanagĩrĩra
Jeremiah46:18 Mũthamaki
Jeremiah46:19 Oha mĩrigo yaku ya gũthiĩ nayo kũrĩa ũgaatahwo
Jeremiah46:20 “Bũrũri wa Misiri ũhaana moori njega mũno
Jeremiah46:21 Thigari cia mũcaara iria irĩ kuo ihaana ta njaũ cia gĩcegũ. O nao nĩmakagarũrũka more marĩ hamwe
Jeremiah46:22 Mũrurumo wa andũ a Misiri ũgaatuĩka ta wa nyoka rĩrĩa ĩrethara
Jeremiah46:23 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:24 Mwarĩ ũcio wa bũrũri wa Misiri nĩagaconorithio
Jeremiah46:25 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah46:26 Nĩngamaneana kũrĩ andũ arĩa mendaga kũmaruta muoyo
Jeremiah46:27 “Tiga gwĩtigĩra
Jeremiah46:28 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ “Tiga gwĩtigĩra
Jeremiah47:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia ũrĩa mũnabii
Jeremiah47:2 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ta rora ũrĩa kĩguũ kĩa maaĩ kĩroima na kũu mwena wa gathigathini; nĩgĩgũtuĩka ta rũũĩ rũiyũru mũno
Jeremiah47:3 maigua mũkubio wa mbarathi igĩtengʼera
Jeremiah47:4 Nĩgũkorwo mũthenya nĩmũkinyu wa kũniina andũ a Filisti othe
Jeremiah47:5 Andũ a Gaza makeenjwo njuĩrĩ macakae; Ashikeloni nakuo gũgaakira ki. Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah47:6 “Mũrarĩra mũkooria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah47:7 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah48:1 Ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ bũrũri wa Moabi: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah48:2 Moabi gũtigacooka kũgaathĩrĩrio rĩngĩ; kũu Heshiboni andũ nĩmagathugunda ũrĩa megũgũũkĩrĩra
Jeremiah48:3 Ta thikĩrĩria mbu ĩyo ĩroigwo kũu Horonaimu
Jeremiah48:4 Bũrũri wa Moabi nĩũkonũhwo: ciana ciakuo cia ngenge nĩikaarĩra ciugĩrĩirie.
Jeremiah48:5 Marambata na njĩra ya gũthiĩ Luhithu
Jeremiah48:6 Mwĩtharei! Honokiai mĩoyo yanyu
Jeremiah48:7 Tondũ wa ũrĩa wee wĩhokete ciĩko ciaku o na ũtonga waku-rĩ
Jeremiah48:8 Mũniinani nĩagookĩrĩra itũũra o itũũra
Jeremiah48:9 Itĩrĩriai Moabi cumbĩ
Jeremiah48:10 “Kũrumwo-rĩ
Jeremiah48:11 “Moabi atũũrĩte agaacĩire kuuma arĩ mwĩthĩ
Jeremiah48:12 No matukũ nĩmarooka
Jeremiah48:13 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo Moabi nĩagaconoka nĩ ũndũ wa ngai ĩrĩa ĩtagwo Kemoshu
Jeremiah48:14 “Mwakĩhota atĩa kuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah48:15 Moabi nĩgũkanangwo na matũũra makuo matharĩkĩrwo; aanake ake arĩa ega mũno magaikũrũka rĩũraganĩro-inĩ makooragwo
Jeremiah48:16 “Kũgũa kwa Moabi nĩgũkinyu; mũtino wake nĩũgũũka o na ihenya.
Jeremiah48:17 Mũcakaĩrei inyuĩ arĩa othe mũtũũraga mũmũthiũrũrũkĩirie
Jeremiah48:18 “Harũrũkai mwehere riiri-inĩ ũcio wanyu
Jeremiah48:19 Rũgamai mũkĩra-inĩ wa barabara mwĩrorere
Jeremiah48:20 Moabi nĩmũconorithie
Jeremiah48:21 Matuĩro ma ciira nĩmakinyĩte bũrũri-inĩ ũrĩa mwaraganu: magakinya Holoni
Jeremiah48:22 na magakinya Diboni
Jeremiah48:23 na magakinya Kiriathaimu
Jeremiah48:24 na magakinya Keriothu
Jeremiah48:25 Rũhĩa rwa Moabi nĩrũrengetwo; guoko gwake nĩ kuunĩtwo
Jeremiah48:26 “Mũheei njoohi anyue arĩĩo
Jeremiah48:27 Githĩ Isiraeli ndatuĩkĩte kĩndũ gĩa gũthekererwo nĩwe? Kaĩ aanyiitirwo arĩ gatagatĩ ka aici
Jeremiah48:28 Tiganĩriai matũũra manyu mũgatũũre ndwaro-inĩ cia mahiga
Jeremiah48:29 “Nĩtũiguĩte ũhoro wa mwĩtĩĩo wa Moabi
Jeremiah48:30 Nĩnjũũĩ rũngʼathio rwake
Jeremiah48:31 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndĩrarĩrĩra Moabi
Jeremiah48:32 Ndĩrarĩra nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Jeremiah48:33 Gĩkeno na gũcanjamũka nĩithirĩte kũu mĩgũnda-inĩ ya matunda
Jeremiah48:34 “Mĩgambo ya kĩrĩro kĩao ĩraiguuo kuuma Heshiboni o nginya Eleale na Jahazu
Jeremiah48:35 Kũu Moabi nĩnganiina arĩa othe marutagĩra maruta kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru
Jeremiah48:36 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngoro yakwa nĩĩracakaĩra Moabi
Jeremiah48:37 Mĩtwe yothe nĩmĩenje na nderu ciothe cikenjwo; guoko guothe nĩgũteme
Jeremiah48:38 Nyũmba-igũrũ guothe kũu Moabi
Jeremiah48:39 “Hĩ! Kaĩ nĩkũmomore-ĩ! Kaĩ nĩmararĩra-ĩ! Kaĩ Moabi nĩahũndũkĩte na thuutha nĩ thoni-ĩ! Moabi atuĩkĩte kĩndũ gĩa gũthekererwo
Jeremiah48:40 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Atĩrĩrĩ! Nderi nĩĩracuuhũka
Jeremiah48:41 Keriothu nĩgũgũtunyanwo
Jeremiah48:42 Moabi nĩakaniinwo atige gũtuĩka rũrĩrĩ rĩngĩ
Jeremiah48:43 Inyuĩ andũ a Moabi
Jeremiah48:44 “Ũrĩa wothe ũkoora nĩ ũndũ wa guoya
Jeremiah48:45 “Andũ arĩa metharĩte makoorĩra ciĩruru-inĩ cia Heshiboni matirĩ na ũteithio
Jeremiah48:46 Wee Moabi
Jeremiah48:47 “No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:1 Ũhoro ũkoniĩ andũ a Amoni: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Kaĩ Isiraeli atarĩ na aanake? Ndarĩ na andũ a kũmũgaya? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgĩtũmĩte Moleku egwatĩre bũrũri wa Gadi? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte andũ ake matũũre matũũra-inĩ makuo?”
Jeremiah49:2 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:3 “Wee Heshiboni
Jeremiah49:4 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga wĩrahĩre ituamba ciaku
Jeremiah49:5 Nĩngakũrehithĩria imakania kuuma kũrĩ arĩa othe makũrigiicĩirie
Jeremiah49:6 “No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:7 Ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ Edomu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Kaĩ gũtarĩ na ũũgĩ ũtigarĩte kũu Temani? Kaĩ kĩrĩra gĩthirĩte harĩ andũ arĩa akuũku? Kaĩ ũũgĩ wao ũbuthĩte biũ?
Jeremiah49:8 Garũrũkai mwĩthare
Jeremiah49:9 Agethi a thabibũ mangĩũka kũrĩ we-rĩ
Jeremiah49:10 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:11 Ndigĩrai ciana cianyu cia ngoriai; nĩngagitĩra mĩoyo yacio. Atumia anyu a ndigwa mũreke o nao manjĩhoke.”
Jeremiah49:12 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Kũngĩkorwo arĩa mataagĩrĩirwo kũnyuĩra gĩkombe kĩu no nginya makĩnyuĩre-rĩ
Jeremiah49:13 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ngwĩhĩta ngĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Jeremiah49:14 Nĩnjiguĩte ndũmĩrĩri kuuma kũrĩ Jehova: Atĩ nĩatũmire mũrekio athiĩ kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:15 “Rĩu nĩngũkũnyiihia mũno gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:16 Guoya ũrĩa ũtũmaga andũ magwĩtigĩre na mwĩtĩĩo wa ngoro yaku-rĩ
Jeremiah49:17 “Edomu gũgaatuĩka kũndũ gwa kũmakania; arĩa othe makaahĩtũkĩra kuo nĩmakamaka na makũnyũrũrie
Jeremiah49:18 O ta ũrĩa Sodomu na Gomora kwangʼaũranirio
Jeremiah49:19 “O ta mũrũũthi ũũkĩte kuuma ihinga-inĩ cia Jorodani
Jeremiah49:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah49:21 Thĩ nĩĩkainainio nĩ mũrurumo wao makĩgũa thĩ; kayũ ga kĩrĩro kĩao gakaiguuo o nginya Iria Itune.
Jeremiah49:22 Atĩrĩrĩ! Nderi nĩĩkombũka na ĩcuuhũke
Jeremiah49:23 Ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ Dameski: “Hamathu na Aripadi nĩamaku
Jeremiah49:24 Dameski nĩrĩũrĩtwo nĩ hinya
Jeremiah49:25 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte itũũra rĩrĩa rĩrĩ ngumo rĩage gũtiganĩrio
Jeremiah49:26 Ti-itherũ
Jeremiah49:27 “Nĩngacina thingo cia Dameski; naguo mwaki ũcio nĩũgaacina ciĩgitĩro cia Beni-Hadadi.”
Jeremiah49:28 Ũhoro ũkoniĩ Kedari
Jeremiah49:29 Hema ciao na ndũũru ciao cia mbũri nĩigatahwo; ciandarũa ciao nĩigakuuo
Jeremiah49:30 “Mwĩtharei narua! Ikarai thĩinĩ wa ngurunga iria ndiku
Jeremiah49:31 “Arahũkai mũtharĩkĩre rũrĩrĩ rũu rũtũũrĩte rũgaacĩire na rũhooreire
Jeremiah49:32 “Ngamĩĩra ciao igaatuĩka cia gũtahwo
Jeremiah49:33 “Hazoru gũgaatuĩka ũtũũro wa mbwe
Jeremiah49:34 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia ũcio mũnabii ĩkoniĩ Elamu
Jeremiah49:35 Ũũ nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga: “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah49:36 Nĩngarehithĩria andũ a Elamu huho iria inya ciumaga mĩena ĩrĩa ĩna ya igũrũ; ngaamahurunjĩra na kũu huho icio inya ciumaga
Jeremiah49:37 Nĩngahehenja Elamu maitho-inĩ ma thũ ciao
Jeremiah49:38 Nĩngaiga gĩtĩ gĩakwa kĩa ũnene kũu Elamu
Jeremiah49:39 “No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa Jehova aaririe na kanua ka Jeremia ũcio mũnabii
Jeremiah50:2 “Anĩrĩrai na mũhunjanĩrie ũhoro ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Jeremiah50:3 Tondũ rũrĩrĩ ruumĩte mwena wa gathigathini nĩrũkamũtharĩkĩra
Jeremiah50:4 “Matukũ-inĩ macio
Jeremiah50:5 “Nĩmakoorĩrĩria njĩra ya gũthiĩ Zayuni
Jeremiah50:6 “Andũ akwa makoretwo marĩ ngʼondu ciũrĩte; arĩithi ao nĩmamahĩtithĩtie njĩra
Jeremiah50:7 Ũrĩa wothe wamoonire akĩmatambuura; thũ ciao ikiuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:8 “Mwĩtharei muume Babuloni; eherai bũrũri wa andũ a Babuloni
Jeremiah50:9 Nĩgũkorwo nĩngarahũra ũiguano wa ndũrĩrĩ nene
Jeremiah50:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Babuloni nĩgũgatahwo; andũ othe arĩa magaagũtaha nĩmagakuua indo cia kũmaigana
Jeremiah50:11 “Tondũ nĩmũkenete na mũkarũũhia
Jeremiah50:12 nyina wanyu nĩagaconoka mũno; we ũcio wamũciarire nĩagaconorithio. Nĩwe ũgaakorwo arĩ mũnini mũno ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Jeremiah50:13 Tondũ wa marakara ma Jehova
Jeremiah50:14 “Mwĩhaarĩrie mũthiũrũrũkĩrie Babuloni
Jeremiah50:15 Riugĩrĩriei kuuma na mĩena yothe! Nĩrĩĩneanĩte rĩo rĩene
Jeremiah50:16 Eheriai ũrĩa ũhaandaga kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah50:17 “Isiraeli ahaana ta rũũru rũhurunjũkĩte
Jeremiah50:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah50:19 No nĩngacookia Isiraeli ũrĩithio-inĩ wake mwene
Jeremiah50:20 Matukũ-inĩ macio
Jeremiah50:21 “Tharĩkĩrai bũrũri wa Merathaimu
Jeremiah50:22 Kũrĩ na mbugĩrĩrio ya mbaara bũrũri-inĩ ũcio
Jeremiah50:23 Nyondo ĩrĩa ĩtũũrĩte ĩhũũraga thĩ yothe-rĩ
Jeremiah50:24 Ndaakwambĩire mũtego
Jeremiah50:25 Jehova nĩahingũrĩte harĩa aigaga indo ciake cia mbaara
Jeremiah50:26 Ũkaai mũgũtharĩkĩre muumĩte kũndũ kũraya. Thariai makũmbĩ makuo; gũcookanĩrĩriei irũndo ta cia hĩba cia ngano. Kwanangei biũ
Jeremiah50:27 Ũragai tũtegwa twakuo tuothe
Jeremiah50:28 Ta thikĩrĩriai mũigue arĩa moorĩte na arĩa metharĩte makoima bũrũri wa Babuloni
Jeremiah50:29 “Ĩtai aikia a mĩguĩ mokĩrĩre Babuloni
Jeremiah50:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah50:31 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:32 “Mwĩtĩĩi ũcio nĩakahĩngwo agwe
Jeremiah50:33 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:34 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:35 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Harĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora rwa gũũkĩrĩra andũ a Babuloni
Jeremiah50:36 Rũhiũ rwa njora rũgookĩrĩra anabii akuo a maheeni
Jeremiah50:37 Rũhiũ rwa njora rũgookĩrĩra mbarathi
Jeremiah50:38 Nĩgũkaara riũa rĩa kũhũithia maaĩ makuo! Namo nĩmakaahũa biũ. Nĩgũkorwo ũcio nĩ bũrũri ũiyũrĩte ngai cia mĩhianano
Jeremiah50:39 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nyamũ cia werũ-inĩ na hiti nĩcio igaatũũraga Babuloni
Jeremiah50:40 O ta ũrĩa Ngai aangʼaũranirie Sodomu
Jeremiah50:41 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:42 Marooka marĩ na mota na matimũ mao; nao nĩ andũ ooru
Jeremiah50:43 Mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩaiguĩte ũhoro wao
Jeremiah50:44 O ta mũrũũthi ũũkĩte kuuma ihinga-inĩ cia Jorodani ũgakinya ũrĩithio-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru-rĩ
Jeremiah50:45 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Jeremiah50:46 Mũrurumo wa Babuloni gũgĩtahwo nĩũgathingithia thĩ; kayũ ga kĩrĩro gĩakuo nĩgakaiguuo ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ.
Jeremiah51:1 Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:2 Nĩngatũma andũ a kũngĩ mathiĩ Babuloni magakũhurunje ta ũrĩa mũũngũ ũmbũragwo ihuhĩro-inĩ
Jeremiah51:3 Mũtikanareke mũikia wa mĩguĩ ageete ũta wake
Jeremiah51:4 Makaagũa thĩ moragĩtwo kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah51:5 Nĩgũkorwo Isiraeli na Juda matitirikĩtwo nĩ Ngai wao
Jeremiah51:6 “Mwĩtharei muume kũu Babuloni! Ũrai mũhonokie mĩoyo yanyu! Mwĩtharei mũtikaniinanĩrio nakuo nĩ ũndũ wa mehia makuo. Nĩ ihinda rĩa Jehova rĩa kwĩrĩhĩria; agaakũrĩha o kĩrĩa gĩkwagĩrĩire.
Jeremiah51:7 Babuloni kwahaanaga ta gĩkombe gĩa thahabu kĩrĩ guoko-inĩ kwa Jehova; nakuo gũgĩtũma thĩ yothe ĩhaane ta ĩrĩĩtwo nĩ njoohi. Ndũrĩrĩ nĩcianyuire ndibei yakuo; nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩu ihaana ta igũrũkĩte.
Jeremiah51:8 Babuloni nĩgũkũgũa o rĩmwe na kũhehenjwo. Kũrĩrĩrei! Rehei ndawa ya kũniina ruo rwakuo; hihi kwahota kũhona.
Jeremiah51:9 “ ‘Nĩtũngĩahonirie Babuloni
Jeremiah51:10 “ ‘Jehova nĩonanĩtie ũthingu witũ; ũkai tũthiĩ tũkoimbũrĩre Zayuni maũndũ marĩa Jehova Ngai witũ ekĩte.’
Jeremiah51:11 “Noorai mĩguĩ
Jeremiah51:12 Haandai bendera kũrigania na thingo cia Babuloni! Ongererai agitĩri
Jeremiah51:13 Wee ũtũũraga gũkuhĩ na njũũĩ nyingĩ
Jeremiah51:14 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩehĩtĩte akĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩake
Jeremiah51:15 “Nĩwe wombire thĩ na ũndũ wa hinya wake; ningĩ akĩhaanda thĩ na ũũgĩ wake
Jeremiah51:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agũũthũka-rĩ
Jeremiah51:17 “Andũ othe nĩmagĩte meciiria na makaaga ũmenyo
Jeremiah51:18 Ndĩrĩ kĩene
Jeremiah51:19 We ũcio Rũgai rwa Jakubu ndatariĩ tayo
Jeremiah51:20 “Nĩwe njũgũma yakwa ya ita
Jeremiah51:21 Nĩwe hũthagĩra kũhehenja mbarathi na mũmĩhaici
Jeremiah51:22 ngakũhũthĩra kũhehenja mũndũ mũrũme na mũndũ-wa-nja
Jeremiah51:23 Ngakũhũthĩra kũhehenja mũrĩithi na rũũru rwake rwa mbũri
Jeremiah51:24 “Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:25 “Nĩngũgũũkĩrĩra wee kĩrĩma gĩkĩ gĩa kũniinana
Jeremiah51:26 Gũtirĩ ihiga rĩkarutwo harĩwe rĩtuĩke rĩa koine
Jeremiah51:27 “Haandai bendera bũrũri-inĩ
Jeremiah51:28 Thagathagai ndũrĩrĩ ikahũũrane nake; thagathagai athamaki a Amedi
Jeremiah51:29 Bũrũri nĩũrathingitha na ũkenyogonda nĩ ruo
Jeremiah51:30 Njamba iria irĩ hinya cia Babuloni nĩitigĩte kũrũa; ciikarĩte ciĩgitio-inĩ ciacio iria nũmu. Hinya wacio nĩ mũthiru; ihaanĩte o ta andũ-a-nja. Ciikaro ciakuo nĩicinĩtwo na mwaki; mĩgĩĩka ya ihingo ciakuo nĩ miunange.
Jeremiah51:31 Mũtwari ndũmĩrĩri ũmwe ararũmĩrĩrwo nĩ ũngĩ
Jeremiah51:32 ningĩ mariũko ma njũũĩ nĩmanyiite
Jeremiah51:33 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩatũmeretie
Jeremiah51:35 Maũndũ ma ũhinya marĩa maanekwo nyama ciitũ-rĩ
Jeremiah51:36 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah51:37 Babuloni gũgaatuĩka hĩba ya kũndũ kwanangĩku
Jeremiah51:38 Andũ othe akuo makaararamaga ta mĩrũũthi mĩĩthĩ
Jeremiah51:39 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:40 “Ngaamaikũrũkia ta tũgondu tũgĩthiĩ gũthĩnjwo
Jeremiah51:41 “Hĩ
Jeremiah51:42 Iria rĩrĩa inene nĩrĩkaiyũra Babuloni guothe; mũrurumo wa ndiihũ ciarĩo nĩguo ũgaakũhubanĩria.
Jeremiah51:43 Matũũra makuo nĩmakirĩte ihooru
Jeremiah51:44 Nĩngaherithĩria Beli kũu Babuloni na ndũme ĩtahĩke kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩothe ĩmeretie. Ndũrĩrĩ itigacooka kũhatĩkana igĩthiĩ kũrĩ yo. Naruo rũthingo rwa Babuloni nĩrũkaagũa.
Jeremiah51:45 “Umai kũu thĩinĩ warĩo
Jeremiah51:46 Mũtikanareke ngoro cianyu ciũrwo nĩ hinya
Jeremiah51:47 Nĩgũkorwo ti-itherũ ihinda nĩrĩgooka rĩrĩa ngaaherithia ngai cia mĩhianano ya Babuloni; bũrũri ũcio wothe nĩũgaconorithio
Jeremiah51:48 Hĩndĩ ĩyo igũrũ na thĩ na kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ kuo nĩikanĩrĩra nĩ gũkena igĩkenerera Babuloni
Jeremiah51:49 “Babuloni no nginya gũkaagũa nĩ ũndũ wa andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maanooraga
Jeremiah51:50 Inyuĩ mũhonokete kũũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora-rĩ
Jeremiah51:51 “Nĩtũconorithĩtio
Jeremiah51:52 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:53 O na kũngĩtuĩka Babuloni gwĩtũũgĩrĩtie gũgakinya o matu-inĩ
Jeremiah51:54 “Mũgambo wa kĩrĩro nĩũraiguuo kũu Babuloni; nĩ mũgambo wa kũniinanwo ũraiguuo kũu bũrũri wa andũ a Babuloni.
Jeremiah51:55 Jehova nĩakaniina Babuloni; nĩagakiria inegene rĩu inene rĩakuo. Makũmbĩ ma thũ makaahũũyũka taarĩ mũrurumo wa maaĩ maingĩ. Mũrurumo wa mĩgambo yao nĩĩkaiguuagwo.
Jeremiah51:56 Mũniinani nĩagookĩrĩra Babuloni; njamba ciakuo iria irĩ hinya nĩikaanyiitwo
Jeremiah51:57 Anene akuo
Jeremiah51:58 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Rũthingo rwa Babuloni rũrĩa rwariĩ nĩrũkangʼaũranio biũ
Jeremiah51:59 Ĩno nĩo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa Jeremia aaheire Seraia mũrũ wa Neria
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia nĩandĩkĩte ibuku-inĩ rĩa gĩkũnjo ũhoro wothe ũkoniĩ mwanangĩko ũrĩa ũgaakinyĩrĩra Babuloni: maũndũ marĩa mothe maandĩkĩtwo makoniĩ Babuloni.
Jeremiah51:61 Jeremia akĩĩra Seraia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:62 Ũcooke uuge atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:63 Warĩkia gũthoma ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo-rĩ
Jeremiah51:64 Ũcooke uuge atĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ũmwe rĩrĩa aatuĩkire mũthamaki
Jeremiah52:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ ma Jehova
Jeremiah52:3 Na nĩ ũndũ wa marakara ma Jehova-rĩ
Jeremiah52:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwaka-inĩ wa kenda wa ũthamaki wa Zedekia
Jeremiah52:5 Narĩo itũũra rĩu inene rĩgĩikara rĩrĩ irigiicĩrie nginya mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa ũthamaki wa Zedekia.
Jeremiah52:6 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo rũthingo rwa itũũra rĩu inene rũkĩmomorwo
Jeremiah52:8 no mbũtũ ya ita ya Babuloni ĩgĩtengʼeria Mũthamaki Zedekia nginya ĩkĩmũkinyĩra werũ-inĩ ũrĩa mwaraganu wa Jeriko. Thigari ciake ciothe ikĩamũranio nake ikĩhurunjwo.
Jeremiah52:9 Nayo mbũtũ ya ita ya Babuloni ĩkĩnyiita Mũthamaki Zedekia. Makĩmũtwara kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Babuloni ũrĩa warĩ kũu Ribila
Jeremiah52:10 Mũthamaki wa Babuloni arĩ kũu Ribila nĩoragithirie ariũ a Zedekia o hau maitho-inĩ ma ithe wao; agĩcooka akĩũragithia anene othe a Juda.
Jeremiah52:11 Nĩacookire agĩkũũrithia Zedekia maitho
Jeremiah52:12 Mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri wa ĩtano
Jeremiah52:13 agĩcina hekarũ ya Jehova
Jeremiah52:14 Nayo mbũtũ yothe ya ita ya Babuloni
Jeremiah52:15 Nebuzaradani ũcio warĩ mũnene wa arangĩri a mũthamaki nĩatahire andũ amwe arĩa maarĩ athĩĩni mũno
Jeremiah52:16 No Nebuzaradani nĩatigire andũ amwe arĩa maarĩ athĩĩni mũno a bũrũri ũcio kuo
Jeremiah52:17 Andũ a Babuloni makiunanga itugĩ cia gĩcango
Jeremiah52:18 Ningĩ magĩkuua nyũngũ
Jeremiah52:19 Mũnene ũcio wa thigari cia mũthamaki nĩakuuire mbakũri iria nene
Jeremiah52:20 Gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩarutirwo itugĩ-inĩ icio cierĩ
Jeremiah52:21 O gĩtugĩ kĩmwe gĩacio kĩarĩ kĩa mĩkono ikũmi na ĩnana kũraiha
Jeremiah52:22 Kĩongo gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩarĩ hau gĩtugĩ-igũrũ
Jeremiah52:23 Na haarĩ na makomamanga mĩrongo kenda na matandatũ maacuuhĩte mĩena-inĩ; makomamanga mothe marĩa maathiũrũrũkĩirie igũrũ wa magemio macio ma rũgara maarĩ igana rĩmwe.
Jeremiah52:24 Mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri nĩanyiitire Seraia mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Jeremiah52:25 Harĩ andũ arĩa maatigaire kũu itũũra-inĩ inene
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradani ũcio mũnene wa arangĩri akĩmakuua othe
Jeremiah52:27 Kũu Ribila
Jeremiah52:28 Ũyũ nĩguo mũigana wa andũ arĩa Nebukadinezaru aatahire akĩmatwara bũrũri ũngĩ: mwaka-inĩ wa mũgwanja aatahire Ayahudi 3
Jeremiah52:29 naguo mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana wa ũthamaki wa Nebukadinezaru
Jeremiah52:30 o naguo mwaka-inĩ wake wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ
Jeremiah52:31 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:32 Nĩamwarĩirie na ũhooreri
Jeremiah52:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jekonia akĩruta nguo ciake cia njeera
Jeremiah52:34 Mũthamaki ũcio wa Babuloni nĩaheaga Jekonia indo cia kũmũteithia o mũthenya matukũ mothe marĩa aatũũrire muoyo
Lamentations1:1 Hĩ! Kaĩ itũũra rĩu inene nĩrĩikarĩte rĩtiganĩirio
Lamentations1:2 Ũtukũ araaraga akĩrĩra na ruo
Lamentations1:3 Thuutha wa thĩĩna na mawĩra maritũ
Lamentations1:4 Njĩra cia gũthiĩ Zayuni no macakaya
Lamentations1:5 Amuku ake matuĩkĩte nĩo mamwathaga; thũ ciake nĩcio igaacĩire. Jehova nĩamũrehithĩirie kĩeha nĩ ũndũ wa mehia make maingĩ. Ciana ciake itahĩtwo igatwarwo bũrũri ũngĩ
Lamentations1:6 Mwarĩ wa Zayuni nĩehereirwo nĩ riiri wake. Anene ake mahaanĩte ta thwariga ciagĩte ũrĩithio; moorĩte matarĩ na hinya
Lamentations1:7 Matukũ-inĩ ma thĩĩna na kũũrũũra gwake-rĩ
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalemu nĩehĩtie mũno
Lamentations1:9 Gĩko gĩake nĩkĩnyiitĩte nguo ciake; nake ndaigana gwĩcũũrania mũtũũrĩre wake wa thuutha. Kũgũa gwake kwarĩ gwa kũmakania; gũtiarĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa kũmũhooreria. “Wee Jehova
Lamentations1:10 Thũ ĩyo nĩyegwatĩire igĩĩna-inĩ ciake ciothe; nake akĩĩonera ndũrĩrĩ iria itooĩ Ngai igĩtoonya handũ harĩa hake haamũre: o arĩa wee wathanĩte matikanatoonye kĩũngano-inĩ gĩaku.
Lamentations1:11 Andũ ake othe nĩgũcaaya maracaaya magĩetha gĩa kũrĩa; magagĩkũũrania igĩĩna ciao na irio nĩguo matũũre muoyo. “Wee Jehova
Lamentations1:12 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Lamentations1:13 “We aandũmĩire mwaki uumĩte igũrũ
Lamentations1:14 “Mehia makwa mohanĩtio
Lamentations1:15 “Mwathani nĩaregete njamba ciothe cia ita iria ndĩ nacio
Lamentations1:16 “Maũndũ macio nĩmo maratũma ndĩre
Lamentations1:17 Zayuni atambũrũkĩtie moko
Lamentations1:18 “Jehova nĩ mũthingu
Lamentations1:19 “Ndaatũmanĩire arĩa twarĩ ngwatanĩro
Lamentations1:20 “Wee Jehova
Lamentations1:21 “Andũ nĩmaiguĩte mũcaayo wakwa
Lamentations1:22 “Waganu wao wothe nĩũgĩkinye mbere yaku
Lamentations2:1 Hĩ! Kaĩ Mwathani nĩakĩhumbĩrĩte Mwarĩ wa Zayuni na itu rĩa marakara make-ĩ! Nĩatungumanĩtie riiri wa Isiraeli
Lamentations2:2 Mwathani-rĩ
Lamentations2:3 Rũhĩa rwa Isiraeli ruothe arũrengete arĩ na marakara mahiũ. Nĩeheretie guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo
Lamentations2:4 Ageetete ũta wake o ta thũ; guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo nĩ kwĩhaarĩirie. Arĩa othe maatũire makenagia maitho-rĩ
Lamentations2:5 Mwathani-rĩ
Lamentations2:6 Nĩonũhĩte gĩikaro gĩake ta mũgũnda; nĩanangĩte handũ hake ha gũtũnganĩrwo. Jehova nĩatũmĩte Zayuni ariganĩrwo nĩ ciathĩ ciake iria njathane
Lamentations2:7 Mwathani nĩaregete kĩgongona gĩake
Lamentations2:8 Jehova nĩatuire itua rĩa kũmomora rũthingo rũrĩa rũthiũrũrũkĩirie Mwarĩ wa Zayuni. Nĩatambũrũkirie rũrigi rwa gũthima
Lamentations2:9 Ihingo ciakuo nĩihorokeire na thĩ; mĩgĩĩko yacio nĩamiunangĩte
Lamentations2:10 Athuuri a kũu kwa Mwarĩ wa Zayuni maikarĩte thĩ makirĩte ki; nao nĩmehurĩirie rũkũngũ mĩtwe
Lamentations2:11 Maitho makwa nĩmaroora nĩ kũrĩra
Lamentations2:12 Tũrooria manyina atĩrĩ
Lamentations2:13 Ingĩkiuga atĩa nĩ ũndũ waku? Ingĩkũgerekania nakĩ
Lamentations2:14 Cioneki iria anabii aku moonaga ciarĩ cia tũhũ na cia maheeni; matiigana kũmũguũrĩria mehia manyu nĩguo magirĩrĩrie gũtahwo kwanyu. Ndũmĩrĩri iria maamũheire ciarĩ cia maheeni
Lamentations2:15 Ehĩtũkĩri othe mahũũraga hĩ; mathekaga makĩinainagĩria Mwarĩ ũyũ wa Jerusalemu mĩtwe
Lamentations2:16 Thũ ciaku ciothe ciathamagia tũnua igũũkĩrĩre; igũthekagĩrĩra na ikahagarania magego
Lamentations2:17 Jehova nĩarĩkĩtie gwĩka ũrĩa aathugundĩte; we nĩahingĩtie kiugo gĩake
Lamentations2:18 Ngoro cia andũ nĩirakaĩra Mwathani. Atĩrĩrĩ
Lamentations2:19 Arahũka
Lamentations2:20 “Wee Jehova
Lamentations2:21 “Andũ ethĩ o na arĩa akũrũ makomete hamwe rũkũngũ-inĩ rwa njĩra
Lamentations2:22 “O ta ũrĩa wĩtanaga mũthenya wa gĩathĩ-rĩ
Lamentations3:1 Niĩ ndĩ mũndũ wonete thĩĩna nĩ ũndũ wa kũhũũrwo na rũthanju rwa mangʼũrĩ make.
Lamentations3:2 Andwarĩte akangereria nduma-inĩ handũ ha ũtheri-inĩ;
Lamentations3:3 ti-itherũ
Lamentations3:4 Nĩatũmĩte nyama cia mwĩrĩ wakwa na gĩkonde kĩaguo ihinyare
Lamentations3:5 Nĩandigiicĩirie
Lamentations3:6 Atũmĩte ndũũre nduma-inĩ o ta andũ arĩa maakuire tene.
Lamentations3:7 Nĩanjirigĩire na rũthingo nĩguo ndikae kũũra; mĩnyororo yakwa nĩamĩritũhĩtie mũno.
Lamentations3:8 O na rĩrĩa ndetana kana ndakaya ngĩenda ũteithio-rĩ
Lamentations3:9 Nĩahingĩte njĩra yakwa na mahiga maicũhie; atũmĩte tũcĩra twakwa tuogome.
Lamentations3:10 Kũrĩ niĩ aatuĩkĩte o ta nduba rĩrĩa yoheirie
Lamentations3:11 akĩngururia kuuma gacĩra-inĩ
Lamentations3:12 Ageetete ũta wake
Lamentations3:13 Nĩatheecire ngoro yakwa na mĩguĩ kuuma thiaka-inĩ wake.
Lamentations3:14 Ngĩgĩtuĩka wa gũthekagĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ akwa othe; maanyũrũragia na rwĩmbo mũthenya wothe.
Lamentations3:15 Anjiyũrĩtie maũndũ marũrũ
Lamentations3:16 Nĩangʼethũrangĩte magego makwa na kagoto; anangĩrĩirie rũkũngũ-inĩ.
Lamentations3:17 Nĩnjagithĩtio thayũ; nĩndiganĩirwo ũgaacĩru nĩ kĩĩ.
Lamentations3:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nguuga atĩrĩ
Lamentations3:19 Nĩngũririkana thĩĩna wakwa
Lamentations3:20 Ngoro yakwa no ĩraririkana maũndũ macio
Lamentations3:21 O na gũtariĩ ũguo nĩndirikanaga ũndũ ũyũ
Lamentations3:22 Tondũ wa wendo mũnene wa Jehova
Lamentations3:23 Tha ciaku ikoragwo irĩ njerũ rũciinĩ o rũciinĩ
Lamentations3:24 Ngoro yakwa yugaga atĩrĩ
Lamentations3:25 Jehova nĩ mwega kũrĩ arĩa mamwĩhokaga
Lamentations3:26 nĩ wega mũndũ gweterera ũhonokio wa Jehova o akirĩte.
Lamentations3:27 Nĩ wega mũndũ gũkuua icooki hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arĩ mũnini.
Lamentations3:28 Nĩaikare arĩ wiki akirĩte
Lamentations3:29 Nĩaturumithie ũthiũ wake rũkũngũ-inĩ
Lamentations3:30 Nĩerekererie rũthĩa kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmũgũtha
Lamentations3:31 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ndateanagĩria andũ nginya tene.
Lamentations3:32 O na gũtuĩka nĩarehaga kĩeha-rĩ
Lamentations3:33 Nĩgũkorwo ndarehagĩra andũ mĩnyamaro
Lamentations3:34 Rĩrĩa andũ a bũrũri arĩa othe mohetwo maarangĩrĩrio na makinya-rĩ
Lamentations3:35 rĩrĩa mũndũ aagithio kĩhooto gĩake mbere ya Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno-rĩ
Lamentations3:36 o na rĩrĩa mũndũ atuĩrwo ciira hatarĩ kĩhooto-rĩ
Lamentations3:37 Nũũ ũngĩaria na atũme ũndũ ũcio ũhinge
Lamentations3:38 Githĩ kanua-inĩ ka Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno tiho hoimaga maũndũ mooru
Lamentations3:39 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩ muoyo-rĩ
Lamentations3:40 Nĩtũthuthuurie-i mĩthiĩre iitũ na tũmĩtuĩrie
Lamentations3:41 Nĩtwambararie ngoro ciitũ na moko maitũ na igũrũ kũrĩ Mũrungu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ
Lamentations3:42 “Ithuĩ-rĩ
Lamentations3:43 “Wee wĩhumbĩrĩte na marakara
Lamentations3:44 Wee wĩhumbĩrĩte na itu nĩgeetha gũtikagĩe na ihooya rĩngĩgũkinyĩra.
Lamentations3:45 Wee ũtũmĩte tũtuĩke ta gĩko
Lamentations3:46 “Thũ ciitũ ciothe itwathamĩirie tũnua itũũkĩrĩre.
Lamentations3:47 Nĩtũkorereirwo nĩ kĩmako kĩnene
Lamentations3:48 Maitho makwa maranyũrũrũkia tũrũũĩ twa maithori nĩ ũndũ andũ akwa nĩmanangĩtwo.
Lamentations3:49 Maitho makwa marĩnyũrũrũkagia maithori mategũtigithĩria
Lamentations3:50 nginya rĩrĩa Jehova agaacũthĩrĩria arĩ igũrũ oone.
Lamentations3:51 Maũndũ marĩa ndĩrona nĩmaranjiguithia kĩeha ngoro
Lamentations3:52 Andũ arĩa maatuĩkĩte thũ ciakwa hatarĩ gĩtũmi nĩo maanguĩmaga ta nyoni.
Lamentations3:53 Maanjikirie irima makĩenda kũnjũraga
Lamentations3:54 ndaahubanĩirio nĩ maaĩ maingĩ
Lamentations3:55 Ngĩkaĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku Wee Jehova
Lamentations3:56 Na we ũkĩigua ithaithana rĩakwa
Lamentations3:57 Nawe ũkĩnguhĩrĩria rĩrĩa ndagũkaĩire
Lamentations3:58 Wee Mwathani-rĩ
Lamentations3:59 Wee Jehova
Lamentations3:60 Wee nĩwonete kwĩrĩhĩria kwao guothe
Lamentations3:61 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Lamentations3:62 maũndũ marĩa thũ ciakwa ciaragia na mĩheehũ ikĩngʼungʼuanaga injũkĩrĩre mũthenya wothe.
Lamentations3:63 Ta kĩmarore! Magĩikara thĩ kana magĩũkĩra
Lamentations3:64 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Lamentations3:65 Ũmia ngoro ciao
Lamentations3:66 Maingatithie ũrĩ na marakara
Lamentations4:1 Hĩ! Kaĩ thahabu ĩyo nĩĩthirĩte ũkengu wayo-ĩ
Lamentations4:2 Ariũ a Zayuni arĩa me bata
Lamentations4:3 O na mbwe nĩciongithagia ciana ciacio
Lamentations4:4 Rũrĩmĩ rwa gakenge rũnyiitanĩte na karakara nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyoota; twana tũhooyaga irio
Lamentations4:5 Andũ arĩa rĩmwe maarĩĩaga irio njega
Lamentations4:6 Iherithia rĩa andũ akwa nĩ inene gũkĩra rĩa itũũra rĩa Sodomu
Lamentations4:7 Anene akuo maatherete gũkĩra tharunji
Lamentations4:8 No rĩu mairĩte o na gũkĩra mbiro; matikũũrĩkanaga marĩ njĩra-inĩ. Ikonde cia mĩĩrĩ yao ciũmanĩrĩire na mahĩndĩ; ciumĩte o ta rũthanju.
Lamentations4:9 Kaba arĩa mooragagwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Lamentations4:10 Moko ma andũ-a-nja arĩa marĩ tha nĩmarugire ciana ciao ene
Lamentations4:11 Jehova nĩarekereirie mangʼũrĩ make biũ; aitũrũrĩte marakara make mahiũ. Nĩakĩtie mwaki kũu Zayuni ũrĩa ũcinĩte mĩthingi yakuo.
Lamentations4:12 Athamaki a thĩ matingĩetĩkirie
Lamentations4:13 No ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire nĩ ũndũ wa mehia ma anabii akuo
Lamentations4:14 Rĩu maturuuraga njĩra-inĩ ta andũ atumumu. Mathaahĩtio nĩ thakame ũũ atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩgeria kũhutia nguo ciao.
Lamentations4:15 Andũ mamakayagĩrĩria
Lamentations4:16 Jehova we mwene nĩwe ũmahurunjĩte; nĩatigĩte kũmarũmbũiya. Athĩnjĩri-Ngai matiheagwo gĩtĩĩo
Lamentations4:17 Makĩria ma ũguo-rĩ
Lamentations4:18 Andũ maatũcemaga ikinya gwa ikinya
Lamentations4:19 Andũ arĩa matũingatithĩtie-rĩ
Lamentations4:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũitĩrĩrie maguta nĩ Jehova
Lamentations4:21 Kena na ũcanjamũke
Lamentations4:22 Wee Mwarĩ wa Zayuni-rĩ
Lamentations5:1 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Lamentations5:2 Igai riitũ nĩrĩneanĩtwo kũrĩ ageni
Lamentations5:3 Nĩtũtuĩkĩte ciana cia ngoriai na ciana itarĩ na maithe
Lamentations5:4 Maaĩ marĩa tũnyuuaga no tũgũrire; o na ngũ nĩkũgũra tũragũra.
Lamentations5:5 Arĩa matũingatithagia marĩ o magũrũ-inĩ maitũ; nĩtũnogete
Lamentations5:6 Twĩneanĩte kũrĩ andũ a Misiri na a Ashuri nĩgeetha tuone irio cia gũtũigana.
Lamentations5:7 Maithe maitũ nĩmehirie na rĩu matirĩ ho
Lamentations5:8 Ngombo nĩcio itwathaga
Lamentations5:9 Tuonaga irio na ũndũ wa gũtwarĩrĩria mĩoyo iitũ ũgwati-inĩ
Lamentations5:10 Gĩkonde giitũ kĩhiũhĩte o ta riiko rĩa kũruga mĩgate
Lamentations5:11 Andũ-a-nja nĩmanyiitĩtwo na hinya gũkũ Zayuni
Lamentations5:12 Anene akuo nĩ macuurĩtio na moko mao; athuuri nao matiheagwo gĩtĩĩo.
Lamentations5:13 Aanake marutithagio wĩra wa hinya ithĩi-inĩ; tũmwana natuo tũtũgũũgaga nĩgũkuuithio mĩrigo ya ngũ.
Lamentations5:14 Athuuri nĩmatigĩte gũikara kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa itũũra inene; aanake nao nĩmatigĩte kũina nyĩmbo ciao.
Lamentations5:15 Ngoro ciitũ nĩithirĩte gĩkeno; ndũrũhĩ ciitũ igarũrũkĩte igatuĩka macakaya.
Lamentations5:16 Thũmbĩ ya ũnene nĩĩgwĩte
Lamentations5:17 Tondũ ũcio ngoro ciitũ nĩiringĩkĩte; na tondũ wa maũndũ macio maitho maitũ makaira
Lamentations5:18 tondũ wa Kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni
Lamentations5:19 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Lamentations5:20 Ũriganagĩrwo nĩ ithuĩ hĩndĩ ciothe nĩkĩ? Ũtũtiganĩirie hĩndĩ ndaaya ũguo nĩkĩ?
Lamentations5:21 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Lamentations5:22 tiga ũkorirwo nĩũtũregeete biũ
Ezekiel1:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Ezekiel1:2 Mũthenya wa gatano wa mweri ũcio
Ezekiel1:3 kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩgĩakinyĩrĩire Ezekieli ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
Ezekiel1:4 Ngĩcũthĩrĩria ngĩona rũhuho rwa kĩhuhũkanio rũgĩũka ruumĩte na mwena wa gathigathini
Ezekiel1:5 na thĩinĩ wa mwaki ũcio nĩ haarĩ kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ciũmbe inya irĩ muoyo
Ezekiel1:6 na o kĩmwe gĩacio kĩarĩ na mothiũ mana na mathagu mana.
Ezekiel1:7 Magũrũ ma cio maarĩ marũngarũ; namo makinya ma cio maatariĩ ta ma gacaũ
Ezekiel1:8 Rungu rwa mathagu ma cio
Ezekiel1:9 namo mathagu ma cio
Ezekiel1:10 Mothiũ ma cio maatariĩ ta ũũ: O kĩmwe gĩa icio inya kĩarĩ na ũthiũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel1:11 Ũguo nĩguo mothiũ ma cio maatariĩ. Mathagu ma cio maatambũrũkĩtio na igũrũ; o kĩmwe kĩarĩ na mathagu meerĩ
Ezekiel1:12 O kĩmwe gĩa cio gĩathiiaga kĩrũngĩrĩirie o mbere. O kũrĩa guothe Roho aacierekagĩria
Ezekiel1:13 Ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo cionagwo ihaana ta makara megwakana mwaki kana ta imũrĩ. Mwaki ũcio wathiiaga thuutha na mbere gatagatĩ-inĩ ga ciũmbe icio; warĩ mũcangararu
Ezekiel1:14 Ciũmbe icio ciaguthũkaga na thuutha na ikaguthũka na mbere ta ũrĩa rũheni rũhenũkaga.
Ezekiel1:15 Rĩrĩa ndacũthĩrĩirie ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo
Ezekiel1:16 Naguo mũhianĩre na mũthondekere wa magũrũ macio ma ngaari warĩ ta ũũ: Maahenagia ta thumarati
Ezekiel1:17 Namo magĩthiĩ maathiiaga na mwena o wothe wa ĩyo ĩna kũrĩa ciũmbe icio cierekeirie ũthiũ; magũrũ macio ma ngaari matiagarũrũkaga rĩrĩa ciũmbe icio igũthiĩ.
Ezekiel1:18 Mĩbara ya mo yarĩ mĩraihu na igũrũ na yarĩ ya kũmakania
Ezekiel1:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo ciathiĩ
Ezekiel1:20 O kũrĩa guothe Roho aacierekagĩria
Ezekiel1:21 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ciũmbe icio ciathiĩ
Ezekiel1:22 Igũrũ rĩa mĩtwe ya ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo nĩ haarĩ kĩndũ kĩaraganu kĩahaanaga ta wariĩ wakengaga ta mbarabu
Ezekiel1:23 Rungu rwa wariĩ ũcio
Ezekiel1:24 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ciũmbe icio ciathiiaga
Ezekiel1:25 Ningĩ ngĩigua mũgambo uumĩte na igũrũ rĩa wariĩ ũcio warĩ igũrũ rĩa mĩtwe yacio hĩndĩ ĩyo ciarũgamĩte ithunĩte mathagu.
Ezekiel1:26 Igũrũ rĩa wariĩ ũcio warĩ igũrũ rĩa mĩtwe yacio nĩ haarĩ kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ta gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene gĩakĩtwo na kahiga ka yakuti ĩrĩa ya bururu
Ezekiel1:27 Ndaarora ngĩona kuuma harĩa honekaga taarĩ ho njohero yake gũcooka na igũrũ
Ezekiel1:28 Ũtheri ũcio wamũrigiicĩirie watariĩ ta mũkũnga-mbura ũrĩ itu-inĩ rĩa mbura mũthenya ũrĩa kũroira
Ezekiel2:1 Nake mũndũ ũcio akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel2:2 O hĩndĩ ĩyo aanjaragĩria
Ezekiel2:3 Nake akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel2:4 Andũ acio ndĩragũtũma kũrĩ o-rĩ
Ezekiel2:5 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel2:6 Nawe mũrũ wa mũndũ-rĩ
Ezekiel2:7 No nginya ũmaarĩrie na ciugo ciakwa
Ezekiel2:8 No wee mũrũ wa mũndũ-rĩ
Ezekiel2:9 Ngĩcooka ngĩcũthĩrĩria
Ezekiel2:10 nake akĩrĩkũnjũrĩra hau mbere yakwa. Narĩo rĩandĩkĩtwo ciugo cia macakaya mĩena yeerĩ
Ezekiel3:1 Nake mũndũ ũcio akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩathamia kanua
Ezekiel3:3 Ningĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:4 Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ: “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel3:5 Ndũratũmwo kũrĩ andũ a mwarĩrie ũtooĩ kana rũthiomi rũritũ
Ezekiel3:6 ti kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ iria ciaragia mwarĩrie ũtooĩ kana rũthiomi rũritũ
Ezekiel3:7 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:8 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:9 Nĩngũtũma gĩthiithi gĩaku kĩũme ta ihiga rĩrĩa rĩũmũ mũno
Ezekiel3:10 Ningĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:11 Thiĩ o rĩu kũrĩ andũ anyu arĩa matahĩtwo warie nao. Meere atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:12 Ningĩ Roho akĩnjoya na igũrũ
Ezekiel3:13 Naguo warĩ mũgambo wa mathagu ma ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo makĩhutania mo mene
Ezekiel3:14 Roho agĩcooka akĩnjoya na igũrũ akĩnjeheria
Ezekiel3:15 Ngĩkinya kũrĩ arĩa maatahĩtwo
Ezekiel3:16 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩyo mũgwanja-rĩ
Ezekiel3:17 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel3:18 Rĩrĩa ngwĩra mũndũ mwaganu atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:19 No wee ũngĩkaania mũndũ ũcio mwaganu
Ezekiel3:20 “Ningĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel3:21 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:22 Guoko kwa Jehova kwarĩ igũrũ rĩakwa ndĩ o kũu
Ezekiel3:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩũkĩra ngĩthiĩ werũ-inĩ ũcio mwaraganu
Ezekiel3:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wakwa
Ezekiel3:25 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:26 Niĩ nĩngatũma rũrĩmĩ rwaku rũnyiitane na karakara nĩguo ũkire wage kũmanegenia
Ezekiel3:27 No rĩrĩa ngaakwarĩria-rĩ
Ezekiel4:1 “Wee
Ezekiel4:2 Ũcooke ũrĩrigiicĩrie: Rĩakĩrĩre indo cia mbaara cia gũteithia gũtharĩkĩra itũũra
Ezekiel4:3 Cooka woe rũgĩo rwa kĩgera
Ezekiel4:4 “Ningĩ ũkome na mwena waku wa ũmotho
Ezekiel4:5 Nĩngũtuĩrĩire ũkome matukũ maiganaine na mĩaka ya mehia mao. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio matukũ magana matatũ na mĩrongo kenda nĩmo ũgaakuua mehia ma andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli.
Ezekiel4:6 “Warĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Ezekiel4:7 Hũgũra ũthiũ waku ũwerekerie itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩu rĩrigiicĩirio
Ezekiel4:8 Nĩngakuoha na mĩhĩndo nĩguo ndũkanahote kwĩgarũra na mwena ũmwe kana ũrĩa ũngĩ nginya rĩrĩa matukũ maku ma kũrigiicĩrio magaathira.
Ezekiel4:9 “Oya ngano na cairi
Ezekiel4:10 Thima cekeri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia irio iria ũrĩrĩĩaga o mũthenya na ũcirĩĩage mahinda marĩa mabange.
Ezekiel4:11 Ningĩ ũthime maaĩ gĩcunjĩ gĩa ithathatũ kĩa hini ĩmwe
Ezekiel4:12 Rĩĩaga irio icio o ta ũrĩa ũngĩrĩa mũgate wa cairi; ũũruge andũ makĩonaga
Ezekiel4:13 Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel4:14 Na niĩ ngiuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel4:15 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel4:16 Nake agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel4:17 nĩ ũndũ nĩgũgakorwo na ũnyiihu wa irio na wa maaĩ. Nĩmakamakaga moona o mũndũ ũrĩa atariĩ na nĩmakahĩnja nĩ ũndũ wa mehia mao.
Ezekiel5:1 “Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:2 Rĩrĩa matukũ marĩa mũrigiicĩirio magaathira-rĩ
Ezekiel5:3 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:4 Cooka woe gakundi kayo ũgaikie mwaki-inĩ ũgacine. Mwaki nĩũgatheerema kuuma hau ũiyũre nyũmba yothe ya Isiraeli.
Ezekiel5:5 “Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo itũũra inene rĩa Jerusalemu
Ezekiel5:6 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:7 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Wee ũkoretwo ũrĩ mũremi gũkĩra ndũrĩrĩ ici igũthiũrũrũkĩirie
Ezekiel5:8 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel5:9 Tondũ wa mĩhianano ĩyo yaku yothe ĩrĩ magigi
Ezekiel5:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel5:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel5:12 Gĩcunjĩ gĩa ithatũ kĩa andũ aku makooragwo nĩ mũthiro
Ezekiel5:13 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo marakara makwa nĩmagathira
Ezekiel5:14 “Nĩngagũtua mwanangĩko
Ezekiel5:15 Wee ũgaatuĩka wa kũmenwo
Ezekiel5:16 Rĩrĩa ngaakũratha na mĩguĩ yakwa ya ũragani na ya ngʼaragu
Ezekiel5:17 Nĩngakũrehere ngʼaragu na nyamũ cia gĩthaka igũtharĩkĩre
Ezekiel6:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel6:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel6:3 ũciĩre atĩrĩ: ‘Inyuĩ irĩma cia Isiraeli
Ezekiel6:4 Igongona cianyu nĩikamomorwo
Ezekiel6:5 Nĩngaragania ciimba cia andũ a Isiraeli hau mbere ya mĩhianano ĩyo yao
Ezekiel6:6 Kũndũ kũrĩa guothe mũtũũraga
Ezekiel6:7 Andũ anyu nĩmakooragĩrwo gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu
Ezekiel6:8 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel6:9 Ningĩ marĩ ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ kũu matwarĩtwo marĩ atahe-rĩ
Ezekiel6:10 Nao nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova; niĩ ndiamamakagia tũhũ ngiuga atĩ nĩngamarehere mũtino ũyũ.
Ezekiel6:11 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Hũũra hĩ
Ezekiel6:12 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtũũraga kũraya akooragwo nĩ mũthiro
Ezekiel6:13 Nao nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova

Ezekiel7:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel7:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel7:3 Rĩu ithirĩro nĩrĩgũkinyĩrĩire
Ezekiel7:4 Ndigakũiguĩra tha kana ngũcaaĩre; ti-itherũ
Ezekiel7:5 “Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: ‘Mwanangĩko! Mwanangĩko ũtarĩ waiguuo nĩũrooka.
Ezekiel7:6 Ithirĩro nĩrĩkinyu! Ithirĩro nĩrĩkinyu! Rĩarahũkĩte rĩgũũkĩrĩire. Nĩrĩkinyu!
Ezekiel7:7 Nĩũkoretwo nĩ mũtino
Ezekiel7:8 Niĩ ndĩ hakuhĩ gũgũitĩrĩria mangʼũrĩ makwa
Ezekiel7:9 Ndigakũiguĩra tha kana ngũcaaĩre; nĩngakũrĩha kũringana na mĩthiĩre yaku na mĩtugo yaku ĩrĩ magigi gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova ndĩrahũũrana.
Ezekiel7:10 “ ‘Mũthenya nĩguo ũyũ! Nĩmũkinyu! Mũtino nĩmũkinyu
Ezekiel7:11 Maũndũ ma ũhinya nĩmakũrĩte magatuĩka rũthanju rwa kũherithia waganu; gũtirĩ andũ magaatigara
Ezekiel7:12 Ihinda rĩu nĩrĩkinyu
Ezekiel7:13 Mwendia ndagakũũra gĩthaka kĩrĩa endetie rĩrĩa rĩothe acio eerĩ marĩ muoyo
Ezekiel7:14 O na mangĩhuha karumbeta
Ezekiel7:15 “ ‘Mwena wa na nja kũrĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel7:16 Arĩa othe magaatigara na mahonoke magaakorwo irĩma-inĩ
Ezekiel7:17 Guoko o guothe nĩgũkaregera
Ezekiel7:18 Nĩmakahumbwo nguo cia makũnia
Ezekiel7:19 Nĩmakahurunja betha yao barabara
Ezekiel7:20 Nĩmetĩĩagĩra ũgemu wa mathaga mao
Ezekiel7:21 Nĩngacineana ciothe kũrĩ andũ a kũngĩ ituĩke ndaho
Ezekiel7:22 Nĩngamahutatĩra ndige kũmona
Ezekiel7:23 “ ‘Haarĩria mĩnyororo
Ezekiel7:24 Nĩngarehe ndũrĩrĩ iria njaganu mũno ciĩgwatĩre nyũmba ciao ituĩke ciao; nĩngatũma mwĩtĩĩo wa andũ arĩa marĩ hinya ũthire
Ezekiel7:25 Kĩmakania gĩoka-rĩ
Ezekiel7:26 Mũtino ũgooka ũrũmanĩrĩire na ũngĩ
Ezekiel7:27 Mũthamaki nĩagacakaya
Ezekiel8:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa ĩtandatũ
Ezekiel8:2 Ngĩrora
Ezekiel8:3 Nĩatambũrũkirie kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ta guoko na akĩnjoya anyiitĩte njuĩrĩ cia mũtwe wakwa. Roho akĩnjoya na-igũrũ rĩera-inĩ
Ezekiel8:4 Na hau mbere yakwa nĩho riiri wa Ngai wa Isiraeli warĩ
Ezekiel8:5 Ningĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:6 Nake akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:7 Ningĩ akĩndehe itoonyero-inĩ rĩa nja ĩyo. Ngĩrora ngĩona irima rũthingo-inĩ.
Ezekiel8:8 Akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:9 Ningĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩtoonya kuo
Ezekiel8:11 Hau mbere yacio nĩ haarũgamĩte athuuri mĩrongo mũgwanja a nyũmba ya Isiraeli
Ezekiel8:12 Nake akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:13 Ningĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:14 Ningĩ akĩndehe itoonyero-inĩ rĩa kĩhingo gĩa gathigathini kĩa nyũmba ya Jehova
Ezekiel8:15 Nake akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:16 Ningĩ akĩndoonyia nja ya na thĩinĩ ya nyũmba ya Jehova
Ezekiel8:17 Nake akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio niĩ nĩngameka maũndũ na marakara; ndikamaiguĩra tha kana ndĩmacaaĩre. O na mangĩkaanĩrĩra matũ-inĩ makwa
Ezekiel9:1 Ningĩ ngĩigua agĩĩtana na mũgambo mũnene
Ezekiel9:2 Na niĩ ngĩona andũ atandatũ magĩũka moimĩte mwena wa kĩhingo kĩa rũgongo
Ezekiel9:3 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:4 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:5 O thikĩrĩirie ũguo
Ezekiel9:6 Ũragai athuuri
Ezekiel9:7 Ningĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mooraganaga niĩ ngĩtigwo ndĩ nyiki
Ezekiel9:9 Nake akĩnjookeria atĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Ezekiel9:11 Ningĩ mũndũ ũcio wehumbĩte nguo cia gatani
Ezekiel10:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:2 Nake Jehova akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wehumbĩte nguo cia gatani atĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:3 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:4 Naguo riiri wa Jehova ũkĩambata uumĩte igũrũ rĩa akerubi
Ezekiel10:5 Naguo mũrurumo wa mathagu ma akerubi acio nĩwaiguĩkaga o nginya kũu nja ya nyumĩrĩra
Ezekiel10:6 Na rĩrĩa Jehova aathire mũndũ ũcio warĩ na nguo cia gatani
Ezekiel10:7 Ningĩ ũmwe wa akerubi acio agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake mwaki-inĩ ũcio warĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ kao. Akĩoya mwaki ũmwe waguo
Ezekiel10:8 (Rungu rwa mathagu ma akerubi acio nĩkuonekaga kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ta moko ma mũndũ.)
Ezekiel10:9 Nĩndarorire
Ezekiel10:10 Makĩoneka-rĩ
Ezekiel10:11 Magĩthiĩ
Ezekiel10:12 Mĩĩrĩ yao yothe
Ezekiel10:13 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:14 O ũmwe wa akerubi aarĩ na mothiũ mana: Ũthiũ ũmwe warĩ wa kerubi
Ezekiel10:15 Ningĩ akerubi acio makĩambata na igũrũ. Ici ciarĩ ciũmbe irĩ muoyo iria ndoonete hau Rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Kebari.
Ezekiel10:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akerubi acio maathiiaga
Ezekiel10:17 Rĩrĩa akerubi acio marũgama
Ezekiel10:18 Ningĩ riiri wa Jehova ũkĩehera hau igũrũ rĩa hingĩro ya hekarũ na ũkĩrũgama igũrũ rĩa akerubi acio.
Ezekiel10:19 O ndĩĩroreire ũguo
Ezekiel10:20 Icio nĩ ciũmbe irĩ muoyo iria ndoonete irĩ rungu rwa Ngai wa Isiraeli hau Rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Kebari
Ezekiel10:21 O ũmwe aarĩ na mothiũ mana
Ezekiel10:22 Mothiũ mao maahaanaga ta marĩa ndoonete hau Rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Kebari. O ũmwe wao aathiiaga arũngĩrĩirie na mbere.
Ezekiel11:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho akĩnjoya na igũrũ
Ezekiel11:2 Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel11:3 Moigaga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel11:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio marathĩre ũhoro wa kũmookĩrĩra; marathĩre ũhoro
Ezekiel11:5 Ningĩ Roho wa Jehova agĩũka igũrũ rĩakwa
Ezekiel11:6 Nĩmũũragĩte andũ aingĩ itũũra-inĩ rĩĩrĩ inene
Ezekiel11:7 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel11:8 Inyuĩ nĩmwĩtigĩrĩte rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel11:9 Nĩngamũrutũrũra muume itũũra-inĩ inene
Ezekiel11:10 Inyuĩ mũkooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel11:11 Itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene rĩtigatuĩka nyũngũ harĩ inyuĩ
Ezekiel11:12 Na inyuĩ nĩmũkamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Ezekiel11:13 Na rĩrĩa ndaarathaga
Ezekiel11:14 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel11:15 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel11:16 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio uga atĩrĩ: ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: O na gũtuĩka nĩndamatwarithirie kũraya gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ
Ezekiel11:17 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio uga atĩrĩ: ‘Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Nĩngamũcookanĩrĩria kuuma ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Ezekiel11:18 “Nĩmagacooka kuo
Ezekiel11:19 Nĩngamahe ũũrũmwe wa ngoro
Ezekiel11:20 Ningĩ nĩmakarũmagĩrĩra kĩrĩra gĩakwa gĩa kũrũmĩrĩrwo
Ezekiel11:21 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel11:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akerubi acio
Ezekiel11:23 Riiri ũcio wa Jehova ũkĩambata uumĩte thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu inene na ũgĩikara igũrũ rĩa kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩarĩ mwena wa irathĩro warĩo.
Ezekiel11:24 Roho akĩnjoya na igũrũ
Ezekiel11:25 na niĩ ngĩĩra andũ acio maatahĩtwo ũhoro wothe ũrĩa Jehova aanyonetie.

Ezekiel12:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio niĩ ngĩĩka o ta ũrĩa ndaathĩtwo. Ngĩruta mĩrigo yakwa nja kũrĩ mũthenya barigici

Ezekiel13:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel13:3 Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Kaĩ anabii acio akĩĩgu marĩ na haro-ĩ
Ezekiel13:4 Anabii aku
Ezekiel13:5 Inyuĩ mũtiambatĩte mũthiĩ rũthingo-inĩ kũrĩa gũtharũkĩte
Ezekiel13:6 Cioneki ciao nĩ cia maheeni
Ezekiel13:7 Githĩ ti cioneki cia maheeni muonete
Ezekiel13:8 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel13:9 Guoko gwakwa nĩgũgookĩrĩra anabii arĩa moonaga cioneki cia maheeni
Ezekiel13:10 “ ‘Tondũ mahĩtithagia andũ akwa
Ezekiel13:11 nĩ ũndũ ũcio ĩra andũ arĩa marũhakaga coka atĩ no rũkũgũa. Nĩngoiria mbura nene mũno
Ezekiel13:12 Rĩrĩa rũthingo rũu rũkaaga-rĩ
Ezekiel13:13 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Nĩngarekereria rũhuho rũrĩ na hinya ndĩ na mangʼũrĩ
Ezekiel13:14 Nĩngamomora rũthingo rũu mũhakĩte coka na ndĩrũharaganie tĩĩri-inĩ nginya mũthingi wa ruo ũguũranio. Rĩrĩa rũkaagũa
Ezekiel13:15 Ũguo nĩguo ngeeruta mangʼũrĩ makwa na rũthingo rũu
Ezekiel13:16 o anabii acio a Isiraeli
Ezekiel13:17 “Rĩu mũrũ wa mũndũ-rĩ
Ezekiel13:18 ũmeere atĩrĩ
Ezekiel13:19 Nĩmũũthaahĩtie kũrĩ andũ akwa nĩ ũndũ wa ngundi ya cairi na twenyũ twa mũgate. Nĩ ũndũ wanyu kũheenia andũ akwa
Ezekiel13:20 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel13:21 Nĩngatembũranga mataama macio manyu na honokie andũ akwa ndĩmarute moko-inĩ manyu
Ezekiel13:22 Tondũ nĩmwatũmire arĩa athingu morwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaheenia o rĩrĩa niĩ itaamareheire kĩeha
Ezekiel13:23 nĩ ũndũ ũcio

Ezekiel16:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel16:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel16:3 uuge atĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:4 Mũthenya ũrĩa waciarirwo-rĩ
Ezekiel16:5 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wakũrorire
Ezekiel16:6 “ ‘Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩndahĩtũkĩire hau warĩ ngĩkuona ũkĩĩgaragaria thakame-inĩ yaku
Ezekiel16:7 Nĩndatũmire ũkũre o ta mũtĩ wa mũgũnda. Nawe ũgĩkũra
Ezekiel16:8 “ ‘Thuutha ũcio nĩndahĩtũkĩire hau
Ezekiel16:9 “ ‘Nĩndagũthambirie na maaĩ
Ezekiel16:10 Nĩndakũhumbire nguo ngʼemie na ngĩgwĩkĩra nyamũga cia rũũa. Nĩndakũhumbire nguo njega ya gatani na ngĩkũhumba nguo cia goro.
Ezekiel16:11 Nĩndakũgemirie na mathaga: ngĩgwĩkĩra bangiri moko
Ezekiel16:12 ngĩcooka ngĩgwĩkĩra gĩcũhĩ iniũrũ
Ezekiel16:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũkĩgemio na thahabu na betha: nacio nguo ciaku ciarĩ cia gatani ĩrĩa njega
Ezekiel16:14 Nayo ngumo yaku ĩgĩtheerema ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũthaka waku
Ezekiel16:15 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:16 Woire nguo imwe ciaku
Ezekiel16:17 Ningĩ ũgĩcooka ũkĩoya mathaga macio mega ndaakũheire
Ezekiel16:18 Ningĩ ũkĩoya nguo icio ciaku ciarĩ ngʼemie
Ezekiel16:19 O nacio irio iria ndaakũheete ũrĩe
Ezekiel16:20 “ ‘Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:21 Nĩwathĩnjire ciana ciakwa ũgĩciruta igongona harĩ mĩhianano ĩyo.
Ezekiel16:22 Mĩtugo-inĩ yaku yothe ĩrĩ magigi ĩrĩa wekire
Ezekiel16:23 “ ‘Hĩ
Ezekiel16:24 nĩweyakĩire kĩhumbu
Ezekiel16:25 Gĩturi-inĩ kĩa o njĩra nĩweyakĩire mahooero matũũgĩru
Ezekiel16:26 Nĩwahũũrire ũmaraya na andũ a Misiri arĩa mwariganĩtie nao
Ezekiel16:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩgũtambũrũkĩria guoko ngĩgũũkĩrĩra
Ezekiel16:28 Nĩwahũũrire ũmaraya na andũ a Ashuri o nao
Ezekiel16:29 Ningĩ ũgĩkĩrĩrĩria gũtharia o nginya ũgĩkinya Babuloni
Ezekiel16:30 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:31 Rĩrĩa weyakĩire ihumbu gĩturi-inĩ kĩa o njĩra
Ezekiel16:32 “ ‘Wee mũtumia ũyũ mũtharia! Wee wendaga ageni handũ ha mũthuuriguo!
Ezekiel16:33 Mũmaraya o wothe nĩamũkagĩra irĩhi
Ezekiel16:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio wee ndũtariĩ ta arĩa angĩ ũmaraya-inĩ waku; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkwĩringagĩrĩria ũmwĩtĩkĩre. Wee-rĩ
Ezekiel16:35 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel16:36 Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Tondũ nĩwaitangire ũtonga waku
Ezekiel16:37 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũcookanĩrĩria endwa aku othe arĩa wanekenia nao
Ezekiel16:38 Nĩngagũtuĩra ciira o ta ũrĩa andũ-a-nja arĩa matharagia na arĩa maitithagia thakame matuuagĩrwo; na ndũme ũkorwo nĩ mangʼũrĩ makwa na ũiguĩrwo ũiru nĩguo ũcookererwo nĩ thakame ĩyo.
Ezekiel16:39 Ningĩ nĩngakũneana moko-inĩ ma endwa aku
Ezekiel16:40 Nĩmakarehe kĩrĩndĩ gĩgũũkĩrĩre
Ezekiel16:41 Nĩmagacina nyũmba ciaku na makũherithie wĩroreirwo nĩ andũ-a-nja aingĩ. Nĩngakinyia ũmaraya waku mũthia
Ezekiel16:42 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mathũgũta makwa ma gũgũũkĩrĩra nĩmakahũahũa
Ezekiel16:43 “ ‘Na tondũ ndwaririkanire matukũ ma ũnini waku
Ezekiel16:44 “ ‘Mũndũ o wothe waragia na thimo-rĩ
Ezekiel16:45 Wee ũrĩ mwarĩ wa nyũkwa kũna
Ezekiel16:46 Mwarĩ wa nyũkwa ũrĩa mũkũrũ aarĩ Samaria ũrĩa watũũraga mwena waku wa gathigathini marĩ na airĩtu ake; nake mwarĩ wa nyũkwa ũrĩa mũnini aarĩ Sodomu
Ezekiel16:47 Wee-rĩ
Ezekiel16:48 Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa Niĩ ndũũraga muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel16:49 “ ‘Maya nĩmo maarĩ mehia ma mwarĩ wa nyũkwa Sodomu: We marĩ na airĩtu ake maarĩ andũ etĩĩi
Ezekiel16:50 Nĩmeĩkĩrĩire na magĩĩka maũndũ marĩ magigi maitho-inĩ makwa. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndamaingatire
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria ndehirie nuthu ya mehia marĩa wee wehirie. Wee wĩkĩte maũndũ marĩ magigi maingĩ kũmakĩra
Ezekiel16:52 Ũrokĩrĩrĩria gũconorithio
Ezekiel16:53 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:54 nĩguo ũigue thoni na ũconoke nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio mothe wekire nĩ ũndũ wa kũmahe ũhurũko.
Ezekiel16:55 Nao aarĩ acio a maitũguo
Ezekiel16:56 O na ndũngĩagwetire rĩĩtwa rĩa mwarĩ wa nyũkwa Sodomu mũthenya ũcio wetĩĩaga
Ezekiel16:57 mbere ya waganu waku kũguũrio. O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Ezekiel16:58 Wee nĩwe ũgaacookererwo nĩ maciaro ma ũũra-thoni waku
Ezekiel16:59 “ ‘Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Nĩngagwĩka o ta ũrĩa wagĩrĩire nĩ gwĩkwo
Ezekiel16:60 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:61 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkaririkana mĩthiĩre yaku
Ezekiel16:62 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngahaanda kĩrĩkanĩro giitũ nawe

Ezekiel17:6 naguo ũkĩringũra

Ezekiel17:14 nĩguo ũthamaki ũcio wagithio hinya
Ezekiel17:15 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:16 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo
Ezekiel17:17 Firaũni hamwe na mbũtũ yake ya hinya ya ita o na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ
Ezekiel17:18 Nĩanyararire mwĩhĩtwa ũcio na ũndũ wa gũthũkia kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu. Tondũ nĩanyiitanĩire na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu
Ezekiel17:19 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo
Ezekiel17:20 Nĩngamũtambũrũkĩria wabu wakwa
Ezekiel17:21 Nacio mbũtũ ciake cia thigari ciothe iria ikoora nĩikooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel17:22 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Niĩ mwene nĩngatua karũhonge kuuma gacũmbĩrĩ ka mũtarakwa ndĩkahaande. Ngaatua karũhonge koororo ka mũthunano kuuma gacũmbĩrĩ kaguo
Ezekiel17:23 Kũu kĩrĩma-igũrũ gĩa Isiraeli nĩkuo ngakahaanda; nĩgakaruta honge na gaciare maciaro
Ezekiel17:24 Mĩtĩ yothe ya mũgũnda nĩĩkamenya atĩ niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ nyiihagia mũtĩ ũrĩa mũraihu na ngatũma mũtĩ ũrĩa mũkuhĩ ũkũre ũraihe. Nĩnyũmagia mũtĩ ũrĩa mũruru
Ezekiel18:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel18:2 “Inyuĩ andũ aya
Ezekiel18:3 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel18:4 Nĩgũkorwo roho o wothe ũrĩ muoyo nĩ wakwa; roho wa ithe nĩ wakwa o na wa mũriũ no wakwa. Roho ũrĩa wĩhagia nĩguo ũgaakua.
Ezekiel18:5 “Mũndũ aahota gũkorwo nĩ mũthingu
Ezekiel18:6 We ndarĩĩaga irio iria irutagĩrwo mahooero-inĩ marĩa marĩ irĩma igũrũ
Ezekiel18:7 Ndahinyagĩrĩria mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Ezekiel18:8 Ningĩ ndakombanagĩra nĩguo etie uumithio ũtarĩ wa kĩhooto
Ezekiel18:9 Mũndũ ũcio nĩarũmagĩrĩra watho wakwa wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo
Ezekiel18:10 “Mũndũ ũcio angĩkorwo arĩ na mwanake mũtunyani
Ezekiel18:11 (o na harĩa ithe ateekire ũndũ o na ũmwe wa mo): “We nĩarĩĩaga irio iria irutĩirwo mahooero-inĩ marĩa marĩ irĩma-igũrũ. Nĩathũkagia mũtumia wa mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ.
Ezekiel18:12 Nĩahinyagĩrĩria mũthĩĩni na mũbatari. Nĩatunyanaga indo. Ndacookagia kĩrĩa oete gĩa kũrũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ. Nĩatiiragĩra mĩhianano maitho. Nĩekaga maũndũ marĩa marĩ magigi.
Ezekiel18:13 We nĩakombanagĩra nĩguo etie uumithio ũtarĩ wa kĩhooto
Ezekiel18:14 “No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:15 “We ndarĩĩaga irio iria irutĩirwo mahooero-inĩ marĩa marĩ irĩma igũrũ
Ezekiel18:16 Ndahinyagĩrĩria mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Ezekiel18:17 Nĩarigagĩrĩria guoko gwake gũtikehie
Ezekiel18:18 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:19 “No inyuĩ mũũragia atĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:20 Roho ũrĩa wĩhagia nĩguo ũgaakua. Mwana ndakagaya waganu wa ithe
Ezekiel18:21 “No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:22 Gũtirĩ ihĩtia o na rĩmwe rĩa marĩa aaneka rĩgaacooka kũririkanwo. Tondũ wa maũndũ ma ũthingu marĩa ekĩte-rĩ
Ezekiel18:23 Mwathani Jehova ekũũria atĩrĩ: Anga niĩ nĩngenagio nĩ gĩkuũ kĩa andũ arĩa aaganu? Githĩ ti kwenda ingĩenda magarũrũke matigane na mĩthiĩre ĩyo yao nĩguo matũũre muoyo?
Ezekiel18:24 “No angĩkorwo mũndũ mũthingu no agarũrũke atigane na ũthingu wake
Ezekiel18:25 “No inyuĩ muugaga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:26 Mũndũ mũthingu angĩgarũrũka atigane na ũthingu wake ehie
Ezekiel18:27 No mũndũ mwaganu angĩgarũrũka atigane na waganu ũrĩa ekĩte
Ezekiel18:28 Nĩ ũndũ nĩeciiragia ũhoro wa mahĩtia make mothe marĩa aneeka
Ezekiel18:29 No andũ a nyũmba ĩno ya Isiraeli mekuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:30 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel18:31 Tiganai na waganu wothe ũrĩa mwĩkĩte
Ezekiel18:32 Nĩgũkorwo ndikenagio nĩ gĩkuũ kĩa mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Ezekiel19:1 “Ningĩ ambĩrĩria macakaya makoniĩ athamaki a Isiraeli
Ezekiel19:2 ũmeere atĩrĩ: “ ‘Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel19:3 Warerire kĩana kĩmwe kĩaguo
Ezekiel19:4 Nacio ndũrĩrĩ ikĩigua ũhoro waguo
Ezekiel19:5 “ ‘Na rĩrĩa nyina ya mũrũũthi ũcio yoonire mwĩhoko wayo ndũnahinga
Ezekiel19:6 Naguo ũgĩcangacanga gatagatĩ ka mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa ĩngĩ
Ezekiel19:7 Nĩwamomorire ciĩhitho ciao iria nũmu
Ezekiel19:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Ezekiel19:9 Makĩũguucũrũria na icũhĩ cia maniũrũ
Ezekiel19:10 “ ‘Maitũguo aatariĩ ta mũthabibũ ũhaandĩtwo thĩinĩ wa mũgũnda waku wa mĩthabibũ hakuhĩ na maaĩ; nĩwaciarĩte mũno

Ezekiel20:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa mũgwanja
Ezekiel20:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩkĩnginyĩrĩra ngĩĩrwo atĩrĩ:
Ezekiel20:3 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel20:4 “Nĩũkũmatuĩra ciira? Nĩũkũmatuĩra ciira
Ezekiel20:5 ũmeere atĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:6 Mũthenya ũcio ndehĩtire ngĩmeera atĩ nĩngamaruta bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel20:7 Na niĩ ngĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:8 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:9 No ngĩĩka ũndũ
Ezekiel20:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndaamatongoririe ngĩmaruta bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel20:11 Nĩndamaheire kĩrĩra kĩa watho wakwa wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo na ngĩmamenyithia mawatho makwa
Ezekiel20:12 Ngĩcooka ngĩmahe Thabatũ ciakwa irĩ kĩmenyithia gatagatĩ gakwa nao
Ezekiel20:13 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:14 No ngĩĩka ũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Ezekiel20:15 Ningĩ nĩndehĩtire njoete guoko na igũrũ o kũu werũ-inĩ
Ezekiel20:16 Ndeekire ũguo tondũ nĩmaregire mawatho makwa
Ezekiel20:17 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:18 Nĩnderire ciana ciao irĩ kũu werũ-inĩ atĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:19 Niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu; rũmagĩrĩrai kĩrĩra kĩa watho wakwa wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo
Ezekiel20:20 Ikaragiai Thabatũ ciakwa irĩ theru
Ezekiel20:21 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:22 No nĩndagirĩrĩirie guoko gwakwa
Ezekiel20:23 Ningĩ nĩndehĩtire harĩo njoete guoko na igũrũ kũu werũ-inĩ
Ezekiel20:24 tondũ matiathĩkĩire mawatho makwa
Ezekiel20:25 Ngĩcooka ngĩmarekereria irĩra-inĩ iria itaarĩ njega
Ezekiel20:26 nĩndarekire mathaahio nĩ ũndũ wa iheo ciao
Ezekiel20:27 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel20:28 Rĩrĩa ndaamareehire bũrũri ũrĩa ndeehĩtire atĩ nĩngamahe
Ezekiel20:29 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩmooria atĩrĩ: Gĩtũmi gĩa kũndũ kũu gũtũũgĩru mũthiiaga nĩ kĩĩ?’ ” (Nakuo gwĩtagwo Bama nginya ũmũthĩ.)
Ezekiel20:30 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ĩra andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli atĩrĩ: ‘Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Anga nĩmũgwĩthaahia o ta ũrĩa maithe manyu meekire
Ezekiel20:31 Rĩrĩa mũkũruta iheo cianyu
Ezekiel20:32 “ ‘Inyuĩ mugaga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:33 Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo
Ezekiel20:34 Nĩngamũruta ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ na guoko kũrĩ hinya
Ezekiel20:35 Nĩngamũrehe werũ-inĩ wa ndũrĩrĩ
Ezekiel20:36 O ta ũrĩa ndaatuĩrĩire maithe manyu ciira kũu werũ-inĩ wa bũrũri wa Misiri-rĩ
Ezekiel20:37 Nĩngamũrũmbũiya ngĩmũhĩtũkĩria rungu rwa rũthanju rwakwa
Ezekiel20:38 Nĩngamũtheria
Ezekiel20:39 “ ‘No inyuĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli-rĩ
Ezekiel20:40 Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Nĩgũkorwo kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩakwa gĩtheru
Ezekiel20:41 Nĩngamwĩtĩkĩra ta mũrĩ ũbumba ũrĩ na mũtararĩko mwega
Ezekiel20:42 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Ezekiel20:43 Mũrĩ kũu nĩmũkaririkana mĩtugo yanyu na ciĩko ciothe iria mwĩthaahĩtie nacio
Ezekiel20:44 Nĩmũkamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Ezekiel20:45 Ningĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩkĩnginyĩrĩra
Ezekiel20:46 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel20:47 Ĩra mũtitũ ũcio wa mwena wa gũthini atĩrĩ: ‘Igua kiugo kĩa Jehova. Ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Ndĩ hakuhĩ gwakia mwaki thĩinĩ waku
Ezekiel20:48 Mũndũ o wothe nĩakoona atĩ niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ ndĩwakĩtie; ndũkahoreka.’ ”
Ezekiel20:49 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngiuga atĩrĩ

Ezekiel21:9 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ

Ezekiel21:21 Nĩgũkorwo mũthamaki wa Babuloni akaarũgama maahũkanĩro ma njĩra ĩyo
Ezekiel21:22 Guoko-inĩ gwake kwa ũrĩo
Ezekiel21:23 Ũndũ ũcio nĩũkoneka ta ũtarĩ wa ma kũrĩ andũ arĩa mehĩtĩte atĩ nĩmarĩmwathĩkagĩra

Ezekiel21:28 “Nawe mũrũ wa mũndũ

Ezekiel22:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel22:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel22:3 ũrĩĩre atĩrĩ
Ezekiel22:4 nĩũhĩtĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa thakame ĩrĩa ũitĩte
Ezekiel22:5 Andũ arĩa marĩ gũkuhĩ na arĩa marĩ kũraya nĩmagakũnyũrũragia
Ezekiel22:6 “ ‘Ta rora ũrĩa o ũmwe wa athamaki a Isiraeli arĩa marĩ thĩinĩ waku ahũthagĩra hinya wake ũũru agĩitithia thakame.
Ezekiel22:7 Nĩmagithĩtie ithe wa ciana o na nyina gĩtĩĩo marĩ kũu thĩinĩ waku; na marĩ thĩinĩ waku nĩmahinyĩrĩirie ageni na makanyariira mwana ũrĩa ũkuĩrĩirwo nĩ ithe
Ezekiel22:8 Wee-rĩ
Ezekiel22:9 Kũu thĩinĩ waku nĩ kũrĩ andũ maiganagĩrĩra igenyo
Ezekiel22:10 Nĩ kũrĩ andũ thĩinĩ waku mataheaga ũrĩrĩ wa maithe mao gĩtĩĩo; na thĩinĩ waku nĩ kũrĩ andũ mathũkagia atumia nĩ ũndũ wa gũthiĩ nao mahinda-inĩ mao ma mweri
Ezekiel22:11 Kũu thĩinĩ waku nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ wĩkaga maũndũ marĩ magigi na mũtumia wa mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
Ezekiel22:12 Andũ maamũkagĩra mahaki marĩ thĩinĩ waku nĩguo maite thakame; wee ũrĩ mũrĩa-ngʼũũrũ
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Ti-itherũ nĩngahũũra hĩ nĩ ũndũ wa uumithio ũcio wonete ũtarĩ wa kĩhooto
Ezekiel22:14 Mũthenya ũrĩa ngaakũherithia-rĩ ũmĩrĩru waku nĩũgetiiria
Ezekiel22:15 Nĩngakũharaganĩria ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Ezekiel22:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wee ũgaakorwo ũthaahĩte maitho-inĩ ma ndũrĩrĩ
Ezekiel22:17 Ningĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩkĩnginyĩrĩra
Ezekiel22:18 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel22:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Tondũ inyuothe nĩmũtuĩkĩte gĩko kĩrĩa gĩtigaraga rĩrĩa cuuma ĩratherio na mwaki wa ũturi
Ezekiel22:20 O ta ũrĩa andũ macookanagĩrĩria betha
Ezekiel22:21 Nĩngamũcookanĩrĩria na ndĩmũhurutĩre na mangʼũrĩ makwa mahiũ
Ezekiel22:22 O ta ũrĩa betha ĩtwekagĩrio icua-inĩ rĩa mwaki
Ezekiel22:23 O rĩngĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel22:24 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel22:25 Nĩ kũrĩ na ndundu ya gũũkanĩrĩra ya anene akuo marĩ thĩinĩ waguo
Ezekiel22:26 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai akuo mahũthagĩra hinya makiuna watho wakwa
Ezekiel22:27 Anene akuo arĩa marĩ kuo matariĩ ta njũũi igĩtambuura kĩrĩa inyiitĩte; maitaga thakame na makooraga andũ
Ezekiel22:28 Anabii akuo mamahakagĩra ciĩko icio coka mwerũ
Ezekiel22:29 Andũ a bũrũri ũcio mahũthagĩra ũhahanyi na ũtunyani; mahinyagĩrĩria athĩĩni na abatari
Ezekiel22:30 “Ndaacaririe mũndũ thĩinĩ wao ũngĩaka rũthingo na arũgame mbere yakwa mwanya-inĩ
Ezekiel22:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngamaitĩrĩria mangʼũrĩ makwa
Ezekiel23:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel23:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel23:3 Nĩmatuĩkire ahũũri maraya kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel23:4 Ũrĩa mũkũrũ eetagwo Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohola nĩahũũraga ũmaraya o na arĩ wakwa; nake nĩeriragĩria endwa ake
Ezekiel23:6 mehumbĩte nguo cia rangi wa bururu
Ezekiel23:7 Nĩeneanire ta mũmaraya harĩ andũ othe arĩa atĩĩku thĩinĩ wa Ashuri
Ezekiel23:8 Ndaatiganire na ũmaraya ũcio aambĩrĩirie arĩ bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel23:9 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩmũneana harĩ endwa ake
Ezekiel23:10 Nĩmamũrutire nguo
Ezekiel23:11 “Mwarĩ wa nyina Oholiba nĩeyoneire maũndũ macio
Ezekiel23:12 O nake nĩeriragĩria andũ a Ashuri
Ezekiel23:13 Nĩndonire atĩ o nake nĩethaahĩtie; eerĩ maathiiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩhaanaine.
Ezekiel23:14 “No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel23:15 meeohete mĩcibi njohero na iremba mĩtwe icunjuurĩte; othe monekaga mahaana ta atwarithia a ngaari cia mbarathi cia ita a Babuloni
Ezekiel23:16 O rĩrĩa aamoonire
Ezekiel23:17 Ningĩ andũ a Babuloni magĩũka kũrĩ we
Ezekiel23:18 Rĩrĩa aathiire na mbere na ũmaraya wake atekũhitha
Ezekiel23:19 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel23:20 Arĩ kũu
Ezekiel23:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũkĩĩrirĩria ũũra-thoni wa wĩthĩ waku
Ezekiel23:22 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel23:23 andũ a Babuloni na Akalidei othe
Ezekiel23:24 Nĩmagagũũkĩrĩra marĩ na matharaita
Ezekiel23:25 Nĩngerekeria marakara makwa ndĩ na ũiru ngũũkĩrĩre
Ezekiel23:26 Ningĩ nĩmagakũruta nguo na makuue mathaga maku marĩa mega.
Ezekiel23:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩnganiina ũũra-thoni na ũmaraya ũrĩa wee waambĩrĩirie ũrĩ kũu bũrũri wa Misiri. Ndũkarora maũndũ macio ũmerirĩrie
Ezekiel23:28 “Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkũneana kũrĩ acio ũthũire
Ezekiel23:29 Magaakũherithia marĩ na rũthũũro
Ezekiel23:30 nĩcio ikũreheire maũndũ macio
Ezekiel23:31 Wee ũrũmĩrĩire mĩthiĩre ya mwarĩ wa nyũkwa; nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngakũnengera gĩkombe gĩake ũkĩnyiite na guoko gwaku.
Ezekiel23:32 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “Wee ũkaanyuĩra gĩkombe kĩa mwarĩ wa nyũkwa
Ezekiel23:33 Wee nĩũkaiyũrwo nĩ ũrĩĩu na kĩeha
Ezekiel23:34 Ũgaakĩnyuĩra na ũkĩinĩkĩrĩre; ũgaakĩringithia thĩ
Ezekiel23:35 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Kuona atĩ wee nĩũriganĩirwo nĩ niĩ na ũkanjikia na thuutha waku
Ezekiel23:36 Jehova aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ: Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel23:37 nĩgũkorwo nĩmatharĩtie
Ezekiel23:38 O na ningĩ ũndũ ũngĩ manjĩkĩte nĩ ũyũ: Ihinda o rĩu nĩmathaahirie handũ-hakwa-harĩa-haamũre
Ezekiel23:39 Mũthenya o ro ũcio maarutire ciana ciao igongona kũrĩ mĩhianano yao-rĩ
Ezekiel23:40 “O na ningĩ magĩtũmanĩra arũme arĩa mookire kuuma kũraya
Ezekiel23:41 Ningĩ mũgĩikarĩra ũrĩrĩ warĩtwo na ũkagemio mũno
Ezekiel23:42 “Nake nĩarigiicĩirio nĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ kĩanegenaga gĩtekũmaka; andũ a Sabea makĩrehwo kuuma werũ-inĩ
Ezekiel23:43 Ningĩ ngĩaria ũhoro wa ũcio waniinĩtwo hinya nĩ ũtharia
Ezekiel23:44 Nao magĩkoma nake. O ta ũrĩa arũme makomaga na mũmaraya
Ezekiel23:45 No andũ arĩa athingu nĩmakamaherithia na iherithia rĩa andũ-a-nja arĩa matharagia na magaitithia thakame
Ezekiel23:46 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Mareherei kĩrĩndĩ kĩmookĩrĩre
Ezekiel23:47 Kĩrĩndĩ kĩu nĩgĩkamahũũra na mahiga nyuguto na kĩmatemange na hiũ ciao cia njora; gĩkooraga aanake na airĩtu ao
Ezekiel23:48 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩnganiina ũũra-thoni kũu bũrũri ũcio nĩguo andũ-a-nja othe makaanio
Ezekiel23:49 Inyuĩ nĩmũkaherithio nĩ ũndũ wa ũũra-thoni wanyu
Ezekiel24:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa kenda
Ezekiel24:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel24:3 Arĩria andũ aya a nyũmba ĩno nemi na ngerekano
Ezekiel24:4 Ĩkĩra icunjĩ cia nyama thĩinĩ wayo
Ezekiel24:5 oya nyamũ ĩrĩa njega mũno rũũru-inĩ. Igĩrĩra ngũ rungu rwayo nĩ ũndũ wa mahĩndĩ; reke ĩtherũke
Ezekiel24:6 “ ‘Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “ ‘Kaĩ itũũra rĩu inene rĩitithagia thakame rĩrĩ na haro-ĩ
Ezekiel24:7 “ ‘Nĩgũkorwo thakame ĩrĩa rĩitithĩtie ĩrĩ o thĩinĩ warĩo: Rĩamĩitire o kũu rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga itheri; rĩtiamĩitire tĩĩri-inĩ
Ezekiel24:8 Nĩgeetha njarahũre mangʼũrĩ na ndĩĩrĩhĩrie-rĩ
Ezekiel24:9 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel24:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio iganĩrĩra ngũ
Ezekiel24:11 Ningĩ ũhagĩre nyũngũ ĩyo theri makara-inĩ
Ezekiel24:12 Nĩkĩremete njĩra ciothe; gĩkũrĩ kĩu kĩayo ti kĩrute
Ezekiel24:13 “ ‘Rĩu-rĩ
Ezekiel24:14 “ ‘Niĩ Jehova nĩnjarĩtie. Ihinda nĩikinyu njĩke ũndũ. Ndikerigĩrĩria; na ndikaiguanĩra tha kana ndĩĩricũkwo. Ũgaatuĩrwo ciira kũringana na mĩtugo yaku
Ezekiel24:15 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel24:16 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel24:17 Caaya ũkirĩte; tiga kũrĩrĩra ũcio ũkuĩte. Ikara wĩohete kĩremba mũtwe na wĩkĩrĩte iraatũ magũrũ; ndũkehumbĩre kanua kana ũrĩe irio cia mũtugo wa hĩndĩ ya macakaya.”
Ezekiel24:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩrooka kwarĩria andũ rũciinĩ
Ezekiel24:19 Nao andũ acio makĩnjũũria atĩrĩ
Ezekiel24:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ezekiel24:21 Ĩra andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Ezekiel24:22 Na inyuĩ nĩmũgeeka o ta ũguo niĩ njĩkĩte. Mũtikehumbĩra kanua kana mũrĩe irio cia mũtugo wa hĩndĩ ya macakaya.
Ezekiel24:23 Nĩmũgaikara mwĩohete iremba mĩtwe na mwĩkĩrĩte iraatũ magũrũ. Mũtigacakaya kana mũrĩre
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekieli agaatuĩka rũũri harĩ inyuĩ; mũgeeka o ta ũguo we ekĩte. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maũndũ macio mageekĩka-rĩ
Ezekiel24:25 “Nawe mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel24:26 mũthenya ũcio mũndũ ũũrĩte kwao nĩagakũrehera ũhoro.
Ezekiel24:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kanua gaku nĩgagatumũka; nĩũkaria nake
Ezekiel25:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire ngĩĩrwo atĩrĩ:
Ezekiel25:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel25:3 Meere atĩrĩ
Ezekiel25:4 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũmũneana kũrĩ andũ a kũu irathĩro mũtuĩke kĩndũ kĩao. Nĩmagaaka kambĩ ciikaro ciao na mambe hema ciao
Ezekiel25:5 Nĩngagarũra Raba gũtuĩke ũrĩithio wa ngamĩĩra
Ezekiel25:6 Nĩgũkorwo ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Tondũ inyuĩ nĩmũhũũrĩte hĩ na mũkaringithia makinya manyu thĩ
Ezekiel25:7 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngamũtambũrũkĩria guoko gwakwa
Ezekiel25:8 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Tondũ Moabi na Seiru moigire atĩrĩ
Ezekiel25:9 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngaguũria rũbaru rwa Moabi
Ezekiel25:10 Nĩnganeana Moabi hamwe na Aamoni moko-inĩ ma andũ a Irathĩro matuĩke indo ciao
Ezekiel25:11 na niĩ nĩngaherithia Moabi. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.’ ”
Ezekiel25:12 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Tondũ Edomu nĩerĩhĩirie harĩ nyũmba ya Juda na agĩtuĩka mũhĩtia mũno nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
Ezekiel25:13 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Nĩngatambũrũkia guoko gwakwa njũkĩrĩre Edomu na njũrage andũ akuo na mahiũ mao. Nĩngakwananga
Ezekiel25:14 Nĩngerĩhĩria harĩ Edomu na guoko kwa andũ akwa Isiraeli
Ezekiel25:15 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ; ‘Tondũ Afilisti nĩmekire maũndũ ma kwĩrĩhĩria
Ezekiel25:16 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Ngirie gũtambũrũkia guoko gwakwa njũkĩrĩre Afilisti
Ezekiel25:17 Nĩngerĩhĩria harĩo na rĩĩrĩhĩria inene na ndĩmaherithie ndĩ na mangʼũrĩ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Ezekiel26:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe
Ezekiel26:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel26:3 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Nĩngũgũũkĩrĩra wee Turo
Ezekiel26:4 Nĩmakananga thingo cia Turo
Ezekiel26:5 Kũu iria-inĩ gũgaatuĩka kũndũ gwa gũtambũrũkĩria nga cia gũtega thamaki
Ezekiel26:6 nakuo kũndũ kwarĩo kũrĩa gũtũũragwo kũu bũrũri-thĩinĩ nĩgũkaniinwo na rũhiũ rwa njora. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.
Ezekiel26:7 “Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Kuuma mwena wa gathigathini nĩngarehe Nebukadinezaru
Ezekiel26:8 Nĩakananga kũndũ gwaku gwa gũtũũrwo kũu bũrũri-inĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel26:9 Nĩakoonereria nditi ya mĩgogo amomore thingo ciaku
Ezekiel26:10 Mbarathi ciake igaakorwo irĩ nyingĩ ũũ atĩ nĩigagũthika na rũkũngũ. Thingo ciaku nĩikainaina nĩ ũndũ wa inegene rĩa mbarathi cia mbaara
Ezekiel26:11 Mahũngũ ma mbarathi ciake nĩmakaranga njĩra ciaku ciothe; nĩakooraga andũ aku na rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel26:12 Nĩmagagũtaha ũtonga waku na magũtunye indo ciaku cia wonjoria; nĩmakamomora thingo ciaku na matharie nyũmba ciaku iria njega
Ezekiel26:13 Nĩngakinyia inegene rĩa nyĩmbo ciaku mũthia
Ezekiel26:14 Nĩngatũma ũtuĩke rwaro rwa ihiga itheri
Ezekiel26:15 “Mwathani Jehova ekwĩra Turo atĩrĩ: Mabũrũri marĩa marĩ ndwere-inĩ cia iria githĩ matikainaina nĩ mũrurumo wa kũgũa gwaku
Ezekiel26:16 Ningĩ anene othe arĩa marĩ ndwere-inĩ cia iria nĩmakehera itĩ-inĩ ciao cia ũnene
Ezekiel26:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakoerera icakaya rĩgũkoniĩ
Ezekiel26:18 Rĩu-rĩ
Ezekiel26:19 “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngaatũma ũtuĩke itũũra inene rĩtiganĩirio
Ezekiel26:20 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo ngaagũikũrũkia hamwe na arĩa maikũrũkagio irima-inĩ harĩ andũ arĩa a tene. Nĩngatũma ũtũũre mũhuro wa thĩ
Ezekiel26:21 Nĩngatũma ũrĩkĩrĩrie na kĩmako kĩnene
Ezekiel27:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel27:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel27:3 Ĩra Turo
Ezekiel27:4 Wathani waku warĩ o kũu iria gatagatĩ; aaki aku nĩo maatũmire ũthaka waku ũkinyanĩre.
Ezekiel27:5 Maagũthondekeire mbaũ ciaku ciothe na mĩkarakaba kuuma Seniru; nĩmooire mĩtarakwa ya kuuma Lebanoni nĩguo magũthondekere mũtĩ wa kĩbebero.
Ezekiel27:6 Nayo mĩtĩ ya gũtwarithia marikabu makĩmĩthondeka na mĩgandi kuuma Bashani; nacio mbaũ cia mĩthithinda cioimĩte ndwere-inĩ cia iria rĩa Kitimu
Ezekiel27:7 Taama mwega wa gatani ũrĩa mũgemie wa kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri nĩguo warĩ gĩtama gĩaku gĩa gũtwara marikabu
Ezekiel27:8 Andũ a Sidoni na Arivadi nĩo maatwarithagia marikabu ciaku; nao andũ aku arĩa oogĩ
Ezekiel27:9 Mabundi arĩa akũrũ a Gebali nĩo maarutaga wĩra wa gũthinga mĩanya kũu marikabu-inĩ. Marikabu ciothe cia iria-inĩ na atwarithia a cio mookĩte kũu nĩguo mũthogorane nao indo ciaku.
Ezekiel27:10 “ ‘Andũ a Perisia
Ezekiel27:11 Andũ a Arivadi na Heleki nĩo maarangagĩra thingo ciaku mĩena yothe; nao andũ a Gamadi nĩo maakoragwo marĩ mĩthiringo-inĩ yaku ĩrĩa mĩraihu na igũrũ. Maacuuragia ngo ciao gũthiũrũrũkĩria thingo ciaku; magĩtũma ũthaka waku ũkinyanĩre.
Ezekiel27:12 “ ‘Andũ a Tarishishi nĩmarutithanirie wĩra wa wonjoria nawe nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa warĩ na ũtonga mũnene wa indo; nĩmakũũranagia indo ciaku cia wonjoria na betha
Ezekiel27:13 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Javani
Ezekiel27:14 “ ‘Andũ a Bethi-Togarima nĩmakũũranagia indo ciaku cia wonjoria na mbarathi cia wĩra
Ezekiel27:15 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Dedani nĩmoonjorithanagia nawe
Ezekiel27:16 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Suriata nĩmarutithanirie wĩra wa wonjoria nawe tondũ wa indo ciaku kũingĩha; nĩmakũũranirie indo ciaku cia wonjoria na tũhiga twa thumarati
Ezekiel27:17 “ ‘Juda na Isiraeli nĩmoonjorithanagia nawe; magĩkũũrania indo ciaku cia wonjoria na ngano ya kuuma Minithu
Ezekiel27:18 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Dameski
Ezekiel27:19 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Avedani
Ezekiel27:20 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Dedani nĩo mwonjorithanagia nao matandĩko ma mbarathi.
Ezekiel27:21 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Arabia na anene othe a Kedari maarĩ agũri a indo ciaku; nĩmarutithanirie wĩra wa wonjoria nawe wa tũgondu
Ezekiel27:22 “ ‘Nao onjoria a kuuma Sheba na Rama nĩmoonjorithanagia nawe; nĩ ũndũ indo ciaku cia wonjoria maacikũũranagia na indo iria njega mũno cia mĩthemba yothe ya mahuti manungi wega
Ezekiel27:23 “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Harani
Ezekiel27:24 Kũu ndũnyũ-inĩ yaku-rĩ
Ezekiel27:25 “ ‘Marikabu cia Tarishishi nĩcio igũkuuagĩra indo ciaku cia wonjoria. Ũiyũrĩrĩirio mĩrigo mĩritũ o kũu iria gatagatĩ.
Ezekiel27:26 Andũ aku arĩa matwarithagia marikabu magũtwaraga maria-inĩ gatagatĩ. No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel27:27 Ũtonga waku
Ezekiel27:28 Mabũrũri marĩa mariganĩtie na iria nĩmagathingitha hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aruti wĩra aku a marikabu-inĩ magaakaya.
Ezekiel27:29 Arĩa othe mahutanagia na mĩiko ya gũtwarithia marikabu nĩmagatiganĩria marikabu ciao; thigari cia iria-inĩ na arĩa othe marutaga wĩra marikabu-inĩ makaarũgama hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria.
Ezekiel27:30 Makaanĩrĩra
Ezekiel27:31 Makenja mĩtwe yao nĩ ũndũ waku
Ezekiel27:32 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo maragirĩka magĩgũcakayagĩra-rĩ
Ezekiel27:33 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa indo ciaku cia wonjoria ciatwaragwo iria-inĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel27:34 Rĩu nĩwanangĩtwo nĩ iria o kũu maaĩ-inĩ marĩa mariku; nĩũtoonyereire hamwe na indo ciaku cia wonjoria
Ezekiel27:35 Arĩa othe matũũraga mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa marĩ ndwere-inĩ cia iria nĩmamakĩte nĩ ũndũ waku; athamaki ao mainainaga nĩ kũmaka
Ezekiel27:36 Nao onjoria marĩ gatagatĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ nĩmarakũnyũrũria; nĩũkinyĩte mũthia wa kũguoyohithania

Ezekiel28:4 Tondũ wa ũũgĩ waku na ũmenyo waku
Ezekiel28:5 Tondũ wa ũmenyi waku mũnene wa wonjoria
Ezekiel28:6 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “ ‘Tondũ wĩciiragia ũrĩ mũũgĩ
Ezekiel28:7 nĩngũkũrehithĩria andũ a kũngĩ magũũkĩrĩre
Ezekiel28:8 Nĩmagagũikũrũkia magũkinyie irima-inĩ
Ezekiel28:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkoiga atĩ
Ezekiel28:10 Ũgaakua gĩkuũ ta kĩa andũ arĩa mataruaga

Ezekiel28:12 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel28:13 Wee watũũrĩte Edeni
Ezekiel28:14 Waitĩrĩirio maguta ũtuĩke ta kerubi mũgitanĩri
Ezekiel28:15 Ndwarĩ na ũcuuke mĩthiĩre-inĩ yaku
Ezekiel28:16 Tondũ wa wonjoria waku kũingĩha
Ezekiel28:17 Ngoro yaku nĩyanyiitirwo nĩ mwĩtĩĩo nĩ ũndũ wa ũthaka waku
Ezekiel28:18 Nĩ ũndũ wa mehia maku maingĩ na wonjoria ũtarĩ wa ma
Ezekiel28:19 Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe iria ciakũũĩ
Ezekiel28:20 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel28:21 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ

Ezekiel28:23 Nĩngarĩrehithĩria mũthiro
Ezekiel28:24 “ ‘Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ andũ a Isiraeli makaagĩa na thũ mariganĩtie nacio
Ezekiel28:25 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngaacookanĩrĩria andũ a Isiraeli moime ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ kũrĩa maahurunjirwo
Ezekiel28:26 Magaatũũra kuo marĩ agitĩre
Ezekiel29:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel29:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel29:3 Mwarĩrie ũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Ezekiel29:4 No nĩngagwĩkĩra ndwano thĩa-inĩ ciaku
Ezekiel29:5 Nĩngagũtiga werũ-inĩ
Ezekiel29:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa othe matũũraga bũrũri wa Misiri nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova. “ ‘Wee ũkoretwo ũrĩ mũthĩgi wa kamũrangi wa gũtiira nyũmba ya Isiraeli.
Ezekiel29:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakũnyiitire na moko mao-rĩ
Ezekiel29:8 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Nĩngakũrehithĩria rũhiũ rwa njora rũgũũkĩrĩre na rũũrage andũ aku na mahiũ mao.
Ezekiel29:9 Misiri gũgaatuĩka bũrũri mũtiganĩrie
Ezekiel29:10 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũgũũkĩrĩra na njũkĩrĩre tũrũũĩ twaku
Ezekiel29:11 Gũtirĩ ikinya rĩa mũndũ kana rĩa nyamũ rĩgaatuĩkanĩria kuo; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgaatũũra kuo ihinda rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
Ezekiel29:12 Nĩngatũma bũrũri wa Misiri ũkire ihooru gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mabũrũri marĩa manangĩku
Ezekiel29:13 “ ‘No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel29:14 Nao andũ arĩa maatahĩtwo a Misiri nĩngamacookia bũrũri wa Pathirosi
Ezekiel29:15 Ũgaakorwo wĩnyiihĩtie gũkĩra mothamaki mothe
Ezekiel29:16 Bũrũri wa Misiri ndũgacooka gũtuĩka mwĩhoko wa andũ a Isiraeli
Ezekiel29:17 Mwaka-inĩ wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja
Ezekiel29:18 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel29:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Nĩngũneana bũrũri wa Misiri harĩ Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni

Ezekiel30:1 Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire
Ezekiel30:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel30:3 Nĩgũkorwo mũthenya ũcio nĩũkuhĩrĩirie
Ezekiel30:4 Rũhiũ rwa njora nĩrũgookĩrĩra bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel30:5 Andũ a Kushi na Putu
Ezekiel30:6 “ ‘Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “ ‘Arata a Misiri nĩmakooragwo
Ezekiel30:7 “ ‘Nĩmagakira ihooru
Ezekiel30:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova
Ezekiel30:9 “ ‘Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ
Ezekiel30:10 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “ ‘Nĩnganiina kĩrĩndĩ kĩa Misiri
Ezekiel30:11 We na mbũtũ ciake cia ita
Ezekiel30:12 Nĩngatũma tũrũũĩ tuothe twa Rũũĩ rwa Nili tũhwe
Ezekiel30:13 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “ ‘Nĩngathũkangia ngai cia mĩhianano na niine mĩhiano ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Nofu. Gũtigacooka kũgĩa mũthamaki kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel30:14 O nakuo Pathirosi nĩngakwananga
Ezekiel30:15 O nakuo Pelusiumu nĩngagũitĩrĩria mangʼũrĩ makwa
Ezekiel30:16 Nĩngagwatia mwaki kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel30:17 Aanake a Heliopoli na a Bubasiti makooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Ezekiel30:18 Mũthenya nĩũkagĩa nduma kũu Tehafunehasu rĩrĩa ngoinanga icooki rĩa Misiri; kũu nĩkuo hinya wake ũcio etĩĩaga naguo ũgaathirĩra. Nĩakahumbĩrwo nĩ matu
Ezekiel30:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngaherithia bũrũri wa Misiri
Ezekiel30:20 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe
Ezekiel30:21 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel30:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel30:23 Nĩngahurunja andũ a Misiri ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Ezekiel30:24 Nĩngekĩra moko ma mũthamaki wa Babuloni hinya
Ezekiel30:25 Nĩngekĩra moko ma mũthamaki wa Babuloni hinya
Ezekiel30:26 Nĩngahurunja andũ a Misiri ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Ezekiel31:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel31:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel31:3 Cũrania ũhoro wa bũrũri wa Ashuri
Ezekiel31:4 Wakũragio nĩ maaĩ
Ezekiel31:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũraiha gũkĩra mĩtĩ yothe ya gĩthaka; mathĩgĩ maguo makĩongerereka
Ezekiel31:6 Nyoni ciothe cia rĩera-inĩ igĩaka itara mathĩgĩ-inĩ maguo
Ezekiel31:7 Ũthaka waguo warĩ mũkaru
Ezekiel31:8 Mĩtarakwa ĩrĩa yarĩ mũgũnda wa Ngai ndĩngĩaigananire naguo
Ezekiel31:9 Nĩ niĩ ndaũthakarĩtie na honge nyingĩ
Ezekiel31:10 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Kuona atĩ nĩwaraihĩte na igũrũ
Ezekiel31:11 nĩndaũneanire kũrĩ mwathi wa ndũrĩrĩ
Ezekiel31:12 naruo rũrĩrĩ rũtarĩ tha o na hanini
Ezekiel31:13 Nyoni ciothe cia rĩera-inĩ igĩtũũra mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio wagwĩte
Ezekiel31:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gũtirĩ mĩtĩ ĩngĩ ĩrĩ kũu gũkuhĩ na maaĩ ĩgaacooka gwĩtĩĩa nĩ ũndũ wa kũraiha na igũrũ
Ezekiel31:15 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Mũthenya ũrĩa mũtĩ ũcio waikũrũkirio mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Ezekiel31:16 Nĩndatũmire ndũrĩrĩ ciinainio nĩ mũrurumo waguo ũkĩgũa rĩrĩa ndaũikũrũkirie mbĩrĩra-inĩ hamwe na arĩa maikũrũkaga kũu irima. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mĩtĩ yothe ya Edeni
Ezekiel31:17 Arĩa othe maatũũraga kĩĩruru-inĩ kĩaguo
Ezekiel31:18 “ ‘Nĩ mũtĩ ũrĩkũ harĩ mĩtĩ ya Edeni ũngĩgerekanio nawe ũhoro-inĩ ũkoniĩ riiri na ũnene? No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel32:1 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel32:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel32:3 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “ ‘Nĩngagũikĩria wabu wakwa
Ezekiel32:4 Nĩngagũikia kũu bũrũri-inĩ
Ezekiel32:5 Nĩngaragania nyama ciaku irĩma igũrũ
Ezekiel32:6 Nĩngaiyũria thĩ na thakame yaku ĩyo ĩratherera o nginya irĩma-inĩ
Ezekiel32:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngaakũhuhũkia-rĩ
Ezekiel32:8 Motheri mothe marĩa maaraga marĩ igũrũ nĩngatũma magũtuĩkĩre nduma; nĩngaiyũria bũrũri waku nduma
Ezekiel32:9 Nĩngathĩĩnia ngoro cia andũ aingĩ
Ezekiel32:10 Nĩngatũma ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ imakio nĩwe
Ezekiel32:11 “ ‘Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “ ‘Rũhiũ rwa njora rwa mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩrũgagũũkĩrĩra.
Ezekiel32:12 Nĩngatũma kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku kĩũragwo na hiũ cia njora cia andũ arĩa marĩ hinya
Ezekiel32:13 Nĩnganiina mahiũ mao mothe marĩa marĩ ndwere-inĩ cia maaĩ maingĩ
Ezekiel32:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngatũma maaĩ makuo mahoorere
Ezekiel32:15 Rĩrĩa ngaatũma bũrũri wa Misiri ũkire ihooru
Ezekiel32:16 “Macio nĩmo macakaya marĩa makaamũcakaĩra. O nao airĩtu a ndũrĩrĩ magaacakaya o ũguo; ũguo nĩguo magaacakaĩra bũrũri wa Misiri na kĩrĩndĩ gĩakuo
Ezekiel32:17 Mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel32:18 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel32:19 Moorie atĩrĩ: ‘Inyuĩ mũrĩ ende gũkĩra arĩa angĩ? Ikũrũkai mũgakomio hamwe na arĩa mataruĩte.’
Ezekiel32:20 Nao makaagũa hamwe na arĩa maanooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora. Rũhiũ rwa njora nĩrũcomore; rekei akururio arĩ hamwe na kĩrĩndĩ gĩake gĩothe.
Ezekiel32:21 Kuuma kũu thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra
Ezekiel32:22 “Ashuri arĩ kũu hamwe na mbũtũ ciake ciothe cia ita; arigiicĩirio nĩ mbĩrĩra cia arĩa ake othe maanooragwo
Ezekiel32:23 Mbĩrĩra ciao irĩ irima kũrĩa kũriku
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu arĩ o kũu
Ezekiel32:25 Nĩarĩirwo ũrĩrĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka arĩa maanakua
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki na Tubali marĩ kũu

Ezekiel33:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ

Ezekiel33:4 hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ wothe ũrĩa ũkaigua karumbeta kau no aage kwĩhũga
Ezekiel33:5 Kuona atĩ nĩaiguire mũgambo wa karumbeta na akĩaga kwĩhũga-rĩ
Ezekiel33:6 No rĩrĩ

Ezekiel33:11 Meere ũũ
Ezekiel33:12 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio

Ezekiel33:14 Ningĩ ingĩĩra mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu atĩrĩ
Ezekiel33:15 angĩcookia kĩrĩa ooete gĩa kũrũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ
Ezekiel33:16 Gũtirĩ rĩĩhia o na rĩmwe ekĩte rĩgaacooka kũririkanwo nĩguo orio. Nĩekĩte maũndũ marĩa marĩ ma kĩhooto na magĩrĩire; ti-itherũ nĩagatũũra muoyo.
Ezekiel33:17 “No andũ anyu moigaga atĩrĩ

Ezekiel34:4 Inyuĩ mũtiĩkĩrĩte iria hinyaru hinya
Ezekiel34:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ciahurunjũkire tondũ itiarĩ na mũrĩithi
Ezekiel34:6 Ngʼondu ciakwa ciorũũrire kũu irĩma-inĩ guothe o na tũrĩma-igũrũ. Ciahurunjirwo thĩ yothe
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio

Ezekiel34:12 O ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi amenyagĩrĩra rũũru rwake rũrĩa rũhurunjũkĩte rĩrĩa arĩ hamwe naruo-rĩ
Ezekiel34:13 Nĩngaciruta ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Ezekiel34:14 Nĩngacirĩithagia kũrĩa kũrĩ na ũrĩithio mwega
Ezekiel34:15 Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel34:16 Nĩngacaria iria ciũrĩte
Ezekiel34:17 “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “Ha ũhoro wanyu inyuĩ rũũru rwakwa-rĩ
Ezekiel34:18 Anga ti ũndũ mũiganu harĩ inyuĩ kũrĩa kũu ũrĩithio-inĩ ũcio mwega? Ningĩ no nginya mũrangĩrĩrie ũrĩithio ũcio ũngĩ wanyu na makinya? Anga ti ũndũ mũiganu harĩ inyuĩ kũnyua maaĩ makembu? No nginya mũcooke munjuge maaĩ macio mangĩ na makinya manyu?
Ezekiel34:19 No nginya rũũru rwakwa rũrĩĩage kĩrĩa mũrangĩrĩirie
Ezekiel34:20 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel34:21 Tondũ mũcithinĩkanagia na rwere
Ezekiel34:22 nĩngahonokia rũũru rwakwa
Ezekiel34:23 Nĩngaciarahũrĩra mũrĩithi ũmwe
Ezekiel34:24 Niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ ngaatuĩka Ngai wacio
Ezekiel34:25 “ ‘Nĩngathondeka kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa thayũ nacio
Ezekiel34:26 Nĩngacirathima na ndaathime kũrĩa gũthiũrũkĩirie kĩrĩma gĩakwa. Nĩngoiragia mbura hĩndĩ ya kĩmera yakinya; nĩgũkaagĩa mbura ya kĩrathimo.
Ezekiel34:27 Mĩtĩ ya mũgũnda nĩĩgaciaraga maciaro mayo
Ezekiel34:28 Matigacooka gũtahwo nĩ ndũrĩrĩ
