Micah5:1 Thagathaga mbũtũ ciaku cia mbaara
Micah5:2 “No rĩrĩ
Micah5:3 Tondũ ũcio
Micah5:4 Nĩagookĩra arĩithie rũũru rwa mbũri ciake arĩ na hinya wa Jehova
Micah5:5 Nake nĩagatuĩka thayũ wao. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ashuri makaahithũkĩra bũrũri witũ
Micah5:6 Nĩmagaatha bũrũri wa Ashuri na rũhiũ rwa njora; maathe bũrũri wa Nimurodi na hiũ cia njora icomoretwo. Nĩagatũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ Aashuri hĩndĩ ĩrĩa magaatharĩkĩra bũrũri witũ na matuĩkanĩirie mĩhaka-inĩ iitũ.
Micah5:7 Matigari ma Jakubu magaatuĩka ta ime riumĩte harĩ Jehova gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ
Micah5:8 Matigari ma Jakubu magaakoragwo gatagatĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ
Micah5:9 Guoko gwaku nĩgũkambarario na igũrũ kuonanie ũhootani harĩ thũ ciaku
Micah5:10 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Micah5:11 Nĩngananga matũũra marĩa manene ma bũrũri wanyu
Micah5:12 Nĩngananga ũgo wanyu
Micah5:13 Nĩngananga mĩhianano yanyu ya gwacũhio
Micah5:14 Itugĩ cia Ashera iria mũrĩ nacio nĩngacimunya na momore matũũra manyu manene.
Micah5:15 Nĩngerĩhĩria ndĩ na marakara na mangʼũrĩ kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ iria itanjathĩkagĩra.”
Micah6:1 Ta thikĩrĩriai ũrĩa Jehova ekuuga: “Ũkĩrai mwĩciirĩrĩre mbere ya irĩma; mũreke tũrĩma tũigue ũrĩa mũkuuga.
Micah6:2 Inyuĩ irĩma ici
Micah6:3 “Andũ akwa
Micah6:4 Ndaamũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri
Micah6:5 Andũ akwa
Micah6:6 Nĩ kĩĩ ingĩtwara mbere ya Jehova
Micah6:7 Anga Jehova no akenio nĩ ndũrũme ngiri nyingĩ
Micah6:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Micah6:9 Ta thikĩrĩriai! Jehova nĩaretana kũu itũũra inene
Micah6:10 Wee nyũmba ya waganu-rĩ
Micah6:11 No njuge mũndũ ndehĩtie akĩhũthagĩra ratiri itarĩ cia ma
Micah6:12 Itonga ciakuo nĩ cia ngũĩ; andũ akuo nĩ a maheeni
Micah6:13 Tondũ ũcio
Micah6:14 Mũrĩrĩĩaga irio na mũtihũũne
Micah6:15 Mũrĩhaandaga no mũtikaagetha; mũrĩĩhihaga ndamaiyũ no mũtikehaka maguta ma cio; mũrĩĩhihaga thabibũ no mũtikanyua ndibei yacio.
Micah6:16 Nĩmũrũmĩrĩire irĩra cia watho wa Omuri na mĩtugo yothe ya nyũmba ya Ahabu
Micah7:1 Hĩ
Micah7:2 Andũ arĩa eetigĩri Ngai nĩmathirĩte bũrũri‑inĩ
Micah7:3 Mahũthagĩra moko mao meerĩ gwĩka ũũru; mũtongoria etagia iheo na hinya
Micah7:4 Ũrĩa mwega mũno wao ahaana ta congʼe
Micah7:5 Ndũkanehoke mũndũ wa itũũra; ndũkanehoke o na mũrataguo. Menyerera ciugo cia kanua gaku

Micah7:12 Mũthenya ũcio

Micah7:14 Rĩithia andũ aku na mũthĩgi waku

Micah7:16 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩikoona na iconoke
Micah7:17 Igaacũnaga rũkũngũ ta nyoka

Nahum1:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Nineve. Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo ibuku rĩa kĩoneki kĩa Nahumu
Nahum1:2 Jehova nĩ Mũrungu ũrĩ ũiru na mwĩrĩhĩria; Jehova nĩerĩhagĩria na akaiyũrwo nĩ mangʼũrĩ. Jehova nĩerĩhagĩria harĩ thũ ciake
Nahum1:3 Jehova ndahiũhaga kũrakara na nĩarĩ hinya mũnene; Jehova ndakaaga kũherithia mũndũ mwaganu. Njĩra yake ĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa rũhuho rũnene na thĩinĩ wa kĩhuhũkanio
Nahum1:4 Akũũmaga iria
Nahum1:5 Irĩma ithingithaga mbere yake
Nahum1:6 Nũũ ũngĩĩtiiria mathirĩ make? Nũũ ũngĩkĩũmĩrĩria marakara make mahiũ? Mangʼũrĩ make-rĩ
Nahum1:7 Jehova nĩ mwega
Nahum1:8 no rĩrĩ
Nahum1:9 Ũrĩa wothe magaaciirĩra gwĩka Jehova-rĩ
Nahum1:10 Makaarigiicwo mĩigua-inĩ na marĩĩo nĩ ndibei yao; nao magaacinwo ta maragara momũ.
Nahum1:11 Nĩ harĩ ũmwe wĩyumĩrĩtie thĩinĩ waku wee Nineve
Nahum1:12 Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “O na aakorwo marĩ na arata
Nahum1:13 Na rĩrĩ
Nahum1:14 Jehova nĩarutĩte watho ũgũkoniĩ
Nahum1:15 Ta cũthĩrĩriai kũũrĩa irĩma-igũrũ
Nahum2:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
Nahum2:2 Jehova nĩagacookeria Jakubu riiri wake
Nahum2:3 Ngo cia thigari ciake nĩ cia rangi mũtune
Nahum2:4 Ngaari cia ita iraguthũka ituĩkanĩirie njĩra cia itũũra
Nahum2:5 Acookanĩrĩirie mbũtũ cia thigari iria njamba
Nahum2:6 Hingĩrĩrio cia rũũĩ nĩ hingũre
Nahum2:7 Nĩ gwathanĩtwo itũũra rĩu inene rĩtahwo na rĩthaamio. Ngombo ciarĩo cia airĩtu iragirĩka na mĩgambo ta ya ndutura
Nahum2:8 Nineve kũhaana ta ndia
Nahum2:9 Tahai betha! Tahai thahabu! Ũtonga ũrĩa ũrĩ igĩĩna-inĩ ciao ciothe ndũngĩthira!
Nahum2:10 Nineve nĩgũtahe
Nahum2:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
Nahum2:12 Mũrũũthi wa njamba nĩwatambuurĩire ciana ciaguo nyama cia gũciigana
Nahum2:13 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ
Nahum3:1 Kaĩ itũũra inene rĩa Nineve rĩrĩa rĩitaga thakame rĩrĩ na haaro-ĩ! Itũũra rĩu rĩiyũrĩtwo nĩ maheeni na indo cia ũtunyani
Nahum3:2 Rĩ na mwanũko wa mĩcaarica
Nahum3:3 Thigari cia mbarathi irahithũka
Nahum3:4 maũndũ maya mothe marekĩka nĩ ũndũ wa ũingĩ wa merirĩria ma mũmaraya
Nahum3:5 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ
Nahum3:6 Ngũgũikĩria gĩko kĩrĩ magigi
Nahum3:7 Arĩa othe magaakuona nĩmakoora makiugaga atĩrĩ
Nahum3:8 Wee-rĩ
Nahum3:9 Kushi na Misiri nĩcio ciarĩ hinya warĩo ũtangĩathirire; Putu na Lubimu maarĩ amwe a thiritũ narĩo.
Nahum3:10 No rĩrĩ
Nahum3:11 Wee nawe nĩũkarĩĩo
Nahum3:12 Ciĩhitho ciaku nũmu ciothe ihaana ta mĩtĩ ya mĩkũyũ
Nahum3:13 Tarora
Nahum3:14 Taha maaĩ ũige
Nahum3:15 Kũu nĩkuo mwaki ũgaakũniinĩra
Nahum3:16 Onjoria aku ũmaingĩhĩtie
Nahum3:17 Arangĩri aku matariĩ ta ngigĩ
Nahum3:18 Atĩrĩrĩ
Nahum3:19 Kĩronda gĩaku gĩtingĩhona; nguraro yaku nĩ ya gũkũũraga. Mũndũ o wothe ũiguĩte ũhoro waku arahũũra hĩ tondũ nĩũgwĩte
Habakkuk1:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire mũnabii Habakuku.
Habakkuk1:2 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Habakkuk1:3 Ũtũmaga ndĩrorere wagi wa kĩhooto nĩkĩ? Ũkiragĩrĩria maũndũ mooru nĩkĩ? Mwanangĩko na haaro irĩ mbere yakwa; kũrĩ na njũgitano
Habakkuk1:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Habakkuk1:5 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Habakkuk1:6 Nĩngwarahũra andũ a Babuloni
Habakkuk1:7 Nĩ andũ a kũmakania
Habakkuk1:8 Mbarathi ciao irĩ ihenya gũkĩra ngarĩ
Habakkuk1:9 othe mokaga mehaarĩirie kũruta haaro. Thigari icio ciao nyingĩ mũno ithiiaga ihaatĩte ta rũhuho rwa werũ-inĩ
Habakkuk1:10 Manyararaga athamaki
Habakkuk1:11 Ningĩ mahĩtũkagĩra kuo na ihenya o ta rũhuho mathiĩte na mbere: andũ maagararaga watho
Habakkuk1:12 Wee Jehova-rĩ
Habakkuk1:13 Maitho maku nĩ matheru mũno
Habakkuk1:14 Ũtuĩte andũ ta thamaki cia iria
Habakkuk1:15 Thũ ĩyo njaganu ĩmaguucagia othe na ndwano
Habakkuk1:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Habakkuk1:17 Ĩĩgũtũũra ĩtahaga na wabu wayo
Habakkuk2:1 Nĩngũrũgama handũ hakwa ha kũrangĩra
Habakkuk2:2 Nake Jehova akĩnjookeria atĩrĩ
Habakkuk2:3 Nĩgũkorwo ũguũrio ũyũ wetereire ihinda rĩrĩa rĩtuĩtwo; waragia ũhoro wa matukũ ma mũthia
Habakkuk2:4 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Habakkuk2:5 ti-itherũ
Habakkuk2:6 “Githĩ andũ othe matikamũthekerera makĩmũnyũrũragia
Habakkuk2:7 Andũ arĩa ũrĩ na thiirĩ wao githĩ matigagũũkĩrĩra o rĩmwe? Githĩ matikaarahũka
Habakkuk2:8 Tondũ nĩũtahĩte ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ indo ciao
Habakkuk2:9 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wakaga wathani wake
Habakkuk2:10 Wee wanaciirĩra kũniinwo kwa ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ
Habakkuk2:11 Mahiga ma rũthingo nĩmakanĩrĩra
Habakkuk2:12 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wakithagia itũũra inene na ũiti wa thakame
Habakkuk2:13 Githĩ Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ndatuĩte atĩ wĩra wa andũ no ngũ cia gwakĩrĩria mwaki
Habakkuk2:14 Nĩgũkorwo thĩ nĩĩkaiyũrwo nĩ ũmenyo wa riiri wa Jehova
Habakkuk2:15 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũheaga andũ a itũũra rĩake njoohi
Habakkuk2:16 Ũkaiyũrwo nĩ thoni
Habakkuk2:17 Haaro ĩrĩa ũrutĩire Lebanoni-rĩ
Habakkuk2:18 “Mũhianano mũicũhie nĩ wa bata ũrĩkũ mũndũ aarĩkia kũwacũhia? O naguo mũhianano wa gũtwekio ũrĩa ũtũmaga andũ maheeneke nĩ wa bata ũrĩkũ? Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa ũũthondekaga ehokaga kĩrĩa ombĩte; athondekaga mĩhianano ĩtaaragia.
Habakkuk2:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩraga rũbaũ atĩrĩ
Habakkuk2:20 No rĩrĩ
Habakkuk3:1 Rĩrĩ nĩ ihooya rĩa mũnabii Habakuku
Habakkuk3:2 Atĩrĩrĩ Jehova
Habakkuk3:3 Ngai ookire oimĩte Temani
Habakkuk3:4 Ũkengi wake wahaanaga ta riũa rĩkĩratha; mĩrũri yahenũkaga kuuma guoko-inĩ gwake

Zechariah8:5 Njĩra cia itũũra rĩu inene ikaiyũra tũhĩĩ na tũirĩtu tũgĩthaaka.”
Zechariah8:6 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũndũ ũcio no woneke ũrĩ wa magegania nĩ matigari ma andũ acio
Zechariah8:7 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Nĩngahonokia andũ akwa kuuma mabũrũri ma mwena wa irathĩro na wa ithũĩro.
Zechariah8:8 Nĩngamacookia matũũre Jerusalemu; nao magaatuĩka andũ akwa na niĩ nduĩke Ngai wao wa kwĩhokeka na mũthingu.”
Zechariah8:9 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Inyuĩ arĩa mũraigua ciugo ici ciaririo nĩ anabii arĩa maarĩ kuo rĩrĩa mũthingi wa nyũmba ya Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe wahaandirwo-rĩ
Zechariah8:10 Mbere ya hĩndĩ ĩyo gũtiarĩ irĩhi rĩa mũndũ kana rĩa nyamũ. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩarutire wĩra wake na thayũ nĩ ũndũ wa thũ ciake
Zechariah8:11 No rĩrĩ
Zechariah8:12 “Mbeũ nĩĩgakũra wega
Zechariah8:13 O ta ũrĩa mũkoretwo mũkĩonwo ta mũrĩ arume mũrĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ
Zechariah8:14 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “O ta ũrĩa ndaatuĩte atĩ nĩngũmũrehere mwanangĩko
Zechariah8:15 “nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩu nĩnduĩte nĩngwĩka Jerusalemu na Juda maũndũ mega rĩngĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tigai gwĩtigĩra.
Zechariah8:16 Maya nĩmo maũndũ marĩa mũgwĩka: aranagĩriai ũhoro wa ma mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Zechariah8:17 mũtikanaciirĩre gwĩka mũndũ wa itũũra rĩanyu ũũru
Zechariah8:18 Ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩyanginyĩrire rĩngĩ
Zechariah8:19 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Mahinda ma kwĩhinga kũrĩa irio mweri wa kana
Zechariah8:20 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Andũ aingĩ na atũũri a matũũra maingĩ manene nĩ magooka
Zechariah8:21 nao atũũri a itũũra rĩmwe inene magaathiĩ itũũra rĩngĩ inene moige atĩrĩ
Zechariah8:22 Irĩndĩ na ndũrĩrĩ irĩ hinya nĩ igooka Jerusalemu kũrongooria Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe na kũmũthaitha.”
Zechariah8:23 Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Matukũ-inĩ macio andũ ikũmi kuuma thiomi-inĩ ciothe na ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ ciothe nĩmakanyiita Mũyahudi ũmwe

Zechariah9:2 na ĩgakinyĩrĩra Hamathu o nakuo
Zechariah9:3 Andũ a Turo nĩmeyakĩire kĩĩgitĩro kĩrũmu
Zechariah9:4 No rĩrĩ

Zechariah9:7 Nĩngaruta thakame tũnua-inĩ twao
Zechariah9:8 Na rĩrĩ
Zechariah9:9 Kena mũno

Zechariah9:11 No ha ũhoro waku-rĩ
Zechariah9:12 Cookai kĩĩhitho-inĩ kĩanyu kĩrĩa kĩrũmu
Zechariah9:13 Ngaagonya Juda o taarĩ ũta wakwa
Zechariah9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehova nĩakoonwo arĩ igũrũ rĩao; mũguĩ wake ũkaarathũka ta rũheni. Mwathani Jehova nĩakahuha karumbeta; agaathiĩ arĩ ihuhũkanio-inĩ cia mwena wa gũthini
Zechariah9:15 nake Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩakamagitĩra. Nao makaamaniina biũ

Matthew1:4 nake Ramu aarĩ ithe wa Aminadabu
Matthew1:5 nake Salimoni aarĩ ithe wa Boazu

Matthew1:7 nake Solomoni aarĩ ithe wa Rehoboamu
Matthew1:8 nake Asa aarĩ ithe wa Jehoshafatu
Matthew1:9 nake Uzia aarĩ ithe wa Jothamu

Matthew1:12 Thuutha wa gũtahwo

Matthew1:14 nake Azoro aarĩ ithe wa Zadoku
Matthew1:15 nake Eliudi aarĩ ithe wa Eleazaru
Matthew1:16 nake Jakubu aarĩ ithe wa Jusufu

Matthew1:18 Ũhoro wa gũciarwo kwa Jesũ Kristũ watariĩ ũũ: Nyina Mariamu nĩ oorĩtio nĩ Jusufu atuĩke mũtumia wake

Matthew1:22 Na rĩrĩ

Matthew1:25 No matiigana kũmenyana nginya rĩrĩa aaciarire mwana ũcio wa kahĩĩ. Nake Jusufu agĩtua mwana ũcio Jesũ.

Matthew2:5 Makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ

Matthew2:11 Nao magĩtoonya nyũmba

Matthew2:13 Maarĩkia gũthiĩ-rĩ
Matthew2:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ

Matthew2:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũhoro ũrĩa waarĩtio na kanua ka mũnabii Jeremia ũkĩhinga
Matthew2:18 “Mũgambo nĩwaiguirwo kũu Rama
Matthew2:19 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew2:20 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew2:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew2:22 Rĩrĩa aiguire atĩ Arikelau nĩwe wathamakaga Judea handũ ha ithe Herode
Matthew2:23 agĩthiĩ gũtũũra itũũra rĩĩtagwo Nazarethi. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũhoro ũrĩa waarĩtio na tũnua twa anabii ũkĩhinga
Matthew3:1 Matukũ-inĩ macio Johana ũrĩa Mũbatithania nĩokire
Matthew3:2 akiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew3:3 Ũyũ nĩwe ũrĩa ũhoro wake waarĩtio nĩ mũnabii Isaia rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ: “Kũrĩ na mũgambo wa mũndũ ũkwanĩrĩra werũ-inĩ
Matthew3:4 Johana eekagĩra Nguo ya guoya wa ngamĩĩra
Matthew3:5 Nao andũ nĩmathiiaga kũrĩ we moimĩte Jerusalemu
Matthew3:6 Moimbũraga mehia mao
Matthew3:7 Na rĩrĩa oonire Afarisai na Asadukai aingĩ magĩũka hau nĩgeetha amabatithie
Matthew3:8 Ciarai maciaro maringaine na kwĩrira.
Matthew3:9 Na mũtikeĩĩre na ngoro cianyu atĩrĩ
Matthew3:10 Ithanwa nĩrĩige itina-inĩ cia mĩtĩ
Matthew3:11 “Niĩ ndĩmũbatithagia na maaĩ mwerira. No thuutha wakwa nĩgũgũũka mũndũ ũngĩ ũrĩ na hinya kũrĩ niĩ
Matthew3:12 Gĩtarũrũ gĩake akĩnyiitĩte na guoko
Matthew3:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akiuma Galili agĩthiĩ Rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Jorodani akabatithio nĩ Johana.
Matthew3:14 Nowe Johana akĩgeria kũmũgiria
Matthew3:15 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew3:16 Jesũ aarĩkia kũbatithio o ũguo-rĩ
Matthew3:17 Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma igũrũ
Matthew4:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ nĩatongoririo nĩ Roho agĩtwarwo werũ-inĩ akagerio nĩ mũcukani.
Matthew4:2 Na aniina mĩthenya mĩrongo ĩna
Matthew4:3 Nake mũgerania akĩmũkora
Matthew4:4 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew4:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũcukani akĩmũtwara itũũra rĩrĩa itheru
Matthew4:6 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew4:7 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew4:8 Ningĩ mũcukani akĩmũtwara kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩraaya mũno
Matthew4:9 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew4:10 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew4:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũcukani akĩmũtiga
Matthew4:12 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire atĩ Johana nĩaikĩtio njeera-rĩ
Matthew4:13 Akiuma Nazarethi
Matthew4:14 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa waarĩtio na kanua ka mũnabii Isaia ũhinge
Matthew4:15 “Bũrũri wa Zebuluni
Matthew4:16 andũ arĩa matũũraga nduma-inĩ nĩmonete ũtheri mũnene; nao arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũrĩ kĩĩruru gĩa gĩkuũ-rĩ
Matthew4:17 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kũhunjia ũhoro akiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew4:18 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aaceeraga hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Iria rĩa Galili
Matthew4:19 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew4:20 Nao o rĩmwe magĩtiganĩria neti ciao
Matthew4:21 Na aathiathia akĩona andũ angĩ eerĩ a nyina ũmwe
Matthew4:22 na o rĩmwe magĩtiganĩria gatarũ na magĩtiga ithe wao
Matthew4:23 No rĩrĩ
Matthew4:24 Nayo ngumo yake ĩkĩhunjio bũrũri wothe wa Suriata
Matthew4:25 Nao andũ aingĩ mũno kuuma Galili
Matthew5:1 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire andũ aingĩ mũno-rĩ
Matthew5:2 Nake akĩambĩrĩria kũmaruta ũhoro
Matthew5:3 “Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:4 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:5 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:6 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:7 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:8 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:9 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:10 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:11 “Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew5:12 Kenai na mũcanjamũke
Matthew5:13 “Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ cumbĩ wa thĩ. No cumbĩ ũngĩkorwo nĩũthirĩte mũcamo waguo-rĩ
Matthew5:14 “Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ ũtheri wa thĩ. Itũũra inene rĩakĩtwo kĩrĩma igũrũ rĩtingĩhithĩka.
Matthew5:15 O na ningĩ andũ matiakagia tawa magacooka kũũkunĩkĩra na mbakũri; handũ ha ũguo
Matthew5:16 O ũguo naguo
Matthew5:17 “Mũtikae gwĩciiria njũkĩte kweheria Watho kana Mohoro ma Anabii; ndiũkĩte kũmeeheria
Matthew5:18 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew5:19 Ũrĩa wothe ũkoina rĩathani o na rĩmwe rĩa marĩa manini
Matthew5:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:21 “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ hĩndĩ ya tene andũ nĩmerirwo atĩrĩ
Matthew5:22 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:23 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew5:24 tiga kĩheo gĩaku o hau mbere ya kĩgongona. Amba ũthiĩ ũkaiguane na mũrũ wa thoguo; ũcooke ũũke ũrutĩre Ngai kĩheo gĩaku.
Matthew5:25 “Hiũha kwĩiguithania na thũ yaku ĩrĩa ĩragũtwara igooti-inĩ. Ĩka ũguo mũrĩ o njĩra-inĩ
Matthew5:26 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew5:27 “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ hĩndĩ ya tene nĩ kwerirwo atĩrĩ
Matthew5:28 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:29 Riitho rĩaku rĩa ũrĩo rĩngĩtũma wĩhie-rĩ
Matthew5:30 Na guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo kũngĩtũma wĩhie-rĩ
Matthew5:31 “Ningĩ nĩ kwĩrĩtwo atĩrĩ
Matthew5:32 No ngũmwĩra atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũtiganaga na mũtumia wake
Matthew5:33 “Ningĩ
Matthew5:34 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: Mũtikanehĩte o na atĩa; mũtikanehĩte na igũrũ tondũ nĩkuo gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩa Ngai;
Matthew5:35 kana mwĩhĩte na thĩ
Matthew5:36 Na ndũkanehĩte na mũtwe waku
Matthew5:37 Reke ‘Ĩĩ’ yaku ĩtuĩke ‘Ĩĩ’
Matthew5:38 “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ hĩndĩ ya tene nĩ kwerirwo atĩrĩ: ‘Riitho rĩrĩhagwo na riitho
Matthew5:39 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: Mũtikanagiane na mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru. No rĩrĩ
Matthew5:40 Na mũndũ angĩenda gũgũthitanga oe kanjũ yaku-rĩ
Matthew5:41 Mũndũ angĩkũhatĩrĩria ũthiĩ itĩĩna rĩmwe-rĩ
Matthew5:42 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩkũhooya kĩndũ
Matthew5:43 “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ hĩndĩ ya tene nĩ kwerirwo atĩrĩ
Matthew5:44 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: Endagai thũ cianyu
Matthew5:45 nĩgeetha mũtuĩke ariũ a Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ. Atũmaga riũa rĩake rĩrathĩre arĩa ooru na arĩa ega
Matthew5:46 Angĩkorwo mwendete o arĩa mamwendete-rĩ
Matthew5:47 Na ningĩ angĩkorwo mũgeithagia o ariũ na aarĩ a ithe wanyu-rĩ
Matthew5:48 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew6:1 “Mwĩmenyererei mũtigekage ciĩko cianyu cia ũthingu mbere ya andũ nĩguo mamuone. Mũngĩĩka ũguo-rĩ
Matthew6:2 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew6:3 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkũheana kĩndũ kũrĩ arĩa abatari-rĩ
Matthew6:4 nĩgeetha ũheani ũcio waku ũtuĩke wa hitho-inĩ. Nake Ithe wanyu
Matthew6:5 “Na rĩrĩa mũkũhooya-rĩ
Matthew6:6 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkũhooya
Matthew6:7 Na ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkũhooya-rĩ
Matthew6:8 Mũtigatuĩke tao
Matthew6:9 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhooyaga atĩrĩ: “ ‘Ithe witũ ũrĩ igũrũ
Matthew6:10 ũthamaki waku nĩũũke
Matthew6:11 Tũhe ũmũthĩ irio ciitũ cia gũtũigana.
Matthew6:12 Na ũtũrekere mahĩtia maitũ
Matthew6:13 Na ndũgatũtware magerio-inĩ
Matthew6:14 Nĩgũkorwo mũngĩrekera andũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mamũhĩtĩria
Matthew6:15 No mũngĩaga kũrekera andũ mehia mao-rĩ
Matthew6:16 “Ningĩ rĩrĩa mũkwĩhinga kũrĩa irio-rĩ
Matthew6:17 No rĩrĩa wĩhingĩte kũrĩa
Matthew6:18 nĩguo andũ matikamenye atĩ nĩwĩhingĩte kũrĩa
Matthew6:19 “Tigagai kwĩigĩra mĩthiithũ gũkũ thĩ
Matthew6:20 No mwĩigagĩrei mĩthiithũ igũrũ
Matthew6:21 Nĩgũkorwo kũrĩa mĩthiithũ yanyu ĩrĩ
Matthew6:22 “Riitho nĩrĩo tawa wa mwĩrĩ. Maitho maku mangĩkorwo marĩ mega
Matthew6:23 No rĩrĩ
Matthew6:24 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ. Nĩ ũndũ no athũũrire ũmwe
Matthew6:25 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew6:26 Ta rorai nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ; itihaandaga
Matthew6:27 Nũũ wanyu ũngĩhota kuongerera muoyo wake ithaa o na rĩmwe nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtanga?
Matthew6:28 “Na nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga mwĩtange nĩ ũndũ wa nguo? Ta rorai itoka cia gĩthaka ũrĩa ikũraga. Itirutaga wĩra kana ikogotha ndigi
Matthew6:29 no ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew6:30 Angĩkorwo ũguo nĩguo Ngai ahumbaga nyeki ya gĩthaka ĩrĩa ĩrĩ ho ũmũthĩ na rũciũ ĩgaikio mwaki-inĩ-rĩ
Matthew6:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew6:32 Nĩgũkorwo maũndũ maya mothe nĩmo macaragio nĩ andũ arĩa matetĩkĩtie Ngai. No Ithe wanyu wa igũrũ nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmũbataragio nĩmo.
Matthew6:33 No ambai mũcarie ũthamaki wake na ũthingu wake
Matthew6:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tigagai gwĩtanga nĩ ũndũ wa rũciũ
Matthew7:1 “Mũtigaciirithanagie nĩgeetha na inyuĩ mũtikanaciirithio.
Matthew7:2 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa mũtuagĩra andũ arĩa angĩ ciira
Matthew7:3 “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga wone kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩa mũrũ wa thoguo
Matthew7:4 Wahota atĩa kwĩra mũrũ wa thoguo atĩrĩ
Matthew7:5 Wee hinga ĩno
Matthew7:6 “Mũtikanahe magui kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩamũre
Matthew7:7 “Hooyai na nĩmũkũheo; mathaai na nĩmũkuona; ringaringai mũrango na nĩmũkũhingũrĩrwo.
Matthew7:8 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa wothe ũhooyaga nĩaheagwo
Matthew7:9 “Na rĩrĩ
Matthew7:10 Kana amwĩtie thamaki nake amũhe nyoka?
Matthew7:11 Angĩkorwo inyuĩ
Matthew7:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew7:13 “Toonyerai mũromo ũrĩa mũceke. Nĩgũkorwo mũromo nĩ mwariĩ na njĩra nĩ njariĩ ĩrĩa yerekeire rĩũrĩro
Matthew7:14 No mũromo nĩ mũkunderu na njĩra nĩ njeke ĩrĩa ĩkinyaga muoyo-inĩ
Matthew7:15 “Mwĩhũgagei anabii a maheeni. Mokaga kũrĩ inyuĩ mehumbĩte njũa cia ngʼondu
Matthew7:16 Nĩmũrĩmamenyaga na maciaro mao. Kaĩ thabibũ igĩtuuagwo mĩtĩ-inĩ ya mĩigua
Matthew7:17 Ũguo noguo
Matthew7:18 Mũtĩ mwega ndũngĩciara maciaro mooru
Matthew7:19 Mũtĩ o wothe ũtaciaraga maciaro mega nĩgũtemwo ũtemagwo ũgaikio mwaki-inĩ.
Matthew7:20 Ũguo nĩguo mũrĩmamenyaga nĩ ũndũ wa maciaro mao.
Matthew7:21 “To mũndũ ũrĩa ũnjĩtaga
Matthew7:22 Mũthenya ũcio aingĩ makanjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew7:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngameera wega atĩrĩ
Matthew7:24 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew7:25 Nayo mbura ĩkiura
Matthew7:26 No mũndũ o wothe ũiguaga ciugo ici ciakwa na ndekaga ũrĩa ciugĩte ahaana ta mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ũrĩa wakire nyũmba yake mũthanga igũrũ.
Matthew7:27 Nayo mbura ĩkiura
Matthew7:28 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩkirie kuuga maũndũ macio
Matthew7:29 tondũ aarutanaga ta mũndũ warĩ na ũhoti
Matthew8:1 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aikũrũkire kuuma kĩrĩma-inĩ
Matthew8:2 Na mũndũ warĩ na mangũ agĩthiĩ harĩ we
Matthew8:3 Nake Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake
Matthew8:4 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:5 Na Jesũ aarĩkia gũtoonya Kaperinaumu
Matthew8:6 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:7 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:8 No mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew8:9 Nĩgũkorwo niĩ mwene ndĩ mũndũ wathagwo
Matthew8:10 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũguo-rĩ
Matthew8:11 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:12 No arĩa marĩ a ũthamaki ũcio nĩmagaikio nja
Matthew8:13 Nake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana atĩrĩ
Matthew8:14 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyire nyũmba ya Petero
Matthew8:15 Akĩmũhutia guoko
Matthew8:16 Hwaĩ-inĩ ũcio
Matthew8:17 Ũhoro ũyũ warĩ wa kũhingia ũrĩa kwaarĩtio na kanua ka mũnabii Isaia
Matthew8:18 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire gĩkundi kĩa andũ arĩa maamũthiũrũrũkĩirie
Matthew8:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrutani ũmwe wa watho agĩũka harĩ we
Matthew8:20 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew8:21 Nake mũrutwo ũngĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:22 Nowe Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩtoonya gatarũ
Matthew8:24 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew8:25 Nao arutwo magĩthiĩ
Matthew8:26 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew8:27 Andũ acio makĩgega
Matthew8:28 Rĩrĩa aakinyire rũgongo rwa bũrũri wa Agadari-rĩ
Matthew8:29 Nao makĩanĩrĩra
Matthew8:30 Nĩ haarĩ na rũũru rũnene rwa ngũrwe rwarĩithagio handũ hataarĩ haraaya na hau maarĩ.
Matthew8:31 Nacio ndaimono igĩthaitha Jesũ
Matthew8:32 Nake agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:33 Arĩa maarĩithagia ngũrwe icio makĩũra
Matthew8:34 Hĩndĩ ĩyo itũũra rĩothe rĩkiumagara rĩgatũnge Jesũ. Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maamuonire
Matthew9:1 Nake agĩtoonya gatarũ
Matthew9:2 Andũ amwe makĩmũrehera mũndũ warĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga
Matthew9:3 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo
Matthew9:4 Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeciiragia
Matthew9:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ mũhũthũ: nĩ kwĩra mũndũ
Matthew9:6 No nĩgeetha mũmenye atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩ na ũhoti gũkũ thĩ wa kũrekanĩra mehia-rĩ … .” Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wakuĩte ciĩga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:7 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩũkĩra
Matthew9:8 Rĩrĩa kĩrĩndĩ kĩu kĩonire ũguo
Matthew9:9 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimaga kũu
Matthew9:10 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩ kwa Mathayo mũciĩ makĩrĩa irio cia hwaĩ-inĩ
Matthew9:11 Rĩrĩa Afarisai moonire ũguo
Matthew9:12 Jesũ aigua ũguo
Matthew9:13 No rĩrĩ
Matthew9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo a Johana magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew9:15 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew9:16 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtumagĩrĩra nguo ngũrũ kĩraka kĩa nguo njerũ
Matthew9:17 Ningĩ andũ matiĩkagĩra ndibei ya mũhihano mondo-inĩ ngũrũ. Mangĩĩka ũguo
Matthew9:18 Na rĩrĩa aaragia maũndũ macio
Matthew9:19 Nake Jesũ agĩũkĩra
Matthew9:20 O hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ agĩũka na thuutha wa Jesũ
Matthew9:21 Tondũ eĩĩraga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:22 Nake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra
Matthew9:23 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyire nyũmba ya mũnene ũcio
Matthew9:24 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew9:25 Thuutha wa andũ acio kuumio nja
Matthew9:26 Ũhoro ũcio ũkĩhunja bũrũri ũcio wothe.
Matthew9:27 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimire kũu
Matthew9:28 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatoonyire nyũmba
Matthew9:29 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmahutia maitho
Matthew9:30 namo maitho mao makĩhingũka magĩcooka kuona. Nake Jesũ akĩmakaania na hinya
Matthew9:31 No-o makiumagara na makĩhunjia ũhoro wake bũrũri ũcio wothe.
Matthew9:32 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moimaga hau
Matthew9:33 Nayo ndaimono yaingatwo
Matthew9:34 No Afarisai makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:35 Nake Jesũ agĩtuĩkania matũũra-inĩ mothe na mĩciĩ-inĩ yothe
Matthew9:36 Na rĩrĩa oonire ũrĩa kĩrĩndĩ kĩu kĩaiganaga
Matthew9:37 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Matthew9:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew10:1 Nake Jesũ nĩetire arutwo ake ikũmi na eerĩ moke harĩ we
Matthew10:2 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma arutwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ: Wa mbere nĩ Simoni (ũrĩa wĩtagwo Petero)
Matthew10:3 na Filipu
Matthew10:4 na Simoni ũrĩa Mũzelote
Matthew10:5 Aya ikũmi na eerĩ nĩo Jesũ aatũmire na akĩmataara ũũ: “Mũtigathiĩ kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ kana mũtoonye itũũra rĩa Asamaria.
Matthew10:6 Nĩ kaba mũthiĩ kũrĩ ngʼondu iria ciũrĩte cia Isiraeli.
Matthew10:7 Mwathiĩ-rĩ
Matthew10:8 Honagiai andũ arĩa arũaru
Matthew10:9 Mũtigekuuĩre thahabu
Matthew10:10 O na ningĩ mũtigekuuĩre mũhuko rũgendo-inĩ
Matthew10:11 “Itũũra o rĩothe kana gatũũra karĩa mũngĩtoonya-rĩ
Matthew10:12 Mwatoonya mũciĩ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew10:13 Angĩkorwo mũciĩ ũcio nĩwagĩrĩire-rĩ
Matthew10:14 Mũndũ o wothe angĩrega kũmũnyiita ũgeni kana arege gũthikĩrĩria ciugo cianyu-rĩ
Matthew10:15 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma ituĩro rĩa itũũra rĩu rĩgaakorwo rĩrĩ inene gũkĩra rĩa Sodomu na Gomora mũthenya ũrĩa wa ciira.
Matthew10:16 Atĩrĩrĩ ndamũtũma o ta ngʼondu gatagatĩ ka njũũi. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew10:17 “Mwĩmenyererei andũ; tondũ nĩmakamũneana ciama-inĩ
Matthew10:18 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro wakwa-rĩ
Matthew10:19 No rĩrĩa makaamũnyiita-rĩ
Matthew10:20 nĩgũkorwo ti inyuĩ mũgaakorwo mũkĩaria
Matthew10:21 “Mũndũ nĩagakunyanĩra mũrũ wa nyina ooragwo
Matthew10:22 Andũ othe nĩmakamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa
Matthew10:23 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwanyariirwo itũũra-inĩ rĩmwe-rĩ
Matthew10:24 “Mũrutwo ti mũnene kũrĩ mũrutani wake
Matthew10:25 Nĩkũiganĩire mũrutwo aiganane na mũrutani wake
Matthew10:26 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew10:27 Ũrĩa ngũmwĩra nduma-inĩ-rĩ
Matthew10:28 Mũtigetigĩre arĩa moragaga o mwĩrĩ
Matthew10:29 Githĩ tũnyoni twĩrĩ tũtiendagio thendi ĩmwe? No gũtirĩ o na kamwe gatuo kangĩgũa thĩ Ithe wanyu atetĩkĩrĩte.
Matthew10:30 O na njuĩrĩ cianyu cia mũtwe nĩndare.
Matthew10:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtigetigĩre; mũrĩ a bata gũkĩra tũnyoni tũingĩ.
Matthew10:32 “Ũrĩa wothe ũkaanyumbũra mbere ya andũ
Matthew10:33 No ũrĩa wothe ũkangaana mbere ya andũ
Matthew10:34 “Mũtigeciirie atĩ njũkĩte kũrehe thayũ gũkũ thĩ. Ndiokire kũrehe thayũ
Matthew10:35 Nĩgũkorwo njũkĩte gũtũma “ ‘mũndũ okanĩrĩre na ithe
Matthew10:36 thũ cia mũndũ igaakorwo irĩ andũ a nyũmba yake kĩũmbe.’
Matthew10:37 “Ũrĩa wothe wendete ithe kana nyina kũngĩra ndagĩrĩire gũtuĩka wakwa; na ũrĩa wothe wendete mũriũ kana mwarĩ kũngĩra ndagĩrĩire gũtuĩka wakwa;
Matthew10:38 nake ũrĩa wothe ũtagakuua mũtharaba wake wa kwambĩrwo aanũmĩrĩre ndagĩrĩire gũtuĩka wakwa.
Matthew10:39 Ũrĩa wothe ũgeragia gũtũũria muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo; no ũrĩa wothe ũkoorwo nĩ muoyo wake nĩ ũndũ wakwa nĩakaũtũũria.
Matthew10:40 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmwamũkagĩra
Matthew10:41 Ũrĩa wothe ũkaamũkĩra mũnabii tondũ nĩ mũnabii
Matthew10:42 Nake ũrĩa wothe ũheaga ũmwe wa aya anini o na gĩkombe kĩa maaĩ mahehu tondũ nĩ mũrutwo wakwa-rĩ
Matthew11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew11:2 Na rĩrĩa Johana aiguĩre arĩ njeera maũndũ marĩa Kristũ eekaga-rĩ
Matthew11:3 makamũũrie atĩrĩ
Matthew11:4 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew11:5 Atumumu nĩmaroona
Matthew11:6 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Matthew11:7 Rĩrĩa arutwo a Johana moimaga hau
Matthew11:8 Akorwo ti ũguo-rĩ
Matthew11:9 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona kĩ? Hihi mwathiĩte kuona mũnabii? Ĩĩ
Matthew11:10 Ũyũ nĩwe ũhoro wake waandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Nĩngũtũma mũtũmwo wakwa athiĩ mbere yaku
Matthew11:11 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma: Harĩ andũ arĩa manaciarwo nĩ andũ-a-nja
Matthew11:12 Kuuma matukũ ma Johana Mũbatithania gwata rĩu
Matthew11:13 Nĩgũkorwo Anabii othe
Matthew11:14 Na angĩkorwo no mwende kwamũkĩra ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Matthew11:15 Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ ma kũigua nĩaigue.
Matthew11:16 “Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew11:17 “ ‘Twamũhuhĩire mũtũrirũ
Matthew11:18 Nĩgũkorwo Johana ookire atekũrĩa na atekũnyua
Matthew11:19 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire akĩrĩĩaga na akĩnyuuaga
Matthew11:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria gũtetia matũũra manene marĩa maaringĩirwo ciama ciake iria nyingĩ
Matthew11:21 “Inyuĩ andũ a Korazini
Matthew11:22 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew11:23 Na inyuĩ
Matthew11:24 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew11:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew11:26 Ĩĩ
Matthew11:27 “Nĩnengeretwo maũndũ mothe nĩ Baba. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Mũriũ tiga Ithe
Matthew11:28 “Ũkai kũrĩ niĩ
Matthew11:29 Oyai icooki rĩakwa mwĩigĩrĩre na mwĩrute na niĩ
Matthew11:30 Nĩgũkorwo icooki rĩakwa nĩ ihũthũ
Matthew12:1 Ihinda rĩu Jesũ nĩatuĩkanĩirie mĩgũnda-inĩ ya ngano mũthenya wa Thabatũ
Matthew12:2 Rĩrĩa Afarisai moonire ũguo
Matthew12:3 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:4 Aatoonyire nyũmba ya Ngai
Matthew12:5 O na ningĩ kaĩ mũthomete Watho-inĩ atĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ
Matthew12:6 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:7 Korwo nĩmwamenyete gĩtũmi gĩa ciugo ici
Matthew12:8 Nĩgũkorwo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩwe Mwathani wa mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”
Matthew12:9 Oima kũu-rĩ
Matthew12:10 na nĩ haarĩ mũndũ wonjete guoko. Na tondũ nĩmacaragia gĩtũmi gĩa gũthitangĩra Jesũ-rĩ
Matthew12:11 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:12 Kaĩ mũndũ atakĩrĩ wa bata mũno gũkĩra ngʼondu! Nĩ ũndũ ũcio watho nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩtie gwĩka wega mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”
Matthew12:13 Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ
Matthew12:14 No Afarisai makiuma nja
Matthew12:15 Nake Jesũ aamenya ũhoro ũcio
Matthew12:16 agĩcooka akĩmakaania atĩ matikoige we nĩwe ũ.
Matthew12:17 Ũndũ ũyũ nĩguo wahingirie ũhoro ũrĩa waarĩtio na kanua ka mũnabii Isaia
Matthew12:18 “Ĩno nĩyo ndungata yakwa ĩrĩa ndĩĩthuurĩire
Matthew12:19 Ndĩgaatetania kana ĩgũũthũke; na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaigua mũgambo wayo njĩra-inĩ.
Matthew12:20 ndĩkoina kamũrangi kagondoku
Matthew12:21 Thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩayo ndũrĩrĩ nĩikaagĩa na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro.”
Matthew12:22 Magĩcooka makĩmũrehera mũndũ warĩ na ndaimono
Matthew12:23 Andũ othe makĩgega
Matthew12:24 No rĩrĩa Afarisai maaiguire ũguo
Matthew12:25 Nake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meciiragia
Matthew12:26 Angĩkorwo Shaitani nĩwe ũingataga Shaitani-rĩ
Matthew12:27 Na angĩkorwo niĩ nyiingataga ndaimono na hinya wa Beelizebuli-rĩ
Matthew12:28 No niĩ ingĩkorwo nyiingataga ndaimono na Roho wa Ngai-rĩ
Matthew12:29 “Ningĩ-rĩ
Matthew12:30 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ hamwe na niĩ
Matthew12:31 Ningĩ ngũmwĩra atĩ
Matthew12:32 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgacaambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakarekerwo
Matthew12:33 “Agĩriai mũtĩ na maciaro maguo nĩmekwagĩra
Matthew12:34 Inyuĩ rũciaro rũrũ rwa nduĩra
Matthew12:35 Mũndũ mwega aaragia maũndũ mega moimĩte mũthiithũ-inĩ wake mwega
Matthew12:36 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:37 Nĩgũkorwo ciugo ciaku nĩcio igaatũma ũtuuo ndũrĩ na mahĩtia
Matthew12:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai amwe na arutani a watho makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:39 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:40 Nĩ gũkorwo o ta ũrĩa Jona aikarire matukũ matatũ
Matthew12:41 Andũ a Nineve nĩmakarũgama hĩndĩ ya ciira hamwe na rũciaro rũrũ marũtuĩre ciira; nĩgũkorwo nĩmeririre rĩrĩa maahunjĩirio nĩ Jona
Matthew12:42 Mũthamaki mũndũ-wa-nja wa mwena wa Gũthini nĩakarũgama hĩndĩ ya ciira hamwe na rũciaro rũrũ arũtuĩre ciira; nĩgũkorwo nĩoimire ituri cia thĩ oke athikĩrĩrie ũũgĩ wa Solomoni
Matthew12:43 “Na rĩrĩ
Matthew12:44 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew12:45 Hĩndĩ ĩyo roho ũcio ũkagĩĩra maroho mangĩ mũgwanja mooru makĩria maguo mwene
Matthew12:46 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ aaragĩria andũ-rĩ
Matthew12:47 Nake mũndũ ũmwe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:48 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:49 Agĩcooka akĩorota arutwo ake
Matthew12:50 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ wothe wĩkaga ũrĩa Baba ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ endaga
Matthew13:1 Mũthenya o ro ũcio-rĩ
Matthew13:2 Ikundi cia andũ aingĩ mũno ikĩũngana harĩa aarĩ nginya ĩgĩtũma atoonye gatarũ na agĩikara thĩ thĩinĩ wayo
Matthew13:3 Nake akĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano
Matthew13:4 Na rĩrĩa aahuraga mbeũ icio-rĩ
Matthew13:5 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara-inĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ. Nacio ikĩmera o narua tondũ tĩĩri ndwarĩ mũriku.
Matthew13:6 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa riũa rĩarire
Matthew13:7 Na mbeũ ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩigua-inĩ
Matthew13:8 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru
Matthew13:9 Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ ma kũigua
Matthew13:10 Nao arutwo ake magĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew13:11 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew13:12 Ũrĩa wothe ũrĩ na indo nĩakoongererwo nyingĩ aingĩhie makĩria. Nake ũrĩa wothe ũtarĩ
Matthew13:13 Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo gĩtũmaga ndĩmaarĩrie na ngerekano: “Nĩ ũndũ o na gũkorwo nĩmoonaga-rĩ
Matthew13:14 Nĩo makinyĩirwo nĩ ũhoro ũrĩa warathirwo nĩ mũnabii Isaia
Matthew13:15 “ ‘Nĩgũkorwo ngoro cia andũ aya nĩ ngingitaru; matũ mao matiiguaga
Matthew13:16 No kũrathimwo nĩ maitho manyu tondũ nĩmoonaga
Matthew13:17 Tondũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew13:18 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew13:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ o wothe aigua ndũmĩrĩri ya ũthamaki na akaaga kũmĩmenya-rĩ
Matthew13:20 Ũrĩa wamũkĩrire mbeũ ĩrĩa yagũire rũnyanjara-inĩ nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũiguaga kiugo
Matthew13:21 No tondũ ndarĩ mĩri-rĩ
Matthew13:22 Nake ũrĩa wamũkagĩra mbeũ ĩrĩa yagũire mĩigua-inĩ-rĩ
Matthew13:23 No ũrĩa wamũkĩrire mbeũ ĩrĩa yagũire tĩĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru-rĩ
Matthew13:24 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ
Matthew13:25 No rĩrĩa andũ othe maakomete-rĩ
Matthew13:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngano yamerire na igĩciara-rĩ
Matthew13:27 “Ndungata cia mwene mũgũnda igĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew13:28 “Agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew13:29 “Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew13:30 Rekei ikũranĩre nginya hĩndĩ ya magetha. Hĩndĩ ĩyo-rĩ
Matthew13:31 Nĩamaheire ngerekano ĩngĩ
Matthew13:32 O na akorwo mbeũ ĩyo nĩyo nini mũno kũrĩ mbeũ ciothe-rĩ
Matthew13:33 Agĩcooka akĩmahe ngerekano o ĩngĩ
Matthew13:34 Jesũ aaragĩria kĩrĩndĩ maũndũ macio mothe na ngerekano na ndaamaragĩria ũndũ o na ũmwe atekũhũthĩra ngerekano.
Matthew13:35 Nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa waaririo na kanua ka mũnabii ũhinge rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ: “Ngaatumũra kanua gakwa njarie na ngerekano
Matthew13:36 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩtiga kĩrĩndĩ
Matthew13:37 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew13:38 Mũgũnda nĩ thĩ
Matthew13:39 nayo thũ ĩrĩa ĩrĩhaandaga nĩ ũrĩa mũũru. Magetha nĩ ithirĩro rĩa mahinda maya
Matthew13:40 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o ta ũrĩa itindiĩ rĩmunyagwo rĩgacinwo na mwaki-rĩ
Matthew13:41 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩagatũma araika ake
Matthew13:42 Nĩmakamaikia thĩinĩ wa icua rĩa mwaki
Matthew13:43 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa athingu magaakenga ta riũa thĩinĩ wa ũthamaki wa Ithe wao. Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ nĩ aigue.
Matthew13:44 “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaanaine na mũthiithũ wahithĩtwo mũgũnda. Na rĩrĩa mũndũ aawoonire
Matthew13:45 “Ningĩ ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaanaine na mwonjorithia wacaragia ruru njega.
Matthew13:46 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oonire ĩmwe ya thogora mũnene-rĩ
Matthew13:47 “O rĩngĩ
Matthew13:48 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yaiyũrire
Matthew13:49 Ũguo nĩguo gũgaakorwo hĩndĩ ya ithirĩro rĩa mahinda maya. Araika nĩmagooka maamũranie arĩa aaganu kuuma kũrĩ arĩa athingu
Matthew13:50 na maikie arĩa aaganu icua-inĩ rĩa mwaki
Matthew13:51 Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew13:52 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:53 Nake Jesũ aarĩkia kũheana ngerekano icio-rĩ
Matthew13:54 Aakinya itũũra rĩa kwao-rĩ
Matthew13:55 Githĩ ũyũ ti we mũrũ wa mũtharamara? Githĩ rĩĩtwa rĩa nyina ti Mariamu
Matthew13:56 Na githĩ aarĩ a nyina othe tũtirĩ nao? Mũndũ ũyũ akĩrutĩte maũndũ maya mothe kũ?”
Matthew13:57 Nao makĩmũrega. No Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:58 Nake ndaaringire ciama nyingĩ kũu
Matthew14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew14:2 nake akĩĩra arĩa maamũtungataga atĩrĩ
Matthew14:3 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew14:4 tondũ Johana nĩamwĩrĩte atĩrĩ: “Watho ndũgwĩtĩkĩrĩtie ũmũhikie.”
Matthew14:5 Herode nĩendaga kũũraga Johana
Matthew14:6 Mũthenya wa gũkũngũĩra gũciarwo kwa Herode-rĩ
Matthew14:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Herode akĩĩhĩta na mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩekũmũhe kĩrĩa gĩothe angĩendire.
Matthew14:8 Nake mũirĩtu ũcio aarĩkia gũtaarwo nĩ nyina
Matthew14:9 Mũthamaki nĩataangĩkire mũno
Matthew14:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũmana kũu njeera na Johana akĩrengwo mũtwe.
Matthew14:11 Naguo mũtwe ũcio wake ũkĩrehwo na kiuga
Matthew14:12 Nao arutwo a Johana magĩthiĩ makĩoya kĩimba gĩake
Matthew14:13 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũhoro ũcio
Matthew14:14 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oimire gatarũ na akĩona andũ aingĩ
Matthew14:15 Na gwakuhĩrĩria gũtuka-rĩ
Matthew14:16 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew14:17 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew14:18 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew14:19 Nake agĩathana andũ maikare thĩ nyeki-inĩ. Akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ
Matthew14:20 Othe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna
Matthew14:21 Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ ta arũme ngiri ithano
Matthew14:22 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake matoonye gatarũ
Matthew14:23 Thuutha wa kũmoigĩra ũhoro-rĩ
Matthew14:24 no gatarũ nĩkarĩkĩtie gũthiĩ itĩĩna iraiharaihu kuuma thĩ nyũmũ
Matthew14:25 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew14:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arutwo maamuonire agĩthiĩ agereire maaĩ igũrũ
Matthew14:27 No hĩndĩ o ĩyo Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew14:28 Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew14:29 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew14:30 No rĩrĩa oonire rũhuho
Matthew14:31 O rĩmwe
Matthew14:32 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maahaicire gatarũ-rĩ
Matthew14:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa maarĩ thĩinĩ wa gatarũ makĩmũgooca
Matthew14:34 Na maarĩkia kũringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ
Matthew14:35 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a kũu maamenyire atĩ nĩ Jesũ
Matthew14:36 na makĩmũthaitha areke arũaru mahutie gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake
Matthew15:1 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew15:2 “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga arutwo aku mathũkie kĩrĩra gĩa athuuri? Matiĩthambaga moko rĩrĩa mekũrĩa irio!”
Matthew15:3 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:4 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai oigire atĩrĩ
Matthew15:5 No inyuĩ muugaga atĩ mũndũ angĩĩra ithe kana nyina atĩrĩ
Matthew15:6 mũndũ ũcio ndarĩ bata wa ‘gũtĩĩa ithe’ naguo. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũgagĩtua kiugo kĩa Ngai gĩa tũhũ nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩra kĩanyu.
Matthew15:7 Inyuĩ hinga ici! Isaia nĩamenyete wega hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarathire ũhoro wanyu
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Andũ aya maaheaga gĩtĩĩo na mĩromo
Matthew15:9 Nao maahooyaga o tũhũ; morutani marĩa marutanaga no mawatho ma andũ.’ ”
Matthew15:10 Nake Jesũ agĩĩta kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩũke harĩ we
Matthew15:11 Kĩrĩa gĩtoonyaga na kanua ka mũndũ ti kĩo ‘kĩmũthaahagia’
Matthew15:12 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo ake magĩthiĩ harĩ we
Matthew15:13 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:14 Tiganai nao; acio nĩ atongoria atumumu. Mũtumumu angĩtongoria mũtumumu ũngĩ
Matthew15:15 Nake Petero akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew15:16 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:17 Kaĩ mũtooĩ atĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩtoonyaga na kanua gĩthiiaga nda
Matthew15:18 No maũndũ marĩa moimaga kanua moimaga ngoro-inĩ
Matthew15:19 Nĩ ũndũ ngoro-inĩ nĩkuo kuumaga meciiria mooru
Matthew15:20 Macio nĩmo maũndũ marĩa ‘mathaahagia’ mũndũ; no kũrĩa irio na moko matarĩ mathambie matingĩtũma mũndũ agĩe na ‘thaahu’.”
Matthew15:21 Ningĩ Jesũ akiuma kũu
Matthew15:22 Mũndũ-wa-nja Mũkaanani woimĩte gũkuhĩ na kũu agĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew15:23 No Jesũ ndarĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe oigire. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio arutwo ake magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we makĩmũringĩrĩria
Matthew15:24 Nake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew15:25 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩũka
Matthew15:26 Nake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew15:27 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew15:28 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:29 Jesũ akiuma kũu
Matthew15:30 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩnene gĩgĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew15:31 Nao andũ makĩgega rĩrĩa moonire arĩa mataaragia makĩaria
Matthew15:32 Nake Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo ake moke harĩ we
Matthew15:33 Nao arutwo ake magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew15:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria
Matthew15:35 Nake akĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩikare thĩ.
Matthew15:36 Agĩcooka akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo mũgwanja na tũthamaki tũu
Matthew15:37 Othe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna. Thuutha ũcio arutwo makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩte makĩiyũria ciondo mũgwanja.
Matthew15:38 Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ andũ ngiri inya
Matthew15:39 Jesũ aarĩkia kuugĩra kĩrĩndĩ ũhoro
Matthew16:1 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew16:2 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:3 Ningĩ rũciinĩ muugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew16:4 Rũciaro rũrũ rwaganu na rwa ũtharia rũũragia rũringĩrwo kĩama
Matthew16:5 Rĩrĩa maaringire iria
Matthew16:6 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew16:7 Nao makĩaranĩria
Matthew16:8 Nake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeranaga
Matthew16:9 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwataũkĩrwo? Mũtingĩririkana mĩgate ĩtano ĩrĩa yarĩirwo nĩ andũ ngiri ithano
Matthew16:10 Kana mĩgate mũgwanja ĩrĩa yarĩirwo nĩ andũ ngiri inya
Matthew16:11 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩragiria mũmenye atĩ ndikwaragia ũhoro wa mĩgate? No mwĩhũgagei ndawa ĩyo ya kũimbia mĩgate ya Afarisai na Asadukai.”
Matthew16:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩmenya atĩ ndaameeraga mehũũge nĩ ũndũ wa ndawa ya kũimbia mĩgate
Matthew16:13 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire rũgongo rwa Kaisarea-Filipi
Matthew16:14 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:15 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:17 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:18 Na niĩ ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:19 Nĩngakũnengera cabi cia ũthamaki wa igũrũ; na kĩrĩa gĩothe ũkooha gũkũ thĩ nĩgĩkoohwo igũrũ
Matthew16:20 Agĩcooka agĩkaania arutwo ake matikeere mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ atĩ we nĩwe Kristũ.
Matthew16:21 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria gũtaarĩria arutwo ake atĩ no nginya athiĩ Jerusalemu
Matthew16:22 Nake Petero akĩmũtwara keheri-inĩ
Matthew16:23 Nake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũrĩra Petero
Matthew16:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Matthew16:25 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wendaga kũhonokia muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo; no ũrĩa wothe ũkoorwo nĩ muoyo wake nĩ ũndũ wakwa nĩakaũhonokia.
Matthew16:26 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew16:27 Nĩgũkorwo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩagooka na riiri wa Ithe hamwe na araika ake
Matthew16:28 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew17:1 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Matthew17:2 Arĩ hau mbere yao akĩgarũrũka ũrĩa aahaanaga. Ũthiũ wake ũkĩara ta riũa
Matthew17:3 O hĩndĩ ĩyo hau mbere yao makiumĩrĩrwo nĩ Musa na Elija makĩaranĩria na Jesũ.
Matthew17:4 Nake Petero akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew17:5 O akĩaragia-rĩ
Matthew17:6 Rĩrĩa arutwo maiguire ũguo-rĩ
Matthew17:7 No Jesũ agĩũka
Matthew17:8 Na rĩrĩa maatiirire maitho-rĩ
Matthew17:9 Rĩrĩa maikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩma-inĩ
Matthew17:10 Nao arutwo makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:11 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:12 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew17:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo makĩmenya atĩ aamaheaga ũhoro wa Johana Mũbatithania.
Matthew17:14 Rĩrĩa maakinyire harĩa kĩrĩndĩ kĩarĩ
Matthew17:15 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew17:16 Nĩndĩramũreheire arutwo aku
Matthew17:17 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:18 Jesũ agĩkũũma ndaimono ĩyo
Matthew17:19 Nao arutwo magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Jesũ keheri-inĩ
Matthew17:20 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:21 No ndaimono mũthemba ũcio ndĩngĩingatĩka na kĩndũ kĩngĩ
Matthew17:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa macookanĩrĩire kũu Galili
Matthew17:23 Nĩmakamũũraga
Matthew17:24 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew17:25 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:26 Nake Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:27 No nĩguo tũtikamarakarie-rĩ
Matthew18:1 Ihinda o rĩu arutwo magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ
Matthew18:2 Nake agĩĩta kaana
Matthew18:3 Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew18:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew18:5 “Nake ũrĩa wothe wamũkagĩra kaana ta gaka thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Matthew18:6 No ũrĩa wothe ũngĩhĩtithia kamwe ga twana tũtũ tũnjĩtĩkĩtie keehie
Matthew18:7 “Kaĩ gũkũ thĩ kũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew18:8 Guoko gwaku kana kũgũrũ gwaku kũngĩtũma wĩhie-rĩ
Matthew18:9 Narĩo riitho rĩaku rĩngĩtũma wĩhie-rĩ
Matthew18:10 “Menyererai mũtikae kũnyarara o na kamwe ga twana tũtũ tũnini. Nĩgũkorwo ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:11 Nĩgũkorwo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire kũhonokia kĩrĩa kĩorĩte.)
Matthew18:12 “Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew18:13 Na angĩmĩona-rĩ
Matthew18:14 Ũguo noguo Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ Igũrũ atangĩenda o na kamwe ga twana tũtũ tũnini koore.
Matthew18:15 “Mũrũ kana mwarĩ wa thoguo angĩkũhĩtĩria-rĩ
Matthew18:16 No angĩrega gũgũthikĩrĩria
Matthew18:17 Angĩrega kũmathikĩrĩria-rĩ
Matthew18:18 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew18:19 “O rĩngĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:20 Nĩgũkorwo harĩa andũ eerĩ kana atatũ monganĩte thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa-rĩ
Matthew18:21 Ningĩ Petero agĩũka harĩ Jesũ
Matthew18:22 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew18:23 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew18:24 Aambĩrĩria kũrora mathabu-rĩ
Matthew18:25 Na tondũ nĩaremetwo nĩ kũrĩha-rĩ
Matthew18:26 “Ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩĩgũithia mbere yake
Matthew18:27 Nake mwathi ũcio wa ndungata ĩyo akĩmĩiguĩra tha
Matthew18:28 “No ndungata ĩyo yoima nja
Matthew18:29 “Ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩĩgũithia thĩ
Matthew18:30 “Nowe akĩrega. Handũ ha ũguo
Matthew18:31 Rĩrĩa ndungata iria ingĩ cioonire ũrĩa gwekĩka-rĩ
Matthew18:32 “Nake mwathi wao agĩĩta ndungata ĩyo
Matthew18:33 Githĩ nawe ndũkwagĩrĩirwo ũiguĩre ndungata ĩrĩa ĩngĩ tha o ta ũrĩa niĩ ngũiguĩrĩire tha?’
Matthew18:34 Nĩ ũndũ wa kũrakara
Matthew18:35 “Ũguo nĩguo Baba ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ ageeka o ũmwe wanyu
Matthew19:1 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew19:2 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmũrũmĩrĩra
Matthew19:3 Na Afarisai amwe magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we nĩguo mamũgerie. Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:4 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:5 na akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew19:6 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew19:7 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:8 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:9 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:10 Nao arutwo makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:11 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:12 Nĩgũkorwo andũ amwe maaciarirwo mahaana ta marĩ ahakũre; angĩ maahakũrirwo nĩ andũ; na angĩ makarega kũhikania nĩ ũndũ wa ũthamaki wa igũrũ. Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩhota gwĩtĩkĩra ũndũ ũyũ
Matthew19:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩreherwo twana nĩguo atũigĩrĩre moko na atũhooere. No arutwo magĩkũũma arĩa maatũrehete.
Matthew19:14 Nowe Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew19:15 Aarĩkia gũtũigĩrĩra moko
Matthew19:16 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew19:17 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:18 Mũndũ ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:19 na tĩĩa thoguo na nyũkwa
Matthew19:20 Mwanake ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew19:21 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:22 Rĩrĩa mwanake ũcio aiguire ũguo-rĩ
Matthew19:23 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Matthew19:24 O rĩngĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:25 Rĩrĩa arutwo maiguire ũguo-rĩ
Matthew19:26 Nake Jesũ akĩmarora akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:27 Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:28 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:29 Na ũrĩa wothe ũtigĩte nyũmba
Matthew19:30 No rĩrĩ
Matthew20:1 “Nĩgũkorwo ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũndũ warĩ na gĩthaka
Matthew20:2 Na aarĩkanĩra nao atĩ nĩekũmarĩha dinari mũthenya ũcio
Matthew20:3 “Ta thaa ithatũ nĩoimagarire na akĩona andũ angĩ marũngiĩ thoko-inĩ matarĩ ũndũ meekaga.
Matthew20:4 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew20:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩthiĩ. “Ningĩ akiumagara rĩngĩ ta thaa thita
Matthew20:6 Na ta thaa ikũmi na ĩmwe
Matthew20:7 “Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:8 “Gwatuka-rĩ
Matthew20:9 “Aruti a wĩra arĩa maandĩkĩtwo thaa ikũmi na ĩmwe moka
Matthew20:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew20:11 Maarĩkia kũrĩhwo
Matthew20:12 Makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew20:13 “Nake agĩcookeria ũmwe wao atĩrĩ
Matthew20:14 Kĩoe mũcaara waku ũthiĩ. Nĩ niĩ ndenda kũrĩha mũndũ ũcio wandĩkirwo thuutha o ta ũguo ndakũrĩha.
Matthew20:15 Githĩ ndirĩ na kĩhooto gĩa gwĩka ũrĩa ngwenda na mbeeca ciakwa? Kana ũraigua ũiru tondũ ndĩ mũtaana?’
Matthew20:16 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio arĩa marĩ thuutha
Matthew20:17 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aambataga Jerusalemu-rĩ
Matthew20:18 “Twerekeire kwambata Jerusalemu
Matthew20:19 na nĩmakamũneana kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ anyũrũrio na ahũũrwo na kĩboko na mamwambe mũtĩ igũrũ. Na mũthenya wa gatatũ nĩakariũkio!”
Matthew20:20 Thuutha ũcio
Matthew20:21 Nake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:22 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:23 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew20:24 Rĩrĩa arutwo acio angĩ ikũmi maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Matthew20:25 Nake Jesũ akĩmeeta hamwe
Matthew20:26 No rĩrĩ
Matthew20:27 na ũrĩa ũngĩenda gũtuĩka wa mbere thĩinĩ wanyu nĩatuĩke ngombo yanyu
Matthew20:28 o ta ũrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ atookire gũtungatĩrwo
Matthew20:29 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ na arutwo ake moimaga Jeriko-rĩ
Matthew20:30 Nao andũ eerĩ atumumu maikarĩte mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra
Matthew20:31 Gĩkundi kĩu kĩa andũ gĩkĩmakaania
Matthew20:32 Nake Jesũ akĩrũgama
Matthew20:33 Makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmaiguĩra tha
Matthew21:1 Na rĩrĩa maakuhĩrĩirie Jerusalemu
Matthew21:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew21:3 Na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩmũũria ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew21:4 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkire nĩgeetha ũrathi ũrĩa waarĩtio na kanua ka mũnabii ũhinge
Matthew21:5 “Ĩrai Mwarĩ wa Zayuni atĩrĩ
Matthew21:6 Nao arutwo magĩthiĩ magĩĩka o ũrĩa Jesũ aamerĩte.
Matthew21:7 Makĩrehe ndigiri na njaũ yayo
Matthew21:8 Na andũ gĩkundi kĩnene mũno makĩara nguo ciao njĩra-inĩ
Matthew21:9 Nacio ikundi cia andũ arĩa maamũtongoretie na arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire maanagĩrĩra makoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew21:10 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyire Jerusalemu
Matthew21:11 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew21:12 Nake Jesũ agĩtoonya kũu hekarũ-inĩ akĩrutũrũra andũ othe arĩa maagũraga na meendagia indo kuo
Matthew21:13 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew21:14 Nao atumumu na cionje magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we kũu hekarũ-inĩ
Matthew21:15 No rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho moonire maũndũ ma magegania marĩa eekaga
Matthew21:16 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:17 Agĩcooka akĩmatiga
Matthew21:18 Na rũciinĩ tene
Matthew21:19 Nake akĩona mũkũyũ mũkĩra wa njĩra
Matthew21:20 Rĩrĩa arutwo ake moonire ũguo makĩgega
Matthew21:21 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:22 Maũndũ mothe marĩa mũrĩhooyaga mwĩtĩkĩtie nĩmũkaheo.”
Matthew21:23 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyire hekarũ-inĩ-rĩ
Matthew21:24 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:25 Ũbatithio wa Johana-rĩ
Matthew21:26 No tũngiuga atĩ
Matthew21:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcookeria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew21:28 “Na rĩrĩ
Matthew21:29 “Nake agĩcookia
Matthew21:30 “Ningĩ mũthuuri ũcio agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũriũ ũcio ũngĩ akĩmwĩra o ũguo. Nake agĩcookia akiuga
Matthew21:31 “Acio eerĩ-rĩ
Matthew21:32 Nĩgũkorwo Johana ookire kũrĩ inyuĩ amwonie njĩra ya ũthingu
Matthew21:33 “Ta thikĩrĩriai ngerekano ĩngĩ: Mũndũ warĩ mwene mũgũnda nĩahaandire mũgũnda ũcio wake mĩthabibũ. Agĩaka rũgiri rũgĩthiũrũrũkĩria mũgũnda ũcio
Matthew21:34 Hĩndĩ ya kũgetha yakuhĩrĩria-rĩ
Matthew21:35 “Akombori acio makĩnyiita ndungata ciake; makĩhũũra ĩmwe
Matthew21:36 Agĩcooka akĩmatũmĩra ndungata ingĩ nyingĩ kũrĩ iria aatũmĩte mbere
Matthew21:37 Mũthia-inĩ akĩmatũmĩra mũrũwe
Matthew21:38 “No rĩrĩa akombori acio moonire mũriũ
Matthew21:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmũnyiita
Matthew21:40 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew21:41 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew21:42 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:43 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew21:44 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkaagwĩra ihiga rĩrĩ nĩagathuthĩka
Matthew21:45 Rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na Afarisai maaiguire ngerekano icio cia Jesũ
Matthew21:46 Magĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũnyiita
Matthew22:1 Nake Jesũ akĩmaarĩria rĩngĩ na ngerekano
Matthew22:2 “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaanaine na mũthamaki warugire iruga nĩ ũndũ wa ũhiki wa mũriũ.
Matthew22:3 Agĩcooka agĩtũma ndungata ciake kũrĩ andũ arĩa meetĩtwo iruga-inĩ
Matthew22:4 “Ningĩ agĩtũma ndungata ingĩ agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew22:5 “No andũ acio matiarũmbũirie ũhoro ũcio magĩĩthiĩra
Matthew22:6 Acio angĩ magĩtharĩkĩra ndungata ciake
Matthew22:7 Mũthamaki ũcio nĩarakarire mũno
Matthew22:8 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
Matthew22:9 Thiĩi magomano-inĩ ma njĩra mwĩre mũndũ o wothe mũkuona oke iruga-inĩ rĩa kĩhikanio.’
Matthew22:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndungata icio ikiumagara
Matthew22:11 “No rĩrĩa mũthamaki aatoonyire nĩguo one ageni-rĩ
Matthew22:12 Akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:13 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki ũcio akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
Matthew22:14 “Nĩgũkorwo aingĩ nĩmetĩtwo
Matthew22:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai makiuma nja
Matthew22:16 Magĩtũma arutwo ao hamwe na Aherodia kũrĩ we. Magĩthiĩ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew22:17 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:18 No Jesũ
Matthew22:19 Nyoniai mbeeca ĩrĩa ĩhũthagĩrwo ya kũrĩha igooti.” Nao makĩmũtwarĩra dinari
Matthew22:20 nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:21 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:22 Rĩrĩa maiguire ũguo-rĩ
Matthew22:23 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Asadukai
Matthew22:24 “Mũrutani
Matthew22:25 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew22:26 Na gũkĩhaana o ũguo kũrĩ mũrũ wa nyina wa keerĩ
Matthew22:27 Marigĩrĩrio-rĩ
Matthew22:28 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:29 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:30 Hĩndĩ ya kũriũka andũ matikahikania kana mahike; magaatuĩka ta araika arĩa marĩ kũu igũrũ.
Matthew22:31 No ha ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa arĩa akuũ-rĩ
Matthew22:32 ‘Niĩ nĩ niĩ Ngai wa Iburahĩmu
Matthew22:33 Rĩrĩa kĩrĩndĩ kĩu kĩaiguire ũguo
Matthew22:34 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afarisai maaiguire atĩ Jesũ nĩahootete Asadukai
Matthew22:35 Ũmwe wao
Matthew22:36 “Mũrutani
Matthew22:37 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:38 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩathani rĩa mbere na rĩrĩa inene.
Matthew22:39 Narĩo rĩa keerĩ no ta rĩu: ‘Endaga mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ o ta ũrĩa wĩyendete wee mwene.’
Matthew22:40 Watho wothe na ũrutani wa Anabii ũhingĩtio nĩ maathani macio meerĩ.”
Matthew22:41 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai monganĩte hamwe-rĩ
Matthew22:42 “Mwĩciiragia atĩa ũhoro wa Kristũ? Muugaga nĩ mũrũ wa ũ?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:43 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Mwathani eerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: “Ikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo
Matthew22:45 Angĩkorwo Daudi amwĩtaga ‘Mwathani-rĩ’
Matthew22:46 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wahotire kũmũcookeria
Matthew23:1 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩĩra ikundi cia andũ o hamwe na arutwo ake atĩrĩ:
Matthew23:2 “Arutani a watho na Afarisai maikaragĩra gĩtĩ kĩa Musa.
Matthew23:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew23:4 Mohaga mĩrigo mĩritũ mũno makamĩigĩrĩra ciande cia andũ
Matthew23:5 “Ũrĩa wothe mekaga
Matthew23:6 na nĩmendete gũikara handũ ha gũtĩĩo maruga-inĩ
Matthew23:7 na nĩmendete kũgeithio ndũnyũ-inĩ
Matthew23:8 “No inyuĩ mũtikanetwo ‘Rabii’
Matthew23:9 Na mũtikaneete mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ gũkũ thĩ ‘baba’
Matthew23:10 O na mũtikanetwo ‘mũrutani’
Matthew23:11 Ũrĩa mũnene thĩinĩ wanyu nĩatuĩkage ndungata yanyu.
Matthew23:12 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa wothe wĩtũgagĩria nĩakanyiihio
Matthew23:13 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:14 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:15 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:16 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:17 Inyuĩ atumumu aya akĩĩgu! Nĩ kĩĩ kĩnene? Nĩ thahabu ĩyo
Matthew23:18 Ningĩ muugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew23:19 Inyuĩ andũ aya atumumu! Nĩ kĩĩ kĩnene? Nĩ kĩheo kĩu
Matthew23:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew23:21 Nake ũrĩa wĩhĩtaga na hekarũ
Matthew23:22 Nake ũrĩa wĩhĩtaga na igũrũ
Matthew23:23 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:24 Inyuĩ atongoria aya atumumu! Inyuĩ mũcungaga rũmuru
Matthew23:25 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:26 Wee Mũfarisai ũyũ mũtumumu! Amba ũthambie gĩkombe na mbakũri mwena wa thĩinĩ
Matthew23:27 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:28 No taguo andũ mamuonaga mũrĩ athingu mwena wa nja
Matthew23:29 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:30 Mũgacooka mũkoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew23:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũkaruta ũira wa atĩ inyuĩ mũrĩ njiaro cia arĩa mooragire anabii.
Matthew23:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew23:33 “Inyuĩ nyoka ici! Inyuĩ ciana cia nduĩra! Mũgaagĩtheema atĩa gũtuĩrwo ciira wa gũikio Jehanamu?
Matthew23:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew23:35 Na nĩmũgagĩcookererwo nĩ thakame yothe ya andũ arĩa athingu
Matthew23:36 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew23:37 “Wee Jerusalemu
Matthew23:38 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew23:39 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew24:1 Nake Jesũ akiuma hekarũ
Matthew24:2 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew24:3 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩte thĩ Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ-rĩ
Matthew24:4 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew24:5 Nĩgũkorwo andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Matthew24:6 Nĩmũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara
Matthew24:7 Rũrĩrĩ nĩrũgookĩrĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ
Matthew24:8 Maũndũ macio mothe nĩ kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ruo ta rwa mũndũ-wa-nja akĩrũmwo agĩe mwana.
Matthew24:9 “Ningĩ nĩmũkaneanwo mũnyariirwo na mũũragwo
Matthew24:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo-rĩ
Matthew24:11 Na anabii aingĩ a maheeni nĩmakoimĩra na nĩmakaheenia andũ aingĩ.
Matthew24:12 Na tondũ waganu nĩũkaingĩha mũno-rĩ
Matthew24:13 no ũrĩa ũgaakirĩrĩria nginya hĩndĩ ya ithirĩro-rĩ
Matthew24:14 Naguo Ũhoro-ũyũ-Mwega wa ũthamaki nĩũkahunjio thĩ yothe ũtuĩke ũira kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Matthew24:15 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa mũkoona ‘kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ thaahu na gĩa kũrehe ihooru’ kĩrũgamĩte Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru
Matthew24:16 hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa marĩ Judea nĩmorĩre irĩma-inĩ.
Matthew24:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ nyũmba yake igũrũ ndakaharũrũke atĩ akarute kĩndũ kuuma nyũmba yake.
Matthew24:18 Nake ũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda ndagacooke mũciĩ kũgĩĩra nguo ciake.
Matthew24:19 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo na nda na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagakorwo na thĩĩna-ĩ!
Matthew24:20 Hooyai nĩguo gwĩthara kwanyu gũtikanakorwo kũrĩ hĩndĩ ya heho kana mũthenya wa Thabatũ.
Matthew24:21 Nĩgũkorwo hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩgũkagĩa na mĩnyamaro mĩnene
Matthew24:22 Na tiga matukũ macio makuhĩhirio-rĩ
Matthew24:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩkamwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew24:24 Nĩgũkorwo Kristũ a maheeni na anabii a maheeni nĩmakeyumĩria monanie morirũ manene na maringe ciama
Matthew24:25 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew24:26 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩkamwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew24:27 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa rũheni ruumĩte irathĩro ruonekaga ithũĩro-rĩ
Matthew24:28 Harĩa hothe harĩ kĩimba
Matthew24:29 “Na rĩrĩ
Matthew24:30 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩmenyithia kĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩgĩkooneka kũu igũrũ
Matthew24:31 Nake nĩagatũma araika ake na mũgambo mũnene wa karumbeta
Matthew24:32 “Na rĩrĩ
Matthew24:33 Ũguo noguo rĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio mothe
Matthew24:34 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew24:35 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigathira
Matthew24:36 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ũhoro wa mũthenya ũcio kana ithaa rĩu
Matthew24:37 O ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Nuhu
Matthew24:38 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ matukũ marĩa maarĩ mbere ya kĩguũ
Matthew24:39 nao matiamenyire nginya rĩrĩa kĩguũ gĩokire
Matthew24:40 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arũme eerĩ magaakorwo marĩ mũgũnda; ũmwe nĩakoywo na ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo.
Matthew24:41 Andũ-a-nja eerĩ magaakorwo magĩthĩa hamwe; ũmwe nĩakoywo na ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo.
Matthew24:42 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew24:43 No menyai atĩrĩ
Matthew24:44 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o na inyuĩ no nginya mũikarage mwĩhaarĩirie
Matthew24:45 “Ningĩ-rĩ
Matthew24:46 Kaĩ nĩũgaakorwo ũrĩ ũndũ mwega harĩ ndungata ĩyo
Matthew24:47 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew24:48 No rĩrĩ
Matthew24:49 na ĩkĩambĩrĩrie kũhũũra ndungata iria ingĩ
Matthew24:50 Mwathi wa ndungata ĩyo agooka mũthenya ũrĩa ĩtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire
Matthew24:51 Nake nĩakamĩherithia mũno
Matthew25:1 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo-rĩ
Matthew25:2 Atano ao maarĩ akĩĩgu
Matthew25:3 Acio akĩĩgu nĩmakuuire matawa mao
Matthew25:4 No rĩrĩ
Matthew25:5 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew25:6 “Na ũtukũ gatagatĩ gũkĩanĩrĩrwo atĩrĩ: ‘Mũhikania nĩ mũũku! Umai mũkamũtũnge!’
Matthew25:7 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo airĩtu othe magĩũkĩra
Matthew25:8 Acio akĩĩgu makĩĩra acio oogĩ atĩrĩ
Matthew25:9 “No acio oogĩ makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:10 “No rĩrĩa maarĩ njĩra-inĩ magĩthiĩ kũgũra maguta-rĩ
Matthew25:11 “Thuutha ũcio airĩtu acio angĩ o nao magĩũka. Makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew25:12 “Nowe agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew25:13 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew25:14 “Ningĩ
Matthew25:15 Akĩnengera ĩmwe yacio taranda ithano cia mbeeca
Matthew25:16 Ndungata ĩrĩa yaneetwo taranda ithano ĩgĩthiĩ o hĩndĩ ĩyo
Matthew25:17 O nayo ĩrĩa yaheetwo taranda igĩrĩ ĩkĩonjorithia ĩkĩona uumithio wa ingĩ igĩrĩ.
Matthew25:18 No ndungata ĩrĩa yaheetwo taranda ĩmwe ĩgĩthiĩ
Matthew25:19 “Thuutha wa ihinda iraaya
Matthew25:20 Ndungata ĩrĩa yaheetwo taranda ithano ĩkĩrehe ingĩ ithano
Matthew25:21 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:22 “Ndungata ĩrĩa yaheetwo taranda igĩrĩ o nayo ĩgĩũka. Ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew25:23 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:24 “Nayo ndungata ĩrĩa yaheetwo taranda ĩmwe o nayo ĩgĩũka. Ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew25:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndetigĩrire
Matthew25:26 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:27 Gũkĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Matthew25:28 “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew25:29 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ o wothe ũrĩ na indo nĩwe ũkoongererwo ingĩ nyingĩ na akĩrĩrĩrio. Nake ũrĩa ũtarĩ
Matthew25:30 Oyai ndungata ĩyo ĩtarĩ bata mũmĩikie nja kũu nduma-inĩ
Matthew25:31 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka arĩ na riiri wake
Matthew25:32 Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩigacookanĩrĩrio mbere yake
Matthew25:33 Nĩakaiga ngʼondu mwena wake wa ũrĩo
Matthew25:34 “Ningĩ Mũthamaki nĩakeera arĩa marĩ mwena wake wa ũrĩo atĩrĩ
Matthew25:35 Nĩgũkorwo ndaarĩ mũhũũtu mũkĩĩhe gĩa kũrĩa
Matthew25:36 na ndaarĩ njaga mũkĩĩhe nguo
Matthew25:37 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa athingu nĩmakamũcookeria mamũũrie atĩrĩ
Matthew25:38 Na nĩ rĩ twakuonire ũrĩ mũgeni tũgĩkũnyiita ũgeni
Matthew25:39 O na nĩ rĩ twakuonire ũrĩ mũrũaru kana ũrĩ njeera na tũgĩũka gũkũrora?’
Matthew25:40 “Nake Mũthamaki nĩagacookia
Matthew25:41 “Ningĩ nĩakeera arĩa marĩ mwena wake wa ũmotho atĩrĩ
Matthew25:42 Nĩgũkorwo ndaarĩ mũhũũtu na mũtiaheire gĩa kũrĩa
Matthew25:43 na ndaarĩ mũgeni na mũtianyiitire ũgeni
Matthew25:44 “Nao nĩmagacookia
Matthew25:45 “Nake nĩakamacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:46 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagathiĩ kũrĩa andũ maherithagio tene na tene
Matthew26:1 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩkirie kuuga maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ
Matthew26:2 “O ta ũrĩa mũũĩ
Matthew26:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri a kĩrĩndĩ makĩgomana kwa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Matthew26:4 nĩguo maciire ũrĩa mangĩnyiitithia Jesũ na njĩra ya wara
Matthew26:5 No makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:6 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:7 na mũndũ-wa-nja warĩ na cuba ya maguta ma goro mũno na manungi wega
Matthew26:8 Rĩrĩa arutwo moonire ũguo
Matthew26:9 Maguta macio manungi wega nĩmangĩendio goro na mbeeca icio iheo athĩĩni.”
Matthew26:10 Nake Jesũ aamenya ũguo
Matthew26:11 Arĩa athĩĩni mũrĩkoragwo nao hĩndĩ ciothe
Matthew26:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aitĩrĩirie mwĩrĩ wakwa maguta macio manungi wega
Matthew26:13 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew26:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũmwe wa acio ikũmi na eerĩ
Matthew26:15 akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:16 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Judasi akĩambĩrĩria gũcaria mweke wa kũmũneana.
Matthew26:17 Mũthenya wa mbere wa kwambĩrĩria kũrĩa Mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndawa ya Kũimbia-rĩ
Matthew26:18 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio arutwo magĩĩka o ũrĩa Jesũ aamathĩte
Matthew26:20 Gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ-rĩ
Matthew26:21 Na rĩrĩa maarĩĩaga
Matthew26:22 Nao makĩnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha mũno
Matthew26:23 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:24 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũthiĩ o ta ũrĩa ũhoro wake wandĩkĩtwo. No mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũkunyanĩra Mũrũ wa Mũndũ kaĩ arĩ na haaro-ĩ! Nĩ kaba mũndũ ũcio atangĩaciarirwo.”
Matthew26:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Judasi
Matthew26:26 Na rĩrĩa maarĩĩaga
Matthew26:27 Agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe
Matthew26:28 Ĩno nĩyo thakame yakwa ya kĩrĩkanĩro
Matthew26:29 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:30 Na maarĩkia kũina rwĩmbo-rĩ
Matthew26:31 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:32 No ndariũkio-rĩ
Matthew26:33 No Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:35 No Petero akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:36 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka agĩthiĩ na arutwo ake handũ heetagwo Gethisemane
Matthew26:37 Agĩthiĩ na Petero
Matthew26:38 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:39 Agĩthiiathiia
Matthew26:40 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩcooka kũrĩ arutwo ake
Matthew26:41 Mwĩhũgei na mũhooe nĩguo mũtikagwe magerio-inĩ. Ngoro nĩyenda
Matthew26:42 Jesũ agĩthiĩ riita rĩa keerĩ
Matthew26:43 Aacooka rĩngĩ akĩmakora makomete
Matthew26:44 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmatiga
Matthew26:45 Ningĩ agĩcooka kũrĩ arutwo akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:46 Ũkĩrai
Matthew26:47 O akĩaragia-rĩ
Matthew26:48 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:49 Nake Judasi agĩthiĩ harĩ Jesũ o rĩmwe
Matthew26:50 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:51 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:52 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:53 Kana ũgwĩciiria ndingĩhota kũhooya Baba
Matthew26:54 No rĩrĩ
Matthew26:55 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩũria kĩrĩndĩ kĩu atĩrĩ
Matthew26:56 No ũndũ ũyũ wothe wĩkĩkĩĩte nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa waandĩkĩtwo nĩ anabii ũhinge.” Nao arutwo othe makĩmũtiganĩria
Matthew26:57 Nao acio maanyiitire Jesũ makĩmũtwara gwa Kaiafa
Matthew26:58 Nowe Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ haraaya
Matthew26:59 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:60 No makĩaga ũira ta ũcio
Matthew26:61 makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:62 Ningĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩrũgama
Matthew26:63 No Jesũ agĩkira ki. Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:64 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:65 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio mũnene agĩtembũranga nguo ciake
Matthew26:66 Mũgwĩciiria atĩa?” Magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew26:67 Magĩcooka makĩmũtuĩra mata ũthiũ
Matthew26:68 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:69 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:70 Nowe agĩkaana ũhoro ũcio mbere yao othe
Matthew26:71 Ningĩ akiumagara
Matthew26:72 Agĩkaana ũhoro ũcio o rĩngĩ
Matthew26:73 Thuutha wa kahinda kanini
Matthew26:74 Nake akĩambĩrĩria kwĩhĩta
Matthew26:75 Nake Petero akĩririkana ũhoro ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩrĩte atĩrĩ
Matthew27:1 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:2 Makĩmuoha na mĩnyororo; makĩmũruta kũu
Matthew27:3 Rĩrĩa Judasi
Matthew27:4 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Judasi agĩikania mbeeca icio thĩinĩ wa hekarũ
Matthew27:6 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai acio anene makĩoya mbeeca icio makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩiguithania mahũthĩre mbeeca icio na kũgũra gĩthaka kĩrĩa kĩa mũũmbi nyũngũ gĩtuĩke gĩa gũthikagwo ageni.
Matthew27:8 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmaga gĩthaka kĩu gĩĩtwo Gĩthaka gĩa Thakame nginya ũmũthĩ.
Matthew27:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa waarĩtio nĩ Jeremia ũrĩa Mũnabii wahingire
Matthew27:10 nao magĩcihũthĩra na kũgũra gĩthaka kĩa mũũmbi nyũngũ
Matthew27:11 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:12 No rĩrĩa aathitangirwo nĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri
Matthew27:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:14 Nowe Jesũ ndaigana gũcookia ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio; nake barũthi akĩgega mũno.
Matthew27:15 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩ maarĩ na mũndũ kĩmaramari wohetwo na woĩkaine mũno
Matthew27:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew27:18 Nĩgũkorwo we nĩamenyaga atĩ maatwarĩte Jesũ kũrĩ we nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru.
Matthew27:19 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo Pilato aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩa ciira
Matthew27:20 No rĩrĩ
Matthew27:21 Barũthi ũcio akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:22 Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:23 Nake Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:24 Rĩrĩa Pilato oonire atĩ matiraiguithania
Matthew27:25 Nao andũ acio othe magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew27:26 Pilato akĩmohorera Baraba. No akĩhũũrithia Jesũ iboko
Matthew27:27 Ningĩ thigari cia barũthi cigĩtwara Jesũ thĩinĩ wa gĩikaro kĩa barũthi
Matthew27:28 Cikĩmũruta nguo ciake
Matthew27:29 cigĩcooka cigĩtuma thũmbĩ ya mĩigua
Matthew27:30 Cikĩmũtuĩra mata
Matthew27:31 Ciarĩkia kũmũnyũrũria
Matthew27:32 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moimagaraga-rĩ
Matthew27:33 Magĩthiĩ
Matthew27:34 Nacio cikĩhe Jesũ ndibei anyue
Matthew27:35 Ciarĩkia kũmwamba mũtĩ-igũrũ
Matthew27:36 Nacio cigĩikara thĩ hau
Matthew27:37 Na hau igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wake
Matthew27:38 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:39 Nao andũ arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra hau makamũrumaga
Matthew27:40 makiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:41 O ũndũ ũmwe athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene
Matthew27:42 Makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:43 Nĩehokete Ngai
Matthew27:44 O na atunyani arĩa maambanĩirio hamwe nake o nao makĩmũruma.
Matthew27:45 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:46 Na ta thaa kenda Jesũ akĩgũthũka na mũgambo mũnene
Matthew27:47 Nao andũ amwe a arĩa maarũngiĩ hau rĩrĩa maiguire ũguo
Matthew27:48 Na o rĩmwe
Matthew27:49 Arĩa angĩ nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:50 Nake Jesũ akĩgũthũka rĩngĩ na mũgambo mũnene
Matthew27:51 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:52 Mbĩrĩra nacio ikĩhingũka
Matthew27:53 makiuma thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra. Na thuutha wa kũriũka kwa Jesũ
Matthew27:54 Rĩrĩa mũnene-wa-thigari-igana na arĩa maarĩ nake makĩrangĩra Jesũ moonire gĩthingithia na maũndũ mothe marĩa meekĩkire-rĩ
Matthew27:55 Na nĩ haarĩ andũ-a-nja aingĩ meeroragĩra marĩ o haraaya. Maarũmĩrĩire Jesũ kuuma Galili nĩguo mamũtungatagĩre.
Matthew27:56 Thĩinĩ wao haarĩ Mariamu Mũmagidali
Matthew27:57 Na hwaĩ-inĩ wakinya-rĩ
Matthew27:58 Nake agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Pilato
Matthew27:59 Jusufu akĩoya mwĩrĩ ũcio
Matthew27:60 akĩũiga thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra yake njerũ ĩrĩa eenjithĩtie rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga. Akĩgaragaria ihiga inene mũromo-inĩ wa mbĩrĩra ĩyo
Matthew27:61 Mariamu Mũmagidali na Mariamu ũcio ũngĩ maikarĩte hau mangʼetheire mbĩrĩra.
Matthew27:62 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ ũrĩa ũrũmagĩrĩra Mũthenya wa Ihaarĩria
Matthew27:63 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew27:64 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ruta watho nĩguo mbĩrĩra ĩyo ĩrangĩrwo nginya mũthenya wa gatatũ. Kwaga ũguo
Matthew27:65 Nake Pilato akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:66 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩthiĩ
Matthew28:1 Thuutha wa Thabatũ
Matthew28:2 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew28:3 Oonekaga ahaana ta rũheni
Matthew28:4 Nao arangĩri acio makĩmwĩtigĩra mũno nginya makĩinaina makĩhaana
Matthew28:5 Nake mũraika ũcio akĩĩra andũ-a-nja acio atĩrĩ
Matthew28:6 Ndarĩ haha
Matthew28:7 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew28:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew28:9 Na o rĩmwe Jesũ agĩtũngana nao
Matthew28:10 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew28:11 Na rĩrĩa andũ-a-nja acio maathiiaga-rĩ
Matthew28:12 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene magĩcemania na athuuri
Matthew28:13 magĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew28:14 Ũhoro ũyũ ũngĩkinyĩra barũthi
Matthew28:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thigari ikĩoya mbeeca icio
Matthew28:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe magĩthiĩ Galili
Matthew28:17 Na rĩrĩa maamuonire-rĩ
Matthew28:18 Nake Jesũ agĩthiĩ kũrĩ o akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew28:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thiĩi mũgatũme andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ciothe matuĩke arutwo akwa
Matthew28:20 na mũkĩmarutaga gwathĩkĩra maũndũ marĩa mothe ndĩmwathĩte. Na ti-itherũ ndĩ hamwe na inyuĩ hĩndĩ ciothe
Mark1:1 Kĩambĩrĩria kĩa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega ũkoniĩ Jesũ Kristũ Mũrũ wa Ngai.
Mark1:2 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa Isaia ũrĩa mũnabii atĩrĩ: “Nĩngũtũma mũtũmwo wakwa athiĩ mbere yaku
Mark1:3 “Kũrĩ mũgambo wa mũndũ ũkwanĩrĩra werũ-inĩ akoiga atĩrĩ
Mark1:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Johana ookire akĩhunjagia
Mark1:5 Nao andũ othe a bũrũri wa Judea na andũ othe a Jerusalemu magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we. Moimbũraga mehia mao
Mark1:6 Johana ehumbaga nguo ciathondeketwo na guoya wa ngamĩĩra
Mark1:7 Nayo ndũmĩrĩri yake yarĩ ĩno: “Thuutha wakwa nĩgũgũũka mũndũ ũngĩ ũrĩ na hinya kũngĩra
Mark1:8 Niĩ ndĩmũbatithagia na maaĩ
Mark1:9 Na rĩrĩ
Mark1:10 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimĩraga maaĩ-inĩ akĩona igũrũ rĩahingũka
Mark1:11 Mũgambo ũkiuma igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Mark1:12 Na o rĩmwe Roho akĩmuoya akĩmũtwara werũ-inĩ
Mark1:13 na agĩikara kũu werũ-inĩ matukũ mĩrongo ĩna
Mark1:14 Thuutha wa Johana gũikio njeera
Mark1:15 akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark1:16 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aathiiagĩra hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria rĩa Galili
Mark1:17 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark1:18 O rĩmwe magĩtiganĩria neti ciao makĩmũrũmĩrĩra.
Mark1:19 Na aathiathia hanini
Mark1:20 O rĩmwe akĩmeeta
Mark1:21 Nao magĩthiĩ Kaperinaumu
Mark1:22 Na andũ makĩgegio nĩ ũrutani wake
Mark1:23 Na rĩrĩ
Mark1:24 “Ũrenda atĩa na ithuĩ
Mark1:25 Nake Jesũ akĩmĩkũma na hinya
Mark1:26 Ngoma ĩyo thũku ĩkĩmũthukathuka na hinya na ĩkiuma thĩinĩ wake ĩgĩkayaga.
Mark1:27 Andũ acio othe makĩgega mũno nginya makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Mark1:28 Nayo ngumo yake ĩkĩhunja na ihenya bũrũri wothe wa Galili.
Mark1:29 Na maarĩkia kuuma thunagogi
Mark1:30 Na rĩrĩ
Mark1:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ agĩthiĩ harĩa aarĩ
Mark1:32 Hwaĩ-inĩ ũcio thuutha wa riũa gũthũa
Mark1:33 Nao andũ a itũũra othe makĩũngana hau mũrango-inĩ wa nyũmba
Mark1:34 nake Jesũ akĩhonia andũ aingĩ arĩa maarĩ na mĩrimũ mĩthemba mĩingĩ. Ningĩ akĩingata ndaimono nyingĩ
Mark1:35 Rũciinĩ kĩroko tene kũrĩ o na nduma
Mark1:36 Nake Simoni na arĩa maarĩ nao magĩthiĩ kũmwetha
Mark1:37 na rĩrĩa maamuonire
Mark1:38 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark1:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthiũrũrũka Galili guothe akĩhunjagia thunagogi-inĩ ciao na akĩingataga ndaimono.
Mark1:40 Na mũndũ ũmwe warĩ na mangũ agĩũka kũrĩ we na akĩmũthaitha aturĩtie maru
Mark1:41 Nake Jesũ akĩringwo nĩ tha nyingĩ
Mark1:42 Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ ũcio agĩthirwo nĩ mangũ
Mark1:43 Nake Jesũ akĩmũkaania na hinya na akĩmwĩra athiĩ
Mark1:44 ningĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark1:45 No handũ ha ũguo agĩthiĩ
Mark2:1 Matukũ manini maathira
Mark2:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ aingĩ makĩũngana nginya hakĩaga handũ ha gũikarwo
Mark2:3 Nĩhookire andũ
Mark2:4 Na tondũ matingĩahotire kũmũkinyia harĩa Jesũ aarĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũingĩ wa andũ-rĩ
Mark2:5 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire wĩtĩkio wao
Mark2:6 Na rĩrĩ
Mark2:7 “Mũndũ ũyũ ekwaria ũguo nĩkĩ? Nĩ araruma Ngai! Nũũ ũngĩ ũngĩhota kũrekanĩra mehia tiga Ngai wiki?”
Mark2:8 O rĩmwe Jesũ akĩmenya thĩinĩ wa roho wake atĩ ũguo nĩguo meciiragia ngoro-inĩ ciao
Mark2:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ mũhũthũ: kwĩra mũndũ ũyũ ũkuĩte ciĩga atĩrĩ
Mark2:10 No nĩgeetha mũmenye atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩ na ũhoti gũkũ thĩ wa kũrekanĩra mehia-rĩ … .” Akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wakuĩte ciĩga atĩrĩ
Mark2:11 “Ndakwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark2:12 Nake agĩũkĩra
Mark2:13 O rĩngĩ Jesũ nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria; nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩnene gĩgĩũka kũrĩ we
Mark2:14 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aahĩtũkaga
Mark2:15 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩĩaga irio cia hwaĩ-inĩ nyũmba kwa Lawi
Mark2:16 Rĩrĩa arutani a watho arĩa maarĩ Afarisai moonire akĩrĩĩanĩra na andũ ehia na etia mbeeca cia igooti
Mark2:17 Nake Jesũ aigua ũguo akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark2:18 Na rĩrĩ
Mark2:19 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark2:20 No ihinda nĩrĩgakinya rĩrĩa mũhikania akeeherio kuuma kũrĩ o
Mark2:21 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkagĩra nguo ngũrũ kĩraka kĩerũ. Angĩĩka ũguo
Mark2:22 Ningĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkĩraga ndibei ya mũhihano mondo-inĩ ngũrũ. Angĩĩka ũguo
Mark2:23 Na mũthenya ũmwe warĩ wa Thabatũ-rĩ
Mark2:24 Nao Afarisai makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark2:25 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark2:26 Aatoonyire nyũmba ya Ngai rĩrĩa Abiatharu aarĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Mark2:27 Ningĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark2:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark3:1 Ningĩ nĩatoonyire thunagogi rĩngĩ
Mark3:2 Andũ amwe ao nĩmacaragia ũndũ mangĩthitangĩra Jesũ
Mark3:3 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ mwonju guoko atĩrĩ
Mark3:4 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark3:5 Akĩmarora arakaire
Mark3:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai makiumagara na makĩambĩrĩria gũthugunda me hamwe na Aherodia ũrĩa mangĩũraga Jesũ.
Mark3:7 Nake Jesũ na arutwo ake makiuma kũu magĩthiĩ iria-inĩ
Mark3:8 Na rĩrĩa maiguire ũrĩa wothe eekaga
Mark3:9 Na tondũ wa gĩkundi kĩu
Mark3:10 Nĩgũkorwo nĩahonetie andũ aingĩ
Mark3:11 Na rĩrĩa rĩothe ngoma thũku ciamuonaga
Mark3:12 Nowe agĩcikaania na hinya mũno itikoige we nĩwe ũ.
Mark3:13 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩambata kĩrĩma-inĩ na agĩĩta arĩa eyendeire
Mark3:14 Akĩamũra ikũmi na eerĩ
Mark3:15 na magĩe na ũhoti wa kũingata ndaimono.
Mark3:16 Andũ acio ikũmi na eerĩ aathuurire nĩ Simoni (ũrĩa aatuire Petero);
Mark3:17 na Jakubu wa Zebedi na mũrũ wa nyina Johana (nao acio akĩmatua Boanerigesi
Mark3:18 na Anderea
Mark3:19 na Judasi Mũisikariota
Mark3:20 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩtoonya nyũmba
Mark3:21 Rĩrĩa andũ ao maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Mark3:22 Nao arutani a watho arĩa maikũrũkĩte kuuma Jerusalemu makiuga atĩrĩ
Mark3:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ akĩmeeta
Mark3:24 Ũthamaki ũngĩamũkana guo mwene
Mark3:25 Nyũmba ĩngĩamũkana na andũ ayo mokanĩrĩre
Mark3:26 Nake Shaitani angĩĩyũkĩrĩra we mwene na aamũkane-rĩ
Mark3:27 Na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtoonya nyũmba ya mũndũ njamba na amũtunye indo ciake
Mark3:28 Ndamwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark3:29 No ũrĩa wothe ũkaaruma Roho Mũtheru ndarĩ hĩndĩ akarekerwo
Mark3:30 Oigire ũguo tondũ moigaga atĩrĩ
Mark3:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Mark3:32 Nakĩo gĩkundi kĩa andũ nĩgĩaikarĩte thĩ hau kĩmũrigiicĩirie
Mark3:33 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark3:34 Agĩcooka akĩrora arĩa maikarĩte mamũrigiicĩirie
Mark3:35 Ũrĩa wothe wĩkaga maũndũ marĩa Ngai endaga
Mark4:1 Nake Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kũrutana o rĩngĩ arĩ kũu hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria. Na rĩrĩ
Mark4:2 Na akĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano
Mark4:3 “Ta thikĩrĩriai! Mũrĩmi ũmwe nĩoimagarire akahure mbeũ ciake.
Mark4:4 Na rĩrĩa aahuraga mbeũ icio
Mark4:5 Iria ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara-inĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ. Nacio ikĩmera narua tondũ tĩĩri ndwarĩ mũriku.
Mark4:6 No rĩrĩa riũa rĩaarire rĩgĩcina mĩmera ĩyo
Mark4:7 Mbeũ iria ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩigua-inĩ
Mark4:8 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩri-inĩ mũnoru. Ikĩmera
Mark4:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:10 Na rĩrĩa aarĩ wiki
Mark4:11 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark4:12 nĩgeetha
Mark4:13 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark4:14 Mũrĩmi ahuraga kiugo kĩa Ngai.
Mark4:15 Andũ amwe matariĩ ta mbeũ iria ciagũire njĩra-inĩ harĩa ũhoro ũhuragwo. Acio nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro
Mark4:16 Angĩ nao matariĩ ta mbeũ iria ciagũire rũnyanjara-inĩ. Acio nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro na o rĩmwe makawamũkĩra na gĩkeno.
Mark4:17 No tondũ matirĩ na mĩri-rĩ
Mark4:18 Angĩ nao matariĩ ta mbeũ iria ciagũire mĩigua-inĩ. Acio nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro
Mark4:19 no mĩhangʼo ya maũndũ ma mũtũũrĩre ũyũ
Mark4:20 Angĩ matariĩ ta mbeũ iria ciagũire tĩĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru. Acio nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro
Mark4:21 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark4:22 Nĩgũkorwo kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ hitho-inĩ nĩgĩkaguũrio
Mark4:23 Akorwo mũndũ arĩ na matũ ma kũigua
Mark4:24 Agĩthiĩ na mbere
Mark4:25 Ũrĩa wothe wĩ na indo nĩakongererwo nyingĩ; na ũrĩa wothe ũtarĩ nĩagatuunywo o na kĩrĩa arĩ nakĩo.”
Mark4:26 Jesũ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:27 Akomaga ũtukũ na agokĩra mũthenya
Mark4:28 Tĩĩri guo mwene nĩguo ũtũmaga iciare. Ciambaga kũruta nguha igacooka ikaruta igira
Mark4:29 Na maciaro macio maarĩkia kũũma
Mark4:30 Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:31 Ũhaana ta mbeũ ya karatarĩ
Mark4:32 No yahaandwo-rĩ
Mark4:33 Jesũ nĩamaheaga ũhoro na ngerekano ingĩ nyingĩ ta icio o ta ũrĩa mangĩahotire kũigua.
Mark4:34 Gũtirĩ ũndũ aameeraga atekwaria na ngerekano. No rĩrĩa maarĩ na arutwo ake oiki
Mark4:35 Na mũthenya o ũcio gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ-rĩ
Mark4:36 Na maarĩkia gũtiga gĩkundi kĩa andũ na thuutha
Mark4:37 Na rĩrĩ
Mark4:38 Jesũ aarĩ toro akomeire muto mũthia-inĩ wa gatarũ. Nao arutwo makĩmũũkĩria makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark4:39 Nake Jesũ agĩũkĩra
Mark4:40 Jesũ akĩũria arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Mark4:41 Nao magĩĩtigĩra mũno na makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Mark5:1 Jesũ na arutwo ake magĩkinya mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria
Mark5:2 Na Jesũ aarĩkia kuuma gatarũ-inĩ
Mark5:3 Mũndũ ũcio aatũũraga kũu mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Mark5:4 Nĩgũkorwo nĩohagwo kaingĩ na mĩnyororo moko na magũrũ
Mark5:5 Aatũũraga akayaga ũtukũ na mũthenya
Mark5:6 Rĩrĩa oonire Jesũ arĩ o haraaya akĩhanyũka
Mark5:7 Akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Mark5:8 Nĩgũkorwo Jesũ aamwĩrĩte atĩrĩ
Mark5:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark5:10 Nake agĩkĩrĩrĩria gũthaitha Jesũ mũno ndagacingate ciume bũrũri ũcio.
Mark5:11 Na rĩrĩ
Mark5:12 Ndaimono icio igĩthaitha Jesũ
Mark5:13 Nake agĩciĩtĩkĩria. Nacio ndaimono icio ikiuma igĩthiĩ igĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa ngũrwe. Rũũru rũu ruothe rwa mũigana wa ngũrwe ngiri igĩrĩ
Mark5:14 Arĩa maarĩithagia ngũrwe icio makĩũra
Mark5:15 Na rĩrĩa mookire harĩ Jesũ
Mark5:16 Andũ arĩa moonete ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkwo makĩĩra andũ acio angĩ maũndũ marĩa mekĩkire kũrĩ mũndũ ũcio waiyũrĩtwo nĩ ndaimono
Mark5:17 Nao andũ acio makĩambĩrĩria gũthaitha Jesũ oime bũrũri ũcio wao.
Mark5:18 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyaga gatarũ
Mark5:19 No Jesũ akĩmũgiria
Mark5:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark5:21 Nake Jesũ aarĩkia kũringa rĩngĩ na gatarũ na aakinya mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria
Mark5:22 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo mũnene ũmwe wa thunagogi wetagwo Jairũ agĩũka hau. Oona Jesũ
Mark5:23 akĩmũthaitha mũno
Mark5:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ agĩthiĩ nake. Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩnene gĩkĩmũrũmĩrĩra
Mark5:25 Na rĩrĩ
Mark5:26 Nĩathĩĩnĩkĩte mũno agĩthondekwo nĩ mandagĩtarĩ aingĩ
Mark5:27 Rĩrĩa aiguire ũhoro wa Jesũ
Mark5:28 tondũ eeciiririe atĩrĩ
Mark5:29 O rĩmwe agĩtiga kuura
Mark5:30 Nake Jesũ o rĩmwe akĩigua atĩ hinya nĩwoima harĩ we. Akĩĩhũgũrĩra kĩrĩndĩ kĩu akĩũria atĩrĩ
Mark5:31 Nao arutwo ake makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark5:32 No Jesũ akĩroranga one nũũ wamũhutĩtie.
Mark5:33 Nake mũtumia ũcio
Mark5:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:35 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩaragia-rĩ
Mark5:36 Nake Jesũ akĩaga gũthikĩrĩria ũguo moigaga
Mark5:37 Jesũ ndetĩkĩririe mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ amũrũmĩrĩre
Mark5:38 Na maakinya mũciĩ kwa mũnene ũcio wa thunagogi
Mark5:39 Agĩtoonya thĩinĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark5:40 Nao makĩmũthekerera. Na thuutha wa kũmoimia nja othe
Mark5:41 Akĩnyiita mwana guoko
Mark5:42 O rĩmwe kairĩtu kau gagĩũkĩra
Mark5:43 Nake akĩmakaania mũno matikareke mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ amenye ũhoro ũcio
Mark6:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ itũũra rĩao
Mark6:2 Mũthenya wa Thabatũ wakinya
Mark6:3 Githĩ ũyũ ti ũrĩa bundi wa mbaũ? Githĩ ũyũ ti mũrũ wa Mariamu
Mark6:4 Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark6:5 Nake Jesũ ndaahotire kũringa ciama kũu
Mark6:6 Nake akĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maagĩte wĩtĩkio. Jesũ agĩcooka agĩthiĩ akĩrutanaga itũũra gwa itũũra.
Mark6:7 Agĩcooka agĩĩta arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ
Mark6:8 Na akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark6:9 Ĩkĩrai iraatũ no mũtigakuue nguo cia kũgarũrĩra.
Mark6:10 Rĩrĩa rĩothe mwatoonya nyũmba
Mark6:11 Na kũrĩa andũ matakamũnyiita ũgeni kana marege kũmũthikĩrĩria-rĩ
Mark6:12 Nao makiumagara magĩthiĩ makĩhunjagia atĩ andũ merire.
Mark6:13 Ningĩ makĩingata ndaimono nyingĩ na magĩitĩrĩria andũ aingĩ arĩa maarĩ arũaru maguta nao makĩhona.
Mark6:14 Mũthamaki Herode nĩaiguire ũhoro ũcio
Mark6:15 Angĩ nao makoiga atĩrĩ
Mark6:16 Nowe Herode rĩrĩa aiguire ũhoro ũcio
Mark6:17 Nĩgũkorwo
Mark6:18 Nake Johana nĩeraga Herode atĩrĩ
Mark6:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Herodia agĩtuma Johana ũthũ na akĩenda kũmũũragithia. No ndangĩahotire gwĩka ũguo
Mark6:20 nĩgũkorwo Herode nĩetigĩrĩte Johana na akamũgitagĩra
Mark6:21 Na rĩrĩ
Mark6:22 Na rĩrĩa mwarĩ wa Herodia aatoonyire kũu maarĩ na akĩina-rĩ
Mark6:23 Akĩĩhĩta
Mark6:24 Mũirĩtu ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩũria nyina atĩrĩ
Mark6:25 O rĩmwe mũirĩtu ũcio akĩhiũha
Mark6:26 Mũthamaki akĩigua kĩeha mũno
Mark6:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũma mũthigari ũmwe wa arĩa maamũrangagĩra
Mark6:28 akĩũrehe na kiuga
Mark6:29 Nao arutwo a Johana maigua ũhoro ũcio
Mark6:30 Atũmwo nĩmagomanire harĩ Jesũ
Mark6:31 Na tondũ wa ũrĩa andũ aingĩ mookaga magĩthiiaga-rĩ
Mark6:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩingĩra gatarũ marĩ oiki
Mark6:33 Nao andũ aingĩ arĩa maamonire magĩthiĩ
Mark6:34 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimire gatarũ
Mark6:35 Na gwatua gũtuka
Mark6:36 Ĩra andũ aya mathiĩ nĩguo makinye mĩgũnda-inĩ na matũũra-inĩ marĩa me hakuhĩ makegũrĩre kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa.”
Mark6:37 Nowe akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark6:38 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark6:39 Nake Jesũ agĩathana andũ othe maikare thĩ ikundi ikundi kũu nyeki-inĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ ho nduru.
Mark6:40 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩikara thĩ marĩ ikundi cia andũ igana na cia andũ mĩrongo ĩtano.
Mark6:41 Nake akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ
Mark6:42 Nao othe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna
Mark6:43 nao arutwo makĩũngania cienyũ cia mĩgate na cia thamaki iria ciatigarĩte makĩiyũria ciondo ikũmi na igĩrĩ.
Mark6:44 Mũigana wa arũme arĩa othe maarĩire irio icio maarĩ ngiri ithano.
Mark6:45 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake matoonye gatarũ mathiiage mbere yake makinye Bethisaida
Mark6:46 Thuutha wa kũmoigĩra ũhoro
Mark6:47 Na gũgĩkinya hwaĩ-inĩ
Mark6:48 Nake akĩona arutwo makĩĩgũmĩra gũtwara gatarũ
Mark6:49 no-o mamuona agereire maaĩ igũrũ magĩĩciiria nĩ ngoma moonaga. Magĩkaya
Mark6:50 tondũ othe nĩmamuonire na magĩĩtigĩra mũno. O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark6:51 Agĩcooka agĩtoonya gatarũ kau maarĩ
Mark6:52 tondũ matiataũkĩirwo nĩ ũhoro wa mĩgate ĩyo; ngoro ciao ciarĩ o nyũmũ.
Mark6:53 Na maarĩkia kũringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ
Mark6:54 Maarĩkia kuuma gatarũ-inĩ
Mark6:55 Magĩtuĩkania bũrũri-inĩ ũcio wothe magakuuaga andũ arĩa maarĩ arũaru na ibarĩ
Mark6:56 Na kũrĩa guothe aathiiaga
Mark7:1 Na rĩrĩ
