Mark7:2 makĩona arutwo ake amwe makĩrĩa irio na moko maarĩ na thaahu
Mark7:3 (Afarisai na Ayahudi othe matirĩĩaga irio matethambĩte moko mao wega kũringana na kĩrĩra gĩa athuuri.
Mark7:4 Rĩrĩa moima ndũnyũ matingĩrĩa matambĩte gwĩthamba. Na nĩ marũmagia irĩra ingĩ
Mark7:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Afarisai na Arutani a watho makĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Mark7:6 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark7:7 Nao maahooyaga o tũhũ; morutani marĩa marutanaga no mawatho ma andũ.’
Mark7:8 Mũtiganĩirie maathani ma Ngai
Mark7:9 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark7:10 Nĩgũkorwo Musa oigire atĩrĩ
Mark7:11 No inyuĩ muugaga atĩ mũndũ angĩĩra ithe kana nyina atĩrĩ
Mark7:12 na mũticookaga kũmwĩtĩkĩria ekĩre ithe kana nyina ũndũ.
Mark7:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũkaagithia kiugo kĩa Ngai kĩene na ũndũ wa kĩrĩra kĩanyu kĩrĩa mũthiiaga mũgĩtiganagĩra. Na nĩmwĩkaga maũndũ maingĩ ta macio.”
Mark7:14 O rĩngĩ Jesũ agĩĩta kĩrĩndĩ harĩ we agĩkĩĩra atĩrĩ
Mark7:15 Gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ nja ya mũndũ kĩngĩmũgwatia ‘thaahu’ nĩ ũndũ wa gũtoonya thĩinĩ wake. No rĩrĩ
Mark7:16 (Aakorwo mũndũ arĩ na matũ ma kũigua
Mark7:17 Thuutha wa gũtigana na kĩrĩndĩ na gũtoonya nyũmba
Mark7:18 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark7:19 Nĩgũkorwo gĩtitoonyaga ngoro-inĩ yake
Mark7:20 Agĩthiĩ na mbere na kwaria
Mark7:21 Nĩgũkorwo ngoro-inĩ cia andũ nĩkuo kuumaga meciiria mooru
Mark7:22 na ũkoroku
Mark7:23 Maũru maya mothe moimaga thĩinĩ wa mũndũ na makamũgwatia thaahu.”
Mark7:24 Nake Jesũ akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ gũkuhĩ na Turo. Agĩtoonya nyũmba ĩmwe na ndeendaga mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ amenye atĩ arĩ kũu; no ndangĩahotire kwĩhitha.
Mark7:25 Na rĩrĩ
Mark7:26 Mũtumia ũcio aarĩ Mũyunani
Mark7:27 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark7:28 Nake mũtumia ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark7:29 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark7:30 Mũtumia ũcio akĩinũka mũciĩ agĩkora kaana gake gakomete ũrĩrĩ-inĩ na ndaimono ĩrĩkĩtie gũthiĩ.
Mark7:31 Ningĩ Jesũ akiuma kũu gũkuhĩ na Turo agĩtuĩkanĩria Sidoni
Mark7:32 Arĩ kũu andũ amwe makĩmũrehere mũndũ ũtaiguaga na ũtaaragia
Mark7:33 Na thuutha wa kũmũtwara handũ keheri-inĩ
Mark7:34 Akĩrora na igũrũ
Mark7:35 Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo matũ ma mũndũ ũcio makĩhingũka na rũrĩmĩ rwake rũkĩregera akĩambĩrĩria kwaria o wega.
Mark7:36 Nake Jesũ akĩmaatha matikeere mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ. No ũrĩa akĩragĩrĩria kũmakaania
Mark7:37 Nao andũ makĩgega mũno makĩria
Mark8:1 Na rĩrĩ
Mark8:2 “Nĩndĩraiguĩra andũ aya tha Nĩgũkorwo makoretwo hamwe na niĩ rĩu mĩthenya ĩtatũ na matirĩ na kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa.
Mark8:3 Ingĩmeera mainũke mahũũtiĩ mekũringĩkĩra njĩra
Mark8:4 Nao arutwo makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark8:5 Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark8:6 Akĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ gĩikare thĩ. Nake akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo mũgwanja
Mark8:7 O na nĩ maarĩ na tũthamaki tũnini tũtarĩ tũingĩ; agĩcookia ngaatho nĩ ũndũ watuo
Mark8:8 Nao makĩrĩa makĩhũũna. Thuutha ũcio arutwo makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩte
Mark8:9 Andũ arũme arĩa maarĩire maarĩ ta ngiri inya. Na aarĩkia kũmeera mathiĩ
Mark8:10 agĩtoonya gatarũ me na arutwo ake
Mark8:11 Nao Afarisai magĩũka na makĩambĩrĩria kũũria Jesũ ciũria. Makĩmwĩra aringe kĩama kuuma igũrũ no nĩkũmũgeria maamũgeragia.
Mark8:12 Nake akĩhũmũka ihũmũka inene
Mark8:13 Agĩcooka akĩmatiga
Mark8:14 Na rĩrĩ
Mark8:15 Nake Jesũ akĩmataara akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark8:16 Nao makĩaranĩria ũhoro ũcio mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Mark8:17 Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeranaga akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark8:18 Anga mũrĩ na maitho na mũtionaga
Mark8:19 Rĩrĩa ndenyũrangĩire andũ arĩa ngiri ithano mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtano-rĩ
Mark8:20 “Na rĩrĩa ndenyũrangĩire andũ arĩa ngiri inya mĩgate ĩrĩa mũgwanja-rĩ
Mark8:21 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark8:22 Na maakinya Bethisaida
Mark8:23 Akĩnyiita mũndũ ũcio mũtumumu guoko
Mark8:24 Nake agĩtiira maitho
Mark8:25 O rĩngĩ Jesũ akĩigĩrĩra mũndũ ũcio moko maitho. Hĩndĩ ĩyo maitho make makĩhingũka
Mark8:26 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark8:27 Jesũ na arutwo ake magĩthiĩ na mbere o nginya tũtũũra-inĩ tũrĩa twarigiicĩirie Kaisarea-Filipi. Na me njĩra-inĩ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark8:28 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark8:29 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark8:30 Nake Jesũ akĩmakaania matikeere mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũhoro wake.
Mark8:31 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kũmaruta atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no nginya one mathĩĩna maingĩ na aregwo nĩ athuuri
Mark8:32 Aaririe ũhoro ũcio atekũhitha
Mark8:33 No Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩrora arutwo ake
Mark8:34 Agĩcooka agĩĩta kĩrĩndĩ hamwe na arutwo ake moke harĩ we
Mark8:35 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa wothe wendaga kũhonokia muoyo wake nĩ kũũrwo akoorwo nĩguo
Mark8:36 Mũndũ angĩĩguna nakĩ angĩĩgwatĩra thĩ yothe
Mark8:37 Kana nĩ kĩĩ mũndũ angĩkũũrania na muoyo wake?
Mark8:38 Mũndũ o wothe ũngĩconoka nĩ ũndũ wakwa na aconoke nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo ciakwa hĩndĩ ĩno ya rũciaro rũrũ rwa ũtharia na rwa mehia
Mark9:1 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark9:2 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Mark9:3 Nguo ciake ikĩerũha cua; gũtirĩ mũndũ gũkũ thĩ ũngĩahotire gũcithambia cierũhe ũguo.
Mark9:4 Na marĩ o hau makiumĩrĩrwo nĩ Elija na Musa
Mark9:5 Nake Petero akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Mark9:6 (Petero oigire ũguo tondũ nĩarigĩtwo nĩ ũrĩa ekuuga
Mark9:7 Ningĩ hagĩũka itu
Mark9:8 Na kahinda o kau makĩĩhũgũra
Mark9:9 Na rĩrĩa maikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩma-inĩ
Mark9:10 Nao magĩkira na ũhoro ũcio
Mark9:11 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark9:12 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark9:13 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark9:14 Na rĩrĩa maakinyire harĩ arutwo arĩa angĩ
Mark9:15 Na rĩrĩa andũ othe moonire Jesũ
Mark9:16 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark9:17 Mũndũ ũmwe warĩ kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ kĩu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark9:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe yamũnyiita
Mark9:19 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark9:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩgatwarĩra Jesũ. Rĩrĩa ngoma ĩyo thũku yoonire Jesũ
Mark9:21 Nake Jesũ akĩũria ithe wa kamwana kau atĩrĩ
Mark9:22 Na maita maingĩ yanagaikia mwaki-inĩ o na maaĩ-inĩ ĩkoorage. No akorwo nĩ harĩ ũndũ ũngĩka
Mark9:23 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark9:24 O rĩmwe ithe wa kamwana kau akĩanĩrĩra
Mark9:25 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire atĩ kĩrĩndĩ nĩgĩatengʼerete gĩũke hau
Mark9:26 Ngoma ĩyo thũku ĩgĩkayũrũrũka
Mark9:27 No Jesũ agĩkanyiita guoko
Mark9:28 Thuutha wa Jesũ gũtoonya nyũmba
Mark9:29 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark9:30 Nao makiuma kũu magĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri wa Galili
Mark9:31 tondũ nĩarutaga arutwo ake. Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark9:32 No matiigana gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa oigaga
Mark9:33 Nao magĩkinya Kaperinaumu. Na rĩrĩa aarĩ nyũmba thĩinĩ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark9:34 No-o magĩkira tondũ marĩ njĩra-inĩ nĩmakararanagia makĩũranagia nũũ mũnene kũrĩ arĩa angĩ.
Mark9:35 Na aikara thĩ
Mark9:36 Nake akĩrehe kaana agĩkarũgamia gatagatĩ kao. Na aarĩkia gũkaiyũkia moko-inĩ make
Mark9:37 “Ũrĩa wothe ũngĩamũkĩra kaana kamwe ta gaka thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Mark9:38 Johana akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark9:39 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark9:40 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa ũtarĩ ũthũ na ithuĩ nĩ ũmwe witũ.
Mark9:41 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark9:42 “Na mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũgaatũma kamwe ga twana tũtũ tũnjĩtĩkĩtie kehie
Mark9:43 Guoko gwaku kũngĩtũma wĩhie
Mark9:44 gũkĩra ũthiĩ Jehanamu kũrĩa kũrĩ mwaki ũtahoraga ũrĩ na moko meerĩ.
Mark9:45 Nakuo kũgũrũ gwaku kũngĩtũma wĩhie
Mark9:46 Kũu kĩgunyũ kĩrĩa kĩmarĩĩaga gĩtikuaga
Mark9:47 Na riitho rĩaku rĩngĩtũma wĩhie
Mark9:48 kũu “ ‘kĩgunyũ kĩrĩa kĩmarĩĩaga gĩtikuaga
Mark9:49 Mũndũ o wothe agekĩrwo mũcamo wa cumbĩ nĩ mwaki
Mark9:50 “Cumbĩ nĩ mwega
Mark10:1 Jesũ agĩcooka akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Judea na mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa Jorodani. O rĩngĩ andũ ikundi magĩũka kũrĩ we
Mark10:2 Na Afarisai amwe magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩenda kũmũgeria
Mark10:3 Nake agĩcookia ũhoro
Mark10:4 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark10:5 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark10:6 No kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria
Mark10:7 ‘Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo gĩtũmaga mũndũ mũrũme atige ithe na nyina na anyiitane na mũtumia wake
Mark10:8 nao eerĩ magatuĩka mwĩrĩ ũmwe.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark10:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark10:10 Na maatoonya nyũmba thĩinĩ
Mark10:11 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark10:12 Nake mũtumia angĩtigana na mũthuuriwe
Mark10:13 Nao andũ makĩrehera Jesũ twana tũnini nĩguo atũhutie
Mark10:14 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũguo
Mark10:15 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark10:16 Nake akĩoya twana tũu
Mark10:17 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimagaraga
Mark10:18 Nake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark10:19 Wee nĩ ũũĩ ũrĩa maathani moigĩte: ‘Ndũkanoragane
Mark10:20 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark10:21 Nake Jesũ amũrora
Mark10:22 Mwanake ũcio agĩtukia gĩthiithi. Agĩthiĩ arĩ na kĩeha
Mark10:23 Nake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra
Mark10:24 Nao arutwo makĩgega maigua ciugo ciake. No Jesũ akiuga o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Mark10:25 Nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩĩra kũhungura irima rĩa cindano gũkĩra gĩtonga gũtoonya ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai.”
Mark10:26 Arutwo ake magĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgega
Mark10:27 Nake Jesũ akĩmarora
Mark10:28 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark10:29 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark10:30 ũtakaheo ũtonga maita igana matukũ maya tũrĩ
Mark10:31 No rĩrĩ
Mark10:32 Na rĩrĩa maarĩ njĩra-inĩ makĩambata merekeire Jerusalemu
Mark10:33 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark10:34 nao mamũnyũrũrie na mamũtuĩre mata
Mark10:35 Na rĩrĩ
Mark10:36 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark10:37 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark10:38 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark10:39 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Mark10:40 No ha ũhoro wa gũikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo kana kwa ũmotho ti niĩ heanaga. Itĩ icio ikaaheo arĩa mathondekeirwo cio.”
Mark10:41 Rĩrĩa arutwo acio angĩ ikũmi maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Mark10:42 Nake Jesũ akĩmeeta hamwe akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark10:43 No rĩrĩ
Mark10:44 nake ũrĩa wothe ũkwenda gũtuĩka wa mbere thĩinĩ wanyu
Mark10:45 Nĩgũkorwo o na Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ndookire gũtungatĩrwo
Mark10:46 Nao magĩkinya Jeriko. Na rĩrĩa Jesũ na arutwo ake
Mark10:47 Na rĩrĩa aiguire atĩ nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi
Mark10:48 Andũ aingĩ makĩmũkaania
Mark10:49 Nake Jesũ akĩrũgama
Mark10:50 Agĩteania nguo yake ya igũrũ
Mark10:51 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark10:52 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Mark11:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark11:3 Na mũngĩũrio nĩ mũndũ atĩrĩ
Mark11:4 Nao magĩthiĩ magĩkora njaũ ya ndigiri yohetwo mũromo-inĩ handũ nja
Mark11:5 andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ ho makĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark11:6 Nao makĩmacookeria o ũrĩa Jesũ aamerĩte
Mark11:7 Rĩrĩa maatwarĩire Jesũ njaũ ĩyo
Mark11:8 Andũ aingĩ makĩara nguo ciao njĩra-inĩ
Mark11:9 Andũ arĩa maatongoretie na arĩa maamumĩte thuutha makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
Mark11:10 “Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Mark11:11 Nake Jesũ aatoonya Jerusalemu
Mark11:12 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rĩrĩa moimaga Bethania
Mark11:13 Nake akĩona mũkũyũ warĩ haraaya ũrĩ na mathangũ maruru agĩthiĩ kũrora kana warĩ na ngũyũ. Aakinya harĩ guo
Mark11:14 Nake akĩĩra mũkũyũ ũcio atĩrĩ
Mark11:15 Na maakinya Jerusalemu
Mark11:16 na ndangĩetĩkĩririe mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ahĩtũkĩrie kĩndũ gĩa kwendia kũu nja cia hekarũ.
Mark11:17 Na rĩrĩa aamarutaga
Mark11:18 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho maigua ũguo
Mark11:19 Gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ
Mark11:20 Rũciinĩ
Mark11:21 Petero akĩririkana ũhoro wa mũkũyũ ũcio
Mark11:22 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria
Mark11:23 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark11:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark11:25 Na rĩrĩa mwarũgama mũhooe
Mark11:26 No mũngĩkorwo mũtirekanagĩra mehia
Mark11:27 Magĩkinya o rĩngĩ Jerusalemu
Mark11:28 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark11:29 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark11:30 Ũbatithio wa Johana-rĩ
Mark11:31 Makĩaranĩria o ene ũhoro ũcio
Mark11:32 No tũngiuga atĩrĩ
Mark11:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcookeria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Mark12:1 Nake akĩambĩrĩria kũmahe ũhoro na ngerekano
Mark12:2 Na rĩrĩ
Mark12:3 Nao makĩmĩnyiita makĩmĩhũũra
Mark12:4 Agĩcooka akĩmatũmĩra ndungata ĩngĩ; nao magĩtiihia ndungata ĩyo mũtwe na makĩmĩĩka maũndũ ma thoni.
Mark12:5 Na o rĩngĩ agĩtũma ndungata ĩngĩ
Mark12:6 “Mũndũ ũcio ndaarĩ na mũndũ ũngĩ watigaire wa gũtũma
Mark12:7 “No akombori acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Mark12:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmũnyiita
Mark12:9 “Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:10 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwathoma maandĩko maya: “ ‘Ihiga rĩrĩa aaki maaregire
Mark12:11 Mwathani nĩwe wĩkĩte ũndũ ũcio
Mark12:12 Magĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũnyiita tondũ nĩmamenyire aaragia ũhoro wao na ngerekano ĩyo
Mark12:13 Thuutha ũcio magĩtũma Afarisai amwe na Aherodia kũrĩ Jesũ nĩguo mamũtege na mĩario yake.
Mark12:14 Magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark12:15 Tũrutage kana tũtikarutage?” No tondũ Jesũ nĩamenyaga ũhinga wao
Mark12:16 Makĩmũrehera dinari ĩyo
Mark12:17 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark12:18 Ningĩ Asadukai
Mark12:19 “Mũrutani
Mark12:20 Na rĩrĩ
Mark12:21 Nake wa keerĩ akĩhikia mũtumia ũcio wa ndigwa
Mark12:22 Ũhoro wa ma nĩ atĩ
Mark12:23 Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:24 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark12:25 Rĩrĩa akuũ makaariũka
Mark12:26 Naguo ha ũhoro wa akuũ kũriũka-rĩ
Mark12:27 We ti Ngai wa arĩa akuũ
Mark12:28 Na rĩrĩ
Mark12:29 Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Mark12:30 Endaga Mwathani Ngai waku na ngoro yaku yothe
Mark12:31 Narĩo rĩa keerĩ nĩ rĩrĩ: ‘Endaga mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ o ta ũrĩa wĩendete wee mwene.’ Gũtirĩ rĩathani rĩngĩ inene kũrĩ macio.”
Mark12:32 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Mark12:33 Ningĩ ũmwende na ngoro yaku yothe
Mark12:34 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire nĩacookia wega
Mark12:35 Na rĩrĩ
Mark12:36 Daudi we mwene
Mark12:37 Daudi we mwene aramwĩta ‘Mwathani.’ Angĩgĩtuĩka mũrũwe atĩa?” Na nĩ haarĩ na gĩkundi kĩnene kĩa andũ kĩamũthikagĩrĩria gĩkenete.
Mark12:38 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩrutana
Mark12:39 na makenda gũikaragĩra itĩ iria cia bata thunagogi-inĩ
Mark12:40 Na no-o matoonyagĩrĩra nyũmba cia atumia a ndigwa makamatunya indo ciao
Mark12:41 Jesũ agĩikara thĩ angʼetheire harĩa heekagĩrwo maruta
Mark12:42 No mũtumia ũmwe wa ndigwa warĩ mũthĩĩni agĩũka akĩhotha tũthendi twĩrĩ tũnini mũno twa gĩcango tũrĩa twarĩ mũigana wa mbeeca ĩmwe.
Mark12:43 Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo ake harĩ we
Mark12:44 Acio angĩ othe maheana kũringana na ũingĩ wa ũtonga wao
Mark13:1 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimaga hekarũ-inĩ
Mark13:2 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark13:3 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩte thĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ angʼetheire hekarũ-rĩ
Mark13:4 “Ta twĩre
Mark13:5 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark13:6 Andũ aingĩ nĩ magooka na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa makiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark13:7 Rĩrĩa mũkaigua mbaara na mũhuhu wa mbaara mũtikanamake. Maũndũ ta macio no nginya mekĩke
Mark13:8 Rũrĩrĩ nĩrũgookĩrĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ
Mark13:9 “No inyuĩ-rĩ
Mark13:10 Naguo Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega no nginya wambe ũhunjio kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe.
Mark13:11 Rĩrĩa rĩothe mũkaanyiitwo mũtwarwo mũgaciirithio
Mark13:12 “Mũndũ nĩagakunyanĩra mũrũ wa nyina ooragwo
Mark13:13 Andũ othe nĩmakamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa
Mark13:14 “Rĩrĩa mũkoona kĩrĩa kĩrĩ thaahu na gĩa kũrehe ihooru kĩarũgama harĩa gĩtagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũrũgama-rĩ
Mark13:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũgaakorwo arĩ nyũmba yake igũrũ ndakanaharũrũke kana atoonye kũruta kĩndũ nyũmba.
Mark13:16 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo arĩ mũgũnda ndagacooke mũciĩ kũgĩĩra nguo ciake.
Mark13:17 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagakorwo marĩ na haaro-ĩ!
Mark13:18 Hooyagai Ngai atĩ maũndũ macio matikanakinye hĩndĩ ya heho
Mark13:19 nĩ ũndũ matukũ macio gũgaakorwo na mĩnyamaro ĩtarĩ yoneka ĩngĩ tayo kuuma kĩambĩrĩria rĩrĩa Ngai ombire thĩ nginya rĩu
Mark13:20 Tiga Mwathani anyihanyiihirie matukũ macio
Mark13:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩkamwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark13:22 Nĩgũkorwo Kristũ a maheeni na anabii a maheeni nĩmakeyumĩria monanie morirũ na maringe ciama nĩguo mahĩtithie andũ arĩa aamũre
Mark13:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Mark13:24 “No ihinda-inĩ rĩu
Mark13:25 njata nacio nĩikaagũa kuuma igũrũ
Mark13:26 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ nĩ makoona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agĩũka arĩ thĩinĩ wa matu
Mark13:27 Nake nĩagatũma araika ake macookanĩrĩrie andũ ake arĩa aamũre kuuma mĩena ĩna ĩrĩa yumaga rũhuho
Mark13:28 “Na rĩrĩ
Mark13:29 Ũguo noguo
Mark13:30 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark13:31 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigathira
Mark13:32 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũũĩ ũhoro wa mũthenya ũcio kana ithaa rĩu
Mark13:33 Ikaragai mwĩiguĩte! Ikaragai mwĩhũgĩte! Mũtiũĩ rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩgaakinya.
Mark13:34 Gũkahaana ta mũndũ ũgũthiĩ rũgendo ũrĩa atigaga egaĩra ndungata ciake irorage mũciĩ
Mark13:35 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark13:36 O rĩrĩa angĩũka-rĩ
Mark13:37 Ũguo ngũmwĩra
Mark14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Mark14:2 Makiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:3 Na rĩrĩa arĩ itũũra-inĩ rĩa Bethania kwa mũndũ wetagwo Simoni ũrĩa warĩ na mangũ
Mark14:4 Andũ amwe arĩa maarĩ kuo makĩigua ũũru
Mark14:5 Maguta macio nĩmangĩendio mbeeca ikĩrĩte mũcara wa mũndũ wa mwaka mũgima nacio mbeeca icio iheo athĩĩni.” Magĩkũũma mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio marĩ na ũũru.
Mark14:6 Nowe Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:7 Athĩĩni marĩkoragwo na inyuĩ hĩndĩ ciothe na no mũmateithie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe mũngĩenda. No niĩ mũtirĩkoragwo na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe.
Mark14:8 Anjĩka o ũrĩa angĩahota. Aitĩrĩria mwĩrĩ wakwa maguta o mbere nĩ ũndũ wa kũhaarĩria gũthikwo gwakwa.
Mark14:9 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark14:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Judasi Mũisikariota
Mark14:11 Nao magĩkena mũno maigua ũguo na makĩmwĩra nĩmekũmũhe mbeeca. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Judasi agĩcaria mweke wa kũmũneana kũrĩ o.
Mark14:12 Mũthenya wa mbere wa Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndawa ya Kũimbia
Mark14:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũma arutwo ake eerĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:14 Kũrĩa egũtoonya mwĩre mwene nyũmba ĩyo atĩrĩ
Mark14:15 Nake nĩekũmuonia nyũmba nene ya igũrũ ĩkĩrĩtwo indo na ĩgathondekwo wega. Haarĩriai irio cia Bathaka iitũ kuo.”
Mark14:16 Arutwo acio makiumagara
Mark14:17 Na gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ
Mark14:18 Maikarĩte metha-inĩ makĩrĩa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:19 Makĩnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha mũno
Mark14:20 Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:21 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ egũthiĩ o ta ũrĩa ũhoro wake wandĩkĩtwo. No mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakunyanĩra Mũrũ wa Mũndũ kaĩ arĩ na haaro-ĩ! Nĩ kaba mũndũ ũcio atangĩaciarirwo.”
Mark14:22 Ningĩ o makĩrĩĩaga-rĩ
Mark14:23 Agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe
Mark14:24 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:25 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark14:26 Na maarĩkia kũina rwĩmbo
Mark14:27 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:28 No ndaariũka
Mark14:29 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark14:30 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria
Mark14:31 No Petero akĩaria ahinyĩrĩirie
Mark14:32 Nao magĩkinya handũ heetagwo Gethisemane
Mark14:33 Akĩoya Petero na Jakubu na Johana agĩthiĩ nao
Mark14:34 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:35 Na aathiathia hanini
Mark14:36 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:37 Ningĩ agĩcooka harĩ arutwo ake akĩmakora makomete. Akĩũria Petero atĩrĩ
Mark14:38 Mwĩhũgagei na mũhooyage nĩgeetha mũtikagwe magerio-inĩ. Ngoro nĩyenda
Mark14:39 O rĩngĩ agĩthiĩ akĩhooya o ũguo.
Mark14:40 Na acooka rĩngĩ harĩo
Mark14:41 Ningĩ agĩũka ihinda rĩa gatatũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark14:42 Ũkĩrai
Mark14:43 O akĩaragia-rĩ
Mark14:44 Judasi ũcio wamũkunyanĩire nĩamaheete kĩmenyithia akameera atĩrĩ
Mark14:45 Judasi o rĩmwe agĩthiĩ harĩ Jesũ
Mark14:46 Nao andũ acio makĩguthũkĩra Jesũ makĩmũnyiita.
Mark14:47 Na ũmwe wa arĩa maarũngiĩ hakuhĩ agĩcomora rũhiũ rwake rwa njora agĩtinia gũtũ kwa ndungata ya mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene.
Mark14:48 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark14:49 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ hekarũ-inĩ ngĩrutanaga mũthenya o mũthenya na mũtingĩĩnyiita. No rĩrĩ
Mark14:50 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo ake othe makĩmũtiganĩria
Mark14:51 Na mwanake ũmwe ũteehumbĩte kĩndũ tiga taama wa gatani akĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ. Na rĩrĩa maamũnyiitire
Mark14:52 agĩtiga taama wake nao
Mark14:53 Nao andũ acio magĩtwara Jesũ kũrĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Mark14:54 Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ haraaya o nginya agĩkinya nja ya mũciĩ wa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio mũnene. Agĩikarania na thigari kũu agĩota mwaki.
Mark14:55 Na rĩrĩ
Mark14:56 Na andũ aingĩ nĩmarutire ũira wa maheeni
Mark14:57 Gũgĩcooka gũkĩrũgama andũ amwe
Mark14:58 “Nĩtwaiguire akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:59 No o na moiga ũguo
Mark14:60 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩrũgama gatagatĩ kao
Mark14:61 No Jesũ agĩkira ki
Mark14:62 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark14:63 Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio mũnene agĩtembũranga nguo ciake. Akĩũria atĩrĩ
Mark14:64 Nĩmweiguĩra akĩruma Ngai. Mũgwĩciiria atĩa?” Nao othe makĩmũtuĩra atĩ aagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũũragwo.
Mark14:65 Hĩndĩ ĩyo amwe makĩambĩrĩria kũmũtuĩra mata
Mark14:66 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero aikarĩte o hau nja-rĩ
Mark14:67 Rĩrĩa oonire Petero agĩota mwaki
Mark14:68 Nowe Petero agĩkaana ũhoro ũcio
Mark14:69 Na rĩrĩa ndungata ĩyo ya mũirĩtu yamuonire ho
Mark14:70 No Petero agĩkaana ũhoro ũcio rĩngĩ. Thuutha wa kahinda kanini
Mark14:71 Nake akĩambĩrĩria kwĩhĩta akiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark14:72 O hĩndĩ ĩyo ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga hĩndĩ ya keerĩ. Nake Petero akĩririkana ũhoro ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩrĩte atĩrĩ
Mark15:1 Na rĩrĩ
Mark15:2 Nake Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark15:3 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene makĩmũthitangĩra maũndũ maingĩ.
Mark15:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato akĩmũũria o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Mark15:5 No Jesũ ndaigana gũcookia ũndũ
Mark15:6 Na rĩrĩ
Mark15:7 Na nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ ũmwe wetagwo Baraba woohetwo hamwe na arĩa maambĩrĩirie ngũĩ ya gũũkĩrĩra thirikari na makooraga andũ thĩinĩ wa mbũkĩrĩra ĩyo.
Mark15:8 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩnene gĩgĩthiĩ harĩ Pilato
Mark15:9 Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark15:10 Nĩgũkorwo nĩamenyaga atĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene maaneanĩte Jesũ kũrĩ we nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru.
Mark15:11 No rĩrĩ
Mark15:12 Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark15:13 Nao makĩanĩrĩra
Mark15:14 Nake Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark15:15 Na tondũ nĩendaga gũkenia kĩrĩndĩ kĩu
Mark15:16 Nacio thigari igĩtwara Jesũ gĩikaro-inĩ kĩa barũthi (na nĩkĩo gĩetagwo Puratoria); igĩcookanĩrĩria mbũtũ yothe ya thigari.
Mark15:17 Ikĩmũhumba nguo ndaaya ya rangi wa ndathi
Mark15:18 Ikĩambĩrĩria kũmũnyũrũria
Mark15:19 Ikĩmũhũũra na rũthanju mũtwe maita maingĩ ikĩmũtuagĩra mata. Ikĩĩgũithia thĩ mbere yake
Mark15:20 Na ciarĩkia kũmũnyũrũria-rĩ
Mark15:21 Na marĩ njĩra thigari ikĩnyiita mũndũ wahĩtũkaga akiuma mĩgũnda-inĩ
Mark15:22 Igĩgĩkinyia Jesũ handũ harĩa heetagwo Gologotha (ũguo nĩ kuuga Handũ hahaana ta Ihĩndĩ rĩa Mũtwe).
Mark15:23 Ningĩ igĩcooka ikĩmũhe ndibei ĩtukanĩtio na manemane
Mark15:24 Igĩkĩmwamba mũtĩ igũrũ. Ikĩgayana nguo ciake
Mark15:25 Kwarĩ thaa ithatũ cia rũciinĩ rĩrĩa ciamwambire mũtĩ igũrũ.
Mark15:26 Ũndũ ũrĩa aathitangĩirwo wandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ
Mark15:27 Ningĩ ikĩamba atunyani eerĩ hamwe nake
Mark15:28 (Namo Maandĩko makĩhingio marĩa moigaga atĩrĩ
Mark15:29 Andũ arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra hau nĩmamũrumaga makĩinagia mĩtwe yao
Mark15:30 harũrũka uume mũtharaba-inĩ ũcio
Mark15:31 O ũndũ ũmwe athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene
Mark15:32 Kristũ ũyũ
Mark15:33 Na rĩrĩ
Mark15:34 Na thaa kenda Jesũ akĩgũthũka na mũgambo mũnene
Mark15:35 Rĩrĩa andũ amwe a arĩa marũngiĩ hau maiguire ũguo
Mark15:36 Mũndũ ũmwe agĩtengʼera
Mark15:37 Nake Jesũ agĩkaya aanĩrĩire
Mark15:38 Nakĩo gĩtambaya kĩa hekarũ gĩgĩatũkana icunjĩ igĩrĩ kuuma igũrũ nginya thĩ.
Mark15:39 Na rĩrĩa mũnene-wa-thigari-igana
Mark15:40 Nĩ haarĩ na atumia meeroragĩra marĩ haraaya. Ũmwe wao aarĩ Mariamu Mũmagidali
Mark15:41 Rĩrĩa aarĩ Galili
Mark15:42 Na tondũ kwarĩ Mũthenya wa Kwĩhaarĩria (nĩguo mũthenya ũrĩa wĩ mbere ya Thabatũ)
Mark15:43 Jusufu wa Arimathea
Mark15:44 Nake Pilato akĩgega aigua atĩ Jesũ nĩarĩkĩtie gũkua. Agĩĩta mũthigari ũrĩa mũnene-wa-thigari-igana
Mark15:45 Rĩrĩa aamenyithirio nĩ mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana atĩ nĩguo kwarĩ
Mark15:46 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu akĩgũra taama wa gatani
Mark15:47 Nake Mariamu Mũmagidali na Mariamu ũrĩa nyina wa Jose makĩona harĩa aigirwo.
Mark16:1 Na rĩrĩ
Mark16:2 Mũthenya wa mbere wa kiumia
Mark16:3 nĩmoranagia atĩrĩ
Mark16:4 No rĩrĩa maatiirire maitho
Mark16:5 Na rĩrĩa maatoonyaga mbĩrĩra-thĩinĩ
Mark16:6 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark16:7 No thiĩi mwĩre arutwo ake o na Petero atĩrĩ
Mark16:8 Atumia acio makiuma hau mbĩrĩra-inĩ makĩinainaga na magegete. Matirĩ mũndũ meerire ũndũ
Mark16:9 Mũthenya wa mbere wa kiumia rũciinĩ tene Jesũ ariũka-rĩ
Mark16:10 Nake Mariamu agĩthiĩ akĩĩra arĩa maatũire na Jesũ
Mark16:11 Nao maigua atĩ Jesũ nĩariũkĩte
Mark16:12 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiumĩrĩra andũ angĩ eerĩ ao
Mark16:13 Andũ acio makĩhũndũka
Mark16:14 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiumĩrĩra arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe makĩrĩa irio; akĩmatetia nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga gwĩtĩkia na nĩ ũndũ wa ũmũ wa ngoro ciao
Mark16:15 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark16:16 Na mũndũ o wothe ũgetĩkia na abatithio nĩakahonoka
Mark16:17 Nacio ciama ici nĩ igatwaranaga na arĩa metĩkĩtie: Nĩmakaingata ndaimono thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; na nĩmakaaria na thiomi njerũ;
Mark16:18 na nĩmakanyiita nyoka na moko mao; na rĩrĩa makaanyua thumu
Mark16:19 Mwathani Jesũ aarĩkia kũmaarĩria ũhoro ũcio
Mark16:20 Nao arutwo magĩcooka makiumagara na makĩhunjia ũhoro kũndũ guothe
Luke1:1 Andũ aingĩ nĩmarĩkĩtie kwandĩka ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mahingĩtio gatagatĩ-inĩ gaitũ
Luke1:2 o ta ũrĩa twaheirwo ũhoro wamo nĩ arĩa meyoneire maũndũ macio kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria marĩ aira na ndungata cia ũhoro ũcio.
Luke1:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke1:4 nĩgeetha ũmenye na ma maũndũ marĩa warutirwo.
Luke1:5 Na rĩrĩ
Luke1:6 O eerĩ maarĩ arũngĩrĩru maitho-inĩ ma Ngai
Luke1:7 Nao matiarĩ na twana tondũ Elizabethi aarĩ thaata; na eerĩ maarĩ akũrũ mũno.
Luke1:8 Na rĩrĩ
Luke1:9 nĩathuurirwo na njĩra ya gũcuukĩrwo mĩtĩ
Luke1:10 Na rĩrĩa ihinda rĩa gũcina ũbumba rĩakinyire
Luke1:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũraika wa Mwathani akiumĩrĩra Zakaria
Luke1:12 Rĩrĩa Zakaria aamuonire
Luke1:13 No mũraika ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ: “Zakaria
Luke1:14 Nĩũgakena na ũcanjamũke
Luke1:15 nĩgũkorwo nĩagatuĩka mũndũ mũnene maitho-inĩ ma Mwathani. Ndarĩ hĩndĩ akaanyua ndibei o na kana kĩndũ o kĩngĩ kĩgagatu kĩngĩtũma mũndũ arĩĩo
Luke1:16 Nake nĩakagarũra andũ aingĩ a Isiraeli macookerere Mwathani Ngai wao.
Luke1:17 Na nĩagathiĩ mbere ya Mwathani arĩ na roho na hinya wa Elija
Luke1:18 Zakaria akĩũria mũraika ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke1:19 Mũraika ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke1:20 Na rĩu nĩũgũkira ũremwo nĩ kwaria nginya mũthenya ũrĩa ũndũ ũcio ũkaahinga
Luke1:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo yothe
Luke1:22 Rĩrĩa oimire
Luke1:23 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩake rĩa gũtungata rĩathirire-rĩ
Luke1:24 Thuutha ũcio Elizabethi mũtumia wake akĩgĩa nda
Luke1:25 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:26 Naguo mweri wa ĩtandatũ wa Elizabethi gũkorwo arĩ na nda-rĩ
Luke1:27 akĩmũtũma kũrĩ mũirĩtu gathirange worĩtio nĩ mũndũ wetagwo Jusufu
Luke1:28 Mũraika ũcio akĩmuumĩrĩra
Luke1:29 Nake Mariamu agĩthĩĩnĩka mũno nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke1:30 Nowe mũraika ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:31 Nawe nĩũkũgĩa nda na nĩũgaaciara mwana wa kahĩĩ
Luke1:32 Nake nĩagatuĩka mũnene na ageetagwo Mũrũ-wa-Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno. Mwathani Ngai nĩakamũhe gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩrĩa gĩa ithe Daudi
Luke1:33 nake nĩagathamakĩra nyũmba ya Jakubu nginya tene; ũthamaki wake ndũgaathira o na rĩ.”
Luke1:34 Mariamu akĩũria mũraika ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke1:35 Nake mũraika ũcio akĩmũcookeria
Luke1:36 O na Elizabethi
Luke1:37 Nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩrema Ngai.”
Luke1:38 Nake Mariamu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke1:39 Matukũ-inĩ o ro macio
Luke1:40 agĩtoonya mũciĩ gwa Zakaria
Luke1:41 Rĩrĩa Elizabethi aiguire ngeithi cia Mariamu-rĩ
Luke1:42 Akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Luke1:43 No nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte njĩkwo wega ũũ
Luke1:44 Ndaigua mũgambo wa ngeithi ciaku wakinya matũ-inĩ makwa
Luke1:45 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Luke1:46 Nake Mariamu akiuga atĩrĩ: “Ngoro yakwa nĩĩragooca Mwathani
Luke1:47 naguo roho wakwa nĩũrakenera Ngai Mũhonokia wakwa
Luke1:48 nĩgũkorwo nĩaririkanĩte kwĩnyiihia kwa ndungata yake. Kuuma rĩu njiarwa ciothe irĩĩnjĩtaga mũrathime
Luke1:49 nĩgũkorwo Ũcio ũrĩ Hinya nĩanjĩkĩire maũndũ manene
Luke1:50 Tha ciake nĩikinyagĩra arĩa mamwĩtigagĩra
Luke1:51 Nĩekĩte maũndũ ma hinya na guoko gwake; na arĩa etĩĩi aharaganagia meciiria ma ngoro ciao.
Luke1:52 Nĩaharũrũkĩtie aathani kuuma itĩ-inĩ ciao cia ũnene
Luke1:53 Nĩahũũnĩtie arĩa ahũtu na maũndũ mega
Luke1:54 Nĩateithĩtie Isiraeli ndungata yake
Luke1:55 o ta ũrĩa eerire maithe maitũ
Luke1:56 Nake Mariamu agĩikara na Elizabethi ta mĩeri ĩtatũ
Luke1:57 Na rĩrĩ
Luke1:58 Andũ a itũũra rĩake na a mbarĩ ciao makĩigua atĩ Mwathani nĩakĩrĩrĩirie kũmũiguĩra tha
Luke1:59 Mũthenya wa ĩnana wakinya
Luke1:60 no nyina akĩaria
Luke1:61 Nao andũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:62 Nao makĩũria ithe ũrĩa angĩenda gatuuo na ũndũ wa kũmũheneria na moko.
Luke1:63 Akĩmeetia kahengere ga kwandĩkwo
Luke1:64 O hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩhingũka kanua
Luke1:65 Nao andũ othe a itũũra makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya
Luke1:66 Nao arĩa othe maiguire ũhoro ũcio makĩgegio nĩguo makĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke1:67 Nake ithe Zakaria akĩiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru
Luke1:68 “Mwathani Ngai wa Isiraeli arogoocwo
Luke1:69 Nĩatwambararĩirie rũhĩa rwa ũhonokio thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Daudi
Luke1:70 (o ta ũrĩa aarĩtie matukũ ma tene na tũnua twa anabii ake atheru)
Luke1:71 rwa gũtũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciitũ
Luke1:72 nĩguo aiguĩre maithe maitũ tha
Luke1:73 o mwĩhĩtwa ũrĩa eehĩtĩire ithe witũ Iburahĩmu:
Luke1:74 atĩ nĩagatũhonokia kuuma guoko-inĩ gwa thũ ciitũ
Luke1:75 tũrĩ atheru na athingu mbere yake matukũ-inĩ maitũ mothe.
Luke1:76 “O nawe
Luke1:77 na ũmenyithie andũ ake ũhoro wa ũhonokio nĩ ũndũ wa kũrekerwo mehia mao
Luke1:78 na tondũ wa tha nyingĩ cia Ngai witũ
Luke1:79 nĩgeetha rĩarĩre arĩa matũũraga nduma-inĩ
Luke1:80 Nako kaana kau gagĩkũra
Luke2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke2:2 (Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩarĩ itarana rĩa mbere rĩrĩa rĩataranirwo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Kuirinio aarĩ barũthi wa Suriata.)
Luke2:3 Nao andũ magĩthiĩ kwĩyandĩkithia o mũndũ itũũra-inĩ rĩake mwene.
Luke2:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jusufu o nake akĩambata kuuma itũũra rĩa Nazarethi kũu Galili
Luke2:5 Nake aathiire kuo nĩgeetha makeyandĩkithie marĩ na Mariamu
Luke2:6 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩ o kũu
Luke2:7 Nake Mariamu akĩrigithatha kaana ga kahĩĩ. Agĩkooha na taama
Luke2:8 Na kũu bũrũri ũcio
Luke2:9 Mũraika wa Mwathani akĩmoimĩrĩra
Luke2:10 No mũraika ũcio akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke2:11 Ũmũthĩ itũũra-inĩ rĩa Daudi
Luke2:12 Na rĩrĩ
Luke2:13 Na o rĩmwe hakiumĩra gĩkundi kĩnene kĩa araika a igũrũ hamwe na mũraika ũcio
Luke2:14 “Ngai arokumio kũu igũrũ mũno
Luke2:15 Na rĩrĩa araika acio maamatigire magĩcooka igũrũ-rĩ
Luke2:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩthiĩ mahiũhĩte
Luke2:17 Na maarĩkia gũkoona
Luke2:18 nao arĩa othe maũiguire makĩgegio mũno nĩ maũndũ marĩa arĩithi acio maameeraga.
Luke2:19 Nowe Mariamu akĩiga maũndũ macio mothe ngoro-inĩ yake
Luke2:20 Nao arĩithi acio makĩhũndũka
Luke2:21 Mũthenya wa kanana wakinya
Luke2:22 Na rĩrĩ
Luke2:23 (o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo Watho-inĩ wa Mwathani atĩrĩ
Luke2:24 na marute igongona kũringana na ũrĩa Watho wa Mwathani uugĩte: “Nĩ ndirahũgĩ igĩrĩ kana tũtutuura twĩrĩ.”
Luke2:25 Na rĩrĩ
Luke2:26 Nĩaguũrĩirio nĩ Roho Mũtheru atĩ ndagakua atoneete Kristũ ũrĩa wa Mwathani.
Luke2:27 Nake agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa hekarũ atongoretio nĩ Roho. Na rĩrĩa aciari a kaana kau ti Jesũ
Luke2:28 Simeoni agĩkaiyũkia moko-inĩ make na akĩgooca Ngai
Luke2:29 “Mwathani Mwene-Hinya
Luke2:30 Nĩgũkorwo maitho makwa nĩmonete ũhonokio waku
Luke2:31 ũrĩa ũhaarĩirie mbere ya andũ othe
Luke2:32 ũrĩ ũtheri wa kũguũrĩria andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ
Luke2:33 Nake ithe na nyina makĩgega mũno nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa maaririo igũrũ rĩako.
Luke2:34 Simeoni agĩcooka akĩmarathima akĩĩra Mariamu
Luke2:35 nĩgeetha meciiria ma ngoro nyingĩ maguũrio. O na ngoro yaku o nayo nĩĩgatheecwo na rũhiũ rwa njora.”
Luke2:36 Ningĩ nĩ kwarĩ na mũtumia mũnabii
Luke2:37 agĩcooka agĩikara arĩ wa ndigwa na hĩndĩ ĩyo aarĩ na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnana na ĩna. Nake ndoimaga hekarũ-inĩ
Luke2:38 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo agĩũka harĩo
Luke2:39 Rĩrĩa Jusufu na Mariamu maarĩkirie gwĩka maũndũ marĩa mothe maathanĩtwo nĩ watho wa Mwathani-rĩ
Luke2:40 Nako kaana kau gagĩkũra
Luke2:41 Mwaka o mwaka aciari ake nĩmathiiaga Jerusalemu nĩ ũndũ wa Gĩathĩ kĩa Bathaka.
Luke2:42 Jesũ aakinyia mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Luke2:43 Na Gĩathĩ kĩu gĩathira
Luke2:44 Nao magĩthiĩ rũgendo rwa mũthenya mũgima
Luke2:45 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mamwaagire
Luke2:46 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ makĩmũkora hekarũ-inĩ aikarĩte gatagatĩ ka arutani
Luke2:47 Ũrĩa wothe waiguaga akĩaria nĩagegagio nĩ ũmenyo wake na ũrĩa aacookagia.
Luke2:48 Rĩrĩa aciari ake maamuonire
Luke2:49 Nake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke2:50 No-o matiataũkĩirwo nĩ ũrĩa aameeraga.
Luke2:51 Nake agĩcooka hamwe nao nginya Nazarethi
Luke2:52 Nake Jesũ agĩkũra
Luke3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke3:2 hĩndĩ ĩyo Anasi na Kaiafa maarĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene
Luke3:3 Nake agĩthiĩ bũrũri wothe ũrĩa warĩ hakuhĩ na Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Luke3:4 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa mũnabii Isaia atĩrĩ: “Nĩ mũgambo wa mũndũ ũkwanĩrĩra werũ-inĩ
Luke3:5 Mĩkuru yothe nĩĩgathikwo
Luke3:6 Nao andũ othe nĩmakona ũhonokio wa Ngai.’ ”
Luke3:7 Andũ aingĩ nĩmathiire kũrĩ Johana akamabatithie
Luke3:8 Ciarai maciaro maringaine na kwĩrira. Na mũtikambĩrĩrie kwĩĩra na ngoro cianyu atĩrĩ
Luke3:9 Ithanwa nĩrĩigĩtwo itina-inĩ cia mĩtĩ
Luke3:10 Nao andũ acio makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke3:11 Nake Johana akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke3:12 Nao etia mbeeca cia igooti o nao magĩũka mabatithio
Luke3:13 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke3:14 Nacio thigari ikĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke3:15 Na rĩrĩ
Luke3:16 Nowe Johana akĩmacookeria akĩmeera othe atĩrĩ
Luke3:17 Gĩtarũrũ gĩake akĩnyiitĩte na guoko nĩguo atherie kĩhuhĩro gĩake
Luke3:18 Johana nĩataarire andũ na ciugo nyingĩ na akamahunjagĩria Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega.
Luke3:19 Na rĩrĩ
Luke3:20 Herode nĩongereire ũndũ ũngĩ mũũru makĩria; naguo nĩ wa kũnyiitithia Johana na kũmuohithia njeera.
Luke3:21 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ othe maarĩkirie kũbatithio
Luke3:22 nake Roho Mũtheru agĩikũrũka akĩũmba igũrũ rĩake arĩ na mwĩrĩ wahaanaga ta wa ndutura. Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma Igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke3:23 Na rĩrĩ
Luke3:24 mũrũ wa Mathati
Luke3:25 mũrũ wa Matathia
Luke3:26 mũrũ wa Maathi
Luke3:27 mũrũ wa Joanani
Luke3:28 mũrũ wa Meliki
Luke3:29 mũrũ wa Joshua

Luke4:1 Nake Jesũ akiuma kũu Jorodani aiyũrĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru
Luke4:2 kũrĩa aagereirio nĩ mũcukani matukũ mĩrongo ĩna. Ndaarĩĩaga kĩndũ matukũ-inĩ macio
Luke4:3 Nake mũcukani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke4:4 Nake Jesũ akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke4:5 Ningĩ mũcukani akĩmũtwara handũ hatũũgĩru mũno
Luke4:6 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke4:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũngĩnyinamĩrĩra ũhooe
Luke4:8 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria
Luke4:9 Nake mũcukani akĩmũtwara Jerusalemu
Luke4:10 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Nĩagaatha araika ake nĩ ũndũ waku makũmenyerere wega;
Luke4:11 ningĩ nĩmagakwanĩrĩria na moko mao
Luke4:12 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke4:13 Rĩrĩa mũcukani aarĩkirie kũmũgeria na njĩra ciothe-rĩ
Luke4:14 Nake Jesũ agĩcooka Galili arĩ na hinya wa Roho
Luke4:15 Nake nĩarutanaga thunagogi-inĩ ciao
Luke4:16 Na rĩrĩ
Luke4:17 Akĩnengerwo ibuku rĩa gĩkũnjo rĩa mũnabii Isaia. Akĩrĩkũnjũra
Luke4:18 “Roho wa Mwathani arĩ igũrũ rĩakwa
Luke4:19 ningĩ nyanĩrĩre mwaka wa gwĩtĩkĩrĩka wa Mwathani.”
Luke4:20 Agĩcooka agĩkũnja ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo
Luke4:21 Nake akĩambĩrĩria kwaria
Luke4:22 Nao andũ othe makĩmũgaatha na makĩgegio mũno nĩ ciugo njega iria cioimaga kanua gake. Makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Luke4:23 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke4:24 Agĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
Luke4:25 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke4:26 No Elija ndaigana gũtũmwo kũrĩ o na ũmwe wao
Luke4:27 Ningĩ nĩ kwarĩ andũ aingĩ maarĩ na mangũ thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli ihinda rĩa Elisha ũrĩa mũnabii
Luke4:28 Andũ othe arĩa maarĩ thĩinĩ wa thunagogi nĩmarakarire mũno rĩrĩa maiguire ũguo.
Luke4:29 Magĩũkĩra makĩmũrutũrũra kuuma itũũra-inĩ rĩu
Luke4:30 Nowe Jesũ akĩgerera gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ
Luke4:31 Agĩcooka agĩikũrũka
Luke4:32 Nao andũ makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake
Luke4:33 Na rĩrĩ
Luke4:34 “Hĩ! Ũrenda atĩa na ithuĩ
Luke4:35 Nake Jesũ akĩmĩkũma
Luke4:36 Nao andũ othe makĩgega makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Luke4:37 Nayo ngumo yake ĩkĩhunja kũrĩa guothe kwariganĩtie na kũu.
Luke4:38 Nake Jesũ akiuma thunagogi
Luke4:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke4:40 Na rĩrĩa riũa rĩathũaga
Luke4:41 O na ningĩ ndaimono ikiuma andũ aingĩ
Luke4:42 Na gwakĩa-rĩ
Luke4:43 Nowe akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke4:44 Nake agĩthiĩ na mbere na kũhunjia thĩinĩ wa thunagogi cia Judea.
Luke5:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke5:2 nake akĩona tũtarũ twĩrĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria rĩu
Luke5:3 Agĩtoonya gatarũ kamwe
Luke5:4 Na aarĩkia kwaria
Luke5:5 Nake Simoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke5:6 Maarĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Luke5:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩheneria arĩa maarutithanagia wĩra nao
Luke5:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Simoni Petero onire ũguo
Luke5:9 Nĩgũkorwo we na arĩa othe maarĩ nao nĩmagegire mũno nĩ ũndũ wa thamaki iria maanyiitĩte
Luke5:10 o na Jakubu na Johana
Luke5:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makiumĩria tũtarũ twao hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria
Luke5:12 Na rĩrĩ
Luke5:13 Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake
Luke5:14 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmũkaania
Luke5:15 Na rĩrĩ
Luke5:16 No Jesũ nĩeheragĩra andũ
Luke5:17 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩ kũrutana aarutanaga
Luke5:18 Na rĩrĩ
Luke5:19 Na rĩrĩa maagire njĩra ya gwĩka ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa ũingĩ wa andũ
Luke5:20 Rĩrĩa Jesũ onire wĩtĩkio wao
Luke5:21 Nao Afarisai na arutani a watho makĩambĩrĩria gwĩciiria ngoro-inĩ ciao
Luke5:22 Nowe Jesũ nĩamenyaga ũrĩa meeciiragia na akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke5:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ mũhũthũ; nĩ kwĩra mũndũ
Luke5:24 No nĩgeetha mũmenye atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩ na ũhoti gũkũ thĩ wa kũrekanĩra mehia-rĩ … .” Akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wakuĩte ciĩga atĩrĩ
Luke5:25 O hau hau akĩrũgama mbere yao
Luke5:26 Nao andũ othe nĩmagegire na magĩkumia Ngai. Makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya
Luke5:27 Thuutha wa ũguo
Luke5:28 Nake Lawi agĩũkĩra
Luke5:29 Lawi agĩcooka akĩrugithĩria Jesũ iruga inene gwake mũciĩ
Luke5:30 No Afarisai na arutani a watho arĩa maarĩ a gĩkundi kĩao magĩtetia arutwo ake makĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke5:31 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke5:32 Niĩ ndiokire gwĩta andũ arĩa athingu
Luke5:33 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke5:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke5:35 No rĩrĩ
Luke5:36 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ũhoro na ngerekano ĩno
Luke5:37 Ningĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkagĩra ndibei ya mũhihano mondo-inĩ ngũrũ. Angĩka ũguo
Luke5:38 Aca
Luke5:39 O na gũtirĩ mũndũ thuutha wa kũnyua ndibei ngũrũ ũcookaga kwenda ndibei ĩyo ya mũhihano
Luke6:1 Mũthenya ũmwe wa Thabatũ
Luke6:2 Afarisai amwe makĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke6:3 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke6:4 Aatoonyire Nyũmba ya Ngai
Luke6:5 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke6:6 Na rĩrĩ

Luke6:8 Nowe Jesũ
Luke6:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke6:10 Akĩĩhũgũra
Luke6:11 Nao makĩrakara mũno
Luke6:12 Mũthenya ũmwe Jesũ nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ akahooe
Luke6:13 Gwakĩa-rĩ
Luke6:14 Simoni (ũrĩa aatuire Petero)
Luke6:15 na Mathayo
Luke6:16 na Judasi wa Jakubu
Luke6:17 Nake Jesũ agĩikũrũka hamwe nao
Luke6:18 nao mookĩte nĩguo mamũigue na mahonio mĩrimũ yao. Nao arĩa maanyamaragio nĩ ngoma thũku makĩhonio
Luke6:19 nao andũ othe makĩgeria kũmũhutia
Luke6:20 Nake akĩrora arutwo ake
Luke6:21 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Luke6:22 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Luke6:23 “Mũthenya ũcio nĩmũgakena na mũrũgarũge
Luke6:24 “No rĩrĩ
Luke6:25 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro inyuĩ arĩa mũhũũniĩ rĩu-ĩ
Luke6:26 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro inyuĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ othe mekũmũgaathĩrĩria-ĩ
Luke6:27 “No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ inyuĩ arĩa mũũthikĩrĩirie: endagai thũ cianyu
Luke6:28 na ningĩ mũrathimage arĩa mamũrumaga
Luke6:29 Na rĩrĩ
Luke6:30 Mũndũ o wothe angĩkũhooya kĩndũ mũhe
Luke6:31 Ĩkagai andũ arĩa angĩ o ũrĩa mũngĩenda mamwĩkage.
Luke6:32 “Rĩu-rĩ
Luke6:33 Na mũngĩkorwo mwĩkaga wega o arĩa mamwĩkaga wega-rĩ
Luke6:34 Na ningĩ mũngĩkorwo mũkombithagia o arĩa mwĩhokete nĩmakamũrĩha-rĩ
Luke6:35 No rĩrĩ
Luke6:36 Iguanagĩrai tha
Luke6:37 “Mũtigaciirithanagie nĩgeetha na inyuĩ mũtikanaciirithio. Mũtigatuanagĩre
Luke6:38 Heanagai
Luke6:39 Agĩcooka akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno
Luke6:40 Mũrutwo ti mũnene kũrĩ mũmũruti
Luke6:41 “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma wone kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩa mũrũ wa thoguo
Luke6:42 Wahota atĩa kwĩra mũrũ wa thoguo atĩrĩ
Luke6:43 “Gũtirĩ mũtĩ mwega ũciaraga maciaro mooru
Luke6:44 O mũtĩ ũmenyekaga na maciaro maguo mwene. Andũ matituaga ngũyũ kuuma mĩtĩ-inĩ ya mĩigua
Luke6:45 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwega aragia maũndũ mega kuuma mũthiithũ-inĩ wa ngoro yake
Luke6:46 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke6:47 Nĩngũmuonia ũrĩa mũndũ ũrĩa ũũkaga kũrĩ niĩ
Luke6:48 Ahaana ta mũndũ waakaga nyũmba
Luke6:49 No mũndũ ũrĩa ũiguaga ciugo ciakwa
Luke7:1 Nake Jesũ aarĩkia kwaria maũndũ macio mothe andũ makĩmũiguaga
Luke7:2 No kũu nĩ kwarĩ na ndungata ya mũnene-wa-thigari-igana
Luke7:3 Nake mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana aigua ũhoro wa Jesũ
Luke7:4 Nao maakinya kũrĩ Jesũ
Luke7:5 tondũ nĩendete rũrĩrĩ rwitũ na nĩatwakĩire thunagogi.”
Luke7:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ agĩthiĩ nao. Na marĩ hakuhĩ gũkinya mũciĩ
Luke7:7 O na nokĩo itanona njagĩrĩire gũũka kũrĩ we. No uga o kiugo
Luke7:8 Nĩgũkorwo niĩ mwene ndĩ mũndũ wathagwo
Luke7:9 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũguo
Luke7:10 Nao andũ arĩa maatũmĩtwo magĩcooka mũciĩ magĩkora ngombo ĩyo ĩrĩ honu.
Luke7:11 Ihinda inini rĩathira
Luke7:12 Na rĩrĩa akuhĩrĩirie kĩhingo gĩa itũũra rĩu
Luke7:13 Rĩrĩa Mwathani onire mũtumia ũcio
Luke7:14 Agĩcooka agĩthiĩ
Luke7:15 Mũndũ ũcio wakuĩte agĩũkĩra
Luke7:16 Andũ othe makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya na makĩgooca Ngai
Luke7:17 Nayo ngumo ya Jesũ ĩkĩhunja Judea guothe o na bũrũri ũrĩa wagũthiũrũrũkĩirie.
Luke7:18 Nao arutwo a Johana nĩmamũheire ũhoro wa maũndũ macio mothe. Nake Johana agĩĩta arutwo ake eerĩ
Luke7:19 akĩmatũma kũrĩ Mwathani makamũũrie atĩrĩ
Luke7:20 Nao arutwo acio maakinya kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:21 Ihinda-inĩ o rĩu Jesũ akĩhonia andũ aingĩ arĩa maarĩ na mĩrimũ
Luke7:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩcookeria arĩa maatũmĩtwo atĩrĩ
Luke7:23 Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarahĩngwo nĩ ũndũ wakwa.”
Luke7:24 Andũ acio maatũmĩtwo nĩ Johana moima harĩ Jesũ
Luke7:25 Angĩkorwo ti guo-rĩ
Luke7:26 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona kĩ? Hihi mwathiĩte kuona mũnabii? Ĩĩ
Luke7:27 Ũyũ nĩwe ũrĩa ũhoro wake wandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Nĩngatũma mũtũmwo wakwa athiĩ mbere yaku
Luke7:28 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:29 (Andũ othe
Luke7:30 No Afarisai na arutani a watho makĩregana na ũrĩa Ngai endaga meke
Luke7:31 Nake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke7:32 Matariĩ ta ciana ciikarĩte ndũnyũ igĩĩta iria ingĩ
Luke7:33 Nĩgũkorwo Johana Mũbatithania ookire atekũrĩa na atekũnyua ndibei
Luke7:34 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire akĩrĩĩaga na akĩnyuuaga
Luke7:35 No ũũgĩ nĩũmenyekaga nĩ wa kĩhooto nĩ ciana ciaguo ciothe.”
Luke7:36 Na rĩrĩ
Luke7:37 Rĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja watũũrĩte mũtũũrĩre wa mehia itũũra-inĩ rĩu aamenyire atĩ Jesũ nĩararĩa irio nyũmba ya Mũfarisai ũcio-rĩ
Luke7:38 na akĩrũgama thuutha wake
Luke7:39 Rĩrĩa Mũfarisai ũrĩa wamwĩtĩte onire ũndũ ũcio
Luke7:40 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:41 “Kũrĩ andũ eerĩ maarĩ na thiirĩ wa mũndũ wakombithanagia mbeeca. Ũmwe aarĩ na thiirĩ wa dinari magana matano
Luke7:42 Na rĩrĩ
Luke7:43 Simoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke7:44 Agĩcooka akĩĩhũgũrĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio

Luke7:46 Wee-rĩ
Luke7:47 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:48 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke7:49 Ageni arĩa angĩ makĩambĩrĩria kwĩrana atĩrĩ
Luke7:50 Jesũ akĩĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke8:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke8:2 o na atumia amwe a arĩa maarutĩtwo ngoma thũku na arĩa maahonetio mĩrimũ: nao nĩ Mariamu (ũrĩa wetagwo Mũmagidali)
Luke8:3 na Joana mũtumia wa Husa
Luke8:4 Andũ aingĩ nĩmathiire na mbere kũngana harĩ Jesũ moimĩte matũũra-inĩ
Luke8:5 Mũrĩmi nĩoimagarire akahure mbeũ ciake. Na rĩrĩa aahuraga mbeũ icio
Luke8:6 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara-inĩ
Luke8:7 Nacio mbeũ ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩigua-inĩ
Luke8:8 Mbeũ ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩri-inĩ mũnoru. Igĩkũra
Luke8:9 Nao arutwo ake makĩmũũria ũrĩa ngerekano ĩyo yoigaga.
Luke8:10 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke8:11 “Ngerekano ĩyo yugĩte atĩrĩ: Mbeũ icio nĩ ũhoro wa Ngai.
Luke8:12 Mbeũ iria ciagũire mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro wa Ngai
Luke8:13 Nacio iria ciagũire rũnyanjara-inĩ nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro wa Ngai
Luke8:14 Mbeũ iria ciagũire mĩigua-inĩ nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro
Luke8:15 No rĩrĩ
Luke8:16 “Na rĩrĩ
Luke8:17 Nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ ũndũ mũhithe ũtakaguũrio
Luke8:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩmenyagĩrĩrei ũrĩa mũthikagĩrĩria. Ũrĩa wothe ũrĩ na indo nĩakongererwo nyingĩ; na ũrĩa wothe ũtarĩ nĩagatuunywo o na kĩrĩa arĩ nakĩo.”
Luke8:19 Na rĩrĩ
Luke8:20 Mũndũ ũmwe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke8:21 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke8:22 Mũthenya ũmwe Jesũ nĩerire arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Luke8:23 Na rĩrĩa maathiiaga Jesũ akĩhĩtwo nĩ toro. Na rĩrĩ
Luke8:24 Nao arutwo magĩthiĩ makĩmũũkĩria
Luke8:25 Akĩũria arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Luke8:26 Makĩringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria
Luke8:27 Jesũ aarĩkia kuuma gatarũ
Luke8:28 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio onire Jesũ
Luke8:29 Nĩgũkorwo Jesũ nĩathĩte ngoma ĩyo thũku yume thĩinĩ wa mũndũ ũcio. Nĩyamũnyiitaga kaingĩ
Luke8:30 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke8:31 Nacio ndaimono igĩkĩrĩrĩria gũthaitha Jesũ ndagaciathe ithiĩ Irima-rĩrĩa-Rĩtarĩ-Gĩturi.
Luke8:32 Na rĩrĩ
Luke8:33 Ndaimono cioima thĩinĩ wa mũndũ ũcio
Luke8:34 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa maarĩithagia ngũrwe icio moonire ũrĩa gwekĩka
Luke8:35 nao andũ makiumagara makone ũndũ ũcio wekĩkĩte. Rĩrĩa maakinyire harĩ Jesũ na makĩona mũndũ ũcio woimĩtwo nĩ ndaimono aikarĩte magũrũ-inĩ ma Jesũ
Luke8:36 Andũ arĩa meyoneire ũndũ ũcio makĩĩra andũ acio angĩ ũrĩa mũndũ ũcio warĩ na ndaimono aahonetio.
Luke8:37 Nao andũ othe a rũgongo rũu rwa Agerasi magĩthaitha Jesũ oime kũu kwao amatige
Luke8:38 Nake mũndũ ũcio warutĩtwo ndaimono akĩmũthaitha mathiĩ nake
Luke8:39 “Cooka mũciĩ ũkoige ũrĩa wothe Ngai agwĩkĩire.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩĩra andũ othe a itũũra ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩkĩire.
Luke8:40 Na rĩrĩ
Luke8:41 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ wetagwo Jairũ warĩ mũnene wa thunagogi agĩũka
Luke8:42 nĩ ũndũ mũirĩtu wake wa mũmwe warĩ wa ta mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ aarĩ hakuhĩ gũkua. Na Jesũ arĩ njĩra-inĩ agĩthiĩ-rĩ
Luke8:43 Gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ acio nĩ haarĩ na mũtumia ũmwe watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Luke8:44 Mũtumia ũcio agĩũka na thuutha wa Jesũ
Luke8:45 Nake Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke8:46 Nowe Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke8:47 Nake mũtumia ũcio
Luke8:48 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke8:49 Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩaragia
Luke8:50 Jesũ aigua ũguo
Luke8:51 Rĩrĩa aakinyire kwa Jairũ
Luke8:52 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ othe no kũrĩra maarĩraga magĩcakayaga nĩ ũndũ wa mwana ũcio. Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke8:53 Nao makĩmũthekerera
Luke8:54 Nowe Jesũ akĩnyiita mwana ũcio guoko
Luke8:55 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo agĩcookererwo nĩ muoyo wake
Luke8:56 Nao aciari ake makĩgega mũno
Luke9:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke9:2 na akĩmatũma mathiĩ makahunjie ũhoro wa ũthamaki wa Ngai na mahonagie andũ arĩa arũaru.
Luke9:3 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke9:4 Nyũmba ĩrĩa yothe mũrĩtoonyaga ikaragai kuo nginya rĩrĩa mũkoima itũũra rĩu.
Luke9:5 Andũ mangĩkaarega kũmũnyiita ũgeni-rĩ
Luke9:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makiumagara magĩthiĩ kuuma gatũũra kamwe nginya karĩa kangĩ makĩhunjagia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega na makĩhonagia andũ kũrĩa guothe maathiiaga.
Luke9:7 Na rĩrĩ
Luke9:8 na angĩ makoiga atĩ Elija nĩonekanĩte
Luke9:9 No Herode akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke9:10 Nao atũmwo maacooka
Luke9:11 no andũ aingĩ makĩmenya ũhoro ũcio na makĩmũrũmĩrĩra. Nake akĩmaamũkĩra na akĩmahe ũhoro wa ũthamaki wa Ngai
Luke9:12 Hwaĩ-inĩ arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke9:13 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke9:14 (Handũ hau haarĩ na arũme ta ngiri ithano.) Nowe akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Luke9:15 Nao arutwo magĩĩka o ũguo
Luke9:16 Nake akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ
Luke9:17 Othe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna
Luke9:18 Na rĩrĩ
Luke9:19 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke9:20 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke9:21 Nake Jesũ akĩmakaania na hinya
Luke9:22 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke9:23 Agĩcooka akĩmeera othe atĩrĩ
Luke9:24 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa wothe wendaga kũhonokia muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo
Luke9:25 Mũndũ angĩĩguna nakĩ angĩĩgwatĩra thĩ yothe
Luke9:26 Mũndũ o wothe ũngĩconoka nĩ ũndũ wakwa na nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo ciakwa
Luke9:27 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke9:28 Mĩthenya ta ĩnana thuutha wa Jesũ kwaria ũhoro ũyũ nĩathiire na Petero
Luke9:29 Na rĩrĩa ahooyaga
Luke9:30 Na rĩrĩ
Luke9:31 makiumĩrĩra Jesũ marĩ na riiri mũnene makĩaria nake. Maaragia ũhoro wa gũkua gwake
Luke9:32 Petero hamwe na arĩa maarĩ nake nĩmahĩtĩtwo nĩ toro
Luke9:33 Na rĩrĩa andũ acio maatiganaga na Jesũ
Luke9:34 Na o akĩaragia-rĩ
Luke9:35 Mũgambo ũkiuma itu-inĩ rĩu
Luke9:36 Thuutha wa mũgambo ũcio kũiguĩka
Luke9:37 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
Luke9:38 Na rĩrĩ
Luke9:39 na ngoma thũku nĩĩmũnyiitaga na agakaya o rĩmwe; ningĩ ĩkamũrũnda na ĩkamũthiorania
Luke9:40 Ndĩrathaithire arutwo aku maingate ngoma ĩyo
Luke9:41 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke9:42 Rĩrĩa kamwana kau gaathiiaga harĩ Jesũ
Luke9:43 Nao othe makĩgegio nĩ ũnene wa Ngai. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ othe maagegetio nĩ ũrĩa wothe Jesũ eekĩte
Luke9:44 “Thikĩrĩriai wega ũrĩa ngũmwĩra: Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũkunyanĩrwo aneanwo moko-inĩ ma andũ.”
Luke9:45 No-o matiamenyire ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩa. Nĩmahithĩtwo ũhoro ũcio
Luke9:46 Na gũkĩgĩa na ngarari gatagatĩ ka arutwo makĩũrania nũũ wao ũngĩtuĩka mũnene kũrĩ arĩa angĩ.
Luke9:47 Nake Jesũ
Luke9:48 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke9:49 Nake Johana akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke9:50 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke9:51 Na rĩrĩ
Luke9:52 Nake agĩtũma andũ mathiĩ mbere yake kũhaarĩria maũndũ nĩ ũndũ wake
Luke9:53 no andũ a kũu matiamũnyiitire ũgeni
Luke9:54 Rĩrĩa arutwo ake
Luke9:55 Nowe Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩmakaania
Luke9:56 nao magĩthiĩ gatũũra kangĩ.
Luke9:57 Rĩrĩa maathiiaga na njĩra
Luke9:58 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke9:59 Akĩĩra mũndũ ũngĩ atĩrĩ
Luke9:60 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke9:61 Na mũndũ ũngĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke9:62 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:1 Thuutha wa ũguo Mwathani agĩthuura andũ angĩ mĩrongo mũgwanja na eerĩ
Luke10:2 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke10:3 Thiĩi! Ndamũtũma ta tũgondu gatagatĩ-inĩ ka njũũi.
Luke10:4 Mũtigakuue kĩbeti
Luke10:5 “Nyũmba o yothe ĩrĩa mũrĩtoonyaga-rĩ
Luke10:6 Na kũngĩkorwo nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ mwendi thayũ kuo
Luke10:7 Ikarai nyũmba ĩyo
Luke10:8 “Mũngĩgatoonya itũũra mũnyiitwo ũgeni-rĩ
Luke10:9 Honagiai arĩa arũaru kuo
Luke10:10 No mũngĩgatoonya itũũra o rĩothe mwage kũnyiitwo ũgeni-rĩ
Luke10:11 ‘Nĩtwaribariba o na rũkũngũ rwa itũũra rĩanyu rũrĩa rwĩnyiitĩrĩire magũrũ maitũ
Luke10:12 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke10:13 “Inyuĩ andũ a Korazini
Luke10:14 No andũ a Turo na Sidoni nĩmagakorwo marĩ murũ mũthenya ũcio wa ciira gũkĩra inyuĩ.
Luke10:15 Na inyuĩ
Luke10:16 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmũthikagĩrĩria inyuĩ nĩ niĩ athikagĩrĩria
Luke10:17 Nao andũ acio mĩrongo mũgwanja na eerĩ magĩcooka makenete
Luke10:18 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:19 Inyuĩ nĩndĩmũheete ũhoti wa kũrangĩrĩria nyoka na tũngʼaurũ
Luke10:20 No rĩrĩ
Luke10:21 Na ihinda o rĩu
Luke10:22 “Nĩnengeretwo maũndũ mothe nĩ Baba. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Mũriũ nũũ
Luke10:23 Agĩcooka akĩhũgũkĩra arutwo ake
Luke10:24 Nĩgũkorwo ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke10:25 Na rĩrĩ
Luke10:26 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:27 Mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria
Luke10:28 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:29 No mũndũ ũcio nĩeendaga gwĩtua mwega
Luke10:30 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria
Luke10:31 Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũmwe nĩagereire njĩra ĩyo
Luke10:32 Ũguo noguo Mũlawii eekire
Luke10:33 No rĩrĩ
Luke10:34 Agĩthiĩ harĩ we
Luke10:35 Kwarooka gũkĩa Mũsamaria ũcio akĩruta dinari igĩrĩ
Luke10:36 “Ũgwĩciiria nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wa acio atatũ watuĩkire mũndũ wa itũũra harĩ mũndũ ũcio wanyiitĩtwo nĩ atunyani?”
Luke10:37 Nake mũrutani ũcio wa watho akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:38 Na rĩrĩ
Luke10:39 Maritha aarĩ na mwarĩ wa nyina wetagwo Mariamu
Luke10:40 Nowe Maritha nĩarĩ na mĩhangʼo nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa mothe magĩrĩire kũhaarĩrio. Agĩũka harĩ Jesũ
Luke10:41 Nake Mwathani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:42 no nĩ harĩ ũndũ ũmwe tu ũbataranĩtie. Mariamu nĩethuurĩire ũndũ ũrĩa mwega makĩria
Luke11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke11:2 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke11:3 Tũheage o mũthenya irio ciitũ cia gũtũigana.
Luke11:4 Na ũtũrekere mehia maitũ
Luke11:5 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke11:6 nĩgũkorwo ndĩ na mũrata wakwa wanjeerera
Luke11:7 “Nake mũndũ ũcio ũrĩ nyũmba thĩinĩ amũcookerie atĩrĩ
Luke11:8 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke11:9 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: Hooyai na nĩmũkũheo; mathaai na nĩmũkuona; ringaringai mũrango na nĩmũkũhingũrĩrwo.
Luke11:10 Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa wothe ũhooyaga nĩaheagwo; na ũrĩa ũmaathaga nĩonaga; na ũrĩa ũringaringaga mũrango nĩahingũragĩrwo.
Luke11:11 “Nĩ mũciari ũrĩkũ thĩinĩ wanyu ũngĩĩtio thamaki nĩ mwana wake
Luke11:12 Kana eetio itumbĩ amũhe kangʼaurũ?
Luke11:13 Angĩkorwo inyuĩ
Luke11:14 Na rĩrĩ
Luke11:15 No amwe ao makiuga atĩrĩ
Luke11:16 Nao andũ angĩ makĩmũgeria
Luke11:17 Jesũ nĩamenyire ũrĩa meciiragia
Luke11:18 Angĩkorwo Shaitani nĩagayũkanĩte akeyũkĩrĩra we mwene-rĩ
Luke11:19 Ningĩ angĩkorwo niĩ nyingataga ndaimono na hinya wa Beelizebuli-rĩ
Luke11:20 Na rĩrĩ
Luke11:21 “Rĩrĩa mũndũ njamba oya indo ciake ciothe cia mbaara
Luke11:22 No rĩrĩ
Luke11:23 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ hamwe na niĩ
Luke11:24 “Na rĩrĩ
Luke11:25 Na yacooka ĩgakora nyũmba ĩyo ĩrĩ haate
Luke11:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoma ĩyo thũku ĩkagĩĩra ngoma ingĩ mũgwanja thũku makĩria mayo
Luke11:27 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aaragia maũndũ maya-rĩ
Luke11:28 Nake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke11:29 Na rĩrĩa kĩrĩndĩ kĩa andũ kĩongererekire-rĩ
Luke11:30 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa Jona aarĩ kĩmenyithia kũrĩ andũ a Nineve
Luke11:31 Mũtumia-mũthamaki ũrĩa wa mwena wa Gũthini nĩakarũgama hĩndĩ ya ciira hamwe na andũ a rũciaro rũrũ arũtuĩre ciira
Luke11:32 Andũ a Nineve nĩmakarũgama hĩndĩ ya ciira hamwe na rũciaro rũrũ marũtuĩre ciira; nĩgũkorwo nĩmeririre maahunjĩirio nĩ Jona
Luke11:33 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgwatagia tawa agacooka akaũiga handũ ũtangĩoneka kana akaũiga rungu rwa irebe
Luke11:34 Riitho rĩaku nĩrĩo tawa wa mwĩrĩ waku. Rĩrĩa maitho maku marĩ mega
Luke11:35 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Luke11:36 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Luke11:37 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩkirie kwaria
Luke11:38 No Mũfarisai ũcio ona ũguo akĩgega nĩ ũndũ Jesũ ndaambire gwĩthamba moko atanarĩa irio.
Luke11:39 Nake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke11:40 Inyuĩ irimũ ici! Githĩ ũrĩa wombire mwena wa na nja to we wombire mwena wa na thĩinĩ?
Luke11:41 No rĩrĩ
Luke11:42 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro inyuĩ Afarisai-ĩ! Tondũ mũrutagĩra Ngai gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi gĩa terere
Luke11:43 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro inyuĩ Afarisai-ĩ! Tondũ mwendaga gũikarĩra itĩ iria cia mbere thunagogi-inĩ na mũgeithagio mũrĩ ndũnyũ-inĩ.
Luke11:44 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Luke11:45 Mũrutani ũmwe wa Watho akĩmũcookeria
Luke11:46 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke11:47 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ! Tondũ mwakagĩra anabii mbĩrĩra
Luke11:48 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũgakĩruta ũira atĩ nĩmwĩtĩkanĩtie na ũrĩa maithe manyu meekire; atĩ nĩo mooragire anabii
Luke11:49 Tondũ wa ũguo ũũgĩ wa Ngai uugĩte atĩrĩ
Luke11:50 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rũciaro rũrũ nĩrũgaciirithĩrio thakame ya anabii othe ĩrĩa yanaitwo kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria gĩa thĩ
Luke11:51 kuuma thakame ya Habili nginya thakame ya Zekaria ũrĩa woragĩirwo gatagatĩ-inĩ ga kĩgongona na handũ harĩa hatheru. Ĩĩ nĩguo
Luke11:52 “Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro inyuĩ arutani a watho-ĩ! Tondũ nĩmweheretie kĩhingũro kĩa ũmenyo. Inyuĩ ene mũtiigana gũtoonya
Luke11:53 Jesũ aarĩkia kuuma kũu
Luke11:54 makĩgeria kũmũtega maigue kana nĩ harĩ ũndũ mũũrũ angĩaria.
Luke12:1 O hĩndĩ ĩyo
Luke12:2 Gũtirĩ ũndũ mũhithanie ũtakaguũrio
Luke12:3 Maũndũ marĩa mwarĩirie nduma-inĩ
Luke12:4 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ arata akwa
Luke12:5 No nĩ ngũmuonia ũrĩa inyuĩ mwagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩtigĩra: Mwĩtigagĩrei ũrĩa ũngĩũraga mwĩrĩ na thuutha wa ũguo arĩ na ũhoti wa gũikia mũndũ Jehanamu. Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke12:6 Githĩ tũnyoni tũtano tũtiendagio tũthendi twĩrĩ? No rĩrĩ
Luke12:7 No ti-itherũ
Luke12:8 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:9 No ũrĩa ũkangaana mbere ya andũ ũcio nĩagakaanwo mbere ya araika a Ngai.
Luke12:10 Nake mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgaacambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakarekerwo
Luke12:11 “Rĩrĩa mũgaatwarwo mbere ya thunagogi
Luke12:12 nĩgũkorwo hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho Mũtheru nĩakamũruta ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo nĩ kuuga.”
Luke12:13 Mũndũ ũmwe warĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ acio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:14 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke12:15 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke12:16 Agĩcooka akĩmahe ũhoro na ngerekano
Luke12:17 Nake akĩĩyũria na ngoro yake atĩrĩ
Luke12:18 “Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke12:19 Njooke njĩĩre ngoro yakwa atĩrĩ
Luke12:20 “No Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:21 “Ũguo nĩguo gũgaatuĩka harĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wĩigagĩra mĩthithũ
Luke12:22 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Luke12:23 Muoyo-rĩ
Luke12:24 Ta mwĩciiriei ũhoro wa mahuru: Matihaandaga kana makagetha
Luke12:25 Nũũ wanyu ũngĩhota kuongerera muoyo wake ithaa o na rĩmwe nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtanga?
Luke12:26 Rĩu-rĩ
Luke12:27 Ta mwĩcũraniei ũrĩa itoka ikũraga. Itirutaga wĩra kana ikogotha ndigi. No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:28 Angĩkorwo ũguo nĩguo Ngai ahumbaga nyeki ya gĩthaka
Luke12:29 Tigagai gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro-inĩ cianyu nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩa mũrĩrĩĩaga kana mũrĩnyuuaga; mũtigatangĩkage nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo.
Luke12:30 Nĩgũkorwo maũndũ maya mothe nĩmo andũ a gũkũ thĩ arĩa matetĩkĩtie Ngai macaranagia namo
Luke12:31 No rĩrĩ
Luke12:32 “Tigagai gwĩtigĩra
Luke12:33 Endiai indo iria mũrĩ nacio mũcooke mũteithie athĩĩni. Mwĩthondekerei ibeeti cia mbeeca iria itangĩtarũka
Luke12:34 Nĩgũkorwo o kũrĩa mĩthiithũ wanyu ĩrĩ
Luke12:35 “Ikaragai mwĩhotorete
Luke12:36 o ta andũ metereire mwathi wao acooke kuuma iruga-inĩ rĩa kĩhikanio
Luke12:37 Nĩũgakorwo ũrĩ ũndũ mwega harĩ ndungata iria mwathi wacio agaakora ciĩiguĩte rĩrĩa agacooka. Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke12:38 Nĩũgakorwo ũrĩ ũndũ mwega harĩ ndungata iria mwathi wacio agaakora ciĩhaarĩirie
Luke12:39 No rĩrĩ
Luke12:40 O na inyuĩ no nginya mũikarage mwĩhaarĩirie
Luke12:41 Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke12:42 Nake Mwathani agĩcookia akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke12:43 Nĩũgakorwo ũrĩ ũndũ mwega harĩ ndungata ĩyo
Luke12:44 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke12:45 No rĩrĩ
Luke12:46 Mwathi wa ndungata ĩyo agooka mũthenya ũrĩa ĩtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire o na ithaa rĩrĩa ĩtooĩ
Luke12:47 “Ndungata ĩrĩa ĩmenyaga ũrĩa mwathi wayo endaga na ndĩĩhaaragĩria kana ĩgeeka ũrĩa Mwathi wayo endaga
Luke12:48 No ĩrĩa ĩtooĩ na nĩĩkaga maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire kũherithanĩrio
Luke12:49 “Njũkĩte kũrehe mwaki gũkũ thĩ
Luke12:50 No ndĩ na ũbatithio ndĩrĩbatithio naguo
Luke12:51 Mũgwĩciiria ndokire kũrehe thayũ gũkũ thĩ? Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:52 Kuuma rĩu gũthiĩ na mbere
Luke12:53 Nao marĩkoragwo magayũkanĩte ũũ
Luke12:54 Jesũ akĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ kĩu atĩrĩ
Luke12:55 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa rũhuho rwahurutana ruumĩte gũthini muugaga atĩrĩ
Luke12:56 Inyuĩ hinga ici! Nĩmũũĩ wega gũkũũrana ũrĩa igũrũ na thĩ gũtariĩ. Mũkĩremagwo nĩgũkũũrana ũhoro wa mahinda maya tũrĩ nĩkĩ?
Luke12:57 “Mwagaga gwĩtuĩra inyuĩ ene ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire nĩkĩ?
Luke12:58 Na rĩrĩ
Luke12:59 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke13:2 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke13:3 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:4 Kana andũ arĩa ikũmi na anana
Luke13:5 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:6 Agĩcooka akĩmaarĩria na ngerekano
Luke13:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke13:8 “No mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria
Luke13:9 Naguo ũngĩciara hĩndĩ ĩyo
Luke13:10 Na rĩrĩ
Luke13:11 nakuo gũgĩkorwo nĩ kwarĩ na mũtumia wonjetio nĩ ngoma thũku mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnana. Atũire ainamĩrĩire atekũhota gwĩtiira o na hanini.
Luke13:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aamuonire
Luke13:13 Agĩcooka akĩmũigĩrĩra moko
Luke13:14 Nake mũnene wa thunagogi akĩrakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ kũhonania mũthenya wa Thabatũ. Nake akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Luke13:15 Nowe Mwathani akĩmũcookeria
Luke13:16 Nake mũtumia ũyũ mwarĩ wa Iburahĩmu
Luke13:17 Rĩrĩa oigire ũguo
Luke13:18 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke13:19 Ũhaana ta mbeũ ya karatarĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ oire akĩhaanda mũgũnda wake. Igĩkũra ĩgĩtuĩka mũtĩ
Luke13:20 Ningĩ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke13:21 Ũhaana ta ndawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ooire na akĩmĩtukania na mũtu mũingĩ
Luke13:22 Nake Jesũ agĩthiĩ ahĩtũkĩire matũũra-inĩ na tũtũũra-inĩ akĩrutanaga erekeire Jerusalemu.
Luke13:23 Nake mũndũ ũmwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke13:24 “Geragiai na hinya gũtoonyera mũrango ũrĩa mũceke; tondũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:25 Rĩrĩa mwene nyũmba agaakorwo okĩrĩte na ahinge mũrango-rĩ
Luke13:26 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkoiga atĩrĩ
Luke13:27 “Nowe nĩakamacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke13:28 “Kũu nĩgũkagĩa na kĩrĩro
Luke13:29 Nao andũ nĩmagooka kuuma mwena wa irathĩro
Luke13:30 No ti-itherũ
Luke13:31 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai amwe magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:32 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke13:33 O na kũrĩ ũguo
Luke13:34 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke13:35 Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke14:2 Na hau mbere yake nĩ haarĩ na mũndũ warũarĩte mũrimũ wa kũimba mwĩrĩ.
Luke14:3 Jesũ akĩũria Afarisai na arutani a watho atĩrĩ
Luke14:4 No-o magĩkira ki. Nake akĩnyiita mũndũ ũcio
Luke14:5 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke14:6 Nao makĩaga ũndũ wa kũmũcookeria.
Luke14:7 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũrĩa ageni maathuuraga itĩ iria ciaikaragĩrwo nĩ ageni a gũtĩĩo maikarĩre cio-rĩ
Luke14:8 “Mũndũ angĩgwĩta iruga-inĩ rĩa kĩhikanio-rĩ
Luke14:9 Kũngĩkĩhaana ũguo-rĩ
Luke14:10 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũngĩtwo-rĩ
Luke14:11 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wĩtũgagĩria nĩakanyiihio
Luke14:12 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wamwĩtĩte atĩrĩ
Luke14:13 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa waruga iruga ĩtaga athĩĩni
Luke14:14 nawe nĩũkarathimwo. O na gũtuĩka matingĩhota gũkũrĩha
Luke14:15 Na rĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe wa arĩa maikarĩte metha-inĩ hamwe nake aiguire ũguo
Luke14:16 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke14:17 Nacio thaa cia kũrĩa ciakinya
Luke14:18 “Nao othe
Luke14:19 “Ũrĩa ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke14:20 “Nake ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke14:21 “Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩthiĩ
Luke14:22 “Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke14:23 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mwathi wayo akĩĩra ndungata ĩyo atĩrĩ
Luke14:24 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke14:25 Na rĩrĩ
Luke14:26 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩũka kũrĩ niĩ na aage gũthũũra ithe na nyina
Luke14:27 Nake mũndũ o wothe ũtegwĩkuuĩra mũtĩ wake wa kwambĩrwo anũmĩrĩre
Luke14:28 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke14:29 Nĩgũkorwo angĩremwo nĩ kũmĩrĩkia thuutha wa gwaka mũthingi
Luke14:30 makoiga atĩrĩ
Luke14:31 “Kana mũthamaki angĩkorwo akiriĩ gũthiĩ kũrũa mbaara na mũthamaki ũngĩ-rĩ
Luke14:32 Angĩona atĩ ndangĩhota kũmũtooria
Luke14:33 Ũguo noguo
Luke14:34 “Na rĩrĩ
Luke14:35 Cumbĩ ũcio ndũrĩ bata gũitwo tĩĩri-inĩ o na kana gũitwo kĩara-inĩ
Luke15:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke15:2 No Afarisai na arutani a watho magĩteta makiuga atĩrĩ
Luke15:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno akĩmeera atĩrĩ:
Luke15:4 “Mũndũ ũmwe wanyu angĩkorwo na ngʼondu igana rĩmwe
Luke15:5 Na aarĩkia kũmĩona
Luke15:6 akainũka mũciĩ. Agacooka ageeta arata ake na andũ a itũũra hamwe
Luke15:7 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:8 “Kana mũtumia angĩkorwo arĩ na icunjĩ ikũmi cia betha
Luke15:9 Na amĩona-rĩ
Luke15:10 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:11 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke15:12 Ũrĩa mũnini akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Luke15:13 “Na matukũ manini mathira
Luke15:14 Nake aarĩkia kũhũthĩra indo ciake ciothe
Luke15:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ kũũria wĩra kũrĩ mũndũ ũmwe wa bũrũri ũcio
Luke15:16 Nĩeriragĩria kwĩhũũnia na makoro marĩa maarĩĩagwo nĩ ngũrwe icio tondũ gũtirĩ mũndũ wamũheaga kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa.
Luke15:17 “Na rĩrĩa ecookerire
Luke15:18 Nĩngũũkĩra thiĩ kũrĩ baba ngamwĩre atĩrĩ: Baba
Luke15:19 Ndĩagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcooka gwĩtagwo mũrũguo rĩngĩ; ndua ta ndungata ĩmwe yaku.’
Luke15:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩũkĩra
Luke15:21 “Nake mũriũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:22 “No ithe akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
Luke15:23 Ningĩ mũrehe njaũ ya gĩcegũ ĩrĩa noru mũmĩthĩnje. Mũreke tũgĩe na iruga na tũkũngũĩre.
Luke15:24 Nĩgũkorwo mũriũ ũyũ wakwa ararĩ mũkuũ na nĩariũkĩte; nĩarorĩte na rĩu nĩonekete.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩambĩrĩria gũkũngũĩra.
Luke15:25 “Na rĩrĩ
Luke15:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũriũ ũcio agĩĩta ndungata ĩmwe ya mũciĩ
Luke15:27 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:28 “Mũrũ wa nyina ũcio mũkũrũ akĩrakara na akĩrega gũtoonya nyũmba. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ithe akiuma nja
Luke15:29 No akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Luke15:30 No rĩrĩa mũrũguo ũyũ ũitangĩte indo ciaku na maraya ainũka
Luke15:31 “Ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:32 No nĩtwagĩrĩirwo gũkũngũĩra na gũcanjamũka
Luke16:1 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ: “Nĩ kwarĩ na mũndũ ũmwe warĩ gĩtonga
Luke16:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩta mũrori ũcio wa indo
Luke16:3 “Nake mũrori wa indo icio akĩĩyũria na ngoro atĩrĩ
Luke16:4 Rĩu nĩndamenya ũrĩa ngwĩka nĩgeetha rĩrĩa ngaatigithio wĩra gũkũ
Luke16:5 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩta mũndũ o wothe warĩ na thiirĩ wa mwathi wake. Akĩũria mũndũ wa mbere atĩrĩ
Luke16:6 “Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke16:7 “Agĩcooka akĩũria mũndũ wa keerĩ atĩrĩ
Luke16:8 “Mwathi ũcio nĩagathĩrĩirie mũrũgamĩrĩri ũcio wa indo ciake ũtaarĩ mwĩhokeku nĩ ũndũ wa kũgĩa na ũũgĩ. Nĩgũkorwo andũ a gũkũ thĩ nĩ oogĩ na maũndũ mao gũkĩra andũ a ũtheri.
Luke16:9 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke16:10 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũngĩĩhokerwo indo nini no ehokerwo o na indo nyingĩ
Luke16:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũngĩkorwo mũtarĩ ehokeku na ũtonga wa gũkũ thĩ-rĩ
Luke16:12 Ningĩ mũngĩkorwo mũtarĩ ehokeku na indo cia andũ arĩa angĩ-rĩ
Luke16:13 “Gũtirĩ ndungata ĩngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ. Nĩ ũndũ no ĩthũũrire ũmwe yende ũcio ũngĩ
Luke16:14 Nao Afarisai
Luke16:15 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke16:16 “Ũhoro wa Watho na ũrutani wa Anabii watũire ũhunjagio nginya hĩndĩ ya Johana ũrĩa Mũbatithania. Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo
Luke16:17 Nĩ ũhũthũ igũrũ na thĩ gũthira
Luke16:18 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũngĩtigana na mũtumia acooke ahikie mũtumia ũngĩ
Luke16:19 “Nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ warĩ gĩtonga wehumbaga nguo cia rangi wa ndathi na cia mũthemba wa gatani ĩrĩa njega
Luke16:20 Na rĩrĩ
Luke16:21 nake nĩeeriragĩria kũrĩa rũitĩki rũrĩa rwagũũaga kuuma metha-inĩ ya gĩtonga kĩu. O na ngui nacio nĩciokaga na igacũna ironda ciake.
Luke16:22 “Ihinda nĩrĩakinyire mũhooi thendi ũcio agĩkua
Luke16:23 Kĩrĩ kũu icua-inĩ
Luke16:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gĩtonga gĩkĩmwĩta gĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke16:25 “Nowe Iburahĩmu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke16:26 Hamwe na ũguo-rĩ
Luke16:27 “Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke16:28 nĩgũkorwo ndĩ na ariũ a baba atano. Reke athiĩ akamahe ũhoro
Luke16:29 “Iburahĩmu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke16:30 “Nakĩo gĩtonga gĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke16:31 “Agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke17:1 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Luke17:2 Nĩ kaba mũndũ ta ũcio ohererwo ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi ngingo aikio iria-inĩ
Luke17:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Luke17:4 Angĩkwĩhĩria maita mũgwanja o mũthenya ũmwe
Luke17:5 Nao atũmwo makĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ
Luke17:6 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke17:7 “Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wanyu ũngĩkorwo arĩ na ndungata ya kũmũrĩmĩra na mũraũ kana ya kũmũrĩithĩria ngʼondu
Luke17:8 Githĩ to amĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Luke17:9 Ningĩ no agĩcookerie ndungata ĩyo ngaatho nĩ gwĩka ũrĩa ĩĩrĩtwo ĩĩke?
Luke17:10 Ũguo noguo o na inyuĩ
Luke17:11 Na rĩrĩ
Luke17:12 Na rĩrĩa aatoonyaga gatũũra kamwe
Luke17:13 makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Luke17:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aamoonire
Luke17:15 Rĩrĩa ũmwe wao onire nĩahonio
Luke17:16 Akĩĩgũithia thĩ magũrũ-inĩ ma Jesũ
Luke17:17 Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke17:18 Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũngĩcooka kũhe Ngai ũgooci tiga o mũgeni ũyũ?”
Luke17:19 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke17:20 Na rĩrĩ
Luke17:21 kana andũ moige atĩrĩ
Luke17:22 Agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Luke17:23 Andũ nĩmakamwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke17:24 O ta ũrĩa rũheni rũhenũkaga rũkamũrĩka matu kuuma mũthia ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ
Luke17:25 No rĩrĩ
Luke17:26 “O ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Nuhu
Luke17:27 Andũ acio maakorirwo makĩrĩa
Luke17:28 “Ningĩ ũguo noguo gwatariĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Loti. Andũ acio maakorirwo makĩrĩa na makĩnyua
Luke17:29 No mũthenya ũrĩa Loti oimire Sodomu
Luke17:30 “Ũguo noguo gũkahaana mũthenya ũrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akaaguũranĩrio.
Luke17:31 Mũthenya ũcio
Luke17:32 Ta ririkanai mũtumia wa Loti!
Luke17:33 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũgeragia gũtũũria muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo
Luke17:34 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke17:35 Atumia eerĩ nĩmagakorwo magĩthĩa hamwe; ũmwe wao akuuo
Luke17:36 (Ningĩ arũme eerĩ nĩmagakorwo makĩruta wĩra hamwe
Luke17:37 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:1 Nake Jesũ akĩhe arutwo ake ngerekano ya kũmaruta atĩ nĩmagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhooyaga hĩndĩ ciothe mategũkua ngoro.
Luke18:2 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Itũũra-inĩ rĩmwe nĩ kwarĩ na mũtuanĩri ciira ũteetigagĩra Ngai kana agatĩĩa andũ.
Luke18:3 Na itũũra-inĩ rĩu nĩ kwarĩ mũtumia ũmwe wa ndigwa wathiiaga kũrĩ we kaingĩ akamwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:4 “No mũtuanĩri ciira ũcio akĩrega kũmũteithia kwa ihinda. No marigĩrĩrio akĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ
Luke18:5 no tondũ wa ũrĩa mũtumia ũyũ wa ndigwa atiindaga agĩĩthĩĩnia
Luke18:6 Nake Mwathani akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke18:7 Githĩ o nake Ngai ndagatua ciira na kĩhooto wa arĩa ake ethuurĩire
Luke18:8 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:9 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩarĩria andũ amwe arĩa meĩhokaga o ene
Luke18:10 “Andũ eerĩ nĩmambatire hekarũ-inĩ kũhooya. Ũmwe aarĩ Mũfarisai na ũcio ũngĩ aarĩ mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti.
Luke18:11 Mũfarisai ũcio akĩrũgama akĩĩhooera we mwene
Luke18:12 Nĩndĩĩhingaga kũrĩa irio maita meerĩ o kiumia
Luke18:13 “No rĩrĩ
Luke18:14 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:15 Na rĩrĩ
Luke18:16 Nowe Jesũ agĩĩta twana tũu harĩ we
Luke18:17 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke18:18 Mũnene ũmwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:19 Nake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:20 We nĩũĩ ũrĩa maathani moigĩte
Luke18:21 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke18:22 Jesũ aigua ũguo
Luke18:23 Rĩrĩa mũnene ũcio aiguire ũguo
Luke18:24 Jesũ akĩmũrora
Luke18:25 Nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩĩra ĩhungurĩre irima rĩa cindano
Luke18:26 Nao arĩa maiguire ũhoro ũcio makĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:27 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke18:28 Nake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:29 Jesũ akĩmeera
Luke18:30 ũtakaheo maita maingĩ ma kĩrĩa atigĩte ihinda-inĩ rĩĩrĩ tũrĩ
Luke18:31 Na rĩrĩ
Luke18:32 Nake nĩakaneanwo kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ. Nao nĩ makaamũnyũrũria
Luke18:33 Naguo mũthenya wa gatatũ nĩakariũka.”
Luke18:34 Nao arutwo ake makĩaga kũmenya ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio. Nĩmahithĩtwo ũhoro ũcio na matiamenyire ũrĩa aameeraga.
Luke18:35 Nake Jesũ akuhĩrĩria Jeriko
Luke18:36 Rĩrĩa aiguire andũ aingĩ makĩhĩtũka
Luke18:37 Andũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:38 Nake akĩanĩrĩra
Luke18:39 Arĩa maatongoretie makĩmũkaania makĩmwĩra akire
Luke18:40 Nake Jesũ akĩrũgama
Luke18:41 Rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie
Luke18:42 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:43 O rĩmwe akĩambĩrĩria kuona
Luke19:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke19:2 Nakuo kũu Jeriko nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ wetagwo Zakayo; warĩ mũnene wa etia mbeeca cia igooti na aarĩ gĩtonga.
Luke19:3 Nĩendaga kuona Jesũ aarĩ ũ
Luke19:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩhanyũka mbere yao
Luke19:5 Nake Jesũ aakinya hau
Luke19:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩharũrũka narua
Luke19:7 Nao andũ moona ũguo makĩambĩrĩria kũnuguna
Luke19:8 Nowe Zakayo akĩrũgama
Luke19:9 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:10 Nĩgũkorwo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire gũcaria na kũhonokia kĩrĩa kĩũrĩte.”
Luke19:11 Na o mathikĩrĩirie maũndũ macio
Luke19:12 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Mũndũ ũmwe warĩ igweta nĩathiire bũrũri wa kũraya agatuuo mũthamaki
Luke19:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩta ndungata ciake ikũmi
Luke19:14 “No andũ a bũrũri wake nĩmamũthũire
Luke19:15 “Na rĩrĩ
Luke19:16 “Ndungata ya mbere ĩgĩũka
Luke19:17 “Nake Mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:18 “Nayo ndungata ya keerĩ ĩgĩũka
Luke19:19 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:20 “Nayo
Luke19:21 Nĩndagwĩtigĩrire
Luke19:22 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:23 Wakĩagire kũiga mbeeca ciakwa bengi nĩkĩ
Luke19:24 “Agĩcooka akĩĩra arĩa maarũgamĩte hau atĩrĩ
Luke19:25 “Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:26 “Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:27 No rĩrĩ
Luke19:28 Nake Jesũ aarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Luke19:29 Aakuhĩrĩria Bethifage na Bethania
Luke19:30 “Thiĩi itũũra rĩrĩa rĩrĩ mbere yanyu
Luke19:31 Mũndũ angĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke19:32 Nao acio maatũmirwo magĩthiĩ
Luke19:33 Na rĩrĩa moohoraga njaũ ĩyo
Luke19:34 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke19:35 Makĩmĩtwarĩra Jesũ
Luke19:36 Na rĩrĩa aathiiaga
Luke19:37 Rĩrĩa aakinyire hakuhĩ na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩikũrũkagĩra Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ
Luke19:38 “Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Luke19:39 Afarisai amwe maarĩ gĩkundi-inĩ kĩu makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke19:40 Nowe akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:41 Na rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie itũũra rĩu inene rĩa Jerusalemu
Luke19:42 akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke19:43 Hĩndĩ nĩĩgakinya rĩrĩa thũ ciaku igaaka ihumbu cia tĩĩri ikũrigiicĩrie
Luke19:44 Nĩigagũtungumania thĩ
Luke19:45 Agĩcooka agĩtoonya hekarũ thĩinĩ
Luke19:46 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke19:47 Na o mũthenya
Luke19:48 No matingĩonire njĩra ya kũmũũraga
Luke20:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke20:2 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke20:3 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke20:4 Ta njĩĩrai
Luke20:5 Makĩaranĩria o ene ũhoro ũcio
Luke20:6 Ningĩ tuoiga atĩ ‘Woimĩte kũrĩ andũ’
Luke20:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcookeria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke20:8 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:9 Agĩcooka akĩhe andũ ũhoro na ngerekano akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:10 Na rĩrĩ
Luke20:11 Agĩcooka agĩtũma ndungata ĩngĩ
Luke20:12 O rĩngĩ agĩtũma ndungata ya gatatũ
Luke20:13 “Nake mwene mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ akĩĩyũria atĩrĩ
Luke20:14 “No rĩrĩa akombori acio maamuonire
Luke20:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmũruta nja ya mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ
Luke20:16 Agooka oorage akombori acio
Luke20:17 Jesũ akĩmarora
Luke20:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũkaagwĩra ihiga rĩu
Luke20:19 Arutani a watho na athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene magĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũnyiitithia o na ihenya tondũ nĩmamenyire aaheanire ngerekano ĩyo akĩaria ũhoro wao. No nĩmetigagĩra andũ.
Luke20:20 O makĩmũtuĩragia-rĩ
Luke20:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athigaani acio makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke20:22 Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke20:23 Nowe Jesũ akĩona ũhinga ũrĩa maarĩ naguo akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:24 “Ta nyoniai mbeeca cianyu. Mbica ĩno na rĩĩtwa rĩĩrĩ nĩ cia ũ?”
Luke20:25 Makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke20:26 Nao makĩaga ũndũ wa kũmũnyiita naguo harĩ maũndũ marĩa aaririe arĩ mbere ya andũ. Na tondũ wa ũrĩa maagegirio nĩ ũrĩa aamacookeirie ũhoro-rĩ
Luke20:27 Na rĩrĩ
Luke20:28 “Mũrutani
Luke20:29 Na rĩrĩ
Luke20:30 Nake wa keerĩ
Luke20:31 na wa gatatũ makĩmũhikia
Luke20:32 Marigĩrĩrio-inĩ
Luke20:33 Rĩu-rĩ
Luke20:34 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke20:35 No rĩrĩ
Luke20:36 Andũ acio matigacooka gũkua; nĩgũkorwo makahaana ta araika. Andũ acio magakorwo marĩ ciana cia Ngai
Luke20:37 Naguo ũhoro wa atĩ andũ arĩa akuũ nĩmariũkagio-rĩ
Luke20:38 We ti Ngai wa arĩa akuũ
Luke20:39 Nao andũ amwe a arutani a watho makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke20:40 Na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wageririe kũmũũria ciũria ingĩ.
Luke20:41 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke20:42 Daudi we mwene nĩoigĩte ibuku-inĩ rĩa Thaburi atĩrĩ: “ ‘Mwathani nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: “Ikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo
Luke20:43 nginya ngaatũma thũ ciaku ituĩke gaturwa ka makinya maku.” ’
Luke20:44 Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke20:45 O andũ acio othe mathikĩrĩirie
Luke20:46 “Mwĩmenyererei arutani a watho. O mendaga gũthiĩ mehumbĩte nguo ndaaya
Luke20:47 No nĩo matoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa makamatunya nyũmba ciao
Luke21:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke21:2 Agĩcooka akĩona mũtumia mũthĩĩni
Luke21:3 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke21:4 Andũ acio angĩ othe maaheana kũringana na ũtonga wao; no mũtumia ũyũ o na arĩ mũthĩĩni
Luke21:5 Na rĩrĩ
Luke21:6 “Ha ũhoro wa mĩako ĩno mũrona-rĩ
Luke21:7 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke21:8 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke21:9 Rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara na wa ngũĩ
Luke21:10 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke21:11 Nĩgũkaagĩa na ithingithia nene mũno
Luke21:12 “No maũndũ macio mothe matanakinya-rĩ
Luke21:13 Ũndũ ũyũ ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mweke wanyu wa kũmarutĩra ũira.
Luke21:14 No rĩrĩ
Luke21:15 Nĩgũkorwo nĩngamũhe ciugo na ũũgĩ iria thũ cianyu itakahota gwĩtiiria kana gũkararia.
Luke21:16 Nĩmũgakunyanĩrwo o na nĩ aciari anyu
Luke21:17 Andũ othe nĩmakamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa.
Luke21:18 No rĩrĩ
Luke21:19 Kũũmĩrĩria kwanyu nĩkuo gũgaatũma mũhonokie mĩoyo yanyu.
Luke21:20 “Rĩrĩa mũkoona Jerusalemu kũrigiicĩirio nĩ thigari cia mbaara
Luke21:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa marĩ Judea nĩmorĩre irĩma-inĩ
Luke21:22 Nĩgũkorwo ihinda rĩu nĩrĩo rĩgaakorwo rĩrĩ rĩa kũherithanio
Luke21:23 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda
Luke21:24 Nĩmakooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Luke21:25 “Na nĩgũkagĩa imenyithia thĩinĩ wa riũa na mweri-inĩ na njata-inĩ. Nakuo gũkũ thĩ
Luke21:26 Andũ nĩmakaringĩka nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaka
Luke21:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agĩũka arĩ thĩinĩ wa itu arĩ na hinya na riiri mũingĩ.
Luke21:28 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maũndũ macio makaambĩrĩria gwĩkĩka-rĩ
Luke21:29 Ningĩ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno: “Ta rorai mũtĩ wa mũkũyũ na mĩtĩ ĩyo ĩngĩ yothe.
Luke21:30 Rĩrĩa yathundũra mathangũ
Luke21:31 Ũguo noguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio mothe magĩkĩka
Luke21:32 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke21:33 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigathira
Luke21:34 “Mwĩmenyererei
Luke21:35 Nĩgũkorwo ũndũ ũyũ ũgaakorerera andũ arĩa othe matũũraga thĩ-ĩno.
Luke21:36 Ikaragai mwĩiguĩte hĩndĩ ciothe
Luke21:37 Na o mũthenya Jesũ nĩarutanaga hekarũ-inĩ
Luke21:38 Nao andũ othe nĩmathiiaga hekarũ-inĩ rũciinĩ tene kũmũthikĩrĩria.
Luke22:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke22:2 nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho nĩmacaragia ũrĩa mangĩũragithia Jesũ
Luke22:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Shaitani agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa Judasi ũrĩa Mũisikariota
Luke22:4 Nake Judasi agĩthiĩ kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na kũrĩ anene a arangĩri a hekarũ makarĩkanĩre ũrĩa angĩkunyanĩra Jesũ.
Luke22:5 Nao magĩkena na magĩtĩkĩra kũmũhe mbeeca.
Luke22:6 Nake agĩĩtĩkĩra
Luke22:7 Naguo mũthenya wa kũrĩa Mĩgate ĩrĩa Ĩtekĩrĩtwo Ndawa ya Kũimbia ũgĩkinya
Luke22:8 Jesũ agĩtũma Petero na Johana
Luke22:9 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:10 Akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke22:11 Mwatoonya mwĩre mũndũ ũrĩa mwene nyũmba ĩyo atĩrĩ
Luke22:12 Nake nĩekũmuonia nyũmba nene ya igũrũ ĩrĩ na indo kuo. Haarĩriai irio cia Bathaka kuo.”
Luke22:13 Nao magĩthiĩ
Luke22:14 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩakinyire
Luke22:15 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:16 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:17 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe
Luke22:18 Nĩgũkorwo ngũmwĩra atĩ kuuma rĩu ndikanyua rĩngĩ ndibei ya maciaro ma mĩthabibũ
Luke22:19 Agĩcooka akĩoya mũgate
Luke22:20 Maarĩkia kũrĩa agĩĩka o ũguo
Luke22:21 No rĩrĩ
Luke22:22 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegwĩkwo o ta ũrĩa gũtuĩtwo
Luke22:23 Nao makĩambĩrĩria kũũrania gatagatĩ-inĩ kao nĩ ũrĩkũ wao ũngĩka ũguo.
Luke22:24 Ningĩ nĩmagĩire na ngarari makĩũrania nũũ gatagatĩ-inĩ kao ũngĩtuuo mũnene.
Luke22:25 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:26 No inyuĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhaana ũguo. Handũ ha ũguo
Luke22:27 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Luke22:28 Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ mũkoretwo mũrĩ hamwe na niĩ hĩndĩ ya magerio makwa.
Luke22:29 Na o ta ũrĩa Baba aheete ũthamaki
Luke22:30 nĩguo mũkarĩĩagĩra na mũkanyuuagĩra metha-inĩ yakwa ũthamaki-inĩ wakwa
Luke22:31 “Simoni
Luke22:32 No wee
Luke22:33 Nowe agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke22:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke22:35 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke22:36 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:37 Na ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:38 Nao arutwo makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:39 Nake Jesũ akiumagara agĩthiĩ Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ o ta ũrĩa amenyerete gwĩkaga
Luke22:40 Na aakinya ho akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:41 Akĩehera ho
Luke22:42 akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke22:43 Na mũraika akĩmuumĩrĩra oimĩte igũrũ
Luke22:44 Nake agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũhooya
Luke22:45 Aatiga kũhooya agĩcooka harĩ arutwo
Luke22:46 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke22:47 O hĩndĩ ĩyo aragia
Luke22:48 nowe Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:49 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arũmĩrĩri a Jesũ monire ũrĩa kwerekeire gwĩkĩka
Luke22:50 Nake ũmwe wao agĩtinia gũtũ kwa ũrĩo kwa ndungata ya mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene.
Luke22:51 Nowe Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke22:52 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩũria athĩnjĩrĩ-Ngai arĩa anene
Luke22:53 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ hekarũ-inĩ o mũthenya
Luke22:54 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩmũnyiita
Luke22:55 Nao maarĩkia gwakia mwaki o nja gatagatĩ na gũikara thĩ hamwe
Luke22:56 Ndungata ĩmwe ya mũirĩtu ĩkĩmuona na ũtheri wa mwaki aikarĩte hau
Luke22:57 Nowe agĩkaana ũhoro ũcio
Luke22:58 Thuutha wa kahinda kanini mũndũ ũngĩ akĩmuona
Luke22:59 Thuutha wa ithaa rĩmwe
Luke22:60 Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke22:61 Mwathani akĩĩhũgũra akĩrora Petero. Nake Petero akĩririkana ũrĩa Mwathani aamwĩrĩte atĩ
Luke22:62 Nake agĩthiĩ nja
Luke22:63 Andũ arĩa maarangĩrĩte Jesũ makĩambĩrĩria kũmũnyũrũria makĩmũhũũraga.
Luke22:64 Makĩmuoha maitho na gĩtambaya makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:65 Na nĩmamwĩrire maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ ma kũmũruma.
Luke22:66 Rũciinĩ gwakĩa
Luke22:67 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:68 na ingĩmũũria kĩũria
Luke22:69 No kuuma rĩu
Luke22:70 Othe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:71 Makĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke23:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe gĩgĩũkĩra
Luke23:2 Nakĩo gĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmũthitanga gĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke23:4 Nake Pilato akĩĩra athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na andũ acio angĩ atĩrĩ
Luke23:5 Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga magwatĩirie atĩrĩ
Luke23:6 Pilato aigua ũguo
Luke23:7 Rĩrĩa aamenyire atĩ Jesũ aarĩ wa bũrũri ũrĩa wathanagwo nĩ Herode
Luke23:8 Rĩrĩa Herode oonire Jesũ
Luke23:9 Akĩũria Jesũ ciũria nyingĩ
Luke23:10 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho maarũgamĩte hau
Luke23:11 Nake Herode na thigari ciake makĩmũthekerera na makĩmũnyũrũria. Makĩmũhumba nguo yarĩ thaka
Luke23:12 Nao Herode na Pilato magĩtuma ũrata mũthenya ũcio
Luke23:13 Pilato agĩĩta athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene
Luke23:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke23:15 O nake Herode ndanamuona arĩ na mahĩtia
Luke23:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmũhũũrithia
Luke23:17 Nĩgũkorwo
Luke23:18 No andũ acio makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo ũmwe
Luke23:19 Baraba aikĩtio njeera nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutithia ngũĩ itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene
Luke23:20 Nake Pilato
Luke23:21 No-o magĩthiĩ na mbere kwanĩrĩra
Luke23:22 Nake akĩmooria riita rĩa gatatũ atĩrĩ
Luke23:23 No-o makĩanĩrĩra mategũtigithĩria makiugaga aambwo mũtĩ-igũrũ
Luke23:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato agĩtua nĩekũmahingĩria o ũguo moorĩtie.
Luke23:25 Akĩohora mũndũ ũcio waikĩtio njeera nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutithia ngũĩ na kũũragana
Luke23:26 Na rĩrĩa thigari cioimagaragia Jesũ
Luke23:27 Andũ gĩkundi kĩnene makĩmũrũmĩrĩra
Luke23:28 Nake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ o
Luke23:29 Nĩgũkorwo kũrĩ hĩndĩ ĩgooka rĩrĩa mũkoigaga atĩrĩ
Luke23:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo “ ‘nĩmakeera irĩma atĩrĩ
Luke23:31 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Luke23:32 Na rĩrĩ
Luke23:33 Rĩrĩa maakinyire karĩma-inĩ handũ heetagwo Ihĩndĩ-rĩa-Mũtwe
Luke23:34 Nake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:35 Nao andũ nĩmarũgamĩte hau makĩmwĩrorera: Nao anene nĩmamũnyũrũragia makoiga atĩrĩ
Luke23:36 Thigari o nacio igĩũka
Luke23:37 ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke23:38 Na nĩ haarĩ maandĩko maandĩkĩtwo igũrũ rĩake atĩrĩ: ŨYŨ NĨWE MŨTHAMAKI WA AYAHUDI.
Luke23:39 Ũmwe wa ageri ngero acio maambanĩirio nake akĩmũruma
Luke23:40 No mũgeri ngero ũcio ũngĩ akĩmũkaania
Luke23:41 Ithuĩ tũherithĩtio na kĩhooto
Luke23:42 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke23:43 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke23:44 Na rĩrĩ
Luke23:45 tondũ riũa nĩrĩatigire kwara. Nakĩo gĩtambaya kĩa hekarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ.
Luke23:46 Nake Jesũ akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Luke23:47 Rĩrĩa mũnene wa gĩkundi gĩa thigari igana oonire ũrĩa gwekĩka
Luke23:48 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa othe maarũgamĩte hau kwĩrorera moonire ũrĩa gwekĩka
Luke23:49 No arĩa othe maamũũĩ
Luke23:50 Na rĩrĩ
Luke23:51 nake ndetĩkanĩtie na ũguo maatuĩte na mageeka. Oimĩte itũũra rĩa Arimathea
Luke23:52 Nake agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Pilato
Luke23:53 Nake agĩcuurũria mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ mũtharaba-inĩ
Luke23:54 Na mũthenya ũcio warĩ wa Ihaarĩria
Luke23:55 Nao atumia arĩa moimĩte na Jesũ Galili makĩrũmĩrĩra Jusufu
Luke23:56 Magĩcooka makĩinũka
Luke24:1 Na rĩrĩ
Luke24:2 Nao magĩkora ihiga rĩgaragarĩtio rĩkeherio mũromo-inĩ wa mbĩrĩra
Luke24:3 no rĩrĩa maatoonyire
Luke24:4 Na rĩrĩa maagegete nĩ ũhoro ũcio
Luke24:5 Nao atumia acio metigĩrĩte mũno
Luke24:6 Ndarĩ haha; nĩariũkĩte! Ririkanai ũrĩa aamwĩrire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ na inyuĩ Galili atĩ:
