John21:5 Nake akĩmeeta akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John21:6 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:7 Nake mũrutwo ũrĩa Jesũ eendete akĩĩra Petero atĩrĩ
John21:8 Nao arutwo acio angĩ makĩmũrũmĩrĩra na marikabu maguucĩtie wabu ũiyũrĩte thamaki tondũ matiarĩ haraaya
John21:9 Maarĩkia kuumĩria marikabu
John21:10 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:11 Nake Simoni Petero akĩhaica marikabu akĩguucia wabu ũcio nginya hũgũrũrũ-inĩ. Naguo waiyũrĩte thamaki iria nene
John21:12 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:13 Nake Jesũ agĩthiĩ
John21:14 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩarĩ ihinda rĩa gatatũ rĩa Jesũ kuumĩrĩra arutwo ake thuutha wa kũriũka kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ.
John21:15 Nao maarĩkia kũrĩa
John21:16 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John21:17 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria hĩndĩ ya gatatũ atĩrĩ
John21:18 “Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
John21:19 Jesũ oigire ũguo nĩgeetha onanie gĩkuũ kĩrĩa Petero agaakua
John21:20 Nake Petero eehũgũra akĩona mũrutwo ũrĩa Jesũ endete amarũmĩrĩire. (Ũcio nĩ ũrĩa wetiranĩtie na Jesũ rĩrĩa marĩĩaga irio cia hwaĩ-inĩ
John21:21 Na rĩrĩa Petero aamuonire-rĩ
John21:22 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John21:23 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
John21:24 Mũrutwo ũcio nĩwe ũrĩ na ũira wa maũndũ maya mothe
John21:25 Jesũ nĩekire maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ. Korwo mothe nĩmandĩkirwo-rĩ
Acts1:1 Thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩakwa rĩa mbere
Acts1:2 nginya mũthenya ũrĩa oirwo agĩtwarwo igũrũ thuutha wa kũhe atũmwo arĩa aathuurĩte mawatho na ũndũ wa Roho Mũtheru.
Acts1:3 Thuutha wa kũnyariirĩka gwake
Acts1:4 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe
Acts1:5 Nĩgũkorwo Johana aabatithanagia na maaĩ
Acts1:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa maagomanire hamwe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts1:7 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Ti ũhoro wanyu kũmenya ciathĩ o na kana mahinda marĩa Ithe witũ atuĩte na ũhoti wake mwene.
Acts1:8 No nĩmũrĩheo hinya rĩrĩa Roho Mũtheru arĩũka igũrũ rĩanyu; na inyuĩ nĩmũgatuĩka aira akwa thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu
Acts1:9 Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Acts1:10 O hĩndĩ ĩyo maikarĩte macũthĩrĩirie mũno akĩambata matu-inĩ-rĩ
Acts1:11 Makĩmooria atĩrĩ
Acts1:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩcooka Jerusalemu moimĩte Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ
Acts1:13 Rĩrĩa maakinyire
Acts1:14 Othe makĩnyiitanĩra hamwe
Acts1:15 Na rĩrĩ
Acts1:16 akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts1:17 Aarĩ ũmwe witũ na nĩagwatanagĩra na ithuĩ ũtungata-inĩ ũyũ.”
Acts1:18 (Judasi nĩagũrire gĩthaka na kĩheo kĩrĩa aamũkĩrire nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wake. Nake akĩgũa gĩthaka-inĩ kĩu na mũnduru
Acts1:19 Andũ othe a kũu Jerusalemu makĩigua ũhoro ũcio
Acts1:20 “Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo Ibuku-inĩ rĩa Thaburi atĩrĩ
Acts1:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩ kwagĩrĩire gũthuurwo mũndũ ũmwe kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa makoretwo marĩ hamwe na ithuĩ ihinda rĩothe rĩrĩa Mwathani Jesũ aaceeraga na ithuĩ
Acts1:22 kwambĩrĩria hĩndĩ ya ũbatithio wa Johana nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ oirwo akĩambata akĩehera harĩ ithuĩ. Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũmwe wa aya no nginya atuĩke mũira hamwe na ithuĩ ũhoro-inĩ wa kũriũka gwake.”
Acts1:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩrũgamia andũ eerĩ
Acts1:24 Magĩcooka makĩhooya makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts1:25 nĩguo oe ũtungata ũyũ wa gũtuĩka mũtũmwo
Acts1:26 Magĩcooka magĩcuuka mĩtĩ
Acts2:1 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthenya wa Bendegothito wakinyire-rĩ
Acts2:2 Na o rĩmwe mũgambo ta wa rũhuho rũnene rũkũhurutana na hinya ũgĩũka kuuma igũrũ
Acts2:3 Makĩona kĩndũ gĩatariĩ ta nĩnĩmbĩ cia mwaki iria ciagayũkanĩte igĩikara igũrũ rĩa mũndũ o mũndũ.
Acts2:4 Othe makĩiyũrio Roho Mũtheru na makĩambĩrĩria kwaria na thiomi ingĩ o ta ũrĩa Roho aamahotithirie.
Acts2:5 Na rĩrĩ
Acts2:6 Rĩrĩa maiguire mũgambo ũcio
Acts2:7 Nao makĩgega mũno
Acts2:8 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma mũndũ o mũndũ witũ amaigue makĩaria na rũthiomi rwa kũrĩa aaciarĩirwo?
Acts2:9 Andũ a Parithi
Acts2:10 na Firigia
Acts2:11 (Ayahudi hamwe na andũ arĩa meegarũrĩte magatuĩka Ayahudi); na andũ a Kirete
Acts2:12 Mamakĩte na makagega makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Acts2:13 Amwe ao
Acts2:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩrũgama hamwe na arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe
Acts2:15 Andũ aya ti arĩĩu
Acts2:16 Aca gũtitariĩ ta ũguo
Acts2:17 “ ‘Ngai ekuuga atĩrĩ
Acts2:18 O na ningĩ nĩngaitĩrĩria ndungata ciakwa cia arũme na cia andũ-a-nja Roho wakwa matukũ-inĩ macio
Acts2:19 Nĩngonania morirũ kũu igũrũ matu-inĩ
Acts2:20 Riũa nĩrĩkagarũrwo rĩtuĩke nduma
Acts2:21 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Acts2:22 “Inyuĩ andũ aya a Isiraeli
Acts2:23 Mũndũ ũyũ aaneanirwo moko-inĩ manyu
Acts2:24 No Ngai akĩmũriũkia kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ
Acts2:25 Tondũ Daudi oigire atĩrĩ ũhoro wake: “ ‘Nĩndonaga Mwathani arĩ mbere yakwa hĩndĩ ciothe. Tondũ arĩ guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo-rĩ
Acts2:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngoro yakwa nĩnjanjamũku
Acts2:27 tondũ ndũkandiganĩria mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Acts2:28 Nĩũũmenyithĩtie njĩra cia muoyo; nĩũkanjiyũria gĩkeno ndĩ harĩa ũrĩ.’
Acts2:29 “Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Acts2:30 Nowe aarĩ mũnabii na nĩamenyete atĩ Ngai nĩamwĩrire na mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩagaikarĩria ũmwe wa rũciaro rwake gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene.
Acts2:31 Nĩ ũndũ nĩamenyete ũhoro ũcio mbere
Acts2:32 Ngai nĩariũkĩtie Jesũ ũcio
Acts2:33 Kuona atĩ nĩatũũgĩrĩtio guoko-inĩ kwa ũrĩo kwa Ngai
Acts2:34 Nĩgũkorwo Daudi ndaambatire agĩthiĩ igũrũ
Acts2:35 o nginya rĩrĩa ngaatua thũ ciaku gaturwa ka makinya maku.” ’
Acts2:36 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe a Isiraeli nĩmamenye atĩrĩ: Ngai nĩ atuĩte Jesũ
Acts2:37 Rĩrĩa andũ maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Acts2:38 Nake Petero akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Acts2:39 Kĩĩranĩro gĩkĩ nĩ kĩanyu na ciana cianyu
Acts2:40 Akĩmataara na ciugo ingĩ nyingĩ
Acts2:41 Andũ arĩa meetĩkĩrire ndũmĩrĩri yake makĩbatithio
Acts2:42 Nao nĩmerutĩire kũgwatĩria ũrutani wa atũmwo
Acts2:43 Andũ othe makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya
Acts2:44 Andũ arĩa othe meetĩkĩtie maarĩ hamwe
Acts2:45 Makĩendia ithaka ciao na indo ciao
Acts2:46 O mũthenya nĩmagomanaga hekarũ-inĩ. Nĩmenyũraga mũgate marĩ mĩciĩ-inĩ yao
Acts2:47 makagoocaga Ngai
Acts3:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Petero na Johana nĩmambatire magĩthiĩ hekarũ-inĩ ihinda rĩa mahooya
Acts3:2 Na rĩrĩ
Acts3:3 Na rĩrĩa onire Petero na Johana marĩ hakuhĩ gũtoonya-rĩ
Acts3:4 Nao Petero na Johana makĩmũkũũrĩra maitho. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts3:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ ũcio akĩmarora
Acts3:6 Petero agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts3:7 Akĩmũnyiita guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo
Acts3:8 Nake akĩrũga na igũrũ
Acts3:9 Rĩrĩa andũ othe monire agĩĩtwara na magũrũ akĩgoocaga Ngai
Acts3:10 makĩmenya atĩ nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa watũũraga aikarĩte kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa hekarũ kĩrĩa gĩetagwo Gĩthaka akĩhooya mbeeca. Nao makĩgega mamakĩte nĩkuona ũrĩa kwahanĩkĩte harĩ mũndũ ũcio.
Acts3:11 Mũndũ ũcio watũũrĩte ahooyaga mbeeca-rĩ
Acts3:12 Rĩrĩa Petero onire ũguo
Acts3:13 Ngai wa Iburahĩmu
Acts3:14 Mwakaanire Ũrĩa Mũtheru na Mũthingu mũkiuga muohorerwo mũũragani.
Acts3:15 Mworagire ũrĩa mũheani wa muoyo
Acts3:16 Nĩ ũndũ wa wĩtĩkio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ
Acts3:17 “Na rĩrĩ
Acts3:18 No rĩrĩ
Acts3:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩrirei na mũgarũrũke kũrĩ Ngai
Acts3:20 nĩguo atũme Kristũ
Acts3:21 We no nginya aikare igũrũ o nginya ihinda rĩkinye rĩa Ngai rĩa gũcookereria maũndũ mothe
Acts3:22 Nĩgũkorwo Musa oigire atĩrĩ
Acts3:23 Na rĩrĩ
Acts3:24 “Ti-itherũ
Acts3:25 Na inyuĩ mũrĩ ariũ a anabii
Acts3:26 Rĩrĩa Ngai aariũkirie ndungata yake
Acts4:1 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Acts4:2 Nĩmaiguĩte ũũru mũno tondũ atũmwo nĩmarutaga andũ na makahunjia ũhoro wa kũriũka kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ thĩinĩ wa Jesũ.
Acts4:3 Makĩnyiita Petero na Johana
Acts4:4 No rĩrĩ
Acts4:5 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
Acts4:6 Nake Anasi
Acts4:7 Magĩathana atĩ Petero na Johana mareehwo mbere yao
Acts4:8 Nake Petero
Acts4:9 Angĩkorwo twĩtĩtwo ũmũthĩ nĩgeetha tũtaarĩrie ũhoro wa gĩĩko kĩega kĩrĩa gĩĩkĩirwo mũndũ ũcio ũratũũrĩte arĩ mwonju
Acts4:10 kĩmenyei inyuĩ
Acts4:11 We nĩwe “ ‘ihiga rĩrĩa inyuĩ aaki mwaregire
Acts4:12 Naguo ũhonokio ndũngĩoneka harĩ mũndũ ũngĩ o wothe
Acts4:13 Rĩrĩa monire ũũmĩrĩru wa Petero na Johana
Acts4:14 No rĩrĩ
Acts4:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmaatha mehere Kĩama-inĩ
Acts4:16 Makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Acts4:17 No nĩguo tũgirie ũndũ ũyũ gũthiĩ na mbere makĩria gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ-rĩ
Acts4:18 Magĩcooka makĩmeeta thĩinĩ rĩngĩ na makĩmaatha atĩ matikaarie kana marutane o na atĩa na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ.
Acts4:19 No Petero na Johana makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Acts4:20 Nĩgũkorwo tũtingĩhota gũtiga kwaria ũrĩa tuonete na tũkaigua.”
Acts4:21 Na thuutha wa kũmakaania
Acts4:22 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũcio wahonetio na njĩra ya kĩama aarĩ na ũkũrũ wa makĩria ma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
Acts4:23 Na rĩrĩa Petero na Johana maarekereirio
Acts4:24 Rĩrĩa maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Acts4:25 Nawe nĩwaririe na ũndũ wa Roho Mũtheru na kanua ka ndungata yaku
Acts4:26 Athamaki a thĩ nĩmatuĩte itua
Acts4:27 Ti-itherũ
Acts4:28 O mekire ũrĩa hinya waku na wendi waku watuĩte o mbere atĩ nĩguo gũgaatuĩka.
Acts4:29 Na rĩrĩ
Acts4:30 Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku ũhonanie
Acts4:31 Nao maarĩkia kũhooya
Acts4:32 Nao andũ arĩa othe meetĩkĩtie maarĩ na ngoro ĩmwe na meciiria o mamwe. Gũtiarĩ mũndũ woigaga atĩ kĩndũ o na kĩrĩkũ kĩa indo ciake nĩ gĩake we mwene
Acts4:33 Nao atũmwo
Acts4:34 Gũtiarĩ andũ maagaga kĩndũ gatagatĩ-inĩ kao. Nĩgũkorwo ihinda kwa ihinda andũ arĩa maarĩ na ithaka kana nyũmba nĩmaciendagia
Acts4:35 magaciiga magũrũ-inĩ ma atũmwo
Acts4:36 Jusufu
Acts4:37 nĩendirie gĩthaka gĩake na akĩrehe mbeeca icio
Acts5:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts5:2 Anania agĩĩtigĩria mbeeca imwe
Acts5:3 Nowe Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts5:4 Rĩrĩa ũtarakĩendetie-rĩ
Acts5:5 Rĩrĩa Anania aiguire ũguo-rĩ
Acts5:6 Nao aanake magĩũka
Acts5:7 Thuutha wa ta mathaa matatũ-rĩ
Acts5:8 Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts5:9 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts5:10 O kahinda kau akĩgũa thĩ magũrũ-inĩ make
Acts5:11 Naguo kanitha wothe
Acts5:12 Na rĩrĩ
Acts5:13 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wacookire kũgeria gwĩturanĩra nao
Acts5:14 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Acts5:15 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo
Acts5:16 Ningĩ andũ aingĩ nĩmonganaga hamwe moimĩte matũũra-inĩ marĩa maathiũrũrũkĩirie Jerusalemu
Acts5:17 Na rĩrĩ
Acts5:18 Makĩnyiita atũmwo
Acts5:19 No ũtukũ-rĩ
Acts5:20 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts5:21 Na rĩrĩ
Acts5:22 No rĩrĩa thigari ciakinyire njeera-rĩ
Acts5:23 “Twakora mĩrango ya njeera ĩrĩ mĩhinge wega
Acts5:24 Rĩrĩa mũnene wa arangĩri a hekarũ na athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene maiguire ũhoro ũcio makĩmaka na makĩrigwo nĩ ũrĩa gũgũikara.
Acts5:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo hagĩũka mũndũ
Acts5:26 Maigua ũguo
Acts5:27 Maarĩkia kũrehe atũmwo-rĩ
Acts5:28 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts5:29 Petero na atũmwo acio angĩ magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts5:30 Ngai wa maithe maitũ nĩariũkirie Jesũ kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ
Acts5:31 Ngai nĩamũtũgĩririe akĩmũiga guoko-inĩ gwake kwa ũrĩo arĩ Mũthamaki na Mũhonokia nĩguo Isiraeli merire na marekerwo mehia.
Acts5:32 Ithuĩ tũrĩ aira a maũndũ macio
Acts5:33 Rĩrĩa maiguire ũguo makĩrakara mũno makĩenda kũmooraga.
Acts5:34 No rĩrĩ
Acts5:35 Nake akĩĩra Kĩama atĩrĩ
Acts5:36 Ihinda rĩhĩtũku mũndũ wetagwo Theuda nĩeyumĩririe agĩĩtuuaga atĩ we nĩ mũndũ ma
Acts5:37 Thuutha wake
Acts5:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Acts5:39 No angĩkorwo ũndũ ũyũ uumanĩte na Ngai
Acts5:40 Nao magĩĩtĩkania na mĩario yake. Nao magĩĩta atũmwo matoonye makĩmahũũrithia iboko. Magĩcooka makĩmaatha matikaarie thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ
Acts5:41 Nao atũmwo makiuma Kĩama-inĩ makenete tondũ wa ũrĩa maatuĩtwo aagĩrĩru a gũconorithio nĩ ũndũ wa Rĩĩtwa rĩu.
Acts5:42 Mũthenya o mũthenya
Acts6:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts6:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts6:3 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Acts6:4 na ithuĩ tũrũmbũiye ũhoro wa mahooya na ũtungata wa kiugo.”
Acts6:5 Ũndũ ũcio moigire nĩwakenirie gĩkundi kĩu gĩothe. Nao magĩthuura Stefano
Acts6:6 Makĩneana andũ acio kũrĩ atũmwo
Acts6:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kiugo kĩa Ngai gĩkĩhunja. Mũigana wa arutwo kũu Jerusalemu ũkĩongerereka mũno
Acts6:8 Na rĩrĩ
Acts6:9 No rĩrĩ
Acts6:10 no matingĩetiiririe ũũgĩ wake kana Roho ũrĩa aaragia naguo.
Acts6:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩringĩrĩria andũ amwe na hitho moige atĩrĩ
Acts6:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtũma okĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ
Acts6:13 Magĩcooka makĩrehe aira a maheeni
Acts6:14 Nĩgũkorwo nĩtũiguĩte akiuga atĩ Jesũ ũyũ wa Nazarethi nĩagatharia handũ haha
Acts6:15 Andũ arĩa othe maarĩ Kĩama-inĩ magĩkũũrĩra Stefano maitho
Acts7:1 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts7:2 Nake Stefano agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts7:3 Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts7:4 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Iburahĩmu akiuma bũrũri wa Akalidei agĩthiĩ gũtũũra Harani. Thuutha wa gĩkuũ gĩa ithe
Acts7:5 Ndaamũheire igai gũkũ
Acts7:6 Ngai eerire Iburahĩmu atĩrĩ: ‘Njiaro ciaku igaatũũra irĩ ngʼeni bũrũri ũtarĩ wacio
Acts7:7 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts7:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩarĩkanĩire na Iburahĩmu kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa ũhoro wa kũrua. Nake Iburahĩmu agĩtuĩka ithe wa Isaaka na akĩmũruithia thikũ ya kanana thuutha wa gũciarwo gwake. Thuutha-inĩ Isaaka agĩtuĩka ithe wa Jakubu
Acts7:9 “Na tondũ wa maguuka maitũ kũiguĩra Jusufu ũiru
Acts7:10 na akĩmũhonokia mathĩĩna-inĩ make mothe. Nĩaheire Jusufu ũũgĩ na akĩmũhotithia atuĩke wa kwendeka nĩ Firaũni mũthamaki wa Misiri; nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmũtua wa gwathaga Misiri o na nyũmba yake yothe ya ũthamaki.
Acts7:11 “Thuutha ũcio gũkĩgĩa ngʼaragu bũrũri-inĩ wothe wa Misiri
Acts7:12 Rĩrĩa Jakubu aiguire atĩ Misiri nĩ kwarĩ na ngano
Acts7:13 Na rĩrĩa maathiire riita rĩa keerĩ-rĩ
Acts7:14 Thuutha wa ũguo-rĩ
Acts7:15 Nake Jakubu agĩikũrũka
Acts7:16 Mĩĩrĩ yao nĩyacookirio Shekemu na ĩgĩthikwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ ĩrĩa Iburahĩmu aagũrĩte na mbeeca kuuma kũrĩ ariũ a Hamori kũu Shekemu.
Acts7:17 “Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩakuhĩrĩirie rĩa Ngai kũhingia kĩĩranĩro gĩake kũrĩ Iburahĩmu-rĩ
Acts7:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki ũngĩ ũtooĩ ũhoro wa Jusufu agĩtuĩka wa gũthamaka Misiri.
Acts7:19 Agĩĩka andũ aitũ ũũru mũno na akĩhinyĩrĩria maithe maitũ na ũndũ wa kũmaringĩrĩria na hinya mate tũkenge twao nĩgeetha tũkue.
Acts7:20 “Ihinda-inĩ rĩu Musa nĩaciarirwo
Acts7:21 Rĩrĩa aigirwo nja-rĩ
Acts7:22 Musa agĩthomithio na ũũgĩ wothe wa andũ a Misiri na aarĩ na hinya wa mĩario na ciĩko.
Acts7:23 “Rĩrĩa Musa aakinyirie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna-rĩ
Acts7:24 Nĩonire mũndũ ũmwe wao akĩnyariirwo nĩ mũndũ wa Misiri. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ kũmũũrĩria na akĩmũrĩhĩria na ũndũ wa kũũraga mũndũ ũcio Mũmisiri.
Acts7:25 Musa eeciirĩtie atĩ andũ ao nĩmangĩonire atĩ Ngai nĩamũhũthagĩra nĩgeetha amahonokie
Acts7:26 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Musa agĩthiĩ agĩkora andũ eerĩ a Isiraeli makĩrũa. Akĩgeria kũmaiguithania akĩmeeraga atĩrĩ
Acts7:27 “No mũndũ ũrĩa wekĩte ũcio ũngĩ ũũru agĩikania Musa
Acts7:28 Ũrenda kũnjũraga o ta ũrĩa ũrooragire Mũmisiri ira?’
Acts7:29 Rĩrĩa Musa aiguire ũguo akĩũra agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Midiani
Acts7:30 “Na rĩrĩ
Acts7:31 Rĩrĩa onire ũguo
Acts7:32 ‘Niĩ nĩ niĩ Ngai wa maithe manyu
Acts7:33 “Nake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts7:34 Ti-itherũ nĩnyonete kũhinyĩrĩrio kwa andũ akwa kũu bũrũri wa Misiri. Nĩnjiguĩte gũcaaya kwao
Acts7:35 “Ũyũ nowe Musa ũrĩa maaregete makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts7:36 Akĩmatongoria makiuma Misiri na agĩĩka morirũ na akĩringa ciama arĩ kũu Misiri
Acts7:37 “Ũyũ nowe Musa ũrĩa werire andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Acts7:38 We aarĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kũu werũ-inĩ
Acts7:39 “No rĩrĩ
Acts7:40 Nao makĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Acts7:41 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo maathondekire mũhianano watariĩ ta njaũ. Makĩũrutĩra magongona
Acts7:42 No Ngai akĩmahutatĩra
Acts7:43 Nĩmũtũũgĩrĩtie ihooero rĩa Moleku
Acts7:44 “Maithe maitũ maarĩ na hema ĩrĩa yetagwo gĩikaro kĩa Ũira kũu werũ-inĩ. Nayo yathondeketwo o ta ũrĩa Ngai eerĩte Musa
Acts7:45 Maarĩkia kwamũkĩra hema-rĩ
Acts7:46 ũrĩa wakenire nĩ gwĩtĩkĩrĩka nĩ Ngai
Acts7:47 No Solomoni nĩwe wamwakĩire nyũmba.
Acts7:48 “No rĩrĩ
Acts7:49 “ ‘Igũrũ nĩkuo gĩtĩ gĩakwa kĩa ũnene
Acts7:50 Githĩ ti guoko gwakwa gwathondekire indo ici ciothe?’
Acts7:51 “Inyuĩ andũ aya aremi
Acts7:52 Nĩ kũrĩ mũnabii ũtaanyariirirwo nĩ maithe manyu? Mooragire o na andũ arĩa maarathire ũhoro wa gũũka kwa Ũrĩa Mũthingu. Na rĩu nĩmũmũkunyanĩire na mũkamũũraga;
Acts7:53 o inyuĩ mwamũkĩrire watho ũrĩa waathanirwo kũgerera araika no mũkĩaga kũwathĩkĩra.”
Acts7:54 Rĩrĩa maiguire maũndũ macio-rĩ
Acts7:55 No Stefano
Acts7:56 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts7:57 Maigua ũguo makĩhumbĩra matũ mao
Acts7:58 makĩmũkururia
Acts7:59 Rĩrĩa maamũhũũraga na mahiga nyuguto
Acts7:60 Agĩcooka agĩturia ndu
Acts8:1 Nake Saũlũ aarĩ ho
Acts8:2 Andũ etigĩri Ngai magĩthika Stefano na makĩmũcakaĩra mũno.
Acts8:3 No Saũlũ akĩambĩrĩria kwananga kanitha. Aathiiaga nyũmba o nyũmba
Acts8:4 Nao andũ arĩa maahurunjĩtwo nĩmahunjirie kiugo kĩa Ngai o kũrĩa guothe maathiiaga.
Acts8:5 Filipu agĩikũrũka agĩthiĩ itũũra rĩarĩ Samaria
Acts8:6 Rĩrĩa ikundi cia andũ ciaiguire Filipu na ikĩona ciama iria aaringaga
Acts8:7 Ngoma thũku nĩcioimaga andũ aingĩ igĩkayũrũrũkaga
Acts8:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gũkĩgĩa na gĩkeno kĩnene itũũra-inĩ rĩu.
Acts8:9 Na rĩrĩ
Acts8:10 nao andũ othe
Acts8:11 Maatũũrĩte mamuumaga thuutha tondũ nĩamagegetie hĩndĩ ndaaya na ũragũri wake.
Acts8:12 No rĩrĩa meetĩkirie Filipu akĩhunjia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa ũthamaki wa Ngai na wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ Kristũ-rĩ
Acts8:13 Simoni we mwene agĩĩtĩkia na akĩbatithio. Nake akĩrũmĩrĩra Filipu kũrĩa guothe aathiiaga
Acts8:14 Rĩrĩa atũmwo arĩa maarĩ kũu Jerusalemu maiguire atĩ andũ a Samaria nĩmetĩkĩrĩte kiugo kĩa Ngai-rĩ
Acts8:15 Nao maakinya kuo
Acts8:16 tondũ nginya hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho Mũtheru ndaakoretwo aikũrũkĩire mũndũ o na ũmwe wao; tiga o kũbatithio maabatithĩtio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani Jesũ.
Acts8:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero na Johana makĩmaigĩrĩra moko
Acts8:18 Rĩrĩa Simoni onire atĩ Roho aaheanagwo na ũndũ wa kũigĩrĩrwo moko nĩ atũmwo-rĩ
Acts8:19 akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts8:20 Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts8:21 Wee ndũrĩ na handũ
Acts8:22 Wĩrire waganu ũyũ na ũhooe Mwathani. Hihi nĩegũkũrekera nĩ ũndũ wa gũkorwo na rĩciiria ta rĩu ngoro-inĩ yaku.
Acts8:23 Nĩgũkorwo nguona ũiyũrĩtwo nĩ marũrũ na ũgatuĩka ngombo ya mehia.”
Acts8:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Simoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts8:25 Rĩrĩa maarĩkirie kũheana ũira na kũhunjia kiugo kĩa Mwathani-rĩ
Acts8:26 Na rĩrĩ
Acts8:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiumagara
Acts8:28 na arĩ njĩra-inĩ akĩinũka
Acts8:29 Roho akĩĩra Filipu atĩrĩ
Acts8:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu akĩhanyũka nginya ngaari-inĩ ĩyo ya mbarathi
Acts8:31 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts8:32 Mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũhakũre aathomaga gacunjĩ gaka ka Maandĩko: “Aatwarirwo o ta ngʼondu gĩthĩnjĩro-inĩ
Acts8:33 Nĩaconorithirio na ndaigana gũtuĩrwo ciira na kĩhooto. Nũũ ũngĩaria ũhoro wa njiaro ciake? Nĩgũkorwo muoyo wake nĩwehererio ũkiuma gũkũ thĩ.”
Acts8:34 Mũndũ ũcio mũhakũre akĩũria Filipu atĩrĩ
Acts8:35 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu akĩrutia ũhoro hau
Acts8:36 Na marĩ njĩra-inĩ magĩthiĩ-rĩ
Acts8:37 (Nake Filipu akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts8:38 Nake agĩathana ngaari ĩyo ya mbarathi ĩrũgame. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu na mũndũ ũcio mũhakũre magĩikũrũka
Acts8:39 Na rĩrĩa moimĩrire maaĩ-inĩ
Acts8:40 No Filipu nĩonekanire Azota
Acts9:1 Ihinda-inĩ o rĩu Saũlũ no eehĩtagĩra kũũraga arutwo a Mwathani. Agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Acts9:2 na akĩmũhooya marũa athiĩ namo thunagogi-inĩ iria ciarĩ Dameski
Acts9:3 Naarĩ rũgendo-inĩ aakuhĩrĩria Dameski-rĩ
Acts9:4 Akĩgũa thĩ
Acts9:5 Saũlũ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts9:6 No rĩrĩ
Acts9:7 Nao andũ arĩa maatwaranaga hamwe na Saũlũ makĩrũgama hau maagĩte ũrĩa mangiuga; o nĩmaiguire mũgambo no matiigana kuona mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ.
Acts9:8 Nake Saũlũ agĩũkĩra
Acts9:9 Ihinda rĩa matukũ matatũ aarĩ mũtumumu
Acts9:10 Na rĩrĩ
Acts9:11 Nake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:12 Nĩonete mũndũ kĩoneki-inĩ wĩtagwo Anania agĩũka kũmũigĩrĩra moko
Acts9:13 Anania akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts9:14 Na okĩte gũkũ arĩ na wathani kuuma kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene
Acts9:15 No Mwathani akĩĩra Anania atĩrĩ
Acts9:16 Nĩngũmuonia ũrĩa arĩ o nginya anyamaarĩke nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa.”
Acts9:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Anania agĩthiĩ na agĩtoonya nyũmba ĩyo. Akĩigĩrĩra Saũlũ moko
Acts9:18 O hĩndĩ ĩyo
Acts9:19 na aarĩkia kũrĩa irio
Acts9:20 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩambĩrĩria kũhunjia thunagogi-inĩ atĩ Jesũ nĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai.
Acts9:21 Andũ othe arĩa maamũiguire makĩgega makĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts9:22 Nowe Saũlũ agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na hinya
Acts9:23 Thuutha wa mĩthenya mĩingĩ gũthira
Acts9:24 no Saũlũ akĩmenya mũbango ũrĩa maarĩ naguo. Mũthenya na ũtukũ maaikaraga mamuoheirie ihingo-inĩ cia itũũra inene nĩguo mamũũrage.
Acts9:25 No arũmĩrĩri aake makĩmuoya ũtukũ
Acts9:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyire Jerusalemu
Acts9:27 No Baranaba akĩmuoya akĩmũtwara kũrĩ atũmwo. Akĩmeera ũrĩa Saũlũ oonire Mwathani arĩ rũgendo-inĩ rwake
Acts9:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ agĩikara na atũmwo
Acts9:29 Ningĩ nĩaaragia na agakararanagia na Ayahudi arĩa maaciarĩirwo kwa Ayunani
Acts9:30 Rĩrĩa ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ maamenyire ũguo
Acts9:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kanitha wa Judea guothe
Acts9:32 Na rĩrĩ
Acts9:33 Arĩ kũu agĩkora mũndũ wetagwo Ainea warĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga
Acts9:34 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:35 Andũ othe arĩa maatũũraga Lida na Sharoni makĩmuona na makĩgarũrũkĩra Mwathani.
Acts9:36 Kũu Jopa nĩ kwarĩ mũrutwo wetagwo Tabitha (narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩgĩtaũrwo nĩ kuuga Dorokasi)
Acts9:37 O ihinda-inĩ rĩu nĩarũarire na agĩkua
Acts9:38 Lida kwarĩ hakuhĩ na Jopa; nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa arutwo maaiguire atĩ Petero aarĩ kũu Lida
Acts9:39 Nake Petero agĩthiĩ hamwe nao
Acts9:40 Nake Petero akĩmeera othe moime nja ya nyũmba; agĩcooka agĩturia maru akĩhooya Ngai. Agĩcooka akĩgarũrũkĩra mũtumia ũcio wakuĩte
Acts9:41 Nake Petero akĩmũnyiita guoko
Acts9:42 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩmenyeka Jopa guothe
Acts9:43 Nake Petero agĩikara Jopa mĩthenya mĩingĩ kwa mũndũ wetagwo Simoni
Acts10:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts10:2 Mũndũ ũcio na andũ othe a nyũmba yake nĩmeyamũrĩire Ngai na makamwĩtigagĩra; nake nĩaheanaga indo ciake na ũtaana kũrĩ andũ arĩa maarĩ abatari na nĩahooyaga Ngai kaingĩ.
Acts10:3 Mũthenya ũmwe ta thaa kenda cia mĩaraho-rĩ
Acts10:4 Korinelio akĩmũrora aiyũrĩtwo nĩ guoya
Acts10:5 Na rĩrĩ
Acts10:6 Araikara gwa Simoni ũria mũtanduki wa njũũa
Acts10:7 Rĩrĩa mũraika ũcio wamwarĩirie aathiire
Acts10:8 Akĩmeera ũrĩa wothe kwahanĩte agĩcooka akĩmatũma Jopa.
Acts10:9 Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire ta thaa thita cia mũthenya marĩ njĩra-inĩ makuhĩrĩirie itũũra rĩu-rĩ
Acts10:10 Nake akĩigua aahũũta na akĩbatario nĩ kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa
Acts10:11 Nake akĩona igũrũ rĩhingũrĩtwo na kĩndũ gĩatariĩ ta gĩtama kĩnene gĩkĩharũrũkio thĩ kĩnyiitĩtwo mĩthia ĩna.
Acts10:12 Nakĩo kĩarĩ na nyamũ cia mĩthemba yothe ya iria irĩ magũrũ mana
Acts10:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgambo ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:14 Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts10:15 Mũgambo ũkĩmwarĩria riita rĩa keerĩ ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:16 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkire maita matatũ
Acts10:17 Na rĩrĩa Petero eeyũragia gĩtũmi gĩa kĩoneki kĩu oonete-rĩ
Acts10:18 Magĩĩtana
Acts10:19 Na rĩrĩa Petero eeciiragia ũhoro wa kĩoneki kĩu
Acts10:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts10:21 Petero agĩikũrũka
Acts10:22 Nao andũ acio magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts10:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩĩra andũ acio matoonye nyũmba matuĩke ageni aake. Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire Petero agĩthiĩ nao
Acts10:24 Naguo mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire magĩkinya Kaisarea. Korinelio agĩkorwo ametereire na eetĩte andũ a nyũmba yake na arata a hakuhĩ.
Acts10:25 Na rĩrĩa Petero aatoonyaga nyũmba
Acts10:26 No Petero akĩmũũkĩria
Acts10:27 O makĩaragia-rĩ
Acts10:28 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ wega atĩ Mũyahudi ndetĩkĩrĩtio nĩ watho kũgwatanĩra na mũndũ wa Ndũrĩrĩ o na kana kũmũceerera. No Ngai nĩanyonetie atĩ ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩ kuuga atĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ti mwamũre kana atĩ arĩ na thaahu.
Acts10:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa ndĩratũmanĩirwo
Acts10:30 Nake Korinelio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ: “Matukũ mana mahĩtũku
Acts10:31 akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tũmana Jopa wĩtĩrwo Simoni ũrĩa wĩtagwo Petero
Acts10:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndagũtũmanĩire o hĩndĩ ĩyo
Acts10:34 Nake Petero akĩambĩrĩria kwaria
Acts10:35 no atĩ nĩetĩkagĩra andũ kuuma ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ ciothe arĩa mamwĩtigagĩra na mageeka ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire.
Acts10:36 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa Ngai aatũmĩire andũ a Isiraeli
Acts10:37 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ ũrĩa gwekĩkire kũu Judea guothe
Acts10:38 ũrĩa Ngai aaitĩrĩire Jesũ wa Nazarethi Roho Mũtheru o na hinya
Acts10:39 “Ithuĩ tũrĩ aira a maũndũ marĩa mothe eekire thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Ayahudi o na Jerusalemu. Nĩmamũũragire na njĩra ya kũmwamba mũtĩ-igũrũ.
Acts10:40 No mũthenya wa gatatũ Ngai akĩmũriũkia kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ na agĩtũma onekane kũrĩ andũ.
Acts10:41 We ndonirwo nĩ andũ othe
Acts10:42 Nĩatwathire tũhunjĩrie andũ na tũrute ũira atĩ we nĩ we Ngai aamũrire atuĩke mũtuanĩri-ciira wa andũ arĩa marĩ muoyo na arĩa makuĩte.
Acts10:43 Anabii othe nĩmaheanaga ũira wa ũhoro wake atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũkaamwĩtĩkia nĩakamũkĩra ũrekeri wa mehia na ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake.”
Acts10:44 Na Petero o akĩaragia ciugo icio-rĩ
Acts10:45 Nao andũ arĩa meetĩkĩtie
Acts10:46 Nĩgũkorwo nĩmamaiguire makĩaria na thiomi makĩgoocaga Ngai. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts10:47 “Harĩ mũndũ ũngĩgiria andũ aya mabatithio na maaĩ? Andũ aya nĩmamũkĩra Roho Mũtheru o ta ithuĩ.”
Acts10:48 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩathana mabatithio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ Kristũ. Magĩcooka makĩũria Petero aikaranie nao ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mĩnini.
Acts11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts11:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa Petero aambatire agĩthiĩ Jerusalemu
Acts11:3 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:4 Nowe Petero akĩambĩrĩria kũmataarĩria maũndũ mothe wega o ta ũrĩa meekĩkĩte
Acts11:5 “Ndaarĩ itũũra-inĩ rĩa Jopa ngĩhooya Ngai
Acts11:6 Ndaacũthĩrĩria thĩinĩ wakĩo ngĩona nyamũ cia thĩ iria irĩ magũrũ mana
Acts11:7 Ngĩcooka ngĩigua mũgambo ũkĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:8 “Na niĩ ngĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts11:9 “Naguo mũgambo ũcio ũkĩaria riita rĩa keerĩ kuuma igũrũ ũkĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:10 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkire maita matatũ
Acts11:11 “O hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ atatũ arĩa maatũmĩtwo kũrĩ niĩ kuuma Kaisarea magĩkinya nyũmba-inĩ ĩrĩa ndaikaraga.
Acts11:12 Nake Roho akĩnjĩĩra thiĩ nao na ndikagĩe na ngaanja. Nao ariũ a Ithe witũ aya atandatũ tũgĩthiĩ nao na tũgĩtoonya nyũmba ya mũndũ ũcio.
Acts11:13 Nake agĩtwĩra ũrĩa oimĩrĩirwo nĩ mũraika arĩ gwake nyũmba
Acts11:14 Nĩegũkũrehera ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa ĩgũtũma wee na nyũmba yaku yothe mũhonoke.’
Acts11:15 “Na rĩrĩa ndaambĩrĩirie kwaria-rĩ
Acts11:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩririkana ũrĩa Mwathani oigĩte atĩrĩ
Acts11:17 Angĩkorwo Ngai nĩamaheire kĩheo o kĩrĩa aatũheire ithuĩ andũ arĩa twetĩkirie Mwathani Jesũ Kristũ-rĩ
Acts11:18 Rĩrĩa maaiguire ũguo
Acts11:19 Na rĩrĩ
Acts11:20 O na kũrĩ o ũguo
Acts11:21 Guoko kwa Mwathani kwarĩ hamwe nao; na andũ aingĩ magĩĩtĩkia makĩgarũrũkĩra Mwathani.
Acts11:22 Nayo ngumo ya maũndũ macio igĩkinyĩra andũ a kanitha ũrĩa warĩ kũu Jerusalemu; nao magĩtũma Baranaba athiĩ Antiokia.
Acts11:23 Rĩrĩa aakinyire na akĩona ũira wa wega wa Ngai
Acts11:24 Baranaba aarĩ mũndũ mwega waiyũrĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru na warĩ na wĩtĩkio
Acts11:25 Nake Baranaba agĩthiĩ Tariso gũcaria Saũlũ
Acts11:26 na rĩrĩa aamuonire akĩmũrehe Antiokia. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kwa ihinda rĩa mwaka ũmwe Baranaba na Saũlũ makĩgomana na kanitha na makĩruta andũ aingĩ. Kũu Antiokia nĩkuo arutwo meetirwo Akristiano riita rĩa mbere.
Acts11:27 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu anabii amwe magĩikũrũka kuuma Jerusalemu nginya Antiokia.
Acts11:28 Ũmwe wao wetagwo Agabo akĩrũgama
Acts11:29 Nao arutwo
Acts11:30 Nĩmekire ũndũ ũcio
Acts12:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts12:2 Akĩũragithia Jakubu
Acts12:3 Na rĩrĩa oonire ũhoro ũcio nĩwakenia Ayahudi-rĩ
Acts12:4 Aarĩkia kũmũnyiitithia
Acts12:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Petero akĩhingĩrwo njeera
Acts12:6 Na ũtukũ ũrĩa Herode aarokaga kũmũtwara agaciirithio
Acts12:7 Na rĩrĩ
Acts12:8 Mũraika ũcio agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts12:9 Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra
Acts12:10 Makĩhĩtũka arangĩri a mbere na a keerĩ na magĩkinya kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa kĩgera kĩrĩa gĩa gũtoonya itũũra inene. Nakĩo kĩhingo kĩu gĩkĩĩhingũra nĩ ũndũ wao
Acts12:11 Nake Petero akĩĩigua
Acts12:12 Na rĩrĩa aguũkĩirwo nĩ ũhoro ũcio
Acts12:13 Petero akĩringaringa mũrango wa nja
Acts12:14 Rĩrĩa aaiguire mũgambo wa Petero
Acts12:15 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts12:16 Nowe Petero agĩthiĩ na mbere kũringaringa mũrango
Acts12:17 Petero akĩmakiria na guoko na akĩmataarĩria ũrĩa Mwathani aamũrutĩte njeera. Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts12:18 Rũciinĩ gwakĩa
Acts12:19 Thuutha wa Herode gũcaria Petero na kũmwaga-rĩ
Acts12:20 Na rĩrĩ
Acts12:21 Na mũthenya ũrĩa waraarĩirio wakinya-rĩ
Acts12:22 Nao makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts12:23 O rĩmwe mũraika wa Mwathani akĩringa Herode nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga kũgoocithia Ngai
Acts12:24 No kiugo kĩa Ngai gĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kuongerereka na gũtheerema.
Acts12:25 Rĩrĩa Baranaba na Saũlũ maarĩkirie ũtungata wao-rĩ
Acts13:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts13:2 Rĩrĩa mahooyaga Mwathani mehingĩte kũrĩa irio
Acts13:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thuutha wa kwĩhinga kũrĩa irio na kũhooya Ngai
Acts13:4 Andũ acio eerĩ
Acts13:5 Rĩrĩa maakinyire Salamisi
Acts13:6 Magĩthiĩ matuĩkanĩirie gĩcigĩrĩra kĩu gĩothe nginya magĩkinya Pafo. Kũu magĩkora Mũyahudi warĩ mũragũri na mũnabii wa maheeni wetagwo Bari-Jesũ
Acts13:7 nake aatungatagĩra barũthi ũrĩa wetagwo Serigio Paũlũ. Barũthi ũcio warĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ
Acts13:8 No rĩrĩ
Acts13:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ
Acts13:10 “Wee ũrĩ mwana wa mũcukani na ũrĩ thũ ya maũndũ marĩa mothe mega! Ũiyũrĩtwo nĩ mĩthemba yothe ya maheeni na waara. Ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũgaatiga kuogomia njĩra iria ciagĩrĩire cia Mwathani?
Acts13:11 Na rĩrĩ
Acts13:12 Nake barũthi oona ũrĩa gwekĩka
Acts13:13 Paũlũ na andũ arĩa maarĩ nao
Acts13:14 Moima Periga
Acts13:15 Thuutha wa gũthomwo kwa Maandĩko ma Watho na ma Anabii
Acts13:16 Paũlũ akĩrũgama
Acts13:17 Ngai wa andũ a Isiraeli nĩathuurire maithe maitũ; agĩtũma andũ acio matheereme hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maatũũraga Misiri
Acts13:18 nĩakirĩrĩirie mĩtugo yao ihinda rĩa ta mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna marĩ werũ-inĩ
Acts13:19 akĩniina ndũrĩrĩ mũgwanja kũu Kaanani naguo bũrũri wacio akĩũhe andũ aake ũtuĩke igai rĩao.
Acts13:20 Ũhoro ũcio wothe wekĩkire ihinda-inĩ rĩa ta mĩaka magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtano. “Thuutha wa ũguo
Acts13:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ makiuga maheo mũthamaki
Acts13:22 Thuutha wa kweheria Saũlũ
Acts13:23 “Kuuma rũciaro-inĩ rwa mũndũ ũyũ
Acts13:24 Jesũ atanooka
Acts13:25 Na rĩrĩa Johana aarĩkagia wĩra wake nĩoririe atĩrĩ: ‘Mwĩciiragia niĩ nĩ niĩ ũũ? Niĩ ti niĩ we. Aca niĩ ti niĩ
Acts13:26 “Ariũ a Ithe witũ
Acts13:27 Andũ a Jerusalemu na anene ao matiakũũranire Jesũ
Acts13:28 O na gũtuĩka mationire gĩtũmi kĩiganu gĩa gũtũma ooragwo
Acts13:29 Na maarĩkia kũhingia maũndũ mothe marĩa maandĩkĩtwo ũhoro wake
Acts13:30 No rĩrĩ
Acts13:31 na kwa ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mĩingĩ nĩonirwo nĩ andũ arĩa moimĩte nao Galili
Acts13:32 “Tũramwĩra ũhoro mwega: Ũhoro ũrĩa Ngai eerĩire maithe maitũ
Acts13:33 nĩatũhingĩirie ithuĩ ciana ciao
Acts13:34 Naguo ũhoro wa ma wa atĩ Ngai nĩamũriũkirie kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ nĩguo ndakabuthe-rĩ
Acts13:35 Ũndũ ũcio nĩwarĩtio handũ hangĩ atĩrĩ: “ ‘Wee ndũkareka ũrĩa waku Mũtheru abuthe.’
Acts13:36 “Nĩgũkorwo rĩrĩa Daudi aarĩkirie gũtungatĩra Ngai rũciaro-inĩ rwake
Acts13:37 No ũrĩa Ngai aariũkirie kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ ndaabuthire.
Acts13:38 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts13:39 Na mũndũ wothe ũmwĩtĩkĩtie nĩatuuagwo mũthingu maũndũ-inĩ mothe marĩa watho wa Musa ũtangĩamũtuire mũthingu.
Acts13:40 Mwĩmenyererei
Acts13:41 “ ‘Ta rorai
Acts13:42 Rĩrĩa Paũlũ na Baranaba moimaga thunagogi
Acts13:43 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũcemanio wathirire
Acts13:44 Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire wa Thabatũ
Acts13:45 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ayahudi moonire kĩrĩndĩ kĩu
Acts13:46 Nao Paũlũ na Baranaba makĩmacookeria marĩ na ũcamba makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts13:47 Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani atwathĩte agatwĩra atĩrĩ: “ ‘Nĩndĩmũtuĩte ũtheri wa gũtherera andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ
Acts13:48 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ maaiguire ũguo magĩkena na magĩtĩĩa kiugo kĩa Mwathani
Acts13:49 Nakĩo kiugo kĩa Mwathani gĩkĩhunja kũndũ guothe kũu bũrũri-inĩ.
Acts13:50 No Ayahudi magĩakĩrĩria atumia arĩa meyamũrĩire Ngai na maarĩ igweta
Acts13:51 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩribariba rũkũngũ kuuma magũrũ mao kuonania
Acts13:52 Nao arutwo makĩiyũrwo ni gĩkeno
Acts14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts14:2 No Ayahudi arĩa maaregire gwĩtĩkia nĩmathogothire andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ
Acts14:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Paũlũ na Baranaba magĩikara kũu ihinda iraaya
Acts14:4 Andũ a itũũra rĩu inene makĩgayũkana; amwe magĩĩtĩkania na Ayahudi
Acts14:5 Nĩ kwarĩ na ndundu yathugundĩtwo nĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ na Ayahudi
Acts14:6 No nao makĩmenya ũhoro ũcio
Acts14:7 kũrĩa maathiire na mbere kũhunjia ũhoro mwega.
Acts14:8 Nakuo kũu Lisitera nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ warĩ mwonju magũrũ
Acts14:9 Nake agĩthikĩrĩria Paũlũ akĩaria. Paũlũ aamũrora
Acts14:10 akĩmwĩta na mũgambo mũnene
Acts14:11 Rĩrĩa gĩkundi kĩu kĩa andũ kĩonire ũrĩa Paũlũ eekĩte
Acts14:12 Magĩĩta Baranaba Zeu
Acts14:13 Mũthĩnjĩri-ngai ya Zeu
Acts14:14 No rĩrĩa atũmwo acio Baranaba na Paũlũ maaiguire ũguo
Acts14:15 “Andũ aya
Acts14:16 Tene
Acts14:17 no ndaigana gwĩtiga atarĩ na ũira wa kuonania atĩ arĩ kuo: nĩamuonetie ũtugi na ũndũ wa kũmuurĩria mbura yumĩte igũrũ na kũmũhe magetha hĩndĩ ya kĩmera; nĩamũheaga irio nyingĩ na akaiyũria ngoro cianyu na gĩkeno.”
Acts14:18 No o na maarĩtie ciugo icio
Acts14:19 Na rĩrĩ
Acts14:20 No arutwo maarĩkia kũmũrigiicĩria
Acts14:21 Paũlũ wa Baranaba makĩhunjia ũhoro mwega itũũra-inĩ rĩu na magĩtũma andũ aingĩ matuĩke arutwo. Magĩcooka makĩhũndũka magĩthiĩ Lisitera
Acts14:22 magĩĩkagĩra arutwo hinya na kũmomĩrĩria nĩgeetha matũũre marũmĩtie wĩtĩkio. Makameeraga atĩrĩ
Acts14:23 Paũlũ na Baranaba makĩmaamũrĩra athuuri a kanitha na makĩhooya Ngai mehingĩte kũrĩa irio
Acts14:24 Thuutha wa gũtuĩkanĩria Pisidia
Acts14:25 na maarĩkia kũhunjia kiugo kũu Periga
Acts14:26 Moima Atalia makĩhaica marikabu
Acts14:27 Maakinya kũu magĩcookanĩrĩria andũ a kanitha hamwe
Acts14:28 Nao magĩikara na arutwo kũu ihinda iraaya.
Acts15:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts15:2 Ũndũ ũyũ ũgĩtũma Paũlũ na Baranaba macookanĩrie na makararanie mũno nao. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Paũlũ na Baranaba makĩamũrwo
Acts15:3 Naguo kanitha ũkĩmoimagaria
Acts15:4 Na maakinya Jerusalemu
Acts15:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ amwe a arĩa meetĩkĩtie a thiritũ ya Afarisai makĩrũgama
Acts15:6 Nao atũmwo na athuuri magĩcemania nĩgeetha maarĩrĩrie ũhoro ũcio.
Acts15:7 Thuutha wa mĩario mĩingĩ
Acts15:8 Nake Ngai
Acts15:9 Ndeekĩrire ngũũrani gatagatĩ gaitũ nao
Acts15:10 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Acts15:11 Aca! Twĩtĩkĩtie atĩ tũhonokete nĩ ũndũ wa wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ
Acts15:12 Nakĩo kĩũngano gĩothe gĩgĩkira ki gĩgĩthikĩrĩria Baranaba na Paũlũ makĩheana ũhoro wa ciama na morirũ iria Ngai eekĩte kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ agereire harĩo.
Acts15:13 Rĩrĩa maarĩkirie kwaria
Acts15:14 Simoni nĩatũtaarĩria ũrĩa Ngai oonanirie wendo wake hĩndĩ ya mbere na ũndũ wa gwĩthuurĩra andũ kuuma kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ nĩguo matuĩke aake.
Acts15:15 Nacio ciugo cia anabii ikaringana na ũhoro ũcio
Acts15:16 “ ‘Thuutha wa ũguo nĩngacooka
Acts15:17 nĩgeetha matigari marongoragie Mwathani
Acts15:18 marĩa moĩkaine kuuma o tene.
Acts15:19 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Acts15:20 Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ
Acts15:21 Nĩgũkorwo ũhoro wa Musa nĩwahunjagio matũũra-inĩ mothe o kuuma mahinda ma tene mũno
Acts15:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atũmwo na athuuri
Acts15:23 Makĩmatũma na marũa maya: Nĩ ithuĩ atũmwo na athuuri
Acts15:24 Nĩtũiguĩte atĩ andũ amwe nĩmooimire kũrĩ ithuĩ matarĩ na rũũtha rwitũ
Acts15:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts15:26 andũ arĩa matwarĩrĩirie mĩoyo yao ũgwati-inĩ nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ.
Acts15:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtwatũma Judasi na Sila nĩgeetha makindĩre ũhoro ũyũ tũramwandĩkĩra na ciugo cia tũnua twao.
Acts15:28 Nĩkuonekete arĩ wega kũrĩ Roho Mũtheru o na kũrĩ ithuĩ twage kũmũkuuithia mũrigo ũkĩrĩte maũndũ maya:
Acts15:29 Na rĩrĩ
Acts15:30 Nao andũ acio makiugĩrwo ũhoro
Acts15:31 Rĩrĩa andũ maathomire marũa macio
Acts15:32 Nao Judasi na Sila
Acts15:33 Thuutha wa gũikara kũu kwa ihinda-rĩ
Acts15:34 (Nowe Sila akĩona arĩ wega aikare kũu.)
Acts15:35 No Paũlũ na Baranaba magĩtigwo kũu Antiokia
Acts15:36 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩigana ũna
Acts15:37 Baranaba nĩeendaga kuoya Johana
Acts15:38 no Paũlũ ndonaga arĩ wega mathiĩ nake
Acts15:39 Makĩgĩa na gũkararania kũnene o nginya makĩamũkana. Baranaba akĩoya Mariko
Acts15:40 no Paũlũ agĩthuura Sila
Acts15:41 Agĩtuĩkanĩria Suriata na Kilikia
Acts16:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts16:2 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ a kũu Lisitera na Ikonia nĩmaragia wega igũrũ rĩake.
Acts16:3 Paũlũ nĩendaga mathiĩ nake rũgendo
Acts16:4 Na rĩrĩa maathiiaga kuuma itũũra nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ
Acts16:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makanitha makĩgĩa na hinya ũhoro-inĩ wa gwĩtĩkia na makongererekaga mũigana o mũthenya.
Acts16:6 Paũlũ na andũ arĩa maarĩ nao magĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri wothe wa Firigia na Galatia
Acts16:7 Rĩrĩa maakinyire mũhaka-inĩ wa Misia
Acts16:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩhĩtũka Misia
Acts16:9 Ũtukũ ũcio-rĩ
Acts16:10 Paũlũ aarĩkia kuona kĩoneki kĩu
Acts16:11 Twaarĩkia kuuma Teroa
Acts16:12 Kuuma kũu tũgĩthiĩ Filipi
Acts16:13 Mũthenya wa Thabatũ wakinya tũkiuma nja ya kĩhingo gĩa itũũra
Acts16:14 Na rĩrĩ
Acts16:15 Rĩrĩa we na andũ a nyũmba yake maabatithirio-rĩ
Acts16:16 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe tũgĩthiĩ harĩa haahooyagĩrwo Ngai
Acts16:17 Mũirĩtu ũcio akĩrũmĩrĩra Paũlũ hamwe na ithuĩ
Acts16:18 Mũirĩtu ũcio agĩthiĩ na mbere na gwĩka ũguo mĩthenya mĩingĩ. Marigĩrĩrio-inĩ Paũlũ agĩthirĩka mũno nginya akĩhũgũkĩra roho ũcio akĩwĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts16:19 Rĩrĩa ene mũirĩtu ũcio ngombo maamenyire atĩ mwĩhoko wao wa kuona mbeeca nĩwathira
Acts16:20 Makĩmarehe mbere ya aciirithania
Acts16:21 nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutana mĩtugo ĩrĩa ithuĩ andũ a Roma tũtagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩtĩkĩra o na kana kũmĩĩka.”
Acts16:22 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩgĩũkĩrĩra Paũlũ na Sila kĩmeeke ũũru no aciirithania makĩruta watho atĩ marutwo nguo na mahũũrwo iboko.
Acts16:23 Thuutha wa kũhũũrwo mũno magĩikio njeera
Acts16:24 Aarĩkia kwamũkĩra watho ũcio
Acts16:25 Na rĩrĩ
Acts16:26 Na o rĩmwe gũkĩgĩa gĩthingithia kĩnene o nginya mĩthingi ya njeera ĩgĩthingitha. Nayo mĩrango yothe ya njeera ikĩhingũka o rĩmwe
Acts16:27 Mũrangĩri wa njeera akĩarahũka
Acts16:28 No Paũlũ akĩanĩrĩra
Acts16:29 Nake mũrangĩri ũcio wa njeera agĩĩtia matawa
Acts16:30 Agĩcooka akĩmoimia na nja
Acts16:31 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts16:32 Magĩcooka makĩmwarĩria ũhoro wa kiugo kĩa Mwathani
Acts16:33 O ihinda rĩu rĩa ũtukũ
Acts16:34 Mũrangĩri ũcio wa njeera akĩmatwara gwake nyũmba
Acts16:35 Na rĩrĩ
Acts16:36 Nake mũrangĩri ũcio wa njeera akĩĩra Paũlũ atĩrĩ
Acts16:37 No Paũlũ akĩĩra thigari icio atĩrĩ
Acts16:38 Nacio thigari igĩcookeria aciirithania ũhoro ũcio
Acts16:39 Nao magĩũka kũmahooreria
Acts16:40 Paũlũ na Sila maarĩkia kuuma njeera
Acts17:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts17:2 Paũlũ agĩtoonya thunagogi
Acts17:3 akĩmataarĩria na akĩmaiguithia atĩ kwarĩ o nginya Kristũ anyariirĩke na ariũke kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ. Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts17:4 Ayahudi amwe magĩtĩkĩra ũhoro ũcio na magĩtuĩka a thiritũ ya Paũlũ na Sila
Acts17:5 No Ayahudi makĩigua ũiru; nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcaria andũ arĩa maarĩ mĩtugo mĩũru kuuma ndũnyũ
Acts17:6 No rĩrĩa maamaagire
Acts17:7 na Jasoni nĩamanyiitĩte ũgeni thĩinĩ wa nyũmba yake. Othe nĩmarakararia watho wa Kaisari
Acts17:8 Rĩrĩa maaiguire ũguo
Acts17:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩĩtia Jasoni na andũ arĩa angĩ maarĩ nao irĩhi rĩa kũmarũgamĩrĩra
Acts17:10 Na kwarĩĩkia gũtuka-rĩ
Acts17:11 Na rĩrĩ
Acts17:12 Ayahudi aingĩ nĩmetĩkirie
Acts17:13 Rĩrĩa Ayahudi a Thesalonike maamenyire atĩ Paũlũ nĩahunjagia kiugo kĩa Ngai kũu Berea-rĩ
Acts17:14 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ magĩtũma Paũlũ athiĩ ndwere-inĩ cia iria
Acts17:15 Nao andũ arĩa moimagaririe Paũlũ
Acts17:16 Paũlũ o ametereire kũu Athene-rĩ
Acts17:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩaranagĩria na Ayahudi o na Ayunani arĩa meeyamũrĩire Ngai kũu thunagogi-inĩ
Acts17:18 Nakĩo gĩkundi kĩa Aepikurio na Asitoiko
Acts17:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩmuoya na makĩmũtwara mbere ya mũcemanio wa Areopago
Acts17:20 Tũraigua ũgĩtwarĩria maũndũ mageni
Acts17:21 (Andũ othe a Athene na andũ a kũngĩ arĩa maatũũraga kuo matirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ meekaga tiga kwaria na gũthikĩrĩria ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mageni).
Acts17:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ akĩrũgama mũcemanio-inĩ wa kĩama kĩu gĩetagwo Areopago akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Andũ aya a Athene
Acts17:23 Nĩgũkorwo o na nĩnyonete kĩgongona kĩandĩkĩtwo maandĩko maya: KŨRĨ NGAI ĨRĨA ĨTOĨO
Acts17:24 “Ngai ũrĩa wombire thĩ na indo ciothe iria irĩ kuo nĩwe Mwathani wa igũrũ na thĩ
Acts17:25 Na ndatungatagwo na moko ma andũ
Acts17:26 Kuuma harĩ mũndũ ũmwe
Acts17:27 Ngai eekire ũguo nĩgeetha andũ mamũmaathe na hihi mamũhambatĩrie mamuone
Acts17:28 ‘Nĩgũkorwo nĩ thĩinĩ wake tũtũũraga na tũgetwara
Acts17:29 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts17:30 Mahinda ma tene Ngai ndaigana kũrũmbũiya ũhoro ũcio wa kwaga ũmenyo
Acts17:31 Nĩgũkorwo nĩatuĩte mũthenya ũrĩa agaatuĩra thĩ ciira na kĩhooto na ũndũ wa mũndũ ũrĩa athuurĩte. Nĩamenyithanĩtie ũndũ ũyũ kũrĩ andũ othe na ũndũ wa kũriũkia Jesũ kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ.”
Acts17:32 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maiguire ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa arĩa akuũ
Acts17:33 Maarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Acts17:34 Andũ mataarĩ aingĩ magĩtuĩka arũmĩrĩri a Paũlũ na magĩĩtĩkia. Ũmwe wao aarĩ Dionisio
Acts18:1 Thuutha ũcio
Acts18:2 Aakinya kũu agĩkora Mũyahudi wetagwo Akula
Acts18:3 na tondũ Paũlũ aarĩ mũtumi wa hema o tao-rĩ
Acts18:4 O mũthenya wa Thabatũ nĩaheanaga ũhoro thunagogi-inĩ
Acts18:5 Rĩrĩa Sila na Timotheo mookire kuuma Makedonia
Acts18:6 No rĩrĩa Ayahudi maakararirie Paũlũ na makĩmũruma
Acts18:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ akiuma kũu thunagogi-inĩ
Acts18:8 Nake Kirisipo
Acts18:9 Ũtukũ ũmwe Mwathani akĩĩra Paũlũ na kĩoneki atĩrĩ
Acts18:10 Nĩgũkorwo ndĩ hamwe nawe
Acts18:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Paũlũ agĩikara kũu mwaka ũmwe na nuthu
Acts18:12 Rĩrĩa Galio aarĩ barũthi wa Akaia
Acts18:13 Makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts18:14 Na rĩrĩa Paũlũ endaga kwaria
Acts18:15 No kuona atĩ nĩ ũhoro wa ciũria ikoniĩ ciugo na marĩĩtwa na watho wanyu inyuĩ ene-rĩ
Acts18:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiuga marutũrũrwo kuuma igooti-inĩ.
Acts18:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ayahudi acio othe makĩgarũrũkĩra Sosithene mũtongoria wa thunagogi
Acts18:18 Paũlũ nĩaikarire kũu Korinitho kwa ihinda. Agĩcooka agĩtiga ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ kuo
Acts18:19 Nao maakinya Efeso
Acts18:20 Nao makĩmũũria aikaranganie nao kuo
Acts18:21 No rĩrĩa oimaga kuo
Acts18:22 Rĩrĩa aakinyire Kaisarea
Acts18:23 Na thuutha wa Paũlũ gũikaranga kũu Antiokia
Acts18:24 O ihinda-inĩ rĩu
Acts18:25 Nĩarutĩtwo na njĩra ĩrĩa ya Mwathani
Acts18:26 Nake akĩambĩrĩria kwaria na ũcamba kũu thunagogi-inĩ. Rĩrĩa Pirisila na Akula maamũiguire akĩaria
Acts18:27 Na rĩrĩa Apolo eendaga gũthiĩ Akaia
Acts18:28 Nĩgũkorwo arĩ na ũhoti mũingĩ
Acts19:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts19:2 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Acts19:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Paũlũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Acts19:4 Paũlũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts19:5 Rĩrĩa maaiguire ũguo
Acts19:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Paũlũ aamaigĩrĩire moko
Acts19:7 Nao othe maarĩ ta andũ ikũmi na eerĩ.
Acts19:8 Paũlũ agĩtoonya thunagogi
Acts19:9 No amwe ao makĩũmia ngoro; makĩaga gwĩtĩkia na magĩcambia Njĩra ĩyo mbere ya kĩrĩndĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Paũlũ akĩmeherera. Akĩoya arutwo agĩthiĩ nao nyũmba ĩrĩa yathomithagĩrio andũ ya Turano
Acts19:10 Ũndũ ũyũ nĩwathiire na mbere ihinda ta rĩa mĩaka ĩĩrĩ
Acts19:11 Ngai nĩaringire ciama cia mwanya agereire harĩ Paũlũ
Acts19:12 o nginya itambaya na nguo iria ciahutagia mwĩrĩ wake igatwarĩrwo andũ arĩa maarĩ arũaru
Acts19:13 Na rĩrĩ
Acts19:14 Ariũ mũgwanja a Mũyahudi wetagwo Sikeva
Acts19:15 Mũthenya ũmwe
Acts19:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ ũcio warĩ na ngoma thũku akĩmarũgĩrĩra akĩmatooria othe. Akĩmahũũra mũno nginya makiuma nyũmba ĩyo makĩũra marĩ njaga makiuraga thakame.
Acts19:17 Rĩrĩa Ayahudi na Ayunani arĩa maatũũraga Efeso maamenyire ũhoro ũcio
Acts19:18 Andũ aingĩ a arĩa meetĩkirie makĩyumĩria na makiumbũra waganu wao matekũhitha.
Acts19:19 Andũ aingĩ arĩa maaragũraga
Acts19:20 Kiugo kĩa Mwathani gĩkĩhunja mũno na njĩra ĩyo na gĩkĩgĩa na hinya.
Acts19:21 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio mothe gwĩkĩka
Acts19:22 Agĩtũma andũ eerĩ a arĩa maamũteithagĩrĩria
Acts19:23 Ihinda-inĩ rĩu nĩ kwagĩire na thogothogo nene ĩkoniĩ ũhoro wa Njĩra ĩyo.
Acts19:24 Mũturi wa indo cia betha wetagwo Demeterio
Acts19:25 Nake agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ acio maaturaga indo icio
Acts19:26 Na nĩmũrona na mũkaigua ũrĩa mũndũ ũyũ ũretwo Paũlũ aiguithĩtie na akahĩtithia andũ aingĩ gũkũ Efeso
Acts19:27 Ũgwati ũrĩa ũrĩ ho nĩ atĩ to wonjoria witũ wiki ũkũmenererio
Acts19:28 Rĩrĩa maaiguire ũguo
Acts19:29 Na thuutha wa kahinda kanini itũũra rĩu rĩkĩiyũra inegene. Andũ acio othe makĩnyiita Gayo na Arisitariko arĩa moimĩte Makedonia na Paũlũ
Acts19:30 Paũlũ nĩendaga kwĩyumĩria mbere ya kĩrĩndĩ kĩu
Acts19:31 O na anene amwe a bũrũri wa Asia arĩa maarĩ arata a Paũlũ makĩmũtũmanĩra
Acts19:32 Kĩũngano kĩu gĩkĩaga ũiguano: Amwe maanagĩrĩra makoiga ũũ
Acts19:33 Ayahudi makiumĩria Alekisanda mbere ya kĩrĩndĩ
Acts19:34 No rĩrĩa maamenyire atĩ aarĩ Mũyahudi
Acts19:35 Karani wa kĩama gĩa itũũra rĩu agĩkiria kĩrĩndĩ kĩu
Acts19:36 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts19:37 Inyuĩ mwarehe andũ aya haha
Acts19:38 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Acts19:39 Angĩkorwo harĩ na ũndũ ũngĩ mũngĩenda kuuga makĩria ma ũguo
Acts19:40 Ũrĩa kũrĩ rĩu nĩ atĩ
Acts19:41 Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Acts20:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts20:2 Agĩtuĩkanĩria mĩena ya kuo
Acts20:3 kũrĩa aaikarire mĩeri ĩtatũ. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Paũlũ eeharagĩria kũhaica marikabu athiĩ Suriata
Acts20:4 Paũlũ aathiire marĩ hamwe na Sopatiro mũrũ wa Puro
Acts20:5 Andũ acio magĩthiĩ mbere magĩtweterera kũu Teroa.
Acts20:6 No ithuĩ tũkĩhaica marikabu
Acts20:7 Mũthenya wa mbere wa kiumia nĩtwagomanire hamwe nĩguo twenyũre mũgate. Paũlũ akĩarĩria andũ
Acts20:8 Nĩ kwarĩ na matawa maingĩ maakanaga kũu nyũmba ya igũrũ kũrĩa twagomanĩte.
Acts20:9 Nake mwanake wetagwo Eutiko aikarĩte ndirica-inĩ
Acts20:10 Paũlũ agĩikũrũka
Acts20:11 Agĩcooka akĩambata nyũmba ya igũrũ
Acts20:12 Nao andũ makĩinũkia mwanake ũcio arĩ muoyo
Acts20:13 No ithuĩ tũgĩthiĩ mbere tũgĩtoonya marikabu tũgĩthiĩ nginya Aso
Acts20:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatũtũngire kũu Aso
Acts20:15 Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire tũkĩhaica marikabu
Acts20:16 Paũlũ nĩatuĩte itua rĩa gũthiĩ ahĩtũkĩte Efeso na marikabu nĩguo ndagate mahinda kũu bũrũri wa Asia
Acts20:17 Paũlũ arĩ kũu Mileto
Acts20:18 Nao maakinya
Acts20:19 Nĩndatungatĩire Mwathani ndĩnyiihĩtie mũno na ndĩ na maithori
Acts20:20 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ ndirĩ ndatithia kũhunjia ũndũ o wothe ũngĩmũguna no ndĩmũrutagĩra mbere ya andũ othe na ngathiiaga o nyũmba o nyũmba.
Acts20:21 Na ngoimbũrĩra Ayahudi o hamwe na Ayunani atĩ no nginya magarũrũke kũrĩ Ngai na ũndũ wa kwĩrira na magĩe na wĩtĩkio thĩinĩ wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ.
Acts20:22 “Na rĩrĩ
Acts20:23 Ũndũ ũrĩa njũũĩ tu nĩ atĩ
Acts20:24 No rĩrĩ
Acts20:25 “Na rĩu nĩnjũũĩ gũtirĩ o na ũmwe thĩinĩ wanyu wa andũ arĩa ndanathiĩ ngĩhunjagĩria ũhoro wa ũthamaki ũgacooka kũnyona rĩngĩ.
Acts20:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts20:27 Nĩ ũndũ niĩ ndirĩ ndatithia kũmũhunjĩria wendi wa Ngai ũrĩ wothe.
Acts20:28 Mwĩmenyererei inyuĩ ene
Acts20:29 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ndaarĩkia gũthiĩ
Acts20:30 O na ningĩ kuuma harĩ inyuĩ nĩgũkoimĩra andũ
Acts20:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ikaragai mwĩhũgĩte! Ririkanai atĩ ihinda rĩa mĩaka ĩtatũ ndirĩ ndatigithĩria gutaara o ũmwe wanyu ũtukũ na mũthenya ngĩitaga maithori.
Acts20:32 “Na rĩu ngũmũneana kũrĩ Ngai o na kũrĩ ũhoro wa wega wake
Acts20:33 Niĩ ndirĩ ndacuumĩkĩra betha kana thahabu
Acts20:34 Inyuĩ ene nĩmũũĩ atĩ ndaarutaga wĩra na moko makwa nĩ ũndũ wa mabata makwa niĩ mwene
Acts20:35 Maũndũ-inĩ marĩa mothe ndeekire
Acts20:36 Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Acts20:37 Nao othe makĩrĩra makĩmũhĩmbagĩria na makĩmũmumunya.
Acts20:38 Ũndũ ũrĩa wamekĩrire kĩeha mũno makĩria
Acts21:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts21:2 Tũgĩkora marikabu yaringaga ĩthiĩ Foinike
Acts21:3 Na rĩrĩa tuonire Kuporo
Acts21:4 Tũgĩkora arutwo kuo
Acts21:5 No ihinda riitũ rĩathira
Acts21:6 Twaarĩkia kuganĩra ũhoro
Acts21:7 Twoima Turo
Acts21:8 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ tũkiuma kuo
Acts21:9 Nake nĩarĩ na airĩtu aake ana matarĩ ahiku
Acts21:10 Na thuutha wa gũkorwo kuo matukũ maingĩ-rĩ
Acts21:11 Rĩrĩa aakinyire harĩ ithuĩ
Acts21:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twaiguire ũguo
Acts21:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts21:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aaregire kũigua ũrĩa twamwĩraga-rĩ
Acts21:15 Thuutha wa ũguo
Acts21:16 Arutwo amwe a kuuma Kaisarea magĩthiĩ hamwe na ithuĩ
Acts21:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twakinyire Jerusalemu
Acts21:18 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Paũlũ
Acts21:19 Nake Paũlũ akĩmageithia na akĩmeera ũrĩa wothe Ngai eekĩire andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ agereire ũtungata-inĩ wake.
Acts21:20 Rĩrĩa maaiguire ũguo
Acts21:21 Nao nĩmamenyithĩtio atĩ nĩ ũrutaga Ayahudi othe arĩa matũũranagia na andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ atĩ magarũrũke matigane na watho wa Musa
Acts21:22 Tũgwĩka atĩa? Hatirĩ ngaanja nĩmekũigua atĩ nĩũũkĩte.
Acts21:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ĩka ũrĩa tũgũkwĩra. Tũrĩ na andũ ana mehĩtĩte mwĩhĩtwa.
Acts21:24 Thiĩ na andũ aya
Acts21:25 Ha ũhoro wa andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ arĩa metĩkĩtie-rĩ
Acts21:26 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Paũlũ agĩthiĩ na andũ acio
Acts21:27 Rĩrĩa matukũ macio mũgwanja maakuhĩrĩirie gũthira-rĩ
Acts21:28 makĩanagĩrĩra atĩrĩ
Acts21:29 (Nĩmonete Tirofimo ũrĩa Mũefeso marĩ na Paũlũ kũu itũũra-inĩ
Acts21:30 Narĩo itũũra rĩothe rĩkĩambũrũrũka nao andũ magĩũka mahanyũkĩte moimĩte mĩena yothe. Makĩnyiita Paũlũ
Acts21:31 Na rĩrĩ
Acts21:32 Nake o rĩmwe akĩoya anene na thigari magĩikũrũka harĩ kĩrĩndĩ matengʼerete. Rĩrĩa andũ acio maarutaga ngũĩ moonire mũnene ũcio na thigari ciake magĩtiga kũhũũra Paũlũ.
Acts21:33 Mũnene ũcio wa thigari agĩũka akĩmũnyiita na agĩathana ohwo na mĩnyororo ĩĩrĩ. Agĩcooka akĩũria aarĩ ũ na nĩ atĩa ekĩte.
Acts21:34 Andũ amwe thĩinĩ wa kĩrĩndĩ maanagĩrĩra makoiga ũũ na arĩa angĩ makoiga ũũ; na tondũ mũnene ũcio wa thigari ndangĩamenyire ma ya ũhoro nĩ ũndũ wa mbugĩrĩrio
Acts21:35 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Paũlũ aakinyire ngathĩ-inĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩgĩthũka mũno o nginya Paũlũ agĩkuuo nĩ thigari.
Acts21:36 Kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa kĩamuumĩte thuutha kĩanagĩrĩra gĩkoiga atĩrĩ
Acts21:37 Rĩrĩa thigari ciarĩ o hakuhĩ gũtoonyia Paũlũ nyũmba ya thigari-rĩ
Acts21:38 Githĩ we tiwe Mũmisiri ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie ngũĩ hĩndĩ ĩmwe
Acts21:39 Paũlũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts21:40 Paũlũ aarĩkia kũheo rũũtha nĩ mũnene ũcio wa thigari
Acts22:1 “Ariũ a Baba
Acts22:2 Rĩrĩa maaiguire akĩmaarĩria na rũthiomi rwa Kĩhibirania-rĩ
Acts22:3 “Niĩ ndĩ Mũyahudi
Acts22:4 Nĩndanyariiraga arũmĩrĩri a Njĩra ĩno o nginya magakua na nganyiita arũme na andũ-a-nja ngamaikia njeera
Acts22:5 o ta ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene na Kĩama gĩothe gĩa athuuri o nao mangĩheana ũira ũcio. O na nĩmaheire marũa ndwarĩre andũ ao kũu Dameski
Acts22:6 “Ta thaa thita ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkinya Dameski-rĩ
Acts22:7 Ngĩgwa thĩ
Acts22:8 “Na niĩ ngĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts22:9 Nao andũ arĩa twarĩ nao nĩmoonire ũtheri ũcio
Acts22:10 “Na niĩ ngĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts22:11 Na rĩrĩ
Acts22:12 “Mũndũ wetagwo Anania nĩookire kũnyona
Acts22:13 Agĩũka na akĩrũgama hakuhĩ na niĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts22:14 “Agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts22:15 Nĩũgũtuĩka mũira wake kũrĩ andũ othe wa kũmoimbũrĩra ũrĩa wonete na ũrĩa ũiguĩte.
Acts22:16 Rĩu nĩ kĩĩ wetereire? Ũkĩra
Acts22:17 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaacookire Jerusalemu
Acts22:18 ngĩkĩona Mwathani akĩaria
Acts22:19 “Na niĩ ngĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts22:20 Na rĩrĩa Stefano mũira waku aaitirwo thakame
Acts22:21 “Nake Mwathani akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts22:22 Kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩgĩthikĩrĩria Paũlũ o nginya rĩrĩa oigire ũguo. Hĩndĩ ĩyo gĩkĩaria na mũgambo mũnene kĩanĩrĩire
Acts22:23 Na rĩrĩa kĩanagĩrĩra gĩgĩteaga nguo ciakĩo na gĩkĩũmbũraga rũkũngũ
Acts22:24 mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ agĩathana Paũlũ aingĩrio nyũmba ya thigari. Ningĩ agĩathana atĩ Paũlũ ahũũrwo iboko na orio ciũria nĩguo kũmenyeke kĩrĩa gĩatũmaga andũ mamugĩrĩrie ũguo.
Acts22:25 Na rĩrĩa maamũkomagia mamũhũũre-rĩ
Acts22:26 Rĩrĩa mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe aaiguire ũguo
Acts22:27 Mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Paũlũ
Acts22:28 Nake mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts22:29 Nao andũ arĩa meendaga kũmũũria ciũria magĩtigana nake o rĩmwe. Mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ we mwene akĩmaka aamenya atĩ nĩoheete Paũlũ na mĩnyororo
Acts22:30 Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire
Acts23:1 Nake Paũlũ agĩkũũrĩra athuuri a Kĩama kĩu maitho akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts23:2 Nake Anania mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Acts23:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts23:4 Nao andũ arĩa maarũgamĩte hakuhĩ na Paũlũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts23:5 Nake Paũlũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Acts23:6 Na rĩrĩ
Acts23:7 Rĩrĩa oigire ũguo
Acts23:8 (Asadukai moigaga gũtirĩ ũriũkio
Acts23:9 Gũkĩgĩa na ngũĩ nene
Acts23:10 Nacio ngarari ikĩneneha mũno
Acts23:11 Ũtukũ ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire
Acts23:12 Rũciinĩ rũrũ rũngĩ
Acts23:13 Andũ arĩa maathugundĩte ndundu ĩyo maarĩ makĩria ya mĩrongo ĩna.
Acts23:14 Magĩthiĩ kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts23:15 Na rĩrĩ
Acts23:16 No rĩrĩa mwanake wa mwarĩ wa nyina na Paũlũ aaiguire ũhoro wa ithugunda rĩu
Acts23:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ agĩĩta ũmwe wa anene a thigari igana rĩmwe
Acts23:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũnene ũcio akĩmuoya
Acts23:19 Mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ akĩnyiita mwanake ũcio guoko
Acts23:20 Nake mwanake ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts23:21 Ndũgetĩkĩre ũguo marenda
Acts23:22 Nake mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ akĩĩra mwanake ũcio athiĩ
Acts23:23 Mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ agĩcooka agĩĩta anene aake eerĩ a thigari igana rĩmwe akĩmaatha atĩrĩ
Acts23:24 Na ningĩ mũhaarĩrie mbarathi cia gũkuua Paũlũ atwarwo kũrĩ Felike ũrĩa barũthi hatarĩ na ũgwati.”
Acts23:25 Agĩcooka akĩandĩka marũa ũũ:
Acts23:26 Nĩ niĩ Kilaudio Lisia
Acts23:27 Mũndũ ũyũ aranyiitĩtwo nĩ Ayahudi na mararĩ hakuhĩ kũmũũraga
Acts23:28 Nĩndĩrendaga kũmenya kĩrĩa maramũthitangagĩra
Acts23:29 Ndĩrakora atĩ athitangĩirwo maũndũ makoniĩ watho wao
Acts23:30 Rĩrĩa ndĩramenyithirio atĩ kũraarĩ na ithugunda rĩa kũũraga mũndũ ũcio
Acts23:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thigari ikĩoya Paũlũ ũtukũ o ta ũrĩa ciaathĩtwo
Acts23:32 Naguo mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ igĩtiga thigari iria ciathiiaga ihaicĩte mbarathi ithiĩ nake
Acts23:33 Thigari icio cia mbarathi ciakinya Kaisarea
Acts23:34 Nake barũthi aathoma marũa
Acts23:35 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts24:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts24:2 Rĩrĩa Paũlũ eetirwo thĩinĩ
Acts24:3 Kũndũ guothe na maũndũ-inĩ mothe
Acts24:4 No nĩgeetha ndigakũnogie makĩria
Acts24:5 “Nĩtuonete mũndũ ũyũ arĩ mũndũ wa kũrehe thĩĩna
Acts24:6 na ningĩ nĩageragia gũthaahia hekarũ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio tũkĩmũnyiita. (Na nĩtũngĩamũtuĩrĩire kũringana na watho witũ.
Acts24:7 No Lisia
Acts24:8 Wee mwene wamũũrangia nĩũkũmenya ma ya ũhoro ũyũ wothe tũmũthitangĩire.”
Acts24:9 Nao Ayahudi makĩnyiitanĩra na thitango ĩyo
Acts24:10 Rĩrĩa barũthi aaheneirie Paũlũ na moko aarie-rĩ
Acts24:11 Nĩ ũndũ mũhũthũ harĩwe kũmenya atĩ ti makĩria ma mĩthenya ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ĩthirĩte kuuma ndambata Jerusalemu kũhooya Ngai.
Acts24:12 Andũ arĩa maathitangĩte matianyonire ngĩkararania na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ hekarũ-inĩ
Acts24:13 Na matingĩhota kuonania ihooto harĩwe cia thitango icio maathitangĩire.
Acts24:14 No rĩrĩ
Acts24:15 na ndĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro thĩinĩ wa Ngai o ta kĩrĩa andũ aya marĩ nakĩo
Acts24:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndĩĩrutanagĩria hĩndĩ ciothe kũiga thamiri yakwa ĩtarĩ na ũcuuke mbere ya Ngai na mbere ya andũ.
Acts24:17 “Thuutha wa gũkorwo itarĩ kuo mĩaka mĩingĩ
Acts24:18 Na rĩrĩa ndarũmbũyanagia na maũndũ macio nĩmangorire kũu hekarũ-inĩ ndĩtheretie. Gũtiarĩ na gĩkundi kĩa andũ ndaarĩ na kĩo
Acts24:19 No nĩ kũrĩ Ayahudi a kuuma bũrũri wa Asia arĩa magĩrĩirwo nĩgũkorwo marĩ haha mbere yaku na maathitange angĩkorwo nĩ marĩ ũndũ mangĩnjuukĩra.
Acts24:20 Akorwo ti ũguo
Acts24:21 tiga ũkorirwo nĩ ũndũ ũyũ ũmwe ndanĩrĩire rĩrĩa ndaarũngiĩ mbere yao ngiuga atĩrĩ: ‘Ũmũthĩ ndũgamĩte mbere yanyu njiirithio nĩ ũndũ nĩnjĩrĩgĩrĩire ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa arĩa akuũ.’ ”
Acts24:22 Nake Felike
Acts24:23 Agĩatha mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe aige Paũlũ arĩ mũrangĩre
Acts24:24 Na rĩrĩ
Acts24:25 Rĩrĩa Paũlũ aaragia ũhoro wa ũthingu
Acts24:26 Ihinda-inĩ o rĩu no ehokaga atĩ Paũlũ nĩangĩamũheire ihaki
Acts24:27 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mĩaka ĩĩrĩ yathirire-rĩ
Acts25:1 Na rĩrĩ
Acts25:2 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na atongoria a Ayahudi magĩũka harĩ we
Acts25:3 Nĩmahĩkire gũthaitha Fesito atĩ nĩ ũndũ wa wega wake kũrĩ o etĩkĩre Paũlũ atwarwo Jerusalemu
Acts25:4 Nake Fesito akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Acts25:5 Tondũ ũcio no tũthiĩ na atongoria amwe anyu nĩgeetha mathiĩ magathitangĩre mũndũ ũcio kuo
Acts25:6 Thuutha wa gũikarania nao kũu ihinda ta rĩa mĩthenya ĩnana kana ikũmi
Acts25:7 Rĩrĩa Paũlũ aakinyire
Acts25:8 Nake Paũlũ akĩĩyarĩrĩria
Acts25:9 Nake Fesito
Acts25:10 Nake Paũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts25:11 No rĩrĩ
Acts25:12 Thuutha wa Fesito gũcookania ndundu na kĩama gĩake
Acts25:13 Mĩthenya mĩnini yathira Mũthamaki Agiripa na Berinike magĩũka kũu Kaisarea kũnyiita Fesito ũgeni.
Acts25:14 Na tondũ nĩmaikaraga kũu mĩthenya mĩingĩ-rĩ
Acts25:15 Rĩrĩa ndaathiire Jerusalemu-rĩ
Acts25:16 “Na niĩ ngĩmeera atĩ ti mũtugo wa andũ a Roma kũneana mũndũ o wothe ataambĩte kũngʼethanĩra na andũ arĩa mamũthitangĩte na kũheo mweke wa kwĩyarĩrĩria ũhoro-inĩ ũrĩa athitangĩirwo.
Acts25:17 Rĩrĩa tuokire nao gũkũ
Acts25:18 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa maamũthitangĩte maarũgamire kwaria
Acts25:19 No handũ ha ũguo
Acts25:20 Nĩndarigirwo nĩ ũrĩa ingĩtuĩria maũndũ ta macio; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩmũũria kana no eende gũthiĩ Jerusalemu agaciirithĩrio maũndũ macio aathitangĩirwo kuo.
Acts25:21 Rĩrĩa Paũlũ aacookirie ciira riiko etererio itua rĩa Mũthamaki-rĩ
Acts25:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Agiripa akĩĩra Fesito atĩrĩ
Acts25:23 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
Acts25:24 Fesito akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts25:25 No niĩ nĩndonire atĩ ndarĩ ũndũ eekĩte wa gũtũma ooragwo
Acts25:26 No ndirĩ na ũndũ mũna ingĩandĩkĩra Mũthamaki Mũgaathe igũrũ rĩake. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Acts25:27 Nĩgũkorwo ndikuona kwagĩrĩire gũtũma mũndũ muohe itekuonania maũndũ marĩa athitangĩirwo.”
Acts26:1 Nake Agiripa akĩĩra Paũlũ atĩrĩ
Acts26:2 “Mũthamaki Agiripa
Acts26:3 na makĩria nĩ tondũ wee nĩũũĩ mĩtugo yothe ya Ayahudi na maũndũ marĩa makararanagĩria. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndakũhooya ũũthikĩrĩrie ũtegũthethũka.
Acts26:4 “Ayahudi othe nĩmooĩ ũrĩa ndũũrĩte kuuma ndĩ mwana
Acts26:5 Nĩmanjũũĩ hĩndĩ ndaaya
Acts26:6 Na rĩrĩ
Acts26:7 Kĩĩranĩro kĩu no kĩo mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa iitũ ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ĩĩrĩgagĩrĩra kuona gĩkĩhingio
Acts26:8 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩtũma mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wanyu atue atĩ nĩ ũndũ ũtangĩĩtĩkio
Acts26:9 “O na niĩ nĩndaiguithĩtio atĩ nĩndagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩka ũrĩa wothe ingĩahotire ndegane na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ wa Nazarethi.
Acts26:10 Na ũguo nĩguo ndeekire kũu Jerusalemu. Ngĩikia andũ aingĩ a arĩa aamũre njeera
Acts26:11 Mahinda maingĩ nĩndathiiaga kuuma thunagogi-inĩ ĩmwe nginya ĩrĩa ĩngĩ nĩgeetha ndĩmaneane maherithio
Acts26:12 “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe ndĩ rũgendo-inĩ ta rũu-rĩ
Acts26:13 Kũrĩ thaa thita cia mũthenya
Acts26:14 Ithuothe tũkĩgũa thĩ
Acts26:15 “Na niĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts26:16 Rĩu ũkĩra ũrũgame na magũrũ maku. Ndaakuumĩrĩra ngwamũre ũtuĩke ndungata na ũtuĩke mũira wa maũndũ marĩa wonete mangoniĩ na marĩa ngũkuonia.
Acts26:17 Nĩngũkũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ andũ anyu na kuuma kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ arĩa ndĩragũtũma kũrĩ o
Acts26:18 ũkamahingũre maitho
Acts26:19 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts26:20 Ngĩambĩrĩria kũhunjĩria andũ arĩa maarĩ Dameski
Acts26:21 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩatũmire Ayahudi maanyiitĩre hekarũ-inĩ
Acts26:22 No nĩngoretwo ndĩ na ũteithio wa Ngai nginya ũmũthĩ ũyũ
Acts26:23 atĩ Kristũ nĩakanyariirwo
Acts26:24 Fesito aigua ũguo
Acts26:25 Nake Paũlũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts26:26 Mũthamaki nĩoĩ maũndũ maya
Acts26:27 Mũthamaki Agiripa
Acts26:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Agiripa akĩũria Paũlũ atĩrĩ
Acts26:29 Nake Paũlũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts26:30 Mũthamaki ũcio agĩũkĩra marĩ hamwe na barũthi
Acts26:31 Makiuma nyũmba ĩyo
Acts26:32 Agiripa akĩĩra Fesito atĩrĩ
Acts27:1 Na rĩrĩa gwatuirwo atĩ nĩtũkũhaica marikabu tũthiĩ Italia
Acts27:2 Tũkĩhaica marikabu yoimĩte Aduramutio ĩrĩa yakirie gũthiĩ icukĩro-inĩ cia marikabu iria ciarĩ ndwere-inĩ cia iria rĩrĩa inene bũrũri-inĩ wa Asia
Acts27:3 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ tũgĩkinya Sidoni; nake Juliasi
Acts27:4 Twoima kũu tũkĩambĩrĩria rũgendo rĩngĩ
Acts27:5 Twaarĩkia gũtuĩkania iria rĩrĩa inene rĩrĩa rĩarĩ gũkuhĩ na mabũrũri ma Kilikia na Pamufilia tũgĩkinya itũũra rĩa Mira
Acts27:6 Tũrĩ kũu mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe akĩona marikabu ya Alekisanderia yathiiaga Italia
Acts27:7 Tũgĩthiĩ kahora ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mĩingĩ na tũrĩ na thĩĩna mũingĩ nginya tũgĩkinya gũkuhĩ na Kinido. Na rĩrĩa rũhuho rwagiririe tũthiĩ ũrĩa twendaga-rĩ
Acts27:8 Nĩtwathiire na thĩĩna mũingĩ tũgereire ndwere-inĩ cia iria rĩrĩa inene na tũgĩkinya handũ heetagwo Gĩcukĩro Kĩega
Acts27:9 Mahinda maingĩ nĩmathirĩte
Acts27:10 “Athuuri aya
Acts27:11 No mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe
Acts27:12 Tondũ gĩcukĩro kĩu gĩtiarĩ kĩega gĩa gũikarwo hĩndĩ ya heho-rĩ
Acts27:13 Rĩrĩa rũhuho rumĩte mwena wa gũthini rwambĩrĩirie kũhurutana kahora-rĩ
Acts27:14 Na ihinda rĩtanathiĩ mũno
Acts27:15 Nayo marikabu ĩkĩnyiitwo nĩ kĩhuhũkanio kĩu ĩkĩremwo nĩgũthiĩ na kũrĩa rũhuho rwoimaga
Acts27:16 Na rĩrĩa twahĩtũkagĩra gacigĩrĩra-inĩ kanini geetagwo Kauda
Acts27:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ acio maakahaicirie marikabu-inĩ
Acts27:18 Nĩtwanyariirĩkire mũno nĩ ũndũ wa kĩhuhũkanio kĩu o nginya mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ makĩambĩrĩria gũikia mĩrigo iria-inĩ.
Acts27:19 Naguo mũthenya wa gatatũ makĩambĩrĩria gũikia indo cia wĩra cia marikabu iria-inĩ na moko mao ene.
Acts27:20 Na rĩrĩa kwaagire kuoneka riũa kana njata ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mĩingĩ
Acts27:21 Thuutha wa andũ gũikara ihinda iraaya matekũrĩa
Acts27:22 No rĩrĩ
Acts27:23 Ũtukũ ũyũ
Acts27:24 aanjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts27:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts27:26 No o na kũrĩ ũguo no nginya tũhate gĩcigĩrĩra-inĩ kĩna.”
Acts27:27 Na rĩrĩ
Acts27:28 Nao makĩoya kĩgeri kĩa ũriku wa maaĩ makĩona atĩ maaĩ maarĩ na ũriku wa buti igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ. Thuutha wa kahinda kanini magĩthima rĩngĩ makĩona atĩ maaĩ maarĩ na ũriku wa buti mĩrongo kenda.
Acts27:29 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra tũtikaagũthithio rwaro rwa ihiga
Acts27:30 Na rĩĩrĩa maageragia kũũra moime marikabu-inĩ
Acts27:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ akĩĩra mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe hamwe na thigari atĩrĩ
Acts27:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thigari igĩtinia mĩkanda ĩrĩa yanyiitĩte gatarũ ga kũhonokia andũ
Acts27:33 Gwakuhĩrĩria gũkĩa
Acts27:34 Rĩu ndamũthaitha mũrĩe irio. Nĩmũbatarĩte kũrĩa irio nĩguo imũige muoyo. Gũtirĩ rũcuĩrĩ rwa mũtwe wa mũndũ o na ũmwe wanyu rũkũũra.”
Acts27:35 Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Acts27:36 Nao othe makĩigua momĩrĩria
Acts27:37 Ithuothe twarĩ andũ 276 arĩa twarĩ marikabu-inĩ.
Acts27:38 Rĩrĩa maarĩire makĩhũũna
Acts27:39 Kwarooka gũkĩa-rĩ
Acts27:40 Nao makĩrenga nanga
Acts27:41 No rĩrĩ
Acts27:42 Thigari ikĩbanga ciũrage ohwo nĩgeetha gũtikagĩe o na ũmwe wao ũngĩthambĩra oore.
Acts27:43 No tondũ mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe nĩendaga kũhonokia muoyo wa Paũlũ
Acts27:44 Nao andũ acio angĩ makinye kuo menyiitĩrĩire mbaũ kana icunjĩ cia marikabu. Ũguo nĩguo andũ othe maakinyire thĩ nyũmũ matarĩ na ũũru.
Acts28:1 Twaarĩkia gũkinya hũgũrũrũ-inĩ tũtarĩ na ũũru
Acts28:2 Nao atũũri a gĩcigĩrĩra kĩu magĩtuonia ũtugi wa mwanya. Magĩtwakĩria mwaki tondũ nĩ kuoiraga na kwarĩ na heho na magĩtũnyiita ũgeni ithuothe.
Acts28:3 Nake Paũlũ akĩoya gĩkundi gĩa tũkũ
Acts28:4 Rĩrĩa andũ a gĩcigĩrĩra kĩu moonire nduĩra ĩcuuhĩte guoko-inĩ gwake makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Acts28:5 Nowe Paũlũ akĩribaribĩra nyoka ĩyo mwaki-inĩ na ndaigana kuona ũndũ mũũru.
Acts28:6 Andũ maataanyaga kuona akĩimba kana agwe o rĩmwe akue
Acts28:7 Na rĩrĩ
Acts28:8 Nake ithe aarĩ ũrĩrĩ arĩ mũrũaru mũrimũ wa kũhiũha mwĩrĩ na kũharwo thakame. Paũlũ agĩtoonya nyũmba kũmuona
Acts28:9 Rĩrĩa gwekĩkire ũguo
Acts28:10 Nĩmatuonirie gĩtĩĩo na njĩra nyingĩ
Acts28:11 Thuutha wa mĩeri ĩtatũ tũkĩhaica marikabu yaikarĩte kũu gĩcigĩrĩra-inĩ hĩndĩ ya heho. Nayo yarĩ marikabu ya kuuma Alekisanderia na yarĩ na rũũri rwa ngai cia mahatha iria cietagwo Kasitori na Poluke.
Acts28:12 Twakinya Sirakusi tũgĩikara kuo ihinda rĩa thikũ ithatũ.
Acts28:13 Twoima kũu tũgĩthiĩ tũgĩkinya Regio. Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ gũkĩgĩa na rũhuho rwa kuuma mwena wa gũthini
Acts28:14 Kũu tũgĩkora ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ amwe
Acts28:15 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ arĩa maarĩ kũu nĩmaiguĩte atĩ nĩtuokaga
Acts28:16 Rĩrĩa twakinyire Roma
Acts28:17 Thuutha wa thikũ ithatũ
Acts28:18 Nao magĩĩthuthuuria na makĩenda kũndekia tondũ ndiarĩ na ihĩtia rĩa ũgeri wa ngero rĩa gũtũma njũragwo.
Acts28:19 No rĩrĩa Ayahudi maareganire na itua rĩu
Acts28:20 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmĩte njũũrie tuonane na inyuĩ na twaranĩrie. Njohetwo na mũnyororo ũyũ nĩ ũndũ wa kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩa andũ a Isiraeli.”
Acts28:21 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts28:22 No nĩtũkwenda kũigua woni waku nĩ ũrĩkũ
Acts28:23 Nao makĩbanga gũcemania na Paũlũ mũthenya mũna
Acts28:24 Amwe magĩĩtĩkia ũrĩa aameerire
Acts28:25 Nao makĩaga kũiguithania o ene
Acts28:26 “ ‘Thiĩ kũrĩ andũ aya

Romans1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
Romans1:2 o Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega eeranĩire o mbere na tũnua twa anabii ake thĩinĩ wa Maandĩko marĩa Matheru
Romans1:3 ũrĩa ũkoniĩ Mũrũwe
Romans1:4 Na rĩrĩ
Romans1:5 kũgerera we Ngai nĩatũheete wega wake
Romans1:6 O na inyuĩ mũrĩ amwe a acio metĩtwo matuĩke a Jesũ Kristũ.
Romans1:7 Ndĩramwandĩkĩra marũa maya inyuothe arĩa mũrĩ kũu Roma
Romans1:8 O mbere nĩngũcookeria Ngai wakwa ngaatho thĩinĩ wa Jesũ Kristũ nĩ ũndũ wanyu inyuothe
Romans1:9 Ngai
Romans1:10 mahooya-inĩ makwa hĩndĩ ciothe; na nĩndĩrahooya atĩ rĩu nĩ ũndũ wa kwenda kwa Ngai no hingũrĩrwo njĩra nĩguo njũke kũrĩ inyuĩ.
Romans1:11 Nĩndĩrerirĩria mũno tuonane na inyuĩ nĩgeetha ndĩmũgaĩre iheo cia kĩĩroho nĩguo muongererwo hinya
Romans1:12 ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩ inyuĩ na niĩ tũgĩe na ũhoro wa kũũmanĩrĩria
Romans1:13 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Romans1:14 Niĩ haana ta ndĩ na thiirĩ na Ayunani o na arĩa matarĩ Ayunani
Romans1:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩkĩo ndĩriragĩria mũno kũhunjia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega o na kũrĩ inyuĩ arĩa mũtũũraga Roma.
Romans1:16 Niĩ ndingĩconokera Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
Romans1:17 Nĩgũkorwo thĩinĩ wa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
Romans1:18 Mangʼũrĩ ma Ngai nĩmaguũrĩtio kuuma igũrũ mokĩrĩre ũhoro wothe wa andũ kũregana na Ngai
Romans1:19 nĩgũkorwo maũndũ ma Ngai marĩa mangĩmenyeka nĩo matiagĩte kũmenyeka nĩo
Romans1:20 Nĩgũkorwo kuuma rĩrĩa thĩ yombirwo
Romans1:21 Tondũ o na harĩa maamenyete Ngai
Romans1:22 Na o rĩrĩa moigaga atĩ o nĩ oogĩ-rĩ
Romans1:23 nao magĩkũũrania riiri wa Ngai ũrĩa mũtũũra muoyo na mĩhianano ĩthondeketwo ĩkahaana ta andũ arĩa makuuaga
Romans1:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai akĩmarekereria marũmagĩrĩre merirĩria mao mooru marĩa ngoro ciao cieriragĩria
Romans1:25 Nĩmakũũranirie ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma wa Ngai na maheeni
Romans1:26 Tondũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Romans1:27 O nao arũme o ũndũ ũmwe nĩmatiganĩirie mũtugo wao ũrĩa wa ndũire na andũ-a-nja
Romans1:28 Na makĩria ma ũguo-rĩ
Romans1:29 Nao makĩiyũrwo nĩ waganu wa mĩthemba yothe
Romans1:30 na acambania
Romans1:31 nao ti akuũku wega
Romans1:32 Na o na gwatuĩka nĩmooĩ watho wa ũthingu wa Ngai atĩ andũ arĩa mekaga maũndũ ta macio maagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũkua
Romans2:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans2:2 Na nĩtũũĩ atĩ Ngai agaatuĩra andũ arĩa mekaga maũndũ ta macio ciira na kĩhooto.
Romans2:3 Tondũ rĩrĩa wee mũndũ ũyũ
Romans2:4 Kana nĩkũnyarara ũnyararĩte ũtugi wake mũnene
Romans2:5 No rĩrĩ
Romans2:6 Nĩ ũndũ Ngai akaarĩha o mũndũ kũringana na maũndũ marĩa aaneka.
Romans2:7 Arĩa macaragia kũheo riiri
Romans2:8 No arĩa eyendi
Romans2:9 Nĩgũkaagĩa na thĩĩna na mĩnyamaro kũrĩ andũ othe arĩa mekaga ũũru; mbere kũrĩ Ayahudi
Romans2:10 no riiri
Romans2:11 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ndatĩĩagĩra andũ maũthĩ.
Romans2:12 Andũ arĩa othe mehagia matarĩ watho-inĩ makaaniinwo matarĩ watho-inĩ
Romans2:13 Nĩgũkorwo ti arĩa maiguaga watho matuagwo athingu maitho-inĩ ma Ngai
Romans2:14 (Ti-itherũ
Romans2:15 tondũ nĩmonanagia atĩ maũndũ marĩa mabataranagia thĩinĩ wa watho nĩmandĩke ngoro-inĩ ciao
Romans2:16 Ũndũ ũyũ ũkooneka mũthenya ũrĩa Ngai
Romans2:17 Atĩrĩrĩ
Romans2:18 angĩkorwo nĩũmenyete ũrĩa endaga
Romans2:19 angĩkorwo nĩwĩtĩkĩtie atĩ wee ũrĩ mũtongoria wa andũ arĩa atumumu
Romans2:20 o na mũtaari wa andũ arĩa akĩĩgu

Romans2:23 Wee wĩrahagĩra watho-rĩ
Romans2:24 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ

Romans3:12 Othe nĩmagarũrũkĩte

Romans3:17 nayo njĩra ya thayũ matimĩũĩ.”

Romans3:23 nĩgũkorwo andũ othe nĩmehĩtie na makanyiihĩrwo nĩ riiri wa Ngai
Romans3:24 na nĩ ũndũ wa wega wa Ngai magatuuo athingu o ũguo tũhũ
Romans3:25 Ngai aamũrutire arĩ igongona rĩa kũhoroheria mehia na ũndũ wa wĩtĩkio thĩinĩ wa thakame yake. Ngai eekire ũguo nĩgeetha onanie ũthingu wake
Romans3:26 nake eekire ũguo nĩgeetha onanie ũthingu wake mahinda-inĩ maya
Romans3:27 Gwagĩtuĩka ũguo-rĩ

Romans4:12 Na ningĩ nowe ithe wa andũ arĩa maruaga

Romans4:18 Iburahĩmu nĩagĩire na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro o na harĩa hataarĩ kĩndũ gĩa kwĩrĩgĩrĩra na agĩĩtĩkia
Romans4:19 Nake o na akĩmenyaga atĩ mwĩrĩ wake watariĩ ta ũrĩ mũkuũ nĩgũkorwo ũkũrũ wake warĩ ta mĩaka igana rĩmwe
Romans4:20 Nowe ndaigana kũgĩa na nganja ũhoro-inĩ wa wĩtĩkio ũkoniĩ kĩĩranĩro kĩu kĩa Ngai

Romans7:13 Kaĩ ũndũ ũcio mwega ũgĩcookete gũtuĩka gĩkuũ harĩ niĩ? Gũtikanatuĩke ũguo! No nĩgeetha wĩhia ũkũũrĩkane atĩ nĩ wĩhia
Romans7:14 Nĩtũũĩ atĩ watho uumanĩte na Roho; no niĩ ndĩ mũndũ ũrĩ na mwĩrĩ wendetio agatuĩka ngombo ya wĩhia.
Romans7:15 Ndimenyaga maũndũ marĩa njĩkaga. Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa nyendaga gwĩka tiguo njĩkaga
Romans7:16 O na ingĩtuĩka njĩkaga ũrĩa itekwenda gwĩka-rĩ

Romans7:18 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ mwega ũtũũraga thĩinĩ wakwa
Romans7:19 Nĩgũkorwo wega ũrĩa nyendaga gwĩka tiguo njĩkaga
Romans7:20 Na rĩrĩ
Romans7:21 Ũndũ ũyũ nĩũtũmaga nyone atĩ watho ũyũ nĩguo ũrutaga wĩra thĩinĩ wakwa: Rĩrĩa ngwenda gwĩka wega-rĩ
Romans7:22 Nĩgũkorwo ngoro-inĩ yakwa thĩinĩ
Romans7:23 no nĩnyonaga watho ũngĩ ũkĩruta wĩra thĩinĩ wa ciĩga cia mwĩrĩ wakwa
Romans7:24 Kaĩ niĩ ndĩkĩrĩ mũndũ mũthĩĩnĩku-ĩ! Nũũ ũkũũhonokia harĩ mwĩrĩ ũyũ wa gĩkuũ?
Romans7:25 Nĩndacookeria Ngai ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ Kristũ Mwathani witũ! Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans8:1 Nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio-rĩ
Romans8:2 tondũ nĩ kũgerera harĩ Jesũ Kristũ watho wa Roho ũrĩa ũheaga muoyo wanjohorire kuuma kũrĩ wĩhia na gĩkuũ.
Romans8:3 Nĩgũkorwo ũndũ ũrĩa watho wa Musa ũtangĩahotire gwĩka nĩ ũndũ wa kwagithio hinya nĩ mwĩrĩ ũyũ wĩhagia-rĩ
Romans8:4 nĩgeetha maũndũ ma ũthingu marĩa mathanĩtwo nĩ watho mahingio thĩinĩ witũ
Romans8:5 Andũ arĩa matũũraga kũringana na mwĩrĩ ũyũ wĩhagia meciiragia o maũndũ marĩa mwĩrĩ ũcio wendaga; no arĩa matũũraga kũringana na Roho meciiragia o maũndũ marĩa mendagwo nĩ Roho.
Romans8:6 Meciiria ma mũndũ mwĩhia marehaga gĩkuũ
Romans8:7 meciiria marĩa mehagia marĩ ũthũ na Ngai. Meciiria macio matiathĩkagĩra watho wa Ngai
Romans8:8 Andũ arĩa maathagwo nĩ mwĩrĩ ũyũ wĩhagia matingĩhota gũkenia Ngai.
Romans8:9 No rĩrĩ
Romans8:10 No angĩkorwo Kristũ arĩ thĩinĩ wanyu-rĩ
Romans8:11 Na ningĩ angĩkorwo Roho wa Ngai ũrĩa wariũkirie Jesũ kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ atũũraga thĩinĩ wanyu-rĩ
Romans8:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Romans8:13 Nĩgũkorwo mũngĩtũũra kũringana na ũrĩa mwĩrĩ ũyũ wĩhagia wendaga-rĩ
Romans8:14 tondũ andũ arĩa othe matongoragio nĩ Roho wa Ngai acio nĩo ciana cia Ngai.
Romans8:15 Nĩgũkorwo mũtiaheirwo roho wa kũmũtua ngombo rĩngĩ nĩguo mwĩtigagĩre
Romans8:16 Roho Mũtheru we mwene nĩwe mũira hamwe na maroho maitũ atĩ ithuĩ tũrĩ ciana cia Ngai.
Romans8:17 Rĩu-rĩ
Romans8:18 Nguona atĩ mĩnyamaro ĩrĩa tũrĩ nayo rĩu ndĩngĩringithanio na riiri ũrĩa tũkaaguũrĩrio.
Romans8:19 Indo iria ciombirwo itũũraga cietereire kũguũranĩrio gwa ciana cia Ngai irĩ na gũthethũka kũnene.
Romans8:20 Nĩgũkorwo ciũmbe icio ciathĩrĩirio itũũre itarĩ kĩene na ti ũndũ wa gwĩthuurĩra cio nyene
Romans8:21 atĩ ciũmbe cio nyene nĩigakũũrwo kuuma ũkombo-inĩ wa kũbutha
Romans8:22 Nĩtũũĩ atĩ nginyagia rĩu ciũmbe icio ciothe itũire icaayaga irĩ na ruo ta rwa mũndũ-wa-nja akĩheo mwana.
Romans8:23 Na to indo icio icaayaga
Romans8:24 Nĩgũkorwo twahonokirio nĩ ũndũ wa kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩu. No rĩrĩ
Romans8:25 No rĩrĩ
Romans8:26 O ũndũ ũmwe
Romans8:27 Nake Ngai ũrĩa ũthuthuuragia ngoro ciitũ nĩoĩ meciiria ma Roho
Romans8:28 Ningĩ nĩtũũĩ atĩ harĩ andũ arĩa mendete Ngai
Romans8:29 Nĩgũkorwo acio Ngai aamenyete o tene-rĩ
Romans8:30 Nao acio aathĩrĩirie o mbere
Romans8:31 Tũkiuge atĩa ũhoro ũkoniĩ maũndũ macio? Angĩkorwo Ngai arĩ mwena witũ-rĩ
Romans8:32 Ũcio ũtaigana gũcaĩra Mũriũ wake mwene
Romans8:33 Nũũ ũngĩona ũndũ wa gũthitangĩra andũ arĩa Ngai ethuurĩire? Nĩ Ngai ũmatuĩte atĩ matirĩ na mahĩtia.
Romans8:34 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũmatua ehia? Gũtirĩ! Kristũ Jesũ
Romans8:35 Nũũ ũngĩtũtigithania na wendani wa Kristũ? Anga nĩ kuona thĩĩna
Romans8:36 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Tũtindaga tũkĩũragwo o mũthenya wothe nĩ ũndũ waku; tũtuuagwo ta ngʼondu cia gũthĩnjwo.”
Romans8:37 No rĩrĩ
Romans8:38 Nĩgũkorwo nĩndĩkĩtie kũmenya kũna atĩ o na kũngĩtuĩka nĩ ũhoro wa gũkua kana gũtũũra muoyo
Romans8:39 o na kana ũraihu wa na igũrũ kana ũriku
Romans9:1 Niĩ ngwaria ũhoro-wa-ma ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ
Romans9:2 atĩ ndĩ na kĩeha kĩnene na ruo rwa ngoro rũtarathira.
Romans9:3 Nĩgũkorwo ingĩendire niĩ mwene nyiitwo nĩ kĩrũmi na nyingatwo ndigithanio na Kristũ handũ-inĩ ha ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ acio a rũrĩrĩ rwitũ kĩũmbe
Romans9:4 nĩo andũ a Isiraeli. O nĩo Ngai aatuire ciana ciake; na nĩo maikaraga na riiri wake
Romans9:5 Ningĩ maithe maitũ marĩa ma tene maarĩ a kĩruka kĩu
Romans9:6 Ũguo ti kuuga atĩ kiugo kĩa Ngai nĩkĩagĩte kũhinga. Nĩgũkorwo ti andũ othe arĩa maciarĩirwo Isiraeli marĩ andũ a Ngai a ma.
Romans9:7 O na ningĩ ti othe ciana cia Iburahĩmu
Romans9:8 Ũguo nĩ ta kuuga atĩrĩ
Romans9:9 Nĩgũkorwo kĩĩranĩro kĩoigĩte atĩrĩ: “Ihinda rĩrĩa rĩamũre rĩakinya nĩngacooka
Romans9:10 Na to ũguo wiki
Romans9:11 No rĩrĩ
Romans9:12 ti na ũndũ wa ciĩko iria mekĩte
Romans9:13 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Nĩndendire Jakubu
Romans9:14 Tũkiuge atĩa nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio? Ngai no atuanĩre ũndũ ũtarĩ wa kĩhooto? Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo!
Romans9:15 Nĩgũkorwo erire Musa atĩrĩ
Romans9:16 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans9:17 Nĩgũkorwo Maandĩko-inĩ Firaũni erĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Ndagũtũũgĩririe nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi gĩkĩ kĩũmbe
Romans9:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai aiguagĩra tha mũndũ ũrĩa enda kũiguĩra tha
Romans9:19 Ũmwe wanyu ahota kũnjũũria atĩrĩ: “Ngai atũire atũtuagĩra mahĩtia nĩkĩ? Tondũ nũũ ũngĩkĩhota kũregana na ũrĩa Ngai ekwenda?”
Romans9:20 No wee-rĩ
Romans9:21 Githĩ mũũmbi wa nyũngũ ndarĩ na kĩhooto gĩa kũhũthĩra rĩũmba o ũrĩa angĩenda; kĩenyũ kĩmwe kĩa rĩũmba rĩu athondeke indo imwe cia kũhũthĩrwo na njĩra ya gũtĩĩka na ingĩ nĩ ũndũ wa mahũthĩro ma ndũire?
Romans9:22 Ĩ kũngĩkorwo Ngai
Romans9:23 Ĩ kũngĩkorwo ekaga ũguo nĩgeetha atũme ũingĩ wa riiri wake ũmenyeke nĩ arĩa mahaana ta indo iria akaiguĩra tha
Romans9:24 na nĩo ithuĩ
Romans9:25 O ta ũrĩa oigĩte Ibuku-inĩ rĩa Hosea
Romans9:26 na ningĩ
Romans9:27 Naguo ũhoro ũkoniĩ Isiraeli
Romans9:28 Nĩgũkorwo Mwathani nĩagatuĩra andũ a gũkũ thĩ ciira o narua
Romans9:29 Na o ta ũrĩa Isaia oigĩte o mbere ũndũ ũcio ũtanakinya
Romans9:30 Tũkiuge atĩa ha ũhoro ũcio? Atĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ
Romans9:31 no atĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Romans9:32 Maagire kũgĩa naguo nĩkĩ? Tondũ matiaũthiingatire na njĩra ya wĩtĩkio
Romans9:33 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo: “Atĩrĩrĩ
Romans10:1 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Romans10:2 Nĩgũkorwo niĩ ndĩ mũira wao atĩ nĩ marĩ kĩyo ũhoro-inĩ wa Ngai
Romans10:3 Na tondũ matiigana kũmenya ũthingu ũrĩa uumaga kũrĩ Ngai no nĩ kũgeria maageririe kwĩhaandĩra ũthingu wao ene-rĩ
Romans10:4 Nake Kristũ nĩwe wakinyirie ũhoro wa watho mũthia nĩgeetha kũgĩe na ũthingu kũrĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wĩtĩkĩtie.
Romans10:5 Musa aataarĩirie ũhoro wa ũthingu ũrĩa uumanaga na watho na njĩra ĩno: “Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga maũndũ macio arĩtũũragio muoyo nĩmo.”
Romans10:6 No rĩrĩ
Romans10:7 “o na ndũkeyũrie
Romans10:8 No ũhoro ũcio uugaga atĩa? Uugaga atĩrĩ
Romans10:9 Atĩ ũngiumbũra na kanua gaku atĩ
Romans10:10 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ etĩkagia na ngoro yake
Romans10:11 Tondũ Maandĩko moigĩte atĩrĩ
Romans10:12 Nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ ngũũrani gatagatĩ ka Mũyahudi na mũndũ-wa-Ndũrĩrĩ: tondũ Mwathani o ũcio nĩwe Mwathani wa andũ othe
Romans10:13 nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwandĩke atĩrĩ
Romans10:14 No rĩrĩ
Romans10:15 Ningĩ andũ mangĩhota atĩa kũhunjia ũhoro matarĩ atũme? O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ
Romans10:16 No rĩrĩ
Romans10:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Romans10:18 No ngũũria atĩrĩ: Matirĩ maigua Ũhoro? Hatirĩ nganja nĩmaiguĩte
Romans10:19 Na ningĩ ngũũria atĩrĩ: Andũ a Isiraeli matiigana kũmenya ũguo? Atĩrĩ
Romans10:20 Nake Isaia akiuga omĩrĩirie mũno atĩrĩ
Romans10:21 No ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ Isiraeli akoiga atĩrĩ
Romans11:1 Ningĩ ngũũria atĩrĩ: Ngai nĩkũrega aaregire andũ ake? Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo! Niĩ mwene ndĩ Mũisiraeli
Romans11:2 Ngai ndaigana kũrega andũ ake arĩa aamenyete o mbere. Kaĩ mũtooĩ ũrĩa Maandĩko moigĩte harĩa handĩkĩtwo ũhoro wa Elija
Romans11:3 “Mwathani
Romans11:4 Ngai aamũcookeirie atĩrĩ
Romans11:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Romans11:6 Na angĩkorwo Ngai aamathuurire nĩ ũndũ wa wega wake-rĩ
Romans11:7 Rĩu tũkiuge atĩa? Nĩ atĩrĩ
Romans11:8 o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Ngai nĩamaheire roho ta wa andũ magonetio nĩ toro
Romans11:9 Nake Daudi ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Metha yao ya kũrĩĩra ĩrotuĩka mũtego
Romans11:10 Maitho mao marogĩa nduma
Romans11:11 Ningĩ ngũũria atĩrĩ: Ayahudi nĩkũhĩngwo maahĩngirwo makĩgũa ũndũ matangĩũkĩra? Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo! Aca ti guo o na atĩa! Ũrĩa kũrĩ nĩ atĩ
Romans11:12 No angĩkorwo ũremi wao nĩũtuĩkĩte ũtonga kũrĩ kĩrĩndĩ gĩa thĩ
Romans11:13 Rĩu-rĩ
Romans11:14 ngĩĩgeragĩria kana hihi ndahota kwarahũra andũ a rũruka rwakwa kĩũmbe maigue ũiru
Romans11:15 Tondũ angĩkorwo kũregwo kwao nĩkuo gwa gũtũma kĩrĩndĩ gĩa thĩ kĩiguithanio na Ngai-rĩ
Romans11:16 Angĩkorwo kĩenyũ gĩa kĩmere kĩrĩa kĩrutĩirwo Ngai kĩrĩ maciaro ma mbere nĩ gĩtheru-rĩ
Romans11:17 Angĩkorwo honge imwe cia mũtamaiyũ wa mũgũnda nĩciakahũrirwo
Romans11:18 menya ndũkae kwĩganĩra honge icio ingĩ. Ũngĩka ũguo-rĩ
Romans11:19 No wee no ũkiuge atĩrĩ
Romans11:20 Ũguo noguo. No rĩrĩ
Romans11:21 Tondũ angĩkorwo Ngai ndaacaĩire honge icio cia ndũire-rĩ
Romans11:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Romans11:23 Andũ acio nao mangĩtiga kũrũmia ũhoro ũcio wa kwaga gwĩtĩkia-rĩ
Romans11:24 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Romans11:25 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Romans11:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans11:27 Nakĩo gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ngaarĩkanĩra nao
Romans11:28 Ha Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega-rĩ
Romans11:29 nĩgũkorwo iheo iria Ngai aheanaga na gwĩtana kũrĩa etanaga nakuo ndacookaga kwĩricũkwo.
Romans11:30 O ta ũrĩa inyuĩ hĩndĩ ĩmwe mwaremeire Ngai
Romans11:31 rĩu no taguo o nao matuĩkĩte aremi
Romans11:32 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai nĩatuĩte andũ othe aremi nĩgeetha acooke amaiguĩre tha othe.
Romans11:33 Hĩ! Ĩ ũũgĩ wa Ngai
Romans11:34 “Nũũ ũmenyete meciiria ma Mwathani? Kana nũũ ũkoretwo akĩmũtaara?”
Romans11:35 “Nũũ wanahe Ngai kĩndũ
Romans11:36 Nĩgũkorwo indo ciothe cioimire harĩ we
Romans12:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Romans12:2 Mũtikanahaananie ũhoro wanyu na maũndũ marĩa mekagwo nĩ andũ a thĩ ĩno; no garũrũkai na ũndũ wa kwerũhio meciiria manyu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũrĩhotaga kũmenya na gwĩtĩkĩra wendi ũcio wa Ngai
Romans12:3 Nĩ ũndũ wa wega ũrĩa ndaaheirwo nĩ Ngai-rĩ
Romans12:4 O ta ũrĩa tũrĩ na ciĩga nyingĩ thĩinĩ wa mwĩrĩ ũmwe
Romans12:5 no taguo o na ithuĩ
Romans12:6 Ningĩ nĩtũheetwo iheo itiganĩte
Romans12:7 Angĩkorwo nĩ gũtungata
Romans12:8 ningĩ angĩkorwo nĩ kũũmĩrĩria andũ
Romans12:9 Wendani wanyu nĩũkoragwo nĩ ũrĩa ũtarĩ ũhinga. Thũũragai ũndũ ũrĩa mũũru; naguo ũndũ ũrĩa mwega mũkĩũrũmagie.
Romans12:10 Endanagai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Romans12:11 Rutagai wĩra na kĩyo
Romans12:12 Ikaragai mũkenete nĩ ũndũ mũrĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Romans12:13 Teithagiai andũ a Ngai mabataro-inĩ mao. Tũũrai mũnyiitaga andũ ũgeni.
Romans12:14 Rathimagai andũ arĩa mamũnyariiraga; marathimagei na mũtikanamarume.
Romans12:15 Kenagai hamwe na arĩa marakena; na mũcakae na arĩa maracakaya.
Romans12:16 Tũũrai mũiguanĩte mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ. Tigagai gwĩtĩĩa
Romans12:17 Mũtikaneke mũndũ ũũru nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa amwĩkĩte. Menyagĩrĩrai nĩguo mwĩkage maũndũ marĩa mangĩonwo magĩrĩire nĩ andũ othe.
Romans12:18 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Romans12:19 Arata akwa
Romans12:20 Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ: “Thũ yaku ĩngĩkorwo ĩhũtiĩ-rĩ
Romans12:21 Mũtikanatoorio nĩ ũũru
Romans13:1 O mũndũ no nginya athĩkagĩre arĩa maathanaga
Romans13:2 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Romans13:3 Nĩgũkorwo aathani ti a kũmakia arĩa mekaga ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire
Romans13:4 Nĩgũkorwo we nĩ ndungata ya Ngai ya gũtũma wonage maũndũ mega. No ũngĩka ũũru-rĩ
Romans13:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Romans13:6 Ũndũ ũcio noguo ũtũmaga mũrutage magooti
Romans13:7 Rutagĩrai andũ othe kĩrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũmarutĩra: Angĩkorwo mũtirutĩte magooti
Romans13:8 Mũtigaikare mũrĩ na thiirĩ na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Romans13:9 Nĩ ũndũ maathani maya
Romans13:10 Wendani-rĩ
Romans13:11 Na mwĩkage ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa kũmenya mahinda maya tũrĩ ũrĩa matariĩ. Ihinda nĩikinyu nĩgeetha mwarahũke mũtige gũkoma
Romans13:12 Ũtukũ ũrĩ hakuhĩ gũthira; naguo mũthenya ũkiriĩ gũkinya. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtũtigane na maũndũ ma nduma na twĩohe indo cia mbaara
Romans13:13 Nĩtũthiiage na mĩthiĩre mĩagĩrĩru
Romans13:14 No rĩrĩ
Romans14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Romans14:2 Wĩtĩkio wa mũndũ ũmwe-rĩ
Romans14:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩĩaga mĩthemba yothe ya irio ndakae kũmena mũndũ ũrĩa ũtekaga ũguo
Romans14:4 Wee ũkĩrĩ ũ nĩguo ũtuĩre ndungata ya mũndũ ũngĩ ciira? Mwathi wayo nĩwe ũmenyaga ĩrũngiĩ wega kana ĩgwĩte. Nayo nĩĩrĩrũgamaga
Romans14:5 Mũndũ ũmwe-rĩ
Romans14:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa wonaga mũthenya ũmwe ũrĩ wa mwanya-rĩ
Romans14:7 Nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ o na ũmwe witũ ũtũũraga nĩ ũndũ wake mwene
Romans14:8 Nĩ ũndũ tũngĩtũũra muoyo-rĩ
Romans14:9 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo watũmire Kristũ akue na acooke ariũke
Romans14:10 Wee-rĩ
Romans14:11 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Ti-itherũ
Romans14:12 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Romans14:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtũgĩtige gũtuanĩra ciira ithuĩ ene. Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ
Romans14:14 Niĩ nĩmenyete wega biũ ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Mwathani Jesũ
Romans14:15 Angĩkorwo mũrũ kana mwarĩ wa thoguo nĩekũigua ũũru tondũ wa kĩrĩa ũrĩĩaga-rĩ
Romans14:16 Mũtikanareke ũndũ ũrĩa muonaga ũrĩ mwega ũtuĩke wa gũcambio.
Romans14:17 Nĩgũkorwo ũthamaki wa Ngai ti ũhoro wa kũrĩa na kũnyua
Romans14:18 tondũ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũtungatagĩra Kristũ na njĩra icio nĩakenagia Ngai
