1Corinthians6:17 No mũndũ ũrĩa wĩnyiitithanagia na Mwathani atuĩkaga ũmwe nake thĩinĩ wa roho.
1Corinthians6:18 Ũragĩrai mehia ma ũmaraya. Mehia marĩa mangĩ mothe mekagwo nĩ mũndũ marĩ nja ya mwĩrĩ wake
1Corinthians6:19 Kaĩ inyuĩ mũtooĩ atĩ mĩĩrĩ yanyu nĩ hekarũ ya Roho Mũtheru ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ wanyu
1Corinthians6:20 inyuĩ mwagũrirwo na thogora. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians7:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians7:2 No tondũ wa ũrĩa ũmaraya ũingĩhĩte-rĩ
1Corinthians7:3 Mũthuuri nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũhingagĩria mũtumia wake bata wake wa kĩhiko
1Corinthians7:4 Mũtumia ndangĩĩathĩra mwĩrĩ wake mwene
1Corinthians7:5 Tigagai kũimana
1Corinthians7:6 Ũhoro ũcio ndawaaria taarĩ rũũtha ngũheana
1Corinthians7:7 No nyende andũ othe mahaane ta ũrĩa niĩ ndariĩ. No o mũndũ aheetwo kĩheo gĩake mwene kuuma kũrĩ Ngai; mũndũ ũmwe aheetwo kĩheo gĩkĩ
1Corinthians7:8 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians7:9 No angĩkorwo matingĩhota kwĩgirĩrĩria-rĩ
1Corinthians7:10 Kũrĩ andũ arĩa mahikĩte na makahikania-rĩ
1Corinthians7:11 No aangĩka ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians7:12 Nĩ ũndũ wa acio angĩ nguuga ũũ
1Corinthians7:13 Nake mũtumia angĩkorwo arĩ na mũthuuri ũtetĩkĩtie
1Corinthians7:14 Nĩgũkorwo mũthuuri ũrĩa ũtetĩkĩtie nĩatheretio nĩ ũndũ wa mũtumia wake
1Corinthians7:15 No rĩrĩ
1Corinthians7:16 Wee mũtumia-rĩ
1Corinthians7:17 No rĩrĩ
1Corinthians7:18 Mũndũ angĩkorwo eetirwo arĩ mũruu-rĩ
1Corinthians7:19 Kũrua gũtirĩ bata; o na kwaga kũrua gũtirĩ bata. Ũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ bata nĩ kũmenyerera maathani ma Ngai.
1Corinthians7:20 O mũndũ nĩaikarage o ũrĩa aatariĩ rĩrĩa Ngai aamwĩtire.
1Corinthians7:21 Wee warĩ ngombo rĩrĩa wetirwo? Ũndũ ũcio ndũgagũtange
1Corinthians7:22 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa warĩ ngombo rĩrĩa Mwathani aamwĩtire-rĩ
1Corinthians7:23 Inyuĩ mwagũrirwo goro; mũtigatuĩke ngombo cia andũ.
1Corinthians7:24 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
1Corinthians7:25 Rĩu-rĩ
1Corinthians7:26 Nĩ ũndũ wa mathĩĩna ma mahinda maya-rĩ
1Corinthians7:27 Wee nĩũhikanĩtie? Ndũkaingate mũtumia waku. Wee nawe hihi ndũhikanĩtie? Tiga kũhikania.
1Corinthians7:28 No ũngĩhikania-rĩ
1Corinthians7:29 Ũndũ ũrĩa ndĩrenda kuuga
1Corinthians7:30 arĩa maracakaya nĩmaikarage ta mataracakaya; nao arĩa makenete nĩmaikarage ta matakenete; o na arĩa mekũgũra indo
1Corinthians7:31 nao arĩa mahũthagĩra indo cia thĩ ĩno
1Corinthians7:32 Niĩ ingĩenda inyuĩ mũikarage mũtegwĩtanga. Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtahikanĩtie etangaga na maũndũ ma Mwathani
1Corinthians7:33 No mũndũ ũrĩa ũhikanĩtie etangaga na maũndũ ma gũkũ thĩ
1Corinthians7:34 naguo wendi wa ngoro yake nĩmũgayũkanu. Mũndũ-wa-nja ũtarĩ mũhiku kana mũirĩtu etangaga na maũndũ ma Mwathani: Muoroto wake nĩ kwĩheana harĩ Mwathani mwĩrĩ na roho. No mũtumia mũhiku etangaga na maũndũ ma thĩ ĩno
1Corinthians7:35 Ndĩramwarĩria maũndũ maya nĩgeetha mũgunĩke
1Corinthians7:36 Mũndũ o wothe angĩona atĩ nĩarahĩtĩria mũirĩtu ũrĩa orĩtie
1Corinthians7:37 No rĩrĩ
1Corinthians7:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians7:39 Mũtumia nĩohanĩtio na mũthuuriwe rĩrĩa rĩothe mũthuuriwe arĩ muoyo. No mũthuuriwe angĩkua
1Corinthians7:40 No itua rĩakwa nĩ atĩrĩ
1Corinthians8:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians8:2 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩciiragia atĩ nĩoĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Corinthians8:3 No mũndũ ũrĩa wendete Ngai
1Corinthians8:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians8:5 Tondũ o na kũngĩkorwo nĩ kũrĩ indo ciĩtagwo ngai
1Corinthians8:6 no harĩ ithuĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians8:7 No ti andũ othe mooĩ ũguo. Andũ amwe nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa matũũrĩte mamenyerete mĩhianano
1Corinthians8:8 No irio iria tũrĩĩaga itingĩtũma tũkuhĩrĩrie Ngai; tũtingĩthũkio nĩ kwaga gũcirĩa
1Corinthians8:9 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians8:10 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ o wothe ũrĩ na thamiri ĩtarĩ na hinya
1Corinthians8:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwehĩria ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ na njĩra ĩyo
1Corinthians8:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians9:1 Githĩ niĩ ndirĩ na wĩyathi? Githĩ niĩ ndirĩ mũtũmwo? Githĩ niĩ ndionire Jesũ Mwathani witũ? Anga inyuĩ mũtirĩ maciaro ma wĩra wakwa thĩinĩ wa Mwathani?
1Corinthians9:2 O na angĩkorwo andũ arĩa angĩ mationaga ta ndĩ mũtũmwo-rĩ
1Corinthians9:3 Gwĩtetera gwakwa harĩ arĩa manjiirithagia nĩ gũkũ:
1Corinthians9:4 Githĩ ithuĩ tũtirĩ na kĩhooto gĩa kũrĩa na kũnyua?
1Corinthians9:5 Githĩ ithuĩ tũtirĩ na kĩhooto kĩa mũndũ gũtwarana rũgendo-inĩ na mũtumia wake mwĩtĩkia
1Corinthians9:6 Kana no niĩ tũrĩ na Baranaba arĩ o nginya tũrutage wĩra nĩguo tuone ũteithio witũ?
1Corinthians9:7 Nũũ ũtungataga ta mũthigari na akeerĩha na indo ciake we mwene? Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ ũhaandaga mũgũnda wa mĩthabibũ na ndarĩe thabibũ cia mũgũnda ũcio? Ningĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians9:8 Ndĩraaria ũhoro ũyũ ndĩ na meciiria ma ũ-mũndũ tu? Githĩ Watho o naguo nduugĩte o ũguo?
1Corinthians9:9 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo watho-inĩ wa Musa atĩrĩ
1Corinthians9:10 Ti-itherũ oigaga ũguo nĩ ũndũ witũ
1Corinthians9:11 Tũngĩkorwo ithuĩ nĩtũhaandĩte mbeũ ya kĩĩroho thĩinĩ wanyu-rĩ
1Corinthians9:12 Angĩkorwo andũ angĩ marĩ na kĩhooto gĩa gũteithio nĩ inyuĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians9:13 Kaĩ inyuĩ mũtooĩ atĩ andũ arĩa marutaga wĩra thĩinĩ wa hekarũ marutaga irio ciao kuuma kũu hekarũ
1Corinthians9:14 O ta ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians9:15 No niĩ ndirĩ ndaahũthĩra kĩhooto o na kĩmwe gĩa cio. Ningĩ ndiraandĩka ũhoro ũyũ ndĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro atĩ nĩmũkũnjĩka maũndũ ta macio. Nĩ kaba ngue gũkĩra mũndũ o naũ agirie ndĩĩrahĩre ũndũ ũcio.
1Corinthians9:16 No rĩrĩ
1Corinthians9:17 Ingĩhunjia nĩ ũndũ wa kwĩyendera-rĩ
1Corinthians9:18 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians9:19 O na gũtuĩka ndĩ muohore na ndirĩ ngombo ya mũndũ-rĩ
1Corinthians9:20 Kũrĩ Ayahudi ndaatuĩkire ta Mũyahudi nĩguo nguucagĩrĩrie Ayahudi. Na kũrĩ arĩa marĩ rungu rwa watho-rĩ
1Corinthians9:21 Kũrĩ arĩa matarĩ watho-inĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians9:22 Kũrĩ arĩa matarĩ hinya-rĩ
1Corinthians9:23 Njĩkaga maũndũ maya mothe nĩ ũndũ wa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
1Corinthians9:24 Kaĩ inyuĩ mũtooĩ atĩ andũ arĩa mahĩtahĩtanaga ihenya-inĩ mahanyũkaga othe
1Corinthians9:25 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũhĩtahĩtanaga thĩinĩ wa mathako-rĩ
1Corinthians9:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians9:27 Aca
1Corinthians10:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians10:2 Othe nĩmabatithirio matuĩke andũ a Musa marĩ rungu rwa itu rĩu
1Corinthians10:3 Na othe maarĩĩaga irio o imwe cia kĩĩroho
1Corinthians10:4 na maanyuuaga maaĩ o mamwe ma kĩĩroho; nĩgũkorwo maanyuire kuuma rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga rwa kĩĩroho rũrĩa rwatwaranaga nao
1Corinthians10:5 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians10:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians10:7 Mũtigatuĩke ahooi mĩhianano
1Corinthians10:8 Ningĩ tũtikahũũre ũmaraya
1Corinthians10:9 O na ningĩ tũtikanagerie Mwathani
1Corinthians10:10 Na mũtikae gũteta
1Corinthians10:11 Maũndũ macio meekĩkire kũrĩ o marĩ cionereria
1Corinthians10:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians10:13 Mũtirĩ mwagerio na magerio mangĩ tiga o marĩa makoraga andũ. Nake Ngai nĩmwĩhokeku; ndangĩtĩkĩra mũgerio na magerio marĩa mũtangĩhota gwĩtiiria. No rĩrĩa mũkũgerio-rĩ
1Corinthians10:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians10:15 Ndĩraarĩria andũ oogĩ; mwĩkũũranĩrei ũrĩa ndĩroiga.
1Corinthians10:16 Gĩkombe gĩa gũcookia ngaatho kĩrĩa tũcookagia ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wakĩo-rĩ
1Corinthians10:17 Na tondũ mũgate ũcio nĩ ũmwe-rĩ
1Corinthians10:18 Ta mwĩcũraniei ũhoro wa andũ a Isiraeli: Arĩa marĩĩaga irio cia igongona-rĩ
1Corinthians10:19 Ndĩrenda kuuga atĩa? Atĩ kĩrĩa kĩrutĩirwo mũhianano nĩ kĩndũ kũrĩ
1Corinthians10:20 Aca! Ũrĩa ndĩroiga nĩ atĩ magongona ma andũ arĩa matarĩ na ũngai marutagĩrwo ndaimono
1Corinthians10:21 Mũtingĩhota kũnyuĩra gĩkombe kĩa Mwathani
1Corinthians10:22 Kaĩ tũrageria kwarahũra ũiru wa Mwathani? Kaĩ tũrĩ na hinya kũmũkĩra?
1Corinthians10:23 “Niĩ ndirigĩrĩirio gwĩka ũndũ
1Corinthians10:24 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcaragia maũndũ ma kwĩguna we mwene
1Corinthians10:25 Rĩĩagai kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩendagio thoko-inĩ ya nyama mũtekwĩyũria ciũria nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩcuuko wa thamiri
1Corinthians10:26 nĩgũkorwo
1Corinthians10:27 Mũndũ ũtarĩ mwĩtĩkia angĩmwĩta mũkarĩe irio gwake
1Corinthians10:28 No mũndũ angĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Corinthians10:29 ngiuga ũguo ti thamiri yaku ndagweta

1Corinthians10:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians10:32 Tigai gwĩka ũndũ ũngĩhĩngithia mũndũ
1Corinthians10:33 o ta ũrĩa niĩ ngeragia gũkenia andũ othe na njĩra o yothe. Nĩgũkorwo ndicaragia ũndũ wa kwĩguna niĩ mwene
1Corinthians11:1 Mwĩgerekaniei na niĩ
1Corinthians11:2 Nĩngũmũgaathĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ wa kũndirikana maũndũ-inĩ mothe
1Corinthians11:3 Rĩu-rĩ
1Corinthians11:4 Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe ũrĩa ũhooyaga kana akaratha ehumbĩrĩte mũtwe-rĩ
1Corinthians11:5 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja o wothe ũrĩa ũhooyaga kana akaratha atahumbĩrĩte mũtwe wake-rĩ
1Corinthians11:6 Angĩkorwo mũndũ-wa-nja ndekũhumbĩra mũtwe wake-rĩ
1Corinthians11:7 Mũndũ mũrũme ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhumbĩra mũtwe wake
1Corinthians11:8 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ mũrũme ndoimire harĩ mũndũ-wa-nja
1Corinthians11:9 Mũndũ mũrũme-rĩ
1Corinthians11:10 Nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi gĩkĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians11:11 No ningĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians11:12 O ta ũrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja oimire harĩ mũndũ mũrũme-rĩ
1Corinthians11:13 Ta tuai arĩ inyuĩ: Nĩ kwagĩrĩire mũndũ-wa-nja kũhooya Ngai atehumbĩrĩte mũtwe?
1Corinthians11:14 Kaĩ maũndũ ma ndũire matamũrutaga atĩ mũndũ-mũrũme gũkorwo arĩ na njuĩrĩ ndaaya nĩ ũndũ wa kũmũconorithia
1Corinthians11:15 no mũndũ-wa-nja gũkorwo na njuĩrĩ ndaaya
1Corinthians11:16 Angĩkorwo kũrĩ na mũndũ ũrĩ na ngarari na ũhoro ũyũ-rĩ
1Corinthians11:17 Ũhoro-inĩ ũrĩa ngũmũtaarĩria rĩu-rĩ
1Corinthians11:18 Ũndũ wa mbere
1Corinthians11:19 Hatarĩ nganja gũtingĩaga kũgĩa na ngarari gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu cia kuonania arĩa anyu metĩkĩrĩkĩte nĩ Ngai.
1Corinthians11:20 Rĩrĩa muongana hamwe
1Corinthians11:21 nĩgũkorwo rĩrĩa mũkũrĩa
1Corinthians11:22 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mĩciĩ mũngĩrĩĩra na mũnyuĩre kuo? Kana nĩ kanitha wa Ngai mũnyararĩte na mũkenda gũconoraga arĩa matarĩ kĩndũ? Ngũkĩmwĩra atĩa? No ndĩkĩmũgaathĩrĩrie nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio? Aca
1Corinthians11:23 Nĩgũkorwo ũhoro ũrĩa ndaamũkĩrire kuuma kũrĩ Mwathani noguo ndaamũkinyĩirie: Mwathani Jesũ

1Corinthians11:25 Ningĩ o ũndũ ũmwe

1Corinthians11:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians11:28 Mũndũ nĩambage gwĩtuĩria mbere ya kũrĩa mũgate ũcio na kũnyuĩra gĩkombe kĩu.
1Corinthians11:29 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũrĩĩaga na akanyua ategũkũũrana mwĩrĩ wa Mwathani

1Corinthians12:5 O na njĩra cia gũtungata nĩ mĩthemba mĩthemba
1Corinthians12:6 Ningĩ kũrĩ mĩrutĩre ya wĩra mĩthemba mĩthemba
1Corinthians12:7 Na rĩrĩ

1Corinthians12:9 nake ũngĩ akaheo wĩtĩkio nĩ Roho o ro ũcio
1Corinthians12:10 nake ũngĩ akaheo hinya wa kũringa ciama
1Corinthians12:11 Maũndũ macio mothe nĩ wĩra wa Roho o ro ũcio ũmwe
1Corinthians12:12 Mwĩrĩ wa mũndũ nĩ ũmwe
1Corinthians12:13 Nĩgũkorwo ithuothe twabatithirio na Roho ũmwe tũgĩtuĩka a mwĩrĩ ũmwe
1Corinthians12:14 Na rĩrĩ

1Corinthians12:16 Nakuo gũtũ kũngiuga atĩ
1Corinthians12:17 Mwĩrĩ wothe ũngĩkorwo no riitho-rĩ
1Corinthians12:18 No ũrĩa kũrĩ
1Corinthians12:19 Ciĩga ciothe ingĩtuĩka nĩ kĩĩga kĩmwe-rĩ
1Corinthians12:20 Ũrĩa kũrĩ nĩ atĩ ciĩga nĩ nyingĩ
1Corinthians12:21 Riitho rĩtingĩhota kwĩra guoko atĩrĩ
1Corinthians12:22 Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians12:23 nacio ciĩga iria tuonaga ta itarĩ cia gũtĩĩo mũno-rĩ
1Corinthians12:24 o rĩrĩa ciĩga ciitũ iria itarĩ cia kũhithwo itabataragio nĩkũmenyererwo mũno. No Ngai nĩanyiitithanĩtie ciĩga cia mwĩrĩ na agatĩĩithia makĩria ciĩga iria ciagĩte gĩtĩĩo
1Corinthians12:25 nĩgeetha gũtikae kũgĩa na nyamũkano thĩinĩ wa mwĩrĩ
1Corinthians12:26 Kĩĩga kĩmwe kĩngĩnyariirĩka
1Corinthians12:27 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians12:28 Nakuo thĩinĩ wa kanitha
1Corinthians12:29 Andũ othe nĩ atũmwo? Andũ othe nĩ anabii? Andũ othe nĩ arutani? Andũ othe nĩ aringi a ciama?
1Corinthians12:30 Andũ othe nĩmaheetwo iheo cia kũhonania? Andũ othe nĩmakĩaragia na thiomi? Andũ othe nĩmagĩtaũraga thiomi?
1Corinthians12:31 No rĩrĩ
1Corinthians13:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Corinthians13:2 Ingĩkorwo ndĩ na kĩheo gĩa kũratha ũhoro
1Corinthians13:3 Ingĩheana indo ciakwa ciothe kũrĩ andũ arĩa athĩĩni
1Corinthians13:4 Wendani nĩũkiranagĩrĩria
1Corinthians13:5 Wendani ndũrĩ rũtũrĩko
1Corinthians13:6 Ningĩ wendani ndũkenagĩra ũũru
1Corinthians13:7 Wendani nĩũgitanagĩra hĩndĩ ciothe
1Corinthians13:8 Wendani ndũthiraga. No akorwo nĩ morathi
1Corinthians13:9 Nĩgũkorwo tũmenyaga maũndũ o gĩcunjĩ
1Corinthians13:10 no hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũndũ ũrĩa mũkinyanĩru ũgooka-rĩ
1Corinthians13:11 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaarĩ kaana-rĩ
1Corinthians13:12 Rĩu tuonaga maũndũ na mairia
1Corinthians13:13 Na rĩu
1Corinthians14:1 Rũmagĩrĩrai mĩthiĩre ya wendani
1Corinthians14:2 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa wothe waragia na rũthiomi-rĩ
1Corinthians14:3 No mũndũ ũrĩa ũheanaga ũhoro wa Ngai aaragĩria andũ akamekĩra hinya
1Corinthians14:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa waragia na rũthiomi nĩ we mwene wĩongagĩrĩra hinya
1Corinthians14:5 No nyende inyuothe mwaragie na thiomi
1Corinthians14:6 No rĩu
1Corinthians14:7 O na ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ indo iria itarĩ muoyo iria igambaga
1Corinthians14:8 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians14:9 Ũguo noguo ũhoro wanyu ũtariĩ. Tiga mwaririe na ciugo ikũmenyeka na rũthiomi rwanyu-rĩ
1Corinthians14:10 Ti-itherũ nĩ kũrĩ mĩthemba mĩingĩ ya thiomi gũkũ thĩ
1Corinthians14:11 No angĩkorwo ndingĩmenya ũrĩa mũndũ aroiga-rĩ
1Corinthians14:12 Ũguo noguo o na inyuĩ mũtariĩ. Kuona atĩ nĩmwĩrirĩirie mũno iheo cia kĩĩroho-rĩ
1Corinthians14:13 Na tondũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians14:14 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Corinthians14:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians14:16 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians14:17 No ũkorwo ũgĩcookia ngaatho wega mũno
1Corinthians14:18 Nĩngũcookeria Ngai ngaatho nĩgũkorwo niĩ nĩnjaragia na thiomi makĩria manyu inyuothe.
1Corinthians14:19 No kanitha-inĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians14:20 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
1Corinthians14:21 Thĩinĩ wa Watho nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Nĩngaarĩria andũ aya na tũnua twa andũ maaragia na thiomi ngʼeni
1Corinthians14:22 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians14:23 Tondũ ũcio kanitha wothe ũngĩũngana na andũ othe maarie na thiomi-rĩ
1Corinthians14:24 No mũndũ ũtarĩ mwĩtĩkia kana mũndũ ũtarĩ mũtaũkĩre nĩ ũhoro ũcio angĩtoonya rĩrĩa andũ othe mararatha mohoro-rĩ
1Corinthians14:25 na maũndũ marĩa atũire ahithĩte ngoro-inĩ nĩmakoimbũka. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio egũithie thĩ ahooe Ngai
1Corinthians14:26 Tũgũkiuga atĩa
1Corinthians14:27 Angĩkorwo nĩ gũkwario na rũthiomi-rĩ
1Corinthians14:28 Angĩkorwo gũtirĩ mũtaũri-rĩ
1Corinthians14:29 Aheani ũhoro eerĩ kana atatũ magĩrĩirwo maarie
1Corinthians14:30 Na mũndũ ũikarĩte thĩ ho angĩgĩa na ũguũrio-rĩ
1Corinthians14:31 Nĩgũkorwo inyuothe no mũrathe ũhoro o mũndũ riita rĩake nĩguo andũ othe marutwo maũndũ na momĩrĩrio.
1Corinthians14:32 Namo maroho ma anabii nĩmathĩkagĩra anabii o ene.
1Corinthians14:33 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ti Ngai wa kĩrigiicano no nĩ wa thayũ. Ta ũrĩa kũrĩ thĩinĩ wa ciũngano ciothe cia andũ arĩa aamũre
1Corinthians14:34 atumia magĩrĩirwo nĩgũikaraga makirĩte ki marĩ thĩinĩ wa kanitha. Matiĩtĩkĩrĩtio kwaria
1Corinthians14:35 Angĩkorwo marĩ na ũndũ mangĩenda kũmenya-rĩ
1Corinthians14:36 Hĩ! Anga kiugo kĩa Ngai kĩambĩrĩirie na inyuĩ? Kana hihi no inyuĩ inyuiki gĩakinyĩire?
1Corinthians14:37 Mũndũ o na ũ angĩĩciiria atĩ nĩ mũnabii
1Corinthians14:38 No angĩagĩra ũndũ ũcio kĩene-rĩ
1Corinthians14:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Corinthians14:40 No maũndũ mothe nĩmekagwo na mũtaratara ũrĩa wagĩrĩire

1Corinthians15:5 na atĩ akiumĩrĩra Petero
1Corinthians15:6 Thuutha ũcio

1Corinthians15:15 Makĩria ma ũguo-rĩ

1Corinthians15:17 Na angĩkorwo Kristũ ndaariũkirio-rĩ
1Corinthians15:18 Ningĩ andũ arĩa marĩkĩtie gũkoma marĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ-rĩ
1Corinthians15:19 Na kũngĩkorwo kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro giitũ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ no kĩa muoyo-inĩ ũyũ tũrĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians15:20 No rĩrĩ
1Corinthians15:21 Tondũ-rĩ
1Corinthians15:22 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa andũ othe makuaga nĩ ũndũ wa Adamu-rĩ
1Corinthians15:23 No o mũndũ akaariũka ihinda rĩake mwene: Kristũ arĩ we wariũkire mbere; na thuutha andũ arĩa marĩ ake hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agooka.
1Corinthians15:24 Thuutha ũcio nĩguo ihinda rĩa kũrigĩrĩria rĩgaakinya
1Corinthians15:25 Nĩgũkorwo no nginya athamake nginya rĩrĩa agaakorwo aigĩte thũ ciake ciothe rungu rwa makinya make.
1Corinthians15:26 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians15:27 Nĩgũkorwo “nĩ aigĩte indo ciothe rungu rwa makinya make.” Na rĩrĩa gũkwĩrwo atĩ “indo ciothe” nĩciigĩtwo rungu rwake
1Corinthians15:28 Aarĩkia gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians15:29 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians15:30 Na ithuĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians15:31 Ngũmwĩra na ma
1Corinthians15:32 Angĩkorwo ndaahũũranire na nyamũ cia gĩthaka kũu Efeso nĩ ũndũ wa itũmi cia ũ-mũndũ-rĩ
1Corinthians15:33 Mũtikaheeneke: “Thiritũ njũru nĩĩthũkagia mĩtugo mĩega.”
1Corinthians15:34 Arahũkai mwĩigue ta ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo
1Corinthians15:35 No mũndũ ahota kũũria atĩrĩ
1Corinthians15:36 Nĩ ũrimũ ũrĩkũ ũyũ! Kĩrĩa wahaanda-rĩ
1Corinthians15:37 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wahaanda-rĩ
1Corinthians15:38 No Ngai amĩheaga mwĩrĩ o ũrĩa endaga ĩgĩe naguo
1Corinthians15:39 Mĩĩrĩ yothe ndĩhaanaine: Andũ marĩ mũthemba ũmwe wa mwĩrĩ
1Corinthians15:40 Ningĩ nĩ kũrĩ mĩĩrĩ ya igũrũ na nĩ kũrĩ mĩĩrĩ ya gũkũ thĩ; no riiri wa mĩĩrĩ ya igũrũ nĩ mũthemba ũmwe
1Corinthians15:41 Riũa rĩrĩ na riiri warĩo mwanya
1Corinthians15:42 Ũguo nĩguo gũgaatuĩka hĩndĩ ya kũriũkio kwa andũ arĩa akuũ. Mwĩrĩ ũrĩa ũhaandagwo nĩ wa kũbutha
1Corinthians15:43 mwĩrĩ ũhaandagwo ũrĩ mũmene
1Corinthians15:44 ũhaandagwo ũrĩ mwĩrĩ wa ndũire
1Corinthians15:45 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Adamu ũrĩa warĩ mũndũ wa mbere-rĩ
1Corinthians15:46 Mwĩrĩ wa kĩĩroho tiguo waambire gũũka
1Corinthians15:47 Mũndũ wa mbere aarĩ wa rũkũngũ rwa thĩ
1Corinthians15:48 O ta ũrĩa mũndũ ũcio wa gũkũ thĩ aatariĩ
1Corinthians15:49 Na ta ũrĩa twagĩire na mũhianĩre wa mũndũ ũcio wa tĩĩri-rĩ
1Corinthians15:50 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Corinthians15:51 Thikĩrĩriai
1Corinthians15:52 o kahinda kanini
1Corinthians15:53 Nĩgũkorwo mwĩrĩ ũyũ ũbuthaga no nginya wĩhumbe mwĩrĩ ũtarĩ wa kũbutha

1Corinthians15:55 “Wee gĩkuũ-rĩ
1Corinthians15:56 Rũboora rwa gĩkuũ nĩ mehia

1Corinthians16:2 Mũthenya wa mbere wa kiumia-rĩ
1Corinthians16:3 Na ndaakinya-rĩ
1Corinthians16:4 Na kũngĩkoneka kwagĩrĩire o na niĩ thiĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians16:5 Ndaarĩkia gũtuĩkanĩria Makedonia-rĩ
1Corinthians16:6 Hihi ngaikara na inyuĩ gwa kahinda
1Corinthians16:7 Ndikwenda kuonana na inyuĩ hĩndĩ ĩno ndĩrahĩtũkĩra kũu

1Corinthians16:9 tondũ ndĩmũhingũrĩre mweke mũnene wa kũruta wĩra mwega ũrĩ na uumithio

1Corinthians16:15 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Stefana nĩo maarĩ a mbere gwĩtĩkia kũu bũrũri wa Akaia
1Corinthians16:16 mwathĩkagĩre andũ ta acio
1Corinthians16:17 Nĩndakenire rĩrĩa Stefana
1Corinthians16:18 Nĩgũkorwo nĩmacanjamũrire roho wakwa o na wanyu. Andũ ta acio nĩmagĩrĩirwo kũheagwo gĩtĩĩo.
1Corinthians16:19 Makanitha ma bũrũri wa Asia nĩmamũgeithia. Akula na Pirisila nĩmamũgeithia mũno thĩinĩ wa Mwathani
1Corinthians16:20 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ othe arĩa marĩ gũkũ nĩmamũgeithia. O mũndũ nĩageithie ũrĩa ũngĩ na ngeithi theru cia kĩmumunyano.
1Corinthians16:21 Niĩ
1Corinthians16:22 Angĩkorwo he mũndũ o na ũ ũtendete Mwathani-rĩ
1Corinthians16:23 Wega wa Mwathani Jesũ ũroikara na inyuĩ.
1Corinthians16:24 Wendani wakwa ũromũkinyĩra inyuĩ inyuothe mũrĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ Jesũ. Ameni.
2Corinthians1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
2Corinthians1:2 Wega na thayũ kuuma kũrĩ Ngai Ithe witũ o na Mwathani Jesũ Kristũ iroikara na inyuĩ.
2Corinthians1:3 Ngai na Ithe wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ arogoocwo
2Corinthians1:4 ũrĩa ũtũũmagĩrĩria mathĩĩna-inĩ maitũ mothe
2Corinthians1:5 Nĩgũkorwo o ta ũrĩa kũnyariirwo gwa Kristũ kũingĩhĩte thĩinĩ witũ-rĩ
2Corinthians1:6 Tũngĩthĩĩnio-rĩ
2Corinthians1:7 Nakĩo kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩrĩa tũrĩ nakĩo nĩ ũndũ wanyu nĩ kĩrũmu
2Corinthians1:8 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
2Corinthians1:9 Ti-itherũ
2Corinthians1:10 Nĩwe watũhonokirie ũgwati-inĩ ũcio wahaanaga wa gĩkuũ
2Corinthians1:11 inyuĩ na inyuĩ mũgĩtũteithagia na gũtũhoera. Nao andũ aingĩ nĩmarĩcookagia ngaatho nĩ ũndũ witũ
2Corinthians1:12 Na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians1:13 Nĩgũkorwo tũtiramwandĩkĩra ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ mũtangĩhota gũthoma kana gũtaũkĩrwo nĩguo. Na ngwĩhoka atĩ
2Corinthians1:14 o ta ũrĩa mũtũmenyete hanini

2Corinthians1:23 Ngai nĩwe mũira wakwa

2Corinthians2:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩgũtua ndaatuire itua atĩ ndikũmũceerera rĩngĩ ndĩmũiguithie kĩeha.
2Corinthians2:2 Tondũ-rĩ
2Corinthians2:3 Ndamwandĩkĩire ũguo nĩgeetha rĩrĩa ngooka ndikanaiguithio kĩeha nĩ acio njagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkenio nĩo. Nĩ ndaarĩ na ũũmĩrĩru harĩ inyuĩ inyuothe atĩ nĩmũngĩagwatanĩire na niĩ gĩkeno-inĩ gĩakwa
2Corinthians2:4 Nĩgũkorwo ndamwandĩkĩire ndĩ mũthĩĩnĩku mũno
2Corinthians2:5 Angĩkorwo nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ ũiguithĩtie amwe anyu kĩeha-rĩ
2Corinthians2:6 Iherithia rĩrĩa aherithĩtio nĩ andũ arĩa aingĩ anyu
2Corinthians2:7 Rĩu inyuĩ-rĩ
2Corinthians2:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Corinthians2:9 Gĩtũmi kĩrĩa gĩatũmire ndĩmwandĩkĩre marũa macio nĩndĩmũgerie
2Corinthians2:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũngĩrekera
2Corinthians2:11 nĩguo Shaitani ndakae gũtũhoota. Nĩgũkorwo tũtirigĩtwo nĩ mawara make.
2Corinthians2:12 Na rĩrĩ

2Corinthians2:14 No rĩrĩ

2Corinthians2:16 Kũrĩ arĩa maroora-rĩ
2Corinthians2:17 Ithuĩ tũtiĩkaga ta ũrĩa andũ aingĩ mekaga; tũtionjorithagia kiugo kĩa Ngai nĩguo tuone uumithio. Handũ ha gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
2Corinthians3:1 Anga nĩtũraambĩrĩria gũcooka kwĩgaathĩrĩria? Kana hihi nĩtũbataire kũheo marũa ma gũtũgaathĩrĩria kũrĩ inyuĩ kana moimĩte kũrĩ inyuĩ ta andũ arĩa angĩ?
2Corinthians3:2 Inyuĩ ene nĩ inyuĩ marũa maitũ
2Corinthians3:3 Inyuĩ nĩmuonanagia atĩ mũrĩ marũa moimĩte kũrĩ Kristũ
2Corinthians3:4 Ũcio nĩguo ũũmĩrĩru witũ harĩ Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa Kristũ.
2Corinthians3:5 Na ti atĩ tũrĩ na ũhoti ithuĩ ene tũngĩĩgaathĩra
2Corinthians3:6 Nĩwe ũtũhotithĩtie tũtuĩke ndungata cia kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa kĩerũ
2Corinthians3:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians3:8 githĩ ũtungata wa Roho to ũgĩkorwo ũkĩrĩ na riiri makĩria?
2Corinthians3:9 Angĩkorwo ũtungata ũrĩa ũtuaga andũ ehia nĩ ũrĩ riiri-rĩ
2Corinthians3:10 Nĩgũkorwo ũhoro ũrĩa warĩ na riiri mbere
2Corinthians3:11 Na angĩkorwo ũhoro ũcio wathiraga wokire na riiri-rĩ
2Corinthians3:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
2Corinthians3:13 Ithuĩ tũtitariĩ ta Musa
2Corinthians3:14 No rĩrĩ
2Corinthians3:15 O na nginya ũmũthĩ rĩrĩa watho wa Musa ũgũthomwo-rĩ
2Corinthians3:16 No rĩrĩa rĩothe mũndũ o na ũ agarũrũkĩra Mwathani-rĩ
2Corinthians3:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians3:18 Na ithuĩ ithuothe arĩa tũtahumbĩrĩte mothiũ maitũ
2Corinthians4:1 Tondũ ũcio
2Corinthians4:2 No ithuĩ nĩtũreganĩte na mĩthiĩre ya hitho na ya thoni; ithuĩ tũtithiiaga na mĩthiĩre ya wara na tũtitukanagia kiugo kĩa Ngai na maheeni. Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ
2Corinthians4:3 O na angĩkorwo ũhoro witũ ũrĩa tũhunjagia nĩmũhumbĩre-rĩ
2Corinthians4:4 Nayo ngai ya mahinda maya
2Corinthians4:5 Nĩgũkorwo ti ũhoro witũ ithuĩ ene tũhunjagia
2Corinthians4:6 Tondũ Ngai ũrĩa woigire
2Corinthians4:7 No rĩrĩ
2Corinthians4:8 Ithuĩ tũhatĩkĩtwo mũno na mĩena yothe
2Corinthians4:9 na nĩtũnyariirĩtwo
2Corinthians4:10 Hĩndĩ ciothe tũkoragwo tũkuuĩte gĩkuũ kĩa Jesũ na mĩĩrĩ iitũ
2Corinthians4:11 Nĩgũkorwo ithuĩ arĩa tũrĩ muoyo tũtũire tũneanagwo gĩkuũ-inĩ nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ
2Corinthians4:12 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
2Corinthians4:13 Nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Tondũ nĩndetĩkirie; nĩkĩo ndaaririe.” Nĩ ũndũ wa roho o ro ũcio wa wĩtĩkio-rĩ
2Corinthians4:14 tondũ nĩtũũĩ atĩ ũrĩa wariũkirie Mwathani Jesũ kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ
2Corinthians4:15 Maũndũ maya mothe nĩmakũmũguna
2Corinthians4:16 Tondũ ũcio tũtiũragwo nĩ hinya. O na gũtuĩka mwena wa nja nĩtũrathirĩrĩkĩra
2Corinthians4:17 Nĩgũkorwo mathĩĩna maitũ mahũthũ na ma ihinda inini maratũma tũreherwo riiri ũmakĩrĩte wa tene na tene.

2Corinthians6:17 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ

2Corinthians7:4 Ndĩ na ũũmĩrĩru mũnene ngĩmwarĩria; nĩndĩĩrahaga mũno nĩ ũndũ wanyu. Mathĩĩna-inĩ maitũ mothe
2Corinthians7:5 Nĩgũkorwo rĩrĩa twakinyire Makedonia
2Corinthians7:6 No Ngai ũrĩa ũhooragĩria arĩa makuĩte ngoro
2Corinthians7:7 na to ũndũ wa gũũka gwake gwiki
2Corinthians7:8 O na ingĩkorwo nĩndatũmire mũgĩe na kĩeha nĩ ũndũ wa marũa makwa-rĩ
2Corinthians7:9 no rĩu ndĩ na gĩkeno
2Corinthians7:10 Kĩeha kĩrĩa kiumanĩte kũrĩ Ngai kĩrehaga ũhoro wa kũhera kũrĩa gũtũmaga andũ mahonoke

2Corinthians7:16 Ndĩ na gĩkeno tondũ rĩu ndĩ na mwĩhoko mũkinyanĩru thĩinĩ wanyu.
2Corinthians8:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians8:2 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ acio maageririo na magerio manene-rĩ
2Corinthians8:3 Nĩgũkorwo niĩ ndĩ mũira atĩ maaheanire indo o ta ũrĩa maahotire
2Corinthians8:4 Nao magĩtũthaitha na hinya mũno metĩkĩrio kũgwatanĩra ũhoro-inĩ wa gũteithia andũ arĩa aamũre.
2Corinthians8:5 Magĩĩka ũndũ ũcio matiawĩkire ta ũrĩa twerĩgĩrĩire
2Corinthians8:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtwaringĩrĩirie Tito
2Corinthians8:7 O ta ũrĩa mũgaacagĩra harĩ maũndũ mothe
2Corinthians8:8 Ti kũmwatha ndĩramwatha
2Corinthians8:9 Nĩgũkorwo nĩmũũĩ ũhoro wa wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ atĩ
2Corinthians8:10 Ha ũhoro ũyũ-rĩ
2Corinthians8:11 Rĩu-rĩ
2Corinthians8:12 Mũndũ angĩkorwo arĩ na wendo
2Corinthians8:13 Kwĩrirĩria gwitũ ti amwe mahũthĩrio mũrigo na inyuĩ mũhinyĩrĩrio
2Corinthians8:14 Ihinda rĩĩrĩ mũingĩhĩtie indo-rĩ
2Corinthians8:15 o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Mũndũ ũrĩa wonganĩtie nyingĩ
2Corinthians8:16 Nĩngũcookeria Ngai ngaatho
2Corinthians8:17 Nĩgũkorwo Tito to mathaithana maitũ aamũkĩrire
2Corinthians8:18 O na nĩtũgũtũma Tito marĩ hamwe na mũrũ wa Ithe witũ ũrĩa ũrĩ na ngumo njega makanitha-inĩ mothe nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa atungatagĩra Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega.
2Corinthians8:19 Makĩria ma ũguo
2Corinthians8:20 Nĩtũrageria mũno kweherera ũndũ o wothe ũngĩtũma tũrutwo mahĩtia rĩrĩa tũkũramata kĩheo gĩkĩ kĩheanĩtwo na ũtaana.
2Corinthians8:21 Nĩgũkorwo nĩtũrerutanĩria gwĩka maũndũ marĩa mangĩonwo magĩrĩire mbere ya Mwathani

2Corinthians9:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians9:2 Nĩgũkorwo nĩnjũũĩ kĩyo kĩanyu gĩa kwenda gũteithia
2Corinthians9:3 No nĩngũtũma ariũ a Ithe witũ nĩguo kwĩraha gwitũ nĩ ũndũ wanyu ũhoro-inĩ ũyũ wa mũhothi gũtigatuĩke gwa tũhũ
2Corinthians9:4 Nĩgũkorwo andũ amwe a Makedonia mangĩrehane na niĩ makore mũtehaarĩirie-rĩ
2Corinthians9:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Corinthians9:6 Ririkanai ũũ: Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhaandaga tũnini akaagetha o tũnini
2Corinthians9:7 O mũndũ aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũheana kĩrĩa atuĩte na ngoro yake nĩekũheana
2Corinthians9:8 Nake Ngai arĩ na ũhoti wa gũtũma mũingĩhĩrwo nĩ maũndũ mothe ma wega wake
2Corinthians9:9 O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Nĩahurunjĩte iheo ciake akahe andũ arĩa athĩĩni; ũthingu wake ũtũũraga nginya tene na tene.”
2Corinthians9:10 Na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians9:11 Na inyuĩ nĩmũrĩtongagio na njĩra ciothe nĩguo mũheanage na ũtaana hĩndĩ ciothe
2Corinthians9:12 Ũteithio ũyũ mũraruta ti kuuga atĩ no andũ a Ngai mũrahingĩria mabata mao
2Corinthians9:13 Na tondũ wa ũtungata ũcio mwĩonanĩtie naguo ũrĩa mũhaana-rĩ
2Corinthians9:14 Na rĩrĩa mekũmũhoera
2Corinthians9:15 Ngai arocookerio ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa kĩheo gĩake kĩrĩa gĩtangiugĩka na ciugo ũrĩa gĩtariĩ!
2Corinthians10:1 Niĩ Paũlũ nĩndamũthaitha nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa Kristũ arĩ mũhooreri na mũcaayanĩri
2Corinthians10:2 Nĩndamũthaitha mũtikanatũme rĩrĩa ngooka ngaakorwo na ũcamba ta ũrĩa njĩrĩgĩrĩire gũkorwo naguo nĩ ũndũ wa andũ amwe arĩa meciiragia atĩ mũtũũrĩre ũrĩa tũtũũraga naguo nĩ wa gũkũ thĩ.
2Corinthians10:3 Nĩgũkorwo o na gũtuĩka tũtũũraga thĩ ĩno
2Corinthians10:4 Matharaita marĩa tũrũaga namo ti ma thĩ ĩno
2Corinthians10:5 Nĩtũmomoraga ngarari
2Corinthians10:6 Na nĩtwĩhaarĩirie kũherithia gĩĩko o gĩothe kĩa ũremi
2Corinthians10:7 Inyuĩ mũrarora maũndũ o igũrũ. Mũndũ o wothe angĩkorwo arĩ na ma atĩ nĩ wa Kristũ-rĩ
2Corinthians10:8 No kuoneke ta ndĩreraha mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoti ũrĩa Mwathani aatũheire. No rĩrĩ
2Corinthians10:9 Ndikwenda kuonwo ta ndĩrenda kũmũmakia na marũa makwa.
2Corinthians10:10 Nĩgũkorwo andũ amwe moigaga atĩrĩ
2Corinthians10:11 Andũ ta acio magĩrĩirwo nĩkũmenya atĩ o ũrĩa ũhoro witũ ũkoragwo ũrĩ marũa-inĩ maitũ rĩrĩa tũtarĩ ho-rĩ
2Corinthians10:12 Tũtigeragia kwĩiganania kana kwĩgerekania na amwe arĩa megathagĩrĩria. Rĩrĩa megwĩthima na arĩa mahaana tao
2Corinthians10:13 No ithuĩ-rĩ
2Corinthians10:14 Tũtireraha gũkĩra ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire
2Corinthians10:15 O na tũtiĩrahaga gũkĩra ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra mũrute nĩ andũ angĩ. Ũndũ ũrĩa twĩrĩgĩrĩire nĩ atĩ
2Corinthians10:16 nĩgeetha tũhote kũhunjia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega ngʼongo iria irĩ mbere ya kwanyu. Nĩgũkorwo tũtikwenda kwĩraha nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra ũrutĩtwo rũgongo rũngĩ nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ.
2Corinthians10:17 No rĩrĩ
2Corinthians10:18 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa wĩgaathagĩrĩria tiwe wonagwo arĩ mwega
2Corinthians11:1 Nĩngwĩhoka nĩmũgũkirĩrĩria ũrimũ ũrĩa mũnini ndĩ naguo; ndamũthaitha mũngirĩrĩrie.
2Corinthians11:2 Nĩndĩraigua ũiru nĩ ũndũ wanyu
2Corinthians11:3 No ndĩ na guoya gũtigatuĩke atĩ meciiria manyu no maturuurio mũtiganĩrie ũgima na ũtheru wa kwĩrutĩra Kristũ
2Corinthians11:4 Inyuĩ nĩmwamũkagĩra ũhoro ũngĩ mũkenete
2Corinthians11:5 No ndigwĩciiria atĩ ndĩ mũnini o na hanini kũrĩ “atũmwo acio anene.”
2Corinthians11:6 No ngorwo itarĩ mũrute ũhoro-inĩ wa kwaria
2Corinthians11:7 Hihi nĩ kwĩhia ndeehirie nĩ kwĩnyiihia nĩguo ndĩmũtũũgĩrie inyuĩ na ũndũ wa kũmũhunjĩria Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa Ngai hatarĩ irĩhi?
2Corinthians11:8 Nĩgũtunya ndaatunyaga makanitha mangĩ ngĩamũkĩra ũteithio kuuma kũrĩ o nĩguo hote kũmũtungata.
2Corinthians11:9 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaarĩ na inyuĩ
2Corinthians11:10 Ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa ũhoro wa ma wa Kristũ ũrĩ thĩinĩ wakwa
2Corinthians11:11 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũma njuge ũguo? Nĩ tondũ ndimwendete? Ngai nĩoĩ atĩ nĩndĩmwendete!
2Corinthians11:12 Na nĩngũthiĩ na mbere na gwĩka ũrĩa ndĩreka
2Corinthians11:13 Nĩgũkorwo andũ ta acio nĩ atũmwo a maheeni
2Corinthians11:14 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ti wa kũmakania
2Corinthians11:15 Ndũkĩrĩ ũndũ wa kũgegania ndungata ciake cingĩĩtua ndungata cia ũthingu. Marigĩrĩrio-inĩ makaagĩa na kĩrĩa kĩringaine na ciĩko ciao.
2Corinthians11:16 Nĩnguuga o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ: Mũndũ ndakae kuona ta ndĩ kĩrimũ. No angĩkorwo nĩguo mũkuona-rĩ
2Corinthians11:17 Ũhoro-inĩ wa mwĩraho ũyũ ndĩ naguo-rĩ
2Corinthians11:18 Kuona atĩ andũ aingĩ nĩmareraha ta ũrĩa thĩ ĩĩrahaga-rĩ
2Corinthians11:19 Tondũ inyuĩ mũkĩrĩ oogĩ-rĩ
2Corinthians11:20 Ti-itherũ
2Corinthians11:21 Nĩngũconoka ngiuga atĩ ithuĩ nĩtwaremirwo nĩ gwĩka maũndũ ta macio! Ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ ũngĩ angĩhota kwĩraha nĩ ũndũ waguo-rĩ
2Corinthians11:22 Andũ acio nĩ Ahibirania? O na niĩ ndĩ Mũhibirania. Andũ acio nĩ Aisiraeli? O na niĩ ndĩ Mũisiraeli. Andũ acio nĩ njiaro cia Iburahĩmu? O na niĩ ndĩ wa rũciaro rwa Iburahĩmu.
2Corinthians11:23 Andũ acio nĩ ndungata cia Kristũ? (Ngwaria ũguo ta ndĩ mũgũrũku.) Niĩ nĩndĩmakĩrĩte. Nĩndutĩte wĩra na kĩyo kũmakĩra
2Corinthians11:24 Ayahudi nĩmahũũrire na kĩboko maita matano
2Corinthians11:25 Nĩndahũũrirwo na thanju maita matatũ
2Corinthians11:26 Ngoretwo ngĩthiĩ ngʼendo nyingĩ. Ngagĩkorwo ndĩ ũgwati-inĩ wa gũtwarwo nĩ njũũĩ
2Corinthians11:27 Ndaanaruta wĩra mũritũ na wa mĩnoga
2Corinthians11:28 Hamwe na macio mothe-rĩ
2Corinthians11:29 Nũũ ũngĩkorwo aagĩte hinya
2Corinthians11:30 Angĩkorwo no nginya ndĩĩrahe
2Corinthians11:31 Ngai
2Corinthians11:32 Kũu Dameski
2Corinthians11:33 No nĩndoimĩirio ndirica
2Corinthians12:1 No nginya thiĩ na mbere na kwĩraha. O na gũtuĩka gwĩka ũguo gũtirĩ uumithio-rĩ
2Corinthians12:2 Nĩnjũũĩ mũndũ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ
2Corinthians12:3 Na nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũndũ ũcio
2Corinthians12:4 nĩoirwo agĩtwarwo kũrĩa andũ arĩa metĩkĩtie mathiiaga
2Corinthians12:5 Nĩngwĩraha nĩ ũndũ wa mũndũ ta ũcio
2Corinthians12:6 O na ingĩenda kwĩraha-rĩ
2Corinthians12:7 Nĩguo ndikanae gwĩtũũgĩria nĩ ũndũ wa ũguũrio mũnene ũguo-rĩ
2Corinthians12:8 Nĩndathaithire Mwathani mahinda matatũ anjehererie mũigua ũcio.
2Corinthians12:9 Nowe akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
2Corinthians12:10 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmaga ngenagĩre kwaga hinya
2Corinthians12:11 Nĩndĩĩtuĩte kĩrimũ
2Corinthians12:12 Maũndũ marĩa matũmaga mũndũ amenywo atĩ nĩ mũtũmwo-rĩ
2Corinthians12:13 Inyuĩ mwakĩrĩ anini gũkĩra makanitha marĩa mangĩ nakĩ
2Corinthians12:14 Rĩu nĩndĩhaarĩirie kũmũceerera ihinda rĩa gatatũ
2Corinthians12:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio no ngene kũhũthĩra kĩrĩa gĩothe ndĩ nakĩo nĩ ũndũ wanyu
2Corinthians12:16 No o na gũtariĩ o ũguo-rĩ
2Corinthians12:17 Hihi nĩndamũhatĩrĩirie na ũndũ wa mũndũ o na ũmwe wa arĩa ndamũtũmĩire?
2Corinthians12:18 Nĩndaringĩrĩirie Tito oke kũrĩ inyuĩ
2Corinthians12:19 Hihi ihinda rĩĩrĩ rĩothe mũkoretwo mũgĩĩciiria atĩ nĩ gwĩciirĩrĩra tũkoretwo tũgĩciirĩrĩra harĩ inyuĩ? Tũkoretwo tũkĩaria mbere ya Ngai ta andũ marĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ; na rĩrĩ
2Corinthians12:20 Nĩgũkorwo nĩndĩretigĩra
2Corinthians12:21 Ngwĩtigĩra atĩ rĩrĩa ngooka kũu rĩngĩ
2Corinthians13:1 Rĩrĩ nĩ riita rĩa gatatũ gũũka kwanyu. Ũhoro o wothe no nginya ũrũgamĩrĩrwo nĩ ũira wa andũ eerĩ kana atatũ.
2Corinthians13:2 Nĩndamũkaanirie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaarĩ na inyuĩ riita rĩa keerĩ. O na rĩu nĩngũmũkaania o rĩngĩ
2Corinthians13:3 tondũ nĩmũrenda kũmenya kĩhooto kĩa atĩ nĩ Kristũ waragia na kanua gakwa. We ndamwĩkagĩra maũndũ ta atarĩ na hinya
2Corinthians13:4 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ ma nĩambirwo mũtharaba-inĩ atarĩ na hinya
2Corinthians13:5 Mwĩgeriei
2Corinthians13:6 Na nĩngwĩhoka atĩ nĩmũrĩona atĩ ithuĩ tũtigwĩte kĩgeranio.
2Corinthians13:7 Na rĩu tũkũhooya Ngai atĩ mũtikae gwĩka ũndũ o na ũmwe mũũru. Ti atĩ nĩguo andũ monage atĩ nĩtwĩtĩkĩrĩtwo nĩwe
2Corinthians13:8 Nĩgũkorwo tũtingĩhota gwĩka ũndũ ũreganĩte na ũhoro wa ma
2Corinthians13:9 Tũkoragwo na gĩkeno rĩrĩa rĩothe tũtarĩ na hinya
2Corinthians13:10 Gĩtũmi kĩrĩa kĩratũma nyandĩke maũndũ maya o na itarĩ hamwe na inyuĩ-rĩ
2Corinthians13:11 Na rĩu ngĩrĩkia-rĩ
2Corinthians13:12 O mũndũ nĩageithie ũrĩa ũngĩ na ngeithi theru cia kĩmumunyano.
2Corinthians13:13 Andũ arĩa othe aamũre nĩmamũgeithia.
2Corinthians13:14 Wega wa Mwathani Jesũ Kristũ
Galatians1:1 Nĩ niĩ mũtũmwo Paũlũ
Galatians1:2 Niĩ hamwe na ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ othe arĩa tũrĩ nao
Galatians1:3 Mũrogĩa na wega na thayũ iria ciumĩte kũrĩ Ngai Ithe witũ
Galatians1:4 ũrĩa werutire nĩ ũndũ wa mehia maitũ nĩguo atũhonokie kuuma kũrĩ mahinda maya tũrĩ
Galatians1:5 nake arotũũra akumagio nginya tene na tene. Ameni.
Galatians1:6 Niĩ nĩkũgega ndĩragega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mũrahiũha gũtigana na ũrĩa wamwĩtire na ũndũ wa wega wa Kristũ
Galatians1:7 naguo ti Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega o na atĩa. No nĩ kũrĩ andũ maramũhĩngĩĩca makĩenda gũthũkia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa Kristũ.
Galatians1:8 No rĩrĩ
Galatians1:9 O ta ũrĩa tũmwĩrĩte
Galatians1:10 Atĩrĩrĩ
Galatians1:11 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Galatians1:12 Ũhoro ũcio ndiaheirwo nĩ mũndũ
Galatians1:13 Nĩgũkorwo nĩmũiguĩte ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yakwa ya tene
Galatians1:14 Niĩ ha ũhoro wa maũndũ makoniĩ ndini ya Ayahudi
Galatians1:15 No rĩrĩ
Galatians1:16 anguũrĩrie Mũriũ nĩgeetha hunjagĩrie andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ ũhoro wake; gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndaahoire kĩrĩra
Galatians1:17 o na ndiambatire Jerusalemu kuonana na arĩa maarĩ atũmwo mbere yakwa
Galatians1:18 Na rĩrĩ
Galatians1:19 Tũtionanire na atũmwo acio angĩ
Galatians1:20 Ũhoro ũyũ ndĩramwandĩkĩra
Galatians1:21 Thuutha ũcio nĩndacookire ngĩthiĩ Suriata na Kilikia.
Galatians1:22 Niĩ mwene ndiamenyekete nĩ makanitha ma Judea marĩa marĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ.
Galatians1:23 No kũigua maiguaga atĩrĩ
Galatians1:24 Nao makĩgooca Ngai nĩ ũndũ wakwa.
Galatians2:1 Mĩaka ikũmi na ĩna yathira nĩndambatire rĩngĩ Jerusalemu
Galatians2:2 Ndathiire tondũ Ngai nĩanguũrĩirie thiĩ kuo
Galatians2:3 No o na Tito
Galatians2:4 Ũhoro ũyũ wa kũrua wagĩire ho tondũ nĩ kwarĩ na ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ a maheeni arĩa maatoonyete gatagatĩ gaitũ na hitho marĩ athigaani nĩguo matuĩrie ũhoro wa wĩyathi ũrĩa tũkoragwo naguo tũrĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ Jesũ
Galatians2:5 Tũtietĩkĩrire ũhoro wao o na hanini
Galatians2:6 Nao andũ arĩa moonekaga taarĩ o anene-rĩ
Galatians2:7 O na rĩrĩ
Galatians2:8 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ũrĩa warutaga wĩra thĩinĩ wa ũtungata wa Petero arĩ mũtũmwo kũrĩ Ayahudi
Galatians2:9 Ningĩ Jakubu
Galatians2:10 Ũndũ ũrĩa maatwĩrire twĩkage nĩ atĩ tũririkanage athĩĩni na noguo ũndũ ũrĩa niĩ mwene ndaarĩ na kĩyo gĩa gwĩka.
Galatians2:11 Na rĩrĩ
Galatians2:12 Andũ amwe moimĩte kũrĩ Jakubu matanakinya-rĩ
Galatians2:13 O na Ayahudi arĩa angĩ makĩnyiitanĩra na Petero ũhinga-inĩ wake
Galatians2:14 Rĩrĩa ndonire atĩ matiekaga kũringana na ma ya Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
Galatians2:15 “Ithuĩ arĩa tũciarĩtwo tũrĩ Ayahudi na tũtarĩ ehia ta andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ-rĩ
Galatians2:16 nĩtũũĩ atĩ mũndũ ndatuĩkaga mũthingu nĩ ũndũ wa gwathĩkĩra watho
Galatians2:17 “Angĩgĩkorwo rĩrĩa tũgũcaria gũtuuo athingu nĩ Kristũ kuonanagia atĩ ithuĩ ene tũrĩ ehia-rĩ
Galatians2:18 Angĩkorwo nĩ ngwaka rĩngĩ kĩrĩa ndaanangire-rĩ
Galatians2:19 Nĩgũkorwo na ũndũ wa watho nĩndakuĩrĩire watho ũcio nĩguo ndũũre muoyo ndĩ wa Ngai.
Galatians2:20 Niĩ nĩndĩkĩtie kwambanĩrio hamwe na Kristũ
Galatians2:21 Ndingĩĩtĩkĩra gũtua wega wa Ngai kĩndũ gĩa tũhũ
Galatians3:1 Atĩrĩrĩ inyuĩ Agalatia aya akĩĩgu! Mũrogetwo nũũ? O inyuĩ muonirio wega Jesũ Kristũ arĩ mwambe mũtĩ igũrũ.
Galatians3:2 No nyende kũmenya ũndũ ũmwe tu kuuma kũrĩ inyuĩ: Mwaheirwo Roho nĩ ũndũ wa gwathĩkĩra watho
Galatians3:3 Kaĩ mũrĩ akĩĩgu atĩa? Mwambĩrĩirie na Roho wa Ngai
Galatians3:4 Anga mwathĩĩnirio na maũndũ maingĩ ũguo o tũhũ
Galatians3:5 Wee Ngai amũheaga Roho wake na akaringaga ciama gatagatĩ kanyu nĩ ũndũ wanyu gwathĩkĩra watho
Galatians3:6 Ta ririkanai ũhoro wa Iburahĩmu
Galatians3:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kĩmenyei atĩ andũ arĩa metĩkĩtie nĩo ciana cia Iburahĩmu.
Galatians3:8 Na tondũ Maandĩko marĩa matheru nĩmooigĩte o mbere atĩ Ngai nĩagatua andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ athingu na ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia-rĩ
Galatians3:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ arĩa metĩkĩtie nĩmarathimanagĩrio hamwe na Iburahĩmu
Galatians3:10 Andũ arĩa othe mehokaga ũhoro wa gwathĩkĩra watho-rĩ
Galatians3:11 Nĩtũũĩ wega atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩtuuo mũthingu mbere ya Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa gwathĩkĩra watho
Galatians3:12 No watho-rĩ
Galatians3:13 Nake Kristũ nĩatũkũũrire agĩtũruta kĩrumi-inĩ kĩa watho na ũndũ wake mwene gũtuĩka kĩrumi ithenya riitũ
Galatians3:14 Aatũkũũrire nĩguo kĩrathimo kĩrĩa Iburahĩmu aarathimĩtwo nakĩo gĩkinyĩre andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ na ũndũ wa Kristũ Jesũ
Galatians3:15 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Galatians3:16 Maũndũ marĩa meranĩirwo
Galatians3:17 Ũrĩa ndĩrenda kuuga nĩ atĩrĩ: Watho
Galatians3:18 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Galatians3:19 Watho-rĩ
Galatians3:20 No rĩrĩ
Galatians3:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Galatians3:22 No Maandĩko moigaga atĩ andũ a thĩ nĩ mohetwo nĩ mehia
Galatians3:23 Ũhoro wa gwĩtĩkia ũtanooka-rĩ
Galatians3:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio watho nĩguo waheirwo ũhoti wa gũtũtwara kũrĩ Kristũ
Galatians3:25 Na rĩrĩ
Galatians3:26 Inyuothe mũrĩ ciana cia Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia Kristũ Jesũ
Galatians3:27 nĩgũkorwo inyuothe arĩa mwabatithirio thĩinĩ wa Kristũ nĩmwĩhumbĩte Kristũ.
Galatians3:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gũtingĩcooka gũthuuranio Mũyahudi kana Mũyunani
Galatians3:29 Angĩkorwo mũrĩ a Kristũ-rĩ
Galatians4:1 Ũrĩa ndĩroiga nĩ atĩrĩ
Galatians4:2 Nĩ gwathwo athagwo nĩ amũrori hamwe na aramati a indo ciake
Galatians4:3 Ũguo noguo o na ithuĩ
Galatians4:4 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩru kũna rĩakinyire
Galatians4:5 nĩguo akũũre andũ arĩa matũire mathagwo nĩ watho
Galatians4:6 Tondũ inyuĩ mũrĩ ciana ciake-rĩ
Galatians4:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Galatians4:8 Tene rĩrĩa mũtooĩ Ngai-rĩ
Galatians4:9 No rĩrĩ
Galatians4:10 Nĩmũrũmĩtie ũhoro wa mĩthenya mĩamũre
Galatians4:11 Ndĩ na kĩeha mũno tondũ gũkuoneka atĩ wĩra ũrĩa wothe ndanenogia naguo nĩ ũndũ wanyu nĩ wa tũhũ!
Galatians4:12 Ndamũthaitha
Galatians4:13 O ta ũrĩa mũũĩ
Galatians4:14 O na gũtuĩka ndwari yakwa yarĩ magerio kũrĩ inyuĩ
Galatians4:15 Kaĩ ũndũ ũcio watũmaga mũkene ũthiĩte kũ? Niĩ ndĩ mũira atĩ
Galatians4:16 Kaĩ rĩu nduĩkĩte thũ yanyu nĩ ũndũ wa kũmũhe ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma?
Galatians4:17 Andũ acio me na kĩyo magĩcaria ũrĩa mũngĩtuĩka a thiritũ yao
Galatians4:18 Nĩ wega kũgĩa na kĩyo
Galatians4:19 Ciana ciakwa nyendete mũno
Galatians4:20 naarĩ korwo ndakorwo hamwe na inyuĩ ta rĩu
Galatians4:21 Ta njĩĩrai
Galatians4:22 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩ
Galatians4:23 Mũriũ wake wa mũtumia ũrĩa warĩ ngombo aaciarĩtwo na njĩra ya ũndũire; no mũriũ ũrĩa waciarĩtwo nĩ mũtumia ũcio ũtaarĩ ngombo aaciarĩtwo na ũndũ wa kũhingia kĩĩranĩro.
Galatians4:24 Namo maũndũ macio nĩ ma ngerekano
Galatians4:25 Na rĩrĩ

Galatians4:29 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Galatians4:30 No rĩrĩ

Galatians5:1 Kristũ nĩgũtuohora aatuohorire nĩguo tũgĩe na wĩyathi. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Galatians5:2 Ta thikĩrĩriai ciugo ciakwa! Niĩ Paũlũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Galatians5:3 Ningĩ nĩngũmwĩra o rĩngĩ atĩ mũndũ o wothe ũngĩtĩkĩra kũrua
Galatians5:4 Inyuĩ arĩa mũrageria gũtuĩka athingu nĩ ũndũ wa watho-rĩ
Galatians5:5 No ithuĩ-rĩ
Galatians5:6 Nĩgũkorwo thĩinĩ wa Kristũ Jesũ
Galatians5:7 Nĩmũratengʼagĩra ihenya rĩega. Nũũ wamũgiririe mũgĩtiga gũcooka gwathĩkĩra ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma?
Galatians5:8 Kũringĩrĩrio kwa mũthemba ũcio gũtiumĩte kũrĩ ũrĩa wamwĩtire.
Galatians5:9 “Ndawa nini tu ya kũimbia mĩgate nĩĩtũmaga mũtu ũrĩa mũkande nayo wothe ũimbe.”
Galatians5:10 Nĩndĩhokete thĩinĩ wa Mwathani atĩ inyuĩ mũtikũgarũrũka mũgĩe na meciiria mangĩ. Ũrĩa ũramũtururia nĩwe ũkaaherithio o na angĩkorwo arĩ ũ.
Galatians5:11 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Galatians5:12 No nyende andũ acio mamũthĩĩnagia mathiĩ na mbere o nginya mehakũre.
Galatians5:13 Inyuĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Galatians5:14 Tondũ-rĩ
Galatians5:15 No rĩrĩ
Galatians5:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nguuga atĩrĩ
Galatians5:17 Nĩgũkorwo mwĩrĩ nĩwĩriragĩria maũndũ marĩa matangĩendwo nĩ Roho
Galatians5:18 No rĩrĩ
Galatians5:19 Na rĩrĩ
Galatians5:20 na kũhooya mĩhianano
Galatians5:21 gũcumĩkĩra na kũrĩĩo nĩ njoohi
Galatians5:22 No rĩrĩ
Galatians5:23 na ũhooreri
Galatians5:24 Nao andũ arĩa marĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ Jesũ nĩmambithĩtie mĩĩrĩ yao mũtĩ-igũrũ hamwe na thuti ciayo na merirĩria mayo.
Galatians5:25 Angĩkorwo tũtũire muoyo nĩ ũndũ wa Roho-rĩ
Galatians5:26 Rekei tũtige gwĩtĩĩa
Galatians6:1 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
Galatians6:2 Teithanagiai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ maũndũ marĩa mamũritũhagĩra
Galatians6:3 Mũndũ angĩĩciiria atĩ we nĩ wa bata hĩndĩ ĩrĩa atarĩ kĩene-rĩ
Galatians6:4 O mũndũ nĩarorage wĩra wake mwene. Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ahote kwĩraha
Galatians6:5 nĩgũkorwo o mũndũ no nginya akuue mũrigo wake.
Galatians6:6 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũrutagwo ũhoro wa Ngai nĩagayanage indo ciothe iria njega na mũmũruti.
Galatians6:7 Mũtikanaheenio: Ngai ndangĩnyũrũrio. Kĩrĩa mũndũ ahaandaga no kĩo agethaga.
Galatians6:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhaandaga maũndũ ma gũkenia merirĩria ma mwĩrĩ-rĩ
Galatians6:9 Ningĩ tũtikanogio nĩ gwĩka wega
Galatians6:10 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Galatians6:11 Onei ũrĩa ndĩramwandĩkĩra marũa maya na ndemwa nene na guoko gwakwa mwene!
Galatians6:12 Andũ acio mendaga kwĩonania atĩ nĩagĩrĩru makĩonwo-rĩ
Galatians6:13 O na acio maruaga matiathĩkagĩra watho
Galatians6:14 No niĩ-rĩ
Galatians6:15 Kũrua kana kwaga kũrua gũtirĩ bata; kĩrĩa kĩrĩ bata nĩ mũndũ agarũrũke atuĩke kĩũmbe kĩerũ.
Galatians6:16 Thayũ na kũiguĩrwo tha kũrogĩa na andũ arĩa marũmagĩrĩra wathani ũyũ
Galatians6:17 Ngĩrĩkĩrĩria nguuga atĩrĩ
Galatians6:18 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ ũrogĩa na maroho manyu
Ephesians1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
Ephesians1:2 Wega na thayũ kuuma kũrĩ Ngai Ithe witũ
Ephesians1:3 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ephesians1:4 Nĩgũkorwo o na thĩ ĩtanombwo
Ephesians1:5 Ngai nĩatuĩte o mbere atĩ nĩtũgaatuĩka ciana ciake nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ Kristũ
Ephesians1:6 nĩguo wega wake ũrĩa ũrĩ riiri ũkumagio
Ephesians1:7 Na twakũũrirwo na ũndũ wa thakame ya Kristũ
Ephesians1:8 wega ũcio aatũingĩhĩirie arĩ na ũũgĩ na ũmenyo wothe.
Ephesians1:9 Nake agĩtũmenyithia hitho ya wendi wake
Ephesians1:10 nĩguo ũkaahingio rĩrĩa mahinda marĩa magĩrĩire magaakinya
Ephesians1:11 Ningĩ nĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ o na ithuĩ twamũkĩrire igai kuuma kũrĩ Ngai
Ephesians1:12 nĩguo o na ithuĩ arĩa twarĩ a mbere kwĩhoka Kristũ
Ephesians1:13 Inyuĩ o na inyuĩ nĩmwataranĩirio na Kristũ mwarĩkia kũigua ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma
Ephesians1:14 Nake Roho nĩwe mũrũgamĩrĩri wa kuonania atĩ nĩtũkagaĩrwo igai riitũ nginya rĩrĩa andũ arĩa marĩ a Ngai magaatuĩka a gũkũũrwo
Ephesians1:15 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ephesians1:16 ndirĩ ndatigithĩria gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Ephesians1:17 Hooyaga atĩ Ngai wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ
Ephesians1:18 Ningĩ nĩhooyaga atĩ maitho manyu ma ngoro mathererwo nĩ ũtheri
Ephesians1:19 o na ũhoti wake mũnene ũtangĩgereka nĩ ũndũ witũ
Ephesians1:20 ũrĩa eekĩrire thĩinĩ wa Kristũ rĩrĩa aamũriũkirie kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ
Ephesians1:21 na agatũũgĩrio mũno igũrũ rĩa wathani o wothe na ũhoti wothe
Ephesians1:22 Nake Ngai akĩiga maũndũ mothe rungu rwa magũrũ make
Ephesians1:23 Kanitha nĩguo mwĩrĩ wake
Ephesians2:1 O na inyuĩ-rĩ
Ephesians2:2 marĩa mwatũũraga thĩinĩ wamo rĩrĩa mwarũmagĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ya thĩ ĩno na mĩthiĩre ya mwathi wa ũthamaki wa rĩera-inĩ
Ephesians2:3 O na ithuĩ ithuothe-rĩ
Ephesians2:4 No tondũ wa wendo wake mũnene harĩ ithuĩ
Ephesians2:5 nĩatũmire tũgĩe na muoyo hamwe na Kristũ o rĩrĩa twarĩ akuũ nĩ ũndũ wa mehia maitũ tondũ nĩ wega wa Ngai watũmire mũhonokio.
Ephesians2:6 Nake Ngai agĩtũriũkanĩria hamwe na Kristũ na agĩtũikaria thĩ hamwe nake kũu igũrũ tũrĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristũ Jesũ.
Ephesians2:7 Eekire ũguo nĩgeetha matukũ marĩa magooka onanie kũrĩ ithuĩ wega wake mũingĩ ũrĩa ũtangĩgereka kũrĩ ithuĩ
Ephesians2:8 Nĩ ũndũ nĩ wega wa Ngai watũmire mũhonokio nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia
Ephesians2:9 na ti ũndũ wa mawĩra marĩa mwanaruta
Ephesians2:10 Nĩgũkorwo ithuĩ tũrĩ wĩra wa moko ma Ngai
Ephesians2:11 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Ephesians2:12 ririkanai atĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo mwatũũrĩte mwamũranĩtio na Kristũ
Ephesians2:13 No rĩu
Ephesians2:14 Nĩgũkorwo we mwene nĩwe thayũ witũ
Ephesians2:15 nĩ ũndũ nĩaniinire watho hamwe na maathani maguo
Ephesians2:16 na nĩgeetha thĩinĩ wa mwĩrĩ ũcio ũmwe
Ephesians2:17 Kristũ ookire akĩmũhunjĩria thayũ inyuĩ arĩa mwarĩ kũraya
Ephesians2:18 Na thĩinĩ wake ithuĩ a iruka icio cierĩ nĩtũkinyaga kũrĩ Ithe witũ na ũndũ wa Roho o ro ũmwe.
Ephesians2:19 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo
Ephesians2:20 mũgagĩakwo igũrũ rĩa mũthingi wa atũmwo na anabii
Ephesians2:21 Thĩinĩ wake mwako wothe nĩũnyiitanĩte
Ephesians2:22 Na nĩ thĩinĩ wake o na inyuĩ mũraakwo hamwe nĩguo mũtuĩke gĩikaro gĩa gũikarwo nĩ Ngai na ũndũ wa Roho wake.
Ephesians3:1 Nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi gĩkĩ
Ephesians3:2 Ti-itherũ nĩmũiguĩte ũhoro wa ũrĩa ndaheirwo ũtungata wa wega wa Ngai nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Ephesians3:3 na nĩguo ũhoro wa hitho ũrĩa ndaamenyithirio na ũndũ wa kũguũrĩrio nĩ Ngai
Ephesians3:4 Mwathoma ũhoro ũyũ
Ephesians3:5 ũrĩa ũtaamenyithirio andũ a njiarwa ingĩ
Ephesians3:6 Naguo mũbango wa Ngai nĩ atĩ
Ephesians3:7 Ndaatuĩkire ndungata ya Ũhoro-ũcio-Mwega nĩ ũndũ wa kĩheo kĩrĩa ndaaheirwo kĩa wega wa Ngai hotithĩtio nĩ hinya wake.
Ephesians3:8 O na gũtuĩka nĩ niĩ mũnini mũno harĩ andũ a Ngai othe

Ephesians3:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũmũthaitha mũtikoorwo nĩ hinya tondũ wa mĩnyamaro ĩrĩa ndĩranyariirwo nayo nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Ephesians3:14 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga ndurie ndu ndĩ mbere ya Ithe witũ

Ephesians3:18 nĩguo mũgĩe na hinya

Philippians4:11 Ndiroiga ũguo nĩ ũndũ nĩmbataire
Philippians4:12 Nĩmenyete ũhoro wa gũikara ndĩ mũkĩaru

Philippians4:21 Geithiai andũ othe arĩa aamũre thĩinĩ wa Kristũ Jesũ. Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ arĩa tũrĩ nao nĩmamũgeithia.
Philippians4:22 Andũ othe arĩa aamũre nĩmamũgeithia
Philippians4:23 Wega wa Mwathani Jesũ Kristũ ũrogĩa na maroho manyu. Ameni.
Colossians1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
Colossians1:2 Tũramũtũmĩra marũa maya inyuĩ andũ arĩa aamũre
Colossians1:3 Hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa tũkũmũhoera
Colossians1:4 tondũ nĩtũiguĩte ũhoro wa ũrĩa mwĩtĩkĩtie Kristũ Jesũ
Colossians1:5 naguo nĩ wĩtĩkio na wendani iria ciumanaga na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩrĩa mũigĩirwo kũu igũrũ na kĩrĩa mũrĩkĩtie kũigua ũhoro wakĩo thĩinĩ wa ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma
Colossians1:6 ũrĩa ũmũkinyĩire. Kũndũ guothe gũkũ thĩ Ũhoro-ũyũ-Mwega nĩũraciara maciaro na nĩũratheerema
Colossians1:7 Mwamenyire ũhoro ũcio kuuma kũrĩ Epafara
Colossians1:8 na nowe ũtũheete ũhoro wa ũrĩa mwendaine mũrĩ thĩinĩ wa Roho.
Colossians1:9 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Colossians1:10 Na tũhooyaga ũguo nĩguo mũhote gũtũũra mũtũũrĩre ũringaine na ũrĩa Mwathani endaga na mũmũkenagie maũndũ-inĩ mothe: mũciarage maciaro mawĩra-inĩ mothe mega marĩa mũrutaga
Colossians1:11 mũgĩĩkagĩrwo hinya na ũhoti wothe kũringana na hinya wake ũrĩ na riiri nĩgeetha mũhote gũkiragĩrĩria mũno mũtegũthethũka na mũrĩ na gĩkeno
Colossians1:12 na mũgĩcookagĩria Ithe witũ ngaatho
Colossians1:13 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai nĩatũhonoketie
Colossians1:14 thĩinĩ wake-rĩ
Colossians1:15 Ũcio nĩwe mũhianĩre wa Ngai ũrĩa ũtonekaga
Colossians1:16 Nĩgũkorwo nĩwe wombire indo ciothe: indo iria irĩ igũrũ na iria irĩ thĩ
Colossians1:17 Kristũ nĩwe warĩ kuo mbere ya indo ciothe
Colossians1:18 Ningĩ nĩwe mũtwe wa mwĩrĩ
Colossians1:19 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai nĩoonire arĩ wega atĩ ũiyũru wa Ngai wothe ũikare thĩinĩ wake
Colossians1:20 na nĩ ũndũ wa Kristũ indo ciothe ituĩke cia kũiguithanio na Ngai
Colossians1:21 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe inyuĩ mwatũire mwamũranĩtio na Ngai na mwarĩ thũ ciake meciiria-inĩ manyu nĩ ũndũ wa mĩtugo yanyu mĩũru.
Colossians1:22 No rĩu nĩamũiguithanĩtie na Kristũ na ũndũ wa ũrĩa aakuire arĩ na mwĩrĩ nĩgeetha amũrũgamie mbere yake mũrĩ atheru
Colossians1:23 mũngĩthiĩ na mbere na gwĩtĩkia mwĩhaandĩte na mũrĩ arũmu
Colossians1:24 Na rĩu nĩngenete nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa thĩĩnĩtio namo nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Colossians1:25 Na niĩ ndaatuirwo ndungata yaguo na ũndũ wa gũtũmwo nĩ Ngai ndĩmũrehere ũhoro wa Ngai mũũmenye kũna
Colossians1:26 na nĩ guo hitho ĩrĩa ĩtũire ĩrĩ hithe kuuma o tene
Colossians1:27 O acio nĩo Ngai oonire arĩ wega kũmenyithia hitho ya ũtonga ũrĩa ũrĩ riiri kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ
Colossians1:28 Ũcio nĩwe tũhunjagia
Colossians1:29 Nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi kĩu nĩndĩĩnogagia
Colossians2:1 Nĩngwenda mũmenye ũrĩa ndĩĩgiaga nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Colossians2:2 Ndĩĩgiaga ũguo nĩgeetha magĩe na ũmĩrĩru wa ngoro na magĩe na ũrũmwe mohanĩtio nĩ wendani
Colossians2:3 ũrĩa thĩinĩ wake kũhithĩtwo mĩthiithũ yothe ya ũũgĩ na ũmenyo.
Colossians2:4 Ndĩramwĩra ũguo nĩgeetha mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakanamũheenie na ngarari cia mawara.
Colossians2:5 Nĩgũkorwo o na ndatuĩka ndirĩ hamwe na inyuĩ thĩinĩ wa mwĩrĩ
Colossians2:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Colossians2:7 mũhaandĩtwo na mũgaakwo thĩinĩ wake
Colossians2:8 Mwĩmenyererei mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakanamũtahe meciiria na maũũgĩ ma maheeni ma tũhũ
Colossians2:9 Nĩgũkorwo ũiyũru wothe wa Ũngai ũtũũraga thĩinĩ wa Kristũ arĩ na mwĩrĩ
Colossians2:10 na inyuĩ nĩmũiyũrĩtwo nĩ muoyo thĩinĩ wa Kristũ
Colossians2:11 O na inyuĩ nĩmwaruire thĩinĩ wake
Colossians2:12 Nĩgũkorwo nĩgũthikwo mwathikirwo hamwe nake rĩrĩa mwabatithirio
Colossians2:13 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwakuĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mehia manyu na mũgaikara ta mũtaruĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mũtũũrĩre wanyu wa mehia-rĩ
Colossians2:14 na aarĩkia gũtharia watho ũrĩa warĩ mwandĩke hamwe na mũtabarĩre waguo
Colossians2:15 Thuutha wa gũtooria maahinya na monene macio-rĩ
Colossians2:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtikanareke mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ amũtuĩre ciira nĩ ũndũ wa irio iria mũrĩĩaga
Colossians2:17 Maũndũ macio no kĩĩruru kĩa maũndũ marĩa magooka; no rĩrĩ
Colossians2:18 Mũtikanareke mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Colossians2:19 Mũndũ ta ũcio ndegwatanĩtie na Mũtwe
Colossians2:20 Atĩrĩrĩ
Colossians2:21 Namo nĩ ta maya: “Ndũkanyiite! Ndũgacame! Ndũkahutie!”
Colossians2:22 Maũndũ macio mothe maraaria ũhoro wa indo iria ithiraga bata ciarĩkia kũhũthĩrwo
Colossians2:23 Ti-itherũ
Colossians3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Colossians3:2 Meciiria manyu nĩmeciiragie maũndũ marĩa ma igũrũ
Colossians3:3 Nĩgũkorwo nĩmwakuire
Colossians3:4 Na rĩrĩa Kristũ
Colossians3:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Colossians3:6 Tondũ wa maũndũ macio
Colossians3:7 O na inyuĩ mwatũire mũthiiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩyo mũtũũrĩre-inĩ ũrĩa mwatũũraga mbere ĩyo.
Colossians3:8 No rĩu no nginya mwĩaũre maũndũ maya mothe
Colossians3:9 Tigagai kũheenania mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Colossians3:10 na mũkehumba mũndũ ũngĩ mwerũ
Colossians3:11 Na ũhoro-inĩ ũcio hatirĩ Mũyunani kana Mũyahudi
Colossians3:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Colossians3:13 Kiranagĩrĩriai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Colossians3:14 Ningĩ gũkĩra maũndũ macio mothe mega-rĩ
Colossians3:15 Rekei thayũ wa Kristũ wathanage ngoro-inĩ cianyu
Colossians3:16 Rekei ũhoro wa Kristũ ũtũũrage ũingĩhĩte mũno thĩinĩ wanyu
Colossians3:17 Na ũndũ ũrĩa wothe mũrĩĩkaga
Colossians3:18 Inyuĩ atumia-rĩ
Colossians3:19 Na inyuĩ athuuri-rĩ
Colossians3:20 O na inyuĩ ciana-rĩ
Colossians3:21 Na inyuĩ maithe-rĩ
Colossians3:22 Na inyuĩ ngombo-rĩ
Colossians3:23 Na rĩrĩ
Colossians3:24 mũkĩmenyaga atĩ nĩmũkaamũkĩra igai kuuma kũrĩ Mwathani rĩrĩ kĩheo kĩanyu. Nĩ Mwathani Kristũ mũtungatagĩra.
Colossians3:25 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wĩkaga ũũru nĩakarĩhwo kũringana na ũũru wake
Colossians4:1 Inyuĩ aathani-rĩ
Colossians4:2 Mwĩheanagei na kĩyo ũhoro-inĩ wa kũhooya
Colossians4:3 Na mũtũhooyagĩre o na ithuĩ
Colossians4:4 Hooyagai nĩgeetha ndĩũhunjagie na andũ magataũkĩrwo wega
Colossians4:5 Tuĩkagai oogĩ harĩ maũndũ marĩa mũrĩĩkaga andũ arĩa matarĩ a thiritũ yanyu; mũtegũte mweke ũrĩa mũrĩ naguo wa gwĩka wega.
Colossians4:6 Na mũkĩaria
Colossians4:7 Tukiko nĩakamũhe ũhoro wakwa wothe. Ũcio nĩ mũrũ wa Ithe witũ twendete mũno
Colossians4:8 Ndamũtũma kũrĩ inyuĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũyũ kĩũmbe
Colossians4:9 Megũũka na Onesimo
Colossians4:10 Nĩmwageithio nĩ Arisitariko ũrĩa tuohetwo nake
Colossians4:11 Jesũ ũrĩa wĩtagwo Jusito o nake nĩamũgeithia. Acio no-o Ayahudi thĩinĩ wa arĩa tũrutithanagia wĩra wa ũthamaki wa Ngai nao
Colossians4:12 Epafara
Colossians4:13 Niĩ ndĩ na ũira wake atĩ nĩarutaga wĩra na hinya
Colossians4:14 Nĩmwageithio nĩ Luka ũrĩa ndagĩtarĩ
Colossians4:15 Geithiai ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ kũu Laodikia
Colossians4:16 Na rĩrĩ
Colossians4:17 Na mwĩre Arikipo atĩrĩ: “No nginya wone atĩ nĩwarĩĩkia wĩra ũrĩa wamũkĩrire thĩinĩ wa Mwathani.”
Colossians4:18 Niĩ Paũlũ nĩ niĩ ndaandĩka ngeithi ici na guoko gwakwa. Ririkanai atĩ ndĩ muohe na mĩnyororo. Wega wa Ngai ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.
1Thessalonians1:1 Nĩ ithuĩ Paũlũ na Sila
1Thessalonians1:2 Nĩtũcookagĩria Ngai ngaatho hĩndĩ ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu inyuothe
1Thessalonians1:3 Rĩrĩa tũkũmũhoera tũrĩ mbere ya Ngai o we Ithe witũ-rĩ
1Thessalonians1:4 Nĩgũkorwo
1Thessalonians1:5 tondũ Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega tũhunjagia
1Thessalonians1:6 Inyuĩ mwatuĩkire a kwĩgerekania na ithuĩ
1Thessalonians1:7 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũgĩtuĩka kĩonereria kũrĩ andũ arĩa othe metĩkĩtie kũu Makedonia
1Thessalonians1:8 Naguo ũhoro wa Mwathani nĩwahunjire uumĩte kũrĩ inyuĩ
1Thessalonians1:9 nĩgũkorwo andũ o ene nĩo maheanaga ũhoro wa ũrĩa mwatũnyiitire ũgeni. Nĩmaheanaga ũhoro wa ũrĩa mwagarũrũkĩire Ngai
1Thessalonians1:10 na mwetagĩrĩre Mũriũ oime igũrũ
1Thessalonians2:1 Inyuĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
1Thessalonians2:2 Mbere ĩyo nĩtwathĩĩnirio na tũkĩrumwo rĩrĩa twarĩ kũu Filipi
1Thessalonians2:3 Nĩgũkorwo gũthaithana gwitũ gũtiumanĩte na ihĩtia
1Thessalonians2:4 No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians2:5 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ ithuĩ ti ndeto cia kwĩyendereria twaragia
1Thessalonians2:6 Ithuĩ tũtiacaragia kũganwo nĩ andũ
1Thessalonians2:7 no nĩtwaikarire na inyuĩ tũhooreire
1Thessalonians2:8 Nĩ tondũ wa ũrĩa twamwendete mũno
1Thessalonians2:9 Ti-itherũ nĩmũkũririkana
1Thessalonians2:10 Inyuĩ mũrĩ aira
1Thessalonians2:11 Ningĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ twekaga mũndũ o mũndũ wanyu o ta ũrĩa ithe wa ciana ekaga ciana ciake mwene
1Thessalonians2:12 tũkamũmagĩrĩria
1Thessalonians2:13 O na ningĩ nĩtũcookagĩria Ngai ngaatho tũtegũtigithĩria tondũ rĩrĩa mwamũkĩrire kiugo kĩa Ngai
1Thessalonians2:14 Nĩgũkorwo inyuĩ
1Thessalonians2:15 o arĩa mooragire Mwathani Jesũ
1Thessalonians2:16 nĩ ũndũ wa kũgeria gũtũgiria tũtikahunjĩrie andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ ũhoro nĩgeetha mahonoke. Ũguo nĩguo meyongagĩrĩra mehia makamaiyũrĩrĩra. Namo mangʼũrĩ ma Ngai nĩmamakinyĩire.
1Thessalonians2:17 No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians2:18 Nĩgũkorwo nĩtwendete mũno gũũka kũrĩ inyuĩ
1Thessalonians2:19 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Thessalonians2:20 Ti-itherũ
1Thessalonians3:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Thessalonians3:2 Tũgĩgĩtũma Timotheo ũrĩa mũrũ wa Ithe witũ
1Thessalonians3:3 nĩguo gũtikagĩe mũndũ ũngĩagagio nĩ magerio macio. Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ wega atĩ nĩmo twathĩrĩirio.
1Thessalonians3:4 Ti-itherũ o na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twarĩ na inyuĩ nĩtwamwĩraga kaingĩ atĩ no nginya tũnyariirwo. O ta ũrĩa mũũĩ atĩ ũguo noguo gwacookire gũgĩtuĩka.
1Thessalonians3:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Thessalonians3:6 No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians3:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Thessalonians3:8 Nĩgũkorwo rĩu tũgũtũũra muoyo kũna
1Thessalonians3:9 Tũngĩhota atĩa gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho cia kũigana nĩ ũndũ wanyu
1Thessalonians3:10 Nĩtũhooyaga ũtukũ na mũthenya na kĩyo kĩingĩ nĩgeetha tũkoonana na inyuĩ rĩngĩ na tũmũrehere kĩrĩa mũtarĩ nakĩo ũhoro-inĩ wa gwĩtĩkia kwanyu.
1Thessalonians3:11 Rĩu-rĩ
1Thessalonians3:12 Mwathani arotũma wendani wanyu wongerereke na ũiyũrĩrĩre harĩ o mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
1Thessalonians3:13 Ningĩ aroĩkĩra ngoro cianyu hinya nĩgeetha mũgaakorwo mũtarĩ na ũcuuke
1Thessalonians4:1 Naguo ũhoro wa kũrigĩrĩria
1Thessalonians4:2 Nĩgũkorwo nĩmũũĩ maũndũ marĩa twamũtaarire namo
1Thessalonians4:3 Tondũ rĩĩrĩ
1Thessalonians4:4 na atĩ o ũmwe wanyu amenye gwatha mwĩrĩ wake mwene ũikarage ũrĩ mũtheru na akĩũtĩĩaga
1Thessalonians4:5 atarĩ na merirĩria ma mwĩrĩ ta andũ a ndũrĩrĩ arĩa matooĩ Ngai;
1Thessalonians4:6 na atĩ ha ũhoro wa maũndũ macio
1Thessalonians4:7 Tondũ Ngai ndatwĩtĩire maũndũ ma waganu
1Thessalonians4:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Thessalonians4:9 Na rĩu-rĩ
1Thessalonians4:10 Na ti-itherũ
1Thessalonians4:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Thessalonians4:12 nĩgeetha mũtũũrĩre wanyu wa o mũthenya
1Thessalonians4:13 No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians4:14 Nĩtwĩtĩkĩtie atĩ Jesũ nĩakuire na akĩriũka
1Thessalonians4:15 Kũringana na kiugo kĩa Mwathani we mwene
1Thessalonians4:16 Thuutha wa ũguo
1Thessalonians4:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Thessalonians5:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians5:2 nĩgũkorwo nĩmũũĩ wega atĩ mũthenya wa Mwathani ũgooka o ta ũrĩa mũici okaga ũtukũ.
1Thessalonians5:3 O rĩrĩa andũ maroiga atĩrĩ
1Thessalonians5:4 No inyuĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
1Thessalonians5:5 Inyuĩ inyuothe mũrĩ ciana cia ũtheri na ciana cia mũthenya. Ithuĩ tũtirĩ a ũtukũ kana a nduma.
1Thessalonians5:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Thessalonians5:7 Nĩgũkorwo arĩa makomaga-rĩ
1Thessalonians5:8 No kuona atĩ ithuĩ tũrĩ a mũthenya-rĩ
1Thessalonians5:9 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ndaatwamũrire nĩguo tũtuĩke a kũrakarĩrwo
1Thessalonians5:10 We nĩatũkuĩrĩire nĩgeetha
1Thessalonians5:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Thessalonians5:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians5:13 Mekagĩrĩrei mũno makĩria na mũmendage nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra ũcio marutaga. Tũũranagiai na thayũ mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ.
1Thessalonians5:14 Na ningĩ nĩtũkũmũringĩrĩria
1Thessalonians5:15 Menyagĩrĩrai gũtikagĩe mũndũ ũkũrĩhĩria ũũru na ũũru
1Thessalonians5:16 Kenagai hĩndĩ ciothe;
1Thessalonians5:17 hooyagai mũtegũtigithĩria;
1Thessalonians5:18 cookagĩriai Ngai ngaatho maũndũ-inĩ mothe
1Thessalonians5:19 Mũtikanahorie mwaki wa Roho;
1Thessalonians5:20 mũtikanaire ũhoro ũrĩa ũrathagwo.
1Thessalonians5:21 Roranagiai maũndũ mothe. Rũmagiai maũndũ marĩa mega.
1Thessalonians5:22 Theemagai ũndũ o wothe mũũru.
1Thessalonians5:23 Ngai we mwene
1Thessalonians5:24 Ũrĩa ũmwĩtaga inyuĩ nĩ mwĩhokeku
1Thessalonians5:25 Ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
1Thessalonians5:26 Geithiai ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ othe na ngeithi theru cia kĩmumunyano.
1Thessalonians5:27 Nĩndamwatha ndĩ mbere ya Mwathani atĩ marũa maya mathomerwo ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ othe.
1Thessalonians5:28 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.
2Thessalonians1:1 Nĩ ithuĩ Paũlũ
2Thessalonians1:2 Wega na thayũ irogĩa na inyuĩ ciumĩte kũrĩ Ngai Ithe witũ
2Thessalonians1:3 Nĩtwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcookagĩria Ngai ngaatho hĩndĩ ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu
2Thessalonians1:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Thessalonians1:5 Maũndũ macio mothe nĩmonanagia atĩ itua rĩa Ngai rĩa ciira nĩ rĩa kĩhooto
2Thessalonians1:6 Ngai nĩ wa kĩhooto: We nĩakarĩha arĩa mamũthĩĩnagia na thĩĩna
2Thessalonians1:7 no inyuĩ arĩa mũtũire mũthĩĩnagio amũhe kĩhurũko
2Thessalonians1:8 Nake nĩakaherithia andũ arĩa matooĩ Ngai na matathĩkagĩra Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ.
2Thessalonians1:9 Nao nĩmakaherithio na kwanangwo kũrĩa gũtagathira
2Thessalonians1:10 mũthenya ũrĩa agooka nĩguo atũũgĩrio thĩinĩ wa andũ ake arĩa atheru
2Thessalonians1:11 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga tũmũhooyagĩre tũtegũtigithĩria
2Thessalonians1:12 Tũhooyaga ũguo nĩgeetha rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani witũ Jesũ rĩtũũgagĩrio thĩinĩ wanyu
2Thessalonians2:1 Atĩrĩrĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ
2Thessalonians2:2 atĩ mũtikahiũhe kwenyenyio kana mũhahũrwo nĩ ũrathi mũna
2Thessalonians2:3 Mũtikareke mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ amũheenie o na atĩa
2Thessalonians2:4 Nĩagokĩrĩra na etũũgĩrie igũrũ rĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩĩtanĩtio na Ngai na kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩhooyagwo
2Thessalonians2:5 Kaĩ mũtararirikana atĩ rĩrĩa ndarĩ hamwe na inyuĩ nĩndamwĩraga maũndũ macio?
2Thessalonians2:6 Na rĩu nĩmũũĩ kĩrĩa kĩgirĩtie mũndũ ũcio ooke na nĩgeetha akaaguũranĩrio ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire.
2Thessalonians2:7 Nĩgũkorwo ũhoro wa hitho wa kũregana na watho nĩũraruta wĩra; no nĩ kũrĩ ũrĩa ũgirĩrĩirie ũhoro ũcio woneke rĩu
2Thessalonians2:8 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo mũndũ ũcio mũregi watho akaaguũranĩrio. Mũndũ ũcio nĩwe Mwathani Jesũ akooraga na mĩhũmũ ya kanua gake
2Thessalonians2:9 Mũndũ ũcio mũregi watho nĩagooka kũringana na wĩra wa Shaitani ũrĩa wonekaga thĩinĩ wa mĩthemba yothe ya ciama cia maheeni
2Thessalonians2:10 o na ooke na mĩthemba yothe ya ũmaramari nĩguo aheenie andũ arĩa marĩ njĩra ya kũũra. Moraga tondũ nĩmaregire kwenda ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma nĩguo mahonokio.
2Thessalonians2:11 Na tondũ ũcio Ngai nĩamarehagĩra ũndũ wa hinya wa kũmahĩtithia
2Thessalonians2:12 na nĩgeetha andũ othe matuĩrwo ciira arĩa matetĩkĩtie ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma na makenagĩra maũndũ ma waganu.
2Thessalonians2:13 No rĩrĩ
2Thessalonians2:14 Aamwĩtĩire ũhoro ũyũ nĩ ũndũ wa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega ũrĩa twamũhunjĩirie nĩguo mũgĩe na riiri wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ.
2Thessalonians2:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Thessalonians2:16 Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ we mwene
2Thessalonians2:17 maroomĩrĩria ngoro cianyu
2Thessalonians3:1 Naguo Ũhoro wa kũrigĩrĩria-rĩ
2Thessalonians3:2 Na ningĩ mũhooyage nĩgeetha tũhonokio kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa aaganu o na ooru
2Thessalonians3:3 No Mwathani nĩmwĩhokeku
2Thessalonians3:4 Tũrĩ na mwĩhoko thĩinĩ wa Mwathani atĩ nĩmũreeka na nĩmũgũthiĩ na mbere gwĩka maũndũ marĩa twathanĩte.
2Thessalonians3:5 Mwathani arotongoria ngoro cianyu nĩguo mũgĩe na wendani wa Ngai na ũkirĩrĩria wa Kristũ.
2Thessalonians3:6 Na rĩrĩ
2Thessalonians3:7 Nĩgũkorwo inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwĩgerekania na ithuĩ. Ithuĩ tũtiarĩ igũũta rĩrĩa twatũire na inyuĩ
2Thessalonians3:8 o na tũtiigana kũrĩa irio cia mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ tũhũ. Handũ ha ũguo
2Thessalonians3:9 Twekaga ũguo
2Thessalonians3:10 Nĩgũkorwo o na rĩrĩa twatũire hamwe na inyuĩ nĩtwamũheire watho ũyũ: “Mũndũ angĩaga kũruta wĩra
2Thessalonians3:11 Nĩtũiguaga amwe thĩinĩ wanyu nĩ igũũta
2Thessalonians3:12 Andũ acio nĩo tũgwatha na tũkamaringĩrĩria thĩinĩ wa Mwathani Jesũ Kristũ atĩ makindĩrie
2Thessalonians3:13 Naho ha ũhoro wanyu
2Thessalonians3:14 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩaga gwathĩkĩra ũrutani witũ ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ wa marũa maya-rĩ
2Thessalonians3:15 No mũtikamũtue taarĩ thũ
2Thessalonians3:16 Na rĩu-rĩ
2Thessalonians3:17 Niĩ Paũlũ nĩ niĩ ndandĩka ngeithi ici na guoko gwakwa mwene
2Thessalonians3:18 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ inyuothe.
1Timothy1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ mũtũmwo wa Kristũ Jesũ nĩ ũndũ wa gwathwo nĩ Ngai Mũhonokia witũ o na nĩ Kristũ Jesũ ũrĩa arĩ we mwĩhoko witũ
1Timothy1:2 Ndĩrakwandĩkĩra marũa maya wee Timotheo
1Timothy1:3 O ta ũrĩa ndakũringĩrĩirie ngĩthiĩ Makedonia
1Timothy1:4 na ningĩ matigathikagĩrĩrie ngʼano cia tũhũ
1Timothy1:5 Muoroto wa watho ũyũ nĩ wendo
1Timothy1:6 Andũ amwe nĩmatiganĩte na ũhoro ũcio na makerekera mĩario-inĩ ya tũhũ.
1Timothy1:7 Mendaga gũtuĩka arutani a watho
1Timothy1:8 Nĩtũũĩ atĩ watho nĩ mwega mũndũ angĩũhũthĩra kũringana na ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire.
1Timothy1:9 O na ningĩ nĩtũũĩ atĩ watho ndũthondekeirwo andũ arĩa athingu no ũthondekeirwo arĩa moinaga watho na arĩa aremi
1Timothy1:10 o na nĩ ũndũ wa itharia na arĩa mogomagia mĩtugo
1Timothy1:11 ũrĩa ũringaine na Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega ũrĩ riiri wa Ngai ũrĩa mũrathime
1Timothy1:12 Nĩngũcookeria Kristũ Jesũ Mwathani witũ ngaatho
1Timothy1:13 O na gũtuĩka rĩmwe ndaarĩ mũrumi Ngai
1Timothy1:14 Naguo wega mũingĩ wa Mwathani witũ ũkĩnjiyũrĩrĩra
1Timothy1:15 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Timothy1:16 No nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi kĩu
1Timothy1:17 Na rĩu
1Timothy1:18 Wee Timotheo
1Timothy1:19 na ũtũũre ũrũmĩtie wĩtĩkio
1Timothy1:20 Amwe ao nĩ Humenayo
1Timothy2:1 Ningĩ
1Timothy2:2 Ningĩ mũhooyagĩre athamaki na arĩa othe mathanaga. Hooyagai nĩgeetha tũtũũrage na mũtũũrĩre wa thayũ na tũhooreire tũgĩtĩĩaga Ngai maũndũ-inĩ mothe na tũrĩ na ũtheru.
1Timothy2:3 Ũndũ ũcio nĩ mwega
1Timothy2:4 o we wendete andũ othe mahonokio na mamenye ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma.
1Timothy2:5 Nĩgũkorwo kũrĩ Ngai o ũmwe
1Timothy2:6 ũrĩa werutire atuĩke wa gũkũũra andũ othe. Naguo ũira wa ũhoro ũcio nĩwaheanirwo ihinda rĩaguo rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire rĩakinya.
1Timothy2:7 Na ũhoro ũcio nĩguo watũmire nduĩke mũhunjia o na mũtũmwo waguo na niĩ ndĩraaria ũhoro wa ma
1Timothy2:8 Ngwenda atĩ arũme mahoithagie kũndũ guothe moete moko matheru na igũrũ
1Timothy2:9 O na ningĩ ngwenda atĩ andũ-a-nja mehumbage wega na nguo itarĩ cia kwĩonania marĩ na mĩthiĩre yagĩrĩire
1Timothy2:10 no makoragwo marĩ na ciĩko njega
1Timothy2:11 Mũndũ-wa-nja aagĩrĩirwo erutage maũndũ akindĩirie na enyiihĩtie biũ.
1Timothy2:12 Ndingĩĩtĩkĩria mũndũ-wa-nja arutanage kana aathage mũndũ mũrũme; no nĩaikarage akindĩirie.
1Timothy2:13 Nĩgũkorwo Adamu nĩwe wombirwo mbere
1Timothy2:14 Ningĩ Adamu tiwe waheenirio; nĩ mũndũ-wa-nja waheenirio agĩtuĩka mwĩhia.
1Timothy2:15 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy3:1 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo wa kwĩhokeka: Atĩ mũndũ o wothe angĩĩrirĩria gũtuĩka mũrori wa maũndũ ma kanitha
1Timothy3:2 Rĩu-rĩ
1Timothy3:3 No ndagakorwo arĩ mũrĩĩu
1Timothy3:4 No nginya akorwo ahotete gwatha mũciĩ wake wega
1Timothy3:5 (Mũndũ angĩkorwo ndangĩhota gwatha mũciĩ wake mwene-rĩ
1Timothy3:6 Ningĩ ndagakorwo arĩ mũndũ mwerũ wĩtĩkio-inĩ ndakae kũgĩa na mwĩtĩĩo
1Timothy3:7 Ningĩ no nginya akorwo arĩ na ngumo njega kũrĩ andũ arĩa matarĩ a thiritũ iitũ
1Timothy3:8 Nao ateithĩrĩria a kanitha
1Timothy3:9 No nginya marũmie ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma wa wĩtĩkio ũrĩa mũrikĩru marĩ na thamiri itarĩ na mwĩcuuko.
1Timothy3:10 Nao mambe magerio; na thuutha ũcio marekwo matuĩke ateithĩrĩria a maũndũ ma kanitha maakorwo matarĩ na ũcuuke.
1Timothy3:11 O ũndũ ũmwe
1Timothy3:12 Mũteithĩrĩria wa kanitha no nginya akorwo arĩ mũthuuri wa mũtumia ũmwe
1Timothy3:13 Arĩa matungatĩte wega nĩmegĩagĩra na ngumo njega
1Timothy3:14 O na gũkorwo ndĩ na mwĩhoko atĩ nĩndĩrĩũka kũrĩ we narua-rĩ
1Timothy3:15 ingĩaga gũũka narua
1Timothy3:16 Na hatarĩ nganja
1Timothy4:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Timothy4:2 Morutani ta macio mahunjagio nĩ andũ arĩa marĩ ũhinga
1Timothy4:3 Acio nĩo makaanagia andũ kũhikania na makameera megirĩrĩrie kũrĩĩaga irio cia mĩthemba ĩmwe
1Timothy4:4 Tondũ-rĩ
1Timothy4:5 tondũ nĩkĩrĩkĩtie gũtherio nĩ kiugo kĩa Ngai na mahooya.
1Timothy4:6 Ũngĩruta ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ maũndũ maya-rĩ
1Timothy4:7 Reganaga na ngʼano cia tũhũ iria itarĩ cia gũtĩĩithia Ngai
1Timothy4:8 Nĩgũkorwo gwĩka maũndũ ma gwĩkĩra mwĩrĩ hinya nĩ ũrĩ bata waguo
1Timothy4:9 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo wa kwĩhokeka na nĩwagĩrĩire gwĩtĩkĩrĩka o biũ
1Timothy4:10 (na ũhoro ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga twĩrutanagĩrie na twĩnogagie)
1Timothy4:11 Athanaga atĩ maũndũ macio mekagwo.
1Timothy4:12 Ndũkanareke mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ akũire tondũ atĩ wĩ mũndũ mwĩthĩ
1Timothy4:13 Wĩheane gũthomagĩra andũ Maandĩko marĩa matheru
1Timothy4:14 Ndũkanaage kũhũthĩra kĩheo gĩaku kĩrĩa waheirwo na ũndũ wa mohoro marĩa maarathirwo
1Timothy4:15 Ĩkagĩra kĩyo harĩ maũndũ macio; wĩheane kũna kũrĩ mo
1Timothy4:16 Menyagĩrĩra wega mũtũũrĩre waku na ũrutani waku. Kiragĩrĩria thĩinĩ wa maũndũ macio
1Timothy5:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Timothy5:2 Atumia arĩa akũrũ
1Timothy5:3 Rũmbũyagia atumia arĩa a ndigwa kũna
1Timothy5:4 No mũtumia wa ndigwa angĩkorwo arĩ na ciana
1Timothy5:5 Mũtumia wa ndigwa ũrĩa ũbataire kũna
1Timothy5:6 No mũtumia wa ndigwa ũrĩa ũikaraga agĩĩkenagia
1Timothy5:7 Rutaga andũ maũndũ macio o namo
1Timothy5:8 Mũndũ wothe angĩaga gũteithia andũ ao
1Timothy5:9 Gũtirĩ mũtumia wa ndigwa wagĩrĩire kwandĩkwo mũtaratara-inĩ wa atumia a ndigwa atakinyĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ
1Timothy5:10 na akorwo nĩoĩkaine wega nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩkaga ciĩko njega
1Timothy5:11 Ha ũhoro wa atumia a ndigwa arĩa ethĩ-rĩ
1Timothy5:12 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo magatuĩka a gũtuĩrwo ciira
1Timothy5:13 Ningĩ
1Timothy5:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Timothy5:15 Ti-itherũ o na rĩu amwe ao nĩmarĩkĩtie kũgarũrũka na makarũmĩrĩra Shaitani.
1Timothy5:16 Mũndũ-wa-nja o wothe mwĩtĩkia angĩkorwo arĩ na atumia a ndigwa a nyũmba yake-rĩ
1Timothy5:17 Athuuri a kanitha arĩa matongoragia maũndũ ma kanitha wega nĩmagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũheo gĩtĩĩo mũno
1Timothy5:18 Nĩgũkorwo Maandĩko marĩa matheru moigĩte atĩrĩ
1Timothy5:19 Ndũkanetĩkĩrie mũthuuri wa kanitha athitangwo
1Timothy5:20 Andũ arĩa maikaraga makĩĩhagia-rĩ
1Timothy5:21 Ndakwĩra atĩrĩ na ma ndĩ mbere ya Ngai
1Timothy5:22 Ndũkahiũhage kũigĩrĩra mũndũ moko
1Timothy5:23 Tiga kũnyuuaga o maaĩ matheri
1Timothy5:24 Mehia ma andũ amwe nĩmeyonanĩtie
1Timothy5:25 O ũndũ ũmwe
1Timothy6:1 Nĩ kwagĩrĩire andũ arĩa ngombo
1Timothy6:2 Arĩa marĩ na aathani metĩkĩtie matikamaime gĩtĩĩo nĩ ũndũ wa gũkorwo atĩ nĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe wao. Handũ ha ũguo
1Timothy6:3 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩrutana ũrutani wa maheeni na akorwo ndetĩkanĩtie na ũrutani ũrĩa mwega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ na ũrutani ũrĩa wa kwĩyamũrĩra Ngai-rĩ
1Timothy6:4 mũndũ ũcio nĩ mwĩtĩĩi na ndarĩ ũndũ oĩ. Ũcio endete o ngarari itarĩ kĩguni na njũgitano ikoniĩ ciugo iria irehaga ũiru
1Timothy6:5 na kũgiana gũtathiraga gatagatĩ ka andũ arĩa marĩ meciiria mooru
1Timothy6:6 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy6:7 Nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ kĩndũ twarehire gũkũ thĩ
1Timothy6:8 No tũngĩgĩa na irio
1Timothy6:9 Andũ arĩa mendaga gũtonga-rĩ
1Timothy6:10 Tondũ kwenda mbeeca nĩkĩo kĩhumo kĩa mĩthemba yothe ya ũũru. Andũ amwe nĩ ũndũ wa kwenda mbeeca mũno-rĩ
1Timothy6:11 No wee mũndũ wa Ngai-rĩ
1Timothy6:12 Rũaga mbaara ĩrĩa njega ya wĩtĩkio. Rũmia ũhoro wa muoyo wa tene na tene o ũrĩa wetĩirwo rĩrĩa woimbũrire wega wĩtĩkio waku mbere ya aira aingĩ.
1Timothy6:13 Ningĩ ndĩ mbere ya Ngai
1Timothy6:14 ũrũmagie rĩathani rĩu wathĩtwo narĩo ũtarĩ na kĩmeni kana ũcuuke nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ akoonanio
1Timothy6:15 ũrĩa Ngai akoonania ihinda rĩake rĩakinya. Ngai ũcio-rĩ
1Timothy6:16 Ningĩ nowe wiki ũtũũraga muoyo ũrĩa ũtathiraga
1Timothy6:17 Athaga andũ arĩa itonga gũkũ thĩ ĩno tũrĩ matigage kwĩgaatha kana kũiga mwĩhoko wao harĩ thĩinĩ wa ũtonga ũcio ũtamenyagĩrwo
1Timothy6:18 Maathe mekage wega
1Timothy6:19 Meka ũguo nĩmarĩĩigagĩra kĩgĩĩna kĩao ene kĩrĩ mũthingi mũrũmu nĩ ũndũ wa mahinda marĩa magooka
1Timothy6:20 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Timothy6:21 Andũ amwe metĩkĩtie atĩ marĩ na ũmenyo ũcio nĩmatũgũũgĩte na makoima wĩtĩkio-inĩ. Wega wa Ngai ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.
2Timothy1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
2Timothy1:2 Ndakwandĩkĩra wee Timotheo
2Timothy1:3 Nĩnjookagĩria Ngai ngaatho
2Timothy1:4 Nĩndĩĩriragĩria mũno gũkuona
2Timothy1:5 Nĩndirikanĩtio ũhoro wa wĩtĩkio waku ũrĩa ũtarĩ ũhinga
2Timothy1:6 Nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi gĩkĩ nĩngũkũririkania atĩ ũhuhagĩrĩrie kĩheo kĩrĩa ũheetwo nĩ Ngai
2Timothy1:7 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ndaatũheire roho wa gũtwĩkagĩra guoya
2Timothy1:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũkanaconoke ũkiumbũra ũira wa Mwathani witũ
2Timothy1:9 Ngai nĩwe watũhonokirie na agĩtwĩtĩra mũtũũrĩre mũtheru
2Timothy1:10 no wega ũcio rĩu nĩũguũranĩirio nĩ ũndũ wa kuonekana kwa Mũhonokia witũ
2Timothy1:11 Na nĩ ũndũ wa Ũhoro-ũcio-Mwega-rĩ
2Timothy1:12 Ũhoro ũcio nĩguo ũtũmĩte nyamarĩke ũguo. No ndiconokaga
2Timothy1:13 Rũmia ũhoro ũrĩa waiguire kuuma kũrĩ niĩ
2Timothy1:14 Menyerera ũndũ ũrĩa mwega ũrĩa wehokeirwo
2Timothy1:15 Wee nĩũĩ atĩ andũ othe thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Asia nĩmandiganĩirie
2Timothy1:16 Mwathani aroiguĩra andũ a nyũmba ya Onesiforo tha tondũ aananyamarũra kaingĩ na ndaconokire nĩ ũndũ wakwa kuohwo na mĩnyororo.
2Timothy1:17 Nowe
2Timothy1:18 Mwathani aroĩtĩkĩra atĩ akaaiguĩrwo tha nĩ Mwathani mũthenya ũcio wakinya! Wee nĩũĩ wega mũno ũrĩa aandeithirie na njĩra nyingĩ rĩrĩa ndaarĩ Efeso.
2Timothy2:1 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo
2Timothy2:2 Namo maũndũ marĩa waiguire ngĩaria mbere ya aira aingĩ-rĩ
2Timothy2:3 Ũmĩrĩria gũthĩĩnĩka hamwe na ithuĩ ta ũrĩ mũthigari mwega wa Kristũ Jesũ.
2Timothy2:4 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrutaga wĩra wa mũthigari ũngĩĩohania na maũndũ matarĩ ma ũũthigari: we endaga o gũkenia mũnene wake ũrĩa ũmwathaga.
2Timothy2:5 Ũguo no taguo
2Timothy2:6 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Timothy2:7 Cũranagia maũndũ marĩa ndĩroiga
2Timothy2:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Timothy2:9 Ũhoro ũcio nĩguo niĩ nyariiragĩrwo o nginya ngohwo na mĩnyororo ta ndĩ mũgeri ngero. No kiugo kĩa Ngai ti kĩohe.
2Timothy2:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Timothy2:11 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩ wa kwĩhokeka
2Timothy2:12 na tũngĩkirĩrĩria-rĩ
2Timothy2:13 na tũngĩaga kwĩhokeka
2Timothy2:14 Ririkanagia andũ maũndũ macio. Makaanagie ũrĩ mbere ya Ngai nĩguo matige gũkararanĩria ndeto itarĩ kĩene; ndeto icio itirĩ kĩguni
2Timothy2:15 Geria mũno wĩonanagie harĩ Ngai wĩ mwĩtĩkĩrĩku
2Timothy2:16 Ehagĩrĩra mĩario ĩtarĩ ya gwĩtigĩra Ngai
2Timothy2:17 Ũrutani wao ũtheaga ta kĩronda kĩa ndĩĩra. Amwe ao nĩ Humenayo
2Timothy2:18 arĩa maturuurĩte na magatiga ũhoro wa ma. Moigaga atĩ ũhoro wa kũriũka nĩũrĩkĩtie kũhĩtũka
2Timothy2:19 No rĩrĩ
2Timothy2:20 Thĩinĩ wa nyũmba yothe nene-rĩ
2Timothy2:21 Mũndũ angĩĩtheria kuuma kũrĩ maũndũ macio matangĩtĩĩka
2Timothy2:22 Na rĩrĩ
2Timothy2:23 Reganaga na ngarari cia ũrimũ na cia ũkĩĩgu
2Timothy2:24 Nayo ndungata ya Ngai ndĩagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũtuĩka ya ngũĩ; handũ ha ũguo
2Timothy2:25 Ningĩ arutage arĩa mamũkararagia ahooreire
2Timothy2:26 na atĩ matuĩke a gwĩcookera
2Timothy3:1 No rĩrĩ
2Timothy3:2 Andũ magaatuĩka eyendi
2Timothy3:3 Ningĩ makorwo matarĩ na wendani
2Timothy3:4 na andũ mendaga gũkunyanĩra andũ arĩa angĩ
2Timothy3:5 Andũ acio metuaga ta meyamũrĩire Ngai no nĩmakaanaga hinya wake. Wĩthemage andũ ta acio.
2Timothy3:6 Acio nĩo arĩa matoonyagĩrĩra nyũmba ciene na makaguucagĩrĩria andũ-a-nja arĩa ahũthũ ngoro
2Timothy3:7 Andũ-a-nja acio nĩmerutaga ũndũ mwerũ hĩndĩ ciothe
2Timothy3:8 O ta ũrĩa Janne na Jambare maakararirie Musa-rĩ
2Timothy3:9 No rĩrĩ
2Timothy3:10 No wee-rĩ
2Timothy3:11 na kũnyariirwo gwakwa
2Timothy3:12 Ti-itherũ
2Timothy3:13 No andũ arĩa aaganu na arĩa aheenania nĩmarĩkĩragĩrĩria kwagana
2Timothy3:14 No wee-rĩ
2Timothy3:15 na ũrĩa wamenyire Maandĩko marĩa matheru kuuma rĩrĩa warĩ kaana
2Timothy3:16 Ũhoro wothe ũrĩa wandĩkĩtwo Maandĩko-inĩ wekĩrirwo thĩinĩ wa mũwandĩki nĩ Ngai
2Timothy3:17 nĩgeetha mũndũ wa Ngai akoragwo arĩ mũkinyanĩru
2Timothy4:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Timothy4:2 Hunjagia Ũhoro wa Ngai; ikaraga wĩhaarĩirie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire na ĩrĩa ĩtagĩrĩire; ningĩ rũithagĩria andũ mahĩtia mao
2Timothy4:3 Nĩgũkorwo ihinda nĩrĩgooka rĩrĩa andũ makaaregana na ũrutani ũrĩa wagĩrĩire. No nĩguo mahingie merirĩria mao-rĩ
2Timothy4:4 Nĩmakahũgũra matũ mao matige kũigua ũhoro wa ma
2Timothy4:5 No wee-rĩ
2Timothy4:6 Nĩgũkorwo nĩnyambĩrĩirie gũitwo thĩ ta iruta rĩa kũnyuuo
2Timothy4:7 Nĩndũĩte mbaara ĩrĩa njega
2Timothy4:8 Rĩu nĩnjigĩirwo thũmbĩ ĩrĩa ya ũthingu
2Timothy4:9 Geria mũno o ũrĩa wahota ũũke kũrĩ niĩ na ihenya
2Timothy4:10 nĩgũkorwo Dema
2Timothy4:11 Luka nowe tũrĩ nake gũkũ. Oya Mariko mũũke nake
2Timothy4:12 Nĩndatũmire Tukiko kũu Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Ũgĩũka-rĩ
2Timothy4:14 Alekisandero ũrĩa mũturi wa indo cia rũthuku nĩanjĩkire ũũru mũno. Mwathani nĩwe ũkaamũrĩha kũringana na ciĩko ciake.
2Timothy4:15 O nawe mwĩmenyerere
2Timothy4:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaciirithirio rĩa mbere-rĩ
2Timothy4:17 No Mwathani nĩarũgamire na niĩ na akĩnjĩkĩra hinya
2Timothy4:18 Mwathani nĩakahonokia ũũru-inĩ o wothe
2Timothy4:19 Geithia Pirisila na Akula
2Timothy4:20 Erasito aatigirwo Korinitho
2Timothy4:21 Geria ũkinye gũkũ mbere ya ihinda rĩa heho. Nĩwageithio nĩ Eubulu
2Timothy4:22 Mwathani aroikaria roho waku. Wega wa Ngai ũroikara hamwe nawe.
Titus1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
Titus1:2 na nĩguo wĩtĩkio na ũmenyo iria irĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩa muoyo wa tene na tene
Titus1:3 Narĩo ihinda rĩake rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire rĩakinya
Titus1:4 Ndĩrakwandĩkĩra marũa maya wee Tito
Titus1:5 Atĩrĩrĩ Tito
Titus1:6 Mũthuuri wa kanitha aagĩrĩirwo akorwo atarĩ na ũcuuke
Titus1:7 Kuona atĩ mũrori wa maũndũ ma kanitha nĩmwĩhokere wĩra wa Ngai
Titus1:8 Nĩ kaba akorwo arĩ mũndũ ũũĩ gũtugana
Titus1:9 Ningĩ no nginya arũmagie ũhoro ũrĩa wa kwĩhokeka
Titus1:10 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kũrĩ andũ aingĩ aremi
Titus1:11 Andũ acio no nginya makirio
Titus1:12 O na mũnabii ũmwe wao nĩoigĩte atĩrĩ
Titus1:13 Ũira ũcio nĩ wa ma. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Titus1:14 na nĩguo matikarũmbũyagie ngʼano cia Ayahudi kana mawatho ma andũ arĩa mareganaga na ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma.
Titus1:15 Kũrĩ andũ arĩa marĩ meciiria matheru
Titus1:16 Kuuga nĩmoigaga atĩ nĩmooĩ Ngai
Titus2:1 No wee-rĩ
Titus2:2 Rutaga athuuri arĩa akũrũ maikarage matarĩ arĩĩu
Titus2:3 O nao atumia arĩa akũrũ marutage gũikaraga na mĩikarĩre ya ũtheru
Titus2:4 nĩgeetha mahote kũruta atumia arĩa ethĩ kwenda athuuri ao na ciana ciao
Titus2:5 na matuĩke a kwĩgirĩrĩria merirĩria ma mwĩrĩ
Titus2:6 O ta ũguo-rĩ
Titus2:7 Maũndũ-inĩ mothe
Titus2:8 o na waragie ciugo iria ciagĩrĩire
Titus2:9 Taaraga ngombo atĩ ciathĩkagĩre aathani a cio maũndũ-inĩ mothe
Titus2:10 na itikamaiyage indo ciao
Titus2:11 Nĩ ũndũ wega wa Ngai ũrĩa ũrehaga ũhonokio nĩũguũranĩirio kũrĩ andũ othe.
Titus2:12 Wega ũcio wa Ngai nĩguo ũtũrutaga kũregana na maũndũ marĩa matarĩ ma kwĩyamũrĩra Ngai
Titus2:13 o tũgĩetagĩrĩra kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩrĩa kĩrĩ na kĩrathimo
Titus2:14 Nake nĩwe werutire nĩ ũndũ witũ
Titus2:15 Rĩu-rĩ
Titus3:1 Ririkanagia andũ acio atĩ maathĩkagĩre anene na arĩa maathanaga
Titus3:2 ningĩ matikae gũcambia mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Titus3:3 Nĩ ũndũ hĩndĩ ĩmwe-rĩ
Titus3:4 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũtugi wa Ngai Mũhonokia witũ na wendo ũrĩa atwendete naguo ciaguũranĩirio-rĩ
Titus3:5 nĩatũhonokirie
Titus3:6 ũrĩa aatũitĩrĩirie na ũtaana nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ Kristũ Mũhonokia witũ
Titus3:7 nĩgeetha twatuuo athingu nĩ ũndũ wa wega wake
Titus3:8 Ũhoro ũcio nĩ wa kwĩhokeka. Na ngũkĩenda waragie maũndũ maya ũgwatĩirie
Titus3:9 No rĩrĩ
Titus3:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtũmaga kũgĩe na nyamũkano-rĩ
Titus3:11 Wagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmenya atĩ mũndũ ta ũcio nĩ mwaganu na nĩ mwĩhia; nake we mwene nĩetuĩrĩire ciira.
Titus3:12 Ndaarĩkia gũtũma Aritema kana Tukiko kũrĩwe
Titus3:13 Ĩka ũrĩa wothe ũngĩhota ũteithie Zena ũrĩa wakiri
Titus3:14 Nao andũ aitũ nĩmemenyerie kũrutaga mawĩra marĩa mega
Titus3:15 Andũ arĩa othe tũrĩ nao nĩmamũgeithia. Geithia andũ arĩa othe matwendete thĩinĩ wa wĩtĩkio. Wega wa Ngai ũrogĩa na inyuĩ inyuothe.
Philemon1:1 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ
Philemon1:2 na kũrĩ mwarĩ wa Ithe witũ Apufia
Philemon1:3 Mũrogĩa na wega na thayũ kuuma kũrĩ Ngai Ithe witũ
Philemon1:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
Philemon1:5 tondũ nĩnjiguaga ũhoro wa wĩtĩkio waku thĩinĩ wa Mwathani Jesũ
Philemon1:6 Nĩhooyaga atĩ ũgĩe na kĩyo rĩrĩa ũkũgwatanĩra nao ũhoro wa wĩtĩkio waku
Philemon1:7 Wendani waku nĩũheete gĩkeno kĩnene mũno na ũkanyũmĩrĩria
Philemon1:8 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Philemon1:9 nĩ kaba ngũthaithe ũwĩke nĩ ũndũ wa wendo. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Philemon1:10 ngũgĩgũthaitha nĩ ũndũ wa mũrũ wakwa Onesimo
Philemon1:11 Mbere ĩyo ndaarĩ kĩene kũrĩwe
Philemon1:12 Nake nĩngũmũcookia kũrĩwe
Philemon1:13 Nĩingĩrendire gũikara nake
Philemon1:14 No ndiendire gwĩka ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wee ũtetĩkĩrĩte
Philemon1:15 No gũkorwo gĩtũmi gĩa akweherere kahinda kanini-rĩ
Philemon1:16 no ndagacooke arĩ o ngombo
Philemon1:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio angĩkorwo nĩũtuaga tũrĩ rũmwe nawe-rĩ
Philemon1:18 Nake angĩkorwo nĩagwĩkĩte ũũru o na ũrĩkũ
Philemon1:19 Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ ndĩrakwandĩkĩra na guoko gwakwa mwene. Nĩngakũrĩha thiirĩ ũcio
Philemon1:20 Atĩrĩrĩ
Philemon1:21 Ndakwandĩkĩra marũa maya ndĩhokete atĩ ndũngĩaga kũnjathĩkĩra
Philemon1:22 Hamwe na ũguo-rĩ
Philemon1:23 Epafara
Philemon1:24 O na Mariko
Philemon1:25 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesũ Kristũ ũrogĩa na roho waku.
Hebrews1:1 Matukũ-inĩ ma tene Ngai nĩarĩirie maithe maitũ na tũnua twa anabii maita maingĩ
Hebrews1:2 no matukũ-inĩ maya ma kũrigĩrĩria-rĩ
Hebrews1:3 Mũrũwe-rĩ
Hebrews1:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtuĩka mũnene gũkĩra araika
Hebrews1:5 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews1:6 Na ningĩ-rĩ
Hebrews1:7 Akĩaria ũhoro wa araika oigire atĩrĩ
Hebrews1:8 No ha ũhoro ũkoniĩ Mũriũ ekuuga atĩrĩ
Hebrews1:9 Wee wendete ũthingu no ũgathũũra waganu; nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Hebrews1:10 Ningĩ akoiga atĩrĩ
Hebrews1:11 Icio nĩgũthira igaathira
Hebrews1:12 Ũgaacikũnja o ta ũrĩa nguo ndaaya ikũnjagwo; ikaagarũrũka o ta ũrĩa nguo igarũrũkaga. No wee ndũgarũrũkaga
Hebrews1:13 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews1:14 Githĩ araika othe ti maroho ma gũtungata
Hebrews2:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Hebrews2:2 Tondũ-rĩ
Hebrews2:3 tũngĩkĩaga atĩa kũherithio tũngĩnyarara ũhonokio mũnene ũũ? Ũhonokio ũyũ
Hebrews2:4 Ningĩ Ngai agĩĩkĩra ũhoro ũyũ ũira atĩ nĩ wa ma na ũndũ wa kuonania marũũri na morirũ
Hebrews2:5 Thĩ ĩrĩa tũkwaria ũhoro wayo
Hebrews2:6 No nĩ harĩ mũndũ mũna ũheanĩte ũira handũ hamwe akoiga atĩrĩ: “Mũndũ akĩrĩ kĩ tondũ ũikaraga ũkĩmwĩciiragia
Hebrews2:7 Watũmire atigie o hanini aiganane na araika
Hebrews2:8 na ũkĩiga indo ciothe rungu rwa magũrũ make aciathage.” Nake akĩiga indo ciothe rungu rwa mũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews2:9 No tuonaga Jesũ
Hebrews2:10 Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwagĩrĩire atĩ Ngai
Hebrews2:11 Jesũ ũrĩa ũtũmaga andũ matuĩke atheru
Hebrews2:12 Akoiga atĩrĩ
Hebrews2:13 Ningĩ akoiga atĩrĩ
Hebrews2:14 Kuona atĩ ciana icio irĩ na mwĩrĩ na thakame-rĩ
Hebrews2:15 na ohore arĩa matũire mohetwo ũkombo-inĩ matukũ mao mothe nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra gĩkuũ.
Hebrews2:16 Nĩgũkorwo ti-itherũ ti araika ateithagia
Hebrews2:17 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio no nginya angĩahaananirio na ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe maũndũ-inĩ mothe
Hebrews2:18 Nĩgũkorwo we mwene nĩathĩĩnĩkire rĩrĩa aageragio-rĩ
